Genesis1:1 E rile mo tshimologong Modimo wa tlhola legodimo le lefatshe. 
Genesis1:2 Lefatshe la bo le tobekanye fela, go sa itsege sepe; mme lefifi la bo le ntse fa godimo ga boteng. Mowa wa Modimo wa elama fa godimo ga metsi." 
Genesis1:3 Modimo wa re: “A go nne lesedi.” Ga nna lesedi. 
Genesis1:4 Modimo wa bona lesedi fa le le molemo; mme Modimo wa farologanya lesedi mo lefifing. 
Genesis1:5 Modimo wa raya lesedi leina wa re: “Motshegare”; mme lefifi wa le raya leina wa re: “Bosigo”, mme ga nna maitseboa, ga ba ga nna moso, letsatsi le le lengwe fela." 
Genesis1:6 Modimo wa re: “A go nne phuthologo fa gare ga metsi, e farologanye metsi le metsi.”" 
Genesis1:7 Modimo wa dira phuthologo, wa farologanya metsi a a kwa tlase ga phuthologo le metsi a a kwa godimo ga phuthologo; ga nna jalo." 
Genesis1:8 Modimo wa raya phuthologo leina, wa re “Legodimo”. Ga nna maitseboa, ga ba ga nna moso, letsatsi la bobedi." 
Genesis1:9 Modimo wa re: “A metsi a a kwa tlase ga legodimo a phuthegele felo go le gongwe, komelelo ya lefatshe e bonale.” Ga nna jalo." 
Genesis1:10 Modimo wa raya komelelo leina wa re “Lefatshe”; phuthegelo ya metsi wa e raya leina wa re: “Mawatle”. Modimo wa bona fa go le molemo. 
Genesis1:11 Modimo wa re: “A lefatshe le tlhoge bojang, morogo o o tsalang peo, le setlhare sa loungo se se ungwang ka fa losikeng lwa sone, se peo ya sone e leng mo teng ga lone mo lefatsheng.” Ga nna jalo." 
Genesis1:12 Lefatshe la tlhoga bojang, morogo o o tsalang peo ka fa losikeng lwa one, le setlhare se se ungwang loungo lo peo ya sone e leng mo teng ga lone, ka fa losikeng lwa sone. Modimo wa bona fa go le molemo." 
Genesis1:13 Ga nna maitseboa, ga ba ga nna moso, letsatsi la boraro." 
Genesis1:14 Modimo wa re: “A go nne masedi mo phuthologong ya legodimo go farologanya motshegare le bosigo, a nne sesupo sa dipaka, le go nna malatsi le dingwaga." 
Genesis1:15 A nne masedi mo phuthologong ya legodimo, go bonesa lefatshe.” Ga nna jalo." 
Genesis1:16 Modimo wa dira masedi a magolo a mabedi: lesedi le legolo gore le laole motshegare, le lesedi le lebotlana gore le laole bosigo; wa dira le dinaledi." 
Genesis1:17 Modimo wa a tlhoma mo phuthologong ya legodimo gore a bonese lefatshe. 
Genesis1:18 Le gore a laole motshegare le bosigo, le go farologanya lesedi le lefifi; Modimo wa bona fa go le molemo." 
Genesis1:19 Ga nna maitseboa, ga ba ga nna moso, letsatsi la bone." 
Genesis1:20 Modimo wa re: “A metsi a nyeudise thata dibopiwa tse di tsamayang, tse di nang le botshelo; a dinonyane di fofe fa godimo ga lefatshe, mo phuthologong e e atlhameng ya legodimo.”" 
Genesis1:21 Modimo wa tlhola maruarua a magolo a lewatle, le dibopiwa dingwe le dingwe tse di tshelang tse metsi a di nyeudisang thata, ka fa ditshikeng tsa tsone; le nonyane, nngwe le nngwe e e diphuka, ka fa losikeng lwa yone. Modimo wa bona fa go le molemo." 
Genesis1:22 Modimo wa di segofatsa, wa re: “Atang, lo ntsifale, lo tlale ka metsi a a mo mawatleng; le dinonyane di ntsifale mo lefatsheng.”" 
Genesis1:23 Ga nna maitseboa, ga ba ga nna moso, letsatsi la botlhano." 
Genesis1:24 Modimo wa re: “A lefatshe le ntshe dibopiwa tse di tshedileng ka fa ditshikeng tsa tsone: diruiwa, le tse di gagabang, le diphologolo le dibatana tsa lefatshe ka fa ditshikeng tsa tsone.” Ga nna jalo." 
Genesis1:25 Modimo wa dira diphologolo le dibatana tsa lefatshe ka fa ditshikeng tsa tsone, le diruiwa ka fa ditshikeng tsa tsone, le sengwe le sengwe se se gagabang fa fatshe, ka fa losikeng lwa sone. Modimo wa bona fa go le molemo." 
Genesis1:26 Modimo wa re: “A re direng motho mo setshwanong sa rona, ee, ka fa setshwanong sa rona; le gone a a laole ditlhapi tsa lewatle, le dinonyane tsa loapi, le dikgomo, le lefatshe lotlhe, le sengwe le sengwe se se gagabang fa fatshe.”" 
Genesis1:27 Modimo wa tlhola motho mo setshwanong sa one tota, wa mo tlhola mo setshwanong sa Modimo; wa ba tlhola nona le tshadi." 
Genesis1:28 Modimo wa ba segofatsa; Modimo wa ba raya wa re: “Atang, lo ntsifale lo tlale ka lefatshe, lo le fenye, lo laole ditlhapi tsa lewatle, le dinonyane tsa loapi, le sengwe le sengwe se se tshedileng se se tsamayang mo lefatsheng.”" 
Genesis1:29 Modimo wa re: “Bonang, ke lo neile morogo mongwe le mongwe o o tsalang peo, o o mo lefatsheng lotlhe, le setlhare sengwe le sengwe se se nang le loungo lwa setlhare lo lo ntshang peo; e tlaa nna dijo tsa lona." 
Genesis1:30 Le phologolo nngwe le nngwe le dibatana tsa lefatshe, le nonyane nngwe le nngwe ya loapi, le sengwe le sengwe se se gagabang fa fatshe se botshelo bo leng mo go sone, ke di neile morogo mongwe le mongwe o motala go nna dijo.” Ga nna jalo." 
Genesis1:31 Modimo wa bona sengwe le sengwe se o se dirileng, mme bonang, ga bo go le molemo thata. Ga nna maitseboa, ga ba ga nna moso, letsatsi la borataro." 
Genesis2:1 Legodimo le lefatshe tsa wediwa, le dilo tsotlhe tse di mo go tsone." 
Genesis2:2 E rile ka letsatsi la bosupa, Modimo wa wetsa tiro ya one e o e dirileng; wa ikhutsa ka letsatsi la bosupa mo tirong yotlhe ya one e o e dirileng." 
Genesis2:3 Modimo wa segofatsa letsatsi la bosupa, wa le itshepisa, gonne mo go lone o ne wa ikhutsa mo tirong yotlhe ya one, e Modimo o e tlhodileng wa e dira." 
Genesis2:4 Tse, ke tsone ditshimologo tsa legodimo le tsa lefatshe, jale ka di tlholwa, ka motlha o Jehofa Modimo o dirileng lefatshe le legodimo ka one." 
Genesis2:5 Go ne go ise go nne le setlhatshana sepe sa naga mo lefatsheng, le gone go ne go ise go tlhoge morogo ope wa naga, gonne Jehofa Modimo o ne a ise a nese pula mo lefatsheng, e bile go ne go se na motho ope yo o ka lemang lefatshe." 
Genesis2:6 Ga tlhatloga mouwane mo lefatsheng wa nosa mmu otlhe. 
Genesis2:7 Jehofa Modimo a bopa motho ka lorole lwa mmu, a budulela mowa wa botshelo mo dinkong tsa gagwe; motho a direga mowa o o tshedileng." 
Genesis2:8 Jehofa Modimo a baya tshimo ka fa ntlheng ya botlhabatsatsi, mo Etene, a baya gone motho yo o mmopileng." 
Genesis2:9 Jehofa Modimo a medisa mo mmung setlhare sengwe le sengwe se se kgatlhang mo matlhong, le se se molemo go jewa; setlhare sa botshelo le sone fa gare ga tshimo, le setlhare sa kitso ya molemo le bosula." 
Genesis2:10 Noka ya tswa mo Etene e ya go nosa tshimo; ya re e tswa gone ya kgaogana, ya nna maphata a le mane." 
Genesis2:11 Leina la ya ntlha ke Pišone: Ke yone e e potologang lefatshe lotlhe la Hafila, kwa gouta e gone." 
Genesis2:12 Gouta ya lefatshe leo e molemo; go bile go na le beteleuma, le majana a berule." 
Genesis2:13 Leina la noka ya bobedi ke Gihone; ke yone e potologang lefatshe lotlhe la Kuše. 
Genesis2:14 Leina la noka ya boraro ke Hitekele: eo ke yone e e potang lefatshe la Asiria ka fa botlhabatsatsi, noka ya bone ke Euferatese." 
Genesis2:15 Jehofa Modimo a tsaya monna, a mmaya mo tshimong ya Etene, go e baakanya le go e lebelela." 
Genesis2:16 Jehofa Modimo a laola monna a re: “O ka ja fela setlhare sengwe le sengwe sa tshimo ka go rata; 
Genesis2:17 mme setlhare sa kitso ya molemo le bosula, sone o se ka wa se ja gonne ka tsatsi le o jang ga sone ruri o tlaa swa.”" 
Genesis2:18 Jehofa Modimo a re: “Ga go molemo fa monna a ka nna a le esi; ke tlaa mo direla thuso e e mo lebanyeng.” 
Genesis2:19 Ke gone ka moo phologolo nngwe le nngwe ya naga le nonyane nngwe le nngwe ya loapi Jehofa Modimo a di bopa ka mmu, a di isa kwa monneng, go bona ka fa o tlaa di rayang maina ka gone. Leina le monna o le reileng sebopiwa sengwe le sengwe se se tshedileng, ya nna lone leina la sone." 
Genesis2:20 Monna a raya dikgomo tsotlhe maina, le dinonyane tsa loapi, le phologolo nngwe le nngwe ya naga; mme Atame ene ga se ka ga bonwa thuso e e mo lebanyeng." 
Genesis2:21 Jehofa Modimo a thulametsa monna ka boroko jo bogolo, mme a thulamela. Mme a ntsha logopo longwe lwa gagwe, a kopanya nama mo boemong jwa lone." 
Genesis2:22 Logopo lo Jehofa Modimo o lo ntshitseng mo monneng, a lo dira mosadi, mme a mo isa kwa monneng." 
Genesis2:23 Monna a re: “Jaana yo, ke lesapo la marapo a me, le nama ya nama ya me; o tlaa bidiwa Mosadi, ka a ntshitswe mo Monneng.”" 
Genesis2:24 Ke gone ka moo monna o tlaa tlogelang rraagwe le mmaagwe, o tlaa ngaparela mosadi wa gagwe; mme ba tlaa nna nama e le nngwe fela." 
Genesis2:25 Monna le mosadi wa gagwe ba bo ba sa ikatega, ka bobedi jwa bone; ba bo ba se na ditlhong." 
Genesis3:1 Jaana noga ya bo e le boferefere bogolo go ditshedi tsotlhe tsa naga tse Jehofa Modimo o di dirileng. Ya raya mosadi ya re: “Kana, a ruri Modimo o rile: ‘Lo se ka lwaa ja ditlhare tsa tshimo’?”" 
Genesis3:2 Mosadi a raya noga a re: “Re ka ja loungo lwa ditlhare tsa tshimo; 
Genesis3:3 mme loungo lwa setlhare se se fa gare ga tshimo, Modimo o rile: ‘Lo se ka lwa lo ja, le gone lo se ka lwa lo ama, lo ka tla lwaa swa.’ ”" 
Genesis3:4 Noga ya raya mosadi ya re: “Ruri ga lo ketla loo swa; 
Genesis3:5 gonne Modimo o a itse gore, e tlaa re mo letsatsing le lo lo jang, foo matlho a lona a tlaa buduloga, mme lo tlaa nna jaaka Modimo, lo itse molemo le bosula.”" 
Genesis3:6 Mosadi a re a bona fa setlhare se le molemo go jewa, se bile se kgatlha mo matlhong, le gone fa setlhare se eletsega go tlhalefisa motho, a tsaya loungo lwa sone, a ja. A ba a lo naya monna wa gagwe a na nae, le ene a ja." 
Genesis3:7 Ka tshoganetso matlho a bone boo babedi a buduloga, ba itemoga fa ba sa ikatega; mme ba rokaganya matlhare a mofeige, ba itirela diaparo." 
Genesis3:8 Kgantele ba utlwa mokgwasa wa Jehofa Modimo a tsamaya mo tshimong, fa letsatsi le fefa, mme monna le mosadi wa gagwe ba iphitlha mo ditlhareng tsa tshimo, ba iphitlhela go bonala ga Jehofa Modimo." 
Genesis3:9 Jehofa Modimo a bitsa monna, a mo raya a re: “O fa kae?”" 
Genesis3:10 Monna a re: “Ke utlwile mokgwasa wa gago mo tshimong, mme ka boifa, ka gobo ke ne ke sa ikatega, mme ka iphitlha.”" 
Genesis3:11 Mme a re: “O boleletswe e mang fa o sa ikatega? A o jele setlhare se ke se go laetseng, ka re, o se ka wa se ja?”" 
Genesis3:12 Monna a re: “Mosadi yo o mo nneileng gore ke nne nae, ke ene yo o nneileng ga setlhare, mme ka ja.”" 
Genesis3:13 Jehofa Modimo a raya mosadi a re: “Ke eng se o se dirileng?” Mosadi a re: “Noga e ntsieditse, mme ka ja.”" 
Genesis3:14 Jehofa Modimo a raya noga a re: “E re ka o dirile seo se, o hutsegile bogolo go dikgomo tsotlhe le diphologolo le dibatana tsa naga. O tlaa gopa ka mpa, o tlaa ja lorole ka malatsi otlhe a botshelo jwa gago." 
Genesis3:15 Ke tlaa tsenya bobaba fa gare ga gago le mosadi, le fa gare ga losika lwa gago le losika lwa gagwe. Lone lo tlaa tapeta tlhogo ya gago, mme wena o tlaa loma serethe sa gagwe.”" 
Genesis3:16 A raya mosadi a re: “Ke tlaa go ntsifaletsa matshwenyego a go ima ga gago. O tlaa belega bana ka bohutsana; keletso ya gago e tlaa nna kwa monneng wa gago, mme o tlaa go laola.”" 
Genesis3:17 A raya Atame a re: “E re ka o reeditse lentswe la mosadi wa gago, o jele ga setlhare se ke se go laetseng ka re: ‘O se ka wa se ja,’ mmu o hutsegile ka ntlha ya gago. O tlaa ja ga one ka letsapa, malatsi otlhe a botshelo jwa gago." 
Genesis3:18 O tlaa go tswela mitlwa le mofero. O tlaa ja merogo ya naga. 
Genesis3:19 O tlaa ja dijo ka mofufutso wa sefatlhogo sa gago go fitlhelela o boele mo mmung, gonne o ntshitswe mo go one. Gonne o lorole, mme o tlaa boela mo loroleng.”" 
Genesis3:20 Monna a raya mosadi wa gagwe leina a re Efa, ka gobo e le mmabatshedi botlhe." 
Genesis3:21 Jehofa Modimo a direla Atame le mosadi wa gagwe diaparo tsa matlalo, a ba apesa." 
Genesis3:22 Jehofa Modimo a re: “Bonang, motho o diregile jaaka mongwe wa rona, o itse molemo le bosula; jaanong e ka tla ya re gongwe a ntsha seatla sa gagwe a tsaya le ga sone setlhare sa botshelo, a ja, a tshela ka bosenabokhutlo.”" 
Genesis3:23 Ke gone ka moo Jehofa Modimo a mo ntsha mo tshimong ya Etene, a ya go lema mmu o a ntshitsweng mo go one." 
Genesis3:24 Jalo a lelekela motho kwa ntle; kwa ntlheng ya botlhabatsatsi ga tshimo ya Etene a baya ditšheruba, le kgabo ya tšhaka e e tukang, e kgadikanela ntlheng tsotlhe, go thiba tsela e e yang setlhareng sa botshelo." 
Genesis4:1 Monna a itse Efa mosadi wa gagwe; a nna moimana a bona Kaine, a re: “Ke bonye monna ka thuso ya ga Jehofa.”" 
Genesis4:2 Gape a bona Abele, monnawe. Abele e ne e le modisa wa dinku, Kaine e le molemi." 
Genesis4:3 E rile motlha mongwe Kaine a tlisa ga loungo lwa mmu, a direla Jehofa tshupelo." 
Genesis4:4 Abele, le ene a tlisa ga maitibolo a letsomane la gagwe, a na le mahura a lone. Mme Jehofa a itumelela Abele le tshupelo ya gagwe;" 
Genesis4:5 a se ka a itumelela Kaine le tshupelo ya gagwe. Jalo Kaine a nna bogale thata, le sefatlhogo sa gagwe sa befa." 
Genesis4:6 Jehofa a raya Kaine a re: “Ana o galefetseng? Le sefatlhogo sa gago se befetseng? 
Genesis4:7 A ga ke re fa o dira sentle o tlaa amogelesega? Mme fa o sa dire sentle, boleo bo ipobile fa mojakong; mme keletso ya jone e tlaa nna mo go wena, mme wena o bo laole.”" 
Genesis4:8 Kaine a bua le Abele, monnawe. Mme ga dirala ya re ba le kwa nageng, Kaine a kgomogela Abele monnawe, a mmolaya." 
Genesis4:9 Jehofa a raya Kaine a re: “Abele monnao, o kae?” A araba a re: “Ga ke itse. A ke modisa wa ga nnake?”" 
Genesis4:10 Jehofa a re: “Ana o dirile eng? Lentswe la madi a ga monnao le mpitsa le tswa mo mmung. 
Genesis4:11 Jaanong o hutsitswe ke mmu, o o atlhamolotseng molomo wa one, go tsenya madi a ga monnao, a tswa seatleng sa gago." 
Genesis4:12 E tlaa re o lema mmu, ga o ketla o tlhola o go ntshetsa thata ya one; o tlaa nna mofaladi le mokgarakgatshegi mo lefatsheng.”" 
Genesis4:13 Kaine a raya Jehofa a re: “Petso ya me e feta mo nka go itshokelang. 
Genesis4:14 Bona, gompieno o ntelekile mo lefatsheng, le sefatlhogo sa gago ke tlaa bo ke se fitlhegetse. Ke tlaa nna mofaladi le mokgarakgatshegi mo lefatsheng, mme go tlaa dirala gore mongwe fela yo o mponang a mpolaye.”" 
Genesis4:15 Jehofa a mo raya a re: “Ke gone le fa e le mongwe fela yo o tlaa bolayang Kaine, o tlaa busolosiwa gasupa.” Mme Jehofa a tlhomela Kaine sekao, e se re gongwe mongwe a mmona a mmolaya." 
Genesis4:16 Kaine a tswa fa pele ga Jehofa, a aga mo lefatsheng la Note, go pota Etene ka fa botlhabatsatsi." 
Genesis4:17 Kaine a itse mosadi wa gagwe, a nna moimana, a bona Enoke. A aga motse, a reelela motse leina la ga morwawe, a re ga Enoke." 
Genesis4:18 Enoke a tshola Irate; Irate a tshola Mehujaele; Mehujaele a tsala Methušaele; Methušaele a tsala Lameke. 
Genesis4:19 Lameke a tsaya basadi ba le babedi: leina la mongwe go twe, Ata, le leina la yo mongwe go twe, Sila." 
Genesis4:20 Ata a bona Jabale; ene e ne e le rraabone ba ba nnang mo ditenteng, ba na le dikgomo." 
Genesis4:21 Leina la ga monnawe go ne go twe Jubale, ene e ne e le rra botlhe ba ba letsang harepe le lotlhaka." 
Genesis4:22 Sila, le ene a bona Tubalekaine, e le mothudi wa ditshipi tse di segang, tsa kgotlho le tsa tshipi. Kgaitsadia Tubalekaine e ne e le Naama." 
Genesis4:23 Lameke a raya basadi ba gagwe a re: “Ata le Sila, utlwang lentswe la me: Lona basadi ba ga Lameke, lo reetse puo ya me, gonne ke bolaile monna ka a ne a ntlhabile, le lekau ka le ne le nkgolafaditse." 
Genesis4:24 E ka re fa Kaine a tlaa busolosediwa gasupa, ruri Lameke ene o tlaa busolosediwa gamasome a supa le metso e supa.”" 
Genesis4:25 Atame a itse mosadi wa gagwe gape; mme a bona ngwana wa mosimane, a mo naya leina a re, Sethe. Mosadi a bua a re: “Modimo o ntaoletse losika lo longwe mo boemong jwa ga Abele; gonne Kaine o ne a mmolaile.”" 
Genesis4:26 Sethe le ene a bona ngwana wa mosimane; a mo raya leina, a re, Enoše. Mo lobakeng loo batho ba simolola go bitsa leina la ga Jehofa." 
Genesis5:1 Lo, ke lone lokwalo lwa ditshika tsa ga Atame. Tsatsing le Modimo o tlhodileng motho ka lone, wa mo dira mo setshwanong sa one Modimo." 
Genesis5:2 Wa tlhola nona le tshadi, wa ba segofatsa, wa ba raya leina wa re “Batho” ka letsatsi le ba tlhodilweng ka lone." 
Genesis5:3 Ya re Atame a sena go tshela dinyaga di le 130, a tshola ngwana wa mosimane yo o tshwanang nae, a ntse jaaka setshwano sa gagwe, a mo raya leina a re Sethe." 
Genesis5:4 Atame a re a sena go tshola Sethe, malatsi a gagwe a nna dinyaga di le 800, a tshola tshimane le tshetsana." 
Genesis5:5 Malatsi otlhe a Atame o tshedileng ka one e ne e le dinyaga di le 930, mme a swa." 
Genesis5:6 Sethe a tshela dinyaga di le 105, a tshola Enoše." 
Genesis5:7 Sethe a re a sena go tshola Enoše, a tshela dinyaga di le 807, a tshola tshimane le tshetsana." 
Genesis5:8 Malatsi otlhe a ga Sethe e ne e le dinyaga di le 912, mme a swa." 
Genesis5:9 Ya re Enoše a sena go tshela dinyaga di le 90, a tshola Kenane." 
Genesis5:10 Enoše a re a sena go tshola Kenane a tshela dinyaga di le 815, a tshola tshimane le tshetsana." 
Genesis5:11 Malatsi otlhe a ga Enoše e ne e le dinyaga di le 905, mme a swa." 
Genesis5:12 Ya re Kenane a sena go tshela dinyaga di le 70, atshola Mahalalele." 
Genesis5:13 Kenane a re a sena go tshola Mahalalele, a tshela dinyaga di le 840, a tshola tshimane la tshetsana." 
Genesis5:14 Malatsi otlhe a ga Kenane e ne e le dinyaga di le 910, mme a swa." 
Genesis5:15 Mahalalele a tshela dinyaga di le 65, a tshola Jarete." 
Genesis5:16 Mahalalele a re a sena go tshola Jarete, a tshela dinyaga di le 830, a ba a tshola tshimane le tshetsana:" 
Genesis5:17 Malatsi otlhe a ga Mahalalele a ne e le dinyaga di le 895, mme a swa." 
Genesis5:18 Jarete a tshela dinyaga di le 162, mme a tshola Enoke." 
Genesis5:19 Jarete a re a sena go tshola Enoke, a tshela dinyaga di le 800, ke fa a tshola tshimane le tshetsana." 
Genesis5:20 Malatsi otlhe a ga Jarete e ne e le dinyaga di le 962, mme a swa." 
Genesis5:21 Enoke a tshela dinyaga di le 65, mme a tshola Methusela." 
Genesis5:22 Enoke a re a sena go tshola Methusela, a sepela le Modimo dinyaga di le 300, a tshola tshimane le tshetsana." 
Genesis5:23 Malatsi otlhe a ga Enoke e ne e le dinyaga di le 365. 
Genesis5:24 Enoke a sepela le Modimo; mme a tlhokafala, gonne Modimo o ne o mo tshotse." 
Genesis5:25 Methusela a tshela dinyaga di le 187, mme a tshola Lameke." 
Genesis5:26 Methusela a re a sena go tshola Lameke, a tshela dinyaga di le 782, a tshola tshimane le tshetsana." 
Genesis5:27 Malatsi otlhe a ga Methusela e ne le dinyaga di le 969, mme a swa." 
Genesis5:28 Lameke a tshela dinyaga di le 182, mme a tshola ngwana wa mosimane." 
Genesis5:29 A mo raya leina a re: Noa; a re: “Yo, o tlaa re gomotsa ka ga tiro ya rona, le ka ga letsapa la diatla tsa rona, ka ntlha ya mmu o Jehofa o o hutsitseng.”" 
Genesis5:30 Lameke a re a sena go tshola Noa, a tshela dinyaga di le 595, a tshola tshimane le tshetsana." 
Genesis5:31 Malatsi otlhe a ga Lameke e ne e le dinyaga di le 777, jalo a swa." 
Genesis5:32 E rile Noa a le dinyaga di le 500, a tshola Sheme, le Hame le Jafethe." 
Genesis6:1 Ga dirala, e rile batho ba simolola go ntsifala mo lefatsheng, ba tshola bana ba basetsana." 
Genesis6:2 Bomorwa Modimo ba bona bomorwadia batho fa ba le bantle, jalo ba tsaya basadi mo go bone, botlhe ba ba ba ratang." 
Genesis6:3 Jehofa a re: “Mowa wa me ga o ketla o nna o ganela le motho ka bosenabokhutlo, ka gobo le ene e bile ke nama. Le fa go ntse jalo malatsi a gagwe a tlaa nna dinyaga di le 120.”" 
Genesis6:4 Ga bo go le mekaloba mo lefatsheng mo malatsing ao. Le gone morago ga moo, fa bomorwa Modimo ba tsena mo go bomorwadia batho, ba tsala bana nabo, bao, e ne e le banna ba ba diganka tsa metlha ya bogologolo; banna ba ba itsegeng." 
Genesis6:5 Mme Jehofa a bona fa boikepo jwa motho bo le bogolo mo lefatsheng, le go akanya ga megopolo ya pelo ya gagwe gotlhe, go le bosula ka metlha yotlhe." 
Genesis6:6 Jehofa a ikwatlhaya ka a dirile motho mo lefatsheng, mme ga mo tlhokofatsa pelo." 
Genesis6:7 Jehofa a re: “Ke tlaa senya motho yo ke mo dirileng ke mo tlosa mo lefatsheng, ene motho le phologolo le sebatana le se se gagabang le nonyane ya loapi; gonne ke a ikwatlhaya ka gobo ke di dirile.”" 
Genesis6:8 Mme Noa ene a bona bopelotlhomogi mo matlhong a ga Jehofa. 
Genesis6:9 Tse, ke tsone ditshika tsa ga Noa. Noa e ne e le monna yo o siameng, a itekanetse mo ditshikeng tsa gagwe; Noa a sepela le Modimo." 
Genesis6:10 Noa a tshola basimane ba le bararo: Sheme, Hame le Jafethe." 
Genesis6:11 Lefatshe le ne le senyegile fa pele ga Modimo, le ne le tletse thubakano." 
Genesis6:12 Modimo wa bona lefatshe, mme bona, le ne le senyegile; gonne batho botlhe ba sentse mekgwa ya bone mo lefatsheng." 
Genesis6:13 Modimo wa raya Noa wa re: “Bokhutlo jwa batho botlhe bo fitlhile fa pele ga me; ka lefatshe le tletse thubakano ka ntlha ya bone. Bona, ke tlaa ba senya mmogo le lefatshe." 
Genesis6:14 Itirele ntlo e e kokobalang ka dikgong tsa morukudu; dira matlwana mo ntlong, o e kane ka boka ka fa teng le ka fa ntle." 
Genesis6:15 Sekao ke se, sa ka fa o tlaa e dirang ka gone: boleele jwa ntlo bo nne kana ka boleele jwa mabogo a le 300, le boatlhamo jwa yone bo nne mabogo a le 50, le bogodimo jwa yone bo nne mabogo a le 30." 
Genesis6:16 O direle ntlo e e kokobalang marulelo, o sadise phatlha ya selekanyo sa lebogo fa gare ga lebota le marulelo. Mojako wa ntlo o o ntshe ka fa lotlhakoreng lwa yone. O e dire dikgaogano di le tharo tse di tlhatlaganyeng: e e fa tlase, le e e fa gare, le e e fa godimo." 
Genesis6:17 Bona, ke tlaa tlisa morwalela wa metsi mo lefatsheng go senya nama yotlhe e mowa wa botshelo o leng mo go yone, go e tlosa fa tlase ga legodimo; dilo tsotlhe tse di mo lefatsheng di tlaa swa." 
Genesis6:18 Ke tlaa tlhomamisa kgolagano ya me nao; o tlaa tsena mo ntlong e e kokobalang, wena, le bomorwao, le mosadi wa gago, le basadi ba bomorwao ba na nao." 
Genesis6:19 Mo go tsotlhe tse di tshelang; tsa nama yotlhe, o tseye di le pedi tsa ditshika tsotlhe, o di ise mo ntlong eo go di tshedisa nao; di nne e tona le e namagadi." 
Genesis6:20 Ga dinonyane ka fa ditshikeng tsa tsone, le ga diruiwa ka fa ditshikeng tsa tsone, ga sengwe le sengwe se se gagabang fa fatshe ka fa losikeng lwa sone, go tlaa tla kwa go wena di le pedi tsa losika longwe le longwe, go di tshedisa." 
Genesis6:21 O itseele dijo tsotlhe tse di jewang, o di phuthele kwa go wena; mme e tlaa nna dijo tsa gago le tsa tsone.”" 
Genesis6:22 Noa a dira jalo; mo go tsotlhe tse Modimo o di mo laoletseng, a dira fela jalo." 
Genesis7:1 Jehofa a raya Noa a re: “Tsena, wena le ntlo ya gago yotlhe mo ntlong e e kokobalang; gonne wena, ke go bonye o le tshiamo fa pele ga me mo losikeng lo." 
Genesis7:2 Ga ditshedi le diphologolo dingwe le dingwe tse di itshekileng o itseele di supa le di supa, e tona le e namagadi ya tsone; ga dikgomo le diphologolo tse di sa itshekang di le pedi, e tona le e namagadi ya tsone." 
Genesis7:3 Ga dinonyane tsa loapi le tsone, di supa le di supa, e tona le e namagadi; go tshedisa losika mo lefatsheng lotlhe fela." 
Genesis7:4 Gonne e tlaa re malatsi a supa a sena go feta, ke tlaa nesa pula mo lefatsheng ka malatsi a le 40 le masigo a le 40; dilo tsotlhe tse di tshedileng tse ke di dirileng, ke tlaa di senya ke di tlosa mo lefatsheng.”" 
Genesis7:5 Noa a dira gotlhe ka fa Jehofa a mo laetseng ka gone. 
Genesis7:6 E rile morwalela wa metsi o nna mo lefatsheng, Noa a bo a le dinyaga di le 600." 
Genesis7:7 Noa a tsena mo ntlong e e kokobalang, ene le bomorwawe, le mosadi wa gagwe le basadi ba bomorwawe nae, ka ntlha ya metsi a morwalela." 
Genesis7:8 Ga ditshedi le diphologolo tse di itshekileng, le ga ditshedi le diphologolo tse di sa itshekang, ga dinonyane, le ga sengwe le sengwe se se gagabang fa fatshe," 
Genesis7:9 tsa tsena ka bobedi le bobedi kwa go Noa mo ntlong, e tona le e namagadi, jaaka Modimo o laotse Noa." 
Genesis7:10 Ga dirala ya re malatsi a supa a sena go feta, metsi a morwalela a nna mo lefatsheng." 
Genesis7:11 Ka ngwaga wa 600 wa botshelo jwa ga Noa, ka kgwedi ya bobedi, ka letsatsi la 17, ka letsatsi leo fela metswedi yotlhe ya boteng jo bogolo jo bo teng teng ya phunyega, le dithoba tsa legodimo tsa bulega." 
Genesis7:12 Pula ya na mo lefatsheng ka malatsi a le 40, le masigo a le 40." 
Genesis7:13 Ka letsatsi leo fela Noa a tsena mo ntlong e e kokobalang, a na le Sheme, le Hame le Jafethe, bomorwa Noa, le mosadi wa ga Noa, le basadi ba bararo ba bomorwawe nae." 
Genesis7:14 Bone le phologolo nngwe le nngwe le sebatana ka fa losikeng lwa tsone, le diruiwa tsotlhe ka fa ditshikeng tsa tsone, le sengwe le sengwe se se gagabang fa fatshe ka fa losikeng lwa sone, le mefuta yotlhe ya dinonyane ka fa losikeng lwa yone, nonyane nngwe le nngwe ya tse di diphuka tsotlhe," 
Genesis7:15 tsa tsena kwa go Noa mo ntlong e e kokobalang, bobedi le bobedi jwa nama yotlhe e mowa wa go tshela o leng mo go yone." 
Genesis7:16 Tse di tsenyeng, tsa tsena e le tona le namagadi tsa nama yotlhe fela, jaaka Modimo o mo laotse; Jehofa a mo tswalela mo teng." 
Genesis7:17 Morwalela wa tswelela ka malatsi a le 40; metsi a kokomoga, a tsholetsa ntlo; ya tsholetsega godimo ga lefatshe." 
Genesis7:18 Metsi a hupetsa, a kokomoga thata mo lefatsheng; ntlo ya tsamaya fa godimo ga metsi." 
Genesis7:19 Metsi a kokomoga thata thata mo lefatsheng: dithaba tse di godileng tsotlhe fela, tse di kwa tlase ga legodimo tsa khurumetsega." 
Genesis7:20 Metsi a kokomogela godimo tekanyo ya boleele jwa mabogo a le some le botlhano; le tsone dithaba tsa khurumetsega. 
Genesis7:21 Nama yotlhe e e tsamayang mo lefatsheng ya a swa, dinonyane le diruiwa, diphologolo le dibatana, le sengwe le sengwe se se gagabang fa fatshe, le batho botlhe." 
Genesis7:22 Tsotlhe tse go leng mowa wa botshelo mo dinkong tsa tsone, tsa tse di mo komelelong, tsa a swa." 
Genesis7:23 Sengwe le sengwe se se tshedileng se se mo lefatsheng sa senngwa, batho le diruiwa, le se se gagabang, le dinonyane tsa legodimo; tsa senngwa tsa tlosiwa mo lefatsheng; ga sala Noa a le esi fela, le ba o nang nabo mo ntlong e e kokobalang." 
Genesis7:24 Metsi a hupetsa lefatshe ka malatsi a a 150. 
Genesis8:1 Modimo wa gopola Noa le sengwe le sengwe se se tshedileng, le diruiwa tsotlhe tse o nang natso mo ntlong e e kokobalang; Modimo wa fokisa phefo mo lefatsheng, metsi a kokobela." 
Genesis8:2 Metswedi ya boteng le yone ya thibala le dithoba tsa legodimo, le pula e e tswang legodimong ya kgaodiwa." 
Genesis8:3 Metsi a nna a boa a fokotsega mo lefatsheng ka metlha yotlhe; morago, malatsi a a 150 a sena go feta, metsi a ngotlafala." 
Genesis8:4 Ya re ka kgwedi ya bosupa, ka letsatsi la lesome le bosupa la kgwedi, ntlo e e kokobalang ya ema mo dithabeng tsa Ararate." 
Genesis8:5 Metsi a nna a ngotlafala ka metlha yotlhe go ya go fitlha mo kgweding ya lesome; ka kgwedi ya lesome, le ka letsatsi la ntlha la kgwedi, ditlhora tsa dithaba tsa bonala." 
Genesis8:6 Ga dirala ya re malatsi a le 40 a sena go feta, Noa a bula fensetere ya ntlo e e kokobalang e o neng a e dirile." 
Genesis8:7 A ntsha mohukubu, mme wa tswa wa dikologa dikologa, ga tsamaya metsi a kgala mo lefatsheng." 
Genesis8:8 A ba a ntsha lephoi, go bona gore a metsi a setse a ngotlegile mo lefatsheng." 
Genesis8:9 Mme lephoi la se ka la fitlhela gope fa le ka bayang monoto wa lone gone, la boela kwa go ene kwa ntlong, gonne metsi a ne a sa ntse a bipile lefatshe lotlhe fela; a ntsha seatla sa gagwe, a le tsaya, a le busetsa mo go ene, mo ntlong." 
Genesis8:10 A nama a sa tlhotse malatsi a mangwe a supa, a ntsha lephoi mo ntlong gape." 
Genesis8:11 Lephoi la boela kwa go ene maitseboa mme la bo le hupile mo molomong wa lone letlhare la motlhware. Jalo Noa a itse fa metsi a setse a ngotlegile mo lefatsheng. 
Genesis8:12 A fela a tlhotse malatsi a supa gape, a ba a ntsha lephoi gape mme la se ka la tlhola le boela kwa go ene." 
Genesis8:13 Ga dirala, ya re ka ngwaga wa 601, ka kgwedi ya ntlha, le ka letsatsi la ntlha la kgwedi, metsi a bo a kgadile mo lefatsheng. Noa a tlosa sekhurumelo sa ntlo, a okomela, mmu wa bo o omile." 
Genesis8:14 E rile ka kgwedi ya bobedi ka letsatsi la 27, lefatshe la bo le omeletse." 
Genesis8:15 Modimo wa raya Noa, wa re:" 
Genesis8:16 “Tswa mo ntlong e e kokobalang, wena, le mosadi wa gago, le bomorwao, le basadi ba bomorwao." 
Genesis8:17 O bo o tswe le sengwe le sengwe sa tse di tshedileng tse o nang natso, sa ditshedi tsotlhe; dinonyane, le diruiwa, le sengwe le sengwe se se gagabang mo lefatsheng, gore di tle di tsale thata, di ate, di ntsifale mo lefatsheng.”" 
Genesis8:18 Noa a tswa, le bomorwawe, le mosadi wa gagwe, le basadi ba bomorwawe." 
Genesis8:19 Phologolo nngwe le nngwe le sebatana, se se gagabang sengwe le sengwe, le nonyane nngwe le nngwe, sengwe le sengwe se se tsamayang mo lefatsheng ka fa ditshikeng tsa tsone, tsa tswa mo ntlong e e kokobalang." 
Genesis8:20 Noa a agela Jehofa sebeso: a tsaya ga ditshedi le phologolo nngwe le nngwe e e itshekileng, le ga nonyane nngwe le nngwe e e itshekileng, a isa ditshupelo tsa phiso mo sebesong." 
Genesis8:21 Jehofa a dupa monko o o monate, Jehofa a ithaya a re: “Ga nketla ke tlhola ke hutsa mmu gape ka ntlha ya motho, ka gobo go akanya ga pelo ya motho go le bosula go tswa bokaung jwa gagwe; le gone ga nketla ke tlhola ke laila dilo tsotlhe tse di tshelang jaaka ke dirile." 
Genesis8:22 E tlaa re ka metlha yotlhe lefatshe le sa ntse le leyo, ga go ketla go khutla letsema le thobo, serame le mogote, lotlhabula le mariga, motshegare le bosigo.”" 
Genesis9:1 Modimo wa segofatsa Noa le bomorwawe, wa ba raya, wa re: “Atang lo ntsifale, lo tlale ka lefatshe." 
Genesis9:2 Lo tlaa boifiwa, lo tlaa tshajwa ke phologolo nngwe le nngwe le sebatana sa lefatshe, le nonyane nngwe le nngwe ya loapi; gotlhe mo go nyeulang ka bontsi mo lefatsheng, le ditlhapi tsotlhe tsa lewatle, go tsentswe mo atleng sa lona." 
Genesis9:3 Dilo tsotlhe tse di tsamayang tse di tshelang, di tlaa nna dijo tsa lona; jaaka merogo e metala, ke di lo neile tsotlhe fela." 
Genesis9:4 Nama e e tlhakanyeng le botshelo jwa yone, jo e leng madi a yone, lo se ka lwa e ja." 
Genesis9:5 Ruri madi a lona, madi a matshelo a lona, ke tlaa a lopa; ke tlaa a lopa mo phologolong nngwe le nngwe, le mo sebataneng; le mo seatleng sa motho e bong seatla sa morwa rramotho, ke tlaa lopa botshelo jwa motho." 
Genesis9:6 “Le fa e le mang yo o tshololang madi a motho, le ene madi a gagwe a tlaa tshololwa ke motho; gonne Modimo o dirile motho mo setshwanong sa one." 
Genesis9:7 “Lona, atang, lo ntsifale; lo tshole bana ba le bantsi mo lefatsheng, lo ntsifale mo go lone.”" 
Genesis9:8 Modimo wa bua le Noa, le bomorwawe ba na nae wa re:" 
Genesis9:9 “Bonang, ke tlhomamisa kgolagano ya me le lona, le losika lwa lona morago ga lona." 
Genesis9:10 Ke e tlhomamisa le ditshedi tsotlhe tse lo nang natso, dinonyane, le dikgomo, phologolo nngwe le nngwe le dibatana tsa lefatshe tse lo nang natso; tsotlhe tse di tswang mo ntlong e e kokobalang, e bong diphologolo le dibatana tsotlhe tsa lefatshe." 
Genesis9:11 Ke tlaa tlhomamisa kgolagano ya me le lona; le gone nama yotlhe ga e ketla e tlhola e kgaolwa ka metsi a morwalela; le gone ga go ketla go tlhola go tla morwalela go senya lefatshe.” 
Genesis9:12 Modimo wa re: “Se, ke sone sesupo sa kgolagano e ke e dirang gare ga me le lona, le dilo tsotlhe tse di tshedileng, tse lo nang natso, go ya ditshikeng tse di se nang bokhutlo:" 
Genesis9:13 Ke tlhoma motshe wa me, ke le Modimo, mo lerung; o tlaa nna sesupo sa kgolagano gare ga me le lefatshe." 
Genesis9:14 Go tlaa dirala gore, fa ke lere leru le okama lefatshe, go tlaa bonala motshe wa godimo mo lerung." 
Genesis9:15 Ke tlaa gakologelwa kgolagano ya me, e e emeng fa gare ga me le lona, le dibopiwa tsotlhe tse di tshedileng tsa nama tsotlhe, mme metsi ga a ketla a tlhola a tswa morwalela go senya ditshedi tsotlhe." 
Genesis9:16 Motshe wa godimo o tlaa nna mo lerung; mme ke tlaa o leba, gore ke tle ke gakologelwe kgolagano e e sa khutleng fa gare ga Modimo le dibopiwa tsotlhe tse di mo lefatsheng.”" 
Genesis9:17 Modimo wa raya Noa, wa re: “Se, ke sone sesupo sa kgolagano e ke e tlhomamisitseng fa gare ga me le ditshedi tsotlhe tse di mo lefatsheng.”" 
Genesis9:18 Bomorwa Noa ba ba duleng mo ntlong e e kokobalang e ne e le Sheme, le Hame le Jafethe. Hame ke rra Kanana." 
Genesis9:19 Ba bararo bao e ne e le bomorwa Noa, jalo ga tswa mo go bone ba ba farafereng lefatshe lotlhe." 
Genesis9:20 Noa a simolola go nna molemi wa mbu, mme a tlhoma tshimo ya mofine." 
Genesis9:21 A nwa bojalwa jwa mofine, a tagwa, a bo a sa ikatega a le mo mogopeng wa gagwe." 
Genesis9:22 Hame, rra Kanana, a bona bosaikategang jwa ga rraagwe, a bolelela bomorwa rraagwe ba babedi kwa ntle." 
Genesis9:23 Sheme le Jafethe ba tsaya seaparo, ba se baya mo maruding a bone boo babedi, ba kata ka samorago, ba bipa bosaikategang jwa ga rraabo; difatlhogo tsa bone tsa bo di mo fularetse, ba se ka ba bona bosaikategang jwa ga rraabo." 
Genesis9:24 A thanya mo bojalweng jwa gagwe jwa mofine, a itse se morwawe yo mmotlana o se mo diretseng." 
Genesis9:25 A re: “A go hutsege Kanana. O tlaa nna motlhanka wa batlhanka mo go bomorwa rraagwe.” 
Genesis9:26 A ba a re: “A go bakwe Jehofa Modimo wa ga Sheme: A Kanana a nne motlhanka wa gagwe. 
Genesis9:27 A Modimo o godise Jafethe; o tlaa aga mo megopeng ya ga Sheme, mme a Kanana a nne motlhanka wa gagwe.”" 
Genesis9:28 E rile morwalela o sena go feta, Noa a tshela dinyaga di le 350." 
Genesis9:29 Malatsi otlhe a ga Noa e ne e le dinyaga tse di 950, ke fa a swa." 
Genesis10:1 Tse, ke tsone ditshika tsa bomorwa Noa, e bong Sheme, Hame, le Jafethe. Ba tsala bana ba basimane morago ga morwalela." 
Genesis10:2 Bomorwa Jafethe ke Gomere le Magoge, le Matai, le Jafane, le Tubale, le Mešeke, le Tirase." 
Genesis10:3 Bomorwa Gomere ke Ašekenase, le Rifathe, le Togarema." 
Genesis10:4 Bomorwa Jafane ke Eliša, le Tarešiše, le Kitime, le Dotanime." 
Genesis10:5 Ditlhake tsa merafe tsa kgaoganngwa ke bone, ka fa mafatsheng a bone, mongwe le mongwe ka fa lolemeng lwa gagwe, ka fa ditshikeng tsa bone, mo merafeng ya bone." 
Genesis10:6 Bomorwa Hame ke Kuše, le Miseraime, le Pute, le Kanana." 
Genesis10:7 Bomorwa Kuše ke Seba, le Hafila, le Sabeta, le Raama, le Sabeteka. Bomorwa Raame ke Sheba le Detane." 
Genesis10:8 Kuše a tshola Nimerote; ene a simolola go nna seganka mo lefatsheng. 
Genesis10:9 E ne e le motsomi yo o nonofileng fa pele ga Jehofa. Ke gone go tle go twe: “Jaaka Nimerote motsomi yo o nonofileng fa pele ga Jehofa.” 
Genesis10:10 Tshimologo ya bogosi jwa gagwe e ne e le Babele, le Erege, le Akate, le Kalene, mo lefatsheng la Shinare." 
Genesis10:11 A tswa mo lefatsheng leo, a ya Asiria, a aga Ninefe, le Rehobotheire, le Kala," 
Genesis10:12 le Resene fa gare ga Ninefe le Kala, o e leng motse o mogolo." 
Genesis10:13 Miseraime a tshola Baludime, le Baaname, le Balehabime le Banafetuhime" 
Genesis10:14 le Bapatherusime, le Bakaseluhime, mo go duleng Bafilisitia, le Kafetorime." 
Genesis10:15 Kanana a tshola Sitone, wa gagwe wa ntlha, le Hethe," 
Genesis10:16 le Bajebuse le Baamore, le Bagiregaše;" 
Genesis10:17 le Bahife le Baarike, le Basine;" 
Genesis10:18 le Baarefate le Basemare, le Bahamathe. Morago ga mo ditshika tsa Bakanana tsa anama." 
Genesis10:19 Molelwane wa Bakanana wa simologa kwa Sitone, jaaka fa go tsamaiwa go lebilwe Gerare go ya go fitlha kwa Gasa; jaaka fa go tsamaiwa go lebilwe Sotoma le Gomora le Atema, le Seboime go fitlha kwa Laša." 
Genesis10:20 Bao, ke bomorwa Hame ka fa ditshikeng tsa bone, ka fa ditemeng tsa bone, mo mafatsheng a bone, mo merafeng ya bone." 
Genesis10:21 Sheme, rra bana botlhe ba ga Ebere, mogoloa Jafethe, le ene a bona bana." 
Genesis10:22 Bomorwa Sheme ke Elame le Asešure le Arepakešate le Lute, le Arame." 
Genesis10:23 Bomorwa Arame ke Use, le Hule, le Gethere, le Maše." 
Genesis10:24 Arepakešate a tshola Shela; Shela a tshola Ebere. 
Genesis10:25 Ebere a tshola bana ba basimane ba le babedi; leina la yo mongwe go twe Pelege, gonne lefatshe la kgaoganngwa mo metlheng ya gagwe; leina la ga monnawe, go twe, Joketane." 
Genesis10:26 Joketane a tshola Alemotate le Shelefe le Hasaremafethe le Jera; 
Genesis10:27 le Hatorame le Usale le Dikela; 
Genesis10:28 le Obale le Abimaele le Sheba; 
Genesis10:29 le Ofire le Hafila le Jobabe; botlhe bao, e ne e le bomorwa Joketane." 
Genesis10:29 le Ofire le Hafila le Jobabe; botlhe bao, e ne e le bomorwa Joketane." 
Genesis10:30 Boago jwa bone bo ne bo simologa kwa Meša, jaaka fa go tsamaiwa go lebilwe Sefare, e le thaba e e kwa botlhabatsatsi." 
Genesis10:31 Bao ke bomorwa Sheme ka fa ditshikeng tsa bone, ka fa ditemeng tsa bone, mo mafatsheng a bone, ka fa merafeng ya bone." 
Genesis10:32 Tseo, ke ditshika tsa bomorwa Noa, ka fa ditshikeng tsa bone, mo merafeng ya bone; mme merafe ya kgaogana ka bone bao mo lefatsheng morago ga morwalela." 
Genesis11:1 Lefatshe lotlhe la bo le le puo e le nngwe fela, le mafoko a le mangwe fela." 
Genesis11:2 Mme ga dirala ya re batho ba etela kwa ntlheng ya botlhabatsatsi, ba fitlhela lobala longwe mo lefatsheng la Shinare; mme ba aga gone." 
Genesis11:3 Ba raana, ba re: “Tlang re direng setene, re se bese se butswe thata.” Setene ya bo e le sone maje a bone, mme bitumena ya bo e le seretse sa bone." 
Genesis11:4 Ba re: “Tlang re ikageleng motse, le kago e e godileng e setlhowa sa yone se tlaa fitlhang kwa legodimong, mme a re itireleng leina; e se re kgotsa ra phatlalalela mo lefatsheng lotlhe.”" 
Genesis11:5 Mme Jehofa a fologela go bona motse, le kago e e godileng e bana ba batho ba e agang." 
Genesis11:6 Jehofa a re: “Bonang, ke batho ba le bangwe fela, ba bile ba na le puo e le nngwe fela botlhe; mme se ke sone se ba simololang go se dira. Jaanong ga ba ketla ba kgoreletsega mo go sepe se ba ikaeletseng go se dira." 
Genesis11:7 Tlang re fologeng, re tlhakatlhakanye puo ya bone gone, gore ba se ka ba utlwana mo puong.”" 
Genesis11:8 Jalo Jehofa a ba phatlalaletsa le lefatshe lotlhe; mme ba khutla go aga motse. 
Genesis11:9 Ke gone ka moo, leina la gone go tulweng Babele, ka gobo Jehofa a petekantse puo ya lefatshe lotlhe gone; Jehofa a ba phatlalaletsa le lefatshe lotlhe go tswa gone." 
Genesis11:10 Tse, ke tsone ditshika tsa ga Sheme. O ne a le dinyaga di le 100, a tshola Arepakešate dinyaga di le pedi morago ga morwalela." 
Genesis11:11 Sheme a re a sena go tshola Arepakešate, a tshela dinyaga di le 500, a ntse a tshola tshimane le tshetsana." 
Genesis11:12 Arepakešate a tshela dinyaga di le 35, a tshola Shela." 
Genesis11:13 Arepakešate a re a sena go tshola Shela, a tshela dinyaga di le 403, a ntse a tshola tshimane le tshetsana." 
Genesis11:14 Shela a tshela dinyaga di le 30, a tshola Ebere." 
Genesis11:15 Shela a re a sena go tshola Ebere, a tshela dinyaga di le 403, a ntse a tshola tshimane le tshetsana." 
Genesis11:16 Ebere a tshela dinyaga di le 34, a tshola Pelege." 
Genesis11:17 Ebere a re a sena go tshola Pelege, a tshela dinyaga di le 430, a ntse a tshola tshimane le tshetsana." 
Genesis11:18 Pelege a tshela dinyaga di le 30, a tshola Reu." 
Genesis11:19 Pelege a re a sena go tshola Reu, a tshela dinyaga di le 209, a ntse a tshola tshimane le tshetsana." 
Genesis11:20 Reu a tshela dinyaga di le 32, a tshola Seruge." 
Genesis11:21 Reu a re a sena go tshola Seruge, a tshela dinyaga di le 207, a ntse a tshola tshimane le tshetsana." 
Genesis11:22 Seruge a tshela dinyaga di le 30, a tshola Nahore." 
Genesis11:23 Seruge a re a sena go tshola Nahore, a tshela dinyaga di le 200, a ntse a tshola tshimane le tshetsana." 
Genesis11:24 Nahore a tshela dinyaga di le 29, a tshola Tera." 
Genesis11:25 Nahore a re a sena go tshola Tera, a tshela dinyaga di le 119, a ntse a tshola tshimane le tshetsana." 
Genesis11:26 Ya re Tera a sena go tshela dinyaga di le 70, a tshola Aberame, Nahore le Harane." 
Genesis11:27 Mme jaana tse, ke tsone ditshika tsa ga Tera. Tera a tshola Aberame, Nahore le Harane; Harane a tshola Lote." 
Genesis11:28 Harane a swa pele ga rraagwe Tera, mo lefatsheng le a tsaletsweng mo go lone, e bong Ure wa Bakalatea." 
Genesis11:29 Aberame le Nahore ba tsaya basadi: leina la mosadi wa ga Aberame, go twe Sarai; leina la mosadi wa ga Nahore go twe Mileka, morwadia Harane, rra Mileka le rra Iseka." 
Genesis11:30 Sarai ya bo e le moopa; a se na ngwana. 
Genesis11:31 Tera a tsaya Aberame morwawe, le Lote morwa Harane, ngwana wa ngwana wa gagwe, le Sarai ngwetsi ya gagwe, mosadi wa ga Aberame morwawe, a tswa nabo mo Ure wa Bakalatea, go ya kwa lefatsheng la Kanana, mme ba fitlha mo Harane, ba aga gone." 
Genesis11:32 Malatsi a ga Tera e ne e le dinyaga di le 205; a swela mo Harane. 
Genesis12:1 Jaana Jehofa a raya Aberame a re: “Tloga, o tswe mo lefatsheng la gaeno, le mo go bagaeno, le mo ntlong ya ga rraago, o ye kwa lefatsheng le ke tlaa le go supetsang." 
Genesis12:2 Ke tlaa dira morafe o mogolo ka wena; ke tlaa go segofatsa, ke dira leina la gago le nna legolo, gore wena o nne tshegofatso." 
Genesis12:3 “Le gone ke tlaa segofatsa bone ba ba go segofatsang, le ene yo o go hutsang ke tlaa mo hutsa. Mo go wena, ditshika tsotlhe tsa lefatshe di tlaa segofala.”" 
Genesis12:4 Jalo Aberame a tsamaya jaaka Jehofa a ne a buile nae; le Lote a ya nae. Aberame a bo a le dinyaga di le 75 fa a tloga mo Harane. 
Genesis12:5 Aberame a tsaya Sarai mosadi wa gagwe, le Lote morwa monnawe, le thoto ya bone yotlhe fela e ba neng ba e bapetse, le batho ba ba ba bonyeng mo Harane; ba tswa ba tsamaela kwa lefatsheng la Kanana, ba fitlha mo lefatsheng la Kanana." 
Genesis12:6 Aberame a ralala lefatshe a tla a fitlha kwa felong ga Šhekeme, a tla mo mookeng wa ga More. Mokanana a bo a le mo lefatsheng ka lobaka loo." 
Genesis12:7 Jehofa a bonala kwa go Aberame, a re: “Lefatshe le, ke tlaa le naya losika lwa gago.” Jaana a agela Jehofa yo o bonetseng kwa go ene sebeso gone." 
Genesis12:8 A huduga gone, a ya kwa thabeng e e potileng Bethele ntlheng ya botlhabatsatsi, a tlhoma mogope wa gagwe, a potilwe ke Bethele ka fa bophirimatsatsi, le ke Ai ka fa botlhabatsatsi. A agela Jehofa sebeso gone, a bitsa leina le Jehofa." 
Genesis12:9 Aberame a eta, a fela a ntse a tsamaela kwa Borwa." 
Genesis12:10 Ga nna leuba mo lefatsheng. Ke fa Aberame a fologela kwa Egepeto go jaka gone, gonne leuba le ne le le letona mo lefatsheng." 
Genesis12:11 Mme ga dirala ya re a le gaufi le go tsena mo Egepeto, a raya Sarai mosadi wa gagwe a re: “A o ko o bone jaana, ke a itse fa o le mosadi yo montle go lejwa." 
Genesis12:12 Go tlaa dirala gore, e re Baegepeto ba go bona ba re: ‘Yo, ke mosadi wa gagwe;’ mme ba tlaa mpolaya, wena ba go lese." 
Genesis12:13 Ke a go rapela, o tle o re, o kgaitsadiake, gore go tle go nne molemo mo go nna ka ntlha ya gago, gore mowa wa me o tshele ka wena.”" 
Genesis12:14 Mme ga dirala e rile Aberame a sena go fitlha mo Egepeto, Baegepeto ba bona mosadi fa a le montle thata." 
Genesis12:15 Dikgosana tsa ga Faro tsa mmona, tsa mmoka kwa go Faro; mosadi a isiwa mo ntlong ya ga Faro." 
Genesis12:16 Faro a tshola Aberame sentle ka ntlha ya mosadi. Aberame a amogela dinku, le dikgomo, le diesela tse ditona, le batlhanka, le malata, le diesela tse dinamagadi le dikamela." 
Genesis12:17 Jehofa a betsa Faro le ntlo ya gagwe ka dipetso tse ditona, ka ntlha ya ga Sarai, mogatsa Aberame." 
Genesis12:18 Ke fa Faro a bitsa Aberame a re: “Ana se o se ntiretseng ke eng? O ne o sa mpoleleleng fa e le mosadi wa gago? 
Genesis12:19 O ne o buelang o re ke kgaitsadio? Ke ba ke ka mo tsaya ke re o tlaa nna mosadi wa me. Ke gone jaana, bona mosadi wa gago ke yo, mo tseye, o tsamaye.”" 
Genesis12:20 Faro a laela banna bangwe ka ga gagwe, ba mmuledisa, le mosadi wa gagwe, le tsotlhe tse a nang natso." 
Genesis13:1 Aberame a tlhatloga mo Egepeto, ene le mosadi wa gagwe, le tsotlhe tse a nang natso, a na le Lote, a ya ntlheng ya Borwa." 
Genesis13:2 Aberame a bo a humile dikgomo thata, le selefera, le gouta." 
Genesis13:3 A nna a tsamaya ka go fuduga fa, a ya go aga fale, a tswa Borwa a ba a fitlha le kwa Bethele, kwa felong fa tente ya gagwe e kileng ya nna gone mo tshimologong fa gare ga Bethele le Ai;" 
Genesis13:4 kwa felong ga sebeso se o kileng a se dira gone pele. Aberame a bitsa leina la ga Jehofa gone. 
Genesis13:5 Lote yo o neng a tsamaya le Aberame, a bo a na le matsomane, le matlhape, le ditente." 
Genesis13:6 Lefatshe la bo le sa ba lekana go ka nna mmogo, gonne dithoto tsa bone di ne di le dikgolo, ba retelelwa ke go aga mmogo." 
Genesis13:7 Ga nna kgang fa gare ga badisa ba dikgomo tsa ga Aberame le badisa ba dikgomo tsa ga Lote. Le gone Bakanana le Baperise ba ne ba agile mo lefatsheng leo ka lobaka loo. 
Genesis13:8 Aberame a raya Lote a re: “Ke a go rapela, a go se nne kgang fa gare ga me le wena, le fa gare ga badisa ba me le ba gago, gonne re bana ba monna a le mongwe fela." 
Genesis13:9 A lefatshe lotlhe ga le fa pele ga gago? Ke a go rapela, o kgaogane le nna. E tlaa re fa o ya ka fa letsogong la molema, nna ke ye ka fa go le legolo; gongwe fa o ya ka fa letsogong le legolo, nna ke ye ka fa go la molema.”" 
Genesis13:10 Lote a tsholetsa matlho a gagwe, a bona lobala lotlhe lwa Joretane fa lo na le metsi sentle ntlheng tsotlhe. E ne e le pele ga Jehofa a senya Sotoma le Gomora, lo ne lo ntse jaaka tshimo ya Jehofa, le jaaka lefatshe la Egepeto, fa go iwa kwa Soare." 
Genesis13:11 Jalo Lote a itlhophela lobala lotlhe lwa Joretane. Lote a hudugela ntlheng ya botlhabatsatsi; ba kgaogana jalo. 
Genesis13:12 Aberame a aga mo lefatsheng la Kanana, Lote ene a aga mo metseng ya lobala, a nna a hudusa mogope wa gagwe go ya go fitlha kwa Sotoma." 
Genesis13:13 Jaana banna ba Sotoma e ne e le baikepi le baleofi mo gogolo thata fa pele ga Jehofa. 
Genesis13:14 Jehofa a raya Aberame, morago Lote a sena go kgaogana nae, a re: “Tsholetsa matlho a gago, fa o leng gone, o lebe ntlheng ya Botsheka, le kwa Borwa, le kwa Botlhabatsatsi, le kwa Bophirimatsatsi;" 
Genesis13:15 gonne lefatshe lotlhe le o le bonang, ke tlaa le naya wena, le losika lwa gago ka bosakhutleng." 
Genesis13:16 Ke tlaa dira losika lwa gago lo nna jaaka lorole lwa lefatshe, ke gore, fa motho a ka bala lorole lwa lefatshe, foo losika lwa gago le lone lo tlaa balwa." 
Genesis13:17 Nanoga, o ralale lefatshe ka boleele jwa lone, le ka boatlhamo jwa lone, gonne ke tlaa le go naya.”" 
Genesis13:18 Aberame a hudusa mogope wa gagwe, a tla a aga fa maokeng a ga Mamere a a mo Heberone, a agela Jehofa sebeso gone." 
Genesis14:1 Ga dirala e rile mo metlheng ya ga Amerafele kgosi ya Shinare, le Arioke kgosi ya Elasare, le Ketorelaomere kgosi ya Elame, le Titale kgosi ya Goime," 
Genesis14:2 ba tsosa ntwa le Bera kgosi ya Sotoma, le Bireša kgosi ya Gomora, le Shinabe kgosi ya Atema, le Shemebere kgosi ya Seboime, le kgosi ya Bela, ke go re Soare." 
Genesis14:3 Ba botlhe ba kopanela mo mokgatšheng wa Sidime, fa jaanong go bidiwang Lewatle la Letswai." 
Genesis14:4 Ba direla Ketorelaomere ka dinyaga di le 12; ka ngwaga wa motso wa boraro ba mo tsogologela. 
Genesis14:5 Ka ngwaga wa lesome le bone, ga tla Ketorelaomere, le dikgosi tse a nang natso, ba kgemetha Barefaime mo Ašeterothe-Karenaime, le Basusime mo Hame, le Baemime mo Shafe-Kiriathaime." 
Genesis14:6 Le Bahore mo Seire, thaba ya bone, go fitlha kwa Eleparane, yo o bapileng le sekaka." 
Genesis14:7 Ba sokologa, ba fitlha kwa Enamišepate ke go re Kateše, ba kgemetha lefatshe lotlhe la Baamaleke, le la Baamore ba ba neng ba agile mo Hasasone-tamare." 
Genesis14:8 Ga bolola kgosi ya Sotoma, le kgosi ya Gomora, le kgosi ya Atema, le kgosi ya Seboime, le kgosi ya Bela, ke go re Soare; ba ba abela ntwa mo mokgatšheng wa Sidime." 
Genesis14:9 Ba e abela Ketorelaomere kgosi ya Elame, le Titale kgosi ya Goime, le Amerafele kgosi ya Shinare, le Arioke kgosi ya Elasare; dikgosi di le nne di tlhabana le tse tlhano." 
Genesis14:10 Jaana mokgatšha wa Sidime wa bo o tletse didiba tsa bitumena; mme kgosi tsa Sotoma le Gomora tsa sia, tsa wela mo didibeng, ba ba falotseng ba tshabela kwa thabeng." 
Genesis14:11 Ba thopa dithoto tsotlhe tsa Sotoma le Gomora, le dijo tsotlhe tsa bone, ba tsamaya." 
Genesis14:12 Ba tshwara Lote, morwa monnaa Aberame, yo o agileng mo Sotoma, le dithoto tsa gagwe, ba tsamaya." 
Genesis14:13 Ga tla mongwe yo o falotseng, a bolelela Aberame wa Mohebere: jaana ene a bo a agile fa maokeng a ga Mamere wa Moamore, morwa rraagwe Ešekole, le morwa rraagwe Anere; bao ya bo e le bathusanyi le Aberame." 
Genesis14:14 E rile Aberame a utlwa fa monnawe a tshwerwe, a bolotsa banna ba gagwe ba ba rutegileng, ba ba tsaletsweng mo ntlong ya gagwe ba le 318, a ba latelela go ya go fitlha kwa Dane." 
Genesis14:15 A ba ikabela bosigo, ene le batlhanka ba gagwe, a ba kgemetha, a ba letelela go fitlha kwa Hoba, o o potileng Damaseko ka fa ntlheng ya la molema." 
Genesis14:16 A busa dithoto tsotlhe, le gone a ba a busa Lote, monnawe, le dithoto tsa gagwe, le basadi, le batho." 
Genesis14:17 Kgosi ya Sotoma ya tswa, ya ya go mo kgatlhantsha a sena go boa kwa polaong ya ga Ketorelaomere, le dikgosi tse a neng a na natso, kwa mokgatšheng wa Shafe, ke gore, Mokgatšha wa Kgosi." 
Genesis14:18 Melekiseteke kgosi ya Saleme a tswa a tshotse senkgwe le bojalwa jwa mofine; a bo a le moperesiti wa Modimo Mogodimodimo. 
Genesis14:19 A mo segofatsa; a re: “A go segofadiwe Aberame ke Modimo Mogodimodimo, Mong wa legodimo le lefatshe." 
Genesis14:20 A go bakwe Modimo Mogodimodimo, o o tsentseng baba ba gago mo seatleng sa gago.” Mme a mo naya sabosome sa tsotlhe." 
Genesis14:21 Kgosi ya Sotoma ya raya Aberame ya re: “Nnaya batho, wena o tseye dithoto.”" 
Genesis14:22 Aberame a raya kgosi ya Sotoma a re: “Seatla sa me ke se tsholeleditse Jehofa Modimo Mogodimodimo, Morui wa legodimo le lefatshe." 
Genesis14:23 Ka re ga nketla ka tsaya tlhale, le fa e le kgole ya setlhako, le fa e le sepe se e leng sa gago, e se re gongwe wa re: ‘Ke humisitse Aberame.’" 
Genesis14:24 Fa e se se makau a se jeleng, le kabelo ya batho ba ke tsamaileng nabo, e bong Anere le Ešekole le Mamere, bao a ba tseye kabelo ya bone.”" 
Genesis15:1 Morago ga dilo tse, lefoko la Jehofa la tla kwa go Aberame ka ponatshegelo la re: “O se ka wa boifa, Aberame. Ke nna thebe ya gago, le tuelo ya gago e kgolo e e feteletseng.”" 
Genesis15:2 Aberame a re: “Morena Modimo, ana o tlaa nnaya eng ka e le fano ke ntse fela ke se na ngwana, mme ene yo o tlaa nnang morui wa ntlo ya me e le Eliesere wa Modamaseko?”" 
Genesis15:3 Aberame a re: “Bona, ga o a nnaya losika lope, mme bona, motho fela yo o tsaletsweng mo ntlong ya me o tlaa nna moja boswa jwa me.”" 
Genesis15:4 Mme, bonang, lefoko la ga Jehofa la tla kwa go ene la re: “Motho yo, ga a ketla a nna moja boswa jwa gago; ene yo o tlaa tswang mo mmeleng wa gago o tlaa nna moja boswa jwa gago.”" 
Genesis15:5 A mo gogela kwa ntle a re: “A ko o lebe jaana kwa legodimong, o bale dinaledi, fa o ka di bala.” A mo raya a re: “Losika lwa gago lo tlaa nna kalo.”" 
Genesis15:6 A dumela Jehofa; a mo itumelela a kaya fa tumelo ya gagwe e le tshiamo. 
Genesis15:7 A mo raya a re: “Ke nna Jehofa yo ke go ntshitseng mo Ure wa Bakalatea, go go naya lefatshe le, go le rua.”" 
Genesis15:8 A re: “Jehofa Modimo, ana ke tlaa itse ka eng fa ke tlaa le rua?”" 
Genesis15:9 A mo raya a re: “Ntlisetsa kgomo ya moroba e e dinyaga tharo, le podi e namagadi e e dinyaga tharo, le phelefu e e dinyaga tharo, le lephoi, le leebana.”" 
Genesis15:10 A tsaya tsotlhe tse, a di fatoganya ka bogare, a baya mofama, mongwe o lebaganye le o mongwe; dinonyane a se ka a di fatoganya." 
Genesis15:11 Manong a fologela mo ditotong, Aberame a a leleka." 
Genesis15:12 E rile letsatsi le phirima Aberame a welwa ke boroko jo botona; a tlelwa ke letshogo le poifo e kgolo. 
Genesis15:13 Mme a raya Aberame a re: “Itse ruri fa losika lwa gago lo tlaa nna baeng mo lefatsheng le e seng la bone, ba tlaa ba direla; ba tlaa ba bogisa ka dinyaga di le 400." 
Genesis15:14 Le one morafe oo, o ba tlaa o direlang, ke tlaa o sekisa; morago ba tlaa tswa ka dithoto tse dikgolo." 
Genesis15:15 Mme wena, o tlaa ya kwa go borraago ka kagiso; o tlaa fitlhwa o tsofetse sentle thata." 
Genesis15:16 E tlaa re mo losikeng lwa bone, ba tlaa boela kwano gape; gonne boikepo jwa Moamore ga bo ise bo tlale.”" 
Genesis15:17 Ga dirala ya re letsatsi le phirimile go le lefifi, bonang, leiso la leubelo le le kubang mosi, le lobone lo lo tukang, tsa ralala fa gare ga mefama eo." 
Genesis15:18 Ka letsatsi leo Jehofa a dira kgolagano le Aberame a re: “Lefatshe le, ke le neile losika lwa gago, go tswa nokeng ya Egepeto go fitlha kwa nokeng e kgolo, noka ya Euferatese:" 
Genesis15:19 Mokene, le Mokenise, le Mokatemone," 
Genesis15:20 le Mohite, le Moperise, le Morefaime," 
Genesis15:21 le Moamore, le Mokanana, le Mogiregaše, le Mojebuse.”" 
Genesis16:1 Jaana Sarai, mosadi wa ga Aberame, a bo a sa bone bana nae; a bo a na le lelata, e le Moegepeto, leina la gagwe go twe, Hagare." 
Genesis16:2 Sarai a raya Aberame a re: “Bona jaana, Jehofa o ntlhokisitse go bona bana; ke a go rapela, ya kwa lelateng la me, e tle e re gongwe ke bone bana ka ene.” Aberame a reetsa lentswe la ga Sarai." 
Genesis16:3 Sarai, mosadi wa ga Aberame, a tsaya Hagare wa Moegepeto, lelata la gagwe, a mo naya Aberame monna wa gagwe, gore e nne mosadi wa gagwe. E ne e le morago ga Aberame a sena go aga dinyaga di le lesome mo lefatsheng la Kanana." 
Genesis16:4 A ya kwa go Hagare, a nna moimana; o rile a ipona a le moimana, a ikgodisa a simolola go nyatsa mohumagadi wa gagwe." 
Genesis16:5 Sarai a raya Aberame a re: “Ke molato wa gago gore tiro e e sa siamang e, e ntirafalele. Ke isitse lelata la me mo sehubeng sa gago; o rile a ipona a imile a nnyatsa. A Jehofa a atlhole fa gare ga me le wena.”" 
Genesis16:6 Aberame a raya Sarai a re: “Bona, lelata la gago le mo seatleng sa gago; mo dire se se molemo mo matlhong a gago.” Sarai a mo direla ka bopeloethata; a tshaba sefatlhogo sa gagwe." 
Genesis16:7 Moengele wa ga Jehofa a mo fitlhela fa motsweding wa metsi mo nageng, fa motsweding o o mo tseleng e e yang Shure." 
Genesis16:8 A re: “Hagare, lelata la ga Sarai, o tswa kae? Mme o ya kae?” A re: “Ke tshaba sefatlhogo sa mohumagadi wa me, Sarai.”" 
Genesis16:9 Moengele wa ga Jehofa a mo raya a re: “Boela kwa mohumagading wa gago, o ineele mo seatleng sa gagwe.”" 
Genesis16:10 Moengele a ba a mo raya a re: “Ke tlaa ntsifatsa losika lwa gago thatathata, lo ba lo tla lo retela go balwa ke bontsi.”" 
Genesis16:11 Moengele wa ga Jehofa a mo raya a re: “Bona, o moimana jaana, o tlaa bona ngwana wa mosimane; o tlaa raya ngwana leina o re: ‘Išemaele’, ka gobo Jehofa o utlwile patikego ya gago." 
Genesis16:12 “Ene o tlaa nna jaaka esela ya naga mo bathong; o tlaa lwantsha motho mongwe le mongwe; le motho mongwe le mongwe o tlaa mo lwantsha. O tlaa aga a lebaganye le bana botlhe ba ga rraagwe.” 
Genesis16:13 A raya Jehofa yo o buileng nae leina, a re: “O Modimo o o bonang;” gonne a re: “A ntsaana ke bonye fano ene yo o mponang?”" 
Genesis16:14 Ke gone ka moo sediba sa bidiwa Beere-lahai-roi (ke go re: “Sediba sa Motshedi yo o mponang”). Bonang, se fa gare ga Kateše le Berete." 
Genesis16:15 Hagare a bona ngwana wa mosimane le Aberame. Aberame a raya leina la ga morwawe yo Hagare a mmonyeng a re, Išemaele." 
Genesis16:16 Aberame a bo a le dinyaga di le 86 fa Hagare a bona Išemaele nae. 
Genesis17:1 E rile Aberame a le dinyaga di le 99, Jehofa a bonala kwa go Aberame a mo raya a re: “Ke nna Modimo Mothatayotlhe; sepela fa pele ga me, o se na selabe sa molato." 
Genesis17:2 Ke tlaa dira kgolagano ya me fa gare ga me le wena, ke tlaa ba ke go ntsifatsa mo gogolo thata.”" 
Genesis17:3 Aberame a wela fa fatshe ka sefatlhogo. Modimo wa bua nae wa re: 
Genesis17:4 “Ka ga me, bona, kgolagano ya me e na nao; o tlaa nna rra-bontsi jwa merafe." 
Genesis17:5 Le gone leina la gago ga le ketla le tlhola le bidiwa Aberame, mme leina la gago le tlaa nna Aberahame; gonne ke go dirile raa-bontsi jwa merafe." 
Genesis17:6 Mme ke tlaa go atisa mo gogolo thata, ke tlaa dira merafe ka wena, le dikgosi di tlaa tswa mo go wena." 
Genesis17:7 “Ke tlaa tlhomamisa kgolagano ya me gare ga me le wena, le losika lwa gago sefularong sa gago, go ya le ditshika tsotlhe tsa bone, gore e nne kgolagano e e sa khutleng, ya go re, ke tlaa nna Modimo mo go wena le mo losikeng lwa gago sefularong sa gago." 
Genesis17:8 Lefatshe la majako a gago, lefatshe lotlhe la Kanana, ke tlaa le naya wena le losika lwa gago sefularong sa gago, go nna boswa jo bo sa khutleng; ke tlaa nna Modimo wa bone.”" 
Genesis17:9 Modimo wa raya Aberahame wa re: “Ka ga gago, boloka kgolagano ya me, wena, le losika lwa gago sefularong sa gago, go ya le ditshika tsotlhe tsa bone." 
Genesis17:10 Kgolagano ya me ke e, e lo tlaa e bolokang, fa gare ga me le wena le losika lwa gago, sefularong sa gago; banna botlhe le basimane botlhe mo go lona ba rupisiwe." 
Genesis17:11 Lo tlaa rupisiwa nama ya letlalo la bonna jwa lona; mme e tlaa bo e le sesupo sa kgolagano fa gare ga me le lona. 
Genesis17:12 A go rupisiwe mosimane mongwe le mongwe wa lona a le malatsi a a ferang mebedi, mo ditshikeng tsotlhe tsa lona, ene yo o tsaletsweng mo ntlong, gongwe yo o rekilweng ka madi mo moennyeng, yo e seng wa losika lwa gago." 
Genesis17:13 Yo o tsaletsweng mo ntlong ya gago, le ene yo o rekilweng ka madi a gago, ba na le go rupisiwa fela. Kgolagano ya me e tlaa nna mo nameng ya lona, go nna kgolagano e e sa khutleng." 
Genesis17:14 Mme banna le basimane ba ba sa rupisiwang, ba nama ya letlalo la bonna jwa bone e sa rupisiwang, mongwe le mongwe wa bone o tlaa kgaolwa mo bathong ba ga gabo; o tlodile kgolagano ya me.”" 
Genesis17:15 Modimo wa raya Aberahame wa re: “Ka ga Sarai, mosadi wa gago, o se ka wa bitsa leina la gagwe Sarai, leina la gagwe e nne Sara." 
Genesis17:16 Ke tlaa mo segofatsa; gape, ke tlaa go naya ngwana wa mosimane ka ene. Ee, ke tlaa mo segofatsa, o tlaa nna mmamerafe: Dikgosi tsa ditšhaba di tlaa tswa mo go ene.”" 
Genesis17:17 Foo Aberahame a wela fa fatshe ka sefatlhogo, a tshega, a ithaya mo pelong a re: “A ngwana o ka bonwa ke yo o dingwaga di lekgolo? Le Sara yo o dingwaga di 90, a o ka bona ngwana?”" 
Genesis17:18 Aberahame a raya Modimo a re: “A bo Išemaele a ka ka a tshela a le fa pele ga gago.” 
Genesis17:19 Modimo wa re: “Nnyaa, Sara mosadi wa gago o tlaa bona ngwana wa mosimane nao, o tlaa mo raya leina o re, Isake. Ke tlaa tlhomamisa kgolagano ya me nae, le losika lwa gagwe sefularong sa gagwe go nna kgolagano e e sa khutleng." 
Genesis17:20 Ka ga Išemaele, ke go utlwile. Bona, ke mo segofaditse, ke tlaa mo atisa, ke tlaa mo ntsifatsa mo go golo thata. O tlaa tsala dikgosana di le 12, ke tlaa mo dira morafe o mogolo." 
Genesis17:21 Kgolagano ya me ke tlaa e tlhomamisa le Isake yo Sara o tlaa mmonang nao, ka lobaka lono lo lo tlhomameng lwa isago.”" 
Genesis17:22 Modimo wa khutla go bua nae; wa tlhatloga wa tswa fa go Aberahame. 
Genesis17:23 Aberahame a tsaya Išemaele morwawe, le botlhe ba ba tsaletsweng mo tlong ya gagwe, le botlhe ba ba rekilweng ka madi a gagwe, banna le basimane botlhe mo bathong ba ntlo ya ga Aberahame, a rupisa nama ya letlalo la bonna jwa bone ka letsatsi leo fela, jaaka Modimo o buile nae." 
Genesis17:24 Aberahame a bo a le dingwaga di 99 fa a rupisiwa nama ya letlalo la bonna jwa gagwe. 
Genesis17:25 Išemaele morwawe a bo a le dingwaga di le 13 fa a rupisiwa nama ya letlalo la bonna jwa gagwe. 
Genesis17:26 Ka letsatsi leo fela Aberahame a rupisiwa, le Išemaele morwawe." 
Genesis17:27 Le banna botlhe ba ntlo ya gagwe, ba ba tsaletsweng mo ntlong; le ba ba rekilweng ka madi mo moennyeng, ba rupisiwa nae." 
Genesis18:1 Jehofa a bonala kwa go ene fa maokeng a ga Mamere, a dutse mo mojakong wa mogope, go le mogote wa motshegare." 
Genesis18:2 A tsholetsa matlho a gagwe, a leba, mme bonang, ga bo go eme banna ba le bararo ba lebaganye nae. O rile a ba bona a tloga mo mojakong wa mogope, a siana a ya go ba kgatlhantsha, a ikobela fa fatshe a re:" 
Genesis18:3 “Morena wa me, a e re fa ke bonye tsalano mo matlhong a gago, ke a go rapela gore, motlhanka wa gago o se ka wa mo feta fela." 
Genesis18:4 A lo ke lo mme go tlisiwe metsinyana, lo itlhapise dinao, lo itapolose fa tlase ga setlhare." 
Genesis18:5 Ke tlaa tlisa senkgwenyana, lo ithethebatse pelo; ka e le fano lo gorogetse motlhanka wa lona, morago ga moo lo tlaa feta.” Ba re: “Dira jalo, jaaka o buile.”" 
Genesis18:6 Aberahame a itlhaganelela kwa go Sara mo mogopeng, a re: “Baakanya ka bofefo dielo di le tharo tsa boupe jo bo sweu jo bo boleta o bo dube, o bo o dire dinkgwe tsa dipapetla.”" 
Genesis18:7 Aberahame a sianela kwa matlhapeng, a gapa namane ya lebotla e e nama e boruma, a e neela motlhanka, a akofa a e baakanya." 
Genesis18:8 A tsaya madila, le maši, le namane e o e baakantseng, a di baya fa pele ga bone. A ema fa go bone fa tlase ga setlhare, ba a ja." 
Genesis18:9 Ba mo raya ba re: “Sara mosadi wa gago o kae?” A re: “Bonang, o mo mogopeng.”" 
Genesis18:10 A re: “Morago ga dikgwedi tse di bofera bongwe di sena go feta, ruri ke tlaa boela mo go wena, bona, Sara, mosadi wa gago o tlaa bona ngwana wa mosimane.” Sara a utlwa a le mo mojakong wa mogope o o fa morago ga gagwe." 
Genesis18:11 Jaana Aberahame le Sara ba bo ba tsofetse, ba tsofaletse ruri. Sara o ne a khutlike go nna ka mokgwa wa bosadi." 
Genesis18:12 Sara a tshega mo teng ga gagwe a re: “A ke ka bona boitumelo ke tsofetse, le morena wa me le ene a tsofetse?”" 
Genesis18:13 Jehofa a raya Aberahame a re: “Sara o ne a tshegelang, a re: ‘A ruri ke tlaa bona ngwana, nna yo ke tsofetseng?’" 
Genesis18:14 A go na le sengwe se se ka retelelang Jehofa? Ke tlaa re mo lobakeng lo lo laotsweng ke boele mo go wena, fa lobaka lo, lo bile lo tsile, Sara o tlaa bona ngwana wa mosimane.”" 
Genesis18:15 Foo Sara a itatola a re: “Ga ke a tshega!” gonne a boifa. Ene a re: “Nnyaa, o no o tshega.”" 
Genesis18:16 Banna ba, ba tloga gone foo, ba leba kwa Sotoma, Aberahame a ya nabo go ba buledisa." 
Genesis18:17 Jehofa a re: “A ke tlaa lobela Aberahame se ke se dirang? 
Genesis18:18 E tswa Aberahame ruri a tlaa nna morafe o mogolo le o o thata, e bile merafe yotlhe e tlaa segofala mo go ene." 
Genesis18:19 Gonne ke mo tlhophile gore a tle a nne a laole bana ba gagwe, le ba ntlo ya gagwe morago ga gagwe, gore ba boloke tsela ya Jehofa go dira tshiamiso le katlholo gore Jehofa a tle a tlise mo go Aberahame se o se buileng ka ga gagwe.”" 
Genesis18:20 Jehofa a re: “E re ka selelo ka ga Sotoma le Gomora se le segolo, le ka boleo jwa bone bo utlwisa botlhoko thata," 
Genesis18:21 ke tlaa fologa jaana, ke ya go bona boo ba dirile gotlhe fela ka fa selelong se se fitlhileng kwa go nna; fa go sa nna jalo, ke tlaa itse.”" 
Genesis18:22 Banna ba, ba sokologa gone, ba tsamaela kwa Sotoma, mme Aberahame a nama a sa eme fa pele ga Jehofa." 
Genesis18:23 Aberahame a atamela a re: “A o tlaa nyeletsa basiami le baikepi? 
Genesis18:24 E tlaa re fa gongwe go ka nna le basiami ba le 50 mo motseng, a o tlaa nyeletsa o sa rekegele motse oo ka ntlha ya basiami ba ba 50 ba ba gone?" 
Genesis18:25 A go nne kgakala nao go dira mo go ntseng jalo, go bolaya basiami le baikepi, ka e tlaa bo e le go re basiami ba ntse jaaka baikepi. Golo mo, a go nne kgakala nao; a Moatlhodi wa lefatshe lotlhe ga a ketla a dira tshiamo?”" 
Genesis18:26 Jehofa a re: “E tlaa re fa ke fitlhela basiami ba le 50 mo Sotoma, mo teng ga motse, foo ke tlaa rekegela gotlhe ka ntlha ya bone.”" 
Genesis18:27 Aberahame a fetola a re: “Bona jaana, nna yo ke leng lorole le molora, ke ipeile go bua le Jehofa." 
Genesis18:28 E tlaa re gongwe go tlhokafale ba le batlhano mo basiaming ba ba 50, a o tlaa senya motse otlhe ka go tlhoka ba le batlhano?” Mme a re: “Ga nketla ke o senya fa ke fitlhela ba le 45 gone.”" 
Genesis18:29 A fela a bua nae gape, a re: “E tlaa re gongwe go fitlhelwe ba le 40 gone.” Mme a re: “Ga nke ke go dira ka ntlha ya ba ba 40.”" 
Genesis18:30 A re: “A Morena wa me a se ka a nna bogale, ke tlaa bua. E tlaa re gongwe go fitlhelwe ba le 30 gone.” A re: “Ga nketla ke go dira fa ke fitlhela ba le 30 gone.”" 
Genesis18:31 A re: “Bona, jaana, ke ipeile go bua le Morena; e tlaa re gongwe go fitlhelwe ba le 20 gone.” Mme a re: “Ga nketla ke o senya ka ntlha ya ba ba 20.”" 
Genesis18:32 A re: “A Morena wa me a se ka a nna bogale, ke tlaa fela ke bua gangwe fela gape; e tlaa re gongwe go fitlhelwe ba le some gone.” A re: “Ga nketla ke o senya ka ntlha ya ba ba some.”" 
Genesis18:33 Jehofa a tsamaya a sena go khutla go bua le Aberahame; Aberahame a boela kwa ga gagwe. 
Genesis19:1 Baengele ba babedi ba fitlha kwa Sotoma go le maitseboa, Lote a bo a dutse fa kgorong ya Sotoma. Ya re Lote a ba bona, a nanoga a ya go ba kgatlhantsha, a ikobela ka sefatlhogo fa fatshe." 
Genesis19:2 A re: “Bonang jaana, barena ba me, ke a lo rapela, a lo ke lo fapogele mo ntlong ya motlhanka wa lona, lo lale, lo itlhapise dinao tsa lona, lo tlaa phakela lo tsamaya.” Ba re: “Nnyaa re tlaa lala mo mmileng.”" 
Genesis19:3 A ba rapela thata, ke fa ba fapogela mo go ene, ba tsena mo ntlong ya gagwe; a ba direla modiro, a besa senkgwe se se sa bedisiwang, ba a ja." 
Genesis19:4 E rile ba ise ba robale, banna ba motse, e bong banna ba Sotoma, ba dika ntlo, bannye le bagolo, batho botlhe ba tswa ntlheng tsotlhe fela." 
Genesis19:5 Ba goa Lote, ba mo raya ba re: “Banna ba ba tsenyeng mo go wena sigong jono ba fa kae? Ba ntshetse kwano go rona, gore re tlhakanele dikobo nabo.”" 
Genesis19:6 Lote a tswela kwa go bone kwa mojakong, a tswala ntlo morago ga gagwe." 
Genesis19:7 A re: “Ke a lo rapela bana ba ga rra, lo se ka lwa dira bosula jo bo kalo." 
Genesis19:8 Bonang jaana ke na le bana ba basetsana ba le babedi ba ba iseng ba itse monna; ke a lo rapela, lo mme ke ba ntshetse kwa go lona, mme lo dire ka bone se se rategang mo matlhong a lona; mme banna ba, lo se ka lwa ba dira sepe, ka e le fa ba tsenye ka fa tlase ga moriti wa ditlhomeso tsa me.”" 
Genesis19:9 Ba re: “Thiboga foo.” Ba ba ba re: “Seo se sa motho se ne se tsile go jaka fela, mme jaanong o rata go re laola; jaana re tlaa go direla maswe bogolo go bone.” Ba pitlelela monna yo thata, e bong Lote, ba atamela, ba tla go thuba setswalo." 
Genesis19:10 Banna ba, ba ntsha letsogo, ba gogela Lote kwa go bone mo ntlong, mme ba tswala ntlo." 
Genesis19:11 Banna ba ba ka fa mojakong wa ntlo ba ba foufatsa, bannye le bagolo; jalo ba itapisa fela ka gore ba senka mojako." 
Genesis19:12 Banna bao ba raya Lote ba re: “Fa o sa na le bangwe gape mono, bagwe ba gago le bomorwao, le bomorwadio, le mongwe fela yo o nang nao mo motseng, o ba ntshe felong fa;" 
Genesis19:13 gonne re tlaa senya felo fa, ka gobo selelo ka ga bone se diregile sekgobo fa pele ga Jehofa; jalo Jehofa o re romile gore re senye Sotoma.”" 
Genesis19:14 Lote a tswela kwa ntle, a ya go bua le bagwe ba gagwe ba ba neng ba tlaa tsaya bomorwadie a re: “Nanogang lo tswe felong fa, gonne Jehofa o tlaa senya motse o.” Mme mo go bagwe ba gagwe ya ne ekete ke motho yo o sotlang." 
Genesis19:15 E rile bosigo bo anoga, foo baengele ba akofisa Lote ba re: “Nanoga, o tseye mosadi wa gago le bomorwadio ba babedi, ba ba fano; o ka tla wa nyelediwa mo tshiamologong ya motse.”" 
Genesis19:16 Mme a diega; banna bao ba mo tshwara ka seatla, le seatla sa mosadi wa gagwe, le seatla sa bomorwadie ba babedi, ka Jehofa a mo utlwela botlhoko. Ba mo ntshetsa kwa ntle, ba mmaya kwa ntle ga motse." 
Genesis19:17 Ga dirala ya re ba sena go ba ntshetsa koo kwa ntle, a mo raya a re: “Tshaba o iphedise; se gadime, le gone o se ka wa emaema mo lobaleng lotlhe fela. Tshabela kwa thabeng, o tle o se ka wa nyelediwa.”" 
Genesis19:18 Lote a ba raya a re: “Nnyaa Jehofa wa me, a go se nne jalo!" 
Genesis19:19 Bona jaana, motlhanka wa gago o bonye bopelotlhomogi mo matlhong a gago, mme o totisitse kutlwelobotlhoko ya gago e o e ntshupeditseng ka go boloka botshelo jwa me; fela, ke palelwa ke go tshabela kwa dithabeng, ka e ka tla ya re gongwe bosula jwa ntshwara, mme ka swa." 
Genesis19:20 Bona jaana, motse o, o gaufi go ka tshabela kwa go one, e bile o monnye. A ko o mme ke tshabele gone, a ga o monnye? Mowa wa me o tlaa tshela.”" 
Genesis19:21 A mo raya a re: “Bona le ka ga selo se ke go amogetse gore ga nketla ke ribegetsa motse o o buileng ka ga one. 
Genesis19:22 Akofa o tshabele gone, gonne ga nkake ka dira sepe o ise o fitlhe gone.” Ke gone ka moo leina la motse le bidiwa Soare, ke go re, Monnye." 
Genesis19:23 E rile Lote a fitlha mo Soare, letsatsi la bo le tlhabile." 
Genesis19:24 Foo Jehofa a nesetsa Sotoma le Gomora sulefura le molelo mo go tswang kwa go Jehofa mo legodimong. 
Genesis19:25 A ribegetsa metse eo, le lobala lotlhe fela, le banni botlhe ba metse le se se melang mo mmung." 
Genesis19:26 Mosadi wa gagwe a gadima a le fa morago ga gagwe, mme a tswa motlhoboloko wa letswai." 
Genesis19:27 Aberahame a phakelela kwa felong fa o neng a eme gone fa pele ga Jehofa. 
Genesis19:28 A leba kwa Sotoma le Gomora, le kwa lefatsheng lotlhe la lobala, a leba, mme mosi wa lefatshe wa bo o tlhatloga jaaka mosi wa leiso la leubelo." 
Genesis19:29 Ga dirala, ya re Modimo o senya metse ya lobala, Modimo wa gopola Aberahame, wa ntsha Lote mo gare ga thibegetso, fa o ribegetsa metse e Lote o neng a agile mo go yone." 
Genesis19:30 Lote a tlhatloga mo Soare, a aga mo thabeng, le bomorwadie ba babedi nae, ka gobo a boifa go aga mo Soare; a aga mo logageng, ene le bomorwadie ba babedi." 
Genesis19:31 Yo mogolo a raya yo mmotlana a re: “Rraarona o tsofetse, mme ga go na monna mo lefatsheng yo o ka tsenang mo go rona ka fa mokgweng wa lefatshe lotlhe." 
Genesis19:32 Ntlo re nose rraarona bojalwa jwa mofine, re tlaa lala nae, gore re tle re boloke losika lwa ga rraarona.”" 
Genesis19:33 Ba nosa rraabo bojalwa jwa mofine sigong joo: yo mogolo a tsena a lala le rraagwe; mme a se ka a lemoga go robala ga gagwe, le fa e le go tsoga ga gagwe." 
Genesis19:34 Ga dirala ya re ka moso, yo mogolo a raya yo mmotlana a re: “Bona, sigo jwa maabane ke letse le rre; a re mo nose bojalwa jwa mofine sigo jono le jone; wena o tsene, o lale nae, gore re tle re boloke losika lwa ga rraarona.”" 
Genesis19:35 Ba nosa rraabo bojalwa jwa mofine le ka jone sigo joo. Yo mmotlana a tloga a lala nae; mme a se ka a lemoga go robala ga gagwe, le fa e le go tsoga ga gagwe." 
Genesis19:36 Jalo bomorwadia Lote boo babedi ba imisiwa ke rraabo. 
Genesis19:37 Yo mogolo a bona ngwana wa mosimane, a mo raya leina a re: Moabe. Ke ene rra Bamoabe le gompieno." 
Genesis19:38 Yo mmotlana le ene a bona ngwana wa mosimane, a mo raya leina a re, Benami. Ke ene rra bana ba ga Amone le gompieno." 
Genesis20:1 Aberahame a tswa gone a etela kwa lefatsheng le le kwa Borwa, a aga fa gare ga Kateše le Shure; a jaka mo Gerare." 
Genesis20:2 Aberahame a bua ka ga Sara, mosadi wa gagwe, a re: “Ke kgaitsadiake:” Abimeleke kgosi ya Gerare a roma a ya go tsaya Sara." 
Genesis20:3 Modimo wa tla mo go Abimeleke ka toro bosigo, wa mo raya wa re: “Bona, o moswi fela ka ntlha ya mosadi yo o mo tsereng; ka gobo e le mosadi wa monna o sele.”" 
Genesis20:4 Jaana Abimeleke o ne a ise a mo atamele; a re: “Morena a o tlaa bolaya le morafe o o siameng? 
Genesis20:5 A le ene ka esi ga a nthaya a re: ‘Ke kgaitsadiake’? Le ene mosadi ka esi o rile: ‘Ke kgaitsadie.’ Ke dirile seo se ka pelo e e siameng fela, le ka diatla tse di phepa fela.”" 
Genesis20:6 Modimo wa mo raya mo torong wa re: “Ee, ke a itse fa o dirile seo se ka pelo e e siameng fela, le gone le nna ka go kganela gore o se ka wa nteofela. Ke gone ka mo ke se kang ka go leseletsa go mo ama." 
Genesis20:7 Ke gone jaana, rebolela monna mosadi wa gagwe; gonne ene ke moperofite, o tlaa go rapelela, mme o tlaa tshela. Fa o sa mo rebole, o bo o itse fa ruri o tlaa swa, wena le botlhe ba e leng ba gago.”" 
Genesis20:8 Abimeleke a phakela ka moso, a bitsa batlhanka botlhe ba gagwe, a bolela dilo tse mo ditsebeng tsa bone; banna ba boifa thata." 
Genesis20:9 Foo Abimeleke a bitsa Aberahame, a mo raya a re: “Ana o re diretse eng? Ke go leofetse mo go eng fa e bo ne ne jaana o tliseditse nna, le bogosi jwa me namane e tona ya boleo? O ntiretse ditiro tse di sa tshwanelang go dirwa.”" 
Genesis20:10 Abimeleke a raya Aberahame a re: “O ne o ikaeletse eng fa o ne o dira jaana?” 
Genesis20:11 Aberahame a re: “Ke ka gonne ke ne ke gopotse gore ruri ga go na ope yo o boifang Modimo mo felong fano. Ka re, ba tlaa mpolaya ka ntlha ya mosadi wa me." 
Genesis20:12 Le mororo ruri ke kgaitsadiake, morwadia rre, mme e seng morwadia mme, mme a tla a nna mosadi wa me." 
Genesis20:13 E rile Modimo o nkgarakgatsha ke tswa ntlong ya ga rre, ka raya mosadi ka re: ‘Pelonomi ke e, e o tlaa e ntshupetsang; felong gongwe le gongwe kwa re tlaa fitlhang gone, o bolele ka ga me o re: Ke kgaitsadiake.’ ”" 
Genesis20:14 Abimeleke a tsaya dinku le dikgomo, le batlhanka, le malata, a di naya Aberahame, a ba a mo rebolela Sara mosadi wa gagwe." 
Genesis20:15 Abimeleke a re: “Bona, lefatshe la me ke leo le fa pele ga gago; aga fela kwa o go ratang.”" 
Genesis20:16 A raya Sara a re: “Bona, ke neile kgaitsadio dipapetla tsa selefera di le 1 000. Bona, ke sebipo sa matlho mo go botlhe ba o nang nabo; mme o siamisitswe fa pele ga batho botlhe.”" 
Genesis20:17 Aberahame a rapela Modimo; Modimo wa fodisa Abimeleke, le mosadi wa gagwe, le malata a gagwe; ba bona bana." 
Genesis20:18 Gonne Jehofa o ne a tswaletse ruri dipopelo tsotlhe tsa ba ntlo ya ga Abimeleke, ka ntlha ya ga Sara, mosadi wa ga Aberahame." 
Genesis21:1 Jehofa a lekola Sara jaaka a dikile a buile, Jehofa a direla Sara jaaka buile." 
Genesis21:2 Sara a nna moimana a bona ngwana wa mosimane le Aberahame, mo botsofeng jwa gagwe, ka lobaka lo lo laotsweng, lo Modimo o kileng wa bua nae ka ga lone." 
Genesis21:3 Aberahame a raya morwawe yo o mo tsetseng, yo Sara o mmonyeng nae leina, a re, Isake." 
Genesis21:4 Mme Aberahame a rupisa morwawe Isake a le malatsi a 8 jaaka Modimo o ne o mo laotse. 
Genesis21:5 E rile Aberahame a tshola Isake morwawe, a bo a le dinyaga di le 100." 
Genesis21:6 Mme Sara a re: “Modimo o mpolaisitse ditshego; mongwe le mongwe yo o utlwang o tlaa tshega le nna.” 
Genesis21:7 A re: “Go ne go ka bua mang a raya Aberahame a re: ‘Sara o tlaa amusa bana’? Gonne ke bonye nae ngwana wa mosimane mo botsofeng jwa gagwe.” 
Genesis21:8 Ngwana a tutuga, a kgwisiwa. Aberahame a dira modiro o mogolo ka letsatsi le Isake o kgwisiwang ka lone." 
Genesis21:9 Sara a bona morwa Hagare wa Moegepeto, yo o mmonyeng le Aberahame, a sotla." 
Genesis21:10 Ka ntlha ya moo a raya Aberahame a re: “Leleka mosadi wa lelata le morwawe, gonne morwa mosadi yo wa lelata ga a ketla a nna moja boswa le morwaake, e bong Isake.”" 
Genesis21:11 Selo se, sa nna botlhoko thata mo matlhong a ga Aberahame ka ntlha ya ga morwawe." 
Genesis21:12 Modimo wa raya Aberahame wa re: “A go se nne botlhoko mo matlhong a gago ka ntlha ya mosimane, le ka ntlha ya mosadi wa gago wa lelata. O nne o reetse lentswe la ga Sara mo go tsotlhe tse o di go rayang; gonne losika lwa gago lo tlaa bidiwa ka Isake." 
Genesis21:13 Le gone ke tlaa dira morafe ka ene morwa mosadi wa lelata, ka e le losika lwa gago.”" 
Genesis21:14 Aberahame a phakela ka moso, a tsaya senkgwe le sepako sa metsi, a di naya Hagare, a di baya mo maruding a gagwe, le ngwana, a mo tsamaisa; a tsamaya, a kgarakgatshega mo nageng ya Beerešeba." 
Genesis21:15 Metsi a fela mo sepakong, mme a latlhela ngwana fa tlase ga setlhatshana sengwe." 
Genesis21:16 A ya a dula a lebaganye nae kwa kgakalanyana, go le jaaka kwa motho o ka hulelang motswi gone, gonne a re: “A ke se ka ka bona go swa ga ngwana.” A dula a lebaganye nae, a tsholetsa lentswe la gagwe, a lela." 
Genesis21:17 Modimo wa utlwa lentswe la mosimane; moengele wa Modimo a bitsa Hagare a le kwa legodimong, a mo raya a re: “Go a reng, Hagare? O se ka wa boifa, gonne Modimo o utlwile lentswe la mosimane kwa o gone." 
Genesis21:18 Nanoga, o kakatlolole ngwana, o mo tshegetse ka letsogo; gonne ke tlaa mo dira morafe o mogolo.”" 
Genesis21:19 Modimo wa budulola matlho a gagwe, a bona sediba sa metsi, a ya a gelela sepako, a nosa mosimane." 
Genesis21:20 Modimo wa nna le mosimane, a gola; a aga mo nageng, a tswa mohula-ka-bora." 
Genesis21:21 A aga mo nageng ya Parane. Mmaagwe a mo tseisa mosadi kwa lefatsheng la Egepeto. 
Genesis21:22 Ga dirala ya re ka lobaka loo, Abimeleke a na le Pikole, molaodi wa ntwa ya gagwe, a bua le Aberahame a re: “Modimo o na nao mo go tsotlhe tse o di dirang." 
Genesis21:23 Ke gone jaana, inkanele fano ka Modimo, fa o se ketla o mpherekanela le fa e le morwaake, le fa e le morwa ngwanake. Fela ka fa pelonoming e ke e go diretseng, o tlaa e ntirela o bo o direla lefatshe le o jakileng mo go lone.”" 
Genesis21:24 Aberahame a re: “Ke tlaa ikana.” 
Genesis21:25 Aberahame a omanya Abimeleke ka ntlha ya sediba sa metsi se batlhanka ba ga Abimeleke ba se tsereng ka dikgoka. 
Genesis21:26 Abimeleke a re: “Ga ke itse yo o dirileng selo se; le gone ga o a ka wa mpolelela, le gone ga ke ise ke utlwe, ke utlwa gompieno fela.”" 
Genesis21:27 Aberahame a tsaya dinku le dikgomo, a di naya Abimeleke; mme bobedi jwa bone ba dira kgolagano." 
Genesis21:28 Aberahame a beela dikwanyana tse di namagatsana di supa fa thoko. 
Genesis21:29 Abimeleke a raya Aberahame a re: “Kana dikwanyana tse di namagatsana tse di supang, tse o di beileng di le tsosi, di kaya eng?”" 
Genesis21:30 A re: “Dikwanyana tse di namagatsana tse di supang tse, o di tseye mo seatleng sa me, gore e nne sesupo sa me fa ke epile sediba se.”" 
Genesis21:31 Ke gone ka moo felo foo a go raya leina a re, Beerešeba, ka gobo ba ikanalanye boo babedi." 
Genesis21:32 Jalo ba dira kgolagano mo Beerešeba; Abimeleke a nanoga le Pikole molaodi wa ntwa ya gagwe, ba boela kwa lefatsheng la Bafilisitia." 
Genesis21:33 Aberahame a tlhoma setlhare sa motamariseka mo Beerešeba; le gone leina la ga Jehofa, “Modimo o o sa khutleng”, a le bitsa gone." 
Genesis21:34 Aberahame a nna a jaka mo lefatsheng la Bafilisitia ka malatsi a le mantsi. 
Genesis22:1 Ga dirala ya re morago ga dilo tse, Modimo wa leka Aberahame, wa mo raya wa re: “Aberahame!” A araba a re: “Ke fano.”" 
Genesis22:2 Wa re: “Tsaya morwao jaana, morwao yo o esi, yo o mo ratang, e bong Isake, o ye kwa lefatsheng la Moria, o mo dire tshupelo ya phiso gone, mo thabeng nngwe e ke tlaa e go bolelelang.”" 
Genesis22:3 Aberahame a phakela ka moso, a belesa esela ya gagwe, a ba a tsaya makau a gagwe a le mabedi, le Isake morwawe; a fatsetsa tshupelo ya phiso dikgong, a nanoga a ya felong kwa Modimo o go mmoleletseng." 
Genesis22:4 Ya re ka letsatsi la boraro Aberahame a tsholetsa matlho a gagwe, a bona felo foo kwa kgakala." 
Genesis22:5 Aberahame a raya makau a gagwe a re: “Salang fa le esela. Nna le mosimane re tlaa ya fale; re tlaa obama, re ba re boela kwano go lona.”" 
Genesis22:6 Aberahame a tsaya dikgong tsa tshupelo ya phiso, a di baya mo go Isake morwawe; a tsaya molelo ka seatla sa gagwe, le thipa; ba tsamaya mmogo boo babedi." 
Genesis22:7 Isake a bua le Aberahame rraagwe a re: “Rra!” A re: “Ke fano, morwaaka.” A re: “Bona, molelo ke o, le dikgong; mme kwanyana ya tshupelo ya phiso e kae?”" 
Genesis22:8 Aberahame a re: “Morwaaka, Modimo o tlaa ipatlela kwanyana ya tshupelo ya phiso.” Jalo ba tsamaya mmogo boo babedi." 
Genesis22:9 Ba tla ba fitlha felong kwa Modimo o go mmoleletseng. Aberahame a aga sebeso gone, a rulaganya dikgong, a golega Isake morwawe, a mmaya mo sebesong mo godimo ga dikgong." 
Genesis22:10 Aberahame a ntsha letsogo a tsaya thipa, a re o bolaya morwawe," 
Genesis22:11 mme moengele wa ga Jehofa a mmitsa a le kwa legodimong a re: “Aberahame, Aberahame!” A re: “Ke fano.”" 
Genesis22:12 A re: “O se ka wa baya mosimane seatla sa gago, le gone o se ka wa mo dira sepe; ka jaanong ke a itse fa o boifa Modimo, ka e le fa o se ka wa gana ka morwao yo o esi, fa ke mo tsaya.”" 
Genesis22:13 Aberahame a tsholetsa matlho a gagwe a leba, a bona, fa morago ga gagwe ga bo go le phelefu, e tshwerwe ka dinaka mo sekgweng. Aberahame a ya a tsaya phelefu, a e isa tshupelo ya phiso mo boemong jwa ga morwawe." 
Genesis22:14 Aberahame a raya felo foo leina a re, Monei; jaaka go tle go buiwe le gompieno go twe, “Mo thabeng ya ga Jehofa-o-a-naya”." 
Genesis22:15 Moengele wa ga Jehofa a bitsa Aberahame lwa bobedi a le kwa legodimong a re: 
Genesis22:16 “Ke ikanne ka nna ka nosi, go bua Jehofa, ka o dirile selo se, wa se ka wa gana ka morwao yo o esi," 
Genesis22:17 ke tlaa go segofatsa, ke ntsifatsa losika lwa gago jaaka dinaledi tsa legodimo, le jaaka mošawa o o mo dintshing tsa lewatle. Losika lwa gago lo tlaa rua kgoro ya metse ya baba ba lona."
