Genesis22:18 Merafe yotlhe ya lefatshe e tlaa segofala mo losikeng lwa gago, ka o utlwile lentswe la me.”" 
Genesis22:19 Jalo Aberahame a boela kwa makaung a gagwe, ba nanoga ba tsamaya mmogo ba ya Beerešeba. Mme Aberahame a aga mo Beerešeba." 
Genesis22:20 Ya re morago ga dilo tse Aberahame a bolelelwa ga twe: “Bonang, Mileka le ene o bonye bana le Nahore, monnao." 
Genesis22:21 Use, wa ntlha wa gagwe, le Buse monnawe, le Kemuele rra Arame," 
Genesis22:22 le Kesete, le Haso, le Piletaše, le Jitelafe, le Bethuele.”" 
Genesis22:23 Bethuele a tshola Rebeka. Ba ba ferang mebedi ba, Mileka a ba bona le Nahore, monnaa Aberahame." 
Genesis22:24 Mogadingwana wa gagwe, yo leina la gagwe go tweng Reuma, le ene a bona Teba, le Gahame, le Tahaše, le Maaka." 
Genesis23:1 Botshelo jwa ga Sara e ne e le dinyaga di le 127; e ne e le tsone dinyaga tsa botshelo jwa ga Sara. 
Genesis23:2 Sara a swela mo Kiriathe-areba, ke gore, Heberone, mo lefatsheng la Kanana. Aberahame a hutsafalela Sara le go mo lelela." 
Genesis23:3 Aberahame a tswa fa pele ga moswi wa gagwe, a bua le bana ba ga Hethe, a re:" 
Genesis23:4 “Ke moeng le mojaki fela mo go lona. Nnayang felo ga phitlhelo mo go lona, e nne ga me, gore ke fitlhe moswi wa me, ke mo tlose mo matlhong a me.”" 
Genesis23:5 Bana ba ga Hethe ba fetola Aberahame ba mo raya ba re: 
Genesis23:6 “Re utlwile morena wa me. O kgosana e kgolo thata mo go rona. Fitlha moswi wa gago mo go e e leng ntle ya diphupu tsa rona, fitlha moswi wa gago. Ga go na ope mo go rona yo o tlaa ganang ka phupu ya gagwe fa o e tsaya, gore o tle o fitlhe moswi wa gago.”" 
Genesis23:7 Aberahame a ema a ikobela beng ba lefatshe, e bong bana ba ga Hethe." 
Genesis23:8 A bua nabo a re: “Fa e le go rata ga lona gore ke fitlhe moswi wa me, ke mo tlose mo matlhong a me, lo nkutlwe, lo nthapelele mo go Eferone, morwa Sohare," 
Genesis23:9 gore a nneye logaga lwa Makapela, lo o nang nalo, lo lo fa sekhutlong sa sebata sa naga ya gagwe. A lo nneye ka tlhwatlhwa e e tshwanetseng, a dire mo ga lona, gore e nne felo ga me ga phitlhelo.”" 
Genesis23:10 Eferone a bo a dutse mo gare ga bana ba ga Hethe. Eferone wa Mohite a fetola Aberahame mo kutlong ya bana ba ga Hethe, e bong botlhe ba ba tsenang ka kgoro ya motse wa gagwe," 
Genesis23:11 a re: “Nyaa, morena wa me, o nkutlwe. Sebata sa naga ke a se go naya, le logaga lo lo mo go sone ke a lo go naya, fa pele ga bomorwa batho ba gaetsho ke a go go naya. Fitlha moswi wa gago.”" 
Genesis23:12 Aberahame a ikoba fa pele ga batho ba lefatshe. 
Genesis23:13 A bua le Eforone mo kutlong ya batho ba lefatshe a re: “Fa o rata, ke a go rapela, o nkutlwe. Ke tlaa go naya tlhwatlhwa ya sebata sa naga; e tseye mo go nna, mme ke tlaa fitlha moswi wa me gone.”" 
Genesis23:14 Eferone a fetola Aberahame a mo raya a re: 
Genesis23:15 “Morena wa me, a ko o nkutlwe; kana sebata sa lefatshe se se lekanyweng ke dipapetla tsa selefera di le 400, e bo e le eng fa gare ga me nao? Ka re, fitlha moswi wa gago fela.”" 
Genesis23:16 Aberahame a utlwa Eferone; Aberahame a lekanyetsa Eferone selefera e o e badileng mo kutlong ya bana ba ga Hethe, dipapetla di le 400 tsa selefera, e le madi a a neng a tle a dumalanwe ke barekisi." 
Genesis23:17 Jalo sebata sa naga ya ga Eferone se se mo Makapela, se se potileng Mamere ka kwano, go le sebata sa naga, le logaga lo lo mo go sone, le ditlhare tsotlhe tse di mo sebateng seo sa naga, le tse di mo molelwaneng tikologong ya sone, tsa tlhomamisediwa." 
Genesis23:18 Aberahame go nna boswa fa pele ga bana ba ga Hethe, fa pele ga botlhe ba ba tsenang ka kgoro ya motse wa gagwe." 
Genesis23:19 Morago ga mo, Aberahame a fitlha Sara mosadi wa gagwe mo logageng lwa sebata sa naga ya Makapela, ka kwano ga Mamere, ke go re, Heberone, mo lefatsheng la Kanana." 
Genesis23:20 Sebata sa naga, le logaga lo lo mo go sone ga tlhomamisediwa Aberahame ke bana ba ga Hethe go nna felo ga phitlhelo." 
Genesis24:1 Aberahame o ne a tsofetse, a tsofetse ruri, mme Jehofa o ne a segofaditse Aberahame mo dilong tsotlhe." 
Genesis24:2 Aberahame a raya motlhanka wa gagwe, mogolwane wa ntlo ya gagwe yo o laolang tsotlhe tse o nang natso a re: “Ke a go rapela, baya seatla sa gago se segolo fa tlase ga serope sa me," 
Genesis24:3 gore o ikane ka Jehofa Modimo wa legodimo, le Modimo wa lefatshe, fa o se ketla o tseisa morwaake mosadi wa bomorwadia Bakanana ba ke agileng mo go bone;" 
Genesis24:4 mme o tlaa ya kwa lefatsheng la gaetsho, le kwa go ba e leng ba gaetsho, o ya go tseisa morwaake Isake mosadi gone.”" 
Genesis24:5 Motlhanka a mo raya a re: “E tlaa re gongwe mosadi a se ke a rate go ntshala morago go tla kwano lefatsheng leno? A e tlaa bo e le gore ke be ke ise morwao kwa lefatsheng le o tswang kwa go lone?” 
Genesis24:6 Aberahame a mo raya a re: “O itise gore o se ka wa ba wa isa morwaake gone. 
Genesis24:7 Jehofa Modimo wa legodimo, yo o nntshitseng mo ntlong ya ga rre le mo lefatsheng la botsalelo jwa me, yo o bileng a bua le nna, a ba a inkanela a re: ‘Lefatshe le, ke tlaa le naya losika lwa gago,’ ene o tlaa roma moengele wa gagwe fa pele ga gago, o tlaa tseisa morwaake mosadi wa gone." 
Genesis24:8 E tlaa re fa mosadi a sa rate go go sala morago, foo o tlaa bo o gololesegile mo maikanong a; fa e se gore, o se ka wa ba wa isa morwaake gone, ke gone gosi fela.”" 
Genesis24:9 Motlhanka a baya seatla sa gagwe fa tlase ga serope sa ga Aberahame, mong wa gagwe, a mo ikanela mabapi le kopo e." 
Genesis24:10 Motlhanka a tsaya dikamela di le some mo dikameleng tsa mong wa gagwe, a tsamaya. A bo a tshotse dilo dingwe tse dintle tsa tsotlhe tsa mong wa gagwe mo seatleng; a nanoga a ya kwa Mesopotamia, kwa motseng wa ga Nahore." 
Genesis24:11 A khubamisa dikamela ka mangole ka fa ntle ga motse, fa sedibeng sa metsi go le lobaka lwa maitseboa, e le lwa basadi go ya go ga metsi." 
Genesis24:12 A re: “Jehofa, Modimo wa ga mongwake Aberahame, ke a go rapela, o ntlisetse letlhogonolo gompieno, o bo o supetse mongwake Aberahame pelonomi." 
Genesis24:13 Bona, ke eme fa motsweding wa metsi, bomorwadia banna ba motse ba tla go ga metsi." 
Genesis24:14 A go dirafale gore morweetsana yo ke tlaa mo rayang ke re: ‘Ke a go rapela, a ko o sekege nkgwana ya gago gore ke nwe,’ mme fa a tlaa re: ‘Nwa, le dikamela tsa gago ke tlaa di nosa,’ ene yoo, e nne ene yo o mo laoletseng motlhanka wa gago Isake; ke tlaa bo ke itse ka mo fa o supeditse mongwake pelonomi.”" 
Genesis24:15 Ga dirala ya re a ise a swetse go bua, bona, Rebeka a tswa, ene yo o tsetsweng ke Bethuele morwa Mileka, mosadi wa ga Nahore, monnaa Aberahame, a tswa a beile nkgwana ya gagwe mo legetleng." 
Genesis24:16 Morweetsana a bo a le montle thata go lejwa, e le kgarebana, le gone a ise a itsiwe ke monna ope. A fologela mo motsweding, a gelela nkgwana ya gagwe, a ba a tlhatloga." 
Genesis24:17 Motlhanka a siana a ya go mo kgatlhantsha a re: “Ke a go rapela, a ko o nnose metsinyana mo nkgwaneng ya gago.”" 
Genesis24:18 Ene a re: “Nwa, morena wa me.” A akofa a rolela nkgwana ya gagwe mo seatleng, a mo nosa." 
Genesis24:19 E rile a sena go swetsa go mo nosa a re: “Le dikamela tsa gago ke tlaa di gelelela di tsamaye di sweditse go nwa.” 
Genesis24:20 A akofa a tshela a nkgwana mo mokorong, a sianela gape kwa sedibeng go ga, a gelelela dikamela tsotlhe tsa gagwe." 
Genesis24:21 Monna yo a mo tlhoma matlho thata; a itidimalela fela, gore a itse boo Jehofa a tlhogonolofaditse loeto lwa gagwe kgotsa nnyaa." 
Genesis24:22 Ga dirala ya re dikamela di sena go nwa, monna a tsaya lenyena la gouta le le bokete jwa dikerame di le 5,5, le maseka a le mabedi a mabogo a le bokete jwa dikerame di le 110 tsa gouta." 
Genesis24:23 A re: “O morwadia mang? Ke a go rapela, mpolelela; a go na le bonno mo ntlong ya ga rraago gore re lale gone?”" 
Genesis24:24 A mo raya a re: “Ke morwadia Bethuele, morwa Mileka, yo o mmonyeng le Nahore.”" 
Genesis24:25 A fela a mo raya a re: “Re na le lotlhaka le dijo tse di lekanyeng, le bonno jwa go lala.”" 
Genesis24:26 Monna a inamisa tlhogo a obamela Jehofa. 
Genesis24:27 A re: “A go bakwe Jehofa Modimo wa ga Aberahame mongwake, yo o sa latlhang kutlwelo botlhoko ya gagwe le boammaaruri jwa gagwe ka ga mongwake. Ka ga me, Jehofa o nkgogetse mo tseleng e e tlang mo ntlong ya bana ba ga rraagwe mongwake.”" 
Genesis24:28 Morweetsana a siana a ya a bolelela ba ntlo ya ga mmaagwe ka fa mafokong a. 
Genesis24:29 Rebeka a bo a na le kgaitsadie, leina la gagwe go twe Labane. Mme Labane a sianela kwa monneng yole kwa motsweding." 
Genesis24:30 Labane o ne a bonye lenyena, le maseka a mabogo a ga kgaitsadie, a bile a utlwile mafoko a ga Rebeka kgaitsadie a re, monna yo o ntheile jaana le jaana. A tla mo monneng, mme bona, a bo a eme le dikamela fa motsweding." 
Genesis24:31 A re: “Tsena, wena mosegofadiwa wa ga Jehofa! O emetseng fa ntle? Gonne ke baakantse ntlo le bonno jwa dikamela.”" 
Genesis24:32 Monna yo a tsena mo ntlong. Labane a belesolola dikamela, a mo naya lotlhaka le dijo tsa dikamela, le metsi a go tlhapa dinao tsa gagwe, le dinao tsa banna ba o nang nabo." 
Genesis24:33 Ga bewa dijo fa pele ga gagwe gore a je, mme a re: “Ga nketla ke e ja ke ise ke bolele se ke se tletseng.” Labane a mo raya a re. “Bolela.”" 
Genesis24:34 A re: “Ke motlhanka wa ga Aberahame. 
Genesis24:35 Jehofa o segofaditse mongwake thata, a ba a tla a nna mogolo; o mo neile matsomane, matlhape, selefera, gouta, batlhanka, malata, dikamela le diesela." 
Genesis24:36 Sara, mosadi wa ga mongwake o rile a tsofetse a bona ngwana wa mosimane le mongwake. Ene o mo neile dilo tsotlhe tse o nang natso." 
Genesis24:37 Mongwake a inkanisa a re: ‘O se ka wa tseisa morwaake mosadi mo go bomorwadia Bakanana ba lefatshe le ke agileng mo go lone. 
Genesis24:38 O ye kwa ntlong ya ga rre, le kwa go bagaetsho, o ye go tseisa morwaake mosadi gone.’" 
Genesis24:39 Ka raya mongwake ka re: ‘E tlaa re gongwe mosadi a se ke a rate go ntshala morago.’ 
Genesis24:40 A nthaya a re: ‘Jehofa yo ke sepelang fa pele ga gagwe, o tlaa roma moengele wa gagwe go ya nao, a tlhogonolofatsa mosepele wa gago. O tlaa tseisa morwaake mosadi mo go bagaetsho, le mo go ba ntlo ya ga rre." 
Genesis24:41 Foo o tlaa bo o gololesegile mo maikanong a me fa o fitlha mo go bagaetsho; e tlaa re fa ba se ka ba mo go neela, o tlaa bo o gololesegile mo maikanong a me.’" 
Genesis24:42 “Ke fitlhile gompieno kwa motsweding ka re: ‘Jehofa, Modimo wa ga mongwake Aberahame, a e re fa jaana o tlhogonolofatsa mosepele wa me o ke o tsamayang," 
Genesis24:43 bona, ke eme fa motsweding wa metsi; a go dirale gore, morweetsana yo o tlaa tlang go ga, yo ke tlaa mo rayang ke re: “Ke a go rapela, o nnose metsinyana mo nkgwaneng ya gago;”" 
Genesis24:44 fa ene a tla a nthaya a re: “Go le wena nwa, le gone ke tlaa gelelela dikamela tsa gago,” a e nne mosadi yo Jehofa o mo laoletseng morwa mongwake.’" 
Genesis24:45 “E rile ke ise ke swetse go bua mo pelong ya me, bona, Rebeka a tswa a beile nkgwana mo legetleng la gagwe, a fologela mo motsweding, a ga. Ka mo raya ka re: ‘Ke a go rapela, mma ke nwe.’" 
Genesis24:46 A akofa a rola nkgwana mo legetleng la gagwe a re: ‘Nwa, ke tlaa ba ke nosa dikamela tsa gago le tsone.’ Jalo ka nwa, a ba a nosa dikamela le tsone." 
Genesis24:47 Ka mmotsa ka re: ‘O morwadia mang?’ Mme a re: ‘Ke morwadia Bethuele, morwa Nahore, yo Mileka o mmonyeng nae.’ Ka mo rwesa lenyena mo nkong ya gagwe le maseka mo mabogong a gagwe." 
Genesis24:48 Ka inamisa tlhogo ka obamela Jehofa. Ka baka Jehofa, Modimo wa ga mongwake Aberahame, yo o nkgogetseng mo tseleng e e siameng go tla ke tseisa morwa mongwake morwadia monnaa mongwake." 
Genesis24:49 Jaana, fa lo rata go direla mongwake ka pelonomi le boammaaruri, lo mpolelele; mme fa go sa nna jalo lo mpolelele; gore ke tle ke fapogele ka fa letsogong le le golo, kgotsa la molema.”" 
Genesis24:50 Foo Labane le Bethuele ba mo fetola ba re: “Selo se se tswa mo go Jehofa; ga re kake ra bua nao se se bosula, kgotsa se se molemo." 
Genesis24:51 Bona, Rebeka ke yo, o fa pele ga gago, mo tseye o tsamaye, a a nne mosadi wa morwa mong wa gago, jaaka Jehofa a buile.”" 
Genesis24:52 Ga dirala, ya re motlhanka wa ga Aberahame a utlwa mafoko a bone, a inamela fa fatshe fa pele ga Jehofa." 
Genesis24:53 Motlhanka a ntsha mekgabo ya selefera le mekgabo ya gouta, le diaparo, a di naya Rebeka. A ba a naya kgaitsadie le mmaagwe dilo tse di tlhokegang." 
Genesis24:54 Ba a ja, ba a nwa, ene le banna ba o nang nabo, ba lala gone ba tsoga ka moso. Ke fa ene a re: “Nnayang tsela gore ke ye kwa go mongwake.”" 
Genesis24:55 Kgaitsadie le mmaagwe ba re: “A morweetsana a tlhole malatsi mangwe le rona le fa a ka ne a le some, morago ga moo o tlaa tsamaya.”" 
Genesis24:56 Ene a ba raya a re: “Lo se ka lwa nkgoreletsa, etswa Jehofa a tlhogonolofaditse mosepele wa me. Nnayang tsela gore ke ye kwa go mongwake.”" 
Genesis24:57 Ba re: “A re bitseng morweetsana re utlwe gore ene a reng.” 
Genesis24:58 Ba bitsa Rebeka ba mo raya ba re: “A o tlaa tsamaya le monna yo?” A re: “Ke tlaa tsamaya.” 
Genesis24:59 Ba naya Rebeka kgaitsadia bone tsela le mmelegi wa gagwe, le motlhanka wa ga Aberahame, le banna ba gagwe." 
Genesis24:60 Ba segofatsa Rebeka, ba mo raya ba re: “Kgaitsadia rona, o nne mma batho ba le makgolo a makgolo a mantsi! A losika lwa gago lo rue kgoro ya ba ba lo ilang.”" 
Genesis24:61 Rebeka a nanoga le barweetsana ba gagwe, ba pagama dikamela ba sala monna yo morago. Motlhanka yo a tsaya Rebeka a tsamaya." 
Genesis24:62 Isake a bo a tla le tsela ya Beere-lahai-roi; gonne o ne a agile mo lefatsheng la Borwa. 
Genesis24:63 Isake a tswela kwa nageng go le maitseboa, a ya go tlhatlhanya, a tsholetsa matlho a gagwe, a leba mme bona, ga bo go tla dikamela." 
Genesis24:64 Rebeka le ene a tsholetsa matlho a gagwe a re a bona Isake, a pagologa kamela." 
Genesis24:65 A raya motlhanka a re: “Monna yo o tsamayang mo nageng a tla go re kgatlhantsha ke mang?” Motlhanka a re: “Ke mongwake.” A tsaya lesire a ipipa ka lone. 
Genesis24:66 Motlhanka a bolelela Isake dilo tsotlhe tse o di dirileng. 
Genesis24:67 Isake a mo isa mo mogopeng wa ga Sara, mmaagwe, mme a tsaya Rebeka a nna mosadi wa gagwe, a mo rata. Mme Isake a gomotsega morago ga loso lwa ga mmaagwe." 
Genesis25:1 Aberahame a tsaya mosadi yo mongwe, leina la gagwe go twe, Ketura." 
Genesis25:2 A bona nae Simerane, le Jokešane, le Metane le Midiane, le Išebake, la Shua." 
Genesis25:3 Jokešane a tshola Sheba, le Detane. Bomorwa Detane e ne e le Ašurime, le Letušime, le Leumime." 
Genesis25:4 Le bomorwa Midiane; e ne e le Efa, le Efere, le Hanoke, le Abita, le Eletaa. Botlhe bao e ne e le bana ba ga Ketura." 
Genesis25:5 Aberahame a naya Isake tsotlhe tse o neng a na natso. 
Genesis25:6 Bomorwa bagadingwana ba Aberahame o ne a na nabo, Aberahame a ba abela dineo, a ba tsamaisa ba tswa mo go Isake morwawe, ene a sa ntse a tshedile, mme ba ya ntlheng ya botlhabatsatsi, lefatsheng le le kwa botlhabatsatsi." 
Genesis25:7 A, ke one malatsi a dinyaga tsa botshelo jwa ga Aberahame a sa ntse a tshedile, e bong dinyaga di le 175." 
Genesis25:8 Aberahame a khutla, a swa a tsofetse sentle thata, e le monna mogolo, a tsamaile dingwaga; a phuthelwa kwa bathong ba ga gabo." 
Genesis25:9 Bomorwawe Isake le Išemaele ba mo fitlha mo logageng lwa Makapela, mo sebateng sa naga se se potileng Mamere ka kwano, sa ga Eferone morwa Sohare wa Mohite;" 
Genesis25:10 e bong sebata sa naga se Aberahame o se rekileng mo baneng ba ga Hethe. Aberahame a fitlhwa gone le Sara mosadi wa gagwe. 
Genesis25:11 Mme ga dirala ya re morago ga loso lwa ga Aberahame Modimo wa segofatsa Isake morwawe. Mme Isake a aga fa Beere-lahai-roi. 
Genesis25:12 Jaana, tse ke tsone ditshika tsa ga Išemaele, morwa Aberahame, yo Hagare wa Moegepeto, lelata la ga Sara, o mmonyeng le Aberahame." 
Genesis25:13 A, ke one maina a bomorwa Išemaele ka maina a bone, ka fa ditshikeng tsa bone; wa ntlha wa ga Išemaele ke Nebaiothe le Ketare, le Atebeele, le Mibesame," 
Genesis25:14 le Mišema, le Duma, le Masa," 
Genesis25:15 Hatate, le Tema, Jeture, Nafiše le Ketema." 
Genesis25:16 Bao ke bomorwa Išemaele mme ao ke maina a bone, ka metsana ya bone, le ka mathibelelo a bone. Ke dikgosana di le 12 ka fa merafeng ya bone." 
Genesis25:17 Tse, ke tsone dinyaga tsa botshelo jwa ga Išemaele, dinyaga di le 137. Mme a khutla, a swa: a phuthelwa kwa bathong ba ga gabo." 
Genesis25:18 Ba aga ba simolola kwa Hafila ba ya go fitlha kwa Sure o o potileng Egepeto ka kwano, fa go iwa kwa Asiria. A nna a lebaganye le bana botlhe ba ga rraagwe." 
Genesis25:19 Tse, ke tsone ditshika tsa ga Isake, morwa Aberahame; Aberahame a tshola Isake." 
Genesis25:20 Isake a ba a le dinyaga di 40 fa a tsaya Rebeka, morwadia Bethuele wa Mosiria, wa kwa Patanaarame, kgaitsadia Labane wa Mosiria go nna mosadi wa gagwe." 
Genesis25:21 Isake a rapelela mosadi wa gagwe thata mo go Jehofa ka a le moopa. Jehofa a rapelesega, Rebeka mosadi wa gagwe a nna moimana." 
Genesis25:22 Bana ba farakana mo teng ga gagwe; a re: “Fa go nna jaana ke a bo ke tshelelang?” A ya go botsa Jehofa. 
Genesis25:23 Jehofa a mo raya, a re: “Merafe e le mebedi e mo sebopelong sa gago. Ditšhaba di le pedi di tlaa kgaogana di tswa mo mpeng ya gago. Tšhaba nngwe e tlaa nna thata bogolo go tšhaba e nngwe. Yo mogolo o tlaa direla yo mmotlana.”" 
Genesis25:24 E rile malatsi a gagwe a go belega a sena go fitlha, bonang, ga bo go le bana ba mafatlha mo sebopelong sa gagwe." 
Genesis25:25 Wa ntlha a tswa a le mohibidu gotlhe fela jaaka seaparo se se bobowa; ba mo raya leina ba re: Esau. 
Genesis25:26 Morago ga mo ga tswa monnawe; seatla sa gagwe sa bo se tshwere serethe sa ga Esau; leina la gagwe la bidiwa Jakobe. Isake a bo a le dinyaga di 60 fa mogatse a ba bona. 
Genesis25:27 Basimane ba thuthuga, Esau a nna motsomi yo o tlhoko, e le monna wa naga. Jakobe a bo a le monna yo o bori, a nna mo megopeng." 
Genesis25:28 Jaana Isake a rata Esau; ka a ne a tle a je nama ya diphologolo tsa gagwe, Rebeka a rata Jakobe." 
Genesis25:29 Jakobe a apaya dikgobe; Esau a tsena a tswa nageng, a bo a lapile." 
Genesis25:30 Esau a raya Jakobe a re: “Ke a go rapela, o mphe bohibidu joo; gonne ke lapile.” Ke gone ka moo leina la gagwe le biditsweng Etome, ke go re, Bohibidu." 
Genesis25:31 Jakobe a re: “Mma ke reke gompieno botsalwapele jwa gago.” 
Genesis25:32 Esau a re: “Bona, ke mo losong fela, botsalwapele bo tlaa nthusang?”" 
Genesis25:33 Jakobe a re: “Inkanele pele.” Mme a mo ikanela, a rekisa botsalwapele jwa gagwe mo go Jakobe." 
Genesis25:34 Jakobe a fa Esau senkgwe le dikgobe tsa dinawa. A ja a nwa; a nanoga a tsamaya. Jalo Esau a nyatsa botsalwapele jwa gagwe. 
Genesis26:1 Ga nna leuba mo lefatsheng, morago ga leuba la ntlha le le kileng la nna mo metlheng ya ga Aberahame. Isake a ya kwa go Abimeleke, kgosi ya Bafilisitia kwa Gerare." 
Genesis26:2 Jehofa a bonala kwa go ene a re: “Se fologele kwa Egepeto; aga mo lefatsheng le ke tlaa le go bolelelang. 
Genesis26:3 O nne o jake mo lefatsheng le, ke tlaa nna nao, ke go segofatsa; gonne mafatshe otlhe a, ke tlaa a naya wena le losika lwa gago. Ke tlaa tlhomamisa maikano a ke a ikanetseng Aberahame rraago." 
Genesis26:4 Ke tlaa ntsifatsa losika lwa gago jaaka dinaledi tsa legodimo, ke ba ke naya losika lwa gago mafatshe a otlhe fela. Merafe yotlhe ya lefatshe e tlaa segofala mo losikeng lwa gago," 
Genesis26:5 ka gobo Aberahame a ne a utlwa lentswe la me a boloka kaelo ya me, ditaolo tsa me, ditayo tsa me, le melao ya me.”" 
Genesis26:6 Isake a aga mo Gerare. 
Genesis26:7 Banna ba felo foo ba mmotsa ka ga mosadi wa gagwe, mme a re: “Ke kgaitsadiake,” ka a boifa go re: “Ke mosadi wa me” gonne a re: “E tlaa re gongwe banna ba felo fa ba mpolaye ka ntlha ya ga Rebeka,” ka a ne a le montle go lejwa." 
Genesis26:8 Mme ga dirala ya re a sena go nna gone ka lobaka lo loleele, Abimeleke kgosi ya Bafilisitia a okomela ka fensetere, a leba, a bona Isake a tshameka le Rebeka mosadi wa gagwe." 
Genesis26:9 Abimeleke a bitsa Isake a re: “Bona, ruri ke mosadi wa gago! O ne o bua jang o re: ‘Ke kgaitsadiake’?” Isake a mo raya a re: “E ne e le ka gobo ke re: ‘E ka re gongwe ka swa ka ntlha ya gagwe.’ ”" 
Genesis26:10 Abimeleke a re: “Seo se o se re diretseng ke eng? Motho mongwe o ka bo a letse le mosadi wa gago a sa gopola sepe, o ka bo e le fano o re tshwarisitse molato.”" 
Genesis26:11 Abimeleke a laya batho botlhe a re: “Yo o amang monna yo le fa e le mosadi wa gagwe, ruri o tlaa bolawa.”" 
Genesis26:12 Isake a lema mo lefatsheng leo, kgetsi ya peo ya mmusetsa dikgetsi di le lekgolo mo thobong ya ngwaga oo, mme Jehofa a mo segofatsa." 
Genesis26:13 Monna yo, a nna mogolo, a nna a humela pele a ba a tla a nna mogolo thata." 
Genesis26:14 A na le dithuo tsa matsomane le dithuo tsa matlhape, le batho ba lolwapa ba le bantsi, mme Bafilisitia ba mo fufegela." 
Genesis26:15 Mme jaana didiba tsotlhe tse batlhanka ba ga rraagwe ba kileng ba di epa mo metlheng ya ga Aberahame rraagwe, Bafilisitia ba di katela ka mmu." 
Genesis26:16 Abimeleke a raya Isake a re: “Tswa mo go rona, gonne o nonofile bogolo go rona.”" 
Genesis26:17 Isake a huduga gone a thibelela mo mokgatšheng wa Gerare, a aga gone." 
Genesis26:18 Isake a katolola didiba tsa metsi tse ba di epileng mo metlheng ya ga Aberahame rraagwe; gonne Bafilisitia ba ne ba di katetse morago ga loso lwa ga Aberahame; a di raya maina ka fa maineng a rraagwe o a di reileng. 
Genesis26:19 Batlhanka ba ga Isake ba epa sediba mo mokgatšheng, ba phunya motswedi wa metsi a a elang gone." 
Genesis26:20 Badisa ba Gerare ba lwa le badisa ba ga Isake ba re: “Metsi ke a rona.” A raya leina la sediba a re: “Eseke,” ke go re: Kgang, gonne ba ganetsanya nae." 
Genesis26:21 Ba epa sediba se sengwe; le sone ba se lwela; a se raya leina a re: “Sitena,” ke go re Bobaba." 
Genesis26:22 A huduga gone a epa sediba se sengwe; sone ba se ka ba se lwela; a se raya leina a re: “Rehobothe,” ke gore Bonno, a re: “Ka gonne jaanong, Jehofa o re diretse bonno, re tlaa ata mo lefatsheng.”" 
Genesis26:23 A tlhatloga gone a ya Beerešeba. 
Genesis26:24 Jehofa a bonala kwa go ene sigong joo, a re: “Ke nna Modimo wa ga Aberahame rraago; se boife, gonne ke na nao, ke tlaa go segofatsa, ke ntsifatsa losika lwa gago ka ntlha ya ga Aberahame motlhanka wa me.”" 
Genesis26:25 A aga aletara gone, a bitsa leina la ga Jehofa, a ba a tlhoma mogope wa gagwe gone; le gone batlhanka ba ga Isake ba epa sediba gone." 
Genesis26:26 Foo Abimeleke a ya kwa go ene a tswa Gerare, a na le Ahusathe tsala ya gagwe, le Pikole molaodi wa ntwa ya gagwe." 
Genesis26:27 Isake a ba raya a re: “Lo tletseng kwano go nna e tswa lo nkila, lo ntelekile mo go lona?”" 
Genesis26:28 Ba re: “Re bonye sentle fela fa Jehofa a nna nao; mme ra re, a jaana go nne maikano fa gare ga rona, e bong fa gare ga rona le wena; re dire kgolagano nao;" 
Genesis26:29 ya gore, ga o ketla o re utlwisa botlhoko, jaaka le rona re senke re go ama; le jaaka re senke re go direla sepe fa e se molemo fela, ra go tsamaisa ka kagiso; jaanong o mosegofadiwa wa ga Jehofa.”" 
Genesis26:30 A ba direla moletlo, ba a ja, ba a nwa." 
Genesis26:31 Ya re ka moso ba tsoga go sa le gale, ba ikanalana; Isake a ba naya tsela ba, tsamaya ka kagiso." 
Genesis26:32 Mme ga dirala ya re ka letsatsi leo, batlhanka ba ga Isake ba tla, ba mmolelela ka ga sediba se ba se epileng, ba mo raya ba re: “Re bonye metsi.”" 
Genesis26:33 A se raya leina a re: “Sheba”. Ke gone ka moo le gompieno leina la motse oo go tweng Beerešeba. 
Genesis26:34 E rile Esau a le dinyaga di le 40 a tsaya mosadi go twe Judithe, morwadia Beeri wa Mohite, le Basemathe morwadia Elone wa Mohite." 
Genesis26:35 Basadi ba, ba utlwisa pelo ya ga Isake le ya ga Rebeka botlhoko jo bo galakang." 
Genesis27:1 E rile Isake a tsofetse, matlho a gagwe a le lotobo, a sa bone sentle, a bitsa Esau morwawe yo mogolo a mo raya a re: “Morwaaka!” A re: “Ke fano.”" 
Genesis27:2 A re: “A ko o bone jaana, ke tsofetse, ga ke itse letsatsi la loso lwa me." 
Genesis27:3 Jaana, ke a go rapela, ka re, tsaya dibolao tsa gago, mokotlopo wa gago le bora jwa gago, o tswele kwa nageng, o ntsomele phologolo." 
Genesis27:4 O nkapeele dijo tse di monate, jaaka tse ke di ratang, o di lere kwano go nna gore ke je; gore mowa wa me o go segofatse ke ise ke swe.”" 
Genesis27:5 E rile Isake a bua le Esau morwawe, Rebeka a bo a utlwa. Esau a tswela kwa nageng a ya go tsoma phologolo le go e lere." 
Genesis27:6 Rebeka a bua le Jakobe morwawe a re: “Bona, ke utlwile rraago a bua le Esau mogoloo, a re:" 
Genesis27:7 ‘Nteretse phologolo, o nkapeele dijo tse di monate, gore ke je, ke go segofatse fa pele ga Jehofa ke ise ke swe.’" 
Genesis27:8 Mme jaana, ka re, morwaaka, o utlwe lentswe la me ka fa ke tlaa go laolang ka gone." 
Genesis27:9 Tloga jaana o ye letsomaneng, o ntlele dipotsane di le pedi tse dintle mo dipoding, mme ke tlaa di apela rraago dijo tse di monate, jaaka tse o di ratang." 
Genesis27:10 O tlaa di isa kwa go rraago gore a je, gore a tle a go segofatse a ise a swe.”" 
Genesis27:11 Jakobe a raya Rebeka mmaagwe a re: “Bona, mogolole Esau ke motho yo o bobowa, nna ke motho yo o borethe." 
Genesis27:12 E tlaa re gongwe rre a nkapaape mme ke nne mo go ene jaaka motsietsi, ke itlisetse khutso e seng tshegofatso.”" 
Genesis27:13 Mmaagwe a mo raya a re: “Phutso ya gago e nne mo go nna, morwaaka, utlwa lentswe la me le le losi fela, o ye o di ntlisetse.”" 
Genesis27:14 A ya, a di tshwara a di tlisa mo go mmaagwe; mmaagwe a apaya dijo tse di monate, jaaka tse rraagwe a di ratang." 
Genesis27:15 Rebeka a tsaya diaparo tse dintle tsa ga Esau morwawe yo mogolo, tse a nang natso mo ntlong, a di apesa Jakobe morwawe yo mmotlana." 
Genesis27:16 Le matlalo a dipotsane a a mo apesa mo mabogong le mo boretheng jwa thamo ya gagwe. 
Genesis27:17 Dijo tse di monate tseo, le senkgwe se o se baakantseng, a di tsenya mo seatleng sa ga Jakobe morwawe." 
Genesis27:18 A ya kwa go rraagwe a re: “Rra!” mme a re: “Ke fano, o mang ngwanaka?”" 
Genesis27:19 Jakobe a raya rraagwe a re: “Ke Esau, ngwana wa gago wa ntlha; ke dirile ka fa o ntheileng ka gone. Ke a go rapela, tsoga, o dule, o je phologolo ya me, gore mowa wa gago o ntshegofatse.”" 
Genesis27:20 Isake a raya morwawe a re: “Go tlile jang, gore o bo o e bonye ka bonako jaana morwaaka?” A re: “Ke ka gonne Jehofa Modimo wa gago o nneile letlhogonolo.”" 
Genesis27:21 Isake a raya Jakobe a re: “Ke a go rapela, a ko o atamele morwaaka, gore ke go apaape boo o morwaake Esau tota kgotsa nnyaa.”" 
Genesis27:22 Jakobe a atamela Isake rraagwe; a mo apaapa a re: “Lentswe lone ke lentswe la ga Jakobe, mabogo ke a ga Esau.”" 
Genesis27:23 A se ka a mo lemoga ka mabogo a gagwe a le bobowa jaaka mabogo a ga Esau mogolowe; jalo o mo segofatsa. 
Genesis27:24 A re: “A o morwaake Esau ka mmaanete?” Ene a re: “Ke nna.” 
Genesis27:25 A re: “E nkatametse ke je phologolo ya ga morwaake gore mowa wa me o go segofatse.” A e atametsa fa go ene, a ja, a ba a mo tlisetsa bojalwa jwa mofine a nwa." 
Genesis27:26 Isake rraagwe a mo raya a re: “Atamela jaana morwaaka, o nkatle.”" 
Genesis27:27 A atamela, a mo atla, a dupa lonko lwa diaparo tsa gagwe, a mo segofatsa, a re: “Bona, lonko lwa ga morwaake lo ntse jaaka lwa naga e Jehofa o e segofaditseng." 
Genesis27:28 A Modimo o go neye monyo wa legodimo, le monono wa lefatshe, le letlotlo la mabele, le bojalwa jwa mofine." 
Genesis27:29 A ditšhaba di go direle, le merafe e go ikobele, o nne morena wa bana ba ga rraago, a bana ba ga mmaago ba go ikobele, go hutsiwe mongwe le mongwe yo o go hutsang, go nne sego mongwe le mongwe yo o go segofatsang.”" 
Genesis27:30 Ya re Isake a sena go khutla go segofatsa Jakobe, a sa ntse a tswa fela fa pele ga Isake rraagwe, Esau mogolowe a tsena a tswa kwa letsomong." 
Genesis27:31 Le ene a apaya dijo tse di monate, a di isa kwa go rraagwe; a raya rraagwe a re: “A rre a tsoge a je phologolo ya ga morwawe, gore mowa wa gago o ntshegofatse.”" 
Genesis27:32 Isake rraagwe a mo raya a re: “Wena o mang?” A re: “Ke morwao, ngwana wa ntlha wa gago, Esau.”" 
Genesis27:33 Isake a roroma mo gogolo thata a re: “Fa e le jalo e ne e le mang yo o tshotseng phologolo a e tlisa mo go nna, ke bile ke jele gotlhe pele o ise o tle, mme ke mo segofaditse? Ee, o tlaa segofala.”" 
Genesis27:34 E rile Esau a utlwa mafoko a ga rraagwe, a gala ka legalo le legolo le le botlhoko, a raya rraagwe a re: “Rra we! Ntshegofatsa, le nna o ntshegofatse.”" 
Genesis27:35 A re: “Monnao o tsile ka boferefere, o go gapetse lesego.”" 
Genesis27:36 A re: “A ga a a rewa leina sentle ga twe Jakobe, ka jaana a ntseetse boemo gabedi; a tsaya botsalo jwa ntlha jwa me; bona, gompieno o nkgapetse lesego la me.” A re: “A ga o a ntshadisetsa tshegofatso nngwe fela?”" 
Genesis27:37 Isake a fetola Esau a mo raya a re: “Bona, ke mo dirile morena wa gago, bana ba ga rraagwe botlhe ke ba mo neile go nna batlhanka; ke mo otlile ka mabele le bojalwa jwa mofine; mme wena morwaaka ke a bo ke ka go direlang?”" 
Genesis27:38 Esau a raya rraagwe a re: “Rra, a o na le tshegofatso e le nngwe fela? Rra we, ntshegofatsa le nna o ntshegofatse.” Esau a tsholetsa lentswe la gagwe a lela." 
Genesis27:39 Isake a mo fetola a mo raya a re: “Bona, bonno jwa gago bo tlaa katogana le monono wa lefatshe le monyo wa legodimo." 
Genesis27:40 O tlaa tshela ka tšhaka ya gago, o tlaa direla monnao; go tlaa dirala gore mogang o mo tsogologelang o tlaa tlosa jokwe ya gagwe mo thamong ya gago.”" 
Genesis27:41 Esau a ila Jakobe ka ntlha ya tshegofatso e rraagwe o mo segofaditseng ka yone. Esau a ithaya mo pelong a re: “Malatsi a go lelela rre a gaufi; foo ke tlaa bolaya Jakobe nnake.” 
Genesis27:42 Mafoko a ga Esau morwawe yo mogolo a bolelelwa Rebeka, a roma a bitsa Jakobe morwawe yo mmotlana, a mo raya, a re: “Bona, mogoloo Esau o ikgomotsa ka ga gago, o ikaeletse go go bolaya." 
Genesis27:43 Ke gone jaana morwaaka, utlwa lentswe la me, o nanoge o tshabele kwa go Labane, kgaitsadiake kwa Harane." 
Genesis27:44 O tlhole nae malatsinyana mangwe go tle go tsamaye tšarafalo ya ga mogoloo e fete. 
Genesis27:45 Go tsamaye bogale jwa ga mogoloo bo boye mo go wena, a lebale se o se mo diretseng. Foo ke tlaa roma ke ya go go tsaya gone. Ana ke tlaa bo ke lo tloselediwang loo babedi ka letsatsi le le lengwe fela?”" 
Genesis27:46 Rebeka a raya Isake a re: “Ke lapisitswe ke botshelo jwa me ka ntlha ya bomorwadia Hethe. Fa Jakobe a tsaya mosadi mo go bomorwadia Hethe, ba ba etsang ba, ba bomorwadia lefatshe le, botshelo jwa me bo tlaa nna le molemo wa eng mo go nna?”" 
Genesis28:1 Isake a bitse Jakobe, a mo segofatsa, a mo laya a re: “O se ka wa tsaya mosadi wa bomorwadia Kanana." 
Genesis28:2 Nanoga o ye kwa Patanaarame, kwa ntlong ya ga Bethuele rra mmaago; o tseye mosadi gone wa bomorwadia Labane, kgaitsadia mmaago." 
Genesis28:3 A Modimo Mothatayotlhe o go segofatse, o go atise, o go ntsifatse gore o tle o nne lesomo la ditšhaba." 
Genesis28:4 O go neye lesego la ga Aberahame le losika lwa gago nao; gore o tle o rue lefatshe la majako a gago, le Modimo o le neileng Aberahame.”" 
Genesis28:5 Isake a naya Jakobe tsela a ya Patanaarame, kwa go Labane morwa Bethuele wa Mosiria, kgaitsadia Rebeka, mma Jakobe le Esau." 
Genesis28:6 Jaana Esau a bona fa Isake a segofaditse Jakobe, a bile a mo neile tsela go ya Patanaarame gore a tseye mosadi gone, le jaaka a re a mo segofatsa a mo laya, a re: “O se ka wa tsaya mosadi wa bomorwadia Kanana;”" 
Genesis28:7 le gone fa Jakobe a utlwile rraagwe le mmaagwe a ile Patanaarame. 
Genesis28:8 Esau a ba a bona fa bomorwadia Kanana ba sa kgatlhe rraagwe Isake. 
Genesis28:9 Foo Esau a ya kwa go Išemaele, a oketsa basadi ba a nang nabo ka go tsaya Mahalathe morwadia Išemaele, morwa Aberahame, kgaitsadia Nebaiothe, go nna mosadi wa gagwe." 
Genesis28:10 Jakobe a tswa mo Beerešeba, a leba kwa Harane." 
Genesis28:11 A wela felo gongwe, a lala gone, ka gobo letsatsi le ne le phirimile. A tsaya lentswe lengwe la felo foo a le sama, a robala." 
Genesis28:12 A lora, mme bonang, ga bo go tlhomilwe sepalamo fa fatshe, setlhoa sa sone se fitlha kwa legodimong; mme bonang; ga bo go tlhatloga go bo go fologa baengele ba Modimo ka sone." 
Genesis28:13 Mme bonang, Jehofa a bo a eme fa godimo ga sone a re: “Ke nna Jehofa Modimo wa ga Aberahame rraago, le Modimo wa ga Isake. Lefatshe le o letseng mo go lone ke tlaa le naya wena, le losika lwa gago." 
Genesis28:14 Losika lwa gago lo tlaa nna jaaka lorole lwa lefatshe, o tlaa anamela kwa bophirimatsatsi, le kwa botlhabatsatsi, le kwa botsheka, le kwa borwa; mo go wena le mo losikeng lwa gago ditshika tsotlhe tsa lefatshe di tlaa segofala." 
Genesis28:15 Bona, ke na nao, ke tlaa go boloka kwa le kwa o yang gone, ke ba ke go lere gape mo lefatsheng le; gonne ga nketla ke go tlogela go tle go tsamaye ke dire se ke se buileng nao.”" 
Genesis28:16 Jakobe a thanya mo borokong jwa gagwe a re: “A bo Jehofa a le felong fano! mme ke ne ke sa itse.” 
Genesis28:17 A boifa a re: “Kana felo fano go boitshega jang! Ga se gope go sele fa e se ntlo ya Modimo fela; fano ke mojako wa legodimo.” 
Genesis28:18 Jakobe a phakela ka moso a tsaya lentswe le o letseng a le samile a le tlhoma go nna segopotso, a ba a thela lookwane mo godimo ga lone." 
Genesis28:19 Mme a raya leina la felo foo a re: “Bethele,” mme leina la motse gale go ne go twe Luse." 
Genesis28:20 Jakobe a itlama ka maikano a re: “E tlaa re fa Modimo o nna le nna, fa o mpoloka mo tseleng e ke e tsamayang, o nnaya dijo go ja le diaparo go apara," 
Genesis28:21 gore ke be ke boele ntlong ya ga rre ka kagiso, foo Jehofa o tlaa nna Modimo wa me." 
Genesis28:22 Lentswe le ke le tlhomileng motloutlo le tlaa nna ntlo ya Modimo; mo go tsotlhe tse o tlaa di nnayang, ruri ke tlaa go naya sa bosome.”" 
Genesis29:1 Jakobe a tswelela mo loetong lwa gagwe, a fitlha mo lefatsheng la bana ba botlhabatsatsi." 
Genesis29:2 A leba, mme bonang, ga bo go le sediba mo nageng; mme bonang ga bo go bothile matsomane a le mararo a dinku fa go sone; gonne ba ne ba tle ba gelelele matsomane mo sedibeng seo. Letlapa le le mo molomong wa sediba la bo le le legolo." 
Genesis29:3 Matsomane otlhe a ne a tle a phuthegele foo, mme ba pitike letlapa ba le tlose mo molomong wa sediba ba gelelele dinku, mme ba itse go ba ba baya letlapa mo bonnong jwa lone mo molomong wa sediba." 
Genesis29:4 Jakobe a ba raya a re: “Bagaetsho, lo ba kae?” Ba re: “Re ba Harane.”" 
Genesis29:5 A ba raya a re: “A lo itse Labane morwa Nahore?” Ba re: “Re a mo itse.” 
Genesis29:6 A ba raya a re: “A o tshedile sentle?” Ba re: “O tshedile sentle; bona, Ragele morwadie o etla, o tla le dinku.”" 
Genesis29:7 A re: “Bona, go sa le motshegare ga e ise e nne lobaka lwa go phutha dikgomo; gelelelang dinku lo tsamaye lo ye go di fudisa.”" 
Genesis29:8 Ba re: “Ga re ka ke ra dira jalo matsomane a ise a phuthege, ba pitike letlapa mo molomong wa sediba; e be e le gone re gelelelang dinku.”" 
Genesis29:9 A re a sa ntse a bua nabo Ragele a tla a na le dinku tsoo rraagwe; gonne e ne e le ene yo o di disang. 
Genesis29:10 Ya re Jakobe a bona Ragele morwadia Labane, kgaitsadia mmaagwe, le dinku tsoo Labane kgaitsadia mmaagwe, Jakobe a atamela a pitika letlapa a le tlosa mo molomong wa sediba, a gelelela letsomane la ga Labane kgaitsadia mmaagwe." 
Genesis29:11 Jakobe a atla Ragele; a tsholetsa lentswe la gagwe a lela. 
Genesis29:12 Jakobe a bolelela Ragele fa a le oo rra rraagwe, fa a bile a le morwa Rebeka; morweetsana a siana a ya a bolelela rraagwe." 
Genesis29:13 Ya re Labane a utlwa mafoko a ga Jakobe ngwana wa ga kgaitsadie a siana a ya go mo kgatlhantsha, a mo tlamparela, a mo atla, a mo tlisa kwa ntlong ya gagwe, a bolelela Labane dilo tse tsotlhe fela." 
Genesis29:14 Labane a mo raya a re: “Ntla, o lesapo la me le nama ya me.” A tlhola nae lobaka lwa kgwedi." 
Genesis29:15 Labane a raya Jakobe a re: “E re ka o le ngwana wa ga rre a ke gore o tshwanetse go ntirela fela o sa bone sepe ka foo? Mpolelela tlhe, go re maduo a gago a tlaa nna eng?”" 
Genesis29:16 Labane o ne a na le bana ba basetsane ba le babedi. Leina la yo mogolo go twe Lea, leina la yo mmotlana go twe Ragele." 
Genesis29:17 Lea a bo a le matlho a bokowa; Ragele a le montle, a bopegile sentle." 
Genesis29:18 Jakobe a rata Ragele; a re: “Ke tlaa go direla dinyaga di supa ka ntlha ya ga Ragele morwadio yo mmotlana.” 
Genesis29:19 Labane a re: “Go molemo fa ke ka mo naya wena bogolo go go mo naya monna o sele; nna le nna.” 
Genesis29:20 Jakobe a direla Ragele dinyaga di supa; tsa nna mo go ene jaaka ekete ke malatsinyana fela, ka ntlha ya lorato lo a mo ratileng ka lone." 
Genesis29:21 Jakobe a raya Labane a re: “Nnaya mosadi wa me, gonne malatsi a me a fetile, gore ke tsene kwa go ene.”" 
Genesis29:22 Labane a phutha batho botlhe ba felo foo, a dira modiro." 
Genesis29:23 Mme ga dirala ya re go le ka maitseboa a tsaya Lea morwadie, a mo isa kwa go ene, Jakobe a tsena kwa go ene." 
Genesis29:24 Labane a ntsha Silepa lelata la gagwe a mo naya Lea go nna lelata la gagwe. 
Genesis29:25 Ga dirala ya re ka moso, bonang, ya bo e le Lea; Jakobe a raya Labane a re: “Ke eng se o se ntiretseng? A ga ke a go direlela Ragele? Ke ka ntlha yang o ntsieditse jaana?”" 
Genesis29:26 Labane a re: “Ga go ke go dirwa jalo mono ga rona go ntsha yo mmotlana pele ga yo mogolo. 
Genesis29:27 Swetsa beke ya yo, re tlaa go naya yo mongwe le ene, ka ntlha ya tiro e o tlaa ntirelang ka yone ka dinyaga tse dingwe di supa.”" 
Genesis29:28 Jakobe a dira jalo, a swetsa beke ya gagwe; Labane a mo naya Ragele morwadie go nna mosadi wa gagwe." 
Genesis29:29 Labane a ntsha Bileha lelata la gagwe a mo naya Ragele go nna lelata la gagwe. 
Genesis29:30 Jakobe a tsena le kwa go ene Ragele, a bo a bile a rata Ragele bogolo go Lea, a dira nae dinyaga tse dingwe di supa." 
Genesis29:31 Jehofa a bona fa Lea a ilwa, mme a bula sebopelo sa gagwe; Ragele a bo a le moopa." 
Genesis29:32 Lea a nna moimana, a bona ngwana wa mosimane, a mo raya leina a re, Rubene; ka a re: “Ka gobo Jehofa o lebile patikego ya me; ka jaana monna wa me a tlaa nthata.”" 
Genesis29:33 A nna moimana gape a bona ngwana wa mosimane; a re: “E re ka Jehofa a utlwile fa ke ilwa, ke gone ka moo o nneileng ngwana wa mosimane,” yo le ene a mo raya leina a re, Simeone." 
Genesis29:34 A nna moimana gape, a bona ngwana wa mosimane; a re: “Jaana gompieno monna wa me o tlaa kopanngwa le nna, gonne ke bonye bana ba basimane ba le bararo nae:” Ka moo leina la gagwe la rewa ga twe, Lefi." 
Genesis29:35 A nna moimana gape, a bona ngwana wa mosimane, mme a re: “Gompieno ke tlaa baka Jehofa;” ka gone moo a mo raya leina a re, Juta; mme a khutla go bona bana." 
Genesis30:1 E rile Ragele a bona fa a sa bone bana le Jakobe, Ragele a hufegela mogolowe; a raya Jakobe a re: “Nnaya bana; fa go sa nne jalo nkaa swa.”" 
Genesis30:2 Bogale jwa ga Jakobe jwa tukela Ragele a re: “A ke mo boemong jwa Modimo o o go timileng loungo lwa sebopelo?” 
Genesis30:3 A re: “Bona Bileha, lelata la me ke yo, tsena kwa go ene, mme o tlaa khubama a le mo mangoleng a me, gore ke tle ke bone bana ka ene.”" 
Genesis30:4 A mo naya Bileha lelata la gagwe go nna mosadi; Jakobe a tsena kwa go ene. 
Genesis30:5 Bileha a nna moimana, a bona ngwana wa mosimane le Jakobe." 
Genesis30:6 Ragele a re: “Modimo o nkatlholetse o bile o utlwile lentswe la me, o nneile ngwana wa mosimane;” ke gone ka moo a mo raya leina a re, Dane." 
Genesis30:7 Bileha lelata la ga Ragele a nna moimana gape, a bona ngwana wa mosimane wa bobedi le Jakobe." 
Genesis30:8 Ragele a re: “Ke sokasokanye le mogolole ka tshokatshokano tse dikgolo, mme ke fentse:” A raya ngwana leina a re, Nafetali." 
Genesis30:9 E rile Lea a bona fa a khutlile go bona bana, a tsaya Silepa lelata la gagwe a mo naya Jakobe go nna mosadi wa gagwe." 
Genesis30:10 Silepa lelata la ga Lea a bona ngwana wa mosimane le Jakobe. 
Genesis30:11 Lea a re: “A lesego!” A mo raya leina a re, Gate." 
Genesis30:12 Silepa lelata la ga Lea a bona ngwana wa mosimane wa bobedi le Jakobe. 
Genesis30:13 Lea a re: “A bo ke le sego! gonne bana ba basetsana ba tlaa nthaya ba re, Ke sego!” A raya ngwana leina a re, Ašere." 
Genesis30:14 E rile ka lobaka lwa thobo ya mabele Rubene a ya a bona ditholwana tsa meithatiso mo nageng, mme a di isa kwa go Lea mmaagwe. Foo Ragele a raya Lea a re: “Ke a go rapela, mpha ditholwana tsa ga morwao tsa meithatiso.”" 
Genesis30:15 A mo raya a re: “A ke selo se sennyennye fa o ntseetse monna wa me? Jaanong o rata go tsaya le tsone ditholwana tsa ga morwaake?” Ragele a re: “Jakobe o tlaa lala nao bosigo jono, fa o nnaya ditholwana tsa meithatiso tsa ga morwao.”" 
Genesis30:16 Jakobe a tswa kwa nageng go le maitseboa. Lea a tswa a ya go mo kgatlhantsha a re: “O na le go tsena kwa go nna, gonne ruri ke go thapile ka tuelo ya ditholwana tsa ga morwaake tsa meithatiso.” Mme a lala nae bosigo joo." 
Genesis30:17 Modimo wa reetsa Lea, a nna moimana, a bona ngwana wa mosimane wa botlhano le Jakobe." 
Genesis30:18 Lea a re: “Modimo o nneile tuelo ya me; ka gobo ke neile monna wa me lelata la me;” a raya ngwana leina a re, Isakare." 
Genesis30:19 Lea a nna moimana gape a bona ngwana wa mosimane wa borataro le Jakobe. 
Genesis30:20 Lea a re: “Modimo o nketleeditse ka ketleetso e e molemo; jaanong monna wa me o tlaa aga le nna ka gobo ke bonye bana ba basimane ba le barataro nae;” a raya ngwana leina a re, Sebulone." 
Genesis30:21 Morago a bona ngwana wa mosetsana, a mo raya leina a re, Dina." 
Genesis30:22 Modimo wa gakologelwa Ragele, Modimo wa mo reetsa wa bula sebopelo sa gagwe." 
Genesis30:23 A nna moimana, a bona ngwana wa mosimane, a re: “Modimo o ntlositse kgobo.”" 
Genesis30:24 A mo raya leina a re, Josefe, a re: “A Jehofa a nkokeletse ka mosimane yo mongwe.”" 
Genesis30:25 Ga dirala e rile Ragele a sena go bona Josefe, Jakobe a raya Labane a re: “Nnaya tsela gore ke ye kwa gaetsho le kwa lefatsheng la gaetsho." 
Genesis30:26 Nthebolela basadi ba me le bana ba me ba ke ba go diretseng, ka ntlha ya bone, o mme ke tsamaye, gonne o itse tirelo ya me e ke go diretseng ka yone.”" 
Genesis30:27 Labane a mo raya a re: “E re ka jaana ke bonye tsalano mo matlhong a gago, nama o sa ntse; gonne ke lemogile fa Jehofa a ntshegofaditse ka ntlha ya gago.”" 
Genesis30:28 A re: “Ntlhaloganyetsa maduo a gago mme ke tlaa a go naya.” 
Genesis30:29 A mo raya a re: “O a itse ka fa ke go diretseng ka gone, le ka fa dikgomo tsa gago di ntseng tsa nna tsa tshela ka gone ke na natso." 
Genesis30:30 Gonne se e rileng ke tla wa bo o na naso se ne se le sebotlana, mme se kokotlegetse se ntse sentsintsi. Jehofa o go segofaditse gongwe le gongwe kwa ke ntseng ka menoga gone; jaana ntlo ya me le yone ke tlaa e batlela leng?”" 
Genesis30:31 A re: “Ke tlaa go naya eng?” Jakobe a re: “Se nneye sepe. E tlaa re fa o ntirela selo se jaana: ke tlaa ba ke hudisa letsomane la gago ke le disa. 
Genesis30:32 Ke tlaa ralala letsomane lotlhe la gago gompieno ke tlosa tse di mmala o maragaraga le o o dibata, le tse dipirwana mo dinkung, le tse di mmala o dibata le o maragaraga mo dipoding; tse di ntseng jalo e tlaa nna tuelo ya me." 
Genesis30:33 Jalo tshiamo ya me e tlaa mphetolela mo motlheng o o tlang, fa o tla go bua ka ga tuelo ya me e le fa pele ga gago. Nngwe le nngwe e e seng mmala o dibata le fa e le o maragaraga mo dipoding, le e e seng pirwana mo dinkung, fa e bonwa mo go nna e tlaa kaiwa e utswilwe.”" 
Genesis30:34 Labane a re: “Bona ke rata gore go nne ka fa lefokong la gago.” 
Genesis30:35 Ka tsatsi leo Labane a tlhaola diphoko tse dingolo, le tse di dibata le dipodi tse dinamagadi tsotlhe tse di mmala o maragaraga, le o o dibata, nngwe le nngwe e e nang le bosweu mo go tsone, le tse dipirwa tsotlhe mo dinkung, a di tsenya mo diatleng tsa bomorwawe." 
Genesis30:36 A baya sebaka sa loeto lwa malatsi a le mararo fa gare ga gagwe le Jakobe. Mme Jakobe a hudisa matsomane a a setseng a ga Labane. 
Genesis30:37 Jakobe a tsaya dithupa tse dinana tsa mopopelara le tsa thamane le tsa morolwane; a di khumolotsa methaladi, a bonatsa bosweu jo bo mo dithupeng." 
Genesis30:38 A tlhoma dithupa tse a di khumoloditseng go lebagana le matsomane mo meelong ya metsi, mo mekorong e matsomane a nwelang mo go yone; mme ya re a tsile go nwa a emere." 
Genesis30:39 Matsomane a emera fa pele ga dithupa, matsomane a tsala bongolwana le mmala o o maragaraga le o o dibata." 
Genesis30:40 Jakobe a tlhaola dikwanyana, a lebisa matsomane kwa go tse di mmala o mongolo le kwa go tse dipirwana tsotlhe mo letsomaneng la ga Labane. A beela matsomane a gagwe kwa thoko, a se ka a a tlhakanya le letsomane la ga Labane." 
Genesis30:41 E ne e tle e re go emera tse di nonofileng bogolo go tse dingwe mo letsomaneng, Jakobe a beye dithupa fa pele ga matlho a matsomane mo meelong ya metsi, gore di tle di emere fa dithupeng." 
Genesis30:42 E ne e tle e re fa letsomane le sa nonofa sentle a se ke a di beele dithupa; jalo tse di sa nonofang sentle e bo e le tsa ga Labane, mme tse di nonifileng e nne tsa ga Jakobe." 
Genesis30:43 Monna yo a huma mo go golo thata, a ba a nna le matsomane a magolo, le malata, le batlhanka, le dikamela, le diesela." 
Genesis31:1 A utlwa mafoko a bomorwa Labane jaaka ba re: “Jakobe o tshotse tsotlhe tse e neng e le tsoo rraetsho; khumo e yotlhe o e bonye ka se e neng e le sa ga rraetsho.” 
Genesis31:2 Jakobe a leba sefatlhogo sa ga Labane, mme bonang, sa bo se sa mo lebe jaaka gale." 
Genesis31:3 Jehofa a raya Jakobe a re: “Boela kwa lefatsheng la borraago, le kwa go bagaeno; mme ke tlaa nna nao.”" 
Genesis31:4 Jakobe a roma a ya go bitsa Ragele le Lea gore ba tle kwa nageng kwa letsomaneng. 
Genesis31:5 A ba raya a re: “Ke bona sefatlhogo sa ga rraeno gore ga se a nteba jaaka gale; Modimo wa ga rre o ntse o na le nna. 
Genesis31:6 Lo a itse fa ke diretse rraeno ka thata ya me yotlhe fela. 
Genesis31:7 Mme rraeno o ntsieditse o fetotse maduo a me gasome. Modimo ga o a ka wa mo leseletsa go nkutlwisa botlhoko. 
Genesis31:8 E ne e tle e re fa a bua jaana a re: ‘Tse di mmala o maragaraga e tlaa nna maduo a gago;’ foo letsomane lotlhe le tsale tse di maragaraga; mme e re fa a re: ‘Tse dingolwana di tlaa nna maduo a gago,’ foo letsomane lotlhe le tsale bongolwana." 
Genesis31:9 Jalo Modimo o tlositse dikgomo tsoo rraeno wa di nnaya. 
Genesis31:10 “Ga dirala ya re lobaka lo letsomane le emerang ka lone, ka tsholetsa matlho a me, ka bona mo torong, mme bonang, diphoko tse di bekarang letsomane e le tse dingolo, le tse di maragaraga, le tse dithamaga." 
Genesis31:11 Moengele wa Modimo o ntheile mo torong a re: ‘Jakobe!’ mme ka re: ‘Ke fano.’ 
Genesis31:12 A re: ‘Tsholetsa matlho a gago jaana o bone, diphoko tsotlhe tse di bekarang letsomane ke tse di ngolo, le tse di maragaraga, le tse di thamaga; gonne ke bonye tsotlhe tse Labane o di go direlang." 
Genesis31:13 Ke nna Modimo wa Bethele, kwa o tloleditseng lentswe le o le tlhomileng gone, kwa o ikanetseng maikano gone. Jaanong nanoga o tswe mo fatsheng le, o boele kwa lefatsheng la botsalelo jwa gago.’ ”" 
Genesis31:14 Ragele le Lea ba mo fetola ba re: “A go sa ntse go na le kabelo nngwe le fa e le boswa bongwe mo ntlong ya ga rraetsho? 
Genesis31:15 A ga re kaiwe baeng fela ke ene, ka a re rekisitse, a bile a jele a sweditse magadi a rona?" 
Genesis31:16 Gonne mahumo otlhe a Modimo o a tlositseng mo go rraetsho, ke a rona le a bana ba rona; jaana le fa e le eng se Modimo o se go reileng, o se dire fela.”" 
Genesis31:17 Foo Jakobe a nanoga, a pagamisa bomorwawe le basadi ba gagwe mo dikameleng;" 
Genesis31:18 a tsamaya le dikgomo tsotlhe tsa gagwe le thoto ya gagwe yotlhe fela e o neng a e phuthile, dikgomo tse o di bapetseng, tse o neng a di phuthile mo Patanaarame, gore a ye kwa go Isake rraagwe kwa lefatsheng la Kanana." 
Genesis31:19 Jaana Labane o ne a ile go beola dinku tsa gagwe; mme Ragele a utswa medimo ya disetwa ya ga rraagwe. 
Genesis31:20 Jakobe a ngwega Labane wa Mosiria a sa itse, ka gobo a se ka a mmolelela fa a tshaba." 
Genesis31:21 Jalo a tshaba ka tsotlhe tse o neng a na natso; a nanoga a kgabaganya Noka, a leba thaba ya Gileate." 
Genesis31:22 E rile ka letsatsi la boraro Labane a bolelelwa fa Jakobe a tshabile. 
Genesis31:23 A tsaya ba ga gabo, a ya nabo, a mo latela loeto lwa malatsi a supa, mme a mo fitlhela mo thabeng ya Gileate." 
Genesis31:24 Modimo wa tla kwa go Labane wa Mosiria ka toro ya bosigo, wa mo raya wa re: “O itise gore o se ka wa bua le Jakobe molemo le fa e le bosula.”" 
Genesis31:25 Labane a fitlha kwa go Jakobe; mme Jakobe o ne a tlhomile mogope wa gagwe mo thabeng; Labane a na le ba ga gabo, a tlhoma wa gagwe mo thabeng ya Gileate." 
Genesis31:26 Labane a raya Jakobe a re: “O dirile jang fa e le fa o ngwegile jaana ke sa itse, mme wa tsamaisa bomorwadiake jaaka ditshwarwa tsa tšhaka fela?" 
Genesis31:27 O ne o tshabelang go sa itsiwe, o nngwegela o sa mpolelela? Aitse nkabo ke go neile tsela ka go direla mokete, le ka dipina, ka meropa, le harepe." 
Genesis31:28 Wa se ka wa ntesa ka atla bomorwaake le bomorwadiake. Aitse o dirile ka boeleele. 
Genesis31:29 Go mo thateng ya seatla sa me go lo utlwisa botlhoko; mme Modimo wa ga rraago o letse o buile le nna bosigo wa re: ‘O itise gore o se ka wa bua le Jakobe molemo le fa e le bosula.’ 
Genesis31:30 Jaana le fa o ne o tlhoafaletse go tsamaya, ka o tlhologeletswe ntlo ya ga rraago mo go botlhoko, le fa go ntse jalo, ana o utswetseng medimo ya me?”" 
Genesis31:31 Jakobe a fetola Labane, a mo raya a re: “Ke ka gonne ke ne ke boifa; ka ke ithaya ke re o ka tla wa ntseela bomorwadio ka thata." 
Genesis31:32 Le fa e le mang yo o tlaa fitlhelang medimo ya gago mo go ene, ga a ketla a tshela; fa pele ga ba ga rona, o tlhaloganye se e leng sa gago se ke nang naso o se tseye.” Ka go bo Jakobe a sa itse fa Ragele a e utswile." 
Genesis31:33 Labane a tsena mo mogopeng wa ga Jakobe le mo mogopeng wa ga Lea, le mo mogopeng wa malata oo mabedi; mme a se ka a e bona. A tswa mo mogopeng wa ga Lea a tsena mo mogopeng wa ga Ragele." 
Genesis31:34 Jaana Ragele o ne a tshotse medimo eo, a e tsentse mo dipeeletsong tsa dikamela, a e ntse godimo. Labane a phuruphutsa mogope otlhe, mme a se ka a e bona." 
Genesis31:35 Ragele a raya rraagwe a re: “A morena wa me a se nne bogale ka ke sa ka ke ka nanoga fa pele ga gago; gonne mokgwa wa basadi o mo go nna.” Mme a hukutsa, mme a se ka a bona mereo." 
Genesis31:36 Jakobe a nna bogale a omana le Labane; Jakobe a fetola Labane a mo raya a re: “Tlolo ya me ke eng? Boleo jwa me ke bofe fa o tla o ntshetse morago ka bogale jo bo tukang jaana? 
Genesis31:37 E re ka o phuruphuditse thoto ya me yotlhe fela, o bonye eng sa thoto yotlhe ya gago? Se beye fa, fa pele ga bagaetsho le bagaeno, gore ba tle ba atlhole fa gare ga rona roo babedi." 
Genesis31:38 Ke ntse ka nna nao dinyaga tse di 20; dinku tsa gago tse dinamagadi le dipodi tse dinamagadi tsa gago ga di a folotsa, le diphelefu tsa letsomane la gago ga ke a di ja." 
Genesis31:39 Se se gagotsweng ke dibatana, ga ke a ka ka se isa kwa go wena, mme ka se emisetsa; wa se lopa mo seatleng sa me le fa se utswilwe motshegare le fa e le bosigo." 
Genesis31:40 Ka nna fela jaana; e re motshegare ka jewa ke letsatsi le ke serame bosigo; boroko jwa me jwa tshaba matlho a me. 
Genesis31:41 Dinyaga tse di 20 ke ntse ke le mo ntlong ya gago; ke go diretse ka ntata ya bomorwadio ba babedi, dinyaga di le 14, ka direla letsomane la gago dinyaga di le thataro; o fetotse maduo a me gasome." 
Genesis31:42 Fa Modimo wa ga rre le Modimo wa ga Aberahame, le o o boifiwang ke Isake o ka bo o se ka wa nna le nna, ruri e ka bo e le fano o mpusitse ke iphotlhere fela. Modimo o bonye patikego ya me le tiro ya diatla tsa me, mme o letse o go kgalemetse bosigo.”" 
Genesis31:43 Labane a fetola Jakobe a mo raya a re: “Bana bao ba basetsana ke bomorwadiake, le banyana bao ke bongwanake, matsomane ao ke matsomane a me, le tsotlhe tse o di bonang ke tsa me; ke ne ke ka dirang ka ga bomorwadiake ba, gompieno, le fa e le bana ba bone ba ba ba bonyeng?" 
Genesis31:44 Jaana, a re dire kgolagano, nna le wena; e nne sesupo gare ga me nao.”" 
Genesis31:45 Jakobe a tsaya lentswe a le emisa jaaka segopotso. 
Genesis31:46 Jakobe a raya ba ga gabo a re: “Rorang maje;” mme ba tsaya maje ba a dira sefikantswe; ba jela gone fa sefikantsweng. 
Genesis31:47 Labane a se raya leina a re: “Jegare-Sahadutha”; mme Jakobe ene a se bitsa “Galeete.” 
Genesis31:48 Labane a re: “Sefikantswe se ke sesupo fa gare ga me nao gompieno.” Ke gone ka moo leina la sone go ne go twe Galeete," 
Genesis31:49 le Misepa, ka a re: “A Jehofa a lebelele gare ga me nao, motlhang re sa tlholeng re bonana." 
Genesis31:50 E tlaa re fa o patika bomorwadiake, le gone fa o tsaya basadi ba sele kwa ntle ga bomorwadiake; gobo go se na motho ope le rona; bona, Modimo ke one mosupi gare ga me nao.”" 
Genesis31:51 Labane a raya Jakobe a re: “Bona sefikantswe se, o bo o bone lentswe le, tse ke di tlhomileng gare ga me le wena." 
Genesis31:52 Sefikantswe se e nne sesupo, le lentswe le nne sesupo, fa ke se ketla ke feta sefikantswe ke ya foo go wena le gone le wena fa o se ketla o feta sefikantswe se, le lentswe le, go tla kwa go nna go utlwisanya botlhoko." 
Genesis31:53 A Modimo wa ga Aberahame, le Modimo wa ga Nahore, Modimo wa ga rraago, o atlhole fa gare ga rona.” Mme Jakobe a ikana ka o o boifiwang ke Isake rraagwe." 
Genesis31:54 Jakobe a isa setlhabelo mo thabeng, a bitsa ba ga gabo ba tla go ja dijo, mme ba a ja, mme ba lala mo thabeng." 
Genesis31:55 Labane a phakela ka moso, a atla bomorwawe le bomorwadie, a ba segofatsa. Labane a tsamaya a boela kwa ga gabo." 
Genesis32:1 Jakobe a tswelela mo tseleng ya gagwe, baengele ba Modimo ba rakana nae." 
Genesis32:2 E rile Jakobe a ba bona a re: “Le ke lesomo la Modimo.” A raya felo foo leina a re Mahanaime. 
Genesis32:3 Jakobe a roma batho ba mo etelela pele ba ya kwa go Esau mogolowe, kwa lefatsheng la Seire, naga ya Etome." 
Genesis32:4 A ba laya a re: “Lo tlaa bua jaana le morena wa me Esau lo re: ‘Motlhanka wa gago Jakobe o bua jaana a re: Ke jakile kwa go Labane ke diegile gone go tla nakong eno. 
Genesis32:5 Ke na le dikgomo, le diesela, le matsomane, le batlhanka, le malata. Ke rometse go bolelela morena wa me gore ke bone tsalano mo matlhong a gago.’ ”" 
Genesis32:6 Barongwa ba ya ba boela mo go Jakobe ba re: “Re ile ra fitlha kwa go mogoloo Esau, le gone ene o e tla go go kgatlhantsha, banna ba ba 400 ba bile ba na nae.”" 
Genesis32:7 Foo Jakobe a boifa thata, a pitlagana; a kgaoganya batho ba o nang nabo, le matsomane, le matlhape, le dikamela a dira masomo a le mabedi." 
Genesis32:8 A re: “E tlaa re fa Esau a fithela lesomo lengwe a le kgemetha, foo lesomo le lengwe le le setseng le tlaa falola.”" 
Genesis32:9 Jakobe a rapela a re: “Modimo wa ga Aberahame rre, le Modimo wa ga Isake rre, Jehofa, yo o ntheileng wa re: ‘Boela kwa lefatsheng la gaeno, le kwa go bagaeno, ke tlaa go direla molemo.’" 
Genesis32:10 Ga ke a tshwanelwa ke bope le fa e le jo bonnye jwa mapelonomi otlhe le fa e le jwa boammaaruri jotlhe jo o bo supeditseng motlhanka wa gago, gonne ke ne ka tlola noka e ya Joretane ke na le thobane ya me fela, mme gompieno ke diregile masomo a le mabedi." 
Genesis32:11 Ke a go rapela, a ko o nkgolole mo seatleng sa ga mogolole, mo seatleng sa ga Esau; gonne ke a mmoifa, o ka tla a nkgemetha, le mma bana le bana." 
Genesis32:12 Wena o rile: ‘Ruri ke tlaa go direla molemo, ke tlaa dira losika lwa gago go nna jaaka mošawa wa lewatle o o sa ka keng wa balwa ka bontsi.’ ”" 
Genesis32:13 A lala gone bosigo joo, a tsaya mo go tse a nang natso, a baakanyetsa Esau mogolowe mpho:" 
Genesis32:14 dipodi tse dinamagadi di le 200, le diphoko di le 20, dinku tse dinamagadi di le 200, le diphelefu di le 20," 
Genesis32:15 dikamela tse di amusang di le 30 le dikamelana tsa tsone, dikgomo tse dinamagadi di le 40, le dipoo di le some, diesela tse dinamagadi di le 20 le dieselana di le some." 
Genesis32:16 A di neela batlhanka, setlhophana sengwe le sengwe se le sosi; a raya batlhanka ba gagwe a re: “Tsamaelang kwa pele ga me, lo ntshe sebaka fa gare ga setlhophana le setlhophana.”" 
Genesis32:17 Yo o kwa pele pele a mo laya a re: “E tlaa re Esau mogolole a kgatlhana nao, a go botsa a re: ‘O wa ga mang? O ya kae? Le dilo tse di fapele ga gago ke tsa ga mang?’" 
Genesis32:18 Foo o re: ‘Ke tsa ga Jakobe motlhanka wa gago; ke mpho e e newang morena wa me Esau. Bona, le ene o kwa morago ga rona.’ ”" 
Genesis32:19 A laya le wa bobedi le wa boraro, le botlhe ba ba setseng ditlhophana morago a re: “Lo tlaa bua le Esau ka mokgwa o o ntseng jalo fa lo mmona." 
Genesis32:20 Lo tlaa re: ‘Le gone, bona, motlhanka wa gago Jakobe o kwa morago ga rona.’ ” Gonne a re: “Ke tlaa mo tima bogale ka mpho e e nketeletseng pele, morago ke tlaa bona sefatlhogo sa gagwe; e tlaa re gongwe a nkamogele.”" 
Genesis32:21 Jalo mpho ya tshelela noka kwa pele ga gawe; mme ene ka esi a lala le lesomo bosigo joo. 
Genesis32:22 A tsoga bosigo joo, a tsaya basadi ba gagwe ba babedi, le malata a gagwe a mabedi, le bana ba gagwe ba le some le motso, a kgabaganya ka letsibogo ja Jaboke." 
Genesis32:23 A ba tsaya a ba kgabagantsha noka a ba a kgabagantsha dilo tse a nang natso. 
Genesis32:24 Jakobe a sala a le esi; mme ga sokasokana nae monna mongwe go tsamaya bosigo jwa a sa. 
Genesis32:25 Mme a re a bona a sa mo fenye, a ama tswinke ya noka ya gagwe; tswinke ya noka ya ga Jakobe ya khumoga ka a sokasokana nae." 
Genesis32:26 A mo raya a re: “Ntesa ke tsamaye gonne bosigo bo a sa.” Mme a re: “Ga nketla ke go lesa o tsamaya fa o sa ntshegofatse.” 
Genesis32:27 A mo raya a re: “Leina la gago e mang?” A re: “Jakobe.” 
Genesis32:28 Mme a re: “Leina la gago ga le ketla le tlhola le bidiwa Jakobe, le tlaa bidiwa Iseraele, gonne o ganetse le Modimo le batho, mme o fentse.”" 
Genesis32:29 Jakobe a mmotsa a re: “Ke a go rapela, a ko o mpolelele leina la gago.” Mme a re: “Ke ka ntlha yang fa o botsa leina la me?” Mme a mo segofatsa gone." 
Genesis32:30 Jakobe a raya leina la felo foo a re, Peniele; gonne a re: “Ke bonye Modimo re lebanye difatlhogo, mme botshelo jwa me bo bolokilwe.”" 
Genesis32:31 Letsatsi la mo tlhabela a fapaanya Peniele, a bo a bolawa ke noka." 
Genesis32:32 Ke gone ka moo bana ba Iseraele ba sa jeng mosifa wa noka o o mo tswinkeng ya serope le gompieno; gonne a ama tswinke ya serope sa ga Jakobe mo mosifeng wa noka. 
Genesis33:1 Jakobe a tsholetsa matlho a gagwe a leba, mme bonang, Esau a bo a tla le banna ba le 400 nae. Mme bana a ba kgaoganyetsa Lea, le Ragele le malata a mabedi." 
Genesis33:2 A baya malata a mabedi le bana ba one kwa pele pele, Lea le bana ba gagwe fa morago, Ragele le Josefe kwa moragorago." 
Genesis33:3 Ene ka esi a fetela kwa pele ga bone, a inamela fa fatshe gasupa, a ba a tla a atamela fa go mogolowe." 
Genesis33:4 Esau a siana a ya go mo kgatlhantsha, a mo kamatlela, a mo atla; mme ba lela." 
Genesis33:5 A tsholetsa matlho a gagwe a bona basadi le banyana; mme a re: “Ba o nang nabo ke bomang?” A re: “Ke bana ba Modimo o ba neileng motlhanka wa gago ka bopelonamagadi jwa one.” 
Genesis33:6 Foo malata a atamela, one le bana ba one, mme ba inama." 
Genesis33:7 Lea le ene a atamela le bana ba gagwe, ba inama; morago ga tla Josefe le Ragele, ba inama." 
Genesis33:8 Mme a re: “O a reng ka lesomo le le kanakana le ke kopanyeng nalo?” Jakobe a re: “Ke gore ke bone tsalano mo matlhong a morena wa me.” 
Genesis33:9 Esau a re: “Ke na le tsetsho, di ntekanye; a se o nang naso e nne sa gago fela nnaka.”" 
Genesis33:10 Jakobe a re: “Nnyaa, ke a go rapela, a e re fa ke bonye tsalano mo matlhong a gago, foo o amogele mpho ya me mo seatleng sa me; ka e le fa ke bonye sefatlhogo sa gago, mme ka go natefela fela jaaka motho a bona sefatlhogo sa Modimo." 
Genesis33:11 Ke a go rapela, a ko o amogele mpho ya me e e isitsweng kwa go wena; ka gobo Modimo o ntiretse ka pelonamagadi, ka ke bile ke na le mo go ntekanyeng.” A mo emelela, mme a e tsaya." 
Genesis33:12 A re: “A re nanoge, re tsamaye mmogo, ke tlaa go etelela pele.”" 
Genesis33:13 A mo raya a re: “Morena wa me o a itse fa bana ba sa le diramatlana le go re matsomane le matlhape a ke nang nao a a amusa. Mme fa ba ka di kgweetsa ka potlako letsatsi le le lengwe fela, matsomane otlhe a ka swa." 
Genesis33:14 Ke a go rapela, a morena wa me a fetele kwa pele ga motlhanka wa gagwe; nna ke tlaa goga ka papetletso ka fa mosepeleng wa matlhape a a kwa pele ga me, le ka fa mosepeleng wa banyana, ke tle ke tsamaye ke fitlhe koo go morena wa me kwa Seire.”" 
Genesis33:15 Esau a re: “Mma ke go tlogelele batho bangwe ba ke nang nabo.” Mme a re: “E tlaa bo e le ka ntlha yang? A nke ke bone tsalano mo matlhong a morena wa me.” 
Genesis33:16 Jalo Esau a boa ka letsatsi leo a leba kwa Seire. 
Genesis33:17 Jakobe a etela kwa Sukothe, a ikagela ntlo, a direla dikgomo tsa gagwe diobo; ke gone ka moo leina la felo foo le bidiwang Sukothe." 
Genesis33:18 Jakobe a fitlha ka kagiso kwa motseng wa Shekeme, o o mo lefatsheng la Kanana, ka a tswa kwa Patanaarame; a thibelela fa pele ga motse." 
Genesis33:19 Sebata sa lefatshe sa fa o tsharolotseng mogope wa gagwe gone, a se reka mo seatleng sa bana ba ga Hamore rra Shekeme, ka dipapetla tsa madi di le lekgolo." 
Genesis33:20 A aga aletara gone, a e raya leina a re: Elelohe-Iseraele. (Ke go re: Modimo wa Iseraele.)" 
Genesis34:1 Dina, morwadia Lea, yo o mmonyeng le Jakobe, a tswa a ya go bona bomorwadia lefatshe." 
Genesis34:2 Shekeme morwa Hamore wa Mohife, kgosana ya lefatshe leo, a mmona; mme a mo tsaya a lala nae, a mo senya." 
Genesis34:3 Pelo ya gagwe ya ngaparela Dina morwadia Jakobe, a rata morweetsana yo; mafoko a gagwe a tsena mo pelong ya morweetsana." 
Genesis34:4 Shekeme a bua le Hamore rraagwe a re: “Mpatlela morweetsana yo, a nne mosadi wa me.”" 
Genesis34:5 Jaana Jakobe a utlwa fa a leswefaditse Dina morwadie; bomorwawe ba bo ba na le dikgomo tsa gagwe kwa nageng; Jakobe a itidimalela fela ba tsamaya ba tla. 
Genesis34:6 Hamore rra Shekeme, a tswela kwa go Jakobe a ya go bua nae." 
Genesis34:7 E rile bomorwa Jakobe ba utlwa ba tloga ba tla gae ba tswa kwa nageng; banna bao ba hutsafala, ba nna bogale thata ka a dirile boatla mo go Iseraele ka go lala le morwadia Jakobe; e le selo se se sa tshwanelang go dirwa." 
Genesis34:8 Hamore a bua nabo a re: “Pelo ya ga morwaake Shekeme e tlhoafaletse morwadia lona; ke a lo rapela, lo mo mo neye gore a nne mosadi wa gagwe," 
Genesis34:9 mme lo nyalane le rona; re neeleng bomorwadia lona, le lona lo tseye bomorwadia rona." 
Genesis34:10 Lo tlaa aga le rona; lefatshe le tlaa nna fa pele ga lona, agang lo bo lo bapale mo go lone lo bone dithuo mo go lone.”" 
Genesis34:11 Shekeme a raya rra morweetsana le bokgaitsadie a re: “A nke ke bone tsalano mo matlhong a lona, se lo tlaa se mpalelang ke tlaa se ntsha." 
Genesis34:12 Le fa lo ntopa bogadi le ketleetso le fa go le kae, ke tlaa ntsha ka fa lo tlaa ntopang ka gone; se se gone fela ke gore nnayang morweetsana a nne mosadi wa me.”" 
Genesis34:13 Bomorwa Jakobe ba fetola Shekeme le rraagwe Hamore ka boferefere, ba bua ka a ne a leswefaditse Dina kgaitsadia bone." 
Genesis34:14 Ba ba raya ba re: “Ga re ka ke ra dira selo se, go neela motho yo o sa rupang kgaitsadia rona; gonne selo seo e tlaa bo e le kgobo mo go rona." 
Genesis34:15 Re tla dumalana le lona ka selo se, se le sosi fela; fa lo ka nna jaaka rona, fa banna botlhe ba lona ba ka rupisiwa." 
Genesis34:16 Foo re tlaa lo neela bomorwadia rona, re ba re tsaya bomorwadia lona, re aga le lona, mme re tlaa tswa batho ba le bangwe fela." 
Genesis34:17 E tlaa re fa lo gana go re utlwa, go rupa, foo re tlaa tsaya morwadia rona, mme re tsamaye.”" 
Genesis34:18 Mafoko a bone a kgatlha Hamore le Shekeme morwa Hamore. 
Genesis34:19 Lekau ga le a ka la diega go dira selo se, gonne le ne le kgatlhilwe ke morwadia Jakobe; le ne le tlotlwa bogolo go botlhe ba ntlo ya ga rraagwe." 
Genesis34:20 Hamore le Shekeme morwawe ba tla mo kgorong ya motse wa bone, ba bua le banna ba motse wa bone ba re:" 
Genesis34:21 “Banna ba ba kagiso le rona; ke gone a ba age mo lefatsheng le, ba bapale mo go lone; gonne, bonang lefatshe le ba lekanye. A re ba tseeleng bomorwadia bone go nna basadi ba rona le rona, re ba neeleng bomorwadia rona." 
Genesis34:22 Banna bao ba ka dumalana le rona go aga le rona le go tswa batho ba le bangwe fela ka selo se, se le sosi fela, fa banna botlhe ba ba mo go rona ba ka rupa jaaka bone ba rupile." 
Genesis34:23 Dikgomo tsa bone le thoto ya bone le dilo tsotlhe tsa bone, a ga di ketla di nna tsa rona? A re dumalaneng le bone fela, mme ba tlaa aga le rona.”" 
Genesis34:24 Botlhe ba ba tswang ka kgoro ya motse wa gagwe ba utlwa Hamore, le Shekeme morwawe; mme banna botlhe ba rupisiwa, e bong botlhe ba ba tswang ka kgoro ya motse wa gagwe." 
Genesis34:25 Ga dirala ya re ka letsatsi la boraro ka ba le botlhokong, bomorwa Jakobe ba le babedi, e bong Simeone le Lefi, bokgaitsadia Dina mongwe le mongwe a tsaya tšhaka ya gagwe, ba wela motse ka pelokgale, ba bolaya banna botlhe fela." 
Genesis34:26 Ba bolaya Hamore le Shekeme morwawe ka bogale jwa tšhaka, ba ntsha Dina mo ntlong ya ga Shekeme ba tswa ba tsamaya." 
Genesis34:27 Bomorwa Jakobe ba tla mo go ba ba bolailweng, ba thopa motse, ka gobo ba ne ba leswefaditse kgaitsadia bone." 
Genesis34:28 Ba gapa matsomane a bone, le matlhape a bone, le diesela tsa bone, le se se mo motseng, le se se kwa nageng." 
Genesis34:29 Le lohumo lotlhe lwa bone, le banyana botlhe ba bone, le basadi ba bone, ba ba tshwara ba ba thopa, e bong tsotlhe tse di mo matlong." 
Genesis34:30 Jakobe a raya Simeone le Lefi a re: “Lo ntshwentse, lo nnkgisitse sebodu mo banning ba lefatshe le mo go Bakanana, le mo go Baperise. Nna ka ke le mmotlana mo palong, ba tlaa nkokoanela ba mpolaya; ke tlaa nyelediwa, nna le ba ntlo ya me.”" 
Genesis34:31 Ba re: “A o ne a ka direla kgaitsadia rona jaaka seaka?” 
Genesis35:1 Modimo wa raya Jakobe wa re: “Nanoga o tlhatlogele kwa Bethele, o age gone; o dire aletara gone, o se direle Modimo o o kileng wa go iponaletsa gone jale ka o tshaba sefatlhogo sa ga mogoloo Esau.”" 
Genesis35:2 Foo Jakobe a raya ba ntlo ya gagwe le botlhe ba o nang nabo a re: “Tlosang medimo e sele e e mo go lona, lo iitshekise, lo apare diaparo di sele." 
Genesis35:3 A re nanogeng re tlhatlogeleng kwa Bethele; ke tlaa dira aletara gone, ke e direla Modimo o o nkarabileng mo letsatsing la pitlagano ya me, wa ba wa nna le mo tseleng e ke neng ke tsamaya ka yone.”" 
Genesis35:4 Ba neela Jakobe medimo yotlhe e sele e e mo diatleng tsa bone, le manyena a a mo ditsebeng tsa bone; Jakobe a di fitlha ka fa tlase ga setlhare sa mooka se se leng ka fa Shekeme." 
Genesis35:5 Ba eta; mme ga bo go le therego e kgolo mo metseng e e mo tikologong ya bone, mme ba se ka ba latela bomorwa Jakobe." 
Genesis35:6 Jalo Jakobe a fitlha kwa Luse o o mo lefatsheng la Kanana, ke go re, Bethele, ene le batho botlhe ba o nang nabo." 
Genesis35:7 A aga aletara gone, a raya felo foo leina a re, Elebethe-ele; ka gobo Modimo o ne wa mo senogela gone jale ka a tshaba sefatlhogo sa ga mogolowe." 
Genesis35:8 Mme Debora, mmelegi wa ga Rebeka a swa, a fitlhwa ka fa tlase ga setlhare sa Bethele, fa tlase ga mooka, ke gone leina la one la bidiwa Alonabakutha." 
Genesis35:9 Modimo wa bonala kwa go Jakobe gape, ka a tswa Patanaarame, wa mo segofatsa." 
Genesis35:10 Modimo wa mo raya wa re: “Leina la gago ke Jakobe; leina la gago ga le ketla le tlhola le bidiwa Jakobe, mme leina la gago go tlaa twe, Iseraele:” A mo raya leina a re, Iseraele." 
Genesis35:11 Modimo wa mo raya wa re: “Ke nna Modimo Mothatayotlhe; ata, o ntsifale. Morafe o tlaa tswa mo go wena le lesomo la merafe, le dikgosi di tlaa tswa mankopeng a gago." 
Genesis35:12 Lefatshe le ke kileng ka le naya Aberahame le Isake, ke tlaa le go naya; le losika lwa gago sehularong sa gago ke tlaa lo naya lefatshe le.”" 
Genesis35:13 Modimo wa tlhatloga wa tswa fa go ene fa felong fa o buileng nae gone. 
Genesis35:14 Jakobe a tlhoma segopotso felong fa o buileng nae gone, e le segopotso sa lentswe, a thela tshupelo e e nowang mo go sone, a ba a thela lookwane mo go sone." 
Genesis35:15 Jakobe a raya leina la felo fa Modimo o buileng nae gone a re, Bethele." 
Genesis35:16 Ba eta ba tswa Bethele; mme ga bo go sa ntse go na le sebaka ba ise ba fitlhe kwa Eferatha, Ragele a simolola go belega a bona pelego e e thata." 
Genesis35:17 Ga dirala ya re a le mo pelegong e e thata mmelegisi a mo raya a re: “O se ka wa boifa ka jaana o tlaa bona ngwana yo mongwe wa mosimane.” 
Genesis35:18 Ga dirala ya re mowa wa gagwe o tswa, ka a ne a swa, a raya leina la ngwana a re, Bononi; rraagwe a mmitsa Benjamine." 
Genesis35:19 Ragele a swa, a fitlhwa mo tseleng e e yang Eferatha, ke one Bethelehema." 
Genesis35:20 Jakobe a emisa sefikantswe fa godimo ga phupu ya gagwe; ke sone segopotso sa phupu ya ga Ragele le gompieno. 
Genesis35:21 Iseraele a eta, a tsharolola mogope wa gagwe ka kwa pele ga kago e e godileng ya phemelo ya Etere." 
Genesis35:22 Ga dirala ya re Iseraele a sa ntse a agile mo lefatsheng leo, Rubene a ya a lala le Bileha mogadingwana wa ga rraagwe; mme Iseraele a utlwa. Jaana bomorwa Jakobe ba bo ba le 12." 
Genesis35:23 Bomorwa Lea ke ba; Rubene, wa ntlha wa ga Jakobe, Simeone, Lefi, Juta, Isakare le Sebulone." 
Genesis35:24 Bomorwa Ragele ke ba; Josefe le Benjamine. 
Genesis35:25 Bomorwa Bileha, lelata la ga Ragele ke ba: Dane le Nafetali." 
Genesis35:26 Bomorwa Silepa, lelata la ga Lea ke ba: Gate le Ašere. Ba ke bone bomorwa Jakobe ba o ba bonyeng kwa Patanaarame." 
Genesis35:27 Jakobe a fitlha kwa go Isake rraagwe, kwa Mamere, kwa motseng wa Kiriathe-areba, o e leng Heberone, kwa Aberahame le Isake ba neng ba jaka gone." 
Genesis35:28 Malatsi a ga Isake e ne e le dinyaga di le 180. 
Genesis35:29 Isake a khutla, a swa, a phuthwa a ya kwa bathong ba ga gabo a tsofetse, a tletse malatsi; mme bomorwawe, Esau le Jakobe ba mo fitlha." 
Genesis36:1 Jaana tse ke tsone ditshika tsa ga Esau, ke ene Etome:" 
Genesis36:2 Esau a tsaya bomorwadia lefatshe la Kanana go nna basadi ba gagwe; Ata morwadia Elone wa Mohite, le Oholibama morwadia Ana, morwadia Sibeone wa Mohife;" 
Genesis36:3 le Basemathe morwadia Išemaele, kgaitsadia Nebaiothe." 
Genesis36:4 Ata a bona le Esau Elifase; Basemathe a bona Reuele; 
Genesis36:5 Oholibama a bona Jeuše, le Jalame, le Kora; ba, ke bomorwa Esau, ba o ba tsetseng mo lefatsheng la Kanana." 
Genesis36:6 Esau a tsaya basadi ba gagwe le bomorwawe le bomorwadie, le batho botlhe ba motse wa gagwe le dikgomo tsa gagwe, le dilo tsotlhe tsa gagwe tse di utlwang le dithuo tsotlhe tsa gagwe tse o neng a di phuthile mo lefatsheng la Kanana; mme a ya kwa lefatsheng le le katoganyeng le Jakobe monnawe." 
Genesis36:7 Gonne dilo tsa bone di ne di le dikgolo thata, go ne go retetse fa ba ka nna mmogo; mme lefatshe la majako a bone le ne le sa kake la ba tshola ka ntlha ya dikgomo tsa bone." 
Genesis36:8 Esau a aga mo thabeng ya Seire; Esau ke ene Etome. 
Genesis36:9 Mme tse, ke tsone ditshika tsa ga Esau rraabo Baetome ba thaba ya Seire." 
Genesis36:10 A ke one maina a bomorwa Esau: Elifase morwa Ata mosadi wa ga Esau, Reuele morwa Basemathe mosadi wa ga Esau." 
Genesis36:11 Bomorwa Elifase e ne e le Temane, Omare, Sefo, Gatame, le Kenase." 
Genesis36:12 Timena e ne e le mogadingwana wa ga Elifase morwa Esau; mme a bona le Elifase Amaleke; bao ke bomorwa Ata mosadi wa ga Esau. 
Genesis36:13 Ba ke bomorwa Reuele: Nahathe, Sera, Shamma, le Misa; bao e ne e le bomorwa Basemathe, mosadi wa ga Esau." 
Genesis36:14 Ba e ne e le bomorwa Oholibama morwadia Ana, morwadia Sibeone, mosadi wa ga Esau; mme a bona le Esau Jeuše, Jalame, le Kora." 
Genesis36:15 Ba ke dikgosana mo go bomorwa Esau, bomorwa Elifase motsalwapele wa ga Esau: Kgosana Temane, kgosana Omare, kgosana Sefo, kgosana Kenase." 
Genesis36:16 Kgosana Kora, kgosana Gatame, kgosana Amaleke; tse ke dikgosana tse di duleng mo go Elifase mo lefatsheng la Etome; bao ke bomorwa Ata." 
Genesis36:17 Ba ke bomorwa Reuele morwa Esau; kgosana Nahathe, kgosana Sera, kgosana Shamma, kgosana Misa. Tseo ke dikgosana tse di duleng mo go Reuele mo lefatsheng la Etome; bao ke bomorwa Basemathe mosadi wa ga Esau." 
Genesis36:18 Ba ke bomorwa Oholibama mosadi wa ga Esau: Kgosana Jeuše, kgosana Jalame, kgosana Kora; tseo ke dikgosana tse di duleng mo go Oholibama, morwadia Ana, mosadi wa ga Esau." 
Genesis36:19 Bao ke bomorwa Esau, mme tseo ke dikgosana tsa bone; Esau ke ene Etome." 
Genesis36:20 Ba ke bomorwa Seire wa Mohori, banni ba lefatshe: Lotane, le Shobale, Sibeone, le Ana." 
Genesis36:21 Le Dišone, Esere, le Dišane; tseo ke dikgosana tse di duleng mo Bahoreng, bana ba ga Seire mo lefatsheng la Etome." 
Genesis36:22 Bana ba ga Lotane e ne e le Hori le Hemame; mme kgaitsadia Lotane e ne e le Timena. 
Genesis36:23 Ba ke bana ba ga Shobale: Alefane, Manahathe, Ebale, Shefo le Oname." 
Genesis36:24 Ba ke bana ba ga Sibeone: Aia le Ana; yo ke ene Ana yo o bonyeng metswedi e e metsi a a molelo mo nageng, ka a hudisa diesela tsa ga Sibeone rraagwe." 
Genesis36:25 Ba ke bana ba ga Ana: Dišone le Oholibama morwadia Ana. 
Genesis36:26 Ba ke bana ba ga Dišone: Hemetane, le Ešebane, le Itherane, le Kerane." 
Genesis36:27 Ba ke bana ba ga Esere: Bilehane, le Saafane, le Akane." 
Genesis36:28 Ba ke bana ba ga Dišane; Use le Arane. 
Genesis36:29 Tse ke dikgosana tse di duleng mo Bahoreng: kgosana Lotane, kgosana Shobale, kgosana Sibeone, kgosana Ana," 
Genesis36:30 kgosana Dišone, kgosana Esere, kgosana Dišane; tseo ke dikgosana tse di duleng mo Bahoreng, ka fa dikgosaneng tsa bone mo lefatsheng la Seire." 
Genesis36:31 Tse ke dikgosi tse di busitseng mo lefatsheng la Etome go ise go buse kgosi epe mo baneng ba Iseraele. 
Genesis36:32 Bele morwa Beore a busa mo Etome; leina la motse wa ga gabo e ne e le Dinehaba. 
Genesis36:33 Bele a swa, mme Jobabe morwa Sera wa Bosera a busa mo boemong jwa gagwe." 
Genesis36:33 Bele a swa, mme Jobabe morwa Sera wa Bosera a busa mo boemong jwa gagwe." 
Genesis36:34 Jobabe a swa, mme Hušame wa lefatshe la Batemane a busa mo boemong jwa gagwe." 
Genesis36:34 Jobabe a swa, mme Hušame wa lefatshe la Batemane a busa mo boemong jwa gagwe." 
Genesis36:35 Hušame a swa, mme Hatate morwa Betate, yo o kgemethetseng Midiane mo nageng ya Moabe, a busa mo boemong jwa gagwe; leina la motse wa ga gabo e ne e le Afithe." 
Genesis36:36 Hatate a swa, mme Samela wa Masereka a busa mo boemong jwa gagwe." 
Genesis36:37 Samela a swa, mme Shaule wa Rehobothe o o fa Nokeng, a busa mo boemong jwa gagwe." 
Genesis36:38 Shaule a swa, mme Baale-hanane morwa Akebore a busa mo boemong jwa gagwe." 
Genesis36:39 Baale-hanane morwa Akebore a swa, mme Hatare a busa mo boemong jwa gagwe; leina la motse wa ga gabo e ne e le Pau; leina la mosadi wa gagwe e le Mehetabele morwadia Matere, morwadia Mesahabe." 
Genesis36:40 A, ke maina a dikgosana tse di duleng mo go Esau, ka fa makgotleng a tsone, le ka fa mafelong a tsone, ka maina a tsone: Kgosana Timena, kgosana Alefa, kgosana Jethethe." 
Genesis36:41 Kgosana Oholibama, kgosana Ela, kgosana Pinone;" 
Genesis36:42 kgosana Kenase, kgosana Temane, kgosana Mibesare;" 
Genesis36:43 kgosana Magadiele, kgosana Irame; tseo ke dikgosana tsa Etome, ka fa mannong a tsone mo lefatsheng le di le ruileng. Yo ke ene Esau rraabo Baetome." 
Genesis37:1 Jakobe a aga mo lefatsheng la majako a ga rraagwe, mo lefatsheng la Kanana." 
Genesis37:2 Tse ke dipolelo kaga ba ga Jakobe. Josefe a le dinyaga di le 17, a disa letsomane a na le bomogolowe; a bo a le lekawana a na le bomorwa Bileha, le bomorwa Silepa, basadi ba ga rraagwe. Josefe a isa polelo e e bosula ka ga bone kwa go rraagwe." 
Genesis37:3 Jaana Iseraele a bo a rata Josefe bogolo go bana botlhe ba gagwe, ka gobo e le ngwana wa botsofe jwa gagwe; mme a mo direla kobo e e mebala mentsi." 
Genesis37:4 Bomogolowe ba bona fa rraabo a mo rata bogolo go bone botlhe; mme ba mo ila, ba ne ba sa kake ba bua nae sentle gope." 
Genesis37:5 Josefe a lora toro, a e bolelela bomogolowe; mme ba mo ila segolo bogolo." 
Genesis37:6 A ba raya a re: “Ke a lo rapela, a ko lo utlwe toro e ke e lorileng:" 
Genesis37:7 Gonne, bonang, re ne re bofa dingata tsa mabele mo leoteng, mme ka tshoganetso ngata ya me ya nanoga ya ba ya ema ya tsepalala, mme dingata tsa lona tsa tla tsa e dikanyetsa, tsa ikobela ngata ya me.”" 
Genesis37:8 Bomogolowe ba mo raya ba re: “A tota o gopola gore o ka re busa? Le gone a o gopola gore o ka re laola?” Ba fela ba mo ila segolo bogolo ka ntlha ya ditoro tsa gagwe le mafoko a gagwe. 
Genesis37:9 A fela a lora toro e nngwe, a e bolelela bomogolowe a re: “Bonang, ke bile ke lorile toro e nngwe gape: Letsatsi le kgwedi, le dinaledi di le 11 tsa inkobela.”" 
Genesis37:10 A e bolelela rraagwe, le bomogolowe; rraagwe a mo kgalemela a mo raya a re: “Toro e o e lorileng ke yang? A ruri nna le mmaago, le bomogoloo, re tlaa tla go go ikobela fa fatshe?”" 
Genesis37:11 Bomogolowe ba mo hufegela; mme rraagwe ene a tshola polelo e ka pelo. 
Genesis37:12 Bomogolowe ba ya go fudisa letsomane la ga rraabo kwa Shekeme. 
Genesis37:13 Mme Iseraele a raya Josefe a re: “Kana bomogoloo ba hudisa letsomane kwa Shekeme? Ntlo, ke tlaa go roma kwa go bone.” Mme a mo raya a re: “Ke fano.”" 
Genesis37:14 A mo raya a re: “A ko o tsamaye jaana, o ye go bona bomogoloo gore a ba sa tshedile sentle, le letsomane a le ntse sentle; o itse go ba o tla o mpolela.” A mo roma a tswa mokgatšheng wa Heberone, mme a fitlha kwa Shekeme." 
Genesis37:15 Monna mongwe a mo fitlhela, a kaila kaila fela mo nageng; mme monna yo a mmotsa a re: “O batlang?”" 
Genesis37:16 A re: “Ke batla bomogolole; ke a go rapela, a ko o mpolelele kwa ba hudisang gone.”" 
Genesis37:17 Monna yo a re: “Ba hudugile mono; gonne ke ba utlwile ba re: ‘A re yeng kwa Dothane.’ ” Josefe a latela bomogolowe, a ba fitlhela kwa Dothane." 
Genesis37:18 Ba mmona a sa le kgakala; mme a re a ise a ba atamele, ba mo rera gore ba tle ba mmolaye." 
Genesis37:19 Ba raana ba re: “Bonang rraditoro ke yole o etla. 
Genesis37:20 Ntlong jaana; a re mmolayeng re mo latlhele mo mokoleng mongwe, re tle re re: ‘Sebatana se mo jele;’ re tlaa bona se se tlaa tswang mo ditorong tsa gagwe.”" 
Genesis37:21 Rubene a utlwa, mme a mo golola mo seatleng sa bone, a re: “A re se tloseng botshelo jwa gagwe.”" 
Genesis37:22 Rubene a ba raya a re: “Se tshololeng madi; mo latlheleng mo mokoleng o, o o mo nageng, lo se ka lwa baya seatla sepe mo go ene;” ya bo e le gore a mo golole mo seatleng sa bone, a tle a mo rebolele rraagwe." 
Genesis37:23 Ga dirala ya re Josefe a fitlha kwa go bomogolowe, ba mo apola kobo ya gagwe, e bong kobo e e mebala mentsi e o e apereng." 
Genesis37:24 Ba mo tsaya, ba mo latlhela mo mokoleng; mme mokole o ne o se na sepe, go ne go se na metsi mo go one." 
Genesis37:25 Ba nna fa fatshe ba a ja dijo. Ba tsholetsa matlho a bone, ba leba, mme bonang, go bo go tla lesomo le le etileng la Baišemaele, ba tswa Gileate ba na le dikamela tsa bone di belesitse dilo tse di lonko lo lo monate tsa malao, le balema, le mura, ba re ba di isa kwa Egepeto." 
Genesis37:26 Mme Juta a raya bomorwa rraagwe a re: “Go tlaa re thusa eng fa re bolaya monnaa rona, re loba madi a gagwe?" 
Genesis37:27 Ntlong, re mmapatseng mo go Baišemaele, mme a seatla sa rona se se ka sa nna mo go ene; gonne ke monnaa rona, nama ya rona.” Mme bomorwa rraagwe ba mo dumela." 
Genesis37:28 Ga feta Bamidiane, e le babapatsi. Bomogoloa Josefe ba goga Josefe ba mo ntsha mo mokoleng; ba mo rekisa mo go Baišemaele ka dipapetla tsa selefera di le 20. Mme ba isa Josefe kwa Egepeto." 
Genesis37:29 Rubene a boela kwa mokoleng; a ya a fitlhela Josefe a seyo mo mokoleng; mme a gagola diaparo tsa gagwe. 
Genesis37:30 A boela kwa go bomonnawe a re: “Ngwana ga a yo; mme nna ke tlaa ya kae?” 
Genesis37:31 Ba tsaya kobo ya ga Josefe, ba bolaya potsane, ba ina kobo mo mading." 
Genesis37:32 Ba isa kobo e e mebala mentsi, ba e fitlhisa kwa go rraabo; ba re: “Selo se re se begile; a ko o sekaseke o bone gore a ke kobo ya ga morwao kgotsa nnyaa.”" 
Genesis37:33 A e itse, a re: “Ke kobo ya ga morwaake; sebatana se mo jele; ga go na pelaelo Josefe o gagogantswe.”" 
Genesis37:34 Jakobe a gagola diaparo tsa gagwe, a tswala letsela la kgetsi mo lothekeng, a lelela morwawe ka malatsi a le mantsi."
