Genesis37:35 Bomorwawe botlhe, le bomorwadie botlhe ba nanoga, ba re ba a mo gomotsa; mme a gana go gomodiwa a re: “Ka gonne ke tlaa fologela mo lebitleng kwa go morwaake ke ntse ke hutsafetse fela.” Mme rraagwe a mo lelela." 
Genesis37:36 Bamidiane ba feta ba mo rekisa kwa Egepeto mo go Potifare, mogolwane wa ga Faro, kgosana ya maotlana." 
Genesis38:1 Mme ga dirala ya re ka lobaka loo, Juta a huduga a tswa mo go bomorwa rraagwe, a menogela kwa monneng mongwe wa Moadulame, leina la gagwe go twe Hira." 
Genesis38:2 Juta a bona morwadia Mokanana mongwe gone, leina la gagwe go twe Shua; a mo tsaya, a tsena kwa go ene." 
Genesis38:3 Mme a nna moimana, a bona ngwana wa mosimane; a mo raya leina a re, Ere." 
Genesis38:4 A ba a nna moimana gape, a bona ngwana wa mosimane; a mo raya leina a re, Onane." 
Genesis38:5 A fela a bona ngwana wa mosimane gape, a mo raya leina a re, Shela. Juta a bo a le kwa Kesibe fa mosadi a bona ngwana yo." 
Genesis38:6 Juta a tseisa Ere ngwana wa gagwe wa ntlha mosadi, leina la gagwe go twe, Tamare." 
Genesis38:7 Ere, ngwana wa ntlha wa ga Juta a bo a le bosula mo matlhong a ga Jehofa; mme Jehofa a mmolaya." 
Genesis38:8 Juta a raya Onane a re: “Tsena kwa go mogatsa mogoloo, o mo tlhatswe ka fa tshwanelong ya monnaa motho, o tsosetse mogoloo losika.”" 
Genesis38:9 Onane a bo a itse fa losika e tlaa bo e se lwa gagwe; mme ga dirala e ne e tle e re a tsena mo go mogatsa mogolowe a thololele fa fatshe, gore e se ka ya re gongwe a tsosetsa mogolowe losika." 
Genesis38:10 Selo se o se dirileng se ne se le bosula mo matlhong a ga Jehofa; mme le ene a mmolaya. 
Genesis38:11 Foo, Juta a raya Tamare ngwetsi ya gagwe a re: “Nna fela mo ntlong ya ga rraago o le motlholagadi, e bo e tle Shela morwaake a gole.” A ithaya a re: “E se ka ya re gongwe le ene a swa jaaka bomogolowe.” Tamare a ya a nna mo ntlong ya ga rraagwe." 
Genesis38:12 Ya tla ya re motlha mongwe morwadia Shua, mosadi wa ga Juta, a swa; mme Juta a gomotsega, a tlhatlogela kwa babeoding ba dinku tsa gagwe kwa Timena, le tsala ya gagwe Hira wa Moadulame." 
Genesis38:13 Tamare a bolelelwa ga twe: “Bona, matsalaago o tlhatlogela kwa Timena go beola dinku tsa gagwe.”" 
Genesis38:14 Mme a apola diaparo tsa gagwe tsa botlholagadi, a ipipa ka losire lwa gagwe, a ipopaganya, a dula fa kgorong ya Enaime o o fa tseleng e e yang Timena; gonne a bona fa Shela a setse a godile, a sa mo neelwe go nna mosadi wa gagwe." 
Genesis38:15 E rile Juta a mmona a ithaya a re, ke seaka; gonne o ne a ipipile sefatlhogo." 
Genesis38:16 A fapogela kwa go ene fa tseleng a re: “Ke a go rapela, a re ye koo, o mme ke ye mo go wena;” gonne a sa itse fa e le ngwetsi wa gagwe. Mme a re: “O tlaa nnaya eng gore o tle o tle mo go nna.”" 
Genesis38:17 A re: “Ke tlaa go romela potsane ya dipodi e tswa kwa letsomaneng.” Mosadi a re: “A o tlaa mpeela sengwe o tle o tsamaye o bo o e tlise?” 
Genesis38:18 Mme a re: “Ke tlaa go beela eng?” A re: “Sekano sa gago, le mogala wa sone, le thobane ya gago e e mo seatleng sa gago.” Mme a di mo neela, a ya mo go ene, a mo imisa." 
Genesis38:19 Tamare a nanoga a tsamaya, a apola losire lwa gagwe, a apara diaparo tsa botlholagadi jwa gagwe." 
Genesis38:20 Juta a romela potsane ka seatla sa tsala ya gagwe ya Moadulame, gore a amogele peelo mo seatleng sa mosadi; mme a se ka a mo fitlhela." 
Genesis38:21 Foo a botsa banna ba ga gabo mosadi, a re: “Se kae seaka se se neng se le kwa Enaime ka fa tseleng?” Ba re: “Ga go ise go ke go nne seaka mono.”" 
Genesis38:22 A boela kwa go Juta a re: “Ga ke a ka ka mo fitlhela; le bone banna ba felo foo ba re: ‘Ga go ise go ke go nne seaka mono.’ ” 
Genesis38:23 Juta a re: “A a se itseele, e se re gongwe ra tlhabisiwa ditlhong; bona, ke rometse potsane e, mme ga o a ka wa mo fitlhela.”" 
Genesis38:24 Ga dirala ya re e ka ne e le dikgwedi di le tharo morago, ga bolelelwa Juta ga twe: “Tamare ngwetsi wa gago, o akafetse; le gone o moimana ka boaka.” Juta a re: “Mo ntshetseng kwa ntle, a fisiwe.”" 
Genesis38:25 E rile a ntshediwa kwa ntle a roma kwa go matsalaagwe a re: “Ke ka monna yo dilo tse e leng tsa gagwe ke leng moimana ka ene; a ba a re ke a go rapela, sekaseka dilo tse, o bone gore ke tsa ga mang, sekano, le megala, le thobane?”" 
Genesis38:26 Juta a di dumela a re: “Ee, tsa me;” a ba a re: “Ene o siame bogolo go nna: ka gobo ke se ka ka mo neela Shela morwaake.” Mme a se ka a ba a tlhola a mo itse." 
Genesis38:27 Ya re mo motlheng wa go belega ga gagwe, bonang, ga bo go le bana ba mafatlha mo sebopelong sa gagwe." 
Genesis38:28 Ga dirala ya re a iteka, mongwe a ntsha letsogo; mme mmelegisi a tsaya tlhale e khibidu a e bofelela mo letsogong la gagwe, a re: “Yo o dule pele.”" 
Genesis38:29 Mme ya re a busa seatla, bonang, monnawe a tswa; mme mmelegisi a re: “O no o intsheletsang phatlha?” Ke gone ka moo leina la gagwe go tweng Perese." 
Genesis38:30 Morago ga tswa mogolowe yo o nang le tlhale e khibidu mo letsogong; mme a rewa leina ga twe, Sera." 
Genesis39:1 Josefe a isiwa kwa Egepeto. Potifare mogolwane wa ga Faro le kgosana ya maotlana, wa Moegepeto a mo reka mo seatleng sa Baišemaele ba ba mo isitseng gone." 
Genesis39:2 Jehofa a nna le Josefe, a ba a nna monna yo o tlhogonolofetseng, a nna mo ntlong ya mong wa gagwe wa Moegepeto." 
Genesis39:3 Mong wa gagwe a bona fa Jehofa a na nae, le go re, Jehofa o tlhogonolofatsa dilo tsotlhe tse o di dirang." 
Genesis39:4 Josefe a bona tsalano mo matlhong a gagwe, mme a mo direla; a mmaya molebalebi wa ntlo ya gagwe, le dilo tsotlhe tse o nang natso a di tsenya mo seatleng sa gagwe." 
Genesis39:5 Ga dirala e sale ka lobaka lo o mmeileng molebalebi ka lone wa ntlo ya gagwe, le wa dilo tsotlhe tse a nang natso, Jehofa o na a segofatsa ntlo ya Moegepeto ka ntlha ya ga Josefe; mme tshegofatso ya ga Jehofa ya nna mo go tsotlhe tse a nang natso, mo ntlong le kwa nageng." 
Genesis39:6 A lesa tsotlhe tse a nang natso mo seatleng sa ga Josefe; a sa itse sepe se a nang naso, fa e se dijo tse o di jang fela. Josefe a bo a le montle, a bopegile sentle." 
Genesis39:7 Ga dirala ya re morago ga dilo tse, mogatsa mong wa gagwe a eletsa Josefe ka matlho; mme a re: “Robala le nna.”" 
Genesis39:8 Mme a gana, a raya mogatsa mong wa gagwe a re: “Bona, monngwake ga a itse sepe se se mo go nna mo ntlong, o tsentse tsotlhe tse a nang natso mo seatleng sa me;" 
Genesis39:9 mo ntlong e, ga go na ope yo o mogolo mo go nna, le gone ga a a baya sepe kwa ntle ga me, fa e se wena, ka gobo o le mosadi wa gagwe; kana foo bosula jo bogolo jo ke ka bo dira jang, ke leofela Modimo?”" 
Genesis39:10 Mme ya re a ntse a bua le Josefe ka malatsi go tlhomagana, a se ka a mo reetsa go rapama fa go ene le fa e le go nna nae." 
Genesis39:11 Ga dirala ya re ka lobaka loo Josefe a tsena mo ntlong go dira tiro ya gagwe; mme go ne go se na ope wa banna ba ntlo gone mo teng. 
Genesis39:12 Mosadi a mo phamola ka seaparo a re: “Robala le nna.” Josefe a tlogela seaparo sa gagwe mo seatleng sa mosadi a tshaba, a tswela kwa ntle." 
Genesis39:13 Ga dirala ya re mosadi a bona fa a tlogetse seaparo sa gagwe mo seatleng sa gagwe, a bile a tshabetse kwa ntle," 
Genesis39:14 a kua banna ba ntlo ya gagwe, a bua nabo, a re: “Bonang, o tsentse motho wa Mohebere mo go rona go re sotla; o ne a tsena kwa go nna gore a robale le nna, mme ka goa ka lentswe le legolo." 
Genesis39:15 Ga dirala ya re a utlwa ke tsholetsa lentswe la me ke goa, a tlogela seaparo sa gagwe fa go nna a tshaba, a tswela kwa ntle.”" 
Genesis39:16 A baya seaparo sa gagwe fa go ene, ya ba ya tla mong wa gagwe a tla gae." 
Genesis39:17 A bua nae ka mafoko a, a re: “Motlhanka wa Mohebere yo o mo tlisitseng mo go rona o ne a tsena kwa go nna go ntshotla." 
Genesis39:18 Ga dirala e rile ke tsholetsa lentswe la me ke goa, a tlogela seaparo sa gagwe fa go nna a tshabela kwa ntle.”" 
Genesis39:19 Ga dirala ya re mong wa gagwe a utlwa mafoko a mosadi wa gagwe o a buang nae a re: “Motlhanka wa gago o ntirile jaana,” bogale jwa gagwe jwa tuka." 
Genesis39:20 Mong wa ga Josefe a mo tsenya mo ntlong ya kgolegelo, felo kwa bagolegwa ba kgosi ba golegelwang gone; a nna gone mo ntlong ya kgolegelo." 
Genesis39:21 Jehofa a nna le Josefe, a mo supetsa pelonomi, a mo naya tsalano mo matlhong a modisa wa ntlo ya kgolegelo." 
Genesis39:22 Modisa wa ntlo ya kgolegelo a tsenya bagolegwa botlhe ba ba mo ntlong ya kgolegelo mo seatleng sa ga Josefe; sengwe le sengwe se se dirwang gone ya nna ene modiri wa sone. 
Genesis39:23 Modisa wa ntlo ya kgolegelo ga a ka a tlhokomela sepe se se mo thateng ya ga Josefe ka gobo Jehofa a na nae; se o se dirang Jehofa a se tlhogonolofatsa fela. 
Genesis40:1 Ga dirala ya re morago ga dilo tse, motshola phafana wa kgosi ya Egepeto le moapei wa yone, ba kgopisa morena wa bone, kgosi ya Egepeto." 
Genesis40:2 Mme Faro a nna bogale le bagolwane ba gagwe ba babedi, e bong mogolo wa batshola diphafana le mogolo wa baapei." 
Genesis40:3 A ba tsenya mo tisong mo ntlong ya kgosana ya maotlana, mo ntlong ya kgolegelo, felo kwa Josefe o golegilweng gone." 
Genesis40:4 Kgosana ya maotlana a ba tsenya mo thateng ya ga Josefe, mme a ba direla; ba sala ba ntse mo tisong ka lobaka." 
Genesis40:5 Mme ba lora toro boo babedi mo bosigong bo le bongwe fela, mongwe le mongwe ka fa phuthololong ya toro ya gagwe, motshola phafana le moapeedi wa kgosi ya Egepeto, ba ba golegilweng mo ntlong ya kgolegelo." 
Genesis40:6 Josefe a tla a tsena kwa go bone ka moso, a ba leba, mme bonang, ba bo ba tlhontse." 
Genesis40:7 Mme a botsa bagolwane ba ga Faro ba a nang nabo mo tisong, mo ntlong ya mong wa gagwe a re: “Ana lo tlhonyeditseng difatlhogo mo go kanakana gompieno?”" 
Genesis40:8 Ba mo raya ba re: “Re lorile toro, mme ga go na ope yo o ka e phuthololang.” Josefe a ba raya a re: “Diphuthololo a ga se tsa Modimo? Ke a lo rapela, e mpoleleleng.”" 
Genesis40:9 Motshola phafana yo mogolo a bolelela Josefe toro ya gagwe, a mo raya a re: “Mo torong ya me, bona, go ne go le mofine fa pele ga me;" 
Genesis40:10 mo mofineng ga bo go le dikala di le tharo; mme wa nna jaka e kete o a kukunya, le dithunya tsa one tsa, thunya; le masitlha a tswa mafine a a buduleng." 
Genesis40:11 Phafana ya ga Faro ya bo e le mo seatleng sa me; ka tsaya mafine ka a gamolela mo phafaneng ya ga Faro, ka neela Faro phafana mo seatleng.”" 
Genesis40:12 Josefe a mo raya a re: “Phuthololo ya yone ke e: Dikala tse tharo ke malatsi a le mararo. 
Genesis40:13 E tlaa re malatsi a ise a nne mararo Faro a tsholetse tlhogo ya gago, a go busetse kwa tirong ya gago; mme o tlaa neela Faro phafana mo seatleng, ka fa mokgweng wa gale, jaaka fa o sa ntse o le motshola phafana wa gagwe." 
Genesis40:14 E tle e re o tshela sentle o nkgopole, ke a go rapela, o ntshupetse pelonomi o nkumake kwa go Faro, o ntseye ke tswe mo ntlong e." 
Genesis40:15 Gonne ruri ke utswilwe ka ngwegisiwa mo lefatsheng la Bahebere; le gone mono ga ke a dira sepe se e ka bong e le fano ba ntsentse mo moleteng o ka ga sone.” 
Genesis40:16 E rile moapei yo mogolo a bona fa phuthololo e le molemo, a raya Josefe a re: “Le nna ke ne ke le mo tirong, mme bona, diroto di le tharo tsa senkgwe se sesweu di ne di le mo tlhogong ya me." 
Genesis40:17 Mo serotong se se kwa godimodimo ga bo go le dijo dingwe le dingwe tse di besitsweng tsa ga Faro; mme dinonyane tsa di ja di le mo serotong mo tlhogong ya me.” 
Genesis40:18 Mme Josefe a mo fetola, a mo raya a re: “Phuthololo ya yone ke e: Diroto tse tharo ke malatsi a le mararo." 
Genesis40:19 E tlaa re malatsi a ise a nne mararo Faro a tsholetse tlhogo ya gago a e tlose mo go wena, a go pege mo setlhareng; mme dinonyane di tlaa ja nama ya gago.”" 
Genesis40:20 Ga dirala ya re ka letsatsi la boraro, e le letsatsi la botsalo jwa ga Faro, a direla batlhanka botlhe ba gagwe modiro, a tsholetsa tlhogo ya motshola phafana yo mogolo le tlhogo ya moapei yo mogolo mo gare ga batlhanka ba gagwe." 
Genesis40:21 A busetsa motshola phafana yo mogolo mo go tsholeng phafana ga gagwe gape; mme a neela Faro phafana mo seatleng. 
Genesis40:22 Moapei yo mogolo a mo pega; jaaka Josefe a ne a ba phuthololetse. 
Genesis40:23 Le fa go ntse jalo motshola phafana yo mogolo ga a ka a gakologelwa Josefe; a mo lebala fela. 
Genesis41:1 Ga dirala ya re kwa bokhutlong jwa dinyaga di le pedi tse di tletseng, Faro a lora, mme bonang a bo a eme fa nokeng." 
Genesis41:2 Mme bonang, ga tlhatloga dikgomo tse dinamagadi di supa mo nokeng di le mebele mentle, di nonne; tsa fula mo motlhakeng." 
Genesis41:3 Morago ga tsone ga tlhatloga dikgomo tse dingwe tse dinamagadi di supa, di le mebele e maswe, di le mekoduwe, tsa ema fa dikgomong tse dingwe tse dinamagadi, fa losing lwa noka." 
Genesis41:4 Dikgomo tse dinamagadi tse di mebele e maswe, tse di mekoduwe, tsa a ja tsa fetsa dikgomo tse dinamagadi tse di mebele mentle, tse di nonneng. Foo Faro a thanya." 
Genesis41:5 A robala a ba a lora lwa bobedi; mme bona diako tsa mabele di supa tsa tswa mo lotlhakeng lo le longwe fela, di nonne, di le molemo." 
Genesis41:6 Mme bonang, diako di supa, tse di se nang sepe, tse di tshubilweng ke phefo ya botlhabatsatsi, di tlhoga morago ga tsone." 
Genesis41:7 Diako tse di swabileng tsa kometsa diako tse supa tse di nonneng tse di tletseng; Faro a thanya, a lemoga fa a ne a lora." 
Genesis41:8 Ga dirala ya re ka moso mowa wa gagwe wa bo o fuduegile, ka moo a roma a bitsa dingaka tsotlhe tsa Egepeto, le ba botlhale botlhe ba gone. Faro a ba bolelela toro ya gagwe; mme ga bo go se na ope yo o ka e mo phuthololelang." 
Genesis41:9 Foo, ga bua motshola phafana yo mogolo, a raya Faro a re: “Ke gakologelwa melato ya me gompieno." 
Genesis41:10 Faro o kile a re a le bogale le batlhanka ba gagwe, a ntsenya mo tisong mo ntlong ya kgosana ya maotlana, nna le moapei yo mogolo." 
Genesis41:11 Ra lora toro mo bosigong bo le bongwe fela, nna le ene; ra lora mongwe le mongwe ka fa phuthololong ya toro ya gagwe." 
Genesis41:12 Ga bo go na le lekau gone le rona, la Mohebere, motlhanka wa kgosana ya maotlana; mme ra mmolelela, mme a re phuthololela ditoro tsa rona; a phuthololela mongwe le mongwe ka fa torong ya gagwe." 
Genesis41:13 Ga dirala fela jaaka a re phuthololetse, ga nna fela jalo; nna a mpusetsa mo tirong ya me, ene a mo pega.”" 
Genesis41:14 Foo Faro a roma a bitsa Josefe, mme ba mo ntsha ka potlako mo moleteng, mme a ipeola, a apara diaparo di sele, a ya a tsena kwa go Faro." 
Genesis41:15 Faro a raya Josefe a re: “Ke lorile toro, mme ga go na ope yo o ka e mphuthololelang; ke utlwile ka ga gago ga twe, e a re fa o utlwa toro o e phutholole.”" 
Genesis41:16 Josefe a fetola Faro a re: “Ga go yo mo go nna; Modimo o tlaa naya Faro phetolo ya kagiso.” 
Genesis41:17 Faro a raya Josefe a re: “Mo torong ya me, bona, ke ne ke eme fa losing lwa noka." 
Genesis41:18 Mme bona, ga tlhatloga dikgomo tse dinamagadi di supa mo nokeng, di nonne di le mebele mentle; tsa fula mo motlhakeng." 
Genesis41:19 Mme bona, dikgomo tse dinamagadi di supa tsa tlhatloga morago ga tsone, di le mekoduwe, di le mebele e maswe thata, di le lopatiko, tse ke iseng ke ke ke bone tse di tshwanang natso gope mo lefatsheng lotlhe la Egepeto ka bomaswe jwa tsone." 
Genesis41:20 Dikgomo tse dinamagadi, tse di mekoduwe tse di mebele e maswe, tsa a ja tsa swetsa dikgomo tse dinamagadi tsa pele tse di nonneng." 
Genesis41:21 E rile di sena go di ja di di swetsa, go ne go sa ka ke ga itsiwe fa di di jele; tsa bo di sa ntse di le mebele e maswe jaaka mo tshimologong. Foo ka thanya." 
Genesis41:22 Ka bona mo torong ya me, bonang, go tswa diako di supa mo lotlhakeng lo le longwe fela, di tletse, di le molemo." 
Genesis41:23 Mme bona, diako di supa tse di swabileng, tse di se nang sepe, di tshubilwe ke phefo ya botlhabatsatsi, tsa tlhoga morago ga tsone." 
Genesis41:24 Diako tse di se nang sepe tsa kometsa diako tse supa tse dintle; mme ka e bolelela dingaka, ga bo go se na ope yo o ka e nthanolelang.”" 
Genesis41:25 Josefe a raya Faro a re: “Toro ya ga Faro nngwe fela; se Modimo o tlogang o se dira, o se boleletse Faro." 
Genesis41:26 Dikgomo tse dinamagadi, tse supa, tse di molemo, ke dinyaga di supa; le diako tse supa tse di molemo, ke dinyaga di supa; toro nngwe fela." 
Genesis41:27 Dikgomo tse dinamagadi tse di mekoduwe, tse di mebele a maswe, tse di tlhatlogileng morago ga tsone, ke dinyaga di supa, le tsone diako tse di se nang sepe, tse di tshubilweng ke phefo ya botlhabatsatsi, di tlaa nna dinyaga di supa tsa leuba." 
Genesis41:28 Ke sone se ke se buileng le Faro; se Modimo o tlogang o se dira o se supeditse Faro. 
Genesis41:29 Bona, go tla dinyaga di supa tsa letlotlo le legolo la dijo mo lefatsheng lotlhe la Egepeto." 
Genesis41:30 Morago ga tsone go tlaa tsoga dinyaga di supa tsa leuba; letlotlo lotlhe le tlaa lebalwa mo lefatsheng la Egepeto; mme leuba le tlaa fedisa lefatshe. 
Genesis41:31 Letlotlo ga le ketla le itsiwe mo lefatsheng ka ntlha ya leuba leo le le le latelang; ka le tlaa nna botlhoko thata. 
Genesis41:32 E re ka toro e le sebedi e diretswe Faro gabedi, ke ka gonne selo se se tlhomamisitswe ke Modimo, Modimo o tlaa akofa o se dirafatsa." 
Genesis41:33 “Ke gone jaana, a Faro a lebalebe monna yo o tlhaloganyang, yo o botlhale, a mo tlhome go nna tlhogo ya lefatshe la Egepeto." 
Genesis41:34 A Faro a dire mo, a tlhome balebalebedi ba lefatshe, ba tseye sa botlhano sa lefatshe la Egepeto ka dinyaga tse supa tsa letlotlo." 
Genesis41:35 Ba kgobokanye dijo tsotlhe tsa dinyaga tse di molemo, tse di tlang, ba phuthele mabele mo seatleng sa ga Faro, go nna dijo mo metseng, mme ba a boloke." 
Genesis41:36 Dijo tse di tlaa nna sebolokelwa lefatshe, go lebelela dinyaga tse di supang tsa leuba, tse di tlaa nnang mo lefatsheng la Egepeto; gore lefatshe le se ka la nyelela ka leuba.”" 
Genesis41:37 Selo se sa nna molemo mo matlhong a ga Faro le mo matlhong a batlhanka botlhe ba gagwe. 
Genesis41:38 Faro a raya batlhanka ba gagwe a re: “A re ka bona mongwe yo o ntseng jaaka yo, e le monna yo mowa wa Modimo o ntseng mo go ene?”" 
Genesis41:39 Faro a raya Josefe a re: “E re ka Modimo o go supeditse tsotlhe tse, ga go na ope yo o tlhaloganyang le fa e le yo o botlhale jaaka wena." 
Genesis41:40 O tlaa nna tlhogo ya ntlo ya me: batho botlhe ba me ba tlaa laolwa ka fa lefokong la gago; fa e se mo setulong sa bogosi fela, ke tlaa nna mogolo mo go wena.”" 
Genesis41:41 Faro a raya Josefe a re: “Bona, ke go tlhomile go nna tlhogo ya lefatshe lotlhe la Egepeto.”" 
Genesis41:42 Faro a rola lenyena le le kanang mo seatleng sa gagwe, a le rwesa Josefe mo seatleng, a mo apesa diaparo tsa leloba le le boleta, a ba a mo apesa mpolokwane wa gouta ma thamong ya gagwe." 
Genesis41:43 A mo palamisa kara ya bobedi e o nang nayo; mme ba goa fa pele ga gagwe ba re: “Khubamang ka mangole;” a mo tlhoma go nna tlhogo ya lefatshe lotlhe la Egepeto. 
Genesis41:44 Faro a raya Josefe a re: “Ke nna Faro, kwa ntle ga gago ga go ketla go tsholetsa ope letsogo la gagwe le fa e le lonao lwa gagwe mo lefatsheng lotlhe la Egepeto.”" 
Genesis41:45 Faro a raya Josefe leina a re, Safenathe-panea; a mo naya Asenathe morwadia Potifera, moperesiti wa One, go nna mosadi wa gagwe. Josefe a tswa a ralala-ralala lefatshe la Egepeto." 
Genesis41:46 Josefe o rile a ema fa pele ga Faro kgosi ya Egepeto a bo a le dinyaga di le 30. Mme Josefe a tswa fa pele ga Faro, a ya a ralala-ralala lefatshe lotlhe la Egepeto." 
Genesis41:47 Ya re mo dinyageng tse di supang tsa letlotlo lefatshe la ungwa ka thata e kgolo. 
Genesis41:48 A kgobokanya dijo tsotlhe tse di mo lefatsheng la Egepeto tsa dinyaga tseo tse di supang, a baya dijo tseo mo metseng; dijo tsa naga e e tikologong ya motse mongwe le mongwe a di beye mo motseng oo." 
Genesis41:49 Josefe a kgobokanya mabele a nna jaaka mošawa wa lewatle, a le magolo thata, a ba a tla a lesa go bala; gonne a ne e se na palo." 
Genesis41:50 Josefe a bona bana ba basimane ba le babedi ngwaga wa leuba o ise o tle, ba Asenathe morwadia Potifera, moperesiti wa One, a ba bonyeng nae." 
Genesis41:51 Josefe a raya wa ntlha leina a re Manase; gonne a re: “Modimo o ntebaditse letsapa lotlhe la me le ntlo yotlhe ya ga rre.” 
Genesis41:52 A raya wa bobedi leina a re Eferaime; gonne a re: “Modimo o nkungwisitse mo lefatsheng la pogiso ya me.” 
Genesis41:53 Dinyaga tse, tse di supang tsa letlotlo le le mo lefatsheng la Egepeto, tsa khutla." 
Genesis41:54 Dinyaga tse di supang tsa leuba tsa simolola go tla, ka fa Josefe o buileng ka gone; mme ga nna leuba mo mafatsheng otlhe; mme mo lefatsheng la Egepeto ga bo go na le dijo." 
Genesis41:55 E rile lefatshe lotlhe la Egepeto le bolailwe ke tlala, batho ba ikuela Faro, ba batla dijo. Faro a raya Baegepeto botlhe a re: “Yang kwa go Josefe; se o se lo rayang lo se dire.”" 
Genesis41:56 Leuba la bo le wetse lefatshe lotlhe fela; mme Josefe a bula matlo otlhe a a boloketseng, a rekisa mo go Baegepeto; mme leuba la nna botlhoko mo lefatsheng la Egepeto." 
Genesis41:57 Mafatshe otlhe a ya kwa Egepeto kwa go Josefe go reka mabele; ka gobo leuba le ne le le botlhoko mo lefatsheng lotlhe fela. 
Genesis42:1 Jakobe a bona fa go na le mabele kwa Egepeto; mme a raya bomorwawe a re: “Lo lebanelang?” 
Genesis42:2 A re: “Bonang, ke utlwile fa go na le mabele kwa Egepeto; fologelang gone, lo re rekele mabele gone, gore re tle re tshele, re se ka ra a swa.”" 
Genesis42:3 Bomogoloa Josefe ba ba some ba bolola ba ya go reka mabele kwa Egepeto. 
Genesis42:4 Mme Benjamine, monnaa Josefe, Jakobe ga a ka a mo roma le bomogolowe gonne a re, e se re kgotsa tatlhego ya mo wela." 
Genesis42:5 Bomorwa Iseraele ba ya go reka ba tlhakana le ba ba yang gone, gonne leuba le ne le le mo lefatsheng la Kanana." 
Genesis42:6 Josefe e ne e le molaodi wa lefatshe; ya bo e le ene yo o rekisang mo bathong botlhe ba lefatshe. Bomogoloa Josefe ba tla ba mo ikobela fa fatshe ka difatlhogo tsa bone. 
Genesis42:7 Mme Josefe a bona bomogolowe, mme a ba itse, mme a ipaya moeng mo go bone, a bua nabo ka thata. A ba raya a re: “Lo tswa kae?” Ba re: “Re tswa kwa lefatsheng la Kanana, re tsile go reka dijo.”" 
Genesis42:8 Josefe a bo a itse bomogolowe; mme bone ba se ka ba mo itse. 
Genesis42:9 Josefe a gakologelwa ditoro tse o kileng a di lora ka ga bone, mme a ba raya a re: “Lo ditlhola fela; lo tsile gore lo bone bosaikategang jwa lefatshe.”" 
Genesis42:10 Ba mo raya ba re: “Nnyaa, morena wa me, batlhanka ba gago ba tsile go reka dijo." 
Genesis42:11 Rotlhe re bomorwa monna a le mongwe fela; re banna ba mmaanete, batlhanka ba gago ga se ditlhola.”" 
Genesis42:12 A ba raya a re: “Nnyaa, lo tsile gore lo bone bosaikategang jwa lefatshe fela.”" 
Genesis42:13 Ba re: “Rona batlhanka ba gago re bana ba le 12, re bomorwa monna a le mongwe fela kwa lefatsheng la Kanana; mme bona, yo mmotlana gompieno o na le rraarona, yo mongwe ga a yo.”" 
Genesis42:14 Josefe a ba raya a re: “Aitse ke sone se ke se buileng le lona ka re lo ditlhola. 
Genesis42:15 Lo tlaa lekwa ka mo; ka botshelo jwa ga Faro ga lo ketla lo tswa mono fa monnaa lona yo mmotlana a sa tle kwano pele. 
Genesis42:16 Romang mongwe wa lona a ye go tlisa monnaa lona, lona lo tlaa golegwa, gore mafoko a lona a lekwe boo go na le boammaaruri mo go lona; fa go sa nna jalo, ke ikana ka botshelo jwa ga Faro lo tla bo lo le ditlhola ruri.”" 
Genesis42:17 A ba tsenya botlhe mmogo mo tisong ka malatsi a le moraro. 
Genesis42:18 Ka letsatsi le boraro Josefe a ba raya a re: “Dirang se, lo tshele; gonne nna ke boifa Modimo." 
Genesis42:19 A e re fa lo le banna ba mmaanete, a mongwe wa bomorwa rraa lona a golegelwe mo ntlong ya lona ya kgolegelo; lona lo tsamaye lo isetse tlala ya matlo a lona mabele." 
Genesis42:20 Lo lere monnaa lona yo mmotlana kwano go nna; jalo mafoko a lona a tlaa bo a le mabolelela ruri, ga lo ketla loo swa.” Ba dira jalo." 
Genesis42:21 Ba raana ba re: “Ruri re molato ka ga monnaa rona, jaaka e rile re bona tlalelo ya mowa wa gagwe jale, ka a re rapela, ra gana go utlwa; ke gone ka fa tlalelo e e tsileng mo go rona ka gone.”" 
Genesis42:22 Rubene a ba fetola a re: “A ga ke a ka ka lo raya jale ka re: ‘Se leofeleng ngwana,’ mme lwa gana go utlwa? Ke gone, bonang, madi a gagwe a a lopiwa.”" 
Genesis42:23 Ba bo ba sa itse fa Josefe a ba utlwa, gonne go ne go na le mofetoledi wa puo gare ga bone." 
Genesis42:24 Mme a ba fularela, a lela; a boela kwa go bone, a bua nabo, mme a tshwara Simeone a mo tsaya mo go bone, a mo golega fa pele ga matlho a bone." 
Genesis42:25 Foo Josefe a laola gore dilwana tsa bone di thelwe mabele di tlale, le gore madi a mongwe le mongwe a rebolelwe mo kgetseng ya gagwe, le gore ba fiwe mofago; ba ba direla jalo." 
Genesis42:26 Ba belesa mabele mo dieseleng, ba tswa gone ba tsamaya." 
Genesis42:27 E rile mongwe wa bone a bofolola kgetse ya gagwe go fa esela ya gagwe dijo ba le felong fa ba lalang gone, a kwaa madi a gagwe; mme bonang, a bo a le mo molomong wa kgetse ya gagwe." 
Genesis42:28 A raya bomorwa rraagwe a re: “Madi a me a rebotswe, mme bonang, a mo kgetsing ya me”; mme pelo tsa bone tsa sula, ba lebana, ba roroma ba re: “Selo se ke eng, se Modimo o se re diretseng?”" 
Genesis42:29 Mme ba fitlha kwa go Jakobe rraabo mo lefatsheng la Kanana, ba mmolelela tsotlhe tse di ba diraletseng; ba re:" 
Genesis42:30 “Monna yole, morena wa lefatshe lele, a bua le rona ka thata, a ba a re, re ditlhola tsa lefatshe." 
Genesis42:31 Ra mo raya ra re: ‘Re banna ba mmaanete; ga re ditlhola; 
Genesis42:32 re bana ba le 12 ba monna, re bomorwa rraa rona; mongwe ga a yo, yo mmotlana gompieno o na le rraa rona kwa lefatsheng la Kanana.’" 
Genesis42:33 Monna yole morena wa lefatshe leo, a re raya a re: ‘Ke tlaa itse ka moo lo le banna ba mmaanete; tlogelang mongwe wa bomorwa rraeno le nna, lo isetse tlala ya matlo a lona mabele, mme lo tsamaye." 
Genesis42:34 Lo lere monnaa lona yo mmotlana kwano go nna, foo ke tlaa itse fa lo se ditlhola, lo le banna ba mmaanete; jalo ke tlaa lo neela morwa rraa lona, lo tlaa nna lo bapala mo lefatsheng.’ ”" 
Genesis42:35 Ga dirala ya re ba ntsha mabele mo dikgetseng tsa bone, bonang, phuthela ya madi a mongwe le mongwe ya bo e le mo kgetseng ya gagwe. Ba re ba bona, le rraabo a bona diphuthela tsa madi, ba tshoga." 
Genesis42:36 Jakobe rraabo, a ba raya a re: “Nna lo nthopile bana; Josefe ga a yo, le Simeone ga a yo, lo bile lo rata go tlosa Benjamine; dilo tse tsotlhe di nkwela maswe.”" 
Genesis42:37 Rubene a raya rraagwe a re: “E tlaa re fa ke sa mo tlise kwano go wena, o tle o bolaye bomorwaake ba babedi; mo tsenye mo tisong ya me fela, ke tlaa ba ke mo tlisa mo go wena gape.”" 
Genesis42:38 Mme a re: “Morwaake ga a ketla a fologa le lona; gonne mogolowe o sule, ke ene esi yo o setseng. E tlaa re fa tatlhego e mo wela mo tseleng e lo e tsamayang foo moriri wa me o o thuntseng lo tlaa o folosetsa ka bohutsana mo phupung.”" 
Genesis43:1 Leuba le ne le le botlhoko mo lefatsheng. 
Genesis43:2 Ga dirala ya re ba sena go ja ba swetsa mabele a ba tsileng nao kwa Egepeto, rraabo a ba raya a re: “Yang gape, lo re rekele dijonyana.”" 
Genesis43:3 Juta a bua nae a re: “Monna yole o ne a re tlhomamiseletsa ruri a re: ‘Ga lo ketla lo bona sefatlhogo sa me fa monnaa lona a sa tle le lona.’ 
Genesis43:4 Fa o ka lesa monnaa rona ra tsamaya nae, re tlaa fologa re go rekela dijo." 
Genesis43:5 Fa o sa mo lese, ga re nka re fologa; gonne monna yole o re reile a re: ‘Ga lo nka lo bona sefatlhogo sa me fa monnaa lona a sa tle le lona.’ ”" 
Genesis43:6 Iseraele a re: “Ana lo ne lo ntirelelang bosula lo bolelela monna yoo fa lo sa na le mongwe monnaa lona?” 
Genesis43:7 Ba re: “Monna yoo o re boditse thata ka ga rona ka rosi, le ka ba ga rona a re: ‘A rraeno o sa tshedile? A lo sa na le mongwe monnaa lona?’ Ra mmolelela ka fa mafoko ao a ne a ntse ka gone; a re ne re ka itse fa a tlaa re raya a re: ‘Lo tle le monnaa lona’?”" 
Genesis43:8 Juta a raya Iseraele rraagwe a re: “Lesa mosimane ke tsamaye nae, re tlaa tloga re tsamaya, gore re tshele, re se ka ra a swa, rona le wena, le bone banyana ba rona." 
Genesis43:9 Nna ke tlaa tlhomamisa pabalesego ya gagwe; o tlaa mo lopa mo seatleng sa me. E tlaa re fa ke sa tle nae ka mmaya fa pele ga gago, foo molato o tlaa bo o ntshwere ka bosakhutleng." 
Genesis43:10 Gonne fa re ka bo re ne re sa ka ra diega, ruri re ka bo re bile re boile lwa bobedi.”" 
Genesis43:11 Rraabo Iseraele a ba raya a re: “Fa go ntse jalo, a lo ko lo dire jaana; lo tsee maungo a a tlhophegileng a lefatshe mo dilwaneng tsa lona, lo isetse monna yoo mpho, balemonyana, le dinotshenyana, le dilo tse di lonko lo monate, tsa malao le mura, le dinuta, le dithamane." 
Genesis43:12 Lo tseye madi sebedi mo seatleng sa lona; madi a lo neng lo a reboletswe mo melomong ya dikgetse tse tsa lona, lo a tshole gape mo atleng sa lona; e tlaa re gongwe e bo e ne e le go a tlodisa matlho fela." 
Genesis43:13 Le gone ene monnaa lona lo mo tseye, lo nanoge, lo ye kwa go monna yoo." 
Genesis43:14 Modimo Mothatayotlhe a lo neye kutlwelo botlhoko fa pele ga monna yoo, gore a tle a lo gololele morwa rraeno yo mongwe le Benjamine. Mme fa ke thopiwa bana ba me, ke a thopiwa.”" 
Genesis43:15 Banna ba, ba tshola mpho, ba ba ba tshola madi sebedi mo seatleng sa bone, le Benjamine; ba nanoga ba fologela kwa Egepeto, ba ema fa pele ga Josefe." 
Genesis43:16 E rile Josefe a bona fa Benjamine a na nabo, a raya molebalebi wa ntlo ya gagwe a re: “Isa banna bao mo ntlong; o tlhabe, o etleetse, gonne banna bao ba tlaa ja le nna motshegare o mogolo.”" 
Genesis43:17 Monna yo a dira jaaka Josefe a buile; mme monna yo a isa banna ba mo ntlong ya ga Josefe. 
Genesis43:18 Banna ba, ba boifa, ka gobo ba isiwa mo ntlong ya ga Josefe; ba re: “Re isiwa mo ntlong ka ntlha ya madi a re a reboletsweng mo dikgetseng tsa rona lwa ntlha, gore a re bonele seipato, a itse go re wela, a re ntsha batlhanka, le diesela tsa rona a di gapa.”" 
Genesis43:19 Ba atamela molebalebi wa ntlo ya ga Josefe, ba bua nae fa mojakong wa ntlo." 
Genesis43:20 Ba re: “Ao morena, re kile ra tla ruri lwa ntlha go reka dijo." 
Genesis43:21 Ga dirala, e rile re fitlha felo kwa re lalang gone, ra bofolola dikgetse tsa rona, mme bona, madi a mongwe le mongwe a bo a le mo molomong wa kgetse, madi a rona a le selekanyo se se tletseng; re bile re a tshotse gape mo seatleng sa rona." 
Genesis43:22 Le madi a mangwe re tsile nao go tla go reka dijo; ga re itse yo o tsentseng madi a rona mo dikgetseng tsa rona.” 
Genesis43:23 Mme a re: “A kagiso e nne le lona, se boifeng. Modimo wa lona, le Modimo wa ga rraeno o lo neile khumo mo dikgetseng tsa lona; ke ne ka amogela madi a lona.” Mme a ntshetsa Simeone kwa go bone." 
Genesis43:24 Monna yo a isa banna bao mo ntlong ya ga Josefe, a ba naya metsi, ba itlhapisa dinao; a ba a fa diesela tsa bone dijo." 
Genesis43:25 Ba baakanya mpho ya bone ba lebelela go tla ga Josefe motshegare o mogolo; gonne ba utlwile fa ba tlaa ja dijo gone. 
Genesis43:26 E rile Josefe a tla gae, ba isa mpho e ba e tshotseng kwa go ene mo ntlong, ba mo ikobelela fa fatshe." 
Genesis43:27 A ba botsa go tshela ga bone a re: “A rraeno o sa tshedile, ke raya monnamogolo yo lo kileng lwa bua ka ga gagwe, a o sa tshedile?”" 
Genesis43:28 Ba re: “Motlhanka wa gago rraa rona o tshedile sentle, o sa ntse a tshela.” Mme ba oba ditlhogo tsa bone, ba ikokobetsa." 
Genesis43:29 A tsholetsa matlho a gagwe, a bona Benjamine, monnawe, ngwana wa ga mmaagwe a re: “A yo ke ene monnaa lona yo mmotlana, yo lo mo mpoleletseng?” Mme a re: “A Modimo o nne pelontle nao morwaaka.”" 
Genesis43:30 Josefe a akofa, ka gobo mateng a gagwe a hohomela monnawe; a senka fa o ka lelelang gone; a tsena mo ntlong ya gagwe e e kwa teng, a lelela gone." 
Genesis43:31 Mme a tlhapa sefatlhogo, a tswa; a ithiba, a re: “Tsholang dijo.”" 
Genesis43:32 Ene ba mo tsholela a le esi, le bone ba tsholelwa ba le bosi, le bone Baegepeto ba ba jang nae, ba le bosi; gonne Baegepeto ba ne ba sa ka ke ba a ja dijo le Bahebere; gonne moo, ke moila mo go Baegepeto." 
Genesis43:33 Ba dula fa pele ga gagwe, wa ntlha ka fa go tsalweng ga gagwe, le yo mmotlana ka fa bobotlaneng jwa gagwe; banna ba, ba gakgamalelana." 
Genesis43:34 A tloga a ba tabolela dijo, tsa isiwa kwa go bone; tse di tabolelwang Benjamine tsa bo di le kana ka tsa ba bangwe ba le batlhano. Ba a nwa, ba dira mokete nae." 
Genesis44:1 A laola molebalebi wa ntlo ya gagwe a re: “Thela mabele mo dikgetseng tsa banna bao, ka fa ba nonofileng go tsaya ka gone, o tsenye madi a mongwe le mongwe mo molomong wa kgetse ya gagwe." 
Genesis44:2 Senwelo sa me, senwelo sa selefera, o se tsenye mo molomong wa kgetse ya yo mmotlana, le madi a gagwe a mabele.” A dira ka fa lefokong le Josefe o le buileng." 
Genesis44:3 E rile bosigo bo sena go sa, banna bao ba newa tsela, bone le diesela tsa bone." 
Genesis44:4 E rile ba sena go tswa mo motseng, ba ise ba ye kgakala, Josefe a raya molebalebedi wa gagwe a re: “Nanoga o latele banna bale; o tlaa re o ba tshwara, o ba reye o re: ‘Ana lo dueletseng molemo ka bosula?" 
Genesis44:5 A ga se sone se morena wa me o nwelang mo go sone, e bile e le sone, ruri, bola jo o laolang ka jone? Lo dirile bosula ka go dira jalo.’ ”" 
Genesis44:6 Mme a ba tshwara, a bua mafoko a nabo." 
Genesis44:7 Ba mo raya ba re: “Morena wa rona, o buelang mafoko a a ntseng jaana? A go se tualo go re, batlhanka ba gago ba ka dira se se ntseng jalo." 
Genesis44:8 Bona, madi a re a fitlhetseng mo melomong ya dikgetse tsa rona, ra ba ra a tlisa gape kwa go wena re tswa lefatsheng la Kanana; ana foo re ne re tlaa utswa jang selefera le fa e le gouta mo ntlong ya morena wa gago?" 
Genesis44:9 Le fa e le mang wa batlhanka ba gago yo se tlaa bonwang mo go ene a a swe, le rona re nne batlhanka ba morena wa rona.”" 
Genesis44:10 Mme a re: “Jaana le gale a go nne ka fa mafokong a lona; ene yo se tlaa bonwang mo go ene, o tlaa nna motlhanka wa me, lona lo tlaa bo lo se na molato.”" 
Genesis44:11 Foo ba akofa, mongwe le mongwe a pagolola kgetse ya gagwe a e baya fa fatshe, mme mongwe le mongwe a bofolola kgetse ya gagwe." 
Genesis44:12 A hukutsa, a simolola ka yo mogolo, a khutla ka yo mmotlana; mme senwelo sa fitlhelwa mo kgetseng ya ga Benjamine." 
Genesis44:13 Foo ba ikgagola diaparo, mongwe le mongwe a belesa esela ya gagwe, ba boela kwa motseng." 
Genesis44:14 Juta le bomorwa rraagwe ba fitlha kwa ntlong ya ga Josefe, mme a bo a sa ntse a le gone; mme ba wela fa fatshe fa pele ga gagwe." 
Genesis44:15 Josefe a ba raya a re: “Ana tiro e lo e dirileng ke efe? A ga lo itse fa ruri motho yo o ntseng jaaka nna a ka laola ka bola?” 
Genesis44:16 Juta a re: “Re tlaa bua le morena wa me re reng? Ana re tlaa buang, kgotsa re tlaa ikgolola jang mo molatong? Modimo o tshwere boleo jwa batlhanka ba gago; bona, re batlhanka ba gago morena, rona le ene yo senwelo se bonyweng mo seatleng sa gagwe.”" 
Genesis44:17 Mme a re: “A go se tualo, gore ke ka dira jalo; monna yo senwelo se bonyweng mo seatleng sa gagwe, ene o tlaa nna motlhanka wa me; ka ga lona, tlhatlogelang kwa go rraa lona ka kagiso.”" 
Genesis44:18 Foo Juta a atamela fa go ene a re: “Morena wee, ke a go rapela, a ko o mme motlhanka wa gago a bue lefoko mo ditsebeng tsa morena wa me, a bogale jwa gago bo se tukele motlhanka wa gago; gonne o ntse fela jaaka Faro." 
Genesis44:19 Morena wa me o kile a botsa batlhanka ba gagwe a re: ‘A lo na le rraeno, le fa e le monnaa lona?’" 
Genesis44:20 Ra raya morena wa me ra re: ‘Re na le rraa rona, monnamogolo, o na le ngwana wa botsofe jwa gagwe, yo monnye; mogolowe o sule, mme o setse a le esi wa ga mmaagwe, rraagwe o a mo rata.’" 
Genesis44:21 Mme wa raya batlhanka ba gago wa re: ‘Lo tle nae kwano go nna gore ke mmone.’ 
Genesis44:22 Ra raya morena wa me ra re: ‘Mosimane ga a ka ke a tlogela rraagwe; gonne e tlaa re fa a ka tlogela rraagwe, rraagwe o ka swa.’" 
Genesis44:23 Wena wa raya batlhanka ba gago wa re: ‘Fa monnaa lona yo mmotlana a sa tle le lona, ga lo ketla lo tlhola lo bona sefatlhogo sa me.’" 
Genesis44:24 “Mme ya re re fitlha kwa go rre motlhanka wa gago, ra mmolelela mafoko a morena wa me." 
Genesis44:25 Mme rraetsho a re: ‘Yang gape, lo re rekele dijonyana.’" 
Genesis44:26 Ra re ga re ka ke ra fologa; fa monnaa rona yo mmotlana re sa ye nae, foo ga re nka re fologa; gonne ga re ka ke ra bona sefatlhogo sa monna yole fa monnaa rona yo mmotlana re sa na nae." 
Genesis44:27 Motlhanka wa gago rre, a re raya a re: ‘Lo a itse fa mosadi wa me a ne a bona bana ba basimane ba le babedi le nna," 
Genesis44:28 mme yo mongwe a tswa mo go nna, mme ka re ruri o gagogantswe; e sa le jalo ga ke ise ke be ke mmone." 
Genesis44:29 Fa lo ntseela yo le ene, mme tatlhego e mo wela, lo tlaa folosetsa moriri wa me o o thuntseng ka bohutsana mo phupung.’" 
Genesis44:30 “Ke gone jaana e tlaa re ke fitlha kwa go motlhanka wa gago rre, mosimane re se na nae, e re ka botshelo jwa gagwe bo bofilwe mmogo le botshelo jwa mosimane," 
Genesis44:31 go tlaa dirala gore e tlaa re a bona fa mosimane re se na nae, foo a swe; batlhanka ba gago ba folosetse moriri o o thuntseng wa motlhanka wa gago rraetsho, ka bohutsana mo phupung." 
Genesis44:32 Gonne nna motlhanka wa gago ka ipaya boipeelo jwa mosimane kwa go rre, ka re: ‘Fa ke sa mo tlise kwa go wena, foo ke tlaa bo ke tshwerwe ke molato mo go rre ka bosakhutleng.’" 
Genesis44:33 Ke gone jaana, ke a go rapela, a motlhanka wa gago a sale boemong jwa mosimane, ke nne motlhanka mo go morena wa me; mme a mosimane a tlhatloge le bomogolowe." 
Genesis44:34 Gonne ke tlaa tlhatlogela jang kwa go rre, mosimane ke se na nae? Ke raya gore ke tle ke se ka ka bona bosula jo bo tlaa welang rre.”" 
Genesis45:1 Foo Josefe a palelwa ke go itshwara fa pele ga botlhe ba ba emeng fa go ene, mme a kua a re: “Ntshang banna botlhe ba tswe fa go nna.” Mme ga se ka ga ema ope nae fa Josefe a ikitsise bomorwa rraagwe." 
Genesis45:2 A tsholetsa lentswe la gagwe ka selelo; mme Baegepeto ba utlwa, le ntlo ya ga Faro ya utlwa." 
Genesis45:3 Josefe a raya bomorwa rraagwe a re: “Ke nna Josefe; a rre o sa ntse a tshedile?” Bomorwa rraagwe ba retelelwa ke go mo fetola; gonne ba huduilwe ke go mmona. 
Genesis45:4 Josefe a raya bomorwa rraagwe a re: “Ke a lo rapela, a ko lo nkatamele.” Ba atamela. Mme a re: “Ke Josefe, monnaa lona, yo lo mo rekisitseng a tlisiwa Egepeto." 
Genesis45:5 Jaana lo se ka lwa hutsafala le fa e le go ikgalefela ka gobo lo ne lwa nthekisa ka tla kwano; gonne Modimo o nthomile fa pele ga lona go boloka botshelo. 
Genesis45:6 Gonne leuba le dikile le ntse dinyaga tse pedi tse mo lefatsheng; go sa na le dinyaga di le tlhano tse go se ketlang go nna le letsema le fa e le thobo mo go tsone. 
Genesis45:7 Modimo o nthomile pele ga lona go lo bolokela masalela mo lefatsheng, le go lo tshetsa ka kgololo e kgolo." 
Genesis45:8 Jalo e ne e se lona ba lo ntlisitseng kwano, e ne e le Modimo; mme o ntirile go nna rraagwe Faro, le morena wa ntlo yotlhe ya gagwe, le molaodi wa lefatshe lotlhe la Egepeto." 
Genesis45:9 “Itlhaganeleng, lo tlhatlogele kwa go rre, lo mo reye lo re: ‘Morwao Josefe o bua jaana a re: Modimo o ntirile morena wa lefatshe la Egepeto lotlhe fela, hudugela kwano go nna, o se ka wa diega." 
Genesis45:10 O tlaa aga mo lefatsheng la Gošene; o tlaa nna gaufi le nna, wena, le bana ba gago, le bana ba bana ba gago, le matsomane a gago, le matlhape a gago, le tsotlhe tse o nang natso." 
Genesis45:11 Ke tlaa go otlela gone; gonne go sa ntse go na le dinyaga di le tlhano tsa leuba; e se re gongwe wa humanega, wena, le ba ntlo ya gago le tsotlhe tse o nang natso.’" 
Genesis45:12 “Mme, bonang, matlho a lona a a bona, le matlho a ga nnake Benjamine, fa e le molomo wa me o o buang le lona." 
Genesis45:13 Lo bolelele rre ka ga kgalalelo yotlhe ya me mo Egepeto, le ka ga tsotlhe tse lo di bonyeng; mme rre lo akofe lo mo lere kwano.”" 
Genesis45:14 A wela mo thamong ya ga Benjamine monnawe, a lela a le mo thamong ya gagwe." 
Genesis45:15 A atla bomorwa rraagwe botlhe, a lelela mo go bone; morago ga mo, bomorwa rraagwe ba bua nae." 
Genesis45:16 Tumo ya gone ya utlwala mo ntlong ya ga Faro, ga twe: “Bomorwa rraagwe Josefe ba tsile;” mme ga kgatlha Faro thata le batlhanka ba gagwe." 
Genesis45:17 Foo Faro a raya Josefe a re: “Raya bomorwa rraago o re: ‘Dirang se: Belesang dipelesa tsa lona, lo tsamaye, lo ye kwa lefatsheng la Kanana." 
Genesis45:18 Lo tseye rraeno le ba matlo a lona, lo tle kwano go nna; ke tlaa lo naya molemo wa lefatshe la Egepeto, lo tlaa ja mafura a lefatshe.’" 
Genesis45:19 Jaanong o laotswe, lona dirang jaana; lo tseele banyana ba lona le basadi ba lona dikoloi mo lefatsheng la Egepeto, lo lere rraeno lo tle." 
Genesis45:20 Le gone se tlhokomeleng thoto ya lona gonne molemo wa lefatshe la Egepeto ke wa lona.” 
Genesis45:21 Bomorwa Iseraele ba dira jalo; Josefe a ba neela dikoloi, ka fa taolong ya ga Faro, a ba a ba naya mefago." 
Genesis45:22 Botlhe fela, a naya mongwe le mongwe diaparo tsa go fapaanya, Benjamine ene a mo naya dipapetla tsa selefera di le makgolo mararo le diaparo di le tlhano tsa go fapaanya." 
Genesis45:23 Tsa ga rraagwe a di ba neelela jaana; e bong diesela di le some di belesitswe dilo tse di monate tsa Egepeto, le diesela tse dinamagadi di le some di belesitswe mabele le senkgwe le dijo tse rraagwe o tlaa di jelang mo tseleng." 
Genesis45:24 Jalo a naya bomorwa rraagwe tsela, ba tsamaya; a ba raya a re: “Lo bone gore lo se omane mo tseleng.”" 
Genesis45:25 Ba tswa mo Egepeto, ba tla mo lefatsheng la Kanana kwa go Jakobe rraabo." 
Genesis45:26 Ba mmolelela ba re: “Josefe o sa tshedile e bile o molaodi wa lefatshe lotlhe la Egepeto.” Pelo ya gagwe ya idibala, gonne a sa ba dumele." 
Genesis45:27 Ba mmolelela mafoko otlhe a ga Josefe a o a buileng nabo; o rile a bona dikoloi tse Josefe o di rometseng go mo tsaya ka tsone, mowa wa ga Jakobe rraabo wa idibologa." 
Genesis45:28 Iseraele a re: “Go lekanye; Josefe morwaake o sa tshedile; ke tlaa ya ke mmona ke ise ke swe.” 
Genesis46:1 Iseraele a ineela mo loetong le tsotlhe tse o nang natso, mme a fitlha kwa Beerešeba, a isetsa Modimo wa ga Isake rraagwe ditlhabelo gone." 
Genesis46:2 Modimo wa bua le Iseraele ka diponatshegelo tsa bosigo wa re: “Jakobe, Jakobe!” a re: “Ke fano.”" 
Genesis46:3 Wa re: “Ke nna Modimo, Modimo wa ga rraago; o se ka wa boifa go hudugela kwa Egepeto; gonne ke tlaa dira morafe o mogolo ka wena gone." 
Genesis46:4 Ke tlaa ya nao kwa Egepeto; le gone ruri ke tlaa ba ke go tlhatlosa gape; Josefe o tlaa baya seatla sa gagwe mo matlhong a gago.” 
Genesis46:5 Jakobe a nanoga mo Beerešeba; mme bomorwa Iseraele ba tsaya Jakobe rraabo, le banyana ba bone, le basadi ba bone ka dikoloi tse Faro o neng a di rometse go ba tsaya ka tsone." 
Genesis46:6 Ba tsaya dikgomo tsa bone, le dilwana tsa bone tse ba di bapetseng mo lefatsheng la Kanana, ba tla mo Egepeto, Jakobe le losika lotlhe lwa gagwe nae." 
Genesis46:7 Bomorwawe le barwa bomorwawe nae, bomorwadie le bomorwadia bomorwawe, le losika lotlhe lwa gagwe a ya nalo kwa Egepeto." 
Genesis46:8 Mme ake one maina a bana ba ga Iseraele ba ba fitlhileng mo Egepeto (Jakobe le bomorwawe): Rubene, motsalwapele wa ga Jakobe." 
Genesis46:9 Bomorwa Rubene: Hanoke, le Palu, le Heserone le Karemi." 
Genesis46:10 Bomorwa Simeone: Jemuele, le Jamine, le Ohate, le Jakine, Sohare, le Shaule, morwa mosadi mongwe wa Mokanana." 
Genesis46:11 Bomorwa Lefi: Gerešone, le Kohathe, le Merari." 
Genesis46:12 Bomorwa Juta: Ere, le Onane, Shela, le Perese, le Sera: boEre le Onane ba ne ba swetse mo lefatsheng la Kanana, mme bomorwa Perese e ne e le Heserone le Hamule." 
Genesis46:13 Bomorwa Isakare: Tola, le Pua, le Jobe, le Shimerone." 
Genesis46:13 Bomorwa Isakare: Tola, le Pua, le Jobe, le Shimerone." 
Genesis46:14 Bomorwa Sebulone: Serete, le Elone, le Jahaleele." 
Genesis46:15 Bao ke bomorwa Lea, ba o ne a ba bona le Jakobe kwa Patane-arame, ba na le morwadie Dina; batho botlhe ba e neng e le bomorwawe le bomorwadie ba ne ba le 33." 
Genesis46:16 Bomorwa Gate: Sifione, le Hagi, Shuni, le Esebone, Eri, le Arote, le Areli." 
Genesis46:17 Bomorwa Ašere: Imena, le Išefa, le Išifi, le Beria, le Sera kgaitsadia bone; le bomorwa Beria; Hebere, le Malekiele." 
Genesis46:18 Bao ke bomorwa Silepa yo Labane o neng a mo naya Lea morwadie, bao o ne a ba bona le Jakobe, e bong batho ba le 16." 
Genesis46:19 Bomorwa Ragele mogatsa Jakobe: Josefe le Benjamine. 
Genesis46:20 Josefe a tshola Manase le Eferaime mo lefatsheng la Egepeto, Asenathe morwadia Potifera moperesiti wa One, o ne a ba bona nae." 
Genesis46:21 Bomorwa Benjamine: Bela, le Bekere, le Ašabele, le Gera, Naamane, le Ehi, le Roše, le Mupime, le Hupime le Arete." 
Genesis46:22 Bao ke bomorwa Ragele, ba ba tsetsweng ke Jakobe, mme fa ba le mmogo e ne e le batho ba le 14." 
Genesis46:23 Bomorwa Dane: Hušime. 
Genesis46:24 Le bomorwa Nafetali: Jahaseele, le Guni, le Jesere le Shileme." 
Genesis46:25 Bao ke bomorwa Bileha; yo Labane o neng a mo naya morwadie Ragele, mme bao a ba bona le Jakobe; e ne e le batho ba supa ba le mmogo." 
Genesis46:26 Batho botlhe ba ba tsileng le Jakobe mo Egepeto, ba ba duleng mo mankopeng a gagwe, kwa ntle ga basadi ba bomorwa Jakobe, ba le mmogo e ne e le batho ba 66." 
Genesis46:27 Bomorwa Josefe ba o ba bonyeng mo Egepeto e ne e le batho ba le babedi; batho botlhe ba ntlo ya ga Jakobe ba ba tsileng mo Egepeto e ne e le 70. 
Genesis46:28 Mme a eteletsa Juta kwa pele ga gagwe go ya kwa go Josefe gore a tle a mo supetse tsela e e yang kwa Gošene; mme ba fitlha mo lefatsheng la Gošene. 
Genesis46:29 Josefe a baakanya kara ya gagwe a tlhatloga a ya go kgatlhantsha Iseraele rraagwe kwa Gošene. Mme a ya kwa go ene a wela mo thamong ya gagwe, a lela ka lobaka lo loleele a le fa thamong ya gagwe." 
Genesis46:30 Iseraele a raya Josefe a re: “Jaanong a nke ke swe ka ke bonye sefatlhogo sa gago fa o sa ntse o tshedile.” 
Genesis46:31 Josefe a raya bomorwa rraagwe le ba ntlo ya ga rraagwe a re: “Ke tlaa tlhatloga ke ya go begela Faro ke mo raya ke re: ‘Bomorwa rre le ba ntlo ya ga rre, ba ba ntseng ba le kwa lefatsheng la Kanana ba nkgorogetse." 
Genesis46:32 Banna bao ke badisa, gonne tiro ya bone e ntse e le dikgomo; ba tsile le matsomane a bone, le matlhape a bone, le tsotlhe tse ba nang natso.’" 
Genesis46:33 Go tlaa dirala gore motlhang Faro o lo bitsang a re: ‘Tiro ya lona ke eng?’ 
Genesis46:34 Lo re: ‘Batlhanka ba gago, tiro ya bone e ntse e le dikgomo fela, e sa le ka bokau jwa rona le gompieno, rona le borraetsho;’ gore lo tle lo age mo lefatsheng la Gošene; gonne modisa mongwe le mongwe ke moila mo go Baegepeto.”" 
Genesis47:1 Foo Josefe a tsena a bolelela Faro a re: “Rre le bomorwa rre ba tsile ba tswa lefatsheng la Kanana, ba na le matsomane a bone, le matlhape a bone, le tsotlhe tse ba nang natso. Mme ba mo lefatsheng la Gošene.”" 
Genesis47:2 Mo go bomorwa rraagwe a tsaya banna ba le batlhano a ba isa fa pele ga Faro. 
Genesis47:3 Faro a raya bomorwa rra Josefe a re: “Tiro ya lona ke eng?” Ba raya Faro ba re: “Batlhanka ba gago re badisa, rona le borraetsho.”" 
Genesis47:4 Ba raya Faro ba re: “Re tsile go jaka fela mo lefatsheng; gonne ga go na bohulo jwa matsomane a batlhanka ba gago; gonne leuba le botlhoko kwa lefatsheng la Kanana. Ke gone re reng: Mma batlhanka ba gago ba age mo lefatsheng la Gošene.” 
Genesis47:5 Faro a bua le Josefe a re: “Rraago le bomorwa rraago ba tsile mo go wena. 
Genesis47:6 Lefatshe la Egepeto le fa pele ga gago; baya rraago le bomorwa rraago kwa lefatshe le gaisang ka molemo gone. A ba age mo lefatsheng la Gošene; mme fa o itse banna bangwe ba ba tlhaga mo go bone o ba beye balaodi ba dikgomo tsetsho.” 
Genesis47:7 Josefe a isa Jakobe rraagwe mo teng, a mmaya fa pele ga Faro; mme Jakobe a segofatsa Faro." 
Genesis47:8 Faro a raya Jakobe a re: “Malatsi a dinyaga tsa botshelo jwa gago a kae?” 
Genesis47:9 Jakobe a raya Faro a re: “Malatsi a dinyaga tsa loeto lwa me ke dinyaga di le 130, a ntse a le mannye fela, a bile a bosula, mme ga a a fitlha kwa malatsing a dinyaga tsa botshelo jwa borre mo malatsing a diketo tsa bone.”" 
Genesis47:10 Jakobe a segofatsa Faro; mme a tswa fa pele ga Faro. 
Genesis47:11 Josefe a baya rraagwe le bomorwa rraagwe, a ba naya boswa mo lefatsheng la Egepeto kwa lefatshe le gaisang ka molemo gone, mo lefatsheng la Ramesese, jaaka Faro a laotse." 
Genesis47:12 Josefe a otla rraagwe le bomorwa rraagwe le botlhe ba ntlo ya ga rraagwe ka dijo, ka fa malwapeng a bone." 
Genesis47:13 Go ne go se na dijo mo lefatsheng lotlhe, gonne leuba le ne le le botlhoko thata, mafatshe a Egepeto le a Kanana a ba a tla a idibala ka ntlha ya lone leuba." 
Genesis47:14 Josefe a kgobokanya madi otlhe a a bonwang mo lefatsheng la Egepeto le mo lefatsheng la Kanana ka mabele a ba neng ba a reka. Josefe a isa madi ao mo ntlong ya ga Faro. 
Genesis47:15 E rile madi a setse a fedile mo lefatsheng la Egepeto le mo lefatsheng la Kanana, Baegepeto botlhe fela ba ya kwa go Josefe ba re: “Re fe dijo. Ana re ka bo re swelang fa pele ga gago?” Gonne madi a tlhaetse." 
Genesis47:16 Josefe a re: “Ntshang dikgomo; ke tlaa lo fa ka dikgomo tsa lona fa madi a tlhaetse.” 
Genesis47:17 Ba isa dikgomo tsa bone kwa go Josefe; Josefe a ba naya dijo mo boemong jwa dipitse, le jwa matsomane, le jwa matlhape, le jwa diesela; a ba jesa ka ngwaga oo, a amogela dikgomo tsotlhe tsa bone mo boemong jwa dijo." 
Genesis47:18 E rile ngwaga oo o sena go feta ba ya kwa go ene ka ngwaga wa bobedi ba mo raya ba re: “Ga re nka re lobela morena wa rona jaaka madi a rona a ile otlhe; le jaaka matlhape a dikgomo e le a morena wa rona. Ga go a sala sepe mo matlhong a morena wa rona fa e se mebele ya rona le matlhagare a rona fela. 
Genesis47:19 Ana re ka bo re swelang fa pele ga matlho a gago, rona le lefatshe la rona? Re reke, rona le lefatshe la rona ka dijo, mme rona, le lefatshe la rona re tlaa nna batlhanka ba ga Faro. Re neye peo gore re tle re tshele, re se ka ra a swa, le gore lefatshe le se ka la swafala fela.”" 
Genesis47:20 Josefe a rekela Faro lefatshe lotlhe la Egepeto; gonne Baegepeto mongwe le mongwe a rekisa tshimo ya gagwe, ka leuba le ne le le botlhoko mo go bone; mme lefatshe la nna la ga Faro." 
Genesis47:21 Ka ga batho, a ba hudusetsa mo metseng, go simolola ka sekhutlo sengwe sa molelwane wa Egepeto go ya kwa sekhutlong se sengwe sa gone." 
Genesis47:22 Fa e se lefatshe la baperesiti le le losi, ga a ka a le reka; gonne baperesiti ba ne ba tle ba amogele kabelo mo go Faro, ba je kabelo e Faro o e ba nayang. Ke gone ka moo ba neng ba se ka ba rekisa lefatshe la bone." 
Genesis47:23 Foo Josefe a raya batho a re: “Bonang, ke lo rekile gompieno le lefatshe la lona, ke lo reketse Faro. Bonang peo ke e, ke ya lona, lo tlaa lema lefatshe." 
Genesis47:24 Go tlaa dirala gore e tle e re ka nako ya thobo, sa botlhano lo se neye Faro, tse nne e nne tsa lona, go nna peo ya leota le go nna dijo tsa lona, le tsa matlo a lona, go nna dijo tsa banyana ba lona.”" 
Genesis47:25 Mme ba re: “O re tshedisitse; a re ke re bone tsalano mo matlhong a morena wa rona, mme re tlaa nna batlhanka ba ga Faro.”" 
Genesis47:26 Josefe a tlhoma molao mo lefatsheng la Egepeto, o eme le gompieno, gore Faro a tseye sa botlhano; fa e se lefatshe la Baperesiti le le losi ga le a ka la nna la ga Faro." 
Genesis47:27 Iseraele a aga mo lefatsheng la Egepeto, mo lefatsheng la Gošene; mme ba bapala maruo gone, ba ata, ba ntsifala thata thata." 
Genesis47:28 Jakobe a aga mo lefatsheng la Egepeto dinyaga di le 17; jalo malatsi a ga Jakobe, a dinyaga tsa botshelo jwa gagwe e ne e le dinyaga di le 147." 
Genesis47:29 Lobaka lwa atamela lo Iseraele o tlaa swang ka lone. Mme a bitsa Josefe morwawe, a mo raya a re: “A e re fa jaana ke bonye tsalano mo matlhong a gago, ke a go rapela, baya seatla sa gago fa tlase ga serope sa me, o ntirele ka pelonomi le ka boammaaruri; ke a go rapela, o se ka wa mphitlha mono Egepeto." 
Genesis47:30 Motlhang ke robalang le borraetsho, o mpelege ke tswe mo Egepeto, o ye go mphitlha mo felong ga phitlhelo ya bone.” Mme a re: “Ke tlaa dira jaaka o buile.”" 
Genesis47:31 A re: “Inkanele.” Mme a mo ikanela. Mme Iseraele a ikobela mo tlhogong ya bolao. 
Genesis48:1 Ga dirala e rile morago ga dilo tse, mongwe a raya Josefe a re: “Bona, rraago o a lwala;” mme a tsaya bomorwawe ba babedi, e bong Manase, le Eferaime a ya nabo." 
Genesis48:2 Mongwe a bolelela Jakobe a re: “Bona, Josefe morwao o tla kwano go wena.” Mme Iseraele a ikakatlolola a dula mo bolaong." 
Genesis48:3 Jakobe a raya Josefe a re: “Modimo Mothatayotlhe o ne wa bonala kwa go nna ke le kwa Luse mo lefatsheng la Kanana, mme wa ntshegofatsa." 
Genesis48:4 Wa nthaya wa re: ‘Bona, ke tlaa go atisa, ke go ntsifatsa, ke tlaa dira lesomo la ditšhaba ka wena, mme lefatshe le, ke tlaa le naya losika lwa gago sehularong sa gago go nna thuo ya bosakhutleng.’" 
Genesis48:5 “Jaana bomorwao ba babedi, ba o ba bonyeng mono mo lefatsheng la Egepeto ke ise ke tle kwano go wena mo Egepeto, ke ba me; Eferaime le Manase, fela jaaka Rubene le Simeone ba tlaa nna ba me." 
Genesis48:6 Lotsalo lwa gago lo o tlaa lo bonang morago ga bone, e tlaa nna lwa gago; ba tlaa bidiwa ka fa leineng la bomorwa rraabo mo bosweng jwa bone." 
Genesis48:7 Ka ga me, e rile ke tswa kwa Patana, Ragele a swela fa go nna mo lefatsheng la Kanana mo tseleng, go sa ntse go le sebaka go ya go fitlha kwa Eferatha; mme ka mo fitlha gone mo tseleng e e yang Eferatha, ke gore Bethelehema.”" 
Genesis48:8 Iseraele a leba bomorwa Josefe a re: “Ke bomang ba?” 
Genesis48:9 Josefe a raya rraagwe a re: “Ke bomorwaake ba Modimo o ba nneileng mono.” Jakobe a ba a re: “Ke a go rapela, a ko o ba tlise fa go nna mme ke tlaa ba segofatsa.”" 
Genesis48:10 Matlho a ga Iseraele a bo a le looto ka botsofe, a sa bone. Josefe a ba atametsa fa go ene, mme a ba atla, a ba kamatlela." 
Genesis48:11 Mme Iseraele a raya Josefe a re: “Ke ne ke sa solofela fa ke ka tlhola ke bona sefatlhogo sa gago; mme bona, Modimo o mpontshitse le lone losika lwa gago.”" 
Genesis48:12 Josefe a ba ntsha fa gare ga mangole a gagwe; a ikobela ka sefatlhogo fa fatshe. 
Genesis48:13 Josefe a ba tsaya boo babedi, Eferaime ka seatla se se siameng sa gagwe, a mo lebaganya le seatla sa molema sa ga Iseraele, le Manase ka seatla sa molema sa gagwe, a mo lebaganya le seatla se se siameng sa ga Iseraele, mme a ba atametsa." 
Genesis48:14 Iseraele a ntsha seatla sa gagwe se segolo a se baya mo tlhogong ya ga Eferaime, yo e leng yo mmotlana, le seatla sa molema sa gagwe a se baya mo tlhogong ya ga Manase, a fapaanya diatla tsa gagwe ka kitso, gonne Manase e ne e le wa ntlha." 
Genesis48:15 A segofatsa Josefe a re: “Modimo o borraetsho Aberahame le Isake ba neng ba sepela fa pele ga one, Modimo o o nkotlileng mo botshelong jotlhe jwa me le mo nakong eno," 
Genesis48:16 Moengele yo o nthekolotseng mo bosuleng jotlhe fela, a a segofatse basimane ba; mme a leina la me le rewe bone, le leina la borraetsho Aberahame le Isake. A ba ntsifale ba tle ba nne bantsi mo gare ga lefatshe.”" 
Genesis48:17 E rile Josefe a bona fa rraagwe a beile seatla sa gagwe se se siameng mo tlhogong ya ga Eferaime, ga mo itumolola; mme a tsholetsa seatla sa ga rraagwe go se tlosa mo tlhogong ya ga Eferaime, a re o se isa mo tlhogong ya ga Manase." 
Genesis48:18 Josefe a raya rraagwe a re: “E seng jalo rra; gonne yo ke ene wa ntlha; baya seatla sa gago se se siameng mo tlhogong ya gagwe.” 
Genesis48:19 Mme rraagwe a gana a re: “Ke a itse morwaaka, ke a itse; le ene o tlaa nna morafe, le ene o tlaa nna mogolo; le fa go ntse jalo monnawe o tlaa nna mogolo mo go ene, le losika lwa gagwe lo tlaa nna bontsi jwa merafe.”" 
Genesis48:20 Mme a ba segofatsa ka letsatsi leo a re: “Iseraele o tlaa boka ka wena, go twe: “ ‘A Modimo o go dire o nne jaaka Eferaime le jaaka Manase;’ ” mme a baya Eferaime kwa pele ga Manase." 
Genesis48:21 Iseraele a raya Josefe a re: “Bona, ke a swa; Modimo o tlaa nna le lona, o ba o lo isa gape kwa lefatsheng la borraeno." 
Genesis48:22 Gape, ke go abetse kabelo nngwe bogolo go bomorwa rraago, ke raya e ke e gapileng mo seatleng sa Baamore ka tšhaka ya me le ka bora jwa me.”" 
Genesis49:1 Jakobe a bitsa bomorwawe a re: “Phuthegang, gore ke tle ke lo bolelele se se tlaa lo diralelang mo metlheng e e tlaa tlang." 
Genesis49:2 “Phuthegang, lo utlwe, lona bomorwa Jakobe; lo reetse Iseraele rraeno." 
Genesis49:3 Rubene, ke wena wa ntlha wa me; nonofo ya me le tshimologo ya thata ya me; tlotlomalo ya bogolo, tlotlomalo ya bonatla." 
Genesis49:4 Ka go kgaphea kgaphea jaaka metsi, ga o ketla o nna le tlotlomalo: ka go bo o kile wa tlhatlogela kwa bolaong jwa ga rraago; wa bo leswefatsa; a ya mo diphateng tsa me." 
Genesis49:5 Simeone le Lefi ke bana ba monna; ditšhaka tsa bone ke dibolao tsa thubakanyo. 
Genesis49:6 Ao, mowa wa me, o se ka wa tsena mo maomeng a bone; kgalalelo ya me, o se ka wa kopana le phuthego ya bone; gonne ba bolaile banna ka bogale jwa bone, le mo go itaoleng ga bone ba kgaola dipholo mesifa." 
Genesis49:7 A go hutsege bogale jwa bone gonne bo ne bo le bolau; le tšhakgalo ya bone, gonne e ne e le bolalome; ke tlaa ba kgaoganya mo go Jakobe, ke ba phatlalatsa mo go Iseraele." 
Genesis49:8 Juta, wena bomorwa rraago ba tlaa go baka; seatla sa gago se tlaa nna mo thamong tsa baba ba gago. Bomorwa rraago ba tlaa ikoba fa pele ga gago." 
Genesis49:9 Juta ke ngwana wa tau; morwaaka, o tlhatlogile mo setotong, a inama, a namalala jaaka tau, le jaaka tau e namagadi; o tlaa tsosiwa e mang?" 
Genesis49:10 Thobane ya bogosi ga e ketla e tloga mo go Juta, le fa e le lore lwa molaodi go tloga fa gare ga dinao tsa gagwe, go bo go tle go tsamaye Shilo a tle pele. Go utlwa ga ditšhaba go tlaa nna kwa go ene." 
Genesis49:11 Ka a golegelela petsana ya gagwe mo mofineng, le eselana ya gagwe mo mofineng o o tlhophegileng: o tlhatswitse diaparo tsa gagwe mo bojalweng jwa mofine, le kobo ya gagwe mo mading a loungo lwa mofine." 
Genesis49:12 Matlho a gagwe a tlaa hubidiwa ke bojalwa jwa mofine, le meno a gagwe a tlaa sweufadiwa ke maši." 
Genesis49:13 Sebulone o tlaa aga kwa bogorogelong jwa lewatle; o tlaa nna bogorogelo jwa dikepe. Molelwane wa gagwe o tlaa tshwaragana le Sitone. 
Genesis49:14 Isakare ke esela e e thata, e namaletse fa gare ga maraka a dinku," 
Genesis49:15 mme a bona felo gongwe ga boikhutso fa go le molemo, le lefatshe fa le ne le le monate; a sekegela lerudi la gagwe go sikara, a tswa motlhanka yo o nnang mo tirong e o e patikelwang." 
Genesis49:16 Dane o tla atlhola batho ba gagwe, jaaka lotso longwe lwa Iseraele." 
Genesis49:17 Dane o tlaa nna noga mo tseleng; le šaušawane e e lomang magwejana a pitse, mopalami a wele kwa morago." 
Genesis49:18 Jehofa, ke ntse ke lebeletse poloka ya gago." 
Genesis49:19 Gate, setlhopha sa bonokwane se tlaa mo pitlaganyetsa: ene o tlaa ba pitlaganyetsa ba hulere." 
Genesis49:20 Mo go Ašere, dijo tsa gagwe di tlaa nna mahura, o tlaa tswa dijo tse di metsegang tsa segosi." 
Genesis49:21 Nafetali ke phala e namagadi e e golotsweng; o ntsha mafoko a a molemo. 
Genesis49:22 Josefe ke kala e e ungwang thata, kala e e ungwang fa motsweding; dikala tsa gagwe di tlolaganya lorako." 
Genesis49:23 Bahudi ka metswi ba mo tshwentse mo go botlhoko, ba mo hula, ba mmogisa." 
Genesis49:24 Mme bora jwa gagwe jwa nna mo thateng, mabogo a diatla tsa gagwe a thatafadiwa ke diatla tsa Mothata wa ga Jakobe, yo e leng modisa le lefika la ga Iseraele," 
Genesis49:25 e bong ka Modimo wa ga rraago o o tlaa go thusang, le ka Mothatayotlhe, yo o tlaa go segofatsang, ka masego a legodimo kwa godimo, le masego a boteng jo bo namaletseng kwa tlase, masego a mabele, le a sebopelo." 
Genesis49:26 Masego a ga rraago a feteletse bogolo go masego a batsadi ba me ba pele, go ya kwa sekhutlong sa bofelo sa dithaba tse di emeng ka bosakhutleng. A tlaa nna mo tlhogong ya ga Josefe; le mo phogong ya gagwe yo a neng a kgaoganye le bomorwa rraagwe." 
Genesis49:27 Benjamine ke phiri e e phamolaphamolang: o tlaa garola setoto ka moso, maitseboa o tlaa aba mo go bolailweng.”" 
Genesis49:28 Botlhe bao ke bone ditso tse di 12 tsa Iseraele; mme se ke sone se rraabo o se buileng nabo a ba segofatsa; mongwe le mongwe ka fa tshegofatsong ya gagwe, a ba segofatsa." 
Genesis49:29 Mme a ba laya, a ba raya a re: “Ke na le go phuthelwa kwa bathong ba gaetsho; lo mphitlhe fa go borraetsho mo logageng lo lo mo sebateng sa naga sa ga Eferone wa Mohite." 
Genesis49:30 Mo logageng lo lo mo nageng ya Makapela, bolebana le Mamere, kwa lefatsheng la Kanana, lo Aberahame o lo rekileng le sebata sa naga mo go Eferone wa Mohite go nna boswa jwa phitlhelo." 
Genesis49:31 Ba fitlhile Aberahame le Sara mosadi wa gagwe gone; ba fitlhile Isake le Rebeka mosadi wa gagwe gone; ka fitlha Lea gone. 
Genesis49:32 Ke raya sebata sa naga le logaga lo lo mo go sone, mo go rekilweng mo baneng ba ga Hethe.”" 
Genesis49:33 E rile Jakobe a sena go wetsa go laya bomorwawe, a gonela dinao tsa gagwe mo bolaong, a khutla, mme a phuthelwa kwa bathong ba ga gabo." 
Genesis50:1 Josefe a wela mo sefatlhogong sa ga rraagwe a lelela mo go ene, a mo atla." 
Genesis50:2 Josefe a laola batlhanka ba gagwe ba e leng dingaka gore ba omise rraagwe ka bongaka; dingaka tsa omisa Iseraele ka bongaka. 
Genesis50:3 Ga feta malatsi a le 40 ka ga gone; gonne malatsi a go omisa motho ka bongaka a tle a fete a le kalo. Baegepeto ba mo lelela ka malatsi a le 70. 
Genesis50:4 E rile malatsi a go mo lelela a fetile, Josefe a bua le ba ntlo ya ga Faro a re: “A e re ka jaana ke bonye tsalano mo matlhong a lona, ke a lo rapela, lo tle lo bue mo ditsebeng tsa ga Faro lo re, ga twe:" 
Genesis50:5 Rre o inkanisitse a re: ‘Bona, ke a swa; mme phupu e ke e ikepetseng kwa lefatsheng la Kanana ke gone kwa o tlaa mphitlhang gone.’ Mme jaana ke a go rapela, mma ke tlhatloge ke ye go fitlha rre, ke tlaa ba ke boa.”" 
Genesis50:6 Faro a re: “Tlhatloga o ye go fitlha rraago ka fa o go ikanisitseng ka gone.” 
Genesis50:7 Josefe a tlhatloga a ya go fitlha rraagwe; mme ga tlhatloga nae batlhanka botlhe ba ga Faro, bagolwane ba ntlo ya gagwe, le bagolwane botlhe ba lefatshe la Egepeto," 
Genesis50:8 le botlhe ba ntlo ya ga Josefe, le bomorwa rraagwe, le ntlo ya ga rraagwe; fa e se banyana ba bone, le matsomane a bone, le matlhape a bone, ba di tlogela mo lefatsheng la Gošene." 
Genesis50:9 Ga tlhatloga nae dikara le bapagama dipitse; ya nna lesomo le legolo thata. 
Genesis50:10 Ba fitlha fa sebuping sa ga Atate se se kwa moseja ga Joretane, ba lelela gone ka selelo se segolo se se botlhoko; mme a direla rraagwe selelo ka malatsi a supa." 
Genesis50:11 E rile banni ba lefatshe, e bong Bakanana, ba bona selelo mo sebuping sa ga Atate ba re: “Se ke selelo se se botlhoko mo go Baegepeto.” Ke gone ka mo leina la gone le reilweng ga twe, Abele-miseraime; o o kwa moseja ga Joretane." 
Genesis50:12 Bomorwawe ba mo direla jaaka a ba laotse. 
Genesis50:13 Gonne bomorwawe ba ne ba mmelegela kwa lefatsheng la Bakanana, ba mo fitlha mo logageng lwa sebata sa naga ya Makapela lo Aberahame o lo rekileng le sebata sa naga go nna boswa jwa phitlhelo, a lo reka mo go Eferone wa Mohite bolebana le Mamere." 
Genesis50:14 E rile ba sena go fitlha rraagwe, Josefe a boela kwa Egepeto, ene le bomorwa rraagwe, le botlhe ba ba tlhatlogileng nae ba ile go fitlha rraagwe." 
Genesis50:15 E rile bomorwa rraagwe ba bona fa rraabo a sule, ba re: “Motlhamongwe Josefe o tlaa re ila, a itefetsa ka botlalo bosula jotlhe jo re kileng ra bo mo direla.”" 
Genesis50:16 Ba isa taetso kwa go Josefe ba re: “E rile rraago a ise a swe a laola a re: 
Genesis50:17 ‘Lo tlaa raya Josefe jaana lo re: “Ke a go rapela, a ko o itshwarele tlolo ya bomorwa rraago le boleo jwa bone, ka gobo ba kile ba go direla bosula.” ’ Mme jaana re a go rapela a ko o itshwarele tlolo ya batlhanka ba Modimo wa ga rraago.” Mme e rile ba bua nae Josefe a lela." 
Genesis50:18 Bomorwa rraagwe ba ya ba wela fa pele ga sefatlhogo sa gagwe ba re: “Bona, re batlhanka ba gago.”" 
Genesis50:19 Josefe a ba raya a re: “Se boifeng; ka re, a ke mo boemong jwa Modimo?" 
Genesis50:20 Ka ga lona lo ne lo ntaoletse bosula; mme Modimo o no o laotse gore go nne molemo, go diratsa go nna jaaka go ntse gompieno, go tshedisa batho ba le bantsi." 
Genesis50:21 Ke gone jaana se boifeng: ke tlaa lo otla le bana ba lona.” A ba gomotsa; mme mafoko a gagwe a ba tsena mo pelong. 
Genesis50:22 Josefe a aga mo Egepeto, ene, le ntlo ya ga rraagwe. Mme a tshela dinyaga di le 110." 
Genesis50:23 Josefe a bona bana ba ga Eferaime ba losika lwa boraro; le bana ba ga Makire morwa Manase, ba tsalelwa mo mangoleng a gagwe." 
Genesis50:24 Josefe a raya ba ga gabo a re: “Ke a swa; Modimo o tlaa lo lekola ruri, mme o tlaa lo tlhatlosa mo lefatsheng leno, o lo isa kwa lefatsheng le o le ikaneletseng Aberahame le Isake le Jakobe.”" 
Genesis50:25 Josefe a ikanisa bana ba Iseraele a re: “Modimo o tlaa lo lekola ruri mme lo tlaa rwala marapo a me lo a tlhatlosa mono.” 
Genesis50:26 Jalo Josefe a swa a le dinyaga di le 110; mme ba mo omisa ka bongaka; a tsenngwa mo letloleng mo Egepeto. 
Exodus1:1 Jaana a ke one maina a bomorwa Iseraele ba ba tsileng mo Egepeto; monna mongwe le mongwe a tla le ba ntlo ya gagwe, ba tla le Jakobe:" 
Exodus1:2 Rubene, Simeone, Lefi, le Juta;" 
Exodus1:3 Isakare, Sebulone, le Benjamine;" 
Exodus1:4 Dane le Nafetali, Gate le Ašere." 
Exodus1:5 Mewa yotlhe e e duleng mo mankopeng a ga Jakobe ke mewa e e masome a supa. Josefe o ne a le mo Egepeto gale. 
Exodus1:6 Josefe a swa, le bomorwa rraagwe botlhe, le botlhe ba lobaka loo." 
Exodus1:7 Bana ba Iseraele ba ungwa thata, ba ata mo gogolo, ba ntsifala, ba nonofa ka thata e e feteletseng, ba tlala ka lefatshe." 
Exodus1:8 Jaana, ga tsoga kgosi e ntšha e busa mo Egepeto e e neng e sa itse Josefe." 
Exodus1:9 Ya raya batho ba yone ya re: “Bonang, batho ba bana ba Iseraele ba bantsi, ba bile ba nonofile bogolo go rona." 
Exodus1:10 Ntlong, a re direng ka botlhale ka ga bone; ba ka tla ba ntsifala, mme go diragale gore motlha mongwe fa go nna ntwa ba pate baba ba rona, ba tlhabane le rona, mme ba itsamaele fela ba tswe mo lefatsheng la rona.”" 
Exodus1:11 Ke gone ka moo ba tlogileng ba ba tlhomela badirisi go ba utlwisa botlhoko ka merwalo ya bone. Ba agela Faro metse ya dipolokelo, e bong Pithome le Ramesese." 
Exodus1:12 Fela jaaka ba ba utlwisa botlhoko bone ba ntsifala bogolo bogolo, ba anama bogolo. Mme ba nna pelo e botlhoko ka ntlha ya bana ba Iseraele." 
Exodus1:13 Baegepeto ba dirisa bana ba Iseraele ka bopeloethata; 
Exodus1:14 ba dira gore go tshela ga bone go nne botlhoko ka tiro e e thata ya go duba seretse sa setene, le ka tiro nngwe le nngwe yotlhe ya mo nageng, tiro yotlhe ya bone ba ne ba e ba dirisa ka bopeloethata." 
Exodus1:15 Kgosi ya Egepeto ya bua le babelegisi ba Bahebere, mongwe leina la gagwe go twe, Shifera, leina la yo mongwe go twe, Pua." 
Exodus1:16 Kgosi ya re: “E re lo belegisa mosadi wa basadi ba Bahebere lo ba bona ba le mo setulong sa pelega: fa e le ngwana wa mosimane foo lo mmolaye; fa e le ngwana wa mosetsana foo a tshele.” 
Exodus1:17 Babelegisi ba bo ba boifa Modimo jalo ba se ka ba dira jaaka kgosi ya Egepeto e ba laotse, ba tshedisa bana ba basimane." 
Exodus1:18 Kgosi ya Egepeto ya bitsa babelegisi ya ba raya ya re: “Lo dirile selo se ka ntlha yang fa e bo ne ne lo tshedisitse bana ba basimane?” 
Exodus1:19 Babelegisi ba raya Faro ba re: “Ke ka gobo basadi ba Bahebere ba sa nna jaaka basadi ba Baegepeto ka gobo ba bofefo, ba tle ba belege babelegisi ba ise ba tle kwa go bone.”" 
Exodus1:20 Modimo wa direla babelegisi sentle; batho ba ntsifala, ba nonofa segolo thata." 
Exodus1:21 Ga diragala ya re ka babelegisi ba boifa Modimo wa ba direla metse. 
Exodus1:22 Faro a laola batho ba gagwe botlhe fela a re: “Ngwana mongwe le mongwe wa mosimane yo o belegwang, lo mo latlhele mo nokeng, mme ngwana wa mosetsana mongwe le mongwe ene lo mo tshedise.”" 
Exodus2:1 Ga tloga monna mongwe wa kgotla ya ga Lefi, a ya a tsaya mosadi mo go bomorwadia Lefi." 
Exodus2:2 Mosadi a nna moimana, a bona ngwana wa mosimane; o rile a mmona fa e le ngwana yo montle a mo suba ka dikgwedi di le tharo." 
Exodus2:3 E rile a palelwa ke go tlhola a mo subile, a mo tseela seroto sa koma, a se dila ka bitumena le ka boka; a tsenya ngwana mo go sone, a se baya mo motsitleng fa lotshitshing lwa noka." 
Exodus2:4 Kgaitsadie a emela kgakala gore a tle a itse se o tlaa se dirwang. 
Exodus2:5 Morwadia Faro a fologela kwa nokeng a ya go tlhapa; malata a gagwe a nna a tsamaya le lotshitshi lwa noka; mme ene a bona seroto mo motsitleng, a roma lelata la gagwe la ya go se tsaya." 
Exodus2:6 A se khurumolola mme a bona ngwanyana; mme bonang, losea lwa lela. Mme a lo tlhomogela pelo, a re: “Yo ke ngwana mongwe wa Bahebere.”" 
Exodus2:7 Foo kgaitsadie a raya morwadia Faro a re: “A ke ke ye go go biletsa moamusi wa basadi ba Bahebere gore a go amusetse ngwana yo?” 
Exodus2:8 Morwadia Faro a mo raya a re: “Ya go mmitsa.” Morweetsana a ya a bitsa mma ngwanyana. 
Exodus2:9 Morwadia Faro a mo raya a re: “Tsaya ngwana yo o ye nae o mo nkamusetse; ke tlaa go naya tuelo ya gago.” Mosadi a tsaya ngwana, a mo amusa." 
Exodus2:10 Ngwanyana a gola, mmaagwe a mo isa kwa go morwadia Faro, a nna morwawe. A mo raya leina a re Moše; a re: “Ka gobo ke mo ntshitse mo metsing.”" 
Exodus2:11 Ga diragala ya re mo metlheng eo, Moše a sena go gola, a tswela kwa go ba ga gabo, a leba merwalo ya bone; a bona Moegepeto a itaya Mohebere mongwe wa ba ga gabo." 
Exodus2:12 A gadima kwa le kwa, ya re a bona fa go se na motho ope, a bolaya Moegepeto, a mo fitlha mo mošaweng." 
Exodus2:13 A tswa ka letsatsi la bobedi, mme bonang, banna ba le babedi ba Behebere ba lwa; a raya yo o rumolanyeng a re: “O iteelang mogaeno?”" 
Exodus2:14 A re: “E mang yo o go tlhomileng go nna kgosana le moatlhodi mo go rona? A o gopola go mpolaya jaaka o bolaile Moegepeto?” Moše a boifa; a re: “E ntse jaana selo se se itsegile.” 
Exodus2:15 Mme jaana e rile Faro a utlwa selo seo a senka go bolaya Moše. Moše a tshaba sefatlhogo sa ga Faro, a aga mo lefatsheng la Midiane, a dula fa sedibeng." 
Exodus2:16 Moperesiti wa Midiane o ne a na le bana ba basetsana ba supa: ba tla go ga, ba gelelela letsomane la ga rraabo, ba le nosetsa mo mekorong." 
Exodus2:17 Ga tla badisa, ba ba leleka. Moše a nanoga, a ba thusa, a nosa letsomane la bone." 
Exodus2:18 E rile ba fitlha kwa go Reuele, rraabo a re: “Ana go ntse jang ka lo akofile gompieno?”" 
Exodus2:19 Ba re: “Moegepeto mongwe o re golotse mo seatleng sa badisa a ba a re gelelela, a nosa letsomane.”" 
Exodus2:20 A raya bomorwadie a re: “Mme o fa kae? Ana lo mo tlogeletseng monna yoo? Mmitseng gore a tle go ja.” 
Exodus2:21 Moše a aga le monna yo a thethebetse pelo; mme a tseisa Moše Sipora, morwadie." 
Exodus2:22 A bona ngwana wa mosimane nae, a mo raya leina a re, Gerešome, gonne a re: “Ke ntse ke le mojaki mo lefatsheng la boeng.”" 
Exodus2:23 Ga diragala ya re mo go feteng ga malatsi ao a mantsi, kgosi ya Egepeto ya a swa. Bana ba Iseraele ba fegelwa ka ntlha ya kgolego, mme ba lela; go lela ga bone ga tlhatlogela kwa Modimong ka ntlha ya kgolego." 
Exodus2:24 Modimo wa utlwa go lela ga bone mme wa gakologelwa kgolagano ya one le Aberahame le Isake le Jakobe. 
Exodus2:25 Modimo wa leba bana ba Iseraele, wa ba ngoka." 
Exodus3:1 Moše a bo a disitse letsomane la ga Jethero mogwagadie, moperesiti wa Midiane; a disetsa letsomane kwa tengteng ga naga, a fitlha kwa thabeng ya Modimo kwa Horebe." 
Exodus3:2 Moengele wa ga Jehofa a bonala kwa go ene a le mo kgabong ya molelo o o tukang mo gare ga setlhare; a leba, mme bona, setlhare sa bo se tuka molelo, mme sa bo se sa še." 
Exodus3:3 Moše a re: “Ke tlaa fapoga ke ya go leba pono e kgolo e, ka fa setlhare se se sa šeng ka gone.”" 
Exodus3:4 E rile Jehofa a bona fa a fapoga a ya go bona, Modimo wa mo tlhaeletsa o le mo gare ga setlhare wa re: “Moše! Moše!” Ene a re: “Ke fano.”" 
Exodus3:5 Wa re: “O se ka wa atamela kwano; rola ditlhako tsa gago mo dinaong tsa gago gonne felo foo fa o emeng gone ke mmu o o boitshepo.” 
Exodus3:6 Wa fela wa re: “Ke nna Modimo wa ga rraago, Modimo wa ga Aberahame, Modimo wa ga Isake, le Modimo wa ga Jakobe.” Moše a ipipa sefatlhogo, gonne a boifa go leba Modimo." 
Exodus3:7 Jehofa a re: “Ruri ke bonye patikego ya batho ba me ba ba kwa Egepeto, ke bile ke utlwile thomeletso ya bone ka ntlha ya bagobagobetsi ba bone; ka gobo ke a a itse mahutsana a bone;" 
Exodus3:8 mme ke fologetse go ba golola mo seatleng sa Baegepeto, le go ba tlhatlosa mo lefatsheng leo, go ba isa kwa lefatsheng le le molemo, le le atlhameng, kwa lefatsheng le le elang maši le dinotshe; kwa felong ga Bakanana, le Bahite, le Baamore, le Baperise, le Bahife, le Bajebuse." 
Exodus3:9 Thomeletso ya bana ba Iseraele e fitlhile mo go nna; gape ke bile ke bonye patiko e Baegepeto ba ba patikang ka yone. 
Exodus3:10 Ntlo, ke tlaa go roma kwa go Faro gore o tle o ntshe batho ba me, bana ba Iseraele, mo Egepeto.”" 
Exodus3:11 Moše a raya Modimo a re: “Ana nna ke mang, fa e bo ne ne ke ka ya kwa go Faro, le go ya go ntsha bana ba Iseraele mo Egepeto?”" 
Exodus3:12 Wa re: “Ke tlaa nna nao ka mmaanete; se e tlaa nna sesupo mo go wena sa fa ke go romile; e tlaa re o sena go ntsha batho mo Egepeto, lo tlaa direla Modimo mo thabeng e.”" 
Exodus3:13 Moše a raya Modimo a re: “Bona, e tlaa re ke fitlha mo baneng ba Iseraele ke ba raya ke re: ‘Modimo wa borraeno o nthomile kwano go lona,’ mme ba nthaya ba re: ‘Leina la one ke mang?’ Ke ba reye ke reng?”" 
Exodus3:14 Modimo wa raya Moše wa re: “KE NTSE YO KE NTSENG;” wa re: “O tlaa bua le bana ba Iseraele jaana o re: ‘KE NTSE o nthomile kwano go lona.’ ” 
Exodus3:15 Modimo wa fela wa bua le Moše wa re: “O tlaa raya bana ba Iseraele o re: ‘JEHOFA, Modimo wa borraeno, Modimo wa ga Aberahame, Modimo wa ga Isake, le Modimo wa ga Jakobe, o nthomile kwano go lona.’ Le ke lone leina la me ka bosakhutleng; ke lone segopotso sa me go ya mo tshikatshikeng tsotlhe." 
Exodus3:16 Ya o phuthe bagolwane ba Iseraele mmogo o ba reye o re: ‘Jehofa Modimo wa borraeno, Modimo wa ga Aberahame, wa ga Isake, le wa ga Jakobe, o mponaletse wa re: “Ruri ke lo lekotse, ke bile ke bonye se lo se dirwang mo Egepeto;" 
Exodus3:17 Ke rile, ke tlaa lo tlhatlosa mo patikong ya Egepeto, ke lo isa kwa lefatsheng la Bakanana, le Bahite, le Baamore, le Baperise, le Bahife le Bajebuse, kwa lefatsheng le le elang maši le dinotshe.” ’" 
Exodus3:18 “Ba tlaa reetsa lentswe la gago; mme o tlaa ya, wena le bagolwane ba Iseraele, lo ya kgosing ya Egepeto lo e reye lo re: ‘Jehofa, Modimo, wa Bahebere o kopanye le rona; re a go rapela ra re: A o ko o mme re tsamaye loeto lwa malatsi a le mararo mo nageng, gore re isetse Jehofa Modimo wa rona tlhabelo.’" 
Exodus3:19 Ke a itse fa kgosi ya Egepeto e se ketla e lo leseletsa go tsamaya, nnyaa, le fa e le ka letsogo le le thata." 
Exodus3:20 Ke tlaa otlolola letsogo la me ke betsa Egepeto ka dikgakgamatso tsa me tsotlhe fela tse ke tlaa di dirang mo gare ga bone; morago ga mo e tlaa lo leseletsa go tsamaya. 
Exodus3:21 “Tšhaba e, ke tlaa e naya go bona letlhogonolo mo matlhong a Baegepeto. Go tlaa diragala gore e tlaa re lo tsamaya lo bo lo sa tsamaye lo iphotlhere fela;" 
Exodus3:22 mosadi mongwe le mongwe o tlaa lopa yo o bapileng nae, a ba a lopa yo o tlhotsetlhotseng mo ntlong ya gagwe mekgabo ya selefera, le mekgabo ya gouta, le diaparo; mme lo tlaa di apesa bomorwaa lona le bomorwadia lona, lo tlaa amoga Baegepeto.”" 
Exodus4:1 Moše a fetola a re: “Bona, ga ba ketla ba ntumela le fa e le go reetsa lentswe la me; gonne ba tlaa re: ‘Jehofa ga a a go bonalela.’ ”" 
Exodus4:2 Jehofa a mo raya a re: “Ke eng se se mo seatleng sa gago?” A re: “Ke thobane.” 
Exodus4:3 Mme a re: “E latlhele fa fatshe.” A e latlhela fa fatshe, ya fetoga noga; Moše a e tshaba." 
Exodus4:4 Jehofa a raya Moše a re: “Ntsha letsogo la gago o e tshware ka mogatla.” A ntsha letsogo a e tshwara, mme ya fetoga thobane mo seatleng sa gagwe." 
Exodus4:5 “Gore ba dumele fa Jehofa, Modimo wa borraabo, Modimo wa ga Aberahame, Modimo wa ga Isake, le Modimo wa ga Jakobe, o go bonaletse.”" 
Exodus4:6 Gape Jehofa a fela a mo raya a re: “Tsenya seatla sa gago mo sehubeng sa gago.” A tsenya seatla sa gagwe mo sehubeng sa gagwe; a re a se ntsha, bonang seatla sa gagwe sa bo se le lepero, se le sesweu jaaka kapoko." 
Exodus4:7 A re: “Tsenya seatla sa gago gape mo sehubeng sa gago.” Mme a tsenya seatla sa gagwe mo sehubeng sa gagwe gape; a re a se ntsha sa bo se fetogile gape, se ntse jaaka nama ya gagwe e nngwe." 
Exodus4:8 “E tlaa re fa ba sa go dumele le fa e le go reetsa lentswe la sesupo sa ntlha, ba tlaa dumela lentswe la sesupo sa morago." 
Exodus4:9 Fa ba sa dumele le fa e le ditshupo tse pedi, le fa e le go reetsa lentswe la gago, o tlaa tsaya metsi a noka, o a thele mo mmung o o omeletseng; metsi a o a tsayang mo nokeng a tlaa fetoga madi mo mmung o o omeletseng.”" 
Exodus4:10 Moše a raya Jehofa a re: “Ao, Morena, ga ke motho yo o itseng go bua sentle, le fa e le gale, le fa e le o sena go bua le motlhanka wa gago, gonne ke bonya mo puong, ke bile ke loleme lo bonya.”" 
Exodus4:11 Jehofa a mo raya a re: “E mang yo o dirileng molomo wa motho? Kgotsa e mang yo o dirang motho gore a nne semumu, gongwe a nne susu, gongwe a nne yo o bonang, kgotsa a nne sefofu? A ga se nna Jehofa?" 
Exodus4:12 Jaanong ka re tsamaya, ke tlaa nna le molomo wa gago ke go ruta se o tlaa se buang.”" 
Exodus4:13 Mme a re: “Ao, Jehofa, a ko o rome ka yo o ka mo romang.”" 
Exodus4:14 Bogale jwa ga Jehofa jwa tukela Moše, foo a re: “A mogoloo Arone, Molefi, a ga a gone? Ke a itse fa ene a ka bua sentle. Le gone, bona, o e tla, o tla go go kgatlhantsha, o tlaa re a go bona a itumele mo pelong ya gagwe." 
Exodus4:15 O tlaa bua nae, o tsenya one mafoko mo molomong wa gagwe; ke tlaa nna le molomo wa gago le molomo wa gagwe, ke lo ruta se lo tlaa se dirang." 
Exodus4:16 Ene o tlaa nna mmueledi wa gago mo bathong: go tlaa diragala gore ene a nne molomo wa gago, wena o nne jaaka Modimo mo go ene." 
Exodus4:17 Thobane e, e o tlaa dirang ditshupo ka yone, o e tshole ka seatla sa gago.”" 
Exodus4:18 Moše a tsamaya a boela kwa go Jethero mogwagadie, a mo raya a re: “A ko o mme ke tsamaye ke boele kwa go bagaetsho ba ba kwa Egepeto, ke ye go bona gore a ba sa ntse ba tshedile.” Jethero a raya Moše a re: “Tsamaya ka kagiso.”" 
Exodus4:19 Moše a re a le mo Midiane Modimo wa mo raya wa re: “Tsamaya o boele kwa Egepeto; gonne banna botlhe ba ba neng ba ba batla go go bolaya ba sule.” 
Exodus4:20 Moše a tsaya mosadi wa gagwe le bomorwawe, a ba palamisa mo eseleng, a boela kwa lefatsheng la Egepeto; Moše a tshola thobane ya Modimo mo seatleng sa gagwe." 
Exodus4:21 Jehofa a raya Moše a re: “E tlaa re o boela kwa Egepeto, o bone gore o dire fa pele ga Faro dikgakgamatso tse ke di go tsentseng mo seatleng; ke tlaa thatafatsa pelo ya gagwe, ga a ketla a leseletsa batho ba tsamaya." 
Exodus4:22 Mme o reye Faro o re: Jehofa o bua jaana a re: ‘Iseraele ke morwaake, ngwana wa ntlha wa me." 
Exodus4:23 Ke go reile ka re: Mma morwaake a tsamaye, gore a ye go ntirela; mme o ganne go mo lesa: bona, ke tlaa bolaya morwao, ngwana wa ntlha wa gago.’ ”" 
Exodus4:24 Ga diragala ya re mo tseleng kwa go lalwang gone, Jehofa a mo kgatlhantsha, mme a batla go mmolaya." 
Exodus4:25 Foo Sipora a tsaya lekgethu, a rupisa morwawe, a go latlhela fa dinaong tsa gagwe; a re: “Ruri o monna wa madi mo go nna.”" 
Exodus4:26 Jalo Jehofa a mo lesa. Foo mosadi a re: “O monna wa madi,” ka thupiso." 
Exodus4:27 Jehofa a raya Arone a re: “Ya kwa nageng, o ye go kgatlhantsha Moše.” Jalo a ya a kopanela nae mo thabeng ya Modimo, mme a mo atla." 
Exodus4:28 Moše a bolelela Arone mafoko otlhe a Jehofa o a mo romileng, le ditshupo tsotlhe tse o di mo laoletseng." 
Exodus4:29 Moše le Arone ba ya ba phutha bagolwane botlhe ba bana ba Iseraele. 
Exodus4:30 Mme Arone a bua mafoko otlhe a Jehofa o a buileng le Moše, a ba a dira ditshupo mo ponong ya batho." 
Exodus4:31 Batho ba dumela; e rile ba utlwa fa Jehofa a lekotse bana ba Iseraele, a bile a bonye patikego ya bone, foo ba ikoba ditlhogo, ba obama." 
Exodus5:1 Morago ga mo Moše le Arone ba tla ba raya Faro ba re: “Jehofa, Modimo wa Iseraele o bua jaana wa re: ‘Lesa batho ba me ba tsamaye ba ye go ntirela modiro kwa nageng.’ ”" 
Exodus5:2 Faro a re: “Jehofa e be e le mang, fa ke ka reetsa lentswe la gagwe ka lesa Baiseraele ba tsamaya? Ga ke itse Jehofa, gape ga nketla ke lesa Baiseraele ba tsamaya.”"
