Numbers14:14 ba tlaa bolelela banni ba lefatshe le; ba utlwile fa o le mo gare ga tšhaba e; gonne wena Jehofa o a bonwa o lebanye sefatlhogo le sefatlhogo, le leru la gago le ba okame, mme wa ba etelela pele, ka mosipuri wa leru motshegare, le ka mosipuri wa molelo bosigo." 
Numbers14:15 Jaana fa o bolaya tšhaba e jaaka e ka bo e le motho a le mongwe fela, foo merafe e e utlwileng tumedi ya gago e tlaa bua e re:" 
Numbers14:16 ‘E re ka Jehofa a sa nonofa go fitlhisa tšhaba e mo lefatsheng le o le ba ikanetseng, ke gone o ba nyeleditseng mo nageng.’" 
Numbers14:17 Jaana, ke a go rapela: A thata ya ga Jehofa e nne kgolo, ka fa o buileng ka gone, wa re:" 
Numbers14:18 ‘Jehofa o bonya go galefa, o tletse boutlwelobotlhoko; o itshwarela boikepo le tlolo, mme yo o molato ga a ketla a mo golola gope, o beletsa bana tshiamololo ya borra ba bone go ya kokomaneng ya boraro le ya bone.’" 
Numbers14:19 Ke a go rapela, o itshwarele tshiamololo ya tšhaba e, ka fa bogolong jwa boutlwelobotlhoko jwa gago, le ka fa o ntseng wa itshwarela tšhaba e go tswa Egepeto le gompieno ka gone.”" 
Numbers14:20 Jehofa a re: “Ke itshwaretse ka fa lefokong la gago; 
Numbers14:21 mme ruri, ruri, jaaka ke tshedile le jaaka lefatshe lotlhe le tlaa tlala kgalalelo ya ga Jehofa:" 
Numbers14:22 E re ka batho bao botlhe ba ba bonyeng kgalalelo ya me, le ditshupo tsa me, tse ke di dirileng kwa Egepeto, le mo nageng, le fa go ntse jalo ba ntekile ka dipaka tse some tse, mme ba se ka ba reetsa lentswe la me;" 
Numbers14:23 ruri ga ba ketla ba bona lefatshe le ke le ikanetseng borraabo, le gone ga go na ope wa ba ba nnyaditseng yo o tlaa le bonang," 
Numbers14:24 fa e se motlhanka wa me Kalebe, ka ene a ne a na le mowa o sele, mme o ntshetse morago ka botlalo; ke ene ke tlaa mo isang mo lefatsheng le o neng a ya go tsena mo go lone; le losika lwa gagwe lo tlaa le rua." 
Numbers14:25 Jaana Baamaleke le Bakanana ba agile mo molapong. E tlaa re ka moso lo menoge lo ye kwa nageng ka tsela e e yang kwa Lewatleng le Lehibidu.” 
Numbers14:26 Jehofa a bua le Moše le Arone, a re:" 
Numbers14:27 “Ke tlaa iphapaanya goleele go le kae le phuthego e e bosula e, e e ntseng e ngongorega ka ga me? Ke utlwile dingongorego tsa bana ba Iseraele, tse ba di ngongoregang ka ga me." 
Numbers14:28 Lo ba reye lo re: Jaaka ke tshedile, go bua Jehofa, ruri jaaka lo buile mo ditsebeng tsa me, ke tlaa lo direla fela jalo:" 
Numbers14:29 Ditoto tsa lona di tlaa wela mo nageng e; botlhe ba ba badilweng mo go lona ka fa palong yotlhe ya lona, go simolola ka ba ba dinyaga di masome mabedi go ya kwa go bomogoloa bone, ba ba ngongoregileng ka ga me." 
Numbers14:30 Ruri ga lo ketla lo fitlha mo lefatsheng le ke le tsholeleditseng letsogo, ka re, ke tlaa lo agisa mo go lone, fa e se Kalebe morwa Jefune le Jošua morwa Nune." 
Numbers14:31 Banyana ba lona, ba lo rileng ba tlaa nna thopo, bone ke tlaa ba fitlhisa, ba tlaa itse lefatshe le lona lo le ganneng;" 
Numbers14:32 ka ga lona, ditoto tsa lona di tlaa wela mo nageng e." 
Numbers14:33 Bana ba lona ba tlaa nna bakgarakgatshegi mo nageng ka dinyaga di 40, ba tlaa rwala maakafalo a lona, go tsamaya ditoto tsa lona di felediwa mo nageng." 
Numbers14:34 Jaaka palo ya malatsi a lo tswang go tlhola lefatshe ka one, e bong malatsi a a 40, letsatsi lengwe le lengwe le tlaa emelwa ke ngwaga, mme lo tlaa rwala ditshiamololo tsa lona, e bong ka dinyaga di le 40, lo tlaa itse go tlhanoga ga me." 
Numbers14:35 Nna Jehofa ke buile ka re, ruri se ke sone se ke tlaa se direlang phuthego e e bosula e, e e mphuthegetseng go tlhabana le nna; ba tlaa fedisiwa mo nageng e, ba tlaa swela teng.”" 
Numbers14:36 Banna ba Moše o ne a ba romile ba ya go tlhola lefatshe, ba ba boileng ba ngongoregisa phuthego yotlhe ka ga gagwe ka go bolela lefatshe ka bosula," 
Numbers14:37 e bong bone banna bao, ba ba boletseng lefatshe ka bosula, ba swela ka sebetso fa pele ga Jehofa." 
Numbers14:38 Mme Jošua morwa Nune, le Kalebe morwa Jefune ba sala ba tshedile mo banneng bao ba ba neng ba ile go tlhola lefatshe." 
Numbers14:39 Moše a bolelela bana ba Iseraele botlhe mafoko ao; mme batho ba hutsafala thata. 
Numbers14:40 Ba phakela ba palamela kwa godimo ga thaba ba re: “Re fano, a re yeng kwa felong fa Jehofa o go re tlhomamiseditseng; gonne re leofile.”" 
Numbers14:41 Moše a re: “Ana lo tlolelang taolo ya ga Jehofa, e tswa go se ketla go lo swelegela molemo ka sepe?" 
Numbers14:42 Se tlhatlogeng, gonne Jehofa ga a mo go lona; lo ka tla lwa kgemethwa ke baba ba lona." 
Numbers14:43 Gonne Baamaleke le Bakanana ba gone fa pele ga lona, mme lo tlaa wa ka tšhaka; gonne lo boile mo go saleng Jehofa morago, ke gone ka moo Jehofa ga a ketla a nna le lona.”" 
Numbers14:44 Ba itaola fela, ba palamela kwa godimo ga thaba; le fa go ntse jalo letlole la kgolagano ya ga Jehofa ga le a ka la tswa mo bothibelelong le fa e le ene Moše." 
Numbers14:45 Foo Baamaleke ba fologa le Bakanana ba ba agileng mo thabeng eo, ba ba kgemetha ba ba kgokolosetsa go ya kwa Horema." 
Numbers15:1 Jehofa a bua le Moše, a re:" 
Numbers15:2 “Bua le bana ba Iseraele, o ba reye o re: E tlaa re lo sena go fitlha mo lefatsheng la maago a lona le ke le lo nayang," 
Numbers15:3 lo rata go direla Jehofa tshupelo ka molelo, tshupelo e e fisiwang, kgotsa setlhabelo, go tla lo dirafatsa ikano nngwe, kgotsa e le tshupelo ya peleego fela, kgotsa e le mo medirong ya lona e e tlhomilweng, go tla lo direla Jehofa monko o o monate, ga matlhape kgotsa ga letsomane;" 
Numbers15:4 foo yo o isetsang Jehofa tshupelo ya gagwe, a a tlise tsupelo ya boupe jwa kilokerame e le nngwe fela, e tlhakanye le litara ya lookwane," 
Numbers15:5 le bojalwa jwa mofine jwa tshupelo e e nowang, bo le litara e le nngwe fela, o tlaa bo baakanyetsa tshupelo e e fisiwang, kgotsa setlhabelo, o e pataganye le kwanyana nngwe le nngwe." 
Numbers15:6 Kgotsa fa e le ga phelefu, o tlaa baakanya tshupelo ya boupe e le dikilokerame di le pedi, di tlhakanye le lookwane lo le dilitara di le 1,5." 
Numbers15:7 O ise dilitara di le 1,5 tsa bojalwa jwa mofine, e le tshupelo e e nowang, ya monko o o monate mo go Jehofa." 
Numbers15:8 E re fa o baakanya kgongwana ya tshupelo e e fisiwang, kgotsa ya setlhabelo, go tla o dirafatsa ikano nngwe, kgotsa e le ya ditshupelo tsa kagiso go Jehofa," 
Numbers15:9 foo a pataganye kgongwana le tshupelo ya boupe e le dikilokerame di le tharo, di tlhakanye le dilitara di le pedi tsa lookwane." 
Numbers15:10 Fa e le tshupelo e e nowang, o ise dilitara di le pedi tsa bojalwa jwa mofine, e le tshupelo e e dirwang ka molelo, e le ya monko o o monate mo go Jehofa." 
Numbers15:11 “A kgongwana nngwe le nngwe e direlwe jalo, le phelefu nngwe le nngwe, le kwanyana e tonanyana nngwe le nngwe, le potsane nngwe le nngwe." 
Numbers15:12 Jaaka palo e lo tlaa e baakanyang, lo tlaa direla nngwe le nngwe jalo ka fa palong ya tsone." 
Numbers15:13 Botlhe ba ba tsaletsweng mo gae ba tlaa dira dilo tse ka mokgwa o, fa ba isa tshupelo e e dirwang ka molelo, ya monko o o monate mo go Jehofa." 
Numbers15:14 Fa moeng a jakile mo go lona, kgotsa le fa e le mang yo o mo go lona go ya le dikokomana tsotlhe tsa lona, a rata go isa tshupelo e e dirwang ka molelo, ya monko o o monate mo go Jehofa, jaaka lo dira, le ene a a dire fela jalo." 
Numbers15:15 Mo phuthegong tao a e nne nngwe fela ya lona le ya moeng yo o jakileng mo go lona, e le tao e e sa khutleng go ya le dikokomana tsa lona, jaaka lona lo ntse, moeng a nne jalo fa pele ga Jehofa." 
Numbers15:16 Molao o nne mongwe fela le taolelo mo go lona, le mo moenyeng yo o jakileng mo go lona.”" 
Numbers15:17 Jehofa a bua le Moše a re: 
Numbers15:18 “Bua le bana ba Iseraele, o ba reye o re: E tlaa re lo fitlha mo lefatsheng le ke lo isang kwa go lone," 
Numbers15:19 e tlaa re fa loo ja dijo tsa lefatshe, lo isetse Jehofa tshupelo ya tsholetso." 
Numbers15:20 Ga boupe jwa lona jwa ntlha jo bo dubilweng lo ise papetlana ya senkgwe e le tshupelo ya tsholetso, jaaka lo tle lo dire tshupelo ya tsholetso ya sebupi sa pholelo, lo se tsholetse jalo." 
Numbers15:21 Ga boupe jwa lona jwa ntlha jo bo dubilweng lo tlaa isetsa Jehofa tshupelo ya tsholetso go ya le dikokomana tsotlhe tsa lona. 
Numbers15:22 “E tlaa re fa lo ka leofa, lo sa tlhokomele ditaolo tse tsotlhe, tse Jehofa o di boleletseng Moše," 
Numbers15:23 e bong tsotlhe tse Jehofa o di lo laoletseng ka seatla sa ga Moše, go simolola ka letsatsi le Jehofa o laotseng ka lone, go ya kwa pele le dikokomana tsotlhe tsa lona;" 
Numbers15:24 foo go tlaa diragala gore fa go dirilwe ka timelo fela kwa ntle ga kitso ya phuthego, phuthego yotlhe e ise kgongwana e le nngwe fela e le tshupelo e e fisiwang, go nna monko o o monate mo go Jehofa, e na le tshupelo ya yone ya boupe, le tshupelo ya yone e e nowang, ka fa mokgweng o laotsweng, le phoko e le nngwe fela ya tshupelo ya boleo." 
Numbers15:25 A moperesiti a direle phuthego yotlhe ya bana ba Iseraele tetlanyo, mme ba tlaa itshwarelwa, gonne e ne e le timelo fela; ba lerile seromololo sa bone, tshupelo e e direlwang Jehofa ka molelo, le tshupelo ya bone ya boleo, ba di isitse fa pele ga Jehofa ka ga timelo ya bone." 
Numbers15:26 Phuthego yotlhe ya bana ba Iseraele e tlaa itshwarelwa, le moeng yo o jakileng mo go bone, gonne ka ga batho botlhe go ne go dirilwe ka botlhokakitso." 
Numbers15:27 “Fa motho a le mongwe fela a leofa ka timelo, foo a ise podi e namagadi ya ngwaga wa ntlha e le tshupelelo ya boleo." 
Numbers15:28 Motho yo o timelang, mme e se ka bomo, moperesiti o tlaa mo direla tetlanyo fa pele ga Jehofa, mme o tlaa itshwarelwa." 
Numbers15:29 Lo nne le molao o le mongwe fela wa yo o dirang sengwe ka go timela fela, wa yo o tsaletsweng mo gae mo baneng ba Iseraele, le wa moeng yo o jakileng mo go bone." 
Numbers15:30 Motho yo o dirang sengwe ka boikgodiso, le fa e ka nna yo o tsaletsweng mo gae, kgotsa moeng, motho yoo o tlhapatsa Jehofa; motho yoo o tlaa kgaolwa a tswa mo bathong ba ga gabo." 
Numbers15:31 Ka a nyaditse lefoko la ga Jehofa, a tlodile taolo ya gagwe, motho yoo a kgaolelwe ruri, boikepo jwa gagwe bo tlaa nna mo go ene.”" 
Numbers15:32 E rile bana ba Iseraele ba sa le mo nageng, ba fitlhela motho a rwalela ka letsatsi la Sabata." 
Numbers15:33 Ba ba mo fitlhetseng a rwalela ba mo isa kwa go Moše le Arone, le kwa phuthegong yotlhe." 
Numbers15:34 Ba mo tsenya mo tebelong, ka go ne go ise go bolelwe se o tlaa se dirwang." 
Numbers15:35 Jehofa a raya Moše, a re: “Ruri motho yoo o tlaa bolawa; a phuthego yotlhe e mo kgobotletse ka maje kwa ntle ga bothibelelo.”" 
Numbers15:36 Phuthego yotlhe ya mo isa kwa ntle ga bothibelelo, ba mo kgobotletsa ka maje, a swa; jaaka Jehofa a laotse Moše." 
Numbers15:37 Jehofa a bua le Moše, a re:" 
Numbers15:38 “Bua le bana ba Iseraele o ba laole gore ba itirele makantsa fa dintlheng tsa diaparo tsa bone, go ya le dikokomana tsotlhe tsa bone, mo makantseng a ntlha nngwe le nngwe ba beye mogala wa bobududu." 
Numbers15:39 E nne lekantsa go lona, gore lo le lebe, lo itse go gakologelwa ditaolo tsotlhe tsa ga Jehofa, le go di dira; le gore lo se tsamayetsamaye fela ka fa dipelong tsa lona, le ka fa matlhong a lona, a lo ntseng lwa nna lwa a sala morago lwa ya go akafala," 
Numbers15:40 gore lo gakologelwe ditaolo tsa me tsotlhe go di dira, le gore lo nne boitshepelo Modimo wa lona." 
Numbers15:41 Ke nna Jehofa Modimo wa lona, yo ke lo ntshitseng mo lefatsheng la Egepeto, go nna Modimo wa lona, ke nna Jehofa Modimo wa lona.”" 
Numbers16:1 Jaana Kora morwa Isehare, morwa Kohathe, morwa Lefi, a na le Dathane le Abirame, bomorwa Eliabe, le One morwa Pelethe, bomorwa Rubene, ba tsaya batho," 
Numbers16:2 ba nanoga fa pele ga Moše, ba na le bangwe ba bana ba Iseraele, dikgosana tsa phuthego di le 250, ba ba bileditsweng pitsong, e le banna ba ba itsegeng." 
Numbers16:3 Ba phuthegela Moše le Arone, ba ba raya ba re: “Lo inaya mo gogolo bobe, e tswa ba phuthego botlhe ba itshepile, mongwe le mongwe wa bone, Jehofa o mo go bone. Ke ka ntlha yang fa lo ikgodisa lo ipaya kwa godimo ga phuthego ya ga Jehofa?”" 
Numbers16:4 E rile Moše a utlwa, a wela ka sefatlhogo fa fatshe," 
Numbers16:5 a bua le Kora le lekoko lotlhe la gagwe, a re: “E tlaa re ka moso Jehofa o tlaa supa ba e leng ba gagwe, le yo o leng boitshepo o tlaa mo atametsa kwa go ene, e bong ene yo o tlaa mo itshenkelang, o tlaa mo atametsa kwa go ene." 
Numbers16:6 Dirang jaana, lo tseye mabeyana, Kora le lekoko lotlhe la gagwe." 
Numbers16:7 Lo tsenye molelo mo go one, lo beye maswalo mo go one fa pele ga Jehofa ka moso. Go tlaa diragala gore motho yo Jehofa o mo itshenkelang, ene o tlaa nna boitshepo; lo inaya mo gogolo bobe, lona bomorwa Lefi.”" 
Numbers16:8 Moše a raya Kora a re: “Utlwang, lona bomorwa Lefi," 
Numbers16:9 a lo fitlhela e le selo se sennyennyane fa e bo ne ne Modimo wa Iseraele, o lo lomolotse mo phuthegong ya Iseraele, go lo atametsa fa go one, go tla lo dira tirelo ya motlaagana wa ga Jehofa le go ema fa pele ga phuthego go ba direla;" 
Numbers16:10 le gore o go atameditse, wena le bomorwao botlhe, bomorwa Lefi? A lo batla le jone boperesiti?" 
Numbers16:11 Ke gone ka fa wena le lekoko lotlhe la gago lo phuthegetseng Jehofa ka gone, go tlhabana nae; Arone e be e le mang fa lo mo ngongoregela jaana?”" 
Numbers16:12 Moše a roma a ya go bitsa Dathane le Abirame bomorwa Eliabe, mme ba re: “Re gana go ya koo." 
Numbers16:13 A ke selo se sennyennyane fa o re tlhatlositse kwa lefatsheng le le elang maši le dinotshe, go tla go re bolaela mo nageng, fa e bo ne ne o bile o itira kgosana mo go rona jaana?" 
Numbers16:14 Gape, ga o a re fitlhisa mo lefatsheng le le elang maši le dinotshe, le gone ga o a re naya boswa jwa matlhagare le masimo a mafine. A o itshoketse go re tsietsa? Ga re ye koo.”" 
Numbers16:15 Moše a nna bogale thata, mme a raya Jehofa a re: “O se ka wa tlhokomela tshupelo ya bone; ga ke a ba tseela le fa e le esela e le nngwe fela, le gone ga ke a utlwisa ope wa bone botlhoko.”" 
Numbers16:16 Moše a raya Kora a re: “Wena le phuthego yotlhe ya gago lo nne fa pele ga Jehofa ka moso, wena le bone, le Arone." 
Numbers16:17 Mongwe le mongwe a tseye lobeyana lwa gagwe, lo bo lo beye maswalo mo go one; motho mongwe le mongwe a tle fa pele ga Jehofa a tshotse lobeyana la gagwe, mabeyana a le 250, le wena le Arone, mongwe le mongwe a tle le lobeyana la gagwe.”" 
Numbers16:18 Mongwe le mongwe a tsaya lobeyana lwa gagwe, ba baya molelo mo go one, ba ba ba baya maswalo mo go one, mme ba ema fa mojakong wa mogope wa bophuthegelo; ba na le Moše le Arone." 
Numbers16:19 Kora a phuthela phutego yotlhe fa mojakong wa mogope wa bophuthegelo; mme kgalalelo ya ga Jehofa ya bonalela phuthego yotlhe. 
Numbers16:20 Jehofa a bua le Moše le Arone a re: 
Numbers16:21 “Itomololeng mo phuthegong e, gore ke tle ke ba nyeletse ka ponyo ya leitlho.”" 
Numbers16:22 Mme ba wela fa fatshe ka difatlhogo ba re: “Ao! Modimo, Modimo wa mewa ya nama yotlhe, a motho o tlaa leofa a le mongwe fela, mme wa nna bogale le phuthego yotlhe?”" 
Numbers16:23 Jehofa a bua le Moše, a re:" 
Numbers16:24 “Bua le phuthego o re: ‘Tlogang fa motlaaganeng wa ga Kora le Dathane le Abirame.’ ” 
Numbers16:25 Moše a nanoga a ya kwa go Dathane le Abirame; bagolwane ba Iseraele ba mo sala morago. 
Numbers16:26 A bua le phuthego a re: “Ke a lo rapela, tlogang fa megopeng ya batho ba ba ba bosula, lo se ameng sepe sa bone, lo ka tla lwa nyelediwa mo dibeng tsotlhe tsa bone.”" 
Numbers16:27 Jalo ba tloga fa motlaaganeng wa ga Kora le Dathane le Abirame, ba tswa ka ntlha tsotlhe; Dathane le Abirame ba ema fa mejakong ya megope ya bone, le basadi ba bone, le bomorwaa bone, le banyana ba bone." 
Numbers16:28 Moše a re: “Lo tlaa itse ka se, fa Jehofa a nthomile gore ke tle go dira ditiro tse tsotlhe, gonne ga ke a di dira e le mogopolo wa me fela." 
Numbers16:29 E tlaa re fa batho ba, ba ka swa loso lwa batho botlhe, kgotsa fa ba lekolwa ka tekolo ya batho botlhe, foo Jehofa o tlaa bo a sa nthoma." 
Numbers16:30 Mme fa Jehofa a dira selo se seša, fa lefatshe le atlhamologa molomo, le ba kometsa, le tsotlhe tse ba nang natso, mme ba wela mo moleteng ba ntse ba utlwa, foo lo tlaa tlhaloganya fa batho ba ba nyaditse Jehofa.”" 
Numbers16:31 Ga dirala ya re a sena go wetsa go bua mafoko otlhe a, lefatshe la phatloga fa tlase ga bone." 
Numbers16:32 Lefatshe la atlhamologa molomo, la ba kometsa, le ba matlo a bone, le batho botlhe fela ba ga Kora, le dithoto tsa bone tsotlhe fela." 
Numbers16:33 Jalo bone ba na le tsotlhe tse e leng tsa bone ba wela mo moleteng ba ntse ba utlwa; lefatshe la ba khurumetsa, ba nyelela ba tswa mo phuthegong." 
Numbers16:34 Baiseraele botlhe ba ba mo tikologong ya bone ba tshaba ka go gala ga bone, gonne ba re: “Lefatshe le ka tla la re kometsa.”" 
Numbers16:35 Ga tswa molelo mo go Jehofa wa laila banna ba ba 250, ba ba isitseng maswalo ao." 
Numbers16:36 Jehofa a bua le Moše a re: 
Numbers16:37 “Bua le Eleasare morwa Arone moperesiti gore a tseye mabeyana mo phisong, wena o phatlalaletse molelo kwa kgakala; gonne a boitshepo;" 
Numbers16:38 e bong mabeyana a baleofi ba, ba ba leofetseng matshelo a bone, mme a a thulwe a nne dimatla tsa go manega sebeso, gonne ba a isitse fa pele ga Jehofa, ke gone a leng boitshepo: a tlaa nna sesupo mo baneng ba Iseraele.”" 
Numbers16:39 Eleasare moperesiti a tsaya mabeyana a kgotlho, a bone ba ba fisitsweng ba a isitseng; ba a thula dimatla tsa go manega sebeso," 
Numbers16:40 gore e nne segopodiso mo baneng ba Iseraele, e le gore ope o sele yo o seng wa losika lwa ga Arone a se atamele a ya go fisa maswalo fa pele ga Jehofa, gore a se ka a nna jaaka Kora le jaaka lesomo la gagwe, jaaka Jehofa a buile nae ka seatla sa ga Moše." 
Numbers16:41 E rile ka moso phuthego yotlhe ya bana ba Iseraele ya ngongoregela Moše le Arone ba re: “Lo bolaile batho ba ga Jehofa.” 
Numbers16:42 Ga dirala ya re phuthego e phuthegetse Moše le Arone ba leba kwa mogopeng wa bophuthegelo, mme bonang leru la bo le o bipile le kgalalelo ya ga Jehofa ya bonala." 
Numbers16:43 Moše le Arone ba tla fa pele ga mogope wa bophuthegelo. 
Numbers16:44 Jehofa a bua le Moše a re: 
Numbers16:45 “Tlhatlogang mo phuthegong e gore ke tle ke ba nyeletse ka ponyo ya leitlho.” Ba wela fa fatshe ka difatlhogo. 
Numbers16:46 Moše a raya Arone a re: “Tsaya lobeyana la gago o tsenye molelo o o tswang mo sebesong mo go lone o lo ise ka bonako kwa phuthegong, o ba direle tetlanyo, gonne go dule bogale kwa go Jehofa, sebetso se simologile.”" 
Numbers16:47 Arone a le tsaya jaaka Moše a buile, a sianela kwa gare ga phuthego, a fitlhela sebetso se simologile mo bathong; a baya maswalo, a direla batho tetlanyo." 
Numbers16:48 A ema fa gare ga baswi le batshedi, mme sebetso sa emisiwa." 
Numbers16:49 Jaana ba ba suleng ka sebetso e ne e le 14 700, kwa ntle ga ba ba suleng ka tiro ya ga Kora." 
Numbers16:50 Arone a boela kwa go Moše kwa mojakong wa mogope wa bophuthegelo, mme sebetso sa emisiwa." 
Numbers17:1 Jehofa a bua le Moše a re: 
Numbers17:2 “Bua le bana ba Iseraele, o tseye dithobane mo go bone, nngwe e nne ya kgotla nngwe le nngwe ya borraabo, mo dikgosaneng tsotlhe ka fa makgotleng a borraabo, dithobane di le 12, o kwale leina la motho mongwe le mongwe mo thobaneng ya gagwe." 
Numbers17:3 O kwale leina la ga Arone mo thobaneng ya ga Lefi, gonne go tlaa nna e le nngwe fela ya tlhogo nngwe le nngwe ya makgotla a borraabo." 
Numbers17:4 O di beye mo mogopeng wa bophuthegelo fa pele ga tshupo, kwa ke kopanelang nao gone." 
Numbers17:5 Motho yo ke mo itshenkelang, thobane ya gagwe e tlaa kukunya; mme ke tlaa khutlisa dingongorego tsa bana ba Iseraele mo go nna, tse ba di ngongoregang ka ga lona.”" 
Numbers17:6 Moše a bua le bana ba Iseraele, mme dikgosana tsotlhe tsa bone tsa mo naya dithobane, mongwe le mongwe e le nngwe fela, ka fa makgotleng a borraabo, e bong dithobane di le 12, thobane ya ga Arone e ne e le mo dithobaneng tsa bone." 
Numbers17:7 Moše a baya dithobane tsa bone fa pele ga Jehofa mo mogopeng wa tshupo. 
Numbers17:8 Ga dirala ya re ka moso Moše a ya mo mogopeng wa tshupo, a fitlhela thobane ya ga Arone ya ntlo ya ga Lefi e kukuntse, e thuntse ka dithunya, e bile e ungwile dithamane tse di buduleng." 
Numbers17:9 Dithobane tsotlhe Moše a di tsaya fa pele ga Jehofa, a di ntshetsa kwa baneng ba Iseraele botlhe; ba di leba, mme mongwe le mongwe a tsaya thobane ya gagwe." 
Numbers17:10 Jehofa a raya Moše a re: “Busetsa thobane ya ga Arone kwa pele ga tshupo, go ya go bolokwa teng, e le sesupo se se sekisang bana ba tsuololo, gore o khutlise dingongorego tsa bone ka ga me, gore ba tle ba se ka ba swa.”" 
Numbers17:11 Moše a dira jalo; a dira jaaka Jehofa a mo laotse. 
Numbers17:12 Bana ba Iseraele ba bua le Moše ba re: “Bona, re a swa, re fedile, re fedile rotlhe." 
Numbers17:13 Mongwe le mongwe yo o atamelang, yo o atamelang motlaagana wa ga Jehofa o a swa, a ke gore re tlaa swa rotlhe fela?”" 
Numbers18:1 Jehofa a raya Arone a re: “Wena le bomorwao, le ba kgotla ya ga rraago ba na nao, lo tlaa rwala tshiamologo ya felo ga boitshepo; mme wena le bomorwao nao lo tlaa rwala tshiamologo ya boperesiti jwa lona." 
Numbers18:2 Le bone bomonnao, e bong lotso lwa ga Lefi, lotso lwa ga rraago, o ba atametse nao gore ba kopanngwe nao, mme ba go direle; wena le bomorwao nao lo nne fa pele ga mogope wa tshupo." 
Numbers18:3 Mme a ba tshegetse tebelo ya gago le tebelo ya Mogope otlhe, fa e se gore ba se ka ba atamela dilwana tsa felo ga boitshepo le sebeso, gore ba se ka ba swa bone le lona." 
Numbers18:4 Ba kopanngwe nao, ba tshegetse tebelo ya mogope wa bophuthegelo ka ga tirelo yotlhe ya Mogope; moeng a se ka a atamela kwa go lona." 
Numbers18:5 Tebelo ya felo ga boitshepo lo tlaa e tshegetsa lotlhe, le tebelo ya sebeso, gore go se tlhole go nna bogale mo baneng ba Iseraele." 
Numbers18:6 Nna, bonang, ke tshotse bomonnaalona, e bong Balefi, mo baneng ba Iseraele, lo ba neilwe, e le mo go neilweng Jehofa, go tla ba dira tirelo ya mogope wa bophuthegelo." 
Numbers18:7 Wena le bomorwao nao lo tshegeletse sengwe le sengwe sa sebeso boperesiti jwa lona, le se se kwa teng ga sesiro; mme lo tlaa direla; ke lo naya boperesiti e le tirelo ya neo; mme moeng yo o atamelang a bolawe.”" 
Numbers18:8 Jehofa a bua le Arone a re: “Nna, ke go neile tebelo ya ditshupelo tsa me tsa tsholetso, e bong dilo tsotlhe tse di itshepileng tsa bana ba Iseraele, ke di neile wena ka ntlha ya tlolo, le bomorwao, e le tshiamelo ya bone ka bosakhutleng." 
Numbers18:9 Mo e tlaa nnang ga gago ga dilo tse di boitshepo jo bo itshepileng, mo go siilweng mo molelong ke mo: Seromololo sengwe le sengwe sa bone, e bong tshupelo nngwe le nngwe ya bone ya boupe, le tshupelo nngwe le nngwe ya bone e e fisiwang, le tshupelelo nngwe le nngwe ya bone ya molato, e ba tlaa e nkisetsang, e tlaa nna boitshepo jo bo itshepetseng wena le bomorwao." 
Numbers18:10 O tlaa ja ga tsone jaaka dilo tse di boitshepo jo bo itshepileng; lonna lotlhe lo tlaa ja ga tsone, go tlaa go itshepela." 
Numbers18:11 “Sa gago ke se, tshupelo ya tsholetso ya neo ya bone, e bong ditshupelo tsotlhe tsa mofoko tsa bana ba Iseraele; ke di neile wena, le bomorwao, le bomorwadio nao, e le tshiamelo ka bosakhutleng; mongwe le mongwe yo o itshekileng mo ntlong ya gago a je ga tsone." 
Numbers18:12 “Lookwane lo lontle bogolo, le mefine e mentle bogolo, le mabele, e bong mabutswapele a tse ba di nayang Jehofa, ke di go neile." 
Numbers18:13 Mabutswapele a loungo lotlhe lo lo mo lefatsheng la bone, a ba a leretseng Jehofa, a tlaa nna a gago; mongwe le mongwe yo o itshekileng mo ntlong ya gago a a di je." 
Numbers18:14 Sengwe le sengwe se se tshwaetsweng Jehofa mo Iseraele, e nne sa gago." 
Numbers18:15 Sengwe le sengwe se go itibolwang ka sone, sa nama yotlhe e ba e isetsang Jehofa, sa motho le sa kgomo, e nne sa gago; le fa go ntse jalo motsalwapele wa motho, ruri o mo rekolole; le setsalwapele sa ditshedi, tse di itshekologileng, o se rekolole." 
Numbers18:16 Tse di nang le go rekololwa mo go tsone, o simolole go di rekolola di le kgwedi e le nngwe fela mo go tsalweng, ka fa tshekatshekong ya gago, ka madi a dipapetlana tsa selefera di le tlhano, ka fa selekanyong sa felo ga boitshepo." 
Numbers18:17 Leitibolo la kgomo le leitibolo la nku le leitibolo la podi, o se ka wa a rekolola; a boitshepo; kgatsha madi a one mo sebesong, mme o fise mahura a one e le tshupelo e e dirwang ka molelo, ya monko o o monate mo go Jehofa." 
Numbers18:18 Nama ya one e nne ya gago, jaaka sehuba se se fokwang, le jaaka serope sa ka fa tsogong le legolo, e nne tsa gago." 
Numbers18:19 Ditshupelo tsa tsholetso tsotlhe tsa dilo tse di itshepileng, tse bana ba Iseraele ba di isetsang Jehofa, ke di neile wena, le bomorwao le bomorwadio nao; e le tshiamelo ka bosakhutleng; ke kgolagano ya letswai ka bosakhutleng fa pele ga Jehofa, go wena le losika lwa gago nao.”" 
Numbers18:20 Jehofa a raya Arone, a re: “O se ka wa rua boswa bope mo lefatsheng la bone, le gone o se ka wa nna le kabelo epe mo go bone. Ke nna kabelo ya gago, le boswa jwa gago, mo baneng ba Iseraele." 
Numbers18:21 “Bana ba ga Lefi bone ke ba neile tsotlhe tsa bosome mo Iseraele go nna boswa jwa bone, go emela tirelo e ba e direlang, e bong tirelo ya mogope wa bophuthegelo." 
Numbers18:22 Go tloga fano a bana ba Iseraele ba se tlhole ba atamela mogope wa bophuthegelo, gore ba se ka ba rwala boleo, mme ba swa." 
Numbers18:23 Mme Balefi ba dire tirelo ya mogope wa bophuthegelo, ba rwale tshiamologo ya bone; a e nne molao ka bosakhutleng go ya le dikokomana tsotlhe tsa lona, mo baneng ba Iseraele ba se ka ba nna le boswa bope;" 
Numbers18:24 gonne tsa bosome tsa bana ba Iseraele tse ba di isetsang Jehofa tshupelo ya tsholetso, ke di neile Balefi go nna boswa; ke gone ka moo ke ba reileng ka re, mo baneng ba Iseraele ba se ka ba dira le boswa bope.”" 
Numbers18:25 Jehofa a bua le Moše a re: 
Numbers18:26 “Gape, bua le Balefi, o ba reye o re: E ne e re mogang lo tsayang mo baneng ba Iseraele tsa bosome tse ke di lo neileng di tswa mo go bone gore e nne boswa jwa lona, foo lo tlaa isa ga tsone tshupelo ya tsholetso mo go Jehofa, sa bosome sa tsa bosome." 
Numbers18:27 Tshupelo ya lona ya tsholetso lo tlaa e balelwa jaaka ekete ke mabele a sebupi sa pholelo, le jaaka botlalo jwa kgatisetso ya bojalwa jwa mofine." 
Numbers18:28 Le lona lo isetse Jehofa tshupelo ya tsholetso e le ya tsa bosome tsotlhe tsa lona tse lo di amogelang mo baneng ba Iseraele; ga tsone lo neye Arone moperesiti tshupelo ya tsholetso ya ga Jehofa. 
Numbers18:29 Ga dineo tsa lona tsotlhe lo ise tshupelo nngwe le nngwe ya ga Jehofa ya tsholetso, ga mo go gontle bogolo mo go tsone, e bong mo go itshepileng ga tsone." 
Numbers18:30 Ke gone o ba reye o re: Mogang lo tsholetsang mo go gontle bogolo, foo go balelwe Balefi jaaka totafalo ya sebupi sa pholelo, le jaaka totafalo ya kgatisetso ya bojalwa jwa mofine." 
Numbers18:31 Lo tlaa se ja mo felong gongwe le gongwe, lona le ba matlo a lona, gonne ke tuelo ya lona e e emelang tirelo ya lona mo mogopeng wa bophuthegelo." 
Numbers18:32 Lo tlaa bo lo sa rwale boleo bope ka ga sone, fa lo sena go tsholetsa mo go gontle bogolo ga sone; lo tlaa bo lo sa tlhapatse dilo tse di itshepileng tsa bana ba Iseraele, gore lo se swe.”" 
Numbers19:1 Jehofa a bua le Moše le Arone, a re:" 
Numbers19:2 “Mo ke gone mo go tlhomilweng ga molao o Jehofa o o laotseng a re: Bua le bana ba Iseraele gore ba go leretse kgomo ya moroba e khunwana e e itekanetseng, e go se nang bogole mo go yone, le e go iseng go bewe jokwe mo go yone." 
Numbers19:3 Lo e neye Eleasare moperesiti, ene a e ise kwa ntle ga bothibelelo, mme a mongwe a e tlhabe fa pele ga matlho a gagwe." 
Numbers19:4 Eleasare moperesiti, a tseye ga madi a yone ka monwana, mme madi a yone a a kgatšhetse gasupa kwa ntlheng ya fa pele ga mogope wa bophuthegelo." 
Numbers19:5 Mongwe a fise kgomo eo ya moroba mo ponong ya gagwe; a fise letlalo la yone le nama ya yone, le madi a yone, le moswang wa yone." 
Numbers19:6 Moperesiti a tseye logong lwa mosetara, le mosiama, le bohibidu jo bo letlhololo, a di latlhele mo gare ga phiso ya kgomo ya moroba." 
Numbers19:7 Foo moperesiti a tlhatswe diaparo tsa gagwe, a itlhapise mmele ka metsi, morago ga mo a tsene mo bothibelelong, mme moperesiti o tlaa bo a itshekologile go ya maitseboeng." 
Numbers19:8 Le yo o fisang kgomo a tlhatswe diaparo tsa gagwe ka metsi, a a itlhapise mmele ka metsi, mme o tlaa bo a itshekologile go ya maitseboeng." 
Numbers19:9 A motho mongwe yo o itshekileng a ole molora wa kgomo ya moroba a o beye kwa ntle ga bothibelelo felong gongwe fa gontle; o bolokelwe phuthego ya bana ba Iseraele go dira metsi a tomololo; ke tshupelelo ya boleo. 
Numbers19:10 Yo o olang molora wa kgomo ya moroba a a tlhatswe diaparo tsa gagwe, o tlaa bo a itshekologile go ya maitseboeng; mme mo baneng ba Iseraele, le mo moennyeng yo o jakileng mo go bone, e nne molao ka bosakhutleng." 
Numbers19:11 “Yo o amang setoto sa motho a a itshekologe ka malatsi a supa. 
Numbers19:12 Ene yoo a a iitshepise ka one ka letsatsi la boraro, ka letsatsi la bosupa a nne boitsheko; fa a ne a se ka a iitshekisa ka letsatsi la boraro, foo o tlaa bo a se boitsheko ka letsatsi la bosupa." 
Numbers19:13 Le fa e le mang yo o amang setoto sa moswi le fa e ka bo e le mang yo o suleng, mme a se ka a iitshekisa, o itshekolola motlaagana wa ga Jehofa; motho yoo, a a kgaolwe mo Iseraele; a nne boitshekologo ka gonne metsi a tomololo a se ka a kgatšhiwa mo go ene; boitshekologo jwa gagwe bo sa ntse bo le mo go ene." 
Numbers19:14 “O ke one molao fa motho a swela mo mogopeng: Mongwe le mongwe yo o tsenang mo mogopeng, le mongwe le mongwe yo o mo mogopeng, a nne a itshekologile ka malatsi a supa." 
Numbers19:15 Le sejana sengwe le sengwe se se sa khurumelwang, se se se nang sekhurumelo se bofeletswe mo go sone, se itshekologile." 
Numbers19:16 Le fa e le mang mo nageng yo o amang mongwe yo o bolailweng ka tšhaka, le fa e le setoto, kgotsa lesapo la motho, kgotsa phupu, a a itshekologe ka malatsi a supa." 
Numbers19:17 “Ka ga motho yo o itshekologileng a ba mo tseele molora wa molelo wa tshupelelo ya boleo, mme metsi a a elang a thelwe mo go one mo sejaneng." 
Numbers19:18 A motho yo o itshekileng a tseye mosiama, a o ine mo metsing, a a kgatšhe mo mogopeng, le mo dijaneng tsotlhe, le mo bathong ba ba neng ba le gona, le mo go ene yo o ne a ama lesapo, kgotsa motho yo o bolailweng kgotsa, moswi kgotsa, phupu." 
Numbers19:19 A motho yo o itshekileng a kgatšhe yo o itshekologileng ka letsatsi la boraro, le ka letsatsi la bosupa; e re ka letsatsi la bosupa a mo itshekise; a tlhatswe diaparo tsa gagwe, a tlhape mo metsing, mme maitseboa o tlaa nna boitsheko." 
Numbers19:20 “Mme motho yo o itshekologileng fa a gana go iitshekisa, mowa oo a o kgaolwe o tswe mo gare ga phuthego, ka a itshekolotse ntlo e e botshepo ya ga Jehofa; metsi a tomololo ga a kgatšhiwa mo go ene, o itshekologile." 
Numbers19:21 A e nne molao o o sa khutleng mo go bone, yo o kgatšhang ka metsi a tomololo a a tlhatswe diaparo tsa gagwe, le yo o amang metsi a tomololo o tlaa itshekologa go ya maitseboeng." 
Numbers19:22 Le fa e le eng se motho yo o itshekologileng o se amang se tlaa itshekologa, le motho yo o se amang o tlaa itshekologa go ya maitseboeng.”" 
Numbers20:1 Ka kgwedi ya ntlha phuthego yotlhe ya bana ba Iseraele, ya fitlha kwa sekakeng sa Tsine, mme batho ba nna mo Kateše; Miriame a swela teng a ba a fitlhwa teng." 
Numbers20:2 Phuthego ya bo e se na metsi; mme ba phuthegela Moše le Arone. 
Numbers20:3 Batho ba ganela le Moše, ba bua ba re: “A bo Modimo o ka bo o mmile ra swa jale ka bagarona ba swela fa pele ga Jehofa." 
Numbers20:4 E bile lo lereditseng phuthego ya ga Jehofa mo nageng e, fa e bo ne ne re swela fano, rona le dikgomo tsa rona?" 
Numbers20:5 Lo re patikile ka ntlha yang go tlhatloga kwa Egepeto go re lere mo felong fano fa go bosula? Ga se felo ga dipeo, le fa e le ga difeige, le fa e le ga mafine, le fa e le digaranata, le gone ga go na metsi a a nowang.”" 
Numbers20:6 Moše le Arone ba tswa fa pele ga phuthego ba ya fa pele ga mojako wa mogope wa bophuthegelo, ba wela fa fatshe ka difatlhogo; mme kgalalelo ya ga Jehofa ya ba bonalela." 
Numbers20:7 Jehofa a bua le Moše a re: 
Numbers20:8 “Tsaya thobane o phuthe phuthego, wena le Arone mogoloo, lo bue le lefika fa pele ga matlho a bone, gore le ntshe metsi a lone; mme o tlaa ntshetsa metsi kwa go bone, a tswa mo lefikaeng; jalo o tlaa nosa phuthego le dikgomo tsa bone metsi.”" 
Numbers20:9 Moše a tsaya thobane fa pele ga Jehofa, a e tsaya jaaka a mo laetse." 
Numbers20:10 Moše le Arone ba phuthela phuthego fa pele ga lefika, mme ene a ba raya, a re: “Utlwang jaana, batsuolodi ke lona, a re tlaa lo ntshetsa metsi mo lefikeng le?”" 
Numbers20:11 Moše a tsholetsa letsogo, a itaya lefika ka thobane ya gagwe gabedi; metsi a tswa a le matona thata, mme phuthego ya nwa, le dikgomo tsa bone." 
Numbers20:12 Jehofa a raya Moše le Arone a re: “E re ka lo se ka lwa ntumela go intshepisa fa pele ga matlho a bana ba Iseraele, ke gone lo se ketlang lo fitlhisa phuthego e mo lefatsheng le ke le ba neileng.”" 
Numbers20:13 Ke one metsi a Meriba, kwa bana ba Iseraele ba neng ba ganela le Jehofa mme a itshupa a le boitshepo mo go bone." 
Numbers20:14 Moše a roma barongwa ba tswa mo Kateše ba ya kwa kgosing ya Etome, a re: “Morwa rraago, e bong Iseraele, o bua jaana a re: O a e itse tapisego yotlhe e e re wetseng," 
Numbers20:15 jaaka borraetsho ba kile ba fologela kwa Egepeto, mme ra aga mo Egepeto ka lobaka lo loleele, Baegepeto ba re direla maswe, rona le borraetsho;" 
Numbers20:16 e rile re goela kwa go Jehofa a utlwa lentswe la rona, a roma moengele a re ntsha mo Egepeto; bona, re mo Kateše motse o o kwano bokhutlong jwa molelwane wa gago." 
Numbers20:17 Ke a rapela, mma re fete, re ralale lefatshe la gago; ga re ketla re ralala lotlhagare le fa e le tshimo ya mafine, le gone ga re ketla re nwa metsi a didiba; re tlaa feta ka tsela e kgolo ya kgosi fela, ga re ketla re fapogela ka fa ntlheng ya le legolo, le fa e le ka fa go la molema, go tsamaye re fapaanye molelwane wa gago.”" 
Numbers20:18 Etome a mo raya a re: “O se ka wa nthalala, nka tla ka go bololela ka tšhaka.”" 
Numbers20:19 Bana ba Iseraele ba mo raya ba re: “Re tlaa tlhatloga ka tsela e kgolo fela, mme fa re nwa metsi a gago, nna le dikgomo tsa me, foo ke tlaa go naya madi a one; ntesa fela ke ralale ka dinao, ke sa dire sepe se sele.”" 
Numbers20:20 Mme a re: “O se ka wa ralala.” Mme Etome a mmololela ka batho ba le bantsi, le ka letsogo le le thata." 
Numbers20:21 Jalo Etome a gana go naya Iseraele tsela go ralala molelwane wa gagwe; foo Iseraele a mo fapoga. 
Numbers20:22 Ba tloga ba tswa mo Kateše; mme bana ba Iseraele, e bong phuthego yotlhe ya fitlha fa thabeng ya Hore." 
Numbers20:23 Jehofa a bua la Moše le Arone mo thabeng ya Hore, fa molelwaneng wa Etome a re:" 
Numbers20:24 “Arone o tlaa kopanngwa le ba ga gabo, gonne ga a ketla a tsena mo lefatsheng le ke le neileng bana ba Iseraele, ka lo ne lwa tsuololela lefoko la me kwa metsing a Meriba." 
Numbers20:25 Tsaya Arone le Eleasare morwawe, o ba tlhatlose mo thabeng ya Hore;" 
Numbers20:26 o apole Arone diaparo tsa gagwe, o di apese Eleasare morwawe; Arone o tlaa kopanngwa le ba ga gabo, a bo a swela gone.”" 
Numbers20:27 Moše a dira jaaka Jehofa a laotse; ba palama thaba ya Hore mo ponong ya phuthego yotlhe. 
Numbers20:28 Moše a apola Arone diaparo tsa gagwe, a di apesa Eleasare morwawe; Arone a swela teng mo godimo ga thaba; Moše le Eleasare ba fologa mo thabeng." 
Numbers20:29 E rile phuthego yotlhe e bona fa Arone a sule, ba lelela Arone ka malatsi a le 30, e bong makgotla otlhe a Iseraele." 
Numbers21:1 Mme Mokanana, kgosi ya Arate yo o neng a agile ntlheng ya borwa, a utlwa go twe Iseraele o tla ka tsela ya Atharime; a tlhabana le Iseraele, a tshwara bangwe ba bone." 
Numbers21:2 Iseraele a ikanela Jehofa ka ikano, a re: “Fa ruri o tlaa ntsenya tšhaba e mo seatleng, foo metse ya bone ke tlaa e senyetsa ruri.”" 
Numbers21:3 Jehofa a reetsa lentswe la Iseraele, a ba neela Bakanana; ba ba senyetsa ruri le metse ya bone; leina la felo foo la bidiwa ga twe, Horema." 
Numbers21:4 Ba tloga ba tswa fa thabeng ya Hore ka tsela e e yang Lewatleng le Lehibidu, go potologa lefatshe la Etome; mowa wa batho wa ngodiega thata ka ntlha ya tsela." 
Numbers21:5 Batho ba kgobotla Modimo le Moše, ba re: “Lo re tlhatloseditseng kwa Egepeto re tla go swela mo nageng? Gonne ga go na dijo, ga go na metsi; mowa wa rona o nkgelwa sebodu ke dijo tse di motlhofo tse.”" 
Numbers21:6 Jehofa a roma dinoga tse di bolayang mo go bone, mme tsa loma batho ba Iseraele ba swa ba le bantsi." 
Numbers21:7 Batho ba ya kwa go Moše ba re: “Re leofile, ka re buile ka go kgobotla Jehofa le wena; rapela Jehofa gore a tlose dinoga mo go rona.” Moše, a rapelela batho." 
Numbers21:8 Jehofa a raya Moše, a re: “Itirele noga ya kgotlho o e pege mo mokgorong; go tlaa dirafala gore mongwe le mongwe yo o lomilweng, o tlaa re a e bona a tshele.”" 
Numbers21:9 Moše a dira noga ya kgotlho, a e pega mo mokgorong, ga dirala e ne e re fa noga e lomile motho mongwe, e re a leba noga ya kgotlho a tshele." 
Numbers21:10 Bana ba Iseraele ba tsamaya, ba ya ba thibelela mo Obothe." 
Numbers21:11 Ba tloga ba tswa Obothe, ba thibelela kwa Iye-abarime, mo nageng e e fa pele ga Moabe, ntlheng ya botlhabatsatsi." 
Numbers21:12 Ba tloga ba tswa teng, ba thibelela mo molapong wa Serete." 
Numbers21:13 Ba tloga ba tswa gone, ba tlhoma kwa moseja ga Arenone o o mo nageng e e tswang mo molelwaneng wa Baamore, gonne Arenone ke molelwane wa Moabe, fa gare ga Moabe le Baamore." 
Numbers21:14 Ke gone ka fa go builweng ka gone mo lokwalong lwa Dintwa tsa ga Jehofa, ga twe: “Wahebe mo Sufa, le melapo ya Arenone," 
Numbers21:15 le kinamelo ya melapo e e lebang kwa bonnong jwa Are, e ikamile molelwane wa Moabe.”" 
Numbers21:16 Go tloga foo ba ya kwa Beere; ke sone sediba se Jehofa o buileng le Moše ka ga sone, a re: “Phutha batho, mme ke tlaa ba naya metsi.”" 
Numbers21:17 Foo Iseraele a opela sehela se, a re: “Biloga wena sediba! Lo se opeleleng!" 
Numbers21:18 Sediba se dikgosana di se epileng, se bagolwane ba batho ba se phuntseng ka thobane ya bogosi le ka dikepu tsa bone.” Go tswa nageng eo ba ya kwa Matana;" 
Numbers21:19 go tswa Matana ba ya kwa Nahaliele; go tswa kwa Nahaliele ba ya kwa Bamothe; 
Numbers21:20 go tswa Bamothe ba ya kwa molapong o o mo nageng ya Moabe go ya kwa tlhoreng ya Pisega, o o okameng sekaka." 
Numbers21:21 Iseraele a roma barongwa kwa go Sihone kgosi ya Baamore, a re:" 
Numbers21:22 “Mma ke ralale lefatshe la gago; ga re ketla re fapogela mo lotlhagareng kgotsa mo tshimong ya mafine; ga re ketla re nwa metsi a didiba; re tlaa feta ka tsela e kgolo ya kgosi go tsamaya re fapaanya molelwane wa gago.” 
Numbers21:23 Mme Sihone a gana go leseletsa Iseraele go tlola molelwane wa gagwe. Sihone a phutha batho ba gagwe botlhe, a bololela Iseraele kwa nageng, ba fitlha kwa Jahase, mme a tlhabana le Iseraele." 
Numbers21:24 Iseraele a mo kgemetha ka bogale jwa tšhaka, a rua lefatshe la gagwe go tswa Arenone go ya Jaboke, e bong kwa go bana ba ga Amone, gonne molelwane wa bana ba ga Amone o ne o le thata." 
Numbers21:25 Iseraele a thopa metse eo yotlhe, mme Iseraele a thopa metse eo yotlhe, mme Iseraele a aga mo metseng yotlhe ya Baamore, mo Hešebone le mo metseng yotlhe ya teng." 
Numbers21:26 Gonne Hešebone e ne e le motse wa ga Sihone kgosi ya Baamore, yo o ne a tlhabanye le kgosi ya Moabe ya pele, mme a mo tseetse lefatshe la gagwe lotlhe fela, e bong go ya kwa Arenone." 
Numbers21:27 Ke gone ka moo, ba ba tlhabang diane ba tle ba re: “Tlang mo Hešebone, a motse wa ga Sihone o agiwe o tlhomamisiwe:" 
Numbers21:28 Gonne go dule molelo mo Hešebone, le kgabo ya molelo mo motseng wa ga Sihone; o laitse Are wa Moabe, barena ba mafelo a godimo a Arenone." 
Numbers21:29 A bo go latlhega wena Moabe; lo nyeleditswe lona batho ba ga Kemoše: o ntshitse bomorwawe jaaka bafaladi, le bomorwadie o ba neetse mo botshwarong ba ya kwa go Sihone kgosi ya Baamore." 
Numbers21:30 Re ba hudile, Hešebone o senyegile go ya kwa Dibone, re swafaditse lefatshe go ya kwa Nofa, o o fitlhang kwa Meteba.”" 
Numbers21:31 Jalo Iseraele a aga mo lefatsheng la Baamore. 
Numbers21:32 Moše a roma a ya go tlhola Jasere, mme ba thopa metse ya gone, ba leleka Baamore ba teng." 
Numbers21:33 Ba menoga, ba tlhatloga ka tsela ya Bašane; Oge kgosi ya Bašane a ba bololela, ene le batho botlhe ba gagwe, ba tlhabana nabo kwa Eterei." 
Numbers21:34 Mme Jehofa a raya Moše a re: “O se ka wa mmoifa, gonne ke mo tsentse mo seatleng sa gago, le batho botlhe ba gagwe, le lefatshe la gagwe; o tlaa mo direla jaaka o diretse Sihone kgosi ya Baamore yo o neng a agile mo Hešebone.”" 
Numbers21:35 Jalo ba mo kgemetha, ene le bomorwawe le batho ba gagwe botlhe fela, a ba a tla a se ka a salelwa ke ope; mme ba rua lefatshe la gagwe." 
Numbers22:1 Bana ba Iseraele ba tloga, ba tlhaolela mo dipaleng tsa Moabe, kwa moseja ga Joretane fa tlase ga Jeriko." 
Numbers22:2 Balake morwa Sipore a bona gotlhe mo Iseraele o go diretseng Baamore. 
Numbers22:3 Moabe a boifa batho bao thata, ka ba le bantsi; mme Moabe a pitlagana ka ntlha ya bana ba Iseraele." 
Numbers22:4 Moabe a raya bagolwane ba Midiane, a re: “Jaanong bontsi jo bo tlaa lakaila gotlhe mo go mo tikologong ya rona, jaaka kgomo e tle e lakaile bojang jwa naga.” Balake morwa Sipore e ne e le ene kgosi ya Moabe ka lobaka loo." 
Numbers22:5 Mme a roma barongwa kwa go Balaame morwa Beore, kwa Pethore, o o fa Nokeng, kwa lefatsheng la bana ba batho ba ga gabo, ba ya go mmitsa, ba re: “Bona, go na le batho ba ba tswang kwa Egepeto; bona, ba khurumeditse lefatshe, ba ntse bolebagana le nna;" 
Numbers22:6 ke a go rapela, o tlo o tle jaana, o mphutsetse batho ba, gonne ba nonofile bobe bogolo go nna, e tlaa re gongwe ke ba fenye, ke ba kgemethe, ke ba leleke mo lefatsheng, gonne ke a itse go re yo o mo segofatsang o segofetse, mme yo o mo hutsang o hutsegile.”" 
Numbers22:7 Bagolwane ba Moabe le bagolwane ba Midiane ba tsamaya ba tshotse tuelo ya go laola ka bola, mme ba ya ba fitlha kwa go Balaame, ba bua nae mafoko a ga Balake." 
Numbers22:8 A ba raya a re: “Lalang mono bosigo jono, ke tlaa ba ke lo leretse lefoko gape jaaka Jehofa a tlaa bua le nna; mme dikgosana tsa Moabe tsa nna kwa go Balaame.”" 
Numbers22:9 Modimo wa tla kwa go Balaame wa re: “Batho ba o nang nabo ke bomang?” 
Numbers22:10 Balaame a raya Modimo a re: “Balake morwa Sipore kgosi ya Moabe, o romile batho kwa go nna a re:" 
Numbers22:11 ‘Bona, batho ba ba tswang Egepeto ba khurumeditse lefatshe; jaana ntlo o ba mphutsetse, e tlaa re gongwe ke nonofele go tlhabana nabo le go ba leleka.’ ”" 
Numbers22:12 Modimo wa raya Balaame wa re: “O se ka wa ya nabo; o se ka wa hutsa batho bao, gonne ba segofetse.”" 
Numbers22:13 Balaame a tsoga mo mosong, mme a raya dikgosana tsa ga Balake a re: “Tlogang lo yeng lefatsheng la ga lona; gonne Modimo o ganne go nnaya tsela go ya le lona.”" 
Numbers22:14 Dikgosana tsa Moabe tsa nanoga tsa tla kwa go Balake tsa re: “Balaame o ganne go tla le rona.” 
Numbers22:15 Balake a fela a roma dikgosana gape di le dintsi, e le tse di tlotlegang bogolo go tsele." 
Numbers22:16 Tsa fitlha kwa go Balaame tsa mo raya tsa re: “Balake morwa Sipore o bua jaana a re: ‘A ko o se kgorelediwe ke sepe go tla kwano go nna," 
Numbers22:17 gonne ke tlaa go godisetsa kwa tlotlong e kgolo; le fa e le eng se o tlaa se buang le nna ke tlaa se dira; a ko o tle fela, o mphutsetse batho ba.’ ”" 
Numbers22:18 Balaame a ba fetola, a raya batlhanka ba ga Balake, a re: “Le fa Balake a ka nnaya ntlo ya gagwe e tletse selefera le gouta, ga nkake ka tlola lefoko la ga Jehofa Modimo wa me, ka ya go dira se se le tlhaelang kgotsa se se le fetang." 
Numbers22:19 Jaana ke a lo rapela, lo bo lo lale mono, gore ke tle ke itse se Jehofa o tlaa felang a se bua le nna.”" 
Numbers22:20 Modimo wa tla kwa go Balaame bosigo wa mo raya wa re: “E tlaa re fa banna bao ba tsile go go bitsa, o nanoge o ye nabo, mme lefoko le ke tlaa le buang nao, ke lone losi le o tlaa le dirang.”" 
Numbers22:21 Balaame a tsoga ka moso a belesa esela ya gagwe, a tsamaya le dikgosana tsa Moabe." 
Numbers22:22 Bogale jwa Modimo jwa tuka ka a tsamaile; moengele wa ga Jehofa a ikemisa mo tseleng go nna moganetsi wa gagwe. A bo a palame esela ya gagwe, le batlhanka ba gagwe ba le babedi a bile a na nabo." 
Numbers22:23 Esela ya bona moengele wa ga Jehofa a eme mo tseleng, a tshotse tšhaka a e ekile; esela ya fapoga tsela ya tsena mo lotlhagareng; mme Balaame a ubula esela go e busetsa mo tseleng." 
Numbers22:24 Foo moengele wa ga Jehofa a ema mo tseleng e e khuti fa gare ga masimo a mafine, go le logora ka fa ntlheng nngwe, le logora ka fa ntlheng e nngwe." 
Numbers22:25 Esela ya bona moengele wa ga Jehofa, ya ipatikela mo lorakong, ya utlwisa lonao lwa ga Balaame botlhoko ka lorako; mme a e ubula gape." 
Numbers22:26 Moengele wa ga Jehofa a ya fa pele, a fitlha a ema fa go pitlaganyeng, fa go se nang fa go ka fapogelwang gone ka fa ntlheng ya le legolo kgotsa ya la molema." 
Numbers22:27 Esela ya bona moengele wa ga Jehofa, mme ya robala Balaame a e palame, mme bogale jwa ga Balaame jwa tuka, a ubula esela ka thobane ya gagwe." 
Numbers22:28 Jehofa a tumolola molomo wa esela, ya raya Balaame ya re: “Ke go diretseng fa e bo ne ne o nkubutse gararo jaana?”" 
Numbers22:29 Balaame a raya esela a re: “Ke ka gonne o ntshotlile, ke rata ke bo ke tshotse tšhaka, gonne jaana nkabo ke go bolaile.”" 
Numbers22:30 Esela ya raya Balaame, ya re: “A ga ke esela ya gago e o ntseng o mpalama ka malatsi otlhe a botshelo jwa gago, nako e sa ntse e le eno? A ke tlwaetse go go direla jaana?” Mme a re: “Nnya.”" 
Numbers22:31 Foo Jehofa a budulola matlho a ga Balaame, mme a bona moengele wa ga Jehofa a eme mo tseleng, a tshotse tšhaka a e ekile; a ikoba tlhogo, a wela fa fatshe." 
Numbers22:32 Moengele wa ga Jehofa a mo raya a re: “Ana o ubutse esela ya gago gararo jaana ka ntlha yang? Bona ke tswetse kwano go nna moganetsi, gonne tsela ya gago e kgopo fa pele ga me." 
Numbers22:33 Esela ya re e mpona ya fapoga gararo fa pele ga me; fa e ka bo e se ka ya mphapoga, ruri nka bo ne ne fano ke bolaile wena, ka rekegela yone.”" 
Numbers22:34 Balaame a raya moengele wa ga Jehofa a re: “Ke leofile, gonne ga ke a ka ka itse fa o eme mo tseleng go nkganela, jaana ka re fa go sa go itumedise, ke tlaa boela kwa morago kwa gae.”" 
Numbers22:35 Moengele wa ga Jehofa a raya Balaame a re: “Ya le banna bao; lefoko le ke tlaa le buang nao ke lone losi le o tlaa le buang.” Balaame a ya le dikgosana tsa ga Balake. 
Numbers22:36 E rile Balake a utlwa fa Balaame a tsile, a tswa a ya go mo kgatlhantsha kwa motseng wa Moabe o o fa molelwaneng wa Arenone, fela kwa bokhutlong jwa molelwane." 
Numbers22:37 Balake a raya Balaame a re: “A ga ke a roma ka tlhoafalo ka ya go go bitsa? O ne o sa tleleng kwa go nna? A ruri ga ke a nonofa go go godisetsa kwa tlotlong?” 
Numbers22:38 Balaame a raya Balake a re: “Bona, ke tsile kwano go wena; a jaana ke na le thata nngwe go bua sengwe? Lefoko le Modimo o le tsenyang mo molomong wa me, ke lone le ke tlaa le buang.”" 
Numbers22:39 Balaame a ya le Balake, ba fitlha kwa Kiriathe-Husothe." 
Numbers22:40 Balake a tlhaba dikgomo le dinku ditlhabelo, a roma kwa go Balaame, le kwa dikgosaneng tse o nang natso." 
Numbers22:41 Ga dirala ya re ka moso, Balake a tsaya Balaame, a mo isa kwa mafelong a a tlotlometseng a ga Baale, mme a re a le foo a bona ntlha ya sekhutlo sa batho bale." 
Numbers23:1 Balaame a raya Balake, a re: “Nkagela fano dibeso di supa, o mpaakanyetse fano dikgongwana di supa, le diphelefu di supa.”" 
Numbers23:2 Balake a dira jaaka Balaame a buile; Balake le Balaame ba isa kgongwana le phelefu tshupelo mo sebesong sengwe le sengwe. 
Numbers23:3 Balaame a raya Balake a re: “Ema fa tshupelong ya gago e e fisiwang, nna ke tlaa tsamaya; e tlaa re gongwe Jehofa a tle go kopana le nna; le fa e le eng se o se ntshupetsang ke tlaa se go bolelela.” Mme a palama thota e e lobala fela." 
Numbers23:4 Modimo wa kopana le Balaame, mme a o raya a re: “Ke baakantse dibeso di supa, ke isitse kgongwana le phelefu tshupelo mo sebesong sengwe le sengwe.”" 
Numbers23:5 Jehofa a tsenya lefoko mo molomong wa ga Balaame, a re: “Boela kwa go Balake, o bue nae jaana.”" 
Numbers23:6 A boela kwa go ene, a fitlhela a eme fa tshupelong ya gagwe e e fisiwang, ene le dikgosana tsotlhe tsa Moabe." 
Numbers23:7 A bua ka setshwantsho sa gagwe a re: “Balake a tswa go ntsaya kwa Arame; kgosi ya Moabe e ntshotse kwa dithabeng tsa botlhabatsatsi, a re: ‘Ntlo, o mphutsetse Jakobe, ntlo, o bopele Iseraele.’" 
Numbers23:8 Ke tlaa hutsa jang ene yo Modimo o sa mo hutsang? Ke tlaa bopela jang ene yo Jehofa a sa mmopelang? 
Numbers23:9 Gonne ke a mmona ke le mo godimo ga mafika, ke le mo godimo ga dithota ke mo lebile; bona, ke tšhaba e e agileng e le yosi, mme ga e ketla e balelwa mo merafeng." 
Numbers23:10 E mang yo o ka balang lorole lwa ga Jakobe, kgotsa a bolela palo ya kgaogano ya bone ya Iseraele? A ke swe loso lwa mosiami, mme bokhutlo jwa me bo nne jaaka jwa gagwe!”" 
Numbers23:11 Balake a raya Balaame a re: “O ntiretseng? Ka go tsaya, ka re o tle o mphutsetse baba ba me, mme bona o ba segofaditse gotlhe fela.”" 
Numbers23:12 A mo fetola a re: “A ga ke a na le go tlhokomela go bua fela se Jehofa o se ntsenyang mo molomong?” 
Numbers23:13 Balake a mo raya, a re: “A ko o ye le nna, re ye kwa felong go sele, kwa o tlaa ba bonang o le teng; o tlaa bona sekhutlo sa bone fela, ga o ketla o ba bona botlhe; o tle o ba mphutsetse o le gone foo.”" 
Numbers23:14 A mo isa kwa setlhabeng sa Sofime, kwa tlhoreng ya Pisega, a aga dibeso di supa teng, a isa kgongwana le phelefu tshupelo mo sebesong sengwe le sengwe." 
Numbers23:15 A raya Balake, a re: “Ema fano fa tshupelong ya gago e e fisiwang, ka ke sa ya go kopana le Jehofa fale.”" 
Numbers23:16 Jehofa a kopana le Balaame, a tsenya lefoko mo molomong wa gagwe, a re: “Boela kwa go Balake, o bue jaana.”" 
Numbers23:17 A tla kwa go ene, a fitlhela a eme fa tshupelong ya gagwe e e fisiwang, le dikgosana tsa Moabe di na nae. Balake a mo raya a re: “Jehofa o buileng?”" 
Numbers23:18 A bua ka setshwantsho sa gagwe a re: “Ema Balake o utlwe, o ntheetse wena morwa Sipore:" 
Numbers23:19 Modimo ga se motho yo o ka akang, le gone ga se morwa motho yo o ka ikwatlhayang; kgotsa, a o buile, mme a ga o ketla o se dira? Kgotsa a o ntshitse lentswe, ga o ketla o le tlhomamisa?" 
Numbers23:20 Bona, ke neilwe taolo ya gore ke segofatse; one o segofaditse, mme nna ga nkake ka fetola." 
Numbers23:21 Ga o a bona boikepo mo go Jakobe le gone ga o a bona bokgopo mo go Iseraele; Jehofa Modimo wa gagwe o na nae, lošalaba lwa kgosi lo mo go bone." 
Numbers23:22 Modimo o ba ntsha mo Egepeto; o na le thata ekete ya nare. 
Numbers23:23 Ruri Jakobe ga a na mereo, Iseraele ga a na ditaola; jaanong go tlaa buiwa ka ga Jakobe le Iseraele go twe: ‘Ana Modimo o dirileng!’" 
Numbers23:24 Bona, tšhaba e, e nanoga jaaka tau e namagadi, le jaaka tau e tona, e ikgogomosa jalo; ga e ketla e robala e ise e je thopo, e ise e nwe madi a ba ba bolailweng.”" 
Numbers23:25 Balake a raya Balaame, a re: “O se ka wa ba hutsa gope, le gone o se ka wa ba segofatsa gope.”" 
Numbers23:26 Balaame a fetola a raya Balake, a re: “A ga ke a go bolelela ka re: Gotlhe mo Jehofa o go buang, ke na le go go dira fela?”" 
Numbers23:27 Balake a raya Balaame, a re: “Ntlo, ke tlaa go isa kwa felong go sele, e tlaa re gongwe go kgatlhe Modimo gore o ba mphutsetse o le gone foo.”" 
Numbers23:28 Balake a isa Balaame kwa tlhoreng ya Peore e e okameng sekaka. 
Numbers23:29 Balaame a raya Balake, a re: “Nkagela fano dibeso di supa, o mpaakanyetse fano dikgongwana di supa le diphelefu di supa.”" 
Numbers23:30 Balake a dira jaaka Balaame a buile, a isa kgongwana le phelefu tshupelo mo sebesong sengwe le sengwe." 
Numbers24:1 E rile Balaame a bona fa go kgatlhile Jehofa go segofatsa Iseraele, ga a ka a ya go kopana le mereo jaaka ka metlha e mengwe, mme a leba fela kwa nageng." 
Numbers24:2 Balaame a tsholetsa matlho, a bona Baiseraele ba ntse ka fa ditsong tsa bone, mme mowa wa Modimo wa tla mo go ene." 
Numbers24:3 A bua ka setshwantsho sa gagwe, a re: “Balaame morwa Beore, a re: Monna yo leitlho la gagwe le ne le buduletse, a re:" 
Numbers24:4 Go bua ene yo o utlwang mafoko a Modimo, yo o bonang ponatshego ya Mothatayotlhe, ka a wela fa fatshe mme a budulogile matlho a re:" 
Numbers24:5 A bo megope ya gago Jakobe e le mentle! e bong metlaagana ya gago Iseraele! 
Numbers24:6 E aname jaaka melapo, jaaka masimo fa losing lwa noka, jaaka makgophana a Jehofa o a tlhomileng, jaaka ditlhare tsa masetara fa metsing." 
Numbers24:7 Metsi a tlaa ela a tswa mo dinkgwaneng tsa gagwe, le dipeo tsa gagwe di tlaa nna mo metsing a le mantsi, kgosi ya gagwe e tlaa goletsega go feta Agage, bogosi jwa gagwe bo tlaa nna bogolo." 
Numbers24:8 Modimo wa mo ntsha mo Egepeto; o na le thata ekete ya nare; o tlaa ja a swetsa merafe e e leng baganetsi ba gagwe, o tlaa robakanya marapo a yone, a e phololetse ka metswi ya gagwe." 
Numbers24:9 A namalala, a robala jaaka tau le jaaka tau e namagadi; e mang yo o tlaa mo tsosang? Go sego mongwe le mongwe yo o go segofatsang; go hutsegile mongwe le mongwe yo o go hutsang.”" 
Numbers24:10 Bogale jwa ga Balake jwa tukela Balaame, mme a opanya diatla tsa gagwe. Balake a raya Balaame, a re: “Ke go biditse ka re o tle go hutsa baba ba me, bona, o ba segofaditse fela ka dipaka tse tharo tse." 
Numbers24:11 Ke gone jaanong tshabela kwa ga gago; ke rile ke tlaa go godisetsa kwa tlotlong e kgolo; bona, Jehofa o go kganetse, gore o se bone tlotlo.”" 
Numbers24:12 Balaame a raya Balake a re: “A ga ke a bua le bone barongwa ba gago, ba o ba romileng kwa go nna, ka re:" 
Numbers24:13 ‘Le fa Balake a ka nnaya ntlo ya gagwe e tletse selefera le gouta, ga nkake ka tlola lefoko la ga Jehofa, go dira molemo le fa e le bosula ka mogopolo wa me fela, le gore se Jehofa o se buang, ke sone se ke tlaa se buang’?" 
Numbers24:14 “Jaanong, bona, ke ya kwa bathong ba gaetsho; ntlo, ke tlaa go kakanyetsa se batho ba, ba tlaa se direlang batho ba gaeno mo metlheng ya bofelo.”" 
Numbers24:15 A bua ka setshwantsho sa gagwe, a re: “Balaame morwa Beore, a re: “Monna yo leitlho la gagwe le ne le buduletse, a re:" 
Numbers24:16 Go bua ene yo o utlwang mafoko a Modimo, a itse kitso ya Mothatayotlhe, yo o bonang ponatshegelo ya Mothatayotlhe, a wela fa fatshe, matlho a gagwe a budulogile, a re:" 
Numbers24:17 Ke a mmona, e seng jaanong; ke mo lebile, mme e seng gaufi; go tlaa tswa naledi mo go Jakobe, le thobane ya bogosi e tlaa tsoga e tswa mo go Iseraele; e tlaa phololetsa dikgokgotsho tsa Moabe, e diga bana botlhe ba pheretlho." 
Numbers24:18 Etome e tlaa nna thuo, le Seire, ba e neng e le baba ba gagwe, e tlaa nna thuo; Iseraele ene a sa ntse a dira ka bopelokgale." 
Numbers24:19 Bogosi bo tlaa newa mongwe yo o tswang mo go Jakobe, o tlaa senya masalela a a mo metseng!”" 
Numbers24:20 A leba Amaleke, a bua ka setshwantsho sa gagwe, a re: “Amaleke e ne e le wa ntlha mo merafeng; bokhutlo jwa gagwe e tlaa nna tshenyego.”" 
Numbers24:21 A leba Mokene, a bua ka setshwantsho sa gagwe, a re: “Boago jwa gago bo thata, le setlhaga sa gago se tlhomilwe mo lefikeng." 
Numbers24:22 Le fa go ntse jalo Kaine o tla kgakgabadiwa, go tsamaye Ašure a go ise botshwarong.”" 
Numbers24:23 A bua ka setshwantsho sa gagwe, a re: “Ao, e mang yo o tlaa tshelang fa Modimo o dira seo se?" 
Numbers24:24 Dikepe di tlaa tswa kwa losing lwa Kitime, di tlaa patika Ašure, di tlaa patika Ebere, mme le ene o tlaa ya tshenyegong.”" 
Numbers24:25 Balaame a nanoga a ya a boela kwa ga gagwe, Balake le ene a tsamaya." 
Numbers25:1 Iseraele a nna mo Sitime, mme batho ba simolola go dira boaka le bomorwadia Moabe;" 
Numbers25:2 gonne ba ne ba tle ba laleletse batho ditlhabelong tsa medimo ya bone; mme batho ba ja, ba ikobela medimo ya bone." 
Numbers25:3 Iseraele a ikopanya le Baale-peore; mme bogale jwa ga Jehofa jwa tukela Iseraele. 
Numbers25:4 Jehofa a raya Moše, a re: “Tsaya bagolwane botlhe ba batho, o ba pegele Jehofa fa pele ga letsatsi, gore bogale jo bogolo jwa ga Jehofa bo fagope Iseraele.”" 
Numbers25:5 Moše a raya baatlhodi ba Iseraele, a re: “A mongwe le mongwe wa lona a bolaye batho ba gagwe ba ba ikopantseng le Baale-peore.”" 
Numbers25:6 Mme bonang, mongwe wa bana ba Iseraele a tla a lere mo go ba ga gabo mosadi wa Semidiane mo ponong ya ga Moše, le mo ponong ya phuthego yotlhe ya bana ba Iseraele, ba sa ntse ba lela fa mojakong wa mogope wa bophuthegelo." 
Numbers25:7 E rile Finease, morwa Eleasare, morwa Arone moperesiti a go bona, a nanoga mo gare ga phuthego, a tshola lerumo mo seatleng;" 
Numbers25:8 a latela motho wa Iseraele mo loobong, a ba phololetsa ka bobedi jwa bone, monna wa Iseraele, le mosadi a mo phunya mogodu. Mme sebetso sa emisiwa mo baneng ba Iseraele." 
Numbers25:9 Ba ba suleng ka sebetso e ne e le 24 000. 
Numbers25:10 Jehofa a bua le Moše, a re:" 
Numbers25:11 “Finease, morwa Eleasare, morwa Arone moperesiti, o fapositse bogale jwa me mo baneng ba Iseraele, ka a ne a le lefufa ka lefufa la me mo gare ga bone; mme ka se ka ka nyeletsa bana ba Iseraele mo lefufeng la me." 
Numbers25:12 Ke gone ka moo o bue, o re: ‘Bona, ke mo naya kgolagano ya me ya kagiso." 
Numbers25:13 E tlaa nna kgolagano e e sa khutleng mo go ene, le mo losikeng lwa gagwe morago ga gagwe, kgolagano ya boperesiti jo bo se nang bokhutlo; ka a ne a le lefufa ka go Modimo wa gagwe, a direla baba ba Iseraele tetlanyo.’ ”" 
Numbers25:14 Leina la monna wa Iseraele yo o bolailweng, yo o bolailweng le mosadi wa Momidiane, e ne e le Simeri morwa Salu, kgosana ya kgotla nngwe ya borraagwe mo go Basimeone." 
Numbers25:15 Leina la mosadi wa Momidiane yo o bolailweng, e ne e le Kosebi, morwadia Sure; yoo e ne e le tlhogo ya batho ba kgotla nngwe ya borraagwe mo Midiane." 
Numbers25:16 Jehofa a bua le Moše, a re:" 
Numbers25:17 “Tshwenya Bamidiane, o ba kgemethe," 
Numbers25:18 gonne ba lo tshwenya ka boferefere jwa bone, jo ba lo fepileng ka jone mo tirong ya Peore, le mo tirong ya ga Kosebi, morwadia kgosana ya Midiane, kgaitsadia bone, yo o bolailweng ka tsatsi la sebetso, mo tirong ya ga Peore.”" 
Numbers26:1 Ga dirala ya re morago ga sebetso, Jehofa a bua le Moše le Eleasare morwa Arone moperesiti, a re:" 
Numbers26:2 “Dirang palo ya phuthego yotlhe ya bana ba Iseraele, go simolola ka ba ba dinyaga di 20 go ya kwa go bomogoloa bone, ka makgotla a borraabo, botlhe ba ba nonofileng go bolola ntwa mo Iseraele.”" 
Numbers26:3 Moše le Eleasare moperesiti ba bua nabo mo dipaleng tsa Moabe, fa Joretane kwa Jeriko, ba re:" 
Numbers26:4 “Dirang palo ya batho, go simolola ka ba ba dinyaga di 20 go ya kwa go bomogoloa bona;” jaaka Jehofa a laotse Moše le bana ba Iseraele, ba ba duleng mo lefstsheng la Egepeto." 
Numbers26:5 Rubene, ngwana wa ntlha wa ga Iseraele; bomorwa Rubene; ba ga Enoke, losika lwa Enoke; ba ga Palu, losika lwa Bapalu;" 
Numbers26:6 ba ga Heserone, losika lwa Baheserone; ba ga Karemi, losika lwa Bakaremi." 
Numbers26:7 Tse ke tsone ditshika tsa Barubene: ba ba badilweng mo go bone ba bo bo le 43 730. 
Numbers26:8 Le bomorwa Palu; Eliabe," 
Numbers26:9 Le bomorwa Eliabe; Nemuele, Dathane le Abirame. Bao ke bone bo Dathane le Abirame, ba ba neng ba itsege mo phuthegong, mme ba ganela le Moše le Arone mo lesomong la ga Kora, jale ka ba ganela le Jehofa." 
Numbers26:10 Lefatshe la atlhamologa molomo, la ba komtsa mmogo le Kora, jale ka lesomo leo le swa; ka molelo o laila banna ba ba 250, mme ba tswa sekao." 
Numbers26:11 Le fa go ntse jalo bomorwa Kora ga ba a ka ba swa. 
Numbers26:12 Bomorwa Simeone ka fa ditshikeng tsa bone: Ba ga Nemuele, losika lwa Banemuele; ba ga Jamine, losika lwa Bajamine; ba ga Jakine, losika lwa Bajakine;" 
Numbers26:13 ba ga Sera, losika lwa Basera; ba ga Saule, losika lwa Basaule;" 
Numbers26:14 tse ke ditshika tsa Basimeone 22 200. 
Numbers26:15 Bomorwa Gate ka fa ditshikeng tsa bone: Ba ga Sifione, losika lwa Basifione; ba ga Hagi, losika lwa Bahagi; ba ga Shuni, losika lwa Bašuni; ba ga Oseni, losika lwa Baoseni;" 
Numbers26:16 ba ga Eri, losika lwa Baeri;" 
Numbers26:17 ba ga Arote, losika lwa Baarote; ba ga Areli, losika lwa Baareli." 
Numbers26:18 Tse ke ditshika tsa bomorwa Gate ka fa palong ya bone ba ba badilweng mo go bone, 40 500." 
Numbers26:19 Bomorwa Juta, Ere le Onane, mme Ere le Onane ba sa le ba swela mo lefatsheng la Kanana." 
Numbers26:20 Bomorwa Juta ka fa ditshikeng tsa bone e ne e le ba: Ba ga Shela, losika lwa Bašela; ba ga Perese, losika lwa Baperese; ba ga Sera, losika lwa Basera." 
Numbers26:21 Bomorwa Perese e ne e le ba: Ba ga Heserone; losika lwa Baheserone; ba ga Hamule, losika lwa Bahamule." 
Numbers26:22 Tse ke tsone ditshika tsa ga Juta, ka fa palong ya bone ba ba badilweng mo go bone, 76 500." 
Numbers26:23 Bomorwa Isakare ka fa ditshikeng tsa bone, Ba ga Tola, losika lwa Batola; ba ga Pua, losika lwa Bapua;" 
Numbers26:24 ba ga Jašube, losika lwa Bajašube; ba ga Shimerone, losika lwa Bašimerone." 
Numbers26:25 Tse ke ditshika tsa ga Isakare ka fa palong ya bone ba ba badilweng mo go bone, 64 300." 
Numbers26:26 Bomorwa Sebulone ka fa ditshikeng tsa bone: Ba ga Serete, losika lwa Baserete; ba ga Elone, losika lwa Baelone; ba ga Jahaleele, losika lwa Bajahaleele." 
Numbers26:27 Tse ke ditshika tsa Basebulone ka fa palong ya bone ba ba badilweng mo go bone, 60 500." 
Numbers26:28 Bomorwa Josefe, ka fa ditshikeng tsa bone: Manase le Eferaime." 
Numbers26:29 Bomorwa Manase: Ba ga Makire, losika lwa Bamakire; Makire a tshola Gileate: ba ga Gileate, losika lwa Bagileate." 
Numbers26:30 Ba ke bomorwa Gileate: Ba ga Iesere, losika lwa Baiesere; ba ga Heleke, losika lwa Baheleke." 
Numbers26:31 Ba ga Aseriele, losika lwa Baaseriele; ba ga Shekeme, losika lwa Bašekeme." 
Numbers26:32 Ba ga Shemita, losika lwa Bašemita; ba ga Hefere, losika lwa Bahefere." 
Numbers26:33 Mme Selofehate morwa Hefere o ne a se na bana ba basimane fa e se ba basetsana fela, maina a bomorwadia Selofehate e ne e le Mahela le Noa, Hogela, Mileka le Tiresa." 
Numbers26:34 Tse ke ditshika tsa ga Manase, ba ba badilweng mo go bone ba ne ba le 52 700." 
Numbers26:35 Ba ke bone bomorwa Eferaime ka fa ditshikeng tsa bone: Ba ga Shuthela, losika lwa Bašuthela; ba ga Bekere, losika lwa Babekere; ba ga Tahane, losika lwa Batahane." 
Numbers26:36 Ba ke bomorwa Shuthela, ba ga Erane, losika lwa Baerane." 
Numbers26:37 Tse ke ditshika tsa bomorwa Eferaime ka fa palong ya ba ba badilweng mo go bone, 32 500. Ba ke bomorwa Josefe ka fa ditshikeng tsa bone." 
Numbers26:38 Bomorwa Benjamine ka fa ditshikeng tsa bone: Ba ga Bela, losika lwa Babela; ba ga Ašebele, losika lwa Baašebele; ba ga Ahirame, losika lwa Baahirame;" 
Numbers26:39 ba ga Shufame, losika lwa Bašufame; ba ga Hufame, losika lwa Bahufame." 
Numbers26:40 Bomorwa Bela e ne e le Arete le Naamane; ba ga Arete, losika lwa Baarete; ba ga Naamane, losika lwa Banaamane." 
Numbers26:41 Ba ke bomorwa Benjamine ka fa ditshikeng tsa bone; ba ba badilweng mo go bone ba ne ba le 45 600. 
Numbers26:42 Ba ke bomorwa Dane ka fa ditshikeng tsa bone: Ba ga Shuhame, losika lwa Bašuhame. Tse ke ditshika tsa ga Dane ka fa ditshikeng tsa bone." 
Numbers26:43 Ditshika tsotlhe tsa Bašuhame, ka fa palong ya bone ba ba badilweng mo go bone, e ne e le 64 400." 
Numbers26:44 Bomorwa Ašere ka fa ditshikeng tsa bone: Ba ga Imena, losika lwa Baimena; ba ga Išifi, losika lwa Baišifi; ba ga Beria, losika lwa Baberia." 
Numbers26:45 Ba bomorwa Beria: ba ga Hebere, losika lwa Bahebere; ba ga Malekiele, losika lwa Bamalekiele." 
Numbers26:46 Leina la morwadia Ašere e ne e le Sera. 
Numbers26:47 Tse ke ditshika tsa bomorwa Ašere ka fa palong ya ba ba badilweng mo go bone, 53 400." 
Numbers26:48 Bomorwa Nafetali ka fa ditshikeng tsa bone: Ba ga Jahaseele, losika lwa Bajahaseele; ba ga Guni, losika lwa Baguni;" 
Numbers26:49 ba ga Jesere, losika lwa Bajesere; ba ga Shileme, losika lwa Bašileme." 
Numbers26:50 Tse ke ditshika tsa ga Nafetali ka fa ditshikeng tsa bone, mme ba ba badilweng mo go bone ba ne ba le 45 400." 
Numbers26:51 Ba ke bone ba ba badilweng ba bana ba Iseraele, 601 730." 
Numbers26:52 Jehofa a bua le Moše a re: 
Numbers26:53 “Lefatshe le tlaa kgaoganngwa ka bone ba, go nna boswa ka fa palong ya maina." 
Numbers26:54 Ba ba leng bantsi o ba neye boswa bogolo, ba ba leng bannye o ba neye boswa bo le bonnye; mongwe le mongwe o tlaa newa boswa jwa gagwe ka fa palong ya ba gagwe ba ba badilweng." 
Numbers26:55 Le fa go ntse jalo lefatshe le tlaa kgaoganngwa ka go laolwa ka bola; a ba rue ka fa maineng a ditso tsa borraabo. 
Numbers26:56 A boswa bo kgaoganngwe ka ba bantsi le ka ba bannye ka fa taolong ya bola.” 
Numbers26:57 Mme Balefi ba ba badilweng ka fa ditshikeng tsa bone ke ba: Ba ga Gerešone, losika lwa Bagerešone; ba ga Kohathe, losika lwa Bakohathe: ba ga Merari, losika lwa Bamerari." 
Numbers26:58 Tse ke ditshika tsa ga Lefi, losika lwa Balibini, losika lwa Baheberone, losika lwa Bamahali, losikwa lwa Bamuši, losika lwa Bakore. Kohathe a tshola Amerame." 
Numbers26:59 Leina la mogatsa Amerame e ne e le Jokebete morwadia Lefi, yo Lefi o ne a mmona kwa Egepeto; Jokebete a bona le Amerame Arone, Moše le Miriame kgaitsadia bone." 
Numbers26:60 Arone a tsala Natabe le Abihu, Eleasare le Ithamare." 
Numbers26:61 Natabe le Abihu ba swa jale ka ba isa molelo wa seeng fa pele ga Jehofa. 
Numbers26:62 Ba ba badilweng mo go bone e ne e le 23 000, go simolola ka ba ba kgwedi e le nngwe fela le go ya kwa go bomogolo a bone, lonna lotlhe; gonne ba ne ba se ka ba balelwa mo baneng ba Iseraele, ka ba sa newa boswa mo baneng ba Iseraele." 
Numbers26:63 Ba ke bone ba ba badilweng ke Moše le Eleasare moperesiti, ba ba badileng bana ba Iseraele mo dipaleng tsa Moabe, fa Joretane kwa Jeriko." 
Numbers26:64 Mo go bone bao go ne go se na motho ope wa ba ba kileng ba balwa pele ke Moše le Arone moperesiti; ba ba badileng bana ba Iseraele kwa nageng ya Sinai," 
Numbers26:65 gonne Jehofa o ne a buile ka ga bone, a re: “Ruri ba tlaa swela mo nageng fela.” Ga bo go sa sala motho ope wa bone, fa e se Kalebe morwa Jefune le Jošua morwa Nune." 
Numbers27:1 Foo ga atamela bomorwadia Selofehate, morwa Hefere, morwa Gileate, morwa Makire, morwa Manase, ba ditshika tsa ga Manase morwa Josefe; a ke maina a bomorwadie: Mahele, Noa, Hogela Mileka le Tiresa." 
Numbers27:2 Ba ema fa pele ga Moše, le fa pele ga Eleasare moperesiti, le fa pele ga dikgosana tsa phuthego fa mojakong wa mogope wa bophuthegelo, ba re:" 
Numbers27:3 “Rraetsho o ne a swela mo nageng, a se mo lesomong la ba ba neng ba phuthegela go ganela le Jehofa mo lesomong la ga Kora, mme a swela mo boleong jwa gagwe ka esi; o ne a se na bana ba basimane." 
Numbers27:4 Ana leina la rraetsho le tlaa bo le tlosediwang mo losikeng lwa gagwe, ka a ne a se na ngwana wa mosimane? Re neyeng boswa mo go bomorwa rraetsho.”" 
Numbers27:5 Moše a isa mafoko a bone fa pele ga Jehofa. 
Numbers27:6 Jehofa a bua le Moše, a re:" 
Numbers27:7 “Bomorwadia Selofehate ba bua ka tshiamo; ruri o ba neye boswa jwa thuo mo go bomorwa rraabo, o dire gore boswa jwa ga rraabo bo fetele mo go bone." 
Numbers27:8 O bue le bana ba Iseraele o re: ‘Fa motho a swa a se na ngwana wa mosimane, foo lo dire gore boswa jwa gagwe bo fetele mo go morwadie." 
Numbers27:9 Fa a se na ngwana wa mosetsana, foo boswa jwa gagwe lo tlaa bo naya bomorwa rraagwe." 
Numbers27:10 Fa a se na bomorwa rraagwe, foo boswa jwa gagwe lo bo neye borangwanaagwe." 
Numbers27:11 Fa rraagwe a se na borangwanaagwe, foo boswa jwa gagwe lo bo neye tsala ya gagwe ya losika lwa gagwe e e gaufi bogolo nae ka go tsalwa, ke ene yo o tlaa bo ruang; e nne molao wa katlholo mo baneng ba Iseraele, jaaka Jehofa a laotse Moše.’ ”" 
Numbers27:12 Jehofa a raya Moše, a re: “Tlhatlogela mo thabeng e ya Abarime, o bone lefatshe le ke le neileng bana ba Iseraele." 
Numbers27:13 O tlaa re o sena go le bona le wena o tlaa kopanngwa le batho ba gaeno, jaaka Arone mogoloo a ne a kopanngwa," 
Numbers27:14 gonne lo no lwa tsuololela lefoko la me mo nageng ya Tsine mo kgannyeng ya phuthego, lwa gana go intshepisa fa pele ga matlho a bone fa metsing.” Ao ke metsi a Meriba wa Kateše mo nageng ya Tsine." 
Numbers27:15 Moše a bua le Jehofa, a re:" 
Numbers27:16 “A Jehofa, Modimo wa mewa ya nama yotlhe, a tlhome motho go nna tlhogo ya phuthego e," 
Numbers27:17 yo o ka tswang fa pele ga bone a ba a tsena fa pele ga bone; yo o ka ba bolotsang a ba a ba gorosa; gore phuthego ya ga Jehofa e se nne jaaka dinku tse di se nang modisa.” 
Numbers27:18 Jehofa a raya Moše a re: “Tsaya Jošua morwa Nune, motho yo mowa o mo go ene, o beye seatla sa gago mo go ene;" 
Numbers27:19 o mmeye fa pele ga Eleasare moperesiti, le fa pele ga phuthego yotlhe; o mo laye mo ponong ya bone," 
Numbers27:20 le tlotlo ya gago o e beye mo go ene, gore phuthego yotlhe ya Iseraele e ineele mo kutlong." 
Numbers27:21 A a eme fa pele ga Eleasare moperesiti, yo o tla mmoletsang ka katlholo ya Urime fa pele ga Jehofa; a ba bolole ka lefoko la gagwe ba be ba goroge ka lefoko la gagwe, ene le bana ba Iseraele botlhe, e bong phuthego yotlhe fela.”" 
Numbers27:22 Moše a dira jaaka Jehofa a mo laotse, a tsaya Jošua, a mmaya fa pele ga Eleasare moperesiti, le fa pele ga phuthego yotlhe;" 
Numbers27:23 a baya diatla tsa gagwe mo go ene, a mo laya, jaaka Jehofa a buile ka seatla sa ga Moše." 
Numbers28:1 Jehofa a bua le Moše, a re:" 
Numbers28:2 “Laola bana ba Iseraele o ba reye o re: ‘Seromololo sa me, dijo tsa me tsa ditshupelo tsa me, tse di dirwang ka molelo, e le monko o o monate mo go nna, lo tlhokomele go di lere mo go nna ka dipaka tsa tsone.’" 
Numbers28:3 O ba reye o re: E ke yone tshupelo e e dirwang ka molelo, e lo tlaa e isetsang Jehofa: Dikwanyana tse ditonanyana tsa ngwaga wa ntlha tse di se nang bogole, di le pedi ka letsatsi lengwe le lengwe, e le tshupelo e e fisiwang ka metlha yotlhe." 
Numbers28:4 Kwanyana ngwe e isiwe ka moso, kwanyana e nngwe e isiwe maitseboa;" 
Numbers28:5 le kilokerama e le nngwe fela ya setou e le tshupelo ya boupe, go tlhakanye le litara ya lookwane lo lo kgobilweng." 
Numbers28:6 Ke tshupelo e e fisiwang ya metlha yotlhe, e e laotsweng mo thabeng ya Sinai gore e nne monko o o monate, tshupelo e e direlwang Jehofa ka molelo." 
Numbers28:7 Tshupelo ya yone e e nowang ya kwanyana e nngwe e nne litara e le nngwe fela; mo felong ga boitshepo o tlaa thelela Jehofa tshupelo e e nowang ya bojalwa jo bo loileng. 
Numbers28:8 Kwanyana e nngwe o e ise maitseboa, jaaka tshupelo ya boupe ya moso, le jaaka tshupelo ya yone e e nowang, o tlaa e isa e le tshupelo e e dirwang ka molelo, ya monko o o monate mo go Jehofa." 
Numbers28:9 “E re ka letsatsi la Sabata o ise dikwanyana di le pedi tsa ngwaga wa ntlha, tse di se nang bogole, le emere ya setou e le dikilokerama di le pedi, e le tshupelo ya boupe, go tlhakanye le lookwane, e nne le tshupelo ya yone e e nowang;" 
Numbers28:10 e ke yone tshupelo e e fisiwang ya Sabata mongwe le mongwe kwa ntle ga tshupelo e e fisiwang ya metlha yotlhe, le tshupelo ya yone e e nowang." 
Numbers28:11 “Le gone e re mo ditshimologong tsa dikgwedi tsa lona lo isetse Jehofa tshupelo e e fisiwang, dikgongwana di le pedi le phelefu e le nngwe fela, le dikwanyana tse di tonanyana di supa tsa ngwaga wa ntlha tse di se nang bogole;" 
Numbers28:12 le dikilokerama di le tharo tsa setou, e le tshupelo ya boupe, go tlhakanye le lookwane, e le ya kgongwana nngwe le nngwe; le dikilokerama di le pedi tsa setou, go tlhakanye le leokwane, e le tshupelo ya boupe ya phelefu;" 
Numbers28:13 le kilokerama e le nngwe fela ya setou se se tlhakanyeng le lookwane, e le tshupelo ya boupe ya kwanyana nngwe le nngwe; e le tshupelo e e fisiwang e e monko o monate, tsa tshupelo e e direlwang Jehofa ka molelo." 
Numbers28:14 Ditshupelo tsa tsone tse di nowang a e nne dilitara di le pedi tsa bojalwa jwa mofine e le tsa kgongwana, dilitara di le 1,5 e le tsa phelefu, le litara e le nngwe fela e le ya kwanyana; e ke yone tshupelo e e fisiwang ya kgwedi nngwe le nngwe mo dikgweding tsotlhe tsa ngwaga." 
Numbers28:15 Le podi e tonanyana e le nngwe fela e le ya tshupelelo ya boleo mo go Jehofa; a e isiwe kwa ntle ga tshupelo e e fisiwang ya metlha yotlhe, e na le tshupelo ya yone e e nowang." 
Numbers28:16 “Ka lesatsi la 14 la kgwedi ya ntlha, ke tlolaganyo ya ga Jehofa." 
Numbers28:17 Ka letsatsi la 15 la kgwedi eo a go nne modiro: a senkgwe se se sa bedisiwang se jewe ka malatsi a supa. 
Numbers28:18 E re ka letsatsi la ntlha go nne phuthego e e itshepileng; lo se ka lwa dira tiro epe ya setlhanka fela mo go lone; 
Numbers28:19 lo ise tshupelo e e dirwang ka molelo, tshupelo e e fisediwang Jehofa; dikgongwana di le pedi, le phelefu e le nngwe fela, le dikwanyana tse ditonanyana di supa tsa ngwaga wa ntlha; di nnele lona di se na bogole;" 
Numbers28:20 le tshupelo ya tsone ya boupe natso, setou se se tlhakanyeng le lookwane; ga kgongwana e nne setou sa dikilokerama di le tharo; ga phelefu e nne setou sa dikilokerama di le pedi;" 
Numbers28:21 ga kwanyana nngwe le nngwe ya tse di supang o ise kilokerama e le nngwe fela ya setou. 
Numbers28:22 Le podi e tonanyana e le nngwe fela ya tshupelelo ya boleo, go lo direla tetlanyo." 
Numbers28:23 Tse lo di ise kwa ntle ga tshupelo e e fisiwang ya moso, e e leng tshupelo e e fisiwang ya metlha yotlhe." 
Numbers28:24 Lo tlaa isa ka mokgwa o o ntseng jaana ka letsatsi lengwe le lengwe, ka malatsi a supa, dijo tsa tshupelo e e dirwang ka molelo, ya monko o o monate mo go Jehofa, e isiwe kwa ntle ga tshupelo e e fisiwang ya metlha yotlhe, e na le tshupelo ya yone e e nowang." 
Numbers28:25 Ka letsatsi la bosupa lo nne phuthego e e itshepileng; lo se ka lwa dira tiro epe ya setlhanka fela. 
Numbers28:26 “Le gone e re ka letsatsi la mabutswapele, fa lo isetsa Jehofa tshupelo e ntšha ya boupe mo modirong wa lona wa dibeke, lo nne phuthego e e itshepileng; lo se ka lwa dira tiro epe ya setlhanka fela." 
Numbers28:27 Lo ise tshupelo e e fisiwang ya monko o o monate mo go Jehofa; dikgongwana di le pedi, phelefu e le nngwe fela, dikwanyana tse ditonanyana di supa tsa ngwaga wa ntlha;" 
Numbers28:28 le tshupelo ya tsone ya boupe, setou se se tlhakanyeng le lookwane, dikilokerama di le tharo tsa kgongwana nngwe le nngwe, dikilokerama di le pedi tsa phelefu." 
Numbers28:29 Kilokerama e le nngwe fela ya kwanyana nngwe le nngwe ya dikwanyana tse di supang; 
Numbers28:30 podi e tonanyana e le nngwe fela, go lo direla tetlanyo." 
Numbers28:31 Lo di ise kwa ntle ga tshupelo e e fisiwang ya metlha yotlhe, le tshupelo ya boupe ya tsone (di nnele lona di se na bogole), le tshupelo ya tsone e e nowang." 
Numbers29:1 “E re ka kgwedi ya bosupa, ka letsatsi la ntlha la kgwedi, lo nne phuthego e e itshepileng; lo se ka lwa dira tiro epe ya setlhanka fela; ke letsatsi la go letsa dinaka mo go lona." 
Numbers29:2 Lo ise tshupelo e e fisiwang ya monko o o monate mo go Jehofa; kgongwana e le nngwe fela, phelefu e le nngwe fela, dikwanyana tse ditonanyana di supa tsa ngwaga wa ntlha tse di se nang bogole;" 
Numbers29:3 le tshupelo ya tsone ya boupe, setou se se tlhakanyeng le lookwane, kikilokerama di le tharo tsa kgongwana, kikilokerama di le pedi tsa phelefu," 
Numbers29:4 le kilokerama e le nngwe fela ya kwanyana nngwe le nngwe ya dikwanyana tse di supang; 
Numbers29:5 le podi e tonanyana e le nngwe fela ya tshupelelo ya boleo, go lo direla tetlanyo." 
Numbers29:6 E nne kwa ntle ga tshupelo e e fisiwang ya kgwedi e e rogwang; le tshupelo ya yone ya boupe, le tshupelo e e fisiwang ya metlha yotlhe, e na le tshupelo ya yone ya boupe, le tshupelo tsa tsone tse di nowang, ka fa mokgweng wa tsone o o laotsweng, e le monko o o monate, e le tshupelo e e direlwang Jehofa ka molelo." 
Numbers29:7 “Ka letsatsi la bosome la kgwedi ya bosupa lo nne phuthego e e itshepileng; lo ipatike mewa; lo se ka lwa dira tiro epe. 
Numbers29:8 Lo isetse Jehofa tshupelo e e fisiwang ya monko o o monate: kgongwana e le nngwe fela, phelefu e le nngwe fela, dikwanyana tse ditonanyana di supa tsa ngwaga wa ntlha; di nne di se na bogole mo go tsone;" 
Numbers29:9 le tshupelo ya tsone ya boupe, setou se se tlhakanyeng le lookwane, dikilokerama di le tharo tsa kgongwana, dikilokerama di le pedi tsa phelefu," 
Numbers29:10 kilokerama e le nngwe fela ya kwanyana nngwe le nngwe ya dikwanyana tse di supang," 
Numbers29:11 podi e tonanyana e le nngwe fela ya tshupelelo ya boleo; kwa ntle ga tshupelelo ya boleo ya tetlanyo, le tshupelo e e fisiwang ya metlha yotlhe, le tshupelo ya yone ya boupe, le ditshupelo tsa tsone tse di nowang." 
Numbers29:12 “Ka letsatsi la lesome le botlhano la kgwedi ya bosupa lo nne phuthego e e itshepileng; lo se ka lwa dira tiro epe ya setlhanka fela, lo direle Jehofa modiro ka malatsi a supa." 
Numbers29:13 Lo ise tshupelo e e fisiwang, tshupelo e e dirwang ka molelo, e e monko o o monate mo go Jehofa; dikgongwana di le 13, diphelefu di le pedi, dikwanyana tse ditonanyana di le 14 tsa ngwaga wa ntlha; e nne tse di se nang bogole." 
Numbers29:14 Le tshupelo ya tsone ya boupe, setou se se tlhakanyeng le lookwane, dikilokerama di le tharo tsa kgongwana nngwe le nngwe, ya dikgongwana tse di 13, dikilokerama di le pedi tsa phelefu nngwe le nngwe ya diphelefu tse pedi," 
Numbers29:15 le kilokerama e le nngwe fela ya kwanyana nngwe le ngwe ya dikwanyana tse di 14," 
Numbers29:16 le podi e tonanyana e le nngwe fela ya tshupelelo ya boleo; kwa ntle ga tshupelo e e fisiwang ya metlha yotlhe, le tshupelo ya yone ya boupe, le tshupelo ya yone e e nowang." 
Numbers29:17 “Ka letsatsi la bobedi lo ise dikgongwana di le 12, diphelefu di le pedi, dikwanyana tse ditonanyana di le 14, tsa ngwaga wa ntlha tse di se nang bogole;" 
Numbers29:18 le tshupelo ya tsone ya boupe, le tshupelo tsa tsone tse di nowang tsa dikgongwana, tsa diphelefu le tsa dikwanyana, ka fa palong ya tsone, ka fa mokgweng o o laotsweng," 
Numbers29:19 le podi e tonanyana e le nngwe fela ya tshupelelo ya boleo; kwa ntle ga tshupelo e e fisiwang ya metlha yotlhe, le tshupelo ya tsone ya boupe, le ditshupelo tsa tsone tse di nowang." 
Numbers29:20 “Ka letsatsi la boraro dikgongwana di le 11, diphelefu di le pedi, dikwanyana tse ditonanyana di le 14 tsa ngwaga wa ntlha, tse di se nang bogole;" 
Numbers29:21 le tshupelo ya tsone ya boupe, le ditshupelo tsa tsone tse di nowang, tsa dikgongwana, tsa diphelefu le tsa dikwanyana, ka fa palong ya tsone, ka fa mokgweng o o laotsweng," 
Numbers29:22 le podi e tonanyana e le nngwe fela ya tshupelelo ya boleo; kwa ntle ga tshupelo e e fisiwang ya metlha yotlhe, le tshupelo ya yone ya boupe, le tshupelo ya yone e e nowang." 
Numbers29:23 “Ka letsatsi la bone dikgongwana di le some, diphelefu di le pedi, dikwanyana tse ditonanyana di le 14, tsa ngwaga wa ntlha, tse di se nang bogole;" 
Numbers29:24 tshupelo ya tsone ya boupe, le ditshupelo tsa tsone tse di nowang, tsa dikgongwana, tsa diphelefu le tsa dikwanyana, ka fa palong ya tsone, ka fa mokgweng o o laotsweng," 
Numbers29:25 le podi e tonanyana e le nngwe fela ya tshupelelo ya boleo; kwa ntle ga tshupelo e e fisiwang ya metlha yotlhe, le tshupelo ya yone e e nowang." 
Numbers29:26 “Ka letsatsi la botlhano dikgongwana di le 9, diphelefu di le pedi, dikwanyana tse ditonanyana di le 14, tsa ngwaga wa ntlha, tse di se nang bogole;" 
Numbers29:27 le tshupelo ya tsone ya boupe, le ditshupelo tsa tsone tse di nowang, tsa dikgongwana, tsa diphelefu le tsa dikwanyana, ka fa palong ya tsone, ka fa mokgweng o o laotsweng," 
Numbers29:28 le podi e tonanyana e le nngwe fela ya tshupelelo ya boleo; kwa ntle ga tshupelo e e fisiwang ya metlha yotlhe, le tshupelo ya yone ya boupe, le tshupelo ya yone e e nowang." 
Numbers29:29 “Ka letsatsi la borataro dikgongwana di le 8, diphelefu di le pedi, dikwanyana tse ditonanyana di le 14 tsa ngwaga wa ntlha, tse di se nang bogole;" 
Numbers29:30 le tshupelo ya tsone ya boupe, le ditshupelo tsa tsone tse di nowang tsa dikgongwana, tsa diphelefu, le tsa dikwanyana, ka fa palong ya tsone, ka fa mokgweng o o laotsweng,"
