Numbers29:31 le podi e tonanyana e le nngwe fela ya tshupelelo ya boleo; kwa ntle ga tshupelo e e fisiwang ya metlha yotlhe, tshupelo ya yone ya boupe, le ditshupelo tsa yone tse di nowang." 
Numbers29:32 “Ka letsatsi la bosupa dikgongwana di supa, diphelefu di le pedi, dikwanyana tse ditonanyana di le some le bone, tsa ngwaga wa ntlha, tse di se nang bogole;" 
Numbers29:33 le tshupelo ya tsone ya boupe, le ditshupelo tsa tsone tse di nowang tsa dikgongwana, tsa diphelefu, le tsa dikwanyana, ka fa palong ya tsone, ka fa mokgweng o o laotsweng," 
Numbers29:34 le podi e tonanyana e le nngwe fela ya tshupelelo ya boleo; kwa ntle ga tshupelo e e fisiwang ya metlha yotlhe, tshupelo ya yone ya boupe, le tshupelo ya yone e e nowang." 
Numbers29:35 “Ka letsatsi la 8 lo nne phuthego e e masisi: lo se ka lwa dira tiro epe ya setlhanka fela," 
Numbers29:36 mme lo tlaa isa tshupelo e e fisiwang, tshupelo e e dirwang ka molelo, ya monko o o monate mo go Jehofa: kgongwana e le nngwe fela, phelefu e le nngwe fela, dikwanyana tse ditonanyana di supa tsa ngwaga wa ntlha, tse di se nang bogole;" 
Numbers29:37 tshupelo ya tsone ya boupe, le ditshupelo tsa tsone tse di nowang tsa kgongwana, tsa phelefu, le tsa dikwanyana, di nne ka fa palong ya tsone, ka fa mokgweng o o laotsweng;" 
Numbers29:38 le podi e tonanyana e le nngwe fela ya tshupelelo ya boleo; kwa ntle ga tshupelo e e fisiwang ya metlha yotlhe, le tshupelo ya yone ya boupe, le tshupelo ya yone e e nowang." 
Numbers29:39 “Tse, lo di isetse Jehofa mo medirong ya lona e e tlhomilweng, kwa ntle ga maikano a lona, le ditshupelo tsa lona tsa peleego, e le ditshupelo tsa lona tse di fisiwang, le ditshupelo tsa lona tsa boupe, le ditshupelo tsa lona tse di nowang, le ditshupelo tsa lona tsa kagiso.”" 
Numbers29:40 Mme Moše a bolelela bana ba Iseraele gotlhe ka fa Jehofa o di laoletseng Moše ka teng. 
Numbers30:1 Moše a bua le ditlhogo tsa ditso tsa bana ba Iseraele, a re: “Se ke sone se Jehofa o se laotseng:" 
Numbers30:2 Fa monna mongwe a ikanele Jehofa, kgotsa fa a ikana ikano gore o golega mowa wa gagwe ka kgolego, a a se tlole lefoko la gagwe; a a dire gotlhe fela ka fa go tswang mo molomong wa gagwe ka gone." 
Numbers30:3 Le gone fa mosadi a ikanela Jehofa, a ikgolega ka kgolego a sa ntse a le mo ntlong ya ga rraagwe, a le mo borweetsaneng jwa gagwe;" 
Numbers30:4 mme fa rraagwe a utlwa ikano ya gagwe, le ikgolego ya gagwe e o ikgolegileng mowa ka yone, fa rraagwe a mo didimalela fela, foo maikano otlhe a gagwe a tlaa ema fela, le ikgolego nngwe le nngwe e o ikgolegileng mowa ka yone e tlaa ema." 
Numbers30:5 Fa rraagwe a gana ka letsatsi le o utlwileng ka lone; a go se eme maikano ape a gagwe, le fa e le ikgolego epe e o ikgolegileng mowa ka yone; Jehofa o tlaa mo itshwarela, gonne rraagwe o ne a gana." 
Numbers30:6 Fa a nyetswe ke monna, maikano a gagwe a sa ntse a le mo go ene, kgotsa puo ya molomo wa gagwe ya potlako e o ikgolegileng mowa ka yone;" 
Numbers30:7 fa monna wa gagwe a e utlwa, mme a mo didimalela fela ka letsatsi le o utlwang ka lone, foo maikano a gagwe a tlaa ema, le diikgolego tse o ikgolegileng mowa ka tsone di tlaa ema." 
Numbers30:8 Fa monna wa gagwe a gana ka tsatsi le o utlwang ka lone, foo o tlaa dirolola ikano ya gagwe e nne lefela, le puo ya molomo wa gagwe ya potlako, e o ikgolegileng mowa ka yone; Jehofa o tlaa mo itshwarela." 
Numbers30:9 Ikano ya moswagadi, kgotsa ya yo o tlhadilweng, gotlhe mo o ikgolegileng ka gone, go tlaa mo emela fela." 
Numbers30:10 Fa a ikanne mo ntlong ya monna wa gagwe, kgotsa a ikgolega mowa ka ikgolego ka ikano," 
Numbers30:11 mme monna wa gagwe a go utlwa, a mo didimalela fela, a se ka a gana: foo maikano a gagwe otlhe a eme, le ikgolego nngwe le nngwe e o ikgolegileng mowa ka yone e eme." 
Numbers30:12 Fa monna wa gagwe a sa di amogele, tsa nna lefela ka tsatsi le o di utlwileng ka lone, foo le fa e ka nna eng se se duleng mo molomong wa gagwe ka ga maikano a gagwe, kgotsa ka ga ikgolego ya mowa wa gagwe, a go se ka ga ema; monna wa gagwe o di dirile lefela; Jehofa o tlaa mo itshwarela." 
Numbers30:13 Ikano nngwe le nngwe, le yone ikano e e golegileng mosadi gore a ipatike mowa, monna wa gagwe o ka e tlhomamisa, gape monna wa gagwe o ka e dira lefela." 
Numbers30:14 Fa monna wa gagwe a mo didimalela fela ka malatsi otlhe, foo o tlhomamisa maikano otlhe a gagwe, le diikgolego tsotlhe tsa gagwe tse di mo go ene; o di tlhomamisitse ka tsatsi le o di utlwileng ka lone." 
Numbers30:15 Fa a sa di amogele, di nna lefela a sena go di utlwa, foo a monna a rwale tshiamololo ya mosadi.”" 
Numbers30:16 E ke yone melao e Jehofa o e laoletseng Moše, gare ga monna le mosadi wa gagwe, gare ga rra motho le morwadie, a sa ntse a le mo borweetsaneng, mo ntlong ya ga rraagwe." 
Numbers31:1 Jehofa a bua le Moše, a re:" 
Numbers31:2 “Busolosetsa bana ba Iseraele mo go Bamidiane, morago ga moo o tlaa kopanngwa le batho ba gaeno.”" 
Numbers31:3 Moše a bua le batho, a re: “Tlhomedisang banna mo go lona gore ba bolole ntwa, ba bololele Bamidiane ba ye go dira pusoloso ya ga Jehofa mo go Bamidiane." 
Numbers31:4 A go tswe banna ba le 1 000 mo lotsong longwe le longwe mo ditsong tsotlhe tsa Iseraele, e le ba lo tlaa ba bolotsang ntwa.”" 
Numbers31:5 Mme mo masomosomong a Baiseraele ga tlhaolwa 1 000 fela mo lotsong longwe le longwe, ke gore batho ba le 12 000 ba ba tlhomeletseng ntwa." 
Numbers31:6 Moše a ba bolotsa ntwa, ba le 1 000 fela ba lotso longwe le longwe, bone le Finease morwa Eleasare moperesiti, ba ya ntweng, ba tshotse dilwana tsa ntlo e e boitshepo, le dinaka tsa go opa mokgosi." 
Numbers31:7 Ba tlhabana le Bamidiane, jaaka Jehofa a laotse Moše; mme lonna lotlhe ba lo bolaya." 
Numbers31:8 Dikgosi tsa Midiane ba di bolaela mo go ba bangwe ba ba bolailweng e bong Efi, le Rekeme, le Sure, le Hure le Reba, dikgosi tse tlhano tsa Midiane. Balaame morwa Beore le ene ba mmolaya ka tšhaka." 
Numbers31:9 Bana ba Iseraele ba tshwara basadi ba Midiane le banyana ba bone; le dikgomo tsotlhe tsa bone, le matlhape otlhe a bone, le dithoto tsotlhe tsa bone, ba di gapa." 
Numbers31:10 Metse ya bone yotlhe kwa ba ne ba agile gone, le manno a bone ba a fisa ka molelo." 
Numbers31:11 Ba tsaya kgapo yotlhe, le thopo yotlhe, ya batho le ya dikgomo." 
Numbers31:12 Batshwarwa, le thopo, le kgapo, ba isa gotlhe kwa go Moše, le kwa go Eleasare moperesiti, le kwa phuthegong ya bana ba Iseraele, kwa bothibelelong mo dipaleng tsa Moabe, tse di fa Joretane kwa Jeriko." 
Numbers31:13 Moše le Eleasare moperesiti, le dikgosana tsotlhe tsa phuthego, ba tswa ba ya go ba kgatlhantsha kwa ntle ga bothibelelo." 
Numbers31:14 Moše a nna bogale le bagolwane ba ntwa, balaodi ba dikete, le balaodi ba makgolo ba ba tswang kwa tirong ya ntwa." 
Numbers31:15 Moše a ba raya a re: “A lo tshedisitse basadi botlhe? 
Numbers31:16 Bonang, bao ba tlodisitse bana ba Iseraele tlolo fa pele ga Jehofa, mo tirong ele ya ga Peore, ka kgakololo ya ga Balaame, jalo sebetso sa tla mo phuthegong ya Jehofa." 
Numbers31:17 Ke gone jaana bolayang bana botlhe ba basimane, le basadi botlhe ba ba itsileng monna ka go lala nae." 
Numbers31:18 Mme bana botlhe ba basetsana, ba ba sa itseng monna ka go lala nae, lo ba itsheditsetse." 
Numbers31:19 Lo thibelele kwa ntle ga bothibelelo ka malatsi a supa; le fa e le mang wa lona yo o bolaileng motho, le gone le fa e le mang yo o amileng motho yo o bolailweng, lo iitshekise ka letsatsi la boraro le ka letsatsi la bosupa, lona le batshwarwa ba lona." 
Numbers31:20 Ka ga seaparo sengwe le sengwe, le tsotlhe tse di dirilweng ka letlalo, le tiro yotlhe ya maodi a dipodi, le dilo tsotlhe tse di dirilweng ka logong lo di itshekise.”" 
Numbers31:21 Eleasare moperesiti a raya batlhabani ba ba tswang ntweng, a re: “E ke yone taolo e e tlhomamisitsweng ya molao, e Jehofa o e laoletseng Moše;" 
Numbers31:22 le fa go ntse jalo gouta, le selefera, le kgotlho, le tshipi, le boleke le lotwe," 
Numbers31:23 tsotlhe tse di sa senngweng ke molelo, lo di ralatse molelo, di tlaa nna boitsheko; le fa go ntse jalo a di itshekisiwe ka metsi a tomololo; mme tsotlhe tse di ka senngwang ke molelo, lo di ralatse metsi." 
Numbers31:24 Lo tlhatswe diaparo tsa lona ka letsatsi la bosupa, mme lo tlaa nna boitsheko, morago ga moo lo ka tla mo bothibelelong.”" 
Numbers31:25 Jehofa a bua le Moše, a re:" 
Numbers31:26 “Wena le Eleasare moperesiti, le ditlhogo tsa makgotla a borra batho, lo dire palo ya kgapo e e gapilweng, ya batho le ya dikgomo;" 
Numbers31:27 lo kgaoganye kgapo eo sebedi: ntlha nngwe lo e kgaoganyetse banna ba ba maano mo tlhabanong, ba ba neng ba bolotse ntwa, ntlha e nngwe e nne ya phuthego yotlhe." 
Numbers31:28 Lo tseele Jehofa lekgetho mo batlhabaning ba ba tswang ntweng; mo makgolong a matlhano mangwe le mangwe lo tseye setshedi se le sengwe fela sa batho, sa dikgomo, sa diesela le sa matsomane." 
Numbers31:29 Lo di tseye mo kabelong ya bone, lo di neye Eleasare moperesiti, e le tshupelo ya tsholetso ya ga Jehofa." 
Numbers31:30 Mo kabelong ya bana ba Iseraele, mo masomeng a matlhano mangwe le mangwe o tseye setshedi se le sengwe fela, sa batho, sa dikgomo, sa diesela, sa matsomane, e bong ditshedi tsotlhe, mme lo di neye Balefi ba ba tshegetsang tebelo ya motlaagana wa ga Jehofa.”" 
Numbers31:31 Moše le Eleasare moperesiti ba dira jaaka Jehofa a laotse Moše. 
Numbers31:32 Jaana kgapo e e setseng batlhabani ba sena go tsaya kgapo ya bone, e ne e le dinku di le 675 000," 
Numbers31:33 le dikgomo di le 72 000," 
Numbers31:34 diesela di le 61 000," 
Numbers31:35 batho ba le mmogo ba le 32 000, ba basadi ba ba neng ba sa itse monna ka go lala nae." 
Numbers31:36 Bontlhanngwe jo e neng e le kabelo ya ba ba tswang ntweng e ne e le dinku di le 337 500. 
Numbers31:37 Lekgetho la ga Jehofa la dinku e le 675. 
Numbers31:38 Dikgomo di ne di le 36 000; lekgetho la ga Jehofa la tsone e le 72. 
Numbers31:39 Diesela di ne di le 30 500; lekgetho la ga Jehofa la tsone e le 61. 
Numbers31:40 Batho ba le 16 000; lekgetho la ga Jehofa la bone e le batho ba le 32. 
Numbers31:41 Lekgetho le e neng e le tshupelo ya ga Jehofa ya tsholetso, Moše a le naya Eleasare moperesiti, jaaka Jehofa a laotse Moše." 
Numbers31:42 Bontlhanngwe jo bo abetsweng bana ba Iseraele, jo Moše o bo lomolotseng mo go tsa banna ba ba tlhabanyeng," 
Numbers31:43 (mme bontlhanngwe jo bo abetsweng phuthego e ne e le dinku di le 337 500," 
Numbers31:44 dikgomo di le 36 000," 
Numbers31:45 diesela di le 30 500," 
Numbers31:46 batho ba le 16 000); 
Numbers31:47 e bong mo go jone bontlhanngwe jo bo abetsweng bana ba Iseraele, Moše a somola go le gongwe fela mo go masome matlhano mangwe le mangwe, ga batho le ga diruiwa, a go naya Balefi ba ba tshegetsang tebelo ya motlaagana wa ga Jehofa, jaaka Jehofa a laotse Moše." 
Numbers31:48 Bagolwane ba ba laolang ba dikete ba ntwa, balaodi ba dikete le balaodi ba makgolo, ba atamela kwa go Moše." 
Numbers31:49 Ba raya Moše ba re: “Batlhanka ba gago ba badile palo ya batlhabani ba ba mo taolong ya rona, mme ga go tlhokafale monna ope mo go rona." 
Numbers31:50 Re lerile seromololo sa ga Jehofa se motho mongwe le mongwe o se bonyeng, mekgabo ya gouta, bompolokwane ba magwejana, mefitshana ya mabogo, dipalamenwana tsa sekanelelo, manyena a ditsebe le mefitshana ya thamo, go tla re direla mewa ya rona tetlanyo fa pele ga Jehofa.”" 
Numbers31:51 Moše le Eleasare moperesiti ba amogela gouta mo go bone, e bong mekgabo yotlhe e e thudilweng." 
Numbers31:52 Gouta yotlhe ya tshupelo ya tsholetso e ba ne ba e isetsa Jehofa, ya balaodi ba dikete, le balaodi ba makgolo, e ne e le dikilokerama di le 190." 
Numbers31:53 (Gonne batlhabani ba ne ba ikgapetse thopo, mongwe le mongwe a itseela ka esi.)" 
Numbers31:54 Moše le Eleasare moperesiti ba amogela gouta mo balaoding ba dikete, le balaoding ba makgolo, ba e isa mo mogopeng wa bophuthegelo gore e nne morafolo fa pele ga Jehofa, o o tswang baneng ba Iseraele." 
Numbers32:1 Jaana bana ba ga Rubene, le bana ba ga Gate ba bo ba na le bontsi jo bogolo jwa matlhape; mme e rile ba bona lefatshe la Jasere, le lefatshe la Gileate, ba fitlhela felo foo e le felo fa go tshwanetseng matlhape." 
Numbers32:2 Bana ba ga Gate le bana ba ga Rubene ba tla ba bua le Moše le Eleasare moperesiti, le dikgosana tsa phuthego, ba re:" 
Numbers32:3 “Atarothe, le Dibone, le Jasere, le Nimera, le Hešebone, le Eleale, le Sebame, le Nebo le Beone," 
Numbers32:4 lefatshe le Jehofa o le kgemethileng fa pele ga phuthego ya Iseraele, ke lefatshe le le tshwanetseng matlhape, mme batlhanka ba gago ba na le matlhape.”" 
Numbers32:5 Ba re: “Fa re bonye tebosego mo matlhong a gago, a lefatshe le, le newe batlhanka ba gago go nna boswa; mme o se ka wa re tshedisa Joretane.”" 
Numbers32:6 Moše a raya bana ba ga Gate le bana ba ga Rubene, a re: “A bana ba ga rraeno ba tlaa ya ntweng, mme lona lo tlaa dula fela fano?" 
Numbers32:7 Ana lo ngodiisetsang pelo ya bana ba Iseraele, gore ba se tshelele kwa lefatsheng le Jehofa o le ba neileng?" 
Numbers32:8 Borraeno ba dirile jalo jale fa ke ba roma ba ya go bona lefatshe, ba tswa Kateše-barenea." 
Numbers32:9 Gonne e rile ba tlhatlogela kwa molatšaneng wa Ešekole, mme ba bona lefatshe, ba ngodiisa pelo ya bana ba Iseraele gore ba se ka ba tsena mo lefatsheng le Jehofa o ne a le ba neile." 
Numbers32:10 Mme bogale jwa ga Jehofa jwa tuka ka tsatsi leo, mme a ikana, a re:" 
Numbers32:11 ‘Ruri ga go na ope wa banna ba ba duleng kwa Egepeto, go simolola ka ba ba dinyaga di 20 go ya kwa go bomogoloa bone, yo o tlaa bonang lefatshe le ke le ikanetseng Aberahame le Isake le Jakobe; ka ba se ka ba ntshala morago ka botlalo," 
Numbers32:12 fa e se Kalebe morwa Jefune wa Mokenise, le Jošua morwa Nune, gonne ba setse Jehofa morago ka botlalo.’" 
Numbers32:13 Mme bogale jwa ga Jehofa jwa tukela Iseraele, mme a ba kgarakgatsha mo nageng ka dinyaga di le 40, ga tsamaya losika lotlhe lo lo dirileng bosula mo ponong ya ga Jehofa lo nyelediwa." 
Numbers32:14 Jaanong le lona lo tsogile lo eme mo boemong jwa borra ba lona, lo le loato lwa batho ba ba boleo, go ba lo totisa bogale jo bo tukang jwa ga Jehofa mo Iseraele." 
Numbers32:15 Gonne fa lo fapoga mo go mo saleng morago o tlaa ba a ba tlogela mo nageng; mme lo tlaa senya batho ba botlhe fela.” 
Numbers32:16 Ba atamela fa go ene, ba re: “Re tlaa agela matlhape a rona maraka, le bana ba rona metse fano;" 
Numbers32:17 mme rona ka rosi re tlaa bo re tlhometse re iketleeditse go etelela bana ba Iseraele pele, go tle go tsamaye re ba fitlhise mo felong ga bone; mme bana ba rona ba tlaa nna mo metseng e e thekeleditsweng ka dithako, ka ntlha ya banni ba lefatshe." 
Numbers32:18 Ga re ketla re boela matlong a rona, go tsamaya bana ba Iseraele ba tsena, mongwe le mongwe wa bone mo bosweng jwa gagwe pele," 
Numbers32:19 gonne ga re ketla re rua nabo kwa moseja ga Joretane le go ya kwa pele; ka boswa jwa rona bo re wetse moseja ono ga Joretane ntlheng ya botlhabatsatsi.” 
Numbers32:20 Moše a ba raya a re: “Fa lo tlaa dira se; fa lo tlaa tlhomela go ya ntweng fa pele ga Jehofa," 
Numbers32:21 fa monna mongwe le mongwe yo o tlhometseng a tlaa tshela Joretane fa pele ga Jehofa, go tsamaya a leleka baba ba gagwe fa pele ga gagwe," 
Numbers32:22 le lefatshe le fenyega fa pele ga Jehofa, foo morago ga moo lo tlaa bowa, mme lo tlaa bo lo se na molato fa pele ga Jehofa, le fa pele ga Iseraele, mme lefatshe le, e tlaa nna boswa jwa lona fa pele ga Jehofa." 
Numbers32:23 E tlaa re fa lo gana go dira jalo, bonang, lo tlaa bo lo leofetse Jehofa; lo bo lo itse ruri fa boleo jwa lona bo tlaa lo tshwara." 
Numbers32:24 Agelang banyana ba lona metse, le dinku tsa lona maraka; lo dire sone se se duleng mo molomong wa lona.”" 
Numbers32:25 Bana ba ga Gate le bana ba ga Rubene ba bua le Moše, ba re: “Batlhanka ba gago ba tlaa dira jaaka morena wa rona a laotse." 
Numbers32:26 Banyana ba rona, basadi ba rona, matsomane a rona le matlhape a rona otlhe a tlaa nna gone mo metseng ya Gileate." 
Numbers32:27 Batlhanka ba gago ba tlaa kgabaganya, mongwe le mongwe yo o tlhomeletseng ntwa, a ya kwa tlhabanong fa pele ga Jehofa, jaaka morena wa rona a bua.”" 
Numbers32:28 Jalo Moše a laya Eleasare moperesiti ka ga bone, le Jošua morwa Nune, le ditlhogo tsa makgotla a borra ba ditso tsa bana ba Iseraela." 
Numbers32:29 Moše a ba raya a re: “Fa bana ba ga Gate le bana ba ga Rubene ba kgabaganya Joretane le lona, e bong monna mongwe le mongwe yo o tlhomeletseng tlhabano fa pele ga Jehofa, mme lefatshe le fenyega fa pele ga lona, foo lo ba neye lefatshe la Gileate go nna boswa." 
Numbers32:30 Mme e tlaa re fa ba gana go kgabaganya le lona ba tlhometse, a ba bone maswa mo go lona mo lefatsheng la Kanana.”" 
Numbers32:31 Bana ba ga Gate le bana ba ga Rubene ba mo fetola ba re: “Fela jaaka Morena a reile batlhanka ba gago, re tlaa dira fela jalo." 
Numbers32:32 Re tlaa kgabaganya re tlhometse fa pele ga Jehofa, re ya mo lefatsheng la Kanana, thuo ya boswa jwa rona e tlaa sala le rona kwano moseja ono ga Joretane.”" 
Numbers32:33 Moše a naya bone, e bong bana ba ga Gate le bana ba ga Rubene le bontlhanngwe jwa lotso lwa ga Manase morwa Josefa, Moše a ba naya bogosi jwa ga Sihone kgosi ya Baamore, le bogosi jwa ga Oge kgosi ya Bašane, lefatshe go ya le metse ya lone e eme mo didikadikeng tsa yone, e bong metse ya lefatshe mo tikologong." 
Numbers32:34 Bana ba ga Gate ba aga Dibone, le Atarothe le Aroere;" 
Numbers32:35 le Aterothe-šofane, le Jasere le Jogebeha;" 
Numbers32:36 le Bethenimera, le Betheharane; metse e e thekeleditsweng ka dithako le maraka a dinku." 
Numbers32:37 Bana ba ga Rubene ba aga Hešebone, le Eleale le Kiriathaime;" 
Numbers32:38 le Nebo, le Baale-meone, (maina a yone a fetotswe) le Sibema: metse e ba e agileng ba e bitsa ka maina a sele." 
Numbers32:39 Bana ba ga Makire, morwa Manase ba ya lefatsheng la Gileate, ba le thopa, ba le tlosetsa Baamore ba ba mo go lone." 
Numbers32:40 Lefatshe la Gileate Moše a le naya Makire morwa Manase; mme a aga mo go lone. 
Numbers32:41 Jaire morwa Manase a ya a thopa metsana ya lone, a e raya leina a re Hafotha-jaire." 
Numbers32:42 Noba a ya a thopa Kenathe le metsana ya teng, mme a go raya leina a re, Noba, jaaka leina la gagwe." 
Numbers33:1 Tse ke ditshetsa tsa bana ba Iseraele fa ba tswa mo lefatsheng la Egepeto ka masomosomo a bone, ba le mo taolong ya ga Moše le Arone." 
Numbers33:2 Moše a kwala mabololo a bone ka fa dikhudugong tsa bone ka taolo ya ga Jehofa; mme tse ke dikhudugo tsa bone ka fa mabololong a bone. 
Numbers33:3 Ba ne ba bolotse mo Ramesese ka kgwedi ya ntlha, ka letsatsi la 15 la kgwedi ya ntlha, e rile go le ka moso, go letse go le tlolaganyo, bana ba Iseraele ba tswa ka letsogo le le tsholetsegileng mo ponong ya Baegepeto botlhe." 
Numbers33:4 Baegepeto bone ba sa ntse ba fitlha batsalwapele botlhe ba bone, ba Jehofa o ba laitseng mo go bone; medimo ya bone, le yone, Jehofa a e sekisitse." 
Numbers33:5 Bana ba Iseraele ba tloga mo Ramasese, ba ya ba tlhoma mo Sukothe." 
Numbers33:6 Ba tloga mo Sukothe, ba ya ba thibelela mo Ethame, o o fa ntlheng ya bogole jwa naga." 
Numbers33:7 Ba tloga mo Ethame, ba boela kwa Pihahirothe o o fa pele ga Baalesefone, mme ba thibelela fa pele ga Migetole." 
Numbers33:8 Ba tloga fa pele ga Hahirothe, ba ralala lewatle ba ya ba tsena mo nageng, ba tsamaya loeto lwa malatsi a le mararo mo nageng ya Ethame, mme ba thibelela mo Mara." 
Numbers33:9 Ba tloga mo Mara, ba fitlha mo Elime; mo Elime go ne go le metswedi ya metsi e le 12, le ditlhare tsa makolane di le 70; mme ba thibelela gone." 
Numbers33:10 Ba tloga mo Elime, ba thibelela fa Lewatleng le Lehihidu." 
Numbers33:11 Ba tloga fa Lewatleng le Lehibidu, ba ya ba thibelela mo nageng ya Sine." 
Numbers33:12 Ba tloga mo nageng ya Sine, ba thibelela mo Dofeka." 
Numbers33:13 Ba tloga mo Dofeka, ba thibelela mo Aluše." 
Numbers33:14 Ba tloga mo Aluše, ba thibelela mo Refidime, kwa go ne go se na metsi a a ka nowang ke batho gone." 
Numbers33:15 Ba tloga mo Refidime, ba thibelela mo nageng ya Sinai." 
Numbers33:16 Ba tloga mo nageng ya Sinai, ba thibelela mo Kiberothe-taafa." 
Numbers33:17 Ba tloga mo Kiberothe-taafa, ba thibelela mo Haserothe." 
Numbers33:18 Ba tloga mo Haserothe, ba thibelela mo Rithema." 
Numbers33:19 Ba tloga mo Rithema, ba thibelela mo Rimone-perese." 
Numbers33:20 Ba tloga mo Rimone-perese, ba thibelela mo Libena." 
Numbers33:21 Ba tloga mo Libena, ba thibelela mo Risa." 
Numbers33:22 Ba tloga mo Risa, ba thibelela mo Kehelatha." 
Numbers33:23 Ba tloga mo Kehelatha ba thibelela mo thabeng ya Shefere. 
Numbers33:24 Ba tloga mo thabeng ya Shefere, ba thibelela mo Harata." 
Numbers33:25 Ba tloga mo Harata, ba thibelela mo Makhelothe." 
Numbers33:26 Ba tloga mo Makhelothe, ba thibelela mo Tabathe." 
Numbers33:27 Ba tloga mo Tahathe, ba thibelela mo Tera." 
Numbers33:28 Ba tloga mo Tera, ba thibelela mo Mitheka." 
Numbers33:29 Ba tloga mo Mitheka, ba thibelela mo Hašemona." 
Numbers33:30 Ba tloga mo Hašemona, ba thibelela mo Moserothe." 
Numbers33:31 Ba tloga mo Moserothe, ba thibelela mo Benejaakane." 
Numbers33:32 Ba tloga mo Benejaakane ba thibelela mo Hore-hagitegate. 
Numbers33:33 Ba tloga mo Hore-hagitegate ba thibelela mo Jotebatha. 
Numbers33:34 Ba tloga mo Jotebatha, ba thibelela mo Aberona." 
Numbers33:35 Ba tloga mo Aberona, ba thibelela mo Esione-gebere." 
Numbers33:36 Ba tloga mo Esione-gebere, ba thibelela mo nageng ya Tsine (ke gore Kateše)." 
Numbers33:37 Ba tloga mo Kateše, ba thibelela mo thabeng ya Hore, ka fa ntlheng ya lefatshe la Etome." 
Numbers33:38 Arone moperesiti a tlhatlogela mo thabeng ya Hore ka taolo ya ga Jehofa, a swela gone, e le ngwaga wa 40 bana ba Iseraele ba sena go tswa mo lefatsheng la Egepeto, ka kgwedi ya botlhano, ka letsatsi la ntlha la kgwedi." 
Numbers33:39 E rile Arone a swela mo thabeng ya Hore a bo a le dinyaga di le 123. 
Numbers33:40 Mme Mokanana, kgosi ya Arate, yo o neng a potile lefatshe la Kanana ntlheng ya borwa, a utlwelela go tla ga Baiseraele." 
Numbers33:41 Ba tloga mo thabeng ya Hore, ba thibelela mo Salemona." 
Numbers33:42 Ba tloga mo Salemona, ba thibelela mo Punone." 
Numbers33:43 Ba tloga mo Punone, ba thibelela mo Obothe." 
Numbers33:44 Ba tloga mo Obothe, ba thibelela mo Iye-abarime, mo molelwaneng wa Moabe." 
Numbers33:45 Ba tloga mo Iyime, ba thibelela mo Dibone-gate." 
Numbers33:46 Ba tloga mo Dibone-gate, ba thibelela mo Alemone-dibelathaime." 
Numbers33:47 Ba tloga mo Alemone-dibelathaime, ba thibelela mo nageng ya Abarime fa pele ga Nebo." 
Numbers33:48 Ba tloga mo nageng ya Abarime, ba thibelela mo dipaleng tsa Moabe fa Joretane kwa Jeriko." 
Numbers33:49 Ba thibelela fa Joretane go simolola kwa Bethe-ješimothe go ya kwa Abele-šitime mo dipaleng tsa Moabe. 
Numbers33:50 Jehofa a bua le Moše mo dipaleng tsa Moabe, fa Joretane kwa Jeriko a re:" 
Numbers33:51 “Bua le bana ba Iseraele, o ba reye o re: Lo tlaa re lo kgabaganya Joretane lo ya mo fatsheng la Kanana," 
Numbers33:52 foo lo leleke banni botlhe ba lefatshe fa pele ga lona, lo senye maje a bone otlhe a a tshwantsheditseng, lo bo lo senye ditshwantsho tsa bone tsotlhe tse di thetsweng, lo nyeletse mafelo otlhe a bone a a tlotlometseng;" 
Numbers33:53 lo itseele lefatshe, lo age mo go lone, gonne lefatshe ke le neile lona go le rua." 
Numbers33:54 Lo rue lefatshe ka taolo ya bola, ka fa ditshikeng tsa lona; ba ba leng bantsi lo ba neye boswa bo le bogolo, ba ba leng bannye lo ba neye boswa bo le bonnye; kwa bola bo laolelang motho gone, e nne gone ga gagwe; lo rue ka fa ditsong tsa borraeno." 
Numbers33:55 E tlaa re fa lo gana go leleka banni ba lefatshe fa pele ga lona, foo ba lo ba lesang ba sala ba tlaa nna jaaka dibabi mo matlhong a lona, le jaaka mitlwa mo ditlhakoreng tsa lona, ba tlaa lo tshwenya mo lefatsheng le lo agang mo go lone." 
Numbers33:56 Go tlaa dirala gore jaaka ke ne ke gopotse go ba direla ke tlaa direla lona fela jalo.” 
Numbers34:1 Jehofa a bua le Moše, a re:" 
Numbers34:2 “Laola bana ba Iseraele, o ba reye o re: Mogang lo fitlhang mo lefatsheng la Kanana, (leo ke lona lefatshe le le tlaa nnang boswa jwa lona, e bong lefatshe la Kanana ka fa melelwaneng ya lona)," 
Numbers34:3 foo ntlha ya lone ya kwa borwa, e simologe kwa nageng ya Tsine go ya go bapa le Etome, molelwane wa lona wa kwa borwa o tswe kwa sekhutlong sa Lewatle la Letswai go ya ntlheng ya botlhabatsatsi." 
Numbers34:4 Molelwane wa lona o menoge o pote botlhatlogo jwa Akerabime ka fa ntlheng ya borwa, o fetele kwa Tsine; matswelelo a one a pote Kateše-barenea ka fa ntlheng ya borwa, o bo o tswele kwa Hasare-atare, mme o fetele kwa Asemone;" 
Numbers34:5 molelwane o menoge fa o tswa Asemone o ye kwa molatsaneng wa Egepeto, sekhutlo sa one se nne kwa lewatleng." 
Numbers34:6 “Molelwane wa ka fa ntlheng ya bophirimatsatsi e nne Lewatle le Legolo le losi lwa lone; e nne one molelwane wa lona wa kwa bophirimatsatsi. 
Numbers34:7 “Mme o, e nne molelwane wa lona ntlheng ya botsheka, go tswa kwa Lewatleng le Legolo lo tlaa ithalela thaba ya Hore," 
Numbers34:8 go tswa thabeng ya Hore lo tlaa ralala fela go ya kwa botsenong jwa Hamathe; sekhutlo sa molelwane se nne kwa Setate. 
Numbers34:9 Molelwane o tlaa tswela kwa Siferone, sekhutlo se nne kwa Hasare-enane; o, e tlaa nna one molelwane wa lona ntlheng ya botsheka." 
Numbers34:10 “Lo tlaa rala molelwane wa lona ka fa ntlheng ya botlhabatsatsi, lo o rale go tswa Hasare-enane go ya Shefame." 
Numbers34:11 Molelwane o tlaa tswa Shefame o fologela kwa Ribela, go pota Aine ntlheng ya botlhabatsatsi; molelwane o tlaa fologa, o ya go fitlha kwa letsogong la lewatle la Kinerete ntlheng ya botlhabatsatsi." 
Numbers34:12 Molelwane o tlaa fologela kwa Joretane, sekhutlo sa one se tlaa nna kwa Lewatleng la Letswani; e tlaa nna lone lefatshe la lona ka fa melelwaneng ya lona mo tikologong.”" 
Numbers34:13 Moše a laola bana ba Iseraele, a re: “Le ke lone lefatshe le lo tlaa le ruang ka taolo ya bola, le Jehofa o laotseng gore le newe ditso tse di ferang mongwe fela le bontlhanngwe jwa lotso lo longwe," 
Numbers34:14 gonne lotso lwa bana ba ga Rubene ka fa makgotleng a borraabo, le lotso lwa bana ba ga Gate ka fa makgotleng a borraabo ba amogetse, le bontlhanngwe jwa lotso lwa ga Manase ba amogetse boswa jwa bone." 
Numbers34:15 Ditso tse pedi le bontlhanngwe jwa lotso ba amogetse boswa moseja ga Joretane kwa Jeriko ntlheng ya botlhabatsatsi, go leba kwa letsatsi le tlhabang teng.”" 
Numbers34:16 Jehofa a bua le Moše, a re:" 
Numbers34:17 “A, ke maina a banna ba ba tlaa lo kgaoganyang lefatshe boswa: Eleasare moperesiti, le Jošua morwa Nune." 
Numbers34:18 Lo tseye kgosana e le nngwe fela mo lotsong longwe le longwe, go kgaoganya lefatshe boswa." 
Numbers34:19 A, ke one maina a banna bao: Wa lotso lwa ga Juta, ke Kalebe morwa Jefune." 
Numbers34:20 Wa lotso lwa ga Simeone, ke Shemuele morwa Amihute." 
Numbers34:21 Wa lotso lwa ga Benjamine, ke Elitate morwa Kiselone." 
Numbers34:22 Wa lotso lwa bana ba ga Dane kgosana, e bong Buki morwa Jogeli." 
Numbers34:23 Wa bana ba ga Josefe, wa lotso lwa bana ba ga Manase kgosana, e bong Hanniele morwa Efote." 
Numbers34:24 Wa lotso lwa bana ba ga Eferaime kgosana, e bong Kemuele morwa Shifetane." 
Numbers34:25 Wa lotso lwa bana ba ga Sebulone kgosana, e bong Elisafane morwa Parenake." 
Numbers34:26 Wa lotso lwa bana ba ga Isakare kgosana, e bong Paletiele morwa Asane." 
Numbers34:27 Le wa lotso lwa bana ba ga Ašere kgosana, e bong Ahihute morwa Shelomi." 
Numbers34:28 Le wa lotso lwa bana ba ga Nafetali kgosana, e bong Petahele morwa Amihute.”" 
Numbers34:29 Bao ke bone ba Jehofa o laotseng gore ba kgaoganyetse bana ba Iseraele boswa mo lefatsheng la Kanana. 
Numbers35:1 Jehofa a bua le Moše mo dipaleng tsa Moabe fa Joretane, kwa Jeriko, a re:" 
Numbers35:2 “Laola bana ba Iseraele gore ba ntshetse Balefi mo bosweng jwa dithuo tsa bone metse e ba tlaa agang mo go yone, le dintlhana tsa metse eo lo di neye Balefi." 
Numbers35:3 Metse eo, a e nne ya bone go aga mo go yone; dintlhana tsa yone e nne tsa dikgomo tsa bone, le tsa dithoto tsa bone, le tsa diruiwa tsotlhe tsa bone." 
Numbers35:4 Boatlhamo jwa dintlhana tsa metse e lo e nayang Balefi a bo simologe ka lorako lwa motse, bo ye go ema ka selekanyo sa dimetara di le 450 ka ntlha tsotlhe." 
Numbers35:5 E re kwa ntle ga motse, ntlheng ya botlhabatsatsi lo lekanye sebaka sa dimetara di le 900, ntlheng ya borwa, sebaka sa dimetara di le 900, ntlheng ya bophirimatsatsi, sebaka sa dimetara di le 900, ntlheng ya botsheka, sebaka sa dimetara di le 900, motse o le fa gare. Tseo e tlaa nna tsone dintlhana mo tikologong ya metse ya bone." 
Numbers35:6 Metse e lo e nayang Balefi, a e nne yone metse e merataro ya botshabelo, e lo e beelang mmolai wa motho go tshabela kwa go yone; kwa ntle ga yone eo lo ba neye metse e le 42." 
Numbers35:7 Metse yotlhe e lo tlaa e nayang Balefi a e nne metse e le 48; lo ba neye yone le dintlhana tikologong ya yone. 
Numbers35:8 Ka ga metse e e leng ya bana ba Iseraele e lo tlaa e nayang Balefi, lo tle lo e tseye e le mentsi mo go ba ba leng bantsi; lo tseye e le mebotlana mo go ba ba leng babotlana; mongwe le mongwe a a neye Balefi metse ya gagwe ka fa bosweng jo o bo bonyeng.”" 
Numbers35:9 Jehofa a bua le Moše, a re:" 
Numbers35:10 “Bua le bana ba Iseraele, o ba reye o re: Mogang lo kgabaganyang Joretane, lo ya mo lefatsheng la Kanana," 
Numbers35:11 foo lo itaolele metse e e tlaa nnang metse ya botshabelo mo go lona; gore mmolai wa motho, yo o bolayang motho ka matsheka fela, a tshabele gone." 
Numbers35:12 Metse eo e tlaa nna botshabelo mo go lona ka ga mmusolosi; gore mmolai wa motho a se swe, a ise a eme fa pele ga phuthego go atlholwa." 
Numbers35:13 Metse e lo tlaa e ntshang e nne merataro ya botshabelo mo go lona. 
Numbers35:14 Lo ntshe metse e le meraro moseja ono ga Joretane, le metse e le meraro mo lefatsheng la Kanana; e tlaa nna metse ya botshabelo." 
Numbers35:15 Metse e merataro eo e tlaa nna ya botshabelo jwa bana ba Iseraele, le jwa baeng ba ba jakileng mo go bone, gore mongwe le mongwe yo o bolayang motho ka matsheka fela, a tshabele teng." 
Numbers35:16 “Fa a mo iteile ka sengwe sa tshipi, mme a swa, ke mmolai wa motho; ruri mmolai wa motho o tlaa bolawa." 
Numbers35:17 Fa a mo gatlile a tshotse lentswe mo seatleng, e le le motho o ka swang ka lone, mme a swa, ke mmolai wa motho; ruri mmolai wa motho o tlaa bolawa." 
Numbers35:18 Kgotsa fa a mo iteile ka sebolao sa logong a se tshotse mo seatleng, e le se motho o ka swang ka sone, mme a swa, ke mmolai wa motho; ruri mmolai wa motho o tlaa bolawa." 
Numbers35:19 Mmusolosi ka esi a bolaye mmolai wa motho; mogang o kopanang nae a a mmolaye. 
Numbers35:20 Fa a mo tlhabile ka kilo, kgotsa a mo konopa, ka go mo lalela, mme a swa," 
Numbers35:21 kgotsa a mo itaya ka letsogo ka kilo, a swa; ruri yo o mo iteileng o tlaa bolawa; ke mmolai wa motho; a mmusolosetsi wa madi a bolaye mmolai wa motho, mogang o kopanang nae." 
Numbers35:22 “Mme fa a mo tlhabile ka tshoganetso, a se na kilo, kgotsa fa a mo konopile ka sengwe, a sa mo lalela," 
Numbers35:23 kgotsa ka lentswe le motho o ka swang ka lone, a sa mmone, a le latlhela mo go ene, mme a swa, le fa a se mmaba wa gagwe, le gone a ne a sa rate go mo utlwisa botlhoko," 
Numbers35:24 foo a phuthego e atlhole gare ga moitei le mmusolosetsi wa madi ka fa dikatlholong tse: 
Numbers35:25 Phuthego e golole mmolai wa motho mo seatleng sa mmusolosetsi wa madi, mme phuthego e mmusetse kwa motseng wa gagwe wa botshabelo, kwa o ne a tshabetse teng; a nne gone go tsamaya moperesiti yo mogolo a a swa, ene yo o ne a tlodiwa lookwane lo lo itshepileng." 
Numbers35:26 Mme fa motlha mongwe mmolai wa motho a ka feta molelwane wa motse wa gagwe wa botshabelo, kwa o ne a tshabetse teng," 
Numbers35:27 fa mmusolosetsi wa madi a mo fitlhela kwa ntle ga molelwane wa motse wa gagwe wa botshabelo, mme fa mmusolosetsi wa madi a bolaya mmolai wa motho; foo a se ka a nna molato wa madi," 
Numbers35:28 gonne o ne a tshwanetse go nna fela mo motseng wa gagwe wa botshabelo, go tsamaya moperesiti yo mogolo a swa. Morago ga loso lwa moperesiti yo mogolo, mmolai wa motho o ka boela kwa lefatsheng le e leng la gagwe." 
Numbers35:29 “Dilo tse di nne molao wa katlholo mo go lona go ya le dikokomana tsotlhe tsa lona mo mannong a otlhe a lona. 
Numbers35:30 Le fa e le mang yo o bolayang motho, mmolai o tlaa bolawa ka molomo wa basupi; motho a se ka a swa ka tshupo ya mosupi a le mongwe fela." 
Numbers35:31 Gape, lo se ka lwa amogela thekololo ka ga botshelo jwa mmolai wa motho yo o molato wa go swa, ruri a a bolawe." 
Numbers35:32 Lo se ka lwa amogela thekololo ka ga gagwe yo o tshabetseng kwa motseng wa gagwe wa botshabelo, ya gore a tle go ba a nna mo lefatsheng, moperesiti yo mogolo a tle a swe pele." 
Numbers35:33 Jalo lo bo lo se ketla lo itshepolola lefatshe le lo nnang mo go lone; gonne madi a leswafatsa lefatshe; ga go na tefo e e ka direlwang lefatshe ya madi a a tshololetsweng mo go lone, fa e se madi a gagwe yo o a tsholotseng." 
Numbers35:34 O se ka wa itshekolola lefatshe le o le nnang, le ke agileng mo gare ga lone; gonne nna Jehofa ke agile mo gare ga bana ba Iseraele.”" 
Numbers36:1 Ditlhogo tsa makgotla a borraabo ba losika lwa bana ba ga Gileate, morwa Makire, morwa Manase, tsa ditshika tsa bomorwa Josefe, tsa atamela, tsa bua fa pele ga Moše le fa pele ga dikgosana, e bong ditlhogo tsa makgotla a borraabo mo baneng ba Iseraele." 
Numbers36:2 Ba re: “Jehofa o laotse morena wa rona gore a neye bana ba Iseraele lefatshe, gore le nne boswa ka taolo ya bola; morena wa rona o ne a laolwa ke Jehofa gore boswa jwa ga Selofehate morwa rraetsho, a bo neye bomorwadie." 
Numbers36:3 Mme jaana e tlaa re fa ba nyalwa ke bomorwa ditso tse dingwe tsa bana ba Iseraele, foo boswa jwa bone bo tlaa tlosiwa mo bosweng jwa borraetsho, bo tlhakanngwe le boswa jwa lotso lo ba tseetsweng mo go lone; jalo bo tlosiwe mo taolelong ya boswa jwa rona." 
Numbers36:4 E tlaa re Jubile wa bana ba Iseraele o dirala, foo boswa jwa bone bo tlaa tlhakanngwa le boswa jwa lotso lo ba tsenang mo go lone; jalo boswa jwa bone bo tlaa tlosiwa mo bosweng jwa lotso lwa borraetsho.”" 
Numbers36:5 Mme Moše a laola bana ba Iseraele ka fa lefokong la ga Jehofa, a re: “Ba lotso lwa bana ba ga Josefe ba bua ka tshiamo." 
Numbers36:6 Se ke sone se Jehofa o se laolang ka ga bomorwadia Selofehate, a re: ‘A ba nyalwe ke ba ba ba ratang; mme ba nyalwe ke ba losika lwa lotso lwa ga rraabo ba le bosi fela." 
Numbers36:7 Jalo ga go ketla go tloga boswa bope jwa bana ba Iseraele mo lotsong longwe jwa ya mo go lo longwe, gonne bana ba Iseraele, mongwe le mongwe o tlaa ngaparela boswa jwa lotso lwa borraagwe." 
Numbers36:8 Ngwana wa mosetsana mongwe le mongwe yo o nang le boswa mo lotsong longwe lwa bana ba Iseraele, a a nne mosadi wa mongwe wa losika lwa lotso lwa ga rraagwe, gore bana ba Iseraele, monna mongwe le mongwe a rue boswa jwa borraagwe." 
Numbers36:9 Jalo ga go ketla go tloga boswa bope mo lotsong longwe jwa ya mo go lo longwe, gonne mo ditsong tsa bana ba Iseraele mongwe le mongwe o tlaa ngaparela boswa jwa gagwe.’ ”" 
Numbers36:10 Fela jaaka Jehofa a laotse Moše, bomorwadia Selofehate ba dira jalo:" 
Numbers36:11 Gonne Mahela, Tiresa, Hogela, Mileka le Noa, bomorwadia Selofehate, ba nyalwa ke bomorwa bana ba ga rraabo." 
Numbers36:12 Ba nyalwa ke ba ditshika tsa bomorwa Manase morwa Josefe, boswa jwa bone jwa nna fela mo lotsong lwa losika lwa ga rraabo." 
Numbers36:13 Tse ke tsone ditaolo le dikatlholo, tse Jehofa o di laoletseng bana ba Iseraele ka seatla sa ga Moše, mo dipaleng tsa Moabe, fa Joretane kwa Jeriko." 
Deuteronomy1:1 A ke one mafoko a Moše o a buileng le Baiseraele botlhe fa moseja ga Joretane, mo nageng, mo molapong wa Areba, bolebagana le Sufe, fa gare ga Parane, le Tofele, le Labane, le Haserothe, le Disahabe." 
Deuteronomy1:2 Go tswa kwa Horebe go fitlha mo Kateše-barenea, ka tsela ya thaba ya Seire, ke mosepele wa malatsi a le 11." 
Deuteronomy1:3 Ka ngwaga wa 40, ka kgwedi ya 11, ka letsatsi la ntlha la kgwedi, Moše a bua le bana ba Iseraele, a bua tsotlhe tse Jehofa o di mo laoletseng ka ga bone;" 
Deuteronomy1:4 morago a sena go fenya Silhone kgosi ya Baamore, yo o ne a agile mo Hešebone, le Oge kgosi ya Bašane, yo o ne a agile mo Ašetarothe, kwa Eterei." 
Deuteronomy1:5 Moše a simolola go bolela molao o, a le kwa moseja ga Joretane, mo lefatsheng la Moabe, a re:" 
Deuteronomy1:6 “Jehofa Modimo wa rona o ne a bua le rona mo Horebe, a re: ‘Go lekanye, ga lo bolo go nna mo thabeng e." 
Deuteronomy1:7 Menogang, lo bothologe, lo ye kwa lefatsheng la makgabana la Baamore, le kwa mafelong otlhe a a gaufi le gone, mo Areba, mo lefatsheng la makgabana, le mo lefatsheng la kwa sehuting, ntlheng ya borwa, le ka kwa losing lwa lewatle, lefatshe la Bakanana, le la Lebanone, go ya kwa nokeng e kgolo, noka ya Euferatese." 
Deuteronomy1:8 Bonang, ke beile lefatshe fa pele go lona; tsenang lo ye go rua lefatshe le Jehofa o le ikanetseng borraeno, Aberahame le Isake le Jakobe, a re: o tlaa le naya bone le losika lwa bone morago ga bone.’" 
Deuteronomy1:9 “Ka bua le lona ka baka loo, ka re: ‘Ga ke a nonofa go lo rwala ke le nosi;" 
Deuteronomy1:10 Jehofa Modimo wa lona o lo ntsifaditse; gompieno lo tshwana le dinaledi tsa legodimo ka bontsi. 
Deuteronomy1:11 Jehofa, Modimo wa borra ba lona, a ke a lo ntsifatse ga makgolo a some, go feta jaaka lo ntse jaana, a a lo segofatse jaaka a lo solofeditse." 
Deuteronomy1:12 Ana ke ka rwala jang ke le nosi ditharaang tsa lona, le mokgweleo wa lona, le kgang ya lona?" 
Deuteronomy1:13 Tsayang banna ba ba botlhale ba ba tlhaloganyo, e le ba ba itsegeng, ka fa ditsong tsa lona; mme ke tlaa ba dira ditlhogo mo go lona.’" 
Deuteronomy1:14 Lo no lwa mphetola, lwa re: ‘Se o se buileng se molemo mo go rona go se dira.’" 
Deuteronomy1:15 Jalo ka tsaya ditlhogo tsa ditso tsa lona, banna ba ba botlhale, ba ba itsegeng, ka ba dira ditlhogo mo go lona, balaodi ba makgolo a masome, balaodi ba makgolo, balaodi ba masome a matlhano, balaodi ba masome, le bagolwane, ka fa ditsong tsa lona." 
Deuteronomy1:16 “Ka laya baatlhodi ba lona ka lobaka loo, ka re: ‘Utlwang ditsheko tsa bana ba borraeno, lo atlhole ka tshiamo gare ga motho le ngwana a rraagwe, le ene moeng yo o mo go lona." 
Deuteronomy1:17 Lo se ka lwa tlhokomela bomangmang jwa batho mo katlholong; lo utlwe ba babotlana le ba bagolo, go tshwane fela; lo se ka lwa boifa sefatlhogo sa motho; gonne katlholo ke ya Modimo. Tsheko e e lo palelang lo e lere kwano go nna, mme ke tlaa e utlwa.’" 
Deuteronomy1:18 Ya re ka lobaka loo ka lo laolela tsotlhe tse lo tshwanetseng go di dira. 
Deuteronomy1:19 “Ra tloga ra tswa Horebe, ra ralala naga e kgolo e e boitshegang eo, e lo e bonyeng ka tsela e e yang kwa lefatsheng la Baamore la makgabana, jaaka Jehofa Modimo wa rona a re laotse; ra fitlha mo Kateše-barenea." 
Deuteronomy1:20 Ka lo raya ka re: ‘Lo tsile mo lefatsheng la Baamore, la makgabana, le Jehofa Modimo wa rona o le re nayang." 
Deuteronomy1:21 Bonang, Jehofa Modimo wa gago o beile lefatshe fa pele ga gago; tlhatloga, o ye o le rue, jaaka Jehofa Modimo wa borraago a buile nao; se boife, le gone o se ka wa rerega.’" 
Deuteronomy1:22 “Lo no lwa nkatamela lotlhe, lwa re: ‘A re romeng batho ba re etelele pele, ba ye go keleka lefatshe fa pele ga rona, ba itse go ba ba re leretse lefoko la tsela e re tshwanetseng go e tsaya, le la metse e re tlaa e fitlhelang.’" 
Deuteronomy1:23 “Selo seo sa nkgatlha thata; mme ka tsaya banna ba le 12 mo go lona, e bong monna mongwe wa lotso longwe le longwe." 
Deuteronomy1:24 Ba menoga, ba tlhatlogela mo thabeng, ba fitlha mo molatswaneng wa Ešekole, ba o tlhola." 
Deuteronomy1:25 Ba tsaya loungo lwa lefatshe ka mabogo, ba tla nalo kwa go rona, ba re leretse lefoko, ba re: ‘Lefatshe le Jehofa Modimo wa rona o le re nayang ke lefatshe le le molemo.’" 
Deuteronomy1:26 “Le fa go ntse jalo lo no lwa gana go tlhatloga, lwa tsuololela taolo ya ga Jehofa Modimo wa lona;" 
Deuteronomy1:27 Iwa ngongorega mo megopeng ya lona, lwa re: ‘Ke ka a re ila, Jehofa o re ntshitse mo lefatsheng la Egepeto go tla a re tsenya mo seatleng sa Baamore, gore ba re senye." 
Deuteronomy1:28 Re a bo re tlhatlogela kae? Bomorwa rraetsho ba re nyerisitse marapo ba re: Batho bao ba bokete, ba bile ba godile bogolo go rona; metse eo e megolo, e bile e thekeleditswe ka dithako tse di fitlhang kwa marung; gape re bonye bomorwa Baanake teng.’" 
Deuteronomy1:29 “Foo ka lo raya ka re: ‘Lo se ka lwa boborana, lo se ka lwa ba boifa." 
Deuteronomy1:30 Jehofa Modimo wa lona yo o lo eteletseng pele, ene o tlaa lo tlhabanela, jaaka tsotlhe tse o di lo diretseng kwa Egepeto fa pele ga matlho a lona;" 
Deuteronomy1:31 le mo nageng, kwa o bonyeng gone jaaka Jehofa Modimo wa gago a ne a go rwala, jaaka monna a tle a rwale morwawe, mo tseleng yotlhe e lo no lwa tsamaya ka yone, go tsamaya lo fitlha mo felong fano.’" 
Deuteronomy1:32 Le fa go ntse jalo mo selong se, ga lo a ka lwa dumela Jehofa, Modimo wa lona," 
Deuteronomy1:33 yo o ne a lo eteletse pele mo tseleng, a ya go lo senkela felo fa lo tlaa tlhomang megope ya lona gone; bosigo e le ka molelo, go lo supetsa tsela e lo tlaa e tsamayang, motshegare e le ka leru." 
Deuteronomy1:34 “ ‘Jehofa a utlwa lentswe la mafoko a lona, mme a nna bogale thata, a ikana a re:" 
Deuteronomy1:35 Ruri ga go na ope wa banna ba losika lo lo bosula lo, yo o tlaa bonang lefatshe le le molemo, le ke le ikanetseng fa ke tlaa le naya borraa lona," 
Deuteronomy1:36 fa e se Kalebe morwa Jefune, ene o tlaa le bona; lefatshe le o le gatileng, ke tlaa le naya ene le bana ba gagwe, ka gonne o setse Jehofa morago ka botlalo.’" 
Deuteronomy1:37 Gape, Jehofa o ne a le bogale le nna ka ntlha ya lona, a re: ‘Le wena ga o ketla o ya go tsena gone;" 
Deuteronomy1:38 Jošua morwa Nune, yo o emang fa pele ga gago, ene o tlaa ya go tsena gone; o mo nametse; gonne ene o tlaa le ruisa Iseraele." 
Deuteronomy1:39 “ ‘Gape banyana ba lona ba lo rileng ba tlaa nna thopo, le bana ba lona ba gompieno ba se nang kitso ya go itse molemo le bosula, ba tlaa ya go tsena gone; ke tlaa le naya bone, ba tlaa le rua." 
Deuteronomy1:40 Mme lona, menogang, lo lebise mosepele wa lona kwa nageng ka tsela ya Lewatle le Lehibidu.’" 
Deuteronomy1:41 “Foo lo no lwa mphetola, lwa nthaya lwa re: ‘Re leofetse Jehofa, re tlaa tlhatloga re ya go tlhabana, re dira gotlhe jaaka Jehofa Modimo wa rona a re laotse.’ Monna mongwe le mongwe wa lona a tlhomela dibolao tsa gagwe; lwa iketleetsa go tlhatloga mo thabeng." 
Deuteronomy1:42 “Jehofa a nthaya a re: ‘Ba reye o re: Lo se ka lwa tlhatloga, le gone lo se ka lwa tlhabana; gonne ga ke mo go lona; lo ka tla lwa kgemethwa fa pele ga baba ba lona.’" 
Deuteronomy1:43 Jalo ka bua le lona, mme ga lo a ka lwa reetsa; lwa tsuololela taolo ya ga Jehofa, lwa nna boitaolo fela, lwa tlhatloga mo thabeng." 
Deuteronomy1:44 Mme Baamore, ba ba agileng mo thabeng eo, ba lo tshologela, ba lo leleka jaaka dintshi tsa dinotshe di tle di dire, ba lo kgokolosetsa kwa Seire, go ya go fitlha kwa Horema." 
Deuteronomy1:45 Lwa boa, lwa lela fa pele ga Jehofa; mme Jehofa a se ka a reetsa lentswe la lona, le fa e le go lo sekegela tsebe." 
Deuteronomy1:46 “Jalo lwa nna mo Kateše ka malatsi a le mantsi, ka fa malatsing a lo lwa nna gone ka one." 
Deuteronomy2:1 “Foo ra menoga, ra lebisa mosepele wa rona kwa nageng ka tsela ya Lewatle le Lehibidu, jaaka Jehofa a buile le nna; ra dikanyeletsa thaba ya Seire ka malatsi a le mantsi." 
Deuteronomy2:2 “Jehofa a bua le nna, a re:" 
Deuteronomy2:3 ‘Go lekanye, ga lo bolo go dikanyeletsa thaba e, menogelang ntlheng ya botsheka." 
Deuteronomy2:4 O laole batho ba, o re: Lo na le go kgabaganya molelwane wa bana ba rraeno, bana ba ga Esau, ba ba agileng mo Seire; mme ba tlaa lo boifa, ke gone lo itise thata." 
Deuteronomy2:5 Lo se ka lwa ganela nabo, gonne ga nketla ke lo naya sepe sa lefatshe la bone; nnyaa, le fa e le fa go lekanyeng pato ya lonao go gata gone, gonne thaba ya Seire ke e neile Esau go nna thuo ya gagwe." 
Deuteronomy2:6 Lo reke dijo mo go bone ka madi, gore lo je; le gone lo reke metsi mo go bone ka madi, gore lo nwe.’" 
Deuteronomy2:7 “Gonne Jehofa Modimo wa gago o go segofaditse mo tirong yotlhe ya seatla sa gago; o itsile go tsamaya ga gago mo go ralaleng naga e kgolo e, dinyaga tse di 40 tse Jehofa Modimo wa gago o ntseng a nna nao ka tsone; ga o a tlhoka sepe." 
Deuteronomy2:8 “Jalo ra fapoga bana ba rraarona, bana ba ga Esau ba ba agileng mo Seire, ra fapoga tsela ya Areba, ra fapoga Elathe le Esione-gebere. Mme ra feta ka tsela ya naga ya Moabe." 
Deuteronomy2:9 Jehofa a nthaya a re: ‘O se ka wa tshwenya Moabe, o se ka wa lwa nabo mo tlhabanong; gonne ga nketla ke go naya sepe sa lefatshe la bone go le rua; gonne Are ke go neile bana ba ga Lote go nna thuo.’ ”" 
Deuteronomy2:10 (Gale go ne go agile Baemime mo go lone, tšhaba e kgolo, batho ba bantsi, e le ba baleele jaaka Baanake;" 
Deuteronomy2:11 le bone ba kaiwa go re ke Barefaime jaaka Baanake; Bamoabe ba ba bitsa Baemime. 
Deuteronomy2:12 Bahori le bone ba kile ba aga mo Seire gale, mme bana ba ga Esau ba aga gone morago ga bone; ba ba senyetsa fa pele ga bone, ba aga gone mo boemong jwa bone, jaaka Baiseraele ba diretse lefatshe le ba le ruileng, le Jehofa o ne a le ba naya.)" 
Deuteronomy2:13 “ ‘Jaana nanogang lo kgabaganye nokana ya Serete.’ Ra kgabaganya nokana ya Serete. 
Deuteronomy2:14 Malatsi a rona a re sena go tswa mo Kateše-barenea, go tla go kgabaganya nokana ya Serete e ne e le dinyaga di le 38, ga tsamaya mephato yotlhe ya batlhabani ya nyelediwa mo bothibelelong, jaaka Jehofa a ba ikanetse." 
Deuteronomy2:15 Gape seatla sa ga Jehofa se ne se tlhabana le bone, go ba senya, go ba tlosa mo bothibelelong, go tsamaya ba nyelediwa." 
Deuteronomy2:16 “Ya re batlhabani ba sena go nyelediwa botlhe ba sule ba tlogile mo bathong," 
Deuteronomy2:17 Jehofa a bua le nna a re: 
Deuteronomy2:18 ‘Gompieno o na le go kgabaganya Are, molelwane wa Moabe." 
Deuteronomy2:19 E re o atamela, o le gaufi le bana ba Amone, o se ka wa ba tshwenya, le gone o se ganele nabo, gonne ga nketla ke go naya sepe sa lefatshe la bana ba ga Amone go nna thuo, gonne ke le neile bana ba ga Lote go nna thuo.’ ”" 
Deuteronomy2:20 (Le lone le kaiwa gore ke lefatshe la Barefaime, ka Barefaime ba kile ba aga gone gale; Baamone ba ba bitsa Basamesume;" 
Deuteronomy2:21 e le tšhaba e kgolo, batho ba bantsi, e le ba baleele, jaaka Baanake; mme Jehofa a ba senyetsa fa pele ga bone; mme ba ba sala morago ba aga gone mo boemong jwa bone," 
Deuteronomy2:22 jaaka a diretse bana ba ga Esau ba ba agileng mo Seire, jale ka a senyetsa Bahori fa pele ga bone; mme ba ba sala morago, ba aga mo boemong jwa bone nako e sa le eno." 
Deuteronomy2:23 Le Baafe ba ba kileng ba aga mo metsaneng go ya go fitlha kwa Gasa, le Bakafetore, ba ba duleng mo go Kafetore, ba ba senya, ba aga mo lefatsheng mo boemong jwa bone.)" 
Deuteronomy2:24 “Ka re: ‘Nanogang, re tsamayeng, lo kgabaganye molapo wa Arenone; bona, Sihone wa Moamore, kgosi ya Hešebone ke mo tsentse le lefatshe la gagwe mo seatleng sa gago; simololang go le rua, lo lwe nae mo tlhabanong." 
Deuteronomy2:25 Go tsweng fano gompieno ke tlaa dira gore merafe yotlhe e e ka fa tlase ga legodimo e go boife, le gore e re ba utlwalela tumedi ya gago, ba rorome ka poifo e kgolo, ba bo ba nne mo tlalelong.’" 
Deuteronomy2:26 “Ka roma barongwa ba tswa mo nageng ya Ketemothe, ba ya kwa go Sihone kgosi ya Hešebone, ba na le mafoko a kagiso, ba re:" 
Deuteronomy2:27 ‘Mma ke ralale lefatshe la gago, ke tlaa feta ka tsela e kgolo fela, ga nketla ke fapogela kwa ntlheng ya le legolo kgotsa la molema." 
Deuteronomy2:28 O tlaa rekisa dijo mo go nna ka madi, gore ke je, o tlaa nnaya metsi ka madi, gore ke nwe; o tle o mme ke ralale ka dinao fela." 
Deuteronomy2:29 Jaaka bana ba ga Esau, ba ba agileng mo Seire, le Bamoabe ba ba agileng mo Are, ba ntiretse, go tle go tsamaye ke kgabaganye Joretane ke ye mo lefatsheng le Jehofa Modimo wa rona o le re nayang.’" 
Deuteronomy2:30 “Mme Sihone kgosi ya Hešebone a gana go re lesa re feta; gonne Jehofa Modimo wa gago a ne a thatafatsa mowa wa gagwe, a kgwaralatsa pelo ya gagwe, gore a tle a mo tsenye mo seatleng sa lona, jaaka gompieno." 
Deuteronomy2:31 “Jehofa a nthaya a re: ‘Bonang, ke simolotse go go neela Sihone le lefatshe la gagwe; o simolole go le rua gore o tle o je lefatshe boswa.’" 
Deuteronomy2:32 Foo Sihone a re bololela, ene le batho botlhe ba gagwe ba tla go tlhabana le rona mo Jahase." 
Deuteronomy2:33 Jehofa Modimo wa rona a mo re neela fa pele ga rona, mme ra mo kgemetha le bomorwawe le batho botlhe ba gagwe." 
Deuteronomy2:34 Ra thopa metse yotlhe ya gagwe ka baka loo, ra senyetsa ruri motse mongwe le mongwe wa banna, le ka basadi le banyana; ga re a ka ra sia ope;" 
Deuteronomy2:35 fa e se dikgomo, ke tsone fela tse re neng ra di itseela le kgapo ya metse e re ne re e thopile." 
Deuteronomy2:36 Go tswa Aroere, o o fa ntlheng ya molapo wa Arenone, go tswa motseng o o mo molapong, go ya fela kwa Gileate, go se ka ga dira le motse ope o o re paletseng ka go golela kwa godimo bobe; Jehofa Modimo wa rona a re neela gotlhe fa pele ga rona;" 
Deuteronomy2:37 fa e se lefatshe la bana ba ga Amone, ke lone losi le lo neng lo se ka lwa le atamela, gotlhe go ya le noka ya Jaboke, le metse ya lefatshe la makgabana, le gongwe le gongwe kwa Jehofa Modimo wa rona o go re ileditseng." 
Deuteronomy3:1 “Foo ra menoga, ra tlhatloga le tsela e e yang Bašane, mme Oge kgosi ya Bašane a re bololela, ene le batho botlhe ba gagwe, ba tla go tlhabana mo Eterei." 
Deuteronomy3:2 Mme Jehofa a nthaya a re: ‘O se ka wa mmoifa; gonne ke mo tsentse mo seatleng sa gago, ene le batho botlhe ba gagwe le lefatshe la gagwe; o mo direle jaaka o diretse Sihone kgosi ya Baamore, yo o ne a agile kwa Hešebone.’" 
Deuteronomy3:3 “Jalo Jehofa Modimo wa rona a tsenya Oge kgosi ya Bašane le ene mo seatleng sa rona, le batho botlhe ba gagwe; ra mo kgemetha, a ba a tla a se ka a salelwa ke ope." 
Deuteronomy3:4 Ra thopa metse yotlhe ya gagwe ka baka loo; go ne go se na motes ope o re se kang ra o ba gapela; metse e le 60, e bong lefatshe lotlhe la Aregobe, e le bogosi jwa ga Oge mo Bašane." 
Deuteronomy3:5 Metse eo yotlhe e ne e le metse e e thekeleditsweng ka dithako tse di godileng le ditswalo le mapako; go sa balwe metse e le mentsi e e sa thekelediwang. 
Deuteronomy3:6 Ra e senyetsa ruri, jaaka re ne re diretse Sihone kgosi ya Hešebone, ra senyetsa ruri metse yotlhe ya lefatshe la banna, le ka basadi le ka banyana." 
Deuteronomy3:7 Dikgomo tsotlhe le kgapo yotlhe ya metse ra di ikgapela e le thopo ya rona fela. 
Deuteronomy3:8 “Ya re ka lobaka loo, ra tsaya lefatshe mo seatleng sa dikgosi tse pedi tsa Baamore ba ba neng ba le moseja ga Joretane, go tswa molapong wa Arenone go ya kwa thabeng ya Heremone;”" 
Deuteronomy3:9 (Heremone yoo Basitone ba go bitsa Sirione, Baamore ba go bitsa Senire.)" 
Deuteronomy3:10 “Metse yotlhe ya lobala, le lefatshe lotlhe la Gileate, le la Bašane yotlhe go ya go fitlha kwa Saleka, le Eterei, e le metse ya bogosi jwa ga Oge mo Bašane.”" 
Deuteronomy3:11 (Gonne Oge kgosi ya Bašane ke ene esi yo o ne a setse wa Barefaime; bonang, bolao jwa gagwe e ne e le bolao jwa tshipi, a ga bo mo Raba wa bana ba ga Amone? Boleele jwa jone bo le boleele jwa mabogo a le bofera o le mongwe, ka fa letsogong la monna.)" 
Deuteronomy3:12 “Lefatshe leo ra le tsaya go le rua ka baka loo, go tswa Aroere o o fa molapong wa Arenone, le bontlhanngwe jwa lefatshe la makgabana la Gileate, le metse ya lone, mme ka go naya Barubene le Bagate." 
Deuteronomy3:13 Mo go ne go setse ga Gileate, le lefatshe lotlhe la Bašane, le bogosi jwa ga Oge, ka go naya bontlhanngwe jwa lotso lwa ga Manase; lefatshe lotlhe la Aregobe, e bong lefatshe lotlhe la Bašane.” (Leo le bidiwa lefatshe la Refaime." 
Deuteronomy3:14 Jaire morwa Manase a tsaya lefatshe lotlhe la Aregobe, go ya kwa molelwaneng wa Bagešure, le Bamaaka; a le raya leina, e bong lone la Bašane ka fa leineng la gagwe, a re, Hafothe-Jaire nako e sa le eno.)" 
Deuteronomy3:15 “Lefatshe la Gileate ka le naya Makire. 
Deuteronomy3:16 Go tswa mo Gileate go ya kwa molapong wa Arenone, ka go naya Barubene le Bagate, bogare jwa molapo le ka fa thoko ga one; ke go re, go ya kwa nokeng ya Jaboke, e e leng molelwane wa bana ba ga Amone;" 
Deuteronomy3:17 Areba le gone, le Joretane le ka fa thoko ga gone, go tswa mo Kinerete go ya fela kwa lewatleng la Areba, Lewatle la Letswai, fa tlase ga meripo ya Pisega ntlheng ya botlhabatsatsi." 
Deuteronomy3:18 “Ka lo laola ka baka loo, ka re: ‘Jehofa Modimo wa lona, o lo neile lefatshe le go le rua; lo tlaa kgabaganya lo tlhometse fa pele ga bana ba ga rraeno, bana ba Iseraele, e bong banna botlhe ba ba nonofetseng tlhabano." 
Deuteronomy3:19 Basadi ba lona ba tlaa sala mo metseng e ke e lo neileng, le banyana ba lona, le dikgomo tsa lona (ke a itse fa lo na le dikgomo di le dintsi.)" 
Deuteronomy3:20 Go tsamaya Jehofa a naya bana ba rraeno boikhutso jaaka lona, le bona ba rua lefatshe le Jehofa Modimo wa lona o le ba nayang moseja ga Joretane, foo mongwe le mongwe wa lona o tlaa boela mo thuong ya gagwe e ke e lo neileng.’" 
Deuteronomy3:21 “Ka laola Jošua ka baka loo, ka re: ‘Matlho a gago a bonye gotlhe mo Jehofa Modimo wa lona o go diretseng dikgosi tse pedi tse; Jehofa o tlaa direla jalo magosi a lo kgabaganyetsang kwa go one." 
Deuteronomy3:22 Lo se ka lwa ba boifa, gonne Jehofa Modimo wa lona ke ene yo o lo tlhabanelang.’" 
Deuteronomy3:23 “Ka rapela Jehofa ka baka loo ka re: 
Deuteronomy3:24 ‘Ao! Jehofa Modimo, o simolotse go supetsa motlhanka wa gago bogolo jwa gago, le letsogo la gago le le thata, gonne go na le ofe modimo kwa legodimong kgotsa mo lefatsheng, o o ka dirang ka fa ditirong tsa gago, le ka fa ditirong tsa gago tsa nonofo?" 
Deuteronomy3:25 Ke a go rapela, mma ke kgabaganye ke ye go bona lefatshe le le molemo le le kwa moseja ga Joretane, thaba e e molemo eo, le Lebanone.’" 
Deuteronomy3:26 “Mme Jehofa o ne a le bogale thata le nna ka ntlha ya lona, a se ka a ntheetsa. Jehofa a nthaya a re: ‘A go go lekane; o se ka wa tlhola o bua le nna ka ga selo se." 
Deuteronomy3:27 Tlhatlogela kwa tlhoreng ya Pisega o tsholeletse matlho ntlheng ya bophirimatsatsi, ntlheng ya botsheka, ntlheng ya borwa le ntlheng ya botlhabatsatsi, o bone ka matlho fela, gonne ga o ketla o kgabaganya Joretane ono." 
Deuteronomy3:28 Mme o laye Jošua, o mo nametse, o mo thatafatse, gonne ene o tlaa kgabaganya fa pele ga tšhaba e, mme lefatshe le o tlaa le bonang, o tlaa le ba ruisa.’" 
Deuteronomy3:29 “Jalo ra nna mo molapong bolebagana le Bethepeore. 
Deuteronomy4:1 “Jaana wena Iseraele, reetsa ditaelo le dikatlholo tse ke di go rutang go di dira; gore lo tshele, le gore lo tsene lo ye go rua lefatshe le Jehofa, Modimo wa borraa lona, o le lo nayang." 
Deuteronomy4:2 Lefoko le ke le lo laolelang lo se ka lwa le oketsa, le gone lo se ka lwa le fokotsa, gore lo tle lo tshegetse ditaolo tsa ga Jehofa Modimo wa lona, tse ke di lo laolelang." 
Deuteronomy4:3 Matlho a lona a bonye se Jehofa o ne a se dira ka ntlha ya Baale-peore; gonne banna botlhe ba ba setseng Baale-peore morago, Jehofa Modimo o ba senyeditse ruri mo gare ga gago." 
Deuteronomy4:4 Mme lona ba lo ngaparetseng Jehofa Modimo wa lona, lo tshedile lotlhe le gompieno." 
Deuteronomy4:5 “Gonne go na le morafe o mogolo 
Deuteronomy4:6 “Bonang, ke lo neile ditaetso le dikatlholo, fela jaaka Jehofa Modimo wa me a ntaotse, gore lo dire jalo mo gare ga lefatshe le lo tsenang mo go lone lo ya go le rua." 
Deuteronomy4:7 Ke gone, lo di tshegetseng lo di dire; gonne mo ke botlhale jwa lona, le tlhaloganyo ya lona, mo ponong ya ditšhaba, tse di tlaa utlwang ditao tse, mme di re: ‘Ruri morafe o mogolo o, ya bo e le tšhaba e e tlhalefileng, e e tlhaloganyang.’ ofe o o nang le modimo mongwe o o gaufi nao, jaaka Jehofa Modimo wa rona o ntse gongwe le gongwe, mogang re o bitsang gone?" 
Deuteronomy4:8 Go na le morafe o mogolo ofe o o nang le ditao le dikatlholo tse di siameng jaaka molao o otlhe, o ke o bayang fa pele ga lona gompieno?" 
Deuteronomy4:9 O itise fela, mme o boloke mowa wa gago thata gore o se lebale dilo tse matlho a gago a di bonyeng, le gore di se tloge mo pelong ya gago ka malatsi otlhe a botshelo jwa gago; o bo o di itsise bana ba gago le bana ba bana ba gago;" 
Deuteronomy4:10 letsatsi le o ne wa ema ka lone fa pele ga Jehofa Modimo wa gago mo Horebe, jale ka Jehofa a nthaya a re: ‘Mphuthela batho, mme ke tlaa ba utlwisa mafoko a me, gore ba tle ba ithute go mpoifa ka malatsi otlhe a ba tlaa tshelang ka one mo lefatsheng, le gore ba rute bana ba bone.’" 
Deuteronomy4:11 “Lwa atamela lwa ema ka fa tlase ga thaba, mme thaba ya tuka molelo, wa tukela kwa bogareng ja legodimo, go bile ga nna lefifi, le maru, le lefifi le le kwenneng." 
Deuteronomy4:12 Jehofa a bua le lona a le mo gare ga molelo; lo no lwa utlwa lentswe le le buang, mme lo se ka lwa bona popego epe, lwa utlwa lentswe fela." 
Deuteronomy4:13 A lo bolelela kgolagano ya gagwe, e o e lo laoletseng gore lo e dire, e bong ditaolo tse some, mme a di kwala mo matlapeng a le mabedi." 
Deuteronomy4:14 Jehofa a ntaola ka baka loo, gore ke lo rute ditao le dikatlholo, gore lo di dire mo lefatsheng le lo kgabagabyetsang kwa go lone go le rua." 
Deuteronomy4:15 “Ke gone lo itiseng thata; gonne ga lo a ka lwa bona popego epe ka tsatsi le Jehofa a buileng le lona ka lona mo Horebe a le mo gare ga molelo; 
Deuteronomy4:16 gore lo tle lo se ka lwa ipodisa, lwa itirela setshwantsho se se setilweng, se se tshwanang le popego nngwe ya setshwano sa se setona, kgotsa sa se senamagadi," 
Deuteronomy4:17 le fa e le setshwano sa setshedi sengwe se se mo lefatsheng, le fa e le setshwano sa nonyane nngwe e e diphuka e e fofang mo loaping," 
Deuteronomy4:18 le fa e le setshwano sa sengwe se se gagabang fa fatshe, le fa e le setshwano sa tlhapi nngwe e e mo metsing tlase ga lefatshe." 
Deuteronomy4:19 Le gone gore o tle o se ka wa tsholeletsa matlho a gago legodimong, mme ya re o bona letsatsi le kgwedi le dinaledi, le lesomosomo lotlhe la legodimo, wa faposediwa koo wa di obamela, wa di direla, e le dilo tse Jehofa Modimo wa gago o di abetseng ditšhaba tsotlhe tse di fa tlase ga legodimo lotlhe fela." 
Deuteronomy4:20 Mme Jehofa o tshotse lona, a lo ntsha mo leisong la leubelo la tshipi, e bong mo Egepeto, gore lo nne tšhaba ya boswa mo go ene, jaaka go ntse gompieno." 
Deuteronomy4:21 Gape Jehofa o ne a nna bogale le nna ka ntlha ya lona, mme a ikana a re: ga nketla ke kgabaganya Joretane, a ba a re ga nketla ke ya go tsena mo lefatsheng le le molemo leo, le Jehofa Modimo wa gago o le nayang go nna boswa." 
Deuteronomy4:22 Ke na le go swela mo fatsheng leno, ga ke na go kgabaganya Joretane; lona lo tlaa kgabaganya, lo ya go rua lefatshe le le molemo lele." 
Deuteronomy4:23 Lo itise, gore lo se ka lwa lebala kgolagano ya ga Jehofa Modimo wa lona, e o e dirileng le lona, lwa itirela setshwantsho se se setilweng se se mo popegong ya sengwe se Jehofa Modimo wa gago o se go ileditseng." 
Deuteronomy4:24 Gonne Jehofa Modimo wa gago ke molelo o o lailang, ke Modimo o o lefufa." 
Deuteronomy4:25 “E tlaa re mogang o tsholang bana le bana ba bone, lo ntse lo dule mo lefatsheng, lo ipodisa lo dira setshwantsho se se setilweng mo popepong ya sengwe, mme lo dira se se bosula mo ponong ya Jehofa Modimo wa lona go mo tlhotlheletsa mo bogaleng;" 
Deuteronomy4:26 ke lo biletsa legodimo le lafatshe gompieno go supa ka ga lona, gore lo tlaa akofa lo nyelelela ruri mo lefatsheng le lo kgabaganyang Joretane lo ya go le rua; ga lo ketla lo lelefatsa malatsi a lona mo go lone, mme lo tlaa senyediwa ruri." 
Deuteronomy4:27 Jehofa o tlaa lo gasanyetsa mo ditšhabeng, lo tlaa sadisiwa lo le bannye fela mo merafeng e Jehofa o tlaa lo gogelang kwa go yone." 
Deuteronomy4:28 Gone lo tlaa direla medimo e e leng tiro ya diatla tsa batho ka logong le lentswe, e le e e sa boneng, e e sa utlweng, e e sa jeng, e e sa dupeng ka nko." 
Deuteronomy4:29 E tlaa re lo le gone fa lo ka batla Jehofa Modimo wa gago, o tlaa mmona, fa o mo senka ka pelo yotlhe ya gago le ka mowa otlhe wa gago." 
Deuteronomy4:30 E tlaa re o le mo pitlaganong mme dilo tse tsotlhe di go wetse, fa e tlaa re mo metlheng ya bofelo o boela mo go Jehofa Modimo wa gago, o reetsa lentswe la gagwe," 
Deuteronomy4:31 ka Jehofa Modimo wa gago e le Modimo o o boutlwelobotlhoko; ga a ketla a go tlogela, le gone ga a ketla a go senya, le fa e le go lebala kgolagano ya borraago e o ne a e ba ikanela." 
Deuteronomy4:32 “Gonne, a ko lo botseng jaana ka ga malatsi a a fetileng, a a ne a ntse pele ga gago, a a sa leng ka Modimo o bopa motho mo lefatsheng, go tswa sekhutlong sengwe sa legodimo go ya sekhutlong se sengwe, go re: A go kile ga ne go le sengwe se se tshwanang le se segolo se, le fa e le go utlwelwa, se se tshwanang naso?" 
Deuteronomy4:33 A tšhaba nngwe e kile ya utlwa lentswe la Modimo, gongwe le bua le le mo gare ga molelo, jaaka wena o utlwile, mme ya tshela?" 
Deuteronomy4:34 Kgotsa a Modimo o kile wa leka go ya go itseela morafe mo gare ga morafe o mongwe ka diteko, ka ditshupo, ka dikgakgamatso, le ka dintwa, ka letsogo la bonatla, ka letsogo le le otlologileng le ka ditheregiso tse dikgolo, jaaka tsotlhe tse Jehofa Modimo wa lona o di lo diretseng kwa Egepeto fa pele ga matlho a lona?" 
Deuteronomy4:35 Ga supediwa wena, gore o itse fa Jehofa e le ene Modimo; ga go na ope o sele kwa ntle ga one." 
Deuteronomy4:36 O go utlwisitse lentswe la gagwe le tswa kwa legodimong, gore a tle a go rute; mo lefatsheng o go bontshitse molelo wa gagwe o mogolo; wa utlwa mafoko a gagwe a tswa mo gare ga molelo." 
Deuteronomy4:37 E re ka a rata borraago, ke gone ka fa o ne a itshenkela losika lwa bone ka gone morago ga bone, a go ntsha ka sebonalo sa gagwe mo Egepeto, ka thata ya gagwe e kgolo;" 
Deuteronomy4:38 go tla a leleka fa pele ga gago merafe e megolo le e e thata bogolo go wena, le go go isa mo teng, go go ruisa lefatshe la bone jaaka go ntse gompieno." 
Deuteronomy4:39 Ke gone itse gompieno, o go tsenye mo pelong, gore Jehofa ke ene Modimo kwa legodimong kwa godimo, le mo lefatsheng fa tlase; ga go na ope o sele." 
Deuteronomy4:40 O tshegetse ditao tsa gagwe, le ditaolo tsa gagwe, tse ke di go laolelang gompieno, gore go nne sentle nao, le bana ba gago morago ga gago, le gore o lelefatse malatsi a gago mo lefatsheng le Jehofa Modimo wa gago o le go nayang ka bosakhutleng.”" 
Deuteronomy4:41 Foo Moše a lomolola metse e le meraro moseja ga Joretane, ntlheng ya botlhabatsatsi;" 
Deuteronomy4:42 gore mmolai wa motho a tshabele gone, yo o bolayang wa ga gabo a sa itse, a sa mo ila mo metlheng e e fetileng; le gore fa a tshabetse kwa go mongwe wa metse e, a tle a tshele:" 
Deuteronomy4:43 E bong, Besere mo nageng mo lefatsheng la lobala, e le wa Barubene; le Ramothe mo Gileate, e le wa Bagate le Golane mo Bašane, e le wa Bamanase." 
Deuteronomy4:44 O, ke one molao o Moše o o beileng fa pele ga bana ba Iseraele." 
Deuteronomy4:45 Tse ke tsone ditshupo le ditao le dikatlholo tse Moše o di buileng le bana ba Iseraele ba tswa Egepeto," 
Deuteronomy4:46 moseja ga Joretane, mo molapong o o lebaganyeng le Bethepeore, mo lefatsheng la ga Sihone kgosi ya Baamore, ba ba neng ba agile mo Hešebone, ba Moše le bana ba Iseraele ba ba kgemethileng ka ba tswa kwa lefatsheng la Egepeto," 
Deuteronomy4:47 ba gapa lefatshe la gagwe ba le rua, le lefatshe la ga Oge kgosi ya Bašane, dikgosi tse pedi tsa Baamore, ba ba neng ba le moseja ga Joretane, ntlheng ya botlhabatsatsi;" 
Deuteronomy4:48 go tswa Aroere, o o fa ntlheng ya molapo wa Arenone, go ya fela kwa thabeng ya Sione (ke yone Heremone)," 
Deuteronomy4:49 le molapo otlhe wa Areba moseja ga Joretane ntlheng ya botlhabatsatsi go ya fela kwa lewatleng la Areba, fa tlase ga meripo ya Pisega." 
Deuteronomy5:1 Moše a bitsa Baiseraele botlhe, a ba raya a re: “Utlwang lona Baiseraele, ditao le dikatlholo tse ke di buang mo ditsebeng tsa lona gompieno, gore lo di ithute, lo di tlhokomele go di dira." 
Deuteronomy5:2 Jehofa Modimo wa rona o ne a dira kgolagano le rona mo Horebe. 
Deuteronomy5:3 Jehofa ga a ka a dira kgolagano eo le borraetsho, fa e se le rona fela, e bong rona ba re sa ntseng re tshedile fano rotlhe gompieno." 
Deuteronomy5:4 Jehofa a buisanya le lona go lebanywe difatlhogo mo thabeng, a le mo gare ga molelo," 
Deuteronomy5:5 (ke ne ka ema fa gare ga Jehofa le lona ka baka loo, go lo utlwisa lefoko la Jehofa; gonne lona lo ne lo boifa ka ntlha ya molelo, mme lo se ka lwa tlhatlogela mo thabeng;) a re:" 
Deuteronomy5:6 “Ke nna Jehofa Modimo wa gago yo ke go ntshitseng mo lefatsheng la Egepeto le mo ntlong ya botlhanka. 
Deuteronomy5:7 “O se ka wa nna le medimo epe e sele fa e se nna. 
Deuteronomy5:8 “O se ka wa itirela setshwantsho sepe se se setilweng, e le setshwano sa sebopego sengwe se se kwa legodimong kwa godimo, kgotsa sa se se mo lefatsheng fa tlase, kgotsa sa se se mo metsing kwa tlase ga lefatshe." 
Deuteronomy5:9 “O se ka wa di ikobela, le fa e le go di direla, gonne, Nna Jehofa Modimo wa gago, ke Modimo o o lefufa, yo ke beletsang bana tshiamololo ya borra ba bone go ya kokomaneng ya boraro, le go ya mo go ya bone ya ba ba nkilang." 
Deuteronomy5:10 Mme ba ba makgolokgolo a bone ba ba nthatang, ba tshegetsa ditaolo tsa me, ke ba supetse boutlwelobotlhoko." 
Deuteronomy5:11 “O se ka wa umakela leina la ga Jehofa Modimo wa gago lefela, gonne ene yo o umakelang leina la gagwe lefela, Jehofa ga a ketla a mo kaya a se na molato." 
Deuteronomy5:12 “Tlhokomela letsatsi la Sabata go le itshepisa, jaaka Jehofa Modimo wa gago a go laotse." 
Deuteronomy5:13 O dire o bo o swetse ditiro tsotlhe tsa gago ka malatsi a le marataro. 
Deuteronomy5:14 Mme letsatsi la bosupa ke Sabata wa ga Jehofa Modimo wa gago; o se ka wa dira tiro epe mo go lone, wena le fa e le morwao, le fa e le morwadio, le fa e le motlhanka wa gago, le fa e le lelata la gago, le fa e le pelesa ya gago, le fa e le esela ya gago, le fa e le diruiwa dipe tsa gago, le fa e le moeng wa gago yo o mo teng ga dikgoro tsa gago; gore motlhanka wa gago le lelata la gago le bone, ba ikhutse jaaka wena." 
Deuteronomy5:15 Le gone o gakologelwe fa wena o ne o le motlhanka mo lefatsheng la Egepeto, mme Jehofa Modimo wa gago a go ntsha teng ka letsogo la nonofo, le ka letsogo le le otlologileng: ke gone ka moo Jehofa Modimo wa gago o go laotseng gore o ilele letsatsi la Sabata." 
Deuteronomy5:16 “Tlotla rraago le mmaago, jaaka Jehofa Modimo wa gago a go laotse; gore malatsi a gago a nne maleele, le gore go ye sentle nao mo lefatsheng le Jehofa Modimo wa gago o le go nayang." 
Deuteronomy5:17 “O se ka wa bolaya motho. 
Deuteronomy5:18 “Le gone o se ka wa dira boaka. 
Deuteronomy5:19 “Le gone o se ka wa utswa. 
Deuteronomy5:20 “Le gone o se ka wa supa maaka ka ga mongwe ka wena. 
Deuteronomy5:21 “Le gone o se ka wa eletsa mosadi wa mongwe ka wena; le gone o se ka wa eletsa ntlo ya mongwe ka wena; le fa e le motlhanka wa gagwe, le fa e le lelata la gagwe, le fa e le pelesa ya gagwe, le fa e le sepe se e leng sa mongwe ka wena." 
Deuteronomy5:22 “Mafoko ao, Jehofa a a bua le phuthego yotlhe ya lona mo thabeng, a le mo gare ga molelo, le ga leru, le ga lefifi le le kwenneng, a a bua ka lentswe le le godileng; mme a se ka a a oketsa. Mme a a kwala mo matlapeng a le mabedi a a nneela.”" 
Deuteronomy5:23 “Ga dirala ya re lo utlwa lentswe le tswa mo gare ga lefifi, thaba e ntse e tuka molelo, lwa nkatamela, e bong ditlhogo tsotlhe tsa ditso tsa lona le bagolwane ba lona;" 
Deuteronomy5:24 lwa re: ‘Bona, Jehofa Modimo wa rona o re supeditse kgalalelo ya gagwe, le bogolo jwa gagwe, re utlwile lentswe la gagwe le tswa mo gare ga molelo; re bonye gompieno fa Modimo o bua le motho, mme a tshele." 
Deuteronomy5:25 Jaana re tlaa bo re swelang? Gonne molelo o mogolo o, o tlaa re laila o re swetsa; gonne fa re fela re tswelela pele go utlwa lentswe la ga Jehofa Modimo wa rona gape, foo re tlaa swa." 
Deuteronomy5:26 Gonne go na le mang wa nama yotlhe yo o kileng a utlwa lentswe la Modimo o o tshedileng le bua le tswa mo gare ga molelo, jaaka rona re le utlwile, mme a tshela?" 
Deuteronomy5:27 A go atamele wena o utlwe tsotlhe tse Jehofa Modimo o tlaa di buang; a go bue wena le rona, o bue tsotlhe tse Jehofa Modimo wa rona o tlaa di buang nao; re tlaa di utlwa re di dira.’" 
Deuteronomy5:28 “E rile lo bua le nna, Jehofa a utlwa lentswe la mafoko a lona, mme Jehofa a nthaya a re: ‘Ke utlwile lentswe la mafoko a tšhaba e, a ba a buileng nao; gotlhe mo ba go buileng ba buile sentle." 
Deuteronomy5:29 A bo pelo e e ntseng jalo e ka bo ne ne e le mo go bone, gore ba mpoife, ba tshegetse ditaolo tsa me tsotlhe ka metlha yotlhe, gore go tle go nne sentle nabo, le bana ba bone ka bosakhutleng!" 
Deuteronomy5:30 Ya o ba reye o re: Boelang kwa megopeng ya lona. 
Deuteronomy5:31 Ka ga gago, wena o eme fano fa go nna, mme ke tlaa bua nao taolo yotlhe, le ditao, le dikatlholo tse o tlaa di ba rutang, gore ba di dire mo lefatsheng le ke le ba nayang go le rua.’" 
Deuteronomy5:32 “Ke gone lo tlhokomeleng go dira jaaka Jehofa Modimo wa lona a lo laotse; lo se ka lwa fapogela ntlheng ya le legolo, kgotsa ntlheng ya la molema." 
Deuteronomy5:33 Lo sepele fela mo tseleng yotlhe e Jehofa Modimo o e lo laoletseng, gore lo tshele, le gore go nne sentle le lona, le gore lo lelefatse malatsi a lona mo lefatsheng le lo tlaa le ruang." 
Deuteronomy6:1 “Jaana tse ke tsone ditaolo, le ditao, le dikatlholo tse Jehofa Modimo wa lona o laotseng gore lo di rutwe, gore lo di dire mo lefatsheng le lo kgabaganyetsang kwa go lone go ya go le rua;" 
Deuteronomy6:2 gore o tle o boife Jehofa Modimo wa gago, o tshegetse ditao tsotlhe tsa gagwe, le ditaolo tsotlhe tsa gagwe tse ke di go laolelang, wena le morwao le morwa morwao, ka malatsi otlhe a botshelo jwa gago; le gore malatsi a gago a lelefadiwe." 
Deuteronomy6:3 Ke gone, utlwa, wena Iseraele, o tlhokomele go go dira; gore go nne sentle nao, le gore lo ate mo gogolo mo lefatsheng le le elang maši le dinotshe, jaaka Jehofa Modimo wa borraeno a go solofeditse pele." 
Deuteronomy6:4 “A ko o utlwe, wena Iseraele, Jehofa Modimo wa rona ke Jehofa yo mongwe fela." 
Deuteronomy6:5 O rate Jehofa Modimo wa gago ka pelo yotlhe ya gago, le ka mowa otlhe wa gago, le ka nonofo ya gago yotlhe fela." 
Deuteronomy6:6 Mafoko a ke a go laolelang gompieno a nne mo pelong ya gago. 
Deuteronomy6:7 O a rute bana ba gago ka tlhoafalo, o bue ka ga one fa o dutse mo ntlong ya gago, le fa o tsamaya mo tseleng, le fa o rapame, le fa o rapamologa." 
Deuteronomy6:8 O a bofelele mo seatleng sa gago go nna sesupo, mme a nne sebeo sa fa gare ga matlho a gago." 
Deuteronomy6:9 O a kwale mo mephakwaneng ya mojako wa ntlo ya gago, le mo dikgorong tsa gago." 
Deuteronomy6:10 “Go tlaa dirala, gore e tlaa re, Jehofa Modimo wa gago a go isa mo lefatsheng le o ne a le ikanela borraago, Aberahame, le Isake le Jakobe, a re o tlaa le go naya; e bong metse e megolo, e mentle, e o se kang wa e aga," 
Deuteronomy6:11 le matlo a a tletseng dilo tsotlhe tse di molemo, a o se kang wa a tlatsa, le madu a metsi a a gabilweng, a o se kang wa a gaba, masimo a mafine, le ditlhare tsa matlhware tse o se kang wa di tlohoma, o ja o kgora;" 
Deuteronomy6:12 foo o itise gore o se ka wa lebala Jehofa yo o go ntshitseng mo lefatsheng la Egepeto, mo ntlong ya botlhanka." 
Deuteronomy6:13 O boife Jehofa Modimo wa gago; ke ene yo o tlaa mo direlang, o ba o ikana ka leina la gagwe." 
Deuteronomy6:14 Lo se ka lwa lata medimo e sele, ya medimo ya ditšhaba tse di mo tikologong ya lona," 
Deuteronomy6:15 gonne Jehofa Modimo wa gago ke Modimo o o lefufa mo gare ga gago; e se re kgotsa bogale jwa ga Jehofa Modimo wa gago jwa go tukela, mme a go senya wa nyelela mo lefatsheng." 
Deuteronomy6:16 “Lo se ka lwa leka Jehofa Modimo wa lona, jaaka lo kile lwa mo leka kwa Masa." 
Deuteronomy6:17 Lo tshegetse ditaolo tsa ga Jehofa Modimo wa lona ka tlohoafalo, le ditshupo tsa gagwe, le ditaelo tse o di lo laoletseng." 
Deuteronomy6:18 O dire sone se se siameng le se se molemo mo ponong ya ga Jehofa, gore go nne sentle nao, le gore o tle o tsene o ye go rua lefatshe le le molemo, le Jehofa o ne a le ikanela borraago," 
Deuteronomy6:19 a re: o tlaa kgoromeletsa ntle baba botlhe ba gago fa pele ga gago, jaaka Jehofa a buile." 
Deuteronomy6:20 “E tlaa re morwao a go botsa mo lobakeng lo lo tlang, a re: ‘Ditshupo le ditao, le dikatlholo tse Jehofa Modimo wa rona o di lo laoletseng, di kayang?’" 
Deuteronomy6:21 Foo o tlaa raya morwao o re: ‘Re ne re le batlhanka ba ga Faro kwa Egepeto; Jehofa a re ntsha mo Egepeto ka letsogo le le nonofileng," 
Deuteronomy6:22 mme Jehofa a dira ditshupo le dikgakgamatso tse dikgolo, le tse di botlhoko, mo Egepeto le mo go Faro, le mo ntlong yotlhe ya gagwe, fa pele ga matlho a rona," 
Deuteronomy6:23 a re ntsha gone, gore a re ise, a ye go re naya lefatshe le o ne a le ikanetse borraetsho." 
Deuteronomy6:24 Mme Jehofa o na a re laola gore re dire ditao tse tsotle, re boife Jehofa Modimo wa rona, gore go tle go nne molemo mo go rona ka metlha yotlhe, le gore a re boloke re tshele, jaaka gompieno." 
Deuteronomy6:25 Mme go tlaa nna tshiamo go rona, fa re tlhokomela go dira taolo e yotlhe fa pele ga Jehofa Modimo wa rona, jaaka a re laotse.’" 
Deuteronomy7:1 “E tlaa re mogang Jehofa Modimo wa gago o go fitlhisang mo lefatsheng le o yang go le rua, a kgoromeletse ntle merafe e le mentsi fa pele ga gago: Bahite le Bagiregaše, le Baamore le Bakanana, le Baperise, le Bahife le Bajebuse, merafe e supa e megolo e e nonofileng bogolo go wena;" 
Deuteronomy7:2 mme mogang Jehofa Modimo wa gago o ba go neelang fa pele ga gago o ba kgemetha; foo o ba senyetse ruri; o se ka wa dira kgolagano epe nabo, le fa e le go nna boutlwelobotlhoko mo go bone." 
Deuteronomy7:3 Le gone o se ka wa nyalana nabo; ngwana wa gago wa mosetsana o se ka wa mo naya ngwana wa bone wa mosimane, le gone o se ka wa tseisa ngwana wa gago wa mosimane ngwana wa bone wa mosetsana." 
Deuteronomy7:4 Gonne o tlaa faposa morwao mo go ntshaleng morago, gore ba direle medimo e sele, jalo bogale jwa ga Jehofa bo lo tukele, mme a go senye ka bonako." 
Deuteronomy7:5 Lo ba direle jaana: Lo rutle dibeso tsa bone, lo thubaganye maje a bone a a emeng metloutlo, lo reme medimako ya bone, le ditshwantsho tsa bone tse di setilweng lo di fise ka molelo." 
Deuteronomy7:6 Gonne o tšhaba e e itshepetseng Jehofa Modimo wa gago; Jehofa Modimo wa gago o go itshenketse gore o nne tšhaba ya gagwe e e tlhaolegileng, go feta ditšhaba tsotlhe tse di mo lefatsheng." 
Deuteronomy7:7 “Jehofa ga a ka a tlhoma lorato lwa gagwe mo go lona, le fa e le go lo itshenkela, ka gore lo ne lo feta ditšhaba tsotlhe ka bontsi; gonne lo ne lo le babotlana mo ditšhabeng tsotlhe fela." 
Deuteronomy7:8 Jehofa a lo ntsha ka letsogo le le nonofileng, a lo rekolola mo ntlong ya botlhanka, mo seatleng sa ga Faro kgosi ya Egepeto, ka gobo Jehofa o a lo rata, le ka gobo a rata go tlhomamisa ikano e o ne a e ikanetse borra ba lona." 
Deuteronomy7:9 Ke gone, itse fa Jehofa Modimo wa gago e le ene Modimo, Modimo o boikanngo, o o tlhomamisang kgolagano ya one le boutlwelobotlhoko jwa one, mo go bone ba ba o ratang, le ba ba tshegetsang ditaolo tsa one, go ya le dikokomana di le sekete." 
Deuteronomy7:10 Ba ba o ilang, o ba lefele mo matlhong, o ba senye; ga o ketla o nyafalela ene yo o o ilang; o tlaa mo lefela mo matlhong fela." 
Deuteronomy7:11 Ke gone o tshegetse taolo, le ditao, le dikatlholo tse ke di go laolelang gompieno, go di dira." 
Deuteronomy7:12 “Go tlaa dirala gore e tlaa re fa lo tlaa bo lo reeditse dikatlholo tse, lo di tshegetsa, lo di dira, Jehofa Modimo wa gago o tlaa go tlhomamisetsa kgolagano le boutlwelobotlhoko jo o bo ikanetseng borraeno." 
Deuteronomy7:13 O tlaa go rata a go segofatsa, a go ntsifatsa; le gone o tlaa segofatsa loungo lwa mmele wa gago, le loungo lwa lefatshe la gago, mabele a gago, le bojalwa jwa gago jwa mofine, le lookwane lwa gago, loato lwa logamo lwa gago, le loonyana lwa letsomane la gago, mo lefatsheng le le ikanetseng borraeno, a re o tlaa le ba naya." 
Deuteronomy7:14 O tlaa segofadiwa bogolo go ditšhaba tsotlhe; ga go ketla go nna le moopa mo go lona wa monna kgotsa wa mosadi kgotsa mo dikgomong tsa lona. 
Deuteronomy7:15 Jehofa o tlaa tlosa bolwetse jotlhe mo go wena; ga a ketla a baya mo go wena bolwetse bope jwa matlhoko a a bosula a Egepeto, a o a itseng; o tlaa a baya mo go botlhe ba ba go ilang." 
Deuteronomy7:16 O nyeletse ditšhaba tsotlhe tse Jehofa Modimo wa gago o tlaa di go neelang; leitlho la gago le se ba utlwele botlhoko, le gone o se ka wa direla medimo ya bone; gonne moo e tlaa bo e le seru mo go wena." 
Deuteronomy7:17 “E tlaa re fa o bua mo pelong ya gago o re: ‘Merafe e, e mentsi e a mpheta; ke tlaa e ruolola jang?’" 
Deuteronomy7:18 O se ka wa e boifa; o gakologelwe sentle se Jehofa Modimo wa gago o se diretseng Faro, le lefatshe lotlhe la Egepeto;" 
Deuteronomy7:19 diteko tse dikgolo tse matlho a gago a di bonyeng, le ditshupo, le dikgakgamatso, le letsogo la nonofo, le letsogo le le otlologileng, dilo tse Jehofa Modimo wa gago o go ntshitseng ka tsone; Jehofa Modimo wa gago o tlaa direla jalo ditšhaba tsotlhe tse o di boifang." 
Deuteronomy7:20 Gape Jehofa Modimo wa gago o tlaa tlisa moruthwane mo go bone; go tle go tsamaye ba ba setseng, mme ba iphitlha, ba nyelele fa pele ga gago." 
Deuteronomy7:21 O se ka wa ba tshoga; gonne Jehofa Modimo wa gago o mo gare ga gago, e le Modimo o mogolo o o boitshegang." 
Deuteronomy7:22 Jehofa Modimo wa gago o tlaa kgoromeletsa ntle merafe eo fa pele ga gago ka thafolo; ga o kake wa e nyeletsa ka lobaka lo le longwe fela, dibatana tsa naga di ka tla tsa go atela." 
Deuteronomy7:23 Mme Jehofa Modimo wa gago o tlaa e go neela fa pele ga gago, mme o tlaa ba tseanya ka tseanyo e kgolo, go tsamaya e senyega." 
Deuteronomy7:24 O tlaa tsenya dikgosi tsa yone mo seatleng sa gago, o tlaa dira gore maina a yone a nyelelele ruri fa tlase ga legodimo, ga go ketla go nna monna ope yo o ka nonofang go ema fa pele ga gago, go tle go tsamaye o e senye." 
Deuteronomy7:25 Ditshwantsho tse di setilweng tsa medimo ya yone lo di fise ka molelo; o se ka wa eletsa selefera kgotsa gouta tse di mo go yone, le fa e le go di itseela; o ka tla wa raelwa ke tsone; gonne ke makgapha mo go Jehofa Modimo wa gago." 
Deuteronomy7:26 Le gone o se ka wa isa se se makgapha mo ntlong ya gago, wa tswa selo se se neeletsweng jaaka sone; o se ilele ruri, o se tlhoele ruri, gone ke selo se se neeletsweng." 
Deuteronomy8:1 “Taolo yotlhe e ke e go laolelang gompieno, lo e tlhokomele go e dira, gore lo tshele, lo ntsifale, lo tsene lo ye go rua lefatshe le Jehofa o ne a le ikanela borra ba lona." 
Deuteronomy8:2 O ikgakolole tsela yotlhe e Jehofa Modimo wa gago o go gogileng ka yone, dinyaga tse di 40 tse, mo nageng, gore a go ise tlase, a go leke, a itse se se mo pelong ya gago, boo o tlaa tshegetsa ditaolo tsa gagwe kgotsa nnyaa." 
Deuteronomy8:3 O ne a go isa tlase, a go bolaisa tlala, a go otla ka mana, a o ne o sa a itse, le fa e le bone borraeno ba ne ba sa a itse; gore a go itsise fa motho a sa tshele ka dijo di le tsosi, fa e se gore, motho o tshela ka sengwe le sengwe se se tswang mo molomong wa ga Jehofa." 
Deuteronomy8:4 Diaparo tsa gago ga di a ka tsa go onalela, le lonao lwa gago ga lo a ka lwa ruruga, ka dinyaga tse di 40 tse." 
Deuteronomy8:5 Le gone o akanye mo pelong ya gago gore jaaka motho a tle a otlhaye morwawe, Jehofa Modimo wa gago o a tla a go otlhaye jalo." 
Deuteronomy8:6 O tshegetse ditaolo tsa ga Jehofa Modimo wa gago, go sepela mo ditseleng tsa gagwe, le go mmoifa." 
Deuteronomy8:7 Gonne Jehofa Modimo wa gago, o go isa mo lefatsheng le le molemo, lefatshe la dinokana tsa metsi, la metswedi, le metlhodi e e tswelang mo megogorong le mo dithabeng;" 
Deuteronomy8:8 lefatshe la mabele le barele, la mafine, la mafeige le la magaranata; lefatshe la matlhware a lookwane le dinotshe;" 
Deuteronomy8:9 lefatshe le o tlaa jang dijo mo go lone di sa tlhokafale; ga o ketla o tlhoka sepe mo go lone; lefatshe le maje a lone a leng tshipi, le le o ka epang kgotlho mo makhubung a lone." 
Deuteronomy8:10 O tlaa ja o kgora, mme o tlaa baka Jehofa Modimo wa gago ka ga lefatshe le le molemo le o le go neileng."
