Deuteronomy27:15 “ ‘Go hutsege monna yo o dirang setshwantsho se se setilweng, le fa e le se se thetsweng, se e leng makgapha mo go Jehofa, tiro ya diatla tsa modiri, a se emisa mo sephiring.’ Mme a batho botlhe ba fetole, ba re: “ ‘A go nne jalo.’" 
Deuteronomy27:16 ‘Go hutsege yo o nyatsang rraagwe kgotsa mmaagwe.’ Batho botlhe ba re: ‘A go nne jalo.’ 
Deuteronomy27:17 ‘Go hutsege yo o sutisang molelwane wa ga gabo.’ Batho botlhe ba re: ‘A go nne jalo.’ 
Deuteronomy27:18 ‘Go hutsege yo o timetsang sefofu mo tseleng.’ Batho botlhe ba re: ‘A go nne jalo.’ 
Deuteronomy27:19 ‘Go hutsege yo o sokang katlholo ya moeng, le ya lesiela, le ya mosadi wa motlholagadi.’ Batho botlhe ba re: ‘A go nne jalo.’" 
Deuteronomy27:20 ‘Go hutsege yo o lalang le mogatsa rraagwe; gonne o bipolotse khiba ya ga rraagwe.’ Batho botlhe ba re: ‘A go nne jalo.’ 
Deuteronomy27:21 ‘Go hutsege yo o lalang le setshedi sengwe.’ Batho botlhe ba re: ‘A go nne jalo.’ 
Deuteronomy27:22 ‘Go hutsege yo o lalang le kgaitsadie, morwadia rraagwe, kgotsa morwadia mmaagwe.’ Batho botlhe ba re: ‘A go nne jalo.’" 
Deuteronomy27:23 ‘Go hutsege yo o lalang le mogwagadie.’ Batho botlhe ba re: ‘A go nne jalo.’ 
Deuteronomy27:24 ‘Go hutsege yo o bolayang wa ga gabo mo sephiring.’ Batho botlhe ba re: ‘A go nne jalo.’ 
Deuteronomy27:25 ‘Go hutsege yo o amogelang tuelo go tla a bolaya motho yo o se nang molato.’ Batho botlhe ba re: ‘A go nne jalo.’ 
Deuteronomy27:26 ‘Go hutsege yo o sa tlhomamiseng mafoko a molao go a dira.’ Batho botlhe ba re: ‘A go nne jalo.’ ” 
Deuteronomy28:1 “Go tlaa dirala gore fa o reetsa lentswe la ga Jehofa Modimo wa gago ka tlhoafalo, go tlhokomela go dira ditaolo tsotlhe tsa gagwe tse ke di go laolelang gompieno, Jehofa Modimo wa gago o tlaa go baya kwa godimo go feta merafe yotlhe ya lefatshe;" 
Deuteronomy28:2 masego a otlhe a tlaa tla mo go wena, a go fitlhela, fa o reetsa lentswe la ga Jehofa Modimo wa gago." 
Deuteronomy28:3 “O tlaa nna sego mo motseng, o tlaa nna sego mo nageng." 
Deuteronomy28:4 “Loungo lwa mmele wa gago lo tlaa segofala, le loungo lwa lefatshe la gago, le loato lwa dikgomo tsa gago, e bong loato lwa dikgomo tsa gago, e bong loato lwa dikgomo tsa gago tse dinamagadi, le loonyana lwa matsomane a gago." 
Deuteronomy28:5 “Seroto sa gago se tlaa segofala, le mogopo wa gago wa bodubelo." 
Deuteronomy28:6 “O tlaa segofala o goroga, o ba o segofala o bolola." 
Deuteronomy28:7 “Baba ba gago ba ba go tsogologelang, Jehofa o tlaa dira gore ba kgemethwe fa pele ga gago; ba tlaa go bololela ka tsela e le nngwe fela, mme ba tlaa tshaba fa pele ga gago ka ditsela di supa." 
Deuteronomy28:8 “Jehofa o tlaa go laolela tshegofatso mo mabolokelong a gago, le mo go tsotlhe tse o di bayang seatla; o tlaa go segofatsa mo lefatsheng le Jehofa Modimo wa gago o le go nayang." 
Deuteronomy28:9 “Jehofa o tlaa go itlhomamisetsa go nna tšhaba e e boitshepo, jaaka a go ikanetse; fa o tshegetsa ditaolo tsa ga Jehofa Modimo wa gago, o ba o sepela mo tseleng tsa gagwe." 
Deuteronomy28:10 Ditšhaba tsotlhe tsa lefatshe di tlaa bona fa o bidiwa ka leina la ga Jehofa; mme di tlaa go boifa. 
Deuteronomy28:11 Jehofa o tlaa go ntsifaletsa mo go molemo, mo loumong lwa mmele wa gago, mo loatong lwa dikgomo tsa gago, le mo loungong lwa lefatshe la gago, mo lefatsheng le Jehofa o ikanetseng borraeno, a re o tlaa le go naya." 
Deuteronomy28:12 Jehofa o tlaa go bulela polokelo ya gagwe e e molemo, e bong legodimo, go nesa pula ya lefatshe la gago mo lobakeng lwa yone, le go segofatsa tiro yotlhe ya diatla tsa gago; o tlaa adima merafe e le mentsi, mme wena ga o ketla o adima mo go ope." 
Deuteronomy28:13 Jehofa o tlaa go dira tlhogo, e seng mogatla, o tlaa nna kwa godimo go le gosi, ga o ketla o nna kwa tlase; fa o reetsa ditaolo tsa ga Jehofa Modimo wa gago, tse ke di go laolelang gompieno, o di tlhokomela o di dira," 
Deuteronomy28:14 o sa fapoge mafoko ape a ke a go laolelang gompieno, go ya ntlheng ya le legolo, kgotsa ya la molema, o latelela medimo e sele go tla o e direla." 
Deuteronomy28:15 “Mme fa o gana go reetsa lentswe la ga Jehofa Modimo wa gago, go tlhokomela go dira ditaolo tsotlhe tsa gagwe, le ditao tsa gagwe tse ke di go laolelang gompieno, diphutso tse tsotlhe di tlaa go wela, di go tshwara." 
Deuteronomy28:16 “O tlaa hutsega mo motseng, o tlaa hutsega mo nageng." 
Deuteronomy28:17 “Go tlaa hutsega seroto sa gago, le mogopo wa gago wa bodubelo." 
Deuteronomy28:18 “Go tlaa hutsega loumo lwa mmele wa gago, le loungo lwa lefatshe la gago, le loato lwa dikgomo tsa gago, le loonyana lwa letsomane la gago." 
Deuteronomy28:19 “O tlaa hutsega o goroga, o tlaa hutsega o bolola." 
Deuteronomy28:20 “Jehofa o tlaa go tlisetsa phutso, le pheretlhego, le kgalemo mo go tsotlhe tse o tlaa di bayang diatla go di dira, go tsamaya o senngwa, le go tsamaya o nyelela ka bonako; ka ntlha ya bosula jwa ditiro tsa gago, tse o ntatlhileng ka tsone." 
Deuteronomy28:21 Jehofa o tlaa dira gore kgogodi e go ngaparele, go tsamaya a go nyeleletsa ruri mo lefatsheng, kwa o yang go tsena teng o ya go le rua." 
Deuteronomy28:22 Jehofa o tlaa go laila ka tlhorego, le ka botlhoko jwa letshoroma, le ka phisego, le ka tutumo e e molelo, le ka tšhaka, le ka tshubego yo bolemo, le ka mokubo; mme dilo tse di tlaa go konatelela go tsamaya o nyelela." 
Deuteronomy28:23 Legodimo la gago le le go okameng le tlaa nna kgotlho fela, le lefatshe le o le gatang le nne tshipi fela." 
Deuteronomy28:24 Jehofa o tlaa dira pula ya lefatshe la gago gore e nne loupa le lorole fela; lo tlaa go nela lo tswa legodimong, go tsamaya o senyega." 
Deuteronomy28:25 “Jehofa o tlaa dira gore o kgemethwe fa pele ga baba ba gago; o tlaa ba bololela ka tsela e le nngwe fela, o tlaa tshaba fa pele ga bone ka ditsela di supa; o tlaa akgaakgelwa kwa le kwa mo gare ga magosi a lefatshe." 
Deuteronomy28:26 Setoto sa gago se tlaa nna dijo tsa dinonyane tsotlhe tsa loapi, le tsa dibatana tsa lefatshe, ga go ketla go dira le ope yo o di tshosang." 
Deuteronomy28:27 Jehofa o tlaa go itaya ka diso tsa Egepeto, le ka ditlhagala, le ka sekwapi, le ka makgophe, e le dilo tse o sa kakeng wa fodisiwa mo go tsone." 
Deuteronomy28:28 Jehofa o tlaa go itaya ka botsenwa, le ka bofofu, le ka tseano ya pelo;" 
Deuteronomy28:29 o tlaa apaapa motshegare jaaka sefofu se tle se apaapa mo lefifing; ga o ketla o tlhogonolofala mo tseleng tsa gago; o tlaa nna o bogisiwa fela, o thopiwa ka metlha yotlhe, ga go nke go nna ope yo o go thusang." 
Deuteronomy28:30 “O tlaa beelela mosadi, mme monna o sele o tlaa lala nae; o tlaa aga ntlo, mme ga o ketla o nna mo go yone; o tlaa tlhoma tshimo ya mafine," 
Deuteronomy28:31 Kgomo ya gago e tlaa tlhajwa fa pele ga matlho a gago, mme ga o ketla o e ja; esela ya gago e tlaa phamolwa ka thata fa pele ga sefatlhogo sa gago, mme ga o ketla o e rebolelwa; dinku tsa gago di tlaa newa baba ba gago, mme ga go nke go nna ope yo o go thusang." 
Deuteronomy28:32 Bana ba gago ba basimane le ba basetsana ba tlaa newa batho ba sele, matlho a gago a tlaa nna a sa le a leba, mme a tlaa kalega ka go tlhola o ba tlhologeletswe motshegare otlhe; mme ga go ketla go nna le sepe se se mo thateng ya seatla sa gago." 
Deuteronomy28:33 Loungo lwa lefatshe la gago, le matsapa otlhe a gago, morafe o o sa o itseng o tlaa go ja gotlhe fela; wena o tlaa bogisiwa fela o pitlwa ka metlha yotlhe." 
Deuteronomy28:34 O tlaa tsentshiwa ke go bona mo o tlaa go bonang ka matlho a gago. 
Deuteronomy28:35 Jehofa o tlaa go itaya mo mangoleng, le mo maotong ka seso se se botlhoko se o sa kakeng wa fodisiwa mo go sone, go tswa mo patong ya lonao go ya kwa phogong." 
Deuteronomy28:36 “Jehofa o tlaa go isa le kgosi e o tlaa e ipeelang, a go isa kwa morafeng o o sa o itseng, wena le fa e le borraeno; o tlaa direla medimo e sele gone, ya logong le ya lentswe." 
Deuteronomy28:37 O tlaa tswa kgakgamatso, le seane, le setlhajwa difela mo ditšhabeng tsotlhe tse Jehofa o tlaa go gogelang kwa go tsone." 
Deuteronomy28:38 “O tlaa rwalela peo e le kgolo kwa bolemong, mme o rorele bobotlana kwa gae, gonne tsie e tlaa e bilatsa fela." 
Deuteronomy28:39 O tlaa tlhoma masimo a mafine, o a baakanya, mme ga o ketla o nwa bojalwa le fa e le go ja loungo lwa mofine; gonne seboko se tlaa di ja." 
Deuteronomy28:40 O tlaa nna le ditlhare tsa matlhware mo lefatsheng lotlhe la gago, mme ga o ketla o tlola lookwane, gonne motlhware wa gago o tlaa tlhotlhorega loungo lwa one." 
Deuteronomy28:41 O tlaa tshola bana ba basimane le basetsana, mme ga ba ketla ba nna ba gago, gonne ba tlaa ya botshwarong." 
Deuteronomy28:42 Tsie e tlaa ja ditlhare tsotlhe tsa gago le loungo lwa lefatshe la gago. 
Deuteronomy28:43 “Moeng yo o mo go wena o tlaa nna a palamela godimodimo ga gago a ntse a ya kwa godimo fela, wena o tlaa nna o ya kwa tlase." 
Deuteronomy28:44 Ene o tlaa go adima, mme ga o ketla o adima ene; ene o tlaa nna tlhogo, wena o nne mogatla." 
Deuteronomy28:45 “Diphutso tse tsotlhe di tlaa tla mo go wena, di tlaa go konatelela di go tshwara go tsamaya o senngwa, ka o se ka wa reetsa lentswe la ga Jehofa Modimo wa gago, go tshegetsa ditaolo tsa gagwe le ditao tsa gagwe tse o di go laoletseng." 
Deuteronomy28:46 Di tlaa nna mo go wena e le sesupo, le segakgamatso, le mo losikeng lwa gago ka bosakhutleng." 
Deuteronomy28:47 “Ka o se ka wa direla Jehofa Modimo wa gago ka boitumelo, le ka boipelo jwa pelo, ka ntlha ya letlotlo la dilo tsotlhe," 
Deuteronomy28:48 ke gone ka moo o tlaa direlang baba ba gago, ba Jehofa o tlaa ba go tsosetsang, o ba direla mo tlaleng, le mo lenyoreng, le mo bosaikategang, le mo botlhokweng jwa dilo tsotlhe; mme o tlaa baya jokwe ya tshipi mo thamong ya gago go tsamaya a go senya." 
Deuteronomy28:49 Jehofa o tlaa go reololela morafe o o tswang kgakala, o tswa kwa bokhutlong jwa lefatshe, jaaka ntswi yo motona a tla a fofe; e le morafe o loleme lwa one o sa lo tlhaloganyeng;" 
Deuteronomy28:50 e le morafe o o sefatlhogo se se bogale, o o se ketlang o tlhokomela botho jwa motsofe, le fa e le go rekegela ba ba nana." 
Deuteronomy28:51 O tlaa ja loato lwa dikgomo tsa gago, le loungo lwa lefatshe la gago, go tsamaya o senngwa; e le morafe o o se ketlang o tlogela mabele, le fa e le bojalwa, le fa e le lookwane, le fa e le loato lwa dikgomo, le fa e le loonyana lwa letsomane la gago, go tsamaya o go fedisa." 
Deuteronomy28:52 O tlaa go tlhasela ka dikgoro tsotlhe tsa gago, go tsamaya dithako tsa gago tse di godileng le tse di thata, tse o di ikanelang, di salalagana mo lefatsheng lotlhe la gago; o tlaa go tlhasela ka dikgoro tsotlhe tsa gago mo lefatsheng lotlhe la gago le Jehofa Modimo wa gago o le go neileng." 
Deuteronomy28:53 “O tlaa ja loumo lwa mmele wa gago tota, nama ya bana ba gago ba basimane le ba basetsana, ba Jehofa Modimo wa gago o ba go neileng; mo tlhaselong le mo pitlaganong e baba ba gago ba tlaa go pitlaganyang ka yone." 
Deuteronomy28:54 Monna wa seitlotli mo go lona, le yo o masisi thata, leitlho la gagwe le tlaa sulafalela morwa rraagwe, le mosadi wa gagwe yo o nnang mo sehubeng sa gagwe, le masalela a bana ba gagwe ba ba mo saletseng." 
Deuteronomy28:55 Ke go re, ga a ketla a naya ope wa bone nama ya bana ba gagwe ba o tlaa ba jang, ka a sa salelwa ke sepe; go tewa mo tlhaselong le mo pitlaganong e mmaba wa gago o tlaa go pitlaganyang ka yone, ka dikgoro tsotlhe tsa gago." 
Deuteronomy28:56 Mosadi wa seitlotli, le yo o masisi mo go lona, yo o ne a sa kake a leka go baya lonao lwa gagwe fa fatshe ka ntlha ya bosisi le boitlotlo, leitlho la gagwe le tlaa sulafalela monna wa gagwe yo o nnang mo sehubeng sa gagwe, le morwawe, le morwadie;" 
Deuteronomy28:57 le motlhana wa gagwe o o tswang mo gare ga dinao tsa gagwe, le bana ba gagwe ba o tlaa ba tsalang; gonne o tlaa ba jesediwa mo sephiring ke go tlhoka dilo tsotlhe, mo tlhaselong le mo pitlaganong e mmaba wa gago o tlaa go pitlaganyang ka yone ka dikgoro tsa gago." 
Deuteronomy28:58 “Fa o sa tlhokomele go dira mafoko otlhe a molao o, a a kwadilweng mo lokwalong lo, gore o boife leina le le galalelang, le le le boitshegang le, e bong JEHOFA MODIMO WA GAGO;" 
Deuteronomy28:59 foo Jehofa o tlaa dira dipetso tsa gago di nna kgakgamatso, le dipetso tsa losika lwa gago, e bong dipetso tse dikgolo tse di emeng ka boleele, le malwetse a a botlhoko a a emang ka boleele." 
Deuteronomy28:60 O tlaa go reololela gape malwetse otlhe a Egepeto, a o ne o a boifa; mme a tlaa go ngaparela." 
Deuteronomy28:61 Le gone botlhoko bongwe le bongwe, le sebetso sengwe le sengwe se se sa kwalwang mo lokwalong lwa molao o, Jehofa o tlaa di lere mo go wena, go tsamaya o senngwa." 
Deuteronomy28:62 Lo tlaa tlogelwa lo le babotlana mo palong, le mororo lo ne lo ntse jaaka dinaledi tsa legodimo ka bontsi; gonne ga o a ka wa reetsa lentswe la Jehofa Modimo wa gago." 
Deuteronomy28:63 Go tlaa dirala, go re, jaaka Jehofa a ne a lo itumelela go lo direla molemo, le go lo ntsifatsa; Jehofa o tlaa lo itumelela jalo go lo nyeletsa, le go lo senya; mme lo tlaa khumolelwa koo mo lefatsheng le o tsenang kwa go lone o ya go le rua." 
Deuteronomy28:64 “Jehofa o tlaa go gasamisetsa le ditšhaba tsotlhe, go tswa kwa sekhutlong sengwe sa lefatshe, go ya kwa sekhutlong se sengwe sa lefatshe; mme o le koo o tlaa direla medimo e sele, e o iseng o e itse, wena le fa e le borraeno, e bong medimo ya logong le lentswe." 
Deuteronomy28:65 Mme o le koo gare ga merafe eo, ga o ketla o bona boiketlo bope, ga go ketla go nna boikhutso jwa lonao lwa gago, Jehofa o tlaa go naya gona pelo e e roromang, le kalego ya matlho, le go serega ga mowa." 
Deuteronomy28:66 Botshelo jwa gago bo tlaa akgega mo pelaelong fa pele ga gago; o tlaa boifa bosigo le motshegare, ga o ketla o dira le tsholofetso epe ya botshelo jwa gago." 
Deuteronomy28:67 O tlaa re go le ka moso, o re: ‘A bo go ka bo go le maitseboa!’ E re maitseboa, o re: ‘A bo e ka bo ne ne go le ka moso!’ Ka ntlha ya poifo ya pelo ya gago e o e boifang le ka ntlha ya pono ya matlho a gago e o e bonang." 
Deuteronomy28:68 Jehofa o tlaa ba a go isa kwa Egepeto ka dikepe, ka tsela e ke go reileng ka ga yone, ka re: ‘Ga o ketla o tlhola o e bona gope,’ mme lo tlaa rata go ipapatsa gone mo babeng ba lona, go nna batlhanka le malata; mme ga go ketla go nna le motho ope yo o tlaa lo rekang.”" 
Deuteronomy29:1 A ke mafoko a kgolagano e Jehofa o laotseng Moše gore a e dire le bana ba Iseraele mo lefatsheng la Moabe, kwa ntle ga kgolagano e o e dirileng nabo kwa Horebe." 
Deuteronomy29:2 Moše a bitsa Baiseraele botlhe, a ba raya, a re: “Lo bonye tsotlhe tse Jehofa o ne a di dira fa pele ga matlho a lona mo lefatsheng la Egepeto, a di direla Faro, le batlhanka botlhe ba gagwe, le lefatshe lotlhe la gagwe." 
Deuteronomy29:3 Diteko tse dikgolo tse matlho a lona a di bonyeng, ditshupo le dikgakgamatso tse dikgolo tseo." 
Deuteronomy29:4 Jehofa ga a a lo naya pelo ya go itse, le fa e le matlho a go bona, le fa e le ditsebe tsa go utlwa, nako e sa le eno." 
Deuteronomy29:5 Ke lo gogile ka dinyaga di le 40 mo nageng; diaparo tsa lona ga di a onala mo go lona, le ditlhako tsa lona ga di a onala mo dinaong tsa lona." 
Deuteronomy29:6 Ga lo a ja senkgwe, ga lo a nwa bojalwa jwa mofine, le fa e le bojalwa jo bo loileng, gore lo tle lo itse fa ke le Jehofa Modimo wa lona." 
Deuteronomy29:7 E rile lo fitlha mo felong fano, bo Sihone kgosi ya Hešebone, le Oge kgosi ya Bašane ba re bololela ka ntwa, mme ra ba kgemetha," 
Deuteronomy29:8 ra gapa lefatshe la bone, ra le naya Barubene, le Bagate, le bontlhanngwe jwa lotso lwa ga Manase, go nna boswa." 
Deuteronomy29:9 Ke gone tshegetsang mafoko a kgolagano e, lo a dire, gore lo tlhogonolofale mo go tsotlhe tse lo di dirang." 
Deuteronomy29:10 “Gompieno lo eme lotlhe fa pele ga Jehofa Modimo wa lona; ditlhogo tsa lona, ditso tsa lona, bagolwane ba lona, maotlana a lona, e bong banna botlhe ba Iseraele," 
Deuteronomy29:11 banyana ba lona, basadi ba lona, moeng wa gago yo o mo gare ga mathibelelo a lona, go simolola ka yo o lo rathelang dikgong, go ya kwa go yo o lo gelang metsi;" 
Deuteronomy29:12 gore lo tsene mo kgolaganong ya ga Jehofa Modimo wa lona, le mo ikanong ya gagwe, e Jehofa Modimo wa lona o e dirang gompieno le lona." 
Deuteronomy29:13 Gore a lo itlhomamisetse gompieno, gore lo nne sešaba sa gagwe, le gore a nne Modimo mo go lona, jaaka a buile le lona, le jaaka a ne a ikanela borraeno, Aberahame, le Isake le Jakobe." 
Deuteronomy29:14 Ke bile ga ke dire kgolagano e, le ikano e, le lona losi;" 
Deuteronomy29:15 ke e dira le yo o emeng fano le rona gompieno fa pele ga Jehofa Modimo wa rona, ke e dira le gone le ene yo o se nang le rona fano gompieno." 
Deuteronomy29:16 “Gonne lo a itse ka fa re ne ra nna mo lefatsheng la Egepeto ka gone, le ka fa re raletseng merafe e lo e raletseng ka gone;" 
Deuteronomy29:17 lo bile lo bonye dilo tsa bone tse di makgapha, le medimo ya bone ya disetwa, ya logong le ya lentswe, ya selefera le ya gouta, e e neng e le mo go bone;" 
Deuteronomy29:18 e se re kgotsa go bo go le mo go lona monna, kgotsa mosadi, kgotsa losika, kgotsa lotso, yo gompieno pelo ya gagwe e hularelang Jehofa Modimo wa rona, e ya go direla medimo ya merafe eo; e se re kgotsa go bo go le mo go lona motswe o o ungwang mogau le longana;" 
Deuteronomy29:19 e re a utlwa mafoko a phutso e, a itshegofatse mo pelong ya gagwe, a re: ‘Ke tlaa nna le kagiso, le fa ke sepela mo bogwading jwa pelo ya me, go senya mo go longola le mo go omeletseng.’" 
Deuteronomy29:20 Jehofa ga a ketla a mo itshwarela, foo bogale jwa ga Jehofa, le lefufa la gagwe, di tlaa kuela motho yoo mosi; le phutso yotlhe e e kwadilweng mo lokwalong lo, e tlaa mo lala godimo, mme Jehofa o tlaa phimolela ruri leina la gagwe fa tlase ga legodimo." 
Deuteronomy29:21 Jehofa o tla mo lomololela bosuleng, a mo ntsha mo ditsong tsotlhe tsa Iseraele ka fa diphutsong tsotlhe tsa kgolagano e e kwadilweng mo lokwalong lwa molao." 
Deuteronomy29:22 “Kokomana e e tlang, e bong bana ba lona ba ba tlaa tsogang morago ga lona, le motho wa ditšhaba yo o tlaa bong a tswa kwa lefatsheng le le kgakala, ba tlaa re ba bona dipetso tsa lefatshe leo, le matlhoko a Jehofa o le tlhokofaditseng ka one," 
Deuteronomy29:23 le go re lefatshe lotlhe ke sulefera le letswai, le phiso, le sa jalwe, le sa ungwe, le sa tlhoge bojang, le ntse jaaka thibegetso ya Sotoma le Gomora, Atema le Seboime, e le mafatshe a Jehofa o a ribegeditseng ka bogale jwa gagwe le ka tšhakgalo ya gagwe." 
Deuteronomy29:24 Merafe yotlhe e tlaa bua, e re: ‘Jehofa o direla lefatshe le jalo ka ntlha yang? Mogote wa bogale jo bogolo jo, o kaya eng?’" 
Deuteronomy29:25 Foo batho ba tlaa bua, ba re: ‘Ke ka gonne ba latlhile kgolagano ya ga Jehofa Modimo wa borraabo, e o e dirileng nabo jale ka a ba ntsha mo lefatsheng la Egepeto." 
Deuteronomy29:26 Ba ile ba direla medimo e sele, ba e obamela, e le medimo e ba sa e itseng le e o se kang a e ba naya." 
Deuteronomy29:27 Ke gone ka mo bogale jwa ga Jehofa jwa tukela lefatshe le, go tla a le leretse phutso yotlhe e e kwadilweng mo lokwalong lo." 
Deuteronomy29:28 Jehofa a ba kukuthomolola mo lefatsheng la bone ka bogale, le ka tšhakgalo, le ka kgakatsego e kgolo, mme a ba latlhela kwa lefatsheng le sele, jaaka go ntse le gompieno.’" 
Deuteronomy29:29 “Dilo tse di subegileng ke tsa ga Jehofa Modimo wa rona, mme dilo tse di senotsweng ke tsa rona le tsa bana ba rona ka bosakhutleng, gore re tle re dire mafoko otlhe a molao o.”" 
Deuteronomy30:1 “Go tlaa dirala, go re e tlaa re fa dilo tse tsotlhe di tsile mo go wena, tshegofatso le phutso, tse ke di beileng fa pele ga gago, fa o di gakologelwa o le kwa gare ga merafe e Jehofa Modimo wa gago o go leleketseng kwa go yone," 
Deuteronomy30:2 fa o boela mo go Jehofa Modimo wa gago o ineela go utlwa lentswe la gagwe jaaka tsotlhe tse ke di go laolelang gompieno, wena le bana ba gago, o ineela ka pelo yotlhe ya gago, le ka mowa otlhe wa gago;" 
Deuteronomy30:3 foo Jehofa Modimo wa gago o tlaa sokolola botshwaro jwa gago, o tlaa go tlhomogela pelo, o tlaa bowa a go phutha kwa ditšhabeng tsotlhe, kwa Jehofa Modimo wa gago o go gasameditseng gone." 
Deuteronomy30:4 Le fa bafaladi bangwe ba gago ba le kwa dikhutlong tsa legodimo, Jehofa Modimo o tlaa go phutha gone, o tlaa ya go go tsaya gone." 
Deuteronomy30:5 Jehofa Modimo wa gago o tlaa go lere mo lefatsheng le borraeno ba ne ba le ruile, o tlaa le rua, o tlaa go direla molemo, o tlaa go ntsifatsa bogolo go borraeno." 
Deuteronomy30:6 Jehofa Modimo wa gago o tlaa go rupisa pelo, le pelo ya losika lwa gago, go tla a lo ratisa Jehofa Modimo wa gago ka pelo yotlhe ya gago, le ka mowa otlhe wa gago gore o tle o tshele." 
Deuteronomy30:7 Jehofa Modimo wa gago o tla baya diphutso tsotlhe tse mo babeng ba gago ba ba go ilang, ba ba go bogisitseng." 
Deuteronomy30:8 O tlaa bowa o ineela go utlwa lentswe la ga Jehofa, o ba o dira tsotlhe tse ke di go laolelang gompieno." 
Deuteronomy30:9 Jehofa Modimo wa gago o tlaa go atla mo tirong yotlhe ya seatla sa gago, mo loumong lwa mmele wa gago, le mo loatong lwa dikgomo tsa gago, le mo loungong lwa lefatshe la gago, gore go nne molemo, gonne Jehofa o tlaa ba a go itumelela gore go nne molemo, jaaka a ne a itumelela borraeno; ke go re;" 
Deuteronomy30:10 fa o ineela go utlwa lentswe la ga Jehofa Modimo wa gago, go tshegetsa ditaolo tsa gagwe le ditao tsa gagwe, tse di kwadilweng mo lokwalong lo, lwa molao; fa o retologela mo go Jehofa Modimo wa gago ka pelo yotlhe ya gago, le ka mowa otlhe wa gago." 
Deuteronomy30:11 “Gonne taolo e ke e go laolelang gompieno, ga e go thatafalele, le gone ga e kgakala." 
Deuteronomy30:12 Ga e kwa legodimong fa o ka bong o re: ‘E mang yo o tlaa re tlhatlogelang kwa legodimong, a ya go e lere mo go rona, a e re utlwisa, gore re e dire?’" 
Deuteronomy30:13 Le gone ga e kwa moseja ga lewatle, fa o ka bong o re: ‘E mang yo o tlaa re tshelelang lewatle, a ya go e lere mo go rona, a e re utlwisa, gore re e dire?’" 
Deuteronomy30:14 Lefoko le gautshwane nao, mo molomong wa gago, le mo pelong ya gago, gore o le dire." 
Deuteronomy30:15 Bona, ke beile fa pele ga gago gompieno botshelo le molemo, le loso le bosula;" 
Deuteronomy30:16 ka ke go laola gompieno, gore o rate Jehofa Modimo wa gago, o sepele mo ditseleng tsa gagwe, le go tshegetsa ditaolo tsa gagwe, le ditao tsa gagwe, le dikatlholo tsa gagwe, gore o tshele, o ntsifale, le gore Jehofa Modimo wa gago a go segofatse mo lefatsheng le o tsenang kwa go lone o ya go le rua." 
Deuteronomy30:17 E tlaa re fa pelo ya gago e fapoga, o gana go utlwa, o gogelwa koo, o ya go obamela medimo e sele, le go e direla," 
Deuteronomy30:18 ke a lo bolelela gompieno, ka re, ruri lo tlaa nyelela; ga lo ketla lo lelefatsa malatsi a lona mo lefatsheng, le o kgabaganyang Joretane o ya go tsena mo go lone go le rua." 
Deuteronomy30:19 Ke lo biletsa legodimo le lefatshe gompieno go supa ka ga lona, fa ke beile botshelo le loso fa pele ga gago, tshegofatso le phutso; ke gone itshenkele botshelo, gore o tshele, wena le losika lwa gago;" 
Deuteronomy30:20 gore o rate Jehofa Modimo wa gago, go ineela go utlwa lentswe la gagwe, le go mo ngaparela; gonne ke ene botshelo jwa gago, le boleele jwa malatsi a gago; gore o tle o age mo lefatsheng le Jehofa o le ikanetseng borraeno, Aberahame, le Isake le Jakobe, fa a tlaa le ba naya.”" 
Deuteronomy31:1 Moše a ya a bua mafoko a otlhe le Baiseraele botlhe fela. 
Deuteronomy31:2 A ba raya a re: “Gompieno nna ke botsofe jwa dinyaga di le lekgolo le masome a mabedi; ga ke tlhole ke nonofile go tswa le go tsena; Jehofa o ntheile a re: ‘Ga nketla ke tshela Joretane ono.’ 
Deuteronomy31:3 Jehofa Modimo wa gago ke ene yo o tlaa kgabaganyang fa pele ga gago; o tlaa senya merafe e fa pele ga gago, mme o tlaa e rua; Jošua ene, o tlaa kgabaganya fa pele ga gago, jaaka Jehofa a buile." 
Deuteronomy31:4 Jehofa o tlaa ba direla jaaka a ne a direla Sihone le Oge, dikgosi tsa Baamore le lefatshe la bone; ba o ba sentseng." 
Deuteronomy31:5 Jehofa o tlaa ba lo neela fa pele ga gago, lo tlaa ba direla ka fa taolong yotlhe e ke e lo laoletseng." 
Deuteronomy31:6 Lo nne thata le pelokgale, lo se boife, lo se ka lwa ba tshoga; gonne Jehofa Modimo wa gago ke ene yo o tsamayang nao; ga a ketla a go tlhaela le fa e le go go latlha.”" 
Deuteronomy31:7 Moše a bitsa Jošua, a mo raya mo ponong ya Baiseraele botlhe, a re: “O nne thata le pelokgale, gonne o tlaa ya le tšhaba e mo lefatsheng le Jehofa o le ikanetseng borraabo, a re o tlaa le ba naya, o tlaa le ba ruisa." 
Deuteronomy31:8 Jehofa ke ene yo o yang fa pele ga gago; o tlaa nna nao, ga a ketla a go tlhaela le fa e le go go latlha; o se ka wa boifa, o se ka wa rerega.”" 
Deuteronomy31:9 Moše a kwala molao o, a o neela baperesiti bomorwa Lefi ba ba rwalang letlole la kgolagano ya ga Jehofa, le bagolwane botlhe ba Iseraele." 
Deuteronomy31:10 Moše a ba laola, a re: “E tlaa re mo bokhutlong jwa bosupa bongwe le bongwe jwa dinyaga, mo lobakeng lo lo laotsweng lwa ngwaga wa kgololo, mo modirong wa metlaagana," 
Deuteronomy31:11 mogang Baiseraele botlhe ba tsileng go bonala fa pele ga Jehofa Modimo wa gago, mo felong fa o tlaa go itshenkelang, o bale molao o fa pele ga Baiseraele botlhe mo kutlong ya bone." 
Deuteronomy31:12 Phutha batho, banna le basadi, banyana, le moeng wa gago yo o mo teng ga dikgoro tsa gago, gore ba utlwe, le gore ba ithute, ba boife Jehofa Modimo wa lona, ba tlhokomele go dira mafoko otlhe a molao o;" 
Deuteronomy31:13 le gore bana ba bone, ba ba iseng ba itse, ba utlwe, ba ithute go boifa Jehofa Modimo wa lona ka lobaka lotlhe lo lo tshelang ka lone mo lefatsheng le lo kgabaganyang Joretane lo ya kwa go lone go le rua.”" 
Deuteronomy31:14 Jehofa a raya Moše a re: “Bona, malatsi a a atamela a o tlaa swang ka one; bitsa Jošua, lo iponatse mo mogopeng wa bophuthegelo, gore ke tle ke mo laye.” Mme Moše le Jošua ba ya ba iponatsa mo mogopeng wa bophuthegelo." 
Deuteronomy31:15 Jehofa a bonala mo Mogopeng a le mo mosipuring wa leru; mosipuri wa ema kgoro ya Mogope godimo. 
Deuteronomy31:16 Jehofa a raya Moše a re: “Bona o tlaa robala le borraago; mme tšhaba e, e tlaa tloga e akafalela medimo ya seeng ya lefatshe, ya kwa ba yang go nna gone mo go yone, ba tlaa ntatlha, ba senya kgolagano ya me e ke e dirileng nabo." 
Deuteronomy31:17 Ke gone bogale jwa me bo tlaa ba tukelang mo letsatsing leo, ke tlaa ba latlha, ke tlaa ba subela sefatlhogo sa me, mme ba tlaa jelwa ruri, le masula a le mantsi le mahutsana a tlaa ba wela; ba tlaa bua mo tsatsing leo ba re: ‘Masula a, a ga a a re wela ka gobo Modimo o seyo mo go rona?’" 
Deuteronomy31:18 Ruri ke tlaa suba sefatlhogo sa me mo tsatsing leo, ka ntlha ya bosula jotlhe jo ba tlaa bong ba bo dirile, ka ba tlaa bo ba menogetse kwa medimong e sele." 
Deuteronomy31:19 “Ke gone jaana, ikwaleleng sefela se, o se rute bana ba Iseraele, o se tsenye mo melomong ya bone, gore sefela se, e nne seganeledi sa me mo baneng ba Iseraele." 
Deuteronomy31:20 Gonne ke tlaa re ke sena go ba fitlhisa mo lefatsheng le ke le ikanetseng borraabo, le le elang maši le dinotshe, mme ba jele, ba kgotshe, ba nonne, foo ba tlaa menogela kwa medimong e sele, ba e direla, ba nnyatse, ba senye kgolagano ya me." 
Deuteronomy31:21 Mme go tlaa dirala go re mogang masula a le mantsi le mahutsana a ba wela, sefela se, se tlaa bo se supa fa pele ga bone jaaka mosupi; gonne ga se ketla se lebalwa mo melomong ya losika lwa bone; e tswa ke itse ditlhatlhanyo tsa bone tse ba di tlhatlhanyang, le jaana, ke ise ke ba fitlhise mo lefatsheng le ke ikanneng ka ga lone.”" 
Deuteronomy31:22 Jalo Moše a kwala sefela se ka tsatsi leo, a ba a se ruta bana ba Iseraele." 
Deuteronomy31:23 A laya Jošua morwa Nune, a re: “O nne thata le pelokgale; gonne o tlaa fitlhisa bana ba Iseraele mo lefatsheng le ke le ba ikanetseng; mme ke tlaa nna nao.”" 
Deuteronomy31:24 Ga dirala ya re Moše a sena go fetsa go kwala mafoko a molao o mo lokwalong, a ba a a wetsa," 
Deuteronomy31:25 a laola Balefi ba ba rwalang letlole la kgolagano ya ga Jehofa, a re:" 
Deuteronomy31:26 “Tsayang lokwalo lo lwa molao, lo lo beye lo bape le letlole la kgolagano ya ga Jehofa Modimo wa lona, gore lo nne gone e le mosupi go go ganetsa." 
Deuteronomy31:27 Gonne ke a e itse tsuololo ya gago, le thamo e thata ya gago; lo tsuololela Jehofa le ke sa ntse ke tshedile ke na le lona gompieno, mme go tlaa nna jalo bogolo jang ke sena go swa?" 
Deuteronomy31:28 Mphutlhelang bagolwane botlhe ba ditso tsa lona, le maotlana a lona, gore ke bue mafoko a mo ditsebeng tsa bone, ke ba biletse legodimo le lefatshe go supa go ba ganetsa." 
Deuteronomy31:29 Gonne ke a itse fa e tlaa re ke sena go swa lo tlaa ipodisetsa ruri, lo fapoga tsela e ke e lo laoletseng; mme bosula bo tlaa lo wela mo metlheng ya morago; gonne lo ganelela go dira se se bosula mo ponong ya ga Jehofa, go mo tlhotlheleletsa bogaleng ka tiro ya diatla tsa lona.”" 
Deuteronomy31:30 Moše a bua mafoko a sefela se mo ditsebeng tsa phuthego yotlhe ya Iseraele, a ba a a wetsa:" 
Deuteronomy32:1 “Lona magodimo, sekegang tsebe, mme ke tlaa bua; a lefatshe le utlwe mafoko a molomo wa me." 
Deuteronomy32:2 Thuto ya me e tlaa rotha jaaka pula, puo ya me e tlaa wa jaaka monyo; jaaka pula ya medupe mo loremeng, le jaaka pula ya maebana mo morogong;" 
Deuteronomy32:3 gonne ke tlaa opela leina la ga Jehofa mokgosi; kayang Modimo wa rona bogolo. 
Deuteronomy32:4 Lefika, tiro ya gagwe e itekanetse; gonne ditsela tsa gagwe tsotlhe ke tshiamiso; Modimo o o boikanngo, o o se nang tshiamololo, one o tekatekanyo, o tshiamo." 
Deuteronomy32:5 Ba o ipodiseditse, ga se bana ba gagwe, ke setshubaba mo go bone; ke losika lo lo logwadi, lo lo kgopo." 
Deuteronomy32:6 A lo a bo lo duel Jehofa jalo, batho ke lona ba dieleele? A ga se ene rraago yo o go rekileng? O go dirile a ba a go tlhomamisa." 
Deuteronomy32:7 Ikgakolole malatsi a bogologolo, gopola dinyaga tsa dikokomana di le dintsi; botsa rraago, o tlaa go tlhotlhela; bagolwane ba gago, ba tlaa go bolelela." 
Deuteronomy32:8 E rile Mgodimodimo a abela merafe boswa jwa yone, ka a kgaoganya bana ba batho, a tlhomela ditšhaba melelwane ka fa palong ya bana ba Iseraele." 
Deuteronomy32:9 Gonne kabelo ya ga Jehofa ke batho ba gagwe; Jakobe ke kabo e e lekantsweng ya boswa jwa gagwe. 
Deuteronomy32:10 O mo fitlhetse mo lefatsheng le le sekaka, mo nageng e e bobidibidi fela, e e dumadumang; a mo dikanyetsa, a mo disa, a mo direla jaaka nyetse ya leitlho la gagwe." 
Deuteronomy32:11 Jaaka ntswi yo motona yo o tleng a fudue setlhaga sa gagwe a bokabokele mo godimo ga mamphorwana a gagwe, ene a ba tsharololele diphuka tsa gagwe, a ba tsaya, a ba rwala mo diphukeng tsa gagwe;" 
Deuteronomy32:12 Jehofa a le esi a ba goga, go se na modimo ope wa seeng nae." 
Deuteronomy32:13 A mo palamisa mafelong a a godimo a lefatshe, a ja totafalo ya naga; a mo ntshetsa dinotshe mo lefikeng, le lookwane mo lefikeng la legakwa." 
Deuteronomy32:14 Madila a dikgomo le maši a dinku a na le mafura a dikwanyana, le diphelefu tsa losika lwa Bašane le dipodi di na le mafura a diphilo tsa mabele; ka madi a loungo lwa mofine wa nwa bojalwa." 
Deuteronomy32:15 Mme Ješurune a nona, a raga; o nonne, o enne, o borethe; foo a latlha Modimo o o mo dirileng, a kobela tlase lefika la poloko ya gagwe." 
Deuteronomy32:16 Ba ne ba tlhotlheletsa lefufa la one ka medimo ya seeng, ba o gakatsa ka tse di makgapha." 
Deuteronomy32:17 Ba ne ba isetsa badimo ditlhabelo, ba e neng e se Modimo ope, e le medimo e ba neng ba sa e itse, medimo e e sa tswang go tlhaga, e borra ba lona ba ne ba sa e tshabe." 
Deuteronomy32:18 Lefika le le go tsetseng o le tlhokomologile, o lebetse Modimo o o go belegeng." 
Deuteronomy32:19 Jehofa a go bona, a ba ferogela sebete ka ntlha ya kgakatso ya bomorwawe le bomorwadie." 
Deuteronomy32:20 A re: Ke tlaa ba subela sefatlhogo sa me, ke tlaa bona gore bokhutlo jwa bone e tlaa nna eng; gonne ke losika lo lo lesoko, bana ba ba se nang boikanngo." 
Deuteronomy32:21 Ba nkhufantse ka se e seng Modimo; ba nkgakaditse ka maithamako a bone; le nna ke tlaa ba tlhotlheletsa lefufa ka ba e seng tšhaba; ke tlaa ba gakatsa ka morafe o o seeleele. 
Deuteronomy32:22 Gonne molelo o tshubilwe mo bogaleng jwa me, o fisetsa kwa moleteng o o kwa tengteng, o laila lefatshe le totafalo ya lone, o tshuba metheo ya dithaba." 
Deuteronomy32:23 Ke tlaa koelela masula mo go bone; ke tlaa feletsa metswi ya me mo go bone. 
Deuteronomy32:24 Ba tlaa fediwa ke tlala, ba tlaa rungwa ke mogote o o tutumang, le tshenyego e e galakang; ke tlaa ba tsosetsa meno a dibatana, le botlhoko jwa dilelemedi tsa lorole." 
Deuteronomy32:25 Kwa ntle tšhaka e tlaa thopa, mme mo matlwaneng a a kwa teng therego; go tlaa senya wa lekau le wa kgarebane, seanyi le monna yo mmududu." 
Deuteronomy32:26 Ke rile: Ke tlaa ba gasamisetsa kwa kgakala, ke khutlisa kgakologelo ya bone mo bathong." 
Deuteronomy32:27 Fa nkabo ke ne ke sa boife kgakatso ya mmaba, e tle e re kgotsa baganetsi ba bone ba gopola ka go sele, e se re kgotsa ba re: Go tsholetsegile letsogo la rona, mme selo se sotlhe fela Jehofa ga a a se dira." 
Deuteronomy32:28 Gonne ke morafe o o se nang kgakololo, ga go na tlhaloganyo mo go bone." 
Deuteronomy32:29 A bo ba ka bo ba ne ba le botlhale, mme ba tlhalogantse se, ba ka bo ne ne ba akanya bokhutlo jwa bone!" 
Deuteronomy32:30 Ana a le mongwe fela o ne a tlaa leleka jang ba ba makgolo a some, le ba le babedi ba tshabisa ba ba makgolo a lekgolo fa Lefika wa bone a ka bo a se ka a ba rekisa, le fa Jehofa a se ka a ba neelela?" 
Deuteronomy32:31 Gonne lefika la bone ga le a nna jaaka Lefika wa rona, le e leng bone baba ba rona ka bosi e le baatlhodi." 
Deuteronomy32:32 Gonne mofine wa bone ke wa mofine wa Sotoma, wa matlhagare a Gomora; loungo lwa bone lwa mofine ke loungo lo lo mogau, le masitlha a bone ke a a galakang." 
Deuteronomy32:33 Bojalwa jwa bone jwa mofine ke botlhoko jwa dikgogela, ke botlhoko jo bo bolalome jwa dišaušawane." 
Deuteronomy32:34 Selo se, a ga se a bewa mo polokelong fa go nna, se kaneletswe mo mahumong a me?" 
Deuteronomy32:35 Pusoloso ke ya me, le tefetso, mo lobakeng lo lonao lwa bone lo tlaa relelang ka lone; gonne letsatsi la thekisego ya bone le gaufi, le dilo tse di nang le go ba wela di tlaa akofa." 
Deuteronomy32:36 Gonne Jehofa o tlaa atlhola batho ba gagwe, o tlaa ikwatlhaya ka ga batlhanka ba gagwe mogang o bonang fa thata ya bone e ile, mme go se na ope yo o setseng, le fa e le yo o tswaletsweng kgotsa yo o lesiwang a itsamaela fela." 
Deuteronomy32:37 O tlaa re: Medimo ya bone e fa kae, e bong lefika le ba ne ba le ikantse;" 
Deuteronomy32:38 e e jeleng mafura a ditlhabelo tsa bone, ya nwa bojalwa jwa mofine jwa bone jwa tshupelo e e nowang. A e nanoge e lo thuse, e nne phemelo ya lona." 
Deuteronomy32:39 Bonang jaana, fa e le Nna one, e bong Nna, mme go se na Modimo ope le nna; ke a bolaya, ke bile ke a tshedisa; ke ntshitse ntho, ke bile ke a fodisa; ga go na ope yo o ka gololang mo seatleng sa me." 
Deuteronomy32:40 Gonne ke tsholeletsa letsogo la me legodimong, ke re, jaaka ke tshela ka bosakhutleng," 
Deuteronomy32:41 fa ke lootsa tšhaka ya me e e šadiang, fa letsogo la me le tshwara katlholo; ke tlaa ipusolosetsa mo babeng ba me, ke itefetsa mo go bone ba ba nkilang." 
Deuteronomy32:42 Metswi ya me ke tlaa e tagisa ka madi, tšhaka ya me e tlaa ja nama; ka madi a ba ba bolailweng, le a batshwarwa, a a tswang tlhogong ya magosana a mmaba." 
Deuteronomy32:43 Lona merafe, itumeleng le batho ba gagwe; gonne o tlaa lefetsa madi a batlhanka ba gagwe, o tlaa iposolosetsa mo babeng ba gagwe, mme o tlaa direla lefatshe la gagwe, le batho ba gagwe, tefololo.”" 
Deuteronomy32:44 Moše a tla, a bua mafoko otlhe a sefela se mo ditsebeng tsa batho, ene, le Hošea morwa Nune." 
Deuteronomy32:45 Moše a wetsa mafoko otlhe a go a bua le Baiseraele botlhe. 
Deuteronomy32:46 A ba raya, a re: “Tlhomang dipelo tsa lona mo mafokong otlhe a molao o, a ke lo a itsiseng gompieno, go tla lo a bolelela bana ba lona go a dirafatsa." 
Deuteronomy32:47 Gonne ga se lefela mo go lona; ka ke botshelo jwa lona, mme lo tlaa lelefatsa malatsi a lona ka sone selo se mo lefatsheng le lo kgabaganyang Joretane lo ya kwa go lone go le rua.”" 
Deuteronomy32:48 Jehofa a bua le Moše ka lone letsatsi leo, a re:" 
Deuteronomy32:49 “Tlhatloga thaba e ya Abarime, o ye thabeng ya Nebo, e e mo lefatsheng la Moabe, e e lebaganyeng le Jeriko; mme o bone lefatshe le Kanana, le ke le nayang bana ba Iseraele go le rua." 
Deuteronomy32:50 O swele gone mo thabeng e o e tlhatlogang, o phuthelwe kwa bathong ba gaeno; jaaka Arone mogoloo a ne a swela mo thabeng ya Hore, a phuthelwa bathong ba ga gabo." 
Deuteronomy32:51 Gonne lo no lwa nteofela mo gare ga bana ba Iseraele fa metsing a Meriba wa Kateše, mo nageng ya Tsine; gonne lo ne lo se kwa lwa intshepisa mo gare ga bana ba Iseraele." 
Deuteronomy32:52 Ka jalo o tlaa bona lefatshe fa pele ga gago; mme ga o ketla o ya gone mo lefatsheng le ke le nayang bana ba Iseraele.” 
Deuteronomy33:1 E ke yone tshegofatso e Moše monna wa Modimo o ne a segofatsa bana ba Iseraele ka yone, pele ga loso lwa gagwe." 
Deuteronomy33:2 A re: “Jehofa o ne a tswa kwa Sinai, a ba tlhabela a tswa mo Seire, a phatsima a betlama a le mo thabeng ya Parane, a bo a tswa mo makgolong a makgolo mantsi a baitshepi, ka fa ntlheng ya gagwe ya letsogo le legolo ga bo go le molao o o ba tutumelang molelo." 
Deuteronomy33:3 Ee, o a di rata ditšhaba, Baitshepi ba gagwe botlhe ba mo seatleng sa gago; ba ne ba dula fa dinaong tsa gago; mongwe le mongwe o tlaa amogela mafoko a gago." 
Deuteronomy33:4 Moše o ne a re laolela molao, e le boswa jwa phuthego ya ga Jakobe." 
Deuteronomy33:5 Ene e ne e le kgosi mo Ješurune, ka ditlhogo tsa batho di phuthwa, ditsho tsotlhe tsa Iseraele di le mmogo." 
Deuteronomy33:6 A Rubene a tshele a se ka a swa; le fa go ntse jalo a batho ba gagwe ba nne babotlana.” 
Deuteronomy33:7 E ke yone tshegofatso ya ga Juta, a re: “Jehofa, utlwa lentswe la ga Juta, o mo lere mo bathong ba ga gabo; o ne a itwela ka mabogo a gagwe, wena o tlaa nna thuso go mo tlhabantsha le baba ba gagwe.”" 
Deuteronomy33:8 Ka ga Lefi, a re: “Thumime wa gago, le Urime wa gago ba na le ene yo o mo ratang, ene yo o ne wa mo leka kwa Masa, yo o ne wa ganela nae kwa metsing a Meriba." 
Deuteronomy33:9 Yo o ne a bua ka ga rraagwe, a re: ‘Ga ke a mmona,’ le ka ga mmaagwe; le gone ga a ka a re bomorwa rraagwe ke bomangmang; le gone ga a ka a itse ba e leng bana ba gagwe, gonne ba tlhokometse lefoko la gago, ba tshegeditse kgolagano ya gago." 
Deuteronomy33:10 Ba tlaa ruta Jakobe dikatlholo tsa gago, le Iseraele molao wa gago; ba tlaa baya maswalo fa pele ga gago, le tshupelo e e fisiwang e le mmogo mo sebesong sa gago." 
Deuteronomy33:11 Jehofa, segofatsa dithoto tsa gagwe, o amogele tiro ya diatla tsa gagwe; ba ba mo tsogologelang o phololetse lotheka lwa bone, le lwa ba ba mo ilang, gore ba se ka ba tlhola ba ema.”" 
Deuteronomy33:12 Ka ga Benjamine, a re: “Moratwa wa ga Jehofa o tlaa aga mo polokegong fa go ene; o tlhola o mmipile motshegare otlhe, o ntse fa gare ga magetla a gagwe.”" 
Deuteronomy33:13 Ka ga Josefe, a re: “A lefatshe la gagwe le segofadiwe ke Jehofa, ka dilo tse di tlhokegang tsa legodimo, ka monyo, le ka boteng jo bo namaletseng kwa tlase," 
Deuteronomy33:14 le ka dilo tse di tlhokegang tsa loungo lwa letsatsi, ka dilo tse di tlhokegang tse di golang le dikgwedi," 
Deuteronomy33:15 le ka dilo tse di tlhophegileng tsa dithaba tsa bogologolo jo bo feteletseng, ka dilo tse di tlhokegang tsa makhubu a a sa yeng kae." 
Deuteronomy33:16 Le ka dilo tse di tlhokegang tsa lefatshe le botlalo jwa lone, le bopelo e monate jwa gagwe yo o ne a agile mo setlhareng, a tshegofatso e tle mo tlhogong ya ga Josefe, le mo phogong ya gagwe yo o ne a lomologanye le bomorwa rraagwe." 
Deuteronomy33:17 Leitibolo la kgomo ya pholo ya gagwe, borena ke jwa gagwe; dinaka tsa gagwe ke dinaka tsa nare; o tlaa fegolela ka tsone ditšhaba tsotlhe fela, e bong dikhutlo tsa lefatshe, bone ke ba makgolo a makgolo, a ba ga Eferaime, le makgolo a makgolo a ba ga Manase.”" 
Deuteronomy33:18 Ka ga Sebulone, a re: “Itumele wena Sebulone, iumele mo go bololeng ga gago; le wena Isakare mo megopeng ya gago." 
Deuteronomy33:19 Ba tlaa biletsa ditšhaba kwa thabeng; ba tlaa isa ditlhabelo tsa tshiamo gone; gonne ba tlaa anya letlotlo la mawatle, le mahumo a a fitlhegileng a mošawa.”" 
Deuteronomy33:20 Ka ga Gate, a re: “A go segofale yo o atlhamolosang Gate; o agile jaaka tau e namagadi, o gagola letsogo, ee, le yona phogo." 
Deuteronomy33:21 Kabelo ya ntlha a e ikgethela, gonne go ne go beilwe kabelo ya motlhoma molao gone; mme a tla le ditlhogo tsa batho a diratsa tshiamiso ya ga Jehofa, le dikatlholo tsa gagwe le Iseraele.”" 
Deuteronomy33:22 Ka ga Dane, a re: “Dane ke ngwana wa tau, yo o tlolang a tswa kwa Bašane.”" 
Deuteronomy33:23 Ka ga Nafetali, a re: “Wena Nafetali, yo o kgotsheng letlhogonolo, le yo o tletseng tshegofatso ya ga Jehofa, o rue ntlha ya bophirimatsatsi le borwa.”" 
Deuteronomy33:24 Ka ga Ašere, a re: “A Ašere a segofale ka bana, a lebosegele bomorwa rraagwe, a ine lonao lwa gagwe mo lookwaneng." 
Deuteronomy33:25 Ditlhako tsa gago di tlaa nna tshipi le kgotlho; mme fela jaaka malatsi a gago a ntse, thata ya gago e tlaa nna fela jalo." 
Deuteronomy33:26 Ješurune! ga go ope yo o tshwanang le Modimo o o palamelang magodimo go go thusa, le ka tlotlomalo ya one mo loaping." 
Deuteronomy33:27 Modimo wa bosakhutleng ke boago jwa gago mme ka fa tlase ga mabogo a a sa yeng kae, o ne wa leleka, wa kgarametsa mmaba, fa pele ga gago, a ba a re: Senya." 
Deuteronomy33:28 Iseraele o agile mo polokegong, motswedi wa ga Jakobe o osi mo lefatsheng la mabele le bojalwa jwa mofine; ee, magodimo a gagwe a wa monyo." 
Deuteronomy33:29 A bo o le sego wena Iseraele! E mang yo o tshwanang nao, e le tšhaba e e bolokwang ke Jehofa, thebe ya thuso ya gago, yo o bileng a le tšhaka ya borena jwa gago! Baba ba gago ba tlaa go ineela; mme o tlaa gata mafelo a a tlotlometseng a bone.”" 
Deuteronomy34:1 Moše a tswa mo dipaleng tsa Moabe, a tlhatloga thaba ya Nebo, mme Moše a ya tlhoreng ya Pisega, o o lebaganyeng le Jeriko. Jehofa a mmontsha lefatshe lotlhe la Gileate, go ya kwa Dane;" 
Deuteronomy34:2 le la Nafetali lotlhe, le lefatshe la Eferaime le Manase, le lefatshe lotlhe la Juta, go ya kwa lewatleng le le kwa bophirimatsatsi;" 
Deuteronomy34:3 le ntlheng ya Borwa, le Lobala lwa molapo wa Jeriko, motse wa makolane, go ya kwa Soare." 
Deuteronomy34:4 Jehofa a mo raya, a re: “Lefatshe le ke lone le ke ikanetseng Aberahame, le Isake le Jakobe, ka re: ‘Ke tlaa le naya losika lwa gago’; ke le go bontshitse ka matlho a gago, mme ga o ketla o kgabaganyetsa gone.”" 
Deuteronomy34:5 Jalo Moše motlhanka wa Jehofa a swela gone mo lefatsheng la Moabe, ka fa lefokong la ga Jehofa." 
Deuteronomy34:6 A fitlhwa mo mogogorong mo lefatsheng la Moabe bolebagana le Bethepeore; mme ga go ope yo o itseng ka ga phupu ya gagwe, le gompieno." 
Deuteronomy34:7 Moše o rile a swa a bo a le dinyaga di le 120; leitlho la gagwe le ne le se lotobo, le thata ya gagwe ya tlholego e sa ngotlega." 
Deuteronomy34:8 Bana ba Iseraele ba lelela Moše mo dipaleng tsa Moabe ka malatsi a le 30; jalo malatsi a selelo sa go hutsafalela Moše a fela. 
Deuteronomy34:9 Jošua morwa Nune a bo a tletse mowa wa botlhale; gonne Moše a mmeile diatla; mme bana ba Iseraele ba mo reetsa, ba dira jaaka Jehofa a laotse Moše." 
Deuteronomy34:10 E sa le jalo, ga go ise go bo go tsoge moperofeti mo Iseraele yo o tshwanang le Moše, yo Jehofa o ne a mo itse go lebanywe difatlhogo." 
Deuteronomy34:11 Mo ditshupong tsotlhe le dikgakgamatso tse Jehofa o ne a mo roma gore a di dire mo lefatsheng la Egepeto, mo go Faro, le mo batlhankeng botlhe ba gagwe, le mo lefatsheng lotlhe la gagwe," 
Deuteronomy34:12 le mo letsogong lotlhe la nonofo, le mo poifisong e kgolo yotlhe, dilo tse Moše a di dira mo ponong ya Baiseraele botlhe fela." 
Joshua1:1 Jaana ga dirala e rile morago ga loso lwa ga Moše motlhanka wa ga Jehofa, Jehofa a bua le Jošua morwa Nune, modiredi wa ga Moše, a re:" 
Joshua1:2 “Moše motlhanka wa me o sule; jaana nanoga o kgabaganye Joretane ono, wena le tšhaba e yotlhe, lo ye kwa lefatsheng le ke le ba nayang, e bong bana ba Iseraele." 
Joshua1:3 Gongwe le gongwe fa pato ya lonao lwa lona e tlaa go gatang, ke go lo neile jaaka ke buile le Moše." 
Joshua1:4 Go simologa kwa nageng, le Lebanone yo, go ya fela kwa nokeng e kgolo, noka ya Euferatese, lefatshe lotlhe la Bahite go ya kwa lewatleng le legolo ntlheng ya bophirimatsatsi, e tlaa nna molelwane wa lona." 
Joshua1:5 Ga go ketla go nna motho ope yo o tlaa nonofang go ema fa pele ga gago malatsi otlhe a botshelo jwa gago; jaaka ke ne ka nna le Moše, ke tlaa nna nao jalo; ga nke ke go latlha le fa e le go go tlogela." 
Joshua1:6 Nna thata le pelokgale, gonne ke wena yo o tlaa nayang setšhaba se lefatshe le ke neng ka ikanela go le naya borraabo." 
Joshua1:7 Fela o nne thata le pelokgale, go tlhokomela go dira ka fa molaong otlhe, o Moše motlhanka wa me o o go laoletseng; o se ka wa o fapoga wa ya ka fa ntlheng ya le legolo kgotsa go la molema, gore o tle o bone go segofala sentle kwa le kwa o yang teng." 
Joshua1:8 Lokwalo lo lwa molao, lo se tloge mo molomong wa gago, o akanye mo go lone motshegare le bosigo, gore o tlhokomele go dira ka fa go tsotlhe tse di kwadilweng mo go lone, gonne tsela ya gago e tlaa nna le letlhogonolo jalo, mme o tlaa bona go segofala sentle." 
Joshua1:9 A ga ke a go laola? Nna thata le pelogale; o se boifisiwe, le gone o se ka wa raraana, gonne Jehofa Modimo wa gago o na nao kwa le kwa o yang gone.”" 
Joshua1:10 Foo Jošua a laola bagolo ba batho, a re:" 
Joshua1:11 “Ralalang bothibelelo, lo laole batho, lo re: ‘Lo ipaakanyetseng mefago; gonne e tlaa re malaatsi e le mararo a ise a fete lo tlaa bo lo kgabaganya Joretane ono, lo ya go tsena lo rua lefatshe le Jehofa Modimo wa lona o le lo nayang go le rua.’ ”" 
Joshua1:12 Jošua a bua le Barubene, le Bagate, le ba ntlhanngwe ya lotso lwa ga Manase, a re:" 
Joshua1:13 “Gakologelwang lefoko le Moše motlhanka wa ga Jehofa o le lo laoletseng, a re: ‘Jehofa Modimo wa lona o lo naya boikhutso, o tlaa lo naya lefatshe le.’" 
Joshua1:14 Basadi ba lona, le banyana ba lona, a ba nne le dikgomo tsa lona, mo lefatsheng le Moše o le lo neileng moseja ono ga Joretane; mme lona lo kgabaganye fa pele ga bana ba rraeno lo tlhometse, e bong banna botlhe ba ba diganka ba ba pelokgale, mme lo ba thuse;" 
Joshua1:15 go tsamaya Jehofa a naya bana ba rraeno boikhutso, jaaka a neile lona, le bone ba rua lefatshe le Jehofa Modimo wa lona o le ba nayang; foo lo tlaa boela lefatsheng la thuo ya lona, lo le rua, e bong Moše motlhanka wa ga Jehofa o le lo neileng moseja ono ga Joretane ntlheng ya botlhabatsatsi.”" 
Joshua1:16 Ba fetola Jošua, ba re: “Tsotlhe tse o di re laoletseng re tlaa di dira, le kwa le kwa o re romang teng re tlaa ya." 
Joshua1:17 Jaaka re reeditse Moše mo dilong tsotlhe, le wena re tlaa go reetsa jalo: ra re: A Jehofa Modimo wa gago o nne nao, jaaka o ne a nna le Moše!" 
Joshua1:18 Le fa e le mang yo o tlaa tsuololelang taolo ya gago, a gana go reetsa mafoko a gago mo go tsotlhe tse o di mo laolelang, o tlaa bolawa; fela, o nne thata le pelokgale.”" 
Joshua2:1 Jošua morwa Nune a ntsha batho ba le babedi mo Shitime ka bosaitsiweng, e le ditlhola, a re: “Yang go tlhola lefatshe, le Jeriko.” Ba ya; ba fitlha kwa ntlong ya seaka sengwe go twe Rahabe, ba lala gone." 
Joshua2:2 Ga bolelelwa kgosi ya Jeriko, ga twe: “Bona, sigo jono go tsile banna ba bana ba Iseraele, ba tla go kheleisa lefatshe.”" 
Joshua2:3 Kgosi ya Jeriko ya roma kwa go Rahabe ya re: “Ntsha banna ba ba tsileng kwa go wena, ba ba tsenyeng mo ntlong ya gago; gonne ba tsile go kheleisa lefatshe lotlhe.”" 
Joshua2:4 Mme mosadi a tsaya banna ba babedi a ba fitlha; a re: “Ee, banna bao ba ne ba tlile mo go nna, mme ga ke a ka ka itse kwa ba tswang teng." 
Joshua2:5 Ga dirala ya re e ka ne e le ka lobaka lwa fa go tswalwa kgoro, go le lefifi, banna bao ba tswela kwa ntle; mme kwa banna ba ba ileng gone ga ke itse; ba konateleleng ka bonako; gonne lo tlaa ba tshwara.”" 
Joshua2:6 Mme mosadi a bo a ba isitse kwa godimo ga ntlo, mme a ba fitlha ka lotlhaka lwa leloba, lo o ne a lo adile ka thulaganyo mo godimo ga ntlo." 
Joshua2:7 Banna bale, ba ba konatelela ka tsela ya matsibogo a Joretane; e rile ba ba ba konatelelang ba sena go tswela kwa ntle, ba tswala kgoro." 
Joshua2:8 E rile ba ise ba robale, mosadi a tlhatlogela kwa go bone mo godimo ga ntlo;" 
Joshua2:9 a raya banna, a re: “Ke a itse fa Jehofa a lo neile lefatshe, le go re theregiso ya lona e re wetse rotlhe, le go re banni botlhe ba lefatshe ba tlhapasela fa pele ga lona." 
Joshua2:10 Gonne re utlwile ka fa Jehofa o kgadisitseng metsi a Lewatle le Lehibidu fa pele ga lona ka gone, jale ka lo tswa kwa Egepeto, le se lo se diretseng dikgosi tse pedi tsa Baamore, tse di ne di le kwa moseja wa Joretane, e bong Sihone le Oge, ba lo ba senyeditseng ruri." 
Joshua2:11 E rile fela re utlwa, dipelo tsa rona tsa nyerega, ga se ka ga sala go le mowa ope mo mothong ope ka ntlha ya lona; gonne Jehofa Modimo wa lona ke ene Modimo kwa legodimong kwa godimo le mo lefatsheng fa tlase." 
Joshua2:12 Ke gone jaana, a ko lo inkanele ka Jehofa go re, ka ke lo diretse ka pelonomi, le lona lo tlaa direla ba ntlo ya ga rre ka pelonomi, le go re lo tlaa nnaya sesupo sa mmaanete," 
Joshua2:13 le go re lo tlaa tshedisa rre, le mme, le bana ba ga rre, ba basimane le ba basetsana, le dilo tsotlhe tse ba nang natso, lo ba lo golola matshelo a rona mo losong.”" 
Joshua2:14 Banna bao ba mo raya ba re: “Botshelo jwa rona bo tlaa emela jwa lona, ke go re, fa lo sa kakanye tiro e ya rona; go tlaa dirala go re, mogang Jehofa o re nayang lefatshe le, re tlaa go direla ka pelonomi le boammaaruri.”" 
Joshua2:15 Foo a ba tshetlolosa ka mogala ka fa fensetereng; gonne ntlo ya gagwe e ne e eme mo godimo ga lorako lwa motse, mme a bo a agile mo godimo ga lorako." 
Joshua2:16 A ba raya a re: “Yang kwa thabeng, bakonatedi ba ka tla ba lo wela; lo iphitlhe gone ka malatsi a le mararo, go tsamaya bakonatedi ba bowa, morago ga moo lo ka tsamaya.”" 
Joshua2:17 Banna ba mo raya ba re: “Re rata ra nna re se na molato ka ga ikano e ya gago, e o e re ikanitsitseng." 
Joshua2:18 Bona, e tlaa re mogang re tlang mo lefatsheng le, mogala o, wa tlhale e e bohibidu jo bo letlholo, o o gokele mo fensetereng e o re tshetlolositseng ka yone; mme borraago le mmaago, le bana ba ga rraago, le ba ntlo ya ga rraago botlhe, o ba phuthele kwano go wena mo ntlong." 
Joshua2:19 Go tlaa dirala go re, le fa e le mang yo o tlaa tswang ka kgoro ya ntlo a ya mo mmileng, madi a gagwe a tlaa nna mo tlhogong ya gagwe, mme rona re tlaa bo re se na molato. Mme le fa e le mang yo o tlaa bong a na nao mo ntlong, madi a gagwe a tlaa nna mo tlhogong ya rona, fa seatla sengwe se ka bewa mo go ene." 
Joshua2:20 Fa o kakanya tiro e ya rona, foo re tlaa bo re se na molato ka ga ikano ya gago e o e re ikanisitseng.”" 
Joshua2:21 Mosadi a re: “A go nne ka fa mafokong a lona.” A ba naya tsela, ba tsamaya; mme mogala wa bohibidu jo bo letlhololo a o gokela mo fensetereng." 
Joshua2:22 Ba ya ba fitlha mo thabeng, ba tlhola teng malatsi a le mararo, ga tsamaya bakonatedi ba boa; bakonatedi ba batla mo tseleng yotlhe, mme ba se ka ba ba bona." 
Joshua2:23 Foo banna ba babedi ba bowa, ba fologa mo thabeng, ba kgabaganya, ba ya ba fitlha kwa go Jošua morwa Nune, ba mmolelela gotlhe mo go ba diraletseng." 
Joshua2:24 Ba raya Jošua, ba re: “Ruri Jehofa o re tsentse lefatshe lotlhe mo diatleng; gape banni botlhe ba lefatshe ba tlhapasela fela fa pele ga rona.”" 
Joshua3:1 Ya re ka moso Jošua a phakela, a huduga mo Shitime, a tla fa Joretane, ene le bana botlhe ba Iseraele; ba lala gone ba ise ba kgabaganye." 
Joshua3:2 Ga dirala ya re morago ga malatsi a le mararo, bagolo ba ralala bothibelelo;" 
Joshua3:3 ba laola batho, ba re: “Mogang lo bonang letlole la kgolagano ya ga Jehofa Modimo wa lona, le baperesiti Balefi ba le rwele, foo lo tlogeng mo felong ga lona lo le sale morago." 
Joshua3:4 Mme le fa go ntse jalo a go nne sebaka fa gare ga lona le lone, e ka ne e le kilometara e le nngwe fela ka selekanyo; lo se ka lwa le atamela, gore lo itse tsela e lo e tsayang; gonne ga lo ise lo ko lo fete ka tsela e gope.”" 
Joshua3:5 Jošua a raya batho, a re: “Iitshepiseng; gonne Jehofa o tlaa tsoga a dira dikgakgamatso mo go lona ka moso.”" 
Joshua3:6 Jošua a bua le baperesiti a re: “Tsholetsang letlole la kgolagano, lo kgabaganye fa pele ga batho.” Mme ba tsholetsa letlole la kgolagano, ba tsamaya fa pele ga batho." 
Joshua3:7 Jehofa a raya Jošua, a re: “Gompieno ke tlaa simolola go go godisa mo ponong ya Baiseraele botlhe, gore ba tle ba itse fa ke na nao, fela jaaka ke ne ke na le Moše." 
Joshua3:8 O laole baperesiti ba ba rwalang letlole la kgolagano, o re: ‘E re lo fitlha fa masegong a metsi a Joretane, lo eme fela mo Joretane.’ ”" 
Joshua3:9 Jošua a raya bana ba Iseraele, a re: “Tlang kwano lo utlwe mafoko a ga Jehofa Modimo wa lona.”" 
Joshua3:10 Jošua a re: “Lo tlaa itse ka se, fa Modimo o o tshedileng o le mo go lona, le go re ga a ketla a tlhaela go leleka fa pele ga lona Bakanana, le Bahite, le Bahife, le Baperise, le Bagiregaše le Baamore le Bajebuse." 
Joshua3:11 Bonang, letlole la kgolagano ya Morena wa lefatshe lotlhe le lo etelela pele le ya mo Joretane." 
Joshua3:12 Ke gone jaana, tsayang banna ba le some le metso mebedi mo ditsong tsa Iseraele, monna mongwe wa lotso longwe le longwe." 
Joshua3:13 Go tlaa re dinao tsa baperesiti ba ba rweleng letlole la ga Jehofa, Morena wa lefatshe lotlhe, di ema mo metsing a Joretane, metsi a Joretane a tlaa kgaolwa, e bong metsi a a tswang kwa godimo; a tlaa ema a le mokoa mongwe fela.”" 
Joshua3:14 Ga dirala, ya re batho ba tloga mo megopeng ya bone, ba ya go kgabaganya Joretane, baperesiti ba ba rweleng letlole la kgolagano ba bo ba le fa pele ga batho;" 
Joshua3:15 erile ba ba rweleng letlole ba fitlha mo Joretane, dinao tsa baperesiti ba ba rweleng letlole di inwa fa masegong a metsi (gonne Joretane o tle o penologele dimota tsotlhe tsa one ka lobaka lotlhe lwa thobo)," 
Joshua3:16 metsi a a tswang kwa godimo a fitlha a ema, a gogomoga a nna mokoa o le mongwe fela, wa ya go fitlha kwa kgakala, kwa Atame, motse o o bapileng le Sarethane; mme a a elelang ntlheng ya lewatle la Areba, e bong Lewatle la Letswai, a kgaogela ruri; batho ba kgabaganya ba lebaganye le Jeriko fela." 
Joshua3:17 Baperesiti ba ba rweleng letlole la kgolagano ya ga Jehofa ba ema ba tsepame fa fatshe go omeletse, fa gare ga Joretane, mme Baiseraele botlhe ba kgabaganya mo lefatsheng le le omeletseng, ga tsamaya morafe otlhe wa kgabaganya Joretane." 
Joshua4:1 Ga dirala ya re morafe otlhe o sena go kgabaganyetsa Joretane ruri, Jehofa a bua le Jošua, a re:" 
Joshua4:2 “Lo itseele banna ba le 12 mo bathong, monna a le mongwe fela wa lotso longwe le longwe." 
Joshua4:3 Lo ba laole, lo re: ‘Tsayang fano mo gare ga Joretane, fa dinao tsa baperesiti di ne di tsepame gone, maje a le 12, lo tshele nao, lo ye go a baya kwa marobalong, kwa lo tlaa lalang gone gompieno.’ ”" 
Joshua4:4 Foo Jošua a bitsa banna ba ba 12, ba o ne a ba baakantse ba bana ba Iseraele, monna a le mongwe fela wa lotso longwe le longwe." 
Joshua4:5 Jošua a ba raya a re: “Fetang lo tsamaye fa pele ga letlole la ga Jehofa Modimo wa lona, lo ye kwa bogareng jwa Joretane, mme monna mongwe le mongwe wa lona a tseye lentswe ka legetla, ka fa palong ya ditso tsa bana ba Iseraele:" 
Joshua4:6 Gore selo se e nne sesupo mo go lona, sa go re e tle e re fa bana ba lona ba botsa mo lobakeng lo lo tlang, ba re: ‘Lo kayang ka maje a?’" 
Joshua4:7 Foo lo tlaa ba raya lo re: ‘Ke ka gonne metsi a Joretane a ne a kgaolwa fa pele ga letlole la kgolagano ya ga Jehofa; e rile re kgabaganya Joretane metsi a Joretane a kgaolwa; mme maje a, a tlaa nna segopodiso mo baneng ba Iseraele ka bosakhutleng.’ ”" 
Joshua4:8 Bana ba Iseraele ba dira jalo jaaka Jošua a laotse, ba tsaya maje a le 12 mo gare ga Joretane, jaaka Jehofa a buile le Jošua, ka fa palong ya ditso tsa bana ba Iseraele; mme ba ya nao kwa ba yang go lala teng, ba a baya teng." 
Joshua4:9 Jošua a tlhoma maje a le 12 mo gare ga Joretane, fa dinao tsa baperesiti ba ba rweleng letlole la kgolagano di ne di eme gone. A teng le gompieno." 
Joshua4:10 Ka gonne baperesiti ba ba rweleng letlole ba ne ba ema mo gare ga Joretane, ga tsamaya tsotlhe tsa wediwa tse Jehofa o di laoletseng Jošua, gore a di bue le batho ka fa go tsotlhe tse Moše o di laoletseng Jošua; batho ba itlhaganela, ba kgabaganya." 
Joshua4:11 Ga dirala ya re batho botlhe ba sena go tshelela ruri, letlole la ga Jehofa la tshela, le baperesiti, mo ponong ya batho." 
Joshua4:12 Bana ba ga Rubene, le bana ba ga Gate, le bontlhanngwe jwa lotso lwa ga Manase, ba tshela ba tlhometse fa pele ga bana ba Iseraele, jaaka Moše a buile nabo." 
Joshua4:13 Ga kgabaganya e ka ne e le batho ba le 40 000, ba kgabaganya ba tlhometse ba iketleeleditse ntwa, ba tshela fa pele ga Jehofa, ba ya tlhabanong, mo dipaleng tsa Jeriko." 
Joshua4:14 Jehofa a godisa Jošua ka tsatsi leo mo ponong ya Baiseraele botlhe, mme ba mmoifa, jaaka ba ne ba boifa Moše, ka malatsi otlhe a botshelo jwa gagwe." 
Joshua4:15 Jehofa a bua le Jošua, a re:" 
Joshua4:16 “Laola baperesiti ba ba rweleng letlole la tshupo, gore ba tlhatloge mo Joretane.”" 
Joshua4:17 Foo Jošua a laola baperesiti, a re: “Tlhatlogang mo Joretane.”" 
Joshua4:18 Ga dirala ya re baperesiti ba ba rweleng letlole la kgolagano ya ga Jehofa ba sena go tlhatloga mo gare ga Joretane, dipato tsa dinao tsa baperesiti di sena go nanogela mo lefatsheng le le omeletseng, metsi a Joretane a boela kwa bonnong jwa one, a penologela dimota tsotlhe tsa one, jaaka gale." 
Joshua4:19 Batho ba tlhatloga mo Joretane ka letsatsi la lesome la kgwedi ya ntlha, ba thibelela mo Gilegale, go pota Jeriko ka fa botlhabatsatsi." 
Joshua4:20 Maje ao a a some le metso mebedi, a ba a ntshitseng mo Joretane, Jošua a a tlhoma mo Gilegale." 
Joshua4:21 A bua le bana ba Iseraele, a re: “E tlaa re fa bana ba lona ba botsa borraabo mo lobakeng lo lo tlang, ba re: ‘Maje ao a kayang?’" 
Joshua4:22 Foo lo tlaa itsise bana ba lona, lo re: ‘Iseraele o ne a kgabaganya Joretane ono, ba gata lefatshe le le omeletseng.’" 
Joshua4:23 Gonne Jehofa Modimo wa lona o ne a kgadisa metsi a Joretane fa pele ga lona, ga tsamaya lwa tshela, jaaka Jehofa Modimo o kile a direla Lewatle le Lehibidu, le o ne a le kgadisa fa pele ga rona, ga tsamaya ra tshela," 
Joshua4:24 gore ditšhaba tsotlhe tsa lefatshe di itse letsogo la ga Jehofa fa le nonofile; le gore ba boife Jehofa Modimo wa lona ka bosakhutleng.” 
Joshua5:1 Ga dirala e rile dikgosi tsotlhe tsa Baamore tse di ne di le mosejeng ga Joretane ntlheng ya bophirimatsatsi, le dikgosi tsotlhe tsa Bakanana tse di ne di le fa lewatleng, di utlwa fa Jehofa a kgadisitse metsi a Joretane fa pele ga bana ba Iseraele, go tsamaya ba tshela, pelo tsa tsone tsa nyerega, mme ga bo go sa tlhole go le mowa mo go bone, ka ntlha ya bana ba Iseraele." 
Joshua5:2 Ya re ka lobaka loo Jehofa a raya Jošua a re: “Itirele dithipa tsa makgethu, o rupise bana ba Iseraele lwa bobedi.”" 
Joshua5:3 Jošua a itirela dithipa tsa makgethu, a rupisa bana ba Iseraele kwa Gibea-haralothe." 
Joshua5:4 Se ke sone se Jošua o ne a rupisa ka ntlha ya sone: batho botlhe ba ba ne ba tswa Egepeto, ba e leng banna, e bong batlhabani botlhe ba ntwa, ba ne ba swetse mo nageng mo tseleng, ba sena go tswa mo Egepeto." 
Joshua5:5 Gonne batho botlhe ba ba duleng ba ne ba rupisitswe; mme batho botlhe ba ba tsaletsweng mo nageng, mo tseleng ba tswa Egepeto bone, ba ne ba sa rupisiwa." 
Joshua5:6 Gonne bana ba Iseraele ba ne ba sepela mo nageng ka dinyaga di le 40 ga tsamaya morafe otlhe, e bong batlhabani ba ntwa botlhe, ba ba duleng mo Egepeto, ba nyelediwa, ka ba se ka ba reetsa lentswe la ga Jehofa; ba Jehofa o ne a ba ikanela, a re: Ga a ketla a ba leseletsa ba bona lefatshe le Jehofa o ne a le ikanetse borraabo, a re o tlaa le ba naya, lefatshe le le elang Maši le dinotshe." 
Joshua5:7 Bana ba bone ba o ba tsositseng mo boemong jwa bone, Jošua a rupisa bone, gonne ba ne ba sa rupisiwa, ka ba se ka ba ba rupisa mo tseleng." 
Joshua5:8 Ga dirala ya re ba sena go wetsa go rupisa morafe otlhe, ba nna fela mo mannong a bone mo botlhaolelong, ba tsamaya ba fola." 
Joshua5:9 Jehofa a raya Jošua a re: “Gompieno ke lo tloseditse kgobo ya Egepeto.” Ke gone ka moo leina la felo foo la bidiwa ga twe, Gilegale, le gompieno." 
Joshua5:10 Bana ba Iseraele ba thibelela mo Gilegale; ba ja tlolaganyo ka letsatsi la 14 la kgwedi go le maitseboa, mo dipaleng tsa Jeriko." 
Joshua5:11 E rile ka moso jaaka ba letse ba jele tlolaganyo, ba ja mabele a magologolo a lefatshe, dipapetlana tsa senkgwe se se sa bedisiwang, le mabele a a gadikilweng, ka tsatsi leo fela." 
Joshua5:12 E rile ka moso, ba letse ba jele mabele a magologolo a lefatshe, mana a khutla; mme bana ba Iseraele ba se ka ba tlhola ba bona mana; mme ba ja loungo lwa lefatshe la Kanana ka ngwaga oo." 
Joshua5:13 Ga dirala ya re Jošua a le fa Jeriko, a tsholetsa matlho a gagwe a leba, mme a fitlhela go eme monna mongwe a lebaganye nae, a tshotse tšhaka ya gagwe e ekilwe ka seatla; mme Jošua a ya kwa go ene, a mo raya, a re: “A o ntlheng ya rona, kgotsa a ntlheng ya baba ba rona?”" 
Joshua5:14 A re: “Nnyaa; mme ke tsile ke le kgosana ya ntwa ya ga Jehofa.” Jošua a wela ka sefatlhogo fa fatshe, a mo obamela, a mo raya, a re: “Morena wa me o raya motlhanka wa gagwe a reng?”" 
Joshua5:15 Kgosana ya ntwwa ya ga Jehofa ya raya Jošua, ya re: “Rola setlhako sa gago; gonne felo fa o emeng gone go boitshepo.” Jošua a dira jalo." 
Joshua6:1 Jaana Jeriko o ne o tswaletswe ruri thata ka ntlha ya bana ba Iseraele, go ne go sa tswe ope, go sa tsene ope." 
Joshua6:2 Jehofa a raya Jošua, a re: “Bona, ke tsentse Jeriko mo seatleng sa gago, le kgosi ya gone, le banna ba diganka ba ba nonofileng." 
Joshua6:3 Lo dikologe motse, batlhabani botlhe ba ntwa ba potonoge motse gangwe fela. O dire jalo ka malatsi a le marataro." 
Joshua6:4 Baperesiti ba supa ba tsamaye fa pele ga letlole ba tshotse diphala di supa tsa dinaka tsa diphelefu; e tlaa re ka tsatsi la bosupa lo potonoge motse gasupa, mme baperesiti ba letse dinaka." 
Joshua6:5 Go tlaa dirala, go re fa ba gelebetla ka boleele ka dinaka tsa diphelefu, mme fa lo utlwa modumo wa dinaka, a batho botlhe, ba thele lošalaba lo logolo; mme lorako lwa motse lo tlaa salalagana fela, batho ba tlaa palama, mongwe le mongwe fa go lebaganyeng nae.”" 
Joshua6:6 Jošua morwa Nune a bitsa baperesiti, a ba raya a re: “Tsholetsang letlole la kgolagano, baperesiti ba supa ba tsamaye fa pele ga letlole la ga Jehofa ba tshotse diphala di supa tsa dinaka tsa diphelefu.”" 
Joshua6:7 A raya batho a re: “Fetang lo dikologe motse, batho ba ba tlhometseng ba fetele fa pele ga letlole la ga Jehofa.”" 
Joshua6:8 Ga nna jalo, go re, e rile Jošua a sena go bua le batho, baperesiti ba supa ba ba tsotseng diphala di supa tsa naka tsa diphelefu fa pele ga Jehofa, ba feta ba letsa dinaka; mme letlole la kgolagano ya ga Jehofa la ba sala morago." 
Joshua6:9 Banna ba ba tlhometseng ba ya fa pele ga baperesiti ba ba letsang diphala, tshimega ya sala letlole morago, baperesiti ba re ba tsamaya ba bo ba ntse ba letsa diphala." 
Joshua6:10 Mme Jošua a laola batho, a re: “Lo se ka lwa thela lošalaba, le fa e le go ntsha lentswe, le fa e le lefoko lepe le se ka la tswa mo molomong wa lona, go tsamaya letsatsi le tla, le ke tlaa lo rayang ka lone, ke re: ‘Thelang lošalaba;’ foo lo tlaa thela lošalaba.”" 
Joshua6:11 Jalo letlole la ga Jehofa a le potonosa motse gangwe fela; mme ba tla mo bothibelelong, ba lala mo bothibelelong." 
Joshua6:12 Jošua a phakela le baperesiti, ba tsaya letlole la ga Jehofa." 
Joshua6:13 Baperesiti ba supa ba ba tshotseng diphala di supa tsa dinaka tsa diphelefu fa pele ga letlole la ga Jehofa, ba tswelela fela ba ntse ba letsa diphala, banna ba ba tlhometseng ba ba etelela pele; tshimega ya sala letlole la ga Jehofa morago, baperesiti ba feta ba letsa diphala." 
Joshua6:14 Ba potonoga motse gangwe fela ka tsatsi la bobedi, ba boela mo bothibelelong; ba dira jalo ka malatsi a le marataro." 
Joshua6:15 Ga dirala ya re ka letsatsi la bosupa ba phakela thata ka makuku, ba potonoga motse gasupa ka mokgwa oo fela; fa e se go re ka tsatsi leo ba potonoga motse gasupa." 
Joshua6:16 Ga dirala ya re ka lwa bosupa ka baperesiti ba letsa dinaka, Jošua a raya batho, a re: “Thelang lošalaba; gonne Jehofa o lo neile motse." 
Joshua6:17 Motse a o neelelwe, e bong one le tsotlhe tse di mo go one, a o neelelwe Jehofa; Rahabe seaka ke ene esi yo o tlaa tshelang, ene le botlhe ba o nang nabo mo ntlong, ka a fitlhile barongwa ba re ne re ba romile." 
Joshua6:18 Lona, le gale lo ikefe mo go se se neeletsweng, e se ka ya re lo sena go se neelela, lwa tsaya ga se se neeletsweng; jalo lwa dira bothibelelo jwa Iseraele go hutsega, mme lwa bo kgobera." 
Joshua6:19 Mme selefera sotlhe le gouta, le dilwana tsa kgotlho le tsa tshipi, di boitshepelo Jehofa, di tlaa tla mo polokelong ya ga Jehofa.”" 
Joshua6:20 Jalo batho ba thela lošalaba, le baperesiti ba letsa dinaka: ga dirala, ya re batho ba utlwa modumo wa phala, batho ba thela lošalaba lo logolo, lorako lwa salalagana, mme batho ba palamela mo motseng, mongwe le mongwe fa go lebaganyeng nae, ba thopa motse." 
Joshua6:21 Ba senyetsa ruri dilo tsotlhe tse di mo motseng, monna le mosadi, lekau le motsofe, kgomo le sehutshane le esela, ba di senya ka bojetla jwa tšhaka." 
Joshua6:22 Jošua a raya banna ba babedi ba ba neng ba tlhola lefatshe, a re: “Tsenang mo ntlong ya seaka lo ntshe mosadi teng, le tsotlhe tse o nang natso, jaaka lo mo ikanetse.”" 
Joshua6:23 Makau, e bong ditlhola, a tsena, a ntsha Rahabe, le rraagwe, le mmaagwe, le bana ba ga rraagwe, le tsotlhe tse o ne a na natso, le botlhe ba losika lwa gagwe, ba ba ntshetsa kwa ntle, ba ba baya kwa ntle ga bothibelelo jwa Iseraele." 
Joshua6:24 Ba fisa motse ka molelo, le tsotlhe tse di mo go one; fa e se selefera le gouta, le dilwana tsa kgotlho, le tsa tshipi, tsone ba di tsenya mo polokelong ya ntlo ya ga Jehofa." 
Joshua6:25 Mme Rahabe seaka, le ba ntlo ya ga rraagwe, le tsotlhe tse o ne a na natso, Jošua a di tshedisa; mme mosadi o sa le a aga mo gare ga Iseraele, nako ke eno, ka a ne a fitlha barongwa ba Jošua o kileng a ba roma ba ya go tlhola Jeriko." 
Joshua6:26 Jošua a ba laya ka ikano ka baka loo, a re: “Go hutsegile motho fa pele ga Jehofa, yo o tlaa emang a aga motse wa Jeriko, o tlaa swelwa ke motsalwapele wa gagwe a thaya motheo wa one, mme o tlaa swelwa ke morwawe yo mmotlana a tlhoma ditswalo tsa one.”" 
Joshua6:27 Mme Jehofa a nna le Jošua jalo, mme tumedi ya gagwe ya nna mo lefatsheng lotlhe fela." 
Joshua7:1 Mme bana ba Iseraele ba tlola ka ga se se neeletsweng; gonne Akane morwa Karemi, morwa Sabedi, morwa Sera, wa lotso lwa Juta, a tsaya ga sone se se neeletsweng; mme bogale jwa ga Jehofa jwa tukela bana ba Iseraele." 
Joshua7:2 Jošua a ntsha banna kwa Jeriko a ba roma kwa Ai, o o fa Bethafene, go pota Bethele ka fa botlhabatsatsi, a bua nabo, a re: “Yang go tlhola lefatshe.” Banna ba, ba ya ba tlhola Ai." 
Joshua7:3 Ba boela kwa go Jošua, ba mo raya ba re: “A batho ba se ye botlhe; go ye batho e ka ne e le ba le makgolo a a masome mabedi, kgotsa a a masome mararo, ba ye go kgemetha Ai; o se ka wa lapisa batho botlhe ka go ba bololetsa gone; gonne ba bannyennyane fela.”" 
Joshua7:4 Ga ya teng e ka ne e le batho ba le makgolo a le masome mararo; mme ba tshaba fa pele ga banna ba Ai. 
Joshua7:5 Banna ba Ai ba ba bolaya e ka ne e le batho ba le masome a mararo le borataro; ba ba leleka go tswa fa pele ga kgoro, go ya fela kwa Shebarime, ba ba bolaela fa phologong; mme dipelo tsa batho tsa tlhapologa, tsa nna jaaka metsi fela." 
Joshua7:6 Jošua a ikgagola diaparo, a wela ka sefatlhogo fa fatshe fa pele ga letlole la ga Jehofa go ya maitseboeng, ene le bagolwane ba Iseraele; ba baya lorole mo ditlhogong tsa bone." 
Joshua7:7 Jošua a re: “Ijoo, Morena Modimo, ana batho o ba kgabagantsheditseng Joretane, go tla go re tsenya mo diatleng tsa Baamore, go re nyeletsa? A bo re ka bo re itumeletse fela go nna kwa moseja ga Joretane." 
Joshua7:8 Morena ke tlaa reng, ka e le fa Baiseraele ba neile baba ba bone dikotla fela!" 
Joshua7:9 Gonne Bakanana le banni botlhe ba lefatshe ba tlaa utlwa, mme ba tlaa re dika, ba tlaa kgaola leina la rona mo lefatsheng; mme leina la gago le legolo o tlaa le direla jang?”" 
Joshua7:10 Jehofa a raya Jošua, a re: “Nanoga, o wetseng jalo ka sefatlhogo fa fatshe?" 
Joshua7:11 Iseraele o leofile; ee, ba tlodile kgolagano ya me e ke e ba laoletseng; ee, ba tshotse ga se se neeletsweng; ba bile ba utswile, ba itimokantse, ba bile ba se tsentse mo thotong ya bone." 
Joshua7:12 Ke gone ka fa bana ba Iseraele ba retelelwang ke go ema fa pele ga baba ba bone ka gone, ba naya baba ba bone dikotla, gonne ba hutsegile; ga nketla ke tlhola ke nna le lona, fa lo sa senye se se neeletsweng sa tswa mo lona." 
Joshua7:13 Nanoga, o itshepise batho, o re: ‘E re ka moso lo bo lo iitshepisitse; gonne Jehofa Modimo wa Iseraele o bua jaana, a re: Go na le se se neeletsweng mo gare ga gago wena Iseraele; ga o kake wa ema fa pele ga baba ba gago, go tsamaya lo tlosa se se neeletsweng mo gare ga lona pele." 
Joshua7:14 Ke gone e tlaa re ka moso lo tlaa atamediwa ka ditso tsa lona; go tlaa dirala go re lotso lo Jehofa o tlaa lo tsayang lo tlaa atamela ka ditshika; mme losika lo Jehofa o tlaa lo tsayang lo tlaa atamela ka dikgotla; mme ba kgotla e Jehofa o tlaa e tsayang ba tla atamela monna le monna. 
Joshua7:15 Go tlaa dirala go re, yo o tlaa tsewang a na le se se neeletsweng o tlaa fisiwa ka molelo, ene le tsotlhe tse o nang natso; ka a tlodile kgolagano ya ga Jehofa, le ka gonne a dirile bosilo mo Iseraele.’ ”" 
Joshua7:16 Jalo Jošua a phakela, a atametsa Baiseraele ka ditso tsa bone; mme ga tsewa lotso lwa Juta;" 
Joshua7:17 a atametsa losika lwa ga Juta; a tsaya losika lwa Basera: a atametsa losika lwa Basera, monna le monna; ga tsewa Sabedi;" 
Joshua7:18 a atametsa ba kgotla ya gagwe monna le monna; ga tsewa Akane morwa Karemi, morwa Sabedi, morwa Sera, wa lotso lwa Juta." 
Joshua7:19 Jošua a raya Akane, a re: “Morwaaka, a ko o galaletse Jehofa Modimo wa Iseraele, o mo ipolelele; le nna o mpolelele se o se dirileng; o se ka wa ntobela.”" 
Joshua7:20 Akane a araba Jošua, a re: “Ruri ke leofetse Jehofa, Modimo wa Iseraele, ke dirile jaana le jaana:" 
Joshua7:21 Ke rile ke bona mo thopong kobo nngwe e ntle ya Sebabilone, le dikilokerame di ka nna 2,3 tsa selefera, le kgapetla ya gouta e le bokete jwa dikilokerame di ka nna 0,6, ka di eletsa, ka di tsaya; mme bona, di fitlhilwe mo mmung mo gare ga mogope wa me, le selefera fa tlase ga one.”" 
Joshua7:22 Jalo Jošua a roma batho, ba sianela kwa mogopeng; ba fitlhela go fitlhilwe mo mogopeng wa gagwe, le selefera kwa tlase." 
Joshua7:23 Ba di ntsha mo gare ga mogope, ba di isa kwa go Jošua, le kwa baneng botlhe ba Iseraele; ba di baya fa pele ga Jehofa." 
Joshua7:24 Jošua, a na le Baiseraele botlhe, ba tsaya Akane morwa Sera, le selefera, le kobo, le kgapetla ya gouta, le bomorwawe, le bomorwadie, le dikgomo tsa gagwe, le diesela tsa gagwe, le dinku tsa gagwe, le mogope wa gagwe, le tsotlhe tse o ne a na natso: ba di isa kwa molapong wa Akore." 
Joshua7:25 Jošua a re: “Ana, o ne o re huduelang? Jehofa o tlaa go hudua gompieno.” Baiseraele botlhe ba mo kgobotletsa ka maje, ba ba fisa ka molelo, ba ba kgobotletsa ka maje." 
Joshua7:26 Ba koela mo godimo ga gagwe mokoa o mogolo wa maje o o gone le gompieno; mme Jehofa a faposa phiso ya bogale jwa gagwe. Ke gone ka moo leina la felo foo le bidiwang go twe, Molapo wa ga Akore, le gompieno." 
Joshua8:1 Jehofa a raya Jošua a re: “Se boife, le gone o se ka wa tseana; tsaya batho botlhe ba ntwa, o nanoge o ye kwa Ai; bona, kgosi ya Ai ke e tsentse mo seatleng sa gago, le batho ba yone, le motse wa yone, le lefatshe la yone." 
Joshua8:2 O direle Ai le kgosi ya gone jaaka o diretse Jeriko le kgosi ya teng; fa e se thopo ya gone, le dikgomo tsa teng; tseo lo di itseele e le thopo; o tle o beele motse balaledi fa morago ga one.”" 
Joshua8:3 Jalo Jošua a nanoga, le batho botlhe ba ntwa, ba ya kwa Ai; Jošua a tlhaola batho ba le 30 000, dinatla tse di pelokgale, mme a ba bolotsa bosigo." 
Joshua8:4 Jalo a ba laola, a re: “Bonang, lo tlaa lalela motse fa morago ga motse; lo se ka lwa nna kgakala bobe le motse, lo bo lo iketleeditse lotlhe;" 
Joshua8:5 nna le batho botlhe ba ke nang nabo, re tlaa atamela kwa motseng; mme go tlaa dirala go re fa ba re thologela, jaaka ga ntlha, re tshabe fa pele ga bone." 
Joshua8:6 Ba tlaa tswa ba re latela go tsamaye re ba katose motse, gonne ba tlaa re: Ba a re tshaba jaaka ga ntlha; jalo re tlaa tshaba fa pele ga bone." 
Joshua8:7 Lo nanoge mo talelong, lo thope motse; gonne Jehofa Modimo wa lona o tlaa o tsenya mo seatleng sa lona." 
Joshua8:8 Go tlaa dirala go re, lo sena go thopa motse, lo o tshube ka molelo; lo dire ka fa lefokong la ga Jehofa; bonang, ke lo laotse.”" 
Joshua8:9 Jošua a ba bolotsa, ba ya talelong, ba nna fa gare ga Bethele le Ai, go pota Ai ntlheng ya bophirimatsatsi; mme Jošua a lala kwa bathong bosigong joo." 
Joshua8:10 Jošua a phakela ka moso, a phutha batho, a ba gopola, a tsamaya ene le bagolwane ba Iseraele, ba etelela batho pele, ba ya kwa Ai." 
Joshua8:11 Batho botlhe, e bong banna ba ntwa ba ba nang nae, ba tsamaya, ba atamela, ba fitlha fa pele ga motse, ba thibelela ba potile Ai ntlheng ya botsheka; mme ga bo go le molapo gare ga gagwe le Ai." 
Joshua8:12 A tsaya banna e ka ne e le ba le 5 000, a ba baya talelo fa gare ga Bethele le Ai, go pota motse ntlheng ya bophirimatsatsi." 
Joshua8:13 Jalo ba aba batho, e bong ntwa yotlhe e e potileng motse ntlheng ya botsheka, le balaledi ba bone ba ba potileng motse ntlheng ya bophirimatsatsi; ya re bosigo joo Jošua a ya mo gare ga molapo." 
Joshua8:14 Ga dirala e rile kgosi ya Ai e bona jalo, ba akofa ba phakela, mme batho ba motse ba thologela Iseraele go tlhabana nabo, yone le batho botlhe ba yone, ka lobaka lo lo laotsweng, fa pele ga Araba; e ne e sa itse fa go na le talelo e e ba laletseng fa morago ga motse." 
Joshua8:15 Jošua le Baiseraele botlhe ba itshema go fenngwa, ba tshaba ka tsela ya naga." 
Joshua8:16 Batho botlhe ba ba mo motseng ba bilediwa mmogo go tla ba ba konatelela; ba konatelela Jošua, ba katosiwa motse." 
Joshua8:17 Ga bo go sa sala monna ope mo Ai le fa e le mo Bethele, yo o se kang a tswa a ya go konatelela Iseraele; ba tlogela motse o atlhame fela, ba konatelela Iseraele." 
Joshua8:18 Jehofa a raya Jošua a re: “Supa Ai ka lerumo le le mo seatleng sa gago; gonne ke tlaa o tsenya mo atleng sa gago.” Jošua a supa motse ka lerumo le le mo seatleng sa gagwe. 
Joshua8:19 Balaledi ba nanoga ka bonako fa ba ne ba le gone, mme ya re a sena go otlolola letsogo ba siana, ba tsena mo motseng, ba o thopa; ba itlhaganela ba o tshuba ka molelo." 
Joshua8:20 E rile banna ba Ai ba gadima, ba leba, bonang, ba fitlhela mosi wa motse o kuelela legodimong, mme ba bo ba se na thata ya go tshabela kwa le fa e le kwa; batho ba ba tshabetseng kwa gare ga naga ba menogela mo bakonateleding." 
Joshua8:21 E rile Jošua le Baiseraele botlhe ba bona fa balaledi ba thopile motse, e bile mosi wa motse o kuelela, foo ba menoga ba bolaya banna ba Ai." 
Joshua8:22 Ba bangwe ba ba thologela ba tswa mo motseng; mme ba bo ba le fa gare ga Baiseraele, bangwe ntlha e, ba bangwe ntlheng e nngwe; ba ba kgemetha, ba se ka ba lesa ope a sala le fa e le yo o falolang." 
Joshua8:23 Mme ba tshwara kgosi ya Ai e tshedile, ba e isa kwa go Jošua." 
Joshua8:24 Ga dirala ya re Baiseraele ba sena go wetsa go bolaya banni botlhe ba Ai mo matlhagareng, le mo nageng kwa ba ba konateletseng teng, mme ba ole botlhe ka bogale jwa tšhaka, ga tsamaya ba fela, jaana Baiseraele botlhe ba boela kwa Ai, ba o kgemetha ka bogale jwa tšhaka." 
Joshua8:25 Batho botlhe ba ba oleng ka tsatsi leo, banna le basadi, e ne e 12 000, e bong batho botlhe ba Ai." 
Joshua8:26 Gonne Jošua ga a ka a gona letsogo le o ne a le otlolotse ka lerumo, ga tsamaya banni botlhe ba Ai a ba senyetsa ruri pele." 
Joshua8:27 Fa e se dikgomo le thopo ya motse oo, Baiseraele ba di itseela, ka fa lefokong la ga Jehofa le o le laoletseng Jošua." 
Joshua8:28 Jalo Jošua a fisa Ai ka molelo, a o ntsha thutubudu ka bosakhutleng, e bong tshwafalo fela, le gompieno." 
Joshua8:29 A pega kgosi ya Ai mo setlhareng, go ya maitseboeng; e rile letsatsi le ya phirimong Jošua a laola gore ba pagolole setoto sa yone mo setlhareng, ba se latlhela fa botsenong jwa kgoro ya motse, mme a koela mo godimo ga sone mokoa o mogolo wa maje, o gone le gompieno." 
Joshua8:30 Foo Jošua a agela Jehofa Modimo wa Iseraele sebeso mo thabeng ya Ebale," 
Joshua8:31 jaaka Moše motlhanka wa ga Jehofa a laoletse bana ba Iseraele, jaaka go kwadilwe mo lokwalong lwa molao wa ga Moše, e bong sebeso sa maje a a sa betlwang, a a seng a ekelwe tshipi epe ke motho ope; mo go sone ba isetsa Jehofa ditshupelo tse di fisiwang, ba tlhaba ditlhabelo tsa kagiso." 
Joshua8:32 A kwala gone mo majeng malebela a molao wa ga Moše, o o ne a o kwala me ponong ya bana ba Iseraele." 
Joshua8:33 Baiseraele botlhe, le bagolwane ba bone, le bagolo, le baatlhodi ba bone, ba ema ka fa ntlheng nngwe le ka fa ntlheng e nngwe ya letlole fa pele ga baperesiti Balefi, e le barwadi ba letlole la kgolagano ya ga Jehofa, moeng le yo o tsaletsweng mo gae, bontlhanngwe bo lebaganye le thaba ya Gerisime, bontlhanngwe bo lebaganye le thaba ya Ebale; jaaka Moše motlhanka wa ga Jehofa a ne a laotse, gore ba tle ba segofatse batho ba Iseraele pele." 
Joshua8:34 Morago ga moo a bala fafoko otlhe a molao, tshegofatso le phutso, ka fa go tsotlhe tse di kwadilweng mo lokwalong lwa molao." 
Joshua8:35 Mo mafokong otlhe a Moše o ne a a laotse, go ne go se na lefoko lepe le Jošua o se kang a le bala fa pele ga phuthego yotlhe ya Iseraele, le basadi, le banyana, le baeng ba ba tlwaelanyeng nabo." 
Joshua9:1 Ga dirala e rile dikgosi tsotlhe tse di kwa moseja ga Joretane di utlwela tirafalo e, e bong dikgosi tse di mo lefatsheng la makgabana, le tse di mo go le le kwa sekhuting, le tse di mo go le le ikamileng lewatle le legolo bolebagana le Lebanone, e bong Bahite, Baamore, Bakanana, Baperise, Bahife le Bajebuse;" 
Joshua9:2 tsa iphuthela go tla go tlhabana le Jošua le Baiseraele, tsa ya seoposengwe fela." 
Joshua9:3 E rile banni ba Gibeone ba utlwela se Jošua o ne a se diretse Jeriko le Ai," 
Joshua9:4 le bone ba dira ka boferefere, ba ya ba ipaya barongwa, ba baya dikgetse tse dikgologolo mo dieseleng tsa bone, ba tsaya makuka a a onetseng a bojalwa a a kgautlhegileng, a a tlamakeletsweng;" 
Joshua9:5 ba rwala ditlhako tse dikgologolo tse di sosobaganyeng, ba apara diaparo tse di onetseng, le senkgwe sa bone sa mofago se ne se omeletse, se bile se kubile." 
Joshua9:6 Ba ya kwa go Jošua kwa bothibelelong kwa Gilegale, ba raya ene le batho ba Iseraele, ba re: “Re tswa lefatsheng le le kgakala, mme ra re lo dire kgolagano le rona.”" 
Joshua9:7 Banna ba Iseraele ba raya Bahife ba re: “Motlhamongwe lo bo o agile mo gare ga rona fela; re ka dira kgolagano le lona jang?” 
Joshua9:8 Ba raya Jošua ba re: “Re batlhanka ba gago.” Jošua a ba raya a re: “Lo bomang? Lo tswa kae?” 
Joshua9:9 Ba mo raya ba re: “Batlhanka ba gago ba tswa lefatsheng le le kgakala thata ka ntlha ya leina la ga Jehofa Modimo wa gago; gonne re utlwile tumedi ya gagwe le tsotlhe tse o di dirileng kwa Egepeto. 
Joshua9:10 Le tsotlhe tse o di diretseng dikgosi tse pedi tsa Baamore, tse di ne di le kwa moseja ga Joretane, Sihone kgosi ya Hešebone le Oge kgosi ya Bašane, yo o ne a le kwa Ašetarothe." 
Joshua9:11 Bagolwane ba rona le banni botlhe ba lefatshe la rona ba bua le rona, ba re: ‘Tseelang loeto lwa lona mofago, lo ye go ba kgatlhantsha lo ba reye lo re: Re batlhanka ba lona; jaana dirang kgolagano le rona.’" 
Joshua9:12 E rile re bolola re tla kwano go lona, senkgwe se sa rona ra se tsaya mofago se le molelo se tswa mo matlong a rona ka tsatsi leo; mme jaana bonang se omeletse se bile se kubile."
