Joshua9:13 Le makuka a, re a tshetse a tlala, a le maša; mme bonang, a kgautlhegile. Diaparo tse tsa rona, le ditlhako tsa rona, di onetse ka ntlha ya boleele jo bogolo jwa loeto.”" 
Joshua9:14 Banna bao ba tsaya ga mefago ya bone; mme ba se ka ba lopa kgakololo mo molomong wa ga Jehofa. 
Joshua9:15 Jošua a dira kagiso nabo, a ba a dira kgolagano nabo, go ba lesa ba tshela, le dikgosana tsa phuthego tsa ba ikanela." 
Joshua9:16 Ga dirala ya re go fetile malatsi a le mararo ba sena go dira kgolagano nabo, ba utlwa, go twe, ba bapile nabo, ba agile mo gare ga bone." 
Joshua9:17 Bana ba Iseraele ba tsamaela pele, ba fitlha kwa metseng ya bone ka letsatsi la boraro. Jaana metse ya bone e ne e le Gibeone, le Kefira, le Beerothe, le Kiriathe-jearime." 
Joshua9:18 Bana ba Iseraele ba se ka ba ba kgemetha, ka dikgosana tsa phuthego di ba ikanetse ka Jehofa Modimo wa Iseraele. Phuthego yotlhe ya ngongoregela dikgosana." 
Joshua9:19 Dikgosana tsotlhe tsa raya phuthego yotlhe, tsa re: “Re ba ikanetse ka Jehofa Modimo wa Iseraele; jaana ga re kake ra ba ama." 
Joshua9:20 Re tlaa ba direla jaana, re ba lesa ba tshela; gobale bo se ka jwa tla go re wela ka ntlha ya ikano e re ba ikanetseng ka yone.”" 
Joshua9:21 Dikgosana tsa ba raya tsa re: “A ba lesiwe ba tshele.” Jalo ba tswa barwaledi ba dikgong, le bagi ba metsi ba phuthego yotlhe, jaaka dikgosana di buile nabo." 
Joshua9:22 Jošua a ba bitsa, a bua nabo, a re: “Lo re tsieleditseng, lwa re: ‘Re kgakala thata le lona;’ le mororo lo agile mo gare ga rona?" 
Joshua9:23 Ke gone jaana lo hutsegile, ga go ketla go tlhokafalela bangwe ba lona go nna batlhanka gope, barwaledi ba dikgong, le bagi ba metsi bantlo ya Modimo wa me.”" 
Joshua9:24 Ba fetola Jošua, ba re: “Ke ka gonne ga bolelelwa batlhanka ba gago ka tlhomamo jaaka Jehofa Modimo wa gago a laotse Moše motlhanka wa gagwe, gore a lo neye lefatshe lotlhe, le gore a senye banni botlhe ba lefatshe fa pele ga lona; ke gone ka moo re ne ra ipoifela thata ka ntlha ya lona, mme ra dira selo se." 
Joshua9:25 Mme jaana, bona, re mo seatleng sa gago: se se molemo, le se se siameng mo matlhong a gago go se re direla, o se dire fela.”" 
Joshua9:26 Mme a ba direla jalo, a ba golola mo seatleng sa bana ba Iseraele, gore ba se ka ba ba bolaya." 
Joshua9:27 Ka tsatsi leo Jošua a ba dira barwadi ba dikgong, le bagi ba metsi ba phuthego, le ba sebeso sa ga Jehofa, nako e sa le eno, mo felong fa o ne a tlaa go itshenkela." 
Joshua10:1 Jaana ga dirala e rile Atoni-seteke kgosi ya Jerusalema a utlwa fa Jošua a thopile Ai, a bile a o senyeditse ruri; jaaka a diretse Jeriko le kgosi ya teng, a direla jalo Ai le kgosi ya gone; le jaaka banni ba Gibeone ba dirile kagiso le Iseraele, ba bile ba ntse mo go bone," 
Joshua10:2 ba boifa thata, gonne Gibeone e ne e le motse o mogolo, o ntse jaaka mongwe wa metse ya segosi, le ka gonne o ne o feta Ai, le banna botlhe ba gone e ne e le diganka fela." 
Joshua10:3 Ke gone ka moo Atoni-seteke kgosi ya Jerusalema a roma kwa go Hohame kgosi ya Heberone, le kwa go Pirame kgosi ya Jaremuthe, le kwa go Jafia kgosi ya Lakiše, le kwa go Debire kgosi ya Egelone, a re:" 
Joshua10:4 “Tlang kwano go nna lo nthuse, re yeng go kgemetha Gibeone; gonne o dirile kagiso le Jošua le bana ba Iseraele.”" 
Joshua10:5 Ke gone ka moo dikgosi tse tlhano tsa Baamore, e bong kgosi ya Jerusalema, le kgosi ya Heberone, le kgosi ya Jaremuthe, le kgosi ya Lakiše, le kgosi ya Egelone, tsa phuthega, tsa bolola le dintwa tsotlhe tsa tsone, tsa ya tsa thibelela Gibeone, tsa o tlhasela." 
Joshua10:6 Banna ba Gibeone ba roma kwa go Jošua kwa bothibelelong jwa Gilegale, ba re: “O se ka wa repisa letsogo la gago mo batlhakeng ba gago, o re itlhaganelele, o tle go re golola, le go re thusa, gonne dikgosi tsotlhe tsa Baamore, tse di agileng mo lefatsheng la makgabana, di re phuthegetse go tlhabana le rona.”" 
Joshua10:7 Jošua a tlhatloga mo Gilegale, ene le batho botlhe ba ntwa nae, le diganka tsotlhe tse di pelokgale." 
Joshua10:8 Jehofa a raya Jošua a re: “O se ka wa boifa, gonne ke ba tsentse mo seatleng sa gago; ga go ketla go ema motho ope wa bone fa pele ga gago.”" 
Joshua10:9 Ke gone Jošua a ba wela ka tshoganetso ka a letse a tsamaya bosigo jotlhe a tswa Gilegale. 
Joshua10:10 Jehofa a ba feretlha fa pele ga Iseraele, a ba bolaya ka polao e kgolo kwa Gibeone, a ba konatelela ka tsela ya botlhatlogo jwa Bethehorone, a ba kgemetha go ya go fitlha kwa Aseka le kwa Maketa." 
Joshua10:11 Ga dirala, ya re ka ba tshaba fa pele ga Iseraele, ka ba le mo phologong ya Bethehorone, Jehofa a ba usetsa maje a magolo a tswa legodimong go ya go fitlha kwa Aseka, mme ba swa. Ba ba suleng ka sefako ba nna bantsi go feta ba bana ba Iseraele ba ba bolaileng ka tšhaka." 
Joshua10:12 Foo Jošua a bua le Jehofa ka tsatsi le Jehofa o neetseng Baamore mo seatleng sa bana ba Iseraele ka lone, a bua mo ponong ya Iseraele, a re: “Wena Letsatsi, sisibala godimo ga Gibeone, le wena Kgwedi mo molapong wa Aijalone.”" 
Joshua10:13 Letsatsi la sisibala, le kgwedi ya ema, ga tsamaya morafe wa ipusolotsetsa baba ba one. Moo, a ga go a kwalwa mo lokwalong lwa ga Jašare? Letsatsi la ema gare ga legodimo, le se ka la itlhaganelela go phirima e ka ne e le ka tsatsi lotlhe fela." 
Joshua10:14 Go ne go se na letsatsi lepe le le tshwanang le leo gope, pele ga lone le fa e le morago ga lone, le Jehofa o reeditseng lentswe la motho ka lone, gonne Jehofa o ne a tlhabanela Iseraele." 
Joshua10:15 Jošua a boela kwa bothibelelong kwa Gilegale, a na le Baiseraele botlhe." 
Joshua10:16 Dikgosi tse tlhano tseo tsa tshaba, tsa ya tsa iphitlha mo logageng lo lo kwa Maketa." 
Joshua10:17 Mme ga bolelelwa Jošua ga twe: “Dikgosi tse tlhano di bonywe di iphitlhile mo logageng kwa Maketa.” 
Joshua10:18 Mme Jošua a re: “Hidikololelang maje a magolo mo molomong wa logaga, mme lo beye banna fa go lone go di lebelela;" 
Joshua10:19 mme lona lo se ka lwa diega; lo konatelele baba ba lona, lo bo lo bolaye ba ba fa moraga mo go bone; lo se ka lwa ba leseletsa ba tsena mo metseng ya bone, gonne Jehofa Modimo wa lona o ba tsentse mo diatleng tsa lona.”" 
Joshua10:20 Ga dirala ya re Jošua le bana ba Iseraele ba sena go wetsa go ba bolaya ka polao e kgolo thata, ga tsamaya ba fela, le masalela a a setseng a ne a tsenye mo metseng e e thekeleditsweng," 
Joshua10:21 batho botlhe ba boela kwa go Jošua mo bothibelelong kwa Maketa ka kagiso, go se na ope yo o ka lelenyetsang bana ba Iseraele loleme lwa gagwe." 
Joshua10:22 Foo Jošua a re: “Thibololang molomo wa logaga, lo ntshetse dikgosi tseo tse tlhano kwa ntle, di tle kwano go nna.”" 
Joshua10:23 Ba dira jalo, ba mo ntshetsa dikgosi tseo tse tlhano mo logageng, kgosi ya Jerusalema, le kgosi ya Heberone, le kgosi ya Jaremuthe, le kgosi ya Lakiše le kgosi ya Egelone." 
Joshua10:24 Ga dirala ya re ba ntsheditse dikgosi tseo kwa go Jošua, Jošua a bitsa banna botlhe ba Iseraele, a raya ditlhogo tsa banna ba ntwa ba o ne a tsamaile nabo, a re: “Atamelang lo beye dinao tsa lona mo dithamong tsa dikgosi tse.” Ba atamela ba baya dinao tsa bone mo dithamong tsa tsone." 
Joshua10:25 Mme Jošua a ba raya a re: “Lo se ka lwa boifa, le fa e le go tseana; lo nne thata le pelokgale, gonne Jehofa o tlaa direla baba botlhe ba lona jalo, ba lo tlhabanang nabo.”" 
Joshua10:26 Morago ga moo Jošua a di bolaya, a di otlela, a di pega mo ditlhareng di le tlhano; tsa tlhola di lepeletse mo ditlhareng go ya maitseboeng." 
Joshua10:27 Ga dirala ya re letsatsi le ya phirimong, Jošua a laola, gore ba di pagolole mo ditlhareng, ba di latlhela mo logageng lo di ne di iphitlhile mo go lone, ba baya maje a magolo fa molomong wa logaga, nako e sa le eno." 
Joshua10:28 Jošua a thopa motse wa Maketa ka tsatsi leo, a o kgemetha ka bojetla jwa tšhaka, le kgosi ya one; a ba senyetsa ruri le mewa yotlhe e e mo go one, ga a ka a tlogela ope; a direla kgosi ya Maketa jaaka a ne a diretse kgosi ya Jeriko." 
Joshua10:29 Jošua a tswa mo Maketa, a na le Baiseraele botlhe, ba fetela kwa Libena, mme ba tlhasela Libena." 
Joshua10:30 Le one Jehofa a o tsenya mo atleng sa Iseraele, le kgosi ya one; a o kgemetha ka bojetla jwa tšhaka, le batho botlhe ba ba mo go one; ga a a ka a tlogela ope mo go one; a direla kgosi ya one jaaka a ne a diretse kgosi ya Jeriko." 
Joshua10:31 Jošua a tswa mo Libena, a na le Baiseraele botlhe, ba fetela kwa Lakiše, ba o thibelela, ba o tlhasela;" 
Joshua10:32 Jehofa a tsenya Lakiše mo seatleng sa Iseraele, a o thopa ka tsatsi la bobedi, a o kgemetha ka bojetla jwa tšhaka, le batho botlhe ba ba mo go one, jaaka tsotlhe tse o ne a di diretse Libena." 
Joshua10:33 Foo Horame kgosi ya Gesere a tla go thusa Lakiše; Jošua a mo kgemetha le batho ba gagwe, ga tsamaya a se ka a mo tlogelela ope." 
Joshua10:34 Jošua a tswa mo Lakiše, a na le Baiseraele botlhe, ba fetela kwa Egelone; ba o thibelela, ba o tlhasela;" 
Joshua10:35 ba o thopa ka tsatsi leo, ba o kgemetha ka bojetla jwa tšhaka, mme batho botlhe ba ba mo go one a ba senyetsa ruri ka tsatsi leo, jaaka tsotlhe tse o ne a di diretse Lakiše." 
Joshua10:36 Jošua a tswa mo Egelone, le Baiseraele botlhe ba na nae, ba ya Heberone, ba o tlhasela;" 
Joshua10:37 ba o thopa, ba o kgemetha ka bojetla jwa tšhaka, le kgosi ya one, le metse yotlhe ya one, le batho botlhe ba ba mo go one; ga a ka a tlogela ope, jaaka tsotlhe tse o ne a di diretse Egelone, a o senyetsa ruri, le batho botlhe ba ba mo go one." 
Joshua10:38 Jošua a boela kwa Debire, a na le Baiseraele botlhe; ba o tlhasela," 
Joshua10:39 mme a thopa, le kgosi ya one, le metse yotlhe ya one; ba e kgemetha ka bojetla jwa tšhaka, ba senyetsa ruri batho botlhe ba ba mo go yone; ga a ka a tlogela ope: jaaka a ne a diretse Heberone, a direla Debire jalo, le kgosi ya one; le jaaka a diretse Libena, le kgosi ya one." 
Joshua10:40 Jalo Jošua a gailela ruri lefatshe lotlhe la makgabana, le la borwa, le la sekhuti, le la meripo, le dikgosi tsotlhe tsa gone; ga a ka a tlogela ope; a senyetsa ruri botlhe ba ba hemang mowa, jaaka Jehofa Modimo wa Iseeraele a laotse." 
Joshua10:41 Jošua a ba kgemetha go tswa Kateše-barenea go ya fela kwa Gasa, le lefatshe lotlhe la Gošene, go ya fela kwa Gibeone." 
Joshua10:42 Dikgosi tse tsotlhe le mafatshe a tsone, Jošua a di thopa ka lobaka lo le longwe fela, gonne Jehofa Modimo wa Iseraele o ne a tlhabanela Iseraele." 
Joshua10:43 Jošua a boela kwa bothibelelong kwa Gilegale, a na le Baiseraele botlhe." 
Joshua11:1 Ga dirala ya re Jabine kgosi ya Hasore a go utlwela, a roma kwa go Jobabe kgosi ya Matone, le kwa kgosing ya Shimerone, le kwa kgosing ya Akešafe," 
Joshua11:1 Ga dirala ya re Jabine kgosi ya Hasore a go utlwela, a roma kwa go Jobabe kgosi ya Matone, le kwa kgosing ya Shimerone, le kwa kgosing ya Akešafe," 
Joshua11:2 le kwa dikgosing tse di neng di le ntlheng ya botsheka mo lefatsheng la makgabana, le mo Areba o o potileng Kinerothe ntlheng ya borwa, le mo lefatsheng le le kwa sekhuting, le mo maroteng a Dore, ka fa bophirimatsatsi," 
Joshua11:3 kwa go Bakanana, ba botlhabatsatsi le ba bophirimatsatsi, le go Baamore le Bahite, le Baperise, le Bajebuse, mo lefatsheng la makgabana, le kwa go Bahife fa tlase ga Heremone mo lefatsheng la Misepa." 
Joshua11:4 Ba bolola, bone le dintwa tsotlhe tsa bone, batho ba le bantsi fela jaaka mošawa o o fa losing lwa lewatle ka bontsi, ba na le dipitse le dikara tsa tlhabano di le dintsi thata." 
Joshua11:5 Dikgosi tse tsotlhe tsa kopana; tsa fitlha tsa thibelela mmogo fa metsing a Merome, di tla go tlhabana le Iseraele." 
Joshua11:6 Jehofa a raya Jošua, a re: “O se ka wa boifa ka ntlha ya bone, gonne e tlaa re ka moso go riana, ke tlaa ba neela fa pele ga Baiseraele ba bolailwe botlhe; o rafole dipitse tsa bona mesifa; o fise dakara tsa bone tsa tlhabano ka molelo.”" 
Joshua11:7 Jalo Jošua, a na le batho botlhe ba tlhabano, a bolola, a tla mo go bone ka tshoganetso fa metsing a Merome, mme a ba phagelela." 
Joshua11:8 Jehofa a ba tsenya mo seatleng sa Iseraele, ba ba kgemetha, ba ba alola ba ya go fitlha kwa Sitone o mogolo, le kwa Miserefothe-maime, le kwa molapong wa Misepe ntlheng ya botlhabatsatsi; ba ba kgemetha, ba se ka ba ba tlogelela ope." 
Joshua11:9 Jošua a ba direla jaaka Jehofa a mo laotse; a rafola dipitse tsa bone mesifa, a fisa dikara tsa bone tsa tlhabano ka molelo." 
Joshua11:10 Jošua a menogela kwa morago ka baka loo, a thopa Hasore, a bolaya kgosi ya teng ka tšhaka; gonne e rile gale Hasore ya bo e le tlogo ya magosi ao otlhe." 
Joshua11:11 Ba kgemetha mewa yotlhe e e neng e le mo go one ka bojetla jwa tšhaka ba e senyetsa ruri; go se ka ga sala ope yo o hemang mowa; a fisa Hasore ka molelo. 
Joshua11:12 Le metse yotlhe ya dikgosi tseo, le dikgosi tsa yone, Jošua a di tsaya a di kgemetha ka bojetla jwa tšhaka, a di senyetsa ruri, jaaka Moše motlhanka wa ga Jehofa a laotse." 
Joshua11:13 Mme ka ga metse e e neng e eme mo dithotaneng tsa one, Baiserele ba se ka ba fisa ope wa yone, fa e se Hasore osi; one Jošua a o fisa." 
Joshua11:14 Thopo yotlhe ya metse eo, le matlhape, bana ba Iseraele ba di itseela thopo; mme batho, ba ba kgemetha botlhe ka bojetla jwa tšhaka, ga tsamaya ba ba senya, le gone ba seka ba tlogela ope yo o hemang mowa." 
Joshua11:15 Jaaka Jehofa a laotse Moše motlhanka wa gagwe, Moše a laola Jošua jalo; Jošua a dira jalo; a se ka a tlogela sepe se sa dirwa sa dilo tsotlhe tse Jehofa o di laoletseng Moše." 
Joshua11:16 Jalo Jošua a thopa lefatshe lotlhe leo, lefatshe la makgabana, le ntlheng ya borwa gotlhe, le lefatshe lotlhe la Gošene, le le le kwa sekhuting, le Areba, le lefatshe la makgabana a Iseraele; le le le kwa sekhuting sa lone;" 
Joshua11:17 go tswa thabeng ya Halake, e e kwa Seire, go ya fela kwa Baalagate mo molapong wa Lebanone fa tlase ga Heremone, mme a thopa dikgosi tsotlhe tsa one, a di kgemetha, a di otlela fela." 
Joshua11:18 Jošua a nna a tlhabana le dikgosi tseo tsotlhe fela ka lobaka lo loleele. 
Joshua11:19 Go ne go se na motse ope o o dirileng kagiso le bana ba Iseraele, fa e se Bahife banni ba Gibeone; ba thopa gotlhe ka ntwa." 
Joshua11:20 Gonne e ne e le go rata ga Jehofa go thatafatsa dipelo tsa bone, gore ba bololele Iseraele ka ntwa, gore a ba senyetse ruri, gore ba se ka ba bona tumelelesego epe, fa e se gore a ba senye, fela jaaka Jehofa a laotse Moše." 
Joshua11:21 Jošua a tla ka baka loo, a kgaola Baanake mo lefatsheng la makgabana, mo Heberone, mo Debire, le mo Anabe, le mo lefatsheng lotlhe la Juta la makgabana, le mo lefatsheng lotlhe la Iseraele la makgabana; Jošua a ba senyetsa ruri le metse ya bone." 
Joshua11:22 Ga go a ka ga sala ope wa Baanake mo lefatsheng la bana ba Iseraele, fa e se mo Gasa, mo Gathe le mo Ašetote, ga sala bangwe gone." 
Joshua11:23 Jalo Jošua a thopa lefatshe lotlhe ka fa go tsotlhe tse Jehofa o ne a di bua le Moše; mme Jošua a le naya Iseraele go nna boswa ka fa dikgaoganong tsa ditso tsa bone. Mme lefatshe la bona boikhutso mo ntweng. 
Joshua12:1 Jaana dikgosi tsa lefatshe ke tse, tse bana ba Iseraele ba di kgemethileng, ba rua lefatshe la tsone kwa moseja ga Joretane go isa ntheng ya botlhabatsatsi, go tswa molapong wa Arenone go ya thabeng ya Heremone, le Areba otlhe fela go isa ntlheng ya botlhabatsatsi:" 
Joshua12:2 Sihone kgosi ya Baamore yo o ne a agile mo Hešebone, a busa go tswa Aroere, o o fa ntlheng ya molapo wa Arenone, le motse o o fa gare ga molapo, le bontlhanngwe jwa Gileate, go ya fela kwa nokeng ya Jaboke, molelwane wa bana ba Amone;" 
Joshua12:3 le one Areba go ya lewatleng la Kinerothe, ntlheng ya botlhabatsatsi, le kwa lewatleng la Areba, e bong Lewatle la Letswai, ntlheng ya botlhabatsatis, tsela e e yang kwa Bethe-ješimothe; le ntlheng ya borwa fa tlase ga meripo ya Pisega." 
Joshua12:4 Le molelwane wa ga Oge kgosi ya Bašane, yo e neng e le lesalela la Barefaime, yo o ne a agile mo Ašetarothe le mo Eterei." 
Joshua12:5 A ba a busa mo thabeng ya Heremone, le mo Saleka, le mo Bašane otlhe, go ya molelwaneng wa Bagešure, le Bamaaka, le bontlhanngwe jwa Gileate, le molelwane wa ga Sihone kgosi ya Hešebone." 
Joshua12:6 Moše motlhanka wa ga Jehofa le bana ba Iseraele, ba ba kgemetha; mme Moše motlhanka wa ga Jehofa a naya Barubene, le Bagate, le bonthanngwe jwa lotso lwa ga Manase, lefatshe leo go le rua." 
Joshua12:7 Tse ke tsone dikgosi tsa lefatshe tse. Jošua le bana ba Iseraele ba di kgemethileng moseja ga Joretane, ntlheng ya bophirimatsatsi, go tswa Baalagate mo molapong wa Lebanone go ya fela kwa thabeng ya Halake, e e isang kwa Seire; Jošua a le naya ditso tsa Iseraele go le rua ka fa dikgaoganong tsa tsone;" 
Joshua12:8 mo lefatsheng la makgabana le le le mo sekhuting, le mo go one Areba, le mo meripong, le mo nageng, le mo ntlheng ya Borwa; Bahite, Baamore, Bakanana, Baperise, Bahife le Bajebuse." 
Joshua12:9 Kgosi ya Jeriko e le nngwe fela; kgosi ya Ai, o o fa Bethele, e le nngwe fela;" 
Joshua12:10 kgosi ya Jerusalema e le nngwe fela; kgosi ya Heberone e le nngwe fela; 
Joshua12:11 kgosi ya Jaremuthe e le nngwe fela; kgosi ya Lakiše e le nngwe fela; 
Joshua12:12 kgosi ya Egelone e le nngwe fela; kgosi ya Gesere e le nngwe fela; 
Joshua12:13 kgosi ya Debire e le nngwe fela; kgosi ya Getere e le nngwe fela; 
Joshua12:14 kgosi ya Horema e le nngwe fela; kgosi ya Arate e le nngwe fela; 
Joshua12:15 kgosi ya Adulame e le nngwe fela; 
Joshua12:16 kgosi ya Maketa e le nngwe fela; kgosi ya Bethele e le nngwe fela; 
Joshua12:17 kgosi ya Tapua e le nngwe fela; kgosi ya Hefere e le nngwe fela; 
Joshua12:18 kgosi ya Afeke e le nngwe fela; kgosi ya Sharone e le nngwe fela; 
Joshua12:19 kgosi ya Matone e le nngwe fela; kgosi ya Hasore e le nngwe fela; 
Joshua12:20 kgosi ya Shimerone-merone e le nngwe fela; kgosi ya Akešafe e le nngwe fela; 
Joshua12:21 kgosi ya Taanake e le nngwe fela; kgosi ya Megito e le nngwe fela; 
Joshua12:22 kgosi ya Keteše e le nngwe fela; kgosi ya Jokeneame mo Karemele e le nngwe fela; 
Joshua12:23 kgosi ya Dore mo thoteng ya Dore e le nngwe fela; kgosi ya Goiime mo Gilegale e le nngwe fela; 
Joshua12:24 kgosi ya Tiresa e le nngwe fela; dikgosi tsotlhe di le 31. 
Joshua13:1 Jaana Jošua o ne a tsofetse, a le dinyaga di le dintsi; mme Jehofa a mo raya, a re: “O tsofetse, o dinyaga di dintsi, mme go sa na le lefatshe le letona le le nang le go ruiwa." 
Joshua13:2 Lefatshe le le sa ntseng le setse ke le: Lefatshe lotlhe la Bafilisitia, le la Bagešure lotlhe;" 
Joshua13:3 go tswa Shihore o o amanang le Egepeto, go ya fela kwa molelwaneng wa Ekerone ntlheng ya botsheka, o o balelwang Bakanana; barena ba batlhano ba Bafilisitia; Bagasa, le Baašetote, le Baašekelone, le Bagite le Baekerone;" 
Joshua13:4 le bone Baafime, ntlheng ya borwa; lefatshe lotlhe la Bakanana, le Meara o e leng wa Basitone, go fitlha kwa Afeke, kwa molelwaneng wa Baamore;" 
Joshua13:5 le lefatshe la Bagebale, le Lebanone otlhe ntlheng ya botlhabatsatsi, go tswa Baalagate fa tlase ga thaba ya Heremone go ya kwa botsenong jwa Hamathe:" 
Joshua13:6 Banni botlhe ba lefatshe la makgabana, go tswa Lebanone go ya Miserefothe-maime, e bong Basitone botlhe; bone, ke tlaa ba lelekela kwa ntle fa pele ga bana ba Iseraele; mme lefatshe o le abele Iseraele ka bola go nna boswa, jaaka ke go laotse." 
Joshua13:7 Ke gone jaana, kgaoganya lefatshe boswa mo ditsong tse di ferang o le mongwe, le ntlha e nngwe ya lotso lwa ga Manase.”" 
Joshua13:8 Barubene, le Bagate ba amogetse nae boswa, jo Moše o bo ba neileng kwa moseja ga Joretane, ntlheng ya botlhabatsatsi, fela jaaka Moše motlhanka wa ga Jehofa a ne a ba naya;" 
Joshua13:9 go tswa Aroere o o fa losing lwa molapo wa Arenone, le motse o o fa gare ga molapo, le lobala lotlhe lwa Meteba go ya Dibone;" 
Joshua13:10 le metse yotlhe ya ga Sihone kgosi ya Baamore, yo o ne a busa mo Hešebone, go ya molelwaneng wa bana ba ga Amone;" 
Joshua13:11 le Gileate, le molelwane wa Bagešure, le Bamaaka, le thaba yotlhe ya Heremone, le lefatshe lotlhe la Bašane go ya Saleka;" 
Joshua13:12 bogosi jotlhe jwa ga Oge mo Bašane, ene yo o ne a busa mo Ašetarothe le mo Eterei, (ke ene yo o ne a setse wa bosalela jwa Barefaime); gonne bao Moše o ne a ba kgemetha, a ba leleka." 
Joshua13:13 Le fa go ntse jalo bana ba Iseraele ba se ka ba leleka Bagešure, le fa e le Bamaaka; Gešure le Maaka ba aga mo gare ga Iseraele, nako e sa le eno." 
Joshua13:14 Lotso lwa ga Lefi ke lone losi lo o se kang a lo naya boswa; ditshupelo tsa ga Jehofa, Modimo wa Iseraele, tse di dirwang ka molelo, ke tsone boswa jwa gagwe, jaaka a buile nae." 
Joshua13:15 Moše a abela lotso lwa bana ba ga Rubene ka fa ditshikeng tsa bone. 
Joshua13:16 Molelwane wa bone o le go tswa kwa Aroere, o o fa losing lwa molapo wa Arenone, le motse o o mo gare ga molapo, le lobala lotlhe lwa Meteba;" 
Joshua13:17 Hešebone, le metse yotlhe ya teng e e mo lobaleng; Dibone le Bamothe-baale, le Bethe-baalemeone;" 
Joshua13:18 le Jahase, le Ketemothe, le Mefaathe;" 
Joshua13:19 le Kiriathaime, le Sibema, le Serethe-šahare mo thoteng ya molapo;" 
Joshua13:20 le Bethepeore, le meripo ya Pisega, le Bethe-ješimothe;" 
Joshua13:21 le metse yotlhe ya lobala, le bogosi jotlhe jwa ga Sihone, kgosi ya Baamore, yo o ne a busa mo Hešebone, yo Moše o ne a mo kgemetha le bagolwane ba Midiane, Efi, le Rekeme, le Sure, le Hure, le Reba, le dikgosana tsa ga Sihone, tse di ne di agile mo lefatsheng leo." 
Joshua13:22 Le ene Balaame morwa Beore, wa moitseanape, bana ba Iseraele ba mmolaya ka tšhaka, mo gare ga ba bangwe ba ba bolailweng ke bone." 
Joshua13:23 Molelwane wa bana ba ga Rubene e ne e le Joretane, le mola wa one. Joo e ne e le jone boswa jwa bana ba ga Rubene ka fa ditshikeng tsa bone, metse le metsana ya gone." 
Joshua13:24 Moše a naya lotso lwa Gate, bana ba ga Gate ka fa ditshikeng tsa bone." 
Joshua13:25 Molelwane wa bone e le Jasere, le metse yotlhe ya Gileate, le bontlhanngwe jwa lefatshe la bana ba ga Amone, go ya kwa Aroere o o amanang le Raba;" 
Joshua13:26 le go tswa Hešebone go ya Ramathe-misepe, le Betonime; le go tswa Mahanaime go ya molelwaneng wa Debire;" 
Joshua13:27 le mo molapong, Betheharame, le Bethenimera, le Sukothe, le Safone, mo go setseng ga bogosi jwa ga Sihone kgosi ya Hešebone, Joretane le mola wa one go ya fela kwa bofelong jwa lewatle la Kinerethe kwa moseja ga Joretane, ntlheng ya botlhabatsatsi." 
Joshua13:28 Jo ke jone boswa jwa bana ba ga Gate ka fa ditshikeng tsa bone, metse le metsana ya teng." 
Joshua13:29 Moše a abela bontlhanngwe jwa lotso lwa ga Manase boswa; ya bo e le jwa bontlhanngwe jwa lotso lwa bana ba ga Manase ka fa ditshikeng tsa bone. 
Joshua13:30 Molelwane wa bone o ne o tswa Mahanaime, lefatshe lotlhe la Bašane, bogosi jotlhe jwa ga Oge kgosi ya Bašane, le metse yotlhe ya Jaire e e mo Bašane, metse e le 30;" 
Joshua13:31 bontlhanngwe jwa Gileate, le Ašetarothe, le Eterei, metse ya bogosi jwa ga Oge mo Bašane, e ne e le ya bana ba ga Makire morwa Manase, e bong bontlhanngwe jwa bana ba ga Makire ka fa ditshikeng tsa bone." 
Joshua13:32 Ke one maswa a Moše o ne a a aba mo dipaleng tsa Moabe, kwa moseja ga Joretane fa Jeriko, ntlheng ya botlhabatsatsi." 
Joshua13:33 Lotso lwa ga Lefi, Moše a se ka o lo naya boswa bope; Jehofa Modimo wa Iseraele ke ene boswa jwa bone, jaaka a buile nabo." 
Joshua14:1 A, ke one maswa a bana ba Iseraele ba ne ba a tsaya mo lefatsheng la Kanana, a Eleasare moperesiti, le Jošua morwa Nune, le ditlhogo tsa makgotla a borra batho ba ditso tsa bana ba Iseraele, a ba a abetseng," 
Joshua14:2 ka go laolwa ka bola ga boswa jwa bone, jaaka Jehofa a laotse ka Moše, ka ga ditso tse di ferang o le mongwe, le ka ga bontlhanngwe jwa lotso." 
Joshua14:3 Gonne boswa jwa ditso tse pedi le jwa bontlhanngwe jwa lotso, Moše o ne a bo abile kwa moseja ga Joretane; mme Balefi a se ka a ba naya boswa bope mo go bone." 
Joshua14:4 Gonne bana ba ga Josefe ba ne ba le ditso di le pedi, Manase le Eferaime; mme ba se ka ba naya Balefi kabelo epe ya lefatshe, fa e se metse ya go aga mo go yone, e na le dintlhana tsa yone, ga dikgomo le ga dithuo tsa bone." 
Joshua14:5 Jaaka Jehofa a laotse Moše, bana ba Iseraele ba dira jalo, ba kgaoganya lefatshe." 
Joshua14:6 Foo bana ba Juta ba atamela kwa go Jošua mo Gilegale; mme Kalebe morwa Jefune wa Mokenise a mo raya a re: “O a se itse selo se Jehofa o ne a se bua le Moše motho wa Modimo, ka ga me le ka ga gago, mo Kateše-barenea." 
Joshua14:7 E rile Moše motlhanka wa ga Jehofa a nthoma ke tswa mo Kateše-barenea ke ya go tlhola lefatshe, ka bo ke le dinyaga di le 40; ka ba ka mo leretse lefoko jaaka go ne go le mo pelong ya me." 
Joshua14:8 Le fa go ntse jalo bana ba ga rre ba ke ne ke tsamaile nabo ba nyerisa dipelo tsa batho; mme nna ka sala Jehofa Modimo wa me morago ka botlalo. 
Joshua14:9 Moše a ikana ka tsatsi leo, a re: ‘Ruri lefatshe le lonao lwa gago lo le gatileng, e tlaa nna boswa jwa gago le jwa bana ba gago ka bosakhutleng, ka o setse Jehofa Modimo wa gago morago ka botlalo.’" 
Joshua14:10 Jaana bona, Jehofa o ntshedisitse, jaaka a ne a bua, ka dinyaga tse di 45 tse, go tswa mo lobakeng lwa jale jaaka Jehofa a bua lefoko le le Moše, Iseraele o ntse a sepela mo nageng; mme jaana bona, gompieno ke botsofe jwa dinyaga di le 85." 
Joshua14:11 Gompieno ke sa ntse ke le thata, fela jaaka mo letsatsing le Moše o ne a nthoma ka lone, jaaka thata ya me e ne e ntse jale, thata ya me e ntse fela jalo le jaana, ya go tlhabana, ya go bolola le ya go goroga." 
Joshua14:12 Ke gone jaana, ka re: Nnaya thaba e Jehofa o ne a bua ka ga yone ka tsatsi leo; gonne o ne wa utlwa mo tsatsing leo jaaka Baanake ba ne ba le gone, le metse ya bone fa e le megolo e thekeleditswe; e tlaa re gongwe Jehofa a nne le nna, mme ke ba leleke, jaaka Jehofa a ne a bua.”" 
Joshua14:13 Jošua a mo segofatsa; a naya Kalebe morwa Jefune Heberone go nna boswa. 
Joshua14:14 Jalo Heberone wa nna boswa jwa ga Kalebe morwa Jefune wa Mokenise nako e sa le eno; gonne o ne a sala Jehofa Modimo wa Iseraele morago ka botlalo. 
Joshua14:15 Gale leina la Heberone e ne e le Kiriathe-areba; Areba yoo e ne e le ene motho yo mogolo mo go Baanake. Lefatshe la bona boikhutso mo ntweng. 
Joshua15:1 Kabelo ya taolelo ya lotso lwa bana ba ga Juta ka fa ditshikeng tsa bone, ya ya go fitlha kwa molelwaneng wa Etome, e bong kwa nageng ya Tsine ntlheng ya borwa, kwa bofelelong jwa ntlha ya borwa." 
Joshua15:2 Molelwane wa bone wa ntlha ya borwa o ne o tswa bofelelong jwa Lewatle la Letswai, kwa sekgonong bolebana le ntlha ya borwa." 
Joshua15:3 Wa bo o isa bopota mokong wa Akerabime ntlheng ya borwa, wa kgabaganyetsa kwa Tsine, wa tlhatloga bopota Kateše-barenea ka fa ntlheng ya borwa, wa feta ka Heserone, wa tlhatlogela kwa Atare, wa menogela kwa Kareka;" 
Joshua15:4 wa kgabaganyetsa kwa Asemone, wa tswa ka molatswana wa Egepeto; mme mafelelo a molelwane e ne e le mo lewatleng; o, e tlaa nna one molelwane wa lona ntlheng ya borwa." 
Joshua15:5 Molelwane wa ntlha ya ka fa botlhabatsatsi e ne e le Lewatle la Letswai go ya fela kwa bokhutlong jwa Joretane. Molelwane wa ntlha ya botsheka o ne o tswa kwa sekgonong sa lewatle kwa bokhutlong jwa Joretane. 
Joshua15:6 Molelwane wa tlhatlogela kwa Bethehogela, wa feta bopota Betharaba ka fa ntlheng ya botsheka; molelwane wa tlhatlogela kwa letlapeng la ga Bohane morwa Rubene." 
Joshua15:7 Molelwane wa tlhatlogela kwa Debire, go tswa mo molapong wa Akore, wa ya jalo ntlheng ya botsheka, o lebile Gilegale, o o lebaganyeng le mokong wa Adumime, o o potileng noka ntlheng ya borwa; mme molelwane wa feta wa ya kwa metsing a Enešemeše, mme mafelelo a one a ne a le mo Enerogele." 
Joshua15:8 Molelwane wa tlhatloga le mogogoro wa morwa Hinome go ya kwa lotlhakoreng lwa Mojebuse ntlheng ya borwa (ke one Jerusalema); molelwane wa tlhatlogela kwa godimo ga thaba e e emeng bolebagana le mogogoro wa morwa Hinome ntlheng ya bophirimatsatsi, ke go re kwa bofelong jwa mogogoro wa Refaime ntlheng ya botsheka." 
Joshua15:9 Molelwane wa ralwa kwa godimo ga thaba, wa ralelwa kwa motsweding wa metsi a Nefetoa, wa tswela kwa metseng ya thabana ya Eferone; molelwane wa ralelwa kwa Baala (ke one Kiriathe-jearime)." 
Joshua15:10 Kwa Baala molelwane wa menogela ntlheng ya bophirimatsatsi go ya thabeng ya Seire, wa fetela kwa lotlhakoreng lwa thaba ya Jearime ntlheng ya botsheka (ke one Kesalone), wa fologela kwa Bethešemeše, wa feta ka fa Timena." 
Joshua15:11 Molelwane wa tswela kwa lotlhakoreng lwa Ekerone ntlheng ya botsheka; molelwane wa ralelwa kwa Shikerone, wa fetela kwa thabaneng ya Baala, mme wa tswa fa Jabeneele; mafelelo a molelwane a ne a le mo lewatleng." 
Joshua15:12 Molelwane wa ka fa bophirimatsatsi wa nna kwa lewatleng le legolo le losi lwa lone. Ke one molelwane wa bana ba ga Juta mo tikologong ka fa ditshikeng tsa bone. 
Joshua15:13 A naya Kalebe morwa Jefune kabelo mo baneng ba Juta ka fa Jehofa o laotseng Jošua ka gone, e bong Kiriathe-areba, yo o eng ene Areba, rraagwe Anake (ke ene Heberone)." 
Joshua15:14 Kalebe a leleka gone bomorwa Anake ba bararo, Shešai, le Ahimane, le Talemai, bana ba ga Anake." 
Joshua15:15 Mme a tlhatloga teng a ya go tlhasela banni ba Debire; gale leina la Debire e ne e le Kiriathe-sefere. 
Joshua15:16 Kalebe a re: “Yo o kgemethang Kiriathe-sefere, a go thopa, ke tlaa mo naya morwadiake Akesa go nna mosadi.”" 
Joshua15:17 Otheniele, morwa Kenase, monnaa Kalebe, a o thopa; mme a mo naya morwadie Akesa go nna mosadi." 
Joshua15:18 Ga dirala ya re mosadi a tla kwa go ene, a mo tlhotlheletsa gore a lope rraagwe naga nngwe; mosadi a pagologa mo eseleng ya gagwe; Kalebe a mo raya a re: “O eletsang?”" 
Joshua15:19 Mosadi a mo raya, a re: “Nnaya lesego; e re ka o mpeile mo lefatsheng la Borwa, o bo o nneye le metswedi ya metsi.” Mme a mo naya metswedi ya godimo le metswedi ya tlase." 
Joshua15:20 Jo ke jone boswa jwa lotso lwa bana ba ga Juta ka fa ditshikeng tsa bone. 
Joshua15:21 Metse ya bofelo ya lotso lwa bana ba Juta go isa ntlheng ya molelwane wa Etome, ntlheng ya Borwa, e ne e le Kabeseele, le Etere, le Jagure;" 
Joshua15:22 le Kina, le Dimona, le Atata;" 
Joshua15:23 le Keteše, le Hasore le Ithenane;" 
Joshua15:24 Sife, le Teleme le Bealothe;" 
Joshua15:25 le Hasore-hatata, le Keriothe-heserone (ke one Hasore);" 
Joshua15:26 Amame, Shema le Molata;" 
Joshua15:27 le Hasare-gata, le Hešemone le Bethepelete;" 
Joshua15:28 le Hasare-šuale, Beerešeba, le Bisiothia;" 
Joshua15:29 Baala, Iime le Eseme;" 
Joshua15:30 le Eletolate, le Kisile le Horema;" 
Joshua15:31 le Sikelage, le Matemana le Sanesana;" 
Joshua15:32 le Lebaothe, Shilehime, le Aine le Rimone; metse yotlhe e le 29, e na le metsana ya yone." 
Joshua15:33 Mo fatsheng le le kwa sehuting, Ešetaole, le Sora le Ašena;" 
Joshua15:34 le Sanoa, le Eneganime, Tapua le Ename;" 
Joshua15:35 Jaremuthe, le Adulame, le Soko le Aseka;" 
Joshua15:36 le Shaaraime, le Adithaime, le Getera, Geterothaime, metse e le 14, e na le metsana ya yona." 
Joshua15:37 Senane, le Hataša, le Migatalegate;" 
Joshua15:38 le Dileane, le Misepe, le Joketheele;" 
Joshua15:39 Lakiše, le Bosekathe, le Egelone;" 
Joshua15:40 le Kabone, le Lahemame, le Kithiliše;" 
Joshua15:41 le Geterothe, le Bethetagone, le Naama le Maketa; metse e le 16, e na le metsana ya yone." 
Joshua15:42 Libena, le Ethere, le Ašane;" 
Joshua15:43 le Ifeta, le Ašena, le Nesibe;" 
Joshua15:44 le Keila, le Akesibe, le Mareša; metse e e ferang o le mongwe, e na le metsana ya yone." 
Joshua15:45 Ekerone, o na le metse ya teng le metsana ya gone;" 
Joshua15:46 go tswa mo Ekerone go ya fela kwa lewatleng, yotlhe e e bapileng le Ašetote, e na le metsana ya yone." 
Joshua15:47 Ašetote, metse ya teng le metsana ya gone; Gasa, metse ya gone le metsana ya gone; go ya kwa molatswaneng wa Egepeto, le kwa lewatleng le legolo, le losi lwa lone." 
Joshua15:48 Le mo lefatsheng la makgabana, Shamire, le Jatire, le Soko;" 
Joshua15:49 le Danna, le Kiriathe-Sanna (ke one Debire);" 
Joshua15:50 le Anabe, le Ešetemo, le Anime;" 
Joshua15:51 le Gošene, le Holone, le Gilo; metse e le 11 e na le metsana ya yone." 
Joshua15:52 Arabe, le Duma, le Ešane;" 
Joshua15:53 le Janime, le Bethetapua, le Afeka;" 
Joshua15:54 le Humeta, le Kiriathe-areba (ke one Heberone), le Siore; metse e e 9 e na le metsana ya yone." 
Joshua15:55 Maone, le Karemele, le Sife, le Juta" 
Joshua15:56 le Jesereele, le Joketeame, le Sanoa;" 
Joshua15:57 Kaine, Gibea, le Timena; metse e le some e na le metsana ya yone." 
Joshua15:58 Halehule, Bethesure le Getore;" 
Joshua15:59 le Maarathe, Bethanothe le Eletekone; metse e le merataro e na le metsana ya yone." 
Joshua15:60 Kiriathe-baale (ke one Kiriathe-jearime) le Raba; metse e le mebedi e na le metsana ya yone. 
Joshua15:61 Mo nageng, Betharaba, Midine le Sekaka;" 
Joshua15:62 le Nibešane, motse wa Letswai, le Enegedi; metse e le merataro, e na le metsana ya yone." 
Joshua15:63 Me ka ga Bajebuse, banni ba Jerusalema, ba bana ba Juta ba ne ba retelelwa ke go ba leleka: Bajebuse ba aga le bana ba Juta mo Jerusalema, nako e sa le eno." 
Joshua16:1 Kabelo ya taolelo ya bana ba ga Josefe, ya tloga mo Joretane fa Jeriko, fa metsing a Jeriko, ntlheng ya botlhabatsatsi, e bong mo nageng, ya tlhatloga ka Jeriko e ralala lefatshe la makgabana e leba kwa Bethele;" 
Joshua16:2 ya tswa Bethele ya leba Luse, ya kgabaganyetsa kwa molelwaneng wa Baareke, go ya kwa Atarothe;" 
Joshua16:3 ya fologela ntlheng ya bophirimatsatsi, ya ya kwa molelwaneng wa Bajafelete, kwa molelwaneng wa Bethehorone o o kwa tlase, e bong kwa Gesere; mme mafelelo a molelwane a nna mo lewatleng." 
Joshua16:4 Mme bana ba ga Josefe, e bong Manase le Eferaime, ba tsaya boswa jwa bone." 
Joshua16:5 Molelwane wa bana ba ga Eferaime ka fa ditshikeng tsa bone wa nna jaana: e bong molelwane wa boswa jwa bone ntlheng ya botlhabatsatsi, ya nna: Atarothe-atare, go ya kwa Bethehorone o o godimo." 
Joshua16:6 Molelwane wa tswela ntlheng ya bophirimatsatsi fa Mikemethathe ntlheng ya botsheka; molelwane wa menogela ntlheng ya botlhabatsatsi wa ya kwa Taanate-šilo, wa feta ka gone o isa bopota Janoa ntlheng ya botlhabatsatsi ga Janoa;" 
Joshua16:7 wa tswa Janoa wa fologela kwa Atarothe, le kwa Naara, wa fitlha kwa Jeriko, wa khutla mo Joretane." 
Joshua16:8 Go tswa Tapua molelwane wa tswela ntlheng ya bophirimatsatsi kwa molatswaneng wa Kana; mafelelo a one a nna mo lewatleng. Jo ke jone boswa jwa lotso lwa bana ba ga Eferaime ka fa ditshikeng tsa bone; 
Joshua16:9 bo pataganye le metse e e lomololetsweng bana ba ga Eferaime mo gare ga boswa jwa bana ba ga Manase, metse yotlhe le metsana ya yone." 
Joshua16:10 Mme ba se ka ba leleka Bakanana ba ba neng ba agile mo Gesere; Bakanana ba aga mo gare ga Eferaime nako e se le eno, ba tswa batlhanka ba go dira se ba se laolwang." 
Joshua17:1 Mme e, ya nna yone kabelo ka taolo ya bola, ya lotso lwa ga Manase: gonne e ne e le ene motsalwapele wa ga Josefe. Ka ga Makire motsalwapele wa ga Manase, rraagwe Gileate, ka a le monna wa ntwa, a bona Gileate le Bašane ka ntlha ya gone moo." 
Joshua17:2 Kabelo ya taolelo ya nna ya ba ba setseng ba bana ba ga Manase ka fa ditshikeng tsa bone; ya Manase ka fa ditshikeng tsa bone, ya bana ba ga Abiesere, le ya bana ba ga Heleke, le ya bana ba ga Asieriele, le ya bana ba ga Shekeme, le ya bana ba ga Hefere, le ya bana ba ga Shemita; bao e ne e le bana ba basimane ba ga Manase morwa Josefe, ka fa ditshikeng tsa bone." 
Joshua17:3 Selofehate morwa Hefere, morwa Gileate, morwa Makire, morwa Manase, o ne a se na bana ba basimane, fa e se ba basetsana fela; maina a bana ba gagwe ba basetsana ke a: Mahela, Noa, Hogela, Mileka le Tiresa." 
Joshua17:4 Ba atamela fa pele ga Eleasare moperesiti le fa pele ga Jošua morwa Nune, le fa pele ga dikgosana, ba re: “Jehofa o ne a laolela Moše gore a re neye boswa mo go bomorwa rraa rona;” ke gone ka ntlha ya gone moo, a ba naya boswa mo go bomorwa raaabo ka fa taolong ya ga Jehofa." 
Joshua17:5 Ga wela dikabelo di le some kwa go Manase, kwa ntle ga lefatshe la Gileate le Bašane, le le kwa moseja ga Joretane;" 
Joshua17:6 gonne bomorwadia Manase ba ne ba na le boswa mo go bomorwawe; lefatshe la Gileate la nna la bomorwa Manase ba bangwe ba ba setseng. 
Joshua17:7 Molelwane wa ga Manase wa tswa mo Ašere wa ya kwa Mikemethathe o o lebaganyeng le Shekeme; molelwane wa tswelela ntlheng ya letsogo le legolo, kwa banning ba Enetapua." 
Joshua17:8 Lefatshe la Tapua e ne e le la ga Manase; Tapua fa molelwaneng wa ga Manase e ne e le wa bana ba ga Eferaime. 
Joshua17:9 Molelwane wa fologela kwa molatswaneng wa Kana, go pota molatswana ntlheng ya borwa; metse e, e ne e le ya ga Eferaime mo metseng ya ga Manase; mme molelwane wa Manase o ne o potile molatswana ntlheng ya botsheka, mme mafelelo a one a nna mo lewatleng." 
Joshua17:10 Ntlheng ya borwa e ne e le ga Eferaime, ntlheng ya botsheka e le ga Manase, lewatle e le molelwane wa gagwe; mme ya ya go fitlha kwa Ašere ntlheng ya botsheka, le kwa go Isakare ntlheng ya botlhabatsatsi." 
Joshua17:11 Mo go Isakare le Ašere, Manase o ne a na le Bethešeane le metse ya teng, le Ibeleame le metse ya gone, le banni ba Dore le metse ya teng, le banni ba Enetore le metse ya gone, le banni ba Taanake le metse ya teng; le banni ba Megito le metse ya gone, e bong dithota tse tharo." 
Joshua17:12 Le fa go ntse jalo bana ba ga Manase ba ne ba sa nonofa go leleka banni ba metse eo; mme Bakanana ba ganelela go aga mo lefatsheng leo. 
Joshua17:13 Ga dirala ya re bana ba Iseraele ba sena go thatafala, ba tsenya Bakanana mo tirelong ya bone, ba se ka ba ba lelekela ruri." 
Joshua17:14 Bana ba ga Josefe ba bua le Jošua, ba re: “Ana go ntse jang ka o nneile kabelo ya taolelo e le nngwe fela, le kabo e le nngwe fela go nna boswa, etswa ke le tšhaba e kgolo, gonne Jehofa o ntse a ntshegofatsa?”" 
Joshua17:15 Jošua a ba raya a re: “E re fa o le tšhaba e kgolo, tlhatlogela kwa sekgweng, o ithemele teng mo lefatsheng la Baperise le la Barefaime; ka lefatshe la makgabana la ga Eferaime le go pitlaganetse.”" 
Joshua17:16 Bana ba ga Josefe ba re: “Lefatshe la makgabana ga le a re lekana; Bakanana botlhe ba ba agileng mo molapong ba na le dikara tsa tlhabano tsa tshipi, bone ba ba mo Bethešeane le metse ya teng, le bone ba ba mo molapong wa Jesereele.”" 
Joshua17:17 Jošua a bua le ba ntlo ya ga Josefe, e bong Eferaime le Manase, a re: “O tšhaba e kgolo, o na le thata e kgolo; kabelo ya taolelo ya gago ga e ketla e nna nngwe fela;" 
Joshua17:18 lefatshe la makgabana e tlaa nna la gago; gonne le fa le le sekgwa, o tlaa se rema, matso a sone a tlaa nna a gago; gonne o tlaa leleka Bakanana, le fa ba na le dikara tsa tshipi tsa tlhabano, ba bile ba le thata.”" 
Joshua18:1 Phuthego yotlhe ya bana ba Iseraele ya phuthegela kwa Shilo, mme ba tlhoma mogope wa bophuthegelo teng; lefatshe la bo le fenyegile fa pele ga bone." 
Joshua18:2 Ga bo go setse ditso di supa mo baneng ba Iseraele, tse di iseng di abelwe boswa jwa tsone." 
Joshua18:3 Mme Jošua a raya bana ba Iseraele, a re: “Lo tlaa nyafala ka lobaka lo lo kae go ya go rua lefatshe le Jehofa Modimo wa borraeno o le lo neileng?" 
Joshua18:4 Itebalebeleng banna ba le bararo ba lotso longwe le longwe; ke tlaa ba roma, ba tlaa nanoga ba ralala lefatshe ba le kwala ka fa bosweng jwa bone, ba tla itse go tla kwano go nna." 
Joshua18:5 Ba tlaa le kgaoganya sesupa: Juta o tlaa nna mo teng ga molelwane wa gagwe fela ntlheng ya borwa, ba ntlo ya ga Josefe ba tlaa nna mo teng ga molelwane wa bone ntlheng ya botsheka." 
Joshua18:6 Lo tla kwala lefatshe dikabo di supa, lo lere lokwalo kwano go nna; mme ke tlaa lo laolela ka bola fano fa pele ga Jehofa Modimo wa rona." 
Joshua18:7 Gonne Balefi ga ba na kabelo mo go lona; gonne boperesiti jwa ga Jehofa ke jone boswa jwa bone; mme Gate le Rubene le bontlhanngwe jwa lotso lwa ga Manase ba amogetse boswa jwa bone kwa moseja ga Joretane ntlheng ya botlhabatsatsi, jo Moše motlhanka wa ga Jehofa o bo ba neileng.”" 
Joshua18:8 Banna bao ba nanoga ba tsamaya; Jošua a laya bone ba ba yang go kwala lefatshe, a re: “Yang lo ralale lefatshe, lo le kwale, lo itse go boela kwano go nna, ke tlaa lo laolela ka bola fano fa pele ga Jehofa mo Shilo.”" 
Joshua18:9 Banna bao ba ya ba ralala lefatshe, ba le kwala dikgaogano di supa mo lokwalong ka fa metseng ya lone, ba itse go tla kwa go Jošua mo bothibelelong kwa Shilo." 
Joshua18:10 Jošua a ba laolela ka bola mo Shilo fa pele ga Jehofa; Jošua a kgaoganyetsa bana ba Iseraele lefatshe teng, ka fa dikgaoganong tsa bone." 
Joshua18:11 Kabelo ya taolelo ya lotso lwa bana ba ga Benjamine ya tswa ka fa ditshikeng tsa bone; molelwane wa taolelo ya bone wa tswa fa gare ga bana ba ga Juta le bana ba ga Josefe. 
Joshua18:12 Molelwane wa bone ntlheng ya botsheka wa simologa mo Joretane; molelwane wa tlhatlogela kwa lotlhakoreng lwa Jeriko ntlheng ya botsheka, wa tlhatloga le lefatshe la makgabana, wa ya ntlheng ya bophirimatsatsi; mafelelo a one a nna mo nageng ya Bethafene." 
Joshua18:13 Molelwane wa tswa teng wa kgabaganyetsa kwa Luse, kwa lotlhakoreng lwa Luse (ke one Bethele) ntlheng ya borwa; molelwane wa fologela kwa Atarothe-atare ka fa thabeng e e potileng Bethehorone o o kwa tlase, ntlheng ya borwa." 
Joshua18:14 Molelwane wa ralwa, mo ntlheng ya bophirimatsatsi wa menogela kwa ntlheng ya borwa, go tswa mo thabeng e e lebaganyeng le Bethehorone go ya ntlheng ya borwa; mafelelo a one a nna kwa Kiriathe-baale (ke one Kiriathe-jearime) motse wa bana ba ga Juta; ya nna one mofama wa kwa bophirimatsatsi." 
Joshua18:15 Ntlha ya borwa ya simologa kwa bofelong jwa Kiriathe-jearime, molelwane wa tswela ntlheng ya bophirimatsatsi, wa tswela kwa motsweding wa metsi wa Nefetoa." 
Joshua18:16 Molelwane wa fologela kwa bofelong jwa thaba e e lebaganyeng le mogogoro wa morwa Hinome, o o mo mogogorong wa Refaime ntlheng ya botsheka; wa fologela mo mogogorong wa Hinome go ya lotlhakoreng lwa Mojebuse ntlheng ya borwa, wa fologela kwa Enerogele;" 
Joshua18:17 wa ralwa ntlheng ya botsheka, wa tswa fa Enešemeše, wa tswela kwa Gelilothe, o o lebaganyeng le botlhatlogo jwa Adumime; wa fologela kwa letlapeng la ga Bohane morwa Rubene;" 
Joshua18:18 wa feta wa ya kwa lotlhakoreng lo lo lebaganyeng le Areba ntlheng ya botsheka, wa fologela mo Areba." 
Joshua18:19 Molelwane wa kgabaganyetsa kwa lotlhakoreng lwa Bethehogela ntlheng ya botsheka; mafelelo a molelwane a nna mo sekgonong sa botsheka sa Lewatle la Letswai, kwa bokhutlong jwa Joretane ntlheng ya borwa; e ne e le one molelwane ntlheng ya borwa." 
Joshua18:20 Joretane e ne e le molelwane wa lone ntlheng ya botlhabatsatsi. E ne e le jone boswa jwa bana ba ga Benjamine, ka melelwane ya lone mo tikologong, ka fa ditshikeng tsa bone." 
Joshua18:21 Jaana metse ya lotso lwa bana ba ga Benjamine, ka fa ditshikeng tsa bone e ne e le Jeriko, Bethehogela, le Emeke-kesise;" 
Joshua18:22 le Betharaba, le Semaraime, le Bethele;" 
Joshua18:23 le Afime, le Para, le Ofera;" 
Joshua18:24 le Kefaramoni, Ofeni, le Geba; metse e le 12, le metsana ya yone;" 
Joshua18:25 Gibeone, Rama le Beerothe;" 
Joshua18:26 le Misepe, Kefira le Mosa;" 
Joshua18:27 le Rekeme, Irepeele le Tarala;" 
Joshua18:28 le Sela, Elefe, le Mojebuse (ke one Jerusalema), Gibeathe le Kiriathe; metse e le 14, le metsana ya yone. Ke yone boswa jwa bana ba ga Benjamine ka fa ditshikeng tsa bone." 
Joshua19:1 Kabelo ya taolelo ya bobedi ya tswela Simeone, e bong lotso lwa bana ba ga Simeone ka fa ditshikeng tsa bone; boswa jwa bone jwa nna fa gare ga boswa jwa bana ba ga Juta." 
Joshua19:2 Boswa jwa bone ya nna Beerešeba, le fa e le Sheba le Molata;" 
Joshua19:3 le Hasare-šuale, Bala le Esema;" 
Joshua19:4 le Eletolate, Bethule le Horema;" 
Joshua19:5 le Sikelage, Bethe-marekabothe le Hasare-susa;" 
Joshua19:6 le Bethe-lebaothe le Sharuhene; metse e le 13, le metsana ya yone." 
Joshua19:7 Aine, Rimone, Ethere le Ašane; metse e le mene, le metsana ya yone;" 
Joshua19:8 le metsana yotlhe e e mo tikologong ya metse eo go ya Baalathe-beere, Rama wa Borwa. Ke jone boswa jwa lotso lwa bana ba ga Simeone ka fa ditshikeng tsa bone." 
Joshua19:9 Boswa jwa bana ba ga Simeone jwa ntshiwa mo molelwaneng wa bana ba ga Juta; gonne kabelo ya bana ba ga Juta e ba feta ka botona; ke gone ka moo bana ba ga Simeone ba bona boswa mo gare ga boswa jwa bone. 
Joshua19:10 Kabelo ya taolelo ya boraro ya tswela bana ba ga Sebulone ka fa ditshikeng tsa bone; molelwane wa boswa kwa bone wa ya kwa Sarite. 
Joshua19:11 Molelwane wa bone wa tlhatlogela ntlheng ya bophirimatsatsi, e bong kwa Marala, wa fitlha kwa Dabešethe; wa ba wa fitlha kwa molatswaneng o o lebaganyeng le Jokeneame." 
Joshua19:12 Kwa Sarite wa menogela kwa botlhabatsatsi kwa letsatsi le tlhabang, le kwa molelwaneng wa Kiselothe-tabore; wa kgabaganyetsa kwa Deberathe, wa tlhatlogela kwa Jafia;" 
Joshua19:13 wa tswa foo wa kgabaganyetsa ntlheng ya botlhabatsatsi kwa Gathe-hefere kwa Ethekasine; wa khutla kwa Rimone o o namalaletseng kwa Nea. 
Joshua19:14 Molelwane wa potologa ntlheng ya botsheka wa ya Hanathone; mafelelo a one a nna mo molapong wa Ifetahele; 
Joshua19:15 le Katathe, Nahalale, Shimerone, Itala le Bethelehema; metse e le 12, le metsana ya yone." 
Joshua19:16 Ke jone boswa jwa bana ba ga Sebulone ka fa ditshikeng tsa bone, metse eo le metsana ya yone." 
Joshua19:17 Kabelo ya taolelo ya bone ya tswela Isakare, e bong bana ba ga Isakare ka fa ditshikeng tsa bone." 
Joshua19:18 Molelwane wa bone wa fitlha kwa Jesereele, le Kesulothe le Shuneme;" 
Joshua19:19 le Hafaraime, Shione le Anaharathe;" 
Joshua19:20 le Rabithe, le Kišione le Ebese;" 
Joshua19:21 le Remethe, Eneganime, Enehata le Bethepasese." 
Joshua19:22 Molelwane wa ya go fitlha kwa Tabore, Shahasuma le Bethešemeše; mafelelo a molelwane wa bone a nna a mo Joretane: metse e le 16, le metsana ya yone." 
Joshua19:23 Ke jone boswa jwa lotso lwa bana ba ga Isakare ka fa ditshikeng tsa bone, metse le metsana ya yone." 
Joshua19:24 Kabelo ya taolelo ya botlhano ya tswela lotso lwa bana ba ga Ašere ka fa ditshikeng tsa bone. 
Joshua19:25 Molelwane wa bone e ne e le Helekathe, Hali, Betene, le Akešafe;" 
Joshua19:26 le Alameleke, Amate, le Mišale; wa fitlha kwa Karemele ntlheng ya bophirimatsatsi le kwa Shihore-libenathe;" 
Joshua19:27 wa menogela kwa botlhabong jwa letsatsi kwa Bethetagone, wa fitlha kwa Sebulone le molapo wa Ifetahele ntlheng ya botsheka, kwa Bethemeke le Neiele; wa kgabaganyetsa kwa Kabule ntlheng ya letsogotlho," 
Joshua19:28 le Eberone, le Rehobe, le Hamone, le Kana, go fitlha fela kwa Sitone o mogolo." 
Joshua19:29 Molelwane wa menogela kwa Rama, le kwa motseng o o thekeleditsweng wa Ture; molelwane wa menogela kwa Hosa; mafelelo a one a nna mo lewatleng fa sebakeng sa Akesibe;" 
Joshua19:30 le Uma, le Afeke le Rehobe; metse e le 22, ka metsana ya yone." 
Joshua19:31 Ke jone boswa jwa lotso lwa bana ba ga Ašere, ka fa ditshikeng tsa bone, metse eo ka metsana ya yone." 
Joshua19:32 Kabelo ya taolelo ya borataro ya tswela bana ba ga Nafetali, e bong bana ba ga Nafetali ka ga ditshikeng tsa bone." 
Joshua19:33 Molelwane wa bone wa simologa mo Helefe, o tswa mo mookeng wa Saanenime, le Ataminekebe, le Jabeneele go ya kwa Lakume; mme mafelelo a one a nna mo Joretane." 
Joshua19:34 Molelwane wa menogela ntlheng ya bophirimatsatsi go ya kwa Asenothe-tabore, wa kgabaganyetsa kwa Hukoke; wa fitlha kwa Sebulone ntlheng ya borwa, wa fitlha kwa go Ašere ntlheng ya bophirimatsatsi, le kwa Juta fa Joretane ntlheng ya botlhabatsatsi." 
Joshua19:35 Metse e e thekeleditsweng e ne e le Sidime, Sere, le Hamathe, Rakathe, le Kinerete;" 
Joshua19:36 le Atama, le Rama le Hasore;" 
Joshua19:37 le Keteše, Eterei le Enehasore;" 
Joshua19:38 le Irone, Migetalele, Horeme, le Bethanathe le Bethešemeše; metse e le 19, ka metsana ya yone." 
Joshua19:39 Ke jone boswa jwa lotso lwa bana ba ga Nafetali ka fa ditshikeng tsa bone, metse eo ka metsana ya yone." 
Joshua19:40 Kabelo ya taolelo ya bosupa ya tswela lotso lwa bana ba ga Dane, ka fa ditshikeng tsa bone." 
Joshua19:41 Molelwane wa boswa jwa bone e ne e le Sora, le Ešetaole, le Ire-šemeše;" 
Joshua19:42 le Shaalabine, le Aijalone le Ithela;" 
Joshua19:43 le Elone, le Timena le Ekerone;" 
Joshua19:44 le Eleteke, le Gibethone le Baalathe;" 
Joshua19:45 le Jehute, le Beneberake le Gatherimone;" 
Joshua19:46 le Mejarekone, le Rakone, mmogo le molelwane o o lebaganyeng le Jopa." 
Joshua19:47 Molelwane wa bana ba ga Dane wa feta wa tswela kwa ntle ga bone; gonne bana ba ga Dane ba ne ba tlhatloga ba ya go tlhasela Lešeme, ba o thopa, ba o kgemetha ka bojetla jwa tšhaka, mme ba go rua ba aga gone, ba raya Lešeme leina, ba re, Dane, jaaka leina la ga Dane rraabo." 
Joshua19:48 Ke jone boswa jwa lotso lwa bana ba ga Dane, ka fa ditshikeng tsa bone, metse eo ka metsana ya yone." 
Joshua19:49 Ba swetsa go kgaoganya lefatshe boswa ka melelwane ya lone; bana ba Iseraele ba naya Jošua morwa Nune boswa mo gare ga bone. 
Joshua19:50 Ba mo naya motse o o ne a o lopile, e bong Timenathesera mo lefatsheng la makgabana la Eferaime ka fa taolong ya ga Jehofa; mme a aga one motse, a nna mo go one." 
Joshua19:51 Ke one maswa a ga Eleasare moperesiti, le Jošua morwa Nune, le ditlhogo tsa makgotla a borra batho ba ditso tsa bana ba Iseraele, ba ne ba a kgaoganya boswa ka taolo ya bola mo Shilo fa pele ga Jehofa, fa mojakong wa mogope wa bophuthegelo. Mme ba swetsa go kgaoganya lefatshe." 
Joshua20:1 Jehofa a bua le Jošua a re: 
Joshua20:2 “Bua le bana ba Iseraele, o re: ‘Itaoleleng metse ya botshabelo e ke buileng le lona ka ga yone ka Moše," 
Joshua20:3 gore mmolai wa motho yo o bolayang motho ka matsheka, a sa itse, a tle a tshabele gone; e tlaa nna botshabelo mo go lona fa motho a tshaba mmusolosi wa madi." 
Joshua20:4 O tlaa tshabela kwa go mongwe wa metse eo, o tlaa ema fa botsenong jwa kgoro ya motse, a kakanya mafoko a gagwe mo ditsebeng tsa bagolwane ba motse; mme ba tlaa mo tsholela mo motseng, ba mo naya bonno, gore a age mo go bone." 
Joshua20:5 Fa mmusolosi wa madi a mo konatelela, foo ba se ka ba tsenya mmolai wa motho mo seatleng sa gagwe; gonne o bolaile wa ga gabo a sa itse, a sa mo ila gale." 
Joshua20:6 O tlaa aga mo motseng oo go tsamaya a ema fa pele ga phuthego go atlholwa, go tsamaya moperesiti yo mogolo wa motlha oo a swa; foo mmolai wa motho o ka boa, a tla mo motseng wa ga gabo, le mo ntlong ya gagwe, mo motseng o e rileng a tshaba a bo a tswa mo go one.’ ”" 
Joshua20:7 Ba lomolola Keteše mo Galilea, mo lefatsheng la makgabana la Nafetali, le Shekeme mo lefatsheng la makgabana la Eferaime, le Kiriathe-areba (ke one Heberone) mo lefatsheng la makgabana la Juta." 
Joshua20:8 Kwa moseja ga Joretane fa Jeriko ntlheng ya botlhabatsatsi, ba tlhoma Besere o o mo nageng mo lobaleng, e le wa lotso lwa ga Rubene, le Ramothe mo Gileate e le wa lotso lwa ga Gate, le Golane mo Bašane e le wa lotso lwa ga Manase." 
Joshua20:9 Eo, ke yone metse e e laoletsweng bana botlhe ba Iseraele le moeng yo o jakileng mo go bone, gore le fa e le mang yo o bolayang motho ka matsheka, a tle a tshabele gone, a se ka a swa ka seatla sa mmusolosi wa madi, go tsamaya a ema fa pele ga phuthego." 
Joshua21:1 Foo ga atamela ditlhogo tsa Balefi tsa makgotla a borra batho, kwa go Eleasare moperesiti, le kwa go Jošua morwa Nune, le kwa ditlhogong tsa makgotla a borra batho, tsa ditso tsa bana ba Iseraele;" 
Joshua21:2 ba bua nabo mo Shilo mo lefatsheng la Kanana, ba re: “Jehofa o ne a laola ka Moše, gore ba re neye metse go aga mo go yone, e na le dintlhana, tsa yone.”" 
Joshua21:3 Bana ba Iseraele ba tsaya metse e, e na le dintlhana tsa yone, mo bosweng jwa bone, ba e naya Balefi, ka fa taolong ya ga Jehofa." 
Joshua21:4 Kabelo ya taolelo ya tswela ditshika tsa Bakohathe; bana ba ga Arone moperesiti, ba e leng ba Balefi, ba bona metse e le 13 ka taolelo ya bola, e tswa mo lotsong lwa Juta, le mo lotsong lwa Basimeone, le mo lotsong lwa Benjamine." 
Joshua21:5 Ba ba setseng ba bana ba ga Kohathe ba bona metse e le some ka taolelo ya bola, ya tswa mo ditshikeng tsa lotso lwa Eferaime, le mo lotsong lwa Dane, le mo go bontlhanngwe jwa lotso lwa Manase." 
Joshua21:6 Bana ba ga Gerešone ba bona metse e le 13 ka taolelo ya bola, ya tswa mo ditshikeng tsa lotso lwa Isakare le mo lotsong lwa Ašere le mo lotsong lwa Nafetali, le mo go bontlhanngwe jwa lotso lwa Manase mo Bašane." 
Joshua21:7 Bana ba ga Merari ka fa ditshikeng tsa bone ba bona metse e le 12 e tswa mo lotsong lwa Rubene, le mo lotsong lwa Gate, le mo lotsong lwa Sebulone." 
Joshua21:8 Bana ba Iseraele ba naya Balefi metse eo le dintlhana mo tikologong ya yone, ka taolelo ya bola, jaaka Jehofa a laotse ka Moše." 
Joshua21:9 Ba tsaya mo lotsong lwa bana ba Juta, le mo lotsong lwa bana ba Simeone, ba ba naya metse e e bolelwang fano ka maina;" 
Joshua21:10 ya nna ya bana ba ga Arone, ba ditshika tsa Bakohathe, ba e neng e le ba bana ba ga Lefi, gonne taolelo ya bola ya ntlha e le ya bone." 
Joshua21:11 Ba ba naya Kiriathe-areba, Areba yoo e ne e le rraagwe Anake, (ke one Heberone), mo lefatsheng la Juta la makgabana, ka dintlhana mo tikologong ya gone." 
Joshua21:12 Matlhagare a motse, le metsana ya one, ba go naya Kalebe morwa Jefune go nna boswa jwa gagwe." 
Joshua21:13 Heberone ba go naya bana ba ga Arone moperesiti, le dintlhana tsa one, motse wa botshabelo jwa mmolai wa motho le Libena le dintlhana tsa gone;" 
Joshua21:14 le Jatire le dintlhana tsa gone, le Ešetemoa le dintlhana tsa gone;" 
Joshua21:15 le Holone le dintlhana tsa gone, le Debire le dintlhana tsa gone;" 
Joshua21:16 le Aine le dintlhana tsa gone, le Juta le dintlhana tsa gone, le Bethešemeše le dintlhana tsa gone; metse e fera mongwe fela mo ditsong tse pedi tse." 
Joshua21:17 Mo lotsong lwa Benjamine ga tsewa Gibeone le dintlhana tsa gone; Geba le dintlhana tsa gone; 
Joshua21:18 Anathothe le dintlhana tsa teng; Alemone le dintlhana tsa teng; metse e le mene. 
Joshua21:19 Metse yotlhe ya bana ba ga Arone baperesiti, e ne e le metse e le 13 le dintlhana tsa yone." 
Joshua21:20 Ditshika tsa bana ba ga Kohathe, Balefi, e bong ba ba setseng ba bana ba ga Kohathe, ba bona metse ya kabelo ya taolelo ya bone mo lotsong lwa Eferaime." 
Joshua21:21 Ba ba naya Shekeme le dintlhana tsa teng mo lefatsheng la Eferaime la makgabana, motse wa botshabelo jwa mmolai wa motho, le Gesere le dintlhana tsa teng;" 
Joshua21:22 le Kibesaime le dintlhana tsa gone, le Bethehorone le dintlhana tsa gone; metse e le mene." 
Joshua21:23 Mo lotsong lwa Dane, Eleteke le dintlhana tsa teng, Gibethone le dintlhana tsa teng;" 
Joshua21:24 Aijalone le dintlhana tsa gone, Gatherimone le dintlhana tsa gone; metse e le mene." 
Joshua21:25 Mo go bontlhanngwe jwa lotso lwa Manase, Taanake le dintlhana tsa teng, le Gatherimone le dintlhana tsa teng; metse e le mebedi." 
Joshua21:26 Metse yotlhe ya ditshika tsa bana ba bangwe ba ga Kohathe e ne e le some le dintlhana tsa yone. 
Joshua21:27 Ba naya bana ba ga Gerešome le ba ditshika tsa Balefi, ba ba naya Golane mo Bašane, le dintlhana tsa teng, motse wa botshabelo jwa mmolai wa motho, e le wa bontlhanngwe jwa lotso lwa Manase; le Beešetera le dintlhana tsa teng; metse e le mabedi." 
Joshua21:28 Mo lotsong lwa Isakare, Kišione le dintlhana tsa gone, Daberathe le dintlhana tsa gone;" 
Joshua21:29 Jaremuthe le dintlhana tsa teng, Eneganime le dintlhana tsa teng; metse e le mene." 
Joshua21:30 Mo lotsong lwa Ašere, Mišale le dintlhana tsa teng, Abetone le dintlhana tsa teng;" 
Joshua21:31 Helekathe le dintlhana tsa gone, le Rehobe le dintlhana tsa gone; metse e le mene." 
Joshua21:32 Mo lotsong lwa Nafetali, Keteše mo Galilea, le dintlhana tsa teng, motse wa botshabelo jwa mmolai wa motho, le Hamothetore le dintlhana tsa teng, le Karetane le dintlhana tsa teng; metse e le meraro." 
Joshua21:33 Metse yotlhe ya Bagerešone ka fa ditshikeng tsa bone e ne e le metse e le 13, ka dintlhana tsa yone." 
Joshua21:34 Ditshika tsa bana ba ga Merari, ba ba setseng ba Balefi, mo lotsong lwa ga Sebulone ba newa Jokeneame le dintlhana tsa teng, le Kareta le dintlhana tsa teng." 
Joshua21:35 Dimena le dintlhana tsa gone, Nahalale le dintlhana tsa gone; metse e le mene." 
Joshua21:36 Mo lotsong lwa Rubene, Besere le dintlhana tsa gone, le Jahase le dintlhana tsa gone." 
Joshua21:37 Ketemothe le dintlhana tsa teng, le Mefaathe le dintlhana tsa teng; metse e le mene." 
Joshua21:38 Mo lotsong lwa ga Gate, Ramothe mo Gileate, le dintlhana tsa gone, motse wa botshabelo jwa mmolai wa motho, le Mahanaime le dintlhana tsa gone;" 
Joshua21:39 Hešebone le dintlhana tsa teng; Jasere le dintlhana tsa teng: metse e le mene fa e le mmogo. 
Joshua21:40 Metse eo yotlhe e ne e le metse ya bana ba ga Merari ka fa ditshikeng tsa bone, e bong ditshika tse di setseng tsa Balefi; kabelo ya taolelo ya bone e ne e le metse e le 12." 
Joshua21:41 Metse yotlhe ya Balefi, mo gare ga thuo ya bana ba Iseraele e ne e le metse e le 48 le dintlhana tsa yone." 
Joshua21:42 Metse eo yotlhe e ne e na le dintlhana tsa yone mo tikologong ya yone; go ne go ntse jalo le metse eo yotlhe fela. 
Joshua21:43 Jalo Jehofa a naya Iseraele lefatshe lotlhe le o ikanneng fa a tlaa le naya borraabo; mme ba le rua, ba aga mo go lone." 
Joshua21:44 Jehofa a ba naya boikhutso mo tikologong ya bone, jaaka tsotlhe tse o ne a di ikanetse borraabo; mme ga se ka ga ema motho ope wa baba ba bone botlhe fa pele ga bone; Jehofa a tsenya baba botlhe ba bone mo seatleng sa bone." 
Joshua21:45 Ga se ka ga tlhaela sepe sa se se molemo se Jehofa o ne a se buile le ntlo ya Iseraele; ga dirala gotlhe fela. 
Joshua22:1 Foo Jošua a bitsa Barubene, Bagate le bontlhanngwe jwa lotso lwa Manase, a ba raya a re:" 
Joshua22:2 “Lo ntse lo tshegeditse gotlhe mo Moše motlhanka wa ga Jehofa o go lo laoletseng, lo reeditse lentswe la me mo go tsotlhe tse ke di lo laoletseng." 
Joshua22:3 Malatsi a mantsi a lo ntse lo sa tlogele bana ba rraeno, nako e sa le eno, lo ntse lo tshegeditse tao ya taolo ya ga Jehofa Modimo wa lona." 
Joshua22:4 Jaana Jehofa Modimo wa lona o neile bana ba rraeno boikhutso, jaaka a buile nabo; ke gone jaana, menogang, lo yeng kwa megopeng ya lona, kwa lefatsheng la boswa jwa lona, le Moše motlhanka wa ga Jehofa o le lo neileng kwa moseja ga Joretane." 
Joshua22:5 Go le gosi fela lo tlhokomele thata go tshegetsa taolo le molao, o Moše motlhanka wa ga Jehofa o o lo laoletseng, go rata Jehofa Modimo wa lona, le go sepela mo ditseleng tsotlhe tsa gagwe, le go tshegetsa ditaolo tsa gagwe, go ngaparela ene, le go mo direla ka pelo yotlhe ya lona, le ka mowa otlhe wa lona.”" 
Joshua22:6 Jalo Jošua a ba segofatsa, a ba naya tsela ba tsamaya; ba ya kwa megopeng ya bone." 
Joshua22:7 Jaana ba bontlhanngwe jwa lotso lwa Manase, Moše o ne a ba neile boswa mo Bašane; bontlha e nngwe Jošua a bo naya boswa mo baneng ba ga rraabo moseja ga Joretane ka fa bophirimatsatsi. Gape e rile Jošua a ba naya tsela go boela megopeng ya bone a ba segofatsa." 
Joshua22:8 A bua nabo a re: “Boelang kwa megopeng ya lona ka khumo e kgolo, ka matlhape a le mantsi, ka selefera, ka gouta, ka kgotlho, ka tshipi, le ka diaparo di le dintsi; lo kgaogane thopo ya baba ba lona le bana ba rraeno.”" 
Joshua22:9 Bana ba ga Rubene, le bana ba ga Gate, le ba bontlhanngwe jwa lotso lwa Manase ba hulara, ba tloga mo baneng ba Iseraele kwa Shilo o o mo lefatsheng la Kanana, ba ya kwa lefatsheng la Gileate, ba ya kwa lefatsheng la boswa jwa bone le ba le ruileng, ka fa taolong ya ga Jehofa ka seatla sa ga Moše." 
Joshua22:10 E rile ba fitlha mo sebakeng sa lefatshe fa Joretane, se se mo lefatsheng la Kanana, bana ba ga Rubene, le bana ba ga Gate, le bontlhanngwe jwa lotso lwa Manase, ba aga sebeso gone fa Joretane, e le sebeso se segolo thata go bonwa." 
Joshua22:11 Mme bana ba Iseraele ba utlwa go twe: “Bonang, bana ba ga Rubene, le bana ba ga Gate, le bontlhanngwe jwa lotso lwa Manase, ba agile sebeso fa tshimologong ya lefatshe la Kanana, mo sebakeng sa lefatshe fa Joretane, ka fa ntlheng e e leng ya bana ba Iseraele.”" 
Joshua22:12 E rile bana ba Iseraele ba utlwa, phuthego yotlhe ya bana ba Iseraele ya phuthegela kwa Shilo, go ya go ba bololela ka ntwa." 
Joshua22:13 Bana ba Iseraele ba roma kwa baneng ba ga Rubene, le kwa baneng ba ga Gate, le kwa go bontlhanngwe jwa lotso lwa Manase, kwa lefatsheng la Gileate, ba roma Finease morwa Eleasare moperesiti;" 
Joshua22:14 a na le dikgosana di le some, kgosana nngwe fela ya kgotla ya rra lotso longwe le longwe lwa Iseraele; mongwe le mongwe wa bone e le tlhogo ya makgotla a borraabo mo ditshikeng tsa Iseraele." 
Joshua22:15 Ba tla ba fitlha mo baneng ba ga Rubene, le mo baneng ba ga Gate, le mo go bontlhanngwe jwa lotso lwa Manase, mo lefatsheng la Gileate, mme ba bua nabo, ba re:" 
Joshua22:16 “Phuthego yotlhe ya ga Jehofa e bua jaana, ya re: ‘Tlolo ya bo e le efe e lo e dirileng fa pele ga Modimo wa Iseraele, lo fapoga gompieno, lo kgaogana le go sala Jehofa morago, fa e bo ne ne lo ikagetse sebeso, go tla lo tsuololela Jehofa ka tsatsi leno." 
Joshua22:17 A tshiamololo ya ka ga Peore e re nnyefaletse, e le e re iseng re intlafatse mo go yone le gompieno, le fa go ne go tsile sebetso mo phuthegong yotlhe ya ga Jehofa," 
Joshua22:18 fa e tlaa bo jaana gompieno lo fapoga, lo kgaogana le go sala Jehofa morago? Go tlaa dirala go re, ka lo tsuololela Jehofa gompieno, e tlaa re ka moso a nne bogale le phuthego yotlhe ya Iseraele." 
Joshua22:19 Le fa go ntse jalo e ka re fa lefatshe la boswa jwa lona le itshekologile, foo lo kgabaganyetse kwano lefatsheng la boswa jwa ga Jehofa, le motlaagana wa ga Jehofa o agileng mo go lone, lo tseye boswa mo go rona; mme lo se ka lwa tsuololela Jehofa, le gone lo se ka lwa tsuololela rona, ka go ikagela sebeso kwa ntle ga sebeso sa ga Jehofa Modimo wa rona." 
Joshua22:20 Akane morwa Sera, a ga a dira tlolo mo selong se se neeletsweng, mme bogale iwa wela phuthego yotlhe ya bana ba Iseraele? Mme motho yoo ga a ka a swa a le esi mo tshiamololong ya gagwe.’ ”" 
Joshua22:21 Foo bana ba ga Rubene, le bana ba ga Gate, le ba bontlhanngwe jwa lotso lwa Manase ba fetola, ba bua le ditlhogo tsa ditshika tsa Iseraele, ba re:" 
Joshua22:22 “Jehofa, Modimo wa medimo, Jehofa, Modimo wa medimo, o a itse, Iseraele le ene o tlaa itse; fa e le ka go tsuolola, kgotsa fa e le ka go tlola fa pele ga Jehofa, o se ka wa re rekegela gompieno;" 
Joshua22:23 fa re ikagetse sebeso jalo, go tla re fapoga, re kgaogana le go sala Jehofa morago, kgotsa fa e le go tla re isa mo go sone tshupelo e e fisiwang, gongwe tshupelo ya boupe, kgotsa fa e le go tla re isa mo go sone ditlhabelo tsa ditshupelo tsa kagiso, a go lopiwe ke Jehofa ka esi;" 
Joshua22:24 bogolo fa selo se, re se ka ra se dira ka kelotlhoko, le ka megopolo, ra re: E ka tla ya re mo lobakeng lo lo tlang bana ba lona ba ka bua le bana ba rona, ba re: ‘Lona lo a bo lo dirang ka Jehofa Modimo wa Iseraele?’" 
Joshua22:25 Fa ba re: ‘Ka Jehofa a dirile Joretane molelwane fa gare ga rona le lona, e bong lona bana ba ga Rubene le bana ba ga Gate; ga lo na kabelo epe mo go Jehofa;’ foo bana ba lona ba khutlise bana ba rona jalo mo go boifeng Jehofa." 
Joshua22:26 Ke gone re rileng: Jaanong a re ipaakanyeng go ikagela sebeso, e seng sa tshupelo e e fisiwang, le fa e le sa tlhabelo;" 
Joshua22:27 mme e be e nne sesupo gare ga rona le lona, le gare ga dikokomana tsa rona morago ga rona, gore re tle re dire tirelo ya ga Jehofa fa pele ga gagwe, ka ditshupelo tsa rona tse di fisiwang, ka ditlhabelo tsa rona, le ka ditshupelo tsa rona tsa kagiso; gore bana ba lona ba se ka ba raya bana ba rona mo lobakeng lo lo tlang, ba re: ‘Ga lo na kabelo mo go Jehofa.’" 
Joshua22:28 Ke gone ka moo re rileng, go tlaa dirala go re mogang ba re rayang jalo, kgotsa ba raya dikokomana tsa rona mo lobakeng lo lo tlang, re tlaa re: ‘Bonang setshwano sa sebeso sa ga Jehofa se borraetsho ba se dirileng, e seng sa tshupelo e e fisiwang, le fa e le sa tlhabelo; ke sesupo fela gare ga rona le lona.’" 
Joshua22:29 A Modimo o ka ka wa re itsa gore re se ka ra tsuololela Jehofa, ra fapoga gompieno, ra kgaogana le go sala Jehofa morago, ra aga sebeso sa tshupelo e e fisiwang, le sa tshupelo ya boupe, kgotsa sa tlhabelo, kwa ntle ga sebeso sa ga Jehofa Modimo wa rona se se fa pele ga motlaagana wa gagwe.”" 
Joshua22:30 E rile Finease moperesiti a na le dikgosana tsa phuthego, e bong ditlhogo tsa ditshika tsa Iseraele, tse di nang nae, ba utlwa mafoko a bana ba ga Rubene le bana ba ga Gate le bana ba ga Manase ba a buileng, ga ba kgatlha thata." 
Joshua22:31 Finease morwa Eleasare moperesiti a raya bana ba ga Rubene le bana ba ga Gate, le bana ba ga Manase, a re: “Gompieno re a itse fa Jehofa a le mo gare ga rona, gonne ga lo a direla Jehofa tlolo eo; jaana lo golotse bana ba Iseraele mo seatleng sa ga Jehofa.”" 
Joshua22:32 Finease morwa Eleasare moperesiti, le dikgosana, ba boa mo baneng ba ga Rubene, le mo baneng ba ga Gate, kwa lefatsheng la Gileate, ba boela kwa lefatsheng la Kanana, kwa baneng ba Iseraele, ba ba ba ba leretse lefoko." 
Joshua22:33 Selo seo sa kgatlha bana ba Iseraele; mme bana ba Iseraele ba baka Modimo, ba se ka ba tlhola ba bua go re ba ba bololela ka ntwa, go ya go senya lefatshe le bana ba ga Rubene le bana ba ga Gate ba agileng mo go lone." 
Joshua22:34 Mme bana ba ga Rubene le bana ba ga Gate, ba raya sebeso se leina, ba re, Eta; gonne ba re: “Ke sesupo gare ga rona, fa Jehofa e le Modimo.”" 
Joshua23:1 Ga dirala e rile morago ga malatsi a le mantsi, Jehofa a sena go naya Iseraele boikhutso mo babeng ba bone mo tikologong ya bone, Jošua a bile a tsofetse, a le dinyaga dintsi;" 
Joshua23:2 Jošua a bitsa Baiseraele botlhe, a bitsa bagolwane ba bone, le ditlhogo tsa bone, le baatlhodi ba bone le bagogi ba bone, a ba raya a re: “Ke tsofetse, ke dinyaga di le dintsi." 
Joshua23:3 Lo bonye tsotlhe tse Jehofa Modimo wa lona o di diretseng merafe yotlhe e ka ntlha ya lona; gonne Jehofa Modimo wa lona ke ene yo o lo tlhabanetseng. 
Joshua23:4 Bonang, ke lo abetse ka taolelo merafe e, e e setseng, go nna boswa jwa ditso tsa lona, go simolola mo Joretane, go ya fela kwa lewatleng le legolo ntlheng ya bophirimatsatsi, e na le merafe yotlhe e ke e kgaotseng." 
Joshua23:5 Jehofa Modimo wa lona, ene o tlaa ba kgorometsa fa pele ga lona, o tlaa ba leleka ba tloga mo ponong ya lona; mme lo tlaa rua lefatshe la bone, jaaka Jehofa Modimo wa lona a buile le lona." 
Joshua23:6 Ke gone nnang pelokgale thata go tshegetsa le go dira tsotlhe tse di kwadilweng mo lokwalong lwa molao wa ga Moše, gore lo se ka lwa di fapoga lwa ya ka fa ntlheng ya letsogo le legolo kgotsa go la molema;" 
Joshua23:7 gore lo se ka lwa tlhakatlhakana le merafe e, e e setseng mo go lona; le fa e le go umaka maina a medimo ya yone, le fa e le go ikanisa batho ka yone, le fa e le go e direla, le fa e le go e ikobela;" 
Joshua23:8 mme ngapareleng Jehofa Modimo wa lona, jaaka lo dirile go tla mo tsatsing leno." 
Joshua23:9 Gonne Jehofa o lelekile merafe e megolo, e e thata, fa pele ga lona; mme ka ga lona, ga go ise go ko go eme motho ope fa pele ga lona, go tla mo tsatsing leno." 
Joshua23:10 Monna wa lona a le mongwe fela o tlaa leleka ba ba makgolo a le some; gonne Jehofa Modimo wa lona ke ene yo o lo tlhabanelang, jaaka a buile le lona." 
Joshua23:11 Ke gone lo itiseng thata, gore lo rate Jehofa Modimo wa lona." 
Joshua23:12 E tlaa re kgotsa fa gongwe lo ka boela kwa morago lwa ngaparela masalela a merafe e, e bong yone e e setseng mo go lona, lwa nyalana nabo, lwa tsena kwa go bone, le bone mo go lona;" 
Joshua23:13 lo bo lo itsetse ruri fa Jehofa Modimo wa lona a se ketla a tlhola a leleka merafe e, e tloga mo ponong ya lona; e tlaa nna serai le seru mo go lona, le thupa mo ditlhakoreng tsa lona, le mitlwa mo matlhong a lona go tsamaya lo nyelela lo tloga mo lefatsheng le le molemo, le Jehofa Modimo wa lona o le lo neileng." 
Joshua23:14 “Mme bonang, gompieno ke ya le tsela ya lefatshe lotlhe; mme lo a itse mo pelong tsa lona lotlhe, le mo meweng ya lona lotlhe, fa go se na sepe se se tlhaetseng sa dilo tsotlhe tse di molemo, tse Jehofa Modimo wa lona o di buileng ka ga lona; di lo dirafaletse tsotlhe, ga go a tlhaela sepe sa tsone." 
Joshua23:15 Go tlaa dirala go re, jaaka dilo tsotlhe tse di molemo di lo dirafaletse, tse Jehofa Modimo wa lona o buileng le lona ka ga tsone, jalo fela Jehofa o tlaa lere mo go lona dilo tsotlhe tse di bosula, go tsamaya a lo senya lo tloga mo lefatsheng le le molemo le Jehofa Modimo wa lona o le lo neileng." 
Joshua23:16 Mogang lo tlolang kgolagano ya ga Jehofa Modimo wa lona, e o e lo laeletseng, lo ya lo direla medimo e sele, lo e ikobela; foo bogale jwa ga Jehofa bo tlaa lo tukela, mme lo tlaa nyelela ka bonako, lo tloga mo lefatsheng le le molemo, le o le lo neileng.”" 
Joshua24:1 Jošua a phuthela ditso tsotlhe tsa Iseraele kwa Shekeme, a bitsa bagolwane ba Iseraele, le ditlhogo tsa bone, le baatlhodi ba bone, le bagogi ba bone; mme ba iponatsa fa pele ga Modimo." 
Joshua24:2 Jošua a raya batho botlhe, a re: “Jehofa Modimo wa Iseraele, o bua jaana, a re: ‘Borraeno gale ba ne ba agile kwa moseja ga Noka, e bong Tera, rraagwe Aberahame le rraagwe Nahore; ba direla medimo e sele." 
Joshua24:3 Ka tsaya rraeno Aberahame kwa moseja ga Noka, ka mo ralatsa lefatshe la Kanana, ka ntsifatsa losika lwa gagwe, ka mo naya Isake." 
Joshua24:4 Isake ka mo naya Jakobe le Esau; Esau ka mo naya thaba ya Seire go e rua; Jakobe ene le bana ba gagwe ba fologela kwa Egepeto. 
Joshua24:5 Ka roma Moše le Arone, ka betsa Egepeto, ka fa ke dirileng mo gare ga gone ka teng; morago ga mo ka lo ntsha gone." 
Joshua24:6 Ka ntsha borraeno mo Egepeto, lwa tla kwa lewatleng; Baegepeto ba konatelela borraeno ka dikara tsa tlhabano, le bapalami ba dipitse, go ya kwa Lewatleng le Lehibidu." 
Joshua24:7 E rile ba goela kwa go Jehofa, a baya lefifi gare ga lona le Baegepeto, a lere lewatle mo go bone, a ba khurumetsa; matlho a lona a bonye se ke se dirileng mo Egepeto; mme lwa aga mo nageng malatsi a le mantsi." 
Joshua24:8 Ka lo fitlhisa mo lefatsheng la Baamore, ba ba neng ba agile kwa moseja ga Joretane; mme ba tlhabana le lona; mme ka ba tsenya mo seatleng sa lona, lwa rua lefatshe la bone; ka ba senya fa pele ga lona." 
Joshua24:9 Foo Balake morwa Sipore, kgosi ya Moabe, a nanoga a tlhabana le Iseraele; a roma batho ba ya go bitsa Balaame morwa Beore, gore a tle go lo hutsa," 
Joshua24:10 mme ka gana go reetsa Balaame; ke gone ka moo a fela a ntse a lo segofatsa; ka lo golola mo seatleng sa gagwe. 
Joshua24:11 Lwa kgabaganya Joretane, lwa tla kwa Jeriko; mme banna ba Jeriko ba tlhabana le lona, Baamore, le Baperise, le Bakanana, le Bahite, le Bagiregaše, le Bahife le Bajebnuse; ka ba tsenya mo seatleng sa lona." 
Joshua24:12 Ka isa moruthwane fa pele ga lona, wa ba leleka fa pele ga lona, e bong dikgosi tse pedi tsa Baamore; e ne e se ka tšhaka ya gago, le fa e le ka bora jwa gago." 
Joshua24:13 Ka lo naya lefatshe le lo se kang lwa dira mo go lone, le metse e lo se kang lwa e aga, lo agile mo go yone; lo ja masimo a mafine, le masimo a matlhware a lo se kang lwa a tlhoma.’" 
Joshua24:14 “Ke gone jaana boifang Jehofa, lo mo direle ka mo go se nang boithamako, le ka boammaaruri; lo tlose medimo e borraeno ba ne ba e direla kwa moseja ga Noka, le mo Egepeto; mme lo direle Jehofa." 
Joshua24:15 Mme fa lo bona go le bosula go direla Jehofa, itshenkeleng gompieno yo lo tlaa mo direlang; le fa e le medimo e borraeno ba ne ba e direla, e e neng e le kwa moseja ga Noka, gongwe medimo ya Baamore, ba lefatshe la bone lo agileng mo go lone; mme ka ga me, le ba ntlo ya me, rona re tlaa direla Jehofa fela.”" 
Joshua24:16 Batho ba mo fetola, ba re: “A Modimo o ka ka wa re itsa gore re se ka ra latlha Jehofa, ra direla medimo e sele;" 
Joshua24:17 gonne Jehofa Modimo wa rona ke ene yo o re ntshitseng le borraetsho mo lefatsheng la Egepeto, mo ntlong ya botlhanka, ke ene yo o dirileng ditshupo tse dikgolo tseo mo ponong ya rona, a ba a re tlamela mo tseleng yotlhe, e re e tsamaileng, le mo bathong botlhe ba re raletseng gare ga bone." 
Joshua24:18 Jehofa a ba a leleka ditšhaba tsotlhe fa pele ga rona, e bong Baamore ba ba neng ba agile mo lefatsheng; ke gone ka moo le rona re tlaa direlang Jehofa, gonne ke ene Modimo wa rona.”" 
Joshua24:19 Mme Jošua a raya batho, a re: “Ga lo kake lwa direla Jehofa; gonne ke Modimo o o boitshepo; ke Modimo o o lefufa; ga o ketla o lo itshwarela ditlolo tsa lona, le fa e le maleo a lona." 
Joshua24:20 Fa lo latlha Jehofa, lo direla medimo e sele ya seeng, foo o tlaa retologa a lo direla bosula, a lo nyeletsa, a sena go lo direla molemo.”" 
Joshua24:21 Batho ba raya Jošua, ba re: “Nnyaa; go direla Jehofa, re tlaa mo direla.”" 
Joshua24:22 Jošua a raya batho, a re: “Lo basupi ka ga lona fa lo itshenketse Jehofa go mo direla.” Mme ba re: “Re basupi.”" 
Joshua24:23 A ba a re: “Ke gone jaana tlosang medimo e sele ya seeng e e mo go lona, lo sekegele Jehofa Modimo wa Iseraele dipelo tsa lona.”" 
Joshua24:24 Batho ba raya Jošua, ba re: “Re tlaa direla Jehofa Modimo wa rona, re tlaa reetsa lentswe la gagwe.”" 
Joshua24:25 Jalo Jošua a dira kgolagano le batho ka tsatsi leo, a ba beela tao, le taolo e e tlhomameng mo Shekeme." 
Joshua24:26 Jošua a kwala mafoko a mo lokwalong lwa molao wa Modimo; a tsaya lentswe le legolo, a le tlhoma teng fa tlase ga mooka o o neng o le fa felong ga boitshepo ga Jehofa." 
Joshua24:27 Jošua a raya batho botlhe, a re: “Bonang, lentswe le, le tlaa nna mosupi gare ga rona; gonne le utlwile mafoko otlhe a Jehofa o a buileng le rona; ke gone le tlaa nna mosupi ka ga lona, e se re kgotsa lwa itatola Modimo wa lona.”" 
Joshua24:28 Jalo Jošua a naya batho tsela, mongwe le mongwe go ya bosweng jwa gagwe." 
Joshua24:29 Ga dirala morago ga dilo tse, Jošua morwa Nune, motlhanka wa ga Jehofa, a swa a le botsofe jwa dinyaga di le 110." 
Joshua24:30 Ba mo fitlha mo molelwaneng wa boswa jwa gagwe mo Timenathesera, o o mo lefatsheng la makgabana la Eferaime, bopota thaba ya Gaaše ka fa ntlheng ya botsheka." 
Joshua24:31 Baiseraele ba direla Jehofa ka malatsi otlhe a ga Jošua, le ka malatsi otlhe a bagolwane ba ba tlogetsweng ke Jošua, ya bo e le ba ba itsileng tiro yotlhe ya ga Jehofa, e o ne a e diretse Iseraele." 
Joshua24:32 Marapo a ga Josefe, a bana ba Iseraele ba duleng nao kwa Egepeto, ba a fitlha mo Shekeme, mo sebateng sa lefatshe se Jakobe o kileng a se reka mo go bormorwa Hamore rra Shekeme ka dipapetlana tsa madi tse di lekgolo; mme sa nna boswa jwa bana ba ga Josefe." 
Joshua24:33 Le ene Eleasare morwa Arone a swa; mme ba mo fitlha mo thoteng ya ga Finehase morwawe, e o ne a e neilwe mo lefatsheng la makgabana la Eferaime." 
Judges1:1 Ga dirala e rile morago ga loso lwa ga Jošua, bana ba Iseraele ba botsa Jehofa ba re: “E mang yo o tlaa re etelelang pele go ya go tlhabana le Bakanana?”" 
Judges1:2 Mme Jehofa a re: “A go bolole Juta; bonang ke tsentse lefatshe mo seatleng sa gagwe.” 
Judges1:3 Juta a raya Simeone morwa rraagwe, a re: “Bolola le nna re ye kabelong ya taolelo ya me, re ye go tlhabana le Bakanana; le nna ke tlaa bolola nao re ya kabelong ya taolelo ya gago.” Mme Simeone a ya nae." 
Judges1:4 Juta a bolola; mme Jehofa a tsenya Bakanana le Baperise mo seatleng sa bone; ba kgemetha banna ba le 10 000 mo go bone mo Beseke. 
Judges1:5 Ba fitlhela Atoni-beseke mo Beseke; ba tlhabana nae, ba kgemetha Bakanana le Baperise." 
Judges1:6 Atoni-beseke a tshaba; mme ba mo konatelela, ba mo tshwara, ba mo kgaola menwana ya kgonotswe, le menwana e megolo ya dinao." 
Judges1:7 Atoni-beseke, a re: “Dikgosi di le 70 tse di kgaotsweng menwana ya kgonotswe, le menwana e megolo ya dinao, di kile tsa sela dijo tsa tsone fa tlase ga lomati lwa me lwa bojelo; jaaka ke dirile, Modimo o ntefeditse.” Mme ba mo isa Jerusalema, a ya a swela gone." 
Judges1:8 Bana ba Juta ba tlhasela Jerusalema, ba o thopa, ba o kgemetha ka bojetla jwa tšhaka, ba tshubela motse." 
Judges1:9 Morago ga moo bana ba Juta ba ya go tlhabana le Bakanana ba ba neng ba agile mo lefatsheng la makgabana, le kwa Borwa, le kwa lefatsheng le le kwa sehuting." 
Judges1:10 Mme Juta a bololela Bakanana ba ba agileng mo Heberone; (gale leina la Heberone e ne e le Kiriathe-areba); ba kgemetha Shešai le Ahimane le Talemai. 
Judges1:11 A tswa gone a bololela banni ba Debire; (gale leine la Debire e ne e le Kiriathe-sefere). 
Judges1:12 Kalebe a re: “Yo o kgemethang Kiriathe-sefere, a o thopa, ke tlaa mo naya morwadiake Akesa go nna mosadi wa gagwe.”" 
Judges1:13 Mme Otheniele morwa Kenase, monnaa Kalebe, a o thopa; mme a mo naya Akesa morwadie go nna mosadi wa gagwe." 
Judges1:14 Ga dirala ya re mosadi a tla kwa go ene, a mo tlhotlheletsa gore a lope rraagwe naga; mme a pagologa esela ya gagwe; mme Kalebe a mo raya, a re: “O batlang?”" 
Judges1:15 A mo raya, a re: “Nnaya lesego; e re ka o mpeile mo lefatsheng la Borwa, a ko o nneye metswedi ya metsi.” Mme Kalebe a mo naya metswedi ya godimo le metswedi ya tlase." 
Judges1:16 Bana ba Mokene, mogwagadia Moše, ba tswa mo motseng wa makolane, ba na le bana ba Juta, ba tlhatlogela kwa nageng ya Juta, bopota Arate ntlheng ya Borwa; ba ya ba aga le batho bao." 
Judges1:17 Juta a ya le Simeone morwa rraagwe, ba ya ba kgemetha Bakanana ba ba agileng mo Sefathe, ba o senyetsa ruri. Leina la motse le ne le bidiwa Horema." 
Judges1:18 Gape Juta a thopa Gasa le tikologo ya teng, le Ašekelone le tikologo ya teng, le Ekerone le tikologo ya teng." 
Judges1:19 Jehofa a bo a na le Juta; mme a leleka banni ba lefatshe la makgabana; gonne o na a retelelwa ke go leleka banni ba molapo, ka gonne ba na le dikara tsa tlhabano tsa tshipi." 
Judges1:20 Motse wa Heberone ba o naya Kalebe, jaaka Moše a ne a buile; mme a leleka gone bomorwa Anake ba bararo." 
Judges1:21 Mme bana ba Benjamine ba se ka ba leleka Bajebuse ba ba ntseng mo Jerusalema; Bajebuse ba sa le ba aga le bana ba Benjamine mo Jerusalema, nako e sa le eno." 
Judges1:22 Ba kgotla ya ga Josefe le bone ba bololela Bethele; Jehofa a bo a na nabo. 
Judges1:23 Ba kgotla ya ga Josefe ba roma batho ba ya go tlhola Bethele. (Gale leina la motse e ne e le Luse.) 
Judges1:24 Balebedi ba bona motho a tswa mo motseng, ba mo raya, ba re: “A ko o re kaele ka fa go tsenwang mo motseng ka gone, mme re tlaa go direla ka bopelonomi.”" 
Judges1:25 A ba supetsa fa go tsenwang motse gone, mme ba kgemetha motse ka bojetla jwa tšhaka; mme ba lesa monna yoo le botlhe ba losika lwa gagwe." 
Judges1:26 Monna yoo a ya lefatsheng la Bahite, a aga motse a o raya leina a re, Luse; le e leng lone leina la one le gompieno." 
Judges1:27 Manase a se ka a leleka banni ba Bethešeane le metse ya gone, le fa e le ba Taanake le metse ya teng, le fa e le banni ba Dore le metse ya gone, le fa e le banni ba Ibeleame le metse ya teng, le fa e le banni ba Megito le metse ya gone; mme Bakanana ba ganelela go aga mo lefatsheng leo." 
Judges1:28 Ga dirala e rile Iseraele a sena go nonofa a dirisa Bakanana tiro, a se ka a ba lelekela ruri." 
Judges1:29 Eferaime ga a ka a leleka Bakanana ba ba agileng mo Gesere; mme Bakanana ba aga mo Gesere mo gare ga bone. 
Judges1:30 Sebulone ga a ka a leleka banni ba Kiterone, le fa e le banni ba Nahalole; mme Bakanana ba aga mo gare ga bone, ba nna bakgethi." 
Judges1:31 Ašere ga a ka a leleka banni ba Ako, le fa e le banni ba Sitone, le fa e le ba Ahelabe, le fa e le ba Akesibe, le fa e le ba Heleba, le fa e le ba Afike, le fa e le ba Rehobe;" 
Judges1:32 mme Baašere ba aga mo gare ga Bakanana, banni ba lefatshe; gonne ba se ka ba ba leleka." 
Judges1:33 Nafetali ga a ka a leleka banni ba Bethešemeše, le fa e le banni ba Bethanathe; mme ba aga mo gare ga Bakanana, banni ba lefatshe; le fa go ntse jalo banni ba Bethešemeše le banni ba Bethanathe ba nna bakgethedi ba bone." 
Judges1:34 Baamore ba patikelela bana ba Dane mo lefatsheng la makgabana, gonne ba se ka ba ba leseletsa go fologela mo molapong." 
Judges1:35 Baamore ba ganelela go aga mo thabeng ya Herese, mo Aijalone, le mo Shaalebime; mme le fa go ntse jalo letsogo la ba kgotla ya ga Josefe la fenya, mme ba nna bakgethi." 
Judges1:36 Molelwane wa Baamore wa simolola fa botlhatlogong jwa Akerabime, go tswa letlapeng go ya kwa godimo." 
Judges2:1 Moengele wa ga Jehofa a tswa kwa Gilegale a tla mo Bokime. A re: “Ke ne ka lo ntsha mo Egepeto, ke lo lerile mo lefatsheng le ke le ikanetseng borraeno; ke rile: ‘Ga nketla ke kgaogana le kgolagano ya me le lona ka gope;’" 
Judges2:2 ka ba ka re, ‘lo se ka lwa dira kgolagano epe le banni ba lefatshe leno; lo rutle dibeso tsa bone;’ mme ga lo a ka lwa reetsa lentswe la me; ana lo dirile jalo ka ntlha yang?"
