1Samuel12:3 Ke nna yono; supang ka ga me fa pele ga Jehofa le fa pele ga Motlodiwa wa gagwe; ke gapetse mang kgomo? Kgotsa ke gapetse mang esela? Kgotsa ke tsieditse mang? Kgotsa ke patikile mang? Kgotsa ke tshotse mo go mang tuelo ya gore ke iphoufatse ka yone? Mme ke tlaa e busetsa kwa go lona.” 
1Samuel12:4 Ba re: “Ga o a re tsietsa le fa e le go re patika, le gone ga o a tsaya sepe mo seatleng sa ope.”" 
1Samuel12:5 A ba raya a re: “Jehofa ke mosupi ka ga lona, motlodiwa wa gagwe le ene ke mosupi monomotlha, fa lo sa bone sepe mo seatleng sa me.” Mme ba re: “Ee, o mosupi.”" 
1Samuel12:6 Samuele a raya batho a re: “Ke Jehofa yo o ne a tlhoma Moše le Arone, a ntsha borraa lona mo lefatsheng la Egepeto." 
1Samuel12:7 Ke gone jaana, emang fela, gore ke ganetsanye le lona fa pele ga Jehofa ka ga ditiro tsotlhe tsa tshiamo tsa Jehofa, tse o di diretseng lona le borraa lona." 
1Samuel12:8 E rile Jakobe a sena go fitlha mo Egepeto, borraa lona ba goela kwa go Jehofa, foo Jehofa a roma Moše le Arone, ba ba ntshitseng borraa lona mo Egepeto ba ba agisa mo felong fa." 
1Samuel12:9 Mme ba tloga ba lebala Jehofa Modimo wa bone, a ba rekisetsa mo seatleng sa ga Sisera, molaodi wa ntwa ya ga Hasore, le mo seatleng sa Bafilisitia, le mo seatleng sa kgosi ya Moabe, ba tlhabana nabo." 
1Samuel12:10 Mme ba goela kwa go Jehofa ba re: ‘Re leofile ka re latlhile Jehofa, re bile re diretse boBaale le boAšetarothe. Re golole mo seatleng sa baba ba rona, mme re tlaa go direla.’" 
1Samuel12:11 Mme Jehofa a roma Jerubaale, le Betane, le Jefetha, le Samuele, a lo golola mo seatleng sa baba ba lona mo ntlheng tsotlhe, lwa aga ka thagamo." 
1Samuel12:12 E rile lo bona fa Nahaše kgosi ya bana ba ga Amone a lo bololetse lwa nthaya lwa re: ‘Nnyaa, mma re busiwe ke kgosi;’ le mororo Jehofa Modimo wa lona e ne e le ene kgosi ya lona." 
1Samuel12:13 “Mme jaana bonang kgosi e lo e itshenketseng, e lo e lopileng; bonang, Jehofa o lo tlhometse kgosi." 
1Samuel12:14 E tlaa re fa lo boifa Jehofa, lo mo direla, lo reetsa lentswe la gagwe, lo sa tsuololele taolo ya ga Jehofa, fa lona le kgosi e e lo busang lo sala Jehofa Modimo wa lona morago, go tlaa nna molemo." 
1Samuel12:15 Mme fa lo gana go reetsa lentswe la ga Jehofa, lo tsuololela taolo ya ga Jehofa, foo seatla sa Jehofa se tlaa tlhabana le lona, jaaka se tlhabana le borraa lona." 
1Samuel12:16 Ke gone jaana emang fela, lo bone selo se segolo se, se Jehofa o tlaa se dirang fa pele ga matlho a lona." 
1Samuel12:17 A ga se thobo ya mabele a masesane gompieno? Ke tlaa biletsa kwa go Jehofa, gore a lere tumo ya maru le pula; mme lo tlaa itse, lo bo lo bona fa boikepo jwa lona bo le bogolo, jo lo bo dirileng mo ponong ya ga Jehofa ka go lopa kgosi.”" 
1Samuel12:18 Jalo Samuele a biletsa kwa go Jehofa; mme Jehofa a tlisa tumo ya maru le pula ka tsatsi leo; mme batho botlhe ba boifa Jehofa le Samuele thata. 
1Samuel12:19 Batho botlhe ba raya Samuele ba re: “Rapelela batlhanka ba gago mo go Jehofa Modimo wa gago, gore re se swe; gonne re okeditse maleo otlhe a rona ka bosula jo, jwa go lopa kgosi.”" 
1Samuel12:20 Samuele a raya batho a re: “Se boifeng; ruri lo dirile bosula jotlhe jo; le fa go ntse jalo, lo se ka lwa fapoga mo go saleng Jehofa morago; lo direleng Jehofa ka pelo yotlhe ya lona." 
1Samuel12:21 Le gone lo se ka lwa fapoga, gonne foo lo ne lo tlaa ba lo latela dilo tsa lefela fela, tse di sa ka keng tsa thusa le fa e le go golola, gonne di lefela fela." 
1Samuel12:22 Gone Jehofa ga a ketla a latlha batho ba gagwe ka ntlha ya leina la gagwe le legolo, ka gobo go kgatlhile Jehofa go lo itirela tšhaba ya gagwe ka esi." 
1Samuel12:23 Gape ka ga me, a go nne kgakala le nna go leofela Jehofa ka go bakela go lo rapelela; ke tlaa lo ruta tsela e e molemo, le e e siameng." 
1Samuel12:24 Boifang Jehofa fela, lo mo direle ka boammaaruri, ka pelo yotlhe ya lona; lo gopole go re, dilo dikgolo jang tse o di lo diretseng." 
1Samuel12:25 Mme e tlaa re fa lo ntse lo ikepa lo tlaa nyelediwa, lona le kgosi ya lona.”" 
1Samuel13:1 Saule o rile a simolola go busa a bo a le dinyaga di le 30; a busa Iseraele ka dinyaga di le pedi. 
1Samuel13:2 Mme Saule a itshenkela banna ba Iseraele ba le 3 000; ba 2 000 a bone ba nna le Saule mo Mikemaša, le mo thabeng ya Bethele; ba le 1 000 ba nna le Jonathane mo Gibea wa Benjamine; batho ba bangwe a ba naya tsela, mongwe le mongwe a ya mogopeng wa gagwe." 
1Samuel13:3 Jonathane a kgemetha setlhopha sa masole a Bafilisitia se se mo Gibea, mme Bafilisitia ba utlwa. Saule a leletsa lonaka mo lefatsheng lotlhe a re: “A Bahebere ba utlwe.”" 
1Samuel13:4 Baiseraele botlhe ba utlwa go twe, Saule o kgemethile setlhopha sa masole a Bafilisitia, le gone fa Baiseraele ba nkgela Bafilisitia sebodu. Batho ba ne ba phuthegetse mmogo kwa Gilegale ba setse Saule morago." 
1Samuel13:5 Bafilisitia ba phuthega ba tla go tlhabana le Iseraele, ba le dikara tsa tlhabano di le 30 000, le bapalama dipitse ba le 6 000, le batho ba le bantsi jaaka mošawa o o fa losing lwa lewatle; ba tlhatloga, ba thibelela mo Mikemaša go pota Bethafene ka fa botlhabatsatsi." 
1Samuel13:6 E rile banna ba Iseraele ba bona fa ba le mo pitlaganong, (ka batho ba ne ba tlaletswe), foo ba iphitlha mo dikgageng le mo dikgweng, le mo mafikeng, le mo mesimeng, le mo mekoleng." 
1Samuel13:7 Jaana bangwe ba Bahebere ba ne ba kgabagantse Joretane ba ile lefatsheng la Gate le Gileate; Saule ene a bo a sa ntse a le mo Gilegale, mme batho botlhe ba mo setse morago ba roroma." 
1Samuel13:8 A tlhola malatsi a supa, ka fa lobakeng lo lo laotsweng ke Samuele; mme Samuele a se ke a tla mo Gilegale, batho ba bo ba mo phatlalaletse." 
1Samuel13:9 Saule a re: “Lereng kwano go nna tshupelo e e fisiwang, le ditshupelo tsa kagiso.” A isa tshupelo e e fisiwang." 
1Samuel13:10 Ga dirala ya re a sena go fetsa go isa tshupelo e e fisiwang, bonang, Samuele a tla; mme Saule a tswa a ya go mo kgatlhantsha gore a mo dumedise." 
1Samuel13:11 Samuele a re: “O dirile eng?” Saule a re: “Ke ka gonne ka bona fa batho ba mphatlalaletse, le gore, wena o sa tle ka malatsi a a kailweng, le gore gape, Bafilisitia ba phuthegela mmogo mo Mikemaša;" 
1Samuel13:12 ke gone ke buileng ka re: ‘Jaanong Bafilisitia ba tlaa ntshologela kwa Gilegale,’ mme ka bo ke ise ke rapele Jehofa ke lope tlhogonolofatso; ke gone ka moo ka ipatelela, ka isa tshupelo e e fisiwang.”" 
1Samuel13:13 Samuele a raya Saule a re: “O dirile boeleele; ga o a tshegetsa taolo ya ga Jehofa Modimo wa gago, e o e go laoletseng; ka gobo jaana Jehofa o ka bo a go tlhomamiseditse bogosi mo Iseraele ka bosakhutleng." 
1Samuel13:14 Mme jaanong bogosi jwa gago ga bo ketla bo nnela ruri. Jehofa o itshenketse monna yo o ntseng ka fa pelong ya gagwe; e bile Jehofa o mo laoletse go nna kgosana ya batho ba gagwe, ka o ne o se ka wa tshegetsa se Jehofa o se go laoletseng.”" 
1Samuel13:15 Samuele a nanoga, a tswa Gilegale, a ya Gibea wa Benjamine. Saule a bala batho ba ba bonwang fa go ene, ba nna e ka ne e le banna ba ba 600." 
1Samuel13:16 Saule le Jonathane morwawe, le batho ba ba bonwang fa go bone, ba nna mo Gibea wa Benjamine; Bafilisitia ba thibelela mo Mikemaša." 
1Samuel13:17 Ba ba tsamayang bonokwane ba tswa mo bothibelelong jwa Bafilisitia ba le masomo mararo; lesomo lengwe la menogela kwa tseleng e e yang Ofera, kwa lefatsheng la Shuale," 
1Samuel13:18 le lengwe la menogela kwa tseleng e e yang Bethehorone, le lengwe la menogela tseleng e e yang molelwaneng o o okameng molapo wa Seboime, ntlheng ya naga." 
1Samuel13:19 Jaana go ne go sa bonwe mothudi ope go ya le lefatshe lotlhe la Iseraele; ka Bafilisitia ba rile: “Bahebere ba ka tla ba ithulela ditšhaka le marumo.” 
1Samuel13:20 Baiseraele botlhe ba ne ba tle ba ye kwa go Bafilisitia, mongwe le mongwe a ye go batola mogoma wa gagwe, le mohana wa gagwe, le selepe sa gagwe, le kepu ya gagwe." 
1Samuel13:21 Le fa go ntse jalo ba ne ba na le ditootso tsa go lootsa dikepu, le mehana, le ditlhabo tse di maphata, le dilepe, le go baakanya ditlhabi." 
1Samuel13:22 Jalo ga dirala ya re mo letsatsing la tlhabano ga se ka ga fitlhelwa tšhaka, le fa e le lerumo mo seatleng sa ope wa batho ba ba nang le Saule le Jonathane; mme mo go Saule le Jonathane morwawe tsa fitlhelwa." 
1Samuel13:23 Mme setlhopha sa masole a Bafilisitia sa tswela kwa phateng ya Mikemaša. 
1Samuel14:1 Jaana ga dirala ya re ka tsatsi lengwe Jonathane, morwa Saule, a raya lekau le le mo tsholelang dibolao tsa gagwe a re: “Ntlo, a re kgabaganyetse kwa setlhopheng sa masole a Bafilisitia se se kwa moseja.” Mme a se ka a bolelela rraagwe." 
1Samuel14:2 Saule a nna kwa sekhutlong sa Gibea fa tlase ga setlhare sa mogaranata se se mo Migerone; batho ba o ne a na nabo ya bo e ka ne e le ba ba 600; 
1Samuel14:3 le Ahija, morwa Ahitube, mogoloa Ikabote, morwa Finease morwa Eli, moperesiti wa ga Jehofa mo Shilo, a apere sekhutlana. Batho ba bo ba sa itse fa Jonathane a tsamaile." 
1Samuel14:4 Fa gare ga diphata tse Jonathane o batlang go kgabaganyetsa kwa setlhopheng sa masole a Bafilisitia ka tsone, ga bo go le lefika le le dikgaga ka fa ntlheng nngwe, le lefika le le dikgaga ka fa ntlheng e nngwe; leina la lengwe e ne e le Bosese, le leina la le lengwe Sene." 
1Samuel14:5 Lefika le lengwe la bo le eme ka fa ntlheng ya botsheka fa pele ga Mikemaša, le lengwe ntlheng ya borwa fa pele ga Geba." 
1Samuel14:6 Jonathane a raya lekau le le mo tsholelang dibolao tsa gagwe, a re: “Ntlo, a re kgabaganyetse kwa setlhopheng sa ba ba sa rupang bale; e ka tla ya re gongwe Jehofa a re direla, gonne Jehofa ga a kgorelediwe go boloka ka bontsi le fa e le ka bobotlana.”" 
1Samuel14:7 Motshola dibolao tsa gagwe a mo raya a re: “Dira gotlhe mo go mo pelong ya gago; fapoga fela, bona, ke na nao ka fa pelong ya gago.”" 
1Samuel14:8 Foo Jonathane a re: “Bona, re tlaa kgabaganyetsa kwa banneng bale, mme re tlaa ba itshenolela." 
1Samuel14:9 E tlaa re fa ba re raya ba re re eme gore ba tle kwa go rona, foo re tlaa ema felong ga rona, re sa ye kwa go bone." 
1Samuel14:10 Mme fa ba re raya ba re: ‘Tlhatlogelang kwano go rona’; foo re tlaa tlhatloga; gonne Jehofa o tlaa bo a ba tsentse mo seatleng sa rona; se e tlaa nna sesupo go rona.” 
1Samuel14:11 Mme ba itshenolela setlhopha sa masole a Bifilisitia ka bobedi jwa bone; Bafilisitia ba re: “Bonang, Bahebere ba tswa mo mesimeng kwa ba ne ba iphitlhule gone.”" 
1Samuel14:12 Banna ba setlhopha sa masole ba fetola Jonathane le motshola dibolao tsa gagwe ba re: “Tlhatlogelang kwano go rona, re tlaa lo supetsa sengwe.” Jonathane a raya motshola dibolao tsa gagwe a re: “Tlhatloga morago ga me, gonne Jehofa o ba tsentse mo seatleng sa Iseraele.”" 
1Samuel14:13 Jonathane a palama ka diatla le dinao, le motshola dibolao tsa gagwe morago ga gagwe. Mme ba wa fa pele ga Jonathane; motshola dibolao tsa gagwe a ba fofotsa fa morago ga gagwe." 
1Samuel14:14 Polao eo ya ntlha e Jonathane le motshola dibolao tsa gagwe ba ne ba e dira, e ne e le ya batho e ka ne e le 20, mo sebakeng se se kanang ka ntlhanngwe ya tema ya dikgomo." 
1Samuel14:15 Ga bo go le thoromo mo bothibelelong, mo nageng, le mo bathong botlhe; ba setlhopha sa masole, le ba bonokwane le bone ba roroma; lefatshe la reketla; ga nna thoromo e kgolo thata." 
1Samuel14:16 Balebedi ba ga Saule mo Gibea wa Benjamine ba leba; mme bonang, bontsi jwa bo bo swalala, ba falalela kwa le kwa." 
1Samuel14:17 Foo Saule a raya batho ba o ne a na nabo a re: “Balang jaana, lo bone yo o duleng mo go rona.” E rile ba sena go bala, bonang, Jonathane le motshola dibolao tsa gagwe ba bo ba seyo." 
1Samuel14:18 Saule a raya Ahija a re: “Lere kwano letlole la Modimo.” Gonne letlole la Modimo le ne le le gone ka baka loo le na le bana ba Iseraele. 
1Samuel14:19 Ga dirala ya re Saule a sa ntse a bua le moperesiti, pheretlho e e mo bothibelelong jwa Bafilisitia ya tswelela ya gola; Saule a raya moperesiti a re: “Gona letsogo la gago.”" 
1Samuel14:20 Saule le batho botlhe ba o nang nabo ba phuthega mmogo, ba tla tlhabanong, mme bonang, tšhaka ya motho mongwe le mongwe ya ekelwa mongwe ka ene, ga nna pheretlhego e kgolo thata." 
1Samuel14:21 Jaana Bahebere ba ba ntseng le Bafilisitia gale, ba ba ileng nabo mo bothibelelong ba tswa mo lefatsheng mo tikologong; le bone ba retologa ba ya go pata Baiseraele, ba ba nang le Saule le Jonathane." 
1Samuel14:22 Le bone batho botlhe ba Iseraele ba ba iphitlhileng mo lefatsheng la Eferaime la makgabana, e rile ba utlwa fa Bafilisitia ba tshabile, le bone ba bakonatelela ka thata mo tlhabanong." 
1Samuel14:23 Jalo Jehofa a golola Iseraele ka tsatsi leo; mme tlhabano ya kgabaganya ka fa Bethafene. 
1Samuel14:24 Batho ba Iseraele ba ne ba pitlagana ka tsatsi leo, gonne Saule a ne a ikanisa batho a re: “Go hutsege motho yo o tlaa jang dijo go ya maitseboeng, go tsamaya ke itefetsa mo babeng ba me.” Jalo go se ka ga nna le ope mo bathong botlhe yo o utlwang dijo." 
1Samuel14:25 Batho botlhe ba tla mo sekgweng, mme ga bo go le dinotshe fa fatshe." 
1Samuel14:26 E rile batho ba tla mo sekgweng, bonang, dinotshe tsa bo di rotha, ope a se ka a isa letsogo mo ganong; gonne batho ba boifa ikano." 
1Samuel14:27 Jonathane ga a ka a utlwa rraagwe a laya batho ka ikano eo; ka ntlha ya gone moo a ntsha thupa e e mo seatleng sa gagwe, a e tsenya mo lomepeng lwa dinotshe, a isa letsogo mo ganong; mme matlho a gagwe a bonesega." 
1Samuel14:28 Foo mongwe wa batho a bua a re: “Rraago o ne a laya ka thata ka ikano a re: ‘Go hutsege motho yo o tlaa jang dijo gompieno.’ Mme batho ba ne ba lapile.” 
1Samuel14:29 Foo Jonathane a re: “Rre o tshwentse lefatshe; a ko lo bone jaaka matlho a me a bonesitswe, ka ke utlwile go le gonnyennyane ga dinotshe tse." 
1Samuel14:30 Go ne go tlaa nna molemo bogolo jang fa batho ba ka bo ba jele thopo ya baba ba bone gompieno e ba e fitlhetseng, ka e le fa polao mo Bafilisiteng e ka bo e nnile kgolo thata.”" 
1Samuel14:31 Ba bolaya Bafilisitia ka tsatsi leo go tswa Mikemaša go ya Aijalone. Batho ba ne ba lapile thata. 
1Samuel14:32 Batho ba phomegela thopo, ba gapa dinku, dikgomo, le dinamane, ba di bolaela fela fa fatshe; mme batho ba di jela le madi a tsone." 
1Samuel14:33 Foo ba bolelela Saule ba re: “Bona, batho ba leofela Jehofa ka ba jela le madi.” Mme a re: “Lo dirile ka bonongwane; hidikololelang lentswe le legolo kwano go nna gompieno.”" 
1Samuel14:34 Saule a re: “Phatlalalelang mo bathong lo ba reye lo re: ‘A mongwe le mongwe a nteretse kgomo ya gagwe, le mongwe le mongwe nku ya gagwe, lo di bolaele fa, lo je; lo se ka lwa leofela Jehofa ka go jela le madi.’ ” Batho botlhe, mongwe le mongwe a tla le kgomo ya gagwe bosigo joo, ba di bolaela gone." 
1Samuel14:35 Saule a agela Jehofa sebeso; ya bo e le sone sebeso sa ntlha se o se agetseng Jehofa. 
1Samuel14:36 Saule a re: “A re fologeng re lateleng Bafilisitia bosigo, re ba thopeng go ya boseng, mme re se ka ra tlogela motho ope wa bone.” Ba re: “Dira se o se bonang se le molemo, le fa e ka bo e le eng.” Foo moperesiti a re: “A re atameleng kwano Modimong.”" 
1Samuel14:37 Saule a lopa kgakololo mo Modimong a re: “A ke ke fologe ke latele Bafilisitia? A o tlaa ba tsenya mo seatleng sa Baiseraele?” Mme ga o a ka wa mo fetola ka tsatsi leo. 
1Samuel14:38 Saule a re: “Atamelang kwano lona bagolwane lotlhe ba batho, lo itse, lo bo lo bone kwa boleo jo bo ne bo le gone gompieno." 
1Samuel14:39 Gonne jaaka Jehofa a tshedile, yo o gololang Iseraele, le fa bo ka ne bo le mo go Jonathane morwaake, ruri o tlaa swa.” Mme go ne go se motho ope mo bathong botlhe yo o mo fetolang." 
1Samuel14:40 Foo a raya Baiseraele botlhe a re: “Lona lo nneng ntlheng nngwe, nna le Jonathane morwaake re tlaa nna ntlheng e nngwe.” Batho ba raya Saule ba re: “Dira se o se bonang se le molemo.”" 
1Samuel14:41 Ke gone Saule a raya Jehofa Modimo wa Iseraele a re: “Supa tshiamo.” Mme Jonathane le Saule ba tlhaolwa ke bola, mme batho bone ba falola." 
1Samuel14:42 Saule a re: “Thelang bola gare ga me le Jonathane morwaake.” Mme Jonathane a tlhaolwa. 
1Samuel14:43 Foo Saule a raya Jonathane a re: “Mpolelela se o se dirileng,” Jonathane a mmolelela a re: “Ruri ka utlwa dinotshenyana ka ntlha ya thupa e e neng e le mo seatleng sa me; mme bona, ke na le go swa fela.”" 
1Samuel14:44 Saule a re: “A Modimo o dire jalo le go feta foo; gonne ruri o tlaa swa, Jonathane.”" 
1Samuel14:45 Mme batho ba raya Saule ba re: “A Jonathane o tlaa swa, yo o dirileng kgololo e kgolo e mo Iseraele? A go se nne jalo; jaaka Jehofa a tshedile, ga go ketla go wela moriri le fa e le o le mongwe fela wa tlhogo ya gagwe fa fatshe; gonne o dirile le Modimo gompieno.” Mme batho ba rekolola Jonathane gore a se swe." 
1Samuel14:46 Foo Saule a tlhatloga a lesa go latela Bafilisitia; mme Bafilisitia ba ya magabone. 
1Samuel14:47 Jaana e rile Saule a sena go tsaya bogosi jwa Iseraele, a tlhabana le baba ba gagwe botlhe mo ntlheng tsotlhe, e bong le Moabe, le bana ba Amone, le Etome, le dikgosi tsa Soba, le Bafilisitia; mme gongwe le gongwe kwa o retologelang gone, a ba tshwenye." 
1Samuel14:48 A dira ka bopelokgale, a kgemetha Baamaleke, a golola Iseraele mo seatleng sa bone ba ba ba thopang." 
1Samuel14:49 Jaana bomorwa Saule e ne e le Jonathane, le Išifi, le Melekišue; maina a bomorwadie ba babedi e ne e le a: Leina la wa ntlha e le Merabe, leina la yo mmotlana Mikale." 
1Samuel14:50 Leina la mosadi wa ga Saule e ne e le Ahinoame morwadia Ahimaase. Leina la molaodi wa ntwa ya gagwe, e le Abenere morwa Nere, rrangwanaagwe Saule." 
1Samuel14:51 Kiše e ne e le rraagwe Saule; mme Nere rra Abenere e le morwa Abiele. 
1Samuel14:52 Go ne go le ntwa e e botlhoko le Bafilisitia ka metlha yotlhe ya ga Saule; mme e ne e tle e re Saule a bona motho yo o senatla, kgotsa motho yo o pelokgale, a mo itseele a ye kwa go ene." 
1Samuel15:1 Samuele a raya Saule a re: “Jehofa o ne a nthoma gore ke go tlotse, gore o nne kgosi ya tšhaba ya gagwe, ya Baiseraele; ke gone jaana, reetsa lentswe le mafoko a ga Jehofa." 
1Samuel15:2 Jehofa wa masomosomo o bua jaana a re: ‘Ke tlhokometse se Baamaleke ba kileng ba se direla Baiseraele, jaaka e rile ba tswa kwa Egepeto ba ba kganela mo tseleng." 
1Samuel15:3 Jaana ya o bolaye Baamaleke, o bo o senyetse ruri tsotlhe tse ba nang natso, o se ka wa ba rekegela; o bolaye monna le mosadi, ngwanyana le yo o anyang, kgomo le nku, kamela le esela.’ ”" 
1Samuel15:4 Saule a phutha batho, a ba bala mo Telaime, ba dinao ba le 200 000, le banna ba Juta ba le 10 000." 
1Samuel15:5 Saule a tla kwa motseng wa Baamaleke, a o lalela mo molapong." 
1Samuel15:6 Saule a raya Bakene a re: “Tsamayang, lo tloge mo gare ga Baamaleke, nka tla ka lo senya nabo; ka e rile bana ba Iseraele ba tswa Egepeto lwa ba direla ka pelonomi.” Bakene ba tsamaya ba tswa mo go Baameleke." 
1Samuel15:7 Saule a kgemetha Baamaleke, go tswa kwa Hafila jaaka fa motho a ya Shure, o o lebaganyeng le Egepeto." 
1Samuel15:8 Agage kgosi ya Baamaleke a mo tshwara fela a tshedile, batho botlhe a ba senyetsa ruri ka bogale jwa tšhaka." 
1Samuel15:9 Mme Saule le batho ba rekegela Agage, le dinku tse di tlhophegileng, le ga dikgomo, le ga tse di mahura, le dikwanyana, le tsotlhe tse di molemo, ba gana go di senyetsa ruri; dilo tsotlhe tse di maswe le tse di malolo, tseo ba di senyetsa ruri." 
1Samuel15:10 Foo ga tla lefoko la Jehofa kwa go Samuele la re: 
1Samuel15:11 “Ke a ikwatlhaya ka ke beile Saule kgosi; gonne o boile mo go ntshaleng morago, ga a a dira ditaolo tsa me.” Mme Samuele a nna bogale; a lala a goela kwa go Jehofa bosigo jotlhe." 
1Samuel15:12 Samuele a phakela a ya go kgatlhantsha Saule; ga bolelelwa Samuele ga twe: “Saule o ne a tsile mo Karemele, mme bona, o itlhometse sefikantswe sa segopodiso, mme a dikologa, a feta, o fologetse kwa Gilegale.”" 
1Samuel15:13 Samuele a tla kwa go Saule, mme Saule a mo raya a re: “O segofadiwe ke Jehofa; ke dirile taolo ya ga Jehofa.”" 
1Samuel15:14 Samuele a re: “Ana go lela ga dinku mo tsebeng tsa me, le go lela ga dikgomo mo ke go utlwang go kayang?”" 
1Samuel15:15 Saule a re: “Ba tswa go di tsaya mo go Baamaleke; gonne batho ba rekegetse dinku tse di tlhophegileng le ga dikgomo, go tla ba isetsa Jehofa Modimo wa gago tlhabelo; tse dingwe re di senyeditse ruri.”" 
1Samuel15:16 Foo Samuele a raya Saule a re: “Baya pelo, ke tlaa go bolelela se Jehofa o letseng a se bua le nna bosigo jono.” A mo raya a re: “Bua.”" 
1Samuel15:17 Samuele a re: “Le fa o ne o le mmotlana mo matlhong a gago, a ga o a bewa tlhogo ya ditso tsa Iseraele? Jehofa a ba a go tlotsa, gore o nne kgosi ya Iseraele." 
1Samuel15:18 Jehofa a go roma go ya loetong a re: ‘Ya o senyetse ruri baleofi bao, e bong Baamaleke, o bo o tlhabane nabo go tle go tsamaye ba nyelele.’" 
1Samuel15:19 Ke ka ntlha yang o se ka wa akela lentswe la ga Jehofa, mme wa phomegela thopo, wa dira bosula mo matlhong a ga Jehofa?”" 
1Samuel15:20 Saule a raya Samuele a re: “Ee, ke aketse lentswe la ga Jehofa, ke ile tseleng e Jehofa o e nthomileng, ke bile ke lerile Agage kgosi ya Baamaleke, mme Baamaleke ke ba senyeditse ruri." 
1Samuel15:21 Mme batho ba tsaya thopo, dinku le dikgomo tse di tlhophegileng mo dilong tse di ne di laoletswe tshenyego, go tla ba isetsa Jehofa Modimo wa gago tlhabelo mo Gilegale.”" 
1Samuel15:22 Samuele a re: “A Jehofa o ka itumelela ditshupelo tse di fisiwang le ditlhabelo, jaaka a itumelela go akela lentswe la ga Jehofa? Bona, go utlwa go molemo bogolo go go isa tshupelo, le go reetsa bogolo go mahura a diphelefu." 
1Samuel15:23 Gonne go tsuolola go tshwana le boleo jwa boloi, le logwadi lo tshwana le tirelo ya medimo ya disetwa le ya mereo. E re ka o ganne lefoko la ga Jehofa, le ene o go ganne go tlhola o nna kgosi.”" 
1Samuel15:24 Saule a raya Samuele a re: “Ke leofile; gonne ke tlodile taolo ya ga Jehofa, le mafoko a gago; gonne ke tshabile batho ka akela lentswe la bone." 
1Samuel15:25 Jaana ka re, ke a go rapela, o intshwarele boleo jwa me, o bo o bowe le nna, gore ke ye go obamela Jehofa.”" 
1Samuel15:26 Mme Samuele a raya Saule a re: “Ga nketla ke boa nao; gonne o ganne lefoko la ga Jehofa, mme Jehofa o go ganne go tlhola o nna kgosi ya Iseraele.”" 
1Samuel15:27 Samuele a retologa, a re o a tsamaya, mme Saule a tshwara ditsetla tsa kobo ya gagwe, mme ya gagoga." 
1Samuel15:28 Samuele a mo raya a re: “Jehofa o gagotse bogosi jwa Iseraele, o bo tlositse mo go wena gompieno, o bo neile mongwe wa gaeno, yo o molemo bogolo go wena." 
1Samuel15:29 Gape, Mothati wa Iseraele ga a ketla a aka, le fa e le go ikwatlhaya; gonne ga se motho yo o ka ikwatlhayang.”" 
1Samuel15:30 Foo a re: “Ke leofile; le fa go ntse jalo, ke a go rapela, o ntlotle fa pele ga bagolwane ba batho ba me, le fa pele ga Baiseraele, mme o boe le nna, gore ke ye go obamela Jehofa Modimo wa gago.”" 
1Samuel15:31 Jalo Samuele a retologa a sala Saule morago; mme Saule a ya a obamela Jehofa. 
1Samuel15:32 Foo Samuele a re: “Nteretseng kwano Agage kgosi ya Baamaleke.” Agage a tla kwa go ene jaaka ekete o a itumela. Agage a re: “A bo botlhoko jwa loso bo tlaa bo bo fetile.” 
1Samuel15:33 Samuele a re: “Jaaka tšhaka ya gago e tlhokisitse basadi bana, le ene mmaago o tlaa nna a se na ngwana mo basading.” Samuele a remaganya Agage fa pele ga Jehofa mo Gilegale." 
1Samuel15:34 Foo Samuele a ya kwa Rama; mme Saule a ya kwa ga gagwe kwa Gibea wa ga Saule. 
1Samuel15:35 Samuele a se ka a tlhola a ya go bona Saule go ya go fitlha mo tsatsing la loso lwa gagwe; mme Samuele a lelela Saule; Jehofa a ikwatlhaya ka a ne a beile Saule kgosi ya Iseraele. 
1Samuel16:1 Jehofa a raya Samuele a re: “O tlaa lelela Saule ka lobaka lo lo kae, ka ke mo ntshitse mo bogosing ja Iseraele? Thela lookwane mo lonakeng lwa gago lo tlale, o tsamaye; ke tlaa go roma kwa go Jese wa Mobethelehema, gonne ke itebalebetse kgosi mo go bomorwawe.”" 
1Samuel16:2 Samuele a re: “Ana ke tlaa tsamaya jang? Fa Saule a go utlwela, o tlaa mpolaya.” Jehofa a re: “O itseele kgomo ya moroba, o re: ‘Ke tsile go isetsa Jehofa tlhabelo.’" 
1Samuel16:3 “O biletse Jese tlhabelong, ke tlaa go kaela se o tlaa se dirang; o tlaa ntlotsetsa ene yo ke tlaa go bolelelang leina la gagwe.”" 
1Samuel16:4 Samuele a dira se Jehofa o se buileng, a fitlha mo Bethelehema. Bagolwane ba motse ba tla go mo kgatlhantsha ba roroma, ba re: “A o tla ka kagiso?”" 
1Samuel16:5 Mme a re: “Ka kagiso, ke tsile go isetsa Jehofa tlhabelo; iitshepiseng, lo tle le nna tlhabelong.” A itshepisa Jese le bomorwawe, a ba biletsa tlhabelong." 
1Samuel16:6 Ga dirala e rile ba tsile, a leba Eliabe, a re: “A bo motlodiwa wa ga Jehofa a ba a le fa pele ga gagwe.”" 
1Samuel16:7 Mme Jehofa a raya Samuele a re: “O se ka wa leba sefatlhogo sa gagwe, le fa e le go gola ga gagwe; gonne ke mo ganna, ka gobo Jehofa ga a bone jaaka motho a bona; gonne motho o leba bokafantle, mme Jehofa o leba pelo.”" 
1Samuel16:8 Foo Jese a bitsa Abinatabe a mo fetisa fa pele ga Samuele, mme a re: “Le yo Jehofa ga a a mo itshenkela.”" 
1Samuel16:9 Foo Jese a fetisa Shama. Mme a re: “Le yo Jehofa ga a a mo itshenkela.” 
1Samuel16:10 Jese a fetisa bomorwawe ba supa fa pele ga Samuele. Mme Samuele a raya Jese a re: “Jehofa ga a a itshenkela ba.” 
1Samuel16:11 Samuele a raya Jese a re: “A bana ba gago ba fano botlhe?” Mme a re: “Go setse yo mmotlana, mme bona, ene o disitse dinku.” Samuele a raya Jese a re: “Roma mongwe a ye go mmitsa, gonne ga re ketla re dula a ise a tle kwano pele.”" 
1Samuel16:12 Mme a roma gore a leriwe. Jaana o ne a le mohibidu, a le montle mo sefatlhogong, a le popego e ntle go lejwa. Jehofa a re: “Nanoga o mo tlotse, gonne ke ene yo.”" 
1Samuel16:13 Foo Samuele a tsaya lonaka lwa lookwane, a mo tlotsa mo gare ga bana ba ga rraagwe; mme mowa wa ga Jehofa wa tla mo go Dafite ka thata, go simolola ka tsatsi leo, le go ya kwa pele. Jalo Samuele a nanoga, a ya kwa Rama." 
1Samuel16:14 Jaana mowa wa ga Jehofa wa bo o tlogile mo go Saule, mme mowa mongwe o o bosula o o tswang kwa go Jehofa wa bo o mo tshwenya." 
1Samuel16:15 Batlhanka ba ga Saule ba mo raya ba re: “Bona mowa mongwe o o bosula o o tswang Modimong o a go tshwenya. 
1Samuel16:16 A morena wa rona a laole batlhanka ba gago, ba ba fa pele ga gago, gore ba batle motho mongwe yo o setswerere go letsa harepa; mme go tlaa dirala, go re, fa mowa o o bosula o o tswang Modimong o le mo go wena, o tlaa letsa ka letsogo la gagwe, mme wena o fole.”" 
1Samuel16:17 Saule a raya batlhanka ba gagwe a re: “Lo ntebalebele motho mongwe yo o itseng go letsa sentle, lo mo lere kwano go nna.”" 
1Samuel16:18 Foo ga fetola lekau lengwe la re: “Bona, ke bonye mongwe morwa Jese wa Mobethelehema, yo o setswerere mo go letseng, a bile a le senatla se se pelokgale, motho wa ntwa, le yo o matsetseleko mo puong, e le motho yo montle, mme Jehofa o na nae.”" 
1Samuel16:19 Ke gone ka moo Saule a roma batho kwa go Jese, a re: “A ko o rome Dafite morwao kwa go nna, ene yo o nnang kwa dinkung.”" 
1Samuel16:20 Jese a tsaya esela e belesitswe senkgwe, le mofalo wa bojalwa jwa mofine, le potsane, a di isa kwa go Saule ka Dafite morwawe." 
1Samuel16:21 Dafite a tla kwa go Saule, a ema fa pele ga gagwe; mme a mo rata thata; a nna motsholela dibolao wa gagwe." 
1Samuel16:22 Saule a roma kwa go Jese, a re: “Ke a go rapela, o mme Dafite a eme fa pele ga me, gonne o bonye botsalano mo matlhong a me.”" 
1Samuel16:23 Ga dirala e ne e re mowa o o bosula o o tswang Modimong o le mo go Saule, Dafite a tseye harepa ya gagwe, mme a letse ka letsogo; jalo Saule a tsidifalelwe, a fole mme mowa o o bosula o tloge mo go ene." 
1Samuel17:1 Jaana Bafilisitia ba phuthela dintwa tsa bone tlhabanong, ba phuthegela kwa Soko, o o leng wa Juta, ba thibelela fa gare ga Soko le Aseka, mo Efese-tamime." 
1Samuel17:2 Saule le banna ba Iseraele ba ne ba phuthegile, mme ba thibelela mo molapong wa Ela, ba abela Bafilisitia tlhabano." 
1Samuel17:3 Bafilisitia ba ema mo thabeng e e ntlheng nngwe, mme Baiseraele ba ema mo thabeng e e ntlheng e nngwe; go ne go le molapo gare ga bone." 
1Samuel17:4 Mme ga tswa seganka mo bothibelelong jwa Bafilisitia, yo o bidiwang Goliathe, wa Gathe, o ne a le boleele jwa mabogo a le marataro le paralatso ya menwana." 
1Samuel17:5 A rwele tlhoro ya phemelo ya kgotlho mo tlhogong, a apere moitshomelo wa phemelo; bokete jwa seaparo e le dikilokerama di le 57." 
1Samuel17:6 A tswele diphemelo e bong dithejana tsa kgotlho mo maotong a gagwe, le putlela ya kgotlho gare ga marudi a gagwe." 
1Samuel17:7 Lore lwa lerumo la gagwe lo ne lo le kana ka mosipuri wa monyedi, le lerumo la gagwe la tshipi tota le le bokete jwa dikilokerama di supa; motsholathebe wa gagwe a mo etelela pele." 
1Samuel17:8 A ema a kua dintwa tsa Iseraele a ba raya a re: “Lo tswetseng lo tla go aba tlhabano ya lona? A ga ke Mofilisitia, a lona ga lo batlhanka ba ga Saule? Itshenkeleng monna mongwe a fologele kwano go nna." 
1Samuel17:9 E tlaa re fa a nonofile go tlhabana le nna, le go mpolaya, foo re nne batlhanka ba lona; mme fa ke mo fenya ke mmolaya, foo lo tlaa nna batlhanka ba rona, lo tlaa re direla.”" 
1Samuel17:10 Mofilisitia a re: “Ke a di kgoba dintwa tsa Iseraele gompieno; nnayang motho, gore re tlhabane mmogo.”" 
1Samuel17:11 E rile Saule le Baiseraele botlhe ba utlwa mafoko ao a Mofilisitia, ba tseakana, ba boifa thata." 
1Samuel17:12 Jaana Dafite e ne e le morwa Moeferatha yole wa Bethelehema wa Juta, yo leina la gagwe go tweng, Jese; a na le bana ba basimane ba fera e le mebedi. Mme e rile mo motlheng wa ga Saule, monna yo a bo a setse a tsofetse, a le dinyaga dintsi mo bathong." 
1Samuel17:13 Bomorwa Jese ba bagolwane ba bararo ba ne ba lateletse Saule kwa tlhabanong. Maina a bomorwawe ba bararo ba ba ileng tlhabanong e ne e le Eliabe wa motsalwapele, le yo o rulaganyeng nae Abinatabe, le wa boraro Shama." 
1Samuel17:14 Dafite a bo a le yo mmotlana. Ba bagolwane ba bararo ba bo ba setse Saule morago. 
1Samuel17:15 Jaana Dafite o ne a tle a boaboele mo go Saule, a itse go ya go hudisa dinku tsa ga rraagwe kwa Bethelehema." 
1Samuel17:16 Mofilisitia a nna a atamela ka moso le maitseboa, a iponatsa ka malatsi a le 40." 
1Samuel17:17 Jese a raya Dafite morwawe a re: “A ko o isetse bomogoloo emere ya mabele a a gadikilweng a, le dinkgwe tse some tse, o di ise ka bonako kwa go bomogoloo kwa bothibelelong;" 
1Samuel17:18 o isetse molaodi wa bone wa makgolo a a some dikase tse di some tse, o bone go re bomogoloo ba tshela jang, o tle le phetolo ya bone.”" 
1Samuel17:19 Jaana Saule, le bone le batho botlhe ba Iseraele ba ne ba le mo molapong wa Ela, ba tlhabana le Bafilisitia." 
1Samuel17:20 Dafite a phakela, a tlogela dinku le modisa mongwe, a tsaya, a tsamaya, jaaka Jese a mo laotse; a ya a fitlha fa maemong a makoloi, ka ntwa e e bololang e ya go tlhabana e thelela tlhabano lošalaba." 
1Samuel17:21 Baiseraele ba aba mephato, ntwa nngwe ya lebanngwa le e nngwe." 
1Samuel17:22 Dafite a tlogela lekokoma la gagwe mo seatleng sa molebedi wa makokoma, a sianela kwa ntweng, a fitlha a dumedisa bomogoloe." 
1Samuel17:23 Ya re a sa bua nabo, bonang, ga tla ene seganka, Mofilisitia wa Gathe yo o bidiwang Goliathe, a tswa mo ntweng ya Bafilisitia, a fela a bua one mafoko ao fela; Dafite a a utlwa." 
1Samuel17:24 Banna botlhe ba Iseraele ba re ba bona monna yoo ba tshaba, ba boifa thata." 
1Samuel17:25 Banna ba Iseraele ba re: “A lo bonye monna yo o tsileng? O a ba a tsile go kgoba Baiseraele; mme go tlaa dirala go re, monna yo o mmolayang, kgosi e tlaa mo humisa ka dikhumo tse dikgolo, o tlaa mo naya morwadie, mme o tlaa rebola ba ntlo ya ga rraagwe mo tirelong ya bogosi mo Iseraele.”" 
1Samuel17:26 Dafite a bua le banna ba ba emeng fa go ene a re: “Motho yo o tlaa bolayang Mofilisitia yo, a tlosa kgobo mo Iseraele, ga twe o tlaa direlwa jang? Gonne Mofilisitia yo o sa rupang yo e a bo e le mang fa e tlaa bo ne ne fano a kgoba dintwa tsa Modimo o o tshedileng?”" 
1Samuel17:27 Batho ba mo fetola ba bua jaana ba re: “Motho yo o mmolayang o tlaa direlwa jalo.” 
1Samuel17:28 Ya re a sa bua le banna bao, Eliabe mogolowe a utlwa; bogale jwa ga Eliabe jwa tukela Dafite a re: “O tletseng kwano? Dinkunyana tsele o di tlogetse le mang kwa nageng? Ke a a itse mabela a gago, le bosilo jwa pelo ya gago; gonne o tsile, gore o tle o bone tlhabano.”" 
1Samuel17:29 Dafite a re: “Ke dirileng jaanong? A ga ke ne ke botsa sengwenyana fela?” 
1Samuel17:30 A mo hularela, a leba kwa go yo mongwe, a bua ka mokgwa o o ntseng jalo fela; batho ba mo fetola gape ka mokgwa wa pele." 
1Samuel17:31 E rile mafoko a a builweng ke Dafite a utlwala, ba a kakanya fa pele ga Saule; mme a roma a ya go mmitsa." 
1Samuel17:32 Dafite a raya Saule a re: “A go se idibale pelo ya ga ope ka ntlha ya motho yole; motlhanka wa gago o tlaa ya go tlhabana le Mofilisitia yo.” 
1Samuel17:33 Saule a raya Dafite a re: “Ga o a nonofa go ya go tlhabana le Mofilisitia yo; gonne o lekau fela, ene e sa le ka bokau jwa gagwe e ntse e le monna wa ntwa fela.”" 
1Samuel17:34 Mme Dafite a raya Saule a re: “Motlhanka wa gago o ne a disitse dinku tsa ga rraagwe; e rile go tla tau le bera, di tsaya kwanyana ya letsomane," 
1Samuel17:35 ka di latela, ka di bolaya, ka golola kwanyana mo ganong la tsone; ya re di re di a ntlolela, ka di tshwara ka ditedu, ka di onya, ka di bolaya." 
1Samuel17:36 Motlhanka wa gago a bolaya tau le bera ka bobedi jwa tsone; mme Mofilisitia yo o sa rupang yo, o tlaa nna jaaka nngwe wa tsone, ka a kgobile dintwa tsa Modimo o o tshedileng.”" 
1Samuel17:37 Dafite a re: “Jehofa yo o nkgolotseng mo leroong la tau le mo leroong la bera, o tlaa nkgolola mo seatleng sa Mofilisitia yo.” Saule a raya Dafite a re: “Ya fela, Jehofa o tlaa nna nao.”" 
1Samuel17:38 Saule a apesa Dafite diaparo tsa gagwe, a mo rwesa tlhoro ya phemelo ya kgotlho mo tlhogong, a mo apesa moitshomelo wa phemelo." 
1Samuel17:39 Dafite a gokelela tšhaka ya gagwe mo diaparong tsa gagwe, mme a re o a tsamaya; gonne o na a ise a di leke. Dafite a raya Saule a re: “Ke retelelwa ke go tsamaya ka dilo tse; gonne ga ke ise ke di leke.” Mme Dafite a di apola." 
1Samuel17:40 A tsaya thobane ya gagwe, mme a itebalebela majana a a borethe a le matlhano mo molatswaneng, a a tsenya mo kgwatlheng ya gagwe ya modisa, e bong mo pataneng ya gagwe; motsekedi wa gagwe le one a o tshotse; mme a atamela kwa go Mofilisitia." 
1Samuel17:41 Mofilisitia a tla a atamela kwa go Dafite, monna yo o tshotseng thebe a mo eteletse pele." 
1Samuel17:42 E rile Mofilisitia a koba, a bona Dafite, a mo nyatsa; gonne e ne e le lekau fela, a le mohibidu, le gone a le montle go lejwa." 
1Samuel17:43 Mofilisitia a raya Dafite a re: “A ke ntša fa e bo ne ne o tla o tshotse ditsamma jaana?” Mofilisitia a roga Dafite ka medimo ya gagwe. 
1Samuel17:44 Mofilisitia a raya Dafite a re: “Tla kwano go nna, mme nama ya gago ke tlaa e naya dinonyane tsa loapi le dibatana tsa naga.”" 
1Samuel17:45 Foo Dafite a raya Mofilisitia a re: “O tla kwa go nna ka tšhaka le ka lerumo, le ka putlela, mme nna ke tla kwa go wena mo ineng la ga Jehofa wa masomosomo, Modimo wa dintwa tsa Iseraele, yo o mo kgobileng." 
1Samuel17:46 Jehofa o tlaa go tsenya mo seatleng sa me gompieno; mme ke tlaa go bolaya, ke tlosa tlhogo ya gago; ditoto tsa ntwa ya Bafilisitia ke tlaa di naya dinonyane tsa loapi gompieno, le dibatana tsa naga, gore lefatshe lotlhe le itse fa go na le Modimo mo Iseraele." 
1Samuel17:47 Le gore, phuthego e, yotlhe, e itse fa Jehofa a sa golole ka tšhaka le ka lerumo; gonne tlhabano ke ya ga Jehofa, o tlaa lo tsenya mo seatleng sa rona.”" 
1Samuel17:48 Ga dirala ya re Mofilisitia a nanoga, a tla a atamela go tla go kopana le Dafite, Dafite a itlhaganela, a sianela kwa ntweng a ya go kopana le Mofilisitia." 
1Samuel17:49 Dafite a tsenya letsogo mo kgwatlheng ya gagwe, a ntsha lentswe gone, a le konopela ka motsekedi, a gatla Mofilisitia mo phatleng; lentswe la tsena mo teng ga phatla ya gagwe, a wela ka sefatlhogo fa fatshe." 
1Samuel17:50 Dafite a fenya Mofilisitia ka motsekedi le ka lentswe, a gatla Mofilisitia a mmolaya; go ne go se na tšhaka mo seatleng sa ga Dafite." 
1Samuel17:51 Foo Dafite a siana, a ya a ema fa go Mofilisitia, a tshwara tšhaka ya gagwe, a e somola mo kgatlheng ya yone a mmolaya, a mo kgaola tlhogo ka yone. E rile Bafilisitia ba bona fa seganka sa bone se sule, ba tshaba." 
1Samuel17:52 Banna ba Iseraele le ba Juta ba nanoga, ba thela lošalaba, ba konatelela Bafilisitia, ga tsamaya ba fitlha kwa Gathe, le kwa dikgorong tsa Ekerone. Bafilisitia ba ba tlhabilweng ba wela mo tseleng e e yang Shaaraime, e bong Gathe le kwa Ekerone." 
1Samuel17:53 Bana ba Iseraele ba boa kwa go konateleleng Bafilisitia, ba thopa bothibelelo jwa bone." 
1Samuel17:54 Dafite a tsaya tlhogo ya Mofilisitia a e isa kwa Jerusalema; mme dibolao tsa gagwe a di tsenya mo mogopeng wa gagwe. 
1Samuel17:55 E rile Saule a bona Dafite a bololela Mofilisitia, a raya Abenere molaodi wa ntwa a re: “Abenere, lekau leo ke morwa mang?” Abenere a re: “Jaaka mowa wa gago o tshedile, kgosi, ga ke itse.”" 
1Samuel17:56 Kgosi ya re: “O tle o botse go re, mosimane yo ke morwa mang.”" 
1Samuel17:57 E rile Dafite a bowa kwa go bolayeng Mofilisitia, Abenere a mo tsaya, a mo isa fa pele ga Saule a tshotse tlhogo ya Mofilisitia." 
1Samuel17:58 Saule a mo raya a re: “O morwa mang wena lekau?” Dafite a mo fetola a re: “Ke morwa motlhanka wa gago Jese wa Mobethelehema.” 
1Samuel18:1 Ga dirala, e rile a sena go khutla go bua le Saule, mowa wa ga Jonathane wa logakana le mowa wa ga Dafite, Jonathane a mo rata jaaka a ithata." 
1Samuel18:2 Saule a mo tsaya ka tsatsi leo, mme a se ka a tlhola a mo leseletsa go ya ga gabo kwa ntlong ya ga rraagwe." 
1Samuel18:3 Foo Jonathane le Dafite ba dira kgolagano ka a mo rata jaaka a ithata. 
1Samuel18:4 Jonathane a ikapola kobo e e mo go ene, a e naya Dafite, le diaparo tsa gagwe, le e leng yone tšhaka ya gagwe, le bora jwa gagwe, le moitlamo wa gagwe." 
1Samuel18:5 Dafite a nna a ya gongwe le gongwe kwa Saule o mo romang gone, a dira ka tlhaloganyo; Saule a mo laodisa banna ba ntwa, mme ga nna molemo mo matlhong a batho botlhe, le mo matlhong a batlhanka ba ga Saule." 
1Samuel18:6 Ya re ba tla, ka Dafite a boa kwa go bolayeng Mofilisitia, basadi ba tswa mo metseng yotlhe ya Iseraele, ba duduetsa, ba bina, ka boitumelo ba tla go kgatlhantsha kgosi Saule ka meropana le ka diletso." 
1Samuel18:7 Basadi ya re ba letsa ba fetolana ka dipina ba re: “Saule o bolaile ba makgolo a masome ba gagwe, mme Dafite o bolaile ba makgolo a makgolo ba gagwe.”" 
1Samuel18:8 Saule a nna bogale thata, polelo eo ya mo itumolola; mme a re: “Ba neile Dafite ba makgolo a makgolo, nna ba nnaya ba makgolo a masome fela; mme o ka ba a bonang gape fa e se bogosi fela?”" 
1Samuel18:9 Saule a dilola Dafite ka matlho go simolola ka tsatsi leo go ya kwa pele. 
1Samuel18:10 Ga dirala ya re ka moso, mowa mongwe o o busula o o tswang Modimong wa tla ka thata mo go Saule, a phokelela mo teng ga ntlo; Dafite a letsa ka letsogo jaaka a tle a dire ka malatsi otlhe, Saule a bo a tshotse lerumo la gagwe." 
1Samuel18:11 Saule a mo konopa ka lerumo; gonne a re: “Dafite ke tlaa mo phololeletsa fela fa lomoteng.” Dafite a tila a tswa fa pele ga gagwe gabedi. 
1Samuel18:12 Saule a boifa Dafite, ka Jehofa a ne a nna nae, mme mo go Saule Jehofa a tlogile." 
1Samuel18:13 Ka ntlha ya gone moo Saule a mo tlosa fa go ene, a mo dira kgosana ya gagwe, a laola ba makgolo a some; a nna a tswa a tsena fa pele ga batho." 
1Samuel18:14 Dafite a dira ka tlhaloganyo mo ditseleng tsa gagwe tsotlhe fela; Jehofa a nna nae. 
1Samuel18:15 E rile Saule a bona fa a dira ka tlhaloganyo e kgolo fela, a mmoifa a tlhabegile." 
1Samuel18:16 Botlhe ba Iseraele le Juta ba bo ba rata Dafite; gonne a nna a tswa a tsena fa pele ga bone. 
1Samuel18:17 Saule a raya Dafite a re: “Bona, morwadiake yo mogolo Merabe, ke tlaa mo go naya go nna mosadi wa gago; o nne pelokgale fela ntlheng ya me go tlhabana ditlhabano tsa ga Jehofa.” Gonne Saule a ithaya, a re: “A seatla sa me ke se ka ka se baya mo go ene, mme a seatla sa Bafilisitia se nne mo go ene.”" 
1Samuel18:18 Dafite a raya Saule, a re: “Ke mang, le botshelo jwa me ke eng, kgotsa losika lwa ga rre mo Iseraele, fa e ka bo ne ne fano ke ka nna mogwe wa kgosi?”" 
1Samuel18:19 Mme e rile ka lobaka lo Merabe morwadia Saule o ka bong a neilwe Dafite ka lone, a newa Ateriele wa Momehola go nna mosadi." 
1Samuel18:20 Mikale morwadia Saule a bo a rata Dafite; mme ba bolelela Saule, mme selo seo sa mo kgatlha." 
1Samuel18:21 Saule a re: “Ke tlaa mo mo naya, gore a tle a nne serai mo go ene, le gore, seatla sa Bafilisitia se tlhabane nae.” Ke gone ka moo Saule a raya Dafite a re: “Gompieno o tlaa nna mogwe wa me lwa bobedi.”" 
1Samuel18:22 Saule a laola batlhanka ba gagwe a re: “Sebetsang Dafite lo re: ‘Bona, kgosi e kgatlhega mo go wena le batlhanka ba gagwe botlhe ba a go rata; mme ra re o nne mogwe wa kgosi.’ ”" 
1Samuel18:23 Batlhanka ba ga Saule ba sebela Dafite mafoko a. Dafite a re: “Mo matlhong a lona a ke sengwe se se motlhofo go nna mogwe wa kgosi, ka ke le motho wa sehumanegi, mme ke kaiwa selo fela?”" 
1Samuel18:24 Batlhanka ba ga Saule ba mmolelela ba re: “Dafite o ne a bua ka go re, ka go re.”" 
1Samuel18:25 Saule a re: “Lo reye Dafite jaana lo re: ‘Kgosi ga e batle bogadi fa e se nama ya ditlhong ya Bafilisitia ba le lekgolo fela, go tla a itefetsa mo babeng ba kgosi.’ ” Saule a bo a gopotse go bolaya Dafite ka diatla tsa Bafilisitia." 
1Samuel18:26 E rile batlhanka ba gagwe ba bolelela Dafite mafoko ao, ga kgatlha Dafite thata go nna mogwe wa kgosi. Mme malatsi a bo a ise a fele," 
1Samuel18:27 Dafite a tloga a tsamaya, ene le banna ba gagwe, mme ba bolaya Bafilisitia e le banna ba le 200; Dafite a lere nama ya bone ya ditlhong, ba di naya kgosi ka palo e e tletseng, gore a tle a nne mogwe wa kgosi. Saule a mo naya Mikale morwadie go nna mosadi wa gagwe." 
1Samuel18:28 Saule a bona a ba a itse fa Jehofa a nna le Dafite; Mikale morwadia Saule a mo rata. 
1Samuel18:29 Saule a fela a boifa Dafite bogolo; Saule a nna mmaba wa ga Dafita ka metlha yotlhe. 
1Samuel18:30 Foo dikgosana tsa Bafilisitia tsa bolola; mme gongwe le gongwe fa di bolola, Dafita a dire ka tlhaloganyo bogolo go batlhanka botlhe ba ga Saule; leina la gagwe la ba la tla la tlotlwa thata." 
1Samuel19:1 Saule a raya Jonathane morwawe le batlhanka ba gagwe botlhe a re, ba bolaye Dafite." 
1Samuel19:2 Jonathane morwa Saule o ne a natefelwa thata ke Dafite. Mme Jonathane a bolelela Dafite a re: “Saule rre, o batla go go bolaya; ke gone, ke a go rapela, o itise ka moso, o nne felo gongwe fa go sa itsiweng, mme o iphitlhe." 
1Samuel19:3 Ke tlaa tswa ke ema fa go rre mo nageng e o mo go yone, ke tlaa seba le rre ka ga gago; fa ke lemoga sengwe ke tlaa se go bolelela.”" 
1Samuel19:4 Jonathane a bolela molemo ka ga Dafite mo go Saule rraagwe, a mo raya a re: “A kgosi e se leofele motlhanka wa yone, e bong Dafite; gonne ga a a go leofela, le ka ntlha ya gonne ditiro tsa gagwe di ntse di le molemo thata mo go wena." 
1Samuel19:5 Gonne o ne a baya botshelo jwa gagwe mo seatleng sa gagwe, a bolaya Mofilisitia, mme Jehofa a direla Baiseraele botlhe phenyo e kgolo; o ne wa go bona, wa itumela; mme ka re o tlaa bo o leofelang madi a a se nang molato, fa o bolaya Dafite ka bomo fela?”" 
1Samuel19:6 Saule a reetsa lentswe la ga Jonathane; Saule a ba a ikana a re: “Jaaka Jehofa a tshedile, ga a ketla a bolawa.”" 
1Samuel19:7 Jonathane a bitsa Dafite, mme Jonathane a mo supetsa dilo tse tsotlhe. Jonathane a isa Dafite kwa go Saule, mme a nna fa pele ga gagwe jaaka gale." 
1Samuel19:8 Ga nna ntwa gape; Dafite a bolola, a tlhabana le Bafilisitia, a ba bolaya ka polao e kgolo; ba tshaba fa pele ga gagwe." 
1Samuel19:9 Mowa mongwe o o bosula o o tswang mo go Jehofa o ne o le mo go Saule, a dutse mo ntlong ya gagwe a tshotse lerumo la gagwe, Dafite a bo a letsa ka seatla sa gagwe." 
1Samuel19:10 Saule a leka go phololeletsa Dafite fa lomoteng ka lerumo; mme a tila a tswa fa pele ga Saule, a tlhaba lomota ka lerumo; Dafite ene a tshaba, a falola 'sigo joo." 
1Samuel19:11 Saule a roma batho kwa ntlong ya ga Dafite gore ba mo lalele, ba mmolaye mo mosong; mme Mikale mosadi wa ga Dafite a mmolelela a re: “Fa o sa iphedise 'sigo jono, ka moso o tlaa bolawa.”" 
1Samuel19:12 Jalo Mikale a folosa Dafite ka fa fensetereng; a tsamaya, a tshaba, a falola." 
1Samuel19:13 Mikale a tsaya moreo a o baya mo bolaong, a ba a baya mosamo wa bobowa jwa dipodi fa tlhogong ya one, a o khurumetsa ka dikobo." 
1Samuel19:14 E rile Saule a roma batho ba tla go tshwara Dafite, mosadi a re: “O a bobola.”" 
1Samuel19:15 Saule a roma batho ba ya go bona Dafite, a re: “Mo lereng kwano go nna a le mo bolaong, gore ke mmolaye.”" 
1Samuel19:16 Ya re barongwa ba tsena, bonang, moreo wa bo o le mo bolaong, o na le mosamo wa bobowa jwa dipodi fa tlhogong ya one." 
1Samuel19:17 Saule a raya Mikale a re: “Ana o ntsieleditseng jaana, wa lesa mmaba wa me, mme o falotse?” Mikale a fetola Saule a re: “O ntheile a re: ‘Ntesa ke tsamaye; nka bo ke go bolaelang?’ ”" 
1Samuel19:18 Jaana Dafite a tshaba, a falola, a tla kwa go Samuele kwa Rama, a mmolelela tsotlhe tse Saule o di mo diretseng. Ene le Samuele ba ya ba aga mo Naiothe." 
1Samuel19:19 Ga bolelelwa Saule ga twe: “Bona, Dafite o mo Naiothe kwa Rama.”" 
1Samuel19:20 Saule a roma batho ba ya go tshwara Dafite; e rile ba bona lesomo la baperofeti ba duduetsa, le Samuele a eme e le tlhogo ya bone, mowa wa Modimo wa tla mo barongweng ba ga Saule, le bone ba duduetsa." 
1Samuel19:21 Ya re go bolelelwa Saule, a roma batho ba bangwe, mme le bone ba duduetsa. Saule a fela a roma batho lwa boraro, le bone ba duduetsa." 
1Samuel19:22 Foo le ene a ya kwa Rama a fitlha fa sedibeng se segolo se se mo Seku; a botsa a re: “BoSamuele le Dafite ba kae?” Mongwe a re: “Bona, ba kwa Naiothe kwa Rama.”" 
1Samuel19:23 A ya gone kwa Naiothe kwa Rama; mme mowa wa Modimo wa tla le mo go ene, a tswelela pele a ntse a duduetsa, ga tsamaya a fitlha mo Naiothe kwa Rama." 
1Samuel19:24 Le gone a apola diaparo, le gone a duduetsa fa pele ga Samuele, a namalala fa fatshe a sa ikatega ka tsatsi leo lotlhe le bosigo joo jotlhe. Ke gone ka moo ba tla ba re: “A Saule le ene o mo baperofeting?”" 
1Samuel20:1 Dafite a tshaba a tswa Naiothe kwa Rama, a tla a bua fa pele ga Jonathane a re: “Ke dirileng? Boikepo jwa me ke eng? Le boleo jwa me ke eng fa pele ga rraago, fa e bo ne ne a senka go mpolaya jaana?”" 
1Samuel20:2 A mo raya, a re: “A go se tualo; ga o ketla o swa; bona, rre ga a dire sepe se segolo le fa e le se sennye, a sa se ntshenolele. Rre o tlaa bo a ntobetse selo se ka ntlha yang? Ga go a nna jalo.”" 
1Samuel20:3 Gape Dafite a ikana a re: “Rraago o itse sentle fa ke bonye botsalano mo matlhong a gago; mme a re: ‘A Jonathane a se itse selo se, o ka tla a hutsafala.’ Ruri jaaka Jehofa a tshedile, le jaaka mowa wa gago o tshedile, gare ga me le loso go na le kgato e le nngwe fela.”" 
1Samuel20:4 Foo Jonathane a raya Dafite a re: “Le fa e ka ne e le eng se mowa wa gago o se eletsang, ke tlaa se go direla fela.”" 
1Samuel20:5 Dafite a raya Jonathane a re: “Bona, ka moso go rogwa kgwedi, ga ke a tshwanela go tlhokafala mo go duleng le kgosi fa go jewa; a ko o ntese ke tsamaye, ke ye go iphitlha mo nageng go ya letsatsing la boraro go le maitsebowa." 
1Samuel20:6 Fa rraago a ntlhoka gongwe, o tle o re: ‘Dafite o ne a ntopa thata, gore a ke a sianele kwa Bethelehema motse wa ga gabo; gonne go na le tlhabelo ya ngwaga gone, ya losika lwa gagwe lotlhe fela.’" 
1Samuel20:7 E tlaa re fa a bua jaana, a re: ‘Go molemo;’ foo motlhanka wa gago o tlaa bona kagiso; mme fa a nna bogale, foo o bo o itse fa bosula bo laotswe ke ene." 
1Samuel20:8 Ke gone o direle motlhanka wa gago ka bopelonomi; gonne o tsentse motlhanka wa gago mo kgolaganong ya ga Jehofa nao. Fa go na le boikepo mo go nna, o tle o mpolaye ka wesi; gonne o tlaa bo o nkisetsang kwa go rraago?”" 
1Samuel20:9 Jonathane a re: “A go nne kgakala nao, gonne fa nka bo ke itse fa gongwe bosula bo laotswe ke rre gore bo tle mo go wena, a ke ne ke ka bo ke sa go bolelele?”" 
1Samuel20:10 Foo Dafite a raya Jonathane a re: “E mang yo o tlaa mpolelelang fa e tlaa re gongwe rraago a go fetole ka mafoko a a thata?” 
1Samuel20:11 Jonathane a raya Dafite a re: “A re ye kwa nageng.” Ba tswela kwa nageng boo babedi. 
1Samuel20:12 Jonathane a raya Dafite a re: “A Jehofa Modimo wa Iseraele a nne mosupi; e tlaa re ka moso ka baka lono kgotsa ka moso o mongwe, ke sena go reetsa re, bona, fa go le molemo ka ga Dafite, foo a ga ke tlaa roma kwa go wena, ke go senolele?" 
1Samuel20:13 A Jehofa a direle Jonathane jalo, a ba a oketse, fa e tlaa re go kgatlhile rre go go direla bosula, mme ke sa go go senolele, ke go tshabise gore o tsamaye ka kagiso; a Jehofa a nne nao, jaaka a ne a ntse le rre." 
1Samuel20:14 O tlaa ntirela bopelonomi jwa ga Jehofa, gore ke se ka ka swa, e seng mo lobakeng lwa fa ke sa ntse ke tshedile lo le losi;" 
1Samuel20:15 le gone o se ka wa khutlisetsa ntlo ya me bopelonomi jwa gago ka bosakhutleng; nnyaa, le e seng fa Jehofa a tlositse baba ba ga Dafite botlhe mo lefatsheng.”" 
1Samuel20:16 Jalo Jonathane a dira kgolagano le ntlo ya ga Dafite, a re: “Jehofa o tlaa go lopa mo seatleng sa baba ba ga Dafite.”" 
1Samuel20:17 Jonathane a ikanisa Dafite gape, ka ntlha ya lorato lo o mo ratang ka lone; gonne a mo rata jaaka a ithata." 
1Samuel20:18 Foo Jonathane a mo raya a re: “E tlaa re ka moso go bo go rogwa kgwedi; o tlaa tlhokwa, ka setulo sa gago se tlaa bo se se na ope." 
1Samuel20:19 E tlaa re o sena go tlhola malatsi a le mararo, o fologe ka bonako, o tle mo felong fa o ne wa iphitlha gone fa go dirwa tiro ele, mme o nne fa lefikeng la Esele." 
1Samuel20:20 Ke tlaa hulela metswi e le meraro ka fa lotlhakoreng lwa lone, jaaka ekete ke hula sengwe se se beilweng sekao." 
1Samuel20:21 Bona, ke tlaa roma mosimane, ke re a ye go senka metswi. Fa ke raya mosimane ke re: ‘Metswi e go potile ka kwano, e tseye!’ o tle, gonne go tlaa bo go le kagiso ka ga gago, e seng sepe se se botlhoko, jaaka Jehofa a tshedile." 
1Samuel20:22 Mme fa ke raya mosimane jaana ke re: ‘Bona, metswi e go potile ka kwa pele,’ wena o tsamaye, gonne Jehofa o tlaa bo a go neile tsela." 
1Samuel20:23 Ka ga selo se wena le nna re buileng ka ga sone, bona, Jehofa o fa gare ga gago le nna ka bosakhutleng.”" 
1Samuel20:24 Jalo Dafite a iphitlha mo nageng; e rile go rogwa ga kgwedi go dirala, kgosi ya dulela go ja." 
1Samuel20:25 Kgosi ya dula mo setulong sa yone, jaaka ka metlha e mengwe, e bong mo setulong se se fa lomoteng; Jonathane a ema ka dinao, Abenere a bo a dutse a bapile le Saule; mme bonno jwa ga Dafite bo ne bo se na ope." 
1Samuel20:26 Le fa go ntse jalo Saule a se ka a bua sepe ka tsatsi leo; gonne a ithaya a re: “Sengwe se mo diraletse, ga a a itsheka; kooteng ga a a itsheka.”" 
1Samuel20:27 Mme ka moso kgwedi e sena go rogwa, e le letsatsi la babedi, bonno jwa ga Dafite jwa bo bo se na ope; Saule a raya Jonathane morwawe a re: “Morwa Jese ga a tleleng go ja, le fa e le maabane, le fa e le gompieno?”" 
1Samuel20:28 Jonathane a fetola Saule a re: “Dafite o ne a ntopa thata gore a lesiwe a ye Bethelehema; 
1Samuel20:29 a re: ‘Ke a go rapela, o ntese ke tsamaye; gonne ba losika lwa rona ba na le tlhabelo mo motseng; mogolole o ntaotse gore ke nne gone; jaana, fa ke bonye botsalano mo matlhong a gago, ke a go rapela, o mme ke tsamaye, ke ye go bona bomogolole;’ ke gone ka fa o sa tlang lomating lwa kgosi lwa bojelo ka gone.”" 
1Samuel20:30 Foo bogale jwa ga Saule jwa tukela Jonathane, a mo raya a re: “Wena morwa mosadi yo o tshokamo yo o serukhutli, a ga ke a nna ke itse fa o itshenketse morwa Jese go tla a go tlhabisa ditlhong, le go tlhabisa bosaikatega jwa ga mmaago ditlhong?" 
1Samuel20:31 Gonne fa morwa Jese a sa ntse a tshela mo lefatsheng, ga go ketla go tlhomamisiwa wena le fa e le bogosi jwa gago. Ke gone roma jaana, o ye go mo nteretse, gonne ruri o tlaa swa.”" 
1Samuel20:32 Jonathane a fetola Saule rraagwe a mo raya a re: “O tlaa bo a bolaelwang? O dirileng?” 
1Samuel20:33 Saule a mo konopa ka lerumo la gagwe, a re o a mmolaya; Jonathane a itse fa go laotswe ke rraagwe go bolaya Dafite ka gone moo." 
1Samuel20:34 Jonathane a nanoga fa lomating a le bogale thata, a se ka a ja dijo ka letsatsi la bobedi la kgwedi, gonne a hutsafalela Dafite, ka rraagwe a mo tlhabisitse ditlhong." 
1Samuel20:35 Ga dirala ya re ka moso Jonathane a tswela kwa nageng ka lobaka lo ba lo golaganeletseng le Dafite, a na le mosimanyana." 
1Samuel20:36 A raya mosimane wa gagwe a re: “Siana, o ye go senka metswi e ke e hulang.” Ya re mosimane a siana, a hula motswi, a o mo fetisa." 
1Samuel20:37 E rile mosimane a fitlha felong fa motswi o Jonathane o o hudileng, Jonathane a tlhaeletsa mosimane a re: “A motswi ga o a go pota ka kwa pele?”" 
1Samuel20:38 Jonathane a tlhaeletsa mosimane a re: “Tsamaya thata, o itlhaganele, o se ka wa diega.” Mosimane wa ga Jonathane a phutha metswi, a tla kwa go mong wa gagwe." 
1Samuel20:39 Mosimane a bo a sa itse sepe; Jonathane le Dafite ke bone bosi ba ba itseng tiro eo. 
1Samuel20:40 Jonathane a neela mosimane wa gagwe dibolao tsa gagwe a mo raya a re: “Tsamaya, o di ise kwa motseng.”" 
1Samuel20:41 E rile mosimane a sena go tsamaya, Dafite a nanoga a tswa felong gongwe ntlheng ya borwa, a wela ka sefatlhogo fa fatshe, a ikoba gararo; mme ba atlana, ba lela mmogo, ga tsamaya Dafite a sita." 
1Samuel20:42 Jonathane a raya Dafite a re: “Tsamaya ka kagiso, ka re ikanne roo babedi mo ineng la ga Jehofa, ra re: ‘Jehofa o tlaa nna gare ga me nao, le gare ga losika lwa me le losika lwa gago ka bosakhutleng.’ ” Mme a nanoga a tsamaya; Jonathane ene a boela motseng." 
1Samuel21:1 Foo Dafite a ya kwa Nobe go Ahimeleke moperesiti; Ahimeleke a ya go kgatlhantsha Dafite a roroma, a mo raya, a re: “Ana ke ka ntlha yang o le wesi, go se na motho ope nao?”" 
1Samuel21:2 Dafite a raya Ahimeleke moperesiti a re: “Kgosi e ntaoletse tiro nngwe, e ntheile ya re: ‘Go se ka ga itse motlho ope ka ga tiro e ke e go romang, le se ke se go laoletseng;’ mme makau ke a kaeletse kwa bolebe." 
1Samuel21:3 Jaana ka re, go na le eng koo go wena? Nnaya dinkgwe di le tlhano, le fa e le sengwe fela se se gone.”" 
1Samuel21:4 Moperesiti a fetola Dafite a re: “Ga go na se e leng senkgwe fela mo go nna, go na le senkgwe se se itshepileng; ke raya fa makau ruri a ithibile mo basading.”" 
1Samuel21:5 Dafite a fetola moperesiti, a mo raya a re: “Ruri basadi ba sa le ba kgaoganngwa le rona e ka ne e le ka malatsi a le mararo; e rile ke bolola dilo tsa makau tsa bo di itshepile, le fa e ka bo e ne e le loeto fela; bogolo jang gompieno dilo tsa bone di tlaa bo di le boitshepo.”" 
1Samuel21:6 Jalo moperesiti a mo naya senkgwe se se itshepileng; gonne go ne go se na sengwe fa e se senkgwe sa tshupo, se se tlosiwang fa pele ga Jehofa, go tlaa ba baya senkgwe se se molelo ka letsatsi le seo se tlosiwang ka lone." 
1Samuel21:7 Monna mongwe wa batlhanka ba ga Saule a bo a le gone ka tsatsi leo, a diilwe fa pele ga Jehofa; leina la gagwe e ne e le Doege, wa Moetome, mogolo wa banna ba ga Saule ba ba disang." 
1Samuel21:8 Dafite a raya Ahimeleke a re: “Mo go wena a ga go na lerumo le fa e le tšhaka? Gonne nna ga ke a tla le tšhaka ya me le fa e le dibolao tsa me, gonne tiro ya kgosi e ne e lopa potlako.”" 
1Samuel21:9 Moperesiti a re: “Tšhaka ya ga Goliathe Mofilisitia, yo o ne wa mmolaya mo molapong wa Ela, bona, e mono e fapilwe ka letsela fa morago ga sekhutlana; fa o rata go tsaya yone o ka e tsaya; gonne ga go na epe e sele fano fa e se yone.” Dafite a re: “Ga go na epe e e tshwanang le yone; e nneye.”" 
1Samuel21:10 Dafite a nanoga a tshaba ka tsatsi leo ka go boifa Saule, a ya kwa go Akiše kgosi ya Gathe." 
1Samuel21:11 Batlhanka ba ga Akiše ba mo raya ba re: “A yo ga se Dafite kgosi ya lefatshe? A ga ba a dudueletsana ka ga gagwe mo dipineng tsa bone ba re: ‘Saule o bolaile ba makgolo a masome ba gagwe, mme Dafite o bolaile ba makgolo a makgolo ba gagwe?’ ”" 
1Samuel21:12 Dafite a boloka mafoko ao mo pelong ya gagwe, mme a boifa Akiše kgosi ya Gathe thata." 
1Samuel21:13 A iphetola mokgwa fa pele ga bone, a ipaya botsenwa a le mo diatleng tsa bone, a kwalakwala mo ditswalong tsa mojako, a lepeletsa mathe mo ditedung tsa gagwe." 
1Samuel21:14 Foo Akiše a raya batlhanka ba gagwe a re: “Lo a bona fa monna yo a tsenwa; ka re lo mo lerile kwa go nna go reng? 
1Samuel21:15 A ke tlhoka ditsenwa fa e tlaa bo ne ne fano lo lerile seapu se go tla go dira botsenwa fa pele ga me? A seapu se se tlaa tsena mo ntlong ya me?” 
1Samuel22:1 Ka ntlha ya moo Dafite a tloga gone a falolela kwa logageng lwa Adulame; mme e rile bomogolowe le botlhe ba ntlo ya ga rraagwe ba utlwa mo, ba fologela kwa go ene gone." 
1Samuel22:2 Mongwe le mongwe yo o mo pitlaganong, le mongwe le mongwe yo go batlwang molato mo go ene, le mongwe le mongwe yo o ngongoregang, ba phuthegela kwa go ene; a nna molaodi wa bone; ga nna nae batho e ka ne e le makgolo a le mane." 
1Samuel22:3 Dafite a tswa gone a ya Misepa wa Moabe; mme a raya kgosi ya Moabe a re: “Ke a go rapela, o mme rre le mme ba huduge, ba tle go nna le lona go tle go tsamaye ke itse se Modimo o tlaa se ntirelang.”" 
1Samuel22:4 A ba lere fa pele ga kgosi ya Moabe; ba aga nae ka lobaka lotlhe lo Dafite o ne a nna mo kagong ya phemelo ka lone. 
1Samuel22:5 Gate moperofeti a a raya Dafite a re: “O se ka wa nna mo kagong ya phemelo; tloga o ye lefatsheng la Juta.” Foo Dafite a tloga a tla mo sekgweng sa Herethe. 
1Samuel22:6 Saule a utlwa fa Dafite a bonywe, le banna ba o nang nabo; Saule a bo a dutse mo Gibea, fa tlase ga setlhare sa motamariseka mo Rama, a tshotse lerumo la gagwe, le batlhanka botlhe ba gagwe ba bo ba emeeme tikologong ya gagwe." 
1Samuel22:7 Saule a raya batlhanka ba gagwe ba ba emeemeng tikologong ya gagwe a re: “Utlwang jaana lona Babenjamine; a morwa Jese o tlaa naya mongwe le mongwe wa lona matlhagare le masimo a mafine, a o tlaa lo dira lotlhe balaodi ba makgolo a masome, le balaodi ba makgolo?" 
1Samuel22:8 Ka e le fa lotlhe lo nkgolaganetse, go se na ope yo o ntshebetsang fa morwaake a dira kgolagano le morwa Jese, go bile go se na ope wa lona yo o ntlhomogelang pelo, le fa e le go ntshebetsa fa morwaake a ntlhotlheleditse motlhanka wa me, gore a tle a ntalele jaaka gompieno?”" 
1Samuel22:9 Foo ga fetola Doege wa Moetome, yo o emeng fa batlhankeng ba ga Saule a re: “Ke bonye morwa Jese a tla kwa Nobe mo go Ahimeleke morwa Ahitube." 
1Samuel22:10 Mme a mmoletsa mo go Jehofa, a mo naya dijo, a ba a mo naya tšhaka ya ga Goliathe wa Mofilisitia.”" 
1Samuel22:11 Foo kgosi ya roma ya ya go bitsa Ahimeleke moperesiti, morwa Ahitube, le botlhe ba ntlo ya ga rraagwe, baperesiti ba ba mo Nobe; mme ba tla botlhe kwa kgosing." 
1Samuel22:12 Saule a re: “Utlwa jaana, wena morwa Ahitube.” A fetola, a re: “Ke fano morena wa me.”" 
1Samuel22:13 Saule a mo raya a re: “Ana lo nkgolaganetse ka ntlha yang, wena le morwa Jese, ka o mo neile senkgwe, le tšhaka, wa ba wa mmoletsa mo Modimong, gore a tle a tlhabane le nna, a ntalele, jaaka gompieno?”" 
1Samuel22:14 Foo Ahimeleke a fetola kgosi a re: “E mang mo batlhankeng ba gago botlhe yo o boikanngo jaaka Dafite, yo e leng mogwe wa kgosi, a na le go gakololana nao, a bile a le tlotlego mo ntlong ya gago?" 
1Samuel22:15 A ke gore ke simolotse gompieno fela go mmoletsa mo Modimong? A go nne kgakala le nna; a kgosi e se kae motlhanka wa gagwe molato ope, le fa e le botlhe ba ntlo ya ga rre; gonne motlhanka wa gago ga a itse sepe sa dilo tsotlhe tse, bonnye, le fa e le bogolo.”" 
1Samuel22:16 Kgosi ya re: “Ruri o tlaa swa, wena Ahimeleke le botlhe ba ntlo ya ga rraago.”" 
1Samuel22:17 Kgosi ya raya basimane ba yone ba ba emeng tikologong ya yone ya re: “Menogang lo bolaye baperesiti ba ga Jehofa; gonne seatla sa bone le sone se na le Dafite, le ka gonne ba ne ba itse fa a ne a tshaba, mme ba se ka ba ntshebetsa.” Mme batlhanka ba kgosi ba gana go ntsha letsogo la bone go wela baperesiti ba ga Jehofa." 
1Samuel22:18 Kgosi ya raya Doege ya re: “A go menoge wena, o wele baperesiti.” Mme Doege wa Moetome a menoga, a wela baperesiti, mme a bolaya ka tsatsi leo ba le 85, ba ba apereng sekutlana sa leloba." 
1Samuel22:19 Nobe motse wa baperesiti, a o kgemetha ka bogale jwa tšhaka, banna le basadi, bana le ba ba anyang, le dikgomo le diesela le dinku, ka bogale jwa tšhaka." 
1Samuel22:20 Mongwe wa bomorwa Ahimeleke morwa Ahitube, yo leina la gagwe e ne e le Abiathare, a falola, a tshaba a latela Dafite." 
1Samuel22:21 Abiathare a bolelela Dafite fa Saule a bolaile baperesiti ba ga Jehofa. 
1Samuel22:22 Dafite a raya Abiathare a re: “Ke itsile ka tsatsi leo, ka Doege wa Moetome a le gone, fa ruri a tlaa bolelela Saule; ke nna ke bolaileng batho botlhe ba ntlo ya ga rraago." 
1Samuel22:23 Nnela ruri le nna, o se ka wa boifa, gonne yo o senkang go mpolaya o senka go bolaya wena; gonne o tlaa nna mo polokegong fa o ntse le nna.”" 
1Samuel23:1 Ba bolelela Dafite ba re: “Bona, Bafilisitia ba tlhasela Keila, mme ba thopa dibopi tsa pholelo.”" 
1Samuel23:2 Ke gone ka moo Dafite a botsa mo go Jehofa a re: “A ke ke ye go kgemetha Bafilisitia bao?” Jehofa a raya Dafite a re: “Ya o kgemethe Bafilisitia, o golole Keila.”" 
1Samuel23:3 Banna ba Dafite o ne a nna nabo ba mo raya ba re: “Bona, re a boifa re le mono Juta; bogolo jang fa re ka ya kwa Keila ra ya go tlhabana le dintwa tsa Bafilisitia.”" 
1Samuel23:4 Foo Dafite a fela a botsa mo go Jehofa gape. Jehofa a mo fetola a re: “Nanoga o fologele kwa Keila; gonne ke tlaa tsenya Bafilisitia mo seatleng sa gago.” 
1Samuel23:5 Dafite le banna ba gagwe ba ya kwa Keila, ba tlhabana le Bafilisitia, ba gapa dikgomo tsa bone ba tsamaya natso, ba ba bolaya ka polao e kgolo. Mme Dafite a golola banni ba Keila." 
1Samuel23:6 Ga dirala, e rile Abiathare morwa Ahimeleke a tshabela kwa go Dafite kwa Keila, a bo a tla a tshotse sekutlana sa leloba." 
1Samuel23:7 Ga bolelelwa Saule fa Dafite a tsile mo Keila. Saule a ithaya, a re: “Modimo o mo tsentse mo seatleng sa me; gonne o tswaletswe, ka a tsenye mo motseng o o nang le ditswalo le mephakalego.”" 
1Samuel23:8 Saule a biletsa batho botlhe ntweng go tla ba fologela kwa Keila ba ya go tlhasela Dafite le batho ba gagwe. 
1Samuel23:9 Dafite o ne a itse fa Saule a mo logela maano a go mo senya; mme a raya Abiathare moperesiti a re: “Lere kwano sekutlana.” 
1Samuel23:10 Foo Dafite a re: “Jehofa Modimo wa Iseraele, motlhanka wa gago o utlwile ka mmaanete fa Saule a senka go tla kwano Keila, a tla go senya motse ka ntlha ya me." 
1Samuel23:11 A batho ba Keila ba tlaa ntsenya mo atleng sa gagwe? A Saule o tlaa tla, jaaka motlhanka wa gago a utlwile? Jehofa Modimo wa Iseraele, ke a go rapela, bolelela motlhanka wa gago.” Jehofa a re: “O tlaa tla.”" 
1Samuel23:12 Foo Dafite a re: “A batho ba Keila ba tlaa ntsenya le batho ba me mo seatleng sa ga Saule?” Jehofa a re: “Ba tlaa lo tsenya.” 
1Samuel23:13 Foo Dafite le banna ba gagwe, e ka ne e le makgolo a le marataro, ba nanoga ba tloga mo Keila, ba nna ba ya fela kwa ba ka yang gone. Ga bolelelwa Saule fa Dafite a falotse mo Keila; mme a se ka a bolola." 
1Samuel23:14 Dafite a nna mo nageng mo mafelong a a thata, a sala mo lefatsheng la makgabana mo nageng ya Sife. Saule a mmatla ka malatsi otlhe, mme Modimo wa se ka wa mo tsenya mo seatleng sa gagwe." 
1Samuel23:15 Dafite a bona fa Saule a tsile go mmolaya. Dafite a bo a le mo nageng ya Sife mo sekgweng. 
1Samuel23:16 Jonathane morwa Saule, a nanoga, a ya kwa go Dafite mo sekgweng, a thatafatsa seatla sa gagwe mo Modimong." 
1Samuel23:17 A mo raya a re: “O se ka wa boifa; gonne seatla sa ga rre Saule ga se ketla se go tshwara; o tlaa nna kgosi ya Iseraele, mme ke tlaa bo ke rulaganye nao; mo, rre Saule o a go itse.”" 
1Samuel23:18 Ka bobedi jwa bone ba dira kgolagano fa pele ga Jehofa; Dafite a nna mo sekgweng, mme Jonathane ene a ya kwa ntlong ya gagwe." 
1Samuel23:19 Foo ga tla Basife kwa go Saule kwa Gibea ba re: “A Dafite ga a a iphitlha kwa go rona mo mafelong a a thata mo sekgweng, mo thabeng ya Hakila, ntlheng ya borwa ya naga?" 
1Samuel23:20 Ke gone jaana, a kgosi e tle ka fa keletsong yotlhe ya mowa wa gago ya go tla, mme tiro ya rona e tlaa nna go mo tsenya mo seatleng sa kgosi.”" 
1Samuel23:21 Saule a re: “Lo segofadiwe ke Jehofa; gone lo nkutlwetse botlhoko. 
1Samuel23:22 Ke a lo rapela, yang lo tlhotlhomise thatathata, lo itse, lo bo lo bone felo ga gagwe kwa o tlhomameng gone, le yo o mmonyeng gone; gonne ke boleletswe fa a dira ka bonokopela thata." 
1Samuel23:23 Ka re, lo bone lo itse mafelo otlhe a gagwe kwa o iphitlhang gone, mme lo tle gape kwa go nna lo tlhotlhomisitse, mme ke tlaa ya le lona; go tlaa dirala fa a le mo lefatsheng ke mo senke fela mo gare ga ba makgolokgolo botlhe ba Juta.”" 
1Samuel23:24 Ba nanoga ba ya kwa Sife fa pele ga Saule. Dafite le banna ba gagwe ba bo ba le mo nageng ya Maone, mo Araba, go pota naga ntlheng ya borwa." 
1Samuel23:25 Saule le banna ba gagwe ba ya go mo senka. Mme batho ba bolelela Dafite; ke gone ka moo a fologela kwa letlapeng, a nna mo nageng ya Maone. E rile Saule a utlwa, a tsoma Dafite mo nageng ya Maone." 
1Samuel23:26 Saule a pota thaba kwano, Dafite le banna ba gagwe ba pota thaba ka ntlha e nngwe; Dafite a itlhaganela go tsamaya ka ntlha ya go boifa Saule; gonne Saule le banna ba gagwe ba ne ba dika Dafite le banna ba gagwe go tla ba ba tshwara." 
1Samuel23:27 Ga tla morongwa mongwe kwa go Saule a re: “Itlhaganele o tle; gonne Bafilisitia ba tlhasetse lefatshe.” 
1Samuel23:28 Jalo Saule a boa kwa go tsomeng Dafite, a thologela Bafilisitia, ke gone ka moo ba reileng felo foo leina ba re, Sela-hamalekothe." 
1Samuel23:29 Dafite a tlhatloga gone a nna mo mafelong a a thata a Enegedi. 
1Samuel24:1 Ga dirala e rile Saule a sena go bowa kwa go latelang Bafilisitia, a bolelelwa ga twe: “Bona, Dafite o mo nageng ya Enegedi.”" 
1Samuel24:2 Foo Saule a tsaya banna ba ba tlhophegileng ba Iseraele ba le 3 000, a ya go senka Dafite le banna ba gagwe mo mafikeng a a nnwang ke dipodi tsa naga." 
1Samuel24:3 A fitlha fa marakeng a dinku mo tseleng, kwa go nang le logaga gone; mme Saule a tsena gone a ya go ithoma. Jaana Dafite le banna ba gagwe ba bo ba ntse kwa tengteng ga logaga." 
1Samuel24:4 Banna ba ga Dafite ba mo raya ba re: “Bona, letsatsi le Jehofa o ne a bua nao ka ga lone ke le, a re: ‘Bona, ke tlaa tsenya mmaba wa gago mo seatleng sa gago, mme o tlaa mo direla ka fa go tlaa nnang molemo mo matlhong a gago ka gone.’ ” Foo Dafite a nanoga a kgaola lokoja lwa kobo ya ga Saule, Saule a sa itse." 
1Samuel24:5 Ga dirala ya re morago ga moo, pelo ya ga Dafite ya ikwatlhaya, ka a kgaotse lokoja lwa ga Saule." 
1Samuel24:6 Mme a raya banna ba gagwe a re: “A go se tualo fa nka direla morena wa me selo se, e le motlodiwa wa ga Jehofa, ke ka mo ntshetsa letsogo la me, ka a le motlodiwa wa ga Jehofa.”" 
1Samuel24:7 Dafite a kganela banna ba gagwe ka mafoko a, a se ka a ba leseletsa go tsogela Saule. Saule a nanoga mo logageng, a tsamaya." 
1Samuel24:8 Dafite le ene a nanoga morago ga moo, a tswa mo logageng, a tlhaeletsa kwa go Saule, a re: “Morena wa me, kgosi.” E rile Saule a gadima, Dafite a inamela fa fatshe ka sefatlhogo, a ikoba." 
1Samuel24:9 Dafite a raya Saule a re: “Ana o reeletsang mafoko a batho, fa ba re: ‘Bona, Dafite o senka go go utlwisa botlhoko’?" 
1Samuel24:10 Bona, gompieno matlho a gago a bonye jaaka Jehofa a ne a go tsentse mo seatleng sa me mo logageng; bangwe ba ne ba re ke go bolaye, mme leitlho la me la go rekegela; ka re: ‘Ga nketla ke ntshetsa morena wa me letsogo; gonne ke ene motlodiwa wa ga Jehofa.’" 
1Samuel24:11 Gape rra, bona, ee, o bone lokoja lwa kobo ya gago mo seatleng sa me; gonne e re ka ke kgaotse lokoja lwa kobo ya gago, mme ke se ka ka go bolaya, o itse o bo o bone, fa go se na bosula le fa e le tlolo mo seatleng sa me; ga ke a go leofela, le fa o tsoma mowa wa me go tla o o tshwara." 
1Samuel24:12 A Jehofa a atlhole gare ga me le wena, a Jehofa a mpusolosetse mo go wena; seatla sa me ga se ketla se nna mo go wena." 
1Samuel24:13 Go ntse jaaka seane sa ba bogologolo se bua se re: ‘Boikepo bo tswa mo baikeping;’ mme seatla sa me ga se ketla se nna mo go wena. 
1Samuel24:14 Ana kgosi ya Iseraele e bololetse mang? O tsoma mang? A ke ntša e e suleng, a ke letsetse?" 
1Samuel24:15 Ke gone a Jehofa a nne moatlhodi, a atlhole gare ga me le wena, mme a a bone, a ntshekele, a nkgolole mo seatleng sa gago.”" 
1Samuel24:16 Ga dirala e rile Dafite a sena go khutla go bua mafoko ao le Saule, Saule a re: “A ke lone lentswe la gago morwaaka Dafite?” Saule a tsholetsa lentswe la gagwe, a lela." 
1Samuel24:17 A raya Dafite a re: “O siame bogolo go nna; gonne o ntiretse molemo, mme nna ke go diretse bosula." 
1Samuel24:18 O boletse gompieno jaaka o ntiretse molemo, gonne e rile ka Jehofa a ne a ntsentse mo seatleng sa gago wa se ka wa mpolaya." 
1Samuel24:19 Gonne fa monna a fitlhela mmaba wa gagwe, a o a tle a mo lese a tsamaya sentle? Ke gone Jehofa a go duele ka molemo ka ntlha ya se o se ntiretseng gompieno." 
1Samuel24:20 Jaana, ke a itse fa ka mmaanete o tlaa nna kgosi, le gore bogosi jwa Iseraele bo tlaa nitamisiwa mo seatleng sa gago." 
1Samuel24:21 Ke gone ka re, inkanele ka Jehofa, fa o se ketla o tlosa losika lwa me morago ga me, le go re ga o ketla o nyeletsa leina la me mo ntlong ya ga rre.”" 
1Samuel24:22 Mme Dafite a ikanela Saule. Saule a ya gae; Dafite le banna ba gagwe ba tlhatlogela kwa felong fa go thata. 
1Samuel25:1 Samuele a swa; mme Baiseraele botlhe ba phuthega mmogo ba mo lelela, ba mo fitlha mo ntlong ya gagwe mo Rama. Mme Dafite a nanoga, a fologela kwa nageng ya Parane." 
1Samuel25:2 Ga bo go le monna mo Maone, yo dithuo tsa gagwe di neng di le kwa Karemele, monna yoo o ne a le mogolo thata, a na le dinku di le 3 000, le dipodi di le 1 000; mme a beola dinku tsa gagwe mo Karemele." 
1Samuel25:3 Leina la monna yoo e ne e le Nabale, leina la mosadi wa gagwe e le Abigaile; mosadi a bo a na le tlhaloganyo thata, a le montle mo sefatlhogong; monna ene a bo a le sebeto, a le bosula mo ditirong tsa gagwe; mme a bo a le wa kgotla ya ga Kalebe." 
1Samuel25:4 Dafite a utlwa a le kwa nageng fa Nabale a beola dinku tsa gagwe. 
1Samuel25:5 Dafite a roma makau a le some; Dafite a raya makau a re: “Tlhatlogelang kwa Karemele, lo ye kwa goo rra Nabale, lo mo dumedise ka leina la me." 
1Samuel25:6 Lo ree ene yo o tshelang a le mo letlotlong, lo bue jaana lo re: ‘A kagiso e nne le wena, a kagiso e nne le ntlo ya gago, a go nne kagiso mo go tsotlhe tse o nang natso." 
1Samuel25:7 Jaana ke utlwile fa o na le babeodi. Basimane ba gago ba ba disang, ba ntse ba na le rona, ga re a ka ra ba utlwisa botlhoko, le gone ga ba a ka ba tlhokafalelwa ke sepe ka lobaka lotlhe lwa fa ba le mo Karemele." 
1Samuel25:8 Botsa makau a gago, ba tlaa go bolelela. Ke gone a makau a me a bone botsalano mo matlhong a gago; gonne re tsile ka letsatsi le le molemo; ke a go rapela, naya batlhanka ba gago le morwao Dafite sengwe fela se se fa gaufi.’ ”" 
1Samuel25:9 E rile makau a ga Dafite a fitlha, a bua le Nabale ka fa mafokong otlhe ao, ka leina la ga Dafite, mme ba itse go khutla." 
1Samuel25:10 Nabale a fetola batlhanka ba ga Dafite a re: “Ana Dafite e be e le mang? Le morwa Jese e mang? Monomotlha go na le batlhanka ba le bantsi ba ba thobang mongwe le mongwe mo go mong wa gagwe. 
1Samuel25:11 A ke tlaa tsaya senkgwe sa me, le metsi a me, le nama ya me e ke e bolaetseng babeoledi ba me, ke di neye batho ba ke sa itseng kwa ba tswang gone?”" 
1Samuel25:12 Mme makau a ga Dafite a itsaya motlhala ba bowa ba fitlha ba mmolelela ka fa mafokong otlhe ao. 
1Samuel25:13 Dafite a raya banna ba gagwe a re: “A mongwe le mongwe a ikgatlhe ka tšhaka ya gagwe.” Mme mongwe le mongwe a ikgatlha ka tšhaka ya gagwe; le ene Dafite a ikgatlha ka tshaka ya gagwe; mme ga sala Dafite morago e ka ne e le banna ba ba 400; mme ba ba 200 ba sala le dithoto. 
1Samuel25:14 Lengwe la makau la bolelela Abigaile, mosadi wa ga Nabale, la re: “Bona, Dafite o ne a romile batho ba tswa kwa nageng, ba tla go dumedisa mong wa rona; mme a fitlha a ba kgalemela fela." 
1Samuel25:15 Banna bao ba bo ba le molemo thata mo go rona, ga re a ka ra utlwisiwa botlhoko, le gone ga re a ka ra tlhoka sepe ka lobaka lotlhe lwa fa re ntse re na nabo re le mo dinageng." 
1Samuel25:16 Ba ne ba le lorako fa go rona bosigo le motshegare, ka lobaka lotlhe lwa fa re na nabo re disitse dinku." 
1Samuel25:17 Ke gone jaana itse o bo o akanye se o tlaa se dirang; gonne bosula bo laoletswe mong wa rona, le ntlo yotlhe ya gagwe; gonne ene ke seramatla ruri, se motho o sa ka keng a bua naso.”" 
1Samuel25:18 Foo Abigaile a itlhaganela, a tsaya dinkgwe di le makgolo mabedi, le mefalo ya bojalwa jwa mofine e le mebedi, le dinku di le tlhano di baakantswe, le dielo di le tlhano tsa mabele a a gadikilweng, le marose a difine tse di swabileng a le lekgolo, le dipapetla tsa difeige di le makgolo mabedi, a di belesa ka diesela." 
1Samuel25:19 A raya makau a gagwe a re: “Nketelelang pele; bonang, ke tlaa lo latela.” Mme a se ka a bolelela monna wa gagwe Nabale." 
1Samuel25:20 Ga nna jalo, ya re a palame esela ya gagwe, a fologa ka phata ya thaba, bonang, Dafite le banna ba gagwe ba bo ba fologa ba lebaganye nae, mme a kopana nabo." 
1Samuel25:21 Dafite o ne a rile: “Ruri dilo tsotlhe tse seapu seo se nang natso mo nageng ke di boloketse lefela, mme go se ka ga tlhokafala sepe sa dilo tsotlhe tse e leng tsa gagwe. O ntefetse molemo ka bosula." 
1Samuel25:22 “A Modimo o direle baba ba ga Dafite jalo o bo o go fetise, fa e tlaa re bosa bo o sa ke bo ke sadisite sengwe le fa e le ngwana wa mosimane a le mongwe fela mo dilong tsotlhe tse e leng tsa gagwe.”" 
1Samuel25:23 E rile Abigaile a bona Dafite, a akofa a pagologa mo eseleng ya gagwe, a wela fa pele ga Dafite ka sefatlhogo, a ikobela fa fatshe." 
1Samuel25:24 A wela fa dinaong tsa gagwe a re: “A boikepo bo nne mo go nna morena wa me, a bo nne mo go nna; ke a go rapela, o mme lelata la gago le bue mo ditsebeng tsa gago, o utlwe mafoko a lelata la gago." 
1Samuel25:25 Ke a go rapela, a morena wa me a se tlhokomele monna yole wa seramatla, e bong Nabale; gonne jaaka leina la gagwe le ntse, le ene o ntse jalo; Nabale ke leina la gagwe, mme boeleele bo mo go ene; nna lelata la gago ga ke a ka ka bona makau a morena wa me o ne o a romile." 
1Samuel25:26 Jaana ka re, morena wa me, jaaka Jehofa a tshedile le jaaka mowa wa gago o tshedile, e re ka Jehofa a go thibile mo molatong wa madi, le mo go ipusolosetseng ka seatla sa gago, ka re: A baba ba gago le ba ba batlelang morena wa me bsula ba nne jaaka Nabale." 
1Samuel25:27 Jaana thelesetso e lelata la gago le e lerileng moreneng wa me, e newe makau a a setseng morena wa me morago." 
1Samuel25:28 Ke a go rapela, o itshwarele tlolo ya lelata la gago; gonne ruri Jehofa o tlaa direla morena wa me ntlo ya tlhomamo, ka morena wa me a tlhabana ditlhabano tsa ga Jehofa; bosula ga bo ketla bo fitlhelwa mo go wena ka metlha yotlhe ya gago." 
1Samuel25:29 Le fa motho a go tsogologetse, a re o a go konatelela, a batla mowa wa gago, le fa go ntse jalo, mowa wa morena wa me o tlaa fitlhelwa mo ngateng ya botshelo mo go Jehofa Modimo wa gago, mewa ya baba ba gago o tlaa e konopela koo jaaka ekete e tswa mo khuting ya motsekedi." 
1Samuel25:30 Go tlaa dirala, e tlaa re Jehofa a sena go direla morena wa me ka fa go tsotlhe tse di molemo, tse o di buileng ka ga gago, a go tlhomile go nna kgosana ya Iseraele;" 
1Samuel25:31 moo, ga go ketla go nna khutsafalo mo go wena, le fa e le kgopiso ya pelo mo go morena wa me, ya go re o kile wa tsholola madi a a se nang molato, le fa e le go re morena wa me o kile a ipusolosetsa ka esi. E tlaa re Jehofa a sena go direla morena wa me sentle, foo o gakologelwe lelata la gago.”" 
1Samuel25:32 Dafite a raya Abigaile a re: “A go bakwe Jehofa Modimo wa Iseraele, yo o go romileng gompieno wa tla go nkgatlhantsha." 
1Samuel25:33 A go bakwe botlhale jwa gago, a go bakwe wena, yo o nthibileng gompieno mo mading a a se nang molato, le mo go ipusolosetseng ka seatla sa me." 
1Samuel25:34 Gonne ruriruri, jaaka Jehofa Modimo wa Iseraele a tshedile, yo o nthibileng, gore ke se ka ka go utlwisa botlhoko, fa o ka bo o se ka wa itlhaganela wa tla go nkgatlhantsha, ruri e ne e tlaa re bosa bo o sa, go ka bo go se ka ga salela Nabale sepe, le fa e le ngwana a le mongwe fela wa mosimane.”" 
1Samuel25:35 Jalo Dafite a amogela mo seatleng sa gagwe se o ne a se mo lereditse; a mo raya a re: “Ya ka kagiso kwa ntlong ya gago; bona, ke reeditse lentswe la gago, le wena ke go tshotse sentle.”" 
1Samuel25:36 Abigaile a fitlha kwa go Nabale; mme bonang a bo a dira modiro mo ntlong ya gagwe, o o tshwanang le modiro wa kgosi; mme pelo ya ga Nabale e ne e tlhapetswe mo teng ga gagwe, gonne a tagilwe thata; ke gone ka moo mosadi o se kang a mmolelela sepe, bonnye le fa e le bogolo, ga tsamaya bosa jwa sa." 
1Samuel25:37 Ga dirala ya re ka moso bojalwa bo dule mo go Nabale, mosadi wa gagwe a mmolelela dilo tse, mme pelo ya gagwe ya nyera mo teng ga gagwe, a nna jaaka lentswe fela." 
1Samuel25:38 Ga dirala e ka ne e le morago ga malatsi a le some, Jehofa a itaya Nabale, mme a swa." 
1Samuel25:39 E rile Dafite a utlwa fa Nabale a sule, a re: “A go bakwe Jehofa, yo o sekileng kgobo ya me e e tswang mo seatleng sa ga Nabale, mme a thiba motlhanka wa gagwe mo bosuleng; go dira bosula ga Nabale, Jehofa o go buseditse mo tlhogong ya gagwe ka esi.” Dafite a roma, a ya go bua ka ga Abigaile, go mo tsaya a nna mosadi wa gagwe." 
1Samuel25:40 E rile batlhanka ba ga Dafite ba fitlha kwa go Abigaile kwa Karemele, ba bua nae ba re: “Dafite o re romile kwano go wena, go tla go go tsaya o ya go nna mosadi wa gagwe.”" 
1Samuel25:41 Mme a nanoga, a ikobela fa fatshe ka sefatlhogo, a re: “Bona, lelata la gago ke motlhanka wa go tlhapisa dinao tsa batlhanka ba morena wa me.”" 
1Samuel25:42 Abigaile a itlhaganela, a tloga, a palama esela, a na le barweetsana ba gagwe ba le batlhano ba ba mo salang morago; mme a sala barongwa ba ga Dafite morago, a ya a nna mosadi wa gagwe." 
1Samuel25:43 Le gone Dafite a tsaya le Ahinoame wa Jesereele; boo babedi ba nna basadi ba gagwe. 
1Samuel25:44 Mme jaana Mikale, morwadia Saule, mosadi wa ga Dafite, Saule o ne a mo neile Paleti morwa Laiše, yo e neng e le motho wa Galime." 
1Samuel26:1 Basife ba tla mo go Saule kwa Gibea, ba re: “A Dafite ga a a iphitlha mo thabeng ya Hakila, e e lebaganyeng le naga?”" 
1Samuel26:2 Foo Saule a nanoga a fologela kwa nageng ya Sife a na le banna ba ba tlhophegileng ba Iseraele ba le 3 000, a ya go senka Dafite mo nageng ya Sife." 
1Samuel26:3 Saule a thibelela mo thabaneng ya Hakila e e lebaganyeng le naga fa tseleng. Dafite a bo a ntse mo nageng, mme a bona fa Saule a mo latelela kwa nageng." 
1Samuel26:4 Ka ntlha ya moo Dafite a ntsha ditlhola, a lemoga fa Saule a tsile ka mmaanete." 
1Samuel26:5 Dafite a nanoga, a tla mo felong fa Saule o thibeletseng gone; Dafite a bona fa Saule o robalang gone le Abenere morwa Nere, molaodi wa ntwa ya gagwe; Saule a robala ka fa teng ga maemo a makoloi, batho ba thibelela tikologong ya gagwe." 
1Samuel26:6 Foo Dafite a bua, a raya Ahimeleke wa Mohite, le Abišai morwa Seruja monnaa Joabe a re: “E mang yo o tlaa yang le nna kwa go Saule kwa bothibelelong?” Abišai a re: “Ke tlaa ya nao.”" 
1Samuel26:7 Dafite le Abišai ba tla mo bathong bosigo; mme Saule a bo a robetse ka fa teng ga maemo a makoloi, lerumo la gagwe a le tlhomile mo mmung fa tlhogong ya gagwe; Abenere le batho ba bo ba robetse tikologong ya gagwe." 
1Samuel26:8 Foo Abišai a raya Dafite a re: “Modimo o tsentse mmaba wa gago mo seatleng sa gago gompieno; jaana ka re, ke a go rapela, o mme ke mo tlhabe ka lerumo ke mo tlhabele fa fatshe gangwe fela, ga nketla ke mo tlhaba gabedi.”" 
1Samuel26:9 Mme Dafite a raya Abišai a re: “O se ka wa mo senya; gonne mang yo o ka ntshetsang motlodiwa wa ga Jehofa letsogo, mme a tlhoka go nna molato?”" 
1Samuel26:10 Dafite a re: “Jaaka Jehofa a tshedile, Jehofa o tlaa mo itaya; gongwe letsatsi la gagwe la go swa le tlaa tla; gongwe o tlaa ya mo tlhabanong, mme a swe." 
1Samuel26:11 A go se nne jalo fa nka ntshetsa motlodiwa wa ga Jehofa letsogo; jaana ke a go rapela, a ko o tseye lerumo le le fa tlhogong ya gagwe, le kurwana ya metsi, mme re tsamaye.”"
