1Samuel26:12 Dafite a tsaya lerumo le kurwana ya metsi fa tlhogong ya ga Saule; ba tsamaya, mme ope a se ka a kubuga, ka ba ne ba robetse botlhe; ka gobo boroko jo bogolo jo bo tswang mo go Jehofa bo no bo ba wetse." 
1Samuel26:13 Foo Dafite a kgabaganyetsa ntlheng e nngwe, a ema mo godimo ga thaba kwa kgakala; go le sebaka se setona fa gare ga bone." 
1Samuel26:14 Dafite a tlhaeletsa kwa bathong, le Abenere morwa Nere a re: “A ga o arabe wena Abenere?” Foo Abenere a araba a re: “O mang wena yo o tlhaeleletsang kwa kgosing?”" 
1Samuel26:15 Dafite a raya Abenere a re: “A ga o monna yo o pelokgale? Go na le mang yo o tshwanang nao mo Iseraele? Ke ka ntlha yang o se ka wa lebela kgosi morena wa gago? Gonne go ile ga tsena motho mongwe a ya go senya kgosi morena wa gago. 
1Samuel26:16 Selo se o se dirileng ga se molemo. Jaaka Jehofa a tshedile, lo tshwanetse go swa, ka lo se ka lwa lebela morena wa lona, motlodiwa wa Jehofa. Jaana batla lerumo la kgosi kwa le gone, le kurwana ya metsi e e neng e le fa tlhogong ya yone.”" 
1Samuel26:17 Saule a itse lentswe la ga Dafite, mme a re: “A ke lone lentswe la gago, morwaaka Dafite?” Dafite a re: “Ke lentswe la me, kgosi morena wa me.”" 
1Samuel26:18 A ba a re: “Ke ka ntlha yang fa morena wa me a konatelela motlhanka wa gagwe? Gonne ke dirileng? Kgotsa go na le bosula bofe mo seatleng sa me? 
1Samuel26:19 Ke gone, ke a go rapela, a kgosi morena wa me a utlwe mafoko a motlhanka wa gagwe. Fa e le Jehofa yo o go ntlhotlheleleditseng, a a ke a amogele tshupelo; mme fa e le bana ba batho, a ba hutsege fa pele ga Jehofa; gonne ba ntelekile gompieno, gore ke se ka ka ngaparela boswa jwa ga Jehofa, ba re: ‘Ke tsamaye, ke ye go direla medimo e sele.’" 
1Samuel26:20 Jaana ka re, a madi a me a se wele fa fatshe ke le go sele ke se fa pele ga Jehofa; gonne kgosi ya Iseraele e bolotse e tsile go senka letsetse fela, go tshwana jaaka fa mongwe a tsoma lesogo mo dithabeng.”" 
1Samuel26:21 Foo Saule a re: “Ke leofile; boa morwaaka Dafite; gonne ga nketla ke tlhola ke go utlwisa botlhoko, ka botshelo jwa me bo ile jwa ratega mo matlhong a gago gompieno; bona, ke itirile seeleele, ke bile ke timetse thata.”" 
1Samuel26:22 Dafite a mo fetola a re: “Bona lerumo ke le kgosi! A lekau lengwe le kgabaganye le tle go le tsaya. 
1Samuel26:23 Jehofa o tlaa lefela mongwe le mongwe tshiamo ya gagwe le boikanngo jwa gagwe; gonne Jehofa o ne a go tsentse mo seatleng sa me gompieno, mme ka gana go ntshetsa motlodiwa wa ga Jehofa letsogo la me." 
1Samuel26:24 Jaaka botshelo jwa gago bo ne bo kaiwa segolo mo matlhong a me gompieno, a botshelo jwa me bo kaiwe segolo jalo mo matlhong a ga Jehofa, a nkgolole mo bohutsaneng jotlhe.”" 
1Samuel26:25 Foo Saule a raya Dafite a re: “O nne sego morwaaka, Dafite; o tlaa dira ka bonatla, ruri o tlaa fenya.” Mme Dafite a tsamaya, Saule le ene a boela felong ga gagwe." 
1Samuel27:1 Dafite a ithaya mo pelong a re: “A bo ke tlaa nama ke swa motlha mongwe ka seatla sa ga Saule; mo go nna go molemo bogolo go falolela kwa lefatsheng la Bafilisitia; Saule o tlaa ntlhoboga go tlhola a mpatla gope mo melelwaneng yotlhe ya Iseraele: jalo ke tlaa falola mo seatleng sa gagwe.” 
1Samuel27:2 Mme Dafite a nanoga, ene le ba ba 600 ba ba nang nae, a kgabaganyetsa kwa go Akiše morwa Maoke, kgosi ya Gathe." 
1Samuel27:3 Dafite a nna kwa go Akiše, ene le banna ba gagwe, mongwe le mongwe a na le ba ntlo ya gagwe, le e leng Dafite a na le basadi ba gagwe ba babedi, Ahinoame, wa Mojesereele, le Abigaile wa Mokaremele, mosadi wa ga Nabale." 
1Samuel27:4 Ga bolelelwa Saule fa Dafite a tshabetse kwa Gathe; mme a se ka a lhola a mmatla gope. 
1Samuel27:5 Dafite a raya Akiše a re: “Fa jaana ke bonye botsalano mo matlhong a gago, a ba nneye bonno mo go mongwe wa metse e e mo lefatsheng, gore ke age gone; gonne motlhanka wa gago o ka bo a nnelang nao mo motseng wa segosi?”" 
1Samuel27:6 Foo Akiše a mo naya Sikelage ka tsatsi leo; ke gone ka fa Sikelage e leng wa dikgosi tsa Juta ka gone le gompieno. 
1Samuel27:7 Palo ya malatsi a Dafite o ne a aga mo lefatsheng la Bafilisitia ka one e ne e le ngwaga o o tletseng le dikgwedi di le nne. 
1Samuel27:8 Dafite le banna ba gagwe ba bolola, ba tlhasela Bagešure, le Bagirise le Baamaleke; gonne merafe eo e ne e le banni ba lefatshe, ba e ne e le ba bogologolo, jaaka fa motho a ya Shure, e bong go ya kwa lefatsheng la Egepeto." 
1Samuel27:9 Dafite a kgemetha lefatshe, a se ka a rekegela monna le fa e le mosadi, mme a gapa dinku le dikgomo, diesela, dikamela, le diaparo; a bowa a tla kwa go Akiše." 
1Samuel27:10 Akiše a re: “Lo tswa go tlhasela kae gompieno?” Dafite a re: “Kwa Juta ntlheng ya borwa, le kwa ntlheng ya go pota Bajerameele kwa borwa, le go pota Bakene ntlheng ya borwa.”" 
1Samuel27:11 Dafite a se ka a rekegela monna le fa e le mosadi go tla a ba lere mo Gathe, a re: “Ba ka tla ba re bolela, ba re: ‘Dafite o ntse a dira jaana le jaana.’ ” Mokgwa wa gagwe o ne o ntse jaana ka metlha yotlhe a le mo lefatsheng la Bafilisitia." 
1Samuel27:12 Akiše a dumela Dafite a re: “Batho ba ga gabo ba Iseraele o ba itlhoiseditse ruri; ke gone ka moo o tlaa nna motlhanka wa me ka bosakhutleng.” 
1Samuel28:1 Ga dirala ya re ka metlha eo Bafilisitia ba phuthela mephato ya bone go ya ntweng, go ya go tlhabana le Baiseraele. Akiše a raya Dafite a re: “O bo o itse fa o bolola le nna mo ntweng, wena le banna ba gago.”" 
1Samuel28:2 Dafite a raya Akiše a re: “Ka re, o tlaa itse se motlhanka wa gago o tlaa se dirang.” Akiše a raya Dafite a re: “Ke tlaa go dira modisa wa tlhogo ya me ka bosakhutleng.”" 
1Samuel28:3 Jaana Samuele o ne a sule, mme Baiseraele botlhe ba mo leletse; ba mo fitlhile mo Rama, e bong mo motseng wa ga gabo. Saule o ne a tlositse ba ba buang le badimo le ba e leng baitseanape mo lefatsheng." 
1Samuel28:4 Bafilisitia ba phuthega ba fitlha ba thibelela mo Shuneme; Saule a phutha Baiseraele botlhe, ba thibelela mo Gileboa." 
1Samuel28:5 E rile Saule a bona ntwa ya Bafilisitia a boifa, pelo ya gagwe ya roroma thata." 
1Samuel28:6 E rile Saule a botsa mo go Jehofa, Jehofa a se ka a mo araba, le fa e le ka ditoro, le fa e le ka Urime, le fa e le ka baperofeti." 
1Samuel28:7 Foo Saule a raya batlhanka ba gagwe a re: “Mpatlelang mosadi mongwe yo o buang le badimo gore ke tle ke ye kwa go ene ke ye go mmotsa.” Batlhanka ba gagwe ba mo raya ba re: “Bona, kwa Enetore go na le mosadiyo o buang le badimo.”" 
1Samuel28:8 Saule a iphetola, a apara diaparo di sele, a ya, ene le banna ba le babedi ba ya nae, mme ba fitlha kwa mosading yoo go le bosigo; mme a re: “Ke a go rapela, a ko o ntshwabele, o mpolelele ka mowa wa sedimo, o tle o ntlhatlosetse mongwe fela yo ke tlaa mo go umakelang.”" 
1Samuel28:9 Mosadi a mo raya a re: “Bona, o a itse se Saule o se dirileng, jaaka a tlositse bone ba ba buang le badimo, le baitseanape mo lefatsheng; mme o beelelang botshelo jwa me seru go tla o mpolaya?”" 
1Samuel28:10 Mme Saule a mo ikanela ka Jehofa a re: “Jaaka Jehofa a tshedile, ga o ketla o diralelwa ke petso epe ka ga selo se.”" 
1Samuel28:11 Foo mosadi a re: “Ke tlaa go tlhatlosetsa mang?” A re: “O tle o ntlhatlosetse Samuele.” 
1Samuel28:12 E rile mosadi a bona Samuele, a gala ka lentswe le legolo; mme mosadi a bua le Saule a re: “O ntsieleditseng? Gonne o Saule.”" 
1Samuel28:13 Kgosi ya mo raya ya re: “O se ka wa boifa; gonne o bona eng?” Mme mosadi a raya Saule a re: “Ke bona modimo mongwe o tlhatloga o tswa mo mmung.” 
1Samuel28:14 A mo raya a re: “Popego ya one e ntse jang?” Mosadi a re: “Go tlhatloga monnamogolo; o khurumeditswe ka kobo.” Saule a lemoga fa e le Samuele, mme a inamela fa fatshe ka sefatlhogo, a ikoba." 
1Samuel28:15 Samuele a raya Saule a re: “Ana o ntlhokiseditseng boiketlo ka go ntlhatlosa?” Saule a mo fetola a re: “Ke pitlaganye thata; gonne Bafilisitia ba nkepela dira, Modimo o ntlogetse, ga o tlhole o nkaraba le fa e le ka baperofeti, le fa e le ka ditoro; ke gone ka moo ke biditseng wena, gore o tle o nkitsise se ke tlaa se dirang.”" 
1Samuel28:16 Samuele a re: “Ke ka ntlha yang o botsa nna, ka e le fa Jehofa a go tlogetse, o bile o ntse mmaba wa gago?" 
1Samuel28:17 Jehofa o itiretse jaaka a ne a bua ka nna; gape Jehofa o rutlile bogosi mo seatleng sa gago, o bo neile wa gaeno, e bong Dafite." 
1Samuel28:18 E re ka o se ka wa akela lentswe la ga Jehofa, wa ba wa se ka wa dirafatsa bogale jo bogolo jwa gagwe mo go Baamaleke, ke gone ka moo Jehofa o go diretseng selo se gompieno." 
1Samuel28:19 Gape le Baiseraele, Jehofa o tlaa ba tsenya nao mo seatleng sa Bafilisitia; e tlaa re ka moso wena le bomorwao lo bo lo nna le nna; Jehofa o tlaa tsenya le lone lesomosomo la Iseraele mo seatleng sa Bafilisitia.”" 
1Samuel28:20 Foo Saule a tloga a wa a namalala fa fatshe, a boifa thata, ka ntlha ya mafoko a ga Samuele; ga bo go se na thata mo go ene; gonne a tlhotse a bile a letse a sa je dijo." 
1Samuel28:21 Mosadi a tla kwa go Saule, a bona fa a tlaletswe thata, mme a mo raya a re: “Bona lelata la gago le reeditse lentswe la gago, mme ka baya botshelo jwa me mo seatleng sa me, ke reeditse mafoko a gago a o ne o a bua le nna." 
1Samuel28:22 Jaana ka re: Ke a go rapela, le wena o reetse lentswe la lelata la gago, o mme ke beye dijonyana fa pele ga gago; mme o je, gore o bone thata fa o tsamaya.”" 
1Samuel28:23 Mme a gana, a re: “Ga ke je.” Batlhanka ba gagwe ba na le mosadi ba mo patelela ka thata; mme a reetsa lentswe la bone. A namologa fa fatshe, a dula fa bolaong." 
1Samuel28:24 Mosadi a bo a na le namane e e nonneng mo ntlong; mme a akofa, a e tlhaba; a tsaya setou, a se duba, a se besa senkgwe se se sa bedisiwang." 
1Samuel28:25 A di baya fa pele ga Saule le fa pele ga batlhanka ba gagwe; mme ba ja. Foo ba nanoga ba tsamaya bosigo joo. 
1Samuel29:1 Jaana Bafilisitia ba phuthela dintwa tsotlhe tsa bone kwa Afeke; Baiseraele ba thibelela fa motsweding o o mo Jesereele. 
1Samuel29:2 Barena ba Bafilisitia ba feta ka ba makgolo, le ka ba makgolo a masome; Dafite le banna ba gagwe ba feta ba le mo tshimegeng ba na le Akiše." 
1Samuel29:3 Foo dikgosana tsa Bafilisitia tsa re: “Ana Bahebere ba, ba dirang fano?” Akiše a raya dikgosana tsa Bafilisitia a re: “A yo ga se Dafite, motlhanka wa ga Saule kgosi ya Iseraele, yo ke ntseng ke na nae malatsi a, kgotsa dinyaga tse, mme e sa le jaaka a thobela kwa go nna le gompieno, ga ke ise ke bone molato ope mo go ene.”" 
1Samuel29:4 Mme dikgosana tsa Bafilisitia tsa nna bogale thata nae; dikgosana tsa Bafilisitia tsa mo raya tsa re: “Busa monna yo, gore a boele kwa felong ga gagwe, kwa o mo laoletseng gone, a se ka a ya le rona tlhabanong, e ka tla ya re mo tlhabanong a nna mmaba wa rona; gonne seapu se se tlaa itetlanya le morena wa sone ka eng? A ga e tlaa bo e le ka ditlhogo tsa batho ba?" 
1Samuel29:5 A yo ga se Dafite yo ba ne ba opelelana ka ga gagwe mo dipineng ba re: “ ‘Saule o bolaile ba makgolo a masome ba gagwe, Dafite o bolaile ba makgolo a makgolo ba gagwe’?”" 
1Samuel29:6 Foo Akiše a bitsa Dafite, a mo raya a re: “Jaaka Jehofa a tshedile, o ntse o le tshiamo, go tswa ga gago le go tsena ga gago le nna mo ntweng go molemo mo matlhong a me; gonne e sa le ka o tla mo go nna nako ke eno, ga ke ise ke bone bosula mo go wena; le fa go ntse jalo barena ga ba go lebe sentle." 
1Samuel29:7 Ke gone jaana boa o tsamaye ka kagiso, gore o se itumolole barena ba Bafilisitia.”" 
1Samuel29:8 Dafite a raya Akiše a re: “Ke dirileng? O bonye eng mo motlhankeng wa gago ka lobaka lotlhe lo ke ntseng fa pele ga gago ka lone, nako e sa le eno, fa e tlaa bo ne ne fano ke sa ye go tlhabana le baba ba kgosi morena wa me?”" 
1Samuel29:9 Akiše a fetola a raya Dafite a re: “Ke a itse fa o le molemo mo matlhong a me, o ntse jaaka moengele mongwe wa Modimo; le fa go ntse jalo dikgosana tsa Bafilisitia di rile: ‘Ga a ye le rona tlhabanong.’" 
1Samuel29:10 Ke gone o tle o tsoge ka maphakela le batlhanka ba morena wa gago ba o tsileng nabo; mme e tlaa re lo sena go tsoga ka maphakela, bosa bo sele, lo tsamaye.”" 
1Samuel29:11 Jalo Dafite a tsoga ka maphakela, ene le banna ba gagwe, go tla ba tsamaya mo mosong, go boela kwa lefatsheng la Bafilisitia. Bafilisitia ba tlhatlogela kwa Jesereele." 
1Samuel30:1 Ga dirala e rile Dafite le banna ba gagwe ba sena go fitlha mo Sikelage ka tsatsi la boraro, Baamaleke ba ne ba tlhasetse ntlheng ya borwa le mo Sikelage, ba kgemethile Sikelage, ba o fisitse ka molelo." 
1Samuel30:2 Ba ne ba tshwere basadi le botlhe ba ba gone, bannye le bagolo; ga ba a ka ba bolaya bape, ba ba tsaya fela ba tsamaya." 
1Samuel30:3 Jalo e rile Dafite le banna ba gagwe ba tla mo motseng, bonang, wa bo o fisitswe ka molelo; basadi ba bone le bana ba bone ba basimane le ba basetsana, ba bo ba tshwerwe." 
1Samuel30:4 Foo Dafite le batho ba o nang nabo ba tsholetsa mantswe a bone ba lela, ga tsamaya ba tlhoka thata ya go tlhola ba lela." 
1Samuel30:5 Basadi ba ga Dafite boo babedi ba ne ba tshwerwe, Ahinoame wa Mojesereele le Abigaile mosadi wa ga Nabale wa Mokaremele." 
1Samuel30:6 Dafite a nna mo pitlaganong e kgolo; gonne batho ba re ba mo kgobotletsa ka maje, ka mewa ya batho e hutsafetse, mongwe le mongwe ka ga bana ba gagwe ba basimane le ba basetsana; mme Dafite ene a ithatafatsa ka Jehofa Modimo wa gagwe." 
1Samuel30:7 Dafite a raya Abiathare moperesiti morwa Ahimeleke a re: “Ke a go rapela, a ko o nteretse kwano sekhutlana.” Abiathare a isa sekhutlana gone kwa go Dafite." 
1Samuel30:8 Dafite a botsa Jehofa a re: “Fa ke latela lesomo le a ke tlaa le tshwara?” Mme a mo fetola a re: “Ba latele, gonne ruri o tlaa ba tshwara, mme o tlaa busa gotlhe go se na pelaelo.”" 
1Samuel30:9 Jalo Dafite a tsamaya, ene le banna ba ba 600 ba o nang nabo, a tla mo molatswaneng wa Besore kwa ba ba tlogetsweng ba setseng gone." 
1Samuel30:10 Mme Dafite a latela, ene le banna ba le 400; gonne banna ba 200 ba ne ba setse kwa morago, ba lapile thata, ba ba ba retelelwa ke go tshela molatswana wa Besore." 
1Samuel30:11 Ba fitlhela motho wa Moegepeto mo nageng, ba mo isa kwa go Dafite ba mo naya dijo a ja; ba mo naya metsi a nwa;" 
1Samuel30:12 ba mo ngathela ga papetlana ya mongoloi wa difeige, ba mo naya marose a le mabedi a ditshwabi tsa difine; e rile a sena go ja a tsitsiboga; gonne o ne a ntse a sa je dijo, le fa e le go nwa metsi ka malatsi a le mararo le masigo a le mararo." 
1Samuel30:13 Dafite a mo raya a re: “O motho wa ga mang? Mme o tswa kae?” A re: “Ke lekau la Egepeto, ke motlhanka wa Moamaleke mongwe; mong wa me o ntlogetse, ka e rile maloba ka tsogelwa ke botlhoko." 
1Samuel30:14 Ra tlhasela go pota Bakerethe ntlheng ya borwa, le kwa go leng ga Juta le go pota Kalebe ntlheng ya borwa; mme ra fisa Sikelage ka molelo.”" 
1Samuel30:15 Dafite a mo raya a re: “A o tlaa nkisa kwa lesomong leo?” A re: “Ikanele ka Modimo fa o se ketla o mpolaya, le fa e le go ntsenya mo seatleng sa mong wa me, mme ke tlaa go isa kwa lesomong leo.”" 
1Samuel30:16 E rile a sena go mo isa, bona, ba bo ba aname le lefatshe lotlhe, ba ja, ba nwa, ba tlhapelwa, ka ntlha ya thopo e kgolo e ba ne ba e gapile mo lefatsheng la Bafilisitia, le mo lefatsheng la Juta." 
1Samuel30:17 Go simolola ka lotlatlana loo ga ya maitseboeng a ka moso Dafite a ba kgemetha; go se ka ga falola motho ope wa bone, fa e se batho ba makau ba le 400 ba ba palameng dikamela, mme ba tshaba." 
1Samuel30:18 Dafite a tsaya gape gotlhe mo Baamaleke ba ne ba go gapile; Dafite a golola basadi ba gagwe boo babedi. 
1Samuel30:19 Go ne go sa tlhokafale sepe, se sennye le fa e le se segolo, bana ba basimane le fa e le ba basetsana, le fa e le thopo, le fa e le sepe se ba ne ba se gapile; Dafite a busa gotlhe fela." 
1Samuel30:20 Dafite a tsaya matlhape le matsomane otlhe, a ba ne ba a kgweetsa fa pele ga dikgomo tse dingwe tseo, a re: “Mo ke thopo ya ga Dafite.”" 
1Samuel30:21 Dafite a tla mo bathong ba ba 200 ba ba neng ba lapile ba retelelwa ke go ya le Dafite, ba ba ba sadisitseng fa molatswaneng wa Besore; mme ba tswa ba ya go kgatlhantsha Dafite, le go kgatlhantsha ba ba nang nae; ya re Dafite a atamela kwa bathong bao, a ba dumedisa." 
1Samuel30:22 Foo banna ba boikepo botlhe, le ba ba diramatla ba bone, ba ba neng ba tsamaile le Dafite, ba bua ba re: “E re ka ba se ka ba tsamaya le rona, ga re ketla re ba naya sepe sa thopo e re tswang go e busa, fa e se mongwe le mongwe mosadi wa gagwe le bana ba gagwe, gore ba ba goge ba tsamaye.”" 
1Samuel30:23 Mme foo Dafite a re: “Ga lo ketla lo dira jalo bana ba ga rra, ka se Jehofa o se re neileng, ene yo o re bolokileng a ba a tsenya lesomo le le neng le re bololetse mo atleng tsa rona." 
1Samuel30:24 Mang yo o tlaa lo reetsang mo selong se? Gonne jaaka kabelo ya yo o ileng tlhabanong e ntse, kabelo ya gagwe yo o ne a setse le dithoto e tlaa nna jalo, ba tlaa abelwa ka go tshwana fela.”" 
1Samuel30:25 Go simolola ka tsatsi leo go ya kwa pele ga nna jalo, a go tlhoma go nna molao, le molao o o tlhomameng mo Iseraele, nako e sa le eno." 
1Samuel30:26 E rile Dafite a tla mo Sikelege, a isa ga thopo kwa bagolwaneng ba Juta, e bong kwa ditsaleng tsa gagwe, a re: “Bonang, ke lo naya thelesetso ke eo ya thopo ya baba ba ga Jehofa.”" 
1Samuel30:27 A naya bone ba ba mo Bethele, le bone ba ba mo Ramothe wa Borwa, le bone ba ba mo Jatire;" 
1Samuel30:28 le bone ba ba mo Aroere, le bone ba ba mo Sifemothe, le bone ba ba mo Ešetemoa;" 
1Samuel30:29 le bone ba ba mo Rakale, le bone ba ba mo metseng ya Bajerameele, le bone ba ba mo metseng ya Bakene;" 
1Samuel30:30 le bone ba ba mo Horema, le bone ba ba mo Borašane, le bone ba ba mo Athake;" 
1Samuel30:31 le bone ba ba mo Heberone, le bone ba mafelo otlhe kwa Dafite le banna ba gagwe ba ne ba tle ba ye gone." 
1Samuel31:1 Bafilisitia ba tlhabana le Baiseraele; mme banna ba Iseraele ba tshaba fa pele ga Bafilisitia, ba wa mo thabeng ya Gileboa ba bolailwe." 
1Samuel31:2 Bafilisitia ba konatelela Saule thata le bomorwawe; mme Bafilisitia ba bolaya Jonathane, le Abinatabe, le Melekišue, bomorwa Saule." 
1Samuel31:3 Tlhabano ya pitlaganya Saule thata, bahudi ka mara ba mo atamela; mme a tlhabakwa thata ke bahudi ka mara." 
1Samuel31:4 Foo Saule a raya motshola dibolao tsa gagwe a re: “Somola tšhaka ya gago, o mphololetse ka yone; batho ba ba sa rupang ba, ba ka tla ba mphololetsa, mme ba ntshotla.” Mme motshola dibolao tsa gagwe a gana; gonne o ne a boifa thata. Ke gone Saule a tshwara tšhaka ya gagwe, a wela mo go yone." 
1Samuel31:5 E rile motshola dibolao tsa gagwe a bona fa Saule a sule, le ene a wela mo tšhakeng ya gagwe, a swa nae." 
1Samuel31:6 Jalo Saule a swa le bomorwawe ba bararo, le motshola dibolao tsa gagwe, le banna botlhe ba gagwe mmogo, ka tsatsi leo fela." 
1Samuel31:7 Banna ba Iseraele ba ba kwa moseja ga molapo le ba ba kwa moseja ga Joretane, ba rile ba bona fa banna ba Iseraele ba tshaba, le go re Saule le bomorwawe ba sule, ba tlogela metse ya bone, ba tshaba; mme Bafilisitia ba tla go aga mo go yone." 
1Samuel31:8 Ga dirala ka moso, e rile Bafilisitia ba tla go apola ba ba bolailweng, ba fitlhela Saule le bomorwawe ba bararo ba ole mo thabeng ya Gileboa." 
1Samuel31:9 Ba mo kgaola tlhogo, ba mo apola dibolao, ba roma mo lefatsheng la Bafilisitia mo tikologong, ba isa mafoko kwa ntlong ya medimo ya bone ya disetwa, le mo bathong." 
1Samuel31:10 Ba tsenya dibolao tsa gagwe mo ntlong ya boAšetarothe; ba kokothela mmele wa gagwe mo lorakong lwa Bethešane. 
1Samuel31:11 Mme e rile banni ba Jabeše-gileate ba utlwa ka ga gagwe se Bafilisitia ba se diretseng Saule," 
1Samuel31:12 banna ba ba pelokgale botlhe ba nanoga, ba lala ba tsamaya bosigo jotlhe, ba ya ba tlosa mmele wa ga Saule le mebele ya bomorwawe mo lorakong lwa Bethešane; ba tla mo Jabeše, ba e fisa gone." 
1Samuel31:13 Ba tsaya marapo a bone, ba a fitlha fa tlase ga setlhare sa motamariseka mo Jabeše, mme ba ikitsa go ja ka malatsi a supa." 
2Samuel1:1 Ga dirala e rile morago ga loso lwa ga Saule, Dafite a sena go hulara kwa go bolayeng Baamaleke, Dafite a bo a bile a tlhotse malatsi a le mabedi mo Sikelage;" 
2Samuel1:2 ga dirala, ya re ka letsatsi la boraro, ga tla motho a tswa kwa bothibelelong jwa ga Saule, diaparo tsa gagwe di gagogile, le mmu o le mo tlhogong ya gagwe; ga nna jaana, ya re a fitlha kwa go Dafite a wela fa fatshe, a ikoba." 
2Samuel1:3 Dafite a mo raya a re: “O tswa kae?” Mme a mo raya a re: “Ke falotse kwa bothibelelong jwa Baiseraele.” 
2Samuel1:4 Dafite a mo raya a re: “Go ile ga nna jang? Ke a go rapela, a ko o mpolelele.” A mo fetola a re: “Batho ba tshabile mo ntweng, le gone batho ba le bantsi ba ole ba sule; boSaule le Jonathane morwawe le bone ba sule.”" 
2Samuel1:5 Dafite a raya motho wa lekau yo o mmolelelang a re: “O itse jang fa Saule le Jonathane morwawe ba sule?” 
2Samuel1:6 Motho wa lekau yo o mmolelelang a re: “Ka tshogana ka ke le mo thabeng ya Gileboa, ka fitlhela Saule a itlhabeditse ka lerumo la gagwe; mme bona, ka fitlhela dikara le bapalama dipitse ba mo konateletse ka thata." 
2Samuel1:7 O rile a gadima a mpona a mpitsa. Ka araba ka re: ‘Ke fano.’ 
2Samuel1:8 A nthaya a re: ‘O mang?’ Ka mo raya ka re: ‘Ke Moamaleke.’ 
2Samuel1:9 A nthaya a re: ‘Ke a go rapela, a ko o eme fa go nna o mpolaye, gonne ke tshwerwe ke sedidi ka go bo botshelo jwa me bo sa le mmogo mo go nna.’" 
2Samuel1:10 Ka ema fa go ene, ka mmolaya, ka ke ne ke itse sentle fa a sa ka ke a tshela a sena go wa; ka tsaya serwalo se se mo tlhogong ya gagwe, le mofitshana mo letsogong la gagwe, ke di lerile kwano go morena wa me.”" 
2Samuel1:11 Foo Dafite a itshwara diaparo, a di gagola, le banna botlhe ba o nang nabo ba dira jalo." 
2Samuel1:12 Ba hutsafala, ba lela, ba ba ba ikitsa go ja go ya maitseboeng, ka ga Saule le ka ga Jonathane, le ka ga batho ba ga Jehofa, le ka ga ntlo ya Iseraele; ka ba ole ka tšhaka." 
2Samuel1:13 Dafite a raya motho wa lekau yo o mmoleletseng a re: “O mokae?” A mo fetola a re: “Ke morwa moeng, ke Moamaleke.”" 
2Samuel1:14 Dafite a mo raya a re: “Go ntse jang ka o se ka wa boifa go ntsha letsogo la gago wa bolaya motlodiwa wa ga Jehofa?” 
2Samuel1:15 Dafite a bitsa lekau lengwe a re: “Mo atamele o mo wele.” Mme a mo itaya a swa. 
2Samuel1:16 Dafita a mo raya a re: “A madi a gago a nne mo tlhogong ya gago; gonne molomo wa gago o supile ka ga gago, ka o re, O bolaile motlodiwa wa ga Jehofa.”" 
2Samuel1:17 Dafite a hutsafalela Saule le Jonathane morwawe ka khutsafalo e. 
2Samuel1:18 A raya batho a re ba rute bana ba Juta sefela sa bora; bonang se kwadilwe mo lokwalong lwa ga Jašare. 
2Samuel1:19 A re: “Iseraele we, a bo kgalalelo ya gago e bolaetswe mo mafelong a gago a a godimo! Ana diganka di ole jang!" 
2Samuel1:20 Lo se ka lwa go bolela mo Gathe, lo se ka lwa go utlwatsa mo mebileng ya Ašekelone; bomorwadia Bafilisitia ba ka tla ba itumela, bomorwadia bone ba ba sa rupang ba ka tla ba ja koma." 
2Samuel1:21 Lona dithaba tsa Gileboa, a go se ne monyo, le fa e le pula mo go lona, le fa e le maota a ditshupelo; gonne ke gone kwa thebe ya seganka e latlhetsweng gone ka bobe, thebe ya ga Saule, jaaka ekete ke ya yo o sa tlodiwang ka lookwane." 
2Samuel1:22 Mo mading a ba ba bolailweng, le mo mahureng a diganka, bora jwa ga Jonathane ga bo a ka jwa bowa fela, le tšhaka ya ga Saule ga e a ka ya bowa e iphotlhere fela." 
2Samuel1:23 Saule le Jonathane ba ne ba le bantle, ba le natefo mo matshelong a bone, le mo losong lwa bone ba ne ba sa kgaogana; ba ne ba le bofefo bogolo go bontswi ba batona, ba le thata bogolo go ditau." 
2Samuel1:24 Lona bomorwadia Iseraele, lelelang Saule yo o ne a lo apesa bohibidu jo bo letlhololo mo go kgatlhang, a baya mekgabo ya gouta mo diaparong tsa lona." 
2Samuel1:25 Ana diganka di ole jang mo gare ga tlhabano. Jonathane o bolaetswe mo mafelong a gago a a godimo. 
2Samuel1:26 Ke mo tlalelong ka ga gago Jonathane, mogolole; mo go nna, o ntse o le natefo thata; lorato lwa gago mo go nna lo ne lo gakgamatsa lo feta lorato lwa basadi." 
2Samuel1:27 Ana diganka di ole jang, le dibolao tsa ntwa di nyeletse jang!”" 
2Samuel2:1 Ya re morago ga moo, Dafite a botsa mo go Jehofa a re: “A ke ke ye kwa metseng mengwe ya Juta?” Jehofa a mo raya a re: “Ya.” Dafite a re: “Ke tlaa ya kae?” Mme a re: “Kwa Heberone.”" 
2Samuel2:2 Jalo Dafite a ya gone, le basadi ba gagwe ba babedi, Ahinoame wa Mojesereele, le Abigaile mosadi wa ga Nabale wa Mokaremele." 
2Samuel2:3 Le banna ba gagwe ba ba nang nae Dafite a ya nabo, mongwe le mongwe a na le ba ntlo ya gagwe; mme ba aga mo metseng ya Heberone." 
2Samuel2:4 Banna ba Juta ba tla ba tlotsa Dafite gone, gore a nne kgosi ya ba kgotla ya ga Juta. Ba bolelela Dafite ba re: “Banna ba Jabeše-gileate ke bone ba ba fitlhileng Saule.”" 
2Samuel2:5 Dafite a roma batho kwa banneng ba Jabeše-gileate, a ba raya a re: “Lo segofadiwe ke Jehofa ka lo diretse morena wa lona, e bong Saule, bopelonomi jo, lwa mo fitlha." 
2Samuel2:6 Jaana a Jehofa a nne bopelonomi le boammaaruri mo go lona; le nna ke tlaa lo lefela bopelonomi jo, ka lo dirile selo se." 
2Samuel2:7 Jaana a mabogo a lona a nne thata, lo bo lo nne pelokgale; gonne Saule morena wa lona o sule, le gone ba kgotla ya ga Juta ba ntloditse, gore ke nne kgosi ya bone.”" 
2Samuel2:8 Jaana Abenere morwa Nere, molaodi wa ntwa ya ga Saule, o ne a tshotse Išibošethe morwa Saule, a mo isitse kwa Mahanaime;" 
2Samuel2:9 a mo dirile kgosi ya Gileate, le ya Baašure, le ya Jesereele, le ya Eferaime le ya Baiseraele botlhe." 
2Samuel2:10 Išibošethe morwa Saule a bo a le dinyaga di le 40 fa a simolola go busa Baiseraele, mme a busa ka dinyaga di le pedi. Ba kgotla ya ga Juta ba sala Dafite morago." 
2Samuel2:11 Lobaka lwa fa Dafite a le kgosi mo Heberone ya ba kgotla ya ga Juta, e ne e le dinyaga di supa le dikgwedi di le thataro." 
2Samuel2:12 Abenere morwa Nere, a bo a na le batlhanka ba ga Išibošethe morwa Saule, a tswa Mahanaime a ya Gibeone." 
2Samuel2:13 Joabe morwa Seruja a na le batlhanka ba ga Dafite, a tswa a kopana nabo fa lekadibeng la Gibeone; mme ba dula, mongwe ka fa ntlheng nngwe ya lekadiba, yo mongwe ka fa ntlheng e nngwe ya lekadiba." 
2Samuel2:14 Abenere a raya Joabe a re: “Ke a go rapela, a makau a nanoge, a tshameke fa pele ga rona.” Joabe a re: “A ba nanoge.”" 
2Samuel2:15 Foo ba nanoga, ba kgabaganya ka go balwa; boora Benjamine, le boora Išibošethe morwa Saule, ba le 12, le batlhanka ba ga Dafite ba le 12." 
2Samuel2:16 Ba tshwaragana ka ditlhogo, mongwe le mongwe a tshwara yo o lebaganyeng nae, ba sotlhetsana ditšhaka mo ditlhakoreng; ba wa mmogo; ke gone ka moo felo foo ga bidiwa ga twe, Helekathe-hasurime, o mo Gibeone." 
2Samuel2:17 Tlhabano e ne e le botlhoko thata ka tsatsi leo; mme Abenere a fenngwa le banna ba Iseraele, fa pele ga batlhanka ba ga Dafite." 
2Samuel2:18 Bomorwa Seruja boo bararo ba bo ba le gone, e bong Joabe le Abisai le Asahele; Asahele a bo a le maoto a a bofefo jaaka phologolo ya naga." 
2Samuel2:19 Asahele a konatelela Abenere; ya re a tsamaya a se ka a fapogela ka fa go le legolo le fa e le ka fa go la molema a ntse a setse Abenere morago. 
2Samuel2:20 Foo Abenere a gadima a re: “A ke wena, Asahele?” Mme a araba a re: “Ke nna.”" 
2Samuel2:21 Abenere a mo raya a re: “Fapogela ntlheng ya le legolo kgotsa ya la molema, o tshware mongwe wa makau o tseye dibolao tsa gagwe.” Asahele a gana go fapoga mo go saleng ene morago." 
2Samuel2:22 Abenere a fela a raya Asahele gape a re: “Fapoga tlhe mo go ntshaleng morago; ana nka bo ke go itaanyetsang mo mmung? Jalo ke ne ke tlaa iponatsa jang mo go Joabe mogoloo?” 
2Samuel2:23 Mme le fa go ntse jalo a gana go fapoga; mme ka ntlha ya gone moo Abenere a mo swatlha mo mogodung ka ntlha ya theku ya lerumo la gagwe, mme lerumo la ya go tswa ka fa motlhaneng wa gagwe; mme a wela foo, a swela gone felong foo; ga dirala ya re botlhe ba ba fitlhang gone fa Asahele o wetseng a swela gone, ba ema." 
2Samuel2:24 Joabe le Abisai ba konatelela Abenere; letsatsi la ba phirimela ba fitlha fa thabeng ya Ama, e e lebaganyeng le Gia mo tseleng ya naga ya Gibeone." 
2Samuel2:25 Bana ba Benjamine ba phuthegela go Abenere, ba nna lesomo le le lengwe fela, ba ya ba ema mo godimo ga thaba nngwe." 
2Samuel2:26 Foo Abenere a tlhaeletsa Joabe a re: “A tšhaka e tlaa ja ka bosakhutleng? A ga o itse fa go tlaa nna botlhoko kwa bokhutlong? E tlaa nna lobaka lo lo kae, o ntse o sa reye batho gore ba boe mo go lelekeng ba ga bone?”" 
2Samuel2:27 Joabe a re: “Jaaka Modimo o tshedile, fa o ka bo o ne o se ka wa bua, ruri batho ba ka bo ba sa le ba tsamaya ka moso, mongwe le mongwe o ka bo a se ka a leleka ngwana a rraagwe.”" 
2Samuel2:28 Joabe a letsa lonaka, batho botlhe ba ema, ba se ka ba tlhola ba konatelela Baiseraele, le gone ba se ka ba tlhola ba tlhabana." 
2Samuel2:29 Abenere le banna ba gagwe ba lala ba tsamaya bosigo joo jotlhe ba raletse Areba; ba kgabaganya Joretane, ba ralala lefatshe lotlhe la Bitherone, ba fitlha mo Mahanaime." 
2Samuel2:30 Joabe a boa kwa go lelekeng Abenere; e rile a sena go phutha batho botlhe ga tlhokafala batlhanka ba ga Dafite ba le 19, le Asahele." 
2Samuel2:31 Batlhanka ba ga Dafite ba ne ba kgemethile boora Benjamine, le banna ba ga Abenere, ga tsamaya ga a swa banna ba le 360." 
2Samuel2:32 Ba tsaya Asahele ba mo fitlha mo phupung ya ga rraagwe, e e neng e le mo Bethelehema. Joabe le banna ba gagwe ba lala ba tsamaya bosigo jotlhe, mme ba selwa kwa Heberone." 
2Samuel3:1 Jaana ga nna ntwa ka lobaka lo loleele gare ga boo rra Saule le boo rra Dafite; Dafite a nonofa bogolo bogolo, boo rra Saule ba koafala bogolo bogolo." 
2Samuel3:2 Dafite a bona bana ba basimane mo Heberone; wa motsalwapele wa gagwe e ne e le Amenone, wa ga Ahinoame wa Mojesereele;" 
2Samuel3:3 wa bobedi e le Kileabe, wa ga Abigaile mosadi wa ga Nabale wa Mokaremele; wa boraro e le Abesalome morwa Maaka morwadia Talemai kgosi ya Gešure;" 
2Samuel3:4 wa bone e le Atonija morwa Hagithe, wa botlhano e le Shefathia morwa Abitale;" 
2Samuel3:5 mme wa borataro e le Ithereame, wa ga Egela mogatsa Dafite. Bao Dafite a ba bona mo Heberone." 
2Samuel3:6 Ga dirala ya re go sa ntse go le ntwa gare ga boo rra Saule le boo rra Dafite, Abenere a ithatafatsa mo ntlong ya ga Saule." 
2Samuel3:7 Jaana Saule o ne a na le mogadingwana mongwe, leina la gagwe e le Risepa, morwadia Aia; mme Išibošethe a raya Abenere a re: “Ka ntlha yang o tsenye mo go mogadingwana wa ga rre?”" 
2Samuel3:8 Foo Abenere a nna bogale thata ka ntlha ya mafoko a ga Išibošethe, a re: “A ke tlhogo ya ntša e e leng ya Sejuta? Gompieno ke diretse ntlo ya ga Saule rraago bopelonomi, le bana ba ga rraagwe, le ditsala tsa gagwe, le gone wena ga ke a go tsenya mo seatleng sa ga Dafite, le fa go ntse jalo gompieno o nnaya molato ka ga mosadi yo." 
2Samuel3:9 A Modimo o direle Abenere jalo, o bo o fetise fa ke sa direle Dafite jalo, jaaka Jehofa a mo ikanetse;" 
2Samuel3:10 go tlosa bogosi mo ntlong ya ga Saule, le go emisetsa Iseraele le Juta setulo sa ga Dafite sa bogosi, go tswa Dane go ya Beerešeba.”" 
2Samuel3:11 Mme a bo a sa nonofa go fetola Abenere ka lefoko lepe, gonne a mmoifa." 
2Samuel3:12 Abenere ka esi a roma batho kwa go Dafite a re: “Lefatshe ke la ga mang?” A ba a re: “Dira kgolagano ya gago le nna, mme bona, seatla sa me se tlaa bo se na nao go sokololela Baiseraele botlhe kwa go wena.”" 
2Samuel3:13 Dafite a re: “Go molemo; ke tlaa dira kgolagano nao; mme ke lopa selo se le sengwe fela mo go wena, ka re, ga o ketla o bona sefatlhogo sa me, fa o sa lere Mikale morwadia Saule pele, fa o tla go bona sefatlhogo sa me.”" 
2Samuel3:14 Dafite a roma batho kwa go Išibošethe morwa Saule, a re: “Nnaya mosadi wa me Mikale, yo ke mo ipeeleletseng ka nama ya ditlhong tsa Bafilisitia ba le lekgolo.”" 
2Samuel3:15 Išibošethe a roma a ya go mo tsaya mo monneng wa gagwe, e bong mo go Palatiele morwa Laiše." 
2Samuel3:16 Mme monna wa gagwe a ya nae, a eta a lela, a mo sala morago go ya go fitlha kwa Bahurime. Foo Abenere a mo raya a re: “Tloga o boe,” mme a boa." 
2Samuel3:17 Abenere a bua le bagolwane ba Iseraele a re: “E rile mo metlheng e e fetileng lwa bo lo ne lo batla gore Dafite a nne kgosi ya lona. 
2Samuel3:18 Jaana a go dirwe jalo, gonne Jehofa o buile ka ga Dafita a re: ‘Ke tlaa golola batho ba me Baiseraele mo seatleng sa Bafilisitia, le mo seatleng sa baba botlhe ba bone ka seatla sa ga Dafite motlhanka wa me.’ ”" 
2Samuel3:19 Le gone Abenere a seba le boora Benjamine; mme le gone Abenere a ya a seba le Dafite kwa Heberone gotlhe mo go neng go le molemo mo matlhong a Baiseraele, le mo go boo rra Benjamine botlhe." 
2Samuel3:20 Jalo Abenere a ya kwa go Dafite kwa Heberone, a na le banna ba le 20. Dafite a direla Abenere le banna ba o nang nabo modiro." 
2Samuel3:21 Abenere a raya Dafite a re: “Ke tlaa nanoga ke ya ke phuthela Baiseraele botlhe kwano kgosing, morena wa me, gore ba tle ba dire kgolagano nao, le gore o tle o buse gotlhe mo mowa wa gago o go eletsang.” Mme Dafite a naya Abenere tsela a tsamaya ka kagiso." 
2Samuel3:22 Mme bonang, batlhanka ba ga Dafite le Joabe ba bo ba tswa bonokwaneng, ba tla ba na le kgapo e kgolo; mme Abenere o ne a se kwa go Dafite, kwa Heberone; ka a mo neile tsela, mme a tsamaile ka kagiso." 
2Samuel3:23 E rile Joabe le ba lesomosomo lotlhe le o nang nalo ba sena go tla ba bolelela Joabe ba re: “Abenere morwa Nere o ne a tsile kgosing, mme kgosi e mo neile tsela, mme o tsamaile ka kagiso.”" 
2Samuel3:24 Joabe a ya kwa kgosing, a re: “O dirileng! Bona, Abenere o ne a tsile mo go wena; ana go ntse jang ka o mo neile tsela, mme o etse ruri?" 
2Samuel3:25 O a mo itse Abenere morwa Nere, fa a ne a tsile go go tsietsa, le go itse go tswa ga gago le go tsena ga gago, le go itse gotlhe mo o go dirang.”" 
2Samuel3:26 E rile Joabe a sena go tswa mo go Dafite, a roma batho ba latela Abenere, mme ba mmusa fa sedibeng sa Sira; mme Dafite a bo a sa itse." 
2Samuel3:27 E rile Abenere a sena go boela mo Heberone, Joabe a mo isa fa thoko mo gare ga kgoro, a ya go seba nae, a mo swatlhetsa gone mo mogodung, a ba a swa, ka ntlha ya madi a ga Asahele monnawe." 
2Samuel3:28 Morago ga moo ya re Dafite a utlwa, a re: “Nna le bogosi jwa me ga re na molato fa pele ga Jehofa ka bosakhutleng ka ga madi a ga Abenere morwa Nere." 
2Samuel3:29 A a wele mo tlhogong ya ga Joabe, le mo go botlhe ba ntlo ya ga rraagwe, a go se tlhokafale mo ntlong ya ga Joabe mongwe yo o nang le keleketlo, kgotsa yo o leng molepero, kgotsa yo o ikokotlelang ka seikokotlelo, kgotsa yo o wang ka tšhaka, kgotsa yo o tlhokang dijo.”" 
2Samuel3:30 Jalo Joabe le Abisai monnawe ba bolaya Abenere, ka a ne a bolaile Asahele monnaa bone kwa Gibeone go tlhabanwa." 
2Samuel3:31 Dafite a raya Joabe, le batho botlhe ba ba nang nae, a re: “Ikgagoleng diaparo, lo itlame ka letsela la kgetse, lo hutsafale fa pele ga Abenere.” Kgosi Dafite a sala setshola moswi morago." 
2Samuel3:32 Ba fitlha Abenere mo Heberone; kgosi ya tsholetsa lentswe ya lela fa phupung ya ga Abenere; le batho botlhe ba lela. 
2Samuel3:33 Kgosi ya lelela Abenere a re: “A Abenere o ne a tshwanetse go swa jaaka seeleele? 
2Samuel3:34 Mabogo a gago a ne a sa bofiwa le maoto a gago a se mo diketaneng; jaaka fa monna a wela fa pele ga bana ba boikepo, o ole jalo.” Batho botlhe ba ba ba mo lelela gape." 
2Samuel3:35 Batho botlhe ba tla go rapela Dafite gore a je dijo go sa ntse go le motshegare; mme Dafite a ikana a re: “A Modimo o ntirele jalo, o bo o fetise, fa nka leka dijo, le fa e le sengwe se sele, letsatsi le ise le phirime pele.”" 
2Samuel3:36 Batho botlhe ba go ela tlhoko, mme ga ba kgatlha; jaaka sengwe le sengwe se kgosi e se dirang se kgatlha batho botlhe." 
2Samuel3:37 Jalo batho botlhe, le Baiseraele botlhe ba ne ba tlhaloganya ka tsatsi leo fa kgosi e sa laola go bolaya Abenere morwa Nere." 
2Samuel3:38 Kgosi ya raya batlhanka ba yone ya re: “A ga lo itse fa go ole kgosana le monna yo motona mo Iseraele gompieno? 
2Samuel3:39 Gompieno ke bokoa, le fa ke tloditswe go nna kgosi; banna ba, bomorwa Seruja ba thata bobe mo go nna; Jehofa o tlaa duela modira boikepo ka fa boikepong jwa gagwe.”" 
2Samuel4:1 E rile Išibošethe morwa Saule, a utlwa fa Abenere a swetse kwa Heberone, mabogo a gagwe a koafala, mme Baiseraele botlhe ba huduega." 
2Samuel4:2 Išibošethe morwa Saule, o ne a na le banna ba le babedi ba e neng e le balaodi ba ditlhopha tsa batho; leina la mongwe e le Baana, leina la yo mongwe e le Rekabe, e le bomorwa Rimone wa mo Beerothe, wa bana ba Benjamine; gonne Beerothe le one o kaiwa e le wa ga Benjamine." 
2Samuel4:3 Babeerothe ba tshabela kwa Gitaime, mme ba sa le ba nna bajaki gone le gompieno." 
2Samuel4:4 Jonathane morwa Saule, o ne a na le ngwana wa mosimane, a le segole mo dinaong. Ka e rile mafoko ka ga Saule le Jonathane a tla a tswa kwa Jesereele, a bo a le dinyaga di le tlhano, mmelegi wa gagwe a mo tsaya, a tshaba; ga dirala ya re mosadi a potlakela go tshaba, mosimane a wa, mme jalo a nna segole. Leina la gagwe e ne e le Mefibošethe." 
2Samuel4:5 Bomorwa Rimone wa Mobeerothe, e bong Rekabe le Baana, ba ya ba fitlha kwa ntlong ya ga Išibošethe ekete letsatsi le gotetse, ene a itapolositse go le motshegare." 
2Samuel4:6 Ba fitlha gone ba tsenela kwa gare ga ntlo, jaaka ekete ba tsile go tsaya mabele; mme ba mo sogotlhetsa mo mogodung; mme Rekabe le Baana monnawe ba falola." 
2Samuel4:7 Jaana ya bo e rile ba fitlha mo ntlong, ka a rapame mo bolaong jwa gagwe, mo borobalong ba mo sogotlhetsa, ba mmolaya, ba mo kgaola tlhogo, ba tsaya tlhogo ya gagwe, ba lala ba tsamaya bosigo jotlhe ka tsela ya Araba." 
2Samuel4:8 Ba isa tlhogo ya ga Išibošethe kwa go Dafite, ba re: “Bona tlhogo ya ga Išibošethe morwa Saule, mmaba wa gago, yo o ne a go batla go go bolaya ke e: Jehofa o lefeditse kgosi morena wa me gompieno mo go Saule, le mo losikeng lwa gagwe.”" 
2Samuel4:9 Mme Dafite a fetola Rakabe le Baana monnawe, bomorwa Rimone, wa Mobeerothe, a ba raya a re: “Jaaka Jehofa a tshedile, yo o rekolotseng mowa wa me mo pitlaganong yotlhe," 
2Samuel4:10 e rile mongwe a mpolelela a re: ‘Saule o sule,’ a gopotse gore o ntereditse mafoko a a molemo, ka mo tshwara, ka mmolaya mo Sikelage, e le tuelo e ke e mo neileng ka ga mafoko a gagwe." 
2Samuel4:11 Bogolo jang, fa banna ba boikepo ba bolaile motho yo o siameng mo ntlong ya gagwe a le mo bolaong, a ga nketla ke lopa madi ao mo seatleng sa lona, ke lo tlosa mo lefatsheng?”" 
2Samuel4:12 Dafite a laola makau a gagwe, mme ba ba bolaya, ba kgaola ditlhogo tsa bone le dinao tsa bone, ba ba pega fa lekadibeng mo Heberone. Ba tsaya tlhogo ya ga Išibošethe, ba e fitlha mo phupung ya ga Abenere mo Heberone." 
2Samuel5:1 Foo ga tla ditso tsotlhe tsa Iseraele kwa go Dafite kwa Heberone, tsa bua tsa re: “Bona, re lesapo la gago le nama ya gago." 
2Samuel5:2 E rile mo metlheng e e fetileng, Saule a sa le kgosi ya rona, e ne e le wena yo o bolotsang o ba o gorosa Baiseraele; Jehofa a go raya a re: ‘O tlaa otla tšhaba ya me Iseraele, o tlaa nna kgosana ya Iseraele.’ ”" 
2Samuel5:3 Jalo bagolwane botlhe ba Iseraele ba tla kgosing kwa Heberone; mme kgosi Dafite a dira kgolagano nabo mo Heberone fa pele ga Jehofa; mme ba tlotsa Dafite, gore a nne kgosi ya Iseraele." 
2Samuel5:4 E rile Dafite a simolola go busa a bo a le dinyaga di le 30, mme a busa ka dinyaga di le 40." 
2Samuel5:5 Ya re mo Heberone a busa Bajuta ka dinyaga di supa le dikgwedi di le thataro; mo Jerusalema a busa Baiseraele botlhe le Bajuta ka dinyaga di le 33. 
2Samuel5:6 Kgosi le batho ba yone ba ya Jerusalema ba ya go tlhasela Bajebuse, banni ba lefatshe; ba ba kileng ba bua le Dafite ba re: “Fa o sa tlose difofu le batlhotsi, ga o ketla o tsena mono;” ba bo ba ithaya ba re: “Dafite ga a ka ke a tsena.”" 
2Samuel5:7 Le fa go ntse jalo Dafite a gapa kago e e thata ya Sione; oo ke one motse wa ga Dafite. 
2Samuel5:8 Mme Dafite a bua ka tsatsi leo, a re: “Le fa e le mang yo o kgemethang Bajebuse, a a tlhatlogele kwa moeding wa metsi, mme a kgemethe batlhotsi le difofu, e le ba ba ilwang ke mowa wa ga Dafite.” Ke gone ka moo go tleng go twe: “Go na le difofu le batlhotsi gone; ga a ka ke a tsena mo ntlong.”" 
2Samuel5:9 Dafite a aga mo kagong e e thata eo, mme a e bitsa Motse wa ga Dafite. Dafite a aga motse mo tikologong ya gone go tswa Milo le go ya kwa teng." 
2Samuel5:10 Dafite a gola bogolo bogolo; gonne Jehofa Modimo wa masomosomo a bo a na nae. 
2Samuel5:11 Hirame kgosi ya Tura a roma batho kwa go Dafite, a isa ditlhare tsa masetara, le babetli ba dikgong, le baagi; mme ba agela Dafite ntlo." 
2Samuel5:12 Dafite a lemoga fa Jehofa a mo tlhomamisitse go nna kgosi ya Iseraele le go re, o goleditse bogosi jwa gagwe ka ntlha ya Baiseraele, tšhaba ya gagwe." 
2Samuel5:13 Dafite a fela a tsaya bagadingwana ba bangwe le basadi mo Jerusalema, a sena go tswa kwa Heberone; Dafite a fela a bona bana ba basimane le ba basetsana." 
2Samuel5:14 Maina a ba o ba bonyeng mo Jerusalema ke a: Shamua, Shobabe, Nathane le Solomone." 
2Samuel5:15 Le Ibehare, Elišua; le Nefege, le Jafie;" 
2Samuel5:16 le Elišama, le Eliata, le Elifelete." 
2Samuel5:17 E rile Bafilisitia ba utlwa fa ba tloditse Dafite go nna kgosi ya Baiseraele, Bafilisitia botlhe ba ya go batla Dafite; mme Dafite a utlwa, mme a fologela kwa kagong e e thata." 
2Samuel5:18 Jaana Bafilisitia ba ne ba tsile, mme ba ikanamisa mo molapong wa Refaime." 
2Samuel5:19 Dafite a botsa Jehofa a re: “A ke ke bololele Bafilisitia? A o tlaa ba tsenya mo seatleng sa me?” Jehofa a raya Dafite a re: “Bolola; gonne ruri ke tlaa tsenya Bafilisitia mo seatleng sa gago.” 
2Samuel5:20 Dafite a tla mo Baale-perasime, Dafite a ba kgemetha gone; mme a re: “Jehofa o phomegeletse baba ba me fa pele ga me, jaaka go phomegela ga metsi.” Ke gone ka moo a raya felo foo leina a re, Baale-perasime." 
2Samuel5:21 Mme ba tlogela ditshwantsho tsa bone tsa medimo gone, mme Dafite le banna ba gagwe ba di tsaya." 
2Samuel5:22 Bafilisitia ba tla gape, ba ikanamisa mo molapong wa Refaime." 
2Samuel5:23 E rile Dafite a botsa mo go Jehofa, a re: “O se ka wa bolola; o ba dike morago, o tle mo go bone bolebagana le ditlhare tsa mamulubere." 
2Samuel5:24 Go tlaa dirala e tlaa re o utlwa mosumo wa motsamao mo godimo ga ditlhare tsa mamulubere, foo o itshikinye; gonne e tlaa bo e le gone Jehofa o yang fa pele ga gago a ya go kgemetha ntwa ya Bafilisitia.”" 
2Samuel5:25 Dafite a dira jalo, jaaka Jehofa a mo laotse; mme a kgemetha Bafilisitia go tswa Geba go tsamaya o fitlha mo Gesere." 
2Samuel6:1 Gape Dafite a phutha batho botlhe ba ba tlhophegileng ba Iseraele, ba le 30 000." 
2Samuel6:2 Dafite a nanoga, a ya le batho botlhe ba o nang nabo, ba ya Baale-Juta, ba ya go tlhatlosa gone letlole la Modimo le le bidiwang ka leina, e bong leina la ga Jehofa wa masomosomo yo o dutseng mo ditšherubeng." 
2Samuel6:3 Ba baya letlole la Modimo mo kareng e ntšha, ba e ntsha mo ntlong ya ga Abinatabe e e mo thabeng; mme Usa le Ahio, bomorwa Abinatabe ba kgweetsa kara e ntšha." 
2Samuel6:4 Ba e ntsha mo ntlong ya ga Abinatabe e e mo thabaneng, e na le letlole la Modimo; Ahio a etelela letlole pele." 
2Samuel6:5 Dafite le ba ntlo ya Iseraele botlhe ba letsa fa pele ga Jehofa ka diletso dingwe le dingwe tse di dirilweng ka logong lwa mofira, le diharepe, le disaletere, le meropana, le ka diphare, le disemebale." 
2Samuel6:6 E rile ba fitlha mo seboping sa pholelo sa ga Nakone, Usa a ntshetsa letlole la Modimo letsogo, a le tshwara; ka dikgomo di ne di tilatila." 
2Samuel6:7 Bogale jwa ga Jehofa jwa tukela Usa, mme Modimo wa mo iteela gone ka ntlha ya timelo ya gagwe; mme a swela gone fa letloleng la Modimo." 
2Samuel6:8 Dafite a itumologa ka Jehofa a kgomogetse Usa; a raya felo foo leina a re, Peresausa, nako e sa le eno." 
2Samuel6:9 Dafite a boifa Jehofa ka tsatsi leo; a re: “Letlole la ga Jehofa le ka tla jang kwa go nna?” 
2Samuel6:10 Jalo Dafite a gana go isa letlole la ga Jehofa kwa go ene mo motseng wa ga Dafite; Dafite a le isa fa thoko mo ntlong ya ga Obete-etome wa Mogite. 
2Samuel6:11 Letlole la ga Jehofa la nna mo ntlong ya ga Obete-etome wa Mogite ka dikgwedi di le tharo; mme Jehofa a segofatsa Obete-etome le ntlo yotlhe ya gagwe. 
2Samuel6:12 Ga bolelelwa kgosi Dafite ga twe: “Jehofa o segofaditse ntlo ya ga Obete-etome, le tsotlhe tse e leng tsa gagwe, ka ntlha ya letlole la Modimo.” Dafite a ya a ntsha letlole la Modimo mo ntlong ya ga Obete-etome, a le isa mo motseng wa ga Dafite ka boitumelo." 
2Samuel6:13 Ga dirala ya re bone ba ba rweleng letlole la ga Jehofa ba sena go tsamaya dikgato di le thataro, a dira tlhabelo ka kgomo le kgongwana e e nonneng." 
2Samuel6:14 Dafite a bina fa pele ga Jehofa ka thata yotlhe ya gagwe; Dafite o ne a itlamile ka sekhutlana sa leloba. 
2Samuel6:15 Jalo Dafite le ba ntlo ya Baiseraele botlhe ba tlhatlosa letlole la ga Jehofa ka meduduetso le ka medumo ya dinaka. 
2Samuel6:16 Ga dirala ya re letlole la ga Jehofa le tla mo motseng wa ga Dafite, Mikale morwadia Saule, a bo a okometse ka fensetere, a bona kgosi Dafite a tlolaka a bina fa pele ga Jehofa; mme a mo nyatsa mo pelong ya gagwe." 
2Samuel6:17 Ba isa letlole la ga Jehofa mo teng, ba le baya mo bonnong jwa lone, mo gare ga mogope o Dafite o o le tlhometseng; Dafite a isa ditshupelo tse di fisiwang le ditshupelo tsa kagiso fa pele ga Jehofa." 
2Samuel6:18 E rile fela Dafite a sena go khutla go isa tshupelo e e fisiwang le ditshupelo tsa kagiso, a segofatsa batho mo ineng la ga Jehofa wa masomosomo." 
2Samuel6:19 A abela batho botlhe, e bong bontsi jotlhe jwa Baiseraele, banna le basadi, a naya mongwe le mongwe papetlana ya senkgwe, le kabelo ya nama le papetlana ya ditshwabi tsa mefine. Mme batho botlhe ba tloga, mongwe le mongwe a ya ga gabo." 
2Samuel6:20 Foo Dafite a boa a tla go segofatsa ba ntlo ya gagwe. Mme Mikale morwadia Saule, a tswa a ya go kgatlhantsha Dafite a re: “Ana kgosi ya Iseraele e ne e galalela jang gompieno, ya ikapola gompieno mo matlhong a malata a batlhanka ba yone, jaaka sephalamatlho se tle se ikapole se se na ditlhong.”" 
2Samuel6:21 Dafite a raya Mikale a re: “E ne e le fa pele ga Jehofa, yo o intshenketseng bogolo go rraago, le bogolo go botlhe ba ntlo ya gagwe, go tla a ntlhoma kgosana ya tšhaba ya ga Jehofa, ya Baiseraele; ke gone ke tlaa nyalakegang fela fa pele ga Jehofa." 
2Samuel6:22 Ke tlaa nama ke itira lonyatso bogolo go mo, ke tlaa nna bobenyana le mo matlhong a me; mo malateng a o buileng ka ga one, mo go one ke tlaa tlotlega fela.”" 
2Samuel6:23 Mikale morwadia Saule ga a ka a bona ngwana, le go ya kwa letsatsing la loso lwa gagwe." 
2Samuel7:1 Ga dirala e rile kgosi e setse e agile mo ntlong ya yone, Jehofa a e neile boikhutso mo babeng botlhe ba yone mo tikologong," 
2Samuel7:2 kgosi ya raya Nathane moperofeti ya re: “Nna ke agile mo ntlong ya masetara, mme letlole la Modimo le agile mo teng ga matsela a a lepeletseng fela.”" 
2Samuel7:3 Nathane a raya kgosi a re: “Ya o dire gotlhe mo go mo pelong ya gago; gonne Jehofa o na nao.” 
2Samuel7:4 Mme ya re bosigo joo lefoko la ga Jehofa la tla mo go Nathane la re: 
2Samuel7:5 “Ya o reye motlhanka wa me Dafite o re: Jehofa o bua jaana a re: ‘A o tlaa nkagela ntlo ya go tla ke aga mo go yone? 
2Samuel7:6 Gonne e sa le ka letsatsi le ke ntshitseng bana ba Iseraele mo Egepeto ka lone, nako ke eno, ga ke ise nke ke age mo ntlong, ke ntse ke tsamaya mo mogopeng le mo motlaaganeng fela." 
2Samuel7:7 Mo mafelong otlhe kwa ke tsamaileng le bana botlhe ba Iseraele gone, a nkile ka bua lefoko le mongwe wa ditso tsa Iseraele, yo ke mo laotseng gore a otle batho ba me Baiseraele ka re: Ana go ntse jang ka lo sa nkagela ntlo ya masetara?’" 
2Samuel7:8 “Ke gone jaana o reye motlhanka wa me Dafite o re: Jehofa wa masomosomo o bua jaana a re: ‘Ke ne ka go tsaya mo mafulong, o setse dinku morago, gore o tle o nne kgosana ya batho ba me ya Baiseraele;" 
2Samuel7:9 ke ne ke ntse ke na nao gongwe le gongwe kwa o ntse o ya gone, ke tlositse baba botlhe ba gago fa pele ga gago; mme ke tlaa go direla leina le legolo, le le tshwanang le leina la ba bagolo ba ba mo lefatsheng." 
2Samuel7:10 Ke tlaa baakanyetsa batho ba me Baiseraele bonno, ke ba tlhoma, gore ba age mo bonnong jo e leng jwa bone, ba sa tlhole ba sutisiwa; le gone bana ba boikepo ga ba ketla ba tlhola ba ba patika jaaka ga ntlha," 
2Samuel7:11 le jaaka go simolola ka tsatsi le ke laotseng ka lone, gore go nne baatlhodi mo bathong ba me Baiseraele; ke tlaa go naya boikhutso mo babeng botlhe ba gago. Gape Jehofa o a go bolelela fa a tlaa go dira motse." 
2Samuel7:12 E tlaa re malatsi a gago a sena go fela, o robala le borraeno, ke tlaa emisa wa losika lwa gago morago ga gago, yo o tlaa tswang mo mmeleng wa gago, mme ke tlaa tlhomamisa bogosi jwa gagwe." 
2Samuel7:13 Ene o tlaa agela leina la me ntlo, mme ke tlaa tlhomamisa setulo sa gagwe sa bogosi ka bosakhutleng." 
2Samuel7:14 Ke tlaa nna rraagwe, ene o tlaa nna morwaake; fa a dira boikepo, ke tlaa mmetsa ka thupa ya batho, le ka kgwathiso ya bana ba batho." 
2Samuel7:15 Boutlwelo botlhoko jwa me ga bo ketla bo mo tlogela, jaaka ke bo tlositse mo go Saule yo ke mo tlositseng fa pele ga gago." 
2Samuel7:16 Motse wa gago o tlaa tlhomamisiwa le bogosi jwa gago ka bosakhutleng fa pele ga gago; le setulo sa gago sa bogosi se tlaa tlhomamisiwa ka bosakhutleng.’ ” 
2Samuel7:17 Nathane a bua le Dafite ka fa mafokong a otlhe le ka fa ponatshegelong e yotlhe fela. 
2Samuel7:18 Foo Dafite kgosi a tsena, a dula fa pele ga Jehofa; mme a re: “Ana ke mang, Jehofa Modimo, le ntlo ya me ke eng, fa e bo ne ne o nterile fano jaana?" 
2Samuel7:19 Mo e ne e le selo se sebotlana mo matlhong a gago, Jehofa Modimo; o bile o buile le ka ga motse wa motlhanka wa gago go o segofaletsa lobaka lo loleele lo lo tlang; mo le gone e le ka fa mokgweng wa batho, Jehofa Modimo." 
2Samuel7:20 Dafite o ka fela a go raya a reng? Gonne o a mo itse motlhanka wa gago, Jehofa Modimo." 
2Samuel7:21 O dirile bogolo jotlhe jo ka ntlha ya lefoko la gago, le ka fa pelong ya gago go tla o bo itsise motlhanka wa gago." 
2Samuel7:22 Ka ntlha ya moo o mogolo, Jehofa Modimo; gonne ga go na ope yo o tshwanang nao, le gone ga go na Modimo ope kwa ntle ga gago, ka fa go tsotlhe tse re di utlwileng ka ditsebe tsa rona." 
2Samuel7:23 Go na le morafe ofe mo lefatsheng o o tshwanang le batho ba gago, ke gore, o o tshwanang le Baiseraele ba Modimo o ileng go ba ithekololela gore e nne tšhaba, le gore o itirele leina, le gore o ba direle dilo tse dikgolo, le lefatshe la gago go le direla dilo tse di boitshegang, fa pele ga batho ba gago, ba o tswang go ba ithekololela kwa Egepeto, ba tswa mo merafeng le mo medimong ya yone." 
2Samuel7:24 O ne wa itlhomamisetsa batho ba gago Baiseraele gore e nne tšhaba mo go wena ka bosakhutleng; le wena Jehofa wa ba wa tla wa nna Modimo wa bone. 
2Samuel7:25 “Jaana, Modimo, lefoko le o le buileng ka ga motlhanka wa gago le ka ga motse wa gagwe, a ko o le tlhomamise ka bosakhutleng, o tle o dire jaaka o buile." 
2Samuel7:26 A leina la gago le godisiwe ka bosakhutleng, ka gore, Jehofa wa masomosomo ke Modimo o o okameng Iseraele; mme motse wa motlhanka wa gago Dafite o tlaa tlhomamisiwa fa pele ga gago." 
2Samuel7:27 Gonne wena Jehofa wa masomosomo, Modimo wa Iseraele, o senoletse motlhanka wa gago wa re: ‘Ke tlaa go agela ntlo’; ke gone ka moo motlhanka wa gago o ikutlwileng mo pelong ya gagwe go go rapela ka morapelo o." 
2Samuel7:28 “Jaana, Jehofa Modimo, o Modimo, le mafoko a gago ke boammaaruri, o tlhomamiseditse motlhanka wa gago selo se se molemo se." 
2Samuel7:29 Ke gone jaana, a go go kgatlhe go segofatsa motse wa motlhanka wa gago, gore o tle o nnele ruri ka bosakhutleng fa pele ga gago; gonne wena, Jehofa Modimo, o se buile; a motse wa motlhanka wa gago o segofadiwe ka tshegofatso ya gago ka bosakhutleng.”" 
2Samuel8:1 Morago ga moo Dafite a kgemetha Bafilisitia, a ba fenya; Dafite a tlosa taolo ya motse o mogolo mo seatleng sa Bafilisitia." 
2Samuel8:2 A kgemetha Bamoabe, a ba lekanya ka mogala a ba laditse fa fatshe; a lekanya selekanyo sa megala e le mebedi ya go bolaya, le ka mogala o le mongwe fela o o tletseng wa go phedisa. Mme Bamoabe ba nna batlhanka ba ga Dafite, ba lere dikabelo." 
2Samuel8:3 Dafite a kgemetha le ene Hatatesere morwa Rehobe, kgosi ya Soba, ka a ya go ba a itseela puso ya gagwe kwa Nokeng." 
2Samuel8:4 Dafite a gapa mo go ene bapalama dipitse ba le 1 700, le ba dinao ba le 20 000; dipitse tsotlhe tsa dikara tsa tlhabano Dafite a di kgaola mesifa, a sadisa mo go tsone tse di lekanyeng dikara di le lekgolo." 
2Samuel8:5 E rile Basiria ba Damaseko ba tla go thusa Hatatesere kgosi ya Soba, Dafite a kgemetha Basiria, banna ba le 22 000." 
2Samuel8:6 Foo Dafite a baya ditlhopha tsa masole mo Siria wa Damaseko; Basiria ba nna batlhanka ba ga Dafite, ba lere dikabelo. Jehofa a naya Dafite phenyo gongwe le gongwe kwa o yang gone." 
2Samuel8:7 Dafite a tsaya dithebe tsa gouta tse di ne di le mo batlhankeng ba ga Hatatesere, a di isa kwa Jerusalema." 
2Samuel8:8 Kwa Beta le kwa Berothai, metse ya ga Hatatesere, kgosi Dafite a tsaya kgotlho e le kgolo thata gone." 
2Samuel8:9 E rile Toi kgosi ya Hamathe a utlwa fa Dafite a kgemethile ntwa yotlhe ya ga Hatatesere," 
2Samuel8:10 foo Toi a roma Jorame morwawe kwa go kgosi Dafite, a ya go mo dumedisa le go mo segofatsa, ka a tlhabanye le Hatatesere a mo kgemethile; gonne Hatatesere o ne a ntse a tlhabana le Toi. Jorame a tla a tshotse dilwana tsa selefera, le dilwana tsa gouta, le dilwana tsa kgotlho;" 
2Samuel8:11 le tsone dilo tseo Dafite a di tshwaela Jehofa, di na le selefera le gouta tse o di mo tshwaetseng tsa merafe yotlhe e o ntseng a e fenya;" 
2Samuel8:12 tsa Siria le tsa Moabe, le tsa bana ba Amone, le tsa Bafilisitia, le tsa Amaleke, le tsa kgapelo ya ga Hatatesere, morwa Rehobe, kgosi ya Soba." 
2Samuel8:13 Dafite a inaya leina ka a bowa kwa go kgemetheng Basiria mo molapong wa Letswai, e bong batho ba le 18 000." 
2Samuel8:14 A baya ditlhopha tsa masole mo Etome; mo lefatsheng lotlhe la Etome a baya ditlhopa tsa batlhabani, mme Baetome botlhe ba nna batlhanka ba ga Dafite. Jehofa a naya Dafite phenyo gongwe le gongwe kwa o yang gone." 
2Samuel8:15 Dafite a busa Baiseraele botlhe; Dafite a direla batho botlhe ba gagwe katlholo le tshiamiso. 
2Samuel8:16 Joabe morwa Seruja e ne e le molaodi wa ntwa; Jehošafate morwa Ahilute e le mokwadi wa ditiralo; 
2Samuel8:17 Satoke morwa Ahitube, le Ahimeleke morwa Abiathare, e le baperesiti; le Seraia e ne e le mokwaledi;" 
2Samuel8:18 Benaia morwa Joiata, e le molaodi wa Bakerethe le Bapelethe; bomorwa Dafite e le dikala tse dikgolo." 
2Samuel9:1 Dafite a re: “A go sa na le mongwe yo o setseng wa ntlo ya ga Saule, gore ke tle ke itshupe bopelonomi mo go ene ka ntlha ya ga Jonathane?”" 
2Samuel9:2 Ga bo go le motlhanka wa ntlo ya ga Saule yo leina la gagwe e leng Siba, mme ba mmiletsa kwa go Dafite; kgosi ya mo raya ya re: “A o Siba?” a re: “Motlhanka wa gago ke nna ene.”" 
2Samuel9:3 Kgosi ya re: “A ga go tlhole go na le ope wa ntlo ya ga Saule, gore ke tle ke itshupe bopelonomi jwa Modimo mo go ene?” Siba a raya kgosi a re: “Jonathane o sa na le ngwana wa mosimane, yo o segole mo dinaong.”" 
2Samuel9:4 Kgosi ya mo raya ya re: “O kwa kae?” Siba a raya kgosi a re: “Bona, o mo ntlong ya ga Makire morwa Amiele, kwa Lotebare.”" 
2Samuel9:5 Foo kgosi Dafite a roma, a ya go mo tsaya kwa ntlong ya ga Makire, morwa Amiele, kwa Lotebare." 
2Samuel9:6 Mme Mefibošethe morwa Jonathane, morwa Saule, a tla kwa go Dafite a wela ka sefatlhogo fa fatshe, a ikoba. Dafite a re: “Mefibošethe.” A araba a re: “Bona, motlhanka wa gago!”" 
2Samuel9:7 Dafite a mo raya a re: “O se ka wa boifa; gonne ruri ke tlaa itshupa pelonomi mo go wena ka ntlha ya ga rraago, mme ke tlaa go rebolela maota otlhe a ga Saule rraago; o tlaa jela dijo fa lomating lwa me ka metlha yotlhe.”" 
2Samuel9:8 A ikoba a re: “Ana motlhanka wa gago ke eng, fa e bo ne ne o leba ntša e e suleng jaaka nna jaana?”" 
2Samuel9:9 Foo kgosi ya bitsa Siba, motlhanka wa ga Saule, ya mo raya ya re: “Gotlhe mo e neng e le ga Saule le ga ba ntlo botlhe ba gagwe, ke go neile morwa mong wa gago." 
2Samuel9:10 O tlaa mo lemela lefatshe, wena le bomorwao, le batlhanka ba gago; mme o lere maungo, gore morwa mong wa gago a bone dijo; Mefibošethe morwa mong wa gago o tlaa jela dijo ka gale fa lomating lwa me.” Siba o ne a na le bana ba basimane ba le 15 le batlhanka ba le 20." 
2Samuel9:11 Foo Siba a raya kgosi a re: “Jaaka tsotlhe tse kgosi morena wa me o di laoletseng motlhanka wa gagwe, motlhanka wa gago o tlaa dira fela jalo.” Ka ga Mefibošethe, ga bua kgosi ya re: “O tlaa jela fa lomating lwa me, jaaka mongwe wa bomorwa kgosi.”" 
2Samuel9:12 Mefibošethe o ne a na le ngwana yo monnye wa mosimanyana, leina la gagwe e le Mika. Botlhe ba ba mo ntlong ya ga Siba, e ne e le batlhanka ba ga Mefibošethe." 
2Samuel9:13 Jalo Mefibošethe a aga mo Jerusalema; gonne o ne a jela fa lomating lwa kgosi ka metlha yotlhe; a bo a le segole mo dinaong tsoo pedi. 
2Samuel10:1 Ga dirala, e rile morago ga moo kgosi ya bana ba Amone a swa, mme Hanune morwawe a busa mo boemong jwa gagwe." 
2Samuel10:2 Dafite a re: “Ke tlaa itshupa pelonomi mo go Hanune morwa Nahaše, jaaka rraagwe a ne a itshupa pelonomi mo go nna.” Dafite a roma batlhanka ba gagwe ba isa matshediso ka ga rraagwe. Batlhanka ba ga Dafite ba tla mo lefatsheng la bana ba Amone." 
2Samuel10:3 Dikgosana tsa bana ba Amone tsa raya Hanune morena wa bone tsa re: “A o gopola go re Dafite o tlotla rraago, fa e bo ne ne a roma batshedisi kwa go wena? A Dafite ga a a roma batlhanka ba gagwe kwa go wena go tla ba kheleisa motse, le go o tlhola, le go o senya?”" 
2Samuel10:4 Jalo Hanune a tshwara batlhanka ba ga Dafite, a ba beola ditedu ntlhanngwe fela, a kgaola diaparo tsa bone ka bogare, a di kgaolela kwa maragong a bone, a itse go ba naya tsela." 
2Samuel10:5 E rile ba go bolelela Dafite, a roma a ya go ba kgatlhantsha; gonne banna bao ba bo ba tlhajwa ke ditlhong thata. Kgosi ya re: “Namang lo sa diegile koo Jeriko go tsamaya ditedu tsa lona di tlhoga, foo lo tlaa itse go tla.”" 
2Samuel10:6 E rile bana ba Amone ba ipona fa ba nkgela Dafite sebodu, bana ba Amone ba roma ba ya go thapa Basiria ba Betherehobe ka tuelo, le Basiria ba Soba, banna ba dinao ba le 20 000, le kgosi ya Maaka a na le banna ba le 10 000, le banna ba Toba ba le 12 000." 
2Samuel10:7 E rile Dafite a utlwa, a roma Joabe le lesomo lotlhe la diganka." 
2Samuel10:8 Bana ba Amone ba bolola, ba aba ntwa fa botsenong jwa kgoro; mme Basiria ba Soba, le ba Rehoba, le banna ba Toba le ba Maaka, ba ne ba le bosi mo nageng." 
2Samuel10:9 E rile Joabe a bona fa ntwa e mo tsentse gare e le kwa pele ga gagwe le kwa morago, a tlhaola mo banneng botlhe ba Iseraele ba ba tlhophegileng, a ba abela bolebagana le Basiria;" 
2Samuel10:10 batho ba bangwe a ba tsenya mo seatleng sa ga Abišai monnawe, a ba abela bolebagana le bana ba Amone." 
2Samuel10:11 A re: “E tlaa re fa Basiria ba mphekeetsa, foo o nthuse; fa bana ba Amone ba go fekeetsa, foo ke tlaa ya go go thusa." 
2Samuel10:12 O nametsege, re dire senna re direle batho ba ga rona, le metse ya Modimo wa rona; mme a Jehofa a dire se o se bonang se le molemo.”" 
2Samuel10:13 Jalo Joabe le batho ba o nang nabo ba atamela ba ya go tlhabana le Basiria; mme ba tshaba fa pele ga gagwe. 
2Samuel10:14 E rile bana ba Amone ba bona fa Basiria ba tshaba, le bone ba tloga ba tshaba fa pele ga Abišai, ba tsena mo motseng. Foo Joabe a bowa kwa baneng ba Amone, a tla Jerusalema." 
2Samuel10:15 E rile Basiria ba bona fa ba alotswe fa pele ga Iseraele, ba phuthega." 
2Samuel10:16 Hataresere a roma a ya go bolotsa Basiria ba ba kwa moseja ga Noka; ba tla mo Helame, ba na le Shobake molaodi wa ntwa ya ga Hataresere, e le moeteledipele wa bone." 
2Samuel10:17 Ga bolelelwa Dafite; mme a phutha Baiseraele botlhe, a kgabaganya Joretane, a tla mo Helame. Basiria ba ikabela Dafite, ba tlhabana nae." 
2Samuel10:18 Basiria ba tshaba fa pele ga Baiseraele; mme Dafite a bolaya Basiria, banna ba dikara di le 700 le bapalama dipitse ba le 40 000, a tlhaba Shobaka molaodi wa ntwa ya bone, a ba a tla a swela gone." 
2Samuel10:19 E rile dikgosi tsotlhe tse e neng e le batlhanka ba ga Hataresere di bona fa di alotswe fa pele ga Iseraele, ba dira kagiso le Baisraele, mme ba ba direla. Jalo Basiria ba boifa go tlhola ba thusa bana ba Amone." 
2Samuel11:1 Ga dirala e rile ka tshokologo ya ngwaga, ka lobaka lwa fa dikgosi di bolola di ya go tlhabana, Dafite a roma Joabe le batlhanka ba gagwe nae, le Baiseraele botlhe; ba ya ba senya bana ba Amone, ba tlhasela Raba. Mme Dafite a sala mo Jerusalema." 
2Samuel11:2 Ga dirala ya re go le maitseboana, Dafite a rapamologa mo bolaong jwa gagwe, a tsamaya tsamaya mo godimo ga ntlo ya kgosi; o rile a le mo godimo ga ntlo a bona mosadi mongwe a tlhapa; mosadi yo a bo a le montle thata go lejwa." 
2Samuel11:3 Dafite a roma a ya go botsa ka ga mosadi, mme mongwe a re: “A yoo ga se Bathešeba morwadia Eliame, mosadi wa ga Uria wa Mohite?”" 
2Samuel11:4 Dafite a roma batho ba ya go mo tsaya; mosadi a tsena kwa go ene mme a lala nae; (gonne o ne a itshekisitswe mo itshekologong ya gagwe;) mosadi a itse go boela kwa ntlong ya gagwe. 
2Samuel11:5 Mosadi a nna moimana; mme a roma a bolelela Dafite a re: “Ke moimana.” 
2Samuel11:6 Dafite a roma kwa go Joabe a re: “Roma Uria wa Mohite a tle kwano go nna.” Joabe a roma Uria kwa go Dafite. 
2Samuel11:7 E rile Uria a tla kwa go ene, Dafite a mmotsa botshelo jwa ga Joabe, le botshelo jwa batho, le ka fa ntwa e tswelelang ka gone." 
2Samuel11:8 Dafite a raya Uria a re: “Ya kwa ntlong ya gago, o itlhapise dinao.” Uria a tloga a tswa mo ntlong ya kgosi, a tloga a isediwa dijo tse di tswang kwa kgosing." 
2Samuel11:9 Mme Uria a robala fa mojakong wa ntlo ya kgosi a na le batlhanka botlhe ba morena wa gagwe, a se ka a ya kwa ntlong ya gagwe." 
2Samuel11:10 Ya re ba sena go bolelela Dafite fa Uria a se ka a ya kwa ntlong ya gagwe, Dafite a raya Uria a re: “A ga o tswe loetong? Ke ka ntlha yang o se ka wa ya kwa ntlong ya gago?”" 
2Samuel11:11 Uria a raya Dafite a re: “Letlole, le Baiseraele le Bajuta, ba mo diobong; le morena wa me Joabe, le batlhanka ba morena wa me, ba thibeletse fela mo nageng; jalo a ke ne ke ka ya kwa ntlong ya me, ka ya go ja le go nwa, le go lala le mosadi wa me? Jaaka o tshedile, le jaaka mowa wa gago o tshedile, ga nketla ke dira selo se.”" 
2Samuel11:12 Dafite a raya Uria a re: “Tlhola mono le gompieno, ka moso ke tlaa go lesa o tsamaya.” Uria a tlhola mo Jerusalema ka tsatsi leo le ka moso." 
2Samuel11:13 E rile Dafite a sena go mmitsa, a ja a nwa fa pele ga gagwe; a mo tagisa; ka maabanyane a tswa a ya go robala mo bolaong jwa gagwe a na le batlhanka ba morena wa gagwe, a se ka a ya kwa ntlong ya gagwe." 
2Samuel11:14 Ga dirala ya re ka moso Dafite a kwalela Joabe lokwalo, a lo isa ka Uria." 
2Samuel11:15 A kwala mo lokwalong a re: “O tle o beye Uria kwa pele, kwa tlhabano e gotetseng bogolo gone, mme lo mo tswe, lo boe ka morago, gore a tle a itewe, a swe.”" 
2Samuel11:16 Ga dirala ya re Joabe a laletse motse, a laolela Uria kwa o itseng fa go na la banna ba ba pelokgale gone." 
2Samuel11:17 Banna ba motse ba tshologa ba tlhabana le Joabe; ga wa batho bangwe, e bong bangwe ba batlhanka ba ga Dafite; Uria wa Mohite le ene a swa." 
2Samuel11:18 Foo Joabe a roma, a ya go bolelela Dafite dilo tsotlhe ka ga ntwa;" 
2Samuel11:19 a laela morongwa a re: “E tlaa re o sena go wetsa go bolelela kgosi dilo tsotlhe ka ga ntwa," 
2Samuel11:20 e tlaa re fa kgosi e ka nna bogale, mme e go raya e re: ‘Ana lo ne lo atamelelang bobe kwa motseng lo tlhabana? A lo ne lo sa itse fa ba tlaa hula ba le mo godimo ga lorako?" 
2Samuel11:21 E mang yo o iteileng Abimeleke morwa Jerubešethe? A ga se mosadi mongwe yo o ne a latlhela tshilo mo go ene a le mo godimo ga lorako, a swela kwa Thebese? Ana lo ne lo atamelelang bobe kwa lorakong?’ Foo o tle o re: ‘Motlhanka wa gago Uria wa Mohite le ene o sule.’ ”" 
2Samuel11:22 Jalo morongwa a tsamaya, a tla a kakanyetsa Dafite tsotlhe tse Joabe o ne a mo romile ka ga tsone." 
2Samuel11:23 Morongwa a raya Dafite a re: “Batho ba ne ba re fenya, ba re tshologela kwa nageng, re ne re tlhatlaganye nabo go ya fela kwa botsenong jwa kgoro." 
2Samuel11:24 Bahudi ba le mo godimo ga lorako ba hula batlhanka ba gago; batlhanka bangwe ba kgosi ba sule, le motlhanka wa gago Uria wa Mohite le ene o sule.”" 
2Samuel11:25 Foo Dafite a raya morongwa a re: “O tlaa raya Joabe jaana o re: ‘A selo se, se se ka sa go itumolola, gonne tšhaka e tle e je mongwe jaaka yo mongwe; tlhabana le motse ka thata e kgolo bogolo, mme o o fenye;’ le wena o mo nametse.”" 
2Samuel11:26 E rile mosadi wa ga Uria a utlwa fa Uria monna wa gagwe a sule, a direla monna wa gagwe khutsafalo." 
2Samuel11:27 Ya re khutsafalo e sena go feta, Dafite a roma a mo tlisa mo ntlong ya gagwe, a nna mosadi wa gagwe, a bona nae ngwana wa mosimane. Mme selo se Dafite o se dirileng sa itumolola Jehofa." 
2Samuel12:1 Jehofa a roma Nathane kwa go Dafite. A tla mo go ene, a mo raya a re: “Go kile ga ne go le banna ba le babedi mo motseng o le mongwe fela; mongwe a humile, mme yo mongwe a humanegile." 
2Samuel12:2 Monna wa mohumi a na le matsomane a le mantsi, le matlhape a le mantsi;" 
2Samuel12:3 mme monna wa sehumanegi a se na sepe fa e se kwanyana e namagatsanyana e le nngwe fela, e o ne a e rekile a e otlile; mme ya gola e nna nae le bana ba gagwe; e ne e ja dijo tsa gagwe, e nwa ga senwelo sa gagwe, e robala mo sehubeng sa gagwe, e nna mo go ene jaaka e ka bo e le ngwana wa mosetsana fela." 
2Samuel12:4 Monna wa mohumi a gorogelwa ke motsamai mongwe, mme a rekegela letsomane la gagwe le matlhape a gagwe, go tsaya mo go one go tlhabisa motho wa motsamai yo o mo gorogetseng, mme a gapa kwanyana ya monna wa sehumanegi, a e tlhabisa motho yo o mo gorogetseng.”" 
2Samuel12:5 Bogale jwa ga Dafite jwa tukela monna yoo; a raya Nathane a re: “Jaaka Jehofa a tshedile, monna yo o dirileng seo se o tshwanetse go swa;" 
2Samuel12:6 o tlaa lefa kwanyana ka go le gone, ka a dirile selo se, le ka gonne o ne a se ka a tlhomoga pelo.”" 
2Samuel12:7 Nathane a raya Dafite a re: “Ke wena monna yoo. Jehofa Modimo wa Iseraele o bua jaana, a re: ‘Ke go tloditse gore o tle o nne kgosi ya Iseraele, ka go golola mo seatleng sa ga Saule;" 
2Samuel12:8 ka go naya ntlo ya mong wa gago, le basadi ba mong wa gago mo sehubeng sa gago, ka go naya ba ntlo ya Iseraele le ya Bajuta; mme fa moo go ka bo go ne go le gobotlana bobe, nka bo ke go okeleditse ka dilo dingwe le dingwe." 
2Samuel12:9 Ana o nyaditse lefoko la ga Jehofa ka ntlha yang, wa dira se se bosula mo matlhong a gagwe? O remile Uria wa Mohite ka tšhaka, o bile o tshotse mosadi wa gagwe gore a nne mosadi wa gago, o mmolaisitse tšhaka ya bana ba Amone." 
2Samuel12:10 Ke gone, tšhaka ga e ketla e tlhola e tlogela ntlo ya gago; ka o nnyaditse, mme wa tsaya mosadi wa ga Uria wa Mohite gore a nne mosadi wa gago.’" 
2Samuel12:11 Jehofa o bua jaana a re: ‘Bona, ke tlaa go tsosetsa bosula mo go ba e leng ba ntlo ya gago, ke tlaa tsaya basadi ba gago, fa pele ga matlho a gago ke ba naya wa gaeno, mme o tlaa lala le basadi ba gago mo ponong ya letsatsi le." 
2Samuel12:12 Gonne wena o se dirile mo sephiring; nna ke tlaa dira selo se fa pele ga Baiseraele botlhe, le fa pele ga letsatsi.’ ”" 
2Samuel12:13 Dafite a raya Nathane a re: “Ke leofetse Jehofa.” Nathane a raya Dafite a re: “Jehofa le ene o tlositse boleo jwa gago; ga o ketla oo swa. 
2Samuel12:14 Le fa go ntse jalo, e re ka o neile baba ba ga Jehofa thata e kgolo ya go tlhapatsa ka tiro e, le ngwana yo o mmonyeng o tlaa swa ruri.”" 
2Samuel12:15 Nathane a tloga a ya kwa ga gagwe. Jehofa a itaya ngwana yo mosadi wa ga Uria o mmonyeng le Dafite, mme a nna botlhoko thata." 
2Samuel12:16 Ya re ka ntlha ya moo Dafite a rapelela ngwana mo Modimong; mme a ikitsa go ja, a tsena a lala a totometse fa fatshe bosigo jotlhe." 
2Samuel12:17 Bagolwane ba ntlo ya gagwe ba nanoga, ba ema fa go ene, go tla ba mo kakatlolola fa fatshe; mme a gana, le gone a se ka a ja dijo nabo." 
2Samuel12:18 Ga dirala ya re ka letsatsi la bosupa, ngwana a swa. Mme batlhanka ba ga Dafite ba boifa go mmolelela fa ngwana a sule; ka ba re: “Bonang, e rile ngwana a sa ntse a tshedile, ra bua nae, mme a se ka a reetsa lentswe la rona; o tlaa itshwenya bogolo jang fa re mmolelela go re ngwana o sule!”" 
2Samuel12:19 Mme e rile Dafite a bona batlhanka ba gagwe ba sebetsanya, a lemoga fa ngwana a sule; a raya batlhanka ba gagwe a re: “A ngwana o sule?” Ba re: “O sule.”" 
2Samuel12:20 Foo Dafite a tloga fa fatshe, a tlhapa, a tlola, a apara diaparo di sele; a tla mo ntlong ya ga Jehofa, a obama; foo a tla mo ntlong e e leng ya gagwe; ya re a batla jalo, ba baya dijo fa pele ga gagwe, mme a ja." 
2Samuel12:21 Foo batlhanka ba gagwe ba mo raya ba re: “Ana ke eng selo se o se dirileng? E rile ngwana a sa ntse a tshedile, wa ikitsa go ja, wa mo lelela; mme ya re ngwana a sena go swa o ema o ja dijo.”" 
2Samuel12:22 A re: “E rile ngwana a sa ntse a tshedile ka ikitsa go ja, ka lela; gonne ke itheile ka re: ‘Go itse mang boo Jehofa ga a kake a nna boutlwelo botlhoko mo go nna gore ngwana a tshele?’" 
2Samuel12:23 Jaana ka a sule nka bo ke ikiletsang go ja? A ke ka ba ka mmusa? Ke tlaa ya kwa go ene, ene ga a ketla a boela kwano go nna.”" 
2Samuel12:24 Dafite a gomotsa Bathešeba mosadi wa gagwe, a tsena kwa go ene a lala nae; mme a bona ngwana wa mosimane, a mo raya leina a re Solomone." 
2Samuel12:25 Jehofa a mo rata; mme a roma ka Nathane moperofeti, a mo raya leina a re Jedidia, ka ntlha ya ga Jehofa." 
2Samuel12:26 Jaana Joabe a tlhabana le Raba wa bana ba Amone, mme a gapa motse wa segosi." 
2Samuel12:27 Joabe a roma batho kwa go Dafite a re: “Ke tlhabanye le Raba, ee, ke gapile motse wa dinoka." 
2Samuel12:28 Ke gone jaana, phutha batho ba ba setseng, o thibelelele motse, o o gape; nka tla ka gapa motse, wa reelelwa leina la me.”" 
2Samuel12:29 Dafite a phutha batho botlhe, a ya kwa Raba, a o tlhasela, a o gapa." 
2Samuel12:30 A tsaya serwalo sa kgosi ya bone a se tlosa mo tlhogong ya yone; bokete jwa sone bo ne bo le talenta ya gouta, mo go sone go le majana a a tlhokegang; mme sa bewa mo tlhogong ya ga Dafite. A ntshetsa thopo ya motse kwa ntle, e le kgolo thata." 
2Samuel12:31 Batho ba ba mo go one a ba ntshetsa kwa ntle, a ba baya fa tlase ga dišage le fa tlase ga dikokola tsa tshipi, le fa tlase ga dilepe tsa tshipi, a ba raladisa bobesetso jwa setene; a direla metse yotlhe ya bana ba Amone jalo. Mme Dafite le batho botlhe ba boela Jerusalema." 
2Samuel13:1 Ga dirala e rile morago ga moo, Abesalome morwa Dafite a bo a na le kgaitsadie mongwe, e le motho yo montle, leina la gagwe e le Tamare; mme Amenone morwa Dafite a mo rata." 
2Samuel13:2 Amenone a tshwenyega thata a ba a tla a bobola ka ga Tamare kgaitsadie; gonne e ne ele kgarebane; mme go ne go le thata mo go Amenone go mo dira sengwe. 
2Samuel13:3 Amenone o ne a na le tsala nngwe, leina la gagwe e le Jonatabe morwa Simea, mogoloa Dafite; Jonatabe e ne e le monna yo o boferefere thata." 
2Samuel13:4 A mo raya a re: “Wena morwa kgosi go ntse jang o bopama jaana ka malatsi otlhe? A ga o mpolelele?” Amenone a mo raya a re: “Ke rata Tamare kgaitsadia Abesalome nnake.” 
2Samuel13:5 Jonatabe a mo raya a re: “Robala mo bolaong jwa gago o itsheme botlhoko; e tlaa re rraago a tla go go bona o mo reye o re: ‘Ke a go rapela, o mme kgaitsadiake Tamare a tle a nneye dijo, a di baakanye mo ponong ya me gore ke di bone, ke be ke di jele mo seatleng sa gagwe.’ ”" 
2Samuel13:6 Jalo Amenone a robala a itshema botlhoko; mme e rile kgosi e tsile go mmona, Amenone a raya kgosi a re: “Ke a go rapela, o mme kgaitsadiake Tamare a tle a ntirele dipapetlana tsa senkgwe le fa e le di le pedi mo ponong ya me, gore ke tle ke jele mo seatleng sa gagwe.”" 
2Samuel13:7 Foo Dafite a romela kwa gae kwa go Tamare a re: “A ke o ye kwa ntlong ya ga Amenone kgaitsadio, o mmaakanyetse dijo.”" 
2Samuel13:8 Tamare a ya kwa ntlong ya ga Amenone kgaitsadie; Amenone a bo a rapame. Mme Tamare a tsaya setou, a se duba, a dira dipapetlana tsa senkgwe mo ponong ya gagwe, a besa dipapetlana tsa senkgwe." 
2Samuel13:9 A tsaya pitsana e e lophaetla, a di gorometsa fa pele ga gagwe; mme a gana go ja. Amenone a re: “Ntshang banna botlhe ba tswe.” Mme banna botlhe ba tswa fa go ene." 
2Samuel13:10 Amenone a raya Tamare a re: “Lere dijo mo ntlwaneng gore ke jele mo seatleng sa gago.” Tamare a tsaya dipapetlana tsa senkgwe tse o di dirileng, a di isa mo ntlwaneng kwa go Amenone kgaitsadie." 
2Samuel13:11 Ya re a sena go di atametsa fa go ene go tla a di ja, a mo tshwara a mo raya a re: “Ntlo o lale le nna kgaitsadiaka.”" 
2Samuel13:12 A mo fetola a re: “Nyaa kgaitsadiaka, o se ka wa nkatisa; gonne ga go a tshwanela fa sengwe se se ntseng jalo se ka dirwa mo Iseraele; o se ka wa dira bosilo jo." 
2Samuel13:13 Nna ke tlaa isa kae ditlhong tsa me? Le ka ga gago o tlaa nna jaaka lengwe la masilo mo Iseraele. Ke gone ke a go rapela, bua le kgosi; gonne ga e ketla e gana gore o ntseye.”" 
2Samuel13:14 Le fa go ntse jalo a gana go reetsa lentswe la gagwe; mme e re ka a le thata bogolo go ene, a mo katisa, a lala nae." 
2Samuel13:15 Foo Amenone a tloga a mo tlhoa ka tlhoo e e feteletseng; ka tlhoo e o mo tlhoileng ka yone ya feta lorato lo o ne a mo rata ka lone pele. Amenone a mo raya a re: “Nanoga o tsamaye.” 
2Samuel13:16 Tamare a mo raya a re: “E seng jalo, gonne tshiamololo e kgolo e, ya go nteleka, e tlaa bo e gaisa e nngwe e o e ntiretseng.” A gana go mo reetsa." 
2Samuel13:17 Foo a bitsa motlhanka wa gagwe yo o mo direlang a re: “Ntshetsa mosadi yo kwa ntle a tswe mo go nna, mme o pakele setswalo morago ga gagwe.”" 
2Samuel13:18 Tamare o ne a apere seaparo se se mebalabala, gonne bomorwadia kgosi ba e leng makgarebane ba ne ba tle ba apare diaparo tse di ntseng jalo. Foo motlhanka wa gagwe a mo ntshetsa kwa ntle, a pakela setswalo morago ga gagwe." 
2Samuel13:19 Tamare a ipaya melora mo tlhogong a ikgagola seaparo se se mebalabala se o se apereng; a ipaya seatla mo tlhogong, a tsamaya, a tla a galela godimo." 
2Samuel13:20 Abesalome kgaitsadie a mo raya a re: “A Amenone kgaitsadio o ntse a na nao? Jaana o tle o didimale kgaitsadiaka; ke kgaitsadio; a selo se se se go tsene mo pelong.” Tamare a nna a poporogetswe fela mo ntlong ya ga Abesalome kgaitsadie. 
2Samuel13:21 E rile kgosi Dafite a utlwa dilo tsotlhe tse, a nna bogale thata." 
2Samuel13:22 Abesalome a se ka a bua le Amenone se se molemo, le fa e le se se bosula; mme a tlhoa Amenone ka a ne a katisitse Tamare kgaitsadie." 
2Samuel13:23 Ga dirala e rile morago ga dinyaga di le pedi tse di tletseng, Abesalome a bo a na le babeodi ba dinku mo Baalehasore o o bapileng le Eferaime; Abesalome a laletsa bomorwa kgosi botlhe." 
2Samuel13:24 Abesalome a tla mo kgosing a re: “Bona, motlhanka wa gago o na le babeodi ba dinku; ke a go rapela, a kgosi le batlhanka ba yone ba ye le motlhanka wa gago.”" 
2Samuel13:25 Mme kgosi ya raya Abesalome ya re: “Nyaa morwaaka, a re se tsamayeng rotlhe, re ka tla ra go imela.” A mo rapela thata; le fa go ntse jalo a gana go tsamaya, mme a mo segofatsa." 
2Samuel13:26 Foo Abesalome a re: “Fa go sa nna jalo, ke a go rapela, a mogolole Amenone a ye le rona.” Kgosi ya mo raya ya re: “O tlaa bo a elang nao?”" 
2Samuel13:27 Abesalome a e rapela thata, ya ba ya tla ya lesa Amenone le bomorwa kgosi botlhe ba ya nae." 
2Samuel13:28 Abesalome a laola batlhanka ba gagwe a re: “Lo ele tlhoko jaana, fa pelo ya ga Amenone e le mokete ka bojalwa jwa mofine; fa ke lo raya ke re: ‘Itayang Amenone,’ foo lo mmolaye, lo se ka lwa boifa; a ga ke a lo laola? Lo nne pelokgale, le boganka fela.”" 
2Samuel13:29 Batlhanka ba ga Abesalome ba direla Amenone jaaka Abesalome a ba laotse. Foo bomorwa kgosi ba nanoga botlhe, mongwe le mongwe a palama mmoulo wa gagwe, a tshaba." 
2Samuel13:30 Ga dirala ya re ba le mo tseleng, mafoko a fitlha kwa go Dafite, ga twe: “Abesalome o bolaile bomorwa kgosi botlhe, go bile ga go a sala ope wa bone.”" 
2Samuel13:31 Foo kgosi ya nanoga ya ikgagola diaparo, ya namalala fa fatshe; batlhanka botlhe ba yone ba ema fa go yone ba ikgagotse diaparo." 
2Samuel13:32 Jonatabe, morwa Shimea mogolo a Dafite, a bua a re: “A morena wa me a se ka a itlhoma fa ba bolaile makau otlhe bomorwa kgosi; ka go sule Amenone a le esi; gonne e sa le ka letsatsi le o katisitseng Tamare kgaitsadie ka lone selo se se ntse se ikaeletswe ka taolo ya ga Abesalome." 
2Samuel13:33 Ke gone jaana, a selo se se se tsene kgosi morena wa me mo pelong, go itlhoma fa bomorwa kgosi ba sule botlhe; gonne go sule Amenone a le esi fela.”" 
2Samuel13:34 Abesalome a tshaba. Mme lekau le le lebetseng la tsholetsa matlho, la leba, mme bonang, ga bo go tla batho ba le bantsi ka tsela ya mofapha wa thaba morago ga lone." 
2Samuel13:35 Jonatabe a raya kgosi a re: “Bona, bomorwa kgosi ba tsile; jaaka motlhanka wa gago a buile, go ntse fela jalo.”" 
2Samuel13:36 Ga dirala ya re a sena go wetsa go bua, bomorwa kgosi ba fitlha, mme ba tsholetsa mantswe a bone ba lela; le ene kgosi le batlhanka ba yone botlhe ba lela mo go botlhoko thata." 
2Samuel13:37 Mme Abesalome a tshaba, a ya kwa go Talemai morwa Amihure kgosi ya Gešure. Dafite a lelela morwawe ka malatsi otlhe." 
2Samuel13:38 Jalo Abesalome a tshaba a ya Gešure, a nna gone dinyaga di le tharo." 
2Samuel13:39 Mowa wa kgosi Dafite o ne o tlhologeletswe go tswela kwa go Abesalome; gonne a setse a gomotsegile ka ga Amenone jaaka a sule. 
2Samuel14:1 Joabe morwa Seruja a lemoga fa pelo ya kgosi e le kwa go Abesalome. 
2Samuel14:2 Mme Joabe a roma motho kwa Tekoa, a bitsa mosadi mongwe yo o botlhale gone, a mo raya a re: “Ke a go rapela, o tle o itsheme motho yo o hutsafetseng, o apare diaparo tsa khutsafalo, ke a go rapela, o se ka wa tlola lookwane, o nne jaaka mosadi yo o sa bolong go lelela moswi fela." 
2Samuel14:3 O tsene kwa kgosing, o bue nae jaana le jaana.” Jalo Joabe a tsenya mafoko mo molomong wa mosadi." 
2Samuel14:4 Ya re mosadi wa Tekoa a bua le kgosi, a wela ka sefatlhogo fa fatshe, a ikoba a re; “Thusa, kgosi.”" 
2Samuel14:5 Kgosi ya mo raya ya re: “O bolawa ke eng?” A e fetola a re: “Ruri ke mosadi wa motlholagadi, monna wa me o sule." 
2Samuel14:6 Lelata la gago o ne a na le bana ba basimane ba le babedi, mme ba lwa mo nageng, go ne go se na ope yo o ba kgaoganyang, mme yo mongwe a itaya yo mongwe, a mmolaya." 
2Samuel14:7 Mme bona, ba losika loo botlhe ba tsogologetse lelata la gago, ba re: ‘Ntsha yo o bolaileng ngwanaa rraagwe gore re mmolaele loso lwa ngwanaa rraagwe yo o mmolaileng, mme jalo re bolaye le ene mojaboswa’; jalo ba tlaa tima legala la me le le setseng, ba sa tlogelele monna wa me leina le fa e le lesalela mo lefatsheng.”" 
2Samuel14:8 Kgosi ya raya mosadi ya re: “Ya kwa ntlong ya gago, ke tlaa laela batho ka ga gago.”" 
2Samuel14:9 Mosadi wa Tekoa a raya kgosi a re: “Morena wa me, kgosi, a boikepo bo nne mo go nna le mo ntlong ya ga rre; a kgosi le setulo sa yone sa bogosi e tlhoke molato.”" 
2Samuel14:10 Kgosi ya re; “Le fa e le mang yo o buang sengwe nao, o mo lere kwa go nna mme ga a ketla a tlhola a go ama gope.”" 
2Samuel14:11 Foo mosadi a re: “Ke a go rapela, a kgosi e gakologelwe Jehofa, Modimo wa gago, gore mmusolosi wa madi a se ka a tlhola a senya, ka o ka tla a senya morwaake.” Mme a re: “Jaaka Jehofa a tshedile, moriri le fa e le o mongwe fela wa ga morwao ga o ketla o wela fa fatshe.”" 
2Samuel14:12 Foo mosadi a re: “Ke a go rapela, o mme lelata la gago le bue lefoko lengwe le kgosi morena wa me.” Mme ya re: “Buela pele.”" 
2Samuel14:13 Mosadi a re: “Ke ka ntlha yang o diretse batho ba Modimo tiro e e ntseng jalo? Gonne fa o bua lefoko le, kgosi e etsa mongwe yo o molato, ka kgosi e sa ye go batla molelekiwa wa yone." 
2Samuel14:14 Gonne go swa ke ga rona, mme re etsa metsi a a tshologetseng fa fatshe, a a sa ka keng a tlhola a selwa; le gone Modimo ga o tlose botshelo, mme o dira maano a go re, yo o lelekilweng a se ka a nna molatlhegi mo go one." 
2Samuel14:15 Jaana ka re, e re ka ke tsile go bua lone lefoko le le kgosi morena wa me, ke ka gonne batho ba mpoifisitse; mme lelata la gago la re: Jaana ke tlaa bua le kgosi; e tle e re gongwe kgosi e dire topo ya motlhanka wa yone." 
2Samuel14:16 Gonne kgosi e tlaa utlwa go golola motlhanka wa yone mo seatleng sa monna yo o ratang go ntshenya, le morwaake mmogo, re tswa mo bosweng jwa Modimo."
