2Samuel14:17 Foo lelata la gago la re: Ke a go rapela, o mme lefoko la kgosi morena wa me le nne boikhutso; gonne kgosi morena wa me o ntse jaaka moengele wa Modimo mo go farologanyeng molemo le bosula; Jehofa Modimo wa gago a nne nao.”" 
2Samuel14:18 Foo kgosi ya fetola mosadi ya re: “Ke a go rapela, o se ka wa ntobela sepe se ke tlaa se go botsang.” Mosadi a re: “A kgosi morena wa me a bue.”" 
2Samuel14:19 Kgosi ya re: “A seatla sa ga Joabe ga se na nao mo seong se sotlhe fela?” Mosadi a fetola a re: “Jaaka mowa wa gago o tshedile, kgosi morena wa me, ga go na ope yo o ka fapogelang ntlheng ya le legolo, kgotsa ntlheng ya la molema a tswa mo go sengwe se kgosi morena wa me o se buileng; gonne motlhanka wa gago Joabe, ke ene yo o ne a ntaola, a ba a tsenya mafoko otlhe a mo molomong wa lelata la gago;" 
2Samuel14:20 motlhanka wa gago Joabe o dirile selo se, go tla a sokolola ponalo ya mafoko a; mme morena wa me o botlhale, ka fa botlhaleng jwa moengele wa Modimo, go itse dilo tsotlhe tse di mo lefatsheng.”" 
2Samuel14:21 Kgosi ya raya Joabe ya re: “Bona jaana, ke dirile selo se; mme ka re, ya o buse lekau leo, e bong Abesalome.”" 
2Samuel14:22 Joabe a wela fa fatshe ka sefatlhogo a ikoba, a segofatsa kgosi; Joabe a re: “Gompieno motlhanka wa gago o a itse fa ke bonye botsalano mo matlhong a gago, kgosi, morena wa me, ka e le fa kgosi e dirile topo ya motlhanka wa yone.”" 
2Samuel14:23 Jalo Joabe a nanoga a ya Gešure, mme a lere Abesalome mo Jerusalema." 
2Samuel14:24 Kgosi ya re: “A a fapogele kwa ntlong ya gagwe, mme a se bone sefatlhogo sa me.” Abesalome a fapogela kwa ntlong ya gagwe, mme a se ka a bona sefatlhogo sa kgosi." 
2Samuel14:25 Jaana mo go Baiseraele botlhe go ne go se na ope yo o bokwang jaaka Abesalome ka bontle jwa gagwe; go tswa patong ya lonao go ya fela kwa phogong go ne go se na bogolenyana bope mo go ene. 
2Samuel14:26 E ne e tle e re a ipeola tlhogo, (o ne a tle a ipeole tlhogo bokhutlong jwa ngwaga mongwe le mongwe, gonne moriri wa gagwe o le bokete mo go ene, a ipeole tlhogo ka ntlha ya gone); a lekanye bokete jwa moriri wa tlhogo ya gagwe, mme bo nne dišekela di le makgolo mabedi ka fa boketeng jwa kgosi." 
2Samuel14:27 Abesalome a tsala bana ba basimane ba le bararo, le wa mosetsana a le mongwe fela, leina la gagwe e le Tamare; yoo e ne e le mosadi yo o sefatlhogo se sentle." 
2Samuel14:28 Abesalome a aga dinyaga di le pedi tse di tletseng mo Jerusalema; a sa bone sefatlhogo sa kgosi. 
2Samuel14:29 Foo Abesalome a romela Joabe gore a tle a mo rome kwa kgosing; mme a gana go tla; a roma gape lwa bobedi, mme a gana go tla." 
2Samuel14:30 Ka ntlha ya moo a raya batlhanka ba gagwe a re: “Bonang, tshimo ya ga Joabe e gaufi le ya me, o na le barele gone; yang lo e tshube ka molelo.” Mme batlhanka ba ga Abesalome ba tshuba tshimo ka molelo." 
2Samuel14:31 Foo Joabe a nanoga, a tla mo go Abesalome mo ntlong ya gagwe, a mo raya a re: “Batlhanka ba gago ba tshubile tshimo ya me ka ntlha yang?”" 
2Samuel14:32 Abesalome a fetola Joabe a re: “Bona, ke romile kwa go wena, ka re: ‘Tla kwano, gore ke tle ke go rome kwa kgosing, go e raya go re: Ana ke dule kwa Gešure go reng? Go ne go le molemo bogolo fa nka bo ke sa ntse ke le gone; jaana ka re o mme ke bone sefatlhogo sa kgosi; mme fa go na le boikepo mo go nna, a e mpolaye.’ ”" 
2Samuel14:33 Joabe a ya kwa kgosing a e bolelela; e rile e sena go bitsa Abesalome, a tla kwa kgosing, a ikobela fa fatshe ka sefatlhogo fa pele ga kgosi; mme kgosi ya atla Abesalome." 
2Samuel15:1 Ga dirala ya re morago ga moo, Abesalome a ipaakanyetsa kara le dipitse, le banna ba le 50, ba ba sianang fa pele ga gagwe." 
2Samuel15:2 Abesalome o ne a tle a phakele a ye go ema fa tseleng ya kgotla ya motse; mme go dirale e re fa motho mongwe a na le sengwe se se tshwanetseng go ya go sekwa kwa kgosing, foo Abesalome a mmitse a re: “O motho wa motse ofe?” Mme a re: “Motlhanka wa gago ke wa lotso lwa sennanne lwa ditso tsa Baiseraele.”" 
2Samuel15:3 Abesalome a mo reye a re: “Bona, mafoko a gago a molemo a siame; ga go na motho ope yo o beilweng ke kgosi go tla go go utlwa.”" 
2Samuel15:4 Gape Abesalome a bue a re: “Ao, a bo nka bo ke beilwe moatlhodi mo lefatsheng, gore motho mongwe le mongwe yo o nang le mafoko kgotsa kgang, a tle mo go nna, mme ke ne ke tlaa mo direla tshiamiso.”" 
2Samuel15:5 Mme go dirale go re e ne e re motho mongwe a atamela a tla go mo ikobela, a ntshe letsogo, a mo tshware, a mo atle." 
2Samuel15:6 Mme Baiseraele botlhe ba ba tlang go atlholwa kwa kgosing, Abesalome a ba direle ka mokgwa o o ntseng jaana; mme Abesalome a utswa dipelo tsa batho ba Iseraele." 
2Samuel15:7 Ga dirala ya re kwa bofelong jwa dinyaga di le nne Abesalome a raya kgosi a re: “Ke a go rapela, o mme ke ye go lefa ikano ya me mo Heberone, e ke e ikanetseng Jehofa." 
2Samuel15:8 Gonne e rile motlhanka wa gago a agile kwa Gešure, kwa Siria, ka ikana ka re: ‘Fa ruri Jehofa a tlaa mpusetsa kwa Jerusalema, foo ke tlaa direla Jehofa.’ ”" 
2Samuel15:9 Kgosi ya mo raya ya re: “Ya ka kagiso.” Mme a nanoga, a ya Heberone." 
2Samuel15:10 Abesalome a roma ditlhola tsa ya le ditso tsotlhe tsa Iseraele, tsa re: “E tlaa re lo utlwa tumo ya lonaka, foo lo re: ‘Abesalome ke kgosi kwa Heberone!’ ”" 
2Samuel15:11 Abesalome a tswa mo Jerusalema a na le banna ba le 200, ba ba laleditsweng, ba tsamaya fela ba se na mogopolo; ba bo ba sa itse sepe." 
2Samuel15:12 E rile Abesalome a sa ntse a isitse ditshupelo, a roma a ya go bitsa Ahithofele wa Mogilo mogakolodi wa ga Dafite, a mo ntsha kwa motseng wa ga gabo, e bong Gilo. Morero o wa gapa batho thata; ka gonne batho ba nna ba ntsifalela kwa go Abesalome ka gale." 
2Samuel15:13 Ga tla morongwa kwa go Dafite, a re: “Dipelo tsa banna ba Iseraele di ile le Abesalome.”" 
2Samuel15:14 Dafite a raya batlhanka ba gagwe botlhe ba ba nang nae mo Jerusalema, a re: “Tlogang, a re tshabeng; gonne go ka tla ga se ka ga falola ope wa rona mo go Abesalome; itlhaganeleng lo tloge, o ka tla a akofa a re tshwara, a tlisa bosula mo go rona, a kgemetha motse ka bogale jwa tšhaka.”" 
2Samuel15:15 Batlhanka ba kgosi ba raya kgosi ba re: “Bona, batlhanka ba gago ba iketleeleditse go dira sengwe le sengwe se kgosi e se ratang.”" 
2Samuel15:16 Kgosi ya tswa, le botlhe ba ntlo ya yone ba e sala morago. Mme kgosi ya tlogela basadi ba le some, ba e ne e le bagadingwana, go lebela ntlo." 
2Samuel15:17 Kgosi ya tswa, le batho botlhe ba e sala morago; ba ema kwa ntlong ya bofelo." 
2Samuel15:18 Mme batlhanka botlhe ba yone ba feta ka fa go yone; le Bakerethe botlhe, le Bapelethe botlhe, le Bagite botlhe, banna ba ba 600, ba ba sa leng ba mo sala morago ba tswa kwa Gathe, ba fetela kwa pele ga kgosi." 
2Samuel15:19 Foo kgosi ya raya Itai wa Mogite ya re: “Ana wena o elang le rona? Boa, o sale le kgosi; gonne o moeng, o bile o mofaladi; boela kwa felong ga gago." 
2Samuel15:20 Mme e re ka o tsile maabane fela, a gompieno ke tlaa go kgarakgatsha le rona, ka ke ya fela kwa ke ka yang gone? Boa o bo o buse bomorwa rraago; a boutlwelo botlhoko le boammaaruri bo nne nao.”" 
2Samuel15:21 Itai a fetola kgosi a re; “Jaaka Jehofa a tshedile, le jaaka kgosi morena wa me a tshedile, ruri kwa kgosi morena wa me o tlaa nnang gone, kana e le go swa, kana go tshela, motlhanka wa gago le ene o tlaa nna gone fela.”" 
2Samuel15:22 Dafite a raya Itai a re: “A re ye koo, o kgabaganye.” Itai wa Mogite a kgabaganya, le batho botlhe ba gagwe le banyana ba o nang nabo." 
2Samuel15:23 Lefatshe lotlhe la lela ka lentswe le legolo, batho botlhe ba kgabaganya; kgosi le yone ya kgabaganya molatswana wa Kiterone, le batho botlhe ba kgabaganya, ba leba kwa tseleng ya naga." 
2Samuel15:24 Mme bonang, Satoke le ene a tla le Balefi botlhe nae, ba rwele letlole la kgolagano ya Modimo; ba rola letlole la Modimo, Abiathare a tlhatloga, ga tsamaya batho botlhe ba feta ba tswa mo motseng." 
2Samuel15:25 Kgosi ya raya Satoke ya re: “Busetsa letlole la Modimo kwa motseng; fa ke bona botsalano mo matlhong a ga Jehofa, o tlaa ba a ntlisa, a ba a mpontsha lone, le boago jwa gagwe." 
2Samuel15:26 Mme e tlaa re fa a bua jaana a re: ‘Ga ke na kgatlhego mo go wena;’ bona, ke fano, a dire ka nna ka fa o bonang go le molemo ka gone.”" 
2Samuel15:27 Le gone kgosi ya raya Satoke moperesiti ya re; “A ga o molebi? Boela motseng ka kagiso, le bana ba lona ba babedi ba basimane lo ye nabo, e bong Ahimaase morwao, le Jonathane morwa Abiathare." 
2Samuel15:28 Bona, ke tlaa ema kwa madibogong a a kwa lobaleng, ke leta lefoko le le ka tswang kwa go lona go ntlhomamisetsa.”" 
2Samuel15:29 Ke gone ka moo Satoke le Abiathare ba busetsa letlole la Modimo kwa Jerusalema; mme ba nna gone. 
2Samuel15:30 Dafite a tlhatloga mokong wa thabana ya Matlhware, a eta a lela jaaka a tlhatloga; o ne a ikhurumeditse tlhogo, le mo dinaong a sa rwala ditlhako; le batho botlhe ba ba nang nae, mongwe le mongwe a ikhurumetsa tlhogo, ba tlhatloga, ba eta ba lela jaaka ba tlhatloga." 
2Samuel15:31 Mongwe a bolelela Dafite a re: “Ahithofele o mo go bone ba ba rerileng le Abesalome.” Mme Dafite a re: “Jehofa, ke a go rapela, a ko o fetole kgakololo ya ga Ahithofele bonyana fela.”" 
2Samuel15:32 Ga dirala ya re Datife a fitlha kwa godimo ga botlhatlogo, kwa Modimo o ne o tle o obamelwe gone, Hušai wa Moareka a tla go mo kgatlhantsha a ikgagotse kobo, le mmu o le mo tlhogong ya gagwe." 
2Samuel15:33 Dafite a mo raya a re: “Fa o feta le nna, o tlaa nna kimelo mo go nna." 
2Samuel15:34 Fa o boela kwa motseng, mme o raya Abesalome o re: ‘Kgosi, ke tlaa nna motlhanka wa gago; jaaka ke ntse ke le motlhanka wa ga rraago mo metlheng e e fetileng; jaana ke tlaa nna motlhanka wa gago jalo’; foo o tlaa bo o ntsupueletsa kgakololo ya ga Ahithofele." 
2Samuel15:35 A ga o na le baperesiti Satoke le Abiathare gone? Ke gone go tlaa dirala go re sengwe le sengwe se o tlaa se utlwang mo ntlong ya kgosi, o tlaa se bolelela baperesiti Satoke le Abiathare." 
2Samuel15:36 Bona, ba na le bana ba bone ba babedi ba basimane, Ahimaase morwa Satoke, le Jonathane morwa Abiathare; mme sengwe le sengwe se lo se utlwang lo tlaa se fitlhisa kwa go nna ka bone.”" 
2Samuel15:37 Jalo Hušai tsala ya ga Dafite a tsena mo motseng; le Abesalome a tla mo Jerusalema. 
2Samuel16:1 E rile Dafite a sena go fapaanya tlhora ya thota go le gonnye, Siba motlhanka wa ga Mefibošethe a mo kgatlhantsha, a na le diesele di le pedi di belesitswe bosale, di belege dinkgwe di le 200, le marose a le lekgolo a ditshwabi tsa mefine, le maungo a letlhabula a le lekgolo, le mofalo wa bojalwa jwa mofine." 
2Samuel16:2 Kgosi ya raya Siba ya re: “O kayang ka dilo tse?” Siba a re: “Diesele ke tsa go palangwa ke ba ntlo ya kgosi; senkgwe le muango a letlhabula ke a go jewa ke makau; bojalwa jwa mofine ke jwa go nowa ke ba ba lapileng mo nageng.” 
2Samuel16:3 Kgosi ya re; “Morwa mong wa gago o kae?” Siba a raya kgosi a re: “Bona, o ntse kwa Jerusalema; gonne o rile: ‘Gompieno ba ntlo ya Iseraele ba tlaa nthebolela bogosi jwa ga rre.’ ”" 
2Samuel16:4 Foo kgosi ya raya Siba ya re: “Bona, tsotlhe tse e leng tsa ga Mefibošethe ke tsa gago.” Siba a re: “Ke a ikoba; a ke bone tsalano mo matlhong a gago, kgosi, morena wa me.”" 
2Samuel16:5 E rile kgosi Dafite a fitlha kwa Bahurime, bonang, ga tswa monna gone e le wa losika lwa ntlo ya ga Saule, leina la gagwe e ne e le Shimei, morwa Gere; a tswa, a tla a ntse a hutsa." 
2Samuel16:6 A konopa Dafite, le batlhanka botlhe ba kgosi Dafite ka maje; mme batho botlhe, le ba ba diganka botlhe ba bo ba mo potile ka fa ntlheng ya le legolo le ya la molema." 
2Samuel16:7 Shimei a re a hutsakanya a bua jaana a re: “Ga! Ga! Monna yo o tshololang madi ke wena, monna yo o seramatla ke wena;" 
2Samuel16:8 Jehofa o buseditse mo go wena madi otlhe a ba ntlo ya ga Saule, yo o busang mo boemong jwa gagwe; Jehofa o tsentse bogosi mo seatleng sa ga Abesalome morwao; bona, o tshwerwe mo bosuleng jwa gago ka o le monna yo o tshololang madi.”" 
2Samuel16:9 Foo ga bua Abišai morwa Seruja le kgosi, a re: “Ana ntša e e suleng e, e hutsetsang kgosi morena wa me? Ke a go rapela, mma ke kgabaganye ke ye go mo kgaola tlhogo.”" 
2Samuel16:10 Mme kgosi ya re: “Ke dirang ka lona bomorwa Seruja? E re ka a hutsakanya, le ka Jehofa a mo reile a re: ‘Hutsa Dafite;’ e mang yo o tlaa reng: ‘Ana o direlang jalo?’ ”" 
2Samuel16:11 Dafite a raya Abišai le batlhanka botlhe ba gagwe a re: “Bonang, morwaake yo o duleng mo mmeleng wa me, o batla go mpolaya; bogolo jang motho yo wa Mobenjamine a ga ka ke a dira jalo? Mo leseng, lo mme a hutsakanye; gonne Jehofa o mo laotse." 
2Samuel16:12 E tle e re gongwe Jehofa a lebe tshiamololo e ke e direlwang, le go re Jehofa a ntefele ka molemo mo boemong jwa go mphutsa ga gagwe gompieno.”" 
2Samuel16:13 Dafite le banna ba gagwe ba feta le tsela; Shimei a tsamaya fa mofapheng wa thabana bolebagana nae, a eta a hutsakanya, a mo konopa ka maje, a kubisa lorole." 
2Samuel16:14 Kgosi le batho botlhe ba ba nang nayo ba fitlha ba lapile; mme kgosi ya itapolosa gone. 
2Samuel16:15 Abesalome, le batho botlhe, e bong banna ba Iseraele, ba tla mo Jerusalema le Ahithofele a na nabo." 
2Samuel16:16 Ga dirala, e rile Hušai wa Moareke, tsala ya ga Dafite, a tsile mo go Abesalome, Hušai a raya Abesalome a re: “A Modimo o boloke kgosi! A Modimo o boloke kgosi!”" 
2Samuel16:17 Abesalome a raya Hušai a re: “A jo ke jone botsalano jwa gago le tsala ya gago? O ne o sa eleng le tsala ya gago?” 
2Samuel16:18 Hušai a raya Abesalome a re: “Nnyaa; yo Jehofa, le batho ba, le tšhaba e, le banna botlhe ba Iseraele ba mo itshenketseng, ke ene yo ke tlaa nnang wa gagwe, ke ene yo ke tlaa nnang nae." 
2Samuel16:19 Gape ke tshwanetse ka bo ke direla mang? A ga ke a tshwanela go direla fa pele ga morwawe? Jaaka ke diretse fa pele ga rraago, ke tlaa nna fela jalo fa pele ga gago.”" 
2Samuel16:20 Foo Abesalome a bua le Ahithofele a re: “Re gakololeng ka fa re tlaa dirang ka gone.” 
2Samuel16:21 Ahithofele a raya Abesalome a re: “Tsena kwa bagadingwaneng ba ga rraago, ba o ba tlogetseng go lebela ntlo; mme Baiseraele botlhe ba tlaa utlwa fa o nkgela rraago sebodu; foo mabogo a botlhe ba ba nang nao a tlaa thatafala.”" 
2Samuel16:22 Ba tsharololela Abesalome mogope mo godimo ga ntlo; Abesalome a tsena kwa bagadingwaneng ba ga rraagwe mo ponong ya Baiseraele botlhe. 
2Samuel16:23 Kgakololo ya ga Ahithofele e o ne a tle a gakolole ka yone mo metlheng eo, e ne e tshwana jaaka ekete fa motho a botsa kwa bobuelong jwa Modimo; kgakololo yotlhe ya ga Ahithofele e ne e ntse jalo mo go Dafite le mo go Abesalome." 
2Samuel17:1 Gape Ahithofele a raya Abesalome a re: “Mma ke tlhaole banna ba le 12 000, mme ke tlaa nanoga ke konatelela Dafite bosigo jono." 
2Samuel17:2 Ke tlaa mo wela a sa ntse a lapile, a le bokoa, mme ke tlaa mmoifisa; mme batho botlhe ba ba nang nae ba tlaa tshaba; ke tlaa bolaya kgosi e le yosi fela." 
2Samuel17:3 Ke tlaa busetsa batho botlhe kwano go wena; motho yo, fa o mo tlositse go tlaa bo go tshwana jaaka fa batho botlhe ba ka bo ba boile; jalo batho botlhe ba tlaa nna mo kagisong.”" 
2Samuel17:4 Polelo eo ya kgatlha Abesalome thata, le bagolwane botlhe ba Iseraele." 
2Samuel17:5 Foo Abesalome a re: “Bitsa le ene Hušai wa Moareke, re utlwe se le ene o se buang.”" 
2Samuel17:6 E rile Hušai a sena go tla kwa go Abesalome, Abesalome a bua nae a re: “Ahithofele o buile jaana le jaana; a ke re dire jaaka a buile? Fa go sa nna jalo, a go bue wena.”" 
2Samuel17:7 Hušai a raya Abesalome a re: “Kgakololo e Ahithofele o gakolotseng ka yone monomotlha ga e molemo.” 
2Samuel17:8 Gape, Hušai a re: “O a mo itse rraago, le banna ba gagwe, fa e le diganka, ba gakatsegile mo pelong tsa bone, jaaka bera e e tseetsweng diberana tsa yone kwa nageng; mme rraago ke monna wa ntwa, mme ga a ketla a robala le batho." 
2Samuel17:9 Bona, jaana o a ba a iphitlhile gongwe mo mokoleng mongwe, kgotsa mo felong gongwe go sele; mme go tlaa dirala go re, e re fa bangwe ba bone ba ole ga ntlha, mongwe fela yo o utlwang o tlaa re: ‘Go na le polao mo bathong ba ba setseng Abesalome morago.’" 
2Samuel17:10 Le e leng ene yo o pelokgale, yo pelo ya gagwe e ntseng jaaka ya tau, o tlaa nyeregela ruri; gonne Baiseraele botlhe ba itse fa rraago e le motho yo o seganka, le bone ba o nang nabo e le banna ba ba pelokgale." 
2Samuel17:11 Mme ke a gakolola, go re a Baiseraele botlhe ba phuthegele kwa go wena, go tswa Dane go ya fela kwa Berešeba, ba nne jaaka mošawa o o fa lewatleng ka bontsi; le go re o ye tlhabanong ka sebele sa gago." 
2Samuel17:12 Jalo re tlaa mo wela felong gongwe kwa o tlaa fitlhelwang gone, re tlaa ririana mo go ene jaaka monyo o tle o wele fa fatshe; mme mo go ene le batho botlhe ba o nang nabo, ga re ketla re tlogela le fa e le a le mongwe fela." 
2Samuel17:13 Gape fa a tsenye mo motseng mongwe, foo Baiseraele botlhe ba tlaa isa megala kwa motseng oo, re tlaa o gogela mo nokeng, go tsamaya go se ke go fitlhelwe lentswenyana le le lengwe fela gone.”" 
2Samuel17:14 Abesalome le banna botlhe ba Iseraele ba re: “Kgakololo ya ga Hušai wa Moareke e gaisa kgakololo ya ga Ahithofele.” Gonne Jehofa o ne a laotse go senya kgakololo e e molemo ya ga Ahithofele, e le gore Jehofa a tlise bosula mo go Abesalome." 
2Samuel17:15 Foo Hušai a raya baperesiti Satoke le Abiathare, a re: “Ahithofele o gakolotse Abesalome le bagolwane ba Iseraele a re, a re; mme nna ke ba gakolotse ka re, ka re." 
2Samuel17:16 Ke gone roma ka bonako, o bolelele Dafite o re: ‘O se ka wa robala bosigo jono fa madibogong a a mo lobaleng, le fa go ka bo go ntse jang o kgabaganye fela; kgosi e ka tla ya komediwa, le batho botlhe ba e nang nabo.’ ”" 
2Samuel17:17 Jaana boJonathane le Ahimaase ba ne ba ntse fa Enerogele; mme lelata lengwe le ne le tle le ye go ba bolelela; mme ba ye ba bolelele kgosi Dafite; gonne ba ne ba sa ka ke ba bonwa ba tla mo motseng. 
2Samuel17:18 Mme mosimane mongwe a ba bona, a bolelela Abesalome; mme ba tsamaya ka potlako boo babedi, ba tla mo ntlong ya monna mongwe mo Bahurima, yo o na a na le mokole mo lwapeng lwa gagwe; mme ba fologela mo go one." 
2Samuel17:19 Mosadi a ala sekhurumetso mo molomong wa mokole, a anega mabele a a thugilweng mo go sone; ga bo go sa itsiwe sepe." 
2Samuel17:20 Batlhanka ba ga Abesalome ba tla kwa mosading mo ntlong; ba re: “Ahimaase le Jonathane ba kae?” Mosadi a ba raya a re: “Ba kgabagantse molatswana wa metsi.” Ya re ba sena go ba batla ba sa ba bone, ba boela kwa Jerusalema." 
2Samuel17:21 Ga dirala ya re ba sena go tsamaya bale ba tswa mo mokoleng ba ya ba bolelela kgosi Dafite; ba raya Dafite ba re: “Nanogang, lo kgabaganye metsi ka bonako, gonne Ahithofele o gakolotse ka ga lona jaana le jaana.”" 
2Samuel17:22 Foo Dafite a nanoga le batho botlhe ba o nang nabo, ba kgabaganya Joretane; e rile bosa bo o sa ga bo go se na ope wa bone yo o se kang a kgabaganya Joretane." 
2Samuel17:23 E rile Ahithofele a bona fa kgakololo ya gagwe e se ka ya tsholwa a belesa esela ya gagwe, a nanoga, a ya gae kwa motseng wa ga gabo, a baakanya ntlo ya gagwe, a tloga a ipeta; a swa, mme a fitlhwa mo phupung ya ga rraagwe." 
2Samuel17:24 Foo Dafite a tla mo Mahanaime. Abesalome a kgabaganya Joretane, ene le banna botlhe ba Iseraele nae." 
2Samuel17:25 Abesalome a tlhoma Amase mo taolong ya ntwa boemong jwa ga Joabe. Jaana Amase e ne e le morwa monna mongwe leina la gagwe e le Ithare wa Moiseraele, yo o ne a tsena mo go Abigale morwadia Nahaše, kgaitsadia Seruja mmaagwe Joabe." 
2Samuel17:26 Baiseraele le Abesalome ba thibelela mo lefatsheng la Gileata. 
2Samuel17:27 E rile Dafite a sena go tla mo Mahanaime, Shobi morwa Nahaše wa Raba wa bana ba Amone, le Makire morwa Amiele wa Lotebare, le Baresilai Mogileate wa Rogelime," 
2Samuel17:28 ba lere malao, le megotšanyana, le dipitsana tsa letsopa, le mabele, le barele, le boupi, le mabele a a gadikilweng, le dinawa, le ditlhodi, le ditloofatshe tse di besitsweng," 
2Samuel17:29 le dinotshe, le madila, le dinku, le ditšhisi, ba di leretse Dafite, le batho ba ba nang nae, go di ja, gonne ba re: “Batho ba bolailwe ke tlala, ba lapile, ba bolailwe ke lenyora mo nageng.”" 
2Samuel18:1 Dafite a bala batho ba o nang nabo, mme a tlhoma balaodi ba makgolo a makgolo, le balaodi ba makgolo mo go bone." 
2Samuel18:2 Dafite a bolotsa batho ba le dikabo di le tharo: kabo nngwe e laolwa ke Joabe, kabo e nngwe ya laolwa ke Abišai morwa Seruja, monnaa Joabe, kabo e nnge ya laolwa ke Itai wa Mogite. Kgosi ya raya batho ya re: “Ruri le nna ke tlaa bolola le lona.”" 
2Samuel18:3 Mme batho ba re: “Ga o bolole, gonne e tlaa re fa re tshaba, ga ba ketla ba re sepe ka rona; le fa re ka a swa bontlha e nngwe ga ba ketla ba re sepe ka rona; mme wena o kana ka batho ba ba 10 000 ba rona; jaana go molemo bogolo wa bo o iketleeditse go re thusa o le mo motseng.”" 
2Samuel18:4 Kgosi ya ba raya ya re: “Se lona lo se bonang se le molemo bogolo, ke tlaa se dira.” Kgosi ya ema fa kgorong, mme batho botlhe ba tswa ka makgolo le ka makgolo a masome." 
2Samuel18:5 Kgosi ya laola Joabe le Abišai le Itai ya re: “Lo mamaisetse lekau leo, e bong Abesalome ka ntlha ya me.” Batho botlhe ba utlwa jaaka kgosi e laela balaodi botlhe ka ga Abesalome." 
2Samuel18:6 Batho ba bololela Baiseraele kwa nageng; mme ga tlhabanelwa mo sekgweng sa Eferaime. 
2Samuel18:7 Batho ba Iseraele ba lotlelwa gone fa pele ga batlhanka ba ga Dafite, mme ga nna polao e kgolo gone ka tsatsi leo, ya batho ba le 20 000." 
2Samuel18:8 Gonne tlhabano e ne e anametse gone mo lefatsheng lotlhe; mme sekgwa sa nyeletsa batho ba le bantsi ka tsatsi leo bogolo go ba ba nyeleditsweng ke tšhaka. 
2Samuel18:9 Abesalome a tshogana ka a kopana le batlhanka ba ga Dafite. Abesalome a bo a palame mmoulo wa gagwe, mmoulo wa huhumela dikala tse ditona tsa mooka o motona, tlhogo ya gagwe ya tshwarwa ke mooka, a lepelediwa gare ga legodimo le lefatshe; mmoulo o o fa tlase ga gagwe wa tsamaela pele." 
2Samuel18:10 Monna mongwe a bona, a bolelela Joabe a re: “Bona, ke bonye Abesalome a akgega mo mookeng.”" 
2Samuel18:11 Joabe a raya monna yo o mmoleletseng a re: “Bona, o go bonye, ke ka ntlha yang o se ka wa mo otlelela gone mo mmung? Ke ne ke tlaa go naya dipapetlana tsa selefera di le some, le moitlamo.”" 
2Samuel18:12 Monna yoo a raya Joabe a re: “Le fa ke ne ke ka bo ke amogela dipapetlana tsa selefera di le makgolo a le some mo atleng sa me, le fa go ntse jalo ke ne ke sa ka ke ka ntshetsa morwa kgosi seatla sa me; gonne mo kutlong ya rona kgosi e laetse wena le Abišai le Itai ya re: ‘Lo itise gore ope a se ka a ama lekau leo, e bong Abesalome.’" 
2Samuel18:13 Fa nka bo ke ne ke dirile ka boferefere ka ga botshelo jwa gagwe, kaitse ga go na sepe se se lobelwang kgosi, foo le wena tota o ne o tlaa ntswa.”" 
2Samuel18:14 Foo Joabe a re: “Ga ke na go diega nao jaana.” A tsaya diputlela di le tharo, a ya a phololetsa pelo ya ga Abesalome ka tsone, a sa ntse a tshedile a le mo gare ga mooka." 
2Samuel18:15 Makau a le some a a tshotseng dibolao tsa ga Joabe a hula Abesalome, a mo otlela, a mmolaya." 
2Samuel18:16 Joabe a letsa lonaka, mme batho ba boa kwa go konateleleng Baiseraele; ka Joabe a rekegela batho." 
2Samuel18:17 Ba tsaya Abesalome, ba mo latlhela mo lehuting le legolo mo sekgweng, ba koela mokoa o mogolo wa maje mo godimo ga gagwe; Baiseraele botlhe ba tshaba, mongwe le mongwe a ya mogopeng wa gagwe." 
2Samuel18:18 Jaana ya bo e rile mo botshelong jwa gagwe Abesalome a bo a tlogile a ikagela sefikantswe se se motloutlo, se se mo mogogorong wa kgosi; gonne a re: “Ga ke na ngwana wa mosimane wa go nna segopodiso sa leina la me;” a raya sefikantswe seo leina la gagwe, se bidiwa sefikantswe sa ga Abesalome le gompieno." 
2Samuel18:19 Foo Ahimaase morwa Satoke a re: “Mma ke siane, ke ise mafoko kwa kgosing, a jaaka Jehofa a e busoloseditse mo babeng ba yone.”" 
2Samuel18:20 Mme Joabe a mo raya a re: “Ga o ketla o nna moisamafoko gompeino, o tlaa isa mafoko ka letsatsi le sele; gompieno ga o ise mafoko ape, gonne morwa kgosi o sule.”" 
2Samuel18:21 Foo Joabe a raya motho wa Mokuše a re: “Ya o bolelele kgosi se o se bonyeng.” Motho wa Mokuše a ikobela Joabe, a siana." 
2Samuel18:22 Foo Ahimaase morwa Satoke a raya Joabe gape a re: “Le fa go ka nna ka fa go nnang ka gone fela, ke a go rapela, o mme ke siane morago ga motho wa Mokuše.” Joabe a re: “O rata go siana ka ntlha yang morwaaka, ka o se ketla o bona tuelo epe ka mafoko a gago?”" 
2Samuel18:23 Mme a re: “Le fa go ka nna ka fa go ka nnang ka gone, ke tlaa siana fela.” Mme a mo raya a re: “Siana.” Foo Ahimaase a siana ka tsela ya Lobala, mme a sia motho wa Mokuše." 
2Samuel18:24 Jaana Dafite a bo a dutse fa gare ga dikgoro tse pedi tsa motse, molebeledi a palama ditlhomeso tsa kgoro a ya kwa lorakong, a tsholetsa matlho a leba, mme bonang, monna a bo a siana a le esi." 
2Samuel18:25 Molebeledi a kua a bolelela kgosi, mme kgosi ya re: “Fa a le esi o na le mafoko.” A tla fela, a atamela." 
2Samuel18:26 Molebedi a bona monna yo mongwe a siana; molebedi a tlhaeletsa kwa mmuding wa setswalo a re: “Bona, monna yo mongwe o tla a sianye a le esi.” Kgosi ya re: “Le ene o tla le mafoko.”" 
2Samuel18:27 Molebedi a re: “Ekete tshiano ya wa pele e tshwana le tshiano ya ga Ahimaase morwa Satoke.” Kgosi ya re: “Ene ke monna yo o molemo, o a ba a tla le mafoko a a molemo.”" 
2Samuel18:28 Ahimaase a kua, a raya kgosi a re: “Go siame gotlhe.” A ikobela fa fatshe ka sefatlhogo fa pele ga kgosi, a re: “A go bakwe Jehofa Modimo wa gago, yo o tsentseng mo seatleng sa gago batho ba ba neng ba tsholeletsa kgosi morena wa me letsogo la bone.”" 
2Samuel18:29 Kgosi ya re: “A lekau Abesalome le tsogile sentle?” Mme Ahimaase a fetola a re: “E rile Joabe a roma motlhanka wa kgosi, e bong nna motlhanka wa gago, ka bona khuduego e kgolo, ga ke itse go re, e ne e le eng.”" 
2Samuel18:30 Kgosi ya re: “Fetela fa thoko, o eme fa.” A fetela fa thoko, a ema a didimetsa fela." 
2Samuel18:31 Mme bonang, motho wa Mokuše a tla; motho wa Mokuše a re: “Go na le mafoko a kgosi morena wa me; gonne gompieno Jehofa o go busoloseditse mo go bone botlhe ba ba neng ba go tsogologetse.”" 
2Samuel18:32 Kgosi ya raya motho wa Mokuše ya re: “A lekau Abesalome le tsogile sentle?” Motho wa Mokuše a e fetola a re: “Baba ba kgosi morena wa me, le botlhe ba ba go tsogologelang go go utlwisa botlhoko, a ba nne jaaka lekau leo.”" 
2Samuel18:33 Kgosi ya huduega thata, ya palamela kwa ntlwaneng e e okameng kgoro, ya lela; ya re e tsamaya, ya bua jaana ya re: “Abesalome, morwaake wee! Abesalome, morwaake wee! A bo ke ka bo ke go swetse, Abesalome, morwaake wee! morwaake wee!”" 
2Samuel19:1 Ga bolelelwa Joabe ga twe: “Bona, kgosi e a lela e hutsafaletse Abesalome.”" 
2Samuel19:2 Phenyo ya fetolwa selelo ka tsatsi leo mo bathong botlhe; gonne batho ba ne ba utlwa ka tsatsi leo go twe: “Kgosi e pelo e botlhoko ka ga morwa yone.” 
2Samuel19:3 Batho ba tsena mo motseng ka tsatsi leo, ka go iphitlha jaaka batho ba ba tlhajwang ke ditlhong ba tle ba tsamaye ka go iphitlha fa ba tshaba mo tlhabanong." 
2Samuel19:4 Kgosi ya ikhurumetsa sefatlhogo sa yone, mme kgosi ya lelela godimo ya re: “Abesalome, morwaake wee! Abesalome, morwaake wee! morwaake wee!”" 
2Samuel19:5 Joabe a tsena mo ntlong kwa kgosing a re: “Gompieno o tlhabisitse difatlhogo tsa batlhanka botlhe ba gago ditlhong, ba gompieno ba golotseng botshelo jwa gago, le matshelo a bomorwao le a bomorwadio, le matshelo a basadi ba gago, le matshelo a bagadingwana ba gago;" 
2Samuel19:6 ka e le fa o rata ba ba go ilang, o ila ba ba go ratang. Gonne o boletse gompieno wa re, dikgosana le batlhanka ga se sepe mo go wena; gonne gompieno ke a lemoga go re, fa Abesalome a ka bo a tshedile, rona rotlhe re sule gompieno, mo go ne go tlaa go kgatlha thata." 
2Samuel19:7 Ke gone jaana nanoga o tswele kwa ntle, o bue kgomotso le batlhanka ba gago; gonne ke a ikana ka Jehofa, fa o sa tswele kwa ntle, ga go ketla go lala monna ope nao 'sigong jono; moo go tlaa nna bosula mo go wena bogolo go bosula jotlhe jo bo go wetseng, go simolola mo bokaung jwa gago le go tla mo motlheng wa gompieno.”" 
2Samuel19:8 Foo kgosi ya nanoga ya dula kwa kgotleng. Ga bolelelwa batho botlhe ga twe: “Bonang, kgosi e dutse mo kgotleng;” mme batho botlhe ba tla fa pele ga kgosi. Jaana ba Iseraele ba ne ba tshabile, mongwe le mongwe a ile mogopeng wa gagwe." 
2Samuel19:9 Batho botlhe ba ne ba le kgang mo ditsong tsotlhe tsa Iseraele, ba re: “Kgosi e re golotse mo seatleng sa baba ba rona, ya re tshedisa mo atleng sa Bafilisitia, jaana e dule mo lefatsheng e tshaba Abesalome." 
2Samuel19:10 Abesalome yo re ne re mo itlolela, gore a re buse, o swetse mo tlhabanong. Jaana ga lo bueleng lefoko la go lere kgosi gape?”" 
2Samuel19:11 Kgosi Dafite a roma kwa baperesiting Satoke le Abiathare a re: “Buang le bagolwane ba Juta lo re: ‘Ke ka ntlha yang fa lona lo le ba morago mo go bosetseng kgosi kwa ntlong ya yone, ka puo ya Baiseraele botlhe e fitlhile mo kgosing ya go e isa kwa ntlong ya yone?" 
2Samuel19:12 Lona lo bana ba ga rre, lo lesapo la me le nama ya me; mme ke ka ntlha yang fa e bo ne ne lo le ba morago mo go lereng kgosi gape.’" 
2Samuel19:13 Lo reye Amasa lo re, ga twe: ‘A ga o lesapo la me la nama ya me? A Modimo o ntirele jalo, o bo o oketse, fa o sa nne molaodi wa ntwa fa pele ga me ka metlha yotlhe mo boemong jwa ga Joabe.’ ”" 
2Samuel19:14 A oba pelo tsa banna botlhe ba Juta, fela jaaka pelo ya monna a le mongwe fela; ba bo ba tla ba roma kwa kgosing, ba re: “Boa, wena le batlhanka botlhe ba gago.”" 
2Samuel19:15 Kgosi ya boa, ya tla mo Joretane. Bajuta ba tla mo Gilegale, ba tla go kgatlhantsha kgosi go tshedisa kgosi noka ya Joretane." 
2Samuel19:16 Shimei morwa Gere wa Mobenjamine, yo e ne e le wa Bahurime, a itlhaganela, a tla le batho ba Juta go kgatlhantsha Dafite." 
2Samuel19:17 O ne a na le banna ba Benjamine ba le 1 000, le Siba motlhanka wa ntlo ya ga Saule, le bomorwawe ba ba 15, le batlhanka ba gagwe ba ba 20; ba tshela Joretane mo ponong ya kgosi." 
2Samuel19:18 Ga tshela mokoro o o yang go tshedisa ba ntlo ya kgosi le go dira se o se gopolang se le molemo. Shimei morwa Gere a wela fa pele ga kgosi, a sena go tshela Joretane." 
2Samuel19:19 A raya kgosi a re: “A morena wa me a se mpalele boikepo, o se ka wa gakologelwa se motlhanka wa gago o se dirileng ka bokgopo ka letsatsi le kgosi morena wa me o ne a tswa ka lone mo Jerusalema; a go se tsene mo pelong ya kgosi." 
2Samuel19:20 Gonne motlhanka wa gago ke a itse fa ke leofile; ke gone, bona ke tsile gompieno ke le wa ntlha mo go botlhe ba ntlo ya ga Josefe go kgatlhantsha kgosi morena wa me.”" 
2Samuel19:21 Abišai morwa Seruja a fetola a re: “A Shimei ga a bolaelwe seo se, ka a kile a hutsa motlodiwa wa ga Jehofa?”" 
2Samuel19:22 Dafite a re; “Ke dirang ka lona bomorwa Seruja, fa e bo ne ne gompieno lo le baganetsi ba me? A gompieno go ka bolawa motho mongwe mo Iseraele? Gonne a ga ke a itse fa gompieno ke le kgosi ya Iseraele?”" 
2Samuel19:23 Kgosi ya raya Shimei ya re: “Ga o ketla o o swa.” Mme kgosi ya mo ikanela. 
2Samuel19:24 Mefibošethe morwa Saule, a tla go kgatlhantsha kgosi; o ne a ise a ipaakanye dinao, le fa e le go ikgaola ditedu, le fa e le go tlhatswa diaparo tsa gagwe, e sa le ka tsatsi le kgosi e tlogileng ka lone, go tla mo tsatsing le e tsileng gae ka lone ka kagiso." 
2Samuel19:25 Ya re a tla Jerusalema go kgatlhantsha kgosi, kgosi ya mo raya ya re: “Ke ka ntlha yang o se ka wa ya le nna wena Mefibošethe?”" 
2Samuel19:26 A fetola a re: “Kgosi, morena wa me, motlhanka wa me o ne a ntsietsa; gonne nna mothanka wa gago ka re: ‘Ke tlaa belesa esela ya me, gore ke e palame ke tsamaye le kgosi;’ gonne motlhanka wa gago o segole." 
2Samuel19:27 O pateleditse motlhanka wa gago fa pele ga kgosi morena wa me; kgosi morena wa me o ntse jaaka moengele wa Modimo; ke gone, dira se se molemo mo matlhong a gago." 
2Samuel19:28 Gonne ba ntlo ya ga rre botlhe e ne e le baswi fa pele ga kgosi morena wa me; le fa go ntse jalo, wa baya motlhanka wa gago mo go bone ba ba jelang fa lomating lwa gago. Ke sa na le tshiamo efe ya go tlhola ke ikuela kwa kgosing?”" 
2Samuel19:29 Kgosi ya mo raya ya re: “Ana o sa buelang ka ga dilo tsa gago? Ka re, wena le Siba lo kgaogane lefatshe.”" 
2Samuel19:30 Mefibošethe a raya kgosi a re: “Nnyaa, a a tseye gotlhe, ka e le fa, kgosi morena wa me a tsile mo ntlong ya gagwe ka kagiso.”" 
2Samuel19:31 Baresilai wa Mogileate a tswa kwa Rogelime; a tshela Joretane a na le kgosi, go e kgabagantsha Joretane." 
2Samuel19:32 Jaana Baresilai ya bo e le motsofe yo mogolo, a le dinyaga di le 80; o ne a neile kgosi dijo, kgosi e sa ntse e le kwa Mahanaime; gonne e ne e le monna yo motona thata." 
2Samuel19:33 Kgosi ya raya Baresilai ya re; “Kgabaganya le nna, ke tlaa go otla o na le nna mo Jerusalema.”" 
2Samuel19:34 Mme Baresilai a raya kgosi a re; “Ana malatsi a dinyaga tsa botshelo jwa me a kae, fa e ka bo jaana ke ka ya le kgosi kwa Jerusalema?" 
2Samuel19:35 Gompieno ke dinyaga di le 80, a ke ka farologanya molemo le bosula? A motlhanka wa gago o ka lemoga moutlwalo wa se ke se jang kgotsa wa se ke se nwang? A nka tlhola ke utlwa lentswe la banna ba ba opelang, le la basadi ba ba opelang? Ke gone e tlaa bo e le ka ntlha yang fa motlhanka wa gago a ka fela a ntse a le mokgweleo mo kgosing morena wa me?" 
2Samuel19:36 Motlhanka wa gago o rata a tshela Joretane le kgosi fela; ka re kgosi e tlaa bo e go ntebogelelang ka tuelo e e kalo? 
2Samuel19:37 Ke a go rapela, o mme motlhanka wa gago a boe, gore ke swele mo motseng wa gaetsho fa phupung ya ga rre le mme. Mme bona, motlhanka wa gago Kimefame; a go kgabaganye ene le kgosi morena wa me; o mo direle ka fa go tlaa nnang molemo mo go wena ka gone.”" 
2Samuel19:38 Kgosi ya mo fetola ya re: “Kimefame o tlaa kgabaganya le nna, ke tlaa mo direla se o tlaa se bonang se le molemo; mme sengwe le sengwe se o tlaa se eletsang mo go nna, ke tlaa se go direla.”" 
2Samuel19:39 Batho botlhe ba kgabaganya Joretane, le kgosi ya kgabaganya, kgosi ya atla Baresilai, ya mo segofatsa, mme a boela kwa ga gabo." 
2Samuel19:40 Jalo kgosi ya kgabaganya kwa Gilegale, le Kimefame a kgabaganya nayo, mme batho botlhe ba Juta ba kgabagantsha kgosi, le bontlha e nngwe jwa batho ba Iseraele." 
2Samuel19:41 Mme bonang, batho botlhe ba Iseraele ba tla mo kgosing, ba raya kgosi ba re: “Ke ka ntlha yang bana ba ga rraetsho, banna ba Juta ba go utswile, mme go le kgosi, le ba ntlo ya yone, le batho botlhe ba ga Dafite nayo, ba ba tshedisitse Joretane?”" 
2Samuel19:42 Banna botlhe ba Juta ba fetola banna ba Iseraele ba re: “Ke ka gonne kgosi ke losika lo lo gaufi le rona; ana lo tlalelang bogale ka ga selo se? A gongwe re jele dijo tsa kgosi? Kgotsa a e re neile neo nngwe?” 
2Samuel19:43 Banna ba Iseraele ba fetola banna ba Juta ba re: “Rona re na le dikabelo di le some mo kgosing, gape re na le tshiamo mo go Dafite e e fetang ya lona. Lo ne lo re nyaletsang, ka lo se ka lwa lopa kgakololo ya rona pele ka ga go busa kgosi?” Mme mafoko a banna ba Juta a ne a le bogale go mafoko a banna ba Iseraele." 
2Samuel20:1 Ga tshoganwa ka go le monna yo o seramatla gone, leina la gagwe e le Sheba, morwa Bikeri, motho wa Mobenjamine; mme a letsa lonaka a re: “Ga re na kabelo mo go Dafite, le gone ga re na boswa mo go morwa Jese; wena Iseraele, a motho mongwe le mongwe a ye mogopeng wa gagwe.”" 
2Samuel20:2 Jalo banna botlhe ba Iseraele ba kgaogana le go sala Dafite morago, ba sala Sheba morwa Bikeri morago; mme banna ba Juta ba ngaparela kgosi ya bone, go simolola kwa Joretane go ya fela kwa Jerusalema." 
2Samuel20:3 Dafite a tla kwa ntlong ya gagwe kwa Jerusalema; kgosi ya tsaya basadi ba ba some ba bagadingwana ba yone, ba e ne e ba tlogetse go lebela ntlo, ya ba tsenya mo tisong, ya ba otla, mme ya se ka ya tsena kwa go bone. Jalo ba tswalelwa go ya letsatsing la loso lwa bone, ba ntse ba tshedile ka botlholagadi fela." 
2Samuel20:4 Foo kgosi ya raya Amasa, ya re: “Mphuthela banna ba Juta, malatsi a le mararo a ise a fete, le wena o bo o le gone fa.”" 
2Samuel20:5 Jalo Amasa a ya go phutha banna ba Juta; a ya a diega a fetisa lobaka lo o lo kaetsweng. 
2Samuel20:6 Dafite a raya Abišai a re: “Jaanong Sheba morwa Bikeri o tlaa re direla bosula jo bo fetang jo bo dirilweng ke Abesalome; wena o tseye batlhanka ba morena wa gago, o mo konatelele, ka o ka tla a tsena mo metseng e e thekeleditsweng, a falole a tswe mo ponong ya rona.”" 
2Samuel20:7 Mme a bololelwa ke banna ba ga Joabe, le Bakerethe, le Bapelethe, le ba ba diganka botlhe; mme ba tswa Jerusalema ba ya go konatelela Sheba morwa Bikeri." 
2Samuel20:8 E rile ba fitlha fa letlapeng le legolo le le mo Gibeone, Amasa a tla go ba kgatlhantsha. Joabe a bo a ikgatlhile ka diaparo tsa gagwe tsa ntwa tse o di apereng, mo go tsone ga bo go le moitlamo o na le tšhaka a e kgatlheletse ka fa nokeng ya gagwe, e le mo kgatlheng ya yone; mme ya re a tsamaela pele ya somoga ya wa." 
2Samuel20:9 Joabe a raya Amasa a re: “A o sa tshela sentle, ngwanaa rra?” Mme Joabe a tshwara Amasa ka ditedu ka seatla sa gagwe se segolo, a re o a mo atla." 
2Samuel20:10 Amasa a se ka a tlhokomela tšhaka e e mo seatleng se segolo sa ga Joabe; mme a mo swatlha ka yone mo mogodung a tshololela mala a gagwe fa fatshe, mme a se ka a tlhola a mo swatlha; mme a swa. Joabe le Abišai morwawe ba konatelela Sheba morwa Bikeri." 
2Samuel20:11 Ga ema fa go ene lengwe la makau a ga Joabe la re: “Yo o ratang Joabe le yo o mo ntlheng ya ga Dafite, a a sale Joabe morago.”" 
2Samuel20:12 Mme Amasa a bo a bidikama fela mo mading a gagwe mo gare ga tsela e kgolo. E rile monna yoo a bona fa batho botlhe ba ema fela a tlosa Amasa mo tseleng e kgolo, a mo isa mo nageng, a mo khurumetsa ka kobo, ka a bona fa mongwe le mongwe yo o tlang ka ene a ema fela." 
2Samuel20:13 E rile a sena go tlosiwa mo tseleng e kgolo batho botlhe ba latela Joabe, ba ya go konatelela Sheba morwa Bikeri." 
2Samuel20:14 A ralala ditso tsotlhe tsa Iseraele go ya kwa Abele, le kwa Bethemaaka, le Babere botlhe; ba phuthega, le bone ba mo latela." 
2Samuel20:15 Ba fitlha ba mo tlhasela mo Abele wa Bethemaaka, ba tlhatlosetsa motse lomota, lwa ikama lorako lwa phemelo; batho botlhe ba ba nang le Joabe ba thulaka lorako, go tla ba lo diga." 
2Samuel20:16 Foo ga kua mosadi mongwe yo o botlhale mo teng ga motse a re: “Hee hee; ke a lo rapela, rayang Joabe lo re a atamele kwano, gore ke bue nae.”" 
2Samuel20:17 A atamela kwa go ene; mme mosadi a re: “A ke wena Joabe?” A araba, a re: “Ke nna.” Mosadi a mo raya a re: “Utlwa mafoko a lelata la gago.” A araba a re: “Ke reeditse.”" 
2Samuel20:18 Mosadi a bua a re: “E rile bogologolo ba ne ba tle ba bue ba re: ‘Le gale ba tlaa lopa kgakololo kwa Abele’; mme kgang e khutle jalo. 
2Samuel20:19 Nna ke wa bone ba ba agisang, le wa ba ba boikanngo mo Iseraele; o batla go senya motes mongwe le mma batho mo Iseraele; ana o ratelang go kometsa boswa jwa ga Jehofa?”" 
2Samuel20:20 Joabe a mo fetola a re: “A go nne kgakala, a go nne kgakala le nna, fa nka kometsa, le fa e le go senya." 
2Samuel20:21 Ga go a nna jalo; mme monna mongwe wa lefatshe la Eferaime la makhujana, leina la gagwe ke Sheba morwa Bikeri, o tsholeleditse kgosi, e bong Dafite, letsogo la gagwe; ntsha ene fela, mme ke tlaa tlogela motse.” Mosadi a raya Joabe a re: “Bona, o tlaa latlhelwa tlhogo ya gagwe ka koo ka fa lorakong.”" 
2Samuel20:22 Foo mosadi a ya mo bathong botlhe ka botlhale jwa gagwe. Ba kgaola Sheba morwa Bikeri tlhogo, ba e latlhela kwa go Joabe. A letsa lonaka mme ba phatlalalela motse, mongwe le mongwe a ya mogopeng wa gagwe, Joabe a boela Jerusalema kwa kgosing." 
2Samuel20:23 Jaana Joabe e ne e le molaodi wa ntwa yotlhe ya Iseraele; Benaia morwa Joiata e le molaodi wa Bakerethe le wa Bapelethe; 
2Samuel20:24 Atorame e le molaodi wa lekgetho; Jehošafate morwa Ahilote e le mokwadi wa ditiralo. 
2Samuel20:25 Shefe e le mokwaledi; Satoke le Abiathare e le baperesiti; 
2Samuel20:26 le ene Ira wa Mojaira e le moperesiti kwa go Dafite. 
2Samuel21:1 E rile mo metlheng ya ga Dafite ga nna leuba ka dinyaga di le tharo, ka ngwaga le ngwaga; Dafite a batla sefatlhogo sa ga Jehofa. Mme Jehofa a re: “Ke ka ntlha ya ga Saule, le ka ntlha ya ba ntlo ya gagwe ba ba diatla di madi, ka a ne a bolaya Bagibeone.”" 
2Samuel21:2 Kgosi ya bitsa Bagibeone, ya ba raya ya re, (le gale Bagibeone e ne e se ba bana ba Iseraele, ya bo e le ba masalela a Baamore; bana ba Iseraele ba ne ba ba ikanetse; e rile Saule a tlhoafaletse bana ba Iseraele le ba Juta, a batla go bolaya Bagibeone.)" 
2Samuel21:3 Dafite a raya Bagibeone a re: “Ke tlaa lo direlang? Ke tlaa lefa kang, gore lo tle lo segofatse boswa jwa Jehofa.”" 
2Samuel21:4 Bagibeone ba mo raya ba re: “Ga go kgang epe e e ka lefwang ka selefere le fa e le ka gouta gare ga rona le Saule, kgotsa ba ntlo ya gagwe; le gone ga se ga rona go bolaya monna ope mo Iseraele.” A re: “Se lo tlaa se buang ke tlaa se lo direla fela.”" 
2Samuel21:5 Ba raya kgosi ba re: “Monna yo o re nyeleditseng, le yo o ne a re logela maano gore re senngwe re se ka ra sala mo melelwaneng epe ya Iseraele, ra re:" 
2Samuel21:6 A re neelwe banna basupa ba bomorwawe, mme re tlaa ba pegela Jehofa mo Gibea wa ga Saule, moitshenkedwi wa ga Jehofa.” Kgosi ya re: “Ke tlaa ba ntsha.”" 
2Samuel21:7 Mme kgosi ya rekegela Mefibošethe morwa Jonathane morwa Saule, ka ntlha ya ikano ya ga Jehofa e e neng e le gare ga bone, gare ga Difite le Jonathane morwa Saule." 
2Samuel21:8 Kgosi ya tsaya bomorwa boo babedi ba ga Risepa morwadia Aia, ba o ne a ba bona le Saule, e bong Aremoni le Mefibošethe; le morwa Mikale morwadia Saule, ba batlhano, ba o ne a ba bona le Ateriele morwa Baresilai wa Meholathe;" 
2Samuel21:9 a ba tsenya mo diatleng tsa Bagibeone, mme ba ba pega mo thabeng fa pele ga Jehofa, ba wa mmogo boo basupa; ba bolawa mo motlheng wa thobo, mo malatsing a ntlha mo tshimologong ya thobo ya barele." 
2Samuel21:10 Risepa morwadia Aia a tsaya letsela la kgetse, a le ikalela mo letlapeng, go tswa tshimologong ya thobo metsi a ba a tla a ba thelegela a tswa legodimong; mme a se ka a leseletsa dinonyane tsa loapi go nna mo go bone motshegare, le fa e le dibatana tsa nago bosigo." 
2Samuel21:11 Ga bolelelwa Dafite se Risepa morwadia Aia, mogadingwana wa ga Saule o se dirileng." 
2Samuel21:12 Dafite a ya a tsaya marapo a ga Saule le marapo a ga Jonathane morwawe mo bathong ba Jabeše-gileate, ba ba kileng ba a utswa mo mmileng wa Bethešeane, kwa Bafilisitia ba ne ba a pegile gone, ka tsatsi le Bafilisitia ba bolaileng Saule ka lone mo Gileboa." 
2Samuel21:13 A tlhatlosa marapo a ga Saule le marapo a ga Jonathane morwawe; ba ba ba phutha marapo a bone ba ba pegilweng. 
2Samuel21:14 Ba fitlha marapo a ga Saule le Jonathane morwawe mo lefatsheng la Benjamine mo Sela, mo phupung ya ga Kiše rraagwe; ba dira gotlhe mo kgosi e go laotseng. Morago ga moo Modimo wa rapelesega ka ga lefatshe." 
2Samuel21:15 Bafilisitia ba ba ba tlhabana le Baiseraele; Dafite a fologa, a na le batlhanka ba gagwe, a tlhabana le Bafilisitia; mme Dafite a lapa." 
2Samuel21:16 Išibibenobe, yo e ne e le wa bomorwa monna wa morobana, yo bokete jwa lerumo la gagwe e ne e le dišekela di le makgolo mararo tsa kgotlho ka bokete, ka a ne a ikgatlheletse ka tšhaka e ntšha, a gopola go bolaya Dafite." 
2Samuel21:17 Abišai morwa Seruja a mo thusa, a itaya Mofilisitia, a mmolaya. Foo banna ba ga Dafite ba mo ikanela ba re: “Ga o ketla o tlhola o bolola ntwa le rona, gore o se ka wa tima lobone lwa Iseraele.”" 
2Samuel21:18 Ga dirala ya re morago ga moo ga tlhabanwa gape le Bafilisitia kwa Gobe; foo Sibekai wa Mohušathe a bolaya Safe, yo e ne e le wa bomorwa monna wa morobana." 
2Samuel21:19 Ga tlhabanwa gape le Bafilisitia kwa Gobe; mme Elehanane morwa Jaare-oregime wa Mobethelehema a bolaya Goliathe wa Mogite, yo lore lwa lerumo la gagwe lo ne lo tshwana le mosipuri wa monyedi." 
2Samuel21:20 Gape ga nna tlhabano kwa Gathe, kwa go ne go na le monna yo o godileng thata gone, yo o ne a na le menwana e le merataro mo seatleng sengwe le sengwe, le menwana e le merataro mo lonaong longwe le longwe, ke go re, e le 24 go le mmogo; le ene e le morwa monna wa morobana." 
2Samuel21:21 Ya re a kgoba Iseraele, Jonathane morwa Shimei mogolo wa Dafite a mmolaya." 
2Samuel21:22 Ba bane bao e ne e le bomorwa monna wa morobana mo Gathe; mme ba wa ka seatla sa ga Dafite le ka seatla sa batlhanka ba gagwe. 
2Samuel22:1 Dafite a bua le Jehofa mafoko a sefela se, ka letsatsi le Jehofa o mo golotseng ka lone mo seatleng sa baba botlhe ba gagwe, le mo seatleng sa ga Saule," 
2Samuel22:2 a re: “Jehofa ke lefika la me, le kago ya me ya phemelo, le mogolodi wa me, e bong wa me;" 
2Samuel22:3 Modimo wa lefika la me, ke tlaa ikanya mo go one; thebe ya me, le lonaka lwa poloko ya me, kago ya me e e godileng, botshabelo jwa me; mmoloki wa me, wa nkgolola mo thubakong." 
2Samuel22:4 Ke tlaa bitsa Jehofa, yo o tshwanetseng go bakwa; jalo ke tlaa gololwa mo babeng ba me." 
2Samuel22:5 Gonne makhubu a metsi a loso a ne a ntsentse gare, merwalela ya boikepo ya mpoifisa." 
2Samuel22:6 Megala ya Bobipo e ne e ntharile, diru tsa loso tsa nkwela." 
2Samuel22:7 Mo pitlaganong ya me ka bitsa Jehofa, Ee, ka tlhaeleletsa kwa go Modimo wa me; wa utlwa lentswe la me o le mo tempeleng ya one, go goa ga me ga tsena mo tsebeng tsa one." 
2Samuel22:8 Foo lefatshe la reketla la roroma, metheo ya legodimo ya tshikinyega ya reketlisiwa, ka one o ne a tuka bogale." 
2Samuel22:9 Ga kua mosi mo dinkong tsa one, molelo o o tswang molomong wa one wa laila; magala a tshujwa ka one." 
2Samuel22:10 Wa oba le one magodimo, wa fologa; go ne go le lefifi le le kwenneng tlase ga dinao tsa one." 
2Samuel22:11 Wa palama mo tšherubeng, wa fofa; Ee, wa bonwa mo diphukeng tsa phefo." 
2Samuel22:12 Wa dira lefifi go nna maobo tikologong ya one, kgobokano ya metsi, maru a a kwenneng a legodimo." 
2Samuel22:13 Magala a molelo a ne a tshujwa ka phatsimo e e fa pele ga one. 
2Samuel22:14 Jehofa a duma a le kwa legodimong, Mogodimodimo a ntsha lentswe la gagwe." 
2Samuel22:15 A hula ka metswi a ba phatlalatsa; e bong ka dikgadima, a ba alola." 
2Samuel22:16 Foo meedi ya lewatle ya bonala, metheo ya lefatshe ya senolwa, ka kgalemo ya ga Jehofa, ka pudulo ya mowa wa dinko tsa gagwe." 
2Samuel22:17 A roma a le godimong, a ntsaya; a ntshwatola mo metsing a magolo;" 
2Samuel22:18 a nkgolola mo mmabeng wa me yo o thata, mo go bone ba ba nkidileng; gonne ba ne ba le thata bobe mo go nna." 
2Samuel22:19 Ba ne ba nkwela mo motlheng wa tatlhego ya me; mme Jehofa ya nna ene seitshegeletso sa me. 
2Samuel22:20 O ne a nntshetsa kwa felong fa go atlhameng; a nkgolola, gonne a kgatlhega thata mo go nna." 
2Samuel22:21 Jehofa, o ne a ntuela ka fa tshiamong ya me; a ntefetsa ka fa bontleng jwa diatla tsa me." 
2Samuel22:22 Gonne ke tshegeditse ditsela tsa ga Jehofa, ga ke a tloga mo Modimong ka go ikepa." 
2Samuel22:23 Gonne dikatlholo tsotlhe tsa gagwe di ne di le fa pele ga me; ka ga melao ya gagwe ga ke a ka ka tloga mo go yone. 
2Samuel22:24 Gape ke ne ke le boitekanelo fa pele ga gagwe, ka ithiba mo boikepong jwa me." 
2Samuel22:25 Ke gone ka moo Jehofa o ne a ntefela ka fa tshiamong ya me; ka fa bontleng jwa me mo ponong ya matlho a gagwe. 
2Samuel22:26 Mo go ba ba kutlwelo botlhoko o tlaa itshupa kutlwelo botlhoko, mo go yo o itekanetseng o tlaa itshupa boitekanelo;" 
2Samuel22:27 mo go yo o itshekileng o tlaa itshupa boitsheko; mo go yo o logwadi, o tlaa itshupa lesoko." 
2Samuel22:28 Batho ba ba patikegang o tlaa ba boloka; mme matlho a gago o mo go ba ba ipegang, gore o tle o ba kokobetse." 
2Samuel22:29 Gonne ke wena lobone lwa me, Jehofa; o tlaa bonesa lefifi la me." 
2Samuel22:30 Gonne ke sotlhomela lesomo ka wena; ke tlola lorako ka Modimo wa me. 
2Samuel22:31 Ka ga Modimo, tsela ya one e itekanetse; lefoko la ga Jehofa le lekilwe; ene, ke thebe ya botlhe ba ba mo ikanyang." 
2Samuel22:32 Gonne Modimo e mang, fa e se ene Jehofa? Le gone lefika ke mang, fa e se Modimo wa rona?" 
2Samuel22:33 Modimo ke one kago ya me e e thata ya phemelo; o goga moitekanedi mo tseleng ya one. 
2Samuel22:34 O dira dinao tsa gagwe go nna jaaka ditlhako tsa kwalata, mme o mpeye mo mafelong a me a a godimo." 
2Samuel22:35 O ruta diatla tsa me go tlhabana; jalo mabogo a me a ba a tle a obe bora jwa kgotlho. 
2Samuel22:36 O bile o nneile thebe ya poloka ya gago; bopelonamagadi jwa gago bo ntirile mogolo. 
2Samuel22:37 Dikgato tsa me o di atlhamoloseditse tlase ga me, dinao tsa me ga di a relela." 
2Samuel22:38 Ke konateletse baba ba me, ke ba sentse; le gone ga ke a ka ka bowa ba ise ba nyelediwe pele." 
2Samuel22:39 Ke ba gaitse, ka ba phololetsa, ba ba ba retelelwa ke go tsoga; Ee, ba wetse fa tlase ga dinao tsa me." 
2Samuel22:40 Gonne o ntlametse go tlhabana ka nonofo, o kokobeditse fa tlase ga me bone ba ba neng ba ntsogologela." 
2Samuel22:41 Gape o dirile gore baba ba me ba nnee dikotla, gore ke tle ke tlose bone ba ba nkilang." 
2Samuel22:42 Ba ne ba leba, mme go ne go se na ope yo o bolokang; ba leba e bong kwa go Jehofa, mme a se ka a ba araba." 
2Samuel22:43 Foo ka ba ngotangota bosesane, jaaka lorole lwa lefatshe, ka ba šobotla jaaka moraga wa mebila, ka ba phatlalatsa." 
2Samuel22:44 E bile o nkgolotse mo dipetapetanong tsa batho ba gaetsho; o ntshegeditse go tla ke nna tlhogo ya merafe; tšhaba e ke iseng ke e itse e tlaa ntirela. 
2Samuel22:45 Baeng ba tlaa inkokobeletsa; e tlaa re ba itlhoma ba nkutlwela, boo ba ineela fela." 
2Samuel22:46 Baeng ba tlaa tlhotlhorega, ba tlaa tla ba roroma ba tswa mo maitshubelong a bone." 
2Samuel22:47 Jehofa o tshedile; a go bakwe lefika la me; a go goletsege Modimo wa lefika la poloko ya me; 
2Samuel22:48 e bong Modimo o o dirafatsang pusoloso ka ga me, o kokobeletse ditšhaba fa tlase ga me;" 
2Samuel22:49 e le o o ntshawatolang mo babeng ba me; Ee, o a ntsholetsa, o mpaya godimo ga bone ba ba ntsogologelang; wa nkgolola mo monneng yo o thubakang." 
2Samuel22:50 Ke gone ka moo ke tlaa go lebogang, Jehofa, mo gare ga merafe, ke tlaa opelela leina la gago dipako." 
2Samuel22:51 O naya kgosi ya gagwe kgololo e kgolo; o itshupa bopelonomi mo go motlodiwa wa gagwe, mo go Dafite le losika lwa gagwe ka bosakhutleng.”" 
2Samuel23:1 Jaana a, ke mafoko a bofelo a ga Dafite; Dafite morwa Jese a bua, monna yo o ne a golelediwa kwa godimo a re: Motlodiwa wa Modimo wa ga Jakobe, le mokwadi yo o rategang wa dipesalema tsa Iseraele; a re:" 
2Samuel23:2 “Mowa wa ga Jehofa o ne wa bua ka nna, lefoko la gagwe le ne le le mo lolemeng lwa me." 
2Samuel23:3 Modimo wa Iseraele o rile, yo e leng Lefika la Iseraele o buile le nna; a re: Motho yo o busang batho ka tshiamo, yo o busang mo poifong ya Modimo," 
2Samuel23:4 o tlaa nna jaaka lesedi la bosa fa letsatsi le tlhaba, e le moso o o se nang maru; fa bojang jo botalana bo tswetswena mo mmung, ka phatsimo e e phepa morago ga pula." 
2Samuel23:5 Ruri ntlo ya me ga e a nna jalo le Modimo; le fa go ntse o dirile le nna kgolagano e e sa khutleng, e e rulagantsweng mo dilong tsotlhe, e e tlhomameng; gonne ke poloko yotlhe ya me, keletso yotlhe ya me, le fa o sa e tswedisetse pele." 
2Samuel23:6 Mme baikepi botlhe ba tlaa nna jaaka mitlwa e e nang le go kgoromediwa fela, ka e sa kake ya tshwarwa ka letsogo;" 
2Samuel23:7 Mme monna yo o e amang o na le go e tshola ka selepe le ngakale; mme e tlaa fisediwa ruri ke molelo mo felong ga yone.” 
2Samuel23:8 A, ke maina a batho ba ba diganka ba Dafite o ne a na nabo; Jošebebašebethe wa Motakemone, mogolwane wa balaodi ba mephato; ga bo go le Adino wa Moesene le ene, yo o ne a tlhabana le batho ba le 800, mme ba bolaelwa gongwe fela." 
2Samuel23:9 Morago ga gagwe ga nna Eleasare morwa Dotai morwa motho wa Moahohi, mongwe wa banna ba bararo ba diganka ba ba kileng ba nna le Dafite, jale ka ba kgoba Bafilisitia ba ba neng ba phuthegetse go tlhabana, mme banna ba Iseraele ba ne ba tsamaile." 
2Samuel23:10 Ene a nanoga a kgemetha Bafilisitia ga tsamaya letsogo la gagwe la lapa, le seatla sa gagwe sa huparela tšhaka; Jehofa a dira phenyo e kgolo ka tsatsi leo; batho ba bowa ba tla morago ga gagwe, ba tla go thopa fela." 
2Samuel23:11 Yo o ne a rulagana nae e ne e le Shama morwa Agee wa Moharare. Bafilisitia ba ne ba phuthegile ba le lesomo kwa go ne go na le sebata sa lefatshe gone se se tletseng lotlhodi; mme batho ba tswa ba tshaba Bafilisitia. 
2Samuel23:12 Ene a ema fa gare ga sebata seo, a se tlhabanela, a bolaya Bafilisitia; mme Jehofa a dira phenyo e kgolo." 
2Samuel23:13 Batho ba le bararo mo bagolwaneng ba ba 30 ba ya, ba fitlha kwa go Dafite kwa logageng lwa Adulame, mo motlheng wa thobo; lesomo la Bafilisitia le ne le thibeletse mo molapong wa Refaime." 
2Samuel23:14 Ya re mo lobakeng loo Dafite a bo a le mo kagong e e thata, setlhopha sa masole a Bafilisitia se le mo Bethelehema." 
2Samuel23:15 Dafite o ne a na le tlhologelelo ya go re a bo mongwe a ka ka a nnosa metsi a sediba sa Bethelehema, se se fa kgorong!" 
2Samuel23:16 Banna ba bararo ba ba diganka ba thobeselela ntwa ya Bafilisitia, ba ya ba ga metsi mo sedibeng sa Bethelehema, se se neng se le fa kgorong, ba a tsaya ba a isa kwa go Dafite; mme a gana go a nwa, a a tsholela fa pele ga Jehofa." 
2Samuel23:17 A re: “A go nne kgakala le nna, Jehofa, fa nka dira seo se; a ke tlaa nwa madi a banna ba ba tsamaileng ba le mo pitlaganong ka ga botshelo jwa bone?” Ke gone ka moo a gana go nwa. Dilo tse banna ba bararo ba ba diganka ba di dirile." 
2Samuel23:18 Abišai, monnaa Joabe, morwa Seruja, e ne e le mogolo wa ba bararo, a tsholeletsa batho ba ba 300 lerumo la gagwe, a ba bolaya, mme a bona leina mo go ba bararo." 
2Samuel23:19 A ga e ne e le ene yo o tlotlego bogolo mo go ba bararo? Ke gone ka moo a beewa molaodi wa bone; le fa go ntse jalo ga a ka a fitlha mo borarong jwa ntlha. 
2Samuel23:20 Benaia morwa Joiata, morwa monna yo o pelokgale wa Kabeseele, yo o ne a dirile ditiro tse dikgolo, a bolaya bomorwa Ariele wa Moabe boo babedi; le gone a fologa a ya a bolaya tau mo gare ga mokole, go le kapoko;" 
2Samuel23:21 a bolaya Moegepeto, e le monna yo o bopegileng sentle; Moegepeto o ne a tshotse lerumo; ene a fologela kwa go ene a tshotse tsamma fela, a phamola lerumo mo seatleng sa Moegepeto, a mmolaya ka lerumo la gagwe." 
2Samuel23:22 Benaia morwa Joiata a dira dilo tse, mme a dirana le leina mo banneng ba bararo ba diganka." 
2Samuel23:23 O ne a le tlotlego bogolo go ba ba 30, mme a se ka a fitlha mo borarong jwa ntlha. Dafite a mmaya molaodi wa balebedi ba gagwe." 
2Samuel23:24 Asahele monnaa Joabe e ne e le mongwe wa ba ba 30; Elehanane morwa Toto wa Betheleheme; 
2Samuel23:25 Shama wa Moharote, Elika wa Moharote;" 
2Samuel23:26 Helese wa Mopalete, Ira morwa Ikeše wa Motekoa;" 
2Samuel23:27 Abiesere wa Moanathothe, Mebunai wa Mokušathe;" 
2Samuel23:28 Salemone wa Moahohe, Maharai wa Monetofa;" 
2Samuel23:29 Helebe morwa Baana wa Monetofa, Itai morwa Ribai wa Gibea wa bana ba Benjamine;" 
2Samuel23:30 Benaia wa Mopirathone, Hitai wa dinokana tsa Gaaše;" 
2Samuel23:31 Abi-alebone wa Moareba, Asemafethe wa Mobarahume;" 
2Samuel23:32 Eliahaba wa Mošalebona, bomorwa Jašene, Jonathane;" 
2Samuel23:33 Shama wa Moharare, Ahiame morwa Sharare wa Moharare;" 
2Samuel23:34 Elefelete morwa Ahasebai, morwa motho wa Momaakathe, Eliame morwa Ahithofele wa Mogilo;" 
2Samuel23:35 Hesero wa Mokaremele, Paarai wa Moarebe;" 
2Samuel23:36 Igale morwa Nathane wa Soba, Bani wa Mogate;" 
2Samuel23:37 Seleke wa Moamone, Naharai wa Mobeerothe, e le batshola dibolao ba ga Joabe morwa Seruia;" 
2Samuel23:38 Ira wa Moithire, Garebe wa Moithire;" 
2Samuel23:39 Uria wa Mohite: batho ba le 37 fa ba le mmogo. 
2Samuel24:1 Gape bogale jwa ga Jehofa jwa tukela Baiseraele, a ba a tlhotlheletsa Dafite a re: “Ya o bale Baiseraele le Bajuta.”" 
2Samuel24:2 Kgosi ya raya Joabe molaodi wa ntwa, yo o ne a nna nae, a re: “Yang lo ralale ditso tsotlhe tsa Iseraele go tswa Dane go ya fela kwa Beerešeba, lo bale batho, gore ke tle ke itse palo ya morafe.”" 
2Samuel24:3 Mme Joabe a raya kgosi a re: “A Jehofa Modimo wa gago a ntsifatse batho ka fa palo ya bone e tlaa nnang ka gone le fa e le galekgolo, mme a matlho a kgosi morena wa me a go bone; mme kgosi morena wa me e kgatlhwa ke selo se ka ntlha yang?”" 
2Samuel24:4 Mme le fa go ntse jalo lefoko la kgosi la kgona Joabe, la ba la kgona balaodi ba ntwa. Joabe le balaodi ba ntwa ba tswa fa pele ga kgosi, ba ya go bala batho ba Iseraele." 
2Samuel24:5 Ba kgabaganya Joretane, ba thibelela mo Aroere, ka fa ntlheng ya letsogo le legolo ga motse o o fa gare ga molapo wa Gate, go ya Jasere." 
2Samuel24:6 Foo ba tla mo Gileate, le mo lefatsheng la Tahatime-hodiši; ba tla mo Dane-jaane, ba potologa ba fitlha kwa Sitone," 
2Samuel24:7 ba tla mo kagong e e thata ya Ture, le mo metseng yotlhe ya Bahife, le ya Bakanana; ba tswela ntlheng ya borwa ya Juta, kwa Beerešeba." 
2Samuel24:8 E rile ba sena go ralala lefatshe lotlhe ka go le boaboela, ba tla Jerusalema kwa bokhutlong jwa dikgwedi tse di 9 le malatsi a le 20." 
2Samuel24:9 Joabe a naya kgosi palo ya batho jaaka ba badilwe; mo go Baiseraele go ne go le banna ba ba pelokgale ba ba itseng go somola tšhaka ba le 800 000; banna ba Juta ba le 500 000. 
2Samuel24:10 Pelo ya ga Dafite ya nongosela a sena go bala batho. Dafite a raya Jehofa a re: “Ke leofile thata ka se ke se dirileng; jaana, Jehofa, ke a go rapela, o tlose boikepo jwa motlhanka wa gago; gonne ke dirile ka boeleele jo bogolo.”" 
2Samuel24:11 Ya re Dafite a tsoga ka moso, lefoko la ga Jehofa la tla mo go Gate moperofeti, molebedi wa ga Dafite a re:" 
2Samuel24:12 “Ya o bue le Dafite o re: ‘Jehofa o bua jaana a re: Ke baya dilo di le tharo fa pele ga gago; o itebalebele sengwe mo go tsone gore ke se go direle.’ ” 
2Samuel24:13 Jalo Gate a tla mo go Dafite a mmolelela, a mo raya a re: “A go ka tla dinyaga di supa tsa leuba mo go wena mo lefatsheng la gaeno, kgotsa a o tlaa tshaba fa pele ga baba ba gago ka dikgwedi di le tharo ba ntse ba go konatelela, kgotsa a kgogodi e ka tla mo lefatsheng la gaeno ka malatsi a le mararo? Jaana o ikgakolole, o akanye phetolo e ke tlaa e busetsang kwa go ene yo o nthomileng.”" 
2Samuel24:14 Dafite a raya Gate a re: “Ke mo pitlaganong e kgolo; a re weleng jaana mo seatleng sa ga Jehofa; gonne mautlwelobotlhoko a gagwe a magolo; mme a ke se wele mo seatleng sa motho.” 
2Samuel24:15 Jehofa a tsosetsa Iseraele kgogodi, go simolola mo mosong go ya fela mo lobakeng lo lo tlhomilweng; mme go tswa Dane go ya Beerešeba ga a swa banna ba le 70 000." 
2Samuel24:16 Ya re moengele a otlololela Jerusalema letsogo la gagwe go o senya, Jehofa a ikwatlhaela bosula joo, a raya moengele yo o senyang batho a re: “Go lekanye; gona letsogo la gago.” Moengele wa ga Jehofa a bo a le fa seboping sa pholelo sa ga Arauna wa Mojebuse." 
2Samuel24:17 Ya re Dafite a bona moengele yo o gailang batho, a bua le Jehofa a re: “Bona, ke leofile, ke dirile ka bokgopo; mme dinku tse, tsone di dirile eng? Ke a go rapela, a letsogo la gago le ke le nne mo go nna fela, le mo ntlong ya ga rre.”" 
2Samuel24:18 Gate a tla mo go Dafite ka tsatsi leo, a mo raya a re: “Tlhatloga, o ye go agela Jehofa sebeso mo seboping sa pholelo sa ga Arauna wa Mojebuse.”" 
2Samuel24:19 Dafite a tlhatloga ka fa puong ya ga Gate jaaka Jehofa a laotse. 
2Samuel24:20 Arauna a leba, a bona kgosi le batlhanka ba yone ba tla ba lebile kwa go ene; mme Arauna a tswa, a ikoba fa pele ga kgosi, sefatlhogo sa gagwe se le fa fatshe." 
2Samuel24:21 Arauna a re: “Ana kgosi morena wa me e tletseng kwa motlhankeng wa yone?” Dafite a re: “Ke go reka sebopi sa pholelo mo go wena, go tla ke agela Jehofa sebeso, gore sebetso se se tle mo bathong, mme se emisiwe.”" 
2Samuel24:22 Arauna a raya Dafite a re: “A kgosi morena wa me a tseye fela, a ise tshupelo ka sengwe fela se o se bonang se le molemo; bona, dikgomo tsa tshupelo e e fisiwang ke tse, le dilo tse go folwang ka tsone, le dijokwe e ka nna tsone dikgong." 
2Samuel24:23 Dilo tse tsotlhe, kgosi, Arauna o a di go naya kgosi.” Arauna a raya kgosi a re: “A Jehofa Modimo a go amogele.”" 
2Samuel24:24 Mme kgosi ya raya Arauna ya re: “Nnyaa; ruri ke tlaa se reka mo go wena ka fa tlhwatlhweng ya sone; le gone ga nketla ke isa tshupelo tse di fisediwang Jehofa Modimo wa me, e le dilo tse ke di neilweng fela.” Dafite a reka sebopi sa pholelo le dikgomo ka dipapetla di le 50 tsa selefera." 
2Samuel24:25 Dafite a agela Jehofa sebeso gone, mme a isa ditshupelo tse di fisiwang le ditshupelo tsa kagiso. Mme Jehofa a rapelesega ka ga lefatshe, mme sebetso sa emisiwa mo Iseraele." 
1Kings1:1 Jaana kgosi Dafite o ne a tsofetse a le dinyaga di le dintsi; ba ne ba tle ba mo khurumetse ka dikobo, mme a se ke a thuthafale." 
1Kings1:2 Ka ntlha ya moo batlhanka ba gagwe ba mo raya ba re: “A kgosi morena wa rona a senkelwe morweetsana wa kgarebana, a a eme fa pele ga kgosi, a e ngomaele, a robale mo sehubeng sa gago, gore kgosi morena wa rona a tle a thuthafale.”" 
1Kings1:3 Jalo ba batla morweetsana yo montle ba ya le melelwane yotlhe ya Iseraele, ba bona Abišage wa Mošuneme, ba mo isa kwa kgosing." 
1Kings1:4 Morweetsana yo a bo a le montle thata; a ngomaela kgosi, a e direla; mme kgosi ya se ka ya mo itse." 
1Kings1:5 Foo Atonija morwa Hagithe a ikgodisa a re: “Ke tlaa nna kgosi.” A ipaakanyetsa dikara, le bapalama dipitse, le banna ba ba 50 ba ba sianang fa pele ga gagwe." 
1Kings1:6 Rraagwe o ne a ise a mo itumolole gope ka go re: “Ana o diretseng jalo?” E ne e bile e le monna yo o bopegileng sentle thata; a rulagana le Abesalome mo go tsalweng. 
1Kings1:7 A gakololana le Joabe morwa Seruja, le Abiathare moperesiti; mme bao ba thusa Atonija ka go mo sala morago." 
1Kings1:8 Satoke moperesiti le Benaia morwa Joiata, le Nathane moperofeti, le Shimei, le Rei, le banna ba ba diganka ba e ne e le ba ga Dafite ba bo ba se kwa go Atonija." 
1Kings1:9 Atonija a tlhaba dinku le dikgomo le tse di nonneng fa lefikeng la Sohelethe, le le bapileng le Enerogele; a bitsa bomorwa rraagwe botlhe, bomorwa kgosi, le banna botlhe ba Juta batlhanka ba kgosi;" 
1Kings1:10 mme Nathane moperofeti, le Benaia, le banna ba ba diganka, le Solomone morwa rraagwe, bone, a se ka a ba bitsa." 
1Kings1:11 Foo Nathane a bua le Bathešeba mmaagwe Solomone a re: “A ga o ise o utlwe fa Atonija morwa Hagithe a busa, mme Dafite morena wa rona a sa go itse?" 
1Kings1:12 Mme jaana, ke a go rapela, o mme ke go gakolole, gore o tle o iphedise, o bo o tshedise Solomone morwao." 
1Kings1:13 Ya o tsene kwa go kgosi Dafite, o mo reye o re: ‘Kgosi, morena wa me, a ga o a ikanela lelata la gago wa re; ruri Solomone morwao o tlaa busa morago ga gago, o tlaa dula mo setulong sa gago sa bogosi? Jaana Atonija o busa jang?’" 
1Kings1:14 Bona, o tlaa re o sa ntse o bua gone le kgosi, le nna ke tlaa tsena morago ga gago, ke tlhomamisa mafoko a gago.”" 
1Kings1:15 Bathešeba a ya a tsena kwa kgosing kwa ntlwaneng; kgosi e ne e tsofetse thata; Abišage we Mošuneme a bo a direla kgosi. 
1Kings1:16 Bathešeba a inama a ikobela kgosi; mme kgosi ya re: “O no o batlang?” 
1Kings1:17 Mohumagadi a mo raya a re: “Morena wa me, o ne wa ikanela lelata la gago ka Jehofa Modimo wa gago, wa re: ‘Ruri Solomone morwao o tlaa busa morago ga gago, o tlaa dula mo setulong sa gago sa bogosi.’" 
1Kings1:18 Mme jaana bona, Atonija o a busa; wena, kgosi morena wa me, ga o go itse." 
1Kings1:19 O tlhabile dikgomo le tse di nonneng le dinku ka bontsi, o bile o biditse bomorwakgosi botlhe, le Abiathare moperesiti, le Joabe molaodi wa ntwa, mme Solomone motlhanka wa gago a se ka a mmitsa." 
1Kings1:20 Wena, kgosi morena wa me, matlho a Baiseraele botlhe a mo go wena, gore o ba bolelele yo o tlaa dulang mo setulong sa bogosi sa kgosi morena wa me morago ga gago." 
1Kings1:21 Fa go se ka ga nna jalo, e tlaa re kgosi morena wa me a sena go robala le borraagwe, go tlaa dirala go re, nna le morwaake Solomone re tlaa kaiwa bakgoreletsi fela.”" 
1Kings1:22 Bonang, ya re a sa ntse a bua le kgosi Nathane moperofeti a tsena." 
1Kings1:23 Ba bolelela kgosi ba re: “Bona, Nathane moperofeti ke yo.” Ya re a sena go tsena fa pele ga kgosi, a inamisetsa sefatlhogo sa gagwe fa fatshe fa pele ga kgosi." 
1Kings1:24 Nathane a re: “Kgosi morena wa me, a o rile, Atonija o tlaa busa morago ga gago, a ke ene yo o tlaa dulang mo setulong sa gago sa bogosi?" 
1Kings1:25 Gonne o tsamaile gompieno, o tlhabile dikgomo, le tse di nonneng le dinku ka bontsi, o biditse bomorwa kgosi botlhe, le balaodi ba ntwa, le Abiathare moperesiti, bona, ba a ja ba a nwa fa pele ga gagwe; mme ba re: ‘A Modimo o boloke kgosi Atonija.’" 
1Kings1:26 Mme nna, e bong nna motlhanka wa gago, le Satoke moperesiti, le Benaia morwa Joiata, le motlhanka wa gago Solomone, ga a a re bitsa." 
1Kings1:27 A selo se, se dirilwe ke kgosi morena wa me, mme o sa tlhaloganyetsa batlhanka ba gago yo o tlaa dulang mo setulong sa bogosi sa kgosi morena wa rona morago ga gagwe?”" 
1Kings1:28 Foo kgosi Dafite a ba fetola a re: “Mpiletsang Bathešeba.” Mme a tla fa pele ga kgosi, a ema fa pele ga kgosi." 
1Kings1:29 Kgosi ya ikana ya re: “Jaaka Jehofa a tshedile, yo o rekolotseng mowa wa me mo pitlaganong yotlhe," 
1Kings1:30 ruri jaaka ke go ikanetse ka Jehofa, Modimo wa Iseraele, ka re, ruri Solomone morwao o tlaa busa morago ga me, o tlaa dula mo setulong sa me sa bogosi mo boemong jwa me; ruri ke tlaa dira jalo gompieno.”" 
1Kings1:31 Foo Bathešeba a inamisetsa sefatlhogo sa gagwe fa fatshe, a ikobela kgosi, a re: “A morena wa me kgosi Dafite a tshele ka bosakhutleng.”" 
1Kings1:32 Kgosi Dafite a re: “Mpiletsang Satoke moperesiti, le Nathane moperofeti, le Benaia morwa Joiata.” Mme ba tla fa pele ga kgosi." 
1Kings1:33 Kgosi ya ba raya ya re: “Tsayang batlhanka ba morena wa lona, lo palamise Solomone morwaake mo mmoulong wa me, lo mo ise kwa Gihone;" 
1Kings1:34 Satoke moperesiti le Nathane moperofeti ba mo tlotse gone, gore a nne kgosi ya Iseraele; lo letse lonaka lo re: ‘A Modimo a boloke kgosi Solomone.’" 
1Kings1:35 Foo lo tle lo mo setse morago, mme o tlaa tla a dula mo setulong sa me sa bogosi; gonne o tlaa nna kgosi mo boemong jwa me; ke mo tlhomile kgosana ya Iseraele le ya Juta.”" 
1Kings1:36 Benaia morwa Joiata a fetola kgosi a re: “A go ne pula; a Jehofa Modimo wa kgosi morena wa me, le ene a a re jalo." 
1Kings1:37 Jaaka Jehofa a ne a ntse a na le kgosi morena wa me, a a nne fela jalo le Solomone, mme a dire setulo sa gagwe sa bogosi gore se nne segolo bogolo go setulo sa bogosi sa kgosi morena wa me.”" 
1Kings1:38 Jalo Satoke moperesiti le Nathane moperofeti, le Benaia morwa Joiata, le Bakerethe, le Bapelethe, ba ya ba palamisa Solomone mo mmoulong wa kgosi Dafite ba mo isa kwa Gihone." 
1Kings1:39 Satoke moperesiti a ntsha lonaka lwa lookwane mo Mogopeng, a tlotsa Solomone. Ba letsa lonaka; mme batho botlhe ba re: “A Modimo o boloke kgosi Solomone!”" 
1Kings1:40 Batho botlhe ba tla ba mo setse morago, mme batho ba letsa diphare, ba itumela ka boitumelo jo bogolo, lefatshe la ba la tla la rata go fatoga ka modumo wa bone." 
1Kings1:41 Atonija le balalediwi botlhe ba ba nang nae ba re ba wetsa go ja ba go utlwa. Ya re Joabe a utlwa modumo wa lonaka a re: “Ana modumo o ekete wa motse o le mo pheretlhegong ke wa eng?” 
1Kings1:42 Ya re a sa ntse a bua, bonang, Jonathane morwa Abiathare moperesiti a tla; mme Atonija a re: “Tsena; gonne o monna yo o molemo, o tla le mafoko a a molemo.”" 
1Kings1:43 Jonathane a fetola a raya Atonija a re: “Ruri kgosi Dafite morena wa rona o dirile Solomone kgosi; 
1Kings1:44 kgosi e mo patile ka Satoke moperesiti le Nathane moperofeti, le Benaia morwa Joiata, le Bakerethe, le Bapelethe, ba mo palamisitse mo mmoulong wa kgosi;" 
1Kings1:45 Satoke moperesiti, le Nathane moperofeti, ba mo tloditse mo Gihone gore a nne kgosi, ba tswa gone ba duduetsa, motse wa ba wa tlala modumo. Modumo oo ke one o lo o utlwileng." 
1Kings1:46 Solomone o bile o dutse mo setulong sa bogosi. 
1Kings1:47 Gape batlhanka ba kgosi ba tla go segofatsa kgosi Dafite morena wa rona, ba re: ‘A Modimo wa gago o dire leina la ga Solomone gore le gaise la gago, o bo o dire setulo sa gagwe sa bogosi gore se nne segolo bogolo go setulo sa gago sa bogosi;’ kgosi ya ba ya ikoba e le mo bolaong jwa yone." 
1Kings1:48 Gape kgosi ya bua jaana ya re: ‘A go bakwe Jehofa, Modimo wa Iseraele, yo o nneileng mongwe go dula mo setulong sa me sa bogosi gompieno, matlho a me a bile a go bona.’ ”" 
1Kings1:49 Balalediwi botlhe ba ga Atonija ba boifa, ba nanoga, mongwe le mongwe a ikela tseleng ya gagwe." 
1Kings1:50 Atonija a boifa ka ntlha ya ga Solomone; a nanoga, a ya a tshwara dinaka tsa sebeso." 
1Kings1:51 Ga bolelelwa Solomone ga twe: “Bona, Atonija o boifa kgosi Solomone; gonne bona, o tshwere dinaka tsa sebeso, a re: ‘A kgosi Solomone a inkanele gompieno fa a se ketla a bolaya motlhanka wa gagwe ka tšhaka.’ ”" 
1Kings1:52 Mme Solomone a re: “Fa a iponatsa e le motho yo o molemo ga go ketla go wela moriri ope wa gagwe fa fatshe; mme fa boikepo bo fitlhelwa mo go ene, o tlaa swa.”" 
1Kings1:53 Jalo kgosi Solomone a roma batho, ba mo folosa kwa sebesong. Mme a tla a ikobela kgosi Solomone; mme Solomone a mo raya a re: “Ya kwa ntlong ya gago.”" 
1Kings2:1 Jaana lobaka lwa ga Dafite lwa go swa lwa atamela; mme a laela Solomone morwawe a re: 
1Kings2:2 “Nna ke ya tseleng ya lefatshe lotlhe; mme ka re, o nne thata o bo o iponatse fa o le monna." 
1Kings2:3 O tshegetse tao ya ga Jehofa Modimo wa gago, go sepela mo ditseleng tsa gagwe, go tshegetsa melao ya gagwe, le ditaolo tsa gagwe, le dikatlholo tsa gagwe, le ditshupo tsa gagwe, ka fa go kwadilweng mo molaong wa ga Moše ka gone, gore o tle o dire ka botlhale mo go tsotlhe tse o di dirang, le gongwe le gongwe kwa o retologelang gone," 
1Kings2:4 gore Jehofa a tlhomamise lefoko la gagwe le o ne a le bua ka ga me, a re: ‘Fa bana ba gago ba tlhokomela tsela ya bone, go sepela fa pele ga me mo boammaaruring ka pelo yotlhe ya bone, le ka mowa otlhe wa bone, ga go ketla go go tlhokafalela monna mo setulong sa bogosi sa Iseraele,’ (go bua Jehofa)." 
1Kings2:5 “Gape, o a itse se Joabe morwa Seruja o ne a se ntirela, e bong se o ne a se direla balaodi ba babedi ba dintwa tsa Iseraele, e bong Abenere morwa Nere, le Amase morwa Jethere, ba o ba bolaileng, a tsholola madi a ntwa mo motlheng wa kagiso, a ba a baya madi a ntwa mo moitlamong wa gagwe o o neng o le mo lothekeng lwa gagwe, le mo ditlhakong tsa gagwe tse o ne a di rwele." 
1Kings2:6 Ke gone dira ka fa botlhaleng jwa gago, mme o se ka wa lesa tlhogo ya gagwe e pududu ya fologela mo phupung ka kagiso." 
1Kings2:7 “Mme o nne pelonomi mo go bomorwa Baresilai wa Mogileate, mme a ba nne mo go bone ba ba jelang fa lomating lwa gago, gonne e rile ke tshaba Abesalome mogoloo, ba ne ba tla jalo mo go nna." 
1Kings2:8 “Bona, o na le Shimei morwa Gere wa Mobenjamine wa Bahurime, yo o ne a mphutsa ka phutso e e botlhoko ka tsatsi le ke ileng kwa Mahanaime ka lone; mme a tla go nkgatlhantsha kwa Joretane, ka mo ikanela ka Jehofa ka re: ‘Ga nketla ke go bolaya ka tšhaka.’" 
1Kings2:9 Ke gone jaana, o se ka wa mo golola mo molatong, gonne o motho yo o botlhale; o tlaa itse se o tshwanetseng go se mo direla, o tlaa folosetsa tlhogo e pududu ya gagwe mo phupung ka madi.”" 
1Kings2:10 Dafite a robala le borraagwe, mme a fitlhwa mo motseng wa ga Dafite." 
1Kings2:11 Lobaka lo Dafite o ne a busitse Iseraele ka lone e ne e le dinyaga di le 40; a busa ka dinyaga di supa mo Heberone, a busa ka dinyaga di le 33 mo Jerusalema." 
1Kings2:12 Mme Solomone a dula mo setulong sa bogosi sa ga Dafite rraagwe; mme bogosi jwa gagwe jwa nitama thata. 
1Kings2:13 Foo Atonija morwa Hagithe a tla mo go Bathešeba mmaagwe Solomone. Bathešeba a re: “A o tla ka kagiso?” A re: “Ka kagiso.” 
1Kings2:14 Gape a re: “Ke na le sengwe se ke se buang nao.” A re: “Bua.” 
1Kings2:15 A re: “O a itse fa bogosi e ne e le jwa me, le go re, Baiseraele botlhe ba ne ba lebile nna gore ke ba buse; le fa go ntse jalo bogosi bo retologile, bo ile go nna jwa ga nnake, gonne e le jwa gagwe bo tswa mo go Jehofa." 
1Kings2:16 Jaana ke go lopa topo e le nngwe fela, o ko o se gane.” Mme a mo raya a re: “Bua.”" 
1Kings2:17 A re: “Ke a go rapela, bua le kgosi Solomone (gonne ga a ketla a go gana), gore a tle a nneye Abišage wa Mošuneme go nna mosadi.”" 
1Kings2:18 Bathešeba a re: “Go molemo; ke tlaa go buelela mo kgosing.” 
1Kings2:19 Ke gone ka moo Bathešeba a ya kwa go kgosi Solomone, go buelela Atonija mo go ene. Kgosi ya nanoga ya tla go mo kgatlhantsha; mme a mo ikobela, a dula mo setulong sa gagwe sa bogosi, a laola gore go beelwe mma kgosi setulo sa segosi; mme a dula ka fa tsogong le legolo la gagwe." 
1Kings2:20 Foo a re: “Ke lopa toponyana mo go wena; a ko o se gane.” Kgosi ya mo raya ya re: “Lopa mma, gonne ga nketla ke gana.”" 
1Kings2:21 A re: “A Abišage wa Mošuneme a newe Atonija mogoloo go nna mosadi.” 
1Kings2:22 Kgosi Solomone a fetola mmaagwe a re: “Ke ka ntlha yang o lopela Atonija Abišage wa Mošuneme? Mo lopele le jone bogosi; gonne ke mogolole. Ee, o bo lopele ene le Abiathare moperesiti, le Joabe morwa Seruia.”" 
1Kings2:23 Foo kgosi Solomone a ikana ka Jehofa, a re: “A Modimo o ntirele jalo, o bo o oketse, fa Atonija a sa buela lefoko le gore a ipolaye." 
1Kings2:24 Ke gone jaana jaaka Jehofa a tshedile, yo o ntlhomamisitseng, a mpaya mo setulong sa bogosi sa ga rre Dafite, yo o bileng a ntirela motse, jaaka a boletse, ruri Atonija o tlaa bolawa ka tsatsi leno.”" 
1Kings2:25 Kgosi Solomone a roma ka Benaia morwa Joiata; mme a mo wela godimo a mmolaya a swa. 
1Kings2:26 Kgosi ya raya Abiathare moperesiti ya re: “Ya kwa Anathothe, kwa matlhagareng a gago; gonne o tshwanetse go swa; ga nketla ke go bolaya mo lobakeng lono, ka o ne wa rwala letlole la ga Jehofa Modimo fa pele ga rre Dafite, le ka gonne o ne wa patikwa ka tsotlhe tse rre o ne a patikwa ka tsone.”" 
1Kings2:27 Solomone a kgoromeletsa Abiathare kwa ntle a se ka a tlhola a le moperesiti wa ga Jehofa; gore a tle a diratse lefoko la ga Jehofa, le o ne a la bua ka ga ntlo ya ga Eli kwa Shilo." 
1Kings2:28 Mafoko a fitlha kwa go Joabe, gonne Joabe o ne a sokologetse kwa go Atonija, le fa a se ka a sokologela kwa go Abesalome. Joabe a tshabela kwa Mogopeng wa ga Jehofa, mme a tshwara dinaka tsa sebeso." 
1Kings2:29 Ga bolelelwa kgosi Solomone ga twe: “Joabe o tshabetse kwa Mogopeng wa ga Jehofa, mme bonang, o fa sebesong.” Foo Solomone a roma Benaia morwa Joiata a re: “Ya, o mo wele godimo.”" 
1Kings2:30 Benaia a tla mo Mogopeng wa ga Jehofa, mme a mo raya a re: “Kgosi e bua jaana ya re: ‘Tswa.’ ” Mme a re: “Nnyaa; ke tlaa swela fa.” Benaia a busetsa lefoko kwa kgosing a re: “Joabe o buile jaana, a mphetola a re, a re.”" 
1Kings2:31 Kgosi ya mo raya ya re: “Dira jaaka a buile, o mo wele godimo, o mo fitlhe; gore o tlose mo go nna le mo ntlong ya ga rre madi a a se nang molato, a Joabe o a tsholotseng." 
1Kings2:32 Jehofa o tlaa busetsa madi a gagwe mo tlhogong ya gagwe, ka a ne a wela banna ba le babedi ba ba siameng godimo, le ba ba molemo bogolo go ene, a ba bolaya ka tšhaka, e bong Abenere morwa Nere, molaodi wa ntwa ya Iseraele, le Amase morwa Jethere molaodi wa ntwa ya Juta, rre Dafite a sa itse." 
1Kings2:33 Jalo madi a bone a tlaa boela mo tlhogong ya ga Joabe, le mo tlhogong ya losika lwa gagwe ka bosakhutleng; mme mo go Dafite, le mo losikeng lwa gagwe, le mo ntlong ya gagwe, le mo setulong sa gagwe sa bogosi, go tlaa nna kagiso ka bosakhutleng, e e tswang mo go Jehofa.”" 
1Kings2:34 Foo Benaia morwa Joiata a ya a mo wela godimo, a mmolaya; mme a fitlhwa mo ntlong ya gagwe kwa nageng." 
1Kings2:35 Kgosi ya tlhoma Benaia morwa Joiata mo boemong jwa gagwe mo taolong ya ntwa; Satoke moperesiti kgosi ya mo tlhoma mo boemong jwa ga Abiathare. 
1Kings2:36 Kgosi ya roma, ya bitsa Shimei, ya mo raya ya re: “O ikagele ntlo mo Jerusalema, o age gone, mme o se ka wa tswa gone wa ya gope." 
1Kings2:37 Gonne e tlaa re mo tsatsing le o tswang ka lone, o kgabaganya molatswana wa Kiterone, o itse ka tlhomamo fa ruri o tlaa swa, madi a gago a tlaa nna mo tlhogong ya gago.”" 
1Kings2:38 Shimei a raya kgosi a re: “Lefoko leo le molemo; jaaka kgosi morena wa me a buile, motlhanka wa gago o tlaa dira jalo.” Shimei a aga mo Jerusalema malatsi a le mantsi." 
1Kings2:39 Ga dirala ya re go sena go feta dinyaga di le tharo, batlhanka ba ga Shimei ba le babedi ba ngwegela kwa go Akiše morwa Maake kgosi ya Gathe. Ga bolelelwa Shimei ga twe: “Bona, batlhanka ba gago ba kwa Gathe.”" 
1Kings2:40 Shimei a nanoga, a belesa esela ya gagwe a ya Gathe kwa go Akiše, a ya go batla batlhanka ba gagwe; Shimei a ya a busa batlhanka ba gagwe kwa Gathe." 
1Kings2:41 Ga bolelelwa Solomone fa Shimei a ne a dule mo Jerusalema a ile Gathe, a bile a tsile." 
1Kings2:42 Kgosi ya roma, ya bitsa Shimei, ya mo raya ya re: “A ga ke a go ikanisa ka Jehofa, ka ba ka go tlhomamisetsa, ka re: ‘O itsetse ruri fa e tlaa re mo tsatsing le o tswang ka lone, o tswela go gongwe, o tlaa swa ruri?’ Mme wa nthaya wa re: ‘Lefoko le o le utlwileng le molemo.’" 
1Kings2:43 Ke ka ntlha yang o se ka wa tshegetsa ikano ya ga Jehofa, le tao e ke go laileng ka yone?”" 
1Kings2:44 Gape kgosi ya raya Shimei ya re: “O a bo itse boikepo jotlhe jo bo mo pelong ya gago, jo o bo diretseng Dafite rre; ke gone Jehofa o tlaa busetsang boikepo jwa gago mo tlhogong ya gago." 
1Kings2:45 Mme kgosi Solomone o tlaa segofadiwa, le setulo sa ga Dafite sa bogosi se tlaa tlhomamisiwa fa pele ga Jehofa ka bosakhutleng.”" 
1Kings2:46 Kgosi ya laola Benaia morwa Joiata, mme a tswa a mo wela godimo, a ba a tla a swa. Mme bogosi jwa tlhomamisiwa mo seatleng sa ga Solomone." 
1Kings3:1 Solomone a nyalela Faro kgosi ya Egepeto, a tsaya morwadia Faro a mo lere mo motseng wa ga Dafite, ga tsamaya a wetsa go aga ntlo ya gagwe, le ntlo ya ga Jehofa, le lorako lwa Jerusalema mo tikologong." 
1Kings3:2 Fa e se go re batho ba ne ba tle ba ise ditlhabelo mo mafelong a a tlotlometseng ka go ne go se na ntlo e e agetsweng leina la ga Jehofa pele ga malatsi ao. 
1Kings3:3 Solomone a rata Jehofa, a sepela mo melaong ya ga Dafite rraagwe; fa e se go re, o ne a isa ditlhabelo a ba a fisa maswalo mo mafelong a a tlotlometseng." 
1Kings3:4 Kgosi ya ya kwa Gibeone go ya go isa ditlhabelo gone, gonne e ne e le gone felo fa go tlotlometseng mo gogolo; Solomone a isa ditshupelo tse di fisiwang di le sekete mo sebesong seo." 
1Kings3:5 Ya re mo Gibeone Jehofa a iponatsa kwa go Solomone mo torong go le bosigo; Modimo wa re: “Lopa se ke tlaa se go nayang.” 
1Kings3:6 Solomone a re: “O diretse motlhanka wa gago rre Dafite, ka bopelonomi jo bogolo ka fa o ne a sepela fa pele ga gago ka gone mo boammaaruring, le mo tshiamong, le mo thokgamong ya pelo nao; o mmoloketse bopelonomi jo bogolo jo, jwa go re o mo neile ngwana wa mosimane go dula mo setulong sa gagwe sa bogosi, jaaka go ntse gompieno." 
1Kings3:7 Jaana Jehofa Modimo wa me, o dirile motlhanka wa gago kgosi mo boemong jwa ga Dafite rre; ke ngwanyana fela; ga ke itse go tswa le go tsena." 
1Kings3:8 Motlhanka wa gago o mo gare ga tšhaba ya gago e o e itshenketseng, tšhaba e kgolo, e e sa kakeng ya kwalwa le fa e le go balwa ka bontsi." 
1Kings3:9 Ke gone naya motlhanka wa gago pelo e e tlhaloganyang gore a tle a atlhole tšhaba ya gago, gore ke farologanye molemo le bosula: gonne e mang yo o nonofileng go atlhola tšhaba e ya gago e kgolo e?”" 
1Kings3:10 Puo eo ya kgatlha Jehofa, ka Solomone a lopile selo seo." 
1Kings3:11 Modimo wa mo raya wa re: “E re ka o lopile selo se, mme wa se ka wa itopela botshelo jo boleele; le gone wa se ka wa itopela khumo, le gone wa se ka wa lopa loso lwa baba ba gago; mme wa itopela tlhaloganyo go farologanya katlholo;" 
1Kings3:12 bona, ke dirile jaaka lefoko la gago; bona, ke go neile pelo e e botlhale le e e tlhaloganyang; ga go ise go ko go nne ope yo o tshwanang nao pele ga gago, le kwa morago ga gago ga go ketla go tsoga ope yo o tshwanang nao." 
1Kings3:13 Le gone ke go neile se o se kang wa se lopa, e bong khumo le tlotlo, ga go ketla go dira le ope mo dikgosing yo o tlaa tshwanang nao ka malatsi otlhe a gago." 
1Kings3:14 Fa o sepela mo ditseleng tsa me, go nna o tshegetsa melao ya me le ditaolo tsa me, jaaka rraago Dafite a ne a sepela, foo ke tlaa lelefatsa malatsi a gago.”"
