2Kings22:19 E re ka pelo ya gago e ne e sisimoga, mme wa ikokobetsa fa pele ga Jehofa, jale ka o utlwa se ke se buileng ka ga felo fa, le ka ga banni ba gone, ka re, ba tlaa nna tshwafatso le phutso, mme o ikgagotse diaparo, wa lela fa pele ga me; le nna ke go utlwile, go bua Jehofa.’" 
2Kings22:20 Ke gone bona, ke tlaa go phuthela kwa go borraago, mme o tlaa phuthelwa phupung ya gago ka kagiso, le gone matlho a gago ga a ketla a bona bosula jotlhe jo ke tlaa bo tlisang mo felong fa.” Mme ba busetsa phetolo e kwa kgosing." 
2Kings23:1 Kgosi ya roma batho, mme ba phuthela bagolwane botlhe ba Juta le ba Jerusalema kwa go yone." 
2Kings23:2 Kgosi ya ya kwa ntlong ya ga Jehofa, e na le banna botlhe ba Juta le banni botlhe ba Jerusalema, le baperesiti, le baperofeti, le batho botlhe, bannye le bagolo; mme a bala mo ditsebeng tsa bone mafoko otlhe a lokwalo lwa kgolagano lo lo bonyweng mo ntlong ya ga Jehofa." 
2Kings23:3 Kgosi ya ema fa lekotwaneng, a dira kgolagano fa pele ga Jehofa ya go sala Jehofa morago le go tshegetsa ditao tsa gagwe le ditshupo tsa gagwe, le melao ya gagwe ka pelo yotlhe ya yone le ka mowa otlhe wa yone, go tla a dirafatsa mafoko a kgolagano a a kwadilweng mo lokwalong; mme batho botlhe ba dumelela kgolagano." 
2Kings23:4 Kgosi ya laola Hilekia moperesiti yo mogolo, le baperesiti ba mophato wa bobedi, le balebedi ba kgoro, gore ba ntshe mo tempeleng ya ga Jehofa dilwana tsotlhe tse di diretsweng Baale, le Modimako, le bontsi jotlhe jwa legodimo. Mme a di fisetsa kwa ntle ga Jerusalema mo matlhagareng a Kiterone, a isa melora ya tsone kwa Bethele." 
2Kings23:5 A khutlisa baperesiti ba medimo ya disetwa, ba dikgosi tsa Juta di ba tlhomileng, go tla ba fisa maswalo mo mafelong a a tlotlometseng mo metseng ya Juta, le mo mafelong a a mo tikologong ya Jerusalema; le bone ba ba fisetsang Baale maswalo le ba ba fisetsang letsatsi, le kgwedi, le dinaledi tse dikgolo, le bontsi jotlhe jwa legodimo." 
2Kings23:6 A ntsha Modimako mo ntlong ya ga Jehofa, a o ntshetsa kwa ntle ga Jerusalema kwa molatswaneng wa Kiterone, a o fisetsa fa molatswaneng wa Kiterone, mme a o leta wa nna leupa fela, a latlhela leupa la one mo diphupung tsa batho fela." 
2Kings23:7 A thubaka matlo a basotoma a a ne a le fa ntlong ya ga Jehofa kwa basadi ba ne ba logelela Modimako megope gone. 
2Kings23:8 A ntsha baperesiti botlhe mo metseng ya Juta, a itshekolola mafelo a a tlotlometseng kwa baperesiti ba ne ba fisetsa maswalo gone, go tswa Geba go ya Beerešeba; a thubaka mafelo a a tlotlometseng a dikgoro a a fa botsenong jwa kgoro ya ga Jošua molaodi wa motse, a a ne a potile kgoro ya motse ka fa ntlheng ya la molema la motho." 
2Kings23:9 Le fa go ntse jalo baperesiti ba mafelo a a tlotlometseng ga ba a ka ba tla sebesong sa Jehofa mo Jerusalema, mme ba ja senkgwe se se sa bedisiwang le ba ga bone." 
2Kings23:10 A itshekolola Tofethe o o mo mogogorong wa bana ba ga Hinome, gore go se nne ope yo o tlaa ralaletsang Moleke morwawe kgotsa morwadie molelo gone." 
2Kings23:11 A tlosa dipitse tse dikgosi tsa Juta di ne di di neile letsatsi, fa botsenong jwa ntlo ya ga Jehofa, fa ntlwaneng e e fa thoko ya ga Nathanemeleke molebedi wa dikhumo; mme dikara tsa letsatsi a di fisa ka molelo." 
2Kings23:12 Dibeso tse di neng di le mo godimo ga ditlhomeso tsa ntlwana e e fa godimo ya ga Ahase, tse dikgosi tsa Juta di di dirileng, le dibeso tse Manase o ne a di dirile mo malwapeng a mabedi a ntlo ya ga Jehofa, kgosi ya di thubaka, a di gosometsa gone, a latlhela lorole lwa tsone mo molatswaneng wa Kiterone." 
2Kings23:13 Mafelo a a tlotlometseng a a fa pele ga Jerusalema, a a ka fa ntlheng ya letsogo le legolo ga thabana ya sebodu, a Solomone kgosi ya Iseraele o ne a a agetse Ašetorethe e le se se makgapha sa Basitone, le Kemoše e le se se makgapha sa Bamoabe, le Melikome, e le se se makgapha sa bana ba Amone, kgosi ya di itshekolola." 
2Kings23:14 A thubaganya maje a a metloutlo, a rema Medimako, mme a tlatsa maemo a dilo tseo ka marapo a baswi." 
2Kings23:15 Gape le sebeso se se mo Bethele, le mafelo a a tlotlometseng a a dirilweng ke Jeroboame morwa Nebate, yo o ne a leofisa Baiseraele, e bong sone sebeso seo, le felo fa go tlotlometseng a go thubaka; a fisa felo fa go tlotlometseng, a go thuga, ga nna leupa fela, a ba a fisa Modimako." 
2Kings23:16 Mme e ne e ya re Josia a ithetolola a kwaya diphupu tse di gone mo thabeng; a roma a ya go ntsha marapo mo diphupung tseo, a a fisetsa mo sebesong, a se itshekolola ka fa lefokong la ga Jehofa, le monna wa Modimo o kileng a le bolela, ene yo o boletseng dilo tse." 
2Kings23:17 Foo a re: “Sefikantswe se ke se bonang ke sa eng?” Banna ba motse ba mmolelela ba re: “Ke phupu ya monna wa Modimo yo o ne a tswa kwa Juta, mme a bolela dilo tse o di diretseng sebeso sa Bethele.”" 
2Kings23:18 Mme a re: “A a nne fela; a go se nne ope yo o tlosang marapo a gagwe.” Mme ba lesa marapo a gagwe, a na le marapo a moperofeti yo o ne a tswa Samaria." 
2Kings23:19 Le one matlo otlhe a mafelo a a tlotlometseng a a mo metseng ya Samaria, a dikgosi tsa Iseraele di ne di a direla go tla ba gakaletsa Jehofa bogaleng, Josia a a tlosa, a dira ka one jaaka ditiro tsotlhe tse o di dirileng kwa Bethele." 
2Kings23:20 Baperesiti botlhe ba ba gone ba mafelo a a tlotlometseng a ba bolaela mo dibesong, a ba a fisetsa marapo a batho mo go tsone; a itse go boela Jerusalema." 
2Kings23:21 Kgosi ya laola batho botlhe ya re: “Direlang Jehofa Modimo wa lona modiro wa tlolaganyo, jaaka go kwadilwe mo lokwalong lo lwa kgolagano.”" 
2Kings23:22 E sa le ka metlha ya baatlhodi ba ba atlhotseng Baiseraele, le fa e le mo metlheng yotlhe ya dikgosi tsa Iseraele, le fa e le ya dikgosi tsa Juta, ekete go ne go se ka ga dirwa tlolaganyo epe e e ntseng jalo." 
2Kings23:23 Mme tlolaganyo eo ya direlwa Jehofa mo Jerusalema ka ngwaga wa 18 wa kgosi Josia. 
2Kings23:24 Gape Josia a tlosa le bone ba ba buang le badimo, le baloi, le mereo, le medimo ya disetwa, le tse di makgapha tsotlhe tse di fitlhetsweng mo lefatsheng la Juta le mo Jerusalema, gore a tlhomamise mafoko a molao a a kwadilweng mo lokwalong lo Hilekia moperesiti o lo bonyeng mo ntlong ya ga Jehofa." 
2Kings23:25 Pele ga gagwe go ne go se na kgosi epe e e tshwanang nae, e e neng ya sokologela mo go Jehofa ka pelo yotlhe ya yone le ka mowa otlhe wa yone, ka fa molaong otlhe wa ga Moše; le fa e le morago ga gagwe ga se ka ga tsoga ope yo o tshwanang nae." 
2Kings23:26 Le fa go ntse jalo, Jehofa o na a se ka a boa mo phisong ya bogale jo bogolo jwa gagwe, e bogale jwa gagwe bo ne bo tukela Bajuta ka yone, ka ntlha ya dithumolo tsotlhe tse Manase o ne a mo rumola ka tsone." 
2Kings23:27 Mme Jehofa a re: “Ke tlaa tlosa Bajuta, ba tswa mo ponong ya me, jaaka ke tlositse Baiseraele: ke tlaa latlha motse o ke o itshenketseng, e bong Jerusalema, le ntlo e ke buileng ka ga yone, ka re: Leina la me le tlaa nna gone.”" 
2Kings23:28 Ditiro tse dingwe tsa ga Josia le tsotlhe tse o ne a di dira, a ga di a kwalwa mo lokwalong lwa ditirafalo tsa dikgosi tsa Juta?" 
2Kings23:29 E rile mo motlheng wa gagwe, Faro-neko kgosi ya Egepeto a bololela kgosi ya Asiria kwa nokeng ya Euferatese; kgosi Josia a mmololela; mme Faro-neko a mmolaela kwa Megito, a sena go mmona." 
2Kings23:30 Batlhanka ba gagwe ba mo tsaya kwa Megito ka kara a sule, ba mo isa Jerusalema, ba mo fitlha mo phupung ya gagwe. Batho ba lefatshe ba tsaya Jehoahase morwa Josia ba mo tlotsa, ba dira kgosi mo boemong jwa ga rraagwe." 
2Kings23:31 E rile Jehoahase a simolola go busa a bo a le dinyaga di le 23; mme a busa ka dikgwedi di le tharo mo Jerusalema; leina la ga mmaagwe e ne e le Hamutale morwadia Jeremia wa Libena. 
2Kings23:32 Mme a dira se se bosula mo ponong ya ga Jehofa, jaaka tsotlhe tse borraagwe ba ne ba di dira." 
2Kings23:33 Mme Faro-neko a mo tsenya mo dikgoleng kwa Ribela, mo lefatsheng la Hamathe, gore a tle a se ka a busa mo Jerusalema; a kgethisa lefatshe dikilokerame di le 3 400 tsa selefera le dikilokerame di le 34 tsa gouta." 
2Kings23:34 Faro-neko a dira Eliakime morwa Josia kgosi mo boemong jwa ga Josia rraagwe, a mo raya leina le sele a re, Jehoiakime; a tlosa Jehoahase; mme a tla mo Egepeto, a swela gone." 
2Kings23:35 Jehoiakime a naya Faro selefera le gouta; a kgethisa lefatshe gore a ntshe madi jaaka taolo ya ga Faro; a tsaya selefera le gouta mo bathong ba lefatshe ka patiko, mo go mongwe le mongwe ka fa lekgethong la gagwe, gore a tle a le neye Faro-neko." 
2Kings23:36 E rile Jehoiakime a simolola go busa a bo a le dinyaga di le 25; a busa ka dinyaga di le 11 mo Jerusalema; leina la ga mmaagwe e ne e le Sebita morwadia Petaia wa Ruma. 
2Kings23:37 Mme a dira se se bosula mo ponong ya ga Jehofa, jaaka tsotlhe tse borraagwe ba ne ba di dira." 
2Kings24:1 E rile mo metlheng ya gagwe, Nebukatenesare kgosi ya Babilone a tla, Jehoiakime a tswa motlhanka wa gagwe ka dinyaga di le tharo; foo a sokologa a mo tsuololela." 
2Kings24:2 Mme Jehofa a mmololetsa manokwane a Bakalatea, le manokwane a Basiria, le manokwane a Bamoabe, le manokwane a bana ba Amone, a ba roma kwa lefatsheng la Juta gore ba le senye, ka fa lefokong la ga Jehofa le o ne a le bua ka baperofeti batlhanka ba gagwe." 
2Kings24:3 Ruri selo se, se tsile mo go Bajuta ka taolo ya ga Jehofa, go tla se ba tlosa mo ponong ya gagwe, ka ntlha ya maleo a ga Manase, ka fa tsotlhe tse o ne a di dira;" 
2Kings24:4 le gone ka ntlha ya madi a batho a a se nang molato a o ne a a tsholola; gonne o ne a tlatsa Jerusalema ka madi a a se nang molato; mme Jehofa a gana go itshwarela. 
2Kings24:5 Ditiro tse dingwe tsa ga Jehoiakime le tsotlhe tse o ne a di dira, a ga di a kwalwa mo lokwalong lwa ditirafalo tsa dikgosi tsa Juta?" 
2Kings24:6 Mme Jehoiakime a robala le borraagwe, mme Jehoiakine morwawe a busa mo boemong jwa gagwe." 
2Kings24:7 Mme Kgosi ya Egepeto ga ya a ka ya tlhola e tswa mo lefatsheng la ga yone; gonne kgosi ya Babilone e ne e gapile gotlhe mo e ne e le ga kgosi ya Egepeto, go tswa molatswaneng wa Egepeto go ya nokeng ya Euferatese." 
2Kings24:8 E rile Jehoiakine a simolola go busa a bo a le dinyaga di le 18; mme a busa ka dikgwedi di le tharo mo Jerusalema; leina la ga mmaagwe e ne e le Nehušete morwadia Elenathane wa Jerusalema. 
2Kings24:9 A dira se se bosula mo ponong ya ga Jehofa, jaaka tsotlhe tse rraagwe o ne a di dira." 
2Kings24:10 Ya re ka lobaka loo batlhanka ba ga Nebukatenesare kgosi ya Babilone ba tla Jerusalema, mme motse wa tlhaselwa." 
2Kings24:11 Nebukatenesare kgosi ya Babilone a tla kwa motseng batlhanka ba gagwe ba ntse ba o tlhasela. 
2Kings24:12 Jehoiakine kgosi ya Juta a tswela kwa kgosing ya Babilone, ene le mmaagwe, le batlhanka ba gagwe, le dikgosana tsa gagwe, le baopafadiwi ba gagwe. Kgosi ya Babilone ya mo tshwara ka ngwaga wa 8 wa puso ya gagwe." 
2Kings24:13 Ya ntsha gone dikhumo tsotlhe tsa ntlo ya ga Jehofa, le dikhumo tsa ntlo ya kgosi, ya kgaolakgaola dilwana tsotlhe tsa gouta tse Solomone kgosi ya Iseraele o kileng a di dira mo tempeleng ya ga Jehofa, jaaka Jehofa a buile." 
2Kings24:14 A tlosa ba Jerusalema botlhe, le dikgosana tsotlhe, le diganka tsotlhe tse di pelokgale, le ditshwarwa di le 10 000, le botlhe baitse ba ditiro, le bathudi; ga go a ka ga sala ope fa e se bahumanegi fela ba batho ba lefatshe." 
2Kings24:15 A isa Jehoiakine kwa Babilone, le mma kgosi, le basadi ba kgosi, le baopafadiwi ba yone, le batho ba batona ba lefatshe, a ba isa botshwarong kwa Babilone, a ba tlosa mo Jerusalema." 
2Kings24:16 Le banna botlhe ba ba dinatla ba le 7 000, le baitse ba ditiro, le bathudi ba le 1 000, botlhe e le ba ba thata, le ba ba tshwanetseng ntwa, kgosi ya Babilone ya ba isa le bone kwa Babilone e le ditshwarwa fela." 
2Kings24:17 Kgosi ya Babilone ya dira Matania rangwanaagwe kgosi mo boemong jwa gagwe, mme a mo raya leina le sele a re, Setekia." 
2Kings24:18 E rile Setekia a simolola go busa a bo a le dinyaga di le 21; mme a busa ka dinyaga di le 11 mo Jerusalema; leina la ga mmaagwe e ne e le Hamutale morwadia Jeremia wa Libena. 
2Kings24:19 A dira se se bosula mo ponong ya ga Jehofa, jaaka tsotlhe tse Jehoiakime a ne a di dira." 
2Kings24:20 Gonne ya re ka ntlha ya bogale jwa ga Jehofa ga dirala jalo mo Jerusalema le mo Juta, ga tsamaya a ba latlha ba tswa mo ponong ya gagwe; mme Setekia a tsuololela kgosi ya Babilone." 
2Kings25:1 Ga dirala e rile ka ngwaga wa 9 wa puso ya gagwe, ka kgwedi ya lesome, ka tsatsi la lesome la kgwedi, Nebukatenesare kgosi ya Babilone a tla Jerusalema, ene le ntwa yotlhe ya gagwe, a fitlha a thibelela fa pele ga one; ba aga dikago tsa tlhabanelo mo tikologong ya one." 
2Kings25:2 Motse wa tlhaselwa go ya go fitlha mo ngwageng wa 11 wa ga Setekia. 
2Kings25:3 E rile ka letsatsi le le ferang o le mongwe la kgwedi ya bone mmopamo wa bo o le botlhoko mo motseng, dijo tsa ba tsa tlhokafalela batho ba lefatshe." 
2Kings25:4 Foo ga dirwa phatlha mo motseng, mme batlhabani botlhe ba tshaba go le bosigo, ba tsaya tsela ya kgoro e e fa gare ga dithako tse pedi, e e fa tshimong ya kgosi; Bakalatea ba bo ba dikanyeditse motse ka ntlha tsotlhe; kgosi ya tsaya tsela ya Araba." 
2Kings25:5 Ntwa ya Bakalatea ya konatelela kgosi, ya mo tshwarela mo dipaleng tsa Jeriko; ntwa yotlhe ya yone ya e falalela." 
2Kings25:6 Foo ba tshwara kgosi, ba e isa kwa kgosing ya Babilone kwa Ribela; mme ba atlhola ka ga gagwe." 
2Kings25:7 Ba bolaya bomorwa Setekia fa pele ga matlho a gagwe, ba gonya matlho a ga Setekia ba mo golega ka diketane ba mo isa kwa Babilone." 
2Kings25:8 Jaana e rile ka kgwedi ya botlhano, ka letsatsi la bosupa la kgwedi, ka o e leng ngwaga wa 19 wa kgosi Nebukatenesare kgosi ya Babilone, Nebusaratane molaodi wa bahemedi, motlhanka mongwe wa kgosi ya Babilone, a tla Jerusalema." 
2Kings25:9 A fisa ntlo ya ga Jehofa, le ntlo ya kgosi; le matlo otlhe a Jerusalema; e bong matlo otlhe a matona a a fisa ka molelo." 
2Kings25:10 Botlhe ba ntwa ya Bakalatea ba ba nang le molaodi wa bahemedi, ba thubaka dithako tsa Jerusalema mo tikologong." 
2Kings25:11 Masalela a batho ba ba neng ba setse mo motseng, le bone ba ba thobileng ba thobetse kwa kgosing ya Babilone, le masalela a bontsi jwa batho, Nebusaratane molaodi wa bahemedi a ba tlosa ba golegilwe." 
2Kings25:12 Molaodi wa bahemedi a tlogela bahumanegi ba lefatshe gore ba nne babaakanyi ba mafine le balemi. 
2Kings25:13 Maotwana a kgotlho a a ne a le mo ntlong ya ga Jehofa, le ditlhomo le lewatle la kgotlho, tse di ne di le mo ntlong ya ga Jehofa, Bakalatea ba di thubaganya, ba isa kgotlho ya tsone kwa Babilone." 
2Kings25:14 Le dipitsa, le diolamolora, le dipoma tsa dipone, le dintshwana, le dilwana tsotlhe tsa kgotlho tse go ne go direlwa ka tsone, ba tsamaya ka tsone." 
2Kings25:15 Le ditshola molelo, le megotšana; se e leng sa gouta e le gouta, le se e leng sa selefera e le selefera, molaodi wa bahemedi a tsamaya ka tsone jalo." 
2Kings25:16 Maotwana a mabedi, lewatle le lengwe fela, le ditlhomo tse Solomone o ne a di diretse ntlo ya ga Jehofa; kgotlho ya dilwana tse tsotlhe e ne e se na palo ya bokete." 
2Kings25:17 Bogodimo jwa lekotwana le le lengwe e ne e le selekanyo sa mabogo a le 18, mme le na le tlhogo ya kgotlho; bogodimo jwa tlhogo e le mabogo a le mararo; tlhogo e na le tiro e e selotloa, le digaranata mo tikologong ya yone, e le ya kgotlho yotlhe; le lekotwana la babedi le na le dilo tse di tshwanang le tse, le tiro e e selotloa." 
2Kings25:18 Molaodi wa bahemedi a tsaya Seraia moperesiti yo mogolo, le Sefania moperesiti wa bobedi, le balebedi ba bararo ba kgoro;" 
2Kings25:19 mme mo motseng a tsaya moopafadiwi mongwe yo o ne a laodisitswe batlhabani; le banna ba le batlhano mo go bone ba ba neng ba leba sefatlhogo sa kgosi, ba ba fitlhetsweng mo motseng; le mokwaledi, e bong molaodi wa ntwa yo o ne a tle a phuthe batho ba lefatshe; le banna ba le 60 ba batho ba lefatshe ba ba fitlhetsweng mo motseng." 
2Kings25:20 Nebusaratane a ba tsaya, a ba isa kwa kgosing ya Babilone kwa Ribela." 
2Kings25:21 Kgosi ya Babilone ya ba kgemetha, ya ba bolaela mo Ribela mo lefatsheng la Hamathe. Jalo Bajuta ba ntshiwa mo lefatsheng ba tlosiwa ba golegilwe." 
2Kings25:22 Ka ga batho ba ba setseng mo lefatsheng la Juta, ba Nebukatenesare kgosi ya Babilone o ba tlogetseng, a dira Getalia morwa Ahikame, morwa Shafane, molaodi wa bone." 
2Kings25:23 Jaana e rile balaodi botlhe ba mephato, bone le batho ba bone, ba utlwa fa kgosi ya Babilone e dirile Getalia molaodi, ba ya kwa go Getalia kwa Misepa, e bong Išemaele morwa Nethania, le Johanane morwa Karia, le Seraia morwa Tanahumethe wa Monetofatha, le Jaasania morwa motho wa Maakathe, bone le batho ba bone." 
2Kings25:24 Getalia a ba ikanela le batho ba bone, a ba raya a re: “Lo se ka lwa boifa ka ntlha ya batlhanka ba Bakalatea; lo nne mo lefatsheng, lo direle kgosi ya Babilone, mme go tlaa nna molemo mo go lona.”" 
2Kings25:25 Mme ya re ka kgwedi ya bosupa, Išemaele morwa Nethania, morwa Elešame, wa losika lwa segosi, a tla, a na le banna ba le some, mme a itaya Getalia a swa, le Bajuta le Bakalatea ba o nang nabo mo Misepa." 
2Kings25:26 Mme batho botlhe, bannye le bagolo, le balaodi ba mephato, ba nanoga ba ya Egepeto; gonne ba boifa Bakalatea." 
2Kings25:27 Ka ngwaga wa 37 wa botshwaro jwa ga Jehoiakine kgosi ya Juta, ka kgwedi ya 12, ka letsatsi la 27 la kgwedi, Efile-merotake, kgosi ya Babilone, ka ngwaga o o simolotseng go busa ka one, a tsholetsa tlhogo ya ga Jehoiakine kgosi ya Juta, a mo ntsha mo tlong ya kgolegelo." 
2Kings25:28 A bua nae ka pelonomi, a tlhoma setulo sa gagwe sa bogosi godimo ga ditulo tsa dikgosi tse di nang nae mo Babilone." 
2Kings25:29 A mo apola diaparo tsa gagwe tsa ntlo ya kgolegelo, mme a jela dijo fa pele ga gagwe ka gale ka malatsi otlhe a botshelo jwa gagwe." 
2Kings25:30 Mme ka ga kabelo, ga nna kabelo e o e newang ke kgosi ka gale le ka gale, ka malatsi otlhe a botshelo jwa gagwe." 
1Chronicles1:1 Atame, Sethe, Enoše;" 
1Chronicles1:2 Kenane, Mahalalele, Jarete;" 
1Chronicles1:3 Enoke, Methusela, Lameke;" 
1Chronicles1:4 Noa, Sheme, Hame, le Jafete." 
1Chronicles1:5 Bomorwa Jafete ke: Gomere le Magoge le Matai le Jafane le Tubale le Mešeke le Tirase. 
1Chronicles1:6 Bomorwa Gomere ke: Ašekenase le Difathe le Togarema. 
1Chronicles1:7 Bomorwa Jafane ke: Eliša le Tarešiše le Kitime le Rotanime. 
1Chronicles1:8 Bomorwa Hame ke: Kuše le Miseraime le Pute le Kanaane. 
1Chronicles1:9 Bomorwa Kuše ke: Sebe, le Hafila le Sabeta le Raama le Sabeteka. Bomorwa Raama ke Sheba le Detane." 
1Chronicles1:10 Mme Kuše a tsala Nimerote; ene a simolola go nna motho wa seganka mo lefatsheng. 
1Chronicles1:11 Miseraime a tsala Ludime le Anamime le Lehabime le Nafetuhime," 
1Chronicles1:12 le Patherusime le Kaseluhime, (ba Bafilisitia ba duleng mo go bone), le Kafetorime." 
1Chronicles1:13 Kanaane a tsala Sitone, motsalwapele wa gagwe, le Hethe," 
1Chronicles1:14 le Mojebuse le Moamora le Mogiregaše 
1Chronicles1:15 le Mohife le Moarike le Mosine," 
1Chronicles1:16 le Morefate le Mosemare le Mohamathe. 
1Chronicles1:17 Bomorwa Sheme ke: Elame, le Asešure le Arepakešate le Lute le Arame le Use le Hule le Gethere le Mešeke." 
1Chronicles1:18 Arepakešate a tsala Shela; Shela a tsala Ebere. 
1Chronicles1:19 Ebere a tsala bana ba basimane ba le babedi: leina la yo mongwe go twe Pelege; gonne mo metlheng ya gagwe lefatshe la kgaoganngwa; mme leina la ga monnawe e ne e le Joketane. 
1Chronicles1:20 Joketane a tsala Alemotate le Shelefe le Hasaremafethe le Jera le 
1Chronicles1:21 Hatorame le Usale le Dikela le 
1Chronicles1:22 Ebale le Abimaele le Sheba; 
1Chronicles1:23 le Ofire le Hafila le Jobabe. Botlhe ba e ne e le bomorwa Joketane. 
1Chronicles1:23 le Ofire le Hafila le Jobabe. Botlhe ba e ne e le bomorwa Joketane. 
1Chronicles1:24 Sheme, Arepakešate, Shela" 
1Chronicles1:25 Ebere, Pelege, Rewu;" 
1Chronicles1:26 Seruge, Nahore, Tera;" 
1Chronicles1:27 Aberame (ke ene Aberahame). 
1Chronicles1:28 Bomorwa Aberahame ke: Isake le Išemaele. 
1Chronicles1:29 Tse ke ditshika tsa bone: wa ntlha wa ga Išemaele ke Nebaiothe; foo Ketare le Atebeele le Mibesame 
1Chronicles1:30 le Mišema le Duma le Masa; Hatate le Tema," 
1Chronicles1:31 le Jeture le Nafiše le Ketema. Bao ke bomorwa Išemaele. 
1Chronicles1:32 Bomorwa Ketura, mogadingwana wa ga Aberahame: a belega Simerane le Jokešane le Metane le Midiane le Išebake le Shua. Bomorwa Jokešane ke: Sheba le Detane." 
1Chronicles1:33 Bomorwa Midiane ke Efa le Efere le Henoke le Abita le Eletea. Botlhe bao e ne e le bomorwa Ketura. 
1Chronicles1:34 Aberahame a tsala Isake. Bomorwa Isake ke Esau le Iseraele. 
1Chronicles1:35 Bomorwa Esau ke Elifase le Reuele le Juše le Jalame le Kora. 
1Chronicles1:36 Bomorwa Elifase ke Temane le Omare le Sefi le Gatame le Kenase le Timena le Amaleke. 
1Chronicles1:37 Bomorwa Reuele ke Nahathe le Sera le Shama le Misa. 
1Chronicles1:38 Bomorwa Seire ke Lotane le Shobale le Sibeone le Ana le Dišone le Esere le Dišane. 
1Chronicles1:39 Bomorwa Lotane ke Hori le Homane; Timena e ne e le kgaitsadia Lotane. 
1Chronicles1:40 Bomorwa Shobale ke Aliane le Manahathe le Ebale le Shefi le Oname. Bomorwa Sibeone ke Aia le Ana. 
1Chronicles1:41 Morwa Ana ke Dišone. Le Bomorwa Dišone: Hamerane le Ešebane le Itherane le Kerane. 
1Chronicles1:42 Bomorwa Esere ke Bilehane le Saafane le Jaakane. Bomorwa Dišane; Use le Arane. 
1Chronicles1:43 Jaana tse ke dikgosi tse di busitseng mo lefatsheng la Etome, pele go ise go buse kgosi epe mo baneng ba Iseraele: Bela morwa Beore; mme leina la motse wa gagwe e ne e le Dinehaba." 
1Chronicles1:44 Bela a swa, mme Jobabe morwa Sera wa Bosera a busa mo boemong jwa gagwe." 
1Chronicles1:44 Bela a swa, mme Jobabe morwa Sera wa Bosera a busa mo boemong jwa gagwe." 
1Chronicles1:45 Jobabe a swa, mme Hušame wa lefatshe la Batemane a busa mo boemong jwa gagwe." 
1Chronicles1:45 Jobabe a swa, mme Hušame wa lefatshe la Batemane a busa mo boemong jwa gagwe." 
1Chronicles1:46 Hušame a swa, mme Hatate morwa Betate a busa mo boemong jwa gagwe, e le ene yo o kgemethileng Midiane mo nageng ya Moabe; leina la motse wa gagwe e ne e le Afithe." 
1Chronicles1:47 Hatate a swa, mme Samela wa Masereka a busa mo boemong jwa gagwe." 
1Chronicles1:48 Samela a swa, mme Saule wa Rehobothe fa Nokeng a busa mo boemong jwa gagwe." 
1Chronicles1:49 Saule a swa, mme Baale-hanane morwa Akebore a busa mo boemong jwa gagwe." 
1Chronicles1:50 Baale-hanane a swa, mme Hatate a busa mo boemong jwa gagwe; leina la motse wa gagwe e ne e le Pai; leina la mosadi wa gagwe e le Mehetabele morwadia Materete morwadia Mesahabe." 
1Chronicles1:51 Hatate a swa, mme dikgosana tsa Etome e ne e le tse: Kgosana Timena, kgosana Alia, kgosana Jethethe," 
1Chronicles1:52 kgosana Oholibama, kgosana Ela, kgosana Pinone," 
1Chronicles1:53 kgosana Kenase, kgosana Temane, kgosana Mibesare," 
1Chronicles1:54 kgosana Magediele, kgosana Irame. Tseo ke dikgosana tsa Etome." 
1Chronicles2:1 Ba ke bomorwa Iseraele: Rubene, Simeone, Lefi le Juta, Isakare le Sebulone;" 
1Chronicles2:2 Dane, Josefe le Benjamine, Nafetali, Gate le Ašere." 
1Chronicles2:3 Bomorwa Juta ke Ere, Onane le Shela; ba bararo ba, o na a ba bona le Bathešua mosadi wa Sekanana. Ere motsalwapele wa ga Juta o ne a le bosula mo ponong ya ga Jehofa; mme a mmolaya." 
1Chronicles2:4 Tamare ngwetsi wa gagwe a bona nae Perese le Sera. Bomorwa Juta botlhe ba ne ba le batlhano. 
1Chronicles2:5 Bomorwa Perese ke Heserone le Hamule. 
1Chronicles2:6 Bomorwa Sera ke Simeri Ethane Hemane Kalekole le Dara; ba bo ba le batlhano mmogo. 
1Chronicles2:7 Morwa Karemi ke Akare, mohudui wa Iseraele, yo o ne a dira tlolo mo selong se se neeletsweng." 
1Chronicles2:8 Morwa Ethane ke Asaria. 
1Chronicles2:9 Bomorwa Heserone le bone ba o ba bonyeng, ke Jerameele le Rame le Kelubai." 
1Chronicles2:10 Rame a bona Aminatabe; Aminatabe a bona Našone kgosana ya bana ba Juta; 
1Chronicles2:11 Našone a bona Saleme; Saleme a bona Boase; 
1Chronicles2:12 Boase a bona Obete; Obete a bona Jese. 
1Chronicles2:13 Jese a bona wa ntlha wa gagwe Eliabe, le Abinatabe wa bobedi, le Shimee wa boraro;" 
1Chronicles2:14 Nathanaele wa bone, Ratai wa botlhano," 
1Chronicles2:15 Oseme wa borataro, Dafite wa bosupa." 
1Chronicles2:16 Bokgaitsadia bone e ne e le Seruja le Abigaile. Bomorwa Seruja: Abiša le Joabe le Asahele; ba bararo. 
1Chronicles2:17 Abigaile a bona Amase; rraagwe Amase e ne e le Jethere wa Moišemaele. 
1Chronicles2:18 Kalebe morwa Heserone a bona bana le Asuba mosadi wa gagwe, gape le Jeriothe; ba e ne e le bomorwa mosadi: Ješere le Shobabe le Aretone." 
1Chronicles2:19 Asuba a swa, mme Kalebe a tsaya Eferathe yo o bonyeng nae Hure." 
1Chronicles2:20 Hure a tshola Uri, Uri a tshola Besalele." 
1Chronicles2:21 Morago Heserone a tsena kwa go morwadia Makire rra Gileate; a mo tsaya a le dinyaga di le 60 ene monna; a bona nae Segube. 
1Chronicles2:22 Segube a bona Jaire, yo o ne a na le metse e le 23 mo lefatsheng la Gileate." 
1Chronicles2:23 Gešure le Arame ba ba tseela metse eo e na le Kenathe le metsana ya gone, e bong metse e le 60. Botlhe ba e ne e le bomorwa Makire rra Gileate." 
1Chronicles2:24 E rile Heserone a sena go swela mo Kalebe-eferatha, foo Abija mosadi wa ga Heserone a bona nae Ašure rra Tekoa." 
1Chronicles2:25 Bomorwa Jerameele motsalwapele wa ga Heserone e ne e le Rame wa ntlha, le Buna le Orene le Oseme le Ahija." 
1Chronicles2:26 Jerameele o ne a na le mosadi yo mongwe; leina la gagwe e le Atara; ene e le mma Oname. 
1Chronicles2:27 Bomorwa Rame, motsalwapele wa ga Jerameele, e ne e le Maase le Jamine le Ekere." 
1Chronicles2:28 Bomorwa Oname e ne e le Shamai le Jate. Bomorwa Shamai ke Natabe le Abišure. 
1Chronicles2:29 Leina la mosadi wa ga Abišure e ne e le Abihaile; mme ene a bona nae Ahebane le Molite. 
1Chronicles2:30 Bomorwa Natabe ke Selete le Apaime. Selete a swa a se na ngwana. 
1Chronicles2:31 Morwa Apaime ke Iši; le bomorwa Iši ke Shešane; morwa Shešane ke Alai. 
1Chronicles2:32 Bomorwa Jate monnaa Shamai ke Jethere le Jonathane; mme Jethere a swa a se na ngwana. 
1Chronicles2:33 Bomorwa Jonathane ke Pelethe le Sasa. Bao e ne e le bomorwa Jerameele. 
1Chronicles2:34 Jaana Shešane o ne a se na bana ba basimane, a na le ba basetsana. Shešane o ne a na le motlhanka e le Moegepeto, leina la gagwe e le Jarehe." 
1Chronicles2:35 Shešane a naya Jarehe motlhanka wa gagwe morwadie go nna mosadi wa gagwe; a bona nae Atai. 
1Chronicles2:36 Atai a tshola Nathane, Nathane a tshola Sabate;" 
1Chronicles2:37 Sabate a tshola Efelale, Efelale a tshola Obete;" 
1Chronicles2:38 Obete a tshola Jehu, Jehu a tshola Asaria;" 
1Chronicles2:39 Asaria a tshola Helese, Helese a tshola Elease;" 
1Chronicles2:40 Elease a tshola Sisemai, Sisemai a tshola Shalume;" 
1Chronicles2:41 Shalume a tshola Jekamia, Jekamia a tshola Elišame." 
1Chronicles2:42 Bomorwa Kalebe monnaa Jerameele e ne e le Meša motsalwapele wa gagwe, yo e ne e le rra Sire: le bomorwa Mareša rra Heberone." 
1Chronicles2:43 Bomorwa Heberone ke Kora le Tapua le Rekeme le Sheme. 
1Chronicles2:44 Sheme a tshola Rahame, rraa Jorekeame; Rekeme a tshola Shamaia." 
1Chronicles2:45 Morwa Shamaia e ne e le Maone; Maone e ne e le rra Bethesure. 
1Chronicles2:46 Efa, mogadingwana wa ga Kalebe a tshola Harane, Moše le Gasese; Harane a tshola Gasese." 
1Chronicles2:47 Bomorwa Jatai ke Regeme le Jothame le Gešane le Pelete le Eta le Shaafe. 
1Chronicles2:48 Maaka, mogadingwana wa ga Kalebe a bona Shebere le Tirehana." 
1Chronicles2:49 Le gone a bona Shaafe rra Matemana, Shefe rra Makebene le rra Gibea; morwadia Kalebe e ne e le Akesa." 
1Chronicles2:50 Ba, e ne e le bomorwa Kalebe; morwa Hure motsalwapele wa ga Eferatha, Shobale rra Kiriathe-jearime;" 
1Chronicles2:51 Saleme rra Bethelehema Harefe rra Bethegatere. 
1Chronicles2:52 Shobale rra Kiriathe-jearime o ne a na le bana ba basimane; Haroe, bontlhanngwe jwa Bamanahathe." 
1Chronicles2:53 Ditshika tsa Kiriathe-jearime ke Bajathire le Bapute le Bašumathe le Bamišera; mo go bone ga tswa Basora le Baešetaole. 
1Chronicles2:54 Bomorwa Saleme ke Bethelehema le Banetofa Aterothe-bethe-Joabe le bontlhanngwe jwa Bamanahathe, e le Basora." 
1Chronicles2:55 Ditshika tsa bakwadi ba ba neng ba agile kwa Jabese ke Batira le Bašimeatha le Basukathe. Bao ke Bakena ba ba duleng mo go Hamatha, rra ba kgotla ya ga Rekabe." 
1Chronicles3:1 Jaana ba, e ne e le bomorwa Dafite ba o ba bonyeng kwa Heberone: wa ntlha Amenone wa ga Ahinoame mosadi wa Mojesereele; wa bobedi, Daniele wa ga Abigaile mosadi wa Mokaremele;" 
1Chronicles3:1 Jaana ba, e ne e le bomorwa Dafite ba o ba bonyeng kwa Heberone: wa ntlha Amenone wa ga Ahinoame mosadi wa Mojesereele; wa bobedi, Daniele wa ga Abigaile mosadi wa Mokaremele;" 
1Chronicles3:2 wa boraro, Abesalome morwa Maaka morwadia Talemai kgosi ya Gešure; wa bone, Atonija morwa Hagithe;" 
1Chronicles3:3 wa botlhano, Shefatia wa ga Abitale; wa borataro, Ithereame wa ga Egela mosadi wa gagwe." 
1Chronicles3:4 A bona ba le barataro mo Heberone; mme a busa ka dinyaga di supa le dikgwedi di le thataro gone; mo Jerusalema a busa ka dinyaga di le 33. 
1Chronicles3:5 Mme ba, a ba bona mo Jerusalema: Shimee, Shobabe, Nathane le Solomone, ke ba bane ba ga Bathešua morwadia Amiele;" 
1Chronicles3:6 Ibehare, Elišame, Elifelete," 
1Chronicles3:7 Noga, Nefege, Jafia," 
1Chronicles3:8 Elišame, Eliate le Elifelete, ba fera o le mongwe fela." 
1Chronicles3:9 Botlhe ba, e ne e le bomorwa Dafite, kwa ntle ga bomorwa bagadingwana ba gagwe; Tamare e ne e le kgaitsadia bone." 
1Chronicles3:10 Morwa Solomone e ne e le Rehoboame, Abija morwawe, Ase morwawe, Jehošafate morwawe;" 
1Chronicles3:11 Jorame morwawe, Ahasia morwawe, Joaše morwawe;" 
1Chronicles3:12 Amasia morwawe, Asaria morwawe, Jothame morwawe;" 
1Chronicles3:13 Ahase morwawe, Hesekia morwawe, Manase morwawe;" 
1Chronicles3:14 Amone morwawe, Josia morwawe." 
1Chronicles3:15 Bomorwa Josia: motsalwapele Johanane, wa bobedi Jehoiakime, wa boraro Setekia, wa bone Shalume." 
1Chronicles3:16 Bomorwa Jehoiakime: Jekonia morwawe, Setekia morwawe." 
1Chronicles3:17 Bomorwa Jekonia wa mogolegwa: Shealetiele morwawe," 
1Chronicles3:18 Malekirame, Petaia, Shenasare, Jekamia, Hošame, Netabia." 
1Chronicles3:19 Bomorwa Petaia ke Serubabele le Shemei; bomorwa Serubabele: Mešulame le Hanania; Shilomethe e ne e le kgaitsadia bone; 
1Chronicles3:20 le Hašuba, Ohele, Berekia, Hasadia le Jušabe-hesete; ba ba tlhano." 
1Chronicles3:21 Bomorwa Hanania: Pelatia le Ješaia; bomorwa Refaia; bomorwa Arenane, bomorwa Obadia, bomorwa Shekania." 
1Chronicles3:22 Bomorwa Shekania: Shemaia; le bomorwa Shemaia: Hatuše, Igale, Baria, Nearia le Shafate; ba barataro." 
1Chronicles3:23 Bomorwa Nearia: Elioenai, Hisikia le Aserikame, ba bararo." 
1Chronicles3:24 Bomorwa Elioenai: Hotafia, Eliašibe, Pelaia, Akube, Johanane, Delaia le Anani; basupa." 
1Chronicles4:1 Bomorwa Juta: Perese, Heserone, Karemi, Hure le Shobale." 
1Chronicles4:2 Reaia morwa Shobale a tshola Jahathe; Jahathe a tshola Ahumai le Lahate. Tseo ke ditshika tsa Basora. 
1Chronicles4:3 Ba e ne e le bomorwa rra Etame: Jesereele, Išeme le Itebaše; leina la kgaitsadia bone e ne e le Haseleleponi;" 
1Chronicles4:4 Peneule e ne e le rra Getore, le Esere rra Huša. Ba e ne e le bomorwa Hure, motsalwapele wa ga Eferatha rra Bethelehema." 
1Chronicles4:5 Ašure rra Tekoa o ne a na le basadi ba le babedi, Hela le Naara." 
1Chronicles4:6 Naara a bona nae Ahusame, Hefere, Temeni le Hahašetari. Bao e ne e le bomorwa Naara." 
1Chronicles4:7 Bomorwa Hela e ne e le Serethe, Isehare le Ethanane." 
1Chronicles4:8 Hakose a tsala Anube, Sobeba le ditshika tsa ga Aharehele morwa Harume." 
1Chronicles4:9 Jabese o ne a le tlotlego bogolo go bomorwa rraagwe; mmaagwe a mo raya leina la Jabese a re: “Ka gobo ke mmelege ka bohutsana.” 
1Chronicles4:10 Jabese a rapela Modimo wa Iseraele a re: “A bo Modimo o ka ka wa ntshegofatsa wa ba wa nkatlhamosetsa molelwane, le gore seatla sa gago se ka ka sa nna le nna, le gone o ka ka wa nthibela mo bosuleng, gore bo se ntlele le bohutsana!” Modimo wa mo naya se o se lopileng." 
1Chronicles4:11 Kelube monnaa Shuha a tshola Mehire, yo e ne e le rra Ešetone." 
1Chronicles4:12 Ešetone a tshola Betherafa, Pasea le Tehina rra Irenahaše. Bao e ne e le banna ba ga Reka." 
1Chronicles4:13 Bomorwa Kenase ke Otheneile le Seraia; le morwa Otheneile e bong Hathathe. 
1Chronicles4:14 Meonothai a bona Ofera; Seraia a bona Joabe rra Mogeharaša; gonne e le badiri ba ditiro tsa botswerere. 
1Chronicles4:15 Bomorwa Kalebe morwa Jefune ke Iru, Ela le Naame; le morwa Ela e bong Kenase." 
1Chronicles4:16 Bomorwa Jehalelele ke Sife le Sifa le Tirie le Asarele. 
1Chronicles4:17 Bomorwa Esera ke Jethere le Merete le Efere le Jalone, mme ene a tshola Miriame le Shamai le Išeba rra Ešetemoa." 
1Chronicles4:18 Mosadi wa gagwe wa Mojuta a belega Jarete rra Getore, le Hebere rra Soko, le Jekuthiele rra Sanoa. Bao ke bomorwa Bithia morwadia Faro, yo Merete o mo tsereng." 
1Chronicles4:19 Bomorwa mosadi wa ga Hodia, kgaitsadia Nahame, e ne e le rra Keila wa Mogareme le Ešetemoe wa Momaaka." 
1Chronicles4:20 Bomorwa Shimone ke Amenone le Rina le Benehanane le Tilone. Bomorwa Iši ke Sohethe le Benesohethe. 
1Chronicles4:21 Bomorwa Shela morwa Juta: Ere rra Leka, le Laata rra Mareša, le ditshika tsa lekgotla la ba ba logang leloba le le boleta ba lekgotla la ga Ašebee;" 
1Chronicles4:22 le Jokime, le banna ba Kosebe, le Joaše, le Sarafe, e le ba ba neng ba na le puso mo Moabe, le Ješubi-leheme. Dikwalo tsa dilo tse ke tsa bogologolo." 
1Chronicles4:23 Bao e ne e le babopi ba dipitsa le banni ba Netaima le Getera; ba ne ba agile le kgosi gone ba agetse tiro ya yone. 
1Chronicles4:24 Bomorwa Simeone ke Nemuele le Jamine le Jaribe le Sera le Shaule; 
1Chronicles4:25 Shalume morwawe, Mibesame morwawe, Mišeme morwawe." 
1Chronicles4:26 Bomorwa Mišeme ke Hamuele morwawe, Sakure morwawe Shemei morwawe." 
1Chronicles4:27 Shemei o ne a na le bana ba basimane ba le 16, le ba basetsana ba le barataro; bomonnawe ba ne ba se na bana ba le bantsi, le gone losika lotlhe lwa bone ga lo a ka lwa ntsifala jaaka bana ba Juta." 
1Chronicles4:28 Ba aga kwa Beerešeba, le Molata, le Hasare-šuale;" 
1Chronicles4:29 le kwa Bileha, le kwa Eseme, le kwa Tolata;" 
1Chronicles4:30 le kwa Bethuele, le kwa Horema, le kwa Sikelage;" 
1Chronicles4:31 le kwa Bethe-marekabothe, le Hasare-susime, le kwa Bethebiri, le kwa Sharaaime. Eo e ne e le metse ya bone go tla go fitlha mo pusong ya ga Dafite." 
1Chronicles4:32 Metsana ya bone e ne e le Etame, Aine, Rimone, Tokene le Ašane, metse e le metlhano," 
1Chronicles4:33 le metsana yotlhe ya bone e e mo tikologong ya metse eo go fitlha kwa Baale. Ao e ne e le maago a bone, ba bile ba na le polelo ya losika lwa bone, e e rulaganyeng." 
1Chronicles4:34 Le Mešobabe, le Jameleke, le Joša morwa Amasia;" 
1Chronicles4:35 le Joele, le Jehu morwa Jošibia, morwa Seraia morwa Asiele;" 
1Chronicles4:35 le Joele, le Jehu morwa Jošibia, morwa Seraia morwa Asiele;" 
1Chronicles4:36 le Elioenai, le Jaakoba, le Ješohaia, le Asaia, le Adiele, le Jesimiele le Benaia;" 
1Chronicles4:37 le Sisa morwa Shifi, morwa Alone, morwa Jetai, morwa Shimiri, morwa Shemaia." 
1Chronicles4:38 Ba ba umakwang ka maina e ne e le dikgosana mo ditshikeng tsa bone; mme makgotla a borraabo a totafala thata. 
1Chronicles4:39 Mme ba ya kwa botsenong jwa Getore, ba ya fela kwa moseja ga molapo ka fa botlhabatsatsi go batlisa matsomane a bone bohulo." 
1Chronicles4:40 Ba fitlhela bohulo jo bo monono jo bo molemo, le lefatshe le atlhame le ituletse fela le le kagisong; gonne ba ba kileng ba aga gone pele e ne e le ba ga Hame." 
1Chronicles4:41 Ba, ba ba kwadilweng ka maina, ba tsile mo metlheng ya ga Hesekia kgosi ya Juta, ba kgemetha megope ya bone le Bameuni ba ba fitlhelwang gone ba ba senyetsa ruri, nako ke eno, mme ba aga boemong jwa bone, gonne go le bohulo jwa matsomane a bone gone." 
1Chronicles4:42 Bangwe ba bone, e bong ba bomorwa Simeone, banna ba ba 500, ba ya thabeng ya Seire, balaodi ba bone e le Pelatia, Nearia, Refaia le Usiele, bomorwa Iši." 
1Chronicles4:43 Ba kgemetha masalela a Baamaleke a a falotseng, mme ba sa le ba aga gone, nako ke eno." 
1Chronicles5:1 Bomorwa Rubene motsalwapele wa ga Iseraele, (gonne e ne e le ene motsalwapele; e re ka a ne a leswefaditse bolao jwa ga rraagwe, tshiamelo ya botsalwapele ya newa bomorwa Josefe morwa Iseraele; mme losika ga lo na go balwa ka fa botsalong pele." 
1Chronicles5:2 Gonne Juta o ne a fenya gare ga bomorwa rraagwe, kgosana ya tswa mo go ene; mme botsalwapele e ne e le jwa ga Josefe.)" 
1Chronicles5:3 Bomorwa Rubene motsalwapele wa ga Iseraele ke Hanoke le Palu le Heserone le Karemi. 
1Chronicles5:4 Bomorwa Joele ke Shemaia morwawe, Goge morwawe, Shimei morwawe," 
1Chronicles5:4 Bomorwa Joele ke Shemaia morwawe, Goge morwawe, Shimei morwawe," 
1Chronicles5:5 Mika morwawe, Reaia morwawe, Baale morwawe," 
1Chronicles5:6 Beera morwawe, yo Tilegathe-pilenesere kgosi ya Asiria o ne a mo tlosa e le motshwarwa; ene e le kgosana ya Barubene." 
1Chronicles5:7 Bomonnawe ka ditshika tsa bone, jale ka ditshika tsa dikokomana tsa bone di rulaganngwa; tlhogo, Jeiele le Sekaria," 
1Chronicles5:8 le Bele morwa Asase morwa Sheme morwa Joele, yo o ne a agile mo Aroere go ya go fitlha kwa Nebo le Baale-meone." 
1Chronicles5:8 le Bele morwa Asase morwa Sheme morwa Joele, yo o ne a agile mo Aroere go ya go fitlha kwa Nebo le Baale-meone." 
1Chronicles5:9 Ntlheng ya botlhabatsatsi a aga go ya go fitlha fela kwa botsenong jwa naga e e tswang nokeng ya Euferatese, ka gobo matlhape a bone a ntsifetse mo lefatsheng la Gileate." 
1Chronicles5:10 E rile mo metlheng ya ga Saule ba epela Bahagere dira, ba ba oleng ka seatla sa bone: ba aga mo megopeng ya bone ba farafere lefatshe lotlhe le le potileng Gileate ka fa botlhabatsatsi." 
1Chronicles5:11 Bomorwa Gate ba aga bolebagana nabo mo lefatsheng la Bašane go fitlha kwa Saleka: 
1Chronicles5:12 Joele tlhogo, le Shafame wa bobedi, Janai le Shafate mo Bašane;" 
1Chronicles5:12 Joele tlhogo, le Shafame wa bobedi, Janai le Shafate mo Bašane;" 
1Chronicles5:13 le bana ba ga rraabo ba makgotla a borraabo; Mikaele, le Mešulame, le Sheba, le Jorai le Jakane, le Sie le Ebere, basupa." 
1Chronicles5:14 Ba e ne e le bomorwa Abihaile morwa Huri morwa Jaroa morwa Gileate morwa Mikaele morwa Jehišai morwa Jahito morwa Buse; 
1Chronicles5:15 Ahi morwa Abediele morwa Guni, tlhogo ya makgotla a borraabo." 
1Chronicles5:16 Ba aga moo Gileate moo Bašane, le mo metseng ya gone, le mo dintlheng tsotlhe tsa Sharona, go ya go fitlha kwa melelwaneng ya tsone." 
1Chronicles5:17 Botlhe ba, ba ne ba balwa ka ditshika tsa bone mo metlheng ya ga Jothame kgosi ya Juta, le mo metlheng ya ga Jeroboame kgosi ya Iseraele." 
1Chronicles5:18 Bomorwa Rubene le Bagate, le bontlhanngwe jwa lotso lwa ga Manase, ba ba diganka, banna ba ba nonofileng go tshola thejane le tšhaka le go hula ka bora, ba le ditswerere mo ntweng, e le 44 760, ba ba nonofileng go bolola go ya go tlhabana." 
1Chronicles5:19 Ba tlhabana le Bahagere, le Jeture, le Nafiše, le Notabe." 
1Chronicles5:20 Ba thusiwa mo go tlhabaneng nabo, mme Bahagere ba tsenngwa mo seatleng sa bone, le botlhe ba ba neng ba na nabo; gonne mo ntweng ba ne ba goela kwa Modimong, mme wa ba rapelesegela; ka gobo ba ne ba ikantse mo go one." 
1Chronicles5:21 Ba ba gapela dikgomo; ba tsaya dikamela di le 50 000, manku a le 250 000, diesela di le 2 000 le batho ba le 100 000." 
1Chronicles5:22 Gonne ga wa batho ba le bantsi ba bolailwe ke ntwa e ne e le ya Modimo. Ba aga mo boemong jwa bone go ya go fitlha kwa botshwarong. 
1Chronicles5:23 Bana ba bontlhanngwe jwa lotso lwa ga Manase ba aga mo lefatsheng; ba ata ba le mo Bašane ba atela kwa Baale-heremone. 
1Chronicles5:24 Ba, e ne e le ditlhogo tsa makgotla a borraabo; e bong Efere, Iši, Eliele, Aseriele, Jeremia, Hotafia le Jahediele, diganka tse di pelokgale, banna ba ba tumileng, ditlhogo tsa makgotla a borraabo." 
1Chronicles5:25 Ba tlolela Modimo wa borraabo, ba akafalela medimo ya ditšhaba tsa lefatshe tse Modimo o di sentseng fa pele ga bone." 
1Chronicles5:26 Modimo wa Iseraele wa tsosa mowa wa ga Pule kgosi ya Asiria, le mowa wa ga Tilegathe-pilenesere kgosi ya Asiria, a ba tlosetsa koo, e bong Barubene le Bagata le bontlhanngwe jwa lotso lwa ga Manase, wa ba isa kwa Hala, le Habore, le Hara le kwa nokeng ya Gosane, go tla mo nakong eno." 
1Chronicles6:1 Bomorwa Lefi ke Gerešone le Kohathe le Merari. 
1Chronicles6:2 Bomorwa Kohathe ke Amerame le Isehare le Heberone le Usiele. 
1Chronicles6:3 Bana ba ga Amerame ke Arone le Moše le Miriame. Bomorwa Arone ke Natabe le Abihu le Eleasare le Ithamare. 
1Chronicles6:4 Eleasare a tshola Finehase, Finehase a tshola Abišua;" 
1Chronicles6:5 Abišua a tshola Buki, Buki a tshola Usi," 
1Chronicles6:6 Usi a tshola Serahia, Serahia a tshola Meraiothe," 
1Chronicles6:7 Meraiothe a tshola Amaria, Amaria a tshola Ahitube," 
1Chronicles6:8 Ahitube a tshola Satoke, Satoke a tshola Ahimaase," 
1Chronicles6:9 Ahimaase a tshola Asaria, Asaria a tshola Johanane," 
1Chronicles6:10 Johanane a tshola Asaria, (ke ene yo o ne a dira tiro ya boperesiti mo ntlong e e agilweng ke Solomone mo Jerusalema)." 
1Chronicles6:11 Asaria a tshola Amaria, Amaria a tshola Ahitube," 
1Chronicles6:12 Ahitube a tshola Satoke, Satoke a tshola Shalume," 
1Chronicles6:13 Shalume a tshola Hilekia, Hilekia a tshola Asaria," 
1Chronicles6:14 Asaria a tshola Seraia, Seraia a tshola Jehosatake," 
1Chronicles6:15 mme Jehosatake a ya botshwarong, jale ka Jehofa a tlosa Juta le Jerusalema ka seatla sa ga Nebukatenesare." 
1Chronicles6:16 Bomorwa Lefi ke Gerešome le Kohathe le Merari. 
1Chronicles6:17 A ke maina a bomorwa Gerešome: Libeni le Shemei. 
1Chronicles6:18 Bomorwa Kohathe e ne e le Amerame, Isihare, Heberone le Usiele." 
1Chronicles6:19 Bomorwa Merari ke Mahali le Muši. Tse ke ditshika tsa Balefi ka fa matlong a borraabo. 
1Chronicles6:20 Ba Gerešome: Libeni morwawe, Jahathe morwawe, Sima morwawe," 
1Chronicles6:21 Joa morwawe, Ito morwawe, Sera morwawe, Jeatherai morwawe." 
1Chronicles6:22 Bomorwa Kohathe: Aminatabe morwawe, Kora morwawe, Asire morwawe," 
1Chronicles6:23 Elekana morwawe, Ebiasafe morwawe, le Asire morwawe;" 
1Chronicles6:24 Tahathe morwawe, Uriele morwawe, Usia morwawe, le Shaule morwawe." 
1Chronicles6:25 Bomorwa Elekana ke Amasia le Ahimothe. 
1Chronicles6:26 Ka ga Elekana, bomorwa Elekana, Sofai morwawe, le Nahathe morwawe," 
1Chronicles6:27 Eliabe morwawe, Jerohame morwawe, Elekana morwawe." 
1Chronicles6:28 Bomorwa Samuele: motsalwapele ke Joele; wa bobedi Abija. 
1Chronicles6:28 Bomorwa Samuele: motsalwapele ke Joele; wa bobedi Abija. 
1Chronicles6:29 Bomorwa Merari ke Mahali, Libeni morwawe, Shimei morwawe, Usa morwawe," 
1Chronicles6:30 Shimee morwawe, Hagia morwawe le Asaia morwawe." 
1Chronicles6:31 Ba ke bone ba Dafite o ne a ba tlhomela tirelo ya go opela mo ntlong ya ga Jehofa, letlole le sena go bona boikhutso." 
1Chronicles6:32 Ba direla ka go opela fa pele ga motlaagana wa mogope wa bophuthegelo, Solomone a ba a tla a aga ntlo ya ga Jehofa mo Jerusalema; mme ba ema mo tirong ya bone ka fa thulaganong ya bone." 
1Chronicles6:33 Ba ke bone ba ba neng ba tle ba eme le bomorwaa bone. Ba bomorwa Bakohathe ke: Hemane moopedi, morwa Joele, morwa Samuele;" 
1Chronicles6:33 Ba ke bone ba ba neng ba tle ba eme le bomorwaa bone. Ba bomorwa Bakohathe ke: Hemane moopedi, morwa Joele, morwa Samuele;"

1Chronicles6:36 morwa Elekana, morwa Joele, morwa Asaria, morwa Sefania;"

1Chronicles6:37 morwa Tahathe, morwa Asire, morwa Ebiasafe, morwa Kora," 
1Chronicles6:38 morwa Isehare, morwa Kohathe, morwa Lefi, morwa Iseraele." 
1Chronicles6:39 Le Asafe monnawe, yo o ne a tle a eme ka fa letsogong le legolo, e bong Asafe morwa Berekia; morwa Shimee," 
1Chronicles6:40 morwa Mikaele, morwa Baaseia; morwa Malekija," 
1Chronicles6:41 morwa Etheni, morwa Sera, morwa Ataia," 
1Chronicles6:42 morwa Ethane, morwa Sima, morwa Shimei," 
1Chronicles6:43 morwa Jahathe, morwa Gerešome, morwa Lefi."

1Chronicles6:45 morwa Hašabia, morwa Amasia, morwa Hilekia," 
1Chronicles6:46 morwa Amesi, morwa Bani, morwa Shemere," 
1Chronicles6:47 morwa Mahali, morwa Muši, morwa Merari, morwa Lefi." 
1Chronicles6:48 Balefi bomonnaa bone, ba ne ba laolelwa tirelo yotlhe ya motlaagana wa ntlo ya Modimo." 
1Chronicles6:49 Arone le bomorwawe ba ne ba tle ba ise tshupelo e e fisiwang mo sebesong sa tshupelo le maswalo mo sebesong sa maswalo, ba isetse tiro yotlhe ya felo ga boitshepo jo bo itshepileng, le go direla Iseraele tetlanyo, ka fa Moše motlhanka wa Modimo o ne a laotse ka gone gotlhe fela." 
1Chronicles6:50 Ba, ke bomorwa Arone; Eleasare morwawe, Finehase morwawe, Abišua morwawe." 
1Chronicles6:51 Buki morwawe, Usi morwawe, Serahia morwawe;" 
1Chronicles6:52 Meraiothe morwawe, Amaria morwawe, Ahitube morwawe;" 
1Chronicles6:53 Satoke morwawe, Ahimaase morwawe." 
1Chronicles6:54 Jaana a ke maago a bone, ka fa matlhaolelong a bone mo melelwaneng ya bone: bomorwa Arone ba ditshika tsa Bakohathe, gonne kabelo ya ntlha ka bola e ne e le ya bone." 
1Chronicles6:55 Bao ba newa Heberone mo lefatsheng la Juta le dintlhana tsa gone tikologong ya gone. 
1Chronicles6:56 Maota a motse le metsana ya one ba di naya Kalebe morwa Jefune. 
1Chronicles6:57 Bomorwa Arone ba newa metse ya botshabelo, Heberone; Libena le one le dintlhana tsa gone, le Jatira, le Ešetemoa le dintlhana tsa gone;" 
1Chronicles6:58 Hilene le dintlhana tsa gone, Debire le dintlhana tsa gone;" 
1Chronicles6:59 Ašana le dintlhana tsa gone le Bethešemeše le dintlhana tsa gone; 
1Chronicles6:60 mo lotsong lwa Benjamine; Geba le dintlhana tsa gone, Alemethe le dintlhana tsa gone le Anathothe le dintlhana tsa gone. Metse yotlhe ya bone go ya le ditshika tsotlhe tsa bone e ne e le metse e le 13." 
1Chronicles6:61 Bomorwa Kohathe ba bangwe ba newa metse e le some, ka taolo ya bola; e tswa mo losikeng lwa lotso, mo go bontlhanngwe jwa lotso, bontlhanngwe jwa Manase." 
1Chronicles6:62 Bomorwa Gerešome ba neewa metse e le 13, ka fa ditshikeng tsa bone, e tswa mo lotsong lwa Isakare, le mo lotsong lwa Ašere, le mo lotsong lwa Nafetali; le mo lotsong lwa Manase mo Bašane." 
1Chronicles6:63 Bomorwa Merari ba newa metse e le 12 ka taolo ya bola, ka fa ditshikeng tsa bone, e tswa lotsong lwa Rubene, le mo lotsong lwa Gata, le mo lotsong lwa Sebulone." 
1Chronicles6:64 Mme bana ba Iseraele ba naya Balefi metse eo le dintlhana tsa yone. 
1Chronicles6:65 Ba aba ka taolo ya bola e le metse e e tswang lotsong lwa bana ba Juta, le mo lotsong lwa bana ba Simeone, le mo lotsong lwa bana ba Benjamine, ba aba metse e e boletsweng ka maina." 
1Chronicles6:66 Bangwe ba ditshika tsa bomorwa Kohathe, ba ne ba na le metse ya melelwane ya bone e tswa lotsong lwa Eferaime." 
1Chronicles6:67 Ba ba naya metse ya botshabelo, Shekeme mo lefatsheng la Eferaime la makgabana, le dintlhana tsa gone; Gesere le one, le dintlhana tsa gone;" 
1Chronicles6:68 Jokemeame le dintlhana tsa gone, le Bethehorone le dintlhana tse gone;" 
1Chronicles6:69 Aijalone le dintlhana tsa gone; le Gatherimone le dintlhana tsa gone; 
1Chronicles6:70 le mo go bontlhanngwe jwa lotso lwa Manase; Anere le dintlhana tsa gone, le Bileame le dintlhana tsa gone, e le ya ba ba setseng ba losika lwa bomorwa Kohathe." 
1Chronicles6:71 Ga newa bomorwa Gerešome, e e tswang mo losikeng lwa bontlhangwe jwa lotso lwa Manase, Golane mo Bašane le dintlhana tsa gone, le Ašetharothe le dintlhana tsa gone." 
1Chronicles6:72 Le mo lotsong lwa Isakare; Keteše le dintlhana tsa gone, Daberathe le dintlhana tsa gone;" 
1Chronicles6:73 le Ramothe le dintlhana tsa gone, le Aneme le dintlhana tsa gone; le Aneme le dintlhana tsa gone;" 
1Chronicles6:74 le mo lotsong lwa Ašere; Mašale le dintlhana tsa gone, le Abetone le dintlhana tsa gone;" 
1Chronicles6:75 le Hukoke le dintlhana tsa gone, le Rehobe le dintlhana tsa gone." 
1Chronicles6:76 Mo lotsong lwa Nafetali; Keteše mo Galilea le dintlhana tsa gone, le Hamone le dintlhana tsa gone, le Kiriathaime le dintlhana tsa gone." 
1Chronicles6:77 Balefi ba bangwe, bomorwa Merari ba newa Rimone le dintlhana tsa gone, le Tabore le dintlhana tsa gone, go tswa mo lotsong lwa Sebulone." 
1Chronicles6:78 Kwa moseja ga Joretane fa Jeriko go pota Joretane ntlheng ya botlhabatsatsi, ba newa mo lotsong lwa Rubene, Besere mo nageng le dintlhana tsa gone, le Jahasa le dintlhana tsa gone." 
1Chronicles6:79 Le Ketemothe le dintlhana tsa gone, le Mefaate le dintlhana tsa gone;" 
1Chronicles6:80 le mo lotsong lwa Gate; Ramothe mo Gileate le dintlhana tsa gone, le Mahanaime le dintlhana tsa gone;" 
1Chronicles6:81 le Hešebone le dintlhana tsa gone, le Jasere le dintlhana tsa gone." 
1Chronicles7:1 Le ba bomorwa Isakare: Tola, Pua, Jašube le Shimerone, ba bane." 
1Chronicles7:2 Le bomorwa Tola: Usi, Refaia, Jeriele, Jamai, Ibesame le Shemuele, ditlhogo tsa makgotla a borraabo, e bong Tola; banna ba ba diganka tse di pelokgale mo ditshikeng tsa bone; mo metlheng ya ga Dafite palo ya bone e ne e le 22 600." 
1Chronicles7:3 Le bomorwa Usi: Iserahia; le bomorwa Iserahia: Mikaele, Obadia, Joele, Isešia, ba batlhano, e le bagolwane botlhe." 
1Chronicles7:3 Le bomorwa Usi: Iserahia; le bomorwa Iserahia: Mikaele, Obadia, Joele, Isešia, ba batlhano, e le bagolwane botlhe." 
1Chronicles7:4 Ga bo go le mephato ya ntwa ya go tlhabana, le yone e na nabo, ka fa ditshikeng tsa bone, ka fa makgotleng a borraabo, 36 000, ka ba na le basadi ba le bantsi le bana ba basimane." 
1Chronicles7:5 Bomorwa rraabo mo ditshikeng tsotlhe tsa Isakare, diganka tse di pelokgale, botlhe fa ba balwa ka fa palong ya ditshika, e ne e le 87 000." 
1Chronicles7:6 Bomorwa Benjamine: Bele, Bekere le Jediaele, ba bararo." 
1Chronicles7:7 Le bomorwa Bele: Esebone, Usi, Usiele, Jerimothe le Iri, ba batlhano; ditlhogo tsa makgotla a borara, banna ba ba diganka tse di pelokgale; ba balwa ka fa palong ya ditshika 22 034." 
1Chronicles7:8 Le bomorwa Bekere: Semira, Joaše, Eliesere, Elioenai, Omeri, Jerimothe, Abija, Anathothe le Alemethe. Botlhe ba e ne e le bomorwa Bekere." 
1Chronicles7:9 Ba balwa ka fa palong ya ditshika, ditlhogo tsa makgotla a borraabo, diganka tse di pelokgale, 20 200." 
1Chronicles7:10 Le morwa Jediaele: Bilehane; bomorwa Bilehane: Jeuša, Benjamine, Ehute, Kanaana, Sethane, Tarešiše le Ahišahare." 
1Chronicles7:11 Botlhe ba e ne e le bomorwa Jediaele ka fa ditlhogong tsa makgotla a borraabo, diganka tse di pelokgale, 17 200, e le ba ba nonofileng go bolola mo ntweng go ya go tlhabana." 
1Chronicles7:12 Bašupime, le Bahupime, bomorwa Ire, Bahušime, bomorwa Ahere." 
1Chronicles7:13 Bomorwa Nafetali: Jahasiele, Guni, Jeseri le Shalume, bomorwa Bileha." 
1Chronicles7:14 Bomorwa Manase: Aseriele wa mosadi wa gagwe, (mogadingwana wa gagwe mosadi wa Moarama a belega Makire rra Gileate." 
1Chronicles7:15 Makire a tsaya mosadi wa Hupima le Shupima, leina la kgaitsadie e ne e le Maaka); leina la wa bobedi e le Selofehate, mme Selofehate a na le bana ba basetsana." 
1Chronicles7:16 Maaka mosadi wa ga Makere a bona ngwana wa mosimane; a mo raya leina a re, Pereše; leina la ga monnawe e ne e le Shereše; le bomorwawe e le Ulame le Rakeme." 
1Chronicles7:17 Le bomorwa Ulame: Betane. Ba e ne e le bomorwa Gileate morwa Makire morwa Manase. 
1Chronicles7:18 Kgaitsadie Hamolekethe a bona Išehote, Abiesere le Mahale." 
1Chronicles7:19 Bomorwa Shemite e ne e le Ahiane, Shekeme, Liki le Aniame." 
1Chronicles7:20 Bomorwa Eferaime ke Shuthela, le Berete morwawe, le Tahathe morwawe Eleata morwawe, le Tahathe morwawe," 
1Chronicles7:21 le Sabate morwawe le Shuthela morwawe, le Esere le Eleate, ba banna ba Gathe ba ba tsaletsweng mo lefatsheng ba ba bolaileng, ka gonne ba ne ba tsile go ba gapela dikgomo." 
1Chronicles7:22 Eferaime rraabo a hutsafala ka malatsi a le mantsi, mme bomorwa rraagwe ba ya go mo gomotsa." 
1Chronicles7:23 Mme a tsena kwa go mogatse, mme a ima, a belega ngwana wa mosimane, a mo raya leina a re, Beria, gonne go ne ga ya bosula le ntlo ya gagwe." 
1Chronicles7:24 Morwadie e ne e le Sheera, yo o agileng Bethehorone o o kwa godimo le o o kwa tlase, le Usene-šeera." 
1Chronicles7:25 Refa le ene e ne e le morwawe, le Rešefe, le Tela morwawe, le Tahane morwawe," 
1Chronicles7:26 Latane morwawe, Amihute morwawe, Elišame morwawe," 
1Chronicles7:27 Nune morwawe, Jošua morwawe." 
1Chronicles7:28 Dithuo tsa bone le maago e ne e le Bethele le metse ya gone, le Naarane ntlheng ya botlhabatsatsi, le Gesere ntlheng ya bophirimatsatsi le metse ya gone, Shekeme le one le metse ya gone go ya go fitlha kwa Asa le metse ya gone." 
1Chronicles7:29 Le ka fa melelwaneng ya bana ba ga Manase Bethešeane le metse ya gone, Taanake le metse ya gone, Megito le metse ya gone, Dora le metse ya gone. Mo metseng eo ga aga bana ba ga Josefe morwa Iseraele." 
1Chronicles7:30 Bomorwa Ašere: Imena, Išefa, Išefi, Beria le Sera kgaitsadia bone." 
1Chronicles7:31 Bomorwa Beria: Hebere, le Malekiele, yo e ne e le rra Biresaithe." 
1Chronicles7:32 Hebere a tsala Jafelete, Shomere, Hothame le Šua kgaitisadia bone." 
1Chronicles7:33 Bomorwa Jafelete: Pasake, Bimehale le Ašefathe. Bao ke bana ba ga Jafelete." 
1Chronicles7:34 Bomorwa Shemere: Ahi, Rohega, Jehuba le Arame." 
1Chronicles7:35 Bomorwa Heleme monnawe: Sofa, Imena, Sheleše le Amale." 
1Chronicles7:36 Bomorwa Sofa: Sua, Harenefere, Shuale, Beri le Imera," 
1Chronicles7:37 Besere, Hote, Shama, Shileša, Itherane le Beera." 
1Chronicles7:38 Bomorwa Jethere ke Jehune le Pisepa le Ara. 
1Chronicles7:39 Bomorwa Ula: Ara, Haniele le Risia." 
1Chronicles7:40 Botlhe bao e ne e le bana ba ga Ašere, ditlhogo tsa makgotla a borraabo, banna ba ba tlhophegileng, ba ba pelokgale, ditlhogo tsa dikgosana. Palo ya bone, fa ba balelwa tirelo ka fa ditshikeng tsa bone, e ne e le banna ba ba 26 000." 
1Chronicles8:1 Benjamine a tshola Bele motsalwapele wa gagwe, Ašebele wa bobedi le Ahara wa boraro;" 
1Chronicles8:2 Noha wa bone, le Rafa wa botlhano." 
1Chronicles8:3 Bele o ne a na le bana ba basimane: Atare, Gere le Abihute;" 
1Chronicles8:4 Abišua, Naamane le Ahoa;" 
1Chronicles8:5 Gere, Shefufane le Hurame." 
1Chronicles8:6 Ba, e ne e le bomorwa Ehute: ba, e le ditlhogo tsa makgotla a borraabo mo banning ba Geba, mme ba ba isa botshwarong kwa Manahathe:" 
1Chronicles8:7 Naamane, le Ahija, le Gera a ba isa botshwarong; mme a tshola Use le Ahihute." 
1Chronicles8:8 Sharaime a tshola bana kwa nageng ya Moaba, a sena go tsamaisa Hušime le Baara basadi ba gagwe." 
1Chronicles8:9 Ene le Hoteše mosadi wa gagwe ba bona Jobabe, le Sibia, le Meša le Malekame;" 
1Chronicles8:9 Ene le Hoteše mosadi wa gagwe ba bona Jobabe, le Sibia, le Meša le Malekame;" 
1Chronicles8:10 le Juse, Shakia le Mirema. Bao e ne e le bomorwawe, ditlhogo tsa makgotla a borara." 
1Chronicles8:11 Ene le Hušime ba bona Abitube le Elepaale. 
1Chronicles8:12 Bomorwa Elepaale: Ebere, le Mišame le Shemete yo o agileng Ono le Lote le metse ya gone." 
1Chronicles8:13 Beria le Shema, ba e ne e le ditlhogo tsa makgotla a borara mo banneng ba Aijalone, ba ba lelekileng banni ba Gathe;" 
1Chronicles8:14 Ahio, Shašake, Jeremothe." 
1Chronicles8:15 Sebadia, Arate, le Etere," 
1Chronicles8:16 le Mikaele, le Išipa, le Johe, bomorwa Beria." 
1Chronicles8:17 Sebadia, le Mešulame, le Hišeki le Hebere," 
1Chronicles8:18 le Išemerai, le Iselia le Jobabe, bomorwa Elepaale." 
1Chronicles8:18 le Išemerai, le Iselia le Jobabe, bomorwa Elepaale." 
1Chronicles8:19 Jakime, le Sikeri le Sabedi;" 
1Chronicles8:20 Elienai, le Silethai le Eliele," 
1Chronicles8:21 Ataia, le Beraia le Shimerathe, bomorwa Shimei." 
1Chronicles8:22 Išepane, Ebere, le Eliele," 
1Chronicles8:23 Abetone, Sikeri, le Hanane," 
1Chronicles8:24 Hanania, Elame, le Anethothija," 
1Chronicles8:25 Ifeteia, le Penuele, bomorwa Shašake." 
1Chronicles8:26 Shamešerai, Sheharia, le Athalia," 
1Chronicles8:27 Jaarešia, Elija, le Sikeri bomorwa Jerohame." 
1Chronicles8:28 Bao e ne e le ditlhogo tsa makgotla a borara go ya le ditshika tsa bone batho ba batona; bao ba aga mo Jerusalema. 
1Chronicles8:29 Mo Gibeone ga aga rra Gibeone Jeiele, leina la mosadi wa gagwe go twe Maaka;" 
1Chronicles8:30 le morwawe wa ntlha: Abetone, le Sure le Kiše le Baale le Natabe," 
1Chronicles8:31 Getore, Ahio le Sekere." 
1Chronicles8:32 Mikelothe a tshola Shimea. Bao le bone ba aga mo Jerusalema le bomorwa rraabo, ba lebaganye le bana ba ga rraabo." 
1Chronicles8:33 Nere a tsala Kiše; Kiše a tshola Saule; Saule a tshola Jonathane le Malekišua, Abinatabe le Ešebaale." 
1Chronicles8:34 Morwa Jonathane e ne e le Meribe-baale; Meribe-baale a tshola Mika. 
1Chronicles8:35 Bomorwa Mika: Pithone, Meleke, Taree le Ahase." 
1Chronicles8:36 Ahase a tshola Jehoata; Jehoata a tshola Alemethe, Asemafethe, le Simeri; Simeri a tshola Mosa;" 
1Chronicles8:37 Mosa a tshola Binee; Rafa e ne e le morwawe, Eleasa morwawe, Asele morwawe." 
1Chronicles8:38 Asele o ne a na le bana ba basimane ba le barataro, maina a bone ke: Aserikame, Bokeru, Išemaele, Shearia, Obadia le Hanane. Botlhe bao e ne e le bomorwa Asele." 
1Chronicles8:39 Bomorwa Ešeke monnawe: Ulame motsalwapele wa gagwe, Jeuše wa bobedi le Elifelete wa boraro." 
1Chronicles8:40 Bomorwa Ulame e ne e le banna ba ba pelokgale, bahudi ka bora, ba bile ba na le bana ba basimane ba le bantsi, bomorwa bana ba le 150. Botlhe bao e ne e le bomorwa Benjamine." 
1Chronicles9:1 Jalo Baiseraele botlhe ba balwa ka fa ditshikeng; mme bonang, ba kwadilwe mo lokwalong lwa dikgosi tsa Iseraele. Bajuta ba isiwa Babilone ba golegilwe ka ntlha ya tlolo ya bone." 
1Chronicles9:2 Jaana banni ba ntlha ba ba tsileng ba aga mo dikabelong tsa bone mo metseng ya bone, e ne e le Iseraele, baperesiti, Balefi le Banethinime." 
1Chronicles9:3 Mo Jerusalema ga aga bangwe ba bana ba Juta, le ba bana ba Benjamine, le ba bana ba Eferaime le Manase;" 
1Chronicles9:4 Utekai morwa Amihute, morwa Omeri, morwa Imeri, morwa Bani, wa bana ba ga Perese morwa Juta." 
1Chronicles9:5 Le Babišilone; Asaia motsalwapele le bomorwawe. 
1Chronicles9:6 Le ba bomorwa Sera ke Jeuele le bana ba ga rraabo ba le 690. 
1Chronicles9:7 Le ba bomorwa Benjamine e ne e le Salu morwa Mešulame morwa Hotafia morwa Hasenau; 
1Chronicles9:8 le Ibeneia morwa Jerohame, le Ela morwa Usi, morwa Mikeri, le Mešulame morwa Shefatia, morwa Ruele, morwa Ibenija;" 
1Chronicles9:9 le bomorwa rraabo, ka fa dikokomaneng tsa bone, ba le 956. Banna botlhe bao e ne e le ditlhogo tsa matlo a borraabo ka makgotla a borraabo." 
1Chronicles9:10 Le ba baperesiti; Jetaia, le Jehoiaribe le Jakine;" 
1Chronicles9:11 le Asaria morwa Hilekia, morwa Mešulame, morwa Satoke, morwa Meraiothe, morwa Ahitube, molaodi wa ntlo ya Modimo;" 
1Chronicles9:12 le Ataia morwa Jerohame, morwa Pašure morwa Malakija, le Masai morwa Adiele, morwa Jasera, morwa Mešulame, morwa, Mešilemithe, morwa Imere;" 
1Chronicles9:13 le bomorwa rraabo, ditlhogo tsa makgotla a borraabo ba le 1 760; e le banna ba ba nonofileng thata mo tirong ya tirelo ya ntlo ya Modimo." 
1Chronicles9:14 Le ba Balefi; Shemaia morwa Hašube, morwa Aserikame, morwa Hašabia, wa bomorwa Merari;" 
1Chronicles9:15 le Bakebakare, Hereše, le Galale le Mathania morwa Mika, morwa Sikeri, morwa Asafe;" 
1Chronicles9:16 le Obadia morwa Shemaia, morwa Galale, morwa Jeduthune, le Berekia morwa Asa, morwa Elekana; yo o ne a agile mo metsaneng ya Banetofatha." 
1Chronicles9:17 Le balebedi ba kgoro: Shalume, Akube, Talemone, Ahimane le bomorwa rraabo; Shalume e ne e le ene yo mogolo;" 
1Chronicles9:18 e le bone ba gale ba ne ba ntse ba lebeletse mo kgorong ya kgosi ntlheng ya botlhabatsatsi; e ne e le bone balebedi ba kgoro ba bothibelelo jwa bana ba ga Lefi. 
1Chronicles9:19 Le Shalume morwa Kore, morwa Ebiasafe, morwa Kora, le bomorwa rraagwe ba ntlo ya ga rraagwe, Bakora, ba bo ba laola tiro ya tirelo, e le balebedi ba dikgoro tsa motlaagana; le borraabo ba kile ba ne ba le balaodi ba bothibelelo jwa ga Jehofa, balebedi ba botseno." 
1Chronicles9:20 Finehase morwa Eleasare e ne e le molaodi wa bone mo metlheng e e fetileng, mme Jehofa a na nae." 
1Chronicles9:21 Sekaria morwa Mešelemia e ne e le molebedi wa kgoro ya mogope wa bophuthegelo. 
1Chronicles9:22 Bao botlhe ba ba itshenketsweng go nna balebedi ba dikgoro ba bo ba le 212. Bao ba balwa ka losika mo metsaneng ya bone, ba Dafite le Samuele wa mmoni, ba ba tlhomileng mo tirong ya bone ya boikanngo." 
1Chronicles9:23 Jalo bone le bana ba bone e ne e le balebedi ba dikgoro tsa ntlo ya ga Jehofa, e bong ntlo ya motlaagana, ka makoko." 
1Chronicles9:24 Balebedi ba dikgoro ba bo ba le mo dintlheng tsoo nne, e bong ntlheng ya botlhabatsatsi, ya bophirimatsatsi, ya botsheka le ya borwa." 
1Chronicles9:25 Bomorwa rraabo ba ba mo metsaneng ya bone, ba bo ba na le go tla go nna nabo ka letsatsi la bosupa ka metlha le metlha;" 
1Chronicles9:26 gonne balebedi ba bagolo ba kgoro, ba bane, ba e ne e le Balefi, ba bo ba le mo tirong ya boikanngo, ba bile ba le balaodi ba matlwana le ba mabolokelo mo ntlong ya Modimo." 
1Chronicles9:27 Mme ba bo ba lala mo tikologong ya ntlo ya Modimo, gonne tibelo ya bone e le mo go bone, e le tiro ya bone go e bula ka meso le meso." 
1Chronicles9:28 Bangwe ba bone e ne e le balebedi ba dilwana tsa tirelo; gonne di ne di tle di leriwe mo teng ka palo, di be di ntshiwe ka palo." 
1Chronicles9:29 Bangwe ba bone ba bile ba beilwe mo taolong ya dilo tsa ntlo, le ya dilwana tsotlhe tsa ntlo e e boitshepo, le ya setou le ya bojalwa jwa mofine, le ya lookwane, le ya lebano, le ya dinkga monate." 
1Chronicles9:30 Bangwe ba bomorwa baperesiti ba baakanya setlolo sa lebano le malao. 
1Chronicles9:31 Matithia, mongwe wa Balefi, motsalwapele wa ga Shalume wa Mokora, o ne a na le tiro ya boikanngo mo dilong tse di besiwang mo dipitseng tse di dikhaetla." 
1Chronicles9:32 Bangwe ba bomorwa rraabo, ba bomorwa Bakohathe, ba bo ba laola senkgwe sa tshupo, go se baakanya ka sabata mongwe le mongwe." 
1Chronicles9:33 Ba ke bone baopedi, ditlhogo tsa makgotla a borraabo ba Balefi, ba ba agileng mo matlwaneng, mme ba bo ba golotswe mo ditirelong tse dingwe; gonne ba tshwerwe ke tiro ya bone motshegare le bosigo." 
1Chronicles9:34 Bao e ne e le ditlhogo tsa matlo a borraabo ba Balefi, mo dikokomaneng tsa bone, e le batho ba bagolo, bao ba ne ba agile mo Jerusalema." 
1Chronicles9:35 Mo Gibeone ga bo go agile rraagwe Gibeone, e bong Jeiele, yo leina la mosadi wa gagwe e ne e le Maaka." 
1Chronicles9:36 Motsalwapele wa gagwe wa mosimane e ne e le Abedone, ga bo go le Sure, le Kiše, Baale, Nere le Natabe," 
1Chronicles9:37 le Getore, le Ahio, le Sekaria le Mikelothe;" 
1Chronicles9:38 Mikelothe a tshola Simeame. Le bone ba aga le bomorwa rraabo mo Jerusalema bolebagana le bomorwa rraabo. 
1Chronicles9:39 Nere a tshola Kiše, Kiše a tshola Saule, Saule a tshola Jonathane, le Melekišue, le Abinatabe le Ešebaale." 
1Chronicles9:40 Morwa Jonathane e ne e le Meribe-baale; Meribe-baale a tshola Mika. 
1Chronicles9:41 Bomorwa Mika: Pithone le Meleke le Taherea le Ahase. 
1Chronicles9:42 Ahase a tshola Jara, Jara a tshola Alemethe le Asemafethe le Simeri; Simeri a tshola Moše." 
1Chronicles9:43 Moše a tshola Binea, le Refaia morwawe, le Elease morwawe, le Asele morwawe." 
1Chronicles9:44 Asele o ne a na le bana ba basimane ba le barataro, ba maina a bone e leng one a: Aserikame, le Bokeru, Išemaele, le Shearia, le Obedia le Hanane; bao e ne e le bomorwa Asele." 
1Chronicles10:1 Jaana Bafilisitia ba tlhabana le Baiseraele; mme banna ba Iseraele ba tshaba fa pele ga Bafilisitia, mme ba wa ba bolaetswe mo thabeng ya Gileboa." 
1Chronicles10:2 Bafilisitia ba konatelela Saule le bomorwawe ka thata; Bafilisitia ba bolaya Jonathane, le Abinatabe, le Malekišue bomorwa Saule." 
1Chronicles10:3 Tlhabano ya pitlaganya Saule thata, bahudi ka bora ba mo tshwara; a nna mo tlalelong ka ntlha ya bahudi ka bora." 
1Chronicles10:4 Foo Saule a raya motshola dibolao wa gagwe a re: “Somola tšhaka ya gago o mphololetse ka yone; nka tla ka sotlwa ke ba ba sa rupang ba.” Motshola dibolao wa gagwe a gana; gonne a boifa thata. Ke gone ka moo Saule a tsaya tšhaka ya gagwe a wela mo go yone. 
1Chronicles10:5 Ya re motshola dibolao wa gagwe a bona fa Saule a sule, le ene a wela mo tšhakeng ya gagwe a swa." 
1Chronicles10:6 Mme Saule a swa le bomorwawe ba bararo; le ba ntlo ya gagwe botlhe ba swa mmogo. 
1Chronicles10:7 E rile banna botlhe ba Iseraele ba ba mo molapong ba bona fa go tshajwa, le go re Saule le bomorwawe ba sule, ba tlogela metse ya bone ba tshaba; mme Bafilisitia ba tla ba aga mo go yone." 
1Chronicles10:8 Ga dirala ka moso, e rile Bafilisitia ba tla go apola ba ba bolailweng, ba fitlhela Saule le bomorwawe ba ole mo thabeng ya Gileboa." 
1Chronicles10:9 Ba mo apola, ba ba ba tsaya tlhogo ya gagwe le dibolao tsa gagwe, ba roma kwa lefatsheng la Bafilisitia tikologong, ba isa mafoko ao mo medimong ya bone ya disetwa, le mo bathong." 
1Chronicles10:10 Ba tsenya dibolao tsa gagwe mo ntlong ya medimo ya bone, ba gokela tlhogo ya gagwe mo ntlong ya ga Dagone." 
1Chronicles10:11 E rile ba Jabeše-gileate botlhe ba utlwela tsotlhe tse Bafilisitia ba di diretseng Saule," 
1Chronicles10:12 foo banna botlhe ba ba diganka ba nanoga, ba ya ba tlosa serepa sa ga Saule, le direpa tsa bomorwawe, ba di isa kwa Jabeše, ba fitlha marapo a bone fa tlase ga mooka mo Jabeše, ba ikitsa go ja ka malatsi a supa." 
1Chronicles10:13 Jalo Saule a swela tlolo ya gagwe e o kileng a e direla Jehofa, ka ntlha ya lefoko la ga Jehofa le o se kang a le tshegetsa; le ka gonne o ne a lopa kgakololo mo go mongwe yo o buang le badimo, gore a tle a botse ka gone." 
1Chronicles10:14 A se ka a botsa mo go Jehofa; ke gone ka moo a mmolaya, mme a sokololela bogosi kwa go Dafite morwa Jese." 
1Chronicles11:1 Foo Baiseraele botlhe ba phuthegela kwa go Dafite kwa Heberone, ba re: “Bona, re lesapo la gago le nama ya gago." 
1Chronicles11:2 E rile mo metlheng e e fetileng, e bong ka Saule a sa ntse a le kgosi, ya bo e le wena yo o bolotsang o ba o gorosa Baiseraele; mme Jehofa Modimo wa gago a go raya a re: ‘O tlaa otla batho ba me Baiseraele, o tlaa nna kgosana ya batho ba me Baiseraele.’ ”" 
1Chronicles11:3 Jalo bagolwane botlhe ba Iseraele ba ya kgosing kwa Heberone; mme Dafite a dira kgolagano nabo mo Heberone fa pele ga Jehofa; mme ba tlotsa Dafite, gore a nne kgosi ya Iseraele, ka fa lefokong la ga Jehofa ka Samuele." 
1Chronicles11:4 Dafite le Baiseraele botlhe ba ya Jerusalema (ke one Jebuse); mme Bajebuse, banni ba lefatshe, ba bo ba le gone." 
1Chronicles11:5 Banni ba Jebuse ba raya Dafite ba re: “Ga o ketla o tsena mono.” Le fa go ntse jalo Dafite a gapa kago e e thata ya phemelo ya Sione; ke one motse wa ga Dafite. 
1Chronicles11:6 Dafite a re: “Le fa e le mang yo o bolayang Bajebuse pele o tlaa nna mogolo le molaodi.” Joabe morwa Seruia a palama pele, a dirwa mogolo." 
1Chronicles11:7 Dafite a aga mo kagong e e thata ya phemelo; ke gone ka moo ba go bitsa ba re: Motse wa ga Dafite. 
1Chronicles11:8 A aga motse mo tikologong, go tswa Milo go ya fela tikologong. Joabe a tsosolosa motse ntlheng e e setseng." 
1Chronicles11:9 Dafite a nna a kokotlegelela pele fela; gonne Jehofa wa masomosome a na nae. 
1Chronicles11:10 Jaana ba ke bone bagolo ba diganka tse Dafite o ne a na natso, ba ba itshupileng bathata ntlheng ya gagwe mo bogosing jwa gagwe, ba na le Baiseraele botlhe, go tla ba mo dira kgosi, ka fa lefokong la ga Jehofa ka ga Baiseraele." 
1Chronicles11:11 E ke palo ya diganka tse Dafite o ne a na natso: Jašobeame, morwa motho mongwe wa Mohakemone, tlhogo ya ba bararo, o ne a ekela batho ba ba 300 a ba bolaya ka lerumo la gagwe, ka lobaka lo le longwe fela." 
1Chronicles11:12 Morago ga gagwe ga bo go le Eleasare, morwa Doto, wa Moahoha, yo e ne e le mongwe wa diganka tse tharo." 
1Chronicles11:13 Ene o ne a na le Dafite kwa Pasetamime, mme Bafilisitia ba ne ba phuthegetse tlhabano gone, kwa go ne go na le sebata teng se se emeng barele thata; mme batho ba bo ba tshaba fa pele ga Bafilisitia." 
1Chronicles11:14 Ba ema mo gare ga sebata seo, ba se tlhabanela, ba bolaya Bafilisitia; mme Jehofa a ba golola ka phenyo e kgolo." 
1Chronicles11:15 Batho ba le bararo mo bagolong ba ba 30 ba ya lefikeng kwa go Dafite, mo logageng lwa Atulame; mme ntwa ya Bafilisitia e ne e thibeletse mo molapong wa Refaime." 
1Chronicles11:16 Dafite a bo a le mo kagong ya phemelo, ka lobaka loo, mme setlhopha sa masole a Bafilisitia se le mo Bethelehema." 
1Chronicles11:17 Dafite a tlhologelelwa, a re: “Ke eletsa jang mongwe a ka nnosa metsi a sediba sa Bethelehema se se fa kgorong!”" 
1Chronicles11:18 Mme ba bararo ba thobeselela ntwa ya Bafilisitia, ba ga metsi mo sedibeng sa Bethelehema se se fa kgorong, ba a tsaya ba a isa kwa go Dafite; Dafite a gana go a nwa, a a tshololela Jehofa." 
1Chronicles11:19 A re: “A Modimo wa me o go nkiletse, gore ke se ka ka dira selo se; a ke tlaa nwa madi a banna ba, ba ba beileng botshelo jwa bone mo bothateng? Gonne ba a lerile ka go tsenya botshelo jwa bone mo bothateng.” Ke gone ka moo a gana go a nwa. Diganka tse tharo tseo tsa dira dilo tse." 
1Chronicles11:20 Abišai monnaa Joabe, e ne e le ene mogolo wa ba bararo gonne o na a ekela batho ba ba 300 lerumo la gagwe, a ba bolaya, mme a nna le leina mo go ba bararo." 
1Chronicles11:21 Mo go ba bararo o na a le tlotlego bogolo go ba babedi, mme a dirwa molaodi wa bone; le fa go ntse jalo ga a ka a fitlha mo borarong jwa ntlha." 
1Chronicles11:22 Benaia morwa Joiata, morwa monna mongwe wa seganka wa Kabeseele yo o ne a dirile ditiro tsa boganka, a bolaya bomorwa Ariele wa Moabe ba le babedi; le gone a ya a bolaya tau mo gare ga mokole mo lobakeng lwa kapoko." 
1Chronicles11:23 A bolaya motho mongwe wa Moegepeto, e le monna yo o godileng thata, yo o boleele bo mabogo matlhano. Moegepeto o ne a tshotse lerumo le le tshwanang le mosipuri wa monyedi; a ya kwa go ene a tshotse thobane fela, a ya a phamola lerumo mo seatleng sa Moegepeto a mmolaya ka lerumo la gagwe." 
1Chronicles11:24 Benaia morwa Joiata a dira dilo tse, a nna le leina mo digankeng tse tharo." 
1Chronicles11:25 Bonang, o ne a le tlotlego bogolo go ba ba 30, a se ka a fitlha mo borarong jwa ntlha; Dafite a mo dira molaodi wa mophato wa gagwe o o mo dibelang." 
1Chronicles11:26 Diganka tsa dintwa ke tse: Asahele monnaa Joabe, Elehanane morwa Doto wa Bethelehema;" 
1Chronicles11:27 Shamothe wa Moharore, Helese wa Mopelone;" 
1Chronicles11:28 Ire morwa Ikeše wa Motekowa, Abiesere wa Moanathothe;" 
1Chronicles11:29 Sibekai wa Mohušathe, Ilai wa Moahoha;" 
1Chronicles11:30 Maharai wa Monetofathe, Helete morwa Baana wa Monetofathe;" 
1Chronicles11:31 Ithai morwa Ribai wa Gibea wa bana ba Benjamine, Benaia wa Mopirathone;" 
1Chronicles11:32 Hurai wa melatswana ya Gaaše, Abiele wa Moarabathe;" 
1Chronicles11:33 Asemafethe wa Mobaharahume, Eliabe wa Mošaalabone;" 
1Chronicles11:34 bomorwa Hašeme wa Mogisone, Jonathane morwa Shage wa Moharara," 
1Chronicles11:35 Ahiame morwa Sakare wa Moharara, Eliafale morwa Ure;" 
1Chronicles11:36 Hefere wa Momekerathe, Ahija wa Mopelone;" 
1Chronicles11:37 Hesero wa Mokaremele, Naarai morwa Esebai;" 
1Chronicles11:38 Joele morwa rraagwe Nathane, Mibehare morwa Hageri;" 
1Chronicles11:38 Joele morwa rraagwe Nathane, Mibehare morwa Hageri;" 
1Chronicles11:39 Seleke wa Moamone, Naharai wa Moberothe motshola dibolao wa ga Joabe morwa Seruia;" 
1Chronicles11:40 Ira wa Moithere, Garebe wa Moithere;" 
1Chronicles11:41 Uria wa Mohite, Sabate morwa Ahalai;" 
1Chronicles11:42 Adine morwa Shise wa Morubene; mogolo mongwe mo go Barubene, a na le batho ba le 30;" 
1Chronicles11:43 Hanane morwa Maaka, le Jehošafate wa Momithene;" 
1Chronicles11:44 Usia wa Moašeterathe, Shame le Jeiele bomorwa Hothame wa Moaroere;" 
1Chronicles11:45 Jediaele morwa Shimeri le Jobe monnawe, wa Motise;" 
1Chronicles11:45 Jediaele morwa Shimeri le Jobe monnawe, wa Motise;" 
1Chronicles11:46 Eliele wa Momahafa, le Jeribai le Jošafa bomorwa Elenaame, le Ithema wa Momoabe," 
1Chronicles11:47 Eliele, le Obete, le Jaasiele wa Momesoba." 
1Chronicles12:1 Ba ke bone ba ba ileng kwa go Dafite kwa Sikelage, ka a sa ntse a iphitlhile ka ntlha ya ga Saule morwa Kiše; e le ba ba diganka, bathusi ba gagwe mo ntweng." 
1Chronicles12:2 Ba ne ba tlhometse mara, ba itse go konopa ka maje, le go hula metswi ka bora ka letsogo le legolo le ka la molema; e le ba bomorwa rraagwe Saule boo rra Benjamine." 
1Chronicles12:3 Yo mogolo e le Ahiesere, gape Joaše, bomorwa Shemaa wa Mogibeathe; le Jesiele, le Pelete bomorwa Asemafethe, le Beraka le Jehu wa Moanathothe," 
1Chronicles12:4 le Išemaia wa Mogibeone, seganka mo go ba ba 30, a le molaodi wa ba ba masome mararo; le Jeremia, Jahasiele, Johanane le Josabate wa Mogeterathe;" 
1Chronicles12:5 Elusai, Jerimothe, Bealia, Shemaria le Shefatia wa Moharufa;" 
1Chronicles12:6 Elekana le Isešia, Asarele, Joesere le Jašobeame, e le Bakora," 
1Chronicles12:7 le Joela le Sebadia bomorwa Jerohame wa Getore. 
1Chronicles12:7 le Joela le Sebadia bomorwa Jerohame wa Getore. 
1Chronicles12:8 Ba Bagate ga itomololela kwa go Dafite kwa kagong ya phemelo mo nageng, diganka tse di pelokgale, e le banna ba ba rutilweng ntwa, ba ba itseng go hema ka thebe le lerumo, ba difatlhogo tsa bone di ne di tshwana jaaka tsa ditau, ba le lobelo jaaka mafele mo dithabeng," 
1Chronicles12:9 yo mogolo e le Esere, wa bobedi Obadia, wa boraro Eliabe," 
1Chronicles12:10 wa bone Mišemana wa botlhano Jeremia," 
1Chronicles12:11 wa borataro Atai, wa bosupa Eliele," 
1Chronicles12:12 wa bo 8 Johanane, wa bo 9 Elesabate," 
1Chronicles12:13 wa lesome Jeremia, wa 11 Makebanai." 
1Chronicles12:14 Bao ba bana ba ga Gate e ne e le balaodi ba ntwa; yo mmotlana mo go bone a le kana ka batho ba le lekgolo, yo mogolo a le kana ka ba le sekete." 
1Chronicles12:15 Bao ke bone ba ba kgabagantseng noka ya Joretane ka kgwedi ya ntlha, noka e tletse letsitla; ba leleka batho botlhe ba melapo, ntlheng ya botlhabatsatsi, le ntlheng ya bophirimatsatsi." 
1Chronicles12:16 Ga tla bangwe ba bana ba Benjamine le ba Juta kwa go Dafite mo kagong ya phemelo. 
1Chronicles12:17 Mme Dafite a tswela go ba kgatlhantsha, a ba raya a re: “Fa lo tsile ka kagiso mo go nna go tlaa lo nthusa, pelo ya me e tlaa gokagana le lona; mme fa lo tsile go nkoka go ntsenya mo seatleng sa baba ba me, ka go se na tshiamololo mo diatleng tsa me, a Modimo wa borraetsho o go lebe o go kgalemele.”" 
1Chronicles12:18 Foo mowa wa tla mo go Amasai, yo e ne e le mogolo mo go ba ba 30, a re: “Re ba gago Dafite, re ntlheng ya gago wena morwa Jese; kagiso, kagiso e nne le wena, kagiso e nne le bathusi ba gago; gonne Modimo wa gago o a go thusa.” Foo Dafite a ba amogela, a ba dira balaodi ba lesomo." 
1Chronicles12:19 Mo go ba Manase le bone ga wela bangwe kwa go Dafite, jale ka a tla le Bafilisitia, ba tla go tlhabana le Saule, mme ba se ka ba ba thusa; gonne e rile barena ba Bafilisitia ba sena go gakololana ba mo naya tsela, ba re: “O tlaa wela kwa go Saule mong wa gagwe, ditlhogo tsa rona di ka tla tsa nna mo bothateng.”" 
1Chronicles12:20 Ya re a ya kwa Sikelage, ga wela kwa go ene boo rra Manase, e bong Atena, le Josabate, le Jediaele, le Mikaele, le Josabate, le Elihu le Silethai, balaodi ba makgolokgolo a boora Manase." 
1Chronicles12:21 Ba thusa Dafite go tlhabana le lesomo la manokwane; gonne botlhe e le diganka tse di pelokgale, e bile e le balaodi ba ntwa." 
1Chronicles12:22 Gonne ga nna ga tla batho kwa go Dafite ka malatsi otlhe go tla go mo thusa, ga tsamaya ya nna ntwa e e lesomosomo le legolo, jaaka lesomosomo la Modimo." 
1Chronicles12:23 E ke yone palo ya ditlhogo tsa bone ba ba neng ba tlohomeletse ntwa, ba ba tsileng kwa go Dafite, kwa Heberone, go pitikololela bogosi jwa ga Saule kwa go Dafite, ka fa lefokong la ga Jehofa." 
1Chronicles12:24 Bana ba Juta ba ba itseng go tshola thebe le lerumo ba le 6 800, ba ba tlhomeletseng ntwa." 
1Chronicles12:25 Ba bana ba Simeone, diganka tse di pelokgale tsa ntwa, go no go le ba le 7 100." 
1Chronicles12:26 Ba bana ba Lefi 4 600. 
1Chronicles12:27 Joiata e ne e le moeteledipele wa ba ntlo ya ga Arone, a na le batho ba le 3 700." 
1Chronicles12:28 Le Satoke, lekau le le seganka se se pelokgale, a na le ba ntlo ya ga rraagwe, ba le balaodi ba le 22." 
1Chronicles12:29 Ba bana ba Benjamine, bomorwa rraagwe Saule, ba ne ba le 3 000, gonne go tla mo lobakeng loo, bontsi jwa bone ba bo ba ntse ba ngaparetse ntlo ya ga Saule." 
1Chronicles12:30 Le ba bana ba Eferaime ba le 20 800, diganka tse di pelokgale, banna ba ba itsegeng mo makgotleng a borraabo." 
1Chronicles12:31 Ba ntlhanngwe ya lotso lwa Manase ba le 18 000, ba ba neng ba kaiwa ka leina, gore ba tle go dira Dafite kgosi." 
1Chronicles12:32 Mme ga bana ba Isakare, batho ba ba nang le tlhaloganyo ya metlha, go itse se Baiseraele ba tshwanetseng go se dira; ditlhogo tsa bone di le 200; bana ba borraabo botlhe ba le mo taolong ya bone." 
1Chronicles12:33 Ba Sebulone ba ba nonofileng go bolola ntwa, ba ba nonofileng go rulaganya ntwa, ba na le dilo dingwe le dingwe tsa ntwa, ba bo ba le 50 000; e le ba ba nonofileng go aba ntwa, ba se pelo e e akabalang." 
1Chronicles12:34 Le ba Nafetali go no go le balaodi ba le 1 000, ba na le batho ba le 37 000, ba ba tshotseng thebe le lerumo." 
1Chronicles12:35 Le boo rra Dane ba ba nonofileng go aba ntwa, batho ba le 28 600." 
1Chronicles12:36 Le Baašere ba ba nonofileng go ya le ntwa, ba nonofile go aba ntwa, ba le 40 000." 
1Chronicles12:37 Kwa moseja ga Joretane boora Rubene, le boo rra Gate, le ba ntlhanngwe ya lotso lwa Manase, ba na le dilo dingwe le dingwe tsa ntwa tsa go tlhabana, ba bo ba le 120 000." 
1Chronicles12:38 Banna ba, e le banna ba ntwa, ba ba nonofileng go aba ntwa, ba tla ka pelo e e itekanetseng kwa Heberone, go dira Dafite kgosi ya Baiseraele botlhe; le botlhe ba ba setseng ba Iseraele, ba le pelo nngwe fela ya go dira Dafite kgosi." 
1Chronicles12:39 Mme ba nna gone le Dafite ka malatsi a le mararo, ba ja ba nwa; gonne ba ga bone ba ne ba ba etleeleditse." 
1Chronicles12:40 Gape le ba ba gaufi nabo, e bong go ya go fitlha kwa goora Isakare, le kwa goo rra Sebulone, le kwa goo rra Nafetali, ba tla ba belesitse dijo ka diesele, le ka dikamela, le ka dimmoulo le ka dikgomo; dijo tsa boupe, le mengoloi ya difeige, le marose a ditshwabi tsa mefine, le bojalwa jwa mofine, le lookwane, le dikgomo le dinku ka letlotlo; gonne go no go na le boitumelo mo Iseraele." 
1Chronicles13:1 Dafite a gakololana le balaodi ba dikete, le ba makgolo, e bong le mogogi mongwe le mongwe." 
1Chronicles13:2 Dafite a raya phuthego yotlhe ya Iseraele a re: “Fa go le molemo mo matlhong a lona, mme fa e le mo go tswang mo go Jehofa Modimo wa rona, a re romeng batho ba ye le lefatshe lotlhe, ba ye gongwe le gongwe kwa go ba ga rona ba ba setseng mo lefatsheng lotlhe la Iseraele, ba baperesiti le Balefi ba nang nabo mo metseng ya bone e e nang le dintlhana, gore ba phuthegele kwano go rona." 
1Chronicles13:3 A re busetseng letlole la Modimo wa rona kwa go rona, gonne ga re a ka ra botsa kwa go lone mo metlheng ya ga Saule.”" 
1Chronicles13:4 Mme phuthego yotlhe ya re e tlaa dira jalo, gonne selo seo se ne se siame mo matlhong a batho botlhe." 
1Chronicles13:5 Jalo Dafite a phutha Baiseraele botlhe, go tswa Shihore molatswana wa Egepeto, go ya fela kwa botsenong jwa Hamathe, gore ba tle go tsaya letlole la Modimo kwa Kiriathe-jearime." 
1Chronicles13:6 Dafite a tlhatloga, le Baiseraele botlhe, ba ya kwa Baale, ke go re kwa Kiriathe-jearime, o e leng wa Juta, ba ya go tsaya gone letlole la Modimo, Jehofa yo o dutseng mo ditšherubeng, yo o bidiwang ka le e leng Leina." 
1Chronicles13:7 Mme ba tshola letlole la Modimo ka kara e ntšha, ba e ntsha mo ntlong ya ga Abinatabe, mme Use le Ahio ba kgweetsa kara." 
1Chronicles13:8 Dafite le Baiseraele botlhe ba letsa fa pele ga Modimo ka thata yotlhe ya bone, e bong ka dipina, le ka diharepe, le ka disaletere, le ka meropana, le ka disemebala le ka dinaka." 
1Chronicles13:9 Ya re ba tla fa seboping sa pholelo sa ga Kitone, Use a ntsha letsogo, a re o tshwara letlole; gonne dikgomo di ne tsa kgokgweetsega." 
1Chronicles13:10 Bogale jwa ga Jehofa jwa tukela Use, mme a mo itaya, ka a ntsheditse letlole letsogo, a swela gone fa pele ga Modimo."
