1Chronicles13:11 Dafite a itumologa ka Jehofa a tshoganyeditse Use, leina la felo foo la bidiwa ga twe Peresusa, nako e sa le eno." 
1Chronicles13:12 Dafite a boifa Modimo ka tsatsi leo, a re: “Ana ke tlaa isa jang letlole la Modimo kwa go nna kwa gae?”" 
1Chronicles13:13 Dafite a se ka a hudusetsa letlole kwa go ene kwa motseng wa ga Dafite, mme a le isa fa thoko mo ntlong ya ga Obete-etome wa Mohite." 
1Chronicles13:14 Letlole la Modimo la nna le ba ntlo ya ga Obete-etome mo ntlong ya gagwe ka dikgwedi di le tharo. Jehofa a segofatsa ntlo ya ga Obete-etome le tsotlhe tse o ne a na natso. 
1Chronicles14:1 Hirame kgosi ya Ture a roma batho kwa go Dafite ba na le ditlhare tsa masetara le baagi le babetli ba dikgong, ba tla go mo agela ntlo." 
1Chronicles14:2 Dafite a lemoga fa Jehofa a mo tlhomamisitse kgosi ya Iseraele, gonne bogosi jwa gagwe bo no bo goleditswe godimo, ka ntlha ya batho ba gagwe Baiseraele." 
1Chronicles14:3 Dafite a fela a tsaya basadi ba bangwe mo Jerusalema, Dafite a fela a tshola bana ba basimane le ba basetsana." 
1Chronicles14:4 A ke maina a bana ba o ba bonyeng mo Jerusaleme: Shamue, Shobabe, Nathane le Solomone;" 
1Chronicles14:5 le Ibehare le Elišua le Elepelete; 
1Chronicles14:6 le Noga le Nefege le Jafie," 
1Chronicles14:7 le Elišame le Beeliate le Elifelete. 
1Chronicles14:8 E rile Bafilisitia ba utlwa fa Dafite a tloditswe, gore a nne kgosi ya Baiseraele botlhe fela, Bafilisitia botlhe ba ya go senka Dafite; mme Dafite a go utlwela, mme a ba bololela." 
1Chronicles14:9 Jaana Bafilisitia ba ne ba tsile bonokwane mo molapong wa Refaime. 
1Chronicles14:10 Dafite a botsa mo Modimong, a re: “A ke ke bololele Bafilisitia? Mme a o tlaa ba ntsenya mo seatleng?” Jehofa a mo raya a re: “Bolola; gonne ke tlaa ba go tsenya mo seatleng.”" 
1Chronicles14:11 Jalo ba tlhatlogela kwa Baale-perasime, Dafite a ba kgemetha gone; mme Dafite a re: “Modimo o thubakile baba ba me ka letsogo la me, jaaka go thobega ga metsi.” Ke gone ka moo ba reileng felo foo leina ba re, Baale-perasime." 
1Chronicles14:12 Mme ba tlogela medimo ya bone gone, mme Dafite a laola gore e fisiwe ka molelo." 
1Chronicles14:13 Bafilisitia ba tla ka bonokwane gape mo molapong. 
1Chronicles14:14 Dafite a botsa mo Modimong gape; mme Modimo wa mo raya wa re: “O se ka wa ba sala morago; ba fapoge, o itse go ba wela bolebagana le ditlhare tsa malubere." 
1Chronicles14:15 Go tlaa dirala go re fa o utlwa ekete modumo wa ba ba tsamaelang gongwe mo dikaleng tsa ditlhare tsa malubere, foo o tswele go tlhabana; gonne Modimo o ile kwa pele ga gago go ya go kgemetha ntwa ya Bafilisitia.”" 
1Chronicles14:16 Mme Dafite a dira jaaka Modimo o mo laotse, mme ba kgemetha ntwa ya Bafilisitia go tswa Gibeone go ya fela kwa Gesere." 
1Chronicles14:17 Tumedi ya ga Dafite ya tswela kwa mafatsheng otlhe; mme Jehofa a tsenya poifo ya gagwe mo merafeng yotlhe fela. 
1Chronicles15:1 Dafite a itirela mantlo mo motseng wa ga Dafite; a baakanyetsa letlole la Modimo felo, mme a le tlhomela mogope." 
1Chronicles15:2 Foo Dafite a re: “Letlole la Modimo ga le a tshwanela go rwalwa ke ope fa e se ke Balefi fela, gonne ke bone ba Jehofa o ba itshenketseng go tla ba rwala letlole la Modimo, le go mo direla ka bosakhutleng.”" 
1Chronicles15:3 Mme Dafite a phuthela Baiseraele botlhe kwa Jerusalema, gore go leriwe letlole la ga Jehofa mo felong ga lone, fa o ne a go le baakanyeditse." 
1Chronicles15:4 Dafite a phutha bomorwa Arone, le Balefi." 
1Chronicles15:5 Ba bomorwa Kohathe: Uriele e le yo mogolo, le bana ba ga rraagwe ba le 120;" 
1Chronicles15:6 ba bomorwa Merari: Asaia e le yo mogolo, le bana ba ga rraagwe ba le 220;" 
1Chronicles15:7 ba bomorwa Gerešome: Joele e le yo mogolo le bana ba ga rraagwe ba le 130; 
1Chronicles15:7 ba bomorwa Gerešome: Joele e le yo mogolo le bana ba ga rraagwe ba le 130; 
1Chronicles15:8 ba bomorwa Elisafane; Shemaia e le yo mogolo, le bana ba ga rraagwe, ba le 200;" 
1Chronicles15:9 ba bomorwa Heberone: Eliele e le yo mogolo, le bana ba ga rraagwe, ba le 80;" 
1Chronicles15:10 ba bomorwa Usiele: Aminatabe a le yo mogolo, le bana ba ga rraagwe, ba le 112." 
1Chronicles15:11 Dafite a bitsa baperesiti Satoke le Abiathare, le Balefi, e bong Uriele, le Asaia le Joele, Shemaia, Eliele le Aminatabe." 
1Chronicles15:11 Dafite a bitsa baperesiti Satoke le Abiathare, le Balefi, e bong Uriele, le Asaia le Joele, Shemaia, Eliele le Aminatabe." 
1Chronicles15:12 Mme a ba raya a re: “Ke lona ditlhogo tsa matlo a borara ba Balefi; iitshepiseng lona le bana ba rraa lona gore lo tle lo ise letlole la ga Jehofa Modimo wa Iseraele, kwa felong fa ke go le baakanyeditseng." 
1Chronicles15:13 Gonne e re ka lo se ka lwa le rwala pele, Jehofa Modimo wa rona o ne a re phomegelela, gonne ga re a ka ra mmatla ka fa molaong.”" 
1Chronicles15:14 Jalo baperesiti le Balefi ba iitshepisa go tla ba isa letlole la ga Jehofa Modimo wa Iseraele. 
1Chronicles15:15 Mme bana ba Balefi ba sikara letlole la Modimo mo maruding a bone, disikaro di le mo go lone, jaaka Moše a laotse ka fa lefokong la ga Jehofa." 
1Chronicles15:16 Dafite a bua le bagolo ba Balefi, gore ba tlhome bana ba ga rraabo go nna baopedi, ba na le diletso tsa kopelo, disaletere, le diharepe le disemebala, ba dira modumo o mogolo, gore ba tsholetse mantswe ka boitumelo." 
1Chronicles15:17 Jalo Balefi ba tlhoma Hemane morwa Joele; le ba bana ba ga rraagwe, Asafe morwa Berekia; le ba bomorwa Merari bana ba ga rraabo, ba tlhoma Ethane morwa Kušaia;" 
1Chronicles15:17 Jalo Balefi ba tlhoma Hemane morwa Joele; le ba bana ba ga rraagwe, Asafe morwa Berekia; le ba bomorwa Merari bana ba ga rraabo, ba tlhoma Ethane morwa Kušaia;" 
1Chronicles15:18 ba tlhoma nabo bomorwa rraabone ba thulagano ya bobedi, e bong Sekaria, Bene, le Jaasiele, le Shemi-ramothe, le Jehiele, le Uni, le Eliabe, le Benaia, le Maaseia, le Matithia, le Elifelehu, le Mikeneia, le Obete-etome le Jeiele, balebedi ba mejako." 
1Chronicles15:19 Jalo baopedi, Hemane le Asafe le Ethane ba tlhongwa, ba na le disemebala tsa kgotlho tsa go dira modumo o mogolo;" 
1Chronicles15:20 le Sekaria, le Asiele, le Shemi-ramothe, le Jehiele, le Uni, le Eliabe, le Maaseia le Benaia, ba na le disaletere tse di laeletsweng Alamothe; (ke gore Basetsana);" 
1Chronicles15:21 le Matithia, Elifelehu, le Mikeneia, le Obete-etome, le Jeiele le Asasia, ba na le diharepe tse di laeletsweng Sheminithe, (ekete ke gore, Mantswe a banna) go tla ba tlhabeletsa." 
1Chronicles15:22 Kenania, mogolo wa Balefi, o ne a laola kopelo, a ba ruta ka ga kopelo ka a le setswerere." 
1Chronicles15:23 Berekia le Elekana ya bo e le balebedi ba mojako ba letlole. 
1Chronicles15:24 Shebania le Jošafate, le Nathanele, le Amasai, le Sekaria, le Benaia le Eliesere e le baperesiti, ba letsa dinaka fa pele ga letlole la Modimo. Obete-etome le Jehia e ne e le balebedi ba mojako ba letlole." 
1Chronicles15:25 Jalo Dafite le bagolwane ba Iseraele, le balaodi ba dikete, ba ya go ntsha letlole la kgolagano ya ga Jehofa kwa ntlong ya ga Obete-etome ka boitumelo." 
1Chronicles15:26 Ga dirala, ya re Modimo o thusa Balefi ba ba rweleng letlole la kgolagano ya ga Jehofa, ba isa ditlhabelo, e bong dikgomo di supa le diphelefu di supa." 
1Chronicles15:27 Dafite o ne a apere kobo ya leloba le le boleta, le Balefi botlhe ba ba rweleng letlole, le baopedi, le Kenania mong wa kopelo a bile a na le baopedi; Dafite a apere sekhutlana sa leloba." 
1Chronicles15:28 Jalo Baiseraele botlhe ba tsaya letlole la kgolagano ya ga Jehofa ka go thela lošalaba, le ka modumo wa lofare, le ka dinaka le disemebala, ba tsosa modumo o mogolo ka disaletere le diharepe." 
1Chronicles15:29 Ga dirala ya re letlole la kgolagano ya ga Jehofa le tla mo motseng wa ga Dafite, Mikale morwadia Saule a bo a lebile ka fensetere, a bona kgosi Dafite a bina a letsa, mme a mo nyatsa mo pelong ya gagwe." 
1Chronicles16:1 Ba gorosa letlole la kgolagano ya Modimo, ba le baya mo gare ga mogope o Dafite o o le tlhometseng; ba isa ditshupelo tse di fisiwang, le ditshupelo tsa kagiso fa pele ga Modimo." 
1Chronicles16:2 E rile Dafite a sena go wetsa go isa tshupelo e e fisiwang, le ditshupelo tsa kagiso, a segofatsa batho ka leina la ga Jehofa." 
1Chronicles16:3 A abela mongwe le mongwe wa Baiseraele, monna le mosadi, mongwe le mongwe kgolokwe ya senkgwe, le sebeka sa nama, le mongoloi wa ditshwabi tsa mefine." 
1Chronicles16:4 A tlhoma bangwe ba Balefi, gore ba direle fa pele ga letlole la ga Jehofa, le go tumisa, le go leboga, le go baka Jehofa Modimo wa Iseraele." 
1Chronicles16:5 Asafe e le yo mogolo, wa bobedi mo go ene e le Sekaria, Jeiele, le Shemi-ramothe, le Jehiele, le Matithia, le Eliabe, le Benaia, le Obete-etome le Jeiele, ba na le disaletere le diharepe; mme Asafe a tsosa modumo o mogolo ka disemebala;" 
1Chronicles16:6 Benaia le Jahasiele ba baperesiti ba letsa dinaka ka metlha yotlhe fa pele ga letlole la kgolagano ya Modimo. 
1Chronicles16:7 Ke gone ka tsatsi leo Dafite a simolola sa ntlha go laola gore go bakwe Jehofa ka Asafe le bana ba ga rraagwe. A re: 
1Chronicles16:8 “A ko lo ntshetseng Jehofa malebogo, bitsang leina la gagwe madiro a gagwe lo a itsefatse mo ditšhabeng." 
1Chronicles16:9 Mo opeleleng, mo opeleleng dipako, buang ka ga ditiro tsotlhe tsa gagwe tse di gakgamatsang." 
1Chronicles16:10 Kgantshang ka leina la gagwe le le itshepileng; a dipelo tsa bone ba ba batlang Jehofa di itumele. 
1Chronicles16:11 Batlang Jehofa le thata ya gagwe; batlang sefatlhogo sa gagwe ka bosakhutleng. 
1Chronicles16:12 Gakologelwang ditiro tsa gagwe tse di gakgamatsang, tse o di dirileng; dikgakgamatso tsa gagwe, le dikatlholo tsa molomo wa gagwe;" 
1Chronicles16:13 lona losika lwa ga Iseraele motlhanka wa gagwe, lona bana ba ga Jakoba, baitshenkedwi ba gagwe." 
1Chronicles16:14 Ke ene Jehofa Modimo wa rona; dikatlholo tsa gagwe di mo lefatsheng lotlhe. 
1Chronicles16:15 Gakologelwang kgolagano ya gagwe ka bosakhutleng, e bong lefoko le o le laoletseng dikokomana di le makgolo a some;" 
1Chronicles16:16 e bong kgolagano e o ne a e dira le Aberahame, le ikano ya gagwe le Isake." 
1Chronicles16:17 Ikano eo o bile a e tlhomamisetsa Jakobe, gore e nne molao o o emeng, gape le Iseraele, gore e nne kgolagano e e sa khutleng," 
1Chronicles16:18 ka a re: ‘Lefatshe la Kanana ke tlaa le naya wena, go nna kabelo ya boswa jwa lona;’" 
1Chronicles16:19 jale ka lo le batho ba se kae mo palong, ee, lo le ba se kaenyana, e bile lo le bajaki fela mo go lone." 
1Chronicles16:20 Ba kgarakgatshega ka go nna ba tlhomaganya merafe fela, ba tswe bogosing jo bongwe ba ye tšhabeng e nngwe." 
1Chronicles16:21 Ga a ka a leseletsa motho ope go ba direla tshiamololo; ee, o ne a kgalemela dikgosi ka ntlha ya bone;" 
1Chronicles16:22 A re: ‘Se ameng batlodiwa ba me, lo se ka lwa utlwisa baperofeti ba me botlhoko bope.’" 
1Chronicles16:23 Lefatshe lotlhe opelela Jehofa! Bonatsa poloka ya gagwe ka go tlhomaganya malatsi. 
1Chronicles16:24 Kakanyang kgalalelo ya gagwe mo gare ga merafe, ditiro tsa gagwe tse di gakgamatsang mo gare ga ditšhaba tsotlhe!" 
1Chronicles16:25 Gonne Jehofa o mogolo, o na le go bakwa segolo, le gone o na le go boifiwa bogolo go medimo yotlhe." 
1Chronicles16:26 Gonne medimo yotlhe ya ditšhaba ke dilo fela, ene Jehofa o dirile magodimo." 
1Chronicles16:27 Tlotlo e fa pele ga gagwe, le borena, thata le boitumelo di mo felong ga gagwe." 
1Chronicles16:28 Ntshetsang Jehofa lona ditshika tsa ditšhaba, ntshetsang Jehofa kgalalelo le thata!" 
1Chronicles16:29 Ntshetsang Jehofa kgalalelo e e tshwanetseng leina la gagwe; lereng tshupelo, lo tle fa pele ga gagwe! Obamelang Jehofa mo bontleng jwa boitshepo." 
1Chronicles16:30 Lefatshe lotlhe a le rorome fa pele ga gagwe; lobopo le lone lo nitame, ga lo kake lwa tsikinngwa." 
1Chronicles16:31 A magodimo a itumele, a lefatshe le ipele; a go buiwe mo merafeng go twe: ‘Jehofa o a busa!’" 
1Chronicles16:32 A lewatle le sume, le bojotlhe jwa lone, a naga e belafale, le tsotlhe tse di mo go lone!" 
1Chronicles16:33 Foo ditlhare tsa sekgwa di tlaa opela ka boitumelo fa pele ga Jehofa, gonne o tla go atlhola lefatshe." 
1Chronicles16:34 A ko lo ntshetseng Jehofa malebogo; gonne o molemo; gonne boutlwelo botlhoko jwa gagwe bo eme ka bosakhutleng. 
1Chronicles16:35 Lo bue lo re: ‘Re boloke Jehofa wa poloko ya rona, o bo o re phuthe o re golole mo merafeng, gore re tle go baka leina la gago le le itshepileng, le go ja koma mo pakong ya gago.’" 
1Chronicles16:36 A go bakwe Jehofa Modimo wa Iseraele, go tswa bosasimologeng go ya fela bosakhutleng.” Mme batho botlhe ba re: “Amen!” Mme ba baka Jehofa." 
1Chronicles16:37 Jalo a tlogela Asafe le bana ba ga rraagwe gone fa pele ga letlole la kgolagano ya ga Jehofa, go tla ba direla fa pele ga letlole ka metlha yotlhe, jaaka tiro ya letsatsi lengwe le lengwe e lopa;" 
1Chronicles16:38 le boObete-etome le bana ba ga rraagwe, batho ba le 68, le Obete-etome morwa Jeduthune le Hosa, ba bile ba le balebedi ba mojako." 
1Chronicles16:39 Mme Satoke moperesiti le bana ba ga rraagwe ba baperesiti, ba le fa pele ga motlaagana wa ga Jehofa mo felong fa go tlotlometseng mo go mo Gibeone," 
1Chronicles16:40 go tla ba isetsa Jehofa ditshupelo tse di fisiwang mo sebesong sa tshupelo e e fisiwang ka metlha yotlhe, ka moso le maitsebowa, e bong jaaka tsotlhe tse di kwadilweng mo molaong wa ga Jehofa, o o o laoletseng Baiseraele." 
1Chronicles16:41 Mme ba bo ba na le Hemane le Jeduthune, le ba bangwe ba ba itshenketsweng, ba ba badilweng ka maina go tla ba baka Jehofa ka gobo boutlwelo botlhoko jwa gagwe bo eme ka bosakhutleng." 
1Chronicles16:42 Mme Hemane le Jeduthune ba bo ba na nabo, ba na le dinaka le disemebala, ba di tsholetse bone ba ba tlaa bong ba dumisetsa godimo, ba bile ba na le diletso tsa dikopelo tsa Modimo. Bomorwa Jeduthune ba bo ba laotswe go nna fa kgorong." 
1Chronicles16:43 Batho botlhe ba tsamaya, mongwe le mongwe a ya kwa ga gagwe, mme Dafite a boa a ya go segofatsa ntlo ya gagwe." 
1Chronicles17:1 Ga dirala e rile Dafite a agile mo ntlong ya gagwe, Dafite a raya Nathane moperofeti a re: “Bona, ke ntse mo ntlong ya masetara fa letlole la kgolagano ya ga Jehofa le ntse fa tlase ga dilepelelo tsa matsela fela.”" 
1Chronicles17:2 Nathane a raya Dafite a re: “Dira tsotlhe tse di mo pelong ya gago, gonne Modimo o na nao.”" 
1Chronicles17:3 Ga dirala ya re bosigo joo, lefoko la Modimo la tla kwa go Nathane, la re:" 
1Chronicles17:4 “Ya o reye Dafite motlhanka wa me, o re: Jehofa o bua jaana, a re: ‘Ga o ketla o nkagela ntlo ya go nna mo go yone;" 
1Chronicles17:5 gonne ke sa le ka ke ntsha Baiseraele mo Egepeto le gompieno ga ke ise nke ke nne mo ntlong; ke ntse ka tswa mo mogopeng mongwe ka ya mo mogopeng o mongwe, le mo motlaaganeng mongwe ka ya mo go o mongwe." 
1Chronicles17:6 Mo mafelong otlhe a ke ntseng ka tsamaya le Baiseraele botlhe gone, a nkile ka bua lefoko le baatlhodi bangwe ba Iseraele, ba ke ba laotseng gore ba otle batho ba me, a nkile ka re: Ana ke ka ntlha yang fa lo sa nkagela ntlo ya masetara?’" 
1Chronicles17:7 “Jaana o tlaa raya motlhanka wa me Dafite, o re: Jehofa wa masomosomo o bua jaana, a re: ‘Ka go tsaya kwa lesakaneng la dinku, mo go saleng dinku morago, gore o nne kgosana ya batho ba me Baiseraele." 
1Chronicles17:8 Ke ntse ke na nao kwa le kwa o ntseng wa ya gone, ke kgaotse baba botlhe ba gago fa pele ga gago; mme ke tlaa go direla leina le le tshwanang le leina la bagodi ba ba mo lefatsheng." 
1Chronicles17:9 Ke tlaa laolela batho ba me Baiseraele felo, mme ke tlaa ba tlhoma, gore ba age mo felong ga bone, ba sa tlhole ba hudusiwa; le gone bana ba boikepo ga ba ketla ba tlhola ba ba kgakgabatsa jaaka pele;" 
1Chronicles17:10 le jaaka go simolola ka tsatsi le ke laoletseng Baiseraele, batho ba me, baatlhodi ka lone; ke tlaa kokobetsa baba botlhe ba gago. Gape ke go bolelela fa Jehofa a tlaa go agela motse." 
1Chronicles17:11 Go tlaa dirala, go re e tlaa re motlha wa gago o fitlhile wa go ya go nna le borraago, ke tlaa emisa losika lwa gago morago ga gago, lo e tlaa nnang lwa bomorwao; mme ke tlaa tlhomamisa bogosi jwa gagwe." 
1Chronicles17:12 Ene o tlaa nkagela ntlo, mme ke tlaa tlhomamisa setulo sa gagwe sa bogosi ka bosakhutleng." 
1Chronicles17:13 Ke tlaa nna rraagwe, ene o tlaa nna morwaake; ga nketla ke mo tlosetsa boutlwelo botlhoko jwa me, jaaka ke bo tloseditse ene yo o ne a le pele ga gago." 
1Chronicles17:14 Mme ke tlaa mo ritibatsa mo ntlong ya me, le mo bogosing jwa me ka bosakhutleng; mme setilo sa bogosi sa gagwe se tlaa tlhomama ka bosakhutleng.’ ”" 
1Chronicles17:15 Nathane a bua le Dafite jalo, ka fa mafokong a otlhe, le ka fa ponatshegelong e yotlhe fela." 
1Chronicles17:16 Foo kgosi Dafite a tsena, a dula fa pele ga Jehofa, a re: “Ke a bo ke le mang, Modimo, le ntlo ya me ke eng, fa e bo ne ne o ntsamaisitse ka tla fa?" 
1Chronicles17:17 Seo, e ne e le se sebotlana mo matlhong a gago Modimo; o buile ka ga ntlo ya motlhanka wa gago ka ga lobaka lo loleele lo lo tlang, o nkaile ka boemo jwa motho yo motona, e le wena, Jehofa Modimo." 
1Chronicles17:18 Ana Dafite o ka fela a go raya a reng ka ga tlotlo e e direlwang motlhanka wa gago? Gonne o a mo itse motlhanka wa gago. 
1Chronicles17:19 Jehofa, o dirile bogolo jotlhe jo, ka ntlha ya motlhanka wa gago, e le ka fa pelong ya gago, go tla o itsise batho dilo tse dikgolo tsotlhe tse." 
1Chronicles17:20 Jehofa, ga go na ope yo o tshwanang nao, le gone ga go na Modimo ope kwa ntle ga gago, ka fa go tsotlhe tse re di utlwileng ka ditsebe tsa rona." 
1Chronicles17:21 Go na le morafe ofe mo lefatsheng o o tshwanang le batho ba gago Iseraele, ba Modimo o ne wa ya go ba ithekololela, gore ba nne sešaba, go tla o itirela leina ka dilo tse dikgolo le tse di boitshegang, ka go leleka merafe fa pele ga batho ba gago, ba o ne wa ba rekolola kwa Egepeto?" 
1Chronicles17:22 Gonne batho ba gago Baiseraele o ne wa ba dira batho ba gago ka bosakhutleng; wena Jehofa o tsile wa nna Modimo wa bone. 
1Chronicles17:23 “Jaana Jehofa, a lefoko le o le buileng ka ga motlhanka wa gago, le ka ga ntlo ya gagwe, le tlhomamisiwe ka bosakhutleng, mme o dire jaaka o buile." 
1Chronicles17:24 A leina la gago le tlhomamisiwe, le godisiwe ka bosakhutleng, go re: Jehofa wa masomosomo ke Modimo wa Iseraele, Modimo mo go Iseraele ruri, le gore ntlo ya ga Dafite motlhanka wa gago e tlhomame fa pele ga gago." 
1Chronicles17:25 Gonne wena Modimo wa me, o senoletse motlhanka wa gago go re o tlaa mo agela motse; ke gone ka moo motlhanka wa gago o ikutlwile mo pelong ya gagwe go rata go rapela fa pele ga gago." 
1Chronicles17:26 Jaana Jehofa, o Modimo, o solofeditse motlhanka wa gago selo se:" 
1Chronicles17:27 Jaana go go kgatlhile go segofatsa ntlo ya motlhanka wa gago, gore e tlhomame ka bosakhutleng fa pele ga gago, gonne wena, Jehofa, o segofaditse, mme e segofetse ka bosakhutleng.”" 
1Chronicles18:1 Morago ga moo ga dirala, go re Dafite a kgemetha Bafilisitia, a ba kokobetsa, a gapa Gathe le metse ya gone mo seatleng sa Bafilisitia." 
1Chronicles18:2 A kgemetha Bamoabe, mme Bamoabe ba nna batlhanka ba ga Dafite, mme ba lere dineo." 
1Chronicles18:3 Dafite a kgemetha Hatatesere kgosi ya Soba a ya Hamathe a ya go tlhoma bogosi jwa gagwe kwa nokeng ya Euferatese. 
1Chronicles18:4 Dafite a mo gapela dikara tsa tlhabano di le 1 000, bapalami ba dipitse ba le 7 000 le batho ba dinao ba le 20 000 mme dipitse tsotlhe tsa dikara Dafite a di kgaola mesifa, a sia tsa dikara di le 100." 
1Chronicles18:5 E rile Basiria ba Damaseko ba tla go thusa Hatatesere kgosi ya Soba, Dafite a kgemetha Basiria banna ba le 22 000." 
1Chronicles18:6 Foo Dafite a tlhoma ditlhopha tsa masole mo Siria wa Damaseko; mme Basiria ba nna batlhanka ba ga Dafite, mme ba lere dineo. Jehofa a naya Dafite phenyo kwa le kwa o ne a ya gone." 
1Chronicles18:7 Dafite a gapa dithebe tsa gouta tse di mo batlhankeng ba ga Hatatesere, a di isa Jerusalema." 
1Chronicles18:8 Mo Tibehathe le mo Kune, metse ya ga Hatatesere, Dafite a tsaya kgotlho e le kgolo thata, e Solomone o tlogileng a dira ka yone lewatle la kgotlho le maotwana le dilwana tsa kgotlho." 
1Chronicles18:9 E rile Tou kgosi ya Hamathe a utlwa fa Dafite a kgemethile ntwa yotlhe ya ga Hatatesere kgosi ya Soba," 
1Chronicles18:10 a roma Hatorame morwawe kwa go kgosi Dafite, a ya go mo dumedisa, le go mo segofatsa, ka a tlhabanye le Hatatesere mme a mo kgemethile; gonne Hatatesere o ne a ntse a tlhabana le Tou; o ne a tshotse dilwana dingwe le dingwe tsa gouta le tsa selefera le tsa kgotlho." 
1Chronicles18:11 Tseo le tsone kgosi Dafite a di tshwaela Jehofa, le selefera le gouta tse o di tsereng mo merafeng yotlhe; mo go Baetome, le mo go Bamoabe, le mo baneng ba Amone, le mo go Bafilisitia, le mo go Baamaleke." 
1Chronicles18:12 Gape Abišai morwa Seruia a kgemetha Baetome ba le 18 000 mo Molapong wa Letswai. 
1Chronicles18:13 Mme a baya ditlhopha tsa masole mo Etome; Baetome botlhe ba nna batlhanka ba ga Dafite. Mme Jehofa a naya Dafite phenyo kwa le kwa o ne a ya gone. 
1Chronicles18:14 Dafite a busa Baiseraele botlhe; a direla batho botlhe ba gagwe katlholo le tshiamiso. 
1Chronicles18:15 Le Joabe morwa Seruia e ne e le molaodi wa ntwa; le Jehošafate morwa Ahilute e le mokwadi wa ditirafalo. 
1Chronicles18:16 Le Satoke morwa Ahitube, le Abimeleke morwa Abiathare e le baperesiti; le Shafeše e ne e le mokwaledi;" 
1Chronicles18:17 le Benaia morwa Jehoiate e e ne e le molaodi wa Bakerethe le Bapelethe; bomorwa Dafite e le bone bagolo tikologong ya kgosi. 
1Chronicles19:1 Ga dirala morago ga moo, Nahaše kgosi ya bana ba Amone a swa, mme morwawe a busa mo boemong jwa gagwe." 
1Chronicles19:2 Mme Dafite a re: “Ke tlaa itshupa fa ke le pelontle le Hanune morwa Nahaše, ka rraagwe a kile a ntshupetsa bopelonomi.” Dafite a roma batho ba ya go mo tshedisa ka ga rraagwe. Batlhanka ba ga Dafite ba fitlha mo lefatsheng la bana ba Amone kwa go Hanune, ba ya matshedisong." 
1Chronicles19:3 Dikgosana tsa bana ba Amone tsa raya Hanune tsa re: “A o gopola go re Dafite o tlotla rraago, jaaka a romile batshedisi kwa go wena? A batlhanka ba gagwe ga ba tle kwa go wena go kheleisa, le go pitikolola, le go tlhola lefatshe?”" 
1Chronicles19:4 Jalo Hanune a tshwara batlhanka ba ga Dafite, a ba beola, a kgaola diaparo tsa bone ka bogare, e bong fa maragong a bone, mme a itse go ba naya tsela." 
1Chronicles19:5 Foo ga ya bangwe ba ya go bolelela Dafite jaaka batho bao ba diretswe. Mme a roma batho ba ya go ba kgatlhantsha; gonne batho bao ba ne ba tlhajwa ke ditlhong thata. Kgosi ya re: “Namang lo sa diegile mo Jeriko go tsamaya, ditedu tsa lona di gole, foo lo tlaa itse go boa.”" 
1Chronicles19:6 E rile bana ba Amone ba ipona fa ba itirile ba ba ilwang mo go Dafite, Hanune le bana ba Amone ba isa dikilokerama tsa selefera di le 34 000, ba ya go thapa dikara tsa tlhabano ka tuelo le bapalami ba dipitse kwa Mesopotamia, le kwa Arame-maaka le kwa Soba." 
1Chronicles19:7 Jalo ba thapa dikara di le 32 000 ka tuelo, le kgosi ya Maaka le batho ba gagwe; ba tla ba thibelela fa pele ga Meteba. Bana ba Amone ba phuthega ba tswa metseng ya bone ba tla go tlhabana." 
1Chronicles19:8 E rile Dafite a go utlwela a roma Joabe, le ntwa yotlhe ya diganka." 
1Chronicles19:9 Bana ba Amone ba bolola, ba aba tlhabano fa kgorong ya motse; mme dikgosi tse di tsileng di ne di le tsosi kwa nageng." 
1Chronicles19:10 Jaana e rile Joabe a bona fa ntwa e mo dikile fa pele le fa morago, a itebalebela banna mo go botlhe ba ba tlhaotsweng ba Iseraele, mme a ba aba go tla ba tlhabana le Basiria." 
1Chronicles19:11 Batho ba bangwe a ba tsenya mo seatleng sa ga Abišai monnawe, mme ba ikaba go tla ba tlhabana le bana ba Amone." 
1Chronicles19:12 Mme a re: “Fa Basiria ba mpalela, foo o tlaa nthusa; mme fa bana ba Amone ba go palela, foo ke tlaa go thusa." 
1Chronicles19:13 O nametsege, re direle batho ba rona le metse ya Modimo wa rona jaaka banna; a Jehofa a dire se o se bonang se le molemo.”" 
1Chronicles19:14 Joabe le batho ba o nang nabo ba atamela fa pele ga Basiria go tlhabana; mme ba tshaba fa pele ga gagwe. 
1Chronicles19:15 E rile bana ba Amone ba bona fa Basiria ba tshabile, le bone ba tshaba fa pele ga Abišai monnawe, ba tsena mo motseng. Foo Joabe a tla Jerusalema." 
1Chronicles19:16 E rile Basiria ba bona fa ba fenyegile fa pele ga Baiseraele, ba roma batho ba ya go ntsha Basiria ba ba kwa moseja ga Noka, ba na le Shofake molaodi wa ntwa ya ga Hataresere e le tlhogo ya bone." 
1Chronicles19:17 Ga bolelelwa Dafite, mme a phutha Baiseraele botlhe, a kgabaganya Joretane, mme a ba fitlhela, a ba abela tlhabano. Jalo e rile Dafite a sena go abela Basiria tlhabano ba tlhabana nae." 
1Chronicles19:18 Basiria ba tshaba fa pele ga Baiseraele; Dafite a bolaya Basiria, banna ba dikara di le 7 000, batho ba dinao ba le 40 000, mme a bolaya Shofake molaodi wa ntwa." 
1Chronicles19:19 E rile batlhanka ba ga Hatatesere ba bona fa ba fenyegile fa pele ga Baiseraele, ba dira kagiso le Dafite, ba mo direla, le gone Basiria ba gana go tlhola ba thusa bana ba Amone." 
1Chronicles20:1 Ga dirala ya re ka lobaka lwa thetologo ya ngwaga, ka lobaka lo dikgosi di tleng di bolole ka lone di ya go tlhabana, Joabe a bolotsa ntwa e e thata, a ya a senya lefatshe la bana ba Amone, a fitlha a tlhasela Raba. Mme Dafite ene a setse kwa Jerusalema. Joabe a kgemetha motse wa Raba, a o ribegetsa." 
1Chronicles20:2 Dafite a tlosa serwalo sa bogosi sa kgosi ya bone mo tlhogong ya yone, a se fitlhela se le bokete jwa dikilokerama di le 34 tsa gouta, go ne go le majana a a tlhokegang mo go sone; mme sa bewa mo tlhogong ya ga Dafite. A ntsha thopo ya motse e le kgolo thata." 
1Chronicles20:3 A ntsha batho ba ba gone, a ba setlha ka dišage, le ka dikokola tsa tshipi, le ka dilepe. Dafite a direla jalo metse yotlhe ya bana ba Amone. Mme Dafite le batho botlhe ba boela Jerusalema." 
1Chronicles20:4 Ga dirala ya re morago ga moo, ga tsoga ntwa le Bafilisitia kwa Gesere; foo Sibekai wa Mohušathe a bolaya Sipai, wa bomorwa morobana; mme ba kokobediwa." 
1Chronicles20:5 Ga nna ntwa gape le Bafilisitia; Elehanane morwa Jaire a bolaya Lagemi morwa rraagwe Goliathe wa Mohite, yo lore lwa lerumo la gagwe lo ne lo tshwana le mosipuri wa monyedi." 
1Chronicles20:6 Gape ga nna ntwa kwa Gathe, kwa go ne go na le monna mongwe gone yo o godileng thata, menwana ya gagwe ya diatla le ya dinao e ne e le 24, a na le e merataro mo seatleng sengwe le sengwe, le e merataro mo lonaong longwe le longwe; le ene a tsetswe ke morobana." 
1Chronicles20:7 E rile a kgoba Baiseraele, Jonathane morwa Shimee mogoloa Dafite a mmolaya." 
1Chronicles20:8 Bao ba ne ba tsetswe ke monna wa morobana mo Gathe; mme ba wa ka seatla sa ga Dafite, le ka seatla sa batlhanka ba gagwe." 
1Chronicles21:1 Satane a tsogela Baiseraele, a tlhotlheletsa Dafite gore a bale Baiseraele." 
1Chronicles21:2 Dafite a raya Joabe le dikgosana tsa batho a re: “Yang lo bale Baiseraele go tswa Berešeba go ya fela kwa Dane; lo ntereletse lefoko gore ke tle ke itse palo ya bone.” 
1Chronicles21:3 Mme Joabe a re: “A Jehofa a ntsifatse batho ba gagwe, gore ba fete e e leng palo ya bone galekgolo, mme kgosi morena wa me, a ga se batlhanka ba morena wa me botlhe? Ana morena wa me o lopela eng selo se? Wa bo o gogela Baiseraele molato ka ntlha yang?”" 
1Chronicles21:4 Le fa go ntse jalo lefoko la kgosi la fenya Joabe. Ka ntlha ya moo Joabe a tloga, a ya a ralala Baiseraele botlhe, a ba a tla Jerusalema." 
1Chronicles21:5 Joabe a naya Dafite tshobokanyo ya go balwa ga batho. Baiseraele ba le mmogo ba bo ba le 1 100 000; banna ba ba itseng go janja ka tšhaka; Bajuta ba bo ba le 470 000, e le banna ba ba itseng go kgadimokanya tšhaka." 
1Chronicles21:6 Mme Balefi le Babenjamine a se ka a ba balela mo go bone; gonne lefoko la kgosi le le maswe thata mo go Joabe. 
1Chronicles21:7 Mme Modimo wa itumologela selo se; ke gone ka moo a betsa Baiseraele. 
1Chronicles21:8 Dafite a raya Modimo a re: “Ke leofile thata ka ke dirile selo se. Jaana, ke a go rapela, tlosa boikepo jwa motlhanka wa gago; gonne ke dirile ka boeleele thata.”" 
1Chronicles21:9 Jehofa a bua le Gate mmonedi wa ga Dafite a re: 
1Chronicles21:10 “Ya o bue le Dafite o re, Jehofa o bua jaana a re: ‘Ke baya dilo di le tharo fa pele ga gago; itshenkela sengwe mo go tsone, gore ke tle ke se go direle.’ ”" 
1Chronicles21:11 Gate a tla mo go Dafite, a mo raya a re: “Jehofa o bua jaana a re: ‘Tsaya se o se ratang;" 
1Chronicles21:12 a e ka nna le fa e le dinyaga di le tharo tsa leuba; kgotsa go gailwa ka dikgwedi di le tharo fa pele ga baba ba gago, tšhaka ya baba ba gago e ntse e go tshwara; kgotsa e ka nna tšhaka ya ga Jehofa ka malatsi a le mararo, e bong kgogodi mo lefatsheng, le moengele wa ga Jehofa go senya mo melelwaneng yotlhe ya Iseraele?’ Jaana o gopole phetolo e ke tlaa e busetsang kwa go yo o nthomileng.”" 
1Chronicles21:13 Mme Dafite a raya Gate a re: “Ke mo pitlaganong e kgolo; a ke wele mo seatleng sa ga Jehofa, gonne mautlwelo botlhoko a gagwe a magolo thata; ke se wele mo seatleng sa motho.”" 
1Chronicles21:14 Jalo Jehofa a tsosetsa Baiseraele kgogodi; mme ga wa banna ba Baiseraele ba le 70 000. 
1Chronicles21:15 Mme Modimo wa roma moengele kwa Jerusalema a ya go o senya; mme ya re a itlhoma gore o a o senya, Jehofa a leba, mme a ikwatlhaela bosula, a raya moengele yo o senyang a re: “Go lekanye; gona seatla sa gago jaanong.” Moengele wa ga Jehofa a bo a eme fa seboping sa pholelo sa ga Orenane wa Mojebuse." 
1Chronicles21:16 Dafite a tsholetsa matlho, a bona moengele wa ga Jehofa a eme fa gare ga lefatshe le legodimo a tshotse tšhaka e ekilwe mo letsogong la gagwe le otlololetswe Jerusalema. Foo Dafite le bagolwane ba wela fa fatshe ka difatlhogo, ba apere letsela la kgetsi." 
1Chronicles21:17 Dafite a raya Modimo a re: “A ga se nna yo ke laotseng gore batho ba balwe? Ke nna fela yo ke leofileng ka ba ka ikepa thata; dinku tse tsone di dirileng? Ke a go rapela, Jehofa Modimo wa me, a seatla sa gago se nne mo go nna le mo ntlong ya ga rre; e seng mo bathong ba gago, gore ba se ka ba nna mo sebetsong.”" 
1Chronicles21:18 Foo moengele wa ga Jehofa a laola Gate gore a reye Dafite a re, Dafite a ye a agele Jehofa sebeso mo seboping sa pholelo sa ga Orenane wa Mojebuse." 
1Chronicles21:19 Mme Dafite a ya ka polelo ya ga Gate e o e buileng ka leina la ga Jehofa. 
1Chronicles21:20 Mme Orenane a retologa, a bona moengele; bomorwawe ba bane ba ba nang nae ba iphitlha. Jaana Orenane a bo a fola mabele." 
1Chronicles21:21 Ya re Dafite a tla mo go Orenane, Orenane a leba, mme a bona Dafite, mme a tswa mo seboping sa pholelo a ikobela Dafite a isitse sefatlhogo fa fatshe." 
1Chronicles21:22 Foo Dafite a raya Orenane a re: “Nnaya felo ga sebopi se, sa pholelo, gore ke agele Jehofa sebeso gone; o tlaa se nnaya ka tlhwatlhwa e e tletseng, gore sebetso se khutlisiwe mo bathong.”" 
1Chronicles21:23 Orenane a raya Dafite a re: “Se tseye fela, a kgosi morena wa me a dire se se molemo mo matlhong a gagwe; bona, ke go naya dikgomo go nna tshupelo e e fisiwang, le dilo tse go folwang ka tsone go nna dikgong, le mabele go nna tshupelo ya boupe; ke ntsha gotlhe fela.”" 
1Chronicles21:24 Mme kgosi Dafite a raya Orenane a re: “Nnyaa; mme ruri ke tlaa go reka ka tlhwatlhwa e e tletseng; gonne ga nketla ke tsaya se e leng sa gago ke se tseela Jehofa, le fa e le go isa tshupelo e e fisiwang e ke sa e ntshetsang sepe.”" 
1Chronicles21:25 Mme Dafite a reka felo foo mo go Orenane ka dipapetla tsa gouta di le 600. 
1Chronicles21:26 Mme Dafite a agela Jehofa sebeso gone, a isa ditshupelo tse di fisiwang le ditshupelo tsa kagiso, a biletsa kwa go Jehofa; mme a mo araba a le mo legodimong ka molelo mo sebesong sa tshupelo e e fisiwang." 
1Chronicles21:27 Jehofa a laola moengele; mme a somela tšhaka mo kgatleng ya yone. 
1Chronicles21:28 Ya re ka lobaka loo, ka Dafite a bona fa Jehofa a mo arabile mo seboping sa pholelo sa ga Orenane wa Mojebuse, foo a isa tlhabelo gone." 
1Chronicles21:29 Gonne motlaagana wa ga Jehofa, o Moše o kileng a o dira mo nageng, le sebeso sa tshupelo e e fisiwang, di ne di le kwa felong fa go tlotlometseng kwa Gibeone ka lobaka loo." 
1Chronicles21:30 Mme Dafite o ne a sa kake a ya fa pele ga sone a ya go botsa mo Modimong; gonne a boifa ka ntlha ya tšhaka ya moengele wa ga Jehofa. 
1Chronicles22:1 Foo Dafite a re: “E ke yone ntlo ya ga Jehofa Modimo, le se ke sone sebeso sa tshupelo e e fisiwang ya Baiseraele.”" 
1Chronicles22:2 Dafite a laola gore go phuthwe baeng ba ba mo lefatsheng la Iseraele; a laola baagi gore ba betle maje a a baakantsweng a go aga ntlo ya Modimo. 
1Chronicles22:3 Dafite a baakanya tshipi ka botlalo ya go dira dimapo tsa ditswalo tsa mejako, le tsa malomagano; le kgotlho ka botlalo jo bo sa itsiweng bokete;" 
1Chronicles22:4 le ditlhare tsa masetara tse di se nang palo; gonne Basitone le bone Bature ba ne ba lere ditlhare tsa masetara kwa go Dafite ka botlalo. 
1Chronicles22:5 Dafite a re: “Solomone morwaake o sa le lekau le le nana, mme ntlo e e agelwang Jehofa e tshwanetse go nna bontle jo bo feteletseng, e nne e e itsegeng le e e galalelang mo mafatsheng otlhe tikologong; mme ka re ke rata go e baakanyetsa dilo.” Mme Dafite a baakanya ka botlalo a ise a swe." 
1Chronicles22:6 Foo a bitsa Solomone morwawe, a mo laola gore a agele Jehofa Modimo wa Iseraele ntlo." 
1Chronicles22:7 Dafite a raya Solomone morwawe a re: “Ka ga me, go ne go le mo pelong ya me go agela leina la ga Jehofa Modimo wa me ntlo." 
1Chronicles22:8 Mme lefoko la ga Jehofa la tla kwa go nna la re: ‘O tsholotse madi a le magolo bobe, o dirile dintwa tse dikgolo; ga o agele leina la me ntlo, ka o tsholotse madi a le matona mo lefatsheng mo ponong ya me." 
1Chronicles22:9 Bona, o tlaa tshola ngwana wa mosimane, yo o tlaa nnang motho wa boikhutso. Ke tlaa mo naya boikhutso mo babeng botlhe ba gagwe tikologong; gonne leina la gagwe e tlaa nna Solomone, mme ke tlaa naya Baiseraele kagiso le boiketlo mo metlheng ya gagwe." 
1Chronicles22:10 Ene o tlaa agela leina la me ntlo; o tlaa nna morwaake, mme ke tlaa nna rraagwe; ke tlaa tlhomamisa setulo sa bogosi jwa gagwe mo go Baiseraele ka bosakhutleng.’" 
1Chronicles22:11 “Jaana morwaaka, a Jehofa a nne nao, o tlhogonolofale, o age ntlo ya ga Jehofa Modimo wa gago, jaaka a buile ka ga gago." 
1Chronicles22:12 Se le sosi fela ke se, a Jehofa a go neye bonokopela le tlhaloganyo, a go laye ka ga Baiseraele; gore o tshegetse molao wa ga Jehofa Modimo wa gago." 
1Chronicles22:13 Foo o tlaa tlhogonolofala fa o tlhokomela go dira melao le dikatlholo tse Jehofa o ne a di laolela Moše ka ga Baiseraele. O nne thata le pelokgale. O se ka wa boifa le fa e le go rerega. 
1Chronicles22:14 Jaana bona, mo bobotlaneng jwa me ke baakanyeditse ntlo ya ga Jehofa dikelokerama tsa gouta di le 3 400 000 le dikilokerama tsa selefera di le 34 000 000; kgotlho yone le tshipi ke mo go se nang selekanyo sa bokete; gonne go eme ka letlotlo; dikgong le tsone le maje ke a baakantse; o ka nna wa go oketsa fela." 
1Chronicles22:15 Gape o na le badiri ba le bantsi, baremi le badiri ka maje le dikgong, le batho botlhe ba ba matsetseleko mo tirong nngwe le nngwe." 
1Chronicles22:16 Gouta, le selefera, le kgotlho, le tshipi ga di na palo; nanoga o dire, Jehofa a nne nao.”" 
1Chronicles22:17 Le gone Dafite a laola dikgosana tsotlhe tsa Iseraele, gore di thuse Solomone morwawe a re:" 
1Chronicles22:18 “A Jehofa Modimo wa lona ga a a nna le lona? A ga a a lo naya boikhutso ka ntlha tsotlhe? Gonne banni ba lefatshe o ba ntsentse mo seatleng, lefatshe le fenyegile fa pele ga Jehofa le fa pele ga batho ba gagwe." 
1Chronicles22:19 Jaana tlhomamisang pelo ya lona le mowa wa lona mo go batleng Jehofa Modimo wa lona; ke gone nanogang, lo age ntlo e e itshepileng ya ga Jehofa Modimo, go tla lo lere letlole la kgolagano ya ga Jehofa, le dilwana tse di itshepileng tsa Modimo, mo ntlong e e tlaa agelwang leina la ga Jehofa.”" 
1Chronicles23:1 Jaana Dafite o ne a tsofetse, a le metlha e e tletseng; mme a baya Solomone morwawe kgosi ya Iseraele." 
1Chronicles23:2 Mme a phutha dikgosana tsotlhe tsa Iseraele di na le baperesiti le Balefi. 
1Chronicles23:3 Balefi ba bo ba balwa e le ba ba dinyaga di 30 go ya kwa go bomogoloa bone, palo ya bone ka ditlhogo tsa bone, monna le monna, e ne e le 38 000." 
1Chronicles23:4 “Mo go bao ga bo go le 24 000 e le balebalebi ba tiro ya ntlo ya ga Jehofa; 6 000 e le balaodisiwa le baatlhodi," 
1Chronicles23:5 ba ba 4 000 e le balebedi ba mejako; ba ba 4 000 ba baka Jehofa ka diletso tse ke di dirileng,” go bua Dafite, “ka re go tle go bakwe ka tsone.”" 
1Chronicles23:6 Dafite a ba kgaoganya makoko a a fapaanang fela jaaka bomorwa Lefi ba ntse, e bong Gerešone le Kohathe le Merari." 
1Chronicles23:7 Ga Bagerešone: e ne e le Latane le Shimei. 
1Chronicles23:8 Bomorwa Latane: e le Jehiele yo mogolo, Sethame le Joele, ba le bararo." 
1Chronicles23:8 Bomorwa Latane: e le Jehiele yo mogolo, Sethame le Joele, ba le bararo." 
1Chronicles23:9 Bomorwa Shimei: e le Shelomothe, Hasiele le Harane, ba le bararo. Bao e ne e le ditlhogo tsa matlo a borraabo tsa ga Latane." 
1Chronicles23:10 Le bomorwa Shimei: Jahathe, Sine, Jeuše le Beria. Ba bane bao e le bomorwa Shimei." 
1Chronicles23:11 Jahathe e ne e le yo mogolo, Sisa e le wa bobedi; Jeuše le Beria ba bo ba se na bana ba basimane ba le bantsi; ka ntlha ya moo ba nna ntlo ya borra batho kgotla e le nngwe fela." 
1Chronicles23:12 Bomorwa Kohathe: Amerame, le Isahare, le Heberone le Usiele, ba le bane." 
1Chronicles23:13 Bomorwa Amerame: Arone le Moše: Arone a lomololwa, gore a tle a itshepise dilo tse di boitshepo jo bo itshepileng, ene le bomorwawe, ka bosakhutleng, go tla ba fisa maswalo fa pele ga Jehofa, go mo direla le go baka leina la gagwe ka bosakhutleng." 
1Chronicles23:14 Ka ga Moše, monna wa Modimo, bomorwawe ba ne ba balelwa mo lotsong lwa ga Lefi." 
1Chronicles23:15 Bomorwa Moše: Gerešome le Eliesere. 
1Chronicles23:16 Bomorwa Gerešome: Shebuele yo mogolo. 
1Chronicles23:17 Bomorwa Eliesere e ne e le Rehabia yo mogolo. Eliesere o ne a se na ba sele bana ba basimane; bomorwa Rehabia ba bo ba le bantsi thata. 
1Chronicles23:18 Bomorwa Isehare: Shelomithe yo mogolo. 
1Chronicles23:19 Bomorwa Heberone: Jeria yo mogolo, wa bobedi Amaria, wa boraro Jahasiele, wa bone Jekameame." 
1Chronicles23:20 Bomorwa Usiele: Mika yo mogolo, wa bobedi Isešia." 
1Chronicles23:21 Bomorwa Merari: Mahali le Muši. Bomorwa Mahali: Eleasare le Kiše. 
1Chronicles23:22 Eleasare a swa a se na bana ba basimane fa e se ba basetsana fela; bomorwa rraabo, e bong bomorwa Kiše ba ba nyala." 
1Chronicles23:23 Bomorwa Muši: Mahali, le Etere, le Jeremothe, ba le bararo." 
1Chronicles23:24 Ba e ne e le bomorwa Lefi ka fa matlong a borraabo, e bong ditlhogo tsa matlo a borraabo, tsa bone ba ba badilweng mo go bone, mo palong ya maina ka ditlhogo tsa bone, ba ba dirang tiro ya tirelo ya ntlo ya Jehofa, go simolola ka ba ba dinyaga di 20 le bomogoloa bone." 
1Chronicles23:25 Gonne Dafite o ne a re: “Jehofa Modimo wa Iseraele, o neile batho ba gagwe boikhutso; o agile mo Jerusalema ka bosakhutleng." 
1Chronicles23:26 Le bone Balefi ga ba ke ba tlhola ba na le go rwala motlaagana le dilwana tsa one tsa tirelo ya one.” 
1Chronicles23:27 Gonne bomorwa Lefi ba tlogile ba balwa ka mafoko a bofelo a ga Dafite, go simolola ka ba ba dinyaga di 20 go ya kwa go bomogoloa bone." 
1Chronicles23:28 Gonne tiro ya bone e le go lebelela mo go bomorwa Arone mo tirelong ya ntlo ya ga Jehofa, mo malwapeng, mo matlwaneng le mo go ntlafatseng dilo tsotlhe tse di itshepileng, e bong tiro ya tirelo ya ntlo ya Modimo," 
1Chronicles23:29 le mo go sone senkgwe sa tshupo, le mo setoung sa tshupelo ya boupe, le fa e le sa dinkgwenyana tse di lotsatsana tse di sa bedisiwang, kgotsa sa se se besitsweng mo pitseng e e lokhaetla, kgotsa sa se se kokobileng, le sa seelo sengwe le sengwe, le go lekanya botona;" 
1Chronicles23:30 le go ema ka meso yotlhe ba leboga ba baka Jehofa, le gone mo maitseboeng;" 
1Chronicles23:31 le go isa ditshupelo tsotlhe tse di fisiwang di isediwa Jehofa, mo bosabateng, le mo metlheng ya go rogwa ga dikgwedi, le mo metlheng ya mediro e e tlhomilweng, di le palo e e emeng ka fa molaong o o tlhomilweng ka ga yone, ka metlha yotlhe fa pele ga Jehofa." 
1Chronicles23:32 Le gore ba tle ba lebele mogope wa bophuthegelo, le go lebela felo ga boitshepo, le go lebelela bomorwa Arone bomogoloa bone, mo tirelong ya ntlo ya ga Jehofa." 
1Chronicles24:1 Makoko a diphapaano tsa bomorwa Arone e ne e le a: Bomorwa Arone: Natabe le Abihu, Eleasare le Ithamare." 
1Chronicles24:2 Natabe le Abihu ba ne ba swa pele ga rraabo, ba bo ba se na bana, ke gone ka moo Eleasare le Ithamare ba dira tiro ya boperesiti." 
1Chronicles24:3 Dafite a na le Satoke wa bomorwa Eleasare, le Ahimeleke wa bomorwa Ithamare, a ba kgoaganya ka makoko ka fa phapaanong ya bone mo tirelong ya bone." 
1Chronicles24:4 Ga fitlhelwa mo go bomorwa Eleasare bagolo ba le bantsi go feta ba bomorwa Ithamare; ba kgaoganngwa jaana: Mo go bomorwa Eleasare, go ne go le ba le 16, ditlhogo tsa mantlo a borraabo; mo go bomorwa Ithamare, ka fa matlong a borraabo ba ba 8." 
1Chronicles24:5 Ba kgaoganngwa jalo ka fa taolong ya bola, bangwe ba tlhakanye le ba bangwe; gonne go no go le dikgosana tsa ntlo e e boitshepo, le dikgosana tsa Modimo mo go bomorwa Eleasare le mo go bomorwa Ithamare." 
1Chronicles24:6 Shemaia morwa Nethanele mokwaledi, yo e ne e le wa Balefi a ba kwala mo ponong ya kgosi le dikgosana, le Satoke moperesiti, le Ahimeleke morwa Abiathare, le ditlhogo tsa makgotla a borraabo tsa baperesiti le tsa Balefi; ntlo e le nngwe ya boraro e tseelwa Eleasare, le e le nngwe e tseelwa Ithamare." 
1Chronicles24:7 Jaana taolo ya ntlha ya tswela Jehoiaribe, ya bobedi ya tswela Jetaia," 
1Chronicles24:8 ya boraro ya tswela Harime, ya bone ya tswela Seorime," 
1Chronicles24:9 ya botlhano ya tswela Malekije, ya borataro ya tswela Mijamine;" 
1Chronicles24:10 ya bosupa ya tswela Hakose, ya 8 ya tswela Abija;" 
1Chronicles24:11 ya 9 ya tswela Ješua, ya lesome ya tswela Shekania;" 
1Chronicles24:12 ya 11 ya tswela Eleašibe, ya 12 ya tswela Jakime;" 
1Chronicles24:13 ya 13 ya tswela Hupa, ya 14 ya tswela Ješebeabe;" 
1Chronicles24:14 ya 15 ya tswela Bilega, ya 16 ya tswela Imere;" 
1Chronicles24:15 ya 17 ya tswela Hesire, ya 18 ya tswela Hapisese;" 
1Chronicles24:16 ya 19 ya tswela Pethahia, ya 20 ya tswela Jehesekele;" 
1Chronicles24:17 ya 21 ya tswela Jakine, ya 22 ya tswela Gamule;" 
1Chronicles24:18 ya 23 ya tswela Delaia, ya 24 ya tswela Maasia." 
1Chronicles24:19 Eo, e ne e le yone thulaganyo ya bone mo tirelong ya bone go tla mo ntlong ya ga Jehofa ka fa molaong o ba o neilweng ke Arone rraabo, jaaka Jehofa Modimo wa Iseraele a mo laotse." 
1Chronicles24:20 Le ba ba setseng ba bomorwa Lefi: mo go bomorwa Amerame, Shubaele; mo go bomorwa Shubaele, Jeheteia." 
1Chronicles24:21 Ba ga Rehabia: mo go bomorwa Rehabia, yo mogolo Isešia." 
1Chronicles24:22 Mo go Baisehare, Shelomothe; mo go bomorwa Shelomothe, Jahathe." 
1Chronicles24:23 Le bomorwa Heberone: yo mogolo Jeria, wa bobedi Amaria, wa boraro Jahasiele, wa bone Jekameame." 
1Chronicles24:24 Bomorwa Usiele, Mika; mo go bomorwa Mika, Shamire." 
1Chronicles24:25 Monnawe Mika, Isešia; mo go bomorwa Isešia, Sekaria." 
1Chronicles24:26 Bomorwa Merari: Maheli le Muši, bomorwa Jaasia: Beno." 
1Chronicles24:27 Bomorwa Merari: ba ga Jaasia, Beno, Shohame, Sakure le Iberi." 
1Chronicles24:28 Ba ga Maheli: Eleasare, yo o ne a se na bana ba basimane." 
1Chronicles24:29 Ba ga Kiše: bomorwa Kiše, Jerameele." 
1Chronicles24:30 Le bomorwa Muši: Maheli, Etere le Jerimothe. Bao e ne e le bomorwa Balefi ka fa matlong a borraabo." 
1Chronicles24:31 Bao le bone ba thela bola fela jaaka bomogoloa bone bomorwa Arone mo ponong ya kgosi Dafite, le Satoke, le Ahimeleke, le ditlhogo tsa makgotla a borraabo tsa baperesiti le tsa Balefi; makgotla a borraabo a yo mogolo fela jaaka one a ga monnawe." 
1Chronicles25:1 Gape Dafite le balaodi ba ntwa ba lomololela tirelo bangwe ba bomorwa Asafe, le ba ga Hemane, le ba ga Jeduthune, ba ba tlaa duduetsang ka diharepe le disaletere le ka disimebale. Palo ya bone ba ba dirang tiro ka fa tirelong ya bone e ne e le ba:" 
1Chronicles25:2 Ba bomorwa Asafe: Sakure, le Josefe, le Nethania le Ašarela, bomorwa Asafe, ba le mo seatleng sa ga Asafe, yo o ne a duetsa ka fa taolong ya kgosi." 
1Chronicles25:3 Ba ga Jeduthune, bomorwa Jeduthune: Getalia le Seri, le Ješaia, Hašabia le Matithia, ba le barataro; ba le mo seatleng sa ga rraabo Jeduthune a na le harepe, yo o ne a duduetsa ka go leboga le ka go baka Jehofa." 
1Chronicles25:4 Ba ga Hemane, bomorwa Hemane: Bukia, le Matania, le Usiele, le Shebuele le Jerimothe, le Hanania, le Hanani, le Eliatha, Gitaleti, le Romameti-esere, Jošebekaša, le Malothi, le Hothire, le Mahasiothe." 
1Chronicles25:5 Botlhe ba e ne e le bomorwa Hemane, molebedi wa kgosi mo mafokong a Modimo, go tsholetsa lonaka. Modimo wa naya Hemane bana ba basimane ba le 14, le ba basetsana ba le bararo." 
1Chronicles25:6 Botlhe ba, ba ne ba le mo diatleng tsa ga rraabo go opela mo ntlong ya ga Jehofa, ka disimebale, le disaletere le diharepe, mo tirelong ya ntlo ya Modimo; boAsafe le Jeduthune le Hemane ba le mo taolong ya kgosi." 
1Chronicles25:7 Palo ya bone, ba na le bomorwa rraabone ba ba rutilweng go opelela Jehofa, e bong botlhe ba ba ditswerere, e ne e le 288." 
1Chronicles25:8 Ba thelela ditebelo tsa bone bola, botlhe ba tshwana fela, ba babotlana jaaka ba bagolo, moruti jaaka yo o rutwang." 
1Chronicles25:9 Taolo ya ntlha ya tswela Asafe ka ga Josefe; ya bobedi ya tswela Gatalia, ene le bomonnawe le bomorwawe, ba le 12;" 
1Chronicles25:10 ya boraro ya tswela Sakure, bomorwawe le bomonnawe, ba le 12;" 
1Chronicles25:11 ya bone ya tswela Iseri, bomorwawe le bomonnawe, ba le 12;" 
1Chronicles25:12 ya botlhano ya tswela Nethania, bomorwawe le bomonnawe, ba le 12;" 
1Chronicles25:13 ya borataro ya tswela Bukia, bomorwawe le bomonnawe, ba le 12;" 
1Chronicles25:14 ya bosupa ya tswela Ješarela, bomorwawe, le bomonnawe, ba le 12;" 
1Chronicles25:15 ya bofera e le mebedi ya tswela Ješaia, bomorwawe le bomonnawe ba le 12;" 
1Chronicles25:16 ya bofera o le mongwe ya tswela Matania, bomorwawe le bomonnawe, ba le 12;" 
1Chronicles25:17 ya lesome ya tswela Shimei, bomorwawe le bomonnawe, ba le 12;" 
1Chronicles25:18 ya 11, ya tswela Asarele, bomorwawe le bomonnawe, ba le 12;" 
1Chronicles25:19 ya 12 ya tswela Hašabia, bomorwawe le bomonnawe, ba le 12." 
1Chronicles25:20 Mo go ya 13 ga nna Shubaele, bomorwawe le bomonnawe, ba le 12;" 
1Chronicles25:21 mo go ya 14 ga nna Matithia, bomorwawe le bomonnawe ba le 12;" 
1Chronicles25:22 mo go ya 15 ga nna Jeremothe, bomorwawe le bomonnawe, ba le 12;" 
1Chronicles25:23 mo go ya 16 ga nna Hanania, bomorwawe le bomonnawe ba le 12;" 
1Chronicles25:24 mo go ya 17 ga nna Jošebekaše, bomorwawe le bomonnawe, ba le 12;" 
1Chronicles25:25 mo go ya 18 ga nna Hanani, bomorwawe le bomonnawe, ba le 12;" 
1Chronicles25:26 mo go ya 19 ga nna Malothi, bomorwawe le bomonnawe ba le 12;" 
1Chronicles25:27 mo go ya 20 ga nna Eliatha, bomorwawe le bomonnawe, ba le 12;" 
1Chronicles25:28 mo go ya 21 ga nna Hothire, bomorwawe le bomonnawe, ba le 12;" 
1Chronicles25:29 mo go ya 22 ga nna Gitaleti bomorwawe le bomonnawe, ba le 12;" 
1Chronicles25:30 mo go ya 23; ga nna Mahasiothe, bomorwawe le bomonnawe, ba le 12;" 
1Chronicles25:31 mo go ya 24 ga nna Romameti-esere, bomorwawe le bomonnawe, ba le 12." 
1Chronicles26:1 Ba ba laoletsweng makoko a diphapaano tsa balebedi ba mejako: Ba Bakora; Mešelemia morwa Kore, wa bomorwa Asafe." 
1Chronicles26:2 Mešelemia o ne a na le bana ba basimane: Sekaria motsalwapele, wa bobedi Jediaele, wa boraro Sebadia, wa bone Jetheniele," 
1Chronicles26:3 wa botlhano Elame, wa borataro Johanane, wa bosupa Elioenai." 
1Chronicles26:4 Obete-etome o ne a na le bana ba basimane: Shemaia motsalwapele, wa bobedi Josabate, wa boraro Joa, wa bone Sakare, wa botlhano Nethanele," 
1Chronicles26:5 Wa borataro Amiele, wa bosupa Isakare, wa bo 8, Peulethai; gonne Modimo o ne a mo segofatsa." 
1Chronicles26:6 Le ene Shemaia morwawe a bona bana ba basimane ba ba busang ntlo ya rraabo: gonne e le diganka tse di pelokgale. 
1Chronicles26:7 Bomorwa Shemaia: Otheni, Refaele, Obete, Elesabate yo bomonnawe e ne e le batho ba ba pelokgale." 
1Chronicles26:8 Ba botlhe e ne e le bomorwa Obete-etome, bone le bomorwaa bone, le bana ba ga rraabo, banna ba ba nonofileng mo thateng ya go direla, ba ga Obete-etome ba le 62." 
1Chronicles26:9 Mešelemia o ne a na le bana ba basimane le bomonnawe, e le batho ba ba pelokgale ba le 18." 
1Chronicles26:10 Le ene Hosa wa bana ba ga Merari, o na a na le bana ba basimane; yo mogolo Shimeri (gonne le fa e ne e se ene motsalwapele, rraagwe a mmaya yo mogolo;)" 
1Chronicles26:11 wa bobedi Hilekia, wa boraro Tebalia, wa bone Sekaria; bomorwa Hosa le bomonnawe ba le mmogo ba ne ba le 13." 
1Chronicles26:12 Makoko a diphapaano tsa balebedi ba mejako e ne e le bone bao, e bong banna ba batona, ba na le ditebelo jaaka bomonnaa bone tsa go direla mo ntlong ya ga Jehofa." 
1Chronicles26:13 Mme ba thela bola, bannye le bagolo, ka fa matlong a borraabo, ba thelela kgoro nngwe le nngwe." 
1Chronicles26:14 Ntlha ya botlhabatsatsi bola jwa e laolela Shelemia. Foo ka ga Sekaria morwawe, a le mogakolodi yo o botsetseleko, ba mo thelela bola; mme bola jwa gagwe jwa mo laolela ntlha ya botsheka." 
1Chronicles26:15 Jwa laolela Obete-etome ntlha ya borwa; jwa neela bomorwawe ntlo ya polokelo. 
1Chronicles26:16 Jwa laolela Shupime le Hosa ntlha ya bophirimatsatsi fa kgorong ya Shalekethe, fa morathong o o tlhatlogang, tebelo e ne e lebaganye le tebelo." 
1Chronicles26:17 Ntlheng ya botlhabatsatsi go no go le Balefi ba le barataro, ntlheng ya botsheka ba le bane ka tsatsi lengwe le lengwe, ntlheng ya borwa ba le bane ka tsatsi lengwe le lengwe, le ntlo ya polokelo ba le babedi, le babedi." 
1Chronicles26:18 Jwa laolela Parebare ntlha ya bophirimatsatsi, ba le bane ka fa morathong, le ba le babedi ka fa Parebare." 
1Chronicles26:19 A ke one makoko a diphapaano tsa balebedi ba mejako; ba bomorwa Bakora, le ba bomorwa Merari." 
1Chronicles26:20 Mo go ba Balefi, Ahija a laola mabolokelo a dikhumo tsa ntlo ya Modimo, le mabolokelo a dikhumo tse di tshwaetsweng Modimo." 
1Chronicles26:21 Bomorwa Latane; bomorwa Bagerešone ba e ne e le boora Latane, ditlhogo tsa mantlo a borraabo mo go boora Latane wa Mogerešone; Jehiele." 
1Chronicles26:22 Bomorwa Jehiele: Sethame, le Joele monnawe ba laola mabolokelo a ntlo ya ga Jehofa." 
1Chronicles26:22 Bomorwa Jehiele: Sethame, le Joele monnawe ba laola mabolokelo a ntlo ya ga Jehofa." 
1Chronicles26:23 Mo go Baamerame ba Baisehare ba Baheberone, Bausiela:" 
1Chronicles26:24 Shebuele morwa Gerešome morwa Moše, e ne e le molaodi wa mabolokelo." 
1Chronicles26:25 Le bomonnawe; mo go Eliesere ga tswa Rehabia morwawe, Ješaia morwawe, Jorame morwawe, Sikeri morwawe, Shelomothe morwawe." 
1Chronicles26:26 Shelomothe yoo le bomonnawe ba ne ba laola mabolokelo otlhe a dilo tse di tshwaetsweng Modimo, tse kgosi Dafite le ditlhogo tsa makgotla a borraabo, balaodi ba makgolo a masome le ba makgolo, le balaodi ba ntwa, ba di tshwaetseng Modimo." 
1Chronicles26:27 Mo dilong tse di gapilweng mo ntweng ba tshwaya tse di tlaa baakanyang ntlo ya ga Jehofa. 
1Chronicles26:28 Le tsotlhe tse Samuele molebi, le Saule morwa Kiše, le Abenere morwa Nere, le Joabe morwa Seruia ba di tshwaetseng Modimo; le fa e ka bo e le mang yo o ne a tshwaetse Modimo sengwe, se ne se le mo seatleng sa boShelemothe le bomonnawe." 
1Chronicles26:29 Mo go Baisehare, Kenania le bomorwawe ba ne ba laoletswe tiro e e kwa ntle mo go Baiseraele, go nna maotlana le baatlhodi." 
1Chronicles26:30 Mo go Baheberone, Hašabia le bomonnawe, batho ba ba bopelokgale, ba le 1 700, e le balebedi ba Baiseraele kwa moseja ga Joretane ntlheng ya bophirimatsatsi; mo tirong yotlhe ya ga Jehofa, le mo tirelong ya kgosi." 
1Chronicles26:31 Mo go Baheberone, Jerija e ne e le yo mogolo, e bong wa Baheberone, ka fa makgotleng a bone ka mantlo a borara. Ya re ka ngwaga wa 40 wa puso ya ga Dafite, ba ne ba batlwa, mme ga fitlhelwa mo go bone diganka tse di pelokgale kwa Jasere wa Gileate." 
1Chronicles26:32 Le bomonnawe, batho ba bopelokgale, ba le 2 700, ditlhogo tsa makgotla a borara, ba kgosi Dafite o ne a ba dira balebedi mo go Barubene, le mo go Bagate le mo go ba ntlhanngwe ya lotso lwa ga Manase, mo tirong nngwe le nngwe e e leng ya Modimo le mo ditirong tsa kgosi." 
1Chronicles27:1 Jaana bana ba Iseraele ka fa palong ya bone, e bong ditlhogo tsa makgotla a borara le balaodi ba makgolo a masome, le ba makgolo, le maotlana a bone, a a direlang kgosi, mo tirong nngwe le nngwe ya makoko a diphapaano tse di ne di tsena di tswa ka kgwedi le kgwedi, ka dikgwedi tsotlhe tsa ngwaga, ba phapaano nngwe le nngwe ba bo ba le 24 000." 
1Chronicles27:2 Molaodi wa phapaano ya ntlha ya kgwedi ya ntlha e ne e le Jašobeame morwa Sabediele; mo lekokong la phapaano ya gagwe go ne go le batho ba le 24 000. 
1Chronicles27:3 Ene e ne e le wa bana ba ga Perese, mogolo wa balaodi botlhe ba ntwa, ka kgwedi ya ntlha." 
1Chronicles27:4 Tlhogo ya lekoko la phapaano ya kgwedi ya bobedi e ne e le Dotai wa Moahohe, a na le lekoko la phapaano ya gagwe; le Mikelothe e ne e le molaodi; mo lekokong la phapaano ya gagwe go le batho ba le 24 000." 
1Chronicles27:5 Molaodi wa boraro wa lesomosomo wa kgwedi ya boraro, e ne e le Benaia morwa Jehoiate moperesiti, e le yo mogolo; mme mo lekokong la phapaano ya gagwe go no go le batho ba le 24 000." 
1Chronicles27:6 Yo ke ene Benaia yo e ne e le seganka sa ba ba 30, le molaodi wa ba ba 30, mme Amisabate morwawe o ne a le wa lekoko la phapaano ya gagwe." 
1Chronicles27:7 Molaodi wa bone wa kgwedi ya bone e ne e le Asahele monnaa Joabe, le Sebadia morwawe morago ga gagwe; mo lekokong la phapaano ya gagwe go ne go le batho ba le 24 000." 
1Chronicles27:8 Molaodi wa botlhano wa kgwedi ya botlhano e ne e le Shamahuthe wa Moiserahe, mo lekokong la phapaanong ya gagwe go ne go le batho ba le 24 000." 
1Chronicles27:9 Molaodi wa borataro wa kgwedi ya borataro e ne e le Ira morwa Ikeše wa Motekoa; mo lekokong la phapaano ya gagwe go le batho ba le 24 000. 
1Chronicles27:10 Molaodi wa bosupa wa kgwedi ya bosupa e ne e le Helese wa Mopelone, wa bana ba Eferaime; mo lekokong la phapaano ya gagwe go le batho ba le 24 000." 
1Chronicles27:11 Molaodi wa bo 8 wa kgwedi ya bo 8 e ne e le Sibekai wa Mohušatha wa Basera; mo lekokong la phapaano ya gagwe go le batho ba le 24 000. 
1Chronicles27:12 Molaodi wa bo 9 wa kgwedi ya bo 9 e ne e le Abiesere wa Moanathothe wa Babenjamine; mo lekokong la phapaano ya gagwe go le batho ba le 24 000. 
1Chronicles27:13 Molaodi wa lesome wa kgwedi ya lesome e ne e le Maharai wa Monetofathe wa Basere; mme mo lekokong la phapaano ya gagwe go le batho ba le 24 000. 
1Chronicles27:14 Molaodi wa 11 wa kgwedi ya 11 e ne e le Benaia wa Mopirathone wa bana ba Eferaime; mo lekokong la phapaano ya gagwe go no go le batho ba le 24 000. 
1Chronicles27:15 Molaodi wa 12 wa kgwedi ya 12 e ne e le Heletai wa Monetofa oo rra Otheniele; mme mo lekokong la phapaano ya gagwe go ne go le batho ba le 24 000. 
1Chronicles27:16 Gape mo go laoleng ditso tsa Iseraele, mo go Barubene, Eliesere morwa Sikeri e ne e le molaodi; mo go Basimeone e ne e le Shefatia morwa Maaka;" 
1Chronicles27:17 mo go Balefi e ne e le Hašabia morwa Kemuele; mo go Baarone, e le Satoke;" 
1Chronicles27:18 mo go Bajuta e le Elihu mogoloa Dafite; mo go Baisakare, e le Omeri morwa Mikaele;" 
1Chronicles27:19 mo go Basebulone e le Išemaia morwa Obadia; mo go Banafetali e le Jeremothe morwa Aseriele; 
1Chronicles27:20 mo baneng ba Eferaime e le Hošea morwa Asasia; mo ntlheng nngwe ya lotso lwa Manase e le Joele morwa Petaia; 
1Chronicles27:20 mo baneng ba Eferaime e le Hošea morwa Asasia; mo ntlheng nngwe ya lotso lwa Manase e le Joele morwa Petaia; 
1Chronicles27:21 mo ntlheng e nngwe ya lotso lwa Manase mo Gileate, e ne e le Ito morwa Sekaria; mo go Babenjamine e le Jaasiele morwa Abenere;" 
1Chronicles27:22 mo go Badane e ne e le Asarele morwa Jerohame. Bao e ne e le balaodi ba ditso tsa Iseraele. 
1Chronicles27:23 Dafite ga a a ka a bala ba ba dinyaga di 20 fela, le fa e le bomonnaa bone; gone Jehofa a rile o tlaa ntsifatsa Baiseraele ba nna jaaka dinaledi tsa legodimo." 
1Chronicles27:24 Joabe morwa Seruia a simolola go bala, mme a se ka a fetsa; gonne bogale jwa wela Baiseraele ka ntlha ya gone moo; le gone palo ga e a ka ya tsenngwa mo dikwalong tsa ditirafalo tsa kgosi Dafite." 
1Chronicles27:25 Molaodi wa mabolokelo a dikhumo tsa kgosi e ne e le Asemafethe morwa Adiele, mme molaodi wa mabolokelo a a mo dinageng le mo metseng le mo metsaneng, le mo dikagong tse di thata, e le Jonathane morwa Usia." 
1Chronicles27:26 Molaodi wa bone ba ba dirang tiro ya naga ya go lema lefatshe, e ne e le Eseri morwa Kelube." 
1Chronicles27:27 Molaodi wa masimo a mafine e ne e le Shimei wa Moramathe, molaodi wa totafalo ya masimo a mafine e e tsenang mo mabolokelong a bojalwa jwa mofine e ne e le Sabedi wa Mošifime." 
1Chronicles27:28 Molaodi wa ditlhare tsa matlhware, le ditlhare tsa masekamore, tse di mo lefatsheng la melapo, e ne e le Baale-hanane wa Mogetere; molaodi wa mabolokelo a lookwane a a kwa tlase ga matlo e ne e le Joaše." 
1Chronicles27:29 Molaodi wa matlhape a a hulang mo Sharone e ne e le Shiterai wa Mošarone; molaodi wa matlhape a a mo melapong, e ne e le Shafate morwa Atelai;" 
1Chronicles27:30 molaodi wa dikamela e le Obile wa Moišemaile; molaodi wa diesela e le Jeheteia wa Moheronothe. 
1Chronicles27:31 Molaodi wa matsomane e le Jasise wa Mohagare. Bao botlhe e ne e le balaodi ba thoto e e leng ya kgosi Dafite. 
1Chronicles27:32 Gape Jonathane ngwana wa ga mogoloa Dafite e ne e le mogakolodi, motho wa tlhaloganyo le mokwadi; Jehiele morwa Hakemoni o na a nna le bomorwa kgosi." 
1Chronicles27:33 Le Ahitofele e ne e le mogakolodi wa kgosi; Hušai wa Momareka e ne e le kala ya kgosi. 
1Chronicles27:34 Jehoiata morwa Benaia le Abiathare ba rulagana le Ahitofele; molaodi wa ntwa ya kgosi e le Joabe. 
1Chronicles28:1 Dafite a phutha dikgosana tsotlhe tsa Iseraele, dikgosana tsa ditso le balaodi ba mašomo a a direlang kgosi ka phapaano, le balaodi ba dikete le balaodi ba makgolo, le balaodi ba thoto le dithuo tsa kgosi le tsa bomorwaa yone, ba na le maotlana, le diganka e bong diganka tsotlhe tse di pelokgale, a ba phuthela kwa Jerusalema." 
1Chronicles28:2 Foo kgosi Dafite a ema ka dinao, mme a re: “Ntheetsang, bana ba ga rra, le batho ba me; ka ga me, go ne go le mo pelong ya me go agela letlole la kgolagano ya ga Jehofa, le sebeeo sa dinao sa Modimo wa rona, ntlo ya boikhutso; mme ke ne ke ipaakanyeditse go aga." 
1Chronicles28:3 Modimo wa nthaya wa re: ‘Ga o agele leina la me ntlo ka gobo o monna wa ntwa, o tsholotse madi.’" 
1Chronicles28:4 Le fa go ntse jalo Jehofa, Modimo wa Iseraele o na a intshenkela mo ntlong yotlhe ya ga rre, gore ke nne kgosi ya Iseraele ka bosakhutleng; gonne o itshenketse Juta go nna kgosana; le mo ntlong ya ga Juta a tsaya ntlo ya ga rre: le mo baneng ba ga rre a kgatlhega mo go nna go ntira kgosi ya Baiseraele botlhe." 
1Chronicles28:5 Mo baneng botlhe ba me ba basimane (gonne Jehofa o nneile bana ba basimane ba le bantsi) o itshenketse Solomone morwaake gore a dule mo setulong sa bogosi jwa ga Jehofa go laola Baiseraele. 
1Chronicles28:6 “A nthaya a re: ‘Solomone morwao ene o tlaa aga ntlo ya me le malwapa a me; gonne ke mo itshenketse, gore a nne morwaake, mme ke tlaa nna rraagwe." 
1Chronicles28:7 Ke tlaa tlhomamisa bogosi jwa gagwe ka bosakhutleng, fa a tlhomama mo go direng ditaolo tsa me le dikatlholo tsa me, jaaka gompieno.’" 
1Chronicles28:8 “Jaana mo ponong ya Baiseraele botlhe, le ya phuthego ya ga Jehofa, le mo kutlong ya Modimo wa rona lo tlhokomele, lo tote ditaolo tsotlhe tsa ga Jehofa Modimo wa lona; gore lo rue lefatshe le le molemo le, lo bo lo le tlogelele bana ba lona boswa ka bosakhutleng, morago ga lona." 
1Chronicles28:9 “Wena Solomone morwaaka, o itse Modimo wa ga rraago, o o direle ka pelo e e itekanetseng, le ka mogopolo o o tletseng; gonne Jehofa o kheleisa dipelo tsotlhe, o tlhaloganya dikakanyo tsotlhe tsa megopolo; fa o mmatla, o tlaa bonwa ke wena; fa o mo tlogela o tlaa go latlha ka bosakhutleng." 
1Chronicles28:10 O itise jaana; gonne Jehofa o go itshenketse go tla o agela felo ga botshepo ntlo; o thatafale, o go dire.”" 
1Chronicles28:11 Foo Dafite a naya Solomone morwawe sekao sa mokatako wa tempele, le sa matlo a yone, le sa mabolokelo a yone, le sa matlwana a yone a a fa godimo, le matlwana a yone a a ka kwa teng, le sa felo ga senno sa boutlwelo botlhoko;" 
1Chronicles28:12 le sekao sa tsotlhe tse di mo pelong ya gagwe, sa malwapa a ntlo ya ga Jehofa, le sa matlwana a a mo tikologong ya yone, sa mabolokelo a ntlo ya Modimo, le sa mabolokelo a dilo tse di tshwaetsweng Modimo;" 
1Chronicles28:13 le sa makoko a diphapaano tsa baperesiti le Balefi, le sa tiro yotlhe ya tirelo ya ntlo ya ga Jehofa, le sa dilwana tsotlhe tsa tirelo mo ntlong ya ga Jehofa," 
1Chronicles28:14 sa gouta ka selekanyo sa bokete, sa dilwana tsa gouta, sa dilwana tsotlhe tsa tirelo nngwe le nngwe; sa selefera, sa dilwana tsotlhe tsa selefera, ka selekanyo sa bokete, sa dilwana tsotlhe tsa tirelo nngwe le nngwe;" 
1Chronicles28:15 sa ditlhomo tsa dipone tsa gouta, e ntse e le ka selekanyo sa bokete, le sa dilampa tsa sone, tsa gouta, sa setlhomo sengwe le sengwe sa lobone le sa dilampa tsa sone, ka selekanyo sa bokete; le sa ditlhomo tsa dipone tsa selefera, sa setlhomo sengwe le sengwe le dilampa tsa sone, selefera se ne se eme ka selekanyo sa bokete, ka fa tirong ya setlhomo sengwe le sengwe;" 
1Chronicles28:16 le gouta ya dimati tsa bojelo tsa tshupo ka selekanyo, ya lomati longwe le longwe; le selefera sa dimati tsa bojelo tsa selefera;" 
1Chronicles28:17 le dikgogetsa nama, le megotšana, le dinwelo tsa gouta e e sa pekwang; le ya megopo, ya gouta, ya mogopo mongwe le mongwe ka selekanyo sa bokete; le ga megopo ya selefera, mogopo mongwe le mongwe ka fa selekanyong sa bokete;" 
1Chronicles28:18 le ga sebeso sa maswalo, gouta e e itshekisitsweng ka fa selekanyong sa bokete; le gouta ya sekao sa kara, e bong ditšheruba tse di tsharolotseng diphuka, mme tsa khurumetsa letlole la kgolagano ya ga Jehofa." 
1Chronicles28:19 “Gotlhe mo,” go bua Dafite, “ke go tlhaloganyeditswe ka lokwalo lo lo tswang mo seatleng sa ga Jehofa, e bong ditiro tsotlhe tsa sekao se.”" 
1Chronicles28:20 Dafite a raya Solomone morwawe a re: “Thatafala, o nametsege, mme o go dire; o se ka wa boifa, o se ka wa rarega; gonne Jehofa Modimo, e bong Modimo wa me, o na nao, ga o ketla o go tlhokafalela, le fa e le go go tlogela, go tsamaya tiro yotlhe ya tirelo ya ntlo ya ga Jehofa e wediwa." 
1Chronicles28:21 Mme bona, go na le makoko a diphapaano tsa baperesiti le Balefi, ke ao, a tirelo yotlhe ya ntlo ya Modimo; mme go tlaa nna nao mo tirong yotlhe motho mongwe le mongwe yo o pelo e ratang, le yo o setswerere mo tirelong nngwe le nngwe, le balaodi le batho botlhe ba tlaa nna fela mo taolong ya gago.”" 
1Chronicles29:1 Kgosi Dafite a raya phuthego yotlhe a re: “Solomone morwaake, yo Modimo o mo itshenketseng a le esi, o sa le lekau le le nana, mme tiro yone e kgolo; gonne ntlo e ya segosi ga se ya motho, fa e se ya ga Jehofa Modimo." 
1Chronicles29:2 Ke baakanyeditse ntlo ya Modimo wa me ka thata yotlhe ya me, gouta ya go dira dilo tsa gouta, selefera sa go dira dilo tsa selefera, kgotlho ya go dira dilo tsa kgotlho, tshipi ya go dira dilo tsa tshipi, dikgong tsa go dira dilo tsa dikgong; majana a šohama, majana a a tlaa tlhongwang, majana a a gomang mo dilong tse dirilweng, le a a mebala mengwe le mengwe, majana mangwe le mangwe a a tlhokegang le maje a marabele ka letlotlo." 
1Chronicles29:3 Gape, e re ka ke tlhomile pelo ya me mo ntlong ya Modimo wa me, mme e re ka ke na le khumo ya gouta le ya selefera, e e leng ya me, ke e ntshetsa ntlo ya Modimo wa me, godimo ga tsotlhe tse ke di baakanyeditseng ntlo e e boitshepo," 
1Chronicles29:4 e bong dikilokerama tsa gouta di le 102 000 e le gouta ya Ofire, le dikilokerama tsa selefera se se itshekisitsweng di le 238 000 go manegwa mo dimoteng tsa mantlo," 
1Chronicles29:5 gouta ya go dira dilo tsa gouta, le selefera sa go dira dilo tsa selefera, le tsa tiro nngwe le nngwe e e tlaa dirwang ka diatla tsa badiri. Ke gone, go na le mang yo o ratang go itomololela Jehofa gompieno ka pelo?”" 
1Chronicles29:6 Foo dikgosana tsa makgotla a borraabo, le dikgosana tsa ditso tsa Iseraele, le balaodi ba dikete le ba makgolo, ba na le balaodi ba tiro ya kgosi, ba ntsha dilo ka peleego;" 
1Chronicles29:7 ba ntshetsa tirelo ya ntlo ya Modimo gouta e le dikilokerama di le 170 000, le dikilokerama di le 84, selefera se le ditone di ka nna 340, kgotlho e le ditone di ka nna 620, tshipi e le 3 400." 
1Chronicles29:8 Batho ba majana a a tlhokegang a fitlhetsweng mo go bone, ba a tsenya mo khumong ya ntlo ya ga Jehofa e e mo seatleng sa ga Jehiele wa Mogerešone." 
1Chronicles29:9 Foo batho ba itumela ka ba ntsha ka peleego, gonne ba ne ba naya Jehofa ka boitumelo ka pelo e e itekanetseng; kgosi Dafite le ene a itumela ka boitumelo jo bogolo." 
1Chronicles29:10 Ke gone ka moo Dafite a baka Jehofa fa pele ga phuthego yotlhe; Dafite a re: “A go bakwe wena Jehofa Modimo wa Iseraele, rraetsho, ka bosakhutleng le ka bosaengkae." 
1Chronicles29:11 Bogolo ke jwa gago, Jehofa, le thata, le kgalalelo, le phenyo le borena; gonne tsotlhe tse di kwa legodimong le tse di mo lefatsheng ke tsa gago; bogosi ke jwa gago, Jehofa, mme o goleditswe o le tlhogo mo godimo ga tsotlhe." 
1Chronicles29:12 Khumo le yone tlotlo di tswa mo go wena, o busa gotlhe fela; mo seatleng sa gago go na le nonofo le bonatla; le go godisa go mo seatleng sa gago, le go abela botlhe thata." 
1Chronicles29:13 Ke gone jaana, Modimo wa rona, re a go leboga, re baka leina la gago le le galalelang." 
1Chronicles29:14 “Mme nna ke mang, le batho ba me ke bomang, fa e bo ne ne fano re ntsha dilo ka pelo yotlhe ka mokgwa o o ntseng jaana? Gonne dilo tsotlhe di tswa mo go wena, mme re go neile mo e leng ga gago fela." 
1Chronicles29:15 Gonne re baeng fa pele ga gago, le bajaki, jaaka borraetsho botlhe ba ne ba ntse; metlha ya rona mo lefatsheng e ntse jaaka moriti fela, ga go na go nnela ruri." 
1Chronicles29:16 Jehofa Modimo wa rona, bontsi jotlhe jwa dilo tse re di baakantseng go tla re go agela ntlo ya leina la gago le le itshepileng, di tswa mo seatleng sa gago, ke tsa gago tsotlhe fela." 
1Chronicles29:17 Le gone, Modimo wa me, ke a itse fa o leka pelo, mme o na le kgatlhego mo thokgamong. Ka ga me, ke ntshitse dilo tse tsotlhe ka boitumelo mo thokgamong ya pelo ya me; jaana ke bonye batho ba gago ka boitumelo, ba ba fano ba tsile go go ntshetsa dilo ka peleego." 
1Chronicles29:18 Jehofa Modimo wa ga Aberahame, wa ga Isake, le wa ga Iseraele, borraetsho, tlhomamisa se mo boikutlong jwa megopolo ya pelo ya batho ba gago, mme o ipaakanyetse pelo ya bone." 
1Chronicles29:19 O neye Solomone morwaake pelo e e itekanetseng, go tshegetsa ditaolo tsa gago, le ditshupo tsa gago, le melao ya gago, le go dira dilo tsotlhe tse, le go aga ntlo ya segosi, e ke e baakanyeditseng dilo.”" 
1Chronicles29:20 Dafite a raya phuthego yotlhe a re: “Jaana lo bakeng Jehofa Modimo wa lona.” Phuthego yotlhe ya baka Jehofa Modimo wa borraabo, ba ikoba ditlhogo, ba obamela Jehofa, le kgosi." 
1Chronicles29:21 Ba isetsa Jehofa ditlhabelo, ba ba ba isetsa Jehofa tshupelo e e fisiwang, ka moso morago ga tsatsi leo, e bong dikgomo di le 1 000, le diphelefu di le 1 000, dikwanyana di le 1 000, di na le ditshupelo tsa tsone tse di nowang, le ditlhabelo di le letlotlo tsa Baiseraele botlhe." 
1Chronicles29:22 Ba ja ba nwa fa pele ga Jehofa ka tsatsi leo ka boitumelo jo bogolo. Ba dira Solomone morwa Dafite kgosi lwa bobedi, ba ba ba mo tloletsa Jehofa, gore a nne kgosana, le Satoke gore a nne moperesiti." 
1Chronicles29:23 Foo Solomone a dula mo setulong sa bogosi sa ga Jehofa, e le kgosi mo boemong jwa ga Dafite rraagwe, mme a tlhogonolofala, mme Baiseraele botlhe ba mo utlwa." 
1Chronicles29:24 Dikgosana tsotlhe le diganka, le bone bomorwa kgosi Dafite, ba ikokobeletsa kgosi Solomone." 
1Chronicles29:25 Jehofa a godisa Solomone ka mo go feteletseng, mo ponong ya Baiseraele botlhe, a baya mo go ene borena jwa segosi jo bo iseng bo ko bo bewe mo kgosing epe pele ga gagwe mo Iseraele." 
1Chronicles29:26 Jaana Dafite morwa Jese o ne a busa Baiseraele botlhe. 
1Chronicles29:27 Lobaka lo o ne a busitse Baiseraele ka lone e ne e le dinyaga di le 40; a busa ka dinyaga di supa mo Heberone, a busa ka dinyaga di le 33 mo Jerusalema." 
1Chronicles29:28 Mme a swa a tsofetse thata, a le metlha e e tletseng, a le khumo le tlotlo; Solomone morwawe a busa mo boemong jwa gagwe." 
1Chronicles29:29 Ditiro tsa kgosi Dafite tsa pele le tsa morago, bonang, di kwadilwe mo mafokong a ga Samuele molebi, le mo mafokong a ga Nathane moperofeti, le mo mafokong a ga Gate molebi." 
1Chronicles29:30 Di na le a puso yotlhe ya gagwe, le bonatla jwa gagwe, le a metlha ya gagwe, le ya Baiseraele, le ya magosi otlhe a mafatshe." 
2Chronicles1:1 Solomone morwa Dafite a thatafadiwa mo bogosing jwa gagwe, Jehofa Modimo wa gagwe a nna nae, a mo godisa mo go feteletseng." 
2Chronicles1:2 Solomone a bua le Baiseraele botlhe, le balaodi ba dikete, le ba makgolo, le baatlhodi, le kgosana nngwe le nngwe mo go Baiseraele botlhe, ditlhogo tsa makgotla a borara." 
2Chronicles1:3 Jalo Solomone le phuthego yotlhe ba ya felong fa go tlotlometseng kwa Gibeone; gonne mogope wa bophuthegelo wa Modimo o ne o le gone, o Moše motlhanka wa ga Jehofa o ne a o dirile kwa nageng." 
2Chronicles1:4 Mme letlole la Modimo, Dafite o ne a le tlhatlositse kwa Kiriathe-jearime a le isitse mo felong fa Dafite o ne a go le baakanyeditse, ka a ne a le tlhometse mogope kwa Jerusalema." 
2Chronicles1:5 Gape le sebeso sa kgotlho, se Besalele morwa Uri, morwa Hure, o ne a se dirile se ne se le gone fa pele ga motlaagana wa ga Jehofa; mme Solomone le phuthego ba ne ba tle ba botse kwa go sone." 
2Chronicles1:6 Solomone a tlhatlogela gone kwa sebesong sa kgotlho fa pele ga Jehofa, se se kwa mogopeng wa bophuthegelo, a isa mo go sone ditshupelo di le 1 000 tse di fisiwang." 
2Chronicles1:7 E rile mo bosigong joo Modimo wa bonala kwa go Solomone, wa mo raya wa re: “Lopa se ke tlaa se go nayang.”" 
2Chronicles1:8 Solomone a raya Modimo a re: “O supeditse Dafite rre bopelonomi jo bogolo, mme o ntirile kgosi mo boemong jwa gagwe." 
2Chronicles1:9 Jaana Jehofa Modimo, a tsholofetso e o e boleletseng Dafite rre e tlhomamisiwe, gonne o ntirile kgosi ya batho ba ba tshwanang le lorole lwa lefatshe ka bontsi." 
2Chronicles1:10 Mme ka re, a ko o nneye botlhale le kitso, gore ke tswe ke be ke tsene fa pele ga tšhaba e; gonne e mang yo o ka atlholang batho ba, ba gago, ba ba leng bogolo jo bo kanakana?”" 
2Chronicles1:11 Modimo wa raya Solomone wa re: “E re ka selo se, se ne se le mo pelong ya gago, mme o se ka wa lopa khumo, kgotsa dithoto, kgotsa tlotlo, kgotsa botshelo jwa bone ba ba go ilang, le gone wa se ka wa lopa go tshela ka lobaka lo loleele; mme o itopetse botlhale le kitso, gore o tle o atlhole batho ba me, ba ke go dirileng kgosi ya bone," 
2Chronicles1:12 o a bo newa botlhale le kitso; mme ke tlaa go naya khumo le thoto le tlotlo, tse di se kang tsa bonwa ke dikgosi dipe tse di kileng tsa nna pele ga gago, le fa e le tse di tlaa tlang morago ga gago, ga go ketla go nna le dipe tse di tlaa bonang jalo.”" 
2Chronicles1:13 Jalo Solomone a bowa mo loetong lwa gagwe kwa felong fa go tlotlometseng mo go kwa Gibeone, a tswa fa pele ga mogope wa bophuthegelo, a tla mo Jerusalema; mme a busa Baiseraele." 
2Chronicles1:14 Solomone a phutha dikara le bapalami ba dipitse; a na le dikara di le 1 400 le bapalami ba dipitse ba le 12 000, ba o ne a ba baya mo metseng ya dikara le kwa kgosing kwa Jerusalema." 
2Chronicles1:15 Kgosi ya dira selefera le gouta tsa nna jaaka maje mo Jerusalema, le masetara a a dira gore a nne jaaka ditlhare tsa masekamore a a mo lefatsheng le le khuti, ka bontsi." 
2Chronicles1:16 Dipitse tse Solomone o ne a na natso tsa bo di tswa kwa Egepeto; babapaledi ba kgosi ba di amogela di le makgathi, lekgathi lengwe le lengwe ka fa tlhwatlhweng ya lone." 
2Chronicles1:17 Ba ne ba tle ba ye ba tseye ba ntshe mo Egepeto kara e le nngwe ka dipapetla di le 600 tsa selefera, le pitse nngwe ka dipapetla di le 150. Ga nna jalo mo dikgosing tsotlhe tsa Bahita le kgosi tsa Siria, ba di tsaya ka madi a bone." 
2Chronicles2:1 Jaana Solomone o ne a ikaeletse go agela leina la ga Jehofa ntlo, le bogosi jwa gagwe ntlo." 
2Chronicles2:2 Solomone a lomolola banna ba le 70 000 ba go rwala merwalo, le ba le 80 000 ba go rema mo dithabeng, le ba le 3 600 ba go lebelela bao." 
2Chronicles2:3 Solomone a roma kwa go Hurame kgosi ya Ture, a re: “Jaaka o ne wa direla Dafite rre, wa mo tlisetsa ditlhare tsa masetara tsa go mo agela ntlo, gore a nne mo go yone; le nna a ko o ntirele fela jalo." 
2Chronicles2:4 Bona, ke agela leina la ga Jehofa Modimo wa me ntlo, go tla ke e neela ene, le go fisetsa fa pele ga gagwe maswalo a dinkga monate, le gore e nne ya senkgwe sa sesupo sa metlha yotlhe, le ya ditshupelo tse di fisiwang, tsa moso le tsa maitsebowa, tsa bosabata, tsa fa go rogwa dikgwedi, le tsa mediro e e tlhomilweng tsa ga Jehofa Modimo wa rona. Oo ke molao wa bosakhutleng mo Iseraele." 
2Chronicles2:5 Ntlo e ke e agang e kgolo, gonne Modimo wa rona o mogolo bogolo go medimo yotlhe." 
2Chronicles2:6 Mme e mang yo o nonofileng go o agela ntlo, ka legodimo, le legodimo la magodimo le sa o lekana? Nna ke be ke le mang fa e bo ne ne ke ka o agela ntlo fa e se ya go fisetsa maswalo fa pele ga one fela?" 
2Chronicles2:7 Ke gone jaana, nthomela motho yo o setswerere mo go direng ka gouta, le ka selefera, ka kgotlho, le ka tshipi, ka bohibidu jo bo mokgona, le ka bohibidu jo bo letlhololo le ka bobududu, le yo o ka nnang setswerere mo go seteng maseto mangwe le mangwe, gore a tle go dira le batho ba ba ditswerere ba ke nang nabo mo Juta le Jerusalema, ba Dafite rre o ne a ba batlile." 
2Chronicles2:8 Le gone o nteretse ditlhare tsa masetara, le ditlhare tsa mafira, le ditlhare tsa maalaguma tsa Lebanone; gonne ke a itse fa batlhanka ba gago ba le ditswerere mo go remeng ditlhare mo Lebanone; mme bona batlhanka ba me ba tlaa dira le batlhanka ba gago;" 
2Chronicles2:9 e bong go mpaakanyetsa ditlhare ka bontsi; gonne ntlo e ke tlogang ke e aga e tlaa nna kgolo le kgakamatso. 
2Chronicles2:10 Mme bona, batlhanka ba gago, baremi ba ba remang ditlhare ke tlaa ba naya dikgetsi di le 20 000 tsa mabele a go jewa, dikgetsi di le 20 000 tsa barele, le dithatholelo di le 20 000 tsa bojalwa jwa mofine, le dithatholelo di le 20 000 tsa lookwane.”" 
2Chronicles2:11 Foo Hurame kgosi ya Ture a mo fetola ka lokwalo lo o na a lo isa kwa go Solomone a re: “Jehofa o go dirile kgosi ya batho ba gagwe ka gonne o a ba rata.” 
2Chronicles2:12 Gape Hurame a re: “A go bakwe Jehofa Modimo wa Iseraele yo o dirileng legodimo le lefatshe yo o neileng Dafite kgosi ngwana wa mosimane yo o botlhale, yo o neilweng bonokopela le tlhaloganyo, yo o tlaa agelang Jehofa ntlo le bogosi jwa gagwe ntlo." 
2Chronicles2:13 Jaana ke romile motho yo o setswerere yo o neilweng tlhaloganyo, wa ga Hurame rre." 
2Chronicles2:14 Morwa mosadi mongwe wa bomorwadia Dane, rraagwe e ne e le motho wa Ture, yo o setswerere mo go direng ka gouta, le ka selefera, le ka kgotlho, le ka tshipi, ka maje, le ka dikgong, ka bohibidu jo bo mokgona, le ka bobududu, le ka leloba le le boleta, le ka bohibidu jo bo letlhololo, le gone mo go seteng maseto mangwe le mangwe, le mo go simololeng sengwe fela sa tiro; ka re, a a ke a newe boemo le ba ditswerere ba gago, le ba ditswerere ba morena wa me Dafite rraago." 
2Chronicles2:15 “Ke gone jaana mabele a morena wa me o buileng ka ga one, le barele, le lookwane, le bojalwa jwa mofine, a a di ise kwa batlhankeng ba gagwe." 
2Chronicles2:16 Mme re tlaa rema ditlhare mo Lebanone ka fa o di tlhokang ka gone; re tlaa di isa kwa go wena ka lewatle kwa Jopa di bofilwe makawe; o tlaa itse go di rwala o di isa kwa Jerusalema.” 
2Chronicles2:17 Solomone a bala baeng botlhe ba ba mo lefatsheng la Iseraele, ka fa go baleng mo Dafite rraagwe o ne a ba bala ka gone; mme ba fitlhelwa e le 153 600." 
2Chronicles2:18 Ba le 70 000 mo go bone a ba laolela go rwala merwalo, ba le 80 000 e le baremi mo dithabeng, ba le 36 000 e le balebalebi ba ba dirisang batho tiro." 
2Chronicles3:1 Foo Solomone a simolola go aga ntlo ya ga Jehofa mo Jerusalema, mo thabaneng ya Morija, kwa Jehofa o ne a bonalela Dafite rraagwe gone, felo fa o go baakantseng, mo felong fa Dafite o ne a go laotse, mo seboping sa pholelo sa ga Orenane wa Mojebuse." 
2Chronicles3:2 A simolola go aga ka tsatsi la bobedi la kgwedi ya bobedi, ka ngwaga wa bone wa puso ya gagwe." 
2Chronicles3:3 Jaana e ke yone metheo e Solomone o ne a e beela kago ya ntlo ya Modimo: Boleele ka selekanyo sa mabogo ka fa selekanyong sa ntlha, e ne e le boleele jwa dimetara di le 27, boatlhamo dimetara di le 9." 
2Chronicles3:4 Mokatako o o fa pele ga ntlo, boleele jwa one e le jwa dimetara di le 9, ka fa boatlhamong jwa ntlo, bogodimo e le jwa dimetara di le 54. Ka fa teng a e manega gouta e e sa pekwang." 
2Chronicles3:5 Ntlo e kgolo a e thiba ditlhomeso ka dimati tsa mafira ka fa teng, a di manega gouta e e itshekileng, a e kwalakwatsa ditlhare tsa makolane, le bompolokwane." 
2Chronicles3:6 A kgabisa ntlo ka majana a a tlhokegang, gore e nne ntle; mme gouta e ne e le gouta ya Parafaima." 
2Chronicles3:7 Le gone a manega ntlo, le mesipuri, le direpudi, le dimota tsa yone, le ditswalo tsa yone ka gouta; a e kwalakwatsa ditšheruba mo dimoteng." 
2Chronicles3:8 A dira ntlo e e boitshepo jo bo itshepileng; boleele jwa yone e le jwa dimetara di le 9, ka fa boatlhamong jwa ntlo, boatlhamo jwa yone e le jwa dimetara di le 9; a e manega gouta e e itshekileng, e feta ditone tse 20 ka bokete:" 
2Chronicles3:9 Bokete jwa dimapo e le dikerame tsa gouta di le 570. Matlwana a a kwa godimo a a manega gouta. 
2Chronicles3:10 Mo ntlong e e boitshepo jo bo itshepileng a dira ditšheruba di le pedi tsa tiro ya setshwantsho; a di manega gouta. 
2Chronicles3:11 Diphuka tsa ditšheruba di le boleele jwa dimetara di le 9; lofuka lwa tšheruba nngwe lo le dimetara di le 2,2, lo fitlha kwa lomoteng lwa ntlo; lofuka lo longwe le lone lo le dimetara di le 2,2, lo fitlha kwa lofukeng lwa tšheruba e nngwe." 
2Chronicles3:12 Lofuka lwa tšheruba e nngwe lo le dimetara di le 2,2, lo fitlha kwa lomoteng lwa ntlo; lofuka lo longwe lo le dimetara di le 2,2 le lone lo tshwaragana le lofuka lwa tšheruba e nngwe." 
2Chronicles3:13 Diphuka tsa ditšheruba tseo tsa tsharologa tsa nna dimetara di le 9; tsa bo di eme ka dinao, difatlhogo tsa tsone di lebile kwa teng ga ntlo." 
2Chronicles3:14 Sesiro a se dira ka bobududu le bohibidu jo bo mokgona, le bohibidu jo bo letlhololo, le leloba le le boleta, mme a logela ditšheruba mo go sone." 
2Chronicles3:15 Le gone a dira maotwana a le mabedi fa pele ga ntlo, a le bogodimo jwa dimetara di le 15,5, le tlhogo e e mo godimo ga lengwe le lengwe la one e le dimetara di le 2,2." 
2Chronicles3:16 Mo bobuelelong a dira bompolokwane a ba baya mo godimo ga maotwana; a dira digaranata di le 100 a di baya mo bompolokwaneng. 
2Chronicles3:17 A tlhoma maotwana fa pele ga tempele, lengwe ka fa ntlheng ya le legolo le lengwe ka fa ntlheng ya la molema; a raya le le ka fa ntlheng ya le legolo leina a re: Jakine, le le ka fa ntlheng ya la molema a le raya leina a re: Boase." 
2Chronicles4:1 Gape a dira sebeso sa kgotlho, boleele jwa sone bo le dimetara di le 9, boatlhamo jwa sone bo le dimetara di le 9, le bogodimo jwa sone bo le dimetara di le 4,5." 
2Chronicles4:2 Le gone a dira lewatle ka go le thela ka kgotlho, le le boatlhamo jwa dimetara di le 4,4 go tswa losing go ya losing lo longwe, le le sediko tikologong, boteng jwa lone bo le dimetara di le 2,2, selekanyo sa tikologo ya lone e le dimetara di le 13,2."
