2Chronicles4:3 Ka fa tlase ga lone go le ditshwantsho tsa dikgomo, di le dikologile, letsogo le le lengwe fela le na le di le some, di dikolositse lewatle tikologong ya lone. Dikgomo di ne di le ditsela di le pedi, di theletswe go lo gongwe fela le lone." 
2Chronicles4:4 La ema le rwelwe ke dikgomo di le 12, di le tharo di lebile ntlheng ya botsheka, di le tharo di lebile ntlheng ya bophirimatsatsi, di le tharo di lebile ntlheng ya borwa, di le tharo di lebile ntlheng ya botlhabatsatsi; lewatle le ne le beilwe mo godimo ga tsone, mme marago otlhe a tsone a lebile kwa teng." 
2Chronicles4:5 Bokima jwa lone bo le kana ka boatlhamo jwa seatla, losi lwa lone lo dirilwe jaaka losi lwa senwelo, jaaka sethunya sa lešoma; le lekanye dinkgwana di le 3 000." 
2Chronicles4:6 A dira le megopo e le some, e le metlhano a e baya ka fa ntlheng ya le legolo, le e le metlhano ka fa ntlheng ya la molema, go tla go tlhatswetsa mo go yone; dilo tse e leng tsa ditshupelo tse di fisiwang ba ne ba tle ba di tlhatswetse mo go yone; lewatle lone e le le baperesiti ba tlhapelang mo go lone." 
2Chronicles4:7 A dira ditlhomo tse some tsa dipone tsa gouta ka fa molaong o o tlhometsweng tsone; a di baya mo tempeleng, di le tlhano ka fa ntlheng ya le legolo, le di le tlhano ka fa ntlheng ya la molema." 
2Chronicles4:8 A dira le dimati tsa bojelo di le some, a di baya mo tempeleng, di le tlhano ka fa ntlheng ya le legolo, le di le tlhano ka fa ntlheng ya le legolo, le di le tlhano ka fa ntlheng ya la molema. A dira megotšana ya gouta e le lekgolo." 
2Chronicles4:9 Gape a dira lolwapa lwa baperesiti, le lolwapa lo logolo, le ditswalo tsa lolwapa, a manega ditswalo tsa one ka kgotlho." 
2Chronicles4:10 Lewatle a le tlhoma ka fa ntlheng ya le legolo ga ntlo, ntlheng ya botlhabatsatsi bolebagana le borwa." 
2Chronicles4:11 Hurame a dira dipitsa, le diolela melora le megotšana. Jalo Hurame a wetsa go dira tiro e o ne a e direla kgosi Solomone mo ntlong ya Modimo." 
2Chronicles4:12 Maotwana a mabedi, le megopo, le ditlhogo tse pedi tse di kwa godimo ga maotwana; le tiro tsa selotloa tse pedi tsa go khurumetsa megopo e mebedi ya ditlhogo tse di mo godimo ga maotwana;" 
2Chronicles4:13 le digaranata tse di 400 tsa tiro tsa selotloa tse pedi; ditsela di le pedi tsa digaranata tsa selotloa, sengwe le sengwe, go khurumetsa megopo e mebedi ya ditlhogo tse di mo godimo ga maotwana." 
2Chronicles4:14 A dira le ditlhomo, a dira megopo ya go tlhatswetsa mo godimo ga ditlhomo;" 
2Chronicles4:15 lewatle le le lengwe fela, le dikgomo tse 12 ka fa tlase ga lone." 
2Chronicles4:16 Le tsone dipitsa, diolela melora, dikgoge tsa nama le dilwana tsotlhe tsa yone, Hurame rraagwe a di direla kgosi Solomone, a di direla ntlo ya ga Jehofa ka kgotlho e e phatsimang." 
2Chronicles4:17 Kgosi ya di thelela mo lobaleng lwa Joretane, mo mmung wa letsopa o o fa gare ga Sukotha le Sereta." 
2Chronicles4:18 Jalo Solomone a dira dilwana tse tsotlhe di le letlotlo le legolo, gonne bokete jwa kgotlho bo ne bo retetse go lemogwa." 
2Chronicles4:19 Solomone a dira dilwana tsotlhe tse di nnang mo ntlong ya Modimo, le sebeso sa gouta, le dimati tsa bojelo tse senkgwe sa tshupo se nnang mo go tsone;" 
2Chronicles4:20 le ditlhomo tsa dipone di na le dilampa tsa tsone tsa gouta e e sa pekwang, gore di tle di tuke fa pele ga bobuelelo ka fa molaong;" 
2Chronicles4:21 le dithunya, le dilampa, le ditlawa tsa gouta, e le gouta e e itekanetseng;" 
2Chronicles4:22 le dipoma tsa dipone, le megotšana, le dintshwana, le diolela molelo tsa gouta e e sa pekwang; ka ga botseno jwa ntlo, ditswalo tsa ka fa teng tsa yone tsa felo ga boitshepo jo bo itshepileng, le ditswalo tsa ntlo, e bong tsa tempele, e ne e le tsa gouta fela." 
2Chronicles5:1 Jalo tiro yotlhe e Solomone o ne a e direla ntlo ya ga Jehofa ya wediwa. Solomone a isa dilo tse Dafite rraagwe o ne a di tshwaetse Modimo; e bong selefera le gouta le dilwana tsotlhe, a di tsenya mo mabolokelong a dikhumo a ntlo ya Modimo." 
2Chronicles5:2 Foo Solomone a phutha bagolwane ba Iseraele, le ditlhogo tsotlhe tsa ditso, le dikgosana tsa makgotla a borara ba bana ba Iseraele, a ba phuthela mo Jerusalema, go tla ba tlhatlosa letlole la kgolagano ya ga Jehofa kwa motseng wa ga Dafite, o e leng Sione." 
2Chronicles5:3 Banna botlhe ba Iseraele ba phuthegela kwa kgosing mo modirong, o o neng o jewa ka kgwedi ya bosupa." 
2Chronicles5:4 Bagolwane botlhe ba Iseraele ba tla, mme Balefi ba tsholetsa letlole." 
2Chronicles5:5 Ba tlhatlosa letlole, le mogope wa bophuthegelo, le dilwana tsotlhe tse di itshepileng tse di ne di le mo mogopeng; tseo baperesiti ba Balefi ba di tlhatlosa." 
2Chronicles5:6 Kgosi Solomone le phuthego yotlhe ya Baiseraele, e e phuthegetseng kwa go ene, ba bo ba le fa pele ga letlole, ba isa ditlhabelo tsa dinku le tsa dikgomo, tse di sa kakeng tsa balwa ka bontsi." 
2Chronicles5:7 Baperesiti ba tsenya letlole la kgolagano ya ga Jehofa mo bonnong jwa lone mo bobuelelong jwa ntlo, mo felong ga boitshepo jo bo itshepileng, e bong fa tlase ga diphuka tsa ditšheruba." 
2Chronicles5:8 Gonne ditšheruba tsa bo di tsharolotse diphuka tsa tsone fa godimo ga felo ga letlole, mme ditšheruba tsa khurumetsa letlole le disikaro tsa lone." 
2Chronicles5:9 Disikaro di ne di le ditelele, dintlha tsa disikaro tsa ba tsa bonala di tswa mo letloleng fa pele ga bobuelelo, di sa bonale motho a le kwa ntle; ke gone kwa le gone le gompieno." 
2Chronicles5:10 Go ne go se na sepe mo letloleng fa e se matlapa a mabedi a Moše o a beileng gone kwa Horebe jale ka Jehofa a dira kgolagano le bana ba Iseraele ka ba tswa kwa Egepeto. 
2Chronicles5:11 Ga dirala ya re baperesiti ba sena go tswa mo felong ga boitshepo, (gonne baperesiti ba ba gone ba ne ba iitshepisitse botlhe fela, ba sa tlhokomele go dira ka makoko a diphapaano tsa bone;" 
2Chronicles5:12 le bone Balefi ba e leng baopedi botlhe fela, e bong Asafe, Hemane, Jeduthune le bomorwaa bone le bomonnaa bone, ba ema ntlheng ya botlhabatsatsi ga sebeso ba kgabile ka leloba le le boleta, ba na le disemebala le disaletere le diharepe ba bile ba na le baperesiti ba le 120 ba ba letsang dinaka)." 
2Chronicles5:13 Ga dirala fela ya re baletsi ba dinaka le baopedi ba ntse jaaka motho a le mongwe fela, ba dira gore go utlwale modumo o le mongwe fela mo go bakeng le mo go lebogeng Jehofa; ya re ba tsholetsa lentswe la bone ka dinaka, le disemebala, le dilo tsa kopelo, ba baka Jehofa, ba re: “Gonne o molemo; gonne boutlwelo botlhoko jwa gagwe bo eme ka bosakhutleng.” Foo ntlo ya tlala leru, e bong ntlo ya ga Jehofa." 
2Chronicles5:14 Baperesiti ba ba ba retelelwa ke go ema ba direla ka ntlha ya leru; gonne kgalalelo ya ga Jehofa e ne e tletse ka ntlo ya Modimo. 
2Chronicles6:1 Foo Solomone a bua a re: “Jehofa o rile o tlaa aga mo lefifing le lentsho. 
2Chronicles6:2 Mme ke go agetse ntlo ya bonno, le felo ga gago go aga gone ka bosakhutleng.”" 
2Chronicles6:3 Kgosi ya retologa, ya segofatsa phuthego yotlhe ya Iseraele, mme phuthego yotlhe ya Iseraele ya ema ka dinao." 
2Chronicles6:4 Kgosi ya re: “A go bakwe Jehofa Modimo wa Iseraele, yo o ne a bua ka molomo le rre Dafite, o bile a diraditse ka diatla, a re:" 
2Chronicles6:5 ‘E sa le ka ke ntsha batho ba me mo lefatsheng la Egepeto ga ise nke ke itshenkele motse ope mo ditsong tsotlhe tsa Iseraele go tla ke aga ntlo mo go one, gore leina la me le nne gone; le gone ga ise nke ke itshenkele motho ope go tla a nna kgosana ya batho ba me Baiseraele." 
2Chronicles6:6 Mme ke itshenketse Jerusalema, gore leina la me le nne gone; ke bile ke itshenketse Dafite, gore a buse batho ba me Baiseraele.’" 
2Chronicles6:7 “Go ne go le mo pelong ya ga rre Dafite go agela leina la ga Jehofa Modimo wa Iseraele ntlo. 
2Chronicles6:8 Mme Jehofa a raya rre Dafite a re: ‘E re ka go no go le mo pelong ya gago go agela leina la me ntlo, o dirile sentle, ka go ne go le mo pelong ya gago." 
2Chronicles6:9 Le fa go ntse jalo ga o ketla o aga ntlo eo; mme morwao yo o tlaa tswang mo mmeleng wa gago, ke ene o tlaa agelang leina la me ntlo.’" 
2Chronicles6:10 “Jehofa o dirafaditse lefoko la gagwe le o ne a le bua, gonne nna ke tsogile mo boemong jwa ga Dafite rre, ke dutse mo setulong sa bogosi sa Iseraele, jaaka Jehofa a na a re solofeditse, mme ke agetse leina la ga Jehofa Modimo wa Iseraele ntlo." 
2Chronicles6:11 Ke beile letlole gone, le kgolagano ya ga Jehofa e mo go lone e o ne a e dira le bana ba Iseraele.”" 
2Chronicles6:12 Kgosi ya ema fa pele ga sebeso sa ga Jehofa mo ponong ya phuthego yotlhe ya Baiseraele, a otlolola mabogo." 
2Chronicles6:13 (Gonne Solomone o ne a dirile maemo a kgotlho, boleele jwa one bo le dimetara di le 2,2, boatlhamo jwa one bo le dimetara di le 2,2, le bogodimo jwa one bo le dimetara di le 1,3, a a tlhomile fa gare ga lolwapa. Mme a ema mo go one, a khubama ka mangole fa pele ga phuthego yotlhe ya Baiseraele, a otlololela mabogo kwa legodimong)," 
2Chronicles6:14 mme a re: “Jehofa Modimo wa Iseraele, ga go na Modimo ope o o tshwanang nao, kwa legodimong le fa e le mo lefatsheng; yo o tshegeletsang batlhanka ba gago kgolagano le boutlwelo botlhoko, e bong ba ba sepelang fa pele ga gago ka pelo yotlhe ya bone;" 
2Chronicles6:15 yo o tshegeleditseng motlhanka wa gago Dafite rre se o ne o se mo solofeditse; ee, o ne wa bua ka molomo, mme o se dirafaditse ka seatla sa gago, jaaka go ntse gompieno." 
2Chronicles6:16 Ke gone, jaana, Jehofa Modimo wa Iseraele, tshegeletsa motlhanka wa gago Dafite rre se o ne wa se mo solofetsa wa re: ‘Ga go ketla go go tlhokafalela monna mo ponong ya me wa go dula mo setulong sa bogosi sa Iseraele; ke raya fa bana ba gago ba tlhokomela tsela ya bone go sepela mo molaong wa me jaaka o sepetse fa pele ga me.’" 
2Chronicles6:17 Ke gone jaana, Jehofa Modimo wa Iseraele, a lefoko la gago le ke le rurifadiwe le o ne wa le bua le motlhanka wa gago Dafite." 
2Chronicles6:18 “A ruri Modimo o ka aga le batho mo lefatsheng? Bona, legodimo, le legodimo la magodimo, ga le a go lekana; bogolo jang ntlo e ke e agileng!" 
2Chronicles6:19 Le fa go ntse jalo a ko o ngoke morapelo wa motlhanka wa gago, le mokokotlelo wa gagwe, Jehofa Modimo wa me, go reetsa pitso le morapelo o motlhanka wa gago o o rapelang fa pele ga gago." 
2Chronicles6:20 Gore matlho a gago a budulogele ntlo e, motshegare le bosigo, e bong felo fa o buileng ka ga gone wa re, o tlaa baya leina la gago gone; go tla o reetsa morapelo o motlhanka wa gago o tlaa o rapelang a lebile felo fa." 
2Chronicles6:21 O reetse mekokotlelo ya motlhanka wa gago, le ya batho ba gago Baiseraele, mogang ba rapelang ba lebile felo fa, ee, utlwa o le bonnong jwa gago, e bong kwa legodimong, mme o re o utlwa, o itshwarele." 
2Chronicles6:22 “E re fa motho a leofela wa ga gabo, mme ikano e beilwe mo go ene e e mo ikanisang, mme fa a tla go ikana fa pele ga sebeso sa gago mo ntlong e," 
2Chronicles6:23 foo o utlwe o le kwa legodimong, mme o dire, o atlhole batlhanka ba gago, ka go lefisa moikepi, go tla o busetsa tsela ya gagwe mo tlhogong ya gagwe; o siamisetse mosiami, go tla o mo naya ka fa tshiamong ya gagwe." 
2Chronicles6:24 “E re fa batho ba gago Baiseraele ba kgemethwa fa pele ga baba ba bone ka gobo ba go leofetse; mme fa ba sokologa, ba ipolela leina la gago, ba rapela ba kokotlela fa pele ga gago mo ntlong e," 
2Chronicles6:25 foo o utlwe o le kwa legodimong, mme o itshwarele boleo jwa batho ba gago Baiseraele, o ba busetse mo lefatsheng le o le neileng bone le borraabo." 
2Chronicles6:26 “Mogang legodimo le tswalegang, mme go se na pula, ka gobo ba go leofetse; fa ba rapela ba lebile felo fa, mme ba ipolela leina la gago, fa ba tlogela boleo jwa bone, mogang o ba utlwisang botlhoko," 
2Chronicles6:27 foo o utlwe o le kwa legodimong, o itshwarele boleo jwa batlhanka ba gago, le jwa batho ba gago Baiseraele, ka o ba ruta tsela e e molemo e ba tshwanetseng go sepela mo go yone; mme o nese pula mo lefatsheng la gago, le o le neileng batho ba gago go nna boswa." 
2Chronicles6:28 “E re fa go le leuba mo lefatsheng, fa go le kgogodi, fa go le tshubego, kgotsa mapote, tsie kgotsa seboko; fa baba ba bone ba ba tlhasela mo lefatsheng la metse ya bone; le fa go ka bo go le petso efe, le fa go ka bo go le botlhoko bofe;" 
2Chronicles6:29 le fa e ka bo e le morapelo le mokokotlelo ofe o o dirwang ke motho mongwe, kgotsa ke batho botlhe ba Iseraele, ba mongwe le mongwe wa bone o tlaa itseng petso ya gagwe tota, le bohutsana jwa gagwe tota, mme fa a ntsha mabogo a gagwe a lebile ntlo e," 
2Chronicles6:30 foo o utlwe o le kwa legodimong bonnong jwa gago, o itshwarele, o direle motho mongwe le mongwe ka fa ditseleng tsotlhe tsa gagwe, yo pelo ya gagwe o e itseng; (gonne wena, e bong wena wesi, o itse dipelo tsa bana ba batho);" 
2Chronicles6:31 gore ba tle ba go boife, go tla ba sepela mo ditseleng tsa gago, ka metlha yotlhe e ba tshelang ka yone mo lefatsheng le o le neileng borraetsho." 
2Chronicles6:32 “Gape, ka ga moeng yo e seng wa batho ba gago Baiseraele, e tlaa re fa a tswa lefatsheng le le kgakala ka ntlha ya leina la gago le legolo, le ka ntlha ya seatla sa gago sa bonatla, le letsogo la gago le le otlologileng, fa a tla, mme a rapela a lebile ntlo e," 
2Chronicles6:33 foo o utlwe o le kwa legodimong, e bong bonnong jwa gago, mme o dire ka fa go tsotlhe tse moeng o biletsang koo go wena ka ga tsone; gore ditšhaba tsotlhe tsa lefatshe di itse leina la gago, di go boife, jaaka batho ba gago Baiseraele, le gore ba itse fa ntlo e ke e agileng e bidiwa ka leina la gago." 
2Chronicles6:34 “E re fa batho ba gago ba bololela baba ba bone ba ya go tlhabana nabo, le fa e ka ne e le tsela efe e o ba romang ka yone, mme fa ba go rapela ba lebile motse o, o o o itshenketseng, le ntlo e ke e agetseng leina la gago," 
2Chronicles6:35 foo o utlwe o le kwa legodimong, o utlwe morapelo wa bone le mokokotlelo wa bone, mme o emele tshiamelo ya bone." 
2Chronicles6:36 “Fa ba go leofela (gonne ga go na motho ope yo o sa leofeng) fa o nna bogale nabo, o ba neela baba ba bone, mme ba ba isa ba golegilwe kwa lefatsheng le le kgakala, kgotsa le le gaufi;" 
2Chronicles6:37 le fa go ntse jalo fa ba ikgopodisa ba le kwa lefatsheng le ba isitsweng kwa go lone ba golegilwe, mme fa ba sokologa ba go kokotlelela kwa lefatsheng la kgolego ya bone, ba re: ‘Re leofile, re dirile ka bokgopo, re dirile ka boikepo;’" 
2Chronicles6:38 fa ba boela mo go wena ka pelo yotlhe ya bone le ka mowa otlhe wa bone, ba le kwa lefatsheng la kgolego ya bone, kwa ba ba isitseng gone ba golegilwe, mme fa ba rapela ba lebile lefatshe la ga bone, le o ne wa le naya borraabo, le motse o o ne wa o itshenkela, le ntlo e ke e agetseng leina la gago," 
2Chronicles6:39 foo o utlwe o le kwa legodimong, e bong bonnong jwa gago, o utlwe morapelo wa bone le mekokotlelo ya bone, mme o emele tshiamelo ya bone; o itshwarele batho ba gago ba ba go leofetseng." 
2Chronicles6:40 “Ka moo, Modimo wa me, ke a go rapela, a matlho a gago a buduloge, a ditsebe tsa gago di sekegele morapelo o o dirwang mo felong fa." 
2Chronicles6:41 Ke gone jaana a ko o nanoge Jehofa Modimo, o tsene mo felong ga gago ga boikhutso, wena le letlole la nonotsho ya gago. A baperesiti ba gago Jehofa Modimo, ba apare poloko, mme a baitshepi ba gago ba itumele mo molemong." 
2Chronicles6:42 “Jehofa Modimo, o se ka wa busa sefatlhogo sa motlodiwa wa gago; o gakologelwe mapelonomi a ga Dafite motlhanka wa gago.”" 
2Chronicles7:1 Jaana e rile Solomone a sena go wetsa go rapela, molelo wa fologa kwa legodimong, wa nyeletsa tshupelo e e fisiwang le ditlhabelo; mme kgalalelo ya ga Jehofa ya tlala ka ntlo." 
2Chronicles7:2 Baperesiti ba retelelwa ke go tsena mo ntlong ya ga Jehofa, gonne kgalalelo ya ga Jehofa e ne e tletse ka ntlo ya Jehofa." 
2Chronicles7:3 E rile molelo o fologa le kgalelo ya ga Jehofa e le mo ntlong, bana botlhe ba Iseraele ba bo ba lebile; mme ba ikobela ka difatlhogo fa fatshe mo bopapathong jwa matlapa, ba obamela ba leboga Jehofa ba re: “Gonne o molemo, le boutlwelobotlhoko jwa gagwe bo eme ka bosakhutleng.”" 
2Chronicles7:4 Foo kgosi le batho botlhe ba isa tlhabelo fa pele ga Jehofa. 
2Chronicles7:5 Kgosi Solomone a isa tlhabelo e le dikgomo di le 22 000, le dinku di le 120 000. Kgosi le batho botlhe ba neela Modimo ntlo ya one." 
2Chronicles7:6 Baperesiti ba ema ka dinao ka fa ditirong tsa bone; Belefi le bone ba ema ka diletso tsa kopelo tsa ga Jehofa, tse kgosi Dafite o ne a di dirile go tla go leboga Jehofa ka tsone, ka boutlwelobotlhoko jwa one bo eme ka bosakhutleng, jale ka Dafite a baka ka tirelo ya bone; baperesiti ba letsa dinaka fa pele ga bone; mme Baiseraele botlhe ba bo ba eme ka dinao." 
2Chronicles7:7 Gape Solomone a itshepisa bogare jwa lolwapa lo lo fa pele ga ntlo ya ga Jehofa; gonne ke gone fa o ne a isetsa gone ditshupelo tse di fisiwang, le mafura a ditshupelo tsa kagiso, gonne sebeso sa kgotlho se Solomone o se dirileng se ne se sa lekana go tshola tshupelo e e fisiwang le tshupelo ya boupe le mahura." 
2Chronicles7:8 Solomone a dira modiro ka lobaka loo ka malatsi a supa, le Baiseraele botlhe nae, e le phuthego e kgolo thata, ba tswa kwa botsenong jwa Hamatha go ya kwa molatswaneng wa Egepeto." 
2Chronicles7:9 Ya re ka letsatsi la 8 ba nna phuthego e e masisi, gonne ba tshegetsa neelo ya sebeso ka malatsi a supa le modiro ka malatsi a supa." 
2Chronicles7:10 Ya re ka letsatsi la 23 la kgwedi ya bosupa, a naya batho tsela, mme ba ya megopeng ya bone, ba itumetse ba le pelo e monate ka ga molemo o Jehofa o o diretseng Dafite, le Solomone, le Baiseraele batho ba gagwe." 
2Chronicles7:11 Jalo Solomone a wetsa ntlo ya ga Jehofa, le ntlo ya kgosi; tsotlhe tse di tsenang mo pelong ya ga Solomone go di dira mo ntlong ya ga Jehofa le mo ntlong ya gagwe tota a di dira a di fenya." 
2Chronicles7:12 Jehofa a bonalela Solomone go le bosigo a mo raya a re: “Ke utlwile morapelo wa gago, ke bile ke itshenketse felo fa, gore go nne ntlo ya tlhabelelo." 
2Chronicles7:13 E tlaa re fa ke tswala legodimo, mme pula e sa ne, kgotsa fa ke laola gore tsie e bilatse lefatshe, kgotsa fa ke tsosa kgogodi mo bathong ba me;" 
2Chronicles7:14 fa batho ba me ba ba bidiwang ka leina la me, ba ikokobetsa, mme ba rapela, ba batla sefatlhogo sa me, mme ba tlogela ditsela tsa bone tsa boikepo; foo ke tlaa utlwa ke le mo legodimong, mme ke tlaa itshwarela boleo jwa bone, ke fodisa lefatshe la bone." 
2Chronicles7:15 Jaana matlho a me a tlaa buduloga, le ditsebe tsa me ke tlaa di sekegela morapelo o o dirwang mo felong fa." 
2Chronicles7:16 Gonne jaana ke itshenketse ke bile ke itshepisitse ntlo e, gore leina la me le tle le nne gone ka bosakhutleng, le matlho a me a tlaa nna gone ka metlha yotlhe, le pelo ya me." 
2Chronicles7:17 Ka ga gago, fa o sepela fa pele ga me jaaka Dafite rraago a sepetse, fa o dira ka fa go tsotlhe tse ke di go laoletseng o ba o tshegetsa melao le dikatlholo tsa me;" 
2Chronicles7:18 foo ke tlaa tlhomamisa setulo sa bogosi jwa gago ka fa ke golaganyeng le rraago Dafite ka gone, ka re: ‘Ga go ketla go go tlhokafalela monna wa go nna mmusi mo Iseraele.’" 
2Chronicles7:19 Mme fa lo fapoga, lo latlha melao ya me, le ditaolo tsa me tse ke di beileng fa pele ga lona, mme lo ya lo direla medimo e sele, lo e obamela," 
2Chronicles7:20 foo ke tlaa ba khumola ka medi ke ba ntsha mo lefatsheng le ke le ba neileng; mme ntlo e, e ke e itshepiseditseng leina la me, ke tlaa e latlha, e tswa mo ponong ya me, ke tlaa e dira gore e nne setlhabaseane le lefoko la tshotlo mo ditšhabeng tsotlhe." 
2Chronicles7:21 “Le ntlo e, e e godileng mo go kana, mongwe le mongwe yo o fetang ka yone o tlaa gakgamala, a re: ‘Ana Jehofa o ne a direlelang lefatshe jaana, le ntlo e?’" 
2Chronicles7:22 Ba tlaa fetola ba re: ‘Ka gonne ba ne ba latlhile Jehofa Modimo wa borraabo, yo o ne a ba ntsha mo lefatsheng la Egepeto, mme ba tshwara medimo e sele, ba e obamela, ba e direla; ke gone ka fa o lerileng bosula jotlhe jo mo go bone ka gone.’ ”" 
2Chronicles8:1 Ga dirala ya re dinyaga di le 20 di sena go feta, tse Solomone o ne a aga ntlo ya ga Jehofa le ntlo ya gagwe tota ka tsone," 
2Chronicles8:2 metse e Hurame o kileng a e naya Solomone, Solomone a e aga, mme a baya bana ba Iseraele, gore ba age mo go yone." 
2Chronicles8:3 Solomone a ya motseng wa Hamathe-soba, mme a o fenya." 
2Chronicles8:4 A aga Tatamore mo nageng, le metse yotlhe ya mabolokelo, e o e agileng mo Hamathe." 
2Chronicles8:5 Le gone a aga Bethehorone, o o kwa godimo le Bethehorone, o o kwa tlase, e le metse e e thekeleditsweng ka dithako, ka ditswalo, le mephakalego;" 
2Chronicles8:6 le Baalathe, le metse yotlhe ya mabolokelo e Solomone o ne a na nayo, le metse yotlhe ya dikara tsa gagwe, le metse ya bapalami ba dipitse, le tsotlhe tse Solomone o ne a eletsa go di aga go tla a ikgatlha ka tsone, mo Jerusalema, le mo Lebanone, le mo lefatsheng lotlhe la mmuso wa gagwe." 
2Chronicles8:7 Ka ga batho botlhe ba ba setseng ba Bahite, le ba Baamore, le ba Baperise, le ba Bahifa, le ba Bajebuse, le ba e ne e se Baiseraele;" 
2Chronicles8:8 mo baneng ba bone ba ba setseng morago ga bone mo lefatsheng, ba bana ba Iseraele ba se kang ba ba nyeletsa, Solomone a ba tsaya lekgetho go tla ba nna batlhanka, nako e sa le eno." 
2Chronicles8:9 Mo baneng ba Iseraele Solomone a se ka a dira batlhanka bape ba go dira tiro ya gagwe; bone ya bo e le batlhabani, le ditlhogo tsa balaodi ba gagwe, le balaodi ba dikara tsa gagwe, le bapalami ba dipitse tsa gagwe." 
2Chronicles8:10 Bano e ne e le balaodisiwa ba bagolo ba ga Solomone, e bong batho ba le 250 ba ba laolang batho." 
2Chronicles8:11 Solomone a tlhatlosa morwadia Faro kwa motseng wa ga Dafite a mo isa kwa ntlong e o e mo agetseng gonne a re: “Mosadi wa me ga a ketla a nna mo ntlong ya ga Dafite kgosi ya Iseraele gonne mafelo ao a itshepile, kwa letlole la ga Jehofa le tsileng gone.”" 
2Chronicles8:12 Foo Solomone a isetsa Jehofa ditshupelo tse di fisiwang mo sebesong sa ga Jehofa, se o se agileng fa pele ga mokatako." 
2Chronicles8:13 Fela jaaka tshwanelo ya letsatsi lengwe le lengwe e lopa, a isa ka fa taolong ya ga Moše, ka metlha ya bosabata, le ya go rogwa ga dikgwedi, le ya mediro e e laotsweng, mediro e le meraro ka ngwaga, e bong mo motlheng wa modiro wa senkgwe se se sa bedisiwang, le mo go wa modiro wa dibeke, le mo go wa modiro wa metlaagana." 
2Chronicles8:14 Makoko a diphapaano a baperesiti a a laolela tirelo ya one, ka fa taolong ya ga Dafite rraagwe, le Balefi a ba laolela ditebelo tsa bone, go baka le go direla fa pele ga baperesiti ka fa tshwanelo ya letsatsi lengwe le lengwe e lopang ka gone; le balebedi ba mejako ka fa diphapaanong tsa bone fa kgorong nngwe le nngwe; gonne Dafite monna wa Modimo o ne a laotse jalo." 
2Chronicles8:15 Ga baa ka ba tlogela taolo ya kgosi, e o e laoletseng baperesiti le Balefi ka ga tiro epe, le fa e le ka ga dikhumo." 
2Chronicles8:16 Jaana tiro yotlhe ya ga Solomone e bo e ne e baakantswe go tla mo tsatsing la go thaiwa ga ntlo ya ga Jehofa, le go ya mo go wediweng ga yone. Jalo ntlo ya ga Jehofa ya dirwa boitekanelo." 
2Chronicles8:17 Foo Solomone a ya Esione-gebere, le kwa Elothe, fa losing lwa lewatle mo lefatsheng la Etome." 
2Chronicles8:18 Mme Hurame a mo isetsa dikepe ka batlhanka ba gagwe, le batlhanka ba ba nang le kitso ya lewatle, ba ya le batlhanka ba ga Solomone kwa Ofire, ba tsaya gouta gone e le dikilokerame di feta 15 000, ba e isa kwa go kgosi Solomone." 
2Chronicles9:1 E rile mohumagadi kgosi ya Sheba a utlwela tumedi ya ga Solomone, a tla Jerusalema go leka Solomone ka dipotso tse di thata, a na le batho ba le bantsi ba ba mo patileng, le dikamela tse di belesitseng ditswaiso, le gouta e le kgolo, le majana a a tlhokegang; mme ya re a tsile mo go Solomone a bua nae ka ga tsotlhe tse di mo pelong ya gagwe." 
2Chronicles9:2 Solomone a mo ranolela dipotso tsotlhe tsa gagwe, go se na sepe se se subegetseng Solomone se o sa se mmolelelang." 
2Chronicles9:3 E rile mohumagadi kgosi ya Sheba a sena go bona botlhale jwa ga Solomone, le ntlo e o e agileng," 
2Chronicles9:4 le dijo tsa lomati lwa gagwe lwa bojelo, le go dula ga batlhanka ba gagwe, le go ema ga badiredi ba gagwe le diaparo tsa bone; le bone batshola dinwelo ba gagwe, le diaparo tsa bone; le botlhatlogo jwa gagwe jo o tlhatlogelang ka jone kwa ntlong ya ga Jehofa; ga bo go sa tlhole go le mowa ope mo go ene mohumagadi." 
2Chronicles9:5 Mme a raya kgosi a re: “E ne e le poledi ya mmaanete e ke e utlwileng kwa lefatsheng la gaetsho ka ga ditiro tsa gago, le ka ga botlhale jwa gago." 
2Chronicles9:6 Le fa go ntse jalo ga ke a ka ka dumela mafoko a batho, go tsamaya ke tla, mme matlho a me a bona; le fa e le bontlhanngwe jwa bogolo jwa botlhale jwa gago ke ne ke sa bo bolelelwa; o feta tumedi e ke e utlwileng." 
2Chronicles9:7 Batho ba gago ba sego, le batlhanka ba, ba gago ba sego, ba ba emang fa pele ga gago ka metlha yotlhe, ba utlwa botlhale jwa gago." 
2Chronicles9:8 A go bakwe Jehofa Modimo wa gago, yo o ne a kgatlhega mo go wena, a ba a tla a go baya mo setulong sa gagwe, go nna kgosi boemong jwa ga Jehofa Modimo wa gago. Gonne Modimo wa gago o ne o rata Baiseraele go tla o ba tlhomamisa ka bosakhutleng, ke gone ka fa o go dirileng kgosi ya bone ka gone, go tla o dira katlholo le tshiamiso.”" 
2Chronicles9:9 Mme Mohumagadi kgosi a naya kgosi dikilokerame tsa gouta di feta 4 000, le ditswaiso ka letlotlo le legolo, le majana a a tlhokegang; le gone go ne go se na ditswaiso dipe tse di tshwanang le tse mohumagadi kgosi ya Sheba o di neileng Solomone." 
2Chronicles9:10 Batlhanka ba ga Hurame, le batlhanka ba ga Solomone ba ba tswang go tsaya gouta kwa Ofire, ba tla le ditlhare tsa maalaguma le majana a a tlhokegang." 
2Chronicles9:11 Kgosi ya direla ntlo ya ga Jehofa le ntlo ya kgosi direpudi ka ditlhare tsa maalaguma, a dira le diharepe le disaletere tsa baopedi; mme go ne go ise go ko go bonwe tse di ntseng jalo gope mo lefatsheng la Juta." 
2Chronicles9:12 Kgosi Solomone a naya mohumagadi kgosi ya Sheba keletso yotlhe ya gagwe, sengwe le sengwe se o se lopang kwa ntle ga tse o ne a tsile natso kgosing. Mme a sokologa, a ya lefatsheng la ga gabo, ene le batlhanka ba gagwe." 
2Chronicles9:13 Jaana bokete jwa gouta e e tlang mo go Solomone ka ngwaga o le mongwe fela e ne e le dikilokerame di feta 23 000; 
2Chronicles9:14 kwa ntle ga e babapadi le bareki ba ne ba e tlisa. Dikgosi tsotlhe tsa Arabia le balaodi ba lefatshe ba tlisa gouta le selefera kwa go Solomone. 
2Chronicles9:15 Kgosi Solomone a dira dithebe tsa gouta di le 200, tsa gouta e e papetlilweng ka noto, thebe nngwe le nngwe ya dirwa ka dikilokerame di supa, tsa gouta e e papetlilweng." 
2Chronicles9:16 A dira dithejana di le 300 tsa gouta e e papetlilweng, thejana nngwe le nngwe ya dirwa ka dikilokerame di le tharo tsa gouta. Kgosi ya di tsenya mo ntlong ya sekgwa sa Lebanone." 
2Chronicles9:17 Gape kgosi ya dira setulo sa bogosi se segolo ka dinaka tsa ditlou, a se manega gouta e e itshekileng." 
2Chronicles9:18 Go ne go le direpudi di le thataro tse di isang kwa setulong sa bogosi, le sebeo sa dinao sa gouta, tse di gokeletsweng mo setulong sa bogosi, le maikaegelo a mabogo ka fa ntlheng nngwe le nngwe ya felo ga bodulo, le ditau di le pedi di eme ka fa mabogong." 
2Chronicles9:19 Ditau di le 12 di ne di eme mo direpuding tse thataro ka fa ntlheng e nngwe le e nngwe. Go ne go sa dirwa dipe tse di tshwanang natso mo bogosing bope. 
2Chronicles9:20 Le dinwelo tsotlhe tsa kgosi Solomone e ne e le tsa gouta, le dilwana tsotlhe tsa ntlo ya sekgwa sa Lebanone, e ne e le tsa gouta e e itshekileng; selefera se ne se sa kaiwe sepe mo metlheng ya ga Solomone." 
2Chronicles9:21 Gonne kgosi e ne e na le dikepe tse di yang Tarešiše di na le batlhanka ba ga Hurame; dikepe tsa Tarešiše di ne di tle di tle gangwe fela ka dinyaga di le tharo, di tlise gouta, le selefera, le dinaka tsa ditlou, le dikgatla le dipekoko." 
2Chronicles9:22 Kgosi Solomone a gaisa dikgosi tsotlhe tsa lefatshe ka dikhumo le ka botlhale. 
2Chronicles9:23 Dikgosi tsotlhe tsa lefatshe tsa rata go bona Solomone, le go utlwa botlhale jwa gagwe jo Modimo o bo tsentseng mo pelong ya gagwe." 
2Chronicles9:24 Motho mongwe le mongwe a tla le neo ya gagwe, dilwana tsa selefera, le dilwana tsa gouta, le diaparo, le dibolao, le ditswaiso, le dipitse le dimmoulo, ka selekanyo ka ngwaga le ngwaga." 
2Chronicles9:25 Solomone o ne a na le maemo a le 4 000 a dipitse le dikara, le bapalami ba dipitse ba le 12 000, ba o ne a ba baya mo metseng ya dikara, le mo Jerusalema kwa kgosing." 
2Chronicles9:26 Mme a busa dikgosi tsotlhe go tswa Nokeng go ya fela kwa lefatsheng la Bafilisitia, le kwa molelwaneng wa Egepeto." 
2Chronicles9:27 Mo Jerusalema kgosi ya tlatsa selefera sa nna jaaka maje, le masetara ya a tlatsa a nna jaaka ditlhare tsa masekamore tse di mo lefatsheng la sekhuti ka bontsi." 
2Chronicles9:28 Ba tseela Solomone dipitse kwa Egepeto le kwa mafatsheng otlhe. 
2Chronicles9:29 Ditiro tse dingwe tsa ga Solomone, tsa ntlha le tsa morago, a ga di a kwalwa mo mafokong a ga Nathane moperofeti le mo perofesong ya ga Ahija wa Mošilona, le mo diponatshegelong tsa ga Ito molebi ka ga Jeroboame morwa Nebate?" 
2Chronicles9:30 Mme Solomone a busa Baiseraele botlhe mo Jerusalema ka dinyaga di le 40. 
2Chronicles9:31 Solomone a robala le borraagwe, a fitlhwa mo motseng wa ga rraagwe, Dafite, mme Rehoboame morwawe a busa mo boemong jwa gagwe." 
2Chronicles10:1 Rehoboame a ya Shekeme, gonne Baiseraele botlhe ba ne ba tsile mo Shekeme ba tla go mo dira kgosi." 
2Chronicles10:2 Ga dirala ya re Jeroboame morwa Nebate a go utlwela, (gonne o ne a le kwa Egepeto kwa o ne a tshabetse gone a tswa mo ponong ya kgosi Solomone), Jeroboame a bowa kwa Egepeto." 
2Chronicles10:3 Mme ba roma ba ya go mmitsa; Jeroboame a tla a na le Baiseraele botlhe, mme ba bua le Rehoboame ba re:" 
2Chronicles10:4 “Rraago o ne a dira jokwe ya rona ya nna botlhoko; mme jaana wena, tlhofofatsa tirelo e e botlhoko ya ga rraago, le jokwe e e bokete e o ne a e baya mo go rona, mme re tlaa go direla.”" 
2Chronicles10:5 Mme a ba raya a re: “Lo tle lo tle gape kwa go nna go sena go feta malatsi a le mararo.” Mme batho ba tsamaya. 
2Chronicles10:6 Kgosi Rehoboame a gakololana le bannabagolo ba ba neng ba ema fa pele ga Solomone rraagwe a sa ntse a tshedile, a re: “Lo nnaya kgakololo efe, gore ke tle ke busetse batho ba phetolo?”" 
2Chronicles10:7 Ba bua nae ba re: “Fa o nna pelonomi mo bathong ba, o ba kgatlha, o bua mafoko a a molemo nabo, foo ba tlaa nna batlhanka ba gago ka bosakhutleng.”" 
2Chronicles10:8 Mme a latlha kgakololo ya bannabagolo e ba e mo gakolotseng, a gakololana le batho ba makau ba ba goletseng gongwe nae, ba ba emang fa pele ga gagwe." 
2Chronicles10:9 A ba raya a re: “Lona lo ntsha kgakololo efe, gore re tle re bosetse batho ba phetolo, ba ba buileng le nna ba re: ‘Tlhofofatsa jokwe e rraago o ne a e baya mo go rona, gore e nne motlhofo?’ ”" 
2Chronicles10:10 Batho ba makau ba ba goletseng gongwe nae ba re: “O tlaa raya batho ba ba buileng nao, ba re: ‘Rraago o ne a ketefatsa jokwe ya rona, wena o e tlhofofatse mo go rona’; o tlaa ba raya jaana o re: ‘Monwana wa me o mmotlana o tlaa nna mokima bogolo go lotheka lwa ga rre." 
2Chronicles10:11 Jaana e re ka rre a ne a lo belesa jokwe e e bokete, nna ke tlaa oketsa jokwe ya lona; rre o ne a lo simega ka dime, nna ke tlaa lo simega ka diphepheng.’ ”" 
2Chronicles10:12 Jalo Jeroboame le batho botlhe ba tla kwa go Rehoboame ka letsatsi la boraro, fela jaaka kgosi e ne e laotse ya re: “Lo tle kwa go nna gape ka letsasi la boraro.”" 
2Chronicles10:13 Kgosi ya ba fetola ka kgobololo; kgosi Rehoboame a latlha kgakololo ya bannabagolo. 
2Chronicles10:14 A bua nabo jaaka kgakololo ya batho ba makau, a re: “Rre o ne a ketefatsa jokwe ya lona, nna ke tlaa e oketsa; rre o na a lo simega ka dime, mme nna ke tlaa lo simega ka diphepheng.”" 
2Chronicles10:15 Kgosi ga e a ka ya reetsa batho; gonne go dirafaditswe ke Modimo, gore Jehofa a tlhomamise lefoko la gagwe le o ne a le bua le Jeroboame morwa Nabate ka Ahija, wa Mošilone." 
2Chronicles10:16 E rile Baiseraele botlhe ba bona fa kgosi e sa ba reetse, batho ba fetola kgosi ba re: “Re na le kabelo efe mo go Dafite? Le gone ga re na boswa bope mo go morwa Jese. Yang megopeng ya lona Baiseraele lotlhe; o bone ntlo ya gago, wena Dafite.” Mme Baiseraele botlhe ba tloga ba ya megopeng ya bone." 
2Chronicles10:17 Ka ga bana ba Iseraele ba ba agileng mo metseng ya Juta, Rehoboame a ba busa fela." 
2Chronicles10:18 Foo kgosi Rehoboame a roma Hatorame, yo e leng molaodi wa ba ba kgethilweng; mme bana ba Iseraele ba mo kgobotletsa ka maje, a swa. Kgosi Rehoboame a itlhaganela a palama mo kareng ya gagwe, go tla a tshabela kwa Jerusalema." 
2Chronicles10:19 Mme Baiseraele ba sa le ba tsuololela kgotla ya ga Dafite, nako ke eno." 
2Chronicles11:1 E rile Rehoboame a tla mo Jerusalema a phutha ba kgotla ya Juta le ya Benjamine, banna ba le 180 000 ba ba tlhophegileng, e le banna ba ntwa, gore ba tlhabane le ba Iseraele, go tla ba busetsa bogosi mo go Rehoboame." 
2Chronicles11:2 Mme lefoko la ga Jehofa la tla kwa go Shemaia monna wa Modimo la re: 
2Chronicles11:3 “Bua le Rehoboame morwa Solomone, kgosi ya Juta, le ba Iseraele botlhe ba ba mo go ba Juta le mo go ba Benjamine o re:" 
2Chronicles11:4 ‘Jehofa o bua jaana a re: Lo se ka lwa bolola, le fa e le go tlhabana le bana ba ga rraeno; a mongwe le mongwe wa lona a boele kwa ga gagwe; gonne selo se, se tswa mo go nna.’ ” Mme ba reetsa mafoko a ga Jehofa, ba boa kwa go bololeleng Jeroboame." 
2Chronicles11:5 Rehoboame a aga mo Jerusalema, a aga metse ya phemelo mo Juta." 
2Chronicles11:6 A aga e bong Bethelehema, le Etame le Tekoa," 
2Chronicles11:7 le Bethesure, le Shoko le Adulame," 
2Chronicles11:8 le Gathe, le Mareša le Sife," 
2Chronicles11:9 le Atoraime, le Lakiše le Aseka," 
2Chronicles11:10 le Sora, le Aijalone le Heberone, metse e e mo Juta le mo Benjamine, metse e e thekeleditsweng." 
2Chronicles11:11 Mme a thatafatsa manno a a thata a phemelo, a baya balaodi gone, le sekokotlegelo sa dijo, le lookwane le bojalwa jwa mofine." 
2Chronicles11:12 Le mo motseng mongwe le mongwe a baya dithebe le marumo, a e thatafatsa mo go feteletseng. Mme Bajuta le Babenjamine, e ne e le ba gagwe." 
2Chronicles11:13 Baperesiti le Balefi ba ba mo go ba Iseraele botlhe ba ya kwa go ene ba tswa kwa melelwaneng yotlhe ya bone. 
2Chronicles11:14 Gonne Balefi ba ne ba tlogela dintlhana tsa bone, le dithuo tsa bone ba tla mo Juta le mo Jerusalema, gonne Jeroboame le bomorwawe ba ba latlha, gore ba se ka ba direla Jehofa ka tiro ya boperesiti." 
2Chronicles11:15 Mme a itlhomela baperesiti ba mafelo a a tlotlometseng, le ba medimo ya dikapodi, le ba dinamane tse o di dirileng." 
2Chronicles11:16 Morago ga bone, go sa le go tswa mo ditsong tsotlhe tsa Iseraele botlhe ba ba itlhomamisitseng ka pelo tsa bone go batla Jehofa, Modimo wa Iseraele, mme ba tla Jerusalema go isetsa Jehofa Modimo wa borraabo tlhabelo." 
2Chronicles11:17 Jalo ba thatafatsa bogosi jwa Juta, ba naya Rehoboame morwa Solomone thata, ka dinyaga di le tharo, gonne ba ne ba sepela ka dinyaga di le tharo mo tseleng ya ga Dafite le Solomone." 
2Chronicles11:18 Rehoboame a tsaya mosadi, Mahalathe morwadia Jerimothe, morwa Dafite, le wa ga Abihaile morwadia Eliabe morwa Jese." 
2Chronicles11:19 A bona nae bana ba basimane: Jeuše, le Shemaria le Sahame." 
2Chronicles11:20 Morago ga gagwe a tsaya Maaka morwadia Abesalome; a bona nae Abija, le Atai, le Sise le Shelimothe." 
2Chronicles11:21 Rehoboame a rata Maaka, morwadia Abesalome bogolo go basadi botlhe ba gagwe le bagadingwana ba gagwe; (gonne o ne a tsaya basadi ba le 18 le bagadingwana ba le 60, mme a tshola bana ba basimane ba le 28, ba basetsana ba le 60.)" 
2Chronicles11:22 Rehoboame a baya Abija morwa Maaka mogolo, e bong kgosana mo go bomonnawe, gonne o na a laotse go mo dira kgosi." 
2Chronicles11:23 A dira ka botlhale, a falaletsa bomorwawe botlhe le mafatshe otlhe a Juta le Benjamine, a ba baya mo motseng mongwe le mongwe o o thekeleditsweng, a ba naya dijo ka botlalo. A ba batlela basadi ba le bantsi." 
2Chronicles12:1 Ga dirala e rile bogosi jwa ga Rehoboame bo sena go tlhomama, le ene a le thata, a tlogela molao wa ga Jehofa, le Baiseraele botlhe nae." 
2Chronicles12:2 Ga dirala ya re ka ngwaga wa botlhano wa kgosi Rehoboame, Shišake kgosi ya Egepeto a bololela Jerusalema, ka ba ne ba leofetse Jehofa," 
2Chronicles12:3 a na le dikara di le 1 200, mme bapalami ba dipitse ba le 60 000; batho ba ba tlang nabo ba tswa Egepeto ba bo ba se na palo: Balubime, le Basukime le Baethiopia." 
2Chronicles12:4 A gapa metse e e thekeleditsweng e e leng ya Juta, a ba a tla mo Jerusalema." 
2Chronicles12:5 Shemaia moperofeti a tla kwa go Rehoboame, le kwa dikgosaneng tsa Juta, tse di phuthegetseng kwa Jerusalema, ka ntlha ya ga Shišake, mme a ba raya a re: “Jehofa, o bua jaana a re: ‘Lo ntatlhile, ke gone ka moo le nna ke lo tlogetse mo seatleng sa ga Shišake.’ ”" 
2Chronicles12:6 Foo dikgosana tsa Iseraele tsa ikokobetsa, le kgosi, mme ba re: “Jehofa o tshiamo.”" 
2Chronicles12:7 E rile Jehofa a bona fa ba ikokobeditse, lefoko la ga Jehofa la tla kwa go Shemaia, la re: “Ba ikokobeditse; ga nketla ke ba senya, mme ke tlaa ba naya kgololo ka ntlha nngwe, le bogale jwa me ga bo ketla bo gorometsegela Jerusalema ka Shišake." 
2Chronicles12:8 Le fa go ntse jalo ba tlaa nna batlhanka ba gagwe; gore ba itse tirelo ya me, le tirelo ya magosi a mafatshe.”" 
2Chronicles12:9 Jalo Shišake kgosi ya Egepeto a bololela Jerusalema, mme a tsaya a tlosa dikhumo tsa ntlo ya ga Jehofa, le dikhumo tsa ntlo ya kgosi; a tsaya gotlhe fela; a tlosa le dithebe tsa gouta tse Solomone o kileng a di dira." 
2Chronicles12:10 Kgosi Rehoboame a dira dithebe tsa kgotlho mo boemong jwa tsone, a di tsenya mo diatleng tsa balaodi ba balebedi ba ba lebelang kgoro ya ntlo ya kgosi." 
2Chronicles12:11 Ga dirala e ne e tle e re fa kgosi e tsena mo ntlong ya ga Jehofa, balebedi ba di sikare, ba itse go di busetsa mo ntlwaneng ya balebedi." 
2Chronicles12:12 Mme ya re a ikokobetsa, bogale jwa ga Jehofa jwa mo fapoga, go tla a se ka a mo senyetsa ruri, gape mo Juta ga fitlhelwa dilo tse di molemo." 
2Chronicles12:13 Jalo kgosi Rehoboame a ithatafatsa mo Jerusalema, mme a busa; gonne Rehoboame o rile a simolola go busa a bo a le dinyaga di le 41, mme a busa ka dinyaga di le 17 mo Jerusalema, e le motse o Jehofa o ne a o itshenketse mo ditsong tsotlhe tsa Iseraele, go tla a baya leina la gagwe gone. Leina la ga mmaagwe e ne e le Naama mosadi wa Moamone." 
2Chronicles12:14 Mme a dira se se bosula, ka a se ka a itlhomamisa ka pelo go batla Jehofa." 
2Chronicles12:15 Jaana ditiro tsa ga Rehoboame tsa ntlha le tsa morago, a ga di a kwalwa mo mafokong a ga Shemaia moperofeti, le a ga Ito molebi, ka fa mokgweng wa palo ya ditshika. Ga bo go ntse go le dintwa gare ga Rehoboame le Jeroboame ka metlha yotlhe." 
2Chronicles12:16 Mme Rehoboame a robala le borraagwe, a fitlhwa mo motseng wa ga Dafite; mme Abija morwawe a busa mo boemong jwa gagwe." 
2Chronicles13:1 Abija a simolola go busa Bajuta ka ngwaga wa 18 wa kgosi Jeroboame. 
2Chronicles13:2 A busa ka dinyaga di le tharo mo Jerusalema; leina la ga mmaagwe e ne e le Mikaia morwadia Uriele wa Gibea. Mme go ne go le ntwa gare ga Abija le Jeroboame. 
2Chronicles13:3 Abija a rulaganya tlhabano a na le ntwa ya diganka tsa tlhabano, e bong banna ba ba tlhophegileng ba le 400 000. Jeroboame a mo abela tlhabano a na le banna ba ba tlhophegileng ba le 800 000, ba e ne e le diganka tse di dinatla." 
2Chronicles13:4 Abija a ema mo godimo ga thabana ya Semaraime e e mo lefatsheng la Eferaime la makhujana a re: “A ko o nkutlwe wena Jeroboame le Baiseraele botlhe. 
2Chronicles13:5 A ga lo a tshwanela go itse fa Jehofa Modimo wa Iseraele a neile Dafite bogosi jwa Iseraele ka bosakhutleng, e bong ene le bomorwawe ka kgolagano ya letswai?" 
2Chronicles13:6 Le fa go ntse jalo Jeroboame morwa Nebate, motlhanka wa ga Solomone morwa Dafite, a ema, a tsuololela morena wa gagwe." 
2Chronicles13:7 Ga phuthegela kwa go ene banna ba ba difafalele, banna ba ba diramatla, ba ithatafaletsa go tlhabana le Rehoboame morwa Solomone ka Rehoboame a sa ntse a le lekau, a le pelo e e sisimogang, mme a retelelwa ke go ganela nabo." 
2Chronicles13:8 Mme jaana gompieno lo gopotse go ganela le bogosi jwa ga Jehofa bo le mo seatleng sa bomorwa Dafite, lo bontsi jo bogolo, lo na le dinamane tsa gouta tse Jeroboame o di lo diretseng go nna medimo." 
2Chronicles13:9 A ga lo a leleka baperesiti ba ga Jehofa bomorwa Arone, le Balefi, mme lo itiretse baperesiti ka fa mokgweng wa ditšhaba tsa mafatshe a mangwe? Ke go re, le fa mongwe a ka tla go itshwaya ka kgongwana le diphelefu di supa, yo o ka nna moperesiti fela wa yone e e seng medimo." 
2Chronicles13:10 “Mme ka ga rona, Jehofa ke ene Modimo wa rona, ga re a mo latlha; re na le baperesiti ba ba direlang Jehofa, e bong bomorwa Arone, le Balefi mo tirong ya bone:" 
2Chronicles13:11 Ba fisetsa Jehofa ka moso le maitsebowa ditshupelo tse di fisiwang le maswalo a a monate; le senkgwe sa tshupo ba tle ba se baakanye mo lomating lwa bojelo lo lo itshepileng; le setlhomo sa lobone sa gouta se na le dilampa tsa sone, go tla di tuka ka maitsebowa otlhe, gonne rona re tshegeditse tebelo ya ga Jehofa Modimo wa rona; mme lona lo mo latlhile." 
2Chronicles13:12 Mme bonang, Modimo o na le rona kwa tlhogong ga rona, le baperesiti ba one ba na le dinaka tsa tlhagiso, ba letsa modumo wa tlhagiso ka ga lona. Lona bana ba Iseraele, lo se ka lwa tlhabana le Jehofa, Modimo wa borraeno; gonne ga lo ketla lo tlhogonolofala.”" 
2Chronicles13:13 Jeroboame ene a tsamaisa talelo, ya ba dika morago, ba bo ba le fa pele ga Juta, talelo yone ya bo e le kwa morago ga bone." 
2Chronicles13:14 E rile Bajuta ba gadima, bonang, ntwa e bo e le fa pele ga bone le fa morago ga bone; mme ba goela kwa go Jehofa, le baperesiti ba letsa dinaka." 
2Chronicles13:15 Foo banna ba Juta ba thela lošalaba; ya re banna ba Juta ba thela lošalaba, ga dirala, go re, Modimo wa lotlha Jeroboame le Baiseraele botlhe fa pele ga Abija le ba Juta." 
2Chronicles13:16 Mme bona, Baiseraele ba tshaba fa pele ga Bajuta, mme Modimo wa ba tsenya mo seatleng sa bone." 
2Chronicles13:17 Abija le batho ba gagwe ba ba bolaya ka polao e kgolo, mme ba Iseraele ba wa ba bolailwe e le banna ba ba tlhophegileng ba le 500 000." 
2Chronicles13:18 Jalo Baiseraele ba kokobediwa ka lobaka loo, mme bana ba Juta ba fenya ka ba ikaegile mo go Jehofa Modimo wa borraabo." 
2Chronicles13:19 Abija a konatelela Jeroboame, a gapa metse mengwe mo go ene, Bethele le metse ya teng, le Ješana le metse ya teng, le Eferone le metse ya teng." 
2Chronicles13:20 Le gone Jeroboame ga a ka a tlhola a bona go thatafala mo metlheng ya ga Abija. Mme Jehofa a mo itaya, mme a swa." 
2Chronicles13:21 Mme Abija a natlafala, mme a tsaya basadi ba le 14, a tshola bana ba basimane ba le 22, le basetsana ba le 16." 
2Chronicles13:22 Ditiro tse dingwe tsa ga Abija, le mekgwa ya gagwe le dipolelo tsa gagwe, di kwadilwe mo phuthololong ya ga Ito moperofeti." 
2Chronicles14:1 Jalo Abija a robala le borraagwe, ba mo fitlha mo motseng wa ga Dafite, mme Asa morwawe a busa mo boemong jwa gagwe. Ya re mo metlheng ya gagwe lefatshe la bona boiketlo ka dinyaga di le some." 
2Chronicles14:2 Asa a dira se se molemo le se se siameng mo matlhong a ga Jehofa Modimo wa gagwe. 
2Chronicles14:3 Gonne o ne a tlosa dibeso tsa seeng, le mafelo a a tlotlometseng, a thubaka maje a a metloutlo, a rema Medimako." 
2Chronicles14:4 A laola Bajuta gore ba batle Jehofa Modimo wa borraabo, le go dira molao le taolo." 
2Chronicles14:5 Le gone a tlosa mafelo a a tlotlometseng le ditshwantsho tsa letsatsi mo metseng yotlhe ya Juta, mme bogosi jwa iketla fa pele ga gagwe." 
2Chronicles14:6 A aga metse e e thekeleditsweng mo Juta, gonne lefatshe le ne le iketlile, mme a se ka a bona ntwa epe ka dinyago tseo, ka gonne Jehofa o na a mo neile boikhutso." 
2Chronicles14:7 Gonne o ne a raya Bajuta a re: “A re ageng metse e, mme re direng dithako mo tikologong ya yone, le dikago tse di godileng tsa phemelo, le ditswalo le mephakalego; lefatshe le sa ntse le le fa pele ga rona, ka re batlile Jehofa Modimo wa rona, re mmatlile, mme o re neile boikhutso ka ntlha tsotlhe. Mme ba aga ba kokotlegela.”" 
2Chronicles14:8 Asa o ne a na le ntwa ya banna ba ba tsholang dithebe le marumo, ba ba tswang mo Juta ba le 300 000; le ba ba tswang mo go Benjamine ba le 280 000, ba ba tsholang dithebe ba itse go fula ka bora; ba botlhe e le diganka tse di pelokgale." 
2Chronicles14:9 Mme ba bololelwa ke Sera wa Moethiopia a na le ntwa e le 1 000 000, le dikara di le 300; a fitlha mo Mareša." 
2Chronicles14:10 Foo Asa a ya go mo kgatlhantsha, mme ba aba tlhabano mo molapong wa Sefatha kwa Mareša." 
2Chronicles14:11 Asa a goela kwa go Jehofa Modimo wa gagwe a re: “Jehofa, ga go na ope kwa ntle ga gago yo o thusang, gare ga mothata le yo o se nang nonofo; re thuse Jehofa Modimo wa rona, gonne re ikaegile mo go wena, re bololetse bontsi jo ka leina la gago. Jehofa, ke wena Modimo wa rona, a motho a se go fenye.”" 
2Chronicles14:12 Jalo Jehofa a kgemetha Baethiopia fa pele ga Asa, le fa pele ga ba Juta, mme Baethiopia ba tshaba." 
2Chronicles14:13 Asa le batho ba a nang nabo a ba konatelela ba ya go fitlha kwa Gerare, mme Baethiopia ba wa ka bontsi jo bogolo; ya ba ya nna motlhakola o o diphepa, gonne ba ne ba thubegile fa pele ga Jehofa, le fa pele ga ntwa ya gagwe; mme ba tsaya thopo e le kgolo thata." 
2Chronicles14:14 Ba kgemetha metse yotlhe e e mo tikologong ya Gerare, gonne poifo ya ga Jehofa ya tla mo go bone, mme ba thopa metse yotlhe, gonne go le thopo e le kgolo mo go yone." 
2Chronicles14:15 Ba kgemetha le yone megope ya dikgomo, ba ba ba gapa dinku di le dintsi le dikamela, mme ba boela Jerusalema." 
2Chronicles15:1 Mowa wa Modimo wa tla mo go Asaria morwa Obete. 
2Chronicles15:2 Mme a tswa a ya go kgatlhantsha Asa, a mo raya a re: “Lo nkutlweng, wena Asa, le Bajuta botlhe le Babenjamine; Jehofa o na le lona, fa lo sa ntse lo na le ene; fa lo mmatla o tlaa bonwa ke lona; mme fa lo mo latlha le ene o tlaa lo latlha." 
2Chronicles15:3 Jaana Baiseraele e sa le bogologolo ba bo ba ntse ba se na Modimo wa boammaaruri, ba se na moperesiti yo o rutang, le fa e le molao." 
2Chronicles15:4 E ne e tle e re mo pitlaganong ya bone fa ba boela mo go Jehofa Modimo wa Iseraele, mme ba mmatla, a bonwe ke bone." 
2Chronicles15:5 Ya re mo metlheng eo yo o bololang le yo o gorogang, ba ne ba sa bone kagiso, go le ditshwenyego tse dikgolo mo banning botlhe ba mafatshe." 
2Chronicles15:6 Ba ne ba thubaganngwa, morafe ke morafe le motse ke motse, gonne Modimo wa ba tshwenya ka dipitlagano tsotlhe fela." 
2Chronicles15:7 Lona lo nne thata, mabogo a lona a se repe, gonne tiro ya lona e tlaa duelwa.”" 
2Chronicles15:8 E rile Asa a utlwa mafoko ao, le polelo ya ga Obete moperofeti, a itira pelokgale, a tlosa dilo tse di makgapha mo lefatsheng lotlhe la Juta le la Benjamine, le mo metseng e o ne a e gapile mo lefatsheng la Eferaime la makhujana; a šafatsa sebeso sa ga Jehofa, se se fa pele ga mokatako wa ga Jehofa." 
2Chronicles15:9 A phutha Bajuta botlhe le Babenjamine, le ba ba jakileng mo go bone ba tswa Eferaime le Manase, le ba ba tswang kwa go Simeone; gonne ba ne ba wela kwa go ene ba le bantsi ba tswa mo Iseraele, ka ba bona fa Jehofa Modimo wa gagwe a na nae." 
2Chronicles15:10 Ba phuthegela kwa Jerusalema ka kgwedi ya boraro, ka ngwaga wa 15 wa puso ya ga Asa." 
2Chronicles15:11 Ba isetsa Jehofa tlhabelo ka tsatsi leo, ga thopo e ba tsileng nayo, dikgomo di le 700 le dinku di le 7 000." 
2Chronicles15:12 Ba tsena mo kgolaganong, ya gore ba batle Jehofa Modimo wa borraabo, ka pelo yotlhe ya bone, le ka mowa otlhe wa bone;" 
2Chronicles15:13 le gore le fa e le mang yo o ganang go batla Jehofa Modimo wa Iseraele, a bolawe, le fa e ka bo e le yo monnye kgotsa yo mogolo, le fa e ka bo e le monna kgotsa mosadi." 
2Chronicles15:14 Ba ikanela Jehofa ka lentswe le le godileng, le ka lošalaba, ka dinaka le ka diphala." 
2Chronicles15:15 Bajuta botlhe ba itumelela ikano eo, gonne ba ikanne ka pelo yotlhe, mme ba mmatla ka keletso yotlhe ya bone; mme a bonwa ke bone; mme Jehofa a ba naya boikhutso mo tikologong." 
2Chronicles15:16 Le ene Maaka, mma Asa kgosi, a mo tlosa mo go tlholeng a le mohumagadi, gonne a diretse Modimako setshwantsho se se maswe; mme Asa a rema setshwantsho sa gagwe, a se dira lorole, a se fisetsa fa molatswaneng wa Kiterone." 
2Chronicles15:17 Mafelo a a tlotlometseng ga a ka a tlosiwa mo Iseraele; le fa go ntse jalo pelo ya ga Asa e ne e itekanetse ka metlha yotlhe ya gagwe. 
2Chronicles15:18 A isa mo ntlong ya Modimo dilo tse rraagwe o ne a di tshwaetse Modimo le tse ene ka esi o ne a di tshwaile, selefera, gouta le dilwana." 
2Chronicles15:19 Go se ka ga tlhola go le ntwa go ya go fitlha ngwageng wa 35 wa puso ya ga Asa. 
2Chronicles16:1 E rile ka ngwaga wa 36 wa puso ya ga Asa, Baaša kgosi ya Iseraele a bololela Juta, a aga motse wa Rama gore a tle a se ka a leseletsa ope go tswa le fa e le go tsena kwa go Asa kgosi ya Juta." 
2Chronicles16:2 Foo Asa a ntsha selefera le gouta mo dikhumong tsa ntlo ya ga Jehofa, le mo go tsa ntlo ya kgosi, a roma kwa go Benehatate kgosi ya Siria yo o agileng kwa Damaseko a re:" 
2Chronicles16:3 “Go na le kgolagano gare ga me nao, jaaka go ne go ntse gare ga rre le rraago; bona, ke go rometse selefera le gouta; ya o senye kgolagano ya gago le Baaše kgosi ya Iseraele, gore a tle a tloge mo go nna.”" 
2Chronicles16:4 Benehatate a reetsa kgosi Asa, mme a roma balaodi ba dintwa tsa gagwe ba bololela metse ya Iseraele; ba kgemetha Ijone le Dane le Abelemaime le metse yotlhe ya mabolokelo ya Nafetali." 
2Chronicles16:5 Ga dirala ya re Baaše a go utlwela, a khutla go aga Rama, mme a lesa tiro ya gagwe ya khutla." 
2Chronicles16:6 Foo kgosi Asa a tsaya Bajuta botlhe, ba tlosa maje a motse wa Rama le dikgong tsa one tse Baaše o ne a aga ka tsone; mme a aga ka tsone Geba le Misepa." 
2Chronicles16:7 E rile ka lobaka loo Hanani molebi a tla kwa go Asa kgosi ya Juta, a mo raya a re: “E re ka o ikaegile mo kgosing ya Siria, mme wa se ka wa ikaega mo go Jehofa Modimo wa gago, ke gone ka moo ntwa ya kgosi ya Siria e falotse mo atleng sa gago." 
2Chronicles16:8 A Baethiopia le Balubime ba ne ba se ntwa e kgolo thata, ba na le dikara le bapalami ba dipitse ba le bontsi jo bo feteletseng? Le fa go ntse jalo, ka o ne o ikaegile mo go Jehofa, a ba tsenya mo seatleng sa gago." 
2Chronicles16:9 Gonne matlho a ga Jehofa a sianela kwa le kwa mo lefatsheng lotlhe go iponatsa fa a le thata ntlheng ya batho ba dipelo tsa bone di leng boitekanelo mo go ene. O dirile ka bonyana mo go se; gonne go tloga mo lobakeng lwa gompieno o tlaa bona dintwa.” 
2Chronicles16:10 Foo Asa a nna bogale le molebi, a mo tsenya mo ntlong ya kgolegelo gonne o na a mo šakgaditse thata ka ntlha ya selo se. Mme Asa a patika batho bangwe ka lobaka loo." 
2Chronicles16:11 Mme bonang, ditiro tsa ga Asa tsa ntlha le tsa morago, bonang, di kwadilwe mo lokwalong lwa dikgosi tsa Juta le tsa Iseraele." 
2Chronicles16:12 E rile ka ngwaga wa 39 wa puso ya gagwe Asa, a nna molwetse mo dinaong; bolwetse jwa gagwe bo ne bo le botona thata; mme mo bolwetseng joo ga a a ka a batla Jehofa, fa e se dingaka fela." 
2Chronicles16:13 Mme Asa a robala le borraagwe, a swa ka ngwaga wa 41 wa puso ya gagwe." 
2Chronicles16:14 Ba mo fitlha mo diphupung tsa gagwe tse o ne a di ikgabetse mo motseng wa ga Dafite, ba mo latsa mo bolaong jo bo tletseng dinkga monate le malao mangwe le mangwe a a baakantsweng ka botswerere jwa modira melemo; mme ba mo direla phiso ya maswalo e le kgolo thata." 
2Chronicles17:1 Jehošafate morwawe a busa mo boemong jwa gagwe, mme a ithatafaletsa Baiseraele." 
2Chronicles17:2 A baya batlhabani mo metseng yotlhe e e thekeleditsweng ya Juta, a baya ditlhopha tsa masole mo lefatsheng la Juta le mo metseng ya Eferaime, e Asa rraagwe o ne a e gapile." 
2Chronicles17:3 Jehofa o ne a na le Jehošafate, gonne a sepela mo ditseleng tsa ntlha tsa ga Dafite rraagwe, mme a se ka a batla kwa go boBaale." 
2Chronicles17:4 A batla mo Modimong wa ga rraagwe, a sepela mo ditaolong tsa one, mme e seng ka fa ditirong tsa Baiseraele." 
2Chronicles17:5 Ke gone ka moo Jehofa a tlhomamisa bogosi mo seatleng sa gagwe; mme Bajuta botlhe ba leretse Jehošafate dineo; a bona khumo le tlotlo ka botlalo. 
2Chronicles17:6 Pelo ya gagwe ya tsholetsega mo tseleng tsa ga Jehofa; gape a tlosa mafelo a a tlotlometseng le Medimako mo Juta. 
2Chronicles17:7 Gape ya re ka ngwaga wa boraro wa puso ya gagwe a roma dikgosana tsa gagwe, e bong Benehaile, le Obadia, le Sekaria, le Nathanaele le Mikaia, ba ya go ruta mo metseng ya Juta;" 
2Chronicles17:8 le Balefi nabo, e bong Shemaia, le Nathania, le Sebadia, le Asafele, le Shemi-ramothe, le Jehonathane, le Atonija, le Tobija le Tobatonija ba Balefi; le baperesiti nabo, e bong Elišame le Jehorame." 
2Chronicles17:9 Ba ruta mo Juta ba tshotse lokwalo lwa molao wa ga Jehofa, ba tsamaya ba ralala metse yotlhe ya Juta, ba ruta mo bathong." 
2Chronicles17:10 Poifo ya ga Jehofa ya wela mo magosing otlhe a mafatshe a a mo tikologong ya Juta, mme ba se ka ba dira ntwa le Jehošafate." 
2Chronicles17:11 Bangwe ba Bafilisitia ba leretse Jehošafate dineo le selefera sa lekgetho; Baarabia ba mo leretse matsomane, diphelefu di le 7 700; le diphoko di le 7 700." 
2Chronicles17:12 Jehošafate a kokotlegela thata; a aga dikago tsa tlhabanelo le metse ya dipolokelo mo Juta. 
2Chronicles17:13 O ne a na le ditiro di le dintsi mo metseng ya Juta; le banna ba ntwa e le diganka tse di pelokgale mo Jerusalema. 
2Chronicles17:14 Mme e ke yone palo ya bone ka fa makgotleng a borraabo: Bajuta, balaodi ba dikete; Atane wa molaodi le diganka tse di pelokgale di le 300 000 di na nae." 
2Chronicles17:15 Le Jehohanane wa molaodi a rulagana nae, a na le batho ba le 280 000." 
2Chronicles17:16 Yo o ne a rulagana le ene e ne e le Amasia morwa Sikeri, yo o ne a ineela mo go Jehofa ka peleego; le diganka tse di pelokgale di le 200 000 nae." 
2Chronicles17:17 Le Babenjamine; Eliate wa seganka se se pelokgale le batho ba le 200 000 ba ba tlhometseng bora le thebe, ba na nae." 
2Chronicles17:18 Yo o ne a rulagana le ene e ne e le Jehosabate, a na le batho ba le 180 000 ba ba iketleeleditseng ntwa." 
2Chronicles17:19 Bao ke bone ba ba neng ba direla fa kgosing, kwa ntle ga ba kgosi e ba beileng mo metseng e e thekeleditsweng mo lefatsheng lotlhe la Juta." 
2Chronicles18:1 Jaana Jehošafate a bo a na le khumo le tlotlo ka botlalo; mme a itsalanya le Ahabe. 
2Chronicles18:2 E rile dinyaga dingwe di sena go feta a ya kwa go Ahabe kwa Samaria. Mme Ahabe a tlhabisa ene le batho ba o nang nabo dinku le dikgomo ka bontsi, a mo tlhotlheletsa go tla a bolola nae a ya kwa Ramothe-gileate." 
2Chronicles18:3 Ahabe kgosi ya Iseraele, a raya Jehošafate kgosi ya Juta a re: “A o tlaa bolola le nna ke ya Ramothe-gileate?” Mme a mo fetola a re: “Ke ntse jaaka wena, le batho ba me ba ntse jaaka batho ba gago; re tlaa nna nao mo ntweng.”" 
2Chronicles18:4 Jehošafate a raya kgosi ya Iseraele a re: “Ke a go rapela, a ko o botse lefoko mo go Jehofa gompieno.”" 
2Chronicles18:5 Foo kgosi ya Iseraele ya phutha baperofeti, banna ba le 400, a ba raya a re: “A ke re ye go tlhabana kwa Ramothe-gileate, kgotsa a ke re khutle?” Ba re: “Ya; gonne Modimo o tlaa o tsenya mo seatleng sa kgosi.”" 
2Chronicles18:6 Jehošafate a re: “Kwa ntle ga bao, a ga go na moperofeti ope wa ga Jehofa yo re ka botsang mo go ene?”" 
2Chronicles18:7 Kgosi ya Iseraele ya raya Jehošafate ya re: “Go sa na le monna mongwe yo re ka botsang mo go Jehofa ka ene; mme ke a mo ila, gonne ga a ke a bolela molemo gope ka ga me, fa e se bosula fela ka metlha yotlhe; ke ene Mikaia morwa Imele.” Jehošafate a re: “A kgosi e se re jalo.”" 
2Chronicles18:8 Foo kgosi ya Iseraele ya bitsa mogolwane mongwe, ya re: “Itlhaganele o ye go lere Mikaia morwa Imele.”" 
2Chronicles18:9 Jaana kgosi ya Iseraele le Jehošafate kgosi ya Juta, mongwe le mongwe a dutse mo setulong sa gagwe sa bogosi, ba apere dikobo tsa bone, mme ba bo ba dutse fa patlelong fa botsenong jwa kgoro ya Samaria; baperofeti botlhe ba bo ba bolela fa pele ga bone." 
2Chronicles18:10 Setekia morwa Kenaana a itirela dinaka tsa tshipi, mme a re: “Jehofa o bua jaana a re: ‘O tlaa kgorometsa Basiria ka tse, go tsamaya ba nyelela.’ ”" 
2Chronicles18:11 Baperofeti botlhe ba bolela jalo, ba re: “Ya kwa Ramothe-gileate, o fenye, gonne Jehofa o tlaa o tsenya mo seatleng sa kgosi.”" 
2Chronicles18:12 Morongwa yo o ileng go bitsa Mikaia a bua nae, a re: “Bona, mafoko a baperofeti a kakanyetsa kgosi molemo ka molomo o le mongwe fela; ke gone ke a go rapela, a lefoko la gago le tshwane le lengwe la bone, o bue molemo.”" 
2Chronicles18:13 Mme Mikaia a re: “Jaaka Jehofa a tshedile, se Modimo wa me o se buang, ke tlaa bua sone.”" 
2Chronicles18:14 Ya re a fitlha kwa kgosing, kgosi ya mo raya ya re: “Mikaia, a ke re ye go tlhabana kwa Ramothe-gileate, kgotsa a ke ke khutle?” Mme a re: “Yang, lo fenye; mme ba tlaa tsenngwa mo seatleng sa lona.”" 
2Chronicles18:15 Kgosi ya mo raya ya re: “Ke tla ge ikanisa ga kae, fa o se ketla o bua sepe le nna fa e se boammaaruri mo ineng la ga Jehofa?”" 
2Chronicles18:16 Mme a re: “Ke bonye Baiseraele botlhe ba faletse mo dithabeng ba ntse jaaka dinku tse di se nang modisa: mme Jehofa a re: ‘Ba, ga ba na mong; a monna mongwe le mongwe a boele kwa ntlong ya gagwe ka kagiso.’ ”" 
2Chronicles18:17 Kgosi ya Iseraele ya raya Jehošafate ya re: “A ga ke a go bolelela fa a se ketla a bolela molemo ka ga me, fa e se bosula fela?”" 
2Chronicles18:18 A re: “Ke gone utlwang lefoko la ga Jehofa: Ka bona Jehofa a dutse mo setulong sa gagwe sa bogosi, mme lesomosomo lotlhe la legodimo le ne le eme ka fa letsogong la gagwe le legolo le fa go la molema." 
2Chronicles18:19 Mme Jehofa a re: ‘Mang yo o tlaa tsietsang Ahabe kgosi ya Israele, gore a tsamaye a ye go wa kwa Ramothe-gileate?’ Mme mongwe a bua ka mokgwa o, yo mongwe a bua ka mokgwa o sele." 
2Chronicles18:20 Ga tswa mowa mongwe, wa ema fa pele ga Jehofa, wa re: ‘Ke tlaa mo fepisa.’ Mme Jehofa a mo raya: ‘Ka eng?’" 
2Chronicles18:21 Wa re: ‘Ke tlaa tswa, mme ke tlaa nna mowa o o akang mo melomong ya baperofeti botlhe ba gagwe.’ A re: ‘Mo fepise, le gone o tlaa fenya; tswa o ye o dire jalo.’" 
2Chronicles18:22 “Ke gone jaana, bona, Jehofa o tsentse mowa o o akang mo melomong ya baperofeti ba, ba gago; Jehofa o buile bosula ka ga gago.”" 
2Chronicles18:23 Foo Setekia morwa Kenaana a atamela, a tlhanya Mikaia mo lesameng, a re: “Mowa wa Modimo o dule ka tsela efe mo go nna wa ya go bua nao?”" 
2Chronicles18:24 Mme Mikaia a re: “Bona, o tlaa bona mo tsatsing leo, mogang o tsenang mo ntlwaneng e e kwa teng o ya go iphitlha gone.”" 
2Chronicles18:25 Kgosi ya Iseraele ya re: “Tshwarang Mikaia, lo mmusetse kwa go Amone molaodi wa motse, le kwa go Joaše morwa kgosi;" 
2Chronicles18:26 mme lo re: ‘Kgosi e bua jaana, ya re: Tsenyang seapu se mo ntlong ya kgolegelo, lo mo neye dijo tsa patiko, le metsi a patiko, go tsamaya ke boa ka kagiso.’ ”" 
2Chronicles18:27 Mikaia a re: “E tlaa re fa o ka boa le fa e le motlha o mongwe fela ka kagiso, Jehofa o tlaa bo a se ka a bua ka nna.” Mme a re: “Lo bo lo utlwe lona lotlhe ditšhaba.”" 
2Chronicles18:28 Jalo kgosi ya Iseraele le Jehošafate kgosi ya Juta, ba ya kwa Ramothe-gileate." 
2Chronicles18:29 Kgosi ya Iseraele ya raya Jehošafate ya re: “Ke tlaa ba ikgakisa, ke itse go tsena mo tlhabanong; wena o apare dikobo tsa gago fela.” Kgosi ya Iseraele ya ba ikgakisa; mme ba tsena mo tlhabanong." 
2Chronicles18:30 Kgosi ya Siria e ne e laotse balaodi ba dikara tsa gagwe, ya re: “Lo se ka lwa tlhabana le ope monnye le fa e le mogolo, fa e se le kgosi ya Iseraele e le yosi fela.”" 
2Chronicles18:31 Ga dirala ya re balaodi ba dikara ba bona Jehošafate, ba re: “Ke ene kgosi ya Iseraele.” Ke gone ka moo ba sokologa ba tlhabana nae; Jehošafate a goa, mme Jehofa a mo thusa; mme Modimo wa ba tlhotlheletsa gore ba mo tlogele." 
2Chronicles18:32 Mme ga dirala, ya re balaodi ba dikara ba bona fa e se kgosi ya Iseraele, ba bowa mo go mo konateleleng." 
2Chronicles18:33 Monna mongwe a hula fela ka bora, ka phaphouletso, mme a betsa kgosi ya Iseraele fa malokololong a moitshomelo wa phemelo; ke gone ka moo a raya mokgweetsi wa kara a re: “Retolola letsogo la gago o ntsamaise ke tswe mo ntweng; gonne ke tlhabilwe mo go botlhoko.”" 
2Chronicles18:34 Mme tlhabano ya gakala ka tsatsi leo; le fa go ntse jalo kgosi ya Iseraele ya ikemisa mo kareng ya yone, go tlhabana le Basiria go ya maitseboeng; mme ya re e ka ne e le ka letsatsi le kotlomela, a swa." 
2Chronicles19:1 Jehošafate a boela kwa ntlong ya gagwe kwa Jerusalema ka kagiso. 
2Chronicles19:2 Jehu morwa Hanani molebi, a tswa a ya go mo kgatlhantsha, mme a raya kgosi Jehošafate a re: “A o ne o tshwanetse go thusa baikepi, le go rata bone ba ba ilang Jehofa? Bogale jo bo tswang kwa go Jehofa bo mo go wena ka ntlha ya selo se." 
2Chronicles19:3 Legale dilo tse di molemo di fitlhetswe mo go wena, ka o tlositse Medimako mo lefatsheng, o itlhomamisitse pelo go batla Modimo.”" 
2Chronicles19:4 Jehošafate a aga mo Jerusalema, a tswa gape a tsamayatsamaya mo bathong, go tswa Beerešeba go ya lefatsheng la Eferaime la makhujana, mme a ba busetsa mo go Jehofa Modimo wa borraabo." 
2Chronicles19:5 A tlhoma baatlhodi mo lefatsheng mo metseng yotlhe ya Juta e e thekeleditsweng, mo motseng mongwe le mongwe." 
2Chronicles19:6 A raya baatlhodi a re: “Lo gopole se lo se dirang, gonne ga lo atlhole ka ga motho, fa e se ka ga Jehofa fela; mme o na le lona mo go atlholeng." 
2Chronicles19:7 Ke gone jaana a poifo ya go Jehofa e nne mo go lona; lo tlhokomele lo e dire, gonne ga go na boikepo bope mo go Jehofa Modimo wa rona, le fa e le go tlhokomela bomangmang jwa batho, le fa e le go amogela dineo.”" 
2Chronicles19:8 Gape mo Jerusalema Jehošafate a tlhoma ga Balefi le ga baperesiti, le ga ditlhogo tsa matlo a borara ba Iseraele, a ba tlhomela katlholo ya ga Jehofa, le ka ga dikgang. Mme ba boela Jerusalema." 
2Chronicles19:9 Mme a ba laya, a re: “Lo dire jaana mo go boifeng Jehofa, ka boikanngo, le ka pelo e e itekanetseng." 
2Chronicles19:10 E a tle e re kgang nngwe e tla kwa go lona e tswa mo baneng ba ga rraeno ba ba agileng mo metseng ya bone, gare ga madi le madi, le gare ga molao le taolo, le gare ga tao le katlholo, lo ba tlhagise, gore ba tle ba se ka ba nna molato mo go Jehofa, mme bogale jwa tla mo go lona le mo baneng ba ga rraeno; dirang mo, mme ga lo ketla lo nna molato." 
2Chronicles19:11 Mme bonang, Amaria moperesiti yo mogolo o lo laola mo dilong tsotlhe tse e leng tsa ga Jehofa; mme Sebadia morwa Išemaele, molaodi wa ntlo ya Juta, o lo laola mo dilong tsotlhe tse e leng tsa kgosi; le bone Balefi ba tlaa nna balaodisiwa fa pele ga lona. Dirang ka botlhoka poifo; mme a Jehofa a nne le ba ba molemo.”" 
2Chronicles20:1 Ga dirala ya re morago ga moo, bana ba Moabe, le bana ba Amone, le bangwe ba Bameuni ba na nabo, ba bololela Jehošafate ba tla go tlhabana nae." 
2Chronicles20:2 Foo ga tla bangwe ba ba bolelelang Jehošafate, ba re: “Go tla bontsi jo bogolo jwa batho go tlhabana nao, ba tswa moseja ga lewatle kwa Siria; mme bona, ba mo Hasasone-tamare” (ke one Enegedi)." 
2Chronicles20:3 Jehošafate a boifa, mme a ineela mo go batleng Jehofa, a laola gore go ikidiwe dijo go ya le lefatshe lotlhe la Juta." 
2Chronicles20:4 Mme Bajuta ba phuthega, ba tla go senka thuso mo go Jehofa, ba tswa fela mo metseng yotlhe ya Juta, ba tla go senka Jehofa." 
2Chronicles20:5 Jehošafate a ema mo phuthegong ya ba Juta le ba Jerusalema, mo ntlong ya ga Jehofa, fa pele ga lolwapa lo loša;" 
2Chronicles20:6 mme a re: “Jehofa Modimo wa borraetsho, a ga o Modimo kwa legodimong? A ga o molaodi wa magosi otlhe a merafe? Mo seatleng sa gago go thata le nonofo, mme go se na ope yo o ka emang fa pele ga gago." 
2Chronicles20:7 Wena Modimo wa rona, a ga o a leleka banni ba lefatshe leno fa pele ga Baiseraele batho ba gago, lefatshe wa le naya losika lwa ga Aberahame, tsala ya gago, ka bosakhutleng." 
2Chronicles20:8 Ba aga mo go lone, ba bile ba go agetse felo ga boitshepo ga leina la gago mo go lone, ba re:" 
2Chronicles20:9 ‘Fa bosula bo tla mo go rona, tšhaka, tshekiso, kgotsa kgogodi, kgotsa leuba, re tlaa ema fa pele ga ntlo e, le fa pele ga gago (gonne leina la gago le mo ntlong e,) re tlaa biletsa kwa go wena mo pitlaganong ya rona, mme o tlaa utlwa o boloka.’" 
2Chronicles20:10 “Mme jaana bona, bana ba Amone le ba Moabe le ba thaba ya Seira, ba o ganneng, wa re Baiseraele ba se ka ba ba tlhasela, jale ka ba tswa lefatsheng la Egepeto, mme ba ba fapoga, ba se ka ba ba senya;" 
2Chronicles20:11 bona jaaka ba re duela, ba tla go re ntsha mo bosweng jwa gago, jo o bo re neileng go bo rua." 
2Chronicles20:12 Modimo wa rona a ga o ketla o ba sekisa? Gonne rona ga re na thata ya go tlhabana le lesomo le legolo le le re bololetseng; le gone ga re itse se re ka se dirang; mme matlho a rona a koo go wena.” 
2Chronicles20:13 Bajuta botlhe ba ema fa pele ga Jehofa ba na le banyana ba bone, le basadi ba bone, le bana ba bone." 
2Chronicles20:14 Foo ya re mo gare ga phuthego, mowa wa ga Jehofa wa tla mo go Jahasiele Molefi, wa bomorwa Asafe, e bong mo go Jahasiele morwa Sekaria morwa Benaia morwa Jeiele morwa Matania;" 
2Chronicles20:15 mme a re: “Reetsang lona lotlhe Bajuta, le lona banni ba Jerusalema, le wena kgosi Jehošafate; Jehofa o lo raya jaana, a re: ‘Lo se ka lwa boifa, le gone lo se ka lwa rerega ka ntlha ya bontsi jo bogolo jo; gonne tlhabano ga se ya lona, ke ya Modimo." 
2Chronicles20:16 E re ka moso lo bolole lo ye go tlhabana nabo; bona, ba tlhatloga ka fa botlhatlogong jwa Sise; lo tlaa ba fitlhela kwa sekhutlong sa molapo, bolebagana le naga ya Jeruele." 
2Chronicles20:17 Ga go ketla go batlwa gore lo tlhabane mo tlhabanong e; lo ikemiseng lo eme fela, mme lo bone poloka ya ga Jehofa e e nang le lona, lona ba Juta le ba Jerusalema.’ Lo se ka lwa boifa, lo bo lo se rerege; e re ka moso lo bolole lo ye go tlhabana nabo; gonne Jehofa o na le lona.”" 
2Chronicles20:18 Jehošafate a ikoba tlhogo, a ikisa fa fatshe ka sefatlhogo, le Bajuta botlhe le banni ba Jerusalema ba wela fa pele ga Jehofa, ba obamela Jehofa." 
2Chronicles20:19 Balefi ba bana ba Makohathe le ba bana ba Bakora, ba ema ba baka Jehofa, Modimo wa Iseraele, ka lentswe le le tsholetsegileng thata." 
2Chronicles20:20 Ka moso ba phakela ba bololela kwa nageng ya Tekoa; mme ya re ba tswa, Jehošafate a ema, a re: “Nkutlwang lona Bajuta, le lona banni ba Jerusalema; lo dumeleng mo go Jehofa Modimo wa lona, jalo lo tlaa tlhomamisiwa; dumelang baperofeti ba gagwe, jalo lo tlaa tlhogonolofala.”" 
2Chronicles20:21 O rile a sena go gakololana le batho, a tlhoma bone ba ba tlaa opelelang Jehofa, ba baka bontle jwa boitshepo, gore e re ba tsamaya fa pele ga ntwa, ba re: “Bakang Jehofa, gonne boutlwelobotlhoko jwa gagwe bo eme ka bosakhutleng.”" 
2Chronicles20:22 Ya re ba simolola go opela le go baka, Jehofa a beela bana ba Amone balaledi, le ba Moabe le ba thaba ya Seire, ba ba tsileng go tlhabana le Bajuta; mme ba kgemethwa." 
2Chronicles20:23 Gonne bana ba Amone le ba Moabe ba nanoga ba tlhabana le bana ba thaba ya Seire go tla ba bolaya le go ba lailela ruri; e rile ba sena go fetsa banni ba Seire, ba tloga ba menogana ba senyana." 
2Chronicles20:24 E rile Bajuta ba tla kagong ya tebelo ya naga, ba leba bontsi jwa batho; mme bonang, ya bo e le ditoto-toto fela tse di wetseng fa fatshe, go se na ope yo o falotseng." 
2Chronicles20:25 E rile Jehošafate le batho ba gagwe ba tla go tsaya thopo ya bone, ba fitlhela mo go bone letlotlo la dikhumo le diaparo, le mekgabo e e thata go rekwa, ba di itlosetsa mo go bone, go feta mo ba ka go rwalang, mme ga feta malatsi a le mararo ba ntse ba rora thopo, e ne e le kgolo thata." 
2Chronicles20:26 Ya re ka letsatsi la bone ba phuthega mo molapong wa Beraka, gonne ke gone kwa ba ne ba baka Jehofa gone; ke gone ka moo felo foo ga rewa leina ga twa, Molapo wa Beraka, nako e sa le eno." 
2Chronicles20:27 Foo ba bowa, motho mongwe le mongwe wa Juta le wa Jerusalema, Jehošafate a le fa pele ga bone, ba ya gape kwa Jerusalema ka boitumelo; gonne Jehofa a ba itumedisitse ka ga baba ba bone." 
2Chronicles20:28 Ba fitlha Jerusalema ka disaletere le diharepe le dinaka mo ntlong ya ga Jehofa. 
2Chronicles20:29 Poifo ya Modimo ya nna mo magosing otlhe a mafatshe ka, ba utlwa fa Jehofa a tlhabanye le baba ba Iseraele." 
2Chronicles20:30 Bogosi jwa ga Jehošafate jwa bona boiketlo, gonne Modimo wa gagwe o ne wa mo naya boikhutso mo tikologong yotlhe." 
2Chronicles20:31 Jehošafate a busa Bajuta: O rile a simolola go busa a bo a le dinyaga di le 35. A busa ka dinyaga di le 25 mo Jerusalema. Leina la ga mmaagwe e ne e le Asuba morwadia Shilihi. 
2Chronicles20:32 A sepela mo tseleng ya ga Asa rraagwe, a se ka a e fapoga, a ntse a dira se se siameng mo matlhong a ga Jehofa." 
2Chronicles20:33 Le fa go ntse jalo mafelo a a tlotlometseng ga a ka a tlosiwa; le gone batho ba ne ba ise ba itlhomamise dipelo mo Modimong wa borraabo. 
2Chronicles20:34 Jaana ditiro tse dingwe tsa ga Jehošafate tsa ntlha le tsa morago, bonang, di kwadilwe mo mafokong a ga Jehu morwa Hanani, a a tsentsweng mo lokwalong lwa dikgosi tsa Iseraele." 
2Chronicles20:35 Morago ga moo Jehošafate kgosi ya Juta a ikopanya le Ahasia kgosi ya Iseraele; ene yo o ne a dira ka boikepo jo bogolo. 
2Chronicles20:36 A ikopanya nae go tla ba dira dikepe tse di ka yang Tarešiše; mme ba dira di kepe mo Esione-gebere. 
2Chronicles20:37 Foo Eliesere morwa Dotafahu wa Mareša a bolela ka ga Jehošafate, a re: “E re ka o ikopantse le Ahasia, Jehofa o sentse ditiro tsa gago.” Mme Dikepe tsa thubega, tsa ba tsa retelelwa ke go ya Tarešiša." 
2Chronicles21:1 Jehošafate a robala le borraagwe, mme a fitlhwa le borraagwe mo motseng wa ga Dafite; mme Jehorame morwawe a busa mo boemong jwa gagwe." 
2Chronicles21:2 O ne a na le bomonnawe bomorwa Jehošafate, e bong Asaria, le Jehiele, Sekaria, le Asaria, le Mikaele le Shafatia; boa botlhe e le bomorwa Jehošafate kgosi ya Iseraele." 
2Chronicles21:3 Rraabo a ba tshwaela a ba naya dineo tse dikgolo, tsa selefera, le tsa gouta le tsa dilo tse di tlhokegang, le metse e e thekeleditsweng mo Juta; mme bogosi jone a bo naya Jehorame, ka e le ene motsalwapele." 
2Chronicles21:4 Jaana e rile Jehorame a le mo bogosing jwa ga rraagwe, a ithatafaditse, a bolaya bomonnawe botlhe ka tšhaka, le bangwe ba dikgosana tsa Iseraele." 
2Chronicles21:5 Jehorame o rile a simolola go busa a bo a le dinyaga di le 32; mme a busa ka dinyanga di 8 mo Jerusalema. 
2Chronicles21:6 Mme a sepela mo tseleng ya dikgosi tsa Iseraele jaaka ba ntlo ya ga Ahabe ba ne ba dira; gonne o ne a nyetse morwadia Ahabe, mme a dira se se bosula mo matlhong a ga Jehofa." 
2Chronicles21:7 Mme Jehofa a gana go senya ntlo ya ga Dafite ka ntlha ya kgolagano e o kileng a e dira le Dafite, le jaaka a mo solofeditse, go re o tlaa naya ene le bana ba gagwe lobone ka metlha yotlhe." 
2Chronicles21:8 E rile mo metlheng ya ga Jehorame Baetome ba tsuololela Bajuta, ba itirela kgosi ya bone." 
2Chronicles21:9 Foo Jehorame a kgabaganya a na le balaodi ba gagwe ba mephato, le dikara tsotlhe tsa gagwe di na nae; a tsoga bosigo a kgemetha Baetome ba ba mo dikanyeditseng, le balaodi ba dikara." 
2Chronicles21:10 Jalo Baetome ba sa le ba tsuololela Juta ba tswa taolong ya bone nako ke eno. Balibena le bone ba mo tsuololela ka lone lobaka loo, ka gobo o ne a latlhile Jehofa, Modimo wa borraagwe." 
2Chronicles21:11 Gape o ne a dira mafelo a a tlotlometseng mo dithabeng tsa Juta, a akafadisa banni ba Jerusalema, a timetsa Bajuta." 
2Chronicles21:12 Mme ga tla lokwalo kwa go ene lo tswa mo go Elija moperofeti, lwa re: “Jehofa o bua jaana, Modimo wa ga Dafite rraago, a re: ‘E re ka o se ka wa sepela mo ditseleng tsa ga Jehošafate rraago, le fa e le mo ditseleng tsa ga Asa kgosi ya Juta," 
2Chronicles21:13 mme o sepetse mo tseleng ya dikgosi tsa Iseraele, o akafaditse Bajuta le banni ba Jerusalema, go bile go tshwana jaaka go dirile ba ntlo ya ga Ahabe; gape o bolaile bomonnao ba ntlo ya ga rraago ba ba neng ba go gaisa ka molemo:" 
2Chronicles21:14 Bona, Jehofa o tlaa itaya batho ba gago ka sebetso se segolo, le bana ba gago, le basadi ba gago, le dilo tsa gago tsotlhe fela." 
2Chronicles21:15 O tlaa bona bolwetse jo bogolo ka botlhoko jwa mala, go tsamaya mala a gago a wela kwa ntle ka ntlha ya bolwetse, ka gale le ka gale.’ ”" 
2Chronicles21:16 Jehofa a tsosetsa Jehorame mowa wa Bafilisitia, le wa Baarabia ba ba bapileng le Baethiopia." 
2Chronicles21:17 Mme ba bololela lefatshe la Juta, ba thobela mo go jone ka thata, ba tlosa thoto yotlhe e e fitlhetsweng mo ntlong ya kgosi, le bomorwawe, le basadi ba gagwe; a ba a tla a se ka a salelwa ke ngwana ope wa mosimane, fa e se Jehoahase, yo mmotlana wa bomorwawe." 
2Chronicles21:18 Morago ga moo gotlhe, Jehofa a mo itaya mo maleng ka botlhoko jo bo se nang kalafo." 
2Chronicles21:19 Ga dirala ya re motlha mongwe, go sena go feta dinyaga di le pedi mala a gagwe a wela kwa ntle ka ntlha ya bolwetse jwa gagwe, mme a swa ka matlhoko a a thata. Mme batho ba gagwe ba se ka ba mo direla phisetso e e etsang phisetso ya borraagwe." 
2Chronicles21:20 O rile a simolola go busa a bo a le dinyaga di le 32, mme a busa mo Jerusalema ka dinyaga di fera mebedi; a swa a sa elediwe ke ope; mme ba mo fitlha mo motseng wa ga Dafite, mme e seng mo diphupung tsa dikgosi." 
2Chronicles22:1 Banni ba Jerusalema ba dira Ahasia, morwa Jehorame yo mmotlana, kgosi mo boemong jwa gagwe; gonne lesomo la batho ba ba kileng ba tla le Baarabia mo bothibelelong ba ne ba bolaile bomogolowe botlhe. Jalo Ahasia morwa Jehorame kgosi ya Juta a busa." 
2Chronicles22:2 E rile Ahasia a simolola go busa a bo a le dinyaga di le 42; mme a busa ka ngwaga o le mongwe fela mo Jerusalema. Leina la ga mmaagwe e ne e le Athalia morwadia Omeri. 
2Chronicles22:3 Le ene a sepela mo ditseleng tsa ba ntlo ya ga Ahabe, gonne mmaagwe e ne e le mogakolodi wa gagwe mo go direng ka boikepo." 
2Chronicles22:4 A dira se se bosula mo ponong ya ga Jehofa, jaaka go ne go dira ba ntlo ya ga Ahabe, gonne bao e ne e le bagakolodi ba gagwe morago ga loso lwa ga rraagwe, go mo isa tshenyegong." 
2Chronicles22:5 Le gone a sepela ka fa kgakololong ya bone, a bolola le Jehorame morwa Ahabe kgosi ya Iseraele, a ya go tlhabana le Hasaele kgosi ya Siria kwa Ramothe-gileate. Basiria ba tlhaba Jorame a tswa dintho." 
2Chronicles22:6 A bowa a ya kwa Jesereele a ya go alafiwa dintho tse ba di mo ntshitseng kwa Rama, ka a tlhabana le Hasaele kgosi ya Siria. Mme Asaria morwa Jehorame kgosi ya Juta a ya go lekola Jehorame morwa Ahabe kwa Jesereele ka a lwala." 
2Chronicles22:7 Jaana tshenyego ya ga Ahasia ya bo e tswa mo Modimong, ka a ile kwa go Jorame. Gonne e rile a fitlha, a bolola le Jehorame, ba bololela Jehu morwa Nemeši, yo Jehofa o ne a mo tloleditse go tla a bolaya ba ntlo ya ga Ahabe." 
2Chronicles22:8 Ga dirala ya re Jehu a sekisa ba ntlo ya ga Ahabe, a fitlhela dikgosana tsa Juta le bomorwa boo rra Ahasia ba thusa Ahasia, mme a ba bolaya." 
2Chronicles22:9 A senka Ahasia, mme ba mo tshwara, (ka o ne a iphithile mo Samaria), mme ba mo isa kwa go Jehu mme ba mmolaya; ba mo fitlha gonne, ba re: “Ke morwa Jehošafate, yo o ne a batla Jehofa ka pelo yotlhe ya gagwe.” Ba ntlo ya ga Ahasia ba ne ba se na thata ya go tshegetsa bogosi." 
2Chronicles22:10 E rile Athalia mma Ahasia a bona fa morwawe a sule, a nanoga a senya losika lotlhe lwa segosi lwa ntlo ya Juta." 
2Chronicles22:11 Mme Jehošabeathe morwadia kgosi, a tsaya Joaše morwa Ahasia, a mo utswa a mo tlosa mo go bomorwa kgosi ba ba bolailweng, a mo tsenya le mmelegi wa gagwe mo ntlwaneng ya borobalo. Jehošabeathe morwadia kgosi Jehorame, mosadi wa ga Jehoiata moperesiti, (gonne e ne e le kgaitsadia Ahasia), a mo subela Athalia, mme a se ka a mmolaya." 
2Chronicles22:12 Mme a nna nabo a subilwe mo ntlong ya Modimo ka dinyaga di le thataro, mme Athalia a busa mo lefatsheng." 
2Chronicles23:1 E rile ka ngwaga wa bosupa Jehoiata a ithatafatsa, a tsaya balaodi ba makgolo, e bong Asaria morwa Jerohame, le Išemaele morwa Jehohanane, le Asaria morwa Obete, le Maaseia morwa Ataia le Elišafate morwa Sikiri, a tsena mo kgolaganong nabo." 
2Chronicles23:2 Ba ralala lefatshe la Juta, ba phutha Balefi mo metseng yotlhe ya Juta, le ditlhogo tsa makgotla a borara ba Iseraele, mme ba tla mo Jerusalema." 
2Chronicles23:3 Phuthego yotlhe ya dira kgolagano le kgosi mo ntlong ya Modimo. Jehoiata a ba raya a re: “Bonang, morwa kgosi o tlaa busa jaaka Jehofa a buile ka ga bomorwa Dafite." 
2Chronicles23:4 Se ke sone se lo tlaa se dirang; lo tlaa kgaogana seraro, kgaogano e ngwe ya lona e nne ba lo tsenang ka Sabata, ba baperesiti le Balefi, lo nne balebedi ba dikgoro;" 
2Chronicles23:5 kgaogano nngwe a e nne fa ntlong ya kgosi; kgaogano e nngwe a e nne fa kgorong ya motheo; mme batho botlhe ba tlaa nna mo malwapeng a ntlo ya ga Jehofa. 
2Chronicles23:6 A go se tle bape mo ntlong ya ga Jehofa, fa e se baperesiti le Balefi ba ba direlang; bone ba tlaa tsena, ka gonne ba boitshepo; mme bontsi jwa batho ba tlaa tshegetsa tebelo ya ga Jehofa." 
2Chronicles23:7 Balefi ba tlaa dikanyeletsa kgosi, mongwe le mongwe a tshotse dibolao tsa gagwe; le fa e le mang yo o tsenang mo ntlong, a a bolawe; mme lona lo nne le kgosi fa e tsena, le fa e tswa.”" 
2Chronicles23:8 Balefi le Bajuta botlhe ba dira ka fa go tsotlhe tse Jehoiata moperesiti o di laotseng. Mongwe le mongwe wa bone a tsaya banna ba gagwe ba ba laoletsweng go tsena ka Sabata ba na le ba ba laoletsweng go tswa ka Sabata; gonne Jehoiata moperesiti ga a ka a naya makoko a diphapaano tsela ya go phatlalala. 
2Chronicles23:9 Jehoiata moperesiti a neela balaodi ba makgolo marumo le dithejana le dithebe tse e neng e le tsa kgosi Dafite, tse di mo ntlong ya Modimo." 
2Chronicles23:10 A tlhoma batho botlhe, motho mongwe le mongwe a tshotse sebolao sa gagwe, go tswa ka fa ntlheng ya ntlo ya letsogo le legolo go ya fela ntlheng ya la molema, go tla ka sebeso le ntlo, ka fa kgosing, tikologong." 
2Chronicles23:11 Foo ba ntsha morwa kgosi, ba baya serwalo sa bogosi mo go ene, ba mo naya tshupo, ba mo dira kgosi; Jehoiata le bomorwawe ba mo tlotsa; ba re: “A kgosi e tshele.”" 
2Chronicles23:12 E rile Athalia a utlwa modumo wa batho ka ba siana ba baka kgosi, a tla kwa bathong mo ntlong ya ga Jehofa." 
2Chronicles23:13 A leba, mme bonang, kgosi ya bo e eme fa lekotwaneng fa botsenong, balaodi le bone ba le fa kgosing le ba dinaka; batho botlhe ba lefatshe ba itumela, ba letsa dinaka; baopedi le bone ba letsa ka dilo tsa kopelo, ba tlhabeletsa ka go opela pako. Foo Athalia a ikgagola diaparo a re: “Mooko! Mooko!”" 
2Chronicles23:14 Jehoiata moperesiti a ntsha balaodi ba makgolo ba ba laolang ntwa, a ba raya a re: “A Athalia a ntshediwe kwa ntle, a tswe mo bathong ba ba rulagantsweng, le fa e le mang yo o mo salang morago, a a bolawe ka tšhaka;” gonne moperesiti o ne a rile: “Lo se ka lwa mmolaela mo ntlong ya ga Jehofa.”" 
2Chronicles23:15 Mme ba mo ntshetsa tsela, a ya kwa botsenong jwa kgoro ya dipitse ya ntlo ya kgosi, mme ba mmolaela gone." 
2Chronicles23:16 Jehoiata a dira kgolagano gare ga gagwe le batho botlhe, le kgosi, ya go re ba tla nna batho ba ga Jehofa." 
2Chronicles23:17 Batho botlhe ba ya mo ntlong ya ga Baale, ba e rutlolola, le dibeso tsa gagwe, le ditshwantsho tsa gagwe ba di thubela ruri, ba bolaela Matane moperesiti wa ga Baale fa pele ga dibeso." 
2Chronicles23:18 Ditiro tsa ntlo ya ga Jehofa Jehoiata a di tsenya mo seatleng sa baperesiti le Balefi, ba Dafite o kileng a ba aba mo ntlong ya ga Jehofa, go tla ba isa ditshupelo tsa ga Jehofa tse di fisiwang ka boitumelo le kopelo, jaaka go kwadilwe mo molaong wa ga Moše, ka fa taolong ya ga Dafite." 
2Chronicles23:19 Mme a tlhoma balebedi fa dikgorong tsa ntlo ya ga Jehofa, gore go se ka ga tsena ope yo o itshekologileng ka sengwe."
