Nehemiah11:3 Jaana ba ke bone ditlhogo tsa ba lefatshe, ba ba agileng mo Jerusalema, mo metseng ya Juta; mongwe le mongwe a aga mo bosweng jwa gagwe mo metseng ya ga bone, e bong Baiseraele, baperesiti, Balefi, Banethinime le bana ba batlhanka ba ga Solomone." 
Nehemiah11:4 Mo Jerusalema ga aga bangwe ba bana ba Juta le ba Benjamine. Ba bana ba Juta: Athaia morwa Usia, morwa Sekaria, morwa Amaria, morwa Shefatia, morwa Mahalalele, wa bana ba ga Perese;" 
Nehemiah11:5 le Maaseia morwa Baruke, morwa Kolohose morwa Hasaia, morwa Ataia morwa Joiaribe, morwa Sekaria, morwa motho wa Mošilone." 
Nehemiah11:6 Bomorwa Perese botlhe ba ba agileng mo Jerusalema e ne e le banna ba ba 468, e le banna ba ba pelokgale." 
Nehemiah11:7 Ba ke bomorwa Benjamine: Salu morwa Mešulame, morwa Joete, morwa Petaia, morwa Kolaia, morwa Maaseia, morwa Ithiele morwa Ješaia." 
Nehemiah11:8 Morago ga gagwe Gabai, Salai, 928." 
Nehemiah11:9 Joele morwa Sikeri e ne e le molebedi wa bone; Juta morwa Hasenua e ne e le wa bobedi mo taolong ya motse. 
Nehemiah11:9 Joele morwa Sikeri e ne e le molebedi wa bone; Juta morwa Hasenua e ne e le wa bobedi mo taolong ya motse. 
Nehemiah11:10 Ba baperesiti: Jetaia morwa Joiaribe, Jakine," 
Nehemiah11:11 Seria morwa Hilekia, morwa Mešulame, morwa Satoke, morwa Meraiothe, morwa Ahitube, molaodi wa ntlo ya Modimo." 
Nehemiah11:12 Le bomonnaa bone ba ba dirang tiro ya ntlo ba le 822: Ataia morwa Jerohame, morwa Pelalia, morwa Amasi, morwa Sekaria, morwa Pašure, morwa Malekia." 
Nehemiah11:13 Le bomonnawe, ditlhogo tsa makgotla a borara, ba le 242; le Amašasai morwa Asarele morwa Ahasai, morwa Mešilemothe, morwa Imere," 
Nehemiah11:14 le bomonnaa bone, banna ba ba pelokgale, 128; molebedi wa bone e le Sabediele, morwa Hagetolime." 
Nehemiah11:15 Le ba Balefi: Shemaia morwa Hasešube morwa Asirikame morwa Hašabia morwa Buni; 
Nehemiah11:16 le Shabethai le Josabate, ba ditlhogo tsa Balefi e le balebedi ba tiro e e kwa ntle ga ntlo ya Modimo;" 
Nehemiah11:17 le Matania morwa Mika, morwa Sabedi, morwa Asafe, e le motlhabeletsi go simolola go leboga mo thapelong, le Bakebukia, wa bobedi mo go bomorwa rraagwe; le Abete, morwa Shamua, morwa Galale, morwa Jeduthune." 
Nehemiah11:18 Balefi botlhe ba ba mo motseng o o boitshepo e ne e le ba 284. 
Nehemiah11:19 Gape balebedi ba kgoro, Akube, Talemone, le bomonnaa bone ba ba tshegeditseng tebelo kwa dikgorong, e le 172." 
Nehemiah11:20 Ba ba setseng ba Baiseraele, ba baperesiti le ba Balefi, ba bo ba le mo metseng yotlhe ya Iseraele, mongwe le mongwe mo bosweng jwa gagwe." 
Nehemiah11:21 Banethinime ba ne ba agile mo Ofele; Siha le Gišepa ba le balebedi ba Banethinime. 
Nehemiah11:22 Le gone molebedi wa Balefi kwa Jerusalema e ne e le Usi morwa Bani, morwa Hašabia, morwa Matania, morwa Mika, wa bomorwa Asafe ba baopedi, e le ene molebedi wa tiro ya ntlo ya Modimo." 
Nehemiah11:23 Ka gonne go no go le taolo ka ga bone e tswa kgosing, le seabe sa baopedi, se se laotsweng, ka fa letsatsi lengwe le lengwe le lopang ka gone." 
Nehemiah11:24 Pethahia morwa Mešesabele wa bana ba ga Sera morwa Juta, o ne a le ka fa tsogong la kgosi mo dilong tsotlhe tse di amang batho." 
Nehemiah11:25 Ka ga metsana, le matlhagare a yone, bangwe ba bana ba Juta ba aga mo Kiriathe-arabe le mo metseng ya teng, mo Dibone le mo metseng ya gone, mo Jekabeseele le mo metsaneng ya gone;" 
Nehemiah11:26 mo Ješua, mo Molata, le Bethepelete;" 
Nehemiah11:27 mo Hasare-šuale, le mo Beerešeba le mo metseng ya teng; le" 
Nehemiah11:28 mo Sikelage, le mo Mekona, le mo metseng ya gone;" 
Nehemiah11:29 le mo Enerimone, le mo Sora le mo Jaremuthe;" 
Nehemiah11:30 Sanoa, Adulame le metsana ya teng, Lakiše le matlhagare a teng, Aseka le metse ya teng. Jalo ba thibelela go tswa Beerešeba go ya go fitlha kwa mogogorong wa Hinome." 
Nehemiah11:31 Bana ba Benjamine le bone ba aga go simolola mo Geba go ya kwa pele, kwa Mikemaše, le Aia, le kwa Bethele le metse ya gone." 
Nehemiah11:32 Kwa Anathothe, Nobe, Anania;" 
Nehemiah11:33 Hasore, Rama, Getaima;" 
Nehemiah11:34 Hatite, Seboime, Nebalate;" 
Nehemiah11:35 Lote le Ono, e le molapo wa badiri ba ditiro tsa botswerere." 
Nehemiah11:36 Le ba Balefi, makoko mangwe a diphapaano a bone mo Juta a kopanngwa le Benjamine." 
Nehemiah12:1 Mme jaana ba ke bone baperesiti le Balefi ba ba tlhatlogileng le Serubabele morwa Shealatiele, le Ješua: Seraia, Jeremia, Esera;" 
Nehemiah12:2 Amaria, Maluke, Hatuše;" 
Nehemiah12:3 Shekania, Rehume, Meremothe;" 
Nehemiah12:4 Ito, Genethoi, Abija;" 
Nehemiah12:5 Mijamine, Maadia, Bilega;" 
Nehemiah12:6 Shemaia le Joiaribe, Jetaia;" 
Nehemiah12:7 Salu, Amoke, Hilekia, Jetaia. Bao e ne e le ditlhogo tsa baperesiti le tsa bomonnaa bone mo metlheng ya ga Ješua." 
Nehemiah12:8 Gape Balefi: Ješua, Binui, Katemiele, Sherebia, Juta le Matania, yo e ne e le molebedi wa ba ba lebogang, ene le bomonnawe." 
Nehemiah12:9 Le ene Bakebukia le Uno, bomonnaa bone, ba lebaganye nabo mo ditebelong." 
Nehemiah12:10 Ješua a tsala Joiakime, Joiakime a tsala Eliašibe, Eliašibe a tsala Joiata," 
Nehemiah12:11 Joiata a tsala Jonathane, Jonathane a tsala Jadu." 
Nehemiah12:12 Mo metlheng ya ga Joiakime go ne go le baperesiti, ditlhogo tsa makgotla a borara: Wa ga Seraia, Meraia;" 
Nehemiah12:13 wa ga Jeremia, Hanania; wa ga Esera, Mešulame; wa ga Amaria, Johanane;" 
Nehemiah12:14 wa ga Maluki, Jonathane; wa ga Shebania, Josefe;" 
Nehemiah12:15 wa ga Harime, Atena; wa ga Meraiothe, Helekai;" 
Nehemiah12:16 wa ga Ito, Sekaria; wa ga Ginethone, Mešulame;" 
Nehemiah12:17 wa ga Abija, Sikeri; wa ga Miniamine, wa ga Moadia, Piletai;" 
Nehemiah12:18 wa ga Bilega, Shamua; wa ga Shemaia, Jehonathane;" 
Nehemiah12:19 le wa ga Joiaribe, Matenai; wa ga Jetaia, Usi;" 
Nehemiah12:20 wa ga Salai, Kalai, wa ga Amoke, Ebere;" 
Nehemiah12:21 wa ga Hilekia, Hašabia; wa ga Jetaia, Nethanele." 
Nehemiah12:22 Ya re mo metlheng ya ga Eliašibe, Joiate, le Johanane, le Jatua, ba bo ba kwadilwe ditlhogo tsa makgotla a borara; baperesiti le bone jalo, mo pusong ya ga Dario wa Moperesia." 
Nehemiah12:23 Bomorwa Lefi, ditlhogo tsa makgotla a borara, ba kwadilwe mo lokwalong lwa ditirafalo, fela go tla go fitlha mo metlheng ya ga Johanane morwa Eliašibe." 
Nehemiah12:24 Le ditlhogo tsa Balefi: Hašabia, Sherebia le Ješua morwa Katamiele, ba na le bomonnaa bone ba lebaganye nabo, go baka le go ntsha malebogo, ka fa taolong ya ga Dafite monna wa Modimo, tebelo e lebaganye le tebelo." 
Nehemiah12:25 Matania, le Bakebukia, Obatia, Mešulame, Talemone, Akube e ne e le balebedi ba kgoro ba tshegeditse tebelo fa dikgorong tsa matlo a dipolokelo." 
Nehemiah12:26 E ne e le bao mo metlheng ya ga Joiakime morwa Ješua, morwa Josatake, mo metlheng ya ga Nehemia molaodi, le ya ga Esera mokwadi." 
Nehemiah12:27 E rile ka neelo ya lorako lwa Jerusalema ba batla Balefi mo mafelong otlhe a bone, go ba lere mo Jerusalema, go tla ba dira neelo ya lorako ka boitumelo, ka malebogo le ka kopelo, ka disemebale, le ka disaletere le ka diharepe." 
Nehemiah12:28 Bomorwa baopedi ba phuthega, ba tswa mo lobaleng mo tikologong ya Jerusalema, le mo metsaneng ya Banetofathe;" 
Nehemiah12:29 le kwa Bethegilegale, le kwa matlhagareng a Geba le Asemafethe; gonne baopedi ba ne ba ikagetse metsana mo tikologong ya Jerusalema." 
Nehemiah12:30 Baperesiti le Balefi ba iitshekisa, ba ba ba itshekisa batho, le dikgoro le lorako." 
Nehemiah12:31 Foo ka lere dikgosana tsa Juta mo godimo ga lorako, ka baakanya masomo a le mabedi a matona a ba ba lebogang, mme ba tsamaya ba bopeletse; lesomo le lengwe la tsamaya ka fa ntlheng ya tsogo le legolo mo godimo ga lorako ba lebile kwa kgorong ya letshotelo." 
Nehemiah12:32 Morago ga bone ga tsamaya Hošaia le bontlhanngwe jwa dikgosana tsa Juta," 
Nehemiah12:33 le Asaria, le Esera, Mešulame," 
Nehemiah12:34 Juta, le Benjamine, le Shemaia le Jeremia," 
Nehemiah12:35 le bangwe ba bomorwa baperesiti ba tshotse dinaka; Sekaria morwa Jonathane, morwa Shemaia, morwa Matania, morwa Mikaia, morwa Sakure, morwa Asafe;" 
Nehemiah12:36 le bomonnawe, Shemaia, le Asaraele, Milalai, le Gilalai, le Maai, le Nethanele, le Juta le Hanani, ba na le diletso tsa kopelo tsa ga Dafite monna wa Modimo; Esera mokwadi a bo a le fa pele ga bone." 
Nehemiah12:37 Mme ba tla ka kgoro ya motswedi, ba tlhamalala ba tlhatloga ka direpudi tsa motse wa ga Dafite, fa botlhatlogong jwa lorako, fa godimo ga ntlo ya ga Dafite, fela kwa kgorong ya metse, ntlheng ya botlhabatsatsi." 
Nehemiah12:38 Lesome le lengwe la bone ba ba lebogang, la ya go ba kgatlhantsha, le nna ke ba setse morago, ke na le bontlhanngwe jwa batho, re le mo godimo ga lorako, godimo ga kago e e godileng ya maiso a boubelo, go ya fela kwa lorakong lo lo atlhameng;" 
Nehemiah12:39 le kwa godimo ga kgoro ya Eferaime, le ka kgoro e kgologolo, le ka kgoro ya ditlhapi le kago e e godileng ya ga Hananele, le kago e e godileng ya Hamea, go ya fela kwa kgorong ya dinku; mme ba fitlha ba ema mo kgorong ya balebedi." 
Nehemiah12:40 Jalo masomo a mabedi a bone ba ba lebogang mo ntlong ya Modimo ba ema, le nna ke na le bontlhanngwe jwa balaodi;" 
Nehemiah12:41 le baperesiti, Eliakime, Maaseia, Miniamine, Mikaia, Elioenai, Sekaria le Hanania, ba tshotse dinaka;" 
Nehemiah12:42 le Maaseia, le Shemaia, le Eleasare, le Usi, Johanane, le Malekia, le Elame le Esera. Baopedi ba opelela godimo, ba na le Jeserahia molebedi wa bone." 
Nehemiah12:43 Ba isa ditlhabelo tse dikgolo ka tsatsi leo, ba itumela, gonne Modimo o no o ba itumedisitse ka boitumelo jo bogolo; le basadi le bana ba itumela. Jalo boitumelo jwa Jerusalema jwa utlwala fela kwa kgakala." 
Nehemiah12:44 Ya re ka letsatsi leo ga tlhongwa batho, ba tlhomelwa dikhumo tsa matlwana, le ditshupelo tsa tsholetso, le mabutswapele, le tsa bosome, go tla ba di phuthela gone, ka fa matlhagareng a metse, le dikabelo tse di laoletsweng baperesiti le Balefi ke molao; gonne Bajuta ba ne ba itumelela baperesiti le Balefi ba ba direlang." 
Nehemiah12:45 Ba tshegetsa tebelo ya Modimo wa bone, le tebelo ya bontlafatso, le baopedi le balebedi ba kgoro ba dira jalo, ka fa taolong ya ga Dafite le ya ga Solomone morwawe." 
Nehemiah12:46 Gonne e rile mo motlheng wa ga Dafite le Asafe bogologolo, go ne go le tlhogo ya baopedi, le difela tsa pako le tsa tebogo tse di lebogang Modimo." 
Nehemiah12:47 Baiseraele botlhe mo motlheng wa ga Serubabele le mo motlheng wa ga Nehemia, ba ntsha dikabelo tsa baopedi le tsa balebedi ba kgoro, ka fa letsatsi lengwe le lengwe le lopang ka teng. Mme bone ba itshepisetsa Balefi; mme Balefi ba itshepisetsa bomorwa Arone." 
Nehemiah13:1 E rile ka tsatsi leo ba bala mo lokwalong lwa ga Moše mo kutlong ya batho; mme ga fitlhelwa go kwadilwe gone go twe, Motho wa Moamone le wa Moabe a se ka a tsena mo phuthegong ya Modimo ka bosakhutleng;" 
Nehemiah13:2 ka ba se ka ba kgatlhantsha bana ba Iseraele ka dijo le ka metsi, mme ba ba thapela Balaame ka tuelo go tla a ba hutsa; le fa go ntse jalo Modimo wa rona o no wa fetola phutso ya nna tshegofatso." 
Nehemiah13:3 Ga dirala ya re ba sena go utlwa molao, ba lomolola bontsi jotlhe jwa batho jo bo tlhakatlhakanyeng mo go Baiseraele." 
Nehemiah13:4 Mme jaana e rile pele ga mo, Eliašibe moperesiti, yo o ne a laoletswe matlwana a ntlo ya Modimo wa rona, e re ka a ne a golaganye le Tobia," 
Nehemiah13:5 o ne a mmaakanyeditse ntlwana e kgolo, mo e rileng gale ba bo ba tsenya ditshupelo tsa boupe gone, le lebano, le dilwana, le tsa bosome tsa mabele, le bojalwa jwa mofine, le lookwane, tse di ne di tle di ntshiwe ka taolo e le tsa Balefi, le tsa baopedi le balebedi ba kgoro; di na le ditshupelo tsa tsholetso tsa baperesiti." 
Nehemiah13:6 Ya re ka lobaka lotlhe loo ke ne ke seyo kwa Jerusalema, gonne e rile ka ngwaga wa 32 wa ga Aretaserese kgosi ya Babilone, ka ya kwa kgosing, mme morago ga malatsi mangwe ka lopa tsela mo kgosing." 
Nehemiah13:7 Ka tla Jerusalema, mme ka tlhaloganya ka ga bosula jo Eliašibe o ne a bo diretse Tobia, ka go mmaakanyetsa ntlwana mo malwapeng a ntlo ya Modimo." 
Nehemiah13:8 Ga nkutlwisa botlhoko thata; ke gone dilo tsotlhe tsa ga Tobia tsa ntlo, ka di latlhela kwa ntle ga ntlwana." 
Nehemiah13:9 Foo ka laola, mme ba itshekisa matlwana; ka busetsa teng dilwana tsa ntlo ya Modimo, di na le ditshupelo tsa boupe le lebano." 
Nehemiah13:10 Ka lemoga fa Balefi ba ntse ba sa newa dikabelo tsa bone; jalo Balefi, le baopedi ba ba dirang tiro, mongwe le mongwe a bile a tshabetse kwa lotlhagareng lwa gagwe." 
Nehemiah13:11 Foo ka ganela le balaodi, ka re: “Ke ka ntlha yang ntlo ya Modimo e lathilwe jaana?” Ka ba phutha, ka ba baya mo bonnong jwa bone." 
Nehemiah13:12 Foo Bajuta botlhe ba lere sa bosome sa mabele, le sa bojalwa jwa mofine, le sa lookwane, mo matlong a dikhumo." 
Nehemiah13:13 Ka laolela matlo a dikhumo balebedi ba dikhumo, Shemaia moperesiti, le Satoke mokwadi, le Petaia e le wa Balefi. Hanane morwa Sakure, morwa Matania, a rulagana nabo; gonne ba kaiwa go re ba boikanngo, mme tiro ya bone e le go abela bomonnaa bone." 
Nehemiah13:14 O tle o nkgakologelwe, Modimo wa me, ka ga selo se, o se ka wa phimola ditiro tsa me tse di molemo tse ke di diretseng ntlo ya Modimo wa me, le ditirelo tsa one." 
Nehemiah13:15 Ya re mo metlheng eo mo Juta, ka bona bangwe ba gata mo dikgatisetsong tsa bojalwa go le Sabata, ba lere makokoma a mabele, ba a belesa mo dieseleng; le jone bojalwa jwa mofine, le difine, le difeige, le merwalo mengwe le mengwe e ba e lereng mo Jerusalema ka letsatsi la Sabata; mme ka ba naya molato mo tsatsing le ba ne ba rekisa dijo ka lone." 
Nehemiah13:16 Go no go bile go agile batho ba Ture gone, ba ba lereng ditlhapi, le thoto nngwe le nngwe, ba di rekisa ka Sabata mo baneng ba Juta, le mo Jerusalema." 
Nehemiah13:17 Foo ka ganela le magosana a Juta, ka ba raya ka re: “Ke bosula bofe jo lo bo dirang, lo itshepolola letsatsi la Sabata?" 
Nehemiah13:18 A borraeno ga ba a dira jalo, mme a Modimo wa rona ga o a lere bosula jo jotlhe mo go rona, le mo motseng ono? Le fa go ntse jalo lo sa ntse lo tlisa bogale mo Iseraele ka go itshepolola Sabata.”" 
Nehemiah13:19 Ga dirala, ya re dikgoro tsa Jerusalema di simolola go fifalelwa pele ga Sabata, ka laola gore go tswalwe dikgoro, mme ka laola gore go se ka ga bulwa go tle go tsamaye Sabata o fete pele; batlhanka bangwe ba me ka ba tlhoma mo go lebeleng dikgoro, gore go se ka ga isiwa morwalo ope mo teng ka letsatsi la Sabata." 
Nehemiah13:20 Jalo bareki le barekisi ba thoto nngwe le nngwe ba lala kwa ntle ga Jerusalema gangwe fela kgotsa gabedi. 
Nehemiah13:21 Foo ka ba naya molato, ka ba raya ka re: “Lo lalelang fa lorakong? Fa lo dira jalo gape, ke tlaa lo tsenya mabogo.” E sa le ka lobaka loo ga ba a ka ba tlhola ba tla ka Sabata." 
Nehemiah13:22 Ka laola Balefi gore ba iitshekise, le gore ba tle go lebela dikgoro, go tla ba itshepisa letsatsi la Sabata. Modimo wa me, o tle o nkgakologelelwe le sone se, mme o nthekegele ka fa bogolong jwa boutlwelobotlhoko jwa gago." 
Nehemiah13:23 Metlheng eo le gone ka bona Bajuta ba ba nyetseng basadi ba Ašetote, ba Amone le ba Moabe." 
Nehemiah13:24 Bana ba bone, ba bua puo ya Seašetote ka ntlha nngwe, mme ba retelelwa ke go bua puo ya Sejuta, fa e se ka fa puong ya batho ba bangwe le ba bangwe." 
Nehemiah13:25 Mme ka ganela nabo, ka ba hutsa ka betsa bangwe ba bone, ka ba khumola moriri, ka ba ikanisa ka Modimo, ka re: “Lo se ka lwa naya bomorwaa bone bomorwadia lona, le gone lo se ka lwa tseisa bomorwaa lona bomorwadia bone, le fa e le go ba itseela." 
Nehemiah13:26 A Solomone kgosi ya Iseraele a ga a ne a leofa ka dilo tse? Le fa go ntse jalo mo bontsing jwa merafe go ne go se na kgosi epe e e tshwanang nae; o ne a ratwa ke Modimo wa gagwe, mme Modimo wa mo dira kgosi ya Baiseraele botlhe. Le fa go ntse jalo le e leng ene, basadi ba seeng ba mo leofisa." 
Nehemiah13:27 Mme e le foo a re tlaa reetsa lona go tla re dira bosula jotlhe jo bogolo jo, re tlolela Modimo wa rona ka go nyala basadi ba seeng?”" 
Nehemiah13:28 Mongwe wa bomorwa Joiate, morwa Eliašibe wa moperisiti yo mogolo, e ne e le mogwe wa ga Sanebalate wa Mohorone; ke gone ka moo ka mo leleka fa go nna." 
Nehemiah13:29 Modimo wa me, a ko o ba gakologelwe, ka ntlha ya gobo ba itshekolotse boperesiti, le kgolagano ya boperesiti, le ya Balefi." 
Nehemiah13:30 Ka ba ntlafatsa jalo mo baennyeng botlhe, ka laolela baperisiti le Balefi ditebelo, mongwe le mongwe mo tirong ya gagwe;" 
Nehemiah13:31 le ya tshupelo ya dikgong, ka metlha e e laotsweng, le ya mabutswapele. Modimo wa me, o tle o nkgakologelwe ka molemo." 
Esther1:1 Jaana ga dirala e rile mo metlheng ya ga Ahasueruse (yoo ke ene Ahasueruse yo o ne a busa dikgaolo tsa mafatshe di le 127, go tswa India go ya fela kwa Ethiopia,)" 
Esther1:2 mo metlheng eo, ya re kgosi Ahasueruse a dutse mo setulong sa bogosi jwa gagwe, se se neng se le mo Shušane, motse wa kgosi," 
Esther1:3 ya re ka ngwaga wa boraro wa mmuso wa gagwe, a direla magosana a gagwe le batlhanka ba gagwe modiro; e bong nonofo ya Peresia le Media, marena le magosana a mafatshe a le fa pele ga gagwe." 
Esther1:4 A supa ka lone lobaka loo dikhumo tsa bogosi jwa gagwe jo bo galalelang, le tlotlo ya borena jwa gagwe jo bo gaisang, a bo supa ka malatsi a le mantsi, e bong ka malatsi a le 180." 
Esther1:5 E rile malatsi ao a sena go feta kgosi ya direla batho botlhe ba gone mo Shušane motse wa kgosi modiro, bagolo le bannye, ka malatsi a supa, mo lwapeng lo lo kwa tshimong ya motse wa kgosi." 
Esther1:6 Go ne go le matsela a a lepeletseng a masweu, le a matala, le a mahibidu, a a gokeletsweng ka mehitshana ya selefera mo maotwaneng a maje a marebele, ka megala ya leloba le le boleta, le ya bohibidu jo bo mokgona, masekamelo e le a gouta le selefera, a le mo bophaphathong jwa matlapa a marebele, a mahibidu, le a masweu, le a masetlha, le a mantsho." 
Esther1:7 Ba ba nosa ka dinwelo tsa gouta (dinwelo tsone go se na dipe tse di tshwanang le tse dingwe), bojalwa jwa mofine jwa segosi bo le letlotlo, ka fa letlotlo le le mo kgosing le ntseng ka gone." 
Esther1:8 Go nwa go ne go le ka fa molaong; go se ope yo o ka patelelang yo mongwe; gonne kgosi e laotse balaodisiwa botlhe ba ntlo ya yone jalo, gore ba dire ka fa go rateng ga motho mongwe le mongwe." 
Esther1:9 Le ene Fašeti, mohumagadi wa kgosi, a direla basadi modiro mo ntlong ya segosi e e leng ya ga kgosi Ahasueruse." 
Esther1:10 Ya re ka letsatsi la bosupa, ka pelo ya kgosi e thamile ka bojalwa jwa mofine, ya laola Mehumane, le Bisethe, le Harebone, le Bigethe, le Abagetha, le Sethare le Karakase, baopafadiwi ba ba supa, ba ba direlang fa pele ga kgosi Ahasueruse," 
Esther1:11 a re ba lere Fašeti mohumagadi wa kgosi, fa pele ga kgosi a na le serwalo sa segosi, go tla a supetsa ditšhaba le magosana bontle jwa gagwe; gonne o na a le montle go lejwa." 
Esther1:12 Mohumagadi Fašeti a gana go tla ka fa taolong ya kgosi ka baopafadiwi; ke gone ka moo kgosi ya gakala thata, bogale jwa yone jwa tuka mo teng ga yone." 
Esther1:13 Foo kgosi ya raya batho ba ba botlhale ba ba itseng metlha, (gonne mokgwa wa kgosi o ne o ntse jalo mo go botlhe ba ba itseng taolo le katlholo." 
Esther1:14 Ba ba rulaganyeng nae ya bo e le Karešene, le Shethare, le Atematha, le Tarešiše, le Merese, le Maresena le Memukane, dikgosana di supa tsa Peresia le Media, ba ba neng ba leba sefatlhogo sa kgosi, ba ba ba dula kwa pele mo bogosing). A re:" 
Esther1:15 “Ana Mohumagadi Fašeti re tlaa mo reng ka fa molaong, ka a se ka a dira taolo ya ga kgosi Ahasueruse ka baopafadiwi?”" 
Esther1:16 Memukane a fetola fa pele ga kgosi le dikgosana, a re: “Fašeti mohumagadi ga a a direla kgosi e le yosi tshiamololo, mme le magosana otlhe, le ditšhaba tsotlhe tse di mo mafatsheng a ga kgosi Ahasueruse." 
Esther1:17 Gonne tiro e ya mohumagadi e tlaa tswela kwa basading botlhe e ya go dira gore banna ba bone ba nyatsege mo matlhong a bone, mogang go bolelwang go twe: ‘Kgosi Ahasueruse o ne a laotse gore Fašeti mohumagadi a leriwe fa pele ga gagwe mme a se ka a tla.’" 
Esther1:18 Ka tsatsi leno, bahumagadi ba dikgosana tsa Peresia le Media ba ba utlwang ka ga tiro ya mohumagadi wa kgosi ba tlaa bua fela jalo mo dikgosaneng tsotlhe tsa kgosi. Jalo go tlaa tsoga lonyatso lo logolo le bogale." 
Esther1:19 Fa go ka kgatlha kgosi, a go tswe mo go yone taolo ya segosi, mme a e kwalwe mo melaong ya Baperesia le Bamedia, gore e se ka ya fetolwa, gore Fašeti a se ka a tlhola a tla fa pele ga kgosi Ahasueruse; mme a kgosi e neye o sele bohumagadi jwa gagwe jwa segosi, a bo neye yo o molemo bogolo go ene." 
Esther1:20 Mme e tlaa re taolo e kgosi e tlaa e dirang e bolelwa mo bogosing jotlhe jwa yone, (gonne bo bogolo), basadi botlhe ba tlaa naya banna ba bone tlotlo, bagolo le bannye.”" 
Esther1:21 Lefoko leo la kgatlha kgosi le dikgosana; mme kgosi ya dira jaaka lefoko la ga Memukane; 
Esther1:22 gonne a tsamaisetsa dikwalo kwa mafatsheng otlhe a kgosi, kwa lefatsheng lengwe le lengwe ka fa go kwaleng ga lone, le kwa sešabeng sengwe le sengwe ka fa puong ya sone, gore monna mongwe le mongwe a dire le taolo mo ntlong ya gagwe, mme a go bolele ka fa puong ya batho ba ga gabo." 
Esther2:1 E rile morago ga dilo tse, bogale jwa ga kgosi Ahasueruse bo sena go kokobela, a gakologelwa Fašeti le se o ne a se dirile, le se se laotsweng ka ga gagwe." 
Esther2:2 Foo batlhanka ba kgosi ba ba e direlang ba re: “A go batlelwe kgosi basetsana ba bantle ba makgarebana. 
Esther2:3 Mme kgosi e tlhome balaodisiwa mo dikgaolong tsotlhe tsa mafatshe otlhe a bogosi jwa yone, gore ba tle ba phuthele basetsana ba makgarebana ba bantle botlhe kwa Shušane motse wa kgosi, kwa ntlong ya basadi, ba nne mo tlamelong ya ga Hegai moopafadiwi wa kgosi, le modisa wa basadi; mme ba newe dilo tsa bone tsa boitshekiso." 
Esther2:4 Mme a mosetsana yo o kgatlhang kgosi a nne mohumagadi mo boemong jwa ga Fašeti.” Selo seo sa kgatlha kgosi; mme ya dira jalo. 
Esther2:5 Ga bo go le Mojuta mongwe mo Shušane motse wa kgosi, yo leina la gagwe e ne e le Moretekai, morwa Jaire, morwa Shimei, morwa Kiše, wa Mobenjamine;" 
Esther2:6 yo o ne a tlositswe kwa Jerusalema le batshwarwa ba ba tlositsweng le Jekonia kgosi ya Juta, yo Nebukatenesare kgosi ya Babilone o ne a mo tlositse." 
Esther2:7 Mme a otla Hatase, ke go re Esethere morwadia rrangwanaagwe, gonne o ne a se na rraagwe le mmaagwe, mme mosetsana yo a bo a le moswaana, a le montle; mme e rile rraagwe le mmaagwe ba sena go swa, Moretekai a mo tshola a nna morwadie." 
Esther2:8 Jalo ga dirala, e rile taolo ya kgosi le boikaelelo jwa yone bo sena go utlwala, basetsana ba le bantsi ba phuthegetse kwa Shušane motse wa kgosi mo tisong ya ga Hegai, Esethere a isiwa mo ntlong ya kgosi, mo tisong ya ga Hegai modisa wa basadi." 
Esther2:9 Morweetsana yo a mo kgatlha, mme morweetsana a direlwa ka bopelonomi ke ene; a akofa a mo naya dilo tsa gagwe tsa boitshekiso, le dikabelo tsa gagwe, le barweetsana ba supa ba ba tswang mo ntlong ya kgosi, ba o ne a tshwanetse go ba neelwa, mme a mo hudusa le barweetsana ba gagwe, a ba hudusetsa kwa bonnong jo bo molemo o o gaisang mo ntlong ya basadi." 
Esther2:10 Esethere ga a ka a bolela batho ba ga gabo, le fa e le losika lwa gagwe; gonne Moretekai o na a mo laile gore a se ka a go bolela." 
Esther2:11 Moretekai o na a nna a tsamaya tsamaya fa pele ga lolwapa lwa ntlo ya basadi ka malatsi otlhe, gore a tle a itse ka fa Esethere o ntseng a tsoga ka teng, le se se tlaa mo dirafalelang." 
Esther2:12 Jaana ya re go tla lobaka lwa morweetsana mongwe le mongwe lwa go tsena kwa kgosing Ahasueruse, morweetsana a sena go direlwa ka fa molaong wa basadi, ka dikgwedi di le 12 (gonne motlha wa maitshekiso a bone o ne o dirafadiwa jalo, ke go re ka dikgwedi di le thataro ba iphorole ka lookwane lwa mura, le ka dikgwedi di le thataro ba iphorole ka dinkga monate, le ka dilo tsa go itshekisa basadi)." 
Esther2:13 Foo ka mokgwa o o ntseng jaana, morweetsana a tle kgosing, sengwe le sengwe se o se eletsang a se newe a tswe naso mo ntlong ya basadi a ye mo ntlong ya kgosi." 
Esther2:14 E re ka maabanyane a ye, mme e re ka moso a boele kwa ntlong ya bobedi ya basadi, mo tisong ya ga Shaašagase, moopafadiwa wa kgosi, yo o disang bagadingwana, a ba a sa tlhole a tsena kwa kgosing, fa kgosi e se ka ya kgatlhega mo go ene, mme a ba a bidiwa ka leina." 
Esther2:15 E rile go tla lobaka lwa ga Esethere morwadia Abihaile rrangwanaagwe Moretekai, yo o ne a mo tshotse a mo dira morwadie, fa a tlaa tsena kwa kgosing, o ne a se ka a eletsa sepe fa e se se Hegai moopafadiwa wa kgosi, modisa wa basadi, o se laotseng. Mme Esethere a kgatlha botlhe ba ba mo lebileng." 
Esther2:16 Jalo Esethere a isiwa kwa kgosing Ahasueruse, mo ntlong ya gagwe ya segosi ka kgwedi ya lesome, e e leng kgwedi ya Tebethe, ka ngwaga wa bosupa wa mmuso wa gagwe." 
Esther2:17 Kgosi ya rata Esethere bogolo go basadi botlhe, mme a bona go segofala le go ratega mo ponong ya yone bogolo go barweetsana botlhe, mme ya baya serwalo sa segosi mo tlhogong ya gagwe, ya mo dira mohumagadi wa yone mo boemong jwa ga Fašeti." 
Esther2:18 Foo kgosi ya direla magosana otlhe a yone le batlhanka ba yone modiro o mogolo, e bong modiro wa ga Esethere; a direla dikgaolo tsa mafatshe lobaka lwa tapologo, a aba dineo, ka fa letlotlo le le mo kgosing le ne le ntse ka teng." 
Esther2:19 E rile barweetsana ba makgarebana ba phuthega lwa bobedi, foo Moretekai a dula mo kgorong ya kgosi." 
Esther2:20 Esethere o ne a ise a bolele losika lwa gagwe, le fa e le batho ba ga gabo, jaaka Moretekai a ne a mo laile; gonne Esethere a dira taolo ya ga Moretekai, fela jaaka jale a sa ntse a otlwa kwa go ene." 
Esther2:21 Ya re mo metlheng eo, Moretekai a dutse mo kgorong ya kgosi, baopafadiwa ba kgosi ba le babedi, e bong Bigethane le Tereše, e le ba bone ba ba lebelang kgoro, ba nna bogale, ba batla go tsenya kgosi Ahasueruse mabogo." 
Esther2:22 Mme selo seo sa itsiwe ke Moretekai, mme a se itsise Esethere mohumagadi wa kgosi; mme Esethere a se bolelela kgosi ka leina la ga Moretekai." 
Esther2:23 E rile go tlhotlhomisiwa ka ga selo se, ga fitlhelwa se ntse jalo, ba pegwa mo setlhareng boo babedi, ga ba ga kwalwa mo lokwalong lwa ditirafalo fa pele ga kgosi." 
Esther3:1 Morago ga dilo tse kgosi Ahasueruse a goletsa Hamane morwa Hametathe wa Moagage, a mo isa kwa pele, a baya setulo sa gagwe godimo ga dikgosana tsotlhe tse o nang natso." 
Esther3:2 Batlhanka botlhe ba kgosi, ba ba mo kgorong ya kgosi ba ikoba, ba tlotla Hamane gonne kgosi e laotse jalo ka ga gagwe. Mme Moretekai a se ka a ikoba a ba a se ka a mo tlotla." 
Esther3:3 Foo batlhanka ba kgosi, ba ba mo kgorong ya kgosi, ba raya Moretekai ba re: “Ana o tlolelang taolo ya kgosi?”" 
Esther3:4 Ga dirala ya re ba ntse ba bua nae ka malatsi otlhe, mme a se ka a ba reetsa, ba bolelela Hamane gore ba tle ba bone boo mafoko a ga Moretekai a tlaa ema; gonne o na a ba boleletse fa a le Mojuta." 
Esther3:5 E rile Hamane a bona fa Moretekai a sa ikobe, le fa e le go mo tlotla, foo Hamane a tlala bogale." 
Esther3:6 Mme a nyatsa go tsenya Moretekai a le esi diatla; gonne ba ne ba mmoleletse batho ba ga gabo Moretekai; ke gone ka moo Hamane a leka go senya Bajuta botlhe go ya le bogosi jotlhe jwa ga Ahasueruse, e bong batho ba ga gabo Moretekai." 
Esther3:7 E rile ka kgwedi ya ntlha, e e leng kgwedi ya Nisane, ka ngwaga wa 12 wa ga kgosi Ahasueruse, ba thela Pure, ke go re bola, fa pele ga Hamane ka malatsi otlhe, le ka dikgwedi tsotlhe, go ya kgweding ya 12, e e leng kgwedi ya Atare." 
Esther3:8 Mme Hamane a raya kgosi Ahasueruse a re: “Go na le tšhaba nngwe e e faletseng, e kgaoganye kgaoganye mo ditšhabeng mo mafatsheng otlhe a bogosi jwa gago; mme melao ya bone e tshwanologile le melao ya ditšhaba tse dingwe tsotlhe fela; le gone ga ba tshegetse ditaolo tsa kgosi; ke gone ka moo ga go a tshwanela kgosi go ba leseletsa." 
Esther3:9 Fa go ka kgatlha kgosi, a go kwalwe gore ba senngwe, mme nna ke tlaa tsenya dikilokerama tse di fetang 340 000 tsa selefera mo diatleng tsa ba ba laolang tiro e, ya kgosi, go tla ba e lere mo dipolokelong tsa dikhumo tsa kgosi.”" 
Esther3:10 Kgosi ya somola lenyena mo seatlang sa yone, ya le naya Hamane morwa Hametathe wa Moagage; mmaba wa Bajuta." 
Esther3:11 Kgosi ya raya Hamane ya re: “Selefera se neilwe wena, le bone batho, go dira ka bone ka fa o bonang go le molemo ka teng.”" 
Esther3:12 Foo bakwaledi ba kgosi ba bidiwa ka kgwedi ya ntlha, ka letsatsi la 13 la yone; mme ga kwalwa ka fa go tsotlhe tse Hamane o di laoletseng balaodisiwa ba kgosi ka gone, le balaodi ba ba laolang mo kgaolong nngwe le nngwe ya lefatshe, le magosana a sešaba sengwe le sengwe kgaolo nngwe le nngwe ya lefatshe ka fa go kwaleng ga yone, le sešaba sengwe le sengwe ka fa puong ya sone; lo no lwa kwalwa mo ineng la kgosi Ahasueruse, lwa kanwa ka lenyena la kgosi." 
Esther3:13 Dikwalo tsa isiwa ke batsamaisi ba dikwalo kwa dikgaolong tsotlhe tsa mafatshe otlhe a kgosi, go senya, le go bolaya, le go nyeletsa Bajuta botlhe, makau le batsofe, banyana le basadi, ka letsatsi le le lengwe fela, e bong ka tsatsi la 12 la kgwedi ya 12, e e leng kgwedi ya Atare, le gore go gapiwe dilo tsa bone." 
Esther3:14 Malebela a lokwalo a na a itsisiwe ditšhaba tsotlhe, gore taolo eo e bolelwe mo kgaolong nngwe le nngwe ya lefatshe gore ditšhaba di ipaakanyetse letsatsi leo." 
Esther3:15 Batsamaisi ba dikwalo ba tsamaya ba potlakisiwa ke taolo ya kgosi, mme molao wa tlhongwa mo Shušane motse wa kgosi. Kgosi le Hamane ba dula ba nwa; motse wa Shušane one wa tseakana fela." 
Esther4:1 E rile Moretekai a itse gotlhe mo go dirilweng, a ikgagola diaparo, a apara letsela la kgetse le na le melora, a tswela kwa gare ga motse, a jajarega ka jajarego e kgolo, e e botlhoko." 
Esther4:2 A tla fela fa pele ga kgoro ya kgosi, gonne go sa kake ga tsena ope mo teng ga kgoro ya kgosi a apere letsela la kgetse." 
Esther4:3 Le mo kgaolong nngwe le nngwe ya lefatshe kwa taolo le molao wa kgosi o fitlhileng teng, ga nna khutsafalo e kgolo mo Bajuteng, le go ikitsa go ja, go lela le go kuruetsa; batho ba le bantsi ba rapama fa fatshe mo letseleng la kgetse le melora." 
Esther4:4 Barweetsana ba ga Esethere le baopafadiwi ba gagwe ba fitlha, ba mmolelela; mohumagadi a nna pelo e e botlhoko thata; a roma batho ba isa diaparo ba ya go apesa Moretekai le go tlosa letsela la kgetsi mo go ene, mme a se ka a di amogela." 
Esther4:5 Foo Esethere a bitsa Hathake, mongwe wa baopafadiwi ba kgosi, yo e ne e mo laoletse go direla mohumagadi, Esethere a mo laola gore a ye kwa go Moretekai, a ye go tlhaloganya go re golo mo ke eng, le go re ke ka ntlha yang." 
Esther4:6 Jalo Hathake a tswela kwa go Moretekai kwa patlelong ya motse, e e fa pele ga kgoro ya kgosi." 
Esther4:7 Moretekai a mmolela gotlhe mo go mo dirafaletseng, le madi tota a Hamane o ne a itlhomamisitse go re o tlaa a tsenya mo dipolokelong tsa dikhumo tsa kgosi ka ga Bajuta, go ba senya." 
Esther4:8 Le gone a mo naya malebela a go kwalwa ga molao o o tlhomilweng mo Shušane go ba senya, gore a ye go a supetsa Esethere, le go a mmolelela; le go mo raya gore a tsene kwa kgosing, a ye go e rapela, le go e lopa ka ga batho ba ga gabo." 
Esther4:9 Hathake a fitlha a bolelela Esethere mafoko a ga Moretekai. 
Esther4:10 Foo Esethere a bua le Hathake, a mo laetsa kwa go Moretekai, a re:" 
Esther4:11 “Batlhanka botlhe ba kgosi, le batho ba dikgaolo tsa mafatshe a kgosi, ba itse gore le fa e le mang, monna kgotsa mosadi, yo o tlaa tsenelang kgosi kwa lwapeng lo lo kwa teng, e le yo o sa bidiwang, go na le molao o le mongwe fela ka ga gagwe, ke go re a bolawe, fa e se yo kgosi e tlaa mo ntshetsang thobane ya gouta ya bogosi, gore a tle a tshele; mme go fetile malatsi a le 30 ke ntse ke sa bidiwe, gore ke ye go tsena kwa kgosing.”" 
Esther4:12 Ba bolelela Moretekai mafoko a ga Esethere. 
Esther4:13 Foo Moretekai a ba raya a re ba busetse phetolo kwa go Esethere, go re: “O se ka wa ikgopola go re o tlaa falola fa o le mo ntlong ya kgosi, bogolo go Bajuta botlhe." 
Esther4:14 Gonne fa o didimalela ruri mo lobakeng lono, foo Bajuta ba tlaa tsogelwa ke thuso le kgololo e e tswang go sele, mme wena le ba ntlo ya ga rraago lo tlaa swa. Go itse mang boo ga o a tlela motlha o o ntseng jaana mo bogosing.”" 
Esther4:15 Foo Esethere a ba raya a re ba busetse phetolo kwa go Moretekai go re: 
Esther4:16 “Ya o phuthe Bajuta botlhe ba ba mo Shušane lo ntirele go ikitsa go ja, lo bo lo se ka lwa ja le fa e le go nwa ka malatsi a le mararo, bosigo le fa e le motshegare. Le nna le barweetsana ba me re tlaa ikitsa go ja jalo; jalo ke tlaa tsena kwa kgosing, le fa e tlaa bo e se ka fa molaong; mme fa ke swa, a ke swe fela.”" 
Esther4:17 Mme Moretekai a tsamaya, a ya a dira jaaka tsotlhe tse Esethere o di mo laoletseng." 
Esther5:1 Jaana ga dirala ya re ka letsatsi la boraro, Esethere a apara diaparo tsa gagwe tsa segosi, a ya a ema mo lwapeng lo lo kwa teng lwa ntlo ya kgosi, bolebagana le ntlo ya kgosi; mme kgosi ya bo e dutse mo setulong sa yone sa segosi mo ntlong ya segosi, bolebagana le kgoro ya ntlo." 
Esther5:2 Ga dirala e rile kgosi e bona Esethere mohumagadi a eme mo lwapeng, Esethere a bona botsalano mo ponong ya yone; mme kgosi ya otlololela Esethere thobane ya gouta ya bogosi e o e tshotseng. Mme Esethere a atamela, a ama ntlha ya thobane ya bogosi." 
Esther5:3 Foo kgosi ya mo raya ya re: “O ratang mohumagadi Esethere? Topo ya gago ke eng? O tlaa se newa fela le fa e ka bo e le bontlhanngwe jwa bogosi.” 
Esther5:4 Esethere a re: “Fa go le molemo mo kgosing, a kgosi e tle le Hamane gompieno mo modirong o ke o e baakanyeditseng.”" 
Esther5:5 Foo kgosi ya re: “Itlhaganediseng Hamane, gore go dirwe jaaka Esethere a buile.” Jalo kgosi le Hamane ba tla modirong o Esethere o ne a o baakantse." 
Esther5:6 Kgosi ya raya Esethere mo modirong wa bojalwa jwa mofine ya re: “Thapelo ya gago ke eng? O tlaa e newa; topo ya gago ke eng? Le fa e ka bo e le bontlhanngwe jwa bogosi go tlaa dirafadiwa.” 
Esther5:7 Foo ga fetola Esethere, a re: “Thapelo le topo ya me ke e:" 
Esther5:8 Fa ke bonye botsalano mo matlhong a kgosi, fa go kgatlha kgosi go nnaya thapelo ya me, le go dirafatsa topo ya me, a kgosi le Hamane ba tle modirong o ke tlaa o ba baakanyetsang, mme ke tlaa dira ka moso jaaka kgosi e buile.”" 
Esther5:9 Foo Hamane a tswa ka tsatsi leo a itumetse, a le pelo e e ipelang. Mme ya re Hamane a bona Moretekai mo kgorong ya kgosi, a se ka a ema ka dinao le fa e le go tsikinyega ka ga gagwe, a tlalela Moretekai bogale." 
Esther5:10 Le fa go ntse jalo a ithiba, mme a ya gae; a roma a ya go bitsa ditsala tsa gagwe le Sereše mosadi wa gagwe." 
Esther5:11 Hamane a ba kakanyetsa kgalalelo ya dikhumo tsa gagwe le bontsi jwa bana ba gagwe, le dilo tsotlhe tse kgosi e mmeileng kwa pele mo go tsone, le jaaka e mmeile kwa pele ga magosana le batlhanka ba kgosi." 
Esther5:12 Gape Hamane a re: “Ee, Esethere mohumagadi wa kgosi ga a ka a leseletsa monna ope go tsena le kgosi mo modirong o o ne a o baakantse fa e se nna; le ka moso ke laleditswe ke ene go ya mmogo le kgosi." 
Esther5:13 Le fa go ntse jalo golo mo, ga go nthuse sepe fa ke sa ntse ke bona Moretekai wa Mojuta a dutse mo kgorong ya kgosi.”" 
Esther5:14 Foo ga bua Sereše mosadi wa gagwe le ditsala tsa gagwe tsotlhe nae, ba re: “A go baakanngwe sefata sa polaelo se se bogodimo jwa dimetara di le 22, mme e re ka moso o bue le kgosi gore Moretekai a pegwe mo go sone; foo o tlaa itse go tsena le kgosi mo modirong ka pelo e e ipelang.” Selo seo sa kgatlha Hamane, mme a laola gore sefata sa polaelo seo se baakanngwe." 
Esther6:1 Ya re bosigo joo kgosi ya lala e sa robala; ya laola gore ba lere lokwalo lo lo kwadilweng ditirafalo, mme tsa balwa fa pele ga kgosi." 
Esther6:2 Ga fitlhelwa go kwadilwe go re, Moretekai o ne a bolela ka ga Bigethane le Tereše baopafadiwa ba kgosi ba le babedi, ba bone ba ba lebelang kgoro, fa ba kile ba batla go tsenya kgosi Ahasueruse mabogo." 
Esther6:3 Kgosi ya re: “Ana Moretekai o diretswe tlotlo le bogolwane bofe ka ntlha ya sone seo?” Foo batlhanka ba kgosi ba ba e direlang ba re: “Ga a a direlwa sepe.” 
Esther6:4 Kgosi ya re: “E mang yo o ka fa lwapeng?” Jaana Hamane o ne a tsile mo lwapeng lo lo kwa ntle, lwa ntlo ya kgosi, a tla go bua le kgosi ka ga go pega Moretekai mo sefateng sa polaelo se o se mmaakanyeditseng." 
Esther6:5 Batlhanka ba kgosi ba mo raya ba re: “Bona, Hamane o eme ka fa lwapeng.” Kgosi ya re: “A a tsene.”" 
Esther6:6 Jalo Hamane a tsena. Kgosi ya mo raya ya re: “Ana monna yo kgosi e ratang go mo tlotla o ka direlwa eng?” Jaana Hamane a ithaya mo pelong ya gagwe a re: “Ana kgosi e ka bo e rata go tlotla mang bogolo go nna?” 
Esther6:7 Hamane a raya kgosi a re: “Monna yo kgosi e ratang go mo tlotla," 
Esther6:8 a a lerediwe diaparo tsa segosi tse kgosi e ntseng e di apara, le pitse e kgosi e ntseng e e palama, le serwalo sa segosi se se bewang mo tlhogong ya yone;" 
Esther6:9 a diaparo tseo le pitse eo di neelwe nngwe ya dikgosana tsa kgosi tse di tlotlegang bogolo, gore ba di apese monna yo kgosi e ratang go mo tlotla, ba mo ralatse mmila wa motse a palame pitse, ba ope mokgosi fa pele ga gagwe, ba re: ‘Go direlwa jaana monna yo kgosi e itumelang go mo tlotla.’ ”" 
Esther6:10 Foo kgosi ya raya Hamane ya re: “Itlhaganele tlhe, o tseye diaparo le pitse jaaka o buile, o direle jalo Moretekai wa Mojuta yo o dutseng fa kgorong ya kgosi, go se tlhaele sepe sa tsotlhe tse o di buileng.”" 
Esther6:11 Foo Hamane a tsaya diaparo le pitse, a apesa Moretekai, a mo ralatsa mmila wa motse a palame, a opa mokgosi fa pele ga gagwe, a re: “Go direlwa jalo monna yo kgosi e ratang go mo tlotla.”" 
Esther6:12 Moretekai a boela gape mo kgorong ya kgosi. Hamane a itlhaganelela kwa ntlong ya gagwe a hutsafetse, tlhogo ya gagwe e khurumeditswe." 
Esther6:13 Hamane a kakanyetsa Sereše mosadi wa gagwe le ditsala tsa gagwe tsotlhe fela, sengwe le sengwe se se mo dirafaletseng. Foo matlhale a gagwe le Sereše mosadi wa gagwe ba mo raya ba re: “Fa Moretekai, yo o simolotseng go wa fa pele ga gagwe, e le wa losika lwa Bajuta, ga o ketla o mo fenya, mme ruri o tlaa wa fa pele ga gagwe.”" 
Esther6:14 Ya re ba sa ntse ba bua nae, baopafadiwi ba kgosi ba tla, ba itlhaganela go isa Hamane modirong o Esethere o ne a o baakantse." 
Esther7:1 Jalo kgosi ya tla e na le Hamane go ja modiro le Esethere mohumagadi. 
Esther7:2 Mme kgosi ya fela e raya Esethere gape ka tsatsi la bobedi mo modirong wa bojalwa jwa mofine, e re: “Ana thapelo ya gago ke eng mohumagadi Esethere? O tlaa e newa; topo ya gago ke eng? Le fa e ka bo e le bontlhanngwe jwa bogosi go tlaa dirafadiwa.”" 
Esther7:3 Foo Esethere mohumagadi a fetola a re: “Fa ke bonye botsalano mo matlhong a gago, kgosi, fa go ka kgatlha kgosi, a nke ke newe botshelo jwa me ka thapelo ya me, le batho ba gaetsho ka topo ya me." 
Esther7:4 Gonne re rekisitswe, nna le batho ba gaetsho, go tla re senngwa, re bolawa, re be re nyelela. Fa re kabo re ne re rekisitswe go tla re nna batlhanka le malata fela, nka bo ke didimetse fela, le fa mmaba a ne a tlaa retelelwa ke go emele tshenyegelo ya kgosi.”" 
Esther7:5 Foo ga bua kgosi Ahasueruse a raya Esethere mohumagadi a re: “Ke mang, mme o kae motho yo o iketleeditseng go gopola mo pelong ya gagwe go dira jalo?”" 
Esther7:6 Esethere a re: “Ke moganetsi le mmaba, e bong Hamane yo wa moloi yo.” Foo Hamane a boifa fa pele ga kgosi le mohumagadi." 
Esther7:7 Kgosi ya nanoga ka bogale jwa yone mo modirong wa bojalwa jwa mofine, ya ya mo tshimong ya motse wa kgosi; mme Hamane, a ema a re o lopa botshelo jwa gagwe mo go Esethere mohumagadi; gonne a bona fa bosula bo laotswe ka ga gagwe ke kgosi." 
Esther7:8 Foo kgosi ya boa kwa tshimong ya motse wa kgosi, ya boela mo felong ga modiro wa bojalwa jwa mofine; Hamane a bo a wetse mo sesekamelong se Esethere o mo go sone. Foo kgosi ya re: “A o betelela le ene mohumagadi fa pele ga me mo ntlong?” Ya re lefoko le sa ntse le tswa mo molomong wa kgosi boo ba khurumetsa Hamane sefatlhogo." 
Esther7:9 Foo ga bua Harebona, mongwe wa baopafadiwa ba ba fa pele ga kgosi, a re: “Bonang, le sone sefata sa polaelo se se bogodimo jwa dimetara di le 22, se Hamane o se baakanyeditseng Moretekai yo o ne a bua molemo ka ga kgosi, se eme mo ntlong ya ga Hamane.” Mme kgosi ya re: “Mo pegeng mo go sone.”" 
Esther7:10 Jalo ba pega Hamane mo sefateng sa polaelo se o ne a se baakanyeditse Moretekai. Foo bogale jwa kgosi jwa kokobela. 
Esther8:1 Ya re ka letsatsi leo kgosi Ahasueruse a naya Esethere mohumagadi ntlo ya ga Hamane mmaba wa Bajuta. Moretekai a tla fa pele ga kgosi; gonne Esethere o na a boletse ka fa o ntseng ka teng mo go ene. 
Esther8:2 Kgosi ya rola lenyena la yone le e le tsereng mo go Hamane mme a le naya Moretekai. Esethere a tlhoma Moretekai molaodi wa ntlo ya ga Hamane. 
Esther8:3 Esethere a fela a bua gape fa pele ga kgosi, a wela fa dinaong tsa yone, a e rapela ka dikeledi, gore kgosi e tlose bosula jwa ga Hamane wa Moagage, le maano a o ne a a logetse Bajuta." 
Esther8:4 Foo kgosi ya ntshetsa Esethere thobane ya gagwe ya gouta ya bogosi. Esethere a nanoga, a ema fa pele ga kgosi." 
Esther8:5 Mme a re: “Fa go ka kgatlha kgosi, mme fa ke bonye botsalano mo matlhong a yone, fa selo se se siame fa pele ga kgosi, le nna fa ke kgatlha mo matlhong a yone, a go kwalwe go kwalolola dikwalo tse di kwadilweng ke Hamane morwa Hamethathe wa Moagage, tse o di kwaletseng go senya Bajuta ba ba mo dikgaolong tsotlhe tsa mafatshe a kgosi;" 
Esther8:6 gonne ke ka itshokela jang go bona bosula jo bo tlaa tlelang batho ba gaetsho? Kgotsa ke ka itshoka jang fa ke bona tshenyego ya losika lwa me?” 
Esther8:7 Foo kgosi Ahasueruse a raya Esethere mohumagadi le Moretekai wa Mojuta a re: “Bonang, ke neile Esethere ntlo ya ga Hamane, ene ba mo pegile mo sefateng sa polaelo, gonne o ne a tsenya Bajuta letsogo la gagwe." 
Esther8:8 Le lona lo kwalele Bajuta ka fa lo ratang ka gone mo ineng la kgosi, mme lo kane lokwalo ka lenyena la kgosi; gonne lokwalo lo lo kwadilweng mo ineng la kgosi, mme lo kannwe ka lenyena la kgosi, ga go na motho ope yo o ka lo kwalololang.”" 
Esther8:9 Foo bakwaledi ba kgosi ba bidiwa ka lobaka loo, ka kgwedi ya boraro, e e leng kgwedi ya Sifane, ka letsatsi la bo 23 la yone; mme ga kwalwa ka fa go tsotlhe tse Moretekai o di laolelang Bajuta, le balaodisiwa, le balaodi, le magosana a dikgaolo tsa mafatshe, a a simololang kwa India go ya kwa Ethiopia, dikgaolo di le 127, ga kwalelwa kgaolo ngwe le nngwe ya lefatshe ka fa go kwaleng ga yone, le sešaba sengwe le sengwe ka fa puong ya sone, le Bajuta ka fa go kwaleng ga bone, le ka fa puong ya bone." 
Esther8:10 A kwala mo ineng la ga kgosi Ahasueruse, a kana ka lenyena la kgosi, mme a tsamaisa dikwalo ka batsamaisi ba dikwalo ba ba palameng dipitse, ga palangwa dipitse tse di bofefo tse di mo tirong ya kgosi, di tsetswe ke dipitse tse di tlhaoletsweng go tsala." 
Esther8:11 Mo go lone lokwalo loo, kgosi ya naya Bajuta ba ba mo motseng mongwe le mongwe tshiamo ya go phuthega le go emela botshelo jwa bone, go senya le go bolaya, le go nyeletsa, thata yotlhe ya batho le ya ba kgaolo ya lefatshe ba ba ratang go ba tlhasela, go bolaya bone le banyana ba bone, le basadi ba bone, le go gapa dilo tsa bone," 
Esther8:12 ka tsatsi le le lengwe fela mo dikgaolong tsotlhe tsa mafatshe otlhe a ga kgosi Ahasueruse, e bong ka letsatsi la lesome le boraro la kgwedi ya 12, e e leng kgwedi ya Atare." 
Esther8:13 Malebela a lokwalo lo lo reng, taolo e e itsisiwe mo kgaolong nngwe le nngwe ya lefatshe, ya bolelelwa ditšhaba tsotlhe, le go re Bajuta ba iketleeletse letsatsi leo go tla ba itefetsa mo babeng ba bone." 
Esther8:14 Batsamaisi ba dikwalo tse ba ne ba palame dipitse tse di bofefo tse di mo tirong ya kgosi, tsa tswa, di itlhaganedisiwa di kgweediwa ke taolo ya kgosi, molao oo wa tlhongwa mo motseng wa Shušane." 
Esther8:15 Moretekai a tswa fa pele ga kgosi a apere diaparo tsa segosi tsa bobududu le bosweu, a bile a na le serwalo se segolo sa gouta, le kobo ya leloba le le boleta le le bohibidu jo bo mokgona; motse wa Shušane wa thela lošalaba, wa itumela." 
Esther8:16 Bajuta ba bona lesedi, le boipelo, le boitumelo, le tlotlo." 
Esther8:17 Mo kgaolong nngwe le nngwe ya lefatshe, le mo motseng mongwe le mongwe, kwa taolo le molao wa kgosi o fitlhileng teng, Bajuta ba bona boipelo le boitumelo le modiro le letsatsi le le molemo. Batho ba le bantsi mo ditšhabeng tsa lefatshe ba tloga ba nna Bajuta; gonne poifo ya Bajuta e wetse mo go bone." 
Esther9:1 Jaana e rile ka kgwedi ya 12, e e leng kgwedi ya Atare, ka letsatsi la 13 la yone, taolo ya kgosi le molao wa yone o setse o le gaufi le go dirafadiwa, ka letsatsi le baba ba Bajuta ba solofetseng go ba laola ka lone; le fa go ntse jalo ga fetolwa ga nna ka go sele, ga nna go re Bajuta ba laole bone ba ba ba ilang;" 
Esther9:2 Bajuta ba phuthegela mo metseng ya bone mo dikgaolong tsotlhe tsa mafatshe a ga kgosi Ahasueruse, go tla ba tsenya mabogo mo go ba ba ratileng go ba utlwisa botlhoko; mme go ne go se na ope yo o ka ba emang pele; gonne poifo ya bone e wetse mo ditšhabeng tsotlhe." 
Esther9:3 Magosana otlhe a dikgaolo tsa mafatshe, le balaodisiwa, le balaodi le ba ba dirang tiro ya kgosi, ba thusa Bajuta, gonne poifo ya ga Moretekai e wetse mo go bone." 
Esther9:4 Ka gonne Moretekai o na a le mogolo mo ntlong ya kgosi, e bile tumedi ya gagwe ya tswela kwa dikgaolong tsotlhe tsa mafatshe; gonne monna yoo Moretekai a golela pele bogolo bogolo." 
Esther9:5 Bajuta ba kgemetha baba botlhe ba bone ka go rema ka tšhaka, le ka polao le tshenyo, mme ba dira se ba se ratang mo go bone ba ba ba ilang." 
Esther9:6 Mo motseng wa Shušane Bajuta ba bolaya ba senya banna ba le 500," 
Esther9:7 le Parešanatatha, Dalefone le Asepatha;" 
Esther9:8 le Poratha, le Atalie le Aritatha," 
Esther9:9 le Paremašeta, le Arisai, le Aritai le Faisatha." 
Esther9:10 Bomorwa Hamane morwa Hametatha mmaba wa Bajuta, bomorwawe ba ba some ba ba bolaya; mme mo thopong ba se ka ba isa seatla." 
Esther9:11 Ya re ka tsatsi leo palo ya bone ba ba bolailweng mo motseng wa Shušane ya isiwa fa pele ga kgosi. 
Esther9:12 Kgosi ya raya Esethere mohumagadi ya re: “Bajuta ba bolaile, ba sentse banna ba le 500 mo motseng wa Shušane, le bomorwa Hamane ba ba some; ba tlaa bo ba dirile jang mo dikgaolong tse dingwe tsa mafatshe a kgosi! Jaana thapelo ya gago ke eng? O tlaa e newa, topo ya gago ke eng gape? E tlaa dirwa.”" 
Esther9:13 Foo ga bua Esethere a re: “Fa go ka kgatlha kgosi, a go leselediwe Bajuta ba ba mo Shušane ba dire le ka moso ka fa molaong wa gompieno, a bomorwa Hamane ba ba some ba pegwe mo sefateng sa polaelo.”" 
Esther9:14 Kgosi ya laola gore go dirwe jalo; mme ga tlhongwa molao mo Shušane; ba pega bomorwa Hamane ba ba some. 
Esther9:15 Bajuta ba ba mo Shušane ba phuthega le ka tsatsi la 14 la kgwedi ya Atare, ba bolaya banna ba le 300 mo Shušane; mme mo thopong ba se ka ba isa seatla." 
Esther9:16 Bajuta ba bangwe ba ba mo dikgaolong tse dingwe tsa mafatshe a kgosi ba phuthega, ba itlhabanela botshelo, mme ba bona boikhutso mo babeng ba bone, mo go bone ba ba ba ilang ba bolaya batho ba le 75 000; mme mo thopong ba se ka ba isa seatla." 
Esther9:17 Seo sa dirwa ka letsatsi la 13 la kgwedi ya Atare; mme ka letsatsi la 14 la yone ba ikhutsa, ba le dira letsatsi la mediro le boipelo." 
Esther9:18 Bajuta ba ba mo Shušane ba phuthega ka letsatsi la 13 la yone; le ka letsatsi la 14 la yone; mme ka letsatsi la 15 la yone ba ikhutsa, ba le dira letsatsi la mediro le boipelo." 
Esther9:19 Ke gone ka moo Bajuta ba metsana ba ba agileng mo metseng e e se nang dithako, ba dira letsatsi la 14 la kgwedi ya Atare letsatsi la boipelo le boitumelo, le letsatsi le le molemo, le la go isanyetsanya dikabelo." 
Esther9:20 Moretekai a kwala dilo tse, mme a romela dikwalo kwa Bajuteng botlhe ba ba mo dikgaolong tsa mafatshe otlhe a ga kgosi Ahusueruse, ba ba gaufi le ba ba kgakala," 
Esther9:21 go ba laola gore ba tshegetse letsatsi la 14 la kgwedi ya Atare, le letsatsi la 15 la yone, ka ngwaga le ngwaga;" 
Esther9:22 ka e le malatsi a Bajuta ba bonyeng boikhutso ka one mo babeng ba bone, e le kgwedi e bohutsana bo ba fetogetseng boipelo ka yone, le selelo sa fetoga letsatsi le le molemo; gore ba a dire malatsi a mediro le boipelo, le a go isanyetsanya dikabelo, le a go abela bahumanegi dineo." 
Esther9:23 Bajuta ba itlhomamisa go re ba tlaa dira jaaka ba simolotse, le jaaka Moretekai a ba kwaletse;" 
Esther9:24 ka gonne Hamane morwa Hametathe wa Moagage, mmaba wa Bajuta botlhe, o ne a logetse Bajuta maano a go ba senya, a bile a thetse Pure, ke go re bola, go ba suputsa le go ba senya." 
Esther9:25 Mme e rile tiro eo e tla fa pele ga kgosi, ya laola ka dikwalo gore maano ao a gagwe a boikepo, a o a logetseng Bajuta, a boele mo tlhogong ya gagwe; le gore ene le bomorwawe ba pegwe mo sefateng sa polaelo." 
Esther9:26 Ke gone ka moo ba raya malatsi ao leina ba re, Purime, ka fa leineng la Pure. Ke gone e rileng ka ntlha ya mafoko otlhe a lokwalo loo, le ka ntlha ya se ba se bonyeng ka ga tiro e, le se se neng se tsile mo ga bone," 
Esther9:27 Bajuta ba tlhoma molao; go le bone, go le losika lwa bone, go le botlhe ba ba ikopanyang nabo, ba itlhomamisa gore go se ka ga tlhaela. Ba re, ba tlaa tshegetsa malatsi a mabedi ao ka fa go kwalweng ga one, le ka fa lobakeng lwa one lo lo laotsweng ka ngwaga le ngwaga;" 
Esther9:28 le go re malatsi ao a tlaa gakologelwa a ba a tshegediwa mo kokomaneng nngwe le nngwe mo losikeng longwe le longwe mo kgaolong nngwe le nngwe ya lefatshe, le mo motseng mongwe le mongwe; le go re malatsi ao, a Purime, a se ka a tlhaela mo Bajuteng, le fa e le kgakologelo ya one go khutla mo losikeng lwa bone." 
Esther9:29 Foo Esethere mohumagadi, morwadia Abihaile, le Moretekai wa Mojuta ba kwala ka thata yotlhe go tlhomamisa lokwalo lo, lwa bobedi lwa Purime." 
Esther9:30 Mme a romela dikwalo kwa Bajuteng botlhe, kwa dikgaolong tsa mafatshe tse di 127 tsa bogosi jwa ga Ahasueruse, di na le mafoko a kagiso le boammaaruri." 
Esther9:31 Go tlhomamisa malatsi ao a Purime, mo metlheng ya one e e laotsweng, jaaka Moretekai wa Mojuta le Esethere mohumagadi wa kgosi ba ba laotse, le jaaka bone ba itlhometse molao le losika lwa bone, mo tirong ya bone ya go ikitsa go ja le ya selelo." 
Esther9:32 Taolo ya ga Esethere ya tlhomamisa dilo tseo tsa Purime; mme ga kwalwa mo lokwalong. 
Esther10:1 Kgosi Ahasueruse a tlhoma lekgetho mo lefatsheng le mo ditlhakeng tsa lewatle. 
Esther10:2 Ditiro tsotlhe tsa thata ya gagwe le tsa bonatla jwa gagwe, le polelo e e tletseng ya bogolo jwa ga Moretekai, jo kgosi e mo godiseditseng kwa go jone, a ga di a kwalwa mo lokwalong lwa ditirafalelo tsa dikgosi tsa Media le Peresia?" 
Esther10:3 Gonne Moretekai wa Mojuta o ne a rulaganye le kgosi Ahasueruse, a le mogolo mo Bajuteng, a amogetswe ke bontsi jwa bana ba ga rraagwe; a ntse a batla gore batho ba ba ga gabo ba bone molemo, a ba a ntse a bua kagiso le losika lotlhe lwa gagwe." 
Job1:1 Go kile ga ne go le monna mongwe mo lefatsheng la Use, leina la gagwe go twe Jobe; monna yo o ne a itekanetse, a le thokgamo, e le motho yo o boifang Modimo, a tshaba bosula." 
Job1:2 Mme a tsala bana ba basimane ba supa, le ba basetsana ba le bararo." 
Job1:3 Dithuo tsa gagwe le tsone e le dinku di le 7 000, dikamela di le 3 000, dipholo tsa dikgomo e le tsa bojokwe ba le 500, diesela tse dinamagadi di le 500, ba ntlo ya gagwe ba le bantsi thata; jalo monna yoo a bo a feta bana botlhe ba kwa botlhabatsatsi ka bogolo." 
Job1:4 Bomorwawe ba ne ba tle ba ye go dira modiro mo ntlong ya mongwe le mongwe ka letsatsi la gagwe; mme ba rome ba ye go bitsa bokgaitsadia bone ba bararo, gore ba tle go ja le go nwa nabo." 
Job1:5 Go no go dirale fa malatsi a mediro ya bone a sena go feta, Jobe a rome a ye go ba itshepisa, a phakele a ise ditshupelo tse di fisiwang ka fa palong ya bone botlhe; gonne Jobe a re: “E ka re gongwe bomorwaake ba bo ba leofile, ba itatotse Modimo mo pelong tsa bone.” Jobe a nna a dira jalo ka metlha yotlhe." 
Job1:6 Jaana go ne go le letsatsi lengwe le bomorwa Modimo ba yang go iponatsa fa pele ga Jehofa ka lone, Satane le ene a ya nabo." 
Job1:7 Jehofa a raya Satane a re: “O tswa kae?” Foo Satane a fetola Jehofa, a re: “Ke tswa go kgarakgatshega mo lefatsheng, le go tsamayatsamaya mo go lone.”" 
Job1:8 Jehofa a raya Satane a re: “A o ntse o tlhokometse motlhanka wa me Jobe, gonne ga go na ope yo o tshwanang nae mo lefatsheng, e le monna yo o itekanetseng, yo o siameng, motho yo o boifang Modimo, a tshaba bosula?”" 
Job1:9 Foo Satane a fetola Jehofa, a re: “A Jobe o boifa Jehofa ka lefela?" 
Job1:10 A ga o a mmeela mo tikologong ya gagwe le ntlo ya gagwe le tsotlhe tse o nang natso ka ntlha tsotlhe? O segofaditse tiro ya diatla tsa gagwe, le dithuo tsa gagwe di atile mo lefatsheng." 
Job1:11 A ko o ntshe seatla sa gago jaana, o ame tsotlhe tse o nang natso, mme o tlaa go itatola mo matlhong a gago.”" 
Job1:12 Mme Jehofa a raya Satane a re: “Bona, dilo tsotlhe tse o nang natso di mo thateng ya gago; fa e se ene fela sebele, o se ka wa ntshetsa ene seatla.” Mme Satane a tswa fa pele ga Jehofa." 
Job1:13 Ga dirala ya re ka letsatsi lengwe bomorwa Jobe le bomorwadie ba ja ba nwa bojalwa jwa mofine mo ntlong ya mogolo wa bone. 
Job1:14 Ga tla morongwa kwa go Jobe, a re: “Dikgomo di ne di lema le diesele di fula fa go tsone;" 
Job1:15 Basabea ba di tlhasela, ba di gapa; ee, ba bolaile batlhanka ka bogale jwa tšhaka; go falotse nna ke le nosi fela ke tla go go bolelela.”" 
Job1:16 Ya re yoo a sa ntse a bua, ga ba ga tla yo mongwe, a re: “Molelo wa Modimo o ole kwa legodimong, mme o laitse dinku, wa di nyeletsa le batlhanka; go falotse nna ke le nosi fela ke tla go go bolelela.”" 
Job1:17 Ya re yoo a sa ntse a bua, ga ba ga tla yo mongwe a re: “Bakalatea ba ne ba itira ditlhopha di le tharo, ba tlhasela dikamela, ba di gapa, ee, ba bile ba bolaile batlhanka ka bogale jwa tšhaka, go falotse nna ke le nosi ke tla go go bolelela.”" 
Job1:18 E rile yoo a sa ntse a bua, ga ba ga tla yo mongwe a re: “Bomorwao le bomorwadio ba ne ba ja ba nwa bojalwa jwa mofine mo ntlong ya mogoloa bone;" 
Job1:19 mme bona, ga tswa sefefo se segolo kwa nageng, sa itaya dikgokgotsho tsa ntlo tsoo nne, mme ya wela makau, mme a sule; go falotse nna ke le nosi fela ke tla go go bolelela.”" 
Job1:20 Foo Jobe a nanoga, a ikgagola kobo, a ipeola tlhogo, a wela fa fatshe, a obama;" 
Job1:21 mme a re: “Ke dule mo sebopelong sa ga mme ke sa ikatega, ke tlaa boela gone ke sa ikatega; Jehofa o ne a nneile, mme Jehofa o tlositse; a go bakwe leina la ga Jehofa.”" 
Job1:22 Mo go tsotlhe tse Jobe ga a ka a leofa, le fa e le go kaya Modimo boatla." 
Job2:1 Gape go le letsatsi lengwe le bomorwa Modimo ba yang go iponatsa fa pele ga Jehofa ka lone, Satane le ene a ya nabo, a ya go iponatsa fa pele ga Jehofa." 
Job2:2 Jehofa a raya Satane a re: “O tswa kae?” Satane a fetola Jehofa a re: “Ke tswa go kgarakgatshega mo lefatsheng, le go tsamayatsamaya mo go lone.”" 
Job2:3 Jehofa a raya Satane a re: “A o ntse o tlhokometse motlhanka wa me Jobe, gonne ga go na ope yo o tshwanang nae mo lefatsheng, e le monna yo o itekanetseng, yo o thokgameng, a boifa Modimo, a tshaba bosula? O sa ntse a tshegeditse bosenang molato jwa gagwe, le fa o ntlhotlheleditse, gore ke mo senye ka bomo.”" 
Job2:4 Satane a fetola Jehofa a re: “Letlalo le tle le ntshediwe letlalo, ee, tsotlhe tse motho o nang natso o tlaa di ntshetsa botshelo jwa gagwe." 
Job2:5 Mme a ko o ntshe seatla sa gago jaana, o mo ame lesapo le nama, mme o tlaa go itatola mo matlhong a gago.”" 
Job2:6 Jehofa a raya Satane a re: “Bona, o mo seatleng sa gago; o rekegele botshelo jwa gagwe, ke gone gotlhe.”" 
Job2:7 Jalo Satane a tswa fa pele ga Jehofa a ya a itaya Jobe ka diso tse di bosula, go simolola ka sebete sa lonao go ya phogong ya gagwe." 
Job2:8 A itseela lobeana go ingwaya ka lone; mme a dula mo meloreng. 
Job2:9 Foo mosadi wa gagwe a mo raya a re: “A o sa ntse o tshegeditse bosenang molato jwa gago? Itatole Modimo, mme o swe.”" 
Job2:10 Mme a raya mosadi a re: “O bua jaaka mongwe wa basadi ba ba dieleele a tle a bue. Wa reng? A re tlaa amogela molemo mo seatleng sa Modimo, mme re se ke re amogele bosula?” Mo go tse tsotlhe Jobe ga a ka a leofa ka molomo wa gagwe." 
Job2:11 Jaana e rile ditsala tsa ga Jobe di le tharo di utlwela bosula jotlhe jo, jo bo tsileng mo go ene, tsa tloga tsa tswa mongwe le mongwe kwa ga gagwe; Elifase wa Motemane, Biletate wa Mošuhe le Sofare wa Monaamathe; ba laletsanya gore ba kgatlhane ba ye go mo hutsafalela le go mo gomotsa." 
Job2:12 Ya re ba tsholetsa matlho ba sa le kgakala, mme ba sa mo itse, ba tlhatlosa mantswe a bone ba lela; mongwe le mongwe a ikgagola kobo, mme ba kubuelela lorole legodimong godimo ga tlhogo tsa bone." 
Job2:13 Jalo ba dula nae fa fatshe ka malatsi a supa le masigo a supa, ope a se ka a bua lefoko nae; gonne ba bona fa botlhoko jwa gagwe bo le botona thata." 
Job3:1 Morago ga moo Jobe a tswa molomo, a hutsa letsatsi la gagwe." 
Job3:2 Jobe a bua a re: 
Job3:3 “A letsatsi le ke belegweng ka lone le nyelele, le bosigo jo bo buileng jwa re: ‘Go ithwelwe ngwana wa mosimane.’" 
Job3:4 A letsatsi leo e nne lefifi, a Modimo o se le tlhokomele o le godimong, le gone a lesedi le se le phatsimele." 
Job3:5 A lefifi le moriti wa loso le le gape le le rue, a leru le le nne godimo; a gotlhe mo go ntshofatsang motshegare go le reregise." 
Job3:6 Ka ga bosigo joo, a lefifi le lentsho le bo tshware; a bo se itumele mo malatsing a ngwaga; a bo se tsene mo palong ya dikgwedi." 
Job3:7 Bonang, a bosigo joo bo nne lolea fela, a go se tle lentswe la boitumelo mo go lone." 
Job3:8 A ba ba hutsang motshegare ba bo hutse, ba ba digonya go tsosa kgogela." 
Job3:9 A dinaledi tsa lotlatlana lwa lone di nne lefifi, a bo batle lesedi, mme a bo se le bone; le gone a bo se bone dintshi tsa matlho a moso," 
Job3:10 ka bo se ka jwa tswala sebopelo sa ga mme, le gone bo se ka jwa subela matlho a me khuduego." 
Job3:11 Ana ke ne ke sa sweleng ke sa tswa mo sebopelong, ke ne ke sa gonogeleng ke tswa mo mpeng fela?" 
Job3:12 Ana mangole a ne a nkamogelelang, le mabele, fa e bo ne ne ke ne ka bona go anya?" 
Job3:13 Gonne e ne e ka bo ne ne gompieno ke rapame ke iketlile, nka bo ke robetse; foo nka bo ne ne ke le mo boikhutsong;" 
Job3:14 nka bo ke na le dikgosi le bagakolodi ba lefatshe, ba ba neng ba ikagela difikantswe tse di emeng di le tsosi." 
Job3:15 Kgotsa nka bo ke na le magosana a a neng a na le gouta, a a neng a tlatsa mantlo a one ka selefera;" 
Job3:16 kgotsa nka bo ke ne ke seyo jaaka tshenyegelelo e e subegileng, jaaka banyana ba ba se kang ba buduloga gope." 
Job3:17 Baikepi ba khutla go tshwenya teng; le balapi ba bona boikhutso teng. 
Job3:18 Bagolegwi ba lapologa mmogo gone; ga ba utlwe lentswe la mogobagobetsi gone. 
Job3:19 Ba bannye ba teng le ba bagolo; motlhanka o gololesegile mo go mong wa gagwe teng. 
Job3:20 Ana lesedi le newa ene yo o mo matladikeng ka ntlha yang, le botshelo, ene yo o galakegang mo moeng;" 
Job3:21 ba ba eletsang loso, mme lo sa tle; ba lo epa bogolo go dikhumo tse di fitlhilweng;" 
Job3:22 e le ba ba ipelang mo gogolo thata, ba ba ba itumela fa ba ka bona phupu?" 
Job3:23 Ana lesedi le neelwang motho yo tsela ya gagwe e fitlhegileng, le yo Modimo o mmeetseng ka matlhaku?" 
Job3:24 Gonne phegelo ya me e tle e tle ke ise ke je, le dipokolelo tsa me di tshologe fela jaaka metsi." 
Job3:25 Gonne selo se ke se boifang se tla mo go nna, le selo se ke se tshabang se a ntlela." 
Job3:26 Ga ke a iketla, le gone ga ke a kgaotsa, le gone ga ke na boikhutso: mme khuduego e tla fela.”" 
Job4:1 Foo ga fetola Elifase wa Motemane, a re:" 
Job4:2 “Fa motho a leka go bua nao, a o tlaa nna pelo e botlhoko? Mme e mang yo o ka ithibang mo go bueng?" 
Job4:3 Bona, o rutile batho ba le bantsi, o thatafaditse diatla tse di bokoa." 
Job4:4 Mafoko a gago a emisitse yo o ne a kgokgweetsega, le mangole a a obegang o a nonotshitse." 
Job4:5 Mme jaanong se tsile mo go wena, mme o a idibala; se a go ama, mme o a huduega." 
Job4:6 A go boifa Modimo ga gago ga se gone boikanyo jwa gago, le bosenang molato jwa ditsela tsa gago, a ga se jone tsholofelo ya gago?" 
Job4:7 “Ke a go rapela, o tle o gakologelwe gore e mang yo o kileng a nyelela a se na molato? Kgotsa bathokgami ba kile ba kgaolwa kae?" 
Job4:8 Ka fa nna ke bonyeng ka teng, ke go re: ba ba lemang boikepo, ba jala bosenyi, ba tle ba robe jone fela." 
Job4:9 Ba tle ba nyelediwe ke go hema ga Modimo, ba lailwe ke tsubutlo ya bogale jwa one." 
Job4:10 Go duma ga tau, le kodu ya tau e e bogale, le meno a ditawana, go robegile." 
Job4:11 Tau e kgolo e tle e bopame ka go tlhoka phologolo, le bana ba tau e namagadi ba phatlalale." 
Job4:12 “Jaana ka sebediwa sengwe, ka longwa tsebe ka ga sone." 
Job4:13 E rile mo megopolong e e tswang mo diponatshegelong tsa bosigo, motlhang boroko jo bogolo bo tshwereng batho," 
Job4:14 poifo ya nkwela, le thoromo, e e neng ya roromisa marapo a me otlhe fela." 
Job4:15 Foo sedimo sengwe sa feta fa pele ga sefatlhogo sa me, nama ya me ya tlhonya bobowa." 
Job4:16 Sa ema, mme ke se ka ka lemoga ponalo ya sone; ga bo go le sebopego fa pele ga matlho a me, go tuuletse fela, mme ka utlwa lentswe le re:" 
Job4:17 ‘A motho yo o swang o ka nna tshiamo bogolo go Modimo? A monna o ka itsheka bogolo go Modiri wa gagwe? 
Job4:18 Bona, ga o ikanye batlhanka ba one; le baengele ba one o tle o ba neye molato wa boeleele." 
Job4:19 Bogolo jang bone ba ba agileng mo matlong a seretse, a motheo wa one o leng mo loroleng, a phatlakanngwa jaaka serurubele." 
Job4:20 Gare ga moso le maitsebowa ba tle ba senngwe, ba swele ruri, ba sa tlhokomelwe ke ope." 
Job4:21 A megala ya megope ya bone ga e tlhomolwe mo teng ga bone? Ba swe, e bile e le mo go se nang botlhale.’" 
Job5:1 “A ko o bitse jaana; a go na le mongwe yo o tlaa go arabang? O tlaa retologela kwa go ofe wa baitshepi? 
Job5:2 Gonne tshwenyego e tle e bolaye motho yoo bonyana, le lefufa le bolaye seeleele." 
Job5:3 Ke bonye ba ba dieleele ba mela metswe, ka hutsa boago jwa gagwe ka tshoganetso." 
Job5:4 Bana ba gagwe ba kgakala le polokego, ba tle ba pitlwe mo kgorong, le gone go se na ope yo o ba gololang." 
Job5:5 Ba ba bolawang ke tlala ba je thobo ya bone, ba ba ba e ntshe le mo teng ga mitlwa; e bile seru se atlhametse thoto tsa bone." 
Job5:6 Gonne patiko ga e tswe mo loroleng le khuduego ga e tlhoge mo mmung; 
Job5:7 motho o tsaletswe khuduego jaaka ditlhase tsa molelo di tle di thunyetse kwa godimo. 
Job5:8 Mme ka ga me, ke rata go batlela kwa Modimong; ke rata go neela Modimo mafoko a me a tsheko;" 
Job5:9 o o dirang dilo tse dikgolo le tse di se nang bokankabetso, dilo tse di gakgamatsang, tse di se nang palo." 
Job5:10 O o nesang pula mo lefatsheng, o tlise metsi mo nageng," 
Job5:11 jalo o beye kwa godimo bone ba ba kwa tlase; ba ba hutsafalang ba golelediwe mo polokegong. 
Job5:12 O tle o tsupuetse ditogamaano tsa maferefere, jalo diatla tsa bone di retelelwe ke go dirafatsa maikaelelo a bone." 
Job5:13 O tle o tshware matlhale mo boferefereng jwa bone; le kgakololo ya ba ba lesoko e goromelediwe koo. 
Job5:14 Ba tle ba kgatlhane le lefifi go le motshegare, ba apaape go le motshegare jaaka mo bosigong." 
Job5:15 O tle o golole mo tšhakeng ya molomo wa bone, e bong motlhoki mo seatleng sa mothati." 
Job5:16 Jalo mohumanegi a nne le tsholofelo, boikepo bo ithibe molomo." 
Job5:17 Bona, go sego motho yo Modimo o mo omanyang; ke gone o se ka wa nyatsa kwatlhao ya Mothatayotlhe." 
Job5:18 Gonne o a tle a tlhokofatse, mme a itse go fapa; a ntshe ntho, mme diatla tsa gagwe di fodise." 
Job5:19 O tlaa go golola mo dikhuduegong di le thataro; ee, mo go di supa, ga go bosula bope jo bo tlaa go amang." 
Job5:20 E tlaa re mo mosweleng a go golole mo losung; le mo ntweng a go golole mo thateng ya tšhaka. 
Job5:21 O tlaa subelwa go betsa ga loleme; le gone ga o ketla o boifa tshenyego mogang e tlang. 
Job5:22 O tlaa tshega tshenyego le borole; le gone ga o ketla o boifa dibatana tsa lefatshe. 
Job5:23 Gonne o tlaa bo o na le kgolagano le maje a naga; le dibatana tsa naga di tlaa nna kagiso nao. 
Job5:24 O tlaa itse fa mogope wa gago o le mo kagisong; o tlaa ya go tlhola lesaka la gago, mme ga o ketla o tlhoka sepe." 
Job5:25 O tlaa ba o itse fa losika lwa gago lo tlaa nna logolo, le go re lotsalo lwa gago lo tlaa nna jaaka bojang jwa lefatshe." 
Job5:26 O tlaa fitlha mo phupung ya gago o le botsofe jo bo tletseng jaaka mokoa wa mabele o tle o fitlhe ka o e leng motlha wa one. 
Job5:27 Bona se, re se kheleisitse, mme se ntse jalo; o se utlwe, o bo o se itse, gore se nne molemo mo go wena.”" 
Job6:1 Foo Jobe a fetola a re: 
Job6:2 “A bo go tshwenyega ga me go ka bo go lekantswe bokete, le tshenyegelo ya me ya bewa mmogo mo selekanyong sa pego." 
Job6:3 Gonne jaana go ka bo go le bokete bogolo go mošawa wa mawatle; ke gone ka moo mafoko a me a ntseng a phomesegela fela. 
Job6:4 Gonne metswi ya Mothatayotlhe e mo teng ga me, e botlhoko jwa yone mowa wa me o bo nwelang ruri; ditheregiso tsa Modimo di a inthulaganyetsa." 
Job6:5 A esela ya naga e tle e lele fa e na le bojang, kgotsa a kgomo e tle e lele e e ja?" 
Job6:6 A selo se se senang moutlwalo se ka jewa se sena letswai? Kgotsa, a go na le moutlwalo mo khwaaneng ya letsae?" 
Job6:7 Mowa wa me o gana go ama dilo tseo; mo go nna di tshwana jaaka dijo tse di ferosang sebete. 
Job6:8 “A bo ke ka bo ke bona topo ya me; le gore Modimo o ka ka wa nnaya se ke se eletsang. 
Job6:9 Ke raya gore, go ka kgatlha Modimo go mphatlakanya fela; e leng gore o ikgolole letsogo, mme o nkgaolele koo!" 
Job6:10 Foo nka bo ke sa ntse ke na le kgomotsego; ee, nka bo ke kgana ka botlhoko jo bo sa rekegeleng; gonne ga ke a itatola mafoko a Moitshepi." 
Job6:11 Thata ya me ke eng, fa e ka bo ne ne fano ke ka lebelela? Le bokhutlo jwa me ke eng fa nka itshoka?" 
Job6:12 A thata ya me ke thata ya maje, kgotsa a nama ya me ke kgotlho?" 
Job6:13 A ga se go re ga ke na thuso mo go nna, le go re go dira mo go thusang go leleketswe ruri mo go nna?" 
Job6:14 Yo o gaufi le go idibala o tshwanetse go bona bopelonomi mo tsaleng ya gagwe; ee, le ene yo o latlhang poifo ya Mothatayotlhe." 
Job6:15 Bana ba ga rre ba dirile ka tsietso jaaka molatswana, jaaka meedi ya melatswana e e fetelang koo fela;" 
Job6:16 e e leng mentsho ka ntlha ya metsi a a gatsetseng, le e kapoko e iphitlhang mo go yone." 
Job6:17 Mme mogang go thuthafalang e nyelele; fa go gotetse e fele, e tloge mo felong ga yone." 
Job6:18 Masomo a baeti ba ba reng ba eta ka tsela ya yone a fapoge, ba tlhatlogele kwa go kgadileng, mme ba swe." 
Job6:19 Masomo a baeti ba Tema a batla, masomo a Sheba a lebelela mo go yone." 
Job6:20 Ba tlhajwa ke ditlhong ka ntlha ya gonne ba ne ba solofetse; ba fitlha gone, mme ba sosobaganngwa." 
Job6:21 Gonne gompieno ga lo sepe; lo bona therego, mme lo a boifa." 
Job6:22 A ke rile: ‘Nnayang,’ Kgotsa: ‘Lo mpeele pele mpho ya thoto tsa lona?’" 
Job6:23 Kgotsa, a ke rile: ‘Lo nkgolole mo seatleng sa moganetse’ kgotsa: ‘Lo nthekolole mo seatleng sa bapatiki?’" 
Job6:24 “Nthutang, mme ke tlaa didimala; ntlhaloganyetseng fa ke timetseng gone." 
Job6:25 Mafoko a thokgamo a nonofile jang! Mme go ganela ga lona go a bo go kgalemela eng? 
Job6:26 A lo tlhatlhanya go kgalemela mafoko fela? Ka mantswe a motho yo o gaketseng a ntse jaaka phefo fela. 
Job6:27 Ee, lo rata lo ka bo lo thelela masiela bola, le go ntsha tsala ya lona tlhwatlhwa fela." 
Job6:28 “Jaana tswee, a lo ke lo ntebe; gonne ruri ga nketla ke aka fa pele ga lona." 
Job6:29 Ke a lo rapela, a ko lo boeng, a go se nne tshiamololo, ee, bang lo boe, mafoko a me a tsheko a siame." 
Job6:30 A go na le tshiamololo mo lolemeng lwa me? A magalapa a me ga a kake a lemoga dilo tse di bosula? 
Job7:1 “A ga se go re motho o na le lobaka lwa tirelo mo lefatsheng? A malatsi a gagwe ga a tshwane le malatsi a yo o thapilweng ka tuelo? 
Job7:2 Jaaka motlhanka yo o eletsang thata go bona moriti go feta, le jaaka mothapiwa yo o lebeletseng tuelo ya gagwe;" 
Job7:3 jalo le nna ke ruisiwa dikgwedi tsa boithamako, ke laoletswe masigo a a tlhobaedisang." 
Job7:4 E tle e re ke itelega, ke a tle ke re: ‘Ke tlaa tsoga leng?’ Mme bosigo bo nne boleele; ke tlale diphethekgano go tsamaye bosigo bo se." 
Job7:5 Nama ya me e apesitswe diboko le lorole lo lo makote; letlalo la me le tle le kopane mme le itse go phanyega seša. 
Job7:6 Malatsi a me a bofefo bogolo go selogi sa monyedi, a feta fela a se na tsholofelo." 
Job7:7 “A ko o gakologelwe go re botshelo jwa me ke phefo fela, leitlho la me ga le ketla le tlhola le bona molemo." 
Job7:8 Leitlho la yo o mponang ga le ketla le tlhola le nteba; matlho a gago a tlaa nna mo go nna, mme ke tlaa bo ke seyo." 
Job7:9 Jaka leru le tle le nyelele, mme le kaologele koo, go ntse jalo, le ene yo o fologelang mo Bobipong ga a ketla a tlhola a tlhatloga." 
Job7:10 Ga a ketla a tlhola a boela kwa ntlong ya gagwe, le gone felo ga gagwe ga go ketla go tlhola go mo itse." 
Job7:11 “Ke gone ga nketla ke kganela molomo wa me; ke tlaa bua mo tlalelong e e mahehe ya mowa wa me; ke tlaa itoka mo botlhokong jwa botshelo jwa me. 
Job7:12 A ke lewatle, kgotsa leruarua la lewatle, fa e bo ne ne o mpeela tebelo jaana?" 
Job7:13 Ya re fa ke re: ‘Bolao jwa me bo tlaa nkgomotsa, sesekamelo sa me se tlaa fefofatsa boitoko jwa me;’" 
Job7:14 foo o tle o ntshose ka ditoro, mme o ntheregise ka diponatshegelo." 
Job7:15 Jalo mowa wa me o bo o tle o rate go betwa, o eteletse loso, bogolo go marapo a, a me." 
Job7:16 Botshelo jwa me bo mpherosa sebete; ga ke rate ka tshelela ruri; ntesa, gonne malatsi a me ke boithamako fela." 
Job7:17 Motho e a bo e le eng, fa e bo ne ne o mo godisa, o ba o tlhoma pelo ya gago mo go ene," 
Job7:18 o mo tlhola ka meso yotlhe, o mo leka ka nako nngwe le nngwe?" 
Job7:19 Ana o tlaa gana ka lobaka lo lokae go faposa matlho mo go nna, le go ntesa ke tle ke metse mathe a me." 
Job7:20 Fa ke leofile, ke go direlang, wena molebedi wa batho? Ana o ipeela sekonopiwa ka nna ka ntlha yang? Ke ba ke tla ke imelwa ke sebele sa me nna ka nosi." 
Job7:21 Ga o itshwareleleng tlolo ya me, wa tlosa boikepo jwa me? Gonne ke tloga ke itelega mo loroleng; o tlaa mpatla ka tlhoafalo, mme ke tla bo ke seyo.”" 
Job8:1 Foo ga fetola Biletate wa Mošuha a re: 
Job8:2 “O tlaa bua dilo tse ka lobaka lo lo kae? Mafoko a molomo wa gago a tlaa nna jaaka phefo e kgolo ka lobaka lo lo kae? 
Job8:3 A Modimo o tle o sokamise katlholo? Kgotsa a Mothatayotlhe o tle a sokamise tshiamiso? 
Job8:4 Fa bana ba gago ba o leofetse, mme o ba tsentse mo seatleng sa tlolo ya bone;" 
Job8:5 fa o ne o ka batla ka tlhoafalo mo Modimong, mme wa dira mokokotlelo wa gago mo go Mothatayotlhe," 
Job8:6 fa o ne o le boitsheko le thokgamo; ruri o ka bo fano a go kubugela, a dira bonno jwa tshiamo ya gago gore bo segofale." 
Job8:7 Le fa tshimologo ya gago e ne e le potlana, le fa go ntse jalo bokhutlo jwa gago bo ne bo tlaa totafala segolo." 
Job8:8 “Gonne ke a go rapela, a ko o botse ka ga motlha wa pele, mme o tseye tsia se borraabo ba se tlhotlhomisitseng:" 
Job8:9 (Gonne rona re ba maabane fela, mme ga re itse sepe, gonne malatsi a rona mo lefatsheng ke moriti fela)." 
Job8:10 A bone ga ba ketla ba go ruta, ba go bolelela, ba bua mafoko a a tswang mo pelong tsa bone?" 
Job8:11 “A motsitla o ka gola go se na loraga? A mophutlo o ka gola go se na metsi? 
Job8:12 E re o sa ntse o le mo botaleng jwa one, o sa ntse o segwa, o bo o swabe pele ga merogo e mengwe." 
Job8:13 Ditsela tsa botlhe ba ba lebalang Modimo di ntse jalo; tsholofelo ya motho yo o sa reng Modimo sepe e tlaa nyelela; 
Job8:14 yo boikgantsho jwa gagwe bo tlaa kgaogang ka bogare, le yo boikanyo jwa gagwe e leng bobi jwa segokgwane fela." 
Job8:15 O tlaa ikaega ntlo ya gagwe, mme ga e ketla e ema; o tlaa itshwarelela ka one, mme ga e ketla e tlhomama." 
Job8:16 O a tle a nne motala pele ga letsatsi le ise le tlhabe, mme matswela a gagwe a anamele mo tshimong ya gagwe." 
Job8:17 Medi ya gagwe e tlamparele thotobolo, a lebe felo ga maje." 
Job8:18 Fa a sengwa a ntshiwa mo felong ga gagwe, foo go tlaa mo itatola go re: ‘Ga ke ise ke go bone.’" 
Job8:19 Bona jo ke boitumelo jwa tsela ya gagwe, ba bangwe ba tlaa tlhongwa mo mmung wa gagwe." 
Job8:20 “Bona, Modimo ga o ketla o latlha motho yo o itekanetseng, le gone ga o ketla o ema badira bosula nokeng." 
Job8:21 O tlaa nama o tlatsa molomo wa gago ka setshego, le dipounama tsa gago ka moduduetso." 
Job8:22 Ba ba go ilang ba tlaa apesiwa ditlhong; le mogope wa moikepi ga o ketla o tlhola o leyo.” 
Job9:1 Foo Jobe a fetola a re: 
Job9:2 “Le gale ke a itse fa go ntse jalo, mme motho o ka siama jang fa pele ga Modimo?" 
Job9:3 Fa a rata go ganela nao, ga a kake a o fetola ka ga molato o le mongwe fela mo go e e makgolo a lesome." 
Job9:4 O botlhale mo pelong, o thata mo nonofong; e mang yo o o ithatafaleditseng mme a tlhogonolofala?" 
Job9:5 O o sutisang dithaba, di se ke di itse, mogang o di pitikololang mo bogaleng jwa one." 
Job9:6 O o reketlisang lefatshe, le tloge felong ga lone, le maotwana a lone a rorome." 
Job9:7 O o laolang letsatsi, mme le se ke le tlhabe; o bo o kane dinaledi." 
Job9:8 O o phuthololang magodimo o le osi, o gate makhubu a metsi a lewatle." 
Job9:9 O o dirang dinaledi tsa Kgogamasigo, Oriona, Selemela, le matlwana a kwa Borwa." 
Job9:10 O o dirang dilo tse dikgolo tse di se nang botlhotlhomiso; ee, dilo tse di gakgamatsang tse di se nang palo." 
Job9:11 Bonang, o kgabaganya fa go nna, mme ga ke o bone; le gone o fetele kwa pele, mme ga ke o lemoge." 
Job9:12 Bonang, o a thopa, mme e mang yo o ka kganelang? E mang yo o tlaa o rayang a re: ‘O dirang?’" 
Job9:13 “Modimo ga o ketla o kganelela bogale jwa one kwa morago; bathusi ba moikgogomosi ba ikokobetse fa tlase ga gagwe. 
Job9:14 Ana nna bogolo jang, ke tlhoka ka fa ke ka o fetolang ka gone, le go itlhophela mantswe a nka ganetsanyang nao ka one." 
Job9:15 O, le fa ke ne ke le tshiamo, le fa go ntse jalo ke ne ke se ketla ke o fetola, ke ne ke ka kokotlela moganetsi wa me fela." 
Job9:16 Fa nka bo ke ne ke biditse, mme fa o ne o nkarabile; le fa go ntse jalo ke ne ke se ketla ke dumela fa o reeditse lentswe la me." 
Job9:17 Gonne o nthobaka ka ledimo la phefo, o ntsifatsa dintho tsa me ka bomo." 
Job9:18 O gana go nteseletsa ka kgwa setšhe, o ntlatsa ka bogalaka." 
Job9:19 Fa re bua ka ga thata ya mothata, bonang, o a bo a le fa! Fa e le ka ga tsheko, e mang yo o tlaa ntaolelang lobaka?" 
Job9:20 Le fa ke le tshiamo, o o leng molomo wa me o tlaa ntshekisa; le fa ke le boitekanelo o tlaa ntshupa gore ke lesoko." 
Job9:21 Le fa ke itekanetse ga ke itlhokomele; ke nyatsa botshelo jwa me. 
Job9:22 Go tshwana fela; ke gone ke reng, o senya moitekanedi le moikepi." 
Job9:23 Fa sebetso se bolaya ka tshoganetso, o tlaa sotla ka tshenyegelo ya yo o se nang molato." 
Job9:24 Lefatshe le tsentswe mo seatleng sa baikepi, o khurumetse sefatlhogo sa baatlhodi ba lone; fa e se one, ana e tlaa bo e le mang?" 
Job9:25 “Jaanong malatsi a me a bofefo bogolo go motabogi yo o isang dikwalo; a tshabela koo, ga a bone molemo ope." 
Job9:26 A fetile jaaka dikepe tse di hadimang; jaaka ntswi yo motona yo o tsuulalelang phologolo. 
Job9:27 Fa ke re: ‘Ke tlaa lebala boitoko jwa me, ke tlaa apola sefatlhogo se se tlhontseng, ke tlaa nametsega pelo;’" 
Job9:28 ke boifa mahutsana a me otlhe, ke a itse fa o se ketla o nkaya go re ga ke na molato." 
Job9:29 Ke tlaa sekisiwa; ke ka ntlha yang fa ke kgokololela lefela? 
Job9:30 Fa ke tlhapa ka metsi a kapoko, ke ba ke intlafatsa diatla mo go ntseng jang;" 
Job9:31 le fa go ntse jalo, o tlaa nthabuetsa mo moseleng wa metsi, diaparo tse e leng tsa me di tlaa nkila." 
Job9:32 Gonne one ga se monna jaaka nna, yo ke ka reng ke ka mo fetola, gore re tle re kopane mmogo mo tshekong." 
Job9:33 Ga go na motsereganyi gare ga rona, yo o ka re bayang seatla roo babedi." 
Job9:34 A o tlose thupa ya one mo go nna, a theregiso ya one e se mpoifise;" 
Job9:35 foo ke ne ke tlaa bua, ke sa o boife, gonne mo go nna ka nosi ga ke a nna jalo." 
Job10:1 “Mowa wa me o tennwe ke botshelo jwa me; ke tlaa golola go itoka ga me; ke tlaa bua ka bogalaka jwa mowa wa me. 
Job10:2 Ke tlaa raya Modimo ke re, O se ka wa ntshekisa; o nkaele ka fa o ganelang le nna ka gone." 
Job10:3 A go molemo mo go wena fa o ka patika, fa o ka nyatsa tiro ya diatla tsa gago, mme o phatsimela kgakololo ya baikepi?" 
Job10:4 A o na le matlho a nama, kgotsa a o bona jaaka motho a bona?" 
Job10:5 A malatsi a gago a tshwana jaaka malatsi a motho, kgotsa dinyaga tsa gago, jaaka malatsi a motho," 
Job10:6 fa e bo ne ne o botsa ka ga boikepo jwa me, o hukutsa ka ga boleo jwa me," 
Job10:7 le fa o ntse o itse fa ke se boikepo; le gone go se na ope yo o ka gololang mo seatleng sa gago? 
Job10:8 Diatla tsa gago di mpopagantse, tsa ntshwatshwaela fela gotlhe; le fa go ntse jalo o a ntshenya." 
Job10:9 Ke a go rapela, a ko o nkgakologelwe go re o mpopile jaaka letsopa; mme a o tlaa ba o mpusetsa mo loroleng?" 
Job10:10 A ga o a nthela jaaka maši, wa nthemisa jaaka madila a a loileng." 
Job10:11 O nkapesitse letlalo le nama, o ntshwaragantse ka marapo le mesifa." 
Job10:12 O nneile botshelo le botsalano, le pabalelo ya gago e tlametse mowa wa me." 
Job10:13 “Le fa go ntse jalo, dilo tse o ne wa di loba mo pelong ya gago; ke a itse fa selo se, se na nao;" 
Job10:14 fa ke leofa, foo o a tle o ntlhokomele, mme ga o ketla o nkgolola mo boikepong jwa me." 
Job10:15 Fa ke le boikepo, go tlaa bo go latlhega nna; mme fa ke le tshiamo, le fa go ntse jalo ga nketla ke tsholetsa tlhogo; ka ke tletse ditlhong, ke ntse ke lebile patikego ya me." 
Job10:16 Ka tlhogo ya me e ikgoletsa, o a tle o ntsome jaaka tau; gape o iponatse kgakgamatso mo go nna." 
Job10:17 O ntšhafaletsa basupi ba gago ba ba nnayang molato, o ntotisetse kgakalo ya gago; ntwa e e tlhomaganyeng le ntwa e tlhabana le nna." 
Job10:18 “E le foo o nntsheditse eng mo sebopelong? Nka bo ke ne ke sule, leitlho lepe le koo le se ka la mpona." 
Job10:19 Nka bo ke ne ke tshwana jaaka fa nka bo ke seyo gope; nka bo ke ne ke tsewa mo sebopelong ka isiwa phupung. 
Job10:20 A malatsi a me ga a mabotlana? Ke gone khutla, mme o ntese gore ke tle ke ikgomotse go le gonnye," 
Job10:21 ke ise ke ye kwa ke se ketlang ke boa gone, e bong kwa lefatsheng la lefifi le la moriti wa loso;" 
Job10:22 lefatshe la lefifi le le kwenneng jaaka lefifi tota; lefatshe la moriti wa loso le le se nang thulagano, le kwa lesedi le ntseng jaaka lefifi gone.”" 
Job11:1 Foo ga fetola Sofare wa Monaamathe, a re:" 
Job11:2 “A bontsi jwa mafoko a ga bo a tshwanela go fetolwa, a monna yo o sephoko o tshwanetse go siamisiwa?" 
Job11:3 A maipelafatso a gago a tshwanetse go khutlisa banna go bua? Fa o sotla, a ga go motho ope yo o tlaa go tlhabisang ditlhong?" 
Job11:4 Gonne o ithaya o re: ‘Tumelo ya me e itshekile, ke montle mo matlhong a gago.’" 
Job11:5 A bo Modimo o ka ka wa bua, wa go tumololela dipounama tsa one;" 
Job11:6 le gore o go supetse maoma a botlhale fa bo le maranyane mo go digeleng go dira. Ke gone itse fa Modimo o go lefetse ka thata mo go botlana bogolo go tshwanelo ya boikepo jwa gago. 
Job11:7 A o ka lemoga Modimo ka go kheleisa? A o ka lemoga Mothatayotlhe ka botlalo? 
Job11:8 Go godimo jaaka legodimo; o ka dirang? Go boteng go feta Bobipo; o ka itseng? 
Job11:9 Selekanyo sa gone se feta lefatshe ka boleele, se feta lewatle ka boatlhamo." 
Job11:10 Fa o tshwara motho, o mo tswalela, mme o mmiletsa tshekong, foo e mang yo o ka o kganelang?" 
Job11:11 Gonne o itse banna ba boithamako; le boikepo o a bo bona, le fa ekete ga o bo tlhokomele." 
Job11:12 Motho a le boithamako ga a na tlhaloganyo; ee, motho o tsalwa jaaka eselana ya esela ya naga fela." 
Job11:13 “Fa o baakanya pelo sentle, o otlolela diatla tsa gago kwa go one;" 
Job11:14 fa boikepo bo le mo seatleng sa gago, o bo lelekele kwa kgakala, mme a tshiamololo e se ka ya aga mo megopeng ya gago;" 
Job11:15 foo ruri o tlaa tsholetsa sefatlhogo sa gago se sena setshubaba; ee, o tlaa tsepama, mme o se ke o boife;" 
Job11:16 gonne o tlaa lebala matladika a gago; o tlaa a gakologelwa jaaka metsi a a kgophogetseng koo. 
Job11:17 Le botshelo jwa gago bo tlaa nna phepha bogolo go motshegare; le fa go le lefifi, le tlaa nna jaaka moso fela." 
Job11:18 O tlaa nna thagamong, ka go na le tsholofelo; ee, o tlaa keleka tikologong ya gago, mme o tlaa ikhutsa mo polokegong."
