Job11:19 Le gone o tlaa itelega, mme ga go na ope yo o tlaa go boifisang; ee, batho ba le bantsi ba tlaa tla go lopa mo go wena." 
Job11:20 Mme matlho a baikepi a tlaa kalega, mme ga ba ketla ba nna le tsela ya botshabelo, le tsholofelo ya bone e tlaa bo e le go swa fela.”" 
Job12:1 Foo Jobe a fetola, a re:" 
Job12:2 “Ga go na pelaelo, ke lona batho tota, mme botlhale bo tlaa swa le lona." 
Job12:3 Mme le nna ke na le tlhaloganyo jaaka lona; ga ke kwa tlase ga lona: ee, dilo tse di ntseng jalo, e mang yo o sa di itseng?" 
Job12:4 Ke ntse jaaka mongwe yo o leng setshego sa ba ga gabo, e le motho yo o kileng a biletsa kwa Modimong, mme wa mo araba; mosiami, monna yo o itekanetseng ke ene setshego." 
Job12:5 Mo mogopolong wa yo o mo boiketlong go na le go nyatsa botlhoka lesego, gone go etleetsegetse yo o relelang." 
Job12:6 Megope ya dinokwane ya tlhogonolofala, le ba ba gakatsang Modimo ba thagame; ba Modimo o tsenyang letlotlo mo seatleng sa bone." 
Job12:7 Mme a ko o botse ditshedi jaana, mme di tlaa go ruta; le dinonyane tsa loapi, mme di tlaa go bolelela." 
Job12:8 Kgotsa o bue le lefatshe, le tlaa go ruta; le ditlhapi tsa lewatle, di tlaa go kakanyetsa." 
Job12:9 Ke ofe yo o sa itseng ka dilo tsotlhe tse, fa seatla sa ga Jehofa se dirile mo?" 
Job12:10 Yo mowa wa sengwe le sengwe se se tshedileng o leng mo seatleng sa gagwe, le mowa wa batho botlhe fela." 
Job12:11 A tsebe ga e leke mafoko, fela jaaka magalapa a tle a utlwe dijo?" 
Job12:12 Botlhale bo na le batsofe, le mo bontsing jwa malatsi go na le tlhaloganyo." 
Job12:13 Mo go one go na le botlhale, le thata; ke one o o nang le kgakololo le tlhaloganyo." 
Job12:14 Bona, o a tle o rutlolole, mme ga go kake ga agiwa gape; o tswalele motho, mme go bo go sa kake ga dirana le pulo." 
Job12:15 Bona, o tle o gane ka metsi, mme a tšhe; gape o a lese, mme a pitikolole lefatshe." 
Job12:16 Nonofo e na le one, le go digela go dira; yo o tsiediwang ke wa one, le yo o tsietsang." 
Job12:17 One o tlosa bagakolodi ba thopilwe, le baatlhodi o ba dire dieleele." 
Job12:18 O hunolola dikgole tsa dikgosi, o bofe ditheka tsa tsone ka moitlamo." 
Job12:19 O tlosa baperesiti ba thopilwe, o ribegetse bathati." 
Job12:20 O tlosa puo ya ba ba ikanyegang, o tlose tlhaloganyo ya bagolwane." 
Job12:21 O goromeletsa lonyatso mo magosaneng, o repise moitlamo wa bathati." 
Job12:22 O epolola dilo tse di boteng mo lefifing, le moriti wa loso o o ntshetse mo leseding." 
Job12:23 O ntsifatsa merafe, mme o e senye; o anamisa merafe, mme o e buse." 
Job12:24 O tlosa pelo ya bagolwane ba batho ba lefatshe, o ba kgarakgatshe mo nageng kwa go se nang tsela." 
Job12:25 Ba apaape mo lefifing ba se na lesedi, mme o ba kgokgweetse jaaka motho yo o tagilweng.”" 
Job13:1 “Bona, leitlho la me le bonye gotlhe fela mo, tsebe ya me e go utlwile, e go tlhalogantse." 
Job13:2 Se lo se itseng, ke sone se le nna ke se itseng; ga ke kwa tlase ga lona." 
Job13:3 Ruri ke rata ka bua le Mothatayotlhe, ke eletsa go ganetsanya le Modimo." 
Job13:4 Lona lo balogi ba maaka lotlhe fela, lo dingaka tse di se nang tiro." 
Job13:5 Lo a bo lo ka ka lwa didimala! Mme e ne e tlaa bo e le botlhale mo go lona. 
Job13:6 Utlwang jaana kganetsanyo ya me, lo reetse kganelelo tsa dipounama tsa me." 
Job13:7 A lo tlaa buelela Modimo ka fa go sa siamang, a lo tlaa buelela one ka tsietso?" 
Job13:8 A lo tlaa tlhokomela bomangmang jwa one? A lo tlaa ganelela Modimo? 
Job13:9 A go ka nna molemo fa o lo keleka? Kgotsa jaaka motho a tle a tsietse motho, a lona lo tlaa tsietsa one jalo?" 
Job13:10 Ruri o ka tla wa lo omanya, fa lo tlhokomela bomangmang jwa batho ka bosaitsiweng." 
Job13:11 A tlotlomalo ya one ga e ketla e lo boifisa, le poitsho ya one ga e ketla e lo wela?" 
Job13:12 Dipolelo tsa lona tse di itsegeng ke diane tsa melora; dikago tsa phemelo tsa lona ke diphemelo tsa seretse fela. 
Job13:13 “Didimalang, lo nte ke bue, go ntlele se se ntlelang fela." 
Job13:14 Nkoo ke tseelang nama ya me ka meno, ka itsenya botshelo jwa me mo seatleng sa me go reng?" 
Job13:15 Le fa o mpolaya, ke tlaa nna ke o lebelela fela; le fa go ntse jalo ke tlaa gantshetsa ditsela tsa me fa pele ga one." 
Job13:16 Se le sone e tlaa nna poloko ya me; gonne motho yo o sa reng Modimo sepe ga a ketla a tla fa pele ga one. 
Job13:17 Utlwang puo ya tlhoafalo, mme a go kakanya ga me go nne mo tsebeng tsa lona." 
Job13:18 Bonang jaana, ke rulagantse mafoko a me a a sekwang; ke a itse fa ke tlaa siamisiwa." 
Job13:19 Ene yo o tlaa ganelang le nna e mang? Gonne jaanong fa ke ka didimala fela ke tlaa swa. 
Job13:20 Fa e se dilo di le pedi, o se ka wa di ntirela, foo ga nketla ke iphitlhela sefatlhogo sa gago." 
Job13:21 Tlosetsa seatla sa gago kgakala le nna; a theregiso ya gago e se ka ya mpoifisa. 
Job13:22 Foo o bitse, mme ke tlaa go araba; kgotsa o mme ke bue, mme o mphetole." 
Job13:23 Maikepo a me le maleo a me a kae? Nkitsise tlolo ya me le boleo jwa me. 
Job13:24 O subelang sefatlhogo sa gago, o ba o nkaya go re ke mmaba wa gago?" 
Job13:25 A o tlaa gabea lekakaba le le tsubutlwang, a o tlaa alola phufe ya soma?" 
Job13:26 Gonne o kwala dilo tse di galakang ka ga me, o njesa boswa jwa maikepo a bokau jwa me;" 
Job13:27 le maoto a me o a tsenya mo disaneng, o tlhokometse ditselana tsotlhe tsa me; o ithalela moralo mo tikologong ya dipato tsa dinao tsa me." 
Job13:28 Le fa ke tshwana le selo se se bodileng se se felang, se se tshwanang le kobo e e jelweng ke motoutwane.”" 
Job14:1 “Motho yo o tsetsweng ke mosadi o malatsi mannye, o bile o tletse khuduego." 
Job14:2 O tswa jaaka sethunya, mme a kgaolwe; le gone o tshaba jaaka moriti, mme a se ke a tlhola." 
Job14:3 A o budulogela yo o ntseng jalo matlho, o ba o nkisa tshekong nao?" 
Job14:4 E mang yo o ka ntshang selo se sentle mo go se se seng sentle? Ga go na ope. 
Job14:5 E re ka malatsi a gagwe a laotswe, le palo ya dikgwedi tsa gagwe e na nao, o bile o mmeetse melelwane ya gagwe e o sa kakeng a e tlola;" 
Job14:6 sheboga mo go ene, gore a tle a ikhutse, go tsamaya a dirafatse letsatsi la gagwe jaaka mothapiwa wa tuelo." 
Job14:7 Gonne mo setlhareng go na le tsholofelo ya go re le fa se remilwe se tlaa ba se tlhoga matswela, le go re letswela le lenana la sone ga le ketla le khutla." 
Job14:8 Le fa modi wa sone o onalela mo lefatsheng, le thito ya sone e swela mo mmung;" 
Job14:9 le fa go ntse jalo, fa se utlwa monko wa metsi se tlaa kukunya, se ntsha dikala jaaka se se tlhomilweng." 
Job14:10 Mme motho ene o a swa, a nyelele; ee, motho a gonoge, mme o ba a le kae?" 
Job14:11 Jaaka metsi a tle a ngangaolege mo letsheng, le noka e tle e kgale e omelele;" 
Job14:12 motho o itelega jalo, mme a sa tsoge; ga ba ketla ba kubuga le fa e le go tsosiwa mo go robaleng ga bone go bo go tsamaye magodimo a sa tlhole a leyo." 
Job14:13 O a bo o ka ka wa mphitlha mo Bobipong, wa ka wa mpoloka ka bosaitsiweng, go tsamaya bogale jwa gago bo feta, wa ka wa ntaolela motlha o o tlhomameng, mme wa nkgakologelwa." 
Job14:14 Fa monna a swa, a o tlaa ba a tshela? Ke ne ke tlaa lebelela ka malatsi otlhe a ntwa eo ya me, kgololo ya me e be e tsamaye e tle." 
Job14:15 O ne o ka bitsa, ke ne ke tlaa go araba; o ne o tlaa eletsa tiro ya diatla tsa gago." 
Job14:16 Mme jaanong, ke fa, o bala dikgato tsa me; a ga o lebale boleo jwa me?" 
Job14:17 Tlolo ya me e kanetswe mo kgetseng, mme o hunela boikepo jwa me." 
Job14:18 Ruri thaba e e wang e tle e nyelele, le lefika le sutisiwe mo bonnong jwa lone;" 
Job14:19 metsi a tle a gotlhe maje; merwalela ya one e gopele ruri lorole lwa lefatshe; le wena o tle o senye tsholofelo ya motho. 
Job14:20 O mo fenya ka bosakhutleng, mme a fete; o fetole sefatlhogo sa gagwe, mme o mo neye tsela." 
Job14:21 Bomorwawe ba newe tlotlo, mme ene a se ke a itse; ba kokobediwe, mme a se ke a go lemoge mo go bone." 
Job14:22 Nama ya gagwe mo go ene e nne botlhoko, mowa wa gagwe mo teng ga gagwe o hutsafale.”" 
Job15:1 Foo ga fetola Elifase wa Motemana, a re:" 
Job15:2 “A monna yo o botlhale o tshwanetse go fetola ka kitso ya boithamako, a kgorisa mpa ya gagwe ka phefo ya botlhabatsatsi?" 
Job15:3 A go tshwanetse fa a ka tsaya kgang ka puo e e se nang thuso, kgotsa ka dipolelo tse o sa kakeng a dira molemo ope ka tsone?" 
Job15:4 Ee, o tsupuetsa poifo, mme o ngotla tshisimogo fa pele ga Modimo." 
Job15:5 Gonne boikepo jwa gago bo ruta molomo wa gago, mme o itshenkela loleme lwa maferefere." 
Job15:6 Molomo wa gago tota o a go sekisa, e seng nna; ee, dipounama tsa gago di supa ka ga gago di go nyatsa." 
Job15:7 “A ke wena monna wa ntlha yo o tsetsweng? Kgotsa a o tsetswe pele ga dithabana? 
Job15:8 A o utlwile kgakololo e e sa itsiweng ya Modimo? A o ikganelela botlhale? 
Job15:9 O itse eng se rona re sa se itseng? O tlhaloganya eng se se seng mo go rona? 
Job15:10 Ba ba ditlhogo ditshweu le banna ba ba tsofetseng thata re na nabo, ba ba tsofetseng thata bogolo go rraago." 
Job15:11 A dikgomotso tsa Modimo di dipotlana bobe mo go wena, le lefoko le le buang nao ka bonolo?" 
Job15:12 Ana pelo ya gago e go isetsang kwa kgakala, le matlho a gago a gwetlhelang?" 
Job15:13 Fa e bo ne ne o sokolola mowa wa gago go tlhabana le Modimo, o lesa mafoko a a ntseng jalo a tswa mo molomong wa gago?" 
Job15:14 Ana motho e be e le eng, fa e bo ne ne go twe, o ka nna montle, le yo o tsetsweng ke mosadi, fa e bo ne ne go twe, o ka nna tshiamo?" 
Job15:15 Bona, ga o ikanye baitshepi ba one; ee, le magodimo ga a mantle mo ponong ya one." 
Job15:16 Bogolo jang go sa kake ga nna jalo motho yo o makgapha, yo o bodileng, e le monna yo o nwang boikepo jaaka metsi!" 
Job15:17 “Nkutlwa, ke tlaa go kaela; se ke se bonyeng ke tlaa se bolela:" 
Job15:18 (Se banna ba ba botlhale ba se boletseng se tswa mo go borraabo, mme ba se ka ba se loba;" 
Job15:19 ba lefatshe le neilweng bone ba le bosi, mme go se ka ga fetela moeng ope mo go bone:)" 
Job15:20 Moikepi o inganga mo botlhokong ka metlha yotlhe ya gagwe, mme dinyaga tse di badilweng di beetswe mopatiki." 
Job15:21 Modumo wa ditheregiso o mo ditsebeng tsa gagwe; le a le mo tlhogonolong mothopi o tlaa mo wela. 
Job15:22 Ga a dumele fa a tlaa boa a tswa mo lefifing, a lebeletswe ke tšhaka." 
Job15:23 O kgarakgatshegela dijo, a re: ‘Di kae?’ O a itse fa letsatsi la lefifi le etleetsegile, le le fa go ene:" 
Job15:24 Pitlagano le tlalelo e e mahehe di a mmoifisa; di a mo fenya jaaka kgosi e e iketleeditseng go tlhabana; 
Job15:25 gonne o otlololetse Modimo letsogo go tlhabana nao, o inatlafaletsa Mothatayotlhe." 
Job15:26 O a o sotlhomelela ka thamo e e thata le ka dikgogoropo tsa dithebe tsa gagwe; 
Job15:27 gonne o ikhurumeditse sefatlhogo ka monono wa gagwe; mme a dire makukunopo a mahura mo dithekeng tsa gagwe. 
Job15:28 O ntse a agile mo metseng e e swafetseng, mo matlong a a sa nnweng ke ope, a a ne a iketleeditse go nna mekoa ya go wa fela." 
Job15:29 Ga a ketla a huma, le dithoto tsa gagwe ga di ketla di tlhomama, le gone go ungwa ga tsone ga go ketla go inamela fa fatshe." 
Job15:30 Ga a ketla a tswa mo lefifing; kgabo ya molelo e tlaa omeletsa dikala tsa gagwe, mme o tlaa tsamaela koo ka pudulo ya molomo wa one." 
Job15:31 A a se ikanye boithamako a itsietsa, gonne boithamako e tlaa nna maduo a gagwe." 
Job15:32 Go tlaa mo dirafalela pele ga motlha wa gagwe, kala ya gagwe ga e ketla e nna nana." 
Job15:33 O tlaa udubatsega dikungwa tsa gagwe tse di sa butswang jaaka mofine, o tlaa tlhotlhorega sethunya sa gagwe jaaka motlhware." 
Job15:34 Gonne lesomo la ba ba sa reng Modimo sepe le tlaa nna boopa, molelo o tlaa laila megope ya ba ba neo e e faposang tshiamo." 
Job15:35 Ba ithwala bosenyi, ba tsala boikepo, mpa ya bone e baakanya tsietso.”" 
Job16:1 Foo Jobe a fetola a re: 
Job16:2 “Ke utlwile dilo di le dintsi tse di ntseng jalo; lo bagomotsi ba lo lapisang lotlhe fela. 
Job16:3 A mafoko a boithamako a ka dirana le bokhutlo? Kgotsa ke eng se se go gakatsang fa e bo ne ne o fetola jaana? 
Job16:4 Le nna ke ne ke ka bua jaaka lona; fa mowa wa lona o ka bo o le mo boemong jwa mowa wa me, ke ne ke ka lo gololela mafoko a a lo nyatsang, ke lo thukhuthela tlhogo." 
Job16:5 Mme nna, ke ne ke tlaa lo nonotsha ka molomo wa me, le kgomotso ya dipounama tsa me e ne e tlaa kokobetsa bohutsana jwa lona." 
Job16:6 Le fa ke bua, bohutsana jwa me ga bo a kokobela; le fa ke ithiba ke a bo ke imologile eng?" 
Job16:7 Mme jaanong o ntapisitse, o swafaditse lesomo la me lotlhe fela." 
Job16:8 O nkudupantse, e le tshupo e e nnyatsang; borole jwa me bo a ntsogologela, bo ntsha tshupo fa pele ga sefatlhogo sa me." 
Job16:9 O nkgagotse mo bogaleng jwa one, o mpogisitse; o ntšhenetse meno; moganetsi wa me o šadikanya matlho a gagwe ka nna." 
Job16:10 Ba nkatlhamoloseditse melomo; ba ntiteile lesama ka kgobo, ba nkgobokanetse go tlhabana le nna." 
Job16:11 Modimo o ntsenya mo seatleng sa ba ba sa reng Modimo sepe, o ntatlhela mo diatleng tsa baikepi." 
Job16:12 Ke ne ke le mo boiketlong, mme wa nthobaganya ka bogare, ee, o ntshwere ka thamo a nthubaganya; o bile o ntlhomile, gore ke nne sekonopiwa sa one." 
Job16:13 Bahudi ba one ba ntikanyeditse, o fatola diphilo tsa me, a sa rekegele; o tshololela santlhokwe wa me fa fatshe." 
Job16:14 O mphatlakanya ka go nthubaka, o ntshotlhomelela jaaka seganka." 
Job16:15 Ke rokeletse letlalo la me letsela la kgetse, ke beile lonaka lwa me mo loroleng." 
Job16:16 Sefatlhogo sa me se kganatheditswe ke go lela, moriti wa loso o mo dintshing tsa matlho a me;" 
Job16:17 le fa go se na thubakanyo mo diatleng tsa me, le morapelo wa me o le boitsheko." 
Job16:18 “Lefatshe wee, o se ka wa bipa madi a me, a kgajajego ya me e se bone felo ga boikhutso." 
Job16:19 Le jaana, bona, mosupi wa me o kwa legodimong, le yo o nkemelang o kwa godimong." 
Job16:20 Ditsala tsa me di a ntshotla, leitlho la me le thelela Modimo dikeledi;" 
Job16:21 gore o tle o emele tshiamo ya motho mo Modimong, le ya morwa motho mo go wa ga gabo!" 
Job16:22 Gonne e tlaa re dinyaganyana di sena go feta, ke be ke ya tseleng e ke se ketlang ke bowa mo go yone." 
Job17:1 “Mowa wa me o fedile, malatsi a me a timile, phupu e ntebeletse." 
Job17:2 Ruri ke a bo ke na le basotli, mme leitlho la me le ntse fela le lebile kgakatso ya bone." 
Job17:3 “A ko o ntshe peelo jaana, a ke emelwe ke wena fa pele ga gago ka wesi; go na le mang yo o tlaa opanyang le nna diatla?" 
Job17:4 Gonne o subetse pelo ya bone tlhaloganyo; ke gone ka moo o se ketlang o ba goletsa. 
Job17:5 Yo o okang ditsala tsa gagwe gore di tle di thopiwe, le e leng matlho a bana ba gagwe a tlaa kalega." 
Job17:6 “O bile o ntirile setlhaba seane mo bathong; ke fetogile ka nna motho wa sekgwelwa mathe fela. 
Job17:7 Le leitlho la me le fifaditswe ke bohutsana, ditokololo tsa me tsotlhe di ntse jaaka moriti fela." 
Job17:8 Bathokgami ba tlaa gakgamalela se, le ba ba se nang molato ba tlaa itlhotlheleletsa yo o sa reng Modimo sepe." 
Job17:9 Le fa go ntse jalo motho yo o tshiamo o tlaa tshegetsa tsela ya gagwe, le yo o diatla tse dintle o tlaa nna a thatafala bogolo bogolo." 
Job17:10 Mme boang lotlhe, lo tle jaana, mme ga nketla ke fitlhela motho yo o botlhale mo go lona." 
Job17:11 Malatsi a me a fetile, maikaelelo a me a robilwe, e bong megopolo ya pelo ya me." 
Job17:12 Ba fetola bosigo motshegare, ba re: ‘Lesedi le gaufi le lefifi.’" 
Job17:13 Fa ke solofetse go re Bobipo e tlaa nna ntlo ya me; fa ke adile sesekamelo sa me mo lefifing; 
Job17:14 fa ke reile sebodu ka re: ‘Ke wena rre.’ Le seboko ka re: ‘Ke wena mme le kgaitsadiake;’ 
Job17:15 foo tsholofelo ya me e bo e le kae? Ka ga tsholofelo ya me e mang yo o tlaa e bonang? 
Job17:16 E tlaa fologela kwa mephakalegong ya Bobipo mogang go sena go bonwa boikhutso mo loroleng.” 
Job18:1 Foo ga fetola Biletate wa Mosuhe a re: 
Job18:2 “Lo tlaa tsoma mafoko ka lobaka lo lokae? Akanyang, mme re tlaa bua kwa morago." 
Job18:3 Ke ka ntlha yang fa re kaiwa jaaka dikgomo, re bile re fetogile re ntse maswe mo ponong ya lona?" 
Job18:4 Wena yo o ikgagolang mo bogaleng jwa gago, a lefatshe le tlaa latlhwa ka ntlha ya gago, kgotsa lefika le tlosiwa mo bonnong jwa lone?" 
Job18:5 Ee, lesedi la moikepi le tlaa tingwa, le tlhase ya molelo wa gagwe ga e ketla e phatsima." 
Job18:6 Lesedi le tlaa nna lefifi mo mogopeng wa gagwe, le lampa ya gagwe mo godimo ga gagwe e tlaa tingwa." 
Job18:7 Dikgato tsa thata ya gagwe di tlaa pitlaganngwa, le kgakololo ya gagwe ka esi e tlaa mo diga." 
Job18:8 Gonne o latlhelwa mo lotloeng ke dinao tsa gagwe, o sepela mo dithapong." 
Job18:9 Seru se tlaa mo tshwara ka serethe, mme segwe se tlaa mo tshegetsa." 
Job18:10 Segole o se fitlhetswe mo mmung, le mogotlha mo tseleng." 
Job18:11 Ditheregiso di tlaa mmoifisa mo ntlheng tsotlhe, di mo gata direthe." 
Job18:12 Nonofo ya gagwe e tlaa jewa ke tlala, tatlhego e tlaa lalela go tlhotsa ga gagwe." 
Job18:13 E tlaa ja e swetsa ditokololo tsa mmele wa gagwe; ee, motsalwapele wa loso o tlaa ja ditokololo tsa gagwe." 
Job18:14 O tlaa khumolwa mo mogopeng wa gagwe o o ikanyang mo go one; o tlaa isiwa kwa kgosing ya ditheregiso. 
Job18:15 Mo mogopeng wa gagwe go tlaa aga se e seng sa gagwe gope; sulefera se tlaa gasiwa mo boagong jwa gagwe. 
Job18:16 Medi ya gagwe e tlaa omelela kwa tlase, kwa godimo kala ya gagwe e tlaa kgaolwa." 
Job18:17 Kgakologelo ya gagwe e tlaa nyelela mo lefatsheng, mme ga a ketla a dira le leina lepe mo mmileng." 
Job18:18 O tlaa ntshiwa mo leseding, a lelekelwa mo lefifing, a alolwa, a tswa mo lefatsheng." 
Job18:19 Ga a ketla a nna le morwawe, kgotsa morwa morwawe mo bathong ba ga gabo, le fa e le a le mongwe fela yo o tlaa salang kwa o ne a jaka teng." 
Job18:20 Ba ba tlang morago ba tlaa gakgamalela letsatsi la gagwe, jaaka ba ba kileng ba nna pele ba ne ba tshwarwa ke poifo." 
Job18:21 Ruri maago a ba ba sa siamang a bo a ntse jalo, mme jo ke jone bonno jwa monna yo o sa itseng Modimo.”" 
Job19:1 Foo Jobe a fetola a re: 
Job19:2 “Lo tlaa nna lo tshwenya mowa wa me, lo nthubaganya ka mafoko ka lobaka lo lo kae?" 
Job19:3 Jaanong lo nkgobile ga some; ga lo tlhajwe ke ditlhong fa lo ntirela ka bopeloethata. 
Job19:4 Fa go ntse jalo, e re fa ke timetse, timelo ya me e be e setse e na le nna ka nosi." 
Job19:5 Fa ruri lo rata go inkgodiseletsa, le go nkgagamaletsa sekgobo sa me," 
Job19:6 itseng jaanong fa Modimo o nthibegeditse mo mafokong a me, mme o ntsentse gare ka lotloa lwa one." 
Job19:7 Bonang, ke lela ke le mo patikegong, mme ga ke utluwe; ke lelela thuso, mme ga go na tshiamiso." 
Job19:8 O thibile tsela ya me ka logora, ga ke na ka fa ke ka fetang ka gone, o beile lefifi mo ditselaneng tsa me." 
Job19:9 O nkapotse kgalalelo ya me, o nthotse serwalo mo tlhogong." 
Job19:10 O nthutlolotse ka ntlha tsotlhe, mme ke ile; tsholofelo ya me o e khumotse jaaka setlhare." 
Job19:11 O bile o ntukiseditse bogale jwa one, o nkaya go re ke mongwe wa baganetsi ba one." 
Job19:12 Mephato ya one e tla e le mmogo, e nkoeletsa tsela ya yone, e thibelela tikologong ya mogope wa me." 
Job19:13 “O ntomologanyeditse kgakala le bana ba ga rre, ba ke itsanyeng nabo ba nnkgeletse ruri." 
Job19:14 Ba losika lwa me ba tlhaetse, le ditsala tsa me tse ke tlwaelanyeng natso di ntebetse." 
Job19:15 Ba ke agileng nabo mo ntlong, le malata a me, ba nkaya go re ke moeng fela; ke motho o sele fela mo ponong ya bone." 
Job19:16 Ke bitse motlhanka wa me, a se ke a nkarabe, le fa ke mo rapela ka molomo wa me." 
Job19:17 Mowa wa legano la me o nkgetse mosadi wa me, le mokokotlelo wa me o nkgetse bana ba sebopelo sa ga mme." 
Job19:18 Le ba e leng banyana ba bannye ba nnyatsa; fa ke nanoga, ba bue ba ntshotle." 
Job19:19 Ditsala tsotlhe tsa me tsa mmaanete ke di ferosa sebete fela, le baratwa ba me ba mphetogetse." 
Job19:20 Lesapo la me le ngaparetse letlalo le nama ya me, ke falotse ka nama ya marinini fela." 
Job19:21 Ntlhomogelang pelo! ntlhomogelang pelo! ditsala tsa me we; gonne seatla sa Modimo se nkamile. 
Job19:22 Ana lo mpogisetsang jaaka Modimo, lo sa kgora nama ya me?" 
Job19:23 “A bo mafoko a me a ka bo a kwadilwe jaana! A ka bo ne ne a ralegilwe mo lokwalong! 
Job19:24 A bo a ka bo a setilwe ka segabo sa tshipi le ka lotwe mo lefikeng ka bosakhutleng! 
Job19:25 Nna ke a itse fa morekolodi wa me a tshedile, le go re o tlaa re kwa bofelong a eme ka dinao mo lefatsheng." 
Job19:26 E tlaa re morago letlalo la me le sena go senngwa jaana, ke tlaa bona Modimo ke le mo nameng ya me;" 
Job19:27 o ke tlaa o iponelang ka nosi, matlho a me a tlaa o leba, e seng a o sele. Diphilo tsa me di fediwa mo teng ga me." 
Job19:28 Fa lo ithaya lo re: ‘A bo re tlaa mmogisa!’ E re ka modi wa mmaanete o fitlhetswe mo go nna; 
Job19:29 lo boife tšhaka, gonne bogale jo bo botšarara bo lere dipetso tsa tšhaka, gore lo tle lo itse fa go na le tshiamiso.”" 
Job20:1 Foo ga fetola Sofare wa Monaamatha a re: 
Job20:2 “Ke gone ka moo megopolo ya me e nnayang phetolo, e bong ka ntlha ya go potlaka ga me mo go nna." 
Job20:3 Ke utlwile kgalemelo e e ntlhabisang ditlhong, mowa wa tlhaloganyo ya me wa mphetola." 
Job20:4 A gale, bogologolo, e sa le ka motho a bewa mo lefatsheng, a o ntse o sa itse se," 
Job20:5 sa go re, go ja koma ga baikepi go le go khutshwane, le boitumelo jwa ba ba sa reng Modimo sepe bo nna ka ponyo ya leitlho fela?" 
Job20:6 Le fa tlotlomalo ya gagwe e palamela kwa magodimong, le tlhogo ya gagwe e fitlha kwa marung;" 
Job20:7 le fa go ntse jalo o tlaa felela ruri ka bosakhutleng jaaka maswe a gagwe; ba ba mmonyeng ba tlaa re: ‘O kae?’ 
Job20:8 O tlaa fofela koo fela jaaka toro, mme ga a ketla a fitlhelwa; ee, o tlaa alolwa jaaka ponatshegelo ya bosigo." 
Job20:9 Leitlho le le kileng la mmona ga le ketla le tlhola le mmona gope; le gone felo ga gagwe ga go ketla go tlhola go mo leba. 
Job20:10 Bana ba gagwe ba tlaa batla botsalano jwa bahumanegi, diatla tsa gagwe di tlaa rebola khumo ya gagwe." 
Job20:11 Le fa marapo a gagwe a tletse bokolwane, bo tlaa itelega nae mo loroleng." 
Job20:12 le fa boikepo bo le botshe mo ganong la gagwe, le fa a bo suba fa tlase ga loleme lwa gagwe;" 
Job20:13 le fa a bo rekegela, a gana go bo lesa, mme a ntse a bo tshegeditse fela mo teng ga legano la gagwe;" 
Job20:14 le fa go ntse jalo, dijo tsa gagwe di fetogile mo maleng a gagwe, ke botlhoko jwa dinenebu mo teng ga gagwe." 
Job20:15 O komeditse dikhumo, mme o tlaa ba a di tlhatsa; Modimo o tlaa di gelola mo mpeng ya gagwe." 
Job20:16 O tlaa mona botlhoko jwa dinenebu; lolema lwa šaušawane lo tlaa mmolaya. 
Job20:17 Ga a ketla a leba dinoka, dinokana tse di elang dinotshe le madila a maši." 
Job20:18 Se o ne a se itapisetsa o tlaa se busa, mme ga a ketla a se meletsa mo teng; ga a ketla a itumelela thoto e o e bapetseng." 
Job20:19 Gonne o patikile a latlha bahumanegi; o gapile ntlo ka thata, e o ne a se ka a e aga." 
Job20:20 “E re ka a ne a sa itse boiketlo mo teng ga gagwe, ga a ketla a sala le sepe sa se o ne a itumela mo go sone." 
Job20:21 Ga se ka ga sala sepe se o sa se jelang ruri; ke gone ka moo go tlhogonolofala ga gagwe ga go ketla go tlhomama. 
Job20:22 O tlaa re mo botlalong jwa letlotlo la gagwe a nne mo pitlaganong; seatla sa mongwe le mongwe yo o mo matladikeng se tlaa wela mo go ene. 
Job20:23 E tlaa re mogang o reng o kgora mo mpeng, Modimo o latlhele bogale jwa tšarologo ya one mo go ene, o tlaa bo kgoromeletsa mo go ene a sa ntse a ja." 
Job20:24 O tlaa tshaba sebolao sa tshipi, bora jwa kgotlho bo tlaa mo phololetsa." 
Job20:25 Fa mongwe a o somola, o tswe mo mmeleng wa gagwe; ee, segale se se phatsimang se tswe mo santlhokweng wa gagwe; ditheregiso di mo go ene." 
Job20:26 Lefifi lotlhe le beetswe dikhumo tsa gagwe tse di rategang; molelo o o sa butswelwang ke motho o tlaa mo laila; o tlaa nyeletsa se se setseng mo mogopeng wa gagwe. 
Job20:27 Magodimo a tlaa senola boikepo jwa gagwe, le lefatshe le tlaa mo tsogologela." 
Job20:28 Totafalo ya ntlo ya gagwe e tlaa tloga, dithoto tsa gagwe di tlaa elela koo mo tsatsing la botšarara jwa one." 
Job20:29 Kabelo ya moikepi ke eo, e tswa mo Modimong, le boswa jo o bo laoletsweng ke Modimo.”" 
Job21:1 Foo Jobe a fetola a re: 
Job21:2 “Lo bo lo utlweng puo ya me sentle; mme se e nne dikgomotso tsa lona. 
Job21:3 Ntesang, le nna ke tlaa bua; ke tlaa re ke sena go bua, lo sotlele pele fela." 
Job21:4 Ka ga me, go itoka ga me a ke go itokela motho? Ke tlaa bo ke sa nne legweegwee ka ntlha yang?" 
Job21:5 Lo nkele tlhoko, lo gakgamale, mme lo ipeye seatla mo melomong." 
Job21:6 Ee, le e tle e re fa ke gakologelwa ke huduege, le go tsitla marapo go ntshware." 
Job21:7 Ana baikepi ba tshela ka ntlha yang ba tsofale, ee, ba natlafale mo nonofong?" 
Job21:8 Losika lwa bone lo tlhomame nabo mo ponong ya bone, le lotsalo lwa bone mo matlhong a bone." 
Job21:9 Mantlo a bone a dibelesege mo poifong, le gone thupa ya Modimo ga e ke e nna mo go bone." 
Job21:10 Poo ya bone e gwele fela e se ke e tlhaele; kgomo ya bone e tsale e se ke e folotse. 
Job21:11 Ba tle ba bolotse banyana ba bone jaaka letsomane, mme bana ba bone ba bine." 
Job21:12 Ba opelele meropana le harepe, ba itumelele go lediwa ga lotlhaka." 
Job21:13 Ba fetise malatsi a bone mo tlhogonolofalong, mme e a re ka ponyo ya leitlho ba kotlomelele fela mo Bobipong." 
Job21:14 Le fa go ntse jalo, ba reile Modimo ba re: ‘Tloga mo go rona; gonne ga re eletse kitso ya ditsela tsa gago." 
Job21:15 Mothatayotlhe ya bo e le eng, fa e bo ne ne re ka mo direla? Re tlaa bo re bona molemo wang fa re mo rapela?’" 
Job21:16 Bona, go tlhogonolofala ga bone ga go mo seatleng sa bone; kgakololo ya baikepi ke kgakala nayo." 
Job21:17 Lobone lwa baikepi lo tle lo tingwe ga kae? Tatlhego ya bone e tle e ba tlele ga kae? Modimo o tle o abe mahutsana mo bogaleng jwa one ga kae? 
Job21:18 Fa ba tla bo ba ka nna ga kae jaaka dirine fa pele ga phefo, le jaaka mmoko o setsuatsue se o tsubulang?" 
Job21:19 Lo a tle lo re: ‘Modimo o beela bana ba gagwe boikepo jwa gagwe.’ A o bo lefetse mo go ene ka esi gore a bo ikitse. 
Job21:20 A matlho a gagwe ka osi a bone tshenyego ya gagwe, a a nwe botšarara jwa Mothatayotlhe." 
Job21:21 Gonne o na le go kgatlhwa ke eng mo ntlong ya gagwe morago ga gagwe, etswa palo ya dikgwedi tsa gagwe e kgaotswe ka bogare?" 
Job21:22 A mongwe o ka ruta Modimo kitso, etswa o atlhola bogoletsegi?" 
Job21:23 Mongwe o swa a tletse nonofo a iketlile, a ituletse gotlhe fela." 
Job21:24 Mabele a gagwe a tletse maši, le moko wa marapo a gagwe o mahura fela." 
Job21:25 Yo mongwe a swe a le mowa o botlhoko, le a e se ke a utlwe se se molemo gope." 
Job21:26 Ba itelege mmogo fela ka bobedi mo loroleng, mme seboko se ba khurumetse." 
Job21:27 “Bonang, ke a e itse megopolo ya lona, le maano a lo a ntogelang ka go sa siamang." 
Job21:28 Gonne lwa re: ‘Ntlo ya kgosana e kae? Le mogope o moikepi o kileng a o nna o kae?’ 
Job21:29 A ga lo a botsa bone ba ba fetang le tsela? A ga lo itse dikao tsa bone? 
Job21:30 Go re motho yo o bosula o rekegelelwa letsatsi la tatlhego, le go re ba gogelwa koo kwa letsatsing la botšarara?" 
Job21:31 E mang yo o tlaa bolelang tsela ya gagwe matlhong a gagwe? E mang yo o tlaa mo kgopololelang se o se dirileng? 
Job21:32 Le fa go ntse jalo o tlaa isiwa kwa lebitleng, mme ba tlaa lebela phupu ya gagwe." 
Job21:33 Makote a molapo a tlaa nna botshe mo go ene, mme batho botlhe ba tlaa gogegela kwa go ene, jaaka go ne go le ba ba se nang palo pele ga gagwe." 
Job21:34 Mme e le foo lo nkgomotsa jang ka lefela, ka mo diphetolong tsa lona go setse boikanyologo fela.”" 
Job22:1 Foo ga fetola Elifase wa Motemane a re: 
Job22:2 “A monna o ka dirana le molemo mo Modimong? Ruri yo o botlhale o tlaa bo a na le go itirela molemo ka esi. 
Job22:3 A go a bo go kgatlha Mothatayotlhe fa o le tshiamo? Kgotsa a go a mo thusa fa o dira ditsela tsa gago di nna boitekanelo? 
Job22:4 A ke ka ntlha ya go mmoifa ga gago a go kgalemela, mme a seka nao?" 
Job22:5 Boikepo jwa gago a ga bo bogolo? Le gone ga go na bokhutlo jwa ditshiamololo tsa gago. 
Job22:6 Gonne o tshotse dipeelo mo go ngwana a rraago ka lefela, wa apola ba ba sa ikategang diaparo tsa bone." 
Job22:7 Ga o a nosa balapi metsi, o timile ba ba bolailweng ke tlala dijo." 
Job22:8 Ka ga monna yo o seganka, ene o ne a na le lefatshe; le motho yo o tlotlego a aga mo go lone." 
Job22:9 O tsamaisitse basadi ba batlholagadi ba iphotlhere fela, wa lesa mabogo a masiela a robega." 
Job22:10 Ke gone ka moo diru di go dikanyeditse, le poifo ya tshoganetso ya go hudua." 
Job22:11 Kgotsa ke lefifi, o ba o tla o sa bone, le metsi a le mantsi a go khurumetsa." 
Job22:12 A Modimo ga o mo bogodimong jwa legodimo? Mme leba bogodimo jwa dinaledi go re di kwa godimo jang! 
Job22:13 Mme wa re Modimo o itse eng? A o ka phunya lefifi le lentsho, mme wa atlhola?" 
Job22:14 Maru a a kwenneng a o sireleditse, mme o sa bone; o tsamaya mo tikologong ya legodimo." 
Job22:15 A o rata go tsaya tsela e kgologolo e baikepi ba e gatileng? 
Job22:16 Ba ba phamotsweng e ise e nne lobaka lwa bone, ba motheo wa bone o ne wa thaololwa jaaka kelelo ya metsi;" 
Job22:17 ba ba reileng Modimo ba re: ‘Tloga mo go rona;’ gape ba re: ‘Mothatayotlhe o ka re direlang?’ 
Job22:18 Le fa go ntse jalo o ne a tladitse matlo a bone ka dilo tse di molemo; a kgakololo ya baikepi e nne kgakala le nna. 
Job22:19 Basiami ba a go bona, mme ba a itumela; ba ba se nang molato ba ba tshega ka tshotlo," 
Job22:20 ba re: ‘Ruri bone ba ba re tsogologetseng ba kgaotswe; le makunantsana a bone molelo o a laitse.’ 
Job22:21 A ko o mo itemotshe, mme o nne mo kagisong; mme molemo o tlaa go diralela ka gone." 
Job22:22 Ke a go rapela, o amogele molao mo molomong wa one, baya mafoko a one mo pelong ya gago." 
Job22:23 Fa o boela kwa go Mothatayotlhe, o tlaa agiwa, fa o tlosetsa tshiamololo kgakala le megope ya gago." 
Job22:24 Khumo ya gago o e beye mo mmung, le gouta ya Ofire mo majeng a melatswana;" 
Job22:25 Mothatayotlhe e tlaa nna ene khumo ya gago le selefera sa gago se se tlhokegang. 
Job22:26 Gonne foo o tlaa inatetsha mo go Mothatayotlhe, mme o tlaa tsholeletsa Modimo sefatlhogo sa gago." 
Job22:27 O tlaa o rapela, mme o tlaa go utlwa; o tlaa lefa maikano a gago." 
Job22:28 Le gone o tlaa ikaelela sengwe, mme o tlaa se tlhomamisediwa; lesedi le tlaa phatsimela ditsela tsa gago." 
Job22:29 E tlaa re fa ba go digela fa fatshe o tlaa re: ‘Go na le bokakatlololo’; le motho yo o boikokobetso o tlaa mmoloka. 
Job22:30 O tlaa phedisa le e leng ene yo o sa tlhokeng molato; ee, o tlaa phedisiwa ka go itsheka ga diatla tsa gago.”" 
Job23:1 Foo Jobe a fetola a re: 
Job23:2 “Le gompieno boitoko jwa me bo galakegile; titeo ya me e boima bogolo go go dumaduma ga me. 
Job23:3 A bo ke ka bo ke itse kwa ke ka o fitlhelang teng, gore ke ke ke ye fela kwa sennong sa one!" 
Job23:4 Ke ne ke tlaa rulaganya mafoko a me fa pele ga one, ke tlatsa molomo wa me ka diphetolano." 
Job23:5 Ke ne ke tlaa itse mafoko a o tlaa mphetolang ka one, ke tlhaloganya se o tlaa se buang le nna." 
Job23:6 A o ne o tlaa ganela le nna ka bogolo jwa nonofo ya one? Nnyaa, o ne o tlaa ntlhokomela." 
Job23:7 Foo mothokgami o ne a tlaa tseisanya kgang nao; jalo ke ne ke tlaa gololwa ka bosakhutleng mo moatlhoding wa me. 
Job23:8 Bona, ke tle ke ye kwa pele, mme ga o gone; le kwa morago, mme ga nkake ka o lemoga;" 
Job23:9 le ka fa go la molema, mogang o dirang tiro, mme ke retelelwe ke go o bona; o itshube ka fa ntlheng ya le legolo, ke be ke retelelwe ke go o bona." 
Job23:10 O itse tsela e ke e tsayang; e tlaa re o sena go nteka, ke tswe jaaka gouta." 
Job23:11 Lonao lwa me lo tshwaretse ruri dikgato tsa one; ke tseetse ruri tsela ya one ke sa e fapoge. 
Job23:12 Ga ke a boa mo ditaolong tsa dipounama tsa one; ke bolokile mafoko a molomo wa one bogolo go dijo tse ke tshelang ka tsone. 
Job23:13 One o na le boitlhomo bo le bongwe fela, mme e mang yo o ka o faposang? Se mowa wa one o se eletsang, o dira sone fela." 
Job23:14 Gonne o dirafatsa se ke se laoletsweng; dilo di le dintsi tse di ntseng jalo o na natso. 
Job23:15 Ke gone ka moo ke huduiwang ke sebonalo sa one; ke re ke akanya, ke be ke o boife." 
Job23:16 Gonne Modimo o idibaditse pelo ya me, Mothatayotlhe o mphuduile;" 
Job23:17 Ka gobo ke se ka ka kgaolwa pele ga lefifi, le gone ga o a ka wa sirela sefatlhogo sa me lefifi le lentsho." 
Job24:1 “Ana ke go reng, ka dipaka di sa fitlhegela Mothatayotlhe, bone ba ba mo itseng ga ba boneleng metlha ya gagwe?" 
Job24:2 Go na le ba ba sutisang melelwane; ba gape matsomane ka thata, ba a hudise." 
Job24:3 Ba gapele koo esela ya lesiela, ba tseye kgomo ya mosadi wa motlholagadi ba e ntshe peelo." 
Job24:4 Ba fapose batlhoki mo tseleng; bahumanegi ba lefatshe ba iphitlhe mmogo. 
Job24:5 Bonang, bone ba tswele kwa tirong ya bone jaaka diesela tsa naga, ba batlhe kotlo ka tlhoafalo; naga e ba ntshetse dijo tsa bana ba bone." 
Job24:6 Ba ikgele morogo mo nageng; ba ronope tshimo ya mofine ya moikepi. 
Job24:7 Ba lale fela ba sa ikatega, ba se na dikobo, ba bile ba se na seaparo mo serameng." 
Job24:8 Ba kolobe ka marothodi a kwa dithabeng, ba tlamparele lefika ka go tlhoka boitshubelo." 
Job24:9 Go na le ba ba phamolang lesiela mo letseleng, mme ba tseye peelo mo bahumaneging;" 
Job24:10 ba bo ba tle ba tsamaye ba sa ikatega ba se na diaparo, mme e re ka ba le tlala, ba rore dingata tsa mabele;" 
Job24:11 ba dire lookwane mo teng ga dithako tsa batho ba; ba gate dikgatisetso tsa bone tsa bojalwa jwa mofine, mme ba bolawe ke lenyora." 
Job24:12 Batho ba dumadume ba le mo motseng o montsi, mowa wa ba ba ntshitsweng dintho o kgajajege; le fa go ntse jalo Modimo ga o go ba kaele go re ke boatla." 
Job24:13 Ba ke ba bone ba ba tsuololelang lesedi; ga ba itse ditsela tsa lone, le gone ga ba nne mo ditselaneng tsa lone." 
Job24:14 Mmolai wa batho o tsoga boo sa, a bolaye bahumanegi le batlhoki; bosigo a nne jaaka legodu." 
Job24:15 Le leitlho la mogokafadi le tle le lebelele lotlatlana, a re: ‘Ga go leitlho lepe le le tlaa mponang;’ mme a ikgakise sefatlhogo." 
Job24:16 E re go le lefifi ba phunye mantlo; mme motshegare ba itswalele; ga ba itse lesedi. 
Job24:17 Gonne mo go bone botlhe moso o ntse jaaka moriti wa loso; gonne ba itse ditherego tsa moriti wa loso.” 
Job24:18 “A fefogele koo mo godimo ga metsi; kabelo ya bone e hutsegile mo lefatsheng; ga a menoge ka tsela ya masimo a mafine. 
Job24:19 Letsatsi le mogote di fedisa metsi a kapoko; Bobipo o direla jalo ba ba leofileng. 
Job24:20 Sebopelo se tlaa mo lebala; seboko se tlaa mo ja botshe; ga a ketla a tlhola a gakologelwa; mme tshiamololo e tlaa rojwa jaaka setlhare. 
Job24:21 O a tle a je a swetse moopa yo o sa tsaleng; ga a direle mosadi wa motlholagadi molemo. 
Job24:22 Diganka le tsone a di gogele koo ka thata ya gagwe; a nanoge mme go bo go se na ope yo o itlhomamisetsang botshelo. 
Job24:23 Modimo o ba neye go nna thagamong, mme ba ikaega gone. Mme matlho a one a mo ditseleng tsa bone." 
Job24:24 Ba goletsegile, le fa go ntse jalo, e re kgantele ba bo ba bile ba ile; ee, ba kokobeditswe, ba tlositswe mo tseleng jaaka ba bangwe botlhe fela, mme ba kgaolwe jaaka dintlha tsa diako tsa mabele." 
Job24:25 Fa go sa nna jalo jaanong, e mang yo o tlaa ntlhomamisang go re ke moaki, mme a dire puo ya me go re e nne e seng sepe?”" 
Job25:1 Foo ga fetola Biletate wa Mošuhe, a re:" 
Job25:2 “Puso le poitsho di na le one; o dira kagiso mo mafelong a one a a godimo. 
Job25:3 A go na le palo ya dintwa tsa one? Lesedi la one ga le tlhabele mang? 
Job25:4 Mme e le foo motho a ka nna tshiamo jang fa pele ga Modimo? Yo o tsetsweng ke mosadi o ka itsheka jang? 
Job25:5 Bona, le e leng kgwedi ga e na phatsimo, le dinaledi ga di a itsheka mo ponong ya one!" 
Job25:6 Bogolo jang motho yo e leng seboko, le morwa motho yo e leng seboko fela!”" 
Job26:1 Foo Jobe a fetola a re: 
Job26:2 “Ana o thusitse jang ene yo o se nang thata! Ana o bolokile jang letsogo le le se nang nonofo! 
Job26:3 Ana o gakolotse jang ene yo o se nang botlhale, wa ba wa bolela ka botlalo kitso ya mmaanete!" 
Job26:4 O kakanyeditse mang mafoko? Mme go dule mowa wa ga mang mo go wena?” 
Job26:5 “Ba ba suleng ba roroma fa tlase ga metsi le tse di agileng mo go one. 
Job26:6 Bobipo ga bo a ikatega fa pele ga one, le Molete wa Tshenyegelo ga o na sebipo." 
Job26:7 O phuthololela botsheka kwa sebakeng se se lolea fela, o lepeletse lefatshe kwa go seng sepe." 
Job26:8 O bofelele metsi mo marung a one a a kwenneng; mme leru ga le phanyege tlase ga one. 
Job26:9 O sireletse ponalo ya setulo sa one sa bogosi, o ale leru la one mo go sone." 
Job26:10 O radile molelwane mo godimo ga metsi, go ya dikhutlong tsa lesedi le lefifi kwa di kopanelang teng." 
Job26:11 Maotwana a legodimo a reketle, a gakgamale ka kgalemelo ya one." 
Job26:12 O hudue lewatle ka thata ya one, mme o phololetse Moikgogomosi ka tlhaloganyo ya one." 
Job26:13 Magodimo a kgabisiwa ka mowa wa one; seatla sa one se tlhabile noga e e fefogang. 
Job26:14 Bonang, mo ke kwa dintlhaneng fela ga ditsela tsa one; mme re utlwa ka phofonyetso e nnye jang ka ga one! Go duma ga nonofo ya one e mang yo o ka go tlhaloganyang?”" 
Job27:1 Jobe a ba a tloga gape a tlhaba seane sa gagwe, a re:" 
Job27:2 “Jaaka Modimo o tshedile, o o ntloseditseng tshiamelo ya me; le Mothatayotlhe yo o tshwentseng mowa wa me:" 
Job27:3 (Gonne botshelo jwa me bo sa ntse bo itekanetse mo go nna le mowa wa Modimo o mo dinkong tsa me); 
Job27:4 ruri dipounama tsa me ga di kake tsa bua tshiamololo, le loleme lwa me ga lo ketla lo bua tsietso." 
Job27:5 A go nne kgakala le nna fa nka lo siamisa; ga nketla ke itlosa thokgamo ya me, go ba ke tla ke swa." 
Job27:6 Tshiamo ya me ke e tshwaretse ruri, ga nketla ke e lesa; ke tlaa re ke sa ntse ke tshedile, pelo ya me ga e ketla e nkgoba." 
Job27:7 A mmaba wa me a nne jaaka baikepi, le gone a yo o ntsogologelang a nne jaaka basiamolodi." 
Job27:8 Gonne tsholofelo ya yo o sa reng Modimo sepe ke eng, le fa a bona papadi mogang Modimo o tlosang mowa wa gagwe?" 
Job27:9 A Modimo o tlaa utlwa go goa ga gagwe monna yo, fa pitlagano e tla mo go ene?" 
Job27:10 A o tlaa inatetshetsa Mothatayotlhe, a biletsa kwa Modimong ka metlha yotlhe?" 
Job27:11 Ke tlaa lo ruta ka ga letsogo la Modimo; se se kwa go ene Mothatayotlhe ga nketla ke se loba. 
Job27:12 Bonang, lona lotlhe ka losi lo se bonye; ke ka ntlha yang lo ithamaketse ruri?”" 
Job27:13 “E ke yone kabelo ya moikepi mo Modimong, le boswa jwa bapatiki jo ba bo amogelang mo go Mothatayotlhe." 
Job27:14 Fa bana ba gagwe ba ntsifala, e be e le ba ntsifalela tšhaka fela; lotsalo lwa gagwe ga lo ketla lo kgora dijo." 
Job27:15 Ba gagwe ba ba setseng ba tlaa fitlhwa mo losong, batlholagadi ba gagwe ga ba ketla ba dira khutsafalo." 
Job27:16 Le fa a ka koa selefera jaaka lorole, a ba a baakanya diaparo jaaka seretse;" 
Job27:17 o ka di baakanya fela, mme basiami ba tlaa di apara, le ba ba se nang molato ba tlaa kgaogana selefera." 
Job27:18 O aga ntlo ya gagwe jaaka serurubele, le jaaka loobo lo moleti o lo agang." 
Job27:19 O itelega a humile, mme e be e le lwa bofelo; a budulole matlho, mme a ba a seyo." 
Job27:20 Ditherego di mo tshware jaaka metsi; ledimo la phefo le mo utswe bosigo. 
Job27:21 Phefo ya botlhabatsatsi e mo kgopholele koo, mme a tloge; e mo feele, a tloge mo felong ga gagwe." 
Job27:22 Gonne Modimo o tlaa mo hureetsa, mme o se ke o rekegele; o ka rata a ka bo a tshaba a tswa mo seatleng sa one." 
Job27:23 Batho ba tlaa mo opela diatla, ba mo otsa, ba mo ntsha felong ga gagwe." 
Job28:1 “Ruri go na le motlobo wa selefera, le felo ga gouta e ba e itshekisang." 
Job28:2 Tshipi e ntshiwa mo mmung, le kgotlho e ntshiwa mo boraleng ka go tlhapolosiwa." 
Job28:3 Motho o anola lefifi, a kheleisetse kwa molelwaneng wa bofelo, a senka maje a lefifi le lentsho le a moriti wa loso." 
Job28:4 Ba tle ba phunyetse morafo kgakala le kwa batho ba ntseng gone; ba lebalwe ke lonao lwa mofeti, ba lepelele ba le kgakala le batho, ba akgaakgegele kwa le kwa." 
Job28:5 Ka ga lefatshe dijo di tswa mo go lone; le huhumelwe le pitikololwe jaaka ekete ka molelo. 
Job28:6 Maje a lone ke felo ga majana a disafira, mme go bapalwe dikgolokwe tsa gouta." 
Job28:7 Tsela eo ga e itsiwe ke letlaka lepe, le leitlho la malelakokwane ga le ise le e bone;" 
Job28:8 dibatana tse di kokorogang ga di ise di e gate, le tau e e bogale ga e ise e fete ka gone." 
Job28:9 O ntshetsa seatla mo lefikeng le le legweka; a pitikolole dithaba kwa meding. 
Job28:10 A arole mesima mo gare ga mafika, leitlho la gagwe le bone sengwe le sengwe se se tlhokegang." 
Job28:11 O thiba dikelelo gore di se rothe; se se subegileng a se ntshetse kwa leseding. 
Job28:12 Ana mme botlhale jone bo tlaa bonwa kae? Le felo ga tlhaloganyo ke kae? 
Job28:13 Motho ga a itse tlhwatlhwa ya lone, le gone ga bo bonwe mo lefatsheng la batshedi." 
Job28:14 Boteng bo a re: ‘Ga bo yo mo go nna:’ lewatle le a re: ‘Ga ke na najo.’ 
Job28:15 Ga bo kake jwa bonwa ka gouta le gone selefera ga se ketla se lekanyediwa tlhwatlhwa ya lone. 
Job28:16 Ga bo kake jwa kaelwa tlhwatlhwa ka gouta ya Ofire, le fa e le ka šohama e e tlhokegang, kgotsa ka safire." 
Job28:17 Gouta le galase ga di kake tsa bo lekana; le gone dilo tse di tlaa bo ananyang e tlaa bo e se mekgabo ya gouta e e itshekileng. 
Job28:18 Korale le legakwa ga di ketla di umakwa; ee, tlhwatlhwa ya botlhale e feta ya borube." 
Job28:19 Topase ya Ethiopia ga e ketla e bo lekana, le gone ga bo ketla bo lekanngwa tlhwatlhwa ka gouta e e itshekileng." 
Job28:20 Mme e le foo botlhale bo tswa kae? Le felo ga tlhaloganyo ke kae? 
Job28:21 Etswe bo subetswe matlho a batshedi botlhe, bo bipetswe dinonyane tsa loapi." 
Job28:22 Molete wa Tshenyegelo le Loso ba re: ‘Re utlwile tumedi ya jone ka ditsebe.’ 
Job28:23 Modimo o tlhalogantse tsela ya jone, o itse bonno jwa jone." 
Job28:24 Gonne o lebile kwa dikhutlong tsa lefatshe, o bona fa tlase ga legodimo lotlhe fela;" 
Job28:25 go direla phefo selekanyo sa bokete; ee, o lekanya metsi ka selekanyo." 
Job28:26 E rile o direla pula molao, le logadima lwa maru tsela;" 
Job28:27 foo wa bo bona, wa bo kakanya; wa bo tlhomamisa, ee, wa bo tlhotlhomisa." 
Job28:28 Wa raya motho wa re: ‘Bona, go boifa Morena ke jone botlhale; le go kgaogana le bosula ke yone tlhaloganyo.’ ”" 
Job29:1 Mme Jobe a fela a tlhaba seane sa gagwe, a re:" 
Job29:2 “A bo ke ka bo ke ntse jaaka mo dikgweding tsa bogologolo, jaaka mo malatsing a Modimo o ntisitseng ka one;" 
Job29:3 ka lampa ya one wa mphatsimela mo tlhogong, mme ka tsamaya ka lesedi la one;" 
Job29:4 jaaka ke ne ke le mo nonofong ya malatsi a me, jaaka ka tsalano ya Modimo e le mo mogopeng wa me;" 
Job29:5 ka Mothatayotlhe a sa ntse a na le nna, le bana ba me ba le tikologong ya me;" 
Job29:6 ka dikgato tsa me di ne di tlhapisiwa ka madila a maši, mme lefika la nthelela dinoka tsa lookwane!" 
Job29:7 E ne e tle e re ke tswela kwa kgotleng kwa motseng, e re ke baakanya setulo sa me mo mmileng," 
Job29:8 makau a ne a tle a re a mpona a iphitlhe, le banna bagolo ba nanoge ba eme ka dinao;" 
Job29:9 dikgosana di khutle go bua, di ipeye seatla mo molomong;" 
Job29:10 lentswe la bagolwane le tuulale, le loleme lwa bone lo ngaparele magalapa a bone." 
Job29:11 Gonne e ne e tle e re tsebe e nkutlwa, foo e ntshegofatse; e re leitlho le mpona, le supe ga me;" 
Job29:12 gonne ke ne ke pholosa mohumanegi yo o goelelang, le lesiela le le se nang ope yo o le thusang." 
Job29:13 Tshegofatso ya yo o batlileng go nyelela ya tla mo go nna; pelo ya mosadi wa motlholagadi ka e ipedisa ka boitumelo. 
Job29:14 Ka apara tshiamo, mme ya nkapesa; tekatekanyo ya me e ne e ntse jaaka kobo le tlhoro ya bogosi." 
Job29:15 Ke ne ke le matlho a difofu, ke le dinao tsa batlhotsi." 
Job29:16 Ke ne ke le rra batlhoki; ka ba ka tlhotlhomisa mafoko a tsheko a yo ke sa mo itseng. 
Job29:17 Ka roba ditlhaya tsa mosiamolodi, ka phamola thopo mo menong a gagwe." 
Job29:18 Foo ka re ke tlaa swela mo setlhageng sa me, ke tlaa ntsifatsa malatsi a me a nna jaaka mošawa." 
Job29:19 Modi wa me o anametse kwa metsing, monyo o lala o le mo kaleng ya me bosigo jotlhe." 
Job29:20 Borena jwa me bo ntse boša mo go nna, bora jwa me bo šafetse mo seatleng sa me." 
Job29:21 Batho ba ne ba tle ba ntshekegele tsebe, ba lebelele, ba didimalele kgakololo ya me." 
Job29:22 E re morago ga mafoko a me ba se ke ba tlhole ba bua; mme puo ya me ya ba rothela. 
Job29:23 Ba ne ba ntebelela jaaka go lebelelwa pula; ba atlhamolosa legano thata jaaka ekete go na pula ya kgogolammoko. 
Job29:24 Fa ke ne ke ba tshega ba se ke ba go dumele; le go sa ga matlho a me ba se ke ba go tlhontshe. 
Job29:25 Ka ba senkela tsela ya bone, mme ka nna tlhogo, ka ba ka aga jaaka kgosi mo ntweng, jaaka mongwe yo o gomotsang bahutsafadi.”" 
Job30:1 “Mme gompieno ba babotlana mo go nna ba a ntshotla, ba borraabo ke rileng ke sa kake ka ba baya le fa e le le dintša tsa letsomane la me." 
Job30:2 Ee, nonofo ya diatla tsa bone, ana e ne e tlaa nthusang, ka e le batho ba ba feletsweng ke thata ya bone?" 
Job30:3 Ba bodumisiwa ke borole le leuba; ba kome mmu o o omeletseng mo phifalong ya kgakgabalo le tshwafalo. 
Job30:4 Ba epe ditshuga mo ditlhareng; motlopi ke dijo tsa bone. 
Job30:5 Ba lelekwe mo bathong; ba ba goelele jaaka e le legodu. 
Job30:6 Ba na le go aga mo dipharong tsa megogoro, mo mesimeng ya lefatshe le mo dikgageng." 
Job30:7 Ba tle ba goe ba le mo ditlhareng; ba kokoanele mo dikhing. 
Job30:8 Ke bana ba dieleele, ee, ke bana ba batho ba ba se nang maina; ba kile ba lelekwa ka thupa mo lefatsheng." 
Job30:9 Jaanong nna ke dule sefela mo go bone, ee, ke lefoko la tshotlo mo go bone." 
Job30:10 Ke ba kgaphafaletse, ba nkemela kgakala, ga ba rekegele go kgwa mathe fa ba mpona." 
Job30:11 Gonne ba repisitse mogala wa bone, ba nkutlwisitse botlhoko, ba latlhile mogala wa nko fa pele ga me." 
Job30:12 Ka fa ntlheng ya letsogo le legolo ga me go tsoga ba e leng dirothola fela; ba kgorometsa dinao tsa me, ba ntsosetse ditsela tsa bone tsa tshenyo." 
Job30:13 Ba senya tsela ya me ba ise tatlhego ya me kwa pele, e le batho ba ba se nang mothusi." 
Job30:14 Ba a tla, ba tsene jaaka ekete ka phatlha e e atlhameng, mo gare ga mekoakoa ba ipitikololele mo go nna." 
Job30:15 Ditherego di menogetse mo go nna, di leleka tlotlo ya me jaaka phefo; go aga sentle ga me go kaologile jaaka leru." 
Job30:16 Jaana mowa wa me o tshologile mo teng ga me; malatsi a pitlagano a ntshwere. 
Job30:17 Mo bosigong marapo a me a nyerega mo teng ga me, metlotsedi e e mphurang ga e ikhutse." 
Job30:18 Seaparo sa me se ntlafolotswe ke thata e kgolo ya bolwetse jwa me, se a mpofa jaaka thamo ya hempe ya me." 
Job30:19 O ntatlhetse mo maragarageng, ke fetogile ke ntse jaaka lorole le molora." 
Job30:20 Ke goela koo go wena, mme ga o nkarabe; ke a ema, mme o nteba fela." 
Job30:21 O fetogile o ntse bolalome mo go nna, o mpogisa ka thata ya letsogo la gago." 
Job30:22 O ntsholeletsa mo phefong, o mpalamisa mo godimo ga yone; mme o nkakgela mo sefefong." 
Job30:23 Gonne ke a itse fa o tlaa nkisa mo losong le mo ntlong e e laoletsweng batshedi botlhe. 
Job30:24 “Ruri wa bo o se ketla o ntshetsa yo o leng mokoa fela wa borope letsogo la one; le fa e ka bo e le mo tshenyegong ya gagwe, motho o ka lela fela ka ntlha ya dilo tse." 
Job30:25 A ga ke a lelela ene yo o ne a le mo pitlaganong? A mowa wa me o ne o sa hutsafalele motlhoki? 
Job30:26 E rile ke lebeletse molemo, foo ga tla bosula; e rile ke letile lesedi, ga tla lefifi." 
Job30:27 Mala a me a a bela, ga a ikhutse; malatsi a pitlagano a tsile mo go nna." 
Job30:28 Ke ntshofetse mme e seng ka letsatsi; ke ema ka dinao mo phuthegong ke goela thuso. 
Job30:29 Ke ngwana wa rraabo bophokoje, ke monkana wa bontšhe." 
Job30:30 Letlalo la me le lentsho, le wa mo go nna, marapo a me a fisiwa ke mogote." 
Job30:31 Ke gone ka moo harepe ya me e fetogile khutsafalo, le lotlhaka lwa me lo fetogile lentswe la batho ba ba lelang.”" 
Job31:1 “Ke ne ka dira kgolagano le matlho a me, jalo ke ne ke ka leba mosetsana jang?" 
Job31:2 Gonne kabo ya Modimo e e tswang godimong ke eng, le se Mothatayotlhe o se abang boswa jo bo tswang bogodimong ke eng?" 
Job31:3 A ga se tatlhego ya basiamolodi, le go ya setime ga badiri ba boikepo?" 
Job31:4 A ga a bone ditsela tsa me, a ba a bala dikgato tsotlhe tsa me?" 
Job31:5 “Fa ke sepetse ka boithamako, fa lonao lwa me lo akofetse mo tsietsong;" 
Job31:6 (a ke lekanngwe mo selekanyong sa pego se se lekalekanyeng, gore Modimo o tlo o itse thokgamo ya me);" 
Job31:7 fa kgato ya me e fapogile tsela, fa pelo ya me e setse matlho a me morago, fa setshubaba sengwe se ngaparetse diatla tsa me," 
Job31:8 foo a ke jale, mme go je o sele; ee, a ditotafalo tsa tshimo ya me di mumulwe." 
Job31:9 “Fa pelo ya me e kile ya fepisiwa ke mosadi, fa ke laletse fa kgorong ya wa gaetsho;" 
Job31:10 foo a mosadi wa me a silele o sele, mme ba bangwe ba obame mo go ene." 
Job31:11 Gonne moo e ne e tlaa nna mathamo; ee, e tlaa nna boikepo jwa go bediwa ke baatlhodi;" 
Job31:12 gonne ke molelo o o lailelang kwa Tshenyegong, e le o o neng o tlaa mumula totafalelo ya me yotlhe fela." 
Job31:13 “Fa e rile motlhanka wa me, le fa e le lelata la me, ba ganela le nna ka nyatsa mafoko a bone;" 
Job31:14 foo ke tlaa dirang mogang Modimo o nanogang? Mogang o sekisang ke tlaa o fetola ke reng? 
Job31:15 Yo o ntirileng mo sebopelong a ga a a mo dira le ene? A ga re a bopiwa roo babedi ke a le mongwe fela mo sebopelong? 
Job31:16 “Fa ke ganne ka sengwe se mohumanegi o ne a se eletsa, kgotsa ka tlhaedisa matlho a mosadi wa motlholagadi;" 
Job31:17 kgotsa fa ke jele thathanyana ya me ke le nosi, mme lesiela le se ka la ja ga yone;" 
Job31:18 (nnyaa, e sa le ka bokau jwa me, le ntse le gola fela le nna, jaaka ke ka bo ke le rraalo; ene ke sa le ke nna mogogi wa gagwe go tswa sebopelong sa ga mme);" 
Job31:19 fa ke bonye mongwe a swa ka go tlhoka diaparo, kgotsa motlhoki a se na kobo;" 
Job31:20 fa ditheka tsa gagwe di se ka tsa ntshegofatsa, fa a se ka a thuthafadiwa ka bobowa jwa dinku tsa me;" 
Job31:21 fa ke tsholeleditse lesiela letsogo la me go le senya, ka gobo ke bona thuso ya me kwa kgotleng," 
Job31:22 foo a lerudi la me le we mo legetleng, letsogo la me le komolwe mo lesapong." 
Job31:23 Gonne tatlhego e e tswang mo Modimong e ne e le theregiso mo go nna mme ka ntlha ya tlotlomalo ya one ke ne ke sa nonofa go dira sepe. 
Job31:24 “Fa ke dirile gouta tsholofelo ya me, mme ka raya gouta e e itshekileng ka re: ‘O boikanyo jwa me;’" 
Job31:25 fa ke itumetse ka gobo khumo ya me e le kgolo, le ka gobo seatla sa me se bapetse thata;" 
Job31:26 fa ke lebile letsatsi ka le phatsima, kgotsa kgwedi ka e tsamaya mo bophatsimong;" 
Job31:27 fa pelo ya me e fepisiwa ka bosaitsiweng, le molomo wa me wa atla seatla sa me," 
Job31:28 moo le gone e ne e tlaa nna boikepo jwa go bediwa ke baatlhodi; gonne ke tlaa bo ke akeditse Modimo o o kwa godimo. 
Job31:29 “Fa ke itumeletse tshenyego ya yo o nkilang, kgotsa ka ikgoletsa kwa godimo fa bosula bo mo tshwere;" 
Job31:30 (ee, ga ke a ka ka leseletsa molomo wa me go leofa ka go lopa ka phutso gore a swe);" 
Job31:31 fa batho ba mogope wa me ba se ka ba re: ‘E mang yo o ka bonang mongwe yo o sa kgorang dijo tsa gagwe?’ 
Job31:32 Moeng ga a ka a lala mo mmileng, mme ka bulela motsamai ditswalo tsa me;" 
Job31:33 fa ke editse Atame ka bipa ditlolo tsa me, ka loba boikepo jwa me mo sehubeng sa me," 
Job31:34 ka gobo ke ne ke boifa bontsi jo bogolo, fa lonyatso lwa ba makgotla lo lwa ntheregisa ka ba ka tla ka didimala, ke se ka ka tswela kwa ntle ga ntlo;" 
Job31:35 a bo ke ka bo ke na le mongwe yo o nkutlwang! (Bona, go ikwala ga me ke mo, a Mothatayotlhe a mphetole); mme ka nna le lokwalo lo lo mpayang molato, lo moganetsi wa me o lo kwadileng!" 
Job31:36 Ruri ke ne ke tlaa lo sikara mo leruding la me; ke ne ke tlaa lo bofelela mo go nna jaaka serwalo sa tlhogo. 
Job31:37 Ke ne ke tlaa mo kakanyetsa palo ya dikgato tsa me, ke ne ke tlaa mo atamela jaaka kgosana." 
Job31:38 Fa lefatshe la me le goa ka ga me, le meralo ya lone e lela mmogo;" 
Job31:39 fa ke jele maungo a lone e seng ka madi, kgotsa ke gonotse mowa wa beng ba lone," 
Job31:40 a sitlasitlwane e tlhoge mo boemong jwa mabele le mofero mo boemong jwa mmidi.” Mafoko a ga Jobe a fedile. 
Job32:1 Jalo banna ba bararo bao ba khutla go fetola Jobe, ka a ipona a le tshiamo." 
Job32:2 Foo ga tuka bogale jwa ga Elihu morwa Barakele wa Mobusa, wa losika lwa ga Rame; bogale jwa gagwe jwa tukela Jobe, ka a itshiamisa bogolo go Modimo." 
Job32:3 Gape bogale jwa gagwe jwa tukela ditsala tsa gagwe tse tharo, ka ba se ka ba bona phetolo, le fa go ntse jalo ba sekisitse Jobe." 
Job32:4 Jaana Elihu o ne a letile lobaka lwa go bua le Jobe, ka ba le bagolo mo go ene." 
Job32:5 E rile Elihu a bona fa go se na phetolo mo melomong ya banna ba bararo bao, bogale jwa gagwe jwa tuka." 
Job32:6 Elihu morwa Barakele wa Mobusa a bua a re: “Nna ke lekau, mme lona lo bagologolo; ke gone ka moo ka ikefa, ka boifa go lo bontsha mogopolo wa me." 
Job32:7 Ka re: ‘Go ko go bua malatsi, le bontsi jwa dinyaga bo tshwanetse go ruta batho botlhale.’" 
Job32:8 Mme mowa o gone mo mothong, le go budula ga Mothatayotlhe go tle go ba neye tlhaloganyo." 
Job32:9 Ba batona ga se bone ba ba botlhale, le fa e le batsofe ba ba tlhaloganyang katlholo." 
Job32:10 Ke gone ke rileng: ‘Ntheetsang; le nna ke tlaa lo bontsha mogopolo wa me.’ 
Job32:11 “Bonang, ka lebelela mafoko a lona, ka reetsa ditharabololo tsa lona, ka lo no lo fophola se lo tlaa se buang." 
Job32:12 Ee, ka lo ela tlhoko, mme go ne go se ope yo o kgonneng Jobe, kgotsa yo o fetotseng mafoko a gagwe mo go lona." 
Job32:13 Lo itise, e se re kgotsa lwa re: ‘Re bonye botlhale; Modimo o ka mo fenya, e seng motho;’" 
Job32:14 gonne mafoko a gagwe ga a ka a a ntebisa go nnyatsa; le gone ga nketla ke mo fetola ka dipolelo tsa lona. 
Job32:15 Ba tseanye, ga ba tlhole ba fetola, ga ba na lefoko lepe le ba le buang." 
Job32:16 A ke tlaa ba leta, ka ba sa bue, ka ba eme fela ba sa tlhole ba fetola?" 
Job32:17 Le nna ke tlaa fetola ntlheng ya me, le nna ke tlaa ntsha mogopolo wa me." 
Job32:18 Gonne ke kgotshe mafoko; mowa o o mo teng ga me wa mpatelela. 
Job32:19 Bonang, mpa ya me e tshwana jaaka bojalwa jwa mofine jo bo se nang botso; jaaka mefalo e meša, e batlile go phanyega." 
Job32:20 Ke tlaa bua, gore ke sehumole, ke tlaa tumolola dipounama tsa me ke fetola." 
Job32:21 Ke a go rapela, o se ka wa ntesa ka gobela ope; le gone ga nketla ke raya motho ope maina a a hakang;" 
Job32:22 gonne ga ke itse go raya batho maina a a hakang, Mmopi wa me o ne a ka tla a ntlosa ka bonako." 
Job33:1 “Le fa go ntse jalo wena Jobe, ke a go rapela, utlwa puo ya me, o reetse mafoko a me otlhe." 
Job33:2 Bona jaana, ke tumolotse molomo wa me, loleme lwa me lo buile mo ganong la me." 
Job33:3 Mantswe a me a tlaa kakanya thokgamo ya pelo ya me; se dipounama tsa me di se itseng di tlaa se bua ka bophepa. 
Job33:4 Mowa wa Modimo o ntirile, go budula ga Mothatayotlhe go a ntshedisa." 
Job33:5 Fa o nonofile, o tle o mphetole; o rulaganye mafoko a gago; ema fa pele ga me!" 
Job33:6 Bona, nna ke ntlheng ya Modimo, fela jaaka wena; le nna ke bopilwe ka letsopa." 
Job33:7 Bona, theregiso ya me ga e ketla e go boifisa, le gone ga o ketla o imelesega ka kgatelelo ya me." 
Job33:8 “Ruri o buile mo kutlong ya me, ke utlwile lentswe la mafoko a gago, wa re:" 
Job33:9 ‘Ke itshekile, ke se na tlolo; ke phepa fela, le gone ga go na boikepo mo go nna." 
Job33:10 Bona, o bona dikgopi mo go nna, o nkaya go re ke mmaba wa one;" 
Job33:11 o tsenya dinao tsa me mo disaneng, o tlhokometse ditselana tsotlhe tsa me.’" 
Job33:12 Bona, ke tlaa go fetola mo go se, ga o a siama; gonne Modimo o mogolo bogolo go motho." 
Job33:13 Ana o ganelelang le one, gonne ga o ke o ipolelela mo dilong dipe tsa one?" 
Job33:14 Gonne Modimo o bua gangwe fela, ee gabedi, le fa motho a sa go tlhokomele." 
Job33:15 E re mo torong, mo ponatshegelong ya bosigo, fa thulamelo e kgolo e wela batho mo borokong mo bolaong;" 
Job33:16 foo o kabolole batho ditsebe, o kanele thuto mo go tsone." 
Job33:17 Gore o tlose motho mo boikaelelong jwa gagwe, le go subela motho boikgodiso;" 
Job33:18 o thiba mowa wa gagwe, gore o se ye mo moleteng, le botshelo jwa gagwe gore a se swe ka tšhaka." 
Job33:19 Le gone o otlhaiwa ka bolwetse mo bolaong jwa gagwe, le ka tlhatlharo e e sa khutleng mo marapong a gagwe;" 
Job33:20 jalo botshelo jwa gagwe boo bo tle bo tenwe ke dijo, le mowa wa gagwe ke dijo tse di metsegang." 
Job33:21 Nama ya gagwe e tlhorege, ga e kake ya bonwa; marapo a gagwe a a neng a sa bonwe a bile a tswetse kwa ntle." 
Job33:22 Ee, mowa wa gagwe o atamela kwa moleteng, le botshelo jwa gagwe kwa disenying." 
Job33:23 Fa go na le moengele mongwe nae, e le mophutholodi, e le motho a le mongwe fela mo go ba ba sekete, gore a kaele motho se se mo siametseng;" 
Job33:24 foo o nna pelotshweu kwa go ene, mme o re: ‘Mo golole, gore a se ka a fologela mo moleteng, ke bonye thekololo.’" 
Job33:25 Nama ya gagwe e tlaa šafala bogolo go ya ngwanyana, o tlaa boela mo malatsing a bokau jwa gagwe." 
Job33:26 A rapele Modimo, mme o nne pelotshweu kwa go ene; a ba a tle a bone sefatlhogo sa one ka boitumelo; o rebolele motho tshiamo ya gagwe." 
Job33:27 A opele fa pele ga batho, a re: ‘Ke leofile, ka sokamisa sone se se siameng, mme go se ka ga nthusa sepe." 
Job33:28 O rekolotse mowa wa me gore o se ye mo moleteng, botshelo jwa me bo tlaa bona lesedi.’" 
Job33:29 Bona, dilo tsotlhe tse Modimo o a di dira, o di direla motho gabedi, ee, gararo." 
Job33:30 Go busa mowa wa gagwe mo moleteng, gore a sedifadiwe ka lesedi la batshedi." 
Job33:31 Jobe, o tlhokomele thata, o ntheetse; didimala mme ke tlaa bua." 
Job33:32 Fa o na le sengwe se o se buang o mphetole; bua, gonne ke rata go go siamisa." 
Job33:33 Fa go sa nna jalo, o reetse nna; didimala, mme ke tlaa go ruta botlhale.”" 
Job34:1 Gape Elihu a fetola, a re:" 
Job34:2 “Utlwang mafoko a me, lona matlhale; lo ntshekegele tsebe, lona ba lo nang le kitso." 
Job34:3 Gonne tsebe e leka mafoko, jaaka magalapa a leka dijo." 
Job34:4 A re itshenkeleng sone se se siameng; a re itsisanyeng se se leng molemo. 
Job34:5 Gonne Jobe o rile: ‘Ke tshiamo, mme Modimo o ntloseditse tshiamelo ya me;" 
Job34:6 e fa ke na le tshiamelo, ke kaiwa gore ke moaki fela; ntho ya me ga e na kalafi le fa ke sa leofa.’" 
Job34:7 Monna yo o tshwanang le Jobe ke mang, yo o nwang tshotlo jaaka metsi," 
Job34:8 yo o tsalanang le badiri ba boikepo, a sepela le batho ba ba bosula?" 
Job34:9 Gonne o rile: ‘Ga go thuse monna sepe fa a ka inatefisa mo Modimong.’ 
Job34:10 Ke gone, ntheetsang, lona banna ba tlhaloganyo; a go nne kgakala le Modimo, fa o ka dira bosula, le Mothatayotlhe, fa a ka dira boikepo." 
Job34:11 Gonne o tlaa lefela motho ka fa tirong ya gagwe, o tlaa dira gore motho mongwe le mongwe a bone ka fa ditseleng tsa gagwe." 
Job34:12 Ee, ruri, Modimo ga o ketla o dira ka mokgwa o o bosula, le gone Mothatayotlhe ga a ketla a sokamisa katlholo." 
Job34:13 E mang yo o mo laodisitseng lefatshe, kgotsa mang yo o baakantseng lobopo lotlhe?" 
Job34:14 Fa o tlhoma pelo ya one go itlhokomela go le gosi, o ne o tlaa iphuthela mowa wa one le botshelo jwa one fela;" 
Job34:15 foo nama yotlhe e tlaa swa mmogo, mme motho o tlaa ba a boela mo loroleng." 
Job34:16 Fa jaana o na le tlhaloganyo, o utlwe se; o reetse lentswe la mafoko a me." 
Job34:17 Le yo mongwe fela yo o ilang tshiamo a o tlaa busa? A o tlaa bona ene molato yo o tekatekanyo le nonofo? 
Job34:18 A go tshwanetse go rewa kgosi go twe: ‘O maswe,’ kgotsa batlotlegi go twe: ‘Lo bosula’?" 
Job34:19 Bogolo jang ga go a tshwanela ga rewa one jalo, o o sa tlhokomeleng sebele sa dikgosana, le o o sa gopoleng bahumi bogolo go bahumanegi, gonne botlhe ke tiro ya diatla tsa one." 
Job34:20 Ba swa ka ponyo ya leitlho, e bong mo gare ga bosigo; batho ba tle ba reketlisiwe, mme ba fete, le bathati ba tlosiwe e seng ka seatla." 
Job34:21 Gonne matlho a one a mo ditseleng tsa motho, mme o bona metsamao yotlhe ya gagwe." 
Job34:22 Ga go na lefifi le fa e le moriti wa loso kwa badiri ba boikepo ba ka itshubelang gone. 
Job34:23 Gonne Modimo ga o tlhoke go tlhola o akanya ka ga motho, fa o mo lere fa pele ga one mo tshekong." 
Job34:24 O thubaganya ba ba thata ka mekgwa e e retelang go lemogwa, o tlhome ba bangwe mo boemong jwa bone." 
Job34:25 Ke gone ka moo o tle o tseye ditiro tsa bone tsia, o ba pitikolole mo bosigong, ba be ba tle ba senngwe." 
Job34:26 O ba diteye jaaka batho ba ba bosula mo ponong e e bonalang ya ba bangwe. 
Job34:27 Ka ba o fapogile go o sala morago, ba ganne go tlhokomela ditsela dipe tsa one;" 
Job34:28 ba ba ba tla ba fitlhisa selelo sa bahumanegi kwa go one, mme o utlwe go goa ga ba ba patikwang." 
Job34:29 E re fa o iketlisa motho, ana e mang yo o ka sekisang? E re fa o itshuba sefatlhogo, ana e mang yo o ka o bonang? Le fa go direlwa morafe kgotsa go direlwa motho, go tshwana fela." 
Job34:30 Gore go se ka ga busa motho yo o sa reng Modimo sepe, le gore go se nne ope yo o beelang batho seru." 
Job34:31 “Gonne a mongwe o kile a raya Modimo a re: ‘Ke kgwathile, ga nketla ke tlhola ke senya.’" 
Job34:32 A mongwe o rile: ‘Se ke sa se boneng o se nthute, fa ke dirile boikepo, ga nketla ke tlhola ke bo dira’?" 
Job34:33 A tefiso ya one e tlaa nna ka fa go rateng ga gago, ka e le fa o e gana? Gonne ke wena yo o nang le go e itshenkela, e seng nna; ke gone bua se o se itseng." 
Job34:34 Banna ba tlhaloganyo ba tlaa nthaya, ee, monna mongwe le mongwe yo o botlhale, yo o nkutlwang; ba tlaa nthaya ba re:" 
Job34:35 ‘Jobe o bua a se na kitso, mafoko a gagwe ga a na botlhale.’" 
Job34:36 A bo Jobe a ka bo a lekelwa le go ya kwa bokhutlong, ka ntlha ya go fetola ga gagwe jaaka batho ba ba bosula ba tle ba fetole." 
Job34:37 Gonne o oketsa boleo jwa gagwe ka tsuololo, o opanya diatla mo go rona, o ntsifatsa mafoko a gagwe a go nyatsa Modimo.”" 
Job35:1 Gape Elihu a fela a fetola, a re:" 
Job35:2 “A o gopola go re se ke tshiamelo ya gago, kgotsa o ithaya o re: ‘Tshiamo ya me e feta ya Modimo,’" 
Job35:3 fa e bo ne ne o re: ‘Go tlaa nthusang?’ Gape wa re: ‘Ke tlaa bona eng bogolo go fa nka bo ke leofile?’ 
Job35:4 Ke tlaa go fetola, le bankana ba gago nao." 
Job35:5 Lelalela magodimong, o bone; leba loapi lo lo godimo bogolo go wena." 
Job35:6 Fa o leofile o a bo o o direla eng? Fa ditlolo tsa gago di ntsifetse, o a bo o o dirang?" 
Job35:7 Fa o le tshiamo, o a bo o o naya eng? Kgotsa: O a bo o amogelang mo seatleng sa gago?" 
Job35:8 Bosula jwa gago bo ka utlwisa motho yo o tshwanang nao botlhoko; tshiamo ya gago e ka thusa mongwe morwa motho. 
Job35:9 “Batho ba tle ba bokolele ka ntlha ya bontsi jwa dipatiko; ba goelele thuso ka ntlha ya letsogo la ba ba thata. 
Job35:10 Mme go bo go se na ope yo o reng: ‘O kae Modimo Modiri wa me, o o opedisang batho bosigo," 
Job35:11 o o re rutang bogolo go diphologolo tsa lefatshe, o re tlhaletsha bogolo go dinonyane tsa loapi?’" 
Job35:12 Foo ba goe, mme ga go arabe ope, ka ntlha ya boikgodiso jwa batho ba ba bosula." 
Job35:13 Ruri Modimo o a bo o se ketla o utlwa boithamako, le gone Mothatayotlhe ga a ketla a bo tlhokomela." 
Job35:14 Bogolo jang ga o ketla o utlwa fa o re ga o o bone, mafoko a a sekwang a fa pele ga one, mme o o letile." 
Job35:15 Mme jaanong, ka o se ka wa lefetsa ka bogale jwa one, le gone ka o sa tlhokomele boitelaganyo bobe;" 
Job35:16 ke gone ka moo Jobe o tumololang molomo wa gagwe ka boithamako; o ntsifatsa mafoko a se na kitso.” 
Job36:1 Le gone Elihu a tswelela pele, a re:" 
Job36:2 “Ntesa go le gonnye, mme ke tlaa go kaela; gonne ke sa na le sengwe se ke se buang ntlheng ya Modimo." 
Job36:3 Ke tlaa ya go tsaya kitso ya me kgakala, ke tlaa kaela Modiri wa me tshiamo." 
Job36:4 Gonne ruri mafoko a me ga se a maaka; mongwe yo o itekanetseng mo kitsong o na nao. 
Job36:5 Bona, Modimo o nonofile, ga o nyatse ope; o thata mo nonofong ya tlhaloganyo." 
Job36:6 Ga o boloke botshelo jwa ba ba bosula; mme o naya ba ba patikwang tshiamelo ya bone. 
Job36:7 Ga o tlose matlho a one mo basiaming; mme o ba baya le dikgosi mo setulong sa bogosi ka bosakhutleng, mme ba goletsege." 
Job36:8 Fa ba golegwa ka dikeetane, ba ba ba tshwarwa ka megala ya patiko;" 
Job36:9 foo o ba supetse tiro ya bone le ditlolo tsa bone fa ba dirile ka boikgodiso. 
Job36:10 Gape o kabololele thuto tsebe ya bone, o laole gore ba bowe mo boikepong." 
Job36:11 Fa ba reetsa, ba o direla, ba tlaa fetisa malatsi a bone mo tlhogonolofalong le dinyaga tsa bone mo monateng." 
Job36:12 Mme fa ba sa reetse, ba tlaa nyelela ka tšhaka, ba tlaa swa go se na kitso." 
Job36:13 Bone ba ba sa reng Modimo sepe mo pelong ba kokotletsa bogale; ga ba goele thuso fa o ba bofa. 
Job36:14 Ba tle ba swe mo bokaung, botshelo jwa bone bo felele mo go ba ba itshekologileng." 
Job36:15 O golola ba ba patikwang ka patiko ya bone; o kabolole ditsebe tsa bone ka pogiso. 
Job36:16 Ee, o ne a tlaa bo a go ntshitse mo patikegong, a go isa felong fa go atlhameng, kwa go se nang pitlagano gone; mme se se bewang mo lomating lwa gago lwa bojelo se ne se tlaa tlala mahura." 
Job36:17 “Mme o tletse tshekiso ya baikepi; tshekiso le tekatekanyo di go tshwere. 
Job36:18 E re ka go na le bogale, o itise gore o se ka wa timediwa ke boikgantsho jwa gago; le gone, a bogolo jwa thekololo bo se go fapose." 
Job36:19 A dikhumo tsa gago di tlaa lekana, gore o se nne mo patikegong, kgotsa dithata tsotlhe tsa nonofo ya gago?" 
Job36:20 O se ka wa eletsa bosigo, e le lobaka lwa batho go kgaolwa mo bonnong jwa bone." 
Job36:21 O itise, o se ka wa tlhokomela boikepo, gonne o itshenketse jone bogolo go patikego." 
Job36:22 Bona, Modimo o dira ka bogodi mo thateng ya one. E mang yo e leng moruti jaaka one?" 
Job36:23 E mang yo o o laoletseng tsela ya one, kgotsa e mang yo o ka reng, o dirile tshiamololo?" 
Job36:24 “O gakologelwe go godisa tiro ya one e batho ba e opetseng. 
Job36:25 Batho botlhe ba ntse ba e lebile; motho o e bonela kgakala. 
Job36:26 Bona, Modimo o mogolo, ga re o itse; palo ya dinyaga tsa one e retela go tlhotlhomisiwa." 
Job36:27 Gonne o gogela dithothi tsa metsi godimong, tse di fetogang pula e e tswang mo mouwaneng wa one;" 
Job36:28 e loapi lo e thelang, lo e thotheletsa mo bathong ka letlotlo." 
Job36:29 Ee, a mongwe o ka tlhaloganya diphuthologo tsa maru, le tutumo ya mogope wa tsharologo wa one?" 
Job36:30 Bona, o phutholola lesedi la one tikologong ya one; o khurumetsa boteng jwa lewatle." 
Job36:31 Gonne o atlhola ditšhaba ka dilo tse; o naya batho dijo ka botlalo. 
Job36:32 O ipipa diatla tsa one ka tladi, o e laela gore e iteye fa go laotsweng." 
Job36:33 Loratla lwa yone lo bolela ka ga one, le tsone dikgomo lo a di bolelela ka ga ledimo le le tlogang le tla.”" 
Job37:1 “Se le sone pelo ya me e a se roromela, e garoge mo felong ga yone." 
Job37:2 Reetsang loratla lwa lentswe la one, le tumo e e tswang mo molomong wa one." 
Job37:3 O e dumisetse fa tlase ga legodimo lotlhe fela, le logadima lwa one o lo gadimisetse kwa dikhutlong tsa lefatshe." 
Job37:4 Morago ga lone go dume kodu; o dume ka kodu ya borena jwa one; mme ga o thibe dikgadima mogang kodu ya one e utlwalang. 
Job37:5 Modimo o duma kgakgamatso ka kodu ya one, o dira dilo tse dikgolo tse re sa kakeng ra di tlhaloganya." 
Job37:6 Gonne o tle o reye kapoko o re: ‘Na mo lefatsheng;’ le pula ya medupe, le marothodi a ya maebana a magolo." 
Job37:7 O konela seatla sa motho mongwe le mongwe; gore batho botlhe ba o ba dirileng ba go itse. 
Job37:8 Foo diphologolo le dibatana di ye mo maiphitlhong, di nne mo dikutleng tsa tsone." 
Job37:9 Ledimo le tle le tswe mo kutleng ya borwa; le serame ntlheng ya botsheka. 
Job37:10 Dikgapetla tsa metsi di abiwa ka pudulo ya Modimo; mme boatlhamo jwa metsi bo gatsediwe. 
Job37:11 Ee, o belesa leru le le kwenneng metsi; o phutholole leru la one la logadima;" 
Job37:12 le dikolosiwe ka kgoro ya one gore di tle di dire sengwe le sengwe se o se di laoletseng mo lefatsheng lotlhe le le nnwang. 
Job37:13 Le fa o di tlisitse gore di nne kwatlhao, kgotsa go thusa lefatshe la one, kgotsa ka kutlwelobotlhoko." 
Job37:14 “Jobe, a ko o reetse se; ema fela, o akanye ditiro tse di gakgamatsang tsa Modimo." 
Job37:15 A o itse ka fa Modimo o tleng o di laye ka gone, mme o phatsimise logadima lwa leru la one ka gone?" 
Job37:16 A o itse go retelediwa ga maru le ditiro tse di gakgamatsang tsa o o leng boitekanelo mo kitsong? 
Job37:17 Le ka fa diaparo tsa gago di leng bothitho ka gone fa lefatshe le tuuletse fela ka ntlha ya phefo ya borwa? 
Job37:18 A o ka tsharolola nao loapi lo lo thata jaaka seiponi se se thetsweng? 
Job37:19 O re rute se re tlaa se buang nao, gonne ga re kake ra rulaganya puo ya rona ka ntlha ya lefifi." 
Job37:20 A o ka bolelelwa fa ke rata go bua, kgotsa a motho o ka eletsa a ka bo a komediwa?" 
Job37:21 Jaana batho ga ba kake ba leba lesedi fa le phatsima mo loaping; fa phefo e fetile e lo ntlafaditse. 
Job37:22 Mo ntlheng ya botsheka go tswa kgalalelo e eketeng ya botsodutsokwane, Modimo o na le borena jo bo boitshegang mo go one." 
Job37:23 Ka ga Mothatayotlhe, ga re kake ra mo tlhantlhabetsa, o tlotlometse mo thateng, mo katlholong le mo tshiamisong e e tletseng, ga a ketla a patika." 
Job37:24 Mme batho ba mmoifa ka ntlha ya gone moo; ga a tlhokomele bape ba ba pelo e e tlhalefileng.” 
Job38:1 Foo Jehofa a le mo sefefong a fetola Jobe, a re:" 
Job38:2 “E mang yo o fifatsang kgakololo ka mafoko a a se nang kitso? 
Job38:3 A ko o ikokwaele lotheka jaaka monna; gonne ke tlaa go botsa, mme o nkakanyetse." 
Job38:4 E rile ke thaya metheo ya lefatshe, wa bo o le fa kae? Kakanya, fa o na le tlhaloganyo." 
Job38:5 E mang yo o tlhomileng dilekanyo tsa lone, fa o itse? E mang yo o ne a le namalaletsa thapo?" 
Job38:6 Metheo ya lone e nitamisitswe mo go eng? Kgotsa: Yo o beileng lentswe la kgokgotsho la lone e mang? 
Job38:7 Jale ka dinaledi tsa moso di opela mmogo le bomorwa Modimo botlhe ba thela lošalaba lwa boitumelo? 
Job38:8 “Kgotsa e mang yo o tswaletseng lewatle ka ditswalo, jale ka le thoba, jaaka ekete le tswa mo sebopelong;" 
Job38:9 jale ka ke dira leru seaparo sa lone, le lefifi le lentsho go nna letsela la phapo mo go lone." 
Job38:10 Ka le beela molelwane wa me, ka ba ka tlhoma mephakalego le ditswalo." 
Job38:11 Ka le raya, ka re: ‘O ka fitlha fa, mme o se ka wa go feta; dintelo tsa gago tse di mabela di tlaa kganelelwa fa?’" 
Job38:12 “A e sa le ka malatsi a gago a simologa a o kile wa laola moso, wa itsise mahube felo ga one;" 
Job38:13 gore a ye go tshwara dikhutlo tsa lefatshe, le gore baikepi ba udubadiwe mo go lone?" 
Job38:14 Le tle le fetoge jaaka mmopa fa tlase ga sekano; mme dilo tsotlhe di kwetoge jaaka mo seaparong. 
Job38:15 Mo baikeping lesedi la tsone le tle le kganelwe, letsogo le le tsholetsegileng le rojwe." 
Job38:16 “A o kile wa tsena kwa metsweding ya lewatle, kgotsa a o kile wa tsamaya mo dikunyaneng tsa boteng?" 
Job38:17 A o kile wa senolelwa dikgoro tsa loso, kgotsa a o kile wa bona dikgoro tsa moriti wa loso?" 
Job38:18 A o tlhalogantse boatlhamo jwa lefatshe? Kakanya fa o go itse gotlhe. 
Job38:19 “Tsela e kae e e yang kwa boagong jwa lesedi, mme ka ga lefifi felo ga lone ke kae?" 
Job38:20 Gore o tle o le ise kwa borakanelong jwa lone, mme o lemoge ditselana tse di yang kwa ntlong ya lone." 
Job38:21 Le gale, o tlaa bo o itse, gonne go jale o ne o tsetswe, palo ya malatsi a gago e kgolo!" 
Job38:22 “A o kile wa tsena mo mabolokelong a kapoko, kgotsa a o kile wa bona mabolokelo a sefako," 
Job38:23 tse ke di boloketseng motlha wa phuduego le letsatsi la dira le ntwa? 
Job38:24 Lesedi le kgaoganngwa ka tsela efe, le phefo ya botlhabatsatsi e iphalatsa mo lefatsheng ka efe tsela?" 
Job38:25 “E mang yo o fatoletseng morwalela wa metsi tsela, kgotsa a fatola tsela ya logadima lwa maru;" 
Job38:26 go nesa pula mo lefatsheng le go se nang motho mo go lone; mo nageng e go se nang motho mo go yone; 
Job38:27 go kgorisa mmu wa tshwafalo le wa kgakgabalo; le go tlhogisa loreme gone? 
Job38:28 “A pula e na le rra yone, kgotsa mang yo o tsetseng dithothi tsa monyo?" 
Job38:29 Dikgapetla tsa metsi di tswa sebopelong sa ga mang le kgogotshwane ya legodimo e mang yo o e tsetseng? 
Job38:30 “Metsi a tle a bipiwe jaaka ekete ka letlapa, mme mo godimo ga boteng go gatsele." 
Job38:31 “A o ka bofa lesetlha la Selemela, kgotsa o ka funolola dithapo tsa dinaledi tse go tweng Dikolobe." 
Job38:32 A o ka gogela ntle masomo a naledi tsa Masarotha mo metlheng ya tsone, kgotsa a o ka tsamaisa naledi tsa Kgogabosigo le popelelo ya yone?" 
Job38:33 A o itse melao ya magodimo? A o ka tlhoma puso ya yone mo lefatsheng? 
Job38:34 A o ka tsholeletsa lentswe la gago kwa marung, gore letlotlo la metsi le go khurumetse?" 
Job38:35 A o ka roma dikgadima gore di tsamaye, mme tsa go raya tsa re: ‘Re fano’?" 
Job38:36 E mang yo o tsentseng botlhale mo matennyeng, kgotsa e mang yo o neileng pelo tlhaloganyo?" 
Job38:37 E mang yo o ka balang maru ka botlhale, kgotsa mang yo o ka tshololang dinkgwana tsa legodimo," 
Job38:38 fa lorole lo golokega le makote a ngaparelana? 
Job38:39 A o tlaa tsomela tau e namagadi phologolo, kgotsa wa kgorisa ditawana," 
Job38:40 fa di namaletse mo dikutleng tsa tsone, di ntse mo setswatsweng di laletse?" 
Job38:41 E mang yo o baakanyetsang mohukubu dijo tsa one, ka mamphorwana a one a lelela Modimo, a kgarakgatshega fela ka go tlhoka dijo?" 
Job39:1 “A o itse motlha o mafele a mafika a tsalang ka one? Kgotsa a o ka supa lobaka lwa phala go bona ngwana? 
Job39:2 A o ka bala dikgwedi tsa tsone tsa bonemeru, kgotsa a o itse motlha o di tsalang ka one?" 
Job39:3 Di khubame, di tsale bana ba tsone, di latlhele mahutsana a tsone kwa ntle." 
Job39:4 Bana ba tsone ba anye fela, ba thugugele mo nageng e e lobala fela; ba tsamaye, mme ba sa tlhole ba boa." 
Job39:5 E mang yo o lesitseng esela ya naga ya tsamaya fela, kgotsa mang yo o hunolotseng dikgole tsa pitse e tilotsana," 
Job39:6 e ntlo ya yone ke e dirileng, e bong naga, le lefatshe la dimpu e nne felo kwa e nnang gone?" 
Job39:7 E sotla tlhapeo wa motse, le gone ga e utlwe kgalemo ya mokgweetsi." 
Job39:8 Namalalo ya dithaba ke mahulo a yone, mme e batle sengwe le sengwe se setala." 
Job39:9 A nare e tlaa itumela go go direla? Kgotsa a e ka nna fa bojelong jwa gago? 
Job39:10 A o ka golega nare ka kgole ya yone mo temong, kgotsa a e tlaa kokola mekgatšha e go setse morago?" 
Job39:11 A o tlaa e ikanya, ka gobo thata ya yone e le kgolo, kgotsa a o tlaa e tlogelela tiro ya gago?" 
Job39:12 A o tlaa e dumela gore e tlaa rora peo ya gago, e ba e kokoanya mabele a sebopi sa gago?" 
Job39:13 Lofuka lwa ntšhe lo a ebela; mme a diphafa tsa gagwe di na le bopelonomi, le fa e le bobowa jwa gagwe?" 
Job39:14 Gonne o tlogela mae a gagwe fa fatshe, o a thuthafatse mo loroleng." 
Job39:15 A lebale fa lonao lo ka tla lwa a thuba, kgotsa fa sebatana se ka a gataka." 
Job39:16 O direla bana ba gagwe ka peloethata, jaaka ekete ga se ba gagwe; le fa tiro ya gagwe e le lefela, ga a na poifo;" 
Job39:17 gonne Modimo o mo timile botlhale, le gone ga o a ka wa mo abela tlhaloganyo." 
Job39:18 Mogang o itsholeletsang godimo, o tle a sotle pitse le mopalami wa yone." 
Job39:19 A o neile pitse nonofo ya yone; a o apesitse thamo ya yone moetse o o fokafokang? 
Job39:20 A ke wena yo o e dirileng gore e tlolatlole jaaka tsie? Go koma ga pudulo ya yone go a boitshega. 
Job39:21 E tle e reme ka tlhako mo molapong, e itumele mo thateng ya yone: e tswe e ye go kgatlhantsha batho ba ba tlhometseng." 
Job39:22 E tshege poifo, ga e tlakasele; le gone ga e neye tšhaka sekotla." 
Job39:23 Mokotlopo o tlharakanye mo go yone, le lerumo le le šadiang matlho le putlela." 
Job39:24 E kometse mmu ka bogale le tšararego; le gone e se ke e dumele fa e le kodu ya lonaka. 
Job39:25 Gongwe le gongwe fa lonaka lo lela e re: ‘Ahe,’ mme e dupelele tlhabano kgakala, le modumo wa balaodi le lošalaba." 
Job39:26 A segodi se fofa ka botlhale jwa gago, se tsharololela diphuka tsa sone kwa borwa?" 
Job39:27 A ntswi yo motona o fofela kwa godimo ka taolo ya gago, mme a dire setlhaga sa gagwe kwa godimo?" 
Job39:28 O aga mo lefikeng, mme o na le boago jwa gagwe gone, mo tlhoreng ya lefika, le mo felong fa go thata." 
Job39:29 A le foo a kwaye phologolo; matlho a gagwe a e bonele kgakala. 
Job39:30 Mamphorwana a gagwe le one a nwe madi, mme kwa go nang le ba ba bolailweng, le ene o gone.”" 
Job40:1 Gape Jehofa a fetola Jobe a re: 
Job40:2 “Yo o betogang fela a o tlaa ganela le Mothatayotlhe? Yo o ganetsanyang le Modimo, a a go fetole.”" 
Job40:3 Foo Jobe a fetola Jehofa a re: 
Job40:4 “Bona, ga ke sepe; ke tlaa go fetola ke reng? Ke ipaya seatla mo molomong fela." 
Job40:5 Ke buile gangwe fela, mme ga nketla ke fetola; ee, gabedi, mme ga nketla ke tlhola ke tswelela.”" 
Job40:6 Foo Jehofa a le mo sefefong a fetola Jobe a re: 
Job40:7 “A ko o ikokwaele lotheka jaana jaaka monna, ke tlaa go botsa, mme o nkakanyetse." 
Job40:8 A o tlaa tsupuetsa le e leng katlholo ya me? A o tlaa mpona molato gore o tle o siamisiwe? 
Job40:9 Kgotsa a o na le letsogo le le tshwanang jaaka la Modimo? A o ka duma ka lentswe jaaka one? 
Job40:10 A ko o ikgabise ka tlotlomalo le bogolwane, mme o ikapese ka tlotlo le borena." 
Job40:11 Thela mapenologo a bogale jwa gago, o lebe mongwe le mongwe yo o ikgodisang o mo kokobetse." 
Job40:12 Leba mongwe le mongwe yo o ikgodisang, mme o mo ise kwa tlase; o gatakele baikepi fa ba emeng gone." 
Job40:13 Ba fitlhe mmogo mo loroleng; o bofele difatlhogo tsa bone mo felong fa go fitlhegileng. 
Job40:14 Foo le nna ke tlaa go ipolela, gore seatla se segolo sa gago tota se ka go boloka." 
Job40:15 A ko o bone kubu, e ke e dirileng jaaka le wena ke go dirile; e ja bojang jaaka kgomo." 
Job40:16 A ko o bone, thata ya yone e mo lothekeng lwa yone, nonofo ya yone e mo mesifeng ya mpa ya yone." 
Job40:17 E tle e tsokotse mogatla jaaka setlhare sa mosetara; mesifa ya dirope tsa yone e nganaganye. 
Job40:18 Marapo a yone a ntse jaaka mephakalego ya kgotlho; dikgopo tsa yone di tshwana jaaka mephakalego ya tshipi. 
Job40:19 Ke yone e kgolo mo ditirong tsa Modimo; ene yo o e dirileng ke ene esi yo o ka atametsang tšhaka ya gagwe kwa go yone. 
Job40:20 Ruri dithaba di e medisetsa dijo; kwa diphologolo tsotlhe tsa naga di tshamekelang gone. 
Job40:21 E tle e bothe fa tlase ga koma, mo boiphitlhelong jwa lotlhaka, le mo ditsobotleng." 
Job40:22 Koma ya e sira ka moriti wa yone; madubunoka a molatswana a e dikanyetse. 
Job40:23 Bona, le fa noka e penologa, ga e rorome; e boikanyo fela le fa Joretane a gogomogela le kwa molomong wa yone." 
Job40:24 A mongwe o ka e tshwara e lebile, kgotsa a mongwe o ka phunya nko ya yone ka serai?" 
Job41:1 “A o ka goga kwena wa e ntshetsa kwa ntle ka kgoge ya tlhapi, kgotsa a o ka gatelela loleme lwa yone ka lodi?" 
Job41:2 A o ka tsenya mogala wa mokhasi mo nkong ya yone, kgotsa a o ka phunya lotlhaya lwa yone ka lomapo?" 
Job41:3 A e ka go direla mekokotlelo e le mentsi, kgotsa a e ka bua nao mafoko a a bonolo?" 
Job41:4 A e tlaa dira nao kgolagano ya go ka o e tsaya ya nna motlhanka wa gago ka bosakhutleng? 
Job41:5 A o ka tshameka nayo jaaka fa e ka bo e le nonyane? Kgotsa a o tlaa e golegela barweetsana ba gago? 
Job41:6 A masomo a batshwari ba ditlhapi a tlaa e ntsha tlhwatlhwa? A ba tlaa e kgaoganya mo bareking? 
Job41:7 A o ka rothotha letlalo la yone ka marumo a dikobe, kgotsa tlhogo ya yone ka marumo a ditlhapi?" 
Job41:8 Baya seatla sa gago mo go yone; o gakologelwe go loma ga yone, mme ga o ketla o tlhola o dira jalo." 
Job41:9 Bona, tsholofelo ya go e tshwara ke lefela, a motho ga a tlhoboge le fa a e bona fela?" 
Job41:10 Ga go na ope yo o pelokgale ya go e kgotla; mme foo yo o ka emang fa pele ga me e mang? 
Job41:11 E mang yo o simolotseng a nnaya pele, fa e bo ne ne ke ka busetsa mo go ene? Sengwe le sengwe se se fa tlase ga legodimo lotlhe ke sa me." 
Job41:12 “Ga nketla ke didimala ka ga ditokololo tsa yone, le fa e le nonofo e kgolo ya yone, le fa e le popego ya yone e e lekalekanyeng sentle." 
Job41:13 E mang yo o ka e khumolotsang seaparo sa ka fa ntle? E mang yo o ka tsenang ka fa teng ga ditlhaya tsa yone tse di tlhatlaganyeng? 
Job41:14 E mang yo o ka bulang ditswalo tsa sefatlhogo sa yone? Meno a yone a dikologilwe ke therego. 
Job41:15 Makape a yone a a thata ke pelafalo ya yone, a kitlantswe jaaka e ka bo e le ka sekano se se pitlaganyang."
