Job41:16 Le lengwe le atamalanye le le lengwe thata, go bile go retelela le phefo go tsena fa gare ga one." 
Job41:17 A lomaganye mmogo; a ngaparalanye, ga a kake a patologanngwa." 
Job41:18 Maethimolo a yone a ntsha ditlhase tsa lesedi, matlho a yone a tshwana le dintshi tsa matlho a moso." 
Job41:19 Ditime tse di tukang di tswa mo ganong la yone, le ditlhase tsa molelo di tswe." 
Job41:20 Mo dinkong tsa yone go tswe mosi jaaka ekete wa pitsa e e apeileng le motsitla o o šang. 
Job41:21 Pudulo ya yone e tshuba magala, kgabo ya molelo e tswa mo ganong la yone." 
Job41:22 Thata e nna mo thamong ya yone, theregiso e bina fa pele ga yone." 
Job41:23 Matlhatlhagano a nama ya yone a ngaparalanye, a kwenne mo go yone; ga a kake a tshikinngwa." 
Job41:24 Pelo ya yone e kwenne jaaka lentswe; ee, e kwenne jaaka lolwala." 
Job41:25 Fa e itsholetsa, ba ba thata ba boife, be tlhakane tlhogo ka ntlha ya go tlakasela." 
Job41:26 Fa motho a e losa ka tšhaka, ga go thuse sepe, le fa e le ka lerumo, le ka motswi, le ka logong lo lo tlhokoditsweng." 
Job41:27 E kaya tshipi jaaka lotlhaka, le kgotlho jaaka kono fela." 
Job41:28 Motswi ga o kake wa e tshabisa; majana a motsekedi a fetoga dirite mo go yone. 
Job41:29 Melamu e kaiwe jaaka dirite, e tshege go ibalala ga putlela." 
Job41:30 Ka kwa mpeng ga yone go etsa dipeana tse di dintlha di bogale, e e beye sephara ekete ke koloi e fola mo marageng." 
Job41:31 E bedise boteng jaaka pitsa, e dire lewatle go nna jaaka setlolo." 
Job41:32 E dira tsela e e phatsimang morago ga yone; motho a gopole go re boteng bo thuntse. 
Job41:33 Mo lefatsheng ga go na sepe se se tshwanang nayo, e le se se se nang poifo." 
Job41:34 E tle e lebe sengwe le sengwe se se goletsegileng; ke kgosi godimo ga bana ba boikgodiso botlhe fela.” 
Job42:1 Foo Jobe a fetola Jehofa, a re:" 
Job42:2 “Ke a itse fa o ka dira dilo tsotlhe, le go re, ga go na boikaelelo bope jwa gago jo bo ka kganelwang." 
Job42:3 ‘E mang yo o subang kgakololo a se na kitso?’ Ke gone ka moo ke buileng se ke se kang ka se tlhaloganya, dilo tse e leng kgakgamatso e kgolo mo go nna, tse ke ne ke sa di itse." 
Job42:4 ‘Ke a go rapela, a ko o utlwe, mme ke tlaa bua; ke tlaa go botsa, mme o mpolelele.’" 
Job42:5 Ke ne ke utlwile ka ga gago ka kutlo ya tsebe; jaanong matlho a me a a go bona. 
Job42:6 Ke gone ka moo ke ipherogelang sebete, ke a ikwatlhaya ke le mo loroleng le molora.”" 
Job42:7 Mme ga nna fela jaana, e rile Jehofa a sena go bua mafoko ao le Jobe, Jehofa a raya Elifase wa Motemane, a re: “Botšarara jwa me bo go tuketse, le ditsala tsa gago tse pedi, gonne ga lo a bua se se siameng ka ga me, jaaka Jobe motlhanka wa me a buile." 
Job42:8 Ke gone jaana, tsayang dikgomo di supa, le diphelefu di supa, lo ye kwa go Jobe motlhanka wa me, lo ikisetse tshupelo e e fisiwang; mme Jobe motlhanka wa me o tlaa lo rapelela, gonne ene ke tlaa mo amogela gore ke se ka ka lo direla jaaka boeleele jwa lona; gonne ga lo a bua sone se se siameng ka ge me, jaaka Jobe motlhanka wa me a buile.”" 
Job42:9 Jalo Elifase wa Motemane, le Biletate wa Mošuha le Sofare wa Monaamathe, ba ya, ba dira ka fa Jehofa a ba laoletseng ka gone; mme Jehofa a amogela Jobe." 
Job42:10 E rile Jobe a rapelela ditsala tsa gagwe, Jehofa a busa botshwaro jwa gagwe; Jehofa a ba okeletsa Jobe ka sebedi bogolo go tse o kileng a bo a na natso gale." 
Job42:11 Foo ga tla kwa go ene bomorwa rraagwe botlhe, le bokgaitsadie botlhe, le botlhe ba o ne a itsanye nabo gale, ba ja dijo nae mo ntlong ya gagwe; ba mo tla matshediso, ba mo gomotsa ka ga bosula jotlhe jo Jehofa o ne a bo lerile mo go ene; le gone mongwe le mongwe a mo naya ledi, le mongwe le mongwe lenyena la gouta." 
Job42:12 Jalo Morena a segofatsa Jobe go ya kwa bokhutlong jwa gagwe bogolo go tshimologo ya gagwe; a nna le dinku di le 14 000, dikamela di le 6 000, dikgomo tsa bojokwe ba le 1 000, le diesela tse dinamagadi di le 1 000." 
Job42:13 O ne a bile a na le bana ba basimane ba supa le ba basetsana ba le bararo. 
Job42:14 Mosetsana wa ntlha a mo raya leina a re, Jemima; leina la wa bobedi Kesia; leina la wa boraro Kerene-hapuke." 
Job42:15 Mo lefatsheng lotlhe go ne go se na basadi bape ba bantle jaaka bomorwadia Jobe; rraabo a ba naya boswa mo go bokgaitsadia bone. 
Job42:16 Morago ga moo Jobe a tshela ka dinyaga di le 140, mme a bona bomorwawe le bomorwa bomorwawe, e bong dikokomana di le nne." 
Job42:17 Jalo Jobe a swa, a tsofetse a le malatsi a a tletseng." 
Psalms1:1 Go sego monna yo o sa tsamayeng mo kgakololong ya baikepi, le fa e le go ema mo tseleng ya baleofi, le fa e le go dula mo setulong sa basotli." 
Psalms1:2 Go itumela ga gagwe go mo molaong wa ga Jehofa; mme o akanya mo molaong wa gagwe motshegare le bosigo. 
Psalms1:3 O tlaa nna jaaka setlhare se se tlhomilweng mo dinokaneng tsa metsi, se se ungwang loungo lwa sone mo motlheng wa sone, se lekakaba la sone le lone le se keng le swaba; mme le fa e le eng se o se dirang se tlaa segofala." 
Psalms1:4 Baikepi ga ba a nna jalo; ba tshwana jaaka mmoko o phefo e o kgopholang. 
Psalms1:5 Ke gone ka mo baikepi ba se ketlang ba ema mo katlholong, le fa e le baleofi mo phuthegong ya basiami." 
Psalms1:6 Gonne Jehofa o itse tsela ya basiami; mme tsela ya baikepi e tlaa nyelela. 
Psalms2:1 Ana merafe e šakgaletseng, le ditšhaba di tlhatlhanyetsang selo sa boithamako?" 
Psalms2:2 Dikgosi tsa lefatshe di a ikemisa, le balaodi ba logisanya maano, ka ga Jehofa, le ka Motlodiwa wa gagwe, ba re:" 
Psalms2:3 “A re kgaoleng dithapo tsa bone, le megala ya bone re e latlhe mo go rona.”" 
Psalms2:4 Ene yo o dutseng mo magodimong o tlaa tshega; Jehofa o tlaa ba sotla. 
Psalms2:5 Ke gone foo o tlaa buang nabo ka bogale jwa gagwe jo bogolo, o tlaa ba rema marapo ka bogale jwa gagwe jo bo tukang:" 
Psalms2:6 “Le fa go ntse jalo ke tlhomile kgosi ya me mo thabeng ya me e e boitshepo ya Sione.” 
Psalms2:7 Ke tlaa bolela ka ga taolo; Jehofa o ntheile a re: “O morwaake; ka tsatsi leno ke go tsetse. 
Psalms2:8 Ntopa, mme ke tlaa go naya merafe go nna boswa jwa gago, le dikhutlo tsa lefatshe go nna thuo ya gago." 
Psalms2:9 O tlaa ba thubakanya ka tsamma ya tshipi; o tlaa ba phatlakanya jaaka sejana sa mmopi.” 
Psalms2:10 Ke gone jaana tlhalefang, lona dikgosi; lo rutege, lona baatlhodi ba lefatshe." 
Psalms2:11 Direlang Jehofa ka poifo, mme lo itumele ka tlakaselo." 
Psalms2:12 Atlang morwa, gore e se re gongwe a galefa, mme lwa nyelela mo tseleng, gonne bogale jwa gagwe bo tlaa akofa bo tuka. Go sego bone botlhe ba ba mo ikanyang." 
Psalms3:1 Jehofa, ana baganetsi ba me ba ntsifetse jang! Bone ba ba ntsogologelang ba bantsi." 
Psalms3:2 Ba bantsi ba ba buang ka ga mowa wa me ba re: “Ga a na go thusiwa gope ke Modimo.” Sela. 
Psalms3:3 Wena Jehofa, o thebe ka ntlha tsotlhe tsa me; o kgalalelo ya me le motsholetsa tlhogo ya me." 
Psalms3:4 Ke tle ke bitse Jehofa ka lentswe la me, mme a nkarabe a le mo thabaneng ya gagwe e e boitshepo. Sela." 
Psalms3:5 Ka rapama, mme ka robala; ka tsoga; ka go bo Jehofa o a nkokotletsa." 
Psalms3:6 Ga nketla ke boifa makgolokgolo a batho ba ba inkemiseditseng ka ntlha tsotlhe. 
Psalms3:7 Tloga o eme, Jehofa; o mpoloke, Modimo wa me; gonne o iteile baba ba me botlhe lesama; o robile meno a baikepi." 
Psalms3:8 Poloka ke ya ga Jehofa; tshegofatso ya gago a e nne mo bathong ba gago. Sela. 
Psalms4:1 A e re ke bitsa o nkarabe Modimo wa tshiamo ya me; o nkatlhamoloseditse bonno ke le mo pitlaganong; nkutlwela botlhoko mme o utlwe morapelo wa me. 
Psalms4:2 Lona bomorwa batho, ana kgalalelo ya me e tlaa fetolwa tlotlologo goleele go le kaye? Lo tlaa rata dinyana lo latela maaka goleele go le kaye? Sela." 
Psalms4:3 Itseng fa Jehofa a ipeetse ene yo e leng moetsa Modimo fa thoko; Jehofa o tlaa utlwa mogang ke tlhaeleletsang kwa go ene. 
Psalms4:4 Emang ka poifo, mme lo se leofe; buabuang ka dipelo tsa lona mo malaong a lona, mme lo tuulale. Sela." 
Psalms4:5 Isang ditlhabelo tsa tshiamo, lo ikanye Jehofa." 
Psalms4:6 Go na le bantsi ba ba reng, e mang yo o tlaa re bontshang sengwe se se molemo? Jehofa, re tsholeletse lesedi la sefatlhogo sa gago." 
Psalms4:7 O tsentse boitumelo mo pelong ya me, go gaisa jwa bone jwa motlha o mabele a bone le bojalwa jwa bone jwa mofine di totileng." 
Psalms4:8 Ke tlaa rapama ke ba ke robala mo kagisong; gonne Jehofa ke wena wesi yo o nkagisang mo polokegong. 
Psalms5:1 Tlhwaela mafoko a me tsebe Jehofa, o gopole go akanya ga me." 
Psalms5:2 Reetsa lentswe la go goa ga me, Kgosi ya me, le Modimo wa me; gonne ke rapela wena." 
Psalms5:3 Jehofa, o tlaa utlwa lentswe la me go sa le ka moso; e tlaa re go sa le ka moso, ke tlaa rulaganyetsa morapelo wa me kwa go wena, mme ke tlaa lebelela." 
Psalms5:4 Gonne ga o Modimo o o nang le go kgatlhwa ke boikepo; bosula ga bo ketla bo tlhola le wena. 
Psalms5:5 Baitelaganyi ga ba ketla ba ema mo ponong ya gago; o ila badiri botlhe ba boikepo. 
Psalms5:6 O tlaa senya ba ba buang maaka. Jehofa o fedisiwa pelo fela ke monna yo o gakaletseng polao, le wa tsietso." 
Psalms5:7 Fa e le ka ga me, ke tlaa tsena mo ntlong ya gago ka bontsi jwa mapelonomi a gago a lorato; le mo poifong ya gago ke tlaa obama ke lebile kwa tempeleng ya gago e e boitshepo." 
Psalms5:8 Nkgoga Jehofa mo tshiamong ya gago ka ntlha ya baba ba me; dira tsela ya gago gore e bonale sentle fa pele ga sefatlhogo sa me. 
Psalms5:9 Gonne ga go na boikanngo mo melomong ya bone; boteng jwa bone ke boikepo ka bosi; memetso ya bone ke phupu e e atlhameng; ba rethefatsa diteme tsa bone. 
Psalms5:10 Ba kaye molato, Modimo; a ba we ka dikgakololo tse e leng tsa bone; o ba kgoromeletse kwa ntle ka bontsi jwa ditlolo tsa bone; gonne ba go tsuololetse." 
Psalms5:11 A botlhe ba ba go ikanyang ba itumele, ba duduetse ka boitumelo ka gale, ka o ba femetse; a le bone ba ba ratang leina la gago ba ipele mo go wena." 
Psalms5:12 Gone o tlaa segofatsa mosiami: Jehofa, o tlaa mo dikanyeletsa ka letlhogonolo jaaka ka thebe." 
Psalms6:1 Jehofa, o se ka wa nkgalemela ka bogale jwa gago, le gone o se ka wa nkwatlhaya ka bogale jwa gago jo bo tukang." 
Psalms6:2 Nkutlwela botlhoko Jehofa; gonne ke swabile fela; Jehofa, o mphodise, gonne marapo a me a remegile." 
Psalms6:3 Mowa wa me le one o tshwenyegile thata; mme wena, Jehofa, e tlaa nna goleele go le kaye?" 
Psalms6:4 Boela mo go nna Jehofa, o golole mowa wa me: o mpoloke ka ntlha ya bopelonomi jwa gago jwa lorato." 
Psalms6:5 Gonne mo losong ga o na go gakologelwa; mo Bobipong yo o tlaa go lebogang e tlaa nna mang? 
Psalms6:6 Ke lapile ka go duma ga me; ka masigo otlhe ke kolobetsa bolao jwa me; ke kolobetsa phate ya me ka dikeledi tsa me. 
Psalms6:7 Leitlho la me le a fela ka ntlha ya bohutsana; le a onala ka ntlha ya baganetsi botlhe ba me. 
Psalms6:8 Ntlogelang lona lotlhe badiri ba boikepo; gonne Jehofa o utlwile lentswe la go lela ga me. 
Psalms6:9 Jehofa o utlwile mekokotlelo ya me; Jehofa o tlaa amogela morapelo wa me. 
Psalms6:10 Baba ba me botlhe ba tlaa tlhajwa ke ditlhong ba tshwenyega thata; ba tlaa boela kwa morago, ba tlaa tlhajwa ke ditlhong ka tshoganetso fela." 
Psalms7:1 Jehofa Modimo wa me ke ikanya mo go wena; mpoloka mo go bone botlhe ba ba nkhukhelang, mme o nkgolole." 
Psalms7:2 O ka tla a gagola mowa wa me jaaka tau, a o gagoganyetsa ruri ka go se ope yo o gololang." 
Psalms7:3 Jehofa Modimo wa me e ka re fa ke dirile selo se; fa go na le boikepo mo diatleng tsa me; 
Psalms7:4 e re fa ke diretse ene yo o neng a le kagiso le nna bosula; (ee, ke golotse fela ene yo e neng e le moganetsi wa me wa ka bomo);" 
Psalms7:5 jalo a mmaba a khukhele mowa wa me mme a o tshware. Ee, a a gatakele botshelo jwa me mo mmung, a beye kgalalelo ya me mo loroleng. Sela." 
Psalms7:6 Tloga o eme Jehofa ka bogale jwa gago; itlotloanyetse tšhakgalo ya baganetsi ba me; o bo o nkubugele; katlholo yone o e laotse. 
Psalms7:7 A phuthego ya ditšhaba e go dikanyeletse; mme o le fa godimo ga bone o boele kwa go ba okameng. 
Psalms7:8 Jehofa o direla ditšhaba katlholo; nkatlhola, Jehofa, ka fa tshiamong ya me le ka fa go tlhokeng molato ga me, mo go nna." 
Psalms7:9 Ao! A boikepo jwa baikepi bo khutle, mme o tlhomamise basiami; gonne Modimo o o tshiamo o leka dipelo le diphilo." 
Psalms7:10 Thebe ya me e mo Modimong o o bolokang ba ba pelo di thokgameng. 
Psalms7:11 Modimo ke moatlhodi yo o siameng, ee, one ke Modimo o o galefang ka malatsi otlhe." 
Psalms7:12 Fa motho a sa sokologe, o tlaa lootsa tšhaka ya one; o obile bora jwa one, o bo laetse." 
Psalms7:13 Le gone o mmaakanyeditse dibolao tsa loso; o dira metswi ya one go nna diphulo tse di molelo. 
Psalms7:14 Bonang, motho yoo o mo pelegong ka boikepo; ee, o ne a ithwele bosenyi, mme o tsetse maaka." 
Psalms7:15 O dirile lemena a le epa, o bile o wetse mo longopeng lo o lo dirileng." 
Psalms7:16 Bosenyi jwa gagwe bo tlaa boela mo tlhogong ya gagwe, go tlaa fologela mo phogong ya gagwe." 
Psalms7:17 Ke tlaa ntshetsa Jehofa malebogo ka fa tshiamong ya gagwe; le leina la ga Jehofa yo o Mogodimodimo ke tlaa le opelela pako. 
Psalms8:1 Jehofa, Morena wa rona, a bo leina la gago le le lentle mo lefatsheng lotlhe! Wena yo o tlhomileng kgalalelo ya gago godimo ga magodimo." 
Psalms8:2 O theile nonofo ka a a tswang melomong ya banyana le ba ba anyang, ka ntlha ya baganetsi ba gago, gore o tle o didimatse mmaba le mmusolosi." 
Psalms8:3 E a re fa ke akanya magodimo a gago, tiro ya menwana ya gago, kgwedi le dinaledi tse o di baakantseng;" 
Psalms8:4 kana motho e be e le eng, fa e bo ne ne o mo gopola, le morwa motho, fa e bo ne ne o mo lekola?" 
Psalms8:5 Gonne o mo fokoditse boemo go le gonnye fela mo Modimong, wa mo rwesa kgalalelo le tlotlo." 
Psalms8:6 Wa mo naya taolo mo ditirong tsa diatla tsa gago; o beile dilo tsotlhe tlase ga dinao tsa gagwe; 
Psalms8:7 dinku tsotlhe le dikgomo, ee, le tsone ditshedi tsa naga;" 
Psalms8:8 dinonyane tsa loapi le ditlhapi tsa lewatle, sengwe le sengwe se se ralalang mawatle ka ditsela tsa one." 
Psalms8:9 Jehofa, Morena wa rona, ana leina la gago le lentle jang mo lefatsheng lotlhe fela!" 
Psalms9:1 Ke tlaa leboga Jehofa ka pelo yotlhe ya me; ke tlaa bolela ditiro tsotlhe tsa gago tse di gakgamatsang. 
Psalms9:2 Ke tlaa ipela ke kgana ka boitumelo mo go wena; ke tlaa opelela leina la gago pako, wena Mogodimodimo;" 
Psalms9:3 e a re baba ba me ba boela kwa morago, ba kgopiwe, ba nyelele ka sebonalo sa gago." 
Psalms9:4 Gonne o emetse tshiamo ya me le go seka ga me; o ne o dutse mo setulong sa bogosi o atlhola ka tshiamo. 
Psalms9:5 O kgalemetse merafe, o sentse baikepi, o timeditse leina la bone ka bosakhutleng le ka bosaengkae." 
Psalms9:6 Baba ba feletse ruri, ba swafetse ka bosakhutleng; le metse e o e pitikolotseng, le e leng go gopolwa ga yone go nyeletse fela nayo." 
Psalms9:7 Jehofa o dutse e le kgosi ka bosakhutleng; setulo sa gagwe sa bogosi o se baakanyeditse katlholo. 
Psalms9:8 O tlaa atlhola lefatshe ka tshiamo; o tlaa direla ditšhaba katlholo ka thokgamo. 
Psalms9:9 Gape, Jehofa o tlaa nna kago e e godileng ya botshabelo jwa bone ba ba patikwang, kago e e godileng ya botshabelo mo metlheng ya dipitlagano;" 
Psalms9:10 ba ba itseng leina la gago ba tlaa ikanya mo go wena; gonne wena, Jehofa, ga o a latlha ba ba go batlang." 
Psalms9:11 Opelelang Jehofa yo o agileng mo Sione dipako; bolelang mo ditšhabeng ditiro tsa gagwe. 
Psalms9:12 Gonne yo o lefetsang tshololo ya madi o a ba gakologelwa; ga a lebale go goa ga bahumanegi. 
Psalms9:13 Nkutlwela botlhoko, Jehofa; leba go patikwa ga me ke ba ba nkilang, wena yo o ntlhatlosang mo dikgorong tsa loso;" 
Psalms9:14 gore ke tle ke bonatse pako yotlhe ya gago; ke tlaa re mo dikgotleng tsa morwadia Sione ke itumele mo polokeng ya gago. 
Psalms9:15 Merafe e ribegetse ka lemena le e le dirileng; lonao lwa bone ka bosi lo tshwerwe ke lotloa lo ba lo thaileng mo phitlhong. 
Psalms9:16 Jehofa o ipoletse, o dirile tshekiso; moikepi o tshwarisitswe ke tiro ya diatla tsa gagwe ka esi. HIGAIONE. Sela." 
Psalms9:17 Baikepi ba tlaa boela Bobipong, e bong merafe yotlhe e e lebalang Modimo." 
Psalms9:18 Gonne batlhoki ga ba ketla ba lebalwa ka metlha yotlhe, le fa e le tebelelo ya bahumanegi ga e ketla e nyelela ka bosakhutleng." 
Psalms9:19 Tloga o eme, Jehofa, a motho a se fenye; a merafe e atlholwe mo ponong ya gago." 
Psalms9:20 Jehofa, ba boifise; a merafe e ikitse fa e le batho fela. Sela." 
Psalms10:1 O emetseng kgakala, Jehofa? O iphitlhelang mo metlheng ya pitlagano?" 
Psalms10:2 Mohumanegi o khukhelwa ka tlhoafalo ka boikgodiso jwa baikepi; a ba tshwarwe ka ditogamaano tse ba di logileng. 
Psalms10:3 Gonne moikepi o belafala ka ga keletso ya pelo ya gagwe, le yo o pelotshetlha o a itatola, ee, o kgala Jehofa." 
Psalms10:4 Moikepi o bua ka boikgodiso jwa sefatlhogo sa gagwe, a re: “Ga o ketla o go lefetsa.” Megopolo yotlhe ya gagwe ke go re: “Ga go na Modimo ope.”" 
Psalms10:5 Ditsela tsa gagwe ke mo go tlhomameng ka metlha yotlhe; dikatlholo tsa gago di kwa godimodimo kgakala le pono ya gagwe; mme ka ga baba ba gagwe botlhe, o ba budula fela." 
Psalms10:6 O ithaya mo pelong ya gagwe a re: “Ga nketla ke tshikinyega; ga nketla ke ba ke nna mo bothateng bope mo tshikatshikeng.” 
Psalms10:7 Legano la gagwe le tletse khutsakanyo le tsietso le patiko; kwa tlase ga loleme lwa gagwe go na le bosenyi le boikepo. 
Psalms10:8 O a tle a dule mo mafelong a talelo a metsana; a bolaele ba ba se nang molato mo mafelong a boiphitlho; ba ba se nang boithuso a ba gotolele matlho. 
Psalms10:9 O a tle a lalele mo setswatswaneng jaaka tau mo selaong sa yone, a lalele mohumanegi go mo tshwara; o mo tshware ruri, ene mohumanegi, mogang o mo gogang ka lotloa lwa gagwe." 
Psalms10:10 O a tle a bobe, a iname, mme ba ba se nang boithuso ba we ka ba ba thata ba gagwe." 
Psalms10:11 O ithaya mo pelong ya gagwe a re: “Modimo o lebetse; o bipile sefatlhogo sa one; ga o ketla o go bona gope.” 
Psalms10:12 Tloga o eme, Jehofa! Modimo, tsholetsa letsogo la gago; o se ka wa lebala bahumanegi." 
Psalms10:13 Ana moikepi o nyaletsang Modimo; a ithaya mo pelong a re: “Ga o ketla o go lefetsa”? 
Psalms10:14 O go bonye; gonne o lebile bosenyi le bopeloyatlhoi go bo tsaya mo seatleng sa gago; yo o se nang boithuso o itesa mo go wena; o ne o ntse o le mothusi wa masiela. 
Psalms10:15 Roba letsogo la moikepi; motho yo o bosula ene, o no o tlhotlhomise boikepo jwa gagwe, o bo o tle o se ka wa tlhola o bona bope." 
Psalms10:16 Jehofa ke Kgosi ka bosakhutleng le ka bosaengkae; baditšhaba ba nyeleletse ruri mo lefatsheng la gagwe. 
Psalms10:17 Jehofa, o utlwile keletso ya baikokobetsi; o tlaa baakanya pelo tsa bone, o tlaa tlhwaa tsebe ya gago go utlwa;" 
Psalms10:18 go tla o atlhola masiela le bapatikwi, gore motho yo e leng wa lefatshe fela a se ka a tlhola a boitshega gope." 
Psalms11:1 Ke ikanya mo go Jehofa; ana lo raya mowa wa me jang, lo re: “Tshabela kwa thabeng ya lona jaaka dinonyane?" 
Psalms11:2 Gonne bonang, aitse baikepi ba oba bora, ba laela motswi wa bone mo mogaleng wa bora, gore ba tle ba re ba le mo lefifing ba hule ba ba pelo di thokgameng." 
Psalms11:3 E a re fa metheo e senngwa, mosiami o ka dirang”?" 
Psalms11:4 Jehofa o mo tempeleng ya gagwe e e boitshepo; Jehofa, setulo sa gagwe sa bogosi se mo legodimong; matlho a gagwe a lebile bana ba batho, dintshi tsa gagwe tsa matlho di a ba leka." 
Psalms11:5 Jehofa o leka basiami; moikepi le yo o ratang go thubaka, mowa wa gagwe o a ba ila." 
Psalms11:6 O tlaa nesetsa baikepi meoko; molelo le sulefura, le phefo e e fisang, dilo tse, e tlaa nna senwelo sa bone se ba se abetsweng." 
Psalms11:7 Gonne Jehofa o siame; o rata tshiamo; bathokgami ba tlaa bona sefatlhogo sa gagwe. 
Psalms12:1 Thusa Jehofa; gonne mmoifa Modimo o a khutla; gonne ba ba ikanyegang ba a tlhaela mo baneng ba batho. 
Psalms12:2 Ba bua boithamako, mongwe le mongwe le wa ga gabo; ba bua ka dipounama tse di hakang le ka pelo e e leng pedi." 
Psalms12:3 Jehofa o tlaa kgaola dipounama tsotlhe tse di hakang, e bong loleme lo lo buang dilo tse dikgolo;" 
Psalms12:4 ba ba rileng: “Re tlaa fenya ka loleme lwa rona; dipounama ke tsa rona fela; e mang yo e leng morena godimo ga rona?” 
Psalms12:5 “Jaanong, ke tlaa tloga ke tsogela kgapelo ya bahumanegi, le phegelo ya batlhoki,” go bua Jehofa; “mme ene yo ba mo budulang ke tlaa mmaya mo polokegong.”" 
Psalms12:6 Mafoko a ga Jehofa ke mafoko a a itshekileng; a ntse jaaka selefera se se lekilweng mo boubelong mo mmung, se itshekisitswe ga supa." 
Psalms12:7 Wena, Jehofa o tlaa ba boloka, o tlaa ba dibela mo losikeng lo ka bosakhutleng." 
Psalms12:8 Baikepi ba tsamayatsamaya ka ntlha tsotlhe mogang bomaswe bo godisiwang mo baneng ba batho. 
Psalms13:1 E tlaa nna lobaka lo lokae, Jehofa, a o tlaa ntebala ka bosakhutleng? O tlaa mphitlhela sefatlhogo sa gago ka lobaka lo lokae?" 
Psalms13:2 Ke tlaa nna ke gakololana le mowa wa me ka lobaka lo lokae, ka ke tlhola letsatsi lotlhe fela ke ntse ke na le bohutsana mo pelong ya me? Mmaba wa me o tlaa nkgodisediwa ka lobaka lo lo kae?" 
Psalms13:3 O tle o akanye, o bo o mphetole Jehofa, Modimo wa me; bonesa matlho a me, nka tla ka robala boroko ja loso;" 
Psalms13:4 mmaba wa me o ka tla a re: “Ke mo fentse;” baganetsi ba me ba ka tla ba itumela mogang ke tshikinyegang. 
Psalms13:5 Nna, ke ikantse mo boutlwelongbotlhoko jwa gago; pelo ya me e tlaa itumela mo polokeng ya gago;" 
Psalms13:6 ke tlaa opelela Jehofa ka a ntiretse sentle ka mo go tletseng. 
Psalms14:1 Seeleele mo pelong ya sone se rile: “Ga go na Modimo ope.” Ba bodile, ba dirile ditiro tse di maswe thata; ga go na ope yo o dirang molemo." 
Psalms14:2 Jehofa o ne a okomela bana ba batho a le kwa legodimong, gore a tle a bone boo go na le bangwe ba ba tlhaloganyang, ba batla Modimo." 
Psalms14:3 Ba fapogile botlhe fela; ba leswefetse mmogo; ga go na ope yo o dirang molemo, nnyaa, le fa e le yo mongwe fela." 
Psalms14:4 Botlhe ba ba dirang boikepo a ga ba na kitso? Ba ba jang batho ba me ba ba swetsa jaaka ba a ja bogobe, mme ba sa bitse Jehofa." 
Psalms14:5 Foo ba ne ba le mo poifong e kgolo; ka gobo Modimo o mo losikeng lwa basiami. 
Psalms14:6 Lo tlhabisa kgakololo ya mohumanegi ditlhong; mme Jehofa ke botshabelo jwa gagwe. 
Psalms14:7 A bo poloko ya Iseraele e ka bo e tsile e tswa kwa Sione! E tlaa re motlhang Jehofa o busang botshwaro jwa batho ba gagwe, foo Jakobe o tlaa itumela le Iseraele o tlaa ipela." 
Psalms15:1 Jehofa, e mang yo o tlaa tlholatlholang mo motlaaganeng wa gago? E mang yo o tlaa agang mo thabaneng ya gago e e boitshepo?" 
Psalms15:2 Ke motho yo o tsamayang ka thokgamo, a dira tshiamo, a bile a bua boammaaruri mo pelong ya gagwe." 
Psalms15:3 Yo o sa pateletseng ka loleme lwa gagwe, le fa e le go direla tsala ya gagwe bosula, le fa e le go amogela kgobo ka ga wa ga gabo." 
Psalms15:4 Yo setlhobogwana se nyatsegang mo matlhong a gagwe; mme o tlotla bone ba ba boifang Jehofa. Yo e a reng a ikutlwisitse botlhoko ka go ikana ga gagwe, a se ke a fetoge." 
Psalms15:5 Yo o sa neeleleng madi a gagwe gore a okediwe, le fa e le go amogela tuelo go tlhokofatsa yo o se nang molato. Yo o dirang dilo tse ga a ketla a tshikinyega gope." 
Psalms16:1 Ntibela, Modimo; gonne ke ikanya mo go wena." 
Psalms16:2 Ke reile Jehofa ka re: “O Morena wa me; ga ke na molemo ope kwa ntle ga gago.” 
Psalms16:3 Ka ga baitshepi ba ba mo lefatsheng, ke bone batlotlegi bogolo, ba go itumela ga me gotlhe go leng mo go bone." 
Psalms16:4 Ba ba ananyang Jehofa ka modimo o sele, mahutsana a bone a tla ntsifadiwa; ditshupelo tsa bone tse di nowang tsa madi, ga nketla ke di isa, le fa e le go umaka maina a medimo ya bona ka dipounama tsa me." 
Psalms16:5 Jehofa ke kabelo ya boswa jwa me, le ya senwelo sa me; o emetse se ke se abetsweng." 
Psalms16:6 Melelwane e ntiteetse mo mafelong a mantle; ee, ke na le boswa jo bontle." 
Psalms16:7 Ke tla baka Jehofa, yo o nneileng kgakololo; ee, diphilo tsa me di a nthuta mo dipakeng tsa bosigo." 
Psalms16:8 Ke ntse ke tlhomile Jehofa fa pele ga me ka gale; e re ka a le ka fa tsogong la me le legolo, ga nketla ke tshikinyega." 
Psalms16:9 Ke gone ka mo pelo ya me e itumelang, le kgalalelo ya me e ipelang; nama ya me le yone e tlaa nna mo polokegong." 
Psalms16:10 Gonne ga o ketla o tlogelela Bobipo mowa wa me; le gone ga o ketla o lesa moitshepi wa gago a bona go bola. 
Psalms16:11 O tlaa ntshupetsa tsela ya botshelo; fa pele ga gago go na le letlotlo la boitumelo; mo seatleng sa gago se segolo go na le tse di jesang monate ka bosakhutleng. 
Psalms17:1 Utlwa e e leng tshiamo Jehofa, o tlhokomele go goa ga me; tsebe o e beele morapelo wa me o o sa tsweng mo dipounameng tse di ipatang." 
Psalms17:2 Go atlholwa ga me a go tswe mo go wena; matlho a gago a lebe ka tekatekanyo. 
Psalms17:3 O hukuditse pelo ya me; o ntekotse bosigo; o ntekile, mme ga o a fitlhela sepe; ke ikaeletse go re molomo wa me ga o ketla o tlola." 
Psalms17:4 Ka ga ditiro tsa batho, ke ithibile mo ditseleng tsa bathubaki ka lefoko la dipounama tsa gago." 
Psalms17:5 Dikgato tsa me di tshwere ditselana tsa gago ka thata, dinao tsa me ga di a relela." 
Psalms17:6 Ke bileditse koo go wena, gonne o tlaa nkaraba Modimo; sekegela tsebe ya gago kwa go nna, o utlwe puo ya me." 
Psalms17:7 Supa bopelonomi jwa gago jwa lorato jo bo tseanyang wena yo o dibelang ba ba go ikanyang, o ba dibele ka letsogo la gago le legolo mo go ba ba ba tsogologelang." 
Psalms17:8 Mpoloka jaaka thaka ya leitlho, o mphitlhe mo moriting wa diphuka tsa gago." 
Psalms17:9 O ntshubele baikepi ba ba nthopang, baba ba me ba ba bolayang ba ba ntikileng." 
Psalms17:10 Ba apesitswe ke mahura a bone; ba bua ka boikgogomoso ka melomo ya bone. 
Psalms17:11 Ba re dikile jaanong mo dikgatong tsa rona; ba tlhoma matlho a bone gore ba re digele fa fatshe. 
Psalms17:12 O ntse jaaka tau e e bogagaru mo go se e se bolaileng, le jaaka ekete ledumedi le le lalelang mo mafelong a boiphitlho." 
Psalms17:13 Tloga o eme Jehofa, o mo kgatlhantshe, o mo dige; golola mowa wa me mo baikeping ka tšhaka ya gago;" 
Psalms17:14 mo banneng, ka seatla sa gago, Jehofa, mo banneng ba lefatshe ba kabelo ya bone e leng mo botshelong jono, le ba o ba kgorisang mpa ka khumo ya gago; ba itumedisiwa ke go tshola bana, mme letlotlo le le setseng ba le tlogelele banyana ba bone ba bannye." 
Psalms17:15 Ka ga me, ke tlaa leba sefatlhogo sa gago mo tshiamong; ke tlaa itumedisiwa ke tshwano ya gago mogang ke tsogang." 
Psalms18:1 Ke a go rata Jehofa, thata ya me." 
Psalms18:2 Jehofa ke lefika la me, le kago ya me ya phemelo, le mogolodi wa me; Modimo wa me, lefika la me le le thata, ke tlaa ikanya mo go one; thebe ya me, le lonaka lwa poloko ya me, le kago ya me e e godileng ya tlhabanelo." 
Psalms18:3 Ke tlaa bitsa Jehofa yo o tshwanetsweng ke go bakwa; jalo ke tlaa bolokwa mo babeng ba me. 
Psalms18:4 Dikgole tsa loso di ne di ntsentse gare, le merwalela ya boikepo ya mpoifisa." 
Psalms18:5 Dikgole tsa Bobipo di ne di ntharile; dirai tsa loso tsa nkwela. 
Psalms18:6 Mo pitlaganong ya me ka bitsa Jehofa, ka goela Modimong wa me; a utlwa lentswe la me a le mo tempeleng ya gagwe e e boitshepo, selelo sa me fa pele ga gagwe sa mo tsena ka ditsebe." 
Psalms18:7 Foo lefatshe la reketla la roroma, metheo ya dithaba le yone ya suta ya reketla, ka gobo a le bogale thata." 
Psalms18:8 Ga kua mosi o tswa dinkong tsa gagwe, molelo o o tswang mo molomong wa gagwe wa laila; magala a tshubiwa ke one." 
Psalms18:9 Magodimo le one a a oba, a ba a fologa; lefifi le lentsho la bo le le fa tlase ga dinao tsa gagwe." 
Psalms18:10 A bo a palame tšheruba, a fofa; ee, a fofa ka bofefo mo diphukeng tsa phefo." 
Psalms18:11 A dira lefifi felo ga gagwe ga maiphitlho, mogope wa gagwe ka fa ntlheng tsotlhe tsa gagwe; lefifi la metsi, maru a maima a legodimo." 
Psalms18:12 Ka go galalela mo go neng go mo eteletse pele, maru a gagwe a maima a feta, sefako le magala a molelo." 
Psalms18:13 le gone Jehofa a dumisa maru mo magodimong, Mogodimodimo a ntsha kodu; sefako le magala a molelo." 
Psalms18:14 A hula metswi ya gagwe a ba phatlalatsa; ee, dikgadima di le dintsi mme a ba phatlalatsa a ba alola." 
Psalms18:15 Foo meedi ya metsi ya bonala, metheo ya lefatshe le yone ya bipololwa, ka kgalemo ya gago, Jehofa, ka pudulo ya mowa wa dinko tsa gago." 
Psalms18:16 A roma a le godimong, a ntsaya; a ntshwatola mo metsing a magolo." 
Psalms18:17 A nkgolola mo mmabeng wa me yo o thata, le mo go ba ba nkidileng, gonne ba le thata bobe mo go nna." 
Psalms18:18 Ba ne ba nkwela godimo mo letsatsing la tatlhego ya me; mme Jehofa ya nna ene seitshwarelelo sa me. 
Psalms18:19 A nntshetsa kwa felong fa go atlhameng; a nkgolola, ka gobo a itumela thata mo go nna." 
Psalms18:20 Jehofa o ne a ntuela ka fa tshiamong ya me; ka fa go itshepeng ga diatla tsa me o ntefetse. 
Psalms18:21 Gonne ke tshwere ditsela tsa ga Jehofa, le gone ga ke a kgaogana le Modimo wa me ka go ikepa." 
Psalms18:22 Gonne dikatlholo tsotlhe tsa gagwe di ne di le fa pele ga me, mme ke se ka ka tlosa melao ya gagwe fa go nna." 
Psalms18:23 Le gone ke ne ke le boitekanelo mo go ene, mme ka ithiba mo boikepong jwa me." 
Psalms18:24 Ke gone ka moo Jehofa o ntefetseng ka fa tshiamong ya me, ka fa go itshepeng ga diatla tsa me mo matlhong a gagwe." 
Psalms18:25 Yo o kutlwelobotlhoko o tlaa mo itshupetsa fa o le kutlwelobotlhoko; monna yo o boitekanelo o tlaa mo itshupetsa o le boitekanelo; 
Psalms18:26 yo o itshekileng o tlaa mo itshupetsa o le boitsheko; yo o kgopo o tlaa mo itshupetsa fa o le lesoko. 
Psalms18:27 Gonne o tlaa boloka batho ba ba patikwang; matlho a a kadileng o tlaa a bokalatsa. 
Psalms18:28 Gonne o tlaa tshuba lobone lwa me; Jehofa Modimo wa me o tlaa bonesa lefifi la me. 
Psalms18:29 Gonne ke sotlhomela lesomo ka wena; ke ba ke tlola lorako ka Modimo wa me. 
Psalms18:30 Ka ga Modimo, tsela ya one e lekanetse; lefoko la ga Jehofa le lekilwe; ene ke thebe mo go bone botlhe ba ba mo ikanyang." 
Psalms18:31 Gonne yo e leng Modimo ke mang, fa e se Jehofa? Yo o leng lefika ke mang, fa e se Modimo wa rona?" 
Psalms18:32 E bong Modimo o o ntlamang ka nonofo, o bo o dire tsela ya me e nne boitekanelo." 
Psalms18:33 O dira dinao tsa me go nna jaaka maoto a tshephe; mme o mpeye mo mafelong a me a a godimo. 
Psalms18:34 O ruta diatla tsa me go tlhabana; mabogo a me a ba a tle a obe bora jwa kgotlho. 
Psalms18:35 O bile o nneile le thebe ya poloka ya gago; letsogo la gago le le siameng le ntshegeditse, le bonolo jwa gago bo ntirile mogolo." 
Psalms18:36 Dikgato tsa me o di atlhamoloseditse fa tlase ga me, dinao tsa me ga di a relela." 
Psalms18:37 Ke tlaa khukhela baba ba me, ke ba tshwara; le gone ga nketla ke bowa go tsamaya ba nyelediwa pele." 
Psalms18:38 Ke tlaa ba kgabuka, ba ba ba tla ba retelelwa ke go tsoga; ba tlaa wela fa tlase ga dinao tsa me." 
Psalms18:39 Gonne o ntlamanyeditse tlhabano ka nonofo; bone ba ba neng ba ntsogologetse o ba khubamisitse fa tlase ga me. 
Psalms18:40 Le gone o dirile gore baba ba me ba nneye mekotla gore ke tle ke kgaole ba ba nkilang. 
Psalms18:41 Ba ne ba goa, mme ga bo go se na ope yo o bolokang; le kwa go Jehofa, mme a se ka a ba araba." 
Psalms18:42 Foo ka ba leta jaaka lorole fa pele ga phefo; ka ba gelolela kwa ntle jaaka seretse sa mebila. 
Psalms18:43 O nkgolotse mo petapetanong tsa batho; o ntirile tlhogo ya merafe; sešaba se ke ntseng ke sa se itse se tlaa ntirela. 
Psalms18:44 Ba tlaa re fela ba utlwa ga me, ba bo ba ineela fela mo go nna; baeng ba tlaa inkhubamisetsa." 
Psalms18:45 Baeng ba tlaa kaologa, mme ba tlaa tla ba roroma, ba tswa mo dipharong tsa bone." 
Psalms18:46 Jehofa o tshedile; a go bakwe lefika la me; a go godisiwe Modimo wa poloko ya me; 
Psalms18:47 e bong Modimo o o mpusolosetsang, o ba o khubamisa batho fa tlase ga me." 
Psalms18:48 O mphalodisa mo babeng ba me; ee, o a tle o nkgoleletse godimo ga ba ba ntsogologelang; o nkgolole mo mothong yo o thubakang." 
Psalms18:49 Ke gone ka mo ke tlaa go ntshetsang malebogo, Jehofa, mo merafeng, ke tlaa opelela leina la gago dipako." 
Psalms18:50 O naya kgosi ya gagwe kgololego e kgolo; o supetsa motlodiwa wa gagwe bopelonomi mo go Dafite le losika lwa gagwe go ya bosakhutleng. 
Psalms19:1 Magodimo a bolela kgalalelo ya Modimo; phuthologo le yone e supa tiro ya diatla tsa one. 
Psalms19:2 Letsatsi le tlhomaganya puo le letsatsi le lengwe, bosigo bo tlhomaganya tshupo ya kitso le bosigo jo bongwe." 
Psalms19:3 Ga go na puo le fa e le loleme; lentswe la one ga le ka ke la utlwiwa. 
Psalms19:4 Thapo ya one e e lekanyang e ile go ralala lefatshe lotlhe, le mafoko a one a ile kwa bokhutlong jwa lefatshe. O tlhometse letsatsi motlaagana mo go one." 
Psalms19:5 Le ntse jaaka monyadi fa a tswa mo borobalong jwa gagwe, le ba le itumela jaaka monna yo o thata fa a siana mo tshianong ya gagwe." 
Psalms19:6 Go tswa ga lone go simologe kwa bokhutlong jwa legodimo, go dikologa ga lone go ye kwa dikhutlong tsa gone; mme ga go na sepe se se fitlhegetseng mogote wa lone." 
Psalms19:7 Molao wa ga Jehofa o itekanetse, o rudisa mowa; tshupo ya ga Jehofa e tlhomamo, e tlhalefisa ba ba sa tlhalefang." 
Psalms19:8 Ditao tsa ga Jehofa di siame, di itumedisa pelo; taolo ya ga Jehofa e itshekile, e tsenya matlho lesedi." 
Psalms19:9 Poifo ya ga Jehofa e ntle, e ntse ka bosakhutleng; dikatlholo tsa ga Jehofa di boammaaruri, di siame fela gotlhe." 
Psalms19:10 Di eletsega bogolo go gouta, ee, bogolo go gouta e ntsi, e e bontle bogolo; di bile di botshe bogolo go dinotshe, le bogolo go lomepa lwa dinotshe." 
Psalms19:11 Le gone gape motlhanka wa gago o tlhagisiwa ke tsone; mo go di tshegetseng go tuelo e kgolo. 
Psalms19:12 E mang yo o ka lemogang ditimelo tsa gagwe? A ko o ntlose melato e e fitlhegileng. 
Psalms19:13 O bo o kganele motlhanka wa gago mo maleong a boitaletso; a a se nne le taolo mo go nna; foo ke tlaa nna boitekanelo, ke tlaa bo ke se molato wa tlolo e kgolo." 
Psalms19:14 A mafoko a molomo wa me, le go akanya ga pelo ya me, go nne tebosego mo ponong ya gago, Jehofa, lefika la me le morekolodi wa me." 
Psalms20:1 A Jehofa a go arabe mo letsatsing la khuduego; a leina la Modimo wa ga Jakobe le go beye kwa godimo; 
Psalms20:2 a a go isetse thuso e e tswang felong ga boitshepo, a be a go kokotletse a le mo Sione;" 
Psalms20:3 a a gakologelwe ditshupelo tsotlhe tsa gago, a be a amogele setlhabelo sa gago sa phiso. Sela." 
Psalms20:4 A a go neye keletso ya pelo ya gago, mme a dirafatse kgakololo yotlhe ya gago." 
Psalms20:5 Re tlaa jela poloka ya gago koma, re tlaa fokisa mekgele ya rona mo ineng la Modimo wa rona; a Jehofa a dirafatse ditopo tsotlhe tsa gago." 
Psalms20:6 Jaanong ke a itse fa Jehofa a boloka motlodiwa wa gagwe; o tlaa mo fetola a le kwa legodimong la gagwe le le boitshepo, ka thata e e bolokang ya letsogo la gagwe le legolo." 
Psalms20:7 Bangwe ba ikanya dikara tsa tlhabano, ba bangwe dipitse fela; mme rona re tlaa nna re umaka leina la ga Jehofa, Modimo wa rona." 
Psalms20:8 Bone ba obame ba ole; mme rona re tsogile, re eme re thokgame." 
Psalms20:9 Jehofa, boloka: a Kgosi e re arabe mogang re bitsang." 
Psalms21:1 Kgosi e tlaa itumela mo thateng ya gago Jehofa; e tlaa ipela mo gogolo jang mo polokong ya gago! 
Psalms21:2 O e neile keletso ya pelo ya yone, ga o a gana topo ya dipounama tsa yone. Sela." 
Psalms21:3 O e tletse pele ka masego a molemo; wa baya serwalo sa gouta e e bontle bogolo mo tlhogong ya yone. 
Psalms21:4 E go lopile botshelo, wa e bo naya; e bong boleele jwa malatsi ka bosakhutleng le ka bosaengkae." 
Psalms21:5 Kgalalelo ya yone e kgolo mo polokeng ya gago; o baya tlotlo le borena mo go ene. 
Psalms21:6 Gonne o dira gore a nne sego bogolo thata ka bosakhutleng; wa mo jesa monate ka boitumelo fa pele ga gago. 
Psalms21:7 Gonne kgosi e ikantse Jehofa; ka ntlha ya bopelonomi jwa lorato jwa Mogodimodimo ga e ketla e tshikinyega. 
Psalms21:8 Letsogo la gago le tlaa phoroma baba botlhe ba gago; letsogo la gago le legolo le tlaa phoroma ba ba go ilang. 
Psalms21:9 O tlaa ba dira jaaka leiso la mouba le le molelolelo mo motlheng wa bogale jwa gago. Jehofa o tlaa ba kometsa mo tšhakgalong ya gagwe, mme molelo o tlaa ba laila o ba nyeletsa." 
Psalms21:10 Loungo lwa bone o tlaa lo senya lo tswa mo lefatsheng, le losika lwa bone lo tswa mo baneng ba batho." 
Psalms21:11 Gonne ba ne ba laotse bosula ka ga gago; ba loga maano a ba sa nonofang go a dirafatsa. 
Psalms21:12 Gonne o tlaa ba retolola, O itse go laelela sefatlhogo sa bone ka megala ya bora jwa gago." 
Psalms21:13 O nne o goletsege, Jehofa, ka thata e e leng ya gago; jalo re tlaa opela, re ba re baka nonofo ya gago." 
Psalms22:1 Modimo wa me, Modimo wa me, o ntatlhetseng? Ke ka ntlha yang o le kgakala le go nthusa, o bile o kgakala le mantswe a go bokolela ga me?" 
Psalms22:2 Modimo wa me wee, ke bitsa motshegare, mme ga o nkarabe; le mo lobakeng lwa bosigo ga ke didimale." 
Psalms22:3 Mme wena o boitshepo; wena yo o ntseng mo dipakong tsa Iseraele. 
Psalms22:4 Borraetsho ba ne ba go ikanya; ba ikanya, mme wa nna wa ba golola." 
Psalms22:5 Ba go kuela, mme ba gololwa; ba ikanya mo go wena, mme ba se ka ba tlhajwa ke ditlhong." 
Psalms22:6 Nna ke seboko fela, ga ke motho wa sepe; ke sekgobo sa batho, ke sotlwa ke batho." 
Psalms22:7 Botlhe ba ba mponang ba ntshega ka go ntshotla; ba petla molomo, ba thukutha tlhogo, ba re:" 
Psalms22:8 “Ineele mo go Jehofa; a ene a mo golole; a a mo golole ka e le fa a itumela thata mo go ene.” 
Psalms22:9 Mme wena, o ene yo o nntshitseng mo sebopelong; wa ntira gore ke ikanye jale ka ke le mo mabeleng a ga mme." 
Psalms22:10 Ke sa le ke latlhelwa mo go wena ke tswa mo sebopelong; ke sa le ke tswa mo mpeng ya ga mme o ntse o le Modimo wa me. 
Psalms22:11 Se nne kgakala le nna; gonne khuduego e gaufi; ka gobo go se na ope yo o thusang. 
Psalms22:12 Dipoo di le dintsi di mpharafere; dipoo tse di thata tsa Bašana di ntikile. 
Psalms22:13 Di Nkatlhamiseditse magano a tsone, jaaka tau e e šakgetseng, e e pepedumang." 
Psalms22:14 Ke tshologile jaaka metsi, marapo a me a lokologile otlhe; pelo ya me e ntse jaaka makgaga; e tlhapologile fa gare ga mala a me." 
Psalms22:15 Thata ya me e omeletse jaaka lophego; loleme lwa me le lone lo mamaretse magalapa a me; mme o nterile mo loroleng lwa loso. 
Psalms22:16 Gonne dintša di mpharafere; phuthego ya badiri ba bosula e ntiteetse mo teng; ba tlhabile diatla tsa me, le dinao tsa me." 
Psalms22:17 Nka bala marapo a me otlhe fela; ba lebile ba nkaletse matlho. 
Psalms22:18 Ba kgaogana diaparo tsa me, mme kobo ya me ba e laola ka bola." 
Psalms22:19 O se ka wa nna kgakala, Jehofa; wena Moelamedi wa me, o intlhaganelele go nthusa." 
Psalms22:20 Golola mowa wa me mo tšhakeng; moratwanyana wa me mo thateng ya ntša. 
Psalms22:21 Nkgolola mo leganong la tau; ee, o nkarabile le ke le mo dinakeng tsa dinare." 
Psalms22:22 Ke tlaa kakanyetsa bana ba ga rre leina la gago; mo gare ga phuthego ke tlaa go baka. 
Psalms22:23 Lona ba lo boifang Jehofa, mmakeng; lona lotlhe losika lwa ga Jakobe, mo galaletseng; lona lotlhe losika lwa Iseraele, lo eme ka go mmoifa." 
Psalms22:24 Gonne ga a a nyatsa, le fa e le go feretlhwa ke patikego ya mopatikwi; le gone ga a a mo subela sefatlhogo sa gagwe; mme o rile a mo ikuela, a utlwa." 
Psalms22:25 Ke ka ga gago fa pako ya me e tswa mo phuthegong e kgolo; ke tlaa lefela maikano a me fa pele ga bone ba ba mmoifang. 
Psalms22:26 Ba ba pelonolo ba tlaa ja ba kgora; bone ba ba senkang Jehofa, ba tlaa mmaka; a pelo tsa lona di tshele ka bosakhutleng." 
Psalms22:27 Dikhutlo tsotlhe tsa lefatshe di tlaa gakologelwa, di boela mo go Jehofa; le ditshika tsotlhe tsa merafe di tlaa obama fa pele ga gago." 
Psalms22:28 Gonne bogosi ke jwa ga Jehofa; ke ene mmusi wa merafe. 
Psalms22:29 Botlhe ba ba nonneng ba lefatshe ba tlaa ja, ba obama; botlhe ba ba fologelang mo loroleng ba tlaa khubama fa pele ga gagwe, le e leng ene yo o se nang thata ya go itshedisa mowa." 
Psalms22:30 Losika longwe lo tlaa mo direla; go tlaa bolelelwa losika lo lo tlang ka ga Jehofa. 
Psalms22:31 Ba tlaa tla, ba tlaa kakanya tshiamo ya gagwe mo bathong ba ba tlogang ba tsalwa, fa ene a go dirile." 
Psalms23:1 Jehofa ke modisa wa me; ga nketla ke tlhoka sepe. 
Psalms23:2 O mpothisa mo mafulong a matalana; o nkgogela ka fa metsing a a didimetseng. 
Psalms23:3 O rudisa mowa wa me; o ntsamaisa mo ditseleng tsa tshiamo ka ntlha ya leina la gagwe. 
Psalms23:4 Ee, le fa ke ralala mogogoro wa moriti wa loso, ga nketla ke boifa bosula bope; gonne o na le nna; kgoge ya gago, le thobane ya gago, tsone di a nkgomotsa." 
Psalms23:5 O a tle o baakanye bojelo fa pele ga me, mo ponong ya baba ba me; o tloditse tlhogo ya me ka lookwane; senwelo sa me se a penologa." 
Psalms23:6 Ruri molemo o tlaa ntshala morago le boutlwelobotlhoko, ka malatsi otlhe a go tshela ga me; mme ke tlaa aga mo ntlong ya ga Jehofa ka bosakhutleng." 
Psalms24:1 Lefatshe ke la ga Jehofa, le botlalo jwa lone; lefatshe le ba ba agileng mo go lone." 
Psalms24:2 Ka gobo o le theile mo mawatleng, o le tlhomamisitse mo merwaleleng." 
Psalms24:3 E mang yo o tlaa tlhatlogelang mo thabaneng ya ga Jehofa? Mme mang yo o tlaa emang mo felong ga gagwe ga boitshepo? 
Psalms24:4 Ke yo o diatla dintle le pelo e e itshekileng; yo o se kang a tsholeletsa mowa wa gagwe kwa boithamakong, mme a sa ikana ka go tsietsa." 
Psalms24:5 Ene o tlaa amogela letlhogonolo mo go Jehofa, le tshiamo mo Modimong wa poloko ya gagwe." 
Psalms24:6 Lo, ke lone losika lwa ba ba o senkang, ba ba senkang sefatlhogo sa gago, Modimo wa ga Jakobe. Sela." 
Psalms24:7 Tsholetsang ditlhogo, lona dikgoro; tsholetsegang lona mejako e e sa leng e nna go tswa tsose; mme Kgosi ya kgalalelo e tlaa tsena." 
Psalms24:8 Kgosi ya kgalalelo e mang? Ke Jehofa yo o thata, yo o bonatla, Jehofa yo o bonatla mo ntweng." 
Psalms24:9 Tsholetsang ditlhogo, lona dikgoro; ee, lo di tsholetse, lona mejako e e ntseng ka bosakhutleng; mme Kgosi ya kgalalelo e tlaa tsena." 
Psalms24:10 Kgosi eo ya kgalalelo ke mang? Jehofa wa masomosomo, ke ene Kgosi ya kgalalelo. Sela." 
Psalms25:1 Ke tsholeletsa mowa wa me kwa go wena, Jehofa." 
Psalms25:2 Modimo wa me, ke ikantse mo go wena, a ke se tlhajwe ke ditlhong, a baba ba me ba se njele koma." 
Psalms25:3 Ee, mo go bone ba ba go lebeletseng, ga go na ope yo o tlaa tlhajwang ke ditlhong; go tlaa tlhajwa ke ditlhong bone ba ba dirang ka mooko ka bomo." 
Psalms25:4 Ntshupetsa metlhala ya gago Jehofa; o nthute ditsela tsa gago. 
Psalms25:5 Ntsamaisa mo boammaaruring jwa gago o bo o nthute; gonne ke wena Modimo wa poloko ya me; ke lebelela mo go wena ka letsatsi lotlhe. 
Psalms25:6 Jehofa, gakologelwa mautlwelobotlhoko a gago a manana, le mapelonomi a gago a lorato; gonne a ntse a le gone e sa le bogologolo." 
Psalms25:7 O se ka wa gakologelwa maleo a jale ke sa le lekau, le fa e le ditlolo tsa me; o nkgakologelwe ka fa bopelonoming jwa gago jwa lorato, ka ntlha ya molemo wa gago Jehofa." 
Psalms25:8 Jehofa o molemo le thokgamo; ke gone ka moo o tlaa rutang baleofi ka ga tsela. 
Psalms25:9 Ba ba pelonolo o tlaa ba tsamaisa mo tshiamisong; ba ba pelonolo o tlaa ba ruta tsela ya gagwe. 
Psalms25:10 Ditsela tsotlhe tsa ga Jehofa di bopelonomi jwa lorato le boammaaruri fela mo go bone ba ba bolokang kgolagano ya gagwe le ditshupo tsa gagwe. 
Psalms25:11 Ka ntlha ya leina la gago Jehofa, o tle o itshwarele boikepo jwa me, gonne bo bogolo." 
Psalms25:12 Motho ke ofe yo o boifang Jehofa? Ke ene o tlaa mo rutang mo tseleng e o tlaa e itshenkelang. 
Psalms25:13 Mowa wa gagwe o tlaa aga o iketlile; losika lwa gagwe lo tlaa rua lefatshe. 
Psalms25:14 Maoma a ga Jehofa a na le ba ba mmoifang; mme o tlaa ba supetsa kgolagano ya gagwe. 
Psalms25:15 Matlho a me a ntse a lebile Jehofa fela ka gale; gonne o tlaa phamola dinao tsa me mo lotloeng. 
Psalms25:16 Retologela kwa go nna, o nkutlwele botlhoko; gonne ke swafetse, ke patikegile." 
Psalms25:17 Dikhuduego tsa pelo ya me di goletse pele; a o ko o nntshe mo dipitlaganong tsa me. 
Psalms25:18 Sekaseka patikego ya me le thekisego ya me; mme o itshwarele maleo a me otlhe. 
Psalms25:19 Sekaseka baba ba me, gonne ba bantsi; ba nkila ka kilo e e bolalome." 
Psalms25:20 A ko o dibele mowa wa me, mme o nkgolole; a ke se ka ka tlhajwa ke ditlhong, gonne ke ikanya mo go wena." 
Psalms25:21 A botlhoka molato le thokgamo di mpoloke, gonne ke lebeletse mo go wena." 
Psalms25:22 Modimo, golola Iseraele, o mo ntshe mo dikhuduegong tsotlhe tsa gagwe." 
Psalms26:1 Nkatlhola, Jehofa, gonne ke ntse ke tsamaya mo go tlhokeng molato ga me; ke bile ke ikantse Jehofa, ke sa kabakanye." 
Psalms26:2 Nkeleka, Jehofa o mphukutse; leka diphilo tsa me, le pelo ya me." 
Psalms26:3 Gonne bopelonomi jwa gago jwa lorato bo fa pele ga matlho a me; mme ke ntse ke tsamaya mo boammaaruring jwa gago. 
Psalms26:4 Ke ntse ke sa dule le batho ba boithamako; le gone ga nketla ke tsenatsena le baitimokanyi. 
Psalms26:5 Ke ila phuthego ya badira dibe, ke gana go dula le baikepi." 
Psalms26:6 Ke tlaa tlhapa diatla tsa me mo bophepeng fela; jalo ke tlaa dikanyeletsa sebeso sa gago, Jehofa." 
Psalms26:7 Gore ke tle ke utlwatse lentswe la tebogo, ke be ke bolele ka ga ditiro tsotlhe tsa gago tse di gakgamatsang." 
Psalms26:8 Jehofa, ke rata boago jwa ntlo ya gago le felo fa kgalalelo ya gago, e agileng gone." 
Psalms26:9 O se ka wa gogobela mowa wa me le baleofi, le fa e le botshelo jwa me le batsholodi ba madi;" 
Psalms26:10 ba bosenyi bo mo diatleng tsa bone, le ba seatla sa bone se segolo se tletseng dituelo tsa phaposo." 
Psalms26:11 Ka ga me ke tlaa nna ke tsamaya mo go tlhokeng molato ga me; nthekolola, mme o nne kutlwelobotlhoko mo go nna." 
Psalms26:12 Lonao lwa me lo eme fa go papannweng; ke tlaa baka Jehofa mo diphuthegong. 
Psalms27:1 Jehofa ke lesedi la me, le poloka ya me; ke tlaa boifa mang? Jehofa ke thata ya botshelo jwa me, ke tlaa nna mo poifong ka ga mang?" 
Psalms27:2 E rile badira bosula ba nkwela ba tla go ja nama ya me, e bong baganetsi ba me le baba ba me, ba kgopiwa ba wa." 
Psalms27:3 Le fa ntwa e ka tla ya thibelela fa tlase ga me, pelo ya me ga e ketla e boifa; le fa tlhabano e ka tla ya ntsogela, le gone moo ke tlaa nna boikanyo fela." 
Psalms27:4 Ke lopile selo sengwe mo go Jehofa, ke sone se ke tlaa se senkang; ke gore ke tle ke age mo ntlong ya ga Jehofa ka malatsi otlhe a botshelo jwa me, go leba bontle jwa ga Jehofa le go botsa mo tempeleng ya gagwe." 
Psalms27:5 Gonne e tlaa re mo motlheng wa khuduego o tlaa mpoloka ka go sa itsiweng mo mogopeng wa gagwe; o tlaa mphitlha mo sekhuting sa motlaagana wa gagwe; o tlaa ntsholetsa a mpaya mo lefikeng. 
Psalms27:6 Mme jaana tlhogo ya me e tlaa tsholediwa godimo ga baba ba me ba ba mo tikologong ya me; mme ke tlaa isa mo motlaaganeng wa gagwe ditshupelo tsa meduduetso; ke tlaa opela, ee, ke tlaa opelela Jehofa dipako." 
Psalms27:7 Jehofa, utlwa mogang ke goang ka lentswe la me; o bo o nkutlwele botlhoko, mme o nkarabe." 
Psalms27:8 E rile fa o re: “Batlang sefatlhogo sa me,” pelo ya me ya go raya ya re: “Sefatlhogo sa gago Jehofa, ke tlaa se batla.”" 
Psalms27:9 O se ka wa mphitlhela sefatlhogo sa gago; o se ka wa kgorometsa motlhanka wa gago ka bogale; wena o ntse o le thuso ya me; o se ka wa ntatlha, le gone o se ka wa ntlogela, wena Modimo wa poloko ya me." 
Psalms27:10 Gonne rre le mme ba ntatlhile, mme Jehofa o tlaa ntshola." 
Psalms27:11 Nthuta motlhala wa gago, Jehofa, o ntsamaise mo tseleng e e bonalang, ka ntlha ya baba ba me." 
Psalms27:12 O se ka wa nneela mo go rateng ga baganetsi ba me; gonne basupi ba maaka ba ntsogologetse, le ba ba budulang bopeloethata." 
Psalms27:13 Nkabo ne ne fano ke idibetse, fa ke ne ke se ka ka dumela fa ke tlaa bona molemo wa ga Jehofa mo lefatsheng la batshedi." 
Psalms27:14 Lebelela mo go Jehofa; o nne thata, mme a pelo ya gago e natlafale; ee, lebelela mo go Jehofa." 
Psalms28:1 Ke tlaa tlhaeleletsa koo go wena, Jehofa; lefika la me, o se ka wa ipaya bosusu mo go nna; e ka tla ya re fa o ntidimaletse, ka nna jaaka ba ba fologelang mo moleteng." 
Psalms28:2 Utlwa lentswe la mekokotlelo ya me, mogang ke go kuang, mogang ke tsholeletsang mabogo a me kwa felong ga bobuelo fa go boitshepo ga gago." 
Psalms28:3 O se ka wa nkgogolela le baikepi, le ba ba dirang tshiamololo; ba ba buang kagiso le ba ga bone, mme go senya go le mo pelong tsa bone." 
Psalms28:4 Ba neye ka fa tirong ya bone le ka fa boikepong jwa go diradira ga bone; ba neye ka fa go direng ga diatla tsa bone; o ba neye tshwanelo ya bone. 
Psalms28:5 E re ka ba sa tlhokomele ditiro tsa ga Jehofa, le go dira ga diatla tsa gagwe, o tlaa ba rutlolola, e seng go ba a ba aga." 
Psalms28:6 A go bakwe Jehofa ka a utlwile lentswe la mekokotlelo ya me. 
Psalms28:7 Jehofa ke thata ya me le thebe ya me; pelo ya me e ikantse mo go ene, mme ke thusegile; ka moo pelo ya me e itumela thata; mme ke tlaa mmaka ka sefela sa me." 
Psalms28:8 Jehofa ke thata ya bone, e bile ke kago e e thata ya phemelo ya poloka ya motlodiwa wa gagwe." 
Psalms28:9 Boloka batho ba gago, mme o segofatse boswa jwa gago; o ba otle le gone, o ba belege ka bosakhutleng." 
Psalms29:1 Nayang Jehofa, lona bomorwa ba ba thata, nayang Jehofa kgalalelo le nonofo." 
Psalms29:2 Nayang Jehofa kgalalelo e e tshwanetseng leina la gagwe; obamelang Jehofa mo bontleng jwa boitshepo. 
Psalms29:3 Lentswe la ga Jehofa le mo godimo ga metsi; Modimo wa kgalalelo o dumisa maru, e bong ene Jehofa mo godimo ga metsi a magolo." 
Psalms29:4 Lentswe la ga Jehofa le nonofile; lentswe la ga Jehofa le tletse borena. 
Psalms29:5 Lentswe la ga Jehofa le roba ditlhare tsa masetara; ee, Jehofa o robaganya masetara a Lebanone." 
Psalms29:6 O bile o a kalapisa jaaka namane; Lebanone le Sirione jaaka pholwana ya nare. 
Psalms29:7 Lentswe la ga Jehofa le fatoganya dikgabo tsa molelo. 
Psalms29:8 Lentswe la ga Jehofa le roromisa naga; Jehofa o roromisa naga ya Kateša. 
Psalms29:9 Lentswe la ga Jehofa le tsadisa ditshephe, le be le fotlhele dikgwa ruri; mme mo tempeleng ya gagwe dilo tsotlhe tsa re: “Kgalalelo!”" 
Psalms29:10 Jehofa o ne a dutse e le kgosi kwa morwaleleng; ee, Jehofa o dutse e le kgosi ka bosakhutleng." 
Psalms29:11 Jehofa o tlaa naya batho ba gagwe nonofo; Jehofa o tlaa segofatsa batho ba gagwe ka kagiso. 
Psalms30:1 Ke tlaa go godisa Jehofa; gonne o ntsholeditse, ga o a ka wa naya baba ba me gore ba itumele ka nna." 
Psalms30:2 Jehofa, Modimo wa me, ke go ikuetse, mme o mphodisitse." 
Psalms30:3 Jehofa, o tlhatlositse mowa wa me mo Bobipong; o ntse o ntshedisitse gore ke se ka ka fologela mo moleteng." 
Psalms30:4 Opelelang Jehofa dipako, lona baitshepi ba gagwe, ntshetsang leina la gagwe le le boitshepo malebogo." 
Psalms30:5 Gonne bogale jwa gagwe bo ema ka ponyo ya leitlho fela; mo tlhogonolofatsong ya gagwe go botshelo; go ka lala go le selelo bosigo, mme e re ka moso go bo go tle boitumelo." 
Psalms30:6 Ka ga me, e rile mo go kokotlegeleng ga me, ke buile, ka re: “Ga nketla ke ba ke tshikinyega gope.”" 
Psalms30:7 Wena, Jehofa, ka botsalano jwa gago o tiisitse thaba ya me gore e eme e nne thata; o ne wa iphitlha sefatlhogo; ka fuduega." 
Psalms30:8 Ka kuela koo go wena, Jehofa; ka isa mekokotlelo kwa go Jehofa." 
Psalms30:9 “E tlaa re ke fologela mo moleteng, madi a me a tlaa bo a na le molemo ofe? A lorole lo tlaa go baka? A lo tlaa bolela boammaaruri jwa gago?" 
Psalms30:10 Utlwa, Jehofa, o nkutlwele botlhoko; Jehofa a e nne wena mothusi wa me.”" 
Psalms30:11 Selelo sa me o se mphetoletse pino; o nkapotse letsela la kgetse, o ntlamile ka boitumelo;" 
Psalms30:12 e le gore kgalalelo ya me e go opelele pako, mme e se ka ya didimala. Jehofa Modimo wa me, ke tlaa go leboga ka bosakhutleng." 
Psalms31:1 Jehofa, ke ikanya mo go wena; a ke se lesiwe ka tlhajwa ke ditlhong gope; o nkgolole o le mo tshiamong ya gago." 
Psalms31:2 Ntlhwaela tsebe; o nkgolole ka bonako; o nne lefika le le thata mo go nna, ntlo ya phemelo go mpoloka." 
Psalms31:3 Gonne wena o lefika la me, le kago ya me ya phemelo; ke gone ka ntlha ya leina la gago, o nkgoge, o bo o ntsamaise." 
Psalms31:4 Mphamola mo lotloeng lo ba lo mpeetseng ka bosaitsiweng, gonne ke wena kago ya me ya phemelo." 
Psalms31:5 Ke tsenya mowa wa me mo seatleng sa gago; O nthekoletse, Jehofa, wena Modimo wa boammaaruri." 
Psalms31:6 Ke a ba ila ba ba tlhokomelang maithamako a maaka; mme ke ikanya mo go Jehofa. 
Psalms31:7 Ke tlaa itumela, ke ipela mo boutlwelongbotlhoko jwa gago, gonne o bonye patikego ya me; o itsile mowa wa me o tshwerwe ke mathata." 
Psalms31:8 Ga o a ka wa nkhupareletsa mo seatleng sa mmaba; o tlhomile dinao tsa me fa go atlhameng. 
Psalms31:9 Nkutlwela botlhoko, Jehofa, gonne ke mo khutsafalong; leitlho la me le fediwa ke bohutsana, ee, mowa wa me le mmele wa me." 
Psalms31:10 Gonne botshelo jwa me bo feletse mo khutsafalong, le dinyaga tsa me mo go fegelweng; thata ya me e a fela ka ntlha ya boikepo jwa me, marapo a me le one a a nyelela." 
Psalms31:11 Ke tsile ka nna sekgobo ka ntlha ya baba botlhe ba me, ee, mo go bagaetsho ga fetelela, ke poitshego mo go ba ke itsanyeng nabo; ba ba kileng ba mpona fa ntle ba ne ba ntshaba." 
Psalms31:12 Ke lebetswe jaaka moswi yo o sa tlholeng a gopolwa; ke ntse jaaka nkgwana e e thubegileng. 
Psalms31:13 Gonne ke utlwile go gobolola ga batho ba le bantsi, go poitsho ka ntlha tsotlhe; ka ba gakololana mmogo ka ga me, ba loga maano a go mpolaya." 
Psalms31:14 Ke ne ka ikanya wena, Jehofa; ka re: O Modimo wa me." 
Psalms31:15 Dipaka tsa me di mo seatleng sa gago; nkgolola mo seatleng sa baba ba me, le mo go ba ba mpogisang." 
Psalms31:16 Phatsimisetsa motlhanka wa gago sefatlhogo sa gago; mpoloka mo bopelonoming jwa gago jwa lorato. 
Psalms31:17 A ke se tlhajwe ke ditlhong Jehofa; gonne ke go biditse. A baikepi ba tlhajwe ke ditlhong, a ba didimale mo Bobipong." 
Psalms31:18 A dipounama tse di akang di nne semumu; tse di sotlang basiami ka makgakga, ka boipelafatso le lonyatso." 
Psalms31:19 Ana molemo wa gago o mogolo jang, o o o beetseng ba ba go boifang, o o o diretseng ba ba ikanyang mo go wena, fa pele ga bana ba batho!" 
Psalms31:20 Mo boiphitlhong jwa sebonalo sa gago o tlaa ba subela ditogamaano tsa batho; o tlaa ba dibela mo kgannyeng ya diteme ka bosaitsiweng mo mogopeng. 
Psalms31:21 A go bakwe Jehofa; gonne o ntshupeditse bopelonomi jwa gagwe jwa lorato jo bo gakgamatsang mo motseng o o thata. 
Psalms31:22 Ka ga me, ke rile mo go potlakeng ga me, ka re: “Ke kgaotswe, ke tlositswe fa pele ga matlho a gago.” Le fa go ntse jalo e rile ke go kua, wa utlwa lentswe la mekokotlelo ya me." 
Psalms31:23 A ko lo rateng Jehofa, lona lotlhe baitshepi ba gagwe: Jehofa o boloka ba ba ikanyegang, mme o duela ka botlalo yo o dirang ka bopelonomi." 
Psalms31:24 Nnang thata, mme dipelo tsa lona di natlafale, lona lotlhe ba lo solofelang mo go Jehofa." 
Psalms32:1 Go sego ene yo tlolo ya gagwe e itshwaretsweng, yo boleo jwa gagwe bo bipilweng." 
Psalms32:2 Go sego motho yo Jehofa o sa mmaleleng boikepo, le yo tsietso e seyong mo moweng wa gagwe." 
Psalms32:3 E rile ke didimetse, marapo a me a onala ka go bokolela ga me ka letsatsi lotlhe." 
Psalms32:4 Gonne seatla sa gago se ne se le boima mo go nna motshegare le bosigo; longola lwa me lwa fetoga jaaka ekete komelelo ya selemo. 
Psalms32:5 Ke ne ka go ipolelela boleo jwa me, le boikepo jwa me ga ke a bo fitlha. Ke rile: “Ke tlaa ipolelela Jehofa ditlolo tsa me,” mme wa itshwarela molato wa boleo jwa me. Sela." 
Psalms32:6 Ka ntlha ya gone mo, a mongwe le mongwe yo e leng moetsa Modimo a go rapele mo motlheng o o ka bonwang ka one; ruri motlhang metsi a magolo a penologang ga a ketla a ba a fitlha kwa go ene." 
Psalms32:7 Wena o boitshubelo jwa me; o tlaa ntibela mo khuduegong; o tlaa ntikanyeletsa ka meduduetso ya kgololego. Sela. 
Psalms32:8 Ke tlaa go laya ke go ruta tsela e o tlaa tsamayang ka yone; ke tlaa go gakolola, leitlho la me le ntse le le mo go wena." 
Psalms32:9 Se nneng jaaka pitse le fa e le jaaka mmoulo, tse di se nang tlhaloganyo; tse go apara ga tsone e tshwanetseng go nna tshipi le dikgole go di thiba, ka di ka tla tsa gana go go atamela." 
Psalms32:10 Mahutsana a le mantsi a tlaa nna mo moikeping; ene yo o ikanyang Jehofa, boutlwelobotlhoko bo tlaa mo dikanyeletsa." 
Psalms32:11 Itumeleng mo go Jehofa, lo bo lo ipele lona basiami; duduetsang ka boitumelo lona lotlhe ba lo leng thokgamo mo pelong." 
Psalms33:1 Itumeleng mo go Jehofa, lona basiami; pako ke bontle jo bo tshwanetseng ba ba thokgameng." 
Psalms33:2 Ntshetsang Jehofa malebogo ka harepe; lo mo opelele ka saletare se se ditlhale di some. 
Psalms33:3 Mo opeleleng sefela se seša; letsang ka botswerere, ka modumo o mogolo." 
Psalms33:4 Gonne lefoko la ga Jehofa le siame; le tiro yotlhe ya gagwe e dirwa mo boikanyegong. 
Psalms33:5 O rata tshiamo le tshiamiso; lefatshe le tletse lorato lo lo tlhomameng lwa ga Jehofa. 
Psalms33:6 Magodimo a dirilwe ka lefoko la ga Jehofa; le lesomosomo lotlhe le le mo go one ka mowa wa molomo wa gagwe. 
Psalms33:7 O kgobokanya metsi a lewatle a nne jaaka mokoa; o beile madiba a a botengteng mo matlong a polokelo. 
Psalms33:8 A lefatshe lotlhe le boife Jehofa; a banni botlhe ba lefatshe ba mo sisimoge. 
Psalms33:9 Gonne o ne a bua, mme ga dirala; a laola, mme ga ema ka tlhomamo." 
Psalms33:10 Jehofa o dira kgakololo ya merafe go nna lefela; o dira megopolo ya ditšhaba go nna e se na tiro. 
Psalms33:11 Kgakololo ya ga Jehofa e eme ka tlhomamo ka bosenabokhutlo, dikgopolo tsa pelo ya gagwe go ya tshikatshikeng." 
Psalms33:12 Go sego morafe o Jehofa e leng Modimo wa one; batho ba o ba itshenketseng gore e nne boswa jwa gagwe ka esi. 
Psalms33:13 Jehofa o okomela a le kwa legodimong; o bona bana botlhe ba batho; 
Psalms33:14 a le mo felong ga boago jwa gagwe, o ntsha matlho o a digela mo banning ba lefatshe." 
Psalms33:15 E bong ene yo o bopang dipelo tsa bone botlhe, yo o akanyang ditiro tsotlhe tsa bone." 
Psalms33:16 Ga go na kgosi epe e e tleng e bolokwe ke bontsi jwa ntwa; motho yo o senatla ga a ke a gololwa ke thata e kgolo. 
Psalms33:17 Pitse ke selo sa lefela fela go boloka; le gone ga e ketla e falodisa ope ka thata e kgolo ya yone. 
Psalms33:18 Bonang, leitlho la ga Jehofa le mo go ba ba mmoifang, mo go ba ba solofelang mo boutlwelongbotlhoko jwa gagwe;" 
Psalms33:19 go golola mowa wa bone mo losong, le go ba tshedisa mo mosweleng." 
Psalms33:20 Mowa wa rona o ntse o lebeletse Jehofa; ke ene thuso ya rona, le thebe ya rona." 
Psalms33:21 Gonne pelo ya rona e tlaa itumela mo go ene, ka gobo re ikantse mo ineng la gagwe le le boitshepo." 
Psalms33:22 “Jehofa, a boutlwelobotlhoko jwa gago bo nne mo go rona, fela ka fa re solofetseng mo go wena ka teng.”" 
Psalms34:1 Ke tlaa baka Jehofa ka metlha yotlhe; pako ya gagwe e tlaa nna ka gale mo molomong wa me. 
Psalms34:2 Mowa wa me o tlaa ipelafatsa mo go Jehofa; ba ba pelonolo ba tlaa go utlwela, mme ba tlaa itumela." 
Psalms34:3 A ko lo godiseng Jehofa le nna, a re goletseng leina la gagwe mmogo." 
Psalms34:4 Ka batla Jehofa, mme a nkaraba, a nkgolola mo dipoifong tsa me tsotlhe fela." 
Psalms34:5 Ba ne ba leba kwa go ene, mme ba sa matlho; difatlhogo tsa bone ga di ketla di sosobagana gope." 
Psalms34:6 Mohumanegi yo, o ne a bitsa, mme Jehofa a mo utlwa, a mo golola mo ditlalelong tsotlhe tsa gagwe." 
Psalms34:7 Moengele wa ga Jehofa o thibelela mo ntlheng tsotlhe tsa ba ba mmoifang, mme o a ba golola." 
Psalms34:8 A ko lo lekeng lo bone fa Jehofa a le molemo; go sego monna yo o mo ikanyang. 
Psalms34:9 A ko lo boifeng Jehofa, lona baitshepi ba gagwe; gonne ga go na go tlhoka mo go ba ba mmoifang." 
Psalms34:10 Ditawana di a tle di tlhoke, di bolawe ke tlala; mme ba ba batlang Jehofa bone, ga ba ketla ba tlhoka sepe se se molemo." 
Psalms34:11 Ntlong lo ntheetseng bana ke lona, ke tlaa lo ruta poifo ya ga Jehofa." 
Psalms34:12 Ke ofe motho yo o eletsang botshelo, a rata bontsi jwa malatsi, gore a tle a bone molemo?" 
Psalms34:13 O kganele loleme lwa gago mo bosuleng le dipounama tsa gago mo go bueng tsietso. 
Psalms34:14 Tlogela bosula, mme o dire molemo; batla kagiso, mme o e latelele." 
Psalms34:15 Matlho a ga Jehofa a mo go ba ba mmoifang, le ditsebe tsa gagwe di kwa go goeng ga bone." 
Psalms34:16 Sefatlhogo sa ga Jehofa se bifetse ba ba dirang bosula, go nyeletsa go gopolwa ga bone mo lefatsheng." 
Psalms34:17 Basiami ba ne ba goa, mme Jehofa a utlwa, a ba golola mo ditlalelong tsotlhe tsa bone." 
Psalms34:18 Jehofa o gaufi le ba ba pelo e phatlogileng, o boloka ba ba mowa o o ngomogileng." 
Psalms34:19 Dipatikego tsa mosiami di dintsi; mme Jehofa o mo golola mo go tsone tsotlhe. 
Psalms34:20 O boloka marapo otlhe a gagwe; ga go na lepe la one le le robegileng. 
Psalms34:21 Bosula bo tlaa bolaya moikepi; le ba ba ilang mosiami ba tlaa sekisiwa. 
Psalms34:22 Jehofa o rekolola mowa wa batlhanka ba gagwe; mo go ba ba mo ikanyang ga go na bape ba ba tlaa bonwang molato. 
Psalms35:1 Jehofa, ganela le ba ba ganelang le nna; o tlhabane le ba ba tlhabanang le nna." 
Psalms35:2 Tsaya thebe le thejane, mme o nkemele go nthusa." 
Psalms35:3 Lerumo le lone o le somole, mme ba ba nkhukhelang o ba thibele tsela; o reye mowa wa me, o re: “Ke nna poloka ya gago.”" 
Psalms35:4 Ba ba tsomang mowa wa me a ba tlhajwe ke ditlhong ba tlotlololwe; ba ba logang maano a go nkutlwisa botlhoko, a ba busediwe kwa morago, ba sosobaganngwe." 
Psalms35:5 A ba nne jaaka mmoko mo phefong, e be e nne moengele wa ga Jehofa yo o ba kgopholang." 
Psalms35:6 A tsela ya bone e nne lefifi le borethe, e le moengele wa ga Jehofa yo o ba khukhelang." 
Psalms35:7 Gonne ba ntshubetse lotloa lwa bone mo lehuting ka bomo; ba epetse mowa wa me lemena ka bomo. 
Psalms35:8 A tshenyego e mo wele a itebetse; a lotloa lwa gagwe lo o lo fitlhileng lo tshware ene ka esi; a a wele mo tshenyegong eo ka yosi. 
Psalms35:9 Mowa wa me o tlaa nna ka boitumelo mo go Jehofa; o tlaa itumela mo polokeng ya gagwe. 
Psalms35:10 Marapo a me otlhe a tlaa re: “Jehofa, mang yo o tshwanang nao? Yo o gololang mohumanegi mo go yo o thata bogolo go ene, ee, mohumanegi le motlhoki mo go ene yo o mo thukhuthang?”" 
Psalms35:11 Basupi ba ba sa siamang ba tle ba eme, ba mpotse ka ga dilo tse ke sa di itseng." 
Psalms35:12 Ba ntefela molemo ka bosula, ba thukhutha mowa wa me." 
Psalms35:13 Mme ka ga me, e rile ba le botlhoko, go apara ga me ya bo e le matsela a kgetse; ka patika mowa wa me ka go ikitsa go ja; morapelo wa me wa ba wa boela mo sehubeng sa me." 
Psalms35:14 Ka etsa jaaka ekete ke direla tsala ya me kgotsa ngwana wa ga rre; ka obega ka khutsafalo jaaka mongwe yo o lelelang mmaagwe. 
Psalms35:15 Nna e rile ke tlhotsa, bone ba itumela, ba ba ba phuthega mmogo; ba babenyana ba mphuthegela mmogo, mme ka bo ke sa itse; ba nkgagola ba se ka ba khutla," 
Psalms35:16 jaaka basotli ba ba matlhapa mo medirong, ba ntšhenetse meno." 
Psalms35:17 Jehofa o tlaa leba fela goleele go le kaye? Falodisa mowa wa me mo ditshenyong tsa bone; moratwanyana wa me mo ditaung. 
Psalms35:18 Ke tlaa go ntshetsa malebogo mo phuthegong e kgolo; ke tlaa go baka mo bontsing jo bogolo jwa batho. 
Psalms35:19 A ba e leng baba ba me ba se itumele ka nna ka mo go sa siamang; le gone ba ba nkilang ka bomo a ba se soke leitlho. 
Psalms35:20 Gonne ga ba bue kagiso; ba baakanyetsa ba ba ntseng ba ituletse fela mo lefatsheng mafoko a tsietso. 
Psalms35:21 Ee, ba nkatlhamisetsa melomo ya bone thata; ba re: “Ahe! Ahe! Leitlho la rona le go bonye.”" 
Psalms35:22 Jehofa, wena o go bonye; o se ka wa didimala; Jehofa o se ka wa nna kgakala le nna." 
Psalms35:23 Kubuga, o tsogele katlholo ya me, e bong go mo go sekwang ga me, Modimo wa me le Morena wa me." 
Psalms35:24 Nkatlhola, Jehofa, Modimo wa me, ka fa tshiamong ya gago; a ba se itumele ka nna." 
Psalms35:25 A ba se bue mo pelong ya bone ba re: “Ahe! Re rata ga nna jalo.” A ba se re: “Re mo komeditse.” 
Psalms35:26 A ba tlhajwe ke ditlhong, ba sosobaganngwe mmogo ba ba itumelelang kutlobotlhoko ya me; a ba ba inkgodisetsang ba apesiwe ditlhong le tlotlologo." 
Psalms35:27 Ba ba tshabang le nna ka ga mo ke go sekang ga tshiamo, a ba duduetse ka boitumelo; ee, a ba nne ba re ka gale: “A go goletsege Jehofa yo o kgatlhwang ke go kokotlegela ga motlhanka wa gagwe.”" 
Psalms35:28 Loleme lwa me lo tlaa bua ka ga tshiamo ya gago, le ka ga pako ya gago ka letsatsi lotlhe fela." 
Psalms36:1 Tlolo ya moikepi e bua mo pelong ya me, ya re: Ga go na poifo ya Modimo fa pele ga matlho a gagwe." 
Psalms36:2 Gonne o iphora mo matlhong a gagwe, a re, boikepo jwa gagwe ga bo ketla bo lemogwa, bo ilwa." 
Psalms36:3 Mafoko a molomo wa gagwe ke boikepo le tsietso fela; o baketse go nna botlhale le go dira molemo. 
Psalms36:4 O loga maano a boikepo mo bolaong jwa gagwe; o ipaya mo tseleng e e seng molemo; ga a feretlhwe ke bosula. 
Psalms36:5 Bopelonomi jwa gago jwa lorato Jehofa, bo kwa magodimong; boikanngo jwa gago bo fitlha kwa marung." 
Psalms36:6 Tshiamo ya gago e tshwana jaaka dithaba tsa Modimo; dikatlholo tsa gago ke lediba le le boteng jo bogolo; Jehofa, o tlamela batho le ditshedi." 
Psalms36:7 Ana bopelonomi jwa gago jwa lorato bo botlhokwa jang, Modimo! E bile bana ba batho ba tshabela mo moriting wa diphuka tsa gago." 
Psalms36:8 Monono wa ntlo ya gago ba tlaa o kgora thata; o tlaa ba nosa ka noka ya tse di natefang tsa gago. 
Psalms36:9 Gonne motswedi wa botshelo o ntse nao; mo leseding la gago re tlaa bona lesedi. 
Psalms36:10 A o ko o tsweleleletse bopelonomi jwa gago jwa lorato mo go ba ba go itseng; le tshiamo ya gago mo go ba ba dipelo di thokgameng. 
Psalms36:11 A lonao lo lo mabela lo se tle fa go nna; a seatla sa moikepi se se nkgarametse. 
Psalms36:12 Gone ba ba dirang boikepo ba ole; ba gateletswe, mme ga ba ketla ba nonofa go tsoga." 
Psalms37:1 O se ka wa itshwenya ka ga badirabosula; le gone o se ka wa nna pelotshetlha ka ga ba ba dirang tshiamololo. 
Psalms37:2 Gonne ba tlaa akofa ba segwa jaaka bojang, ba tlaa swaba jaaka morogo o motala." 
Psalms37:3 Ikanye Jehofa, o bo o dire molemo; aga mo lefatsheng o latelele boikanngo." 
Psalms37:4 Le gone o inatefise mo go Jehofa; mme o tlaa go naya dikeletso tsa pelo ya gago. 
Psalms37:5 Pitikela tsela ya gago mo go Jehofa; o bo o mo ikanye mme, o tlaa go dirafatsa." 
Psalms37:6 O tlaa dira gore tshiamo ya gago e tswe jaaka lesedi, le katlholo ya gago jaaka motshegare." 
Psalms37:7 Itapolose mo go Jehofa, o mo lebelele ka pelotelele; o se ka wa itshwenya ka ga yo o segofalang mo tseleng ya gagwe; ka ntlha ya monna yo o dirafatsang maano a a bosula." 
Psalms37:8 Bakela bogale, o lese kgakalo; o se ka wa itshwenya, ka go itshwenya go tle go ise kwa bosuleng." 
Psalms37:9 Gonne badirabosula ba tlaa kgaolwa; mme ba ba lebeletseng mo go Jehofa ba tlaa rua lefatshe. 
Psalms37:10 Gonne e tlaa re kwa pelenyana, moikepi a bo a sa tlhole a le gone. Ee, o tlaa sekaseka felo ga gagwe ka tlhoafalo, mme ene o tlaa ba a seyo." 
Psalms37:11 Bapelonomi ba tlaa rua lefatshe; ba tlaa inatefisa mo letlotlong la kagiso. 
Psalms37:12 Moikepi o logela mosiami maano, mme o mo šenele meno." 
Psalms37:13 Morena o tlaa mo tshega, ka a bona fa letsatsi la gagwe le atamela." 
Psalms37:14 Baikepi ba somotse tšhaka, ba bile ba obile bora jwa bone; go tla ba diga bahumanegi le batlhoki le go bolaya ba ba mokgwa o o lolameng." 
Psalms37:15 Tšhaka ya bone e tlaa tsena mo pelong tsa bone ka bosi, mara a bone le one a tlaa rojwa." 
Psalms37:16 Bonnye jo mosiami o nang najo bo molemo bogolo go matlotlo a baikepi ba le bantsi. 
Psalms37:17 Gonne mabogo a baikepi a tlaa rojwa; mme Jehofa o tshegeditse basiami. 
Psalms37:18 Jehofa o itse malatsi a baitekanedi; boswa jwa bone bo tlaa nna ka bosakhutleng. 
Psalms37:19 Ga ba ketla ba tlhajwa ke ditlhong mo motlheng wa bosula; mo metlheng ya moswele ba tlaa kgora. 
Psalms37:20 Baikepi ba tlaa nyelela; baba ba ga Jehofa ba tlaa nna jaaka monono wa mafulo a dikgomo; ba tlaa fela; ba tlaa fela ba kua mosi fela. 
Psalms37:21 Moikepi o tle a adime, mme a se ke a buse; mme mosiami o dira ka pelotshweu, a neye fela." 
Psalms37:22 Gonne ba ba segofadiwang ke ene, ba tlaa rua lefatshe; mme ba ba hutsiwang ke ene, ba tlaa kgaolwa." 
Psalms37:23 Ditsamao tsa motho di tlhomamisiwa ke Jehofa; mme o natefelwa ke tsela ya gagwe. 
Psalms37:24 Le fa a wa, ga a ketla a batanyetsegela ruri; ka gobo Jehofa o mo tshegeditse ka seatla sa gagwe." 
Psalms37:25 Nkile ka ne ke le lekau mme jaana ke tsofetse; le fa go ntse jalo ga ke ise nke ke bone mosiami a latlhilwe, le fa e le bana ba gagwe ba legalegela dijo." 
Psalms37:26 Ka letsatsi lotlhe o tlhola a dira ka pelotshweu, a adime, mme losika lwa gagwe lo segofale." 
Psalms37:27 Tlogela bosula, o dire molemo; mme o nne ka bosaengkae." 
Psalms37:28 Gonne Jehofa o rata katlholo; ga a latlhe baitshepi ba gagwe; ba tlamelwa ka bosenabokhutlo; losika lwa baikepi lo tlaa kgaolwa. 
Psalms37:29 Basiami ba tlaa rua lefatshe, ba tlaa aga mo go lone ka bosakhutleng." 
Psalms37:30 Molomo wa mosiami o bua ka ga botlhale, le loleme lwa gagwe lo bua se se siamisang." 
Psalms37:31 Molao wa Modimo wa gagwe o mo pelong ya gagwe; ga go dikgato dipe tsa gagwe tse di tlaa relelang. 
Psalms37:32 Moikepi o ikwaetse mosiami, o batla go mmolaya." 
Psalms37:33 Jehofa ga a ketla a mo lesa mo seatleng sa gagwe, le fa e le go mo sekisa mogang o atlholwang." 
Psalms37:34 Lebelela mo go Jehofa, o bo o tshware tsela ya gagwe, mme o tlaa go goletsa go tla o rua lefatshe; e tlaa re mogang baikepi ba kgaolwang, o tlaa go bona." 
Psalms37:35 Ke bonye moikepi a na le thata e kgolo, a inamisa jaaka setlhare se setala se le mo mmung wa sone wa tlholego." 
Psalms37:36 Mongwe a feta, mme bonang, o ne a seyo; ee, ka mo senka, mme o ne a se kake a bonwa." 
Psalms37:37 Lepa moitekanedi, o lebe mothokgami; gonne bokhutlo jwa motho yoo ke kagiso." 
Psalms37:38 Ka ga batlodi, ba tlaa senngwa mmogo; bokhutlo jwa baikepi ba tlaa kgaolwa." 
Psalms37:39 Poloko ya basiami e tswa mo go Jehofa; ke ene kago ya bone e e thata ya phemelo mo motlheng wa khuduego. 
Psalms37:40 Jehofa o a ba thusa, o a ba falodisa; o ba falodisa mo baikeping, a ba boloke, ka gobo ba tshabetse mo go ene." 
Psalms38:1 Jehofa, a ko o se ka wa nkgalemela ka bogale jwa gago; le gone o se ka wa nkwatlhaya ka bogale jwa gago jo bo tukang." 
Psalms38:2 Gonne metswi ya gago e tsepame mo go nna, seatla sa gago le sone se nkgateletse mo go botlhoko." 
Psalms38:3 Ga go na boitekanelo bope mo nameng ya me ka ntlha ya kgakalo ya gago; le gone ga go na go fola gope mo marapong a me ka ntlha ya boleo jwa me. 
Psalms38:4 Gonne ditshiamololo tsa me di khurumeditse tlhogo ya me, fela jaaka morwalo o o bokete, di a nkimela." 
Psalms38:5 Dikweneso tsa me di a nkga, di bodile, ka ntlha ya boeleele jwa me." 
Psalms38:6 Ke a segega, ke bile ke hutaganye thata; ke tlhola ke ntse ke hutsafetse motshegare otlhe." 
Psalms38:7 Gonne lotheka lwa me lo tletse phisego; ga go na boitekanelo bope mo nameng ya me. 
Psalms38:8 Ke a idibala, ke tapetegile mo go botlhoko; ke gwetlisitswe ke go tlhoka go ikhutsa ga pelo ya me." 
Psalms38:9 Morena, keletso ya me yotlhe e fa pele ga gago; le go duma ga me ga go a go fitlhegela." 
Psalms38:10 Pelo ya me e a tlolatlola, thata ya me e a mphelela; ka ga lesedi la matlho a me, le lone le ntlogetse." 
Psalms38:11 Barati ba me le ditsala tsa me ba emetse sebetso sa me fa thoko; le ba losika lwa me ba emetse kgakala. 
Psalms38:12 Le ba ba tsomang botshelo jwa me, ba mpeela dirai; le ba ba batlang go nkutlwisa botlhoko ba bua dilo tsa bosenyi, ba akanya ditsietso ka letsatsi lotlhe." 
Psalms38:13 Mme nna, jaaka motho yo o bosusu, ga ke utlwe; ke ntse jaaka motho yo o semumu, yo o sa tsweng molomo." 
Psalms38:14 Ee, ke ntse jaaka motho yo o sa utlweng le yo go se nang dikgalemo mo molomong wa gagwe." 
Psalms38:15 Gonne ke solofetse mo go wena, Jehofa; o tlaa araba, Morena, Modimo wa me." 
Psalms38:16 Gonne ke rile: “Ba ka tla ba itumela ka nna; ya re lonao lwa me lo relela, ba inkgodisetsa.”" 
Psalms38:17 Gonne ke a kwetsepela, le bohutsana jwa me bo fa pele ga me ka gale." 
Psalms38:18 Gonne ke tlaa bolela boikepo jwa me; ke tlaa hutsafalela boleo jwa me. 
Psalms38:19 Baba ba me bone, ba tlhaga, ba thata; le ba ba nkilang ka go sa siamang ba ntsifetse;" 
Psalms38:20 le ba ba lefelang molemo ka bosula ke baganetsi ba me, ka gobo ke latelela selo se se molemo." 
Psalms38:21 A ko o se ka wa ntlogela, Jehofa; Modimo, a ko o se nne kgakala le nna." 
Psalms38:22 A ko o itlhaganelele go nthusa Morena, poloka ya me." 
Psalms39:1 Ke rile: “Ke tlaa tlhokomela ditsela tsa me gore ke se ka ka leofa ka loleme lwa me; ke tlaa kganela molomo wa me ka mogala, fa moikepi a sa ntse a le fa pele ga me.”" 
Psalms39:2 Ka nna semumu ka go tuulala, ka didimalela le se se molemo; bohutsana jwa me jwa kgoberega." 
Psalms39:3 Pelo ya me ya nna molelo mo teng ga me; ya re ke sa ntse ke tlhatlhanya, molelo wa ba wa tuka; foo ka bua ka loleme lwa me ka re:" 
Psalms39:4 “Jehofa, nkitsise bofelelo jwa me, le selekanyo sa malatsi a me, gore ke eng; a nke ke itse gore bomotlhošwana jwa me bo kana ka jwa eng." 
Psalms39:5 Bona, o lekantse malatsi a me jaaka dikatlhamo tsa seatla; go tshela ga me go ntse jaaka ga se sepe fa pele ga gago; ruri motho mongwe le monge le a le mo boemong jo bo gaisang, ke lefela gotlhe fela." 
Psalms39:6 Ruri motho mongwe le mongwe o tsamaya jaaka moriti fela; ruri ba tlhobaediwa ke lefela; o tle a koele mahumo, mme ga a itse yo o tlaa a swelang molemo." 
Psalms39:7 Mme jaana Morena, ke lebeletse eng? Tsholofelo ya me e mo go wena." 
Psalms39:8 Nkgolola mo ditlolong tsa me tsotlhe; o se ka wa ntira sekgobo sa dieleele. 
Psalms39:9 Ke ne ke le semumu, ga ke a ka ka tswa molomo, ka gobo go dirile wena." 
Psalms39:10 Tlosa petso ya gago mo go nna; ke nyeleditswe ke titeo ya seatla sa gago. 
Psalms39:11 E tle e re fa o otlhaela motho boikepo jwa gagwe ka dikgalemo, o tle o nyeletse bontle jwa gagwe jaaka tshwele; ruri motho mongwe le mongwe ke lefela. Sela." 
Psalms39:12 Utlwa morapelo wa me, Jehofa; beela go gowa ga me tsebe; o se ka wa didimalela dikeledi tsa me, gonne ke moeng fela wa gago, ke mojaki fela jaaka borraetsho botlhe ba ne ba ntse." 
Psalms39:13 A ko o nthekegele, gore ke tle ke rulwe, ke ise ke tswe mono, mme ke sa tlhole ke leyo.”" 
Psalms40:1 Ke ne ka lebelela Jehofa ka pelotelele; a itshekegela kwa go nna, a utlwa go gowa ga me." 
Psalms40:2 Le gone a ntlhatlosa mo mokoleng o o boitshegang, le mo seretseng se se maragaraga; a tlhoma dinao tsa me mo lefikeng, a ba a tlhomamisa ditsamao tsa me." 
Psalms40:3 O tsentse sefela se seša mo molomong wa me, e bong pako ya Modimo wa rona; batho bantsi ba tlaa go bona, ba boifa, mme ba tlaa ikanya Jehofa." 
Psalms40:4 Go sego monna yo o kgantshang Jehofa; mme a sa tlhokomele ba ba ikgodisang, le fa e le ba ba fapogelang kwa maakeng." 
Psalms40:5 Jehofa Modimo wa me, di dintsi ditiro tsa gago tse di gakgamatsang, tse o di dirileng, le megopolo ya gago e e kwano go rona; ga o ka ke wa di rulaganyediwa; fa ke rata go di bolela, le go bua ka ga tsone, di feta mo go ka balwang." 
Psalms40:6 Ga o na kgatlhego mo setlhabelong le mo tshupelong; ditsebe tsa me o di kabolotse; tshupelo e e fisiwang, le tshupelelo ya boleo ga o a ka wa di lopa." 
Psalms40:7 Foo ka re: “Bona ke tsile; mo momenaganong wa lokwalo go kwadilwe ka ga me ga twe: 
Psalms40:8 Ke itumela thata go dira go rata ga gago, Modimo wa me; ee, molao wa gago o mo teng ga pelo ya me.”" 
Psalms40:9 Ke boletse tshiamo mo phuthegong e kgolo; bona, ga nketla ke thiba dipounama tsa me, Jehofa, o a itse." 
Psalms40:10 Ga ke a fitlha tshiamo ya gago mo teng ga pelo ya me; ke boletse boikanngo jwa gago le poloka ya gago; ga ke a lobela phuthego e kgolo bopelonomi jwa gago jwa lorato le boammaaruri jwa gago. 
Psalms40:11 O se ka wa ntlhokisa mapelonamagadi a gago Jehofa; a bopelonomi jwa gago jwa lorato le boammaaruri jwa gago bo ntlamele ka gale le gale. 
Psalms40:12 Gonne masula a a se nang palo a ntsentse gare; maikepo a me a tsile go ntshwara, ke bile ke retelelwa ke go lelala; a mantsi bogolo go feta palo ya meriri ya tlhogo ya me, mme pelo ya me a mpheletse." 
Psalms40:13 A go go kgatlhe Jehofa go nkgolola; tswee, o itlhaganele go nthusa Jehofa." 
Psalms40:14 Ba ba tsomang mowa wa me go o senya a ba tlhajwe ke ditlhong ba tseanngwe mmogo; ba ba itumelang thata ka go utlwa botlhoko ga me a ba busediwe kwa morago, ba tlhokisiwe tlotlo." 
Psalms40:15 Ba ba nthayang ba re: “Ahe! Ahe!” A ba swafale ka ntlha ya go tlhabisiwa ditlhong ga bone. 
Psalms40:16 A botlhe ba ba go batlang ba itumele, ba ipele mo go wena; a ba ba ratang poloka ya gago ba bue ka go tlhoka go khutla ba re: “A Jehofa a godisiwe.”" 
Psalms40:17 Nna ke lehuma, ke a tlhoka; le fa go ntse jalo, Morena o a nkgopola; wena o thuso ya me, le mogolodi wa me; o se ka wa diega, Modimo wa me." 
Psalms41:1 Go sego yo o gopolang bahumanegi; Jehofa o tlaa mo golola mo motlheng wa bosula. 
Psalms41:2 Jehofa o tlaa mo tlamela, a ba a mo tshedisa, mme o tlaa segofala mo lefatsheng. O se ka wa mo neela mo go rateng ga baba ba gagwe." 
Psalms41:3 Jehofa o tlaa mo oka a le mo bolaong jwa topetego; o a tle o mo alele bolao jwa gagwe gotlhe fela mo bolwetseng jwa gagwe. 
Psalms41:4 Ke rile: “Jehofa, a ko o nkutlwele botlhoko; fodisa mowa wa me; gonne ke go leofetse.”" 
Psalms41:5 Baba ba me ba bua bosula ka ga me, ba re: “O tlaa swa leng ne, leina la gagwe la nyelela?”" 
Psalms41:6 Ya re fa a tsile go mpona, a bue maaka; pelo ya gagwe e ikgobokanyetse boikepo; a re a tswela kwa ntle a bo bolele fela." 
Psalms41:7 Botlhe ba ba nkilang ba sebetsanya ka ga me; ba ntogela maano a go nkutlwisa bothloko. 
Psalms41:8 Ba re: “O kgomaretswe ke botlhoko jo bo maswe, jaaka a rapame jaana, ga a ketla a tlhola a tsoga.”" 
Psalms41:9 Ee, tsala ya me e ke tlwaelanyeng nayo, e ke ne ke e ikantse, e e neng ee ja dijo tsa me, e bile e ntsholeleditse serethe sa yone." 
Psalms41:10 Mme wena, Jehofa, a ko o nkutlwele botlhoko, o ntsose, gore ke tle ke ba ikeletse." 
Psalms41:11 Ke a itse ka mo fa o itumela thata mo go nna, ka go bo mmaba wa me a sa njele koma." 
Psalms41:12 Ka ga me o ntse o nkokotletsa, mo go tlhokeng molato ga me, wa ntlhoma fa pele ga sefatlhogo sa gago ka bosakhutleng." 
Psalms41:13 A go nne go bakwe Jehofa, Modimo wa Iseraele, go tswa kwa go se nang tshimologo go ya kwa bosakhutleng. A go nne jalo, fela jalo." 
Psalms42:1 Jaaka kwalata e hemahemela melatswana ya metsi, mowa wa me o go hemahemela jalo Modimo." 
Psalms42:2 Mowa wa me o nyorelwa Modimo, e bong Modimo o o tshedileng; ke tlaa tla leng ka bonala fa pele ga Modimo?" 
Psalms42:3 Dikeledi tsa me e ne e ntse e le tsone dijo tsa me motshegare le bosigo, ka ba tlhola ba ntse ba nthaya ba re: “Modimo wa gago o kae?”" 
Psalms42:4 Dilo tse, ke a di gakologelwa, mme ke tsholole mowa wa me mo teng ga me, jaaka ke ne ke tle ke ye le bontsi jwa batho ke ba gogela kwa ntlong ya Modimo, ka lentswe la boitumelo le pako, e le bontsi jo bo ilelang letsatsi la modiro." 
Psalms42:5 O inametseng wena mowa wa me? O tlhodiegetseng mo teng ga me? Solofela fela mo Modimong, gonne ke tlaa nama ke tla ke o bakela thuso ya sefatlhogo sa one." 
Psalms42:6 Ao! Modimo wa me, mowa wa me o iname mo teng ga me, ke gone ka moo ke go gakologelwang ke le mo lefatsheng la Joretane le mo Heremone, kwa thabaneng ya Misare." 
Psalms42:7 Madiba a a botengteng a bitsakanya ka kgwaso ya maphothoselo a gago; dinteelo tsotlhe tsa gago le makhubu otlhe a gago a ntloletse godimo. 
Psalms42:8 Le fa go ntse jalo Jehofa o tlaa laola bopelonomi jwa gagwe jwa lorato mo motshegareng, le mo bosigong sefela sa gagwe ke tlaa bo ke na naso, e bong morapelo o o rapelang Modimo wa botshelo jwa me." 
Psalms42:9 Ke tlaa raya Modimo Lefika la me, ke re: “O ntebaletseng? Ke ka ntlha yang ke tsamaya ke hutsafetse ka patiko ya mmaba?”" 
Psalms42:10 Baba ba me ba nkgoba jaaka ekete ke ka tšhaka, mo marapong a me; ka ba tlhola ba ntse ba nthaya ba re: “Modimo wa gago o kae?”" 
Psalms42:11 O inametseng wena mowa wa me? O tlhodiegetseng mo teng ga me? Solofela fela mo Modimong; gonne ke tlaa nama ke tla ke o baka, one o e leng thuso ya sefatlhogo sa me, le Modimo wa me." 
Psalms43:1 A ko o nkatlhole Modimo, o emele go seka ga me mo morafeng o o sa reng Modimo sepe; a ko o nkgolole mo monneng wa tsietso le yo o se nang tshiamo." 
Psalms43:2 Gonne ke wena Modimo wa thata ya me; o ntatlhetseng? Ke ka ntlha yang ke tsamaya ke hutsafetse ka patiko ya mmaba?
