Psalms43:3 A ko o rome lesedi la gago le boammaaruri jwa gago; a di nkgoge; di ntlise kwa thabaneng ya gago e e boitshepo le kwa metlaaganeng ya gago. 
Psalms43:4 Ke gone ke tlaa yang kwa sebesong sa Modimo, kwa Modimong, o o leng boitumelo jwa me jo bo feteletseng; le ka harepe ke tlaa go baka Modimo, Modimo wa me." 
Psalms43:5 O inametseng wena mowa wa me? Mme o tlhodiegetseng mo teng ga me? Solofela fela mo Modimong; gonne ke tlaa nama ke tla ke o baka, one o e leng thuso ya sefatlhogo sa me le Modimo wa me." 
Psalms44:1 Modimo, re ikutlwetse ka ditsebe tsa rona, borraarona ba re boleletse, tiro e o kileng wa e dira mo metlheng ya bone, mo metlheng ya bogologolo." 
Psalms44:2 Wa nna wa leleka merafe ka seatla sa gago, mme wa tlhoma bone; wa patika ditšhaba, wa di phatlalatsa." 
Psalms44:3 Gonne ga ba a ka ba tsaya lefatshe go le rua ka tšhaka ya bone, le gone letsogo la bone ga le a ka la ba boloka; fa e se ka seatla sa gago se segolo, le letsogo la gago, le lesedi la sefatlhogo sa gago, ka gobo o le ntlheng ya bone." 
Psalms44:4 Wena Modimo, o Kgosi ya me; laolela Jakobe kgololo." 
Psalms44:5 Re tlaa diga baba ba rona ka wena; ba ba re tsogologelang re tlaa ba gataka ka leina la gago. 
Psalms44:6 Gonne ga nketla ke ikanya bora jwa me; tšhaka ya me le yone ga e ketla e mpoloka. 
Psalms44:7 Wena o re bolokile mo babeng ba rona, le ba ba re ilang o ba tlhabisitse ditlhong." 
Psalms44:8 Re tlhotse re kgana ka Modimo letsatsi lotlhe; leina la gago re tlaa le ntshetsa malebogo ka bosenabokhutlo. Sela. 
Psalms44:9 Jaana o re latlhile, o re tlotlolotse; ga o bolole le dintwa tsa rona." 
Psalms44:10 O re buseditse kwa morago ra tshaba mmaba; mme ba ba re ilang ba ikgapela ka go rata. 
Psalms44:11 O re abile jaaka dinku tse di tlhaoletsweng go jewa, o re gasagasitse mo merafeng." 
Psalms44:12 O rekisa batho ba gago ka lefela, mme ga o a oketsa khumo ya gago ka tlhwatlhwa ya bone." 
Psalms44:13 O re dira kgobo mo go bankarona, tshotlo le setshego mo go ba ba mo tikologong ya rona." 
Psalms44:14 O re tlhabile seane mo merafeng, le thukhutho tlhogo mo ditšhabeng." 
Psalms44:15 Go tlotlologa ga me go fa pele ga me ka letsatsi lotlhe, ke bipilwe ke ditlhong tsa sefatlhogo sa me." 
Psalms44:16 Ka ntlha ya lentswe la yo o kgobang le yo o tlhapatsang; le ka ntlha ya mmaba le mmusolosi. 
Psalms44:17 Gotlhe mo go re wetse; le fa go ntse jalo ga re a go lebala, le gone ga re a dira ka tsietso mo kgolaganong ya gago." 
Psalms44:18 Pelo ya rona ga e a boela kwa morago le gone dikgato tsa rona ga di a theoga mo tseleng ya gago; 
Psalms44:19 le fa o re thubaganyeditse mo mannong a bophokoje, o re khurumeditse ka moriti wa loso." 
Psalms44:20 A e re fa re kile ra lebala leina la Modimo wa rona, kgotsa ra otlololela modimo o sele mabogo a rona;" 
Psalms44:21 a goo mo, Modimo a ga o ketla o go tlhotlhomisa? Ka one o itse maoma a pelo." 
Psalms44:22 Ee, re tlhola re bolawa ka ntlha ya gago ka letsatsi lotlhe; re kaiwa jaaka dinku tsa go tlhajwa." 
Psalms44:23 Morena tsoga! O robaletseng? Tloga o eme, se re latlhele ruri ka bosakhutleng." 
Psalms44:24 O fitlhelang sefatlhogo sa gago, wa lebala go patikwa ga rona le go bolawa ga rona jaana?" 
Psalms44:25 Gonne mowa wa rona o obegetse mo loroleng; mpa ya rona e ngaparetse mmu. 
Psalms44:26 Tsogela go re thusa, mme o re rekolole ka ntlha ya bopelonomi jwa gago jwa lorato." 
Psalms45:1 Pelo ya me e penologa ka kgang e e monate; ke bua dilo tse ke di dirileng ka ga kgosi; loleme lwa me ke sekwala sa mokwadi yo o bofefo mo go kwaleng. 
Psalms45:2 O montle thata go gaisa bana ba batho; bopelotshweu bo tshetswe mo dipounameng tsa gago; ke gone ka mo Modimo o go segofaditseng ka bosakhutleng. 
Psalms45:3 Gatlha tšhaka ya gago ka fa nokeng ya gago, wena senatla, kgalalelo le borena ke tsa gago." 
Psalms45:4 Mo boreneng jwa gago o pagamela pele ka go rangwa ke dilo, ka ntlha ya boammaaruri, le bopelonomi, le tshiamo; seatla sa gago se segolo se tlaa go ruta dilo tse di boitshegang." 
Psalms45:5 Metswi ya gago e bogale; ditšhaba di wela fa tlase ga gago; e mo pelong ya baba ba kgosi. 
Psalms45:6 Setulo sa gago sa bogosi se ntse ka bosenabokhutlo le ka bosaengkae; thobane ya bogosi jwa gago ke thobane ya tekatekanyo. 
Psalms45:7 O ratile tshiamo, wa ila boikepo; ke gone ka mo Modimo, Modimo wa gago, o go tloditseng ka lookwane lwa boitumelo, go go fetisa dilekane tsa gago." 
Psalms45:8 Diaparo tsa gago tsotlhe di nkga mura, le mokgapha, le kasia; diletso tse di ditlhale di tswa mo matlong a dinaka tsa ditlou a kgosi, di go jesitse monate." 
Psalms45:9 Bomorwadia dikgosi ba gone mo basading ba ba tlotlegang ba gaeno; ka fa letsogong la gago le legolo go ema mohumagadi wa kgosi a apere gouta ya Ofira. 
Psalms45:10 Reetsa, morwadiaka, mme o gopole, o bo o sekege tsebe ya gago; le gone o lebale bagaeno le ntlo ya ga rraago." 
Psalms45:11 Jalo kgosi e tlaa eletsa bontle jwa gago; gonne ke ene morena wa gago; o obamele ene. 
Psalms45:12 Le morwadia Ture o tlaa bo a le gone a tshotse neo; le ba e leng bahumi mo bathong ba tlaa lopa letlhogonolo la gago. 
Psalms45:13 Morwadia kgosi mo teng ga ntlo ya kgosi o galalela gotlhe: diaparo tsa gagwe di logilwe ka go tlhakanngwa le gouta. 
Psalms45:14 O tlaa isiwa kwa kgosing a le mo diaparong tse di meroko mentle; le makgarebane, dilekane tsa gagwe tse di mo etleetsang, a tlaa isiwa kwa go wena." 
Psalms45:15 A tlaa isiwa ka boitumelo le ka boipelo; a tlaa tsena mo ntlong ya kgosi. 
Psalms45:16 Mo boemong jwa borraago go tlaa nna bana ba gago, ba o tlaa ba tlhomang go nna dikgosana mo lefatsheng lotlhe." 
Psalms45:17 Ke tlaa dira leina la gago gore le gakologelwe mo ditshikatshikeng tsotlhe; ke gone ka mo ditšhaba di tlaa go ntshetsang malebogo ka bosenabokhutlo le ka bosaengkae. 
Psalms46:1 Modimo ke botshabelo jwa rona le thata, thuso e e gaufi thata mo tlalelong." 
Psalms46:2 Ke gone ka mo re se ketlang re boifa le fa lefatshe le ka fetoga, le fa dithaba di tshikinyega mo bogareng ga mawatle;" 
Psalms46:3 le fa metsi a one a suma a kgaphasela, le fa dithaba di kutuma ka go ikgogomosa ga one. Sela." 
Psalms46:4 Noka e gone e dikelelo tsa yone di itumedisang motse wa Modimo, e bong felo ga boitshepo jwa metlaagana ya Mogodimodimo." 
Psalms46:5 Modimo o mo gare ga one; ga o ketla o tshikinngwa; Modimo o tlaa o thusa bo sa ntse bo anoga. 
Psalms46:6 Merafe e ne ya šakgala, magosi a tsebeetsega; wa ntsha lentswe la one, lefatshe la tlhapologa." 
Psalms46:7 Jehofa wa masomosomo o na le rona; Modimo wa ga Jakobe ke botshabelo jwa rona. Sela. 
Psalms46:8 Tlang, lo bone ditiro tsa ga Jehofa, e bong ditšhwafatso tse o di dirileng mo lefatsheng." 
Psalms46:9 O khutlisa ditlhabano le kwa bokhutlong jwa lefatshe; o roba bora, o putlaganya lerumo ka bogare; o fisa dikara tsa tlhabano mo molelong." 
Psalms46:10 “Nang fela, mme lo itse fa ke le Modimo; ke tlaa godisiwa mo merafeng; ke tlaa godisiwa mo lefatsheng.”" 
Psalms46:11 Jehofa wa masomosomo o na le rona; Modimo wa ga Jakobe ke botshabelo jwa rona. Sela. 
Psalms47:1 A ko lo openg diatla lona ditšhaba tsotlhe; lo tshelele Modimo lošalaba lwa go ja koma. 
Psalms47:2 Gonne Jehofa Mogodimodimo o a boitshega; ke Kgosi e kgolo ya lefatshe lotlhe. 
Psalms47:3 O tlaa fenya ditšhaba a di baya tlase ga rona, le merafe tlase ga dinao tsa rona." 
Psalms47:4 O tlaa re lebalebela boswa, e bong tlotlomalo ya ga Jakobe yo o neng a mo rata. Sela." 
Psalms47:5 Modimo o tlhatlogile ka lošalaba, Jehofa ka tumo ya lonaka." 
Psalms47:6 Opelelang Modimo dipako, opelang dipako; opelelang Kgosi ya rona dipako, opelang dipako." 
Psalms47:7 Gonne Modimo ke Kgosi ya lefatshe lotlhe; lo opele dipako ka tlhaloganyo. 
Psalms47:8 Modimo o busa mo merafeng; Modimo o dutse mo setulong sa one se se boitshepo sa bogosi. 
Psalms47:9 Dikgosana tsa ditšhaba di phuthegile mmogo, go tla di nna batho ba Modimo wa ga Aberahame; gonne dithebe tsa lefatshe ke tsa Modimo; o goletsegile thata." 
Psalms48:1 O mogolo Jehofa, o na le go bakwa segolo mo motseng wa Modimo wa rona, mo thabeng ya one e e boitshepo." 
Psalms48:2 E ntle thaba ya Sione, ka go golela godimo, e itumelelwa ke lefatshe lotlhe, ka fa ntlheng ya botsheka, motse wa Kgosi e kgolo." 
Psalms48:3 Modimo o ikitsisitse mo matlong a gone a dikgosi fa o le botshabelo. 
Psalms48:4 Gonne, bonang, dikgosi tsa phuthega, mme tsa feta mmogo." 
Psalms48:5 Di ne tsa go bona, foo tsa gakgamala thata; tsa tsielwa, tsa itlhaganela tsa ya koo." 
Psalms48:6 Thoromo ya di tshwara teng; le botlhoko jaaka jwa mosadi yo o mo pelegong. 
Psalms48:7 Wa thuba dikepe tsa Tarešiše ka phefo ya botlhabatsatsi. 
Psalms48:8 Jaaka re utlwile, re bonye fela jalo mo motseng wa ga Jehofa wa masomosomo, mo motseng wa Modimo wa rona; Modimo o tlaa o tlhomamisa ka bosenabokhutlo. Sela." 
Psalms48:9 Re akantse bopelonomi jwa gago jwa lorato, Modimo, mo gare ga tempele ya gago." 
Psalms48:10 Fela jaaka leina la gago le ntse, Modimo, pako ya gago le yone e ntse jalo kwa dikhutlong tsa lefatshe; seatla sa gago se se siameng se tletse tshiamo." 
Psalms48:11 A thaba ya Sione e itumele, le bomorwadia Juta ba ipele, ka ntlha ya dikatlholo tsa gago." 
Psalms48:12 Tlalatlalang le Sione, lo bo lo o potonoge; balang dikago tsa one tse di godileng tsa phemelo." 
Psalms48:13 Lo tlhokomele sentle dithako tsa phemelo tsa one, lo akanye matlo a one a dikgosi; gore lo tle lo bolelele losika lo lo tlang." 
Psalms48:14 Gonne Modimo one, ke Modimo wa rona ka bosakhutleng le ka bosaengkae; one o tlaa nna mosupatsela wa rona le go ya fela mo losong." 
Psalms49:1 Lona ditšhaba tsotlhe, utlwang mo; sekegang tsebe, lona banni botlhe ba lefatshe." 
Psalms49:2 Go le babotlana le bagolwane, bahumi le bahumanegi mmogo." 
Psalms49:3 Molomo wa me o tlaa bua botlhale; le go akanya ga pelo ya me e tlaa nna ka ga tlhaloganyo. 
Psalms49:4 Ke tlaa sekegela setshwantsho tshebe ya me; ke tlaa rarabolola ka harepe polelo ya me e e raraanyeng. 
Psalms49:5 Ana ke tlaa bo ke boifelang mo metlheng ya bosula? Mogang go boikepo jo bo tlhomereng direthe tsa me bo ntsenyang gare? 
Psalms49:6 Mo go ba ba ikanyang lohumo lwa bone, ba belafala ka bontsi jwa dikhumo tsa bone." 
Psalms49:7 Ga go na ope yo o ka rekololang ngwana wa ga rraagwe ka gope, le fa e le go mo ntshetsa serekololo go se naya Modimo." 
Psalms49:8 (Gonne thekololo ya mowa wa bone e topo e thata, e na le go tlhobogwa ka bosakhutleng;)" 
Psalms49:9 gore a tle a nne a tshele ka metlha yotlhe, gore a se ka a bona go bola." 
Psalms49:10 Gonne o a bona fa batho ba ba botlhale ba swa fela, yo o bosilo le yo o sefolofolo ba nyalele fela mmogo, ba tlogelele ba sele khumo ya bone." 
Psalms49:11 Diphupu tsa bone ke magae a bona ka bosakhutleng; ke fa ba nnetseng teng ruri; le fa ba ne ba ntse ba kaya mafatshe go re ke a bone. 
Psalms49:12 Motho ene, a le mo tlotlong ga a nnele ruri; o tshwana jaaka diphologolo tse di nyelelang." 
Psalms49:13 Mokgwa o wa bone ke boeleele fela jwa bone, le fa go ntse jalo e a tle e re morago ga bone batho ba tle ba dumele dipolelo tsa bone. Sela." 
Psalms49:14 Ba laoletswe Bobipo jaaka letsomane la dinku fela. Loso o tlaa nna modisa wa bone; mo mosong bathokgami ba tlaa nna le puso mo go bone, le bontle jwa bone bo tlaa nna sejo sa Bobipo gore bonno jwa jone bo se ka jwa nna." 
Psalms49:15 Mowa wa me Modimo o tlaa o rekolola mo thateng ya Bobipo, gonne o tlaa ntshola. Sela." 
Psalms49:16 O se ka wa boifa fa mongwe a humisiwa, fa kgalalelo ya ntlo ya gagwe e totisiwa;" 
Psalms49:17 ka gobo fa a swa, ga a ketla a ya le sepe; kgalalelo ya gagwe ga e ketla e fologela morago ga gagwe." 
Psalms49:18 Le fa a rile a sa tshedile a segofatsa mowa wa gagwe, ka batho le gale ba tle ba go bake fa o itirela molemo," 
Psalms49:19 o tlaa ya lesomong la borraagwe; ga ba ketla ba bona lesedi gope. 
Psalms49:20 Motho yo o mo tlotlegong, mme a se na tlhaloganyo, o tshwana fela le diphologolo tse di nyelelang." 
Psalms50:1 Modimo, o e leng Modimo, e bong Jehofa, o buile, o biditse lefatshe, go tswa botlhabatsatsi le go ya bophirima jwa lone." 
Psalms50:2 Modimo o phatsimile o le mo Sione o o bontle jo bo tletseng. 
Psalms50:3 Modimo wa rona o tlaa tla, mme ga o ketla o didimala; molelo o tlaa laila fa pele ga one. Mme go tlaa nna ledimo le legolo tikologong ya one." 
Psalms50:4 O tlaa bitsa magodimo kwa godimo, le lefatshe, gore o tle o atlhole batho ba one. O tlaa re:" 
Psalms50:5 “Phuthelang baitshepi ba me kwa go nna; ba ba dirileng kgolagano le nna ka setlhabelo.” 
Psalms50:6 Mme magodimo a tlaa kakanya tshiamo ya one, gonne Modimo ke moatlhodi ka osi. Sela." 
Psalms50:7 “Utlwang batho ba me, ke tlaa bua; wena Iseraele, ke tlaa supa ka ga gago; ke nna Modimo, o ke leng Modimo wa gago." 
Psalms50:8 Ga nketla ke go omanya ka ntlha ya ditlhabelo tsa gago; ditshupelo tsa gago tse di fisiwang di ntse di le fa pele ga me ka gale. 
Psalms50:9 Ga nketla ke tsaya kgomo epe mo ntlong ya gago, le fa e le dipodi tse ditona mo marakaneng a gago." 
Psalms50:10 Gonne setshedi sengwe le sengwe sa sekgwa ke sa me, le dikgomo tse di nnang mo dithabeng tse di makgolo a le some." 
Psalms50:11 Dinonyane tsotlhe tsa dithaba, ke a di itse; le diphologolo tsa naga ke tsa me." 
Psalms50:12 Fa nkabo ke bolawa ke tlala, ke ne ke sa ka ke ka bolelela wena; gonne lobopo ke lwa me, le bojotlhe jwa lone." 
Psalms50:13 A ke a bo ke tlaa ja dinama tsa dipoo le fa e le go nwa madi a dipodi? 
Psalms50:14 Isetsa Modimo setlhabelo sa go leboga; o bo o lefele Mogodimodimo maikano a gago. 
Psalms50:15 E re mo letsatsing la tlalelo o mpitse; ke tlaa go golola mme o tlaa nkgalaletsa.” 
Psalms50:16 Mme moikepi, Modimo o mo raya o re: “Wena, o dirang ka go bolela melao ya me, fa e bo ne ne fano o tsere kgolagano ya me mo molomong wa gago?" 
Psalms50:17 Ka e le fa o ila thuto, le mafoko a me o a latlhela kwa morago ga gago." 
Psalms50:18 E rile o bona legodu wa le dumelela, mme o ntse wa tlhakanela tiro le baakafadi." 
Psalms50:19 O naya molomo wa gago bosula; le loleme lwa gago lo baakanya tsietso. 
Psalms50:20 O a tle o dule o sebe ngwana wa ga rraago; o pateletse ngwana wa ga mmaago tota. 
Psalms50:21 Dilo tse o di dirile, mme ka didimala fela; wa itlhoma gore ke tshwana nao fela, mme ke tlaa go kgalemela, ke di rulaganya fa pele ga matlho a gago." 
Psalms50:22 Jaana elelelwang mo, lona ba lo lebalang Modimo, nka tla ka lo gagoganya, mme ga se ka ga nna ope yo o tlaa gololang;" 
Psalms50:23 le fa e le mang yo o isang setlhabelo sa go ntsha malebogo, o a nkgalaletsa; mme ene yo o rulaganyang go tshela ga gagwe sentle ke tlaa mo supetsa poloka ya Modimo.”" 
Psalms51:1 Nkutlwela botlhoko Modimo, ka fa bopelonoming jwa gago jwa lorato, ka fa bontsing jwa mautlwelobotlhoko a gago, o phimole ditlolo tsa me." 
Psalms51:2 Ntlhapisetsa ruri mo boikepong jwa me, o nntlafatse mo boleong jwa me." 
Psalms51:3 Gonne ke ipolela ditlolo tsa me, le boleo jwa me bo ntutse pele ka gale." 
Psalms51:4 Ke wena, wena wesi yo ke go leofetseng, ka dira se se bosula mo ponong ya gago, gore o tle o bonwe o le tshiamo mogang o buang, o bo o nne phepa mogang o atlholang." 
Psalms51:5 Bona, ke ne ka bopegela mo boikepong; mmé mmè a nkamogelela mo boleong." 
Psalms51:6 Bona, o eletsa boammaaruri mo ditennyeng; le mo bokaeng jo bo fitlhegileng o tlaa nkitsise botlhale." 
Psalms51:7 Ntshekisa ka mosiama, mme ke tlaa itsheka; ntlhapisa, mme ke tlaa nna mosweu bogolo go kapoko." 
Psalms51:8 Nkutlwisa boitumelo le boipelo; gore marapo a o a robileng a tle a itumele. 
Psalms51:9 Subela dibe tsa me sefatlhogo sa gago; o bo o phimole maikepo a me otlhe fela. 
Psalms51:10 Modimo, bopa pelo e e itshekileng mo go nna; o bo o šafatse mowa o o siameng mo teng ga me." 
Psalms51:11 O se ka wa ntatlha, wa ntlosa fa pele ga gago; le mowa wa gago o o boitshepo o se o tlose mo go nna." 
Psalms51:12 Nthebolela boitumelo jwa poloka ya gago; o ntshegetse ka mowa o o phuthologileng. 
Psalms51:13 Foo ke tlaa ruta batlodi ditsela tsa gago; le baleofi ba tlaa sokologela kwa go wena. 
Psalms51:14 Nkgolola mo molatong wa go tsholola madi Modimo, wena Modimo wa poloko ya me; loleme lwa me lo tlaa opelela godimo ka ga tshiamo ya gago." 
Psalms51:15 Jehofa, bula dipounama tsa me; mme molomo wa me o tlaa bolela pako ya gago." 
Psalms51:16 Gonne ga o natefelwe ke setlhabelo; nkabo ke se ntsha; ga o na kgatlhego mo tshupelong e e fisiwang. 
Psalms51:17 Ditlhabelo tsa Modimo ke mowa o o phatlogileng; pelo e e phatlogileng, e e ngomogileng ga o ketla o e nyatsa Modimo." 
Psalms51:18 Direla Sione molemo ka fa natefelong ya gago; aga dithako tsa Jerusalema. 
Psalms51:19 Ke gone o tlaa natefelwang ke ditlhabelo tsa tshiamo, le ke tshupelo e e fisiwang, le tshupelo e e fisiwang e le mmogo; ke gone ba tlaa isang dikgomo ditlhabelo mo sebesong sa gago." 
Psalms52:1 O ipelafaletsang mo bosenying, wena seganka? Boutlwelobotlhoko jwa Modimo bo nnetse ruri." 
Psalms52:2 Loleme lwa gago lo loga maano a boikepo tota; jaaka logare lo lo bogale, lo dira ka tsietso." 
Psalms52:3 O rata bosula bogolo go molemo; le go aka bogolo go go bua tshiamo. Sela. 
Psalms52:4 O rata mafoko otlhe a a senyang, wena loleme lo lo tsietsang." 
Psalms52:5 Modimo o tlaa go senya jalo ka bosakhutleng; o tlaa go tsaya o go phamola mo mogopeng wa gago, o tlaa go khumola ka metswe mo lefatsheng la batshedi. Sela." 
Psalms52:6 Basiami le bone ba tlaa go bona, ba boifa, mme ba tlaa mo tshega, ba re:" 
Psalms52:7 “Bonang, monna yo, ke ene yo o neng a se ka a dira Modimo thata ya gagwe; mme a ikanya bontsi jwa dikhumo tsa gagwe, a ba a ithatafatsa mo boikepong jwa gagwe.”" 
Psalms52:8 Mme ka ga me, ke tshwana le motlhware o motala mo ntlong ya Modimo: ke ikanya boutlwelobotlhoko jwa Modimo ka bosakhutleng le ka bosaengkae." 
Psalms52:9 Ke tlaa go ntshetsa malebogo ka bosakhutleng, ka o go dirile; ke tlaa lebelela leina la gago, gonne le molemo, fa pele ga baitshepi ba gago." 
Psalms53:1 Seeleele mo pelong ya sone se rile: “Ga go na Modimo.” Ba bodile, ba dirile boikepo jo bo maswe thata; ga go na ope yo o dirang molemo." 
Psalms53:2 Modimo o ne wa okomela bana ba batho o le kwa legodimong, gore o tle o bone bo go na le bangwe ba ba tlhaloganyang, ba senka Modimo." 
Psalms53:3 Botlhe fela ba boetse kwa morago; ba atlafetse mmogo; ga go na ope yo o dirang molemo, nnyaa, le fa e le yo mongwe fela." 
Psalms53:4 Ba ba dirang boikepo a ga ba na kitso? Ba ba jang batho ba me ba ba swetsa jaaka ekete ba ja bogobe, mme ba bo ba sa bitse Modimo." 
Psalms53:5 Golo foo ba nna mo poifong e kgolo kwa poifo e ne e seyo gone; gonne Modimo o faladitse marapo a yo o thibelelang go tlhabana nao; o ba tlhabisitse ditlhong, gonne Modimo o ba ganne." 
Psalms53:6 Ao! A bo poloko ya Iseraele e ka bo e tsile e tswa Sione! E tlaa re motlhang Modimo o bosang botshwaro jwa batho ba one, foo Jakobe o tlaa itumela, le Iseraele o tlaa ipela." 
Psalms54:1 Mpoloka, Modimo, ka leina la gago; mme o nkatlhole mo bonatleng jwa gago." 
Psalms54:2 Utlwa morapelo wa me Modimo; sekegela mafoko a molomo wa me tsebe. 
Psalms54:3 Gonne batho ba sele ba ntsogologetse, batho ba ba thubakang ba tsomile mowa wa me; ga ba a baya Modimo fa pele ga bone. Sela." 
Psalms54:4 Bonang, Modimo ke mothusi wa me; Morena o na le ba ba tshegetsang mowa wa me." 
Psalms54:5 O tlaa lefetsa bosula mo babeng ba me; ba senye mo boammaaruring jwa gago. 
Psalms54:6 Ke tlaa go isetsa setlhabelo ka tshupelo e e ntshiwang ka pelotshweu fela; ke tlaa ntshetsa leina la gago malebogo, Jehofa, gonne le molemo." 
Psalms54:7 Gonne o nkgolotse mo tlalelong yotlhe; leitlho la me le bonye keletso ya me mo babeng ba me. 
Psalms55:1 Sekegela morapelo wa me tsebe Modimo; o se ka wa iphitlhela mokokotlelo wa me. 
Psalms55:2 Nkela tlhoko, o nkarabe; ke tlabatlaba mo go itokeng ga me, ke a duma;" 
Psalms55:3 ka ntlha ya lentswe la mmaba, ka ntlha ya patiko ya baikepi; gonne ba latlhela boikepo mo go nna, ba mpogisa ka bogale." 
Psalms55:4 Pelo ya me e tlhokofaditswe thata mo teng ga me; le ditheregiso tsa loso di nkwetse. 
Psalms55:5 Go boifa le go roroma go tsile mo go nna; le go tshoga mo go be go nkhurumeditse. 
Psalms55:6 Ka ba ka tla ka re: “Ija! Ke ka bo ke na le diphuka jaaka lephoi! Foo ke ne ke tlaa fofela koo, ke tsamaya ke nna kwa boikhutsong." 
Psalms55:7 Bonang, jalo ke ne ke tlaa timelela kgakala, ke ne ke tlaa nna nna mo nageng. Sela." 
Psalms55:8 Ke ne ke tlaa itlhaganelela botshabelonyana, ke tshaba matsubutsubu a phefo le ledimo.”" 
Psalms55:9 Morena, senya, o fatole loleme lwa bone; gonne ke bonye go thubaka le go lwa mo motseng." 
Psalms55:10 Motshegare le bosigo ba dikologa mo dithakong tsa one; boikepo bo mo gare ga one le bosenyi. 
Psalms55:11 Tshiamololo e mo gare ga one; patiko ga e tloge le boferefere mo mebileng ya one. 
Psalms55:12 Gonne yo o neng a nkgoba e ne e se mmaba; fa go ne go ntse jalo nka bo ke go itshoketse, le gone yo o neng a inkgodisetsa e ne e se yo o nkilang, fa go ne go ntse jalo nka bo ke mo iphitlhetse;" 
Psalms55:13 mme e ne e le wena monna, molekane wa me, kala ya me, le tsala ya me e ke itsanyeng nayo." 
Psalms55:14 Re ne re tle re gakololane mmogo mo go monate, ra tsamaya mo ntlong ya Modimo re na le tshobokano ya batho." 
Psalms55:15 A ba welwe ke loso ka tshoganetso, a ba fologele mo moleteng ba sa ntse ba utlwa; gonne boikepo bo mo boagong jwa bone mo gare ga bone." 
Psalms55:16 Ka ga me, ke tlaa bitsa Modimo; mme Jehofa o tlaa mpoloka." 
Psalms55:17 Ke tlaa itoka, ke duma, maitseboa le ka moso, le motshegare, mme o tlaa utlwa lentswe la me." 
Psalms55:18 O golotse mowa wa me ka kagiso mo tlhabanong e e neng e mphenya; gonne ba ba lwang le nna ba ne ba le bantsi. 
Psalms55:19 Modimo o tlaa utlwa, o ba o ba patika, e bong one o o sa leng o nna bogologolo, Sela, ke go re, banna ba ba se nang diphetogo, mme ba boifa Modimo." 
Psalms55:20 Ba ba neng ba agisantse nae monna yo, o ba ntsheditse mabogo go tlhabana nabo; o tlhapaditse kgolagano ya gagwe." 
Psalms55:21 Legano la gagwe le ne le le borethe jaaka mafura a serethe, pelo ya gagwe yone e ne e le ntwa fela; mafoko a gagwe a ne a gaisa lookwane ka boleta, le fa go ntse jalo e ne e le ditšhaka fela tse di ekilweng." 
Psalms55:22 Latlhela morwalo wa gago mo go Jehofa, mme o tlaa go kokotletsa; ga a ketla a leseletsa mosiami gope go tshikinngwa." 
Psalms55:23 Mme wena, Modimo, o tlaa ba folosetsa mo moleteng wa tshenyegelo; ba tsholola madi, le ba ba tsietsang, ga ba ketla ba tshela ba swetsa bontlha bongwe jwa malatsi a bone; mme nna ke tlaa ikanya mo go wena." 
Psalms56:1 Modimo, a ko o nne boutlwelobotlhoko mo go nna; gonne motho o rata a bo a ka nkometsa; o a mpatika ka go tlhola a tlhabana ka letsatsi lotlhe." 
Psalms56:2 Baba ba me ba rata ba ka bo ba nkometsa ka letsatsi lotlhe; gonne ba bantsi ba ba tlhabanang le nna ka bopelompe. 
Psalms56:3 Mo motlheng o ke boifang ka one, ke tlaa ikanya mo go wena." 
Psalms56:4 Mo Modimong ke tlaa baka lefoko la one; ke ikantse mo go one Modimo, ga nketla ke boifa; kana yo o nama o ka ntirang?" 
Psalms56:5 Ba tlhola ba sokamisa mafoko a me letsatsi lotlhe; megopolo yotlhe ya bone e nkemeletse go ntirela bosula. 
Psalms56:6 Ba a iphutha, ba a iphitlha, ba lata motlhala wa me, fela jaaka ba ntse ba laletse mowa wa me." 
Psalms56:7 A ba tlaa falola ka boikepo? Modimo diga ditšhaba mo bogaleng. 
Psalms56:8 Dikgarakgatshego tsa me o a di bala. A ko o tsenye dikeledi tsa me tsotlhe mo modutwaneng wa gago; a ga di mo lokwalong lwa gago? 
Psalms56:9 Ke gone baba ba me ba tlaa boang ka morago mo letsatsing le ke bitsang ka lone; mo ke a go itse, fa Modimo o le ntlheng ya me." 
Psalms56:10 Mo Modimong ke tlaa baka lefoko la one; mo go Jehofa ke tlaa baka lefoko la gagwe. 
Psalms56:11 Ke ikantse mo go one Modimo, ga nketla ke boifa, kana motho o ka ntirang?" 
Psalms56:12 Maikano a gago Modimo a mo go nna; ke tlaa go ntshetsa ditshupelo tsa go leboga. 
Psalms56:13 Gonne o golotse mowa wa me mo losong; a ga o a thiba dinao tsa me mo go kgotšweng? Gore ke tle ke nne ke tsamaye fa pele ga Modimo mo leseding la batshedi. 
Psalms57:1 Nkutlwela botlhoko Modimo, a ko o nkutlwele botlhoko; gonne mowa wa me o tshabela mo go wena; ee, ke tlaa tshabela mo moriting wa diphuka tsa gago, go tsamaya dithekisego tse di fete." 
Psalms57:2 Ke tlaa tlhaeleletsa kwa Modimong o o Mogodimodimo, e bong Modimo o o ntirelang dilo tsotlhe." 
Psalms57:3 O tlaa roma o le kwa legodimong, o mpoloka, mogang yo o ratang go nkometsa o nkgobang; Sela; o tlaa ntshetsa boutlwelobotlhoko jwa one le boammaaruri kwa ntle." 
Psalms57:4 Mowa wa me o mo ditaung; ke lala mo go ba ba tukang molelo, e bong bana ba batho, ba meno a bone a leng marumo fela le metswi; le ba loleme lwa bone e leng tšhaka e e bogale." 
Psalms57:5 Modimo, o goletsegele godimo ga magodimo; a kgalalelo ya gago e nne godimo ga lefatshe lotlhe." 
Psalms57:6 Ba baakanyeditse dikgato tsa me lotloa; mowa wa me o obegile; ba epile lemena fa pele ga me; bone ka bosi ba bile ba wetse mo gare ga lone. Sela. 
Psalms57:7 Pelo ya me e nitame, Modimo, pelo ya me e nitame; ke tlaa opela; ee, ke tlaa opela dipako." 
Psalms57:8 Tsoga kgalalelo ya me; saletare le harepe tsogang; nna ka nosi ke tlaa tsoga ka maphakela a magolo. 
Psalms57:9 Ke tlaa go ntshetsa malebogo Morena mo ditšhabeng; ke tlaa go opelela dipako mo merafeng. 
Psalms57:10 Gonne boutlwelobotlhoko jwa gago bo bogolo go ya go fitlha kwa magodimong, le boammaaruri jwa gago go ya go fitlha kwa godimodimo." 
Psalms57:11 Modimo, o goletsegele godimo ga magodimo; a kgalalelo ya gago e nne godimo ga lefatshe lotlhe." 
Psalms58:1 A ruri lo tle lo bue tshiamo ka go didimala? A lo tle lo atlhole ka thokgamo, lona bana ba batho?" 
Psalms58:2 Ee, lo dira tshiamololo mo pelong; lo lekanyetsa go thubaka ga diatla tsa lona kwa ntle mo lefatsheng." 
Psalms58:3 Baikepi ba sa le ba nna ba sele ba sa tswa sebopelong; ya re ba sa ntse ba belegwa ba timele ka go bua maaka. 
Psalms58:4 Botlhoko jwa bone bo tshwana le botlhoko jwa noga; ba tshwana le lebolobolo le le sa utlweng, le le thibang tsebe ya lone," 
Psalms58:5 e le le le sa reetseng lentswe la batshereanyi, le fa go ka tshereanngwa ka botlhale jo bo ntseng jang." 
Psalms58:6 Roba meno a bone, Modimo, mo melomong ya bone; roba, o ntshe meno a matona a ditawana, Jehofa." 
Psalms58:7 A ba nyelele jaaka metsi a a seselang; e tle e re a kaya metswi ya gagwe, e nne jaaka ekete e pomilwe." 
Psalms58:8 A ba nne jaaka kgopa e e tlhapologang e ba e nyelela, jaaka tshenyegelo ya mosadi, e e se kang ya bona letsatsi." 
Psalms58:9 E re pele dipitsa tsa lona di e se di utlwe molelo wa mitlwa, o tlaa e tlosa ka setsuatsue, e e metsi le e e tukang mmogo." 
Psalms58:10 Mosiami o tlaa itumela mogang o bonang pusoloso; o tlaa itlhapisa dinao mo mading a baikepi. 
Psalms58:11 Jalo batho ba bo ba tlaa re: “Ruri go na le tuelo e e nnetseng mosiami; ruri Modimo o gone o o atlholang mo lefatsheng.” 
Psalms59:1 Modimo wa me nkgolola mo babeng ba me; o mpeye kwa godimo, ke tswe mo go ba ba ntsogologelang." 
Psalms59:2 Nkgolola mo badiring ba boikepo, o bo o mpoloke mo bathong ba ba ratang go tsholola madi." 
Psalms59:3 Gonne bona, ba laletse mowa wa me; ba ba thatathata ba a mphuthegela, e seng ka ntlha ya tlolo ya me, le fa e le ka ntlha ya boleo jwa me, Jehofa." 
Psalms59:4 Ba tle ba siane, ba iketleetse kwa ntle ga molato wa me; tsogela go nthusa, mme o bone." 
Psalms59:5 E bong wena, Jehofa, Modimo wa masomosomo, Modimo wa Iseraele, a ko o tsogele go ya go lekola merafe yotlhe; o se ka wa utlwela batlodi bape ba ba ikepang botlhoko. Sela." 
Psalms59:6 Ba tle ba boe ka maabanyane, ba kue jaaka ntša, ba potologe motse." 
Psalms59:7 Bona, ba tle ba kgobole ka legano la bone; ditšhaka di mo dipounameng tsa bone, ka ba tle ba re: “Go utlwa mang?”" 
Psalms59:8 Mme wena Jehofa o tlaa ba tshega; o tlaa sotla ka merafe yotlhe. 
Psalms59:9 Ao, thata ya me, ke tlaa lebelela mo go wena; gonne Modimo ke kago ya me e e godileng ya phemelo." 
Psalms59:10 Modimo wa boutlwelobotlhoko jwa me o tlaa ntlela pele; Modimo o tlaa mma ke bona keletso ya me mo babeng ba me. 
Psalms59:11 O se ka wa ba bolaya, e tlaa re gongwe batho ba me ba lebale; ba falatse ka thata ya gago, o ba folose, Jehofa thebe ya rona." 
Psalms59:12 Ka ntlha ya boleo jwa molomo wa bone, le mafoko a dipounama tsa bone, a ba tshwarwe fela mo bopelompeng jwa bone, le ka ntlha ya go hutsakanya le go aka mo ba go buang." 
Psalms59:13 Ba nyeletse mo bogaleng jo bogolo, o ba nyeletse gore ba tle ba se ka ba tlhola ba le gone; mme a ba itse fa Modimo o laola mo go Jakobe, go ya kwa dikhutlong tsa lefatshe. Sela." 
Psalms59:14 Mme a e re ka maabanyane ba bo ba kue jaaka ntša, ba potologe motse." 
Psalms59:15 Ba tlaa kailakaila go batla dijo, ba tlaa lala ba diegile bosigo jotlhe fa ba sa bone go kgora." 
Psalms59:16 Mme nna, ke tlaa opela ka ga thata ya gago; ee, mo mosong ke tlaa dudueletsa godimo ka ga boutlwelobotlhoko jwa gago, ka gobo o ntse o le kago ya me e e godileng ya phemelo, le botshabelo mo letsatsing la pitlagano ya me." 
Psalms59:17 Wena, Thata ya me, ke tlaa go opelela dipako, ka gobo Modimo ke kago ya me e e godileng ya phemelo, Modimo wa boutlwelobotlhoko jwa me." 
Psalms60:1 Modimo, o re latlhile, o re thubakile; o ntse o le bogale; a ko o bo o re rudise gape." 
Psalms60:2 O reketlisitse lefatshe; o le fatogantse; fodisa diphatogano tsa lone, ka le a roroma." 
Psalms60:3 O supeditse batho ba gago dilo tse di thata; o re nositse bojalwa jwa mofine jwa go theekedisa. 
Psalms60:4 Ba ba go boifang, o ba neile mokgele, gore o bonadiwe ka ntlha ya boammaaruri. Sela." 
Psalms60:5 Boloka ka seatla sa gago se segolo, mme o re arabe, gore moratwi wa gago a gololwe." 
Psalms60:6 Modimo o buile mo boitshepong jwa one; “Ke tlaa ja koma; ke tlaa kgaoganya Shekeme, ke tlaa lekalekanya molapo wa Sukothe." 
Psalms60:7 Gileate ke ga me, le Manase ke ga me, Eferaime le gone ke phemelo ya tlhogo ya me; Juta ke thobane ya me ya bogosi." 
Psalms60:8 Moabe ke mogopo wa me o o tlhapelang; setlhako sa me ke tlaa se latlhela mo Etome; wena Filisitia, goa ka ntlha ya me.”" 
Psalms60:9 E mang yo o tlaa nkisang mo motseng o o thata? E mang yo o tlaa nkgogelang mo Etome? 
Psalms60:10 Wena, Modimo, a ga o a re latlha? Mme le gone Modimo, ga o ko o bolola le dintwa tsa rona." 
Psalms60:11 Re nee thuso go tlhabana le mmaba, gonne go thusa ga motho ke lefela." 
Psalms60:12 Re tlaa dira senna ka Modimo, ka e le one o o tlaa gatakang baba ba rona." 
Psalms61:1 Utlwa go goa ga me, Modimo; ela morapelo wa me tlhoko." 
Psalms61:2 Ke tlaa tlhaeleletsa koo go wena ke le kwa bokhutlong jwa lefatshe, mogang pelo ya me e phikanngwang ke bohutsana, nkgogela kwa lefikeng le le godimo bogolo go nna." 
Psalms61:3 Gonne o ntse o le botshabelo jwa me, kago e e thata ya phemelo fa go tshajwa mmaba." 
Psalms61:4 Ke tlaa aga mo motlaaganeng wa gago ka bosakhutleng; ke tlaa tshebela mo sekhukhung sa diphuka tsa gago. Sela. 
Psalms61:5 Gonne wena Modimo, o utlwile maikano a me; o nneile go tlhakanela boswa le ba ba boifang leina la gago." 
Psalms61:6 O tlaa lelefatsa botshelo jwa kgosi; dinyaga tsa yone di tlaa nna jaaka ekete ke tsa ditshika di le dintsi. 
Psalms61:7 E tlaa nna fa pele ga Modimo ka bosakhutleng; a ko o etleetse bopelonomi jwa lorato, gore bo e boloke, le boammaaruri." 
Psalms61:8 Jalo ke tlaa opelela leina la gago dipako ka bosakhutleng, gore ke nne ke diratse maikano a me ka malatsi otlhe." 
Psalms62:1 Mowa wa me o lebeletse fela mo Modimong; poloko ya me e tswa mo go one. 
Psalms62:2 Ke one osi o e leng lefika la me, le poloko ya me; ke one kago ya me e e godileng ya phemelo; ga nketla ke tshikinyega thata." 
Psalms62:3 Lo tlaa nna lo gagaotla motho goleele go le kaye, gore lo tle lo mmolae, lotlhe, jaaka lomota lo lo obameng, le jaaka logora lo lo reketlang?" 
Psalms62:4 Ba gakololana fela go mo diga mo tlotlomalong ya gagwe; ba natefelwa ke maaka; ka molomo ba a segofatsa, mme mo teng ba hutsake fela. Sela." 
Psalms62:5 Mowa wa me, wena o lebelele mo Modimong fela; gonne tebelelo ya me e mo go one fela." 
Psalms62:6 Ke one osi lefika la me, le poloko ya me; ke one kago ya me e e godileng ya phemelo; ga nketla ke tshikinyega." 
Psalms62:7 Poloko ya me le kgalalelo ya me di na le Modimo; lefika la thata ya me le mo Modimong, le botshabelo jwa me." 
Psalms62:8 Lona batho, ikanyeng mo go one ka metlha yotlhe; tshololang dipelo tsa lona fa pele ga one; Modimo ke botshabelo jwa rona. Sela." 
Psalms62:9 Ruri ba e leng batho fela ke lefela, le batho ba e leng bagolwane ke maaka; mo selekanyong sa pego ba tlaa ya kwa godimo; fa ba le mmogo ba motlhofo bogolo go tsa lefela." 
Psalms62:10 Lo se ka lwa ikanya patiko, lo bo lo se ka lwa thetha ka bogodu; e re fa mahumo a tota, lo se ka lwa tlhoma pelo tsa lona mo go one." 
Psalms62:11 Modimo o buile gangwe fela, mo ke go utlwile gabedi; gore thata ke ya Modimo;" 
Psalms62:12 le gone, Morena, sa gago ke boutlwelobotlhoko, ka gobo o naya motho mongwe le mongwe ka fa tirong ya gagwe." 
Psalms63:1 Modimo, o Modimo wa me; ke tlaa go batla go sa le gale; mowa wa me o go nyoretswe, nama ya me e go tlhologeletswe, mo lefatsheng la lokgere lo lo lapisang, kwa metsi a seong gone." 
Psalms63:2 Ke go lebile jalo mo felong ga boitshepo, go bona thata ya gago le kgalalelo ya gago." 
Psalms63:3 Gonne bopelonomi jwa gago jwa lorato bo molemo bogolo go botshelo; dipounama tsa me di tlaa go baka. 
Psalms63:4 Jalo ke tlaa go baka ka ke sa ntse ke tshedile; ke tlaa tsholetsa mabogo a me mo ineng la gago. 
Psalms63:5 Mowa wa me o tlaa kgora jaaka fa go jelwe mmoko le monono; molomo wa me o tlaa go baka ka dipounama tse di itumelang; 
Psalms63:6 mogang ke go gakologelwang ke le mo bolaong jwa me, mme ke go akanya mo ditisong tsa bosigo." 
Psalms63:7 Gonne o ntse o le thuso ya me; mme ke tlaa itumela mo moriting wa diphuka tsa gago. 
Psalms63:8 Mowa wa me o go latela ka thata; seatla sa gago se se siameng se ntshegeditse. 
Psalms63:9 Mme ba ba tsomang mowa wa me go o senya, ba tlaa ya mo mafelong a lefatshe a a kwa tlase." 
Psalms63:10 Ba tlaa neelwa mo thateng ya tšhaka; ba tlaa nna seabe sa diphokoje. 
Psalms63:11 Kgosi e tlaa itumela mo Modimong; mongwe le mongwe yo o ikanang ka one o tlaa ja koma; gonne molomo wa ba ba buang maaka o tlaa thijwa. 
Psalms64:1 Utlwa lentswe la me, Modimo, mo boitokong jwa me; dibela botshelo jwa me mo go boifeng mmaba." 
Psalms64:2 Ntshubela kgakololo ya mo sephiring ya badira bosula; mo pheretlhong ya badiri ba boikepo; 
Psalms64:3 ba ba looditseng loleme lwa bone jaaka tšhaka, ba kaile metswi ya bone e e leng mafoko a a galakang;" 
Psalms64:4 gore e tle e re ba le mo maipobong ba hule yo o itekanetseng; ba mo hule ka tshoganetso, mme ba sa boife." 
Psalms64:5 Ba itlhoafatsa mo boikaelelong jo bo bosula; ba bue mmogo ka ga go baya diru ka boiphitlho, ba re: “E mang yo o tlaa di bonang?”" 
Psalms64:6 Ba tle ba tlhotlhomise maikepo, ba re: “Re sweditse tatelelo gotlhe, ka boitshoko.” Mme mogopolo o o kwa teng wa mongwe le mongwe o boteng, le yone pelo." 
Psalms64:7 Modimo o tlaa ba hula; ba tlaa kwenesiwa ka tshoganetso ka motswi. 
Psalms64:8 Jalo ba tlaa kgokgoediwa, loleme lwa bone ka bosi lo ntse lo ba nyatsa; botlhe ba ba ba bonang ba tlaa ribaribetsa ka ditlhogo." 
Psalms64:9 Batho botlhe ba tlaa boifa; mme ba tlaa bolelo tiro ya Modimo, le go dira ga one ba tlaa go akanya ka botlhale." 
Psalms64:10 Basiami ba tlaa itumela mo go Jehofa, ba tlaa ikanya mo go ene; botlhe ba ba pelo e e thokgameng ba tlaa ja koma." 
Psalms65:1 Modimo, pako e go lebeletse mo Sione; ke wena yo ikano o tlaa e direlwang." 
Psalms65:2 Wena yo o utlwang thapelo, nama yotlhe e tlaa tla kwa go wena." 
Psalms65:3 Maikepo a a mphenya; ka ga ditlolo tsa rona, wena o tlaa di tlhapisa o di tolosa." 
Psalms65:4 Go sego motho yo o mo itshenkelang, wa mo ikatametsa gore a age mo malwapeng a gago; re tlaa kgora molemo wa ntlo ya gago, e bong felo ga boitshepo ga tempele ya gago." 
Psalms65:5 O tlaa re araba mo tshiamong ka dilo tse di boitshegang, Modimo wa poloko ya rona; yo o leng boikanyo jwa dikhutlo tsotlhe tsa lefatshe le jwa ba ba kwa kgakala mo lewatleng;" 
Psalms65:6 o o tiisang dithaba ka thata ya one; ka o itlamile ka nonofo; 
Psalms65:7 o o didimatsang go suma ga mawatle, go suma ga makhubu a one, le pheretlhego ya ditšhaba." 
Psalms65:8 Le ba ba agileng kwa mafatsheng a a kwa ntlentle ba tle ba tshoge ka ditshupo tsa gago; o itumedisa matso a moso le a maabanyane. 
Psalms65:9 O a tle o lekole lefatshe, mme o le nose, o le humise thata; noka ya Modimo e tletse metsi; o a re o sena go baakanya lefatshe, jalo, o tle o ba etleeleletse mabele." 
Psalms65:10 O a tle o nose malepe a lone thata; o papane ditemana tsa lone; o le ngodise ka medupe; o segofatse go tlhoga ga lone. 
Psalms65:11 O a tle o rwese ngwaga tlhogo ka molemo wa gago; ditsela tsa gago di rothe monono. 
Psalms65:12 Di rothele mo mafulong a naga; mme dithotana di tlamiwe ka boitumelo. 
Psalms65:13 Mafulo a apesiwe matsomane; mekgatšha e khurumediwe ka mabele; e goe ka boitumelo, e be e opele." 
Psalms66:1 Dudueletsa Modimo, ka modumo wa boitumelo, wena lefatshe lotlhe:" 
Psalms66:2 Opelela godimo kgalalelo ya leina la one; galaletsa pako ya one. 
Psalms66:3 Raya Modimo o re: “Ana ditiro tsa gago di boitshega jang! Baba ba gago ba tlaa ineela mo go wena ka ntlha ya bogolo jwa thata ya gago. 
Psalms66:4 Lefatshe lotlhe le tlaa go obamela, le tlaa go opelela; ba tlaa opelela leina la gago.” Sela." 
Psalms66:5 Tlang, lo bone ditiro tsa Modimo; o a boitshega mo go direng ga one mo baneng ba batho." 
Psalms66:6 Lewatle o kile wa le fetola lefatshe le le omeletseng; ba ralala noka ka dinao; gone foo, ra itumela mo go one." 
Psalms66:7 O busa ka nonofo ya one ka bosakhutleng; matlho a one a tlhokometse merafe; a batsuolodi ba se ikgodise. Sela. 
Psalms66:8 A ko lo bakeng Modimo wa rona, lona ditšhaba, lo utlwatse lentswe la pako ya one;" 
Psalms66:9 o o tshegeleditseng mowa wa rona mo botshelong, o bo o sa leseletse dinao tsa rona go tshikinyega." 
Psalms66:10 Gonne wena Modimo o re lekile; o re lekile jaaka selefera se tle se lekwe. 
Psalms66:11 O ne wa re tlisa mo lotloeng; wa baya mokgweleo o o botlhoko mo dinokeng tsa rona. 
Psalms66:12 Ba ba pagameng o ba re tlodisitse godimo ga ditlhogo tsa rona; ra ralala molelo le metsi; wa re ntshetsa kwa felong fa go letlotlo. 
Psalms66:13 Ke tlaa tsena mo ntlong ya gago ka ditshupelo tsa phiso, ke tlaa go lefela maikano a me," 
Psalms66:14 a dipounama tsa me di a boletseng, le a molomo wa me o a buileng, jale ka ke le mo pitlaganong." 
Psalms66:15 Ke tlaa go isetsa ditshupelo tsa phiso, tsa tse di nonneng, di na le maswalo a diphelefu; ke tlaa isa dikgomo di na le dipodi tshupelo. Sela." 
Psalms66:16 Ntlong lo utlweng, lona lotlhe ba lo boifang Modimo, mme ke tlaa kakanya se o se diretseng mowa wa me." 
Psalms66:17 Ke ne ka tlhaeletsa kwa go one ka molomo wa me, wa ba wa bakwa thata ka loleme lwa me." 
Psalms66:18 Fa nkabo ke ne ka tsaya boikepo tsia mo pelong ya me, Jehofa o ne a tlaa se ke a reetse." 
Psalms66:19 Ruri Modimo o utlwile; o tsere lentswe la morapelo wa me tsia. 
Psalms66:20 A go bakwe Modimo o o se kang wa faposa morapelo wa me, le fa e le boutlwelobotlhoko jwa one go bo faposa mo go nna." 
Psalms67:1 A Modimo o nne boutlwelobotlhoko mo go rona, o re segofatse, o re phatsimisetse sefatlhogo sa one; Sela," 
Psalms67:2 gore tsela ya gago e itsiwe mo lefatsheng, le phodiso ya gago e e bolokang mo merafeng yotlhe." 
Psalms67:3 A ditšhaba di go bake Modimo, a ditšhaba tsotlhe di go bake." 
Psalms67:4 A merafe e ke e ipele, e opele ka boitumelo, ka gobo o tlaa atlhola ditšhaba ka tekatekanyo, o ba o busa merafe mo lefatsheng. Sela." 
Psalms67:5 A ditšhaba di go bake, Modimo; a ditšhaba tsotlhe di go bake." 
Psalms67:6 Lefatshe le ntshitse totafalo ya lone; Modimo, e bong Modimo wa rona tota, o tlaa re segofatsa." 
Psalms67:7 Modimo o tlaa re segofatsa; mme dikhutlo tsotlhe tsa lefatshe di tlaa o boifa. 
Psalms68:1 A Modimo o nanoge; a baba ba one ba faladiwe; le ba ba o ilang ba tshabe fa pele ga one. 
Psalms68:2 Jaaka mosi o tle o figitlhediwe, ba figitlhetse jalo; jaaka makgaga a tle a tlhapologe fa pele ga molelo, a baikepi ba nyelele jalo ka sebonalo sa Modimo." 
Psalms68:3 Mme a basiami ba itumele; ba kgane ka boitumelo fa pele ga Modimo; ee, a ba itumele ka boipelo." 
Psalms68:4 Opelelang Modimo, opelelang leina la one dipako; o o ralalang dipoa tsa naga o pagame, lo o direle tsela ya mheru; leina la one ke JAH; lo bo lo kgane ka boitumelo fa pele ga one." 
Psalms68:5 Modimo ke rramasiela, le moatlholedi wa basadi ba batlholagadi mo boagong jwa one jo bo boitshepo." 
Psalms68:6 Ba ba lore, Modimo o tle o ba dire motse; bagolegwi o ba ntshetse go kokotlegela; mme batsuolodi bone, ba agile mo lefatsheng la lokgere." 
Psalms68:7 Modimo, e rile o bolola fa pele ga batho ba gago, e rile o ralala naga ka kgagamalo, Sela;" 
Psalms68:8 lefatshe la roroma, magodimo le one a rotha ka sebonalo sa Modimo; le e leng Sinai yole, a roroma ka sebonalo sa Modimo, Modimo wa Iseraele." 
Psalms68:9 Wena, Modimo, wa nesa pula e kgolo, wa rakalatsa ba boswa jwa gago jale ka ba ne ba ngodiegile." 
Psalms68:10 Phuthego ya gago ya aga gone; wena Modimo, wa etleeletsa bahumanegi ka se se tswang mo molemong wa gago." 
Psalms68:11 “Jehofa o tle a ntshe lefoko, basadi ba ba itsiseng batho mafoko ba nne bontsi jo bogolo." 
Psalms68:12 Dikgosi tsa dintwa di tshabe; di tshabe, mme mosadi yo o salang mo gae a abe thopo." 
Psalms68:13 Le fa lo lala mo marakaneng a dinku, go bo go ntse jaaka diphuka tsa lephoi tse di apesitsweng selefera, le dintlha tsa tsone ka gouta e tshetlha." 
Psalms68:14 E rile Mothatayotlhe a gasanya dikgosi gone, ga nna jaaka fa kapoko e na mo Salemone." 
Psalms68:15 A thaba ya Modimo, thaba ya Bašane! A thaba e e godileng thaba ya Bašane!" 
Psalms68:16 Lona dithaba tse di godileng, lo dilolelang thaba e Modimo o e eleditseng gore e nne boago jwa one? Ee, Jehofa o tlaa aga mo go yone ka bosakhutleng." 
Psalms68:17 Dikara tsa Modimo di le dikete di le masome mabedi, e bong dikete tse di tlhatlaganyeng le dikete; Morena o mo go tsone, jaaka mo Sinai, mo felong ga boitshepo." 
Psalms68:18 O tlhatlogetse kwa godimo, o gogile botshwaro jwa gago bo tshwerwe; o amogetse dineo mo bathong, ee, le mo go bone ba e leng batsuolodi, gore Jehofa Modimo a tle a age nabo." 
Psalms68:19 A go bakwe Morena yo o rwalang merwalo ya rona ka malatsi, e bong Modimo o e leng poloka ya rona. Sela." 
Psalms68:20 Mo go rona Modimo ke Modimo wa dikgololo; mme diphalodiso mo losong ke tse e leng tsa Morena, Modimo wa rona." 
Psalms68:21 Modimo o tlaa arola tlhogo ya baba ba one, e bong segata se se moriri sa yo o sa ntseng a tswelela mo melatong ya gagwe." 
Psalms68:22 Morena o rile; Ke tlaa ba ke ba tlisa gape go tswa kwa Bašane, ke tlaa ba tlisa gape go tswa matenyeng a lewatle;" 
Psalms68:23 gore o tle o ine lonao lwa gago mo mading, gore diteme tsa dintšha tsa gago di bone seabe sa tsone se se tswang babeng ba gago.”" 
Psalms68:24 Ba bonye ditsamao tsa gago Modimo, e bong ditsamao tsa Modimo wa me, Kgosi ya me, di tsena mo felong ga boitshepo." 
Psalms68:25 Baopedi ba ne ba etelela pele, ba ba letsang diletso ba ba sala morago, ba tsentswe gare ke barweetsana ba ba letsang meropana." 
Psalms68:26 Bakang Modimo mo diphuthegong, e bong Morena, lona ba lo leng ba motswedi wa Iseraele." 
Psalms68:27 Yole ke Benjamine yo mmotlana, mmusi wa bone, dikgosana tsa Juta di na le lekoko la tsone, dikgosana tsa Sebulune, dikgosana tsa Nafetali." 
Psalms68:28 Modimo wa gago o laotse thata ya gago; Modimo, a ko o thatafatse sone se o se re diretseng." 
Psalms68:29 Ka ntlha ya tempele ya gago e e kwa Jerusalema, dikgosi di tlaa tlisa dineo kwa go wena." 
Psalms68:30 Kgalemela sebatana sa lotlhaka, bontsi jwa dipoo, di na le dinamane tsa ditšhaba; ba ne ba tle ba ineele ka dipapetlana tsa diselefera; o faladitse ditšhaba tse di natefelwang ke ntwa." 
Psalms68:31 Dikgosana di tlaa tswa kwa Egepeto; lefatshe la Ethopia le tlaa akofa le otlololela Modimo mabogo a lone. 
Psalms68:32 Opelelang Modimo, lona magosi a lefatshe; a ko lo opeleleng Morena dipako, Sela;" 
Psalms68:33 e bong ene yo o pagameng magodimo a magodimo, a a sa leng a leo bogologolo; utlwang, o ntsha lentswe la one, mme e be e le lentswe le le thata thata." 
Psalms68:34 A lo ko lo re: Thata ke ya Modimo; tlotlomalo ya one e okame Iseraele, thata ya one e kwa magodimong." 
Psalms68:35 Modimo o a boitshega o le mo mafelong a gago a a boitshepo; Modimo wa Iseraele one, o naya batho ba one thata le nonofo. A go bakwe Modimo." 
Psalms69:1 Mpoloka Modimo, gonne metsi a tseneletse mowa wa me." 
Psalms69:2 Ke roromela mo morageng o o boteng, kwa go se nang boemo; ke fitlhile mo metsing a a boteng, kwa merwalela e nkhurumetsang gone." 
Psalms69:3 Ke lapisitswe ke go lela ga me; memetso ya me e phaphaletse; matlho a me a tlhaela ka ke lebeletse Modimo wa me. 
Psalms69:4 Ba ba ntlhoileng ka bomo fela ba bantsi bogolo go meriri ya tlhogo ya me; ba ba ratang ba kabo ba nkgaola, e le baba ba me ka go sa siamang, ba thata thata; gone foo, ka rebola se ke sa se tsayang." 
Psalms69:5 Modimo o a bo itse boeleele jwa me; le maleo a me ga a go subegela. 
Psalms69:6 Ba ba go lebeletseng a ba se tlhajwe ke ditlhong ka nna, Jehofa, Modimo wa masomosomo; ba ba go batlang a ba se tlisiwe mo tlotlologong ka nna, Modimo wa Iseraele." 
Psalms69:7 Gonne ke bogisegile kgobo ka ntlha ya gago; ditlhong di bipile sefatlhogo sa me. 
Psalms69:8 Ke ntse moeng mo go bomorwa rre; ke motho o sele mo baneng ba ga mme. 
Psalms69:9 Gonne tlhoafalelo ya ntlo ya gago e njele; e bile dikgobo tsa ba ba go kgobang di wetse mo go nna. 
Psalms69:10 E rile ke lela ke otlhaya mowa wa me ka go ikitsa go ja, ya nna kgobo mo go nna." 
Psalms69:11 E rile ke dira letsela la kgetse go nna seaparo sa me, ka tloga ka tswa seane mo go bone." 
Psalms69:12 Ba ba tleng ba dule fa kgorong ba bua ka ga me; ke bile ke pina ya matagwa. 
Psalms69:13 Ka ga me, morapelo wa me o koo go wena, Jehofa, mo motlheng o o lebosegang; Modimo, mo bontsing jwa boutlwelobotlhoko jwa gago, o nkarabe mo boammaaruring jwa poloka ya gago." 
Psalms69:14 Ntshwatola mo morageng, mme o se ka wa ntesa ka roromela; a ke gololwe mo go ba ba ntlhoileng, mme ke tswe mo metsing a a boteng." 
Psalms69:15 A morwalela wa metsi o se mphikame; le gone a bodiba jo bo botengteng bo se ka jwa nkometsa, mme molete o se ntswalele molomo ke le mo teng." 
Psalms69:16 Nkaraba, Jehofa, ka gobo bopelonomi jwa gago jwa lorato bo molemo, ka fa bontsing jwa mapelonolo a manana a gago, retologela kwa go nna." 
Psalms69:17 O se ka wa subela motlhanka wa gago sefatlhogo sa gago; gonne ke mo pitlaganong; nkaraba ka bonako. 
Psalms69:18 Atamela mowa wa me, o o golole; nthekolola ka ntlha ya baba ba me." 
Psalms69:19 Kgobo ya me o a e itse, le ditlhong tsa me, le tlotlologo ya me; baganetsi ba me botlhe fela ba fa pele ga gago." 
Psalms69:20 Kgobo e phatlotse pelo ya me; ke imelesegile pelo, ka senka bangwe ba ba ka tlhomogang pelo; mme go ne go se na ope; le bagomotsi, mme ka se ka ka bona ope." 
Psalms69:21 Ba bile ba nnaya santlhokwe go nna sejo sa me; le mo go nyorweng ga me ba nnaya bojalwa jo bo botšarara go bo nwa. 
Psalms69:22 A lomati lwa bojelo lwa bone lo tswe serai fa pele ga bone; a e re ba le mo kagisong, lo tle lo nne seru fela." 
Psalms69:23 A matlho a bone a fifale gore ba se bone; o bo o roromise ditheka tsa bone ka metlha yotlhe. 
Psalms69:24 Ba goromeletse bogale jwa gago, mme a kgakalo ya bogale jwa gago e ba tshware." 
Psalms69:25 A boago jwa bone bo nne tshwafalo fela; a go se age ope mo megopeng ya bone. 
Psalms69:26 Gonne ba bogisa ene yo o mo iteileng; ba bolele bohutsana jwa ba o ba kwenesitseng. 
Psalms69:27 Oketsa boikepo jwa bone ka boikepo, mme ba se tle mo tshiamong ya gago." 
Psalms69:28 A ba phimolwe mo lokwalong lwa botshelo, ba se ka ba kwalwa le basiami." 
Psalms69:29 Nna ke lehuma fela, le bohutsana fela; a poloka ya gago Modimo e mpeye kwa godimo." 
Psalms69:30 Ke tlaa baka leina la Modimo ka sefela; ke tlaa o goletsa ka go ntsha malebogo. 
Psalms69:31 Go tlaa kgatlha Jehofa bogolo go kgomo, le fa e le pholo e e nang le dinaka le ditlhako." 
Psalms69:32 Bapelonomi ba go bonye, mme ba itumela; lona ba lo senkang Modimo, a pelo tsa lona di tshele." 
Psalms69:33 Gonne Jehofa o utlwa batlhoki, o bile a sa nyatse bagolegwi ba gagwe." 
Psalms69:34 A legodimo le mmake le lefatshe, le mawatle, le tsotlhe tse di bukunyang mo go one." 
Psalms69:35 Gonne Modimo o tlaa boloka Sione, o tlaa aga metse ya Juta; mme ba tlaa nna gone, ba tlaa nna nayo e le boswa jwa bone." 
Psalms69:36 Losika lwa batlhanka ba one le lone lo tlaa go rua; le ba ba ratang leina la one ba tlaa aga gone. 
Psalms70:1 Akofa, Modimo, o nkgolole; a ko o akofele go nthusa, Jehofa." 
Psalms70:2 Ba ba tsomang mowa wa me a ba tlhajwe ke ditlhong, ba tseanngwe; ba ba itumelang fa ke utlwa botlhoko a ba busediwe kwa morago ba tlhokisiwe tlotlo." 
Psalms70:3 Bone ba ba reng: “Ahe! Ahe!” A ba busediwe kwa morago ka ntlha ya ditlhong tsa bone. 
Psalms70:4 Botlhe ba ba go batlang a ba itumele, ba ipele mo go wena; a ba ba ratang poloka ya gago ba nne ba bue ka gale, ba re: “A Modimo o golediwe.”" 
Psalms70:5 Mme nna ke humanegile, ke a tlhoka; a ko o nkakofele, Modimo; wena o thuso ya me, le mogolodi wa me; Jehofa, o se ka wa diega gope." 
Psalms71:1 Jehofa, ke ikantse mo go wena, a ke se tlhajwe ke ditlhong gope." 
Psalms71:2 Nkgolola ka tshiamo ya gago, me o mphalodise; ntshekegela tsebe ya gago, o mpoloke." 
Psalms71:3 O nne lefika la me la boago, le ke ka nnang ka ya mo go lone ka gale; o ntshitse taolo ya gore ke bolokwe; gonne o lefika la me, le kago ya me ya phemelo." 
Psalms71:4 Mphalodisa, Modimo wa me, mo seatleng sa moikepi, mo seatleng sa mosiamolodi yo o bolalome." 
Psalms71:5 Gonne o tsholofelo ya me, Jehofa, Modimo; o sa le o nna boikanyo jwa me le mo bokaung jwa me." 
Psalms71:6 O sa le o nkokotletsa ke sa tswa sebopelong; ke wena yo o nntshitseng mo maleng a ga mme; pako ya me e tlaa nna ka ga gago ka gale. 
Psalms71:7 Ke ntse jaaka segakgamatso mo bathong ba le bantsi; mme wena o botshabelo jwa me jo bo thata. 
Psalms71:8 Molomo wa me o tlaa tlala pako ya gago, le tlotlo ya gago ka letsatsi lotlhe." 
Psalms71:9 Se ntatlhe mo motlheng wa botsofe; se ntlogele mogang thata ya me e felang. 
Psalms71:10 Gonne baba ba me ba bua ka ga me; le ba ba lalelang mowa wa me ba a gakololana. 
Psalms71:11 Ba re: “Modimo o mo tlogetse, mo lateleleng, lo mo tshware; gonne ga go na ope yo o ka gololang.”" 
Psalms71:12 Ao Modimo! Se nne kgakala le nna; ao, Modimo wa me! Akofela go nthusa." 
Psalms71:13 Bone ba e leng baganetsi ba mowa wa me, a ba tlhajwe ke ditlhong ba nyelediwe; ba ba batlang gore ke utlwe botlhoko a ba bipiwe ka kgobo le tlotlologo." 
Psalms71:14 Nna ke tlaa nna ke solofela fela ka gale, ke tlaa fela ke ntse ke go baka bogolo bogolo." 
Psalms71:15 Molomo wa me o tlaa bolela ka ga tshiamo ya gago, le ka ga poloka ya gago ka letsatsi lotlhe; gonne ga ke itse palo ya tsone." 
Psalms71:16 Ke tlaa tla le ditiro tsa nonofo, tsa ga Jehofa, Modimo; ke tlaa umaka tshiamo ya gago, e e leng ya gago yosi." 
Psalms71:17 Modimo o sa le wa nna wa nthuta le mo bokaung jwa me, ke ntse ke bolela ditiro tsa gago tse di gakgamatsang, nako e sa le eno." 
Psalms71:18 Ee, le gone, e tlaa re ke tsofetse ke thuntse tlhogo, Modimo, o se ka wa ntlogela; go bo go tle go tsamaye ke bolelele kokomana e e tlang thata ya gago, le nonofo ya gago ke e bolelele mongwe le mongwe yo o tlaa tlang." 
Psalms71:19 Tshiamo ya gago, Modimo, le yone e godimo thata; wena Modimo yo o dirileng dilo tse dikgolo, yo o tshwanang nao ya bo e le mang?" 
Psalms71:20 Wena yo o re bontshitseng ditlalelo di le dintsi le tse di botlhoko, o tlaa ba o re rudisa gape, mme o tlaa ba o re kwetola gape o re ntsha kwa matenyeng a lefatshe." 
Psalms71:21 Totisa bogolo jwa me, o bo o retologe gape, o nkgomotse." 
Psalms71:22 Le gone, ke tlaa go baka ka saletare, e bong boammaaruri jwa gago, Modimo wa me; ke tlaa go opelela ka harepe, wena Moitshepi wa Iseraele." 
Psalms71:23 Dipounama tsa me di tlaa itumela thata mogang ke go opelelang dipako; le mowa wa me o o o rekolotseng. 
Psalms71:24 Loleme lwa me le lone lo tlaa bua ka ga tshiamo ya gago ka letsatsi lotlhe; gonne ba tlhabilwe ke ditlhong, gonne ba sosobagantswe, ba ba batlang gore ke utlwe botlhoko." 
Psalms72:1 Naya kgosi dikatloholo tsa gago Modimo, le morwa kgosi o mo neye tshiamo ya gago." 
Psalms72:2 O tlaa atlhola batho ba gago ka tshiamo, le bahumanegi ba gago ka tshekatsheko." 
Psalms72:3 Dithaba di tlaa leretse batho kagiso, le dithabana, mo tshiamong." 
Psalms72:4 O tlaa atlhola bahumanegi ba batho, bana ba batlhoki o tlaa ba boloka, mme mopatiki o tlaa mo phatlakanya." 
Psalms72:5 Ba tlaa nna ba go boifa ka letsatsi le sa leyo, le kgwedi e sa leyo, mo ditshikatshikeng." 
Psalms72:6 O tlaa na jaaka pula e e nang bojang jo bo segilweng, jaaka medupe e e nosang lefatshe." 
Psalms72:7 Mo metlheng ya gagwe basiami ba tlaa thama; go tlaa nna letlotlo la kagiso, go tle go tsamaye kgwedi e tlhokafalele ruri." 
Psalms72:8 O bile o tlaa nna le puso go tswa lewatleng go ya lewatleng, le go tswa Nokeng go ya dikhutlong tsa lefatshe." 
Psalms72:9 Ba ba agileng mo dinageng ba tlaa obama fa pele ga gagwe; le baba ba gagwe ba tlaa latswa lorole. 
Psalms72:10 Dikgosi tsa Tarešiše le tsa ditlhake di tlaa tlisa dimpho; dikgosi tsa Sheba le Seba di tlaa isa dineo. 
Psalms72:11 Ee, dikgosi tsotlhe di tlaa wela fa pele ga gagwe; merafe yotlhe e tlaa mo direla." 
Psalms72:12 Gonne o tlaa golola motlhoki mogang o lelang; le mohumanegi yo o se nang mothusi. 
Psalms72:13 O tlaa tlhomogela bahumanegi le batlhoki pelo; mme mewa ya batlhoki o tlaa e boloka. 
Psalms72:14 O tlaa golola mewa ya bone mo pogisong le mo thubakong; mme madi a bone a tlaa tlotlega mo matlhong a gagwe; 
Psalms72:15 mme ba tlaa tshela; ene o tlaa newa gouta ya Sheba; batho ba tlaa nna ba mo rapelela ka gale; ba tlaa mmaka ka letsatsi lotlhe. 
Psalms72:16 Go tlaa nna letlotlo la mabele mo lefatsheng, mo ditlhoeng tsa dithaba; loungo lwa one lo tlaa ebelega jaaka Lebanone; mme ba e leng ba motse ba tlaa kgaba jaaka bojang jwa lefatshe." 
Psalms72:17 Leina la gagwe le tlaa emela ruri ka bosakhutleng; leina la gagwe le tlaa nna le isiwa kwa pele ka letsatsi le sa leyo; batho ba tlaa segofala mo go ene; merafe yotlhe e tlaa mmitsa mosegofadiwa. 
Psalms72:18 A go bakwe Jehofa Modimo, Modimo wa Iseraele, yo o dirang dikgakgamatso a le esi;" 
Psalms72:19 a go bakwe leina la gagwe le le galalelang ka bosakhutleng; mme a lefatshe lotlhe le tlale kgalalelo ya gagwe. A go nne jalo, fela jalo." 
Psalms72:20 Merapelo ya ga Dafite Morwa Jese e khutlile. 
Psalms73:1 Ruri Modimo o molemo go Iseraele, e bong go ba ba itshekileng mo pelong." 
Psalms73:2 Ka ga me, dinao tsa me di batlile go ya, dikgato tsa me tsa batla go relela." 
Psalms73:3 Gonne e rile ke bona letlhogonolo la baitelaganyi ka nna pelotshetlha ka ga bone baikepi. 
Psalms73:4 Gonne ga go na dipitlagano mo losong lwa bone; mme thata ya bone e nitame fela. 
Psalms73:5 Ga ba mo tlalelong jaaka batho ba bangwe; le gone ga ba tshwenyege jaaka batho ba bangwe. 
Psalms73:6 Ke gone ka mo boikgodiso bo ba rarileng jaaka dibaga mo thamong; go thubaka go ba apesitse jaaka kobo. 
Psalms73:7 Matlho a bone a rotologile ka monono; ba na le mo go fetang keletso ya pelo. 
Psalms73:8 Ba a sotla mme ba bue patiko ba le mo bosuleng; ba bue ka boikgantsho. 
Psalms73:9 Ba nyunyubetsa magodimo; loleme lwa bone lo ralale lefatshe. 
Psalms73:10 Ke gone ka moo batho ba ga gabo ba tleng ba boele fa; mme metsi a senwelo se se tletseng a gopiwe ke bone. 
Psalms73:11 Mme ba re: “Modimo o itse jang? A go na le kitso mo go Mogodimodimo?” 
Psalms73:12 Bona, bao ke bone baikepi; e re ka ba ntse ba le mo boiketlong ka metlha yotlhe, boo ba totelwa ke dikhumo." 
Psalms73:13 Ruri ke ntlafaleditse pelo ya me lefela, ka ba ka tlhapa diatla tsa me mo go se nang molato;" 
Psalms73:14 gonne ke ntse ke tshwenyega ka letsatsi lotlhe, ka otlhaiwa ka meso yotlhe." 
Psalms73:15 Fa nkabo ke rile: “Ke tlaa bua jalo;” bona, nka bo ke diretse bana ba losika lwa gago ka boferefere." 
Psalms73:16 E rile ke akanya gore goo mo nka go itse jang, ga nna tapiso e e botlhoko mo go nna;" 
Psalms73:17 ka tla ka tsamaya ka tsena mo felong ga boitshepo ga Modimo, mme ka akanya bofelelo jwa bone." 
Psalms73:18 Ruri o ba baya mo mareleding; o ba digela mo tshenyegong. 
Psalms73:19 Ana ba kile ba senyega jang ka ponyo ya leitlho fela! Ba jegetse ruri ka ditherego. 
Psalms73:20 Jaaka toro fa motho a kubuga; le wena Morena, fa o kubuga, o tlaa nyatsa setshwano sa bone jalo." 
Psalms73:21 Gonne pelo ya me e ne e le botlhoko, mme ka tlhajwatlhajwa mo diphilong tsa me;" 
Psalms73:22 ka bo ke le popego ya sefolofolo fela mo go ntseng jaana, ke se na kitso; ka nna jaaka phologolo fela fa pele ga gago." 
Psalms73:23 Le fa go ntse jalo ke ntse ke na nao ka metlha yotlhe; o ntse o tshwere seatla sa me se segolo. 
Psalms73:24 O tlaa nketelela pele ka kgakololo ya gago, morago o tlaa nkamogela mo kgalalelong." 
Psalms73:25 Ke na le mang kwa legodimong fa e se wena? Le mo lefatsheng ga go na ope yo ke mo eletsang fa e se wena. 
Psalms73:26 Nama ya me e a fela, le pelo ya me; Modimo ke thata ya pelo ya me, le kabelo ya me ka bosakhutleng." 
Psalms73:27 Gonne, bona ba ba leng kgakala nao ba tlaa nyelela; o sentse botlhe ba ba go tlogelang ba ya boakeng." 
Psalms73:28 Mo go nna go molemo go atamela Modimo; ke dirile Morena Modimo botshabelo jwa me, gore ke tle ke bolele ka ga ditiro tsa gago tsotlhe fela." 
Psalms74:1 Modimo, o re latlheleletseng ruri? Bogale jwa gago bo tukelelang dinku tsa bohulo jwa gago?" 
Psalms74:2 Gakologelwa phuthego ya gago, e o sa leng wa e reka bogologolo, e o e rekolotseng, gore e nne sešaba sa boswa jwa gago; le thaba ya Sione e o kileng wa aga mo go yone." 
Psalms74:3 Tsholeletsa dinao tsa gago kwa maropeng a a ntseng ka bosaengkae; kwa bosuleng jo mmaba o bo dirileng mo felong ga boitshepo. 
Psalms74:4 Baganetsi ba gago ba ntse ba bopa fa gare ga phuthego ya gago; ba tlhomile mekgele ya bone go nna ditshupo. 
Psalms74:5 Ba kile ba nna jaaka ekete ke batho ba ba ekelang sekgwa sa ditlhare dilepe. 
Psalms74:6 Jaanong dilo tse di kwadilweng ka botswerere ka go setwa, ba di thubaka ka seletswana le dinoto." 
Psalms74:7 Ba tshubetse felo ga gago ga boitshepo; ba itshepolotse boago jwa leina la gago, ka go bo digela fa fatshe." 
Psalms74:8 Mo pelong tsa bone ba rile: “A re di gasagaseng gotlhe fela;” ba jele matlo a thuto a otlhe a Modimo mo lefatsheng ka molelo. 
Psalms74:9 Ga re bone ditshupo tsa rona; ga go tlhole go na le moperofeti ope; le gone ga go na ope yo o itseng gore ke lobaka lo lo kaye. 
Psalms74:10 Modimo, kana moganetsi o tlaa nna a kgoba goleele go le kaye? A mmaba o tlaa nna a tlhapatsa leina la gago ka bosakhutleng?" 
Psalms74:11 O gonelang letsogo la gago, e bong letsogo la gago le le siameng? Le ntshe mo sehubeng sa gago o ba nyeletse." 
Psalms74:12 Le fa go ntse jalo, Modimo o ntse o le Kgosi ya me le mo bogologolong, o ntse o dira poloko mo gare ga lefatshe." 
Psalms74:13 O ne wa kgaoganya lewatle ka nonofo ya gago; wa thuba ditlhogo tsa dikgogela mo metsing. 
Psalms74:14 O thubagantse ditlhogo tsa kubu e tona, wa e naya batho ba ba ntseng mo nageng go e ja." 
Psalms74:15 O ne wa fatoganya motswedi le morwalela; wa kgadisa dinoka tse dikgolo thata. 
Psalms74:16 Motshegare ke wa gago, bosigo le gone ke jwa gago; o baakantse lesedi le letsatsi." 
Psalms74:17 O tlhomile dithoko tsotlhe tsa lefatshe; o dirile selemo le mariga. 
Psalms74:18 Gakologelwa mo, Jehofa, go re mmaba o kgobile, le go re batho ba ba dieleele ba tlhapaditse leina la gago." 
Psalms74:19 O se ka wa neela sebatana mowa wa lephoi la gago; o se ka wa lebala botshelo jwa bahumanegi ba gago ka bosakhutleng. 
Psalms74:20 Tlhokomela kgolagano, gonne mafelo a a lefifi a lefatshe a tletse maago a thubakanyo." 
Psalms74:21 A bapatikwi ba ke ba se ka ba bowa ka ditlhong; a bahumanegi le batlhoki ba bake leina la gago. 
Psalms74:22 Modimo, nanoga o ipuelele mo kgannyeng ya gago; gakologelwa ka fa motho wa seeleele o tlholang a go kgoba ka letsatsi lotlhe ka teng." 
Psalms74:23 O se ka wa lebala lentswe la baganetsi ba gago; tlhapeo ya ba ba go tsogologelang e tlhatloga ka gale le ka gale. 
Psalms75:1 Re go ntshetsa malebogo Modimo; re a leboga, gonne leina la gago le le gaufi; batho ba bolela ditiro tsa gago tse di gakgamatsang." 
Psalms75:2 Ke tlaa re ke bona lobaka lo lo tlhomilweng, ke atlhole ka thokgamo." 
Psalms75:3 Lefatshe le tlhapologile le banni botlhe ba lone; ke emisitse maotwana a lone. Sela. 
Psalms75:4 Ke reile baikokomatsi ka re: “Se direng ka boikokomatso;” le baikepi ka re: “Se tsholetseng lonaka. 
Psalms75:5 Se tsholeletseng lonaka lwa lona kwa godimo; se bueng ka thamo e e tlhamaletseng.” 
Psalms75:6 Gonne go tsholetsega ga go tswe kwa botlhabatsatsi le fa e le kwa bophirimatsatsi, le fa e le kwa borwa." 
Psalms75:7 Moatlhodi ke Modimo; o isa mongwe tlase, mme o tsholetse yo mongwe." 
Psalms75:8 Gonne mo seatleng sa ga Jehofa go na le phafana, mme bojalwa jwa mofine bo a huhula; e tletse mo go tlhakantsweng; mme o tshela ga yone eo; ruri magorogoro a yone baikepi botlhe ba lefatshe ba tlaa a gopisa ba a nwa." 
Psalms75:9 Mme nna ke tlaa nna ke bolela ka bosakhutleng; ke tlaa nna ke opelela Modimo wa ga Jakobe dipako. 
Psalms75:10 Dinaka tsotlhe tsa baikepi le tsone ke tlaa di kgaola; mme dinaka tsa basiami di tlaa tsholediwa. 
Psalms76:1 Mo Juta Modimo o a itsiwe; leina la one le legolo mo Iseraele. 
Psalms76:2 Le gone mo Saleme, motlaagana wa one o teng, le boago jwa one bo mo Sione." 
Psalms76:3 O ne wa robaka metswi ya bora teng, thebe le tšhaka le dibetsa tsa ntwa. Sela." 
Psalms76:4 O kgalalelo le tlotlomalo bogolo go thopo e e lefika. 
Psalms76:5 Ba ba pelotona ba gapetswe ba robetse boroko jwa bone; mme ga go na bape ba banna ba ba thata, ba ba bonyeng diatla tsa bone." 
Psalms76:6 Ka kgalemo ya gago Modimo wa ga Jakobe, kara ya tlhabano e na le pitse e digetswe boroko jwa kgonogo." 
Psalms76:7 Wena, e leng wena, o na le go boifiwa; mme mang yo o ka emang mo ponong ya gago mogang o galefang?" 
Psalms76:8 O ne wa utlwatsa katlholo e e tlisang tefetso e tswa legodimong lefatshe la boifa, la ba la didimala fela," 
Psalms76:9 ka Modimo o ema go atlhola, gore o boloke bapelonomi botlhe ba lefatshe. Sela." 
Psalms76:10 Ruri bogale jwa motho bo tlaa go baka; mme makunantshana a a setseng a bogale o tlaa a bofelela mo go wena. 
Psalms76:11 Lo ikane, lo bo lo lefele Jehofa, Modimo wa lona; a botlhe ba ba mo ntlheng tsotlhe tsa gagwe ba tlisetse ene yo o tshwanetseng go boifiwa dineo." 
Psalms76:12 O tlaa kgaola mowa wa dikgosana; o a boitshega mo dikgosing tsa lefatshe. 
Psalms77:1 Ke tlaa goela kwa Modimong ka lentswe la me; e bong Modimo, ka lentswe la me, mme o tlaa ntshekegela tsebe." 
Psalms77:2 E rile mo letsatsing la tlalelo ya me ka batla Morena; seatla sa me se ne se otlologile mo bosigong, mme se se ka sa gonega; mowa wa me wa gana go gomotsega." 
Psalms77:3 Ke gakologelwa Modimo, mme ke tlhobaele; ke itoke, mme mowa wa me o ribegediwe. Sela." 
Psalms77:4 O tshwarisitse matlho a me go lebela fela; ke tlaletswe thata, ke bile ke retelelwa ke go bua." 
Psalms77:5 Ke akantse dipaka tsa bogologolo, dinyaga tsa metlha ya bogologolo tala." 
Psalms77:6 Ke ikgakolola sefela sa me mo bosigong; ke buabue le pelo ya me mme mowa wa me o putle thata. 
Psalms77:7 “A Morena o tlaa latlhela ruri? A ga a ketla a tlhola a rapelesega gope? 
Psalms77:8 A boutlwelobotlhoko jwa gagwe bo etse ruri ka bosakhutleng? A ke go re polelo ya tsholofetso ya gagwe e tlhaelela ruri ka bosaengkae? 
Psalms77:9 A Modimo o lebetse go nna pelonomi? A o tswaletse mautlwelobotlhoko a one a manamagadi ka bogale?” Sela. 
Psalms77:10 Mme ke rile: “Mo ke seemere sa me; ke tlaa gakologelwa dinyaga tsa seatla se segolo sa Mogodimodimo.” 
Psalms77:11 Ke tlaa nna ke umaka ditiro tsa ga Jehofa; gonne ke tlaa gakologelwa dikgakgamatso tsa bogologolo. 
Psalms77:12 Le gone ke tlaa akanya tiro ya gago yotlhe, ke kanka ka ga tse o di dirang." 
Psalms77:13 Tsela ya gago Modimo, e mo felong ga boitshepo, e mang yo e leng Modimo o mogolo jaaka wena Modimo?" 
Psalms77:14 Wena o Modimo o o dirang dikgakgamatso; o itsisitse ditšhaba thata ya gago. 
Psalms77:15 O golotse batho ba gago ka letsogo la gago; bomorwa Jakobe le Josefe. Sela. 
Psalms77:16 Metsi a ne a go bona, Modimo; metsi a ne a go bona, a boifa; matengteng le one a roroma." 
Psalms77:17 Maru a na a tsholola metsi; magodimo a ntsha tumo; metswi ya gago le yone ya gasama. 
Psalms77:18 Kodu ya tumo ya gago ya maru ya nna mo setsuatsueng; dikgadima tsa bonesa lefatshe; lefatshe la roroma la reketla. 
Psalms77:19 Tsela ya gago e ne e le mo lewatleng, le ditselana tsa gago mo metsing a magolo; metlhala ya gago e ne e sa itsiwe." 
Psalms77:20 O ne wa goga batho ba gago jaaka letsomane, ka seatla sa ga Moše le Arone." 
Psalms78:1 Lona batho ba me, beelang molao wa me tsebe; sekegelang mafoko a molomo wa me tsebe." 
Psalms78:2 Ke tlaa tswa molomo ka setshwantsho; ke tlaa wela dipolelo tse di lotobo tsa bogologolo," 
Psalms78:3 tse re di utlwileng, ra di itse, tse borraetsho ba di re boleletseng." 
Psalms78:4 Ga re ketla re di lobela bana ba bone, ka re tlaa bolelela losika lo lo tlang dipako tsa ga Jehofa, le thata ya gagwe, le ditiro tsa gagwe tse di gakgamatsang tse o di dirileng." 
Psalms78:5 Gonne o ne a tlhoma tshupo mo go Jakobe, a baya molao mo go Iseraele, o o o laoletseng borraetsho gore ba tle ba itsise bana ba bone dilo tse;" 
Psalms78:6 gore losika lo lo tlang lo di itse, e bong bana ba ba tlaa tsalwang; ba ba tlaa tlogang ba ba ba di bolelela bana ba bone;" 
Psalms78:7 gore ba tlhome tsholofelo ya bone mo Modimong, ba se ka ba lebala ditiro tsa Modimo, mme ba boloke ditaolo tsa one;" 
Psalms78:8 gore ba se nne jaaka borraabo, ba e neng e le losika lo lo tlhogo e thata, le lwa borukhutlhi; e le losika lo lo sa tlhomang pelo ya lone ka tshiamo, lo mowa wa lone o sa emang sentle le Modimo." 
Psalms78:9 Bana ba ga Eferaime, e rile ba tlhometse dibolao ba bile ba sikere mara, ba menoga ba tshaba mo letsatsing la tlhabano." 
Psalms78:10 Ga ba a ka ba boloka kgolagano ya Modimo, ba gana go tsamaya mo molaong wa one;" 
Psalms78:11 ba lebala ditiro tsa one, le ditiro tse di gakgamatsang tse o neng o di ba bontshitse." 
Psalms78:12 Ke dilo tse di tseanyang, tse o di dirileng mo ponong ya borraabone, mo lefatsheng la Egepeto, le mo nageng ya Soane." 
Psalms78:13 O ne wa fatoganya lewatle, wa ba kgabagantsha; wa emisa metsi a nna jaaka mokoa fela." 
Psalms78:14 Le gone motshegare wa nna wa ba goga ka leru, le bosigo jotlhe ka lesedi la molelo." 
Psalms78:15 Wa fatola mafika mo nageng fela, wa ba nosa thata jaaka mo madibeng a a boteng." 
Psalms78:16 O ne wa phunya metlhodi le yone mo lefikeng, wa eledisa metsi jaaka dinoka." 
Psalms78:17 Le fa go ntse jalo ba tswelela pele fela go o leofela, go tsuololela Mogodimodimo mo loboeng lwa naga." 
Psalms78:18 Ba leka Modimo mo pelong tsa bone, ka go lopela keletso ya bone dijo." 
Psalms78:19 Ee, ba ne ba nyatsa Modimo, ba re: “A Modimo o ka baakanya lomati lwa bojelo mo nageng?”" 
Psalms78:20 Ba re: “Bona, o ne wa itaya lefika, metsi a ba a phothometsega le meelelo ya penologa; a bogobe le jone a o ka bo ntsha? A o tlaa etleeletsa batho ba one nama?”" 
Psalms78:21 Ke gone ka foo Jehofa a utlwa, mme a nna bogale thata; molelo wa tshubelwa Jakobe, bogale le jone jwa tsogela Iseraele;" 
Psalms78:22 ka gobo ba se ka ba dumela Modimo, le fa e le go ikanya poloka ya one." 
Psalms78:23 Le fa go ntse jalo wa laola maru kwa godimo, wa bula dithoba tsa legodimo;" 
Psalms78:24 mme wa ba nesetsa mana go a ja, wa ba naya mabele a legodimo." 
Psalms78:25 Motho a ja bogobe jwa bathata; wa ba gorosetsa dijo tsa go kgorwa. 
Psalms78:26 Wa fokisa phefo ya botlhabatsatsi mo loaping; wa tsamaisa phefo ya borwa ka thata ya one. 
Psalms78:27 Nama le yone wa e ba nesetsa jaaka lorole, le dinonyane tse di diphuka jaaka mošawa wa lewatle." 
Psalms78:28 Wa e usetsa fa gare ga bothibelelo jwa bone, mo tikologong ya manno a bone." 
Psalms78:29 Jalo ba ja, mme ba kgora thata; wa ba naya se ba se eleditseng." 
Psalms78:30 E rile ba ise ba tenwe ke keletso ya bone, nama e sa ntse e le mo maganong a bone," 
Psalms78:31 bogale jwa Modimo jwa ba tsogela, jwa bolaya ba ba nonneng bogolo mo go bone, ja ba jwa thubanyetsa makau a Iseraele fa fatshe." 
Psalms78:32 Le fa go dirile jaana, ba fela ba leofela pele fela, ba sa dumele ditiro tse di gakgamatsang tsa one." 
Psalms78:33 Ka ntlha ya moo wa sweletsa malatsi a bone ka lefela, le dinyaga tsa bone ka therego." 
Psalms78:34 Ya re fa o ba bolaya, ya dira gone ba botsang ka ga one; mme ba bowe ba batle Modimo go sa le gale." 
Psalms78:35 Ba gakologelwe fa Modimo e le lefika la bone; le go re Modimo wa Mogodimodimo ke Morekolodi wa bone. 
Psalms78:36 Ba o tsoatsoa ka molomo wa bone, ba o akela ka loleme lwa bone." 
Psalms78:37 Gonne pelo ya bone e ne e sa siamela one; le gone ba ne ba sa ikanyega mo kgolaganong ya one. 
Psalms78:38 Mme one, ka o tletse pelotlhomogi, wa itshwarela boikepo jwa bone, wa se ka wa ba senya; ee, wa faposa bogale jwa one gantsi, mme wa se ka wa tsosa tšhakgalo yotlhe ya one." 
Psalms78:39 Wa ba gakologelwa fa ba le nama fela; ba le phefo e e fetang, mme e se ke e be e boye." 
Psalms78:40 Ba ne ba o tsuololela gantsintsi jang mo nageng! Ba o hutsafatsa mo difoleng tsa naga! 
Psalms78:41 Ba ba ba menoga gape, ba leka Modimo, ba rumola Moitshepi wa Iseraele." 
Psalms78:42 Ga ba a ka ba gakologelwa seatla sa one, le fa e le letsatsi le o ba golotseng mo moganetsing ka lone." 
Psalms78:43 Ka fa o tlhomileng ditshupo tsa one mo Egepeto ka gone, le dikgakgamatso mo nageng ya Soane;" 
Psalms78:44 wa fetola dinoka tsa bone madi, le dinokana tsa bone, ba ba ba retelelwa ke go nwa." 
Psalms78:45 Wa ba tsosetsa metshitshi ya dintshi, tsa ba ja; le digwagwa tsa ba senya." 
Psalms78:46 Le loato lwa dilo tsa bone wa lo neela diboko; le tsa letsapa la bone wa di neela tsie. 
Psalms78:47 Wa senya mafine a bone ka sefako, le ditlhare tsa bone tsa masekamore ka kgogotshwane." 
Psalms78:48 Dikgomo tsa bone le tsone wa di neela sefako, le matsomane a bone wa a neela tladi ya tlapana e e molelo." 
Psalms78:49 Wa ba piriganyetsa go tuka ga bogale jwa one, tšhakgalo, le kgalefo le tlalelo, e le lesomo la barongwa ba bosula." 
Psalms78:50 Wa phunyetsa bogale jwa one tsela; wa se ka wa rekegela mowa wa bone mo losong, wa neela kgogodi botshelo jwa bone;" 
Psalms78:51 wa gaila bana ba batsalwapele botlhe ba Egepeto, tshimologo ya thata ya bone mo megopeng ya ga Hame;" 
Psalms78:52 mme batho ba e leng ba one, bone wa ba gogela ntle jaaka dinku, wa ba wa ba tsamaisa mo nageng jaaka letsomane fela." 
Psalms78:53 Wa ba goga ka polokego, go tla ba se ka ba boifa; baba ba bone, lewatle la ba ribegetsa." 
Psalms78:54 Wa ba fitlhisa mo molelwaneng wa felo ga one ga boitshepo, mo thabeng eno, e seatla sa one se segolo se e rekileng." 
Psalms78:55 Merafe le yone wa e leleka fa pele ga bone, wa e aba ka thapo go nna boswa, mme wa tsenya ditso tsa Iseraele, tsa nna mo megopeng ya yone." 
Psalms78:56 Le fa go ntse jalo Modimo Mogodimodimo ba o leka, ba o tsuololela fela, mme ba se ka ba boloka ditao tsa one;" 
Psalms78:57 mme ba boela kwa morago, ba dira ka mooko jaaka borraabo; ba fapoga jaaka bora jo bo kgopameng." 
Psalms78:58 Gonne ba ne ba o tlhotlheletsa bogaleng ka mafelo a bone a a tlotlometseng, ba o tsenya lefufa ka ditshwantsho tse di setilweng tsa bone." 
Psalms78:59 E rile Modimo o utlwa wa nna bogale thata, wa fedisiwa pelo fela ke Iseraele;" 
Psalms78:60 wa ba wa tla wa tlogela motlaagana wa Shilo, mogope o o o tlhomileng mo bathong;" 
Psalms78:61 thata ya one wa e tsenya mo botshwarweng, le kgalalelo ya one wa e tsenya mo seatleng sa moganetsi." 
Psalms78:62 Batho ba one wa ba neela tšhaka; le gone wa nna bogale thata le boswa jwa one. 
Psalms78:63 Molelo wa laila makau a bone; barweetsana ba bone le bone ba se ka ba dirana le pina ya nyalo. 
Psalms78:64 Baperesiti ba bone ba wa ka tšhaka, mme batlholagadi ba bone ba se ka ba dira selelo sepe." 
Psalms78:65 Foo Morena a tsoga jaaka mongwe yo o tswang borokong, jaaka monna yo o thata fa a goisiwa ke bojalwa jwa mofine." 
Psalms78:66 A phailela baganetsi ba gagwe kwa morago; a ba dira sekgobo sa metlha yotlhe. 
Psalms78:67 Gape a gana mogope wa ga Josefe, a se ka a itshenkela lotso lwa ga Eferaime;" 
Psalms78:68 a itshenkela lotso lwa ga Juta, e bong thaba ya Sione e o e ratang." 
Psalms78:69 A aga felo ga gagwe ga boitshepo jaaka ditlhora tsa dithaba fela; jaaka lone lefatshe le o le emiseditseng ruri ka bosakhutleng. 
Psalms78:70 Le gone a itshenkela Dafite motlhanka wa gagwe; a mo tsaya a le mo marakaneng a dinku; 
Psalms78:71 a mo tlosa mo go saleng dinku tse di amusang morago; a tla go otla Jakobe, batho ba gagwe, le Iseraele boswa jwa gagwe." 
Psalms78:72 Jalo a ba otla ka fa thokgamong ya pelo ya gagwe, a ba tsamaisa ka botswerere jwa diatla tsa gagwe." 
Psalms79:1 Ao Modimo, ba ditšhaba ba tsile mo bosweng jwa gago; ba tsentse tempele ya gago e e itshepileng leswe; ba beile Jerusalema diphikwephikwe fela." 
Psalms79:2 Ditoto tsa batlhanka ba gago ba di dirile dijo tsa dinonyane tsa loapi; nama ya baitshepi ba gago ba e neile dibatana tsa lefatshe. 
Psalms79:3 Madi a bone ba a tsholotse jaaka metsi mo ntlheng tsotlhe tsa Jerusalema; mme go ne go se na ope yo o ba fitlhang. 
Psalms79:4 Re ntse sekgobo fela mo go bagarona; re lesotlo le setshego mo go ba ba ntlheng tsotlhe tsa rona. 
Psalms79:5 E tlaa nna lobaka lo lo kaye, Jehofa? A o tlaa nna bogale ka bosakhutleng? A lefufa la gago le tlaa nna le tuka jaaka molelo fela?" 
Psalms79:6 Gorometsa bogale jo bogolo jwa gago mo go baditšhaba ba ba sa go itseng, le mo magosing a a sa bitseng leina la gago." 
Psalms79:7 Gonne ba jele ba laila Jakobe, ba bile ba beile boago jwa gagwe kgakgabalo fela." 
Psalms79:8 O se ka wa gakologelwa maikepo a borraetsho ba bogologolo go re sekisa ka one; a mapelonomi a gago a manana a re tlele pele ka bonako; gonne re ile kwa tlase thata. 
Psalms79:9 Re thuse Modimo wa poloko ya rona ka ntlha ya kgalalelo ya leina la gago, o re golole; tlhatswa o tlose dibe tsa rona, ka ntlha ya leina la gago." 
Psalms79:10 Ana baditšhaba ba tlaa bo ba buelang ba re: “Modimo wa bone o kae?” A tefiso ya madi a a tsholotsweng a batlhanka ba gago e itsiwe mo go baditšhaba, mo ponong ya rona." 
Psalms79:11 A go fegelwa ga mogolegwi go fitlhe koo fa pele ga gago; ka fa bogolong jwa thata ya gago a ko o boloke ba ba laoletsweng go swa; 
Psalms79:12 ba re bapileng nabo o ba neye mo dihubeng tsa bone gasupa, kgobo ya bone e ba go kgobileng ka yone, Morena." 
Psalms79:13 Jalo rona batho ba re leng ba gago, re leng dinku tsa bofulo jwa gago, re tlaa go ntshetsa malebogo ka bosenabokhutlo; pako ya gago re tlaa e bonaletsa pele mo tshikatshikeng tsotlhe." 
Psalms80:1 A ko o beye tsebe, wena Modisa wa Iseraele; wena yo o gogang Josefe jaaka letsomane; wena yo o dutseng mo ditšherubeng, betlamela kwa ntle." 
Psalms80:2 Fa pele ga Eferaime, le Benjamine, le Manase, tsosa nonofo ya gago, mme o tle go re boloka." 
Psalms80:3 Re buse gape, Modimo o phatsimise sefatlhogo sa gago, mme re tlaa bolokwa." 
Psalms80:4 Jehofa, Modimo wa masomosomo, o tlaa nna o galefela morapelo wa batho ba gago ka lobaka lo lo kae?" 
Psalms80:5 O ba jesitse bogobe jwa dikeledi, o ba nositse dikeledi mo gogolo thata." 
Psalms80:6 O re dira kgang mo go bagarona; mme baba ba rona ba a tshega. 
Psalms80:7 Baa o re buse gape, Modimo wa masomosomo; o bo o phatsimise sefatlhogo sa gago, mme re tlaa bolokwa." 
Psalms80:8 O ne wa lere mofine wa tswa Egepeto, wa leleka merafe, wa o tlhoma." 
Psalms80:9 Wa baakanya bonno fa pele ga one, mme wa melela kwa teng thata, wa ba wa tlala ka lefatshe." 
Psalms80:10 Dithaba tsa khurumediwa ke moriti wa one, le dikala tsa one tsa nna jaaka masetara a Modimo." 
Psalms80:11 Wa ntshetsa dikala tsa one kwa lewatleng, le matswela a one kwa Nokeng." 
Psalms80:12 Ana o rutletseng dikgora tsa one, jalo botlhe ba ba fetang ka tsela ba bile ba o hula?" 
Psalms80:13 Kolobe ya sekgwa e a o soboloka, le diphologolo tsa naga di o hula fela." 
Psalms80:14 Re a go rapela Modimo wa masomosomo, baa o bowe; okomela o le kwa legodimong o bone, mme o lekole mofine o," 
Psalms80:15 le thito e seatla sa gago se segolo se e tlhomileng, le kala e o e ithatafaleditseng." 
Psalms80:16 O fisitswe ka molelo, o remilwe; ba nyelela ka kgalemo ya sefatlhogo sa gago." 
Psalms80:17 A seatla sa gago se nne mo monneng wa letsogo la gago le legolo, mo go morwa motho yo o mo ithatafaleditseng." 
Psalms80:18 Jalo ga re ketla re go hularela; re rudise, mme re tlaa bitsa leina la gago." 
Psalms80:19 Baa o re buse, Jehofa, Modimo wa masomosomo; phatsimisa sefatlhogo sa gago, mme re tlaa bolokwa." 
Psalms81:1 Opelelang Modimo, thata ya rona, ka mantswe a a tsholetsegileng; dudueletsang Modimo wa ga Jakobe ka boitumelo." 
Psalms81:2 Tlhabeletsang pesalema, lereng kwano moropana, harepe e e natefang le saletare." 
Psalms81:3 A go lediweng lonaka mo thogong ya kgwedi, fa kgwedi e le tshweu, mo letsatsing la modiro wa rona o o masisi." 
Psalms81:4 Gonne ke tao mo go Iseraele, ke mo go laotsweng ke Modimo wa ga Jakobe." 
Psalms81:5 O go tlhomile mo go Josefe go nna tshupo, jale ka a ralala lefatshe la Egepeto, kwa ke utlwileng puo gone, e ke neng ke sa e itse." 
Psalms81:6 “Ka tlosa lerudi la gagwe mo morwalong; diatla tsa gagwe tsa gololwa mo serotong. 
Psalms81:7 E rile o le mo tlalelong wa bitsa, mme ka go golola; ka go araba mo felong ga boiphitlhelo ga tumo ya maru; ka go leka fa metsing a Meriba. Sela." 
Psalms81:8 “A ko o utlwe, tšhaba ya me, mme ke tlaa go supetsa; wena Iseraele, fa o ka bo o ne o ka ntheetsa!" 
Psalms81:9 A go se nne modimo ope wa seeng mo go wena; le gone o se ka wa obamela modimo ope wa seeng. 
Psalms81:10 Ke nna Jehofa, Modimo wa gago, yo ke go tlhatlositseng mo lefatsheng la Egepeto; atlhamolosa legano la gago, mme ke tlaa le tlatsa." 
Psalms81:11 “Mme batho ba me ga ba a ka ba reetsa lentswe la me; Iseraele ga a ka a nthaya sepe. 
Psalms81:12 Jalo ka ba lesa ba latela kgwalalo ya pelo tsa bone, gore ba tle ba tsamaye mo dikgakololong tsa bone fela." 
Psalms81:13 Ao, a bo batho ba me ba ka bo ba ntheetsa, Iseraele le ene o kabo a tsamaya mo ditseleng tsa me!" 
Psalms81:14 Ke ne ke tlaa akofa ke fenya baba ba bone, ke phetsolela letsogo la me kwa baganetsing ba bone." 
Psalms81:15 Baidi ba ga Jehofa ba ne ba tlaa ineela mo go ene; mme lobaka lwa bone lo ne lo tlaa nna ka bosakhutleng. 
Psalms81:16 Le gone o ne a tlaa ba jesa mabele a mantlentle bogolo; ke ne ke tlaa go kgorisa ka dinotshe tse di tswang mo lefikeng.” 
Psalms82:1 Modimo o eme mo phuthegong ya ona Modimo; o atlhola fa gare ga medimo. 
Psalms82:2 “Lo tlaa atlhola ka go sa siamang ka lobaka lo lo kaye, lo tlotla sebele sa baikepi? Sela." 
Psalms82:3 Atlholelang bahumanegi le masiela; direlang ba ba patikwang le batlhoki tshiamo. 
Psalms82:4 Falodisang bahumanegi le batlhoki; ba gololeng mo seatleng sa baikepi. 
Psalms82:5 Ga ba itse, le gone ga ba tlhaloganye; ba kgarakgatshega mo lefifing; metheo yotlhe ya lefatshe e a tshikinyega." 
Psalms82:6 Ke rile: ‘Lo medimo, lotlhe lo bomorwa Mogodimodimo.’" 
Psalms82:7 Le fa go ntse jalo lo tlaa swa jaaka batho fela, lo tlaa wa jaaka nngwe ya dikgosana.”" 
Psalms82:8 Tloga o eme Modimo, o atlhole lefatshe; gonne o tlaa rua merafe yotlhe fela." 
Psalms83:1 Modimo, o se ka wa didimala fela; o se ka wa ikitsa go bua; se nne fela, Modimo." 
Psalms83:2 Gonne bona, baba ba gago ba dira pheretlho; le ba ba go tlhoileng ba tsholeditse tlhogo." 
Psalms83:3 Ba logela batho ba gago kgakololano ya boferefere; ba gakololanela ba gago ba ba subegileng. 
Psalms83:4 Ba rile: “Tlang, a re ba kgaoleng go tlhola e le morafe; gore leina la Iseraele le se tlhole le gopolwa gope.”" 
Psalms83:5 Gonne ba gakololanye ka tumalano e le nngwe fela; e le wena yo ba go golaganelang; 
Psalms83:6 megope ya Etome, ya Baišemaele; Moabe le Bahagare;" 
Psalms83:7 Gebale, Amone le Amaleke; Filisitia o na le banni ba Ture;"
