Psalms83:8 Asiria le ene o ikopantse nabo; ba thusitse bana ba ga Lote. Sela. 
Psalms83:9 Ba direle jaaka o diretse Midiane; le jaaka Sisere, le jaaka Jabine, fa nokeng ya Kišone;" 
Psalms83:10 ba ba nyeletseng kwa Entore; ba ba ba nna jaaka letshotelo la tshimo. 
Psalms83:11 Dira bagolwane ba bone gore ba nne jaaka Orebe le Seebe; ee, dikgosana tsotlhe tsa bone di nne jaaka Seba le Salemuna;" 
Psalms83:12 ba ba kileng ba re: “A re itseeleng maago a Modimo go a rua.” 
Psalms83:13 Modimo wa me, ba dire gore ba nne jaaka lorole lo lo sokeletsegang; jaaka phofedi fa pele ga phefo." 
Psalms83:14 Jaaka molelo o o lakailang sekgwa, le jaaka kgabo ya molelo e e tshubelang dithaba;" 
Psalms83:15 ba khukhele jalo ka ledimo le legolo la gago le le boitshegang; o ba boifise ka matsubutsubu a gago. 
Psalms83:16 A difatlhogo tsa bone di tladiwe tshosobagano; gore ba tle ba batle leina la gago, Jehofa." 
Psalms83:17 A ba tlhajwe ke ditlhong, ba tseanngwe ka bosakhutleng; ee, ba swabisiwe ba nyelele;" 
Psalms83:18 gore ba tle ba itse fa wena wesi; yo leina la gago e leng Jehofa, o le Mogodimodimo, o okame lefatshe lotlhe." 
Psalms84:1 Ana metlaagana ya gago e mentlentle jang, wena Jehofa wa masomosomo!" 
Psalms84:2 Mowa wa me o tlhologeletswe, ee, o idibalela fela malwapa a ga Jehofa; pelo ya me le nama ya me di kurueletsa Modimo o o tshedileng." 
Psalms84:3 Ee, thaga e iponetse ntlo, le peolwane setlhaga, fa e ka bayang mamphorwana a yone gone, e bong dibeso tsa gago, Jehofa wa masomosomo, Kgosi ya me, le Modimo wa me." 
Psalms84:4 Go sego ba ba agileng mo ntlong ya gago; ba tlaa fela ba ntse ba go baka. Sela. 
Psalms84:5 Go sego motho yo thata ya gagwe e leng mo go wena; yo ditsela tse di yang Sione di leng mo pelong ya gagwe. 
Psalms84:6 Ba e reng ba ralala mokgatšha wa Maselelo, ba o phunye metswedi; ee, pula ya sephai e o khurumetse ka masego." 
Psalms84:7 Ba etla ba tlhomagantse thata le thata; mongwe le mongwe wa bone o ya go bonala fa pele ga Modimo mo Sione. 
Psalms84:8 Jehofa Modimo wa masomosomo, a ko o utlwe morapelo wa me; baya tsebe Modimo wa ga Jakobe. Sela." 
Psalms84:9 Bona, Modimo thebe ya rona, mme o lebe sefatlhogo sa motlodiwa wa gago." 
Psalms84:10 Gonne letsatsi le le lengwe fela mo malwapeng a gago, le gaisa malatsi a a makgolo a le some. Ke rata ka nna molebedi wa kgoro mo ntlong ya Modimo bogolo go go aga mo megopeng ya boikepo." 
Psalms84:11 Gonne Jehofa Modimo ke letsatsi le thebe; o tlaa aba tshegofatso le kgalalelo; ga go na sepe se se molemo se o tlaa ganang ka sone mo go ba ba tsamayang ka thokgamo. 
Psalms84:12 Jehofa wa masomosomo, go sego motho yo o ikantseng mo go wena." 
Psalms85:1 Jehofa, o ngokile lefatshe la gago; o busitse botshwaro jwa ga Jakobe." 
Psalms85:2 O itshwaretse boikepo jwa batho ba gago, o bipile boleo jotlhe jwa bone. Sela." 
Psalms85:3 O tlositse kgalefo yotlhe ya gago; o itshokolotse mo go tukeng ga bogale jwa gago. 
Psalms85:4 Re sokologele, Modimo wa poloko ya rona; o khutlise kgakatsego ya gago mo go rona." 
Psalms85:5 A o tlaa nna bogale le rona ka bosakhutleng? A o tlaa gololela bogale jwa gago kwa tshikatshikeng? 
Psalms85:6 A ga o nka o re rudisa gape, gore batho ba gago ba itumele mo go wena?" 
Psalms85:7 A ko o re supetse boutlwelobotlhoko jwa gago Jehofa, o re abele poloka ya gago." 
Psalms85:8 Ke tlaa utlwa se Modimo, Jehofa, o tlaa se buang, gonne o tlaa bua kagiso le batho ba one, le baitshepi ba one; mme a ba se boele gape mo boeleeleng." 
Psalms85:9 Ruri, poloka ya one e gaufi le ba ba o boifang; e le gore kgalalelo e age mo lefatsheng la rona." 
Psalms85:10 Boutlwelobotlhoko bo kopanye le boammaaruri; tshiamo e atlanye le kagiso. 
Psalms85:11 Boammaaruri bo tswetswena mo lefatsheng; tshiamo le yone e okame e le kwa legodimong. 
Psalms85:12 Ee, Jehofa o tlaa aba se se molemo; le lefatshe la rona le tlaa ntsha totafalo ya lone." 
Psalms85:13 Tshiamo e tlaa mo etelela pele; mme e tlaa direla dikgato tsa gagwe tsela ya go tsamaya mo go yone. 
Psalms86:1 Sekega tsebe ya gago, Jehofa, mme o nkarabe, gonne ke humanegile, ke a tlhoka." 
Psalms86:2 Dibela mowa wa me, gonne ke moetsa Modimo; wena Modimo wa me, boloka motlhanka wa gago yo o go ikantseng." 
Psalms86:3 Nkutlwela botlhoko Morena, gonne ke tlhola ke biletsa kwa go wena letsatsi lotlhe fela." 
Psalms86:4 Itumedise mowa wa motlhanka wa gago; gonne ke tsholeletsa mowa wa me koo go wena Morena. 
Psalms86:5 Gonne wena, Morena, o molemo, o iketleeditse go itshwarela; o bile o letlotlo la boutlwelobotlhoko mo go botlhe ba ba go bitsang." 
Psalms86:6 Jehofa, beela morapelo wa me tsebe; o bo o reetse lentswe la mekokotlelo ya me." 
Psalms86:7 Ke tlaa re mo letsatsing la tlalelo ya me ke go bitse, gonne o tlaa nkaraba." 
Psalms86:8 Morena, ga go na ope yo o tshwanang nao mo medimong, le gone ga go na ditiro dipe tse di tshwanang le ditiro tsa gago." 
Psalms86:9 Merafe yotlhe e o e dirileng e tlaa tla e obama fa pele ga gago; e tlaa galaletsa leina la gago; 
Psalms86:10 gonne o mogolo, mme o dira ditiro tse di gakgamatsang; o Modimo o o osi." 
Psalms86:11 Nthuta tsela ya gago, Jehofa; ke tlaa tsamaya mo boammaaruring jwa gago; kitlanya pelo ya me e tle e boife leina la gago." 
Psalms86:12 Ke tlaa go baka Morena Modimo wa me, ka pelo ya me yotlhe fela; ke tla galaletsa leina la gago ka bosenabokhutlo." 
Psalms86:13 Gonne boutlwelobotlhoko jwa gago bo bogolo kwa go nna; mme o swatotse mowa wa me mo moleteng o o kwa tengteng. 
Psalms86:14 Modimo, bapelompe ba ntsogologetse; le phuthego ya banna ba ba thubakang e tsomile mowa wa me; ga ba a go baya fa pele ga bone." 
Psalms86:15 Mme wena Morena, o Modimo, o o tletseng pelotlhomogi, o pelotshweu, o bonya go galefa, o letlotlo la boutlwelobotlhoko le boammaaruri." 
Psalms86:16 A ko o sokologele kwa go nna, o nkutlwele botlhoko; thata ya gago o e neye motlhanka wa gago, mme o boloke morwa lelata la gago." 
Psalms86:17 Mpontsha sesupo se se kayang molemo, gore ba ba nkilang ba se bone, ba tlhajwe ke ditlhong, gonne wena, Jehofa, o nthusitse, o bile o nkgomoditse." 
Psalms87:1 Motheo wa gagwe o mo dithabeng tse di boitshepo. 
Psalms87:2 Jehofa o rata dikgoro tsa Sione bogolo go maago a ga Jakobe otlhe fela. 
Psalms87:3 Dilo tse di galalelang di buiwa ka ga gago, wena motse wa Modimo. Sela." 
Psalms87:4 Ke tlaa nna ke umaka Rahabe, le Babilone fa ba le mo go bone ba ba nkitseng; bona Filisitia, le Ture, ba na le Ethiopia: “Ene yo o tsaletswe gone.”" 
Psalms87:5 Ee, ka ga Sione go tlaa twe: “Yo le yole ba tsaletswe mo go ene;” mme Mogodimodimo ka esi o tlaa mo tlhomamisa." 
Psalms87:6 Jehofa o tlaa re a kwala ditšhaba, a bale a re: “Ene yo, o tsaletswe gone.” Sela." 
Psalms87:7 Ba ba opelang, le ba ba binang ba tlaa re: “Metswedi ya me yotlhe e mo go wena.”" 
Psalms88:1 Jehofa, Modimo wa poloko ya me, ke ntse ke gala fa pele ga gago motshegare le bosigo." 
Psalms88:2 A morapelo wa me o tsene, o fitlhe fa pele ga gago; sekegela go gala ga me tsebe ya gago;" 
Psalms88:3 gonne mowa wa me o tletse ditlalelo, le botshelo jwa me bo atamela kwa Bobipong." 
Psalms88:4 Ke balelwa le bone ba ba fologelang mo moleteng; ke ntse jaaka monna yo o se nang thuso. 
Psalms88:5 Ke latlhetswe fela mo baswing, jaaka ba ba bolailweng, ba ba namaletseng mo phupung, ba o sa tlholeng o ba gakologelwa gope; mme ba kgaotswe mo seatleng sa gago." 
Psalms88:6 O mpeile mo moleteng o o kwa tengteng, mo mafelong a a lefifi, mo matennyeng." 
Psalms88:7 Kgalefo ya gago e ntlapisitse ka thata, o ntlhokofaditse ka dinteelo tsotlhe tsa gago. Sela." 
Psalms88:8 Ba ke itsanyeng nabo o ba isitse kgakala le nna; o ntirile se se makgapha mo go bone; ke tswaletswe, mme ke reteletswe ke go tswa." 
Psalms88:9 Leitlho la me le fela ka ntlha ya tlhokofatso; ke ntse ke go bitsa, Jehofa, ka letsatsi le letsatsi ke otlololetse mabogo a me koo go wena." 
Psalms88:10 A baswi o a bo o tlaa ba supetsa dikgakgamatso? A ba ba fetileng ba tlaa tsoga ba go baka? Sela. 
Psalms88:11 A bopelonomi jwa gago jwa lorato bo tlaa kakanngwa mo phupung? le fa e le boikanngo jwa gago mo goora Tshenyo? 
Psalms88:12 A dikgakgamatso tsa gago di tlaa itsiwe mo lefifing? Le tshiamo ya gago mo lefatsheng la tebalo? 
Psalms88:13 Ke wena, Jehofa, yo ke goetseng kwa go wena; mme e tle e re go le ka moso morapelo wa me o tlaa nna o fitlha fa pele ga gago." 
Psalms88:14 Jehofa, ana o latlhelang mowa wa me? O ntshubelang sefatlhogo sa gago?" 
Psalms88:15 Ke sa le ke patikega, ke iketleeletsa go swa le mo bokaung jwa me; e a re fa ke boga ditheriso tsa gago ke be ke rerege." 
Psalms88:16 Kgalefo e e tukang ya gago e nthibegeditse; ditheriso tsa gago di nkgaotse. 
Psalms88:17 Di ne tsa tlhola di mpharafere jaaka metsi ka letsatsi lotlhe; tsa mphola mmogo. 
Psalms88:18 Morati le tsala o ba isitse kgakala le nna, le ba ke itsanyeng nabo o ba isitse mo lefifing." 
Psalms89:1 Ke tlaa opela ka ga mautlwelobotlhoko a ga Jehofa ka bosakhutleng; ka molomo wa me ke tlaa itsise boikanngo jwa gago mo tshikatshikeng tsotlhe. 
Psalms89:2 Gonne ke rile: Boutlwelobotlhoko bo tlaa agela ruri ka bosakhutleng; boikanngo jwa gago o tlaa bo tlhomamisa le mo magodimong tota. 
Psalms89:3 “Ke golaganye le moitshenkedwi wa me ke ikanetse Dafite motlhanka wa me. 
Psalms89:4 Ka re: ‘Losika lwa gago ke tlaa lo tlhomamisa ka bosakhutleng, ke tlaa agela ruri setulo sa gago sa bogosi, go ya ditshikeng tsotlhe fela.’ ” Sela." 
Psalms89:5 Magodimo a tlaa baka dikgakgamatso tsa gago, Jehofa; boikanngo jwa gago le jone mo phuthegong ya baitshepi." 
Psalms89:6 Gonne, e ka nna mang mo maaping yo o ka tshwantshiwang le Jehofa? E mang mo go bomorwa bathata yo o tshwanang le Jehofa?" 
Psalms89:7 E le Modimo o o boitshegang thata mo lekgotleng la baitshepi; e le o o nang le go sisimogwa bogolo go botlhe ba ba o dikanyeditseng? 
Psalms89:8 Jehofa Modimo wa masomosomo, ana ke mang yo o leng mothata jaaka wena, wena Jehofa? O bile o dikanyeditswe ke boikanngo jwa gago." 
Psalms89:9 O a tle o buse boikgodiso jwa lewatle; e re dintelo tsa lone di rwalelesega o di didimatse. 
Psalms89:10 O thubagantse Rahabe, jaaka mongwe yo o bolailweng; o gasagasitse baba ba gago ka letsogo la thata ya gago." 
Psalms89:11 Magodimo ke a gago, lefatshe le lone ke la gago; lobopo o lo theile le botlalo jwa lone." 
Psalms89:12 Ke wena o tlhodileng botsheka le borwa; Tabore le Heremone di itumela mo ineng la gago. 
Psalms89:13 O na le letsogo le le thata thata; seatla sa gago se thata, seatla sa gago se se siameng se goletsegile." 
Psalms89:14 Tshiamiso le katlholo ke motheo wa setulo sa gago sa bogosi; boutlwelobotlhoko bo eteletse sefatlhogo sa gago pele bo na le boammaaruri. 
Psalms89:15 Go sego batho ba ba itseng tumo e, ya boitumelo; ba bo ba tsamaya mo leseding la sefatlhogo sa gago, Jehofa." 
Psalms89:16 Ba tlhola letsatsi lotlhe ba itumela mo ineng la gago; ba golediwa mo tshiamong ya gago. 
Psalms89:17 Gonne o kgalalelo ya thata ya bone, lonaka lwa rona lo tlaa golediwa mo tlhogonolofatsong ya gago." 
Psalms89:18 Gonne thebe ya rona ke ya ga Jehofa; le kgosi ya rona ke ya Moitshepi wa Iseraele. 
Psalms89:19 Gape o kile wa bua le baitshepi ba gago mo ponatshegelong, wa re: “Ke beile thuso mo go mongwe yo o thata thata; ke goleditse mongwe yo o itshenketsweng mo bathong." 
Psalms89:20 Ke bonye Dafite motlhanka wa me; ke mo tloditse ka lookwane lwa me lo lo boitshepo. 
Psalms89:21 Ke yo seatla sa me se tlaa tlhomamang mo go ene; letsogo la me le lone le tlaa mo thatafatsa. 
Psalms89:22 Mmaba ga a ketla a mo tseela sepe ka patiko; le fa e le morwa boikepo ga a ketla a mo tlhokofatsa. 
Psalms89:23 Ke tlaa thubaganyetsa baba ba gagwe fa fatshe, ke gaila ba ba mo ilang." 
Psalms89:24 Boikanngo jwa me bo tlaa nna le ene, le jone boutlwelobotlhoko jwa me; lonaka lwa gagwe lo tlaa goletsega mo ineng la me." 
Psalms89:25 Le gone ke tlaa baya seatla sa gagwe mo lewatleng; le seatla sa gagwe se se siameng mo dinokeng. 
Psalms89:26 O tlaa goela kwa go nna, a re: ‘Ke wena rre, Modimo wa me, le lefika la poloko ya me.’" 
Psalms89:27 Le nna ke tlaa mo dira ngwana wa motsalwapele wa me, mogolo wa dikgosi tsa lefatshe." 
Psalms89:28 Boutlwelobotlhoko jwa me ke tlaa bo mmolokela ka bosaengkae, le kgolagano ya me e tlaa tlhomama nae." 
Psalms89:29 Le lone losika lwa gagwe ke tlaa lo dira gore lo eme ka bosakhutleng, le setulo sa gagwe sa bogosi jaaka malatsi a legodimo." 
Psalms89:30 E tlaa re fa bana ba gagwe ba tlogela molao wa me, mme ba sa tsamaye mo dikatlholong tsa me;" 
Psalms89:31 fa ba senya melao ya me, ba sa boloke ditaolo tsa me;" 
Psalms89:32 e dira gone ke tlaa kgophololang tlolo ya bone ka thupa, le boikepo jwa bone ka dinteo." 
Psalms89:33 Le fa go ntse jalo boutlwelobotlhoko jwa me ga nketla ke bo tlosetsa ruri mo go ene, le fa e le go leseletsa boikanngo jwa me go tlhaela." 
Psalms89:34 Kgolagano ya me ga nketla ke e tlola le fa e le go fetola sone se se duleng ka dipounama tsa me. 
Psalms89:35 Ke ikanne gangwe fela ka boitshepo jwa me; ga nketla ke aketsa Dafite; ka re: 
Psalms89:36 Losika lwa gagwe lo tlaa ema ka bosakhutleng, le setulo sa gagwe sa bogosi se tlaa ema jaaka letsatsi fa pele ga me." 
Psalms89:37 Se tlaa tlhomamisiwa ka bosakhutleng jaaka kgwedi, le jaaka mosupi yo o ikanyegang mo loaping.” Sela." 
Psalms89:38 Mme o latlhile, o ganne, o ntse o galefetse motlodiwa wa gago." 
Psalms89:39 O fedisitswe pelo ke kgolagano ya motlhanka wa gago; o tlhapaditse serwalo sa gagwe sa bogosi, go ya fela mo mmung." 
Psalms89:40 O rutlile dikgoro tsa gagwe tsotlhe fela; dikago tsa gagwe tse di thata o di ntshitse marope fela. 
Psalms89:41 Botlhe ba ba fetang ka tsela ba a mo thopa; o bile o dule sekgobo mo go ba o bapileng nabo. 
Psalms89:42 O goleditse seatla se se siameng sa baganetsi ba gagwe; o itumedisitse baba botlhe ba gagwe. 
Psalms89:43 Ee, bogale jwa tšhaka ya gagwe o bo phetsotse, wa ba wa se ka wa mo emisa mo tlhabanong." 
Psalms89:44 O khutlisitse go phatsima ga gagwe, le setulo sa gagwe sa bogosi o se digetse fa fatshe." 
Psalms89:45 Malatsi a bokau jwa gagwe o a khutsafaditse; o mmipile ka ditlhong. Sela. 
Psalms89:46 E tlaa nna goleele go le kaye Jehofa? A o tlaa iphitlha ka bosakhutleng? Bogale jwa gago bo tlaa tuka jaaka molelo goleele go le kaye? 
Psalms89:47 A ko o gakologelwe motlha wa me, gore o mokhutshwane jang! Kana bana botlhe ba batho o ba bopetse lefela jang!" 
Psalms89:48 Ana motho ke ofe yo o tlaa tshelang mme a se ketla a bona loso? Yo o tlaa gololang mowa wa gagwe mo thateng ya Bobipo e mang? 
Psalms89:49 Morena, mautlwelobotlhoko a gago, a jale, a kwa kae, a o kileng wa ikanela Dafite mo boikanngong jwa gago?" 
Psalms89:50 Morena, gakologelwa kgobo ya batlhanka ba gago; ka fa ke tshotseng kgobo ya batho botlhe ba ba thata thata mo sehubeng sa me ka gone;" 
Psalms89:51 e baba ba gago Jehofa, ba kgobileng ka yone, e ba kgobileng dikgato tsa motlodiwa wa gago ka yone." 
Psalms89:52 A go bakwe Jehofa ka bosakhutleng. A go nne jalo, fela jalo." 
Psalms90:1 Jehofa, o ntse o le boago jwa rona mo tshikatshikeng tsotlhe." 
Psalms90:2 E rile pele, dithaba di ise di tsalwe, le gone e rile o ise o bope lefatshe le lobopo, fela go tswa kwa bosasimologeng go ya kwa bosakhutleng, wa bo o ntse o le Modimo fela." 
Psalms90:3 O a tle o bosetse motho kwa tshenyegong, mme o re: “Bowang lona bana ba batho.”" 
Psalms90:4 Gonne mo matlhong a gago dinyaga di le makgolo a le some di ntse jaaka maabane fela fa a fetile, le jaaka tiso ya bosigo fela." 
Psalms90:5 O a tle o ba tlosetse koo jaaka ekete ka morwalela; ba ntse jaaka boroko fela; e re ka moso boo ba ntse jaaka bojang jo bo golang. 
Psalms90:6 E re ka moso bo kgabe, bo gole, e re maitsebowa bo segwe mme bo omelele." 
Psalms90:7 Gonne re nyelediwa mo bogaleng jwa gago, le mo kgalefong ya gago re a tlalelwa." 
Psalms90:8 O beile maikepo a rona fa pele ga gago, maleo a rona a a fitlhegileng o a beile mo leseding la sefatlhogo sa gago." 
Psalms90:9 Gonne malatsi otlhe a rona a fetisiwa mo kgalefong ya gago; re swetsa dinyaga tsa rona jaaka polelo e e bolelwang fela. 
Psalms90:10 Malatsi a dinyaga tsa rona ke dinyaga di le masome a supa, gongwe e ka nna dinyaga di le masome a a ferang mebedi ka ntlha ya thata; le fa go ntse jalo, boipelafatso jwa one ke tapiso le bohutsana fela, gonne bo ile ka bofefo, mme re fofele koo." 
Psalms90:11 E mang yo o itseng thata ya bogale jwa gago, le kgalefo ya gago ka fa poifong e e go tshwanetseng?" 
Psalms90:12 Jalo o re rute go bala malatsi a rona, gore re tle re itseele pelo ya botlhale." 
Psalms90:13 Bowa, Jehofa; e tlaa nna goleele go le kaye? A ko o ikwatlhaye ka ga batlhanka ba gago." 
Psalms90:14 A ko o re kgorise boutlwelobotlhoko jwa gago go le ka moso, gore re tle re itumele, re ipele ka malatsi otlhe a rona." 
Psalms90:15 Re ipedise ka fa malatsing a o re utlwisitseng botlhoko ka one, le dinyaga tse re bonyeng bosula mo go tsone." 
Psalms90:16 A tiro ya gago e bonalele batlhanka ba gago, le kgalalelo ya gago mo baneng ba bone." 
Psalms90:17 A bontlentle jwa ga Jehofa, Modimo wa rona, bo nne mo go rona; mme o tlhomamise tiro ya diatla tsa rona mo go rona; ee, tiro ya diatla tsa rona o e tlhomamise." 
Psalms91:1 Ene yo o agileng mo felong fa go sa itsiweng ga Mogodimodimo, o tlaa nnela ruri fa tlase ga moriti wa Mothatayotlhe." 
Psalms91:2 Ke tlaa bua ka ga Jehofa, ke re: “Ke ene botshabelo jwa me, le kago ya me ya phemelo; Modimo wa me o ke o ikantseng.”" 
Psalms91:3 Gonne o tlaa go golola mo serung sa mothaa-nonyane, le mo kgogoding ya leroborobo." 
Psalms91:4 O tlaa go bipa ka diala tsa gagwe tsa diphuka, mme o tlaa ya botshabelong fa tlase ga diphuka tsa gagwe; boammaaruri jwa gagwe ke thebe le thejane." 
Psalms91:5 Ga o ketla o boifa se se rerang bosigo, le fa e le motswi o o thokgoselang motshegare;" 
Psalms91:6 le fa e le kgogodi e e tsamayang mo fifing; le fa e le tshenyo e e swafatsang motshegare o mogolo. 
Psalms91:7 Go ka wa batho ba le makgolo a le some ka fa tlhakoreng lwa gago; le ba le makgolo a le lekgolo ka fa letsogong la gago le legolo; mme wena, ga go ketla go go atamela." 
Psalms91:8 Fa e se ka matlho a gago osi fela o tlaa leba, mme o bona tefetso ya baikepi." 
Psalms91:9 Gonne o rile: “Wena, Jehofa, o botshabelo jwa me.” Mogodimodimo o mo ntshitse bonno jwa gago;" 
Psalms91:10 ga go na bosula bope jo bo tlaa go welang, le gone ga go na petso epe e e tlaa atamelang mogope wa gago." 
Psalms91:11 Gonne o tlaa go laelela baengele ba gagwe, go tla ba go boloka mo ditsamaong tsotlhe tsa gago." 
Psalms91:12 Ba tlaa go legelela ka diatla tsa bone, gore e se re gongwe lonao lwa gago lwa tla lwa sugakanngwa ke lentswe." 
Psalms91:13 O tlaa gata tau le noga; o tlaa sobotlela tawana le šaušawane tlase ga dinao tsa gago. 
Psalms91:14 “E re ka a tlhomile lorato lwa gagwe mo go nna, ke gone ka moo ke tlaa mo gololang; ke tlaa mmaya fa godimo, ka gobo a itsile leina la me." 
Psalms91:15 O tlaa mpitsa, mme ke tlaa mo araba; ke tlaa nna nae mo tlalelong, ke tlaa mo golola, ke tlaa mo tlotla." 
Psalms91:16 Ke tlaa mo thethebatsa pelo ka botshelo jo boleele, ke mo supetsa poloka ya me.”" 
Psalms92:1 Ke selo se se molemo go ntshetsa Jehofa malebogo, le go opelela leina la gago dipako, wena Mogodimodimo;" 
Psalms92:2 go bolelelapale bopelonomi jwa gago jwa lorato go le ka moso, le boikanngo jwa gago ka masigo otlhe." 
Psalms92:3 Ka seletso se se megala e le some, le ka saletare; ka modumo o o tibelang tlase ka harepe." 
Psalms92:4 Gonne wena, Jehofa, O impedisitse ka tiro ya gago; ke tlaa ja koma mo ditirong tsa diatla tsa gago." 
Psalms92:5 Ana ditiro tsa gago di dikgolo jang Jehofa! Megopolo ya gago e boteng thata. 
Psalms92:6 Motho yo o seeleele ga a itse; le gone lesilo ga le tlhaloganye mo, go re," 
Psalms92:7 e re baikepi ba tswetswena jaaka bojang, le badira tshiamolo botlhe ba kgaba; e be e le gore ba nyelelediwe ruri." 
Psalms92:8 Mme wena Jehofa, o kwa godimo ka bosenabokhutlo." 
Psalms92:9 Gonne, bona, baba ba gago, Jehofa; gonne bona, baba ba gago ba tlaa nyelela; badiri botlhe ba tshiamololo ba tlaa gasagasega fela." 
Psalms92:10 Lonaka lwa me o lo goleditse jaaka lwa nare; ke tloditswe lookwane lo loša. 
Psalms92:11 Leitlho la me le lone le bonye keletso ya me mo babeng ba me, ditsebe tsa me di utlwile keletso ya me ka ga badira bosula ba ba ntsogologelang." 
Psalms92:12 Mosiami o tlaa kgaba jaaka mokolane; o tlaa gola jaaka mosetara wa Lebanone. 
Psalms92:13 Ba ba tlhomilweng mo ntlong ya ga Jehofa ba tlaa kgaba mo malwapeng a Modimo wa rona. 
Psalms92:14 Ba tlaa fela ba ntse ba ungwa fela le mo botsofeng; ba tlaa tlala monono, ba nna banana," 
Psalms92:15 go supa fa Jehofa a le thokgamo; ke ene lefika la me, mme ga go na tshiamololo epe mo go ene." 
Psalms93:1 Jehofa o a busa; o apere borena; Jehofa o apere, o itlamile ka thata; lefatshe le lone le nitame, ga le ka ke la tshikinngwa." 
Psalms93:2 Setulo sa gago sa bogosi se sa le se nitama bogologolo; o ntse o leyo go tswa kwa bosasimologeng. 
Psalms93:3 Jehofa, merwalela e tsholeditse, merwalela e tsholeditse kgwaso ya yone; merwalela e tsholetsa makhubu a yone." 
Psalms93:4 Jehofa a le kwa godimo o thata thata, godimo ga dikgwaso tsa metsi a le mantsi, e bong dinteelo tse di thubanyetsegang, tse di thata thata tsa lewatle." 
Psalms93:5 Ditshupo tsa gago di tlhomame thata; boitshepo bo tshwanetse ntlo ya gago, Jehofa ka bosakhutleng." 
Psalms94:1 Jehofa, wena Modimo o pusoloso e leng ya gago, wena Modimo o pusoloso e leng ya gago, betlamela ntle." 
Psalms94:2 Wena moatlhodi wa lefatshe, itsholetse; naya ba bopelompe maduo a bone." 
Psalms94:3 Jehofa, baikepi ba tlaa nna goleele go le kaye; baikepi ba tlaa ja koma goleele go le kaye?" 
Psalms94:4 Ba a balabala, ba bua ka boitelaganyo; badira tshiamololo botlhe ba a ipelafatsa." 
Psalms94:5 Ba phatlakanya batho ba gago, Jehofa; ba tlhokofatsa boswa jwa gago." 
Psalms94:6 Ba tle ba bolaye mosadi wa motlholagadi le moeng ba swe, ba matle masiela." 
Psalms94:7 Mme ba re: “Jehofa ga a ketla a bona, le gone Modimo wa ga Jakobe ga o ketla o tlhokomela.”" 
Psalms94:8 Tlhokomelang, lona ba lo leng dieleele mo bathong; le lona masilo lo tlaa tlhalefa leng?" 
Psalms94:9 Ene yo o tlhomileng tsebe, a ga a ketla a utlwa? Ene yo o bopileng leitlho, a ga a ketla a bona?" 
Psalms94:10 Ene yo o otlhayang merafe, a ga a ketla a siamisa, e bong ene yo o rutang motho kitso?" 
Psalms94:11 Jehofa o itse megopolo ya motho fa e le lefela fela. 
Psalms94:12 Go sego monna yo o mo otlhayang, Jehofa, o mo ruta ka molao wa gago;" 
Psalms94:13 gore o tle o mo neye go ikhutsetsa metlha ya pitlagano, go tsamaye lemena le epelwe baikepi." 
Psalms94:14 Gonne Jehofa ga a ketla a latlha batho ba gagwe, le gone ga a ketla a tlhala boswa jwa gagwe." 
Psalms94:15 Gonne katlholo e tlaa boela mo tshiamong; le botlhe ba ba thokgameng mo pelong ba tlaa e sala morago. 
Psalms94:16 E mang yo o tlaa nkemang nokeng a ntlhabantsha le badira bosula? E mang yo o tlaa nkemelang a ntlhabantsha le badira boikepo? 
Psalms94:17 Fa Jehofa a ka bo a se ka a nna thuso ya me, mowa wa me o ka bo o akofile wa aga mo tidimalong." 
Psalms94:18 E rile ke re: “Lonao lwa me lo a relela,” boutlwelobotlhoko jwa gago Jehofa, jwa ntshegetsa." 
Psalms94:19 Mo bontsing jwa megopolo ya me e e mo teng ga me, dikgomotso tsa gago di tle di jese mowa wa me monate." 
Psalms94:20 A bonno jwa tshiamololo bo tlaa amogana nao, e le se se baakanyang bosenyi ka molao?" 
Psalms94:21 Ba iphuthela mowa wa mosiami, ba ba ba sekisa batho ba ba se nang molato." 
Psalms94:22 Jehofa e ntse e le ene kago ya me e e godileng ya phemelo; le Modimo wa me e ntse ke one lefika la botshabelo jwa me. 
Psalms94:23 Mme o ba lereditse boikepo jwa bone tota, o tlaa ba kgaola ba le mo bosuleng jwa bone tota; Jehofa, Modimo wa rona o tlaa ba kgaola." 
Psalms95:1 A ko lo tleng re opeleleng Jehofa; a re tsheleleng lefika la poloko ya rona lešoa la boitumelo. 
Psalms95:2 A re ke re tleng fa pele ga sefatlhogo sa gagwe ka tebogo; a re mo tsheleleng lešoa la boitumelo ka dipesalema. 
Psalms95:3 Gonne Jehofa ke Modimo o Mogolo, le Kgosi e kgolo godimo ga medimo yotlhe." 
Psalms95:4 Mo seatleng sa gagwe go mafelo a a boteng a lefatshe; ditlhora tsa dithaba, le tsone, ke tsa gagwe." 
Psalms95:5 Lewatle ke la gagwe, o le dirile; diatla tsa gagwe di bopile lefatshe la komelelo." 
Psalms95:6 A ko lo tleng, re obame, re iname; a re khubameng fa pele ga Jehofa mmopi wa rona:" 
Psalms95:7 gonne ke ene Modimo wa rona, mme rona re batho ba bofulo jwa one, le dinku tsa seatla sa one. A bo gompieno lo ka ka lwa utlwa lentswe la one!" 
Psalms95:8 Se thatafatseng pelo tsa lona, jaaka kwa Meriba, jaaka mo tsatsing la Masa kwa nageng," 
Psalms95:9 jale ka borraeno ba nteka, ba ntlhotlhomisa, mme ba bona tiro ya me." 
Psalms95:10 Ka hutsafadiwa ke losika loo ka lobaka lwa dinyaga di le masome mane, ka ba ka re: “A bo e le batho ba ba timelang mo pelong ya bone, mme ga ba a ka ba itse ditsela tsa me.”" 
Psalms95:11 Mme ke gone ka mo ka ikana mo kgalefong ya me, ka re: “Ga ba ketla ba tsena mo boikhutsong jwa me.”" 
Psalms96:1 A ko lo opeleleng Jehofa sefela se seša; lefatshe lotlhe, opelelang Jehofa." 
Psalms96:2 Opelelang Jehofa, bakang leina la gagwe; bolelelang poloka ya gagwe pele ka go tlhomaganya malatsi." 
Psalms96:3 Kakanyang kgalalelo ya gagwe mo gare ga merafe; ditiro tsa gagwe tse di gakgamatsang mo gare ga ditšhaba tsotlhe. 
Psalms96:4 Gonne Jehofa o mogolo, mme o na le go bakwa segolo; o na le go boifiwa bogolo go medimo yotlhe." 
Psalms96:5 Gonne medimo yotlhe ya ditšhaba ke dilo fela; mme ene Jehofa o dirile magodimo. 
Psalms96:6 Tlotlo e fa pele ga gagwe le borena; thata e mo felong ga gagwe ga boitshepo, le bontle." 
Psalms96:7 Ntshetsang Jehofa, lona ditshika tsa ditšhaba; nayang Jehofa kgalalelo le thata." 
Psalms96:8 Nayang Jehofa kgalalelo e e tshwanetseng leina la gagwe; tlisang tshupelo, mme lo tle mo malwapeng a gagwe." 
Psalms96:9 A ko lo obameleng Jehofa mo bontleng jwa boitshepo; a lefatshe lotlhe le rorome fa pele ga gagwe. 
Psalms96:10 Buang mo merafeng, lo re: “Jehofa o a busa; lobopo le lone lo nitame, ga lo kake lwa tshikinngwa; o tlaa atlhola ditšhaba ka tekatekanyo.”" 
Psalms96:11 A magodimo a itumele, a lefatshe le ipele, a lewatle le sume, le bojotlhe jwa lone." 
Psalms96:12 A naga e kgane ka boitumelo, le tsotlhe tse di mo go yone; ke gone ditlhare tsotlhe tsa sekgwa di tlaa opelang ka boitumelo," 
Psalms96:13 fa pele ga Jehofa, gonne o etla; gonne o tla go atlhola lefatshe; o tlaa atlhola lobopo ka tshiamo, le ditšhaba ka boammaaruri jwa gagwe." 
Psalms97:1 Jehofa o a busa; a lefatshe le ipele; a ditlhake tse dintsi di itumele. 
Psalms97:2 Maru a mo dikanyeditse le lefifi; tshiamo le katlholo ke motheo wa setulo sa gagwe sa bogosi. 
Psalms97:3 Molelo o tsamaya fa pele ga gagwe, mme o fisetsa ruri baba ba gagwe mo tikologong." 
Psalms97:4 Dikgadima tsa gagwe tsa bonesa lobopo; lefatshe la bona la roroma. 
Psalms97:5 Dithabana tsa nyerologa jaaka makgaga a dinotshe ka sebonalo sa ga Jehofa, ka sefatlhogo sa Morena wa lefatshe lotlhe." 
Psalms97:6 Magodimo a kakanya tshiamo ya gagwe, le ditšhaba tsotlhe di bonye kgalalelo ya gagwe." 
Psalms97:7 A go tlhajwe ke ditlhong bone botlhe ba ba direlang ditshwantsho tse di setilweng, ba ba ipelafatsang ka medimo ya disetwa; obamelang ene, lona medimo yotlhe." 
Psalms97:8 Sione a utlwa, mme a itumela, le bomorwadia Juta ba ipela; ka ntlha ya dikatlholo tsa gago, Jehofa." 
Psalms97:9 Gonne, wena, Jehofa, O mogodimo o mogolo, godimo ga lefatshe lotlhe; o goleleditswe kgakala godimo ga medimo yotlhe." 
Psalms97:10 Lona ba lo ratang Jehofa, a ko lo ileng bosula; o tlamela mewa ya baitshepi ba gagwe; o ba golola mo seatleng sa baikepi." 
Psalms97:11 Lesedi le jaletswe basiami; boipelo le jone bo jaletswe ba ba thokgameng mo pelong. 
Psalms97:12 Ipeleng mo go Jehofa lona basiami; lo ntshetse leina la gagwe le le boitshepo malebogo. 
Psalms98:1 A ko lo opeleleng Jehofa sefela se seša; gonne o dirile dilo tse di gakgamatsang; seatla sa gagwe se segolo se mo diretse poloka le lone letsogo la gagwe le le boitshepo. 
Psalms98:2 Jehofa o itsisitse batho poloka ya gagwe; tshiamo ya gagwe o e bonaditse ka tshenolo mo matlhong a merafe. 
Psalms98:3 O gakologetswe boutlwelobotlhoko jwa gagwe, le boikanngo jwa gagwe ka ga ntlo ya Iseraele; dikhutlo tsotlhe tsa lefatshe di bonye poloka ya Modimo wa rona." 
Psalms98:4 Tshelela Jehofa lešoa la boitumelo, wena lefatshe lotlhe; ponyegang lo opele ka boitumelo; ee, opelang dipako." 
Psalms98:5 Opelelang Jehofa dipako ka harepe; ka harepe le ka lentswe la kopelo. 
Psalms98:6 Ka dinaka le ka modumo wa diphala, lo tsheleng lešoa la boitumelo fa pele ga Kgosi Jehofa." 
Psalms98:7 A lewatle le sume, le bojotlhe jwa lone; lefatshe le ba ba agileng mo go lone;" 
Psalms98:8 a merwalela e opaope diatla tsa yone; a dithabana di opele mmogo ka boitumelo; 
Psalms98:9 fa pele ga Jehofa gonne o tla go atlhola lefatshe; o tlaa atlhola lobopo ka tshiamo le ditšhaba ka tekatekanyo. 
Psalms99:1 Jehofa o a busa; a ditšhaba di rorome; o ntse mo ditšherubeng; a lefatshe le tshikinyege. 
Psalms99:2 Jehofa o mogolo mo Sione; mme o kwa godimo, godimo ga ditšhaba tsotlhe." 
Psalms99:3 A ba bake leina la gago le legolo, le le boitshegang; go boitshepo ene." 
Psalms99:4 Nonofo ya kgosi le yone e rata katlholo; o tle o tlhomamise tekatekanyo, o dirafatse katlholo le tshiamo mo go Jakobe." 
Psalms99:5 Lona, goletsang Jehofa, Modimo wa rona, lo obame fa sebeong sa dinao tsa gagwe; go boitshepo ene." 
Psalms99:6 Moše le Arone mo baperesiting ba gagwe, le Samuele mo go ba ba bitsang leina la gagwe; bone ba ba neng ba bitsa Jehofa, mme a ba araba." 
Psalms99:7 A bua nabo a le mo mosepuring wa leru; ba ne ba boloka ditshupo tsa gagwe, le molao o o emeng, o o o ba neileng." 
Psalms99:8 O ne wa ba araba Jehofa, Modimo wa rona: O ne o le Modimo o o ba itshwarelang, le fa o tsaya tefetso mo madirong a bone." 
Psalms99:9 Goletsang Jehofa, Modimo wa rona, mme lo obame kwa thabaneng ya gagwe e e boitshepo; gonne Jehofa Modimo wa rona o boitshepo." 
Psalms100:1 Tshelelang Jehofa lošoa la boitumelo, lona mafatshe otlhe." 
Psalms100:2 Direlang Jehofa ka boipelo; tlang fa pele ga sefatlhogo sa gagwe ka go opela. 
Psalms100:3 Itseng fa Jehofa e le ene Modimo, ke ene yo o re dirileng, mme re ba gagwe; re batho ba gagwe, le dinku tsa bohulo jwa gagwe." 
Psalms100:4 Tsenang mo dikgorong tsa gagwe ka go ntsha tebogo, le mo malwapeng a gagwe ka pako; mo ntshetseng malebogo, mme lo bake leina la gagwe." 
Psalms100:5 Gonne Jehofa o molemo; boutlwelobotlhoko jwa gagwe bo eme ka bosakhutleng; le boikanngo jwa gagwe mo ditshikatshikeng tsotlhe. 
Psalms101:1 Ke tlaa opela ka ga boutlwelobotlhoko le katlholo; Jehofa ke wena ke tlaa go opelelang dipako. 
Psalms101:2 Ke tlaa ipaya ka boitlhokomelo mo tseleng e e lekanetseng; ana o tlaa tla leng mo go nna? Ke tlaa tsamaya mo teng ga ntlo ya me ka pelo e e itekanetseng. 
Psalms101:3 Ga nketla ke baya sepe se se maswe fa pele ga matlho a me; ke ila tiro ya ba ba fapogang; ga e ketla e nngaparela. 
Psalms101:4 Pelo e e lesoko e tlaa ntlogela; ga nketla ke itse sepe se se bosula. 
Psalms101:5 Motho yo o pateletsang wa ga gabo kwa ditshebong, ene ke tlaa mo senya; yo o matlho a a pagameng a na le pelo ya boikgodiso, ga nketla ke mo leseletsa." 
Psalms101:6 Matlho a me a tlaa nna mo go ba ba ikanyegang ba lefatshe, gore ba tle ba age le nna; yo o tsamayang mo tseleng e e lekanetseng, ene o tlaa ntirela." 
Psalms101:7 Yo o dirang tsietso ga a ketla a aga mo teng ga ntlo ya me; yo o buang bolotsana ga a ketla a tlhomama fa pele ga matlho a me. 
Psalms101:8 Ka moso le moso ke tlaa nna ke senya baikepi botlhe ba lefatshe, go kgaola badiri botlhe ba boikepo mo motseng wa ga Jehofa." 
Psalms102:1 A ko o utlwe morapelo wa me, Jehofa, mme a go goa ga me go ke go fitlhe koo go wena." 
Psalms102:2 O se ka wa mphitlhela sefatlhogo sa gago mo letsatsing la pitlagano ya me; O ntshekegele tsebe; e re mo letsatsing le ke bitsang ka lone o nkarabe ka bonako. 
Psalms102:3 Gonne malatsi a me a nyelela jaaka mosi; marapo a me le one a a ša jaaka serumola. 
Psalms102:4 Pelo ya me e tapetegile jaaka bojang, e swabile; gonne ke lebala go ja sejo sa me." 
Psalms102:5 Ka ntlha ya lentswe la go duma ga me, marapo a me a ngaparetse nama ya me." 
Psalms102:6 Ke ntse jaaka khukara ya naga; ke fetogile jaaka morubisi wa marotobolo fela. 
Psalms102:7 Ke ntse ke lebeletse, mme ke fetogile jaaka thaga e e ntseng e le nosi mo setlhoeng sa ntlo." 
Psalms102:8 Baba ba me ba tlhola ba nkgoba ka letsatsi lotlhe; ba ba itirang ditsenwa ka ga me ba hutsakanya ka nna. 
Psalms102:9 Gonne ke jele melora jaaka sejo, ka tlhakanya se ke se nwang le dikeledi." 
Psalms102:10 Ke ka ntlha ya kgakatsego ya gago, le kgalefo ya gago; gonne o ntsholeditse wa ntatlhela koo." 
Psalms102:11 Malatsi a me a tshwana le moriti o o yang go fela; mme ke swabile jaaka bojang. 
Psalms102:12 Mme wena, Jehofa, o tlaa nnela ruri ka bosakhutleng; le segopodiso sa gago go ya ditshikatshikeng tsotlhe fela." 
Psalms102:13 O tlaa nanoga o utlwela Sione botlhoko; gonne ke lobaka lwa go mo tlhomogela pelo; ee, lobaka lo lo laotsweng lo fitlhile." 
Psalms102:14 Gonne batlhanka ba gago ba na le kgatlhego mo majeng a gone, ba tlhomogela lorole lwa gone pelo." 
Psalms102:15 Jalo merafe e tlaa boifa leina la ga Jehofa, le dikgosi tsotlhe tsa lefatshe, di tlaa boifa kgalalelo ya gago;" 
Psalms102:16 gonne Jehofa o tsosolositse Sione go o aga; o bonetse mo kgalalelong ya gagwe. 
Psalms102:17 O tlhokometse morapelo wa ba ba hotlhegileng ba se na sepe, ga a ka a nyatsa morapelo wa bone." 
Psalms102:18 Moo, go tlaa kwalelwa losika lo lo tlang; mme tšhaba e e tlaa tlholwang e tlaa baka Jehofa." 
Psalms102:19 Gonne o okometse a le kwa bogodimong jwa felo ga gagwe ga boitshepo; Jehofa o ne a lebile lefatshe a le kwa legodimong; 
Psalms102:20 go utlwa go fegelwa ga mogolegwi; go hunolola ba ba laoletsweng loso; 
Psalms102:21 gore batho ba tle ba bolele leina la ga Jehofa mo Sione, le pako ya gagwe mo Jerusalema;" 
Psalms102:22 mogang ditšhaba di phuthegileng di le mmogo, le magosi, go direla Jehofa." 
Psalms102:23 O ne a koafatsa thata ya me mo tseleng; a khutsafatsa malatsi a me. 
Psalms102:24 Ke ne ka re: “Modimo wa me we! O se ka wa ntlosa ke le fa gare ga malatsi a me; aitse dinyaga tsa gago tsone, di ya le ditshikatshika tsotlhe fela." 
Psalms102:25 O sa le o thaya motheo wa lefatshe bogologolo; le magodimo ke tiro ya diatla tsa gago. 
Psalms102:26 Tsone di tlaa nyelela, mme wena o tlaa nna fela; ee, tseo tsotlhe di tlaa onala jaaka seaparo; o tlaa di fetola jaaka morepo; mme di tlaa fetoga;" 
Psalms102:27 mme wena, o ntse o ntse jaaka o ntse fela; dinyaga tsa gago ga di ketla di dira le bokhutlo." 
Psalms102:28 Bana ba batlhanka ba gago ba tlaa nna fela, le losika lwa bone lo tlaa tlhomamisiwa fa pele ga gago.”" 
Psalms103:1 Baka Jehofa, mowa wa me; le tsotlhe tse di mo teng ga me a di bake leina la gagwe le le boitshepo." 
Psalms103:2 Baka Jehofa, mowa wa me, mme o se ka wa lebala dithuso tsa gagwe tsotlhe;" 
Psalms103:3 yo o itshwarelang maikepo otlhe a gago; a fodise malwetse a gago otlhe fela; 
Psalms103:4 yo o rekololang botshelo jwa gago mo tshenyegong; a go rwese tlhogo ka bopelonomi jwa lorato, le ka mautlwelobotlhoko a manana;" 
Psalms103:5 yo o kgorisang legano la gago ka dilo tse di molemo; bokau jwa gago boo bo tle bo šafadiwe bo nne jaaka jwa ntswi yo motona. 
Psalms103:6 Jehofa o dirafatsa ditiro tsa tshiamo, le dikatlholo o di dirafaletsa botlhe ba ba patikwang." 
Psalms103:7 O ne a itsise Moše metsamao ya gagwe, le madiro a gagwe a a itsise bana ba Iseraele." 
Psalms103:8 Jehofa o tletse bopelotlhomogi, mme o pelotshweu, o bonya go galefa, o letlotlo la boutlwelobotlhoko." 
Psalms103:9 Ga a ketla a omana ka metlha yotlhe; le fa e le go nna ka bogale ka bosenabokhutlo. 
Psalms103:10 Ga a a re direla ka fa maleong a rona, le fa e le go re duela ka fa maikepong a rona." 
Psalms103:11 Gonne jaaka legodimo le ntse le le kwa godimo, godimo ga lefatshe, boutlwelobotlhoko jwa gagwe mo go ba ba mmoifang bo ntse bogolo jalo." 
Psalms103:12 Jaaka botlhabatsatsi bo le kgakala le bophirimatsatsi; le ene o re tloseditse ditlolo tsa rona bokgakala jo bo kalo. 
Psalms103:13 Jaaka rrabana a tle a utlwele bana ba gagwe botlhoko; Jehofa le ene o tlhomogela ba ba mmoifang pelo jalo. 
Psalms103:14 Gonne o itse popego ya rona, o gakologetswe fa re le lorole fela." 
Psalms103:15 Ka ga motho ene, malatsi a gagwe a ntse jaaka bojang fela; jaaka sethunya sa naga, le ene o kgaba fela jalo." 
Psalms103:16 Gonne phefo ya se foka, mme se ile; le bonno jwa sone ga bo ketla bo tlhola bo se itse." 
Psalms103:17 Mme boutlwelobotlhoko jwa ga Jehofa bo ntse fela go tswa bosasimologeng go ya bosaengkae mo go ba ba mmoifang, le tshiamo ya gagwe go ya baneng ba bana;" 
Psalms103:18 mo go ba ba bolokang kgolagano ya gagwe, le mo go ba ba gakologelwang ditaelo tsa gagwe go di dira." 
Psalms103:19 Jehofa o tlhomamisitse setulo sa gagwe sa bogosi mo magodimong; mme bogosi jwa gagwe bo busa gotlhe fela. 
Psalms103:20 Bakang Jehofa lona baengele ba gagwe; lona dinatla mo nonofong, ba lo dirafatsang lefoko la gagwe, lo ntse lo reeditse lentswe la lefoko la gagwe." 
Psalms103:21 Bakang Jehofa lona masomosomo otlhe a gagwe; lona badiredi ba gagwe ba lo dirang go natefelwa ga gagwe. 
Psalms103:22 Bakang Jehofa lona ditiro tsotlhe tsa gagwe, mo mafelong otlhe a puso ya gagwe. Baka Jehofa mowa wa me." 
Psalms104:1 Baka Jehofa, mowa wa me. Jehofa, Modimo wa me, o mogolo thata! O apere tlotlo le borena." 
Psalms104:2 Yo o ikapesang ka lesedi jaaka ka seaparo; yo o ngamolang magodimo jaaka sesiro; 
Psalms104:3 yo o tlhomang maotwana a mantlwana a gagwe mo metsing; yo o dirang maru go nna kara ya gagwe; yo o tsamayang ka dinao mo diphukeng tsa phefo; 
Psalms104:4 yo o dirang diphefo go nna barongwa ba gagwe; badiredi ba gagwe ke melelo e e tutumang; 
Psalms104:5 yo o beileng metheo ya lefatshe, gore le tle le se ka la tshikinngwa ka bosakhutleng." 
Psalms104:6 Wa le khurumetsa ka bodiba jo bo boteng, jaaka e ka bo e le ka morepo; metsi a ne a ema a feta dithaba." 
Psalms104:7 A na a tshaba ka kgalemo ya gago; a tloga a ya koo ka potlako ka kodu ya tumo ya gago ya maru; 
Psalms104:8 a na a tlhatloga ka fa dithabeng, a fologa ka fa megorogorong, a ya go fitlha kwa mafelong a o a a thaetseng." 
Psalms104:9 O beile mmotwana gore a se ka a o tlola; gore a se ka a ba a boa a khurumetsa lefatshe. 
Psalms104:10 O eledisetsa metswedi kwa megorogorong; e elele mo gare ga dithaba. 
Psalms104:11 E nose diphologolo tsotlhe tsa naga; diesela tsa naga di itimole lenyora mo go yone. 
Psalms104:12 Dinonyane tsa legodimo di nne le boago fa go yone; di letse melodi mo dikaleng tsa ditlhare. 
Psalms104:13 O nose dithaba ka metsi a a tswang matlwaneng a gagwe; lefatshe le kgore loungo lwa ditiro tsa gago. 
Psalms104:14 O tlhogisetsa dikgomo bojang, le yone merogo go nna thuso ya batho; gore a tle a ntshe dijo mo mmung;" 
Psalms104:15 le bojalwa jwa mofine jo bo ipedisang pelo ya motho, le lookwane, gore lo phatsimise sefatlhogo sa gagwe, le senkgwe se se thatafatsang pelo ya motho." 
Psalms104:16 Ditlhare tsa ga Jehofa di a kgora; masetara a Lebanone a o a tlhomileng; 
Psalms104:17 kwa dinonyane di agang ditlhaga tsa tsone gone; ka ga mogolodi, ditlhare tsa mafira ke ntlo ya one." 
Psalms104:18 Dithaba tse di godileng ke tsa mehele; meole ya mafika ke botshabelo jwa dipela; 
Psalms104:19 o laoletse kgwedi metlha; letsatsi le ikitse go phirima ga lone. 
Psalms104:20 O dira lefifi, mme go nne bosigo; jo ditshedi tsotlhe tsa sekgwa di gagabelang kwa ntle ka lone." 
Psalms104:21 Ditawana di dume, di dumele se di ka se bolayang, mme di senke nama ya tsone mo Modimong." 
Psalms104:22 Letsatsi le a tlhaba, mme di gonyele, di ye go robala mo dikutleng tsa tsone." 
Psalms104:23 Motho a tswele kwa tirong ya gagwe le kwa mofufutsong wa gagwe go ya maitseboeng. 
Psalms104:24 Jehofa, ana ditiro tsa gago di methalethale jang! O di dirile ka botlhale tsotlhe fela; lefatshe le tletse dikhumo tsa gago." 
Psalms104:25 Fale go lewatle, le legolo, le atlhame, le dilo tse di gagabang tse di se nang palo di mo go lone, ditshedi tse dipotlana le tse dikgolo." 
Psalms104:26 Dikepe di tsamaya gone; leruarua le gone, le o le bopetseng go tshamekela mo go lone." 
Psalms104:27 Tsotlhe tse, di lebeletse mo go wena, gore o tle o di fe dijo tsa tsone mo motlheng o o lebanyeng." 
Psalms104:28 Se o se di nayang di se phuthe; o huporolole seatla sa gago, mme di kgore mo go molemo." 
Psalms104:29 O sube sefatlhogo sa gago, mme di huduege; o tlose mowa wa tsone, di swe, di boele loroleng lwa tsone." 
Psalms104:30 O rome, o ntshe mowa wa gago, mme di tlholege; o šafatse sefatlhogo sa lefatshe." 
Psalms104:31 A kgalalelo ya ga Jehofa e eme ka bosakhutleng; a Jehofa a itumele mo ditirong tsa gagwe; 
Psalms104:32 yo o lebang lefatshe, mme le rorome; a ame dithaba, mme di kue mosi." 
Psalms104:33 Ke tlaa re ke sa ntse ke tshedile ke nne ke opelele Jehofa; ke tlaa re ke sa ntse ke leyo ke nne ke bake Modimo wa me. 
Psalms104:34 A go akanya ga me go nne monate mo go one; ke tlaa itumela mo go Jehofa. 
Psalms104:35 A baleofi ba nyelediwe, ba tloge mo lefatsheng, mme a baikepi ba se tlhole ba leyo gope. Baka Jehofa mowa wa me. Lona, bakang Jehofa." 
Psalms105:1 A ko lo ntshetseng Jehofa malebogo, bitsang leina la gagwe; madiro a gagwe lo a itsefatse mo ditšhabeng." 
Psalms105:2 Mo opeleleng, mo opeleleng dipako; buang ka ga ditiro tsa gagwe tsotlhe tse di gakgamatsang." 
Psalms105:3 Kgantshang ka leina la gagwe le le boitshepo; a dipelo tsa ba ba batlang Jehofa di itumele. 
Psalms105:4 Batlang Jehofa le thata ya gagwe; batlang sefatlhogo sa gagwe ka bosakhutleng. 
Psalms105:5 Gakologelwang ditiro tsa gagwe tse di gakgamatsang tse o di dirileng; dikgakgamatso tsa gagwe, le dikatlholo tsa molomo wa gagwe;" 
Psalms105:6 lona losika lwa ga Aberahame, motlhanka wa gagwe; lona bana ba ga Jakobe, baitshenkedwi ba gagwe." 
Psalms105:7 Ke ene Jehofa Modimo wa rona; dikatlholo tsa gagwe di mo lefatsheng lotlhe fela. 
Psalms105:8 O ntse a gakologetswe kgolagano ya gagwe ka bosakhutleng, e bong lefoko le o le laoletseng dikokomana di le makgolo a some;" 
Psalms105:9 e bong kgolagano e o neng a e dira le Aberahame, le ikano ya gagwe le Isake;" 
Psalms105:10 mme ikano e, a e tlhomamisetsa Jakobe gore e nne molao o o emeng, le mo go Iseraele gore e nne kgolagano e e sa khutleng." 
Psalms105:11 Ka a re: “Ke tlaa go naya lefatshe la Kanana, go nna kabelo ya boswa jwa lona.”" 
Psalms105:12 E le jale ba sa ntse ba se kaye mo palong; ee, ba se kayenyana, ba bile ba le bajaki fela mo go lone;" 
Psalms105:13 ba kgarakgatshega ka go nna ba tlhomaganya merafe fela, ba tswe mo bogosing bongwe ba ye mo tšhabeng e nngwe." 
Psalms105:14 Ga a ka a leseletsa motho ope go ba direla tshiamololo; ee, o ne a kgalemela dikgosi ka ntlha ya bone;" 
Psalms105:15 a re: “Se ameng batlodiwa ba me, lo se ka lwa utlwisa baperofeti ba me botlhoko bope.”" 
Psalms105:16 A biletsa leuba mo lefatsheng; a roba seikokotlelo sotlhe sa senkgwe. 
Psalms105:17 A roma monna yo o neng a ba etelela pele; Josefe a rekisiwa, a nna motlhanka;" 
Psalms105:18 dinao tsa gagwe ba di utlwisa botlhoko ka tse di golegang; a tsenngwa mo diketaneng tsa tshipi; 
Psalms105:19 ga ba ga tla ga fitlha motlha wa go dirafala ga lefoko la gagwe; lefoko la ga Jehofa la mo leka. 
Psalms105:20 Kgosi ya roma, ya mo hunolola dikgole; e bong molaodi wa ditšhaba, mme a mo lesa a tswa fela." 
Psalms105:21 A mo dira morena wa ntlo ya gagwe, le molaodi wa dithoto tsotlhe tsa gagwe;" 
Psalms105:22 gore a golege dikgosana tsa gagwe ka fa o ratang ka gone, le gore a rute bagolwane ba gagwe botlhale." 
Psalms105:23 Iseraele le ene a tla mo Egepeto; Jakobe a jaka mo lefatsheng la ga Hame. 
Psalms105:24 Mme Jehofa a atisa ba gagwe thata, a ba baya go nna thata bogolo go feta baganetsi ba bone." 
Psalms105:25 A sokolola pelo ya bone gore ba ile batho ba gagwe, go direla batlhanka ba gagwe ka boferefere." 
Psalms105:26 A roma Moše, motlhanka wa gagwe, le ene Arone yo o mo itshenketseng." 
Psalms105:27 Ba tlhoma ditshupo tsa gagwe fa gare ga bone, le dikgakgamatso tsa gagwe mo lefatsheng la ga Hame." 
Psalms105:28 A tlhoma lefifi, mme a le fifatsa; mme ga ba a ka ba tsuololela mafoko a gagwe." 
Psalms105:29 A fetola metsi a bone a nna madi, a bolaya ditlhapi tsa bone." 
Psalms105:30 Lefatshe la bone la nna le lesaisai la digwagwa, le mo matlwaneng a dikgosi." 
Psalms105:31 A bua, mme ga tla metshitshi ya dintshi le dinta mo melelwaneng yotlhe ya bone." 
Psalms105:32 A ba naya sefako mo boemong jwa pula, le molelo o o tutumang mo lefatsheng la bone." 
Psalms105:33 A kgemetha mafine a bone le one, le ditlhare tsa mafeige tsa bone; a robakanya ditlhare tsa melelwane ya bone." 
Psalms105:34 A bua, mme tsie ya tla le seboko, mme ya bo e le mo go se nang palo," 
Psalms105:35 mme tsa ja tsa swetsa merogo yotlhe mo lefatsheng la bone, tsa ba tsa ja tsa bilatsa loungo lwa mmu wa bone." 
Psalms105:36 Le gone a gaila batsalwapele botlhe mo lefatsheng la bone, tshimologo ya thata yotlhe ya bone." 
Psalms105:37 Mme a ba ntsha ba tswa ba na le selefera le gouta; mme go ne go se na motho ope yo o sekoa mo ditšhabeng tsa gagwe. 
Psalms105:38 E rile ba bothologa, Egepeto a itumela; gonne poifo ya bone e ne e ba wetse." 
Psalms105:39 A tsharolola leru go nna sesiro; le molelo go sedifatsa bosigo. 
Psalms105:40 Ba lopa, mme a lere makwetekwio, a ba kgorisa ka senkgwe sa legodimo." 
Psalms105:41 A arola lefika, metsi a tšhabanyetsega; a elela mo mafelong a a lokgere jaaka noka." 
Psalms105:42 Gonne a gakologelwa lefoko la gagwe le le boitshepo le ene Aberahame motlhanka wa gagwe. 
Psalms105:43 A ntsha batho ba gagwe, ba tswa ka boitumelo, le baitshenkedwi ba gagwe ka go opela;" 
Psalms105:44 a ba naya mafatshe a merafe; ba tsaya mohuhutso wa ditšhaba; ba o rua; 
Psalms105:45 gore ba tle ba boloke ditao tsa gagwe, ba tlhokomele melao ya gagwe. Bakang Jehofa." 
Psalms106:1 Bakang Jehofa. A lo ko lo ntshetseng Jehofa malebogo; gonne o molemo; ka gobo boutlwelobotlhoko jwa gagwe bo eme ka bosakhutleng. 
Psalms106:2 E mang yo o ka bolelang ditiro tsa ga Jehofa tsa bonatla, le fa e le go bonatsa pako ya gagwe yotlhe?" 
Psalms106:3 Go sego ba ba tshegetsang katlholo, le ene yo o dirang tshiamo ka metlha yotlhe." 
Psalms106:4 O tle o nkgakologelwe, Jehofa, ka lesego le o le ngoketseng batho ba gago; a ko o ntekole ka poloka ya gago;" 
Psalms106:5 gore ke tle ke bone go kokotlegela ga baitshenkedwi ba gago, gore ke tle ke ipele mo go itumeleng ga morafe wa gago, gore ke kgane ka boitumelo le boswa jwa gago." 
Psalms106:6 Re leofile le borraetsho, re ikepile, re dirile maswe." 
Psalms106:7 Borraetsho ga ba a ka ba tlhaloganya dikgakgamatso tsa gago kwa Egepeto; ga ba a ka ba gakologelwa bontsi jwa mautlwelobotlhoko a gago; mme ba nna dirukhutlhi fela kwa lewatleng, e bong kwa Lewatleng le Lehibidu." 
Psalms106:8 Le fa go ntse jalo a ba boloka ka ntlha ya leina la gagwe, gore a itsefatse thata ya gagwe e e bonatla." 
Psalms106:9 Le gone a kgalemela Lewatle le Lehibidu, mme la kgala; jalo a ba goga a ba ralatsa mo madibeng a a boteng jaaka mo nageng fela." 
Psalms106:10 A ba dibela mo seatleng sa yo o ba ilang, a ba rekolola mo seatleng sa mmaba." 
Psalms106:11 Metsi a khurumetsa baganetsi ba bone; ga se ka ga sala ope wa bone. 
Psalms106:12 E dira gone ba dumelang mafoko a gagwe; ba opela pako ya gagwe. 
Psalms106:13 Ba tloga ba lebala ditiro tsa gagwe ka bonako; ba se ka ba lebelela kgakololo ya gagwe; 
Psalms106:14 ba ineela thata mo dikeletsong mo nageng, ba leka Modimo mo dipoweng tsa naga." 
Psalms106:15 Wa ba naya topo ya bone; mme wa tsenya mowa wa bone malolo fela. 
Psalms106:16 Ba nna pelotshetlha le mo go ene Moše, mo bothibelelong, le mo go Arone moitshepi wa ga Jehofa." 
Psalms106:17 Lefatshe la phatloga la kometsa Dathane, la ba la bipa lesomo la ga Abirame." 
Psalms106:18 Molelo wa tshujwa mo lesomong la bone; kgabo ya fisetsa ruri baikepi. 
Psalms106:19 Ba dira namane mo Horebe, ba obamela setshwantsho se se thetsweng." 
Psalms106:20 Jalo ba fetolela kgalalelo ya bone mo setshwantshong sa kgomo e e jang bojang. 
Psalms106:21 Ba lebala Modimo Mmoloki wa bone, yo o dirileng dilo tse dikgolo kwa Egepeto;" 
Psalms106:22 ditiro tse di gakgamatsang mo lefatsheng la ga Hame, le dilo tse di boitshegang fa Lewatleng le Lehibidu." 
Psalms106:23 Ke gone ka mo o rileng, o tlaa ba senya, fa Moše moitshenkedwi wa one a ne a se ka a ema fa pele ga one mo phatlheng, go faposa bogale jwa one jo bo thata, gore e se re kgotsa wa ba senya." 
Psalms106:24 Ee, ba ne ba nyatsa lefatshe le le natefang; ba se ka ba dumela lefoko la gagwe;" 
Psalms106:25 ba ngongorega ba le mo megopeng ya bone, mme ba se ka ba reetsa lentswe la ga Jehofa." 
Psalms106:26 Ke gone ka moo a ba tsholeletsa seatla sa gagwe, o re o tlaa ba digela mo nageng;" 
Psalms106:27 le gone a re, o tlaa digela losika lwa bone mo gare ga merafe, a ba gasagasa mo mafatsheng." 
Psalms106:28 Le gone ba ne ba ikopanya le Baalepeore, mme ba ja ditshupelo tsa baswi." 
Psalms106:29 Jalo ba mo tlhotlheletsa bogaleng ka madiro a bone, mme sebetso sa ba phagelela." 
Psalms106:30 Foo ga ema Finehase, mme a dirafatsa tshekiso; jalo sebetso sa khutlisiwa;" 
Psalms106:31 mme moo, a go balelwa fa e le tshiamo go ya ditshikatshikeng tsotlhe ka bosenabokhutlo." 
Psalms106:32 Le gone ba mo gakatsa kwa metsing a Meriba, ga ba ga tla ga nna maswe mo go Moše ka ntlha ya bone;" 
Psalms106:33 ka gobo ba rukhutlhela mowa wa gagwe, mme a bua ka phorumelo ka dipounama tsa gagwe." 
Psalms106:34 Ga ba a ka ba senya ditšhaba, jaaka Jehofa a ba laotse;" 
Psalms106:35 ba itlhakanya le merafe, ba ithuta ditiro tsa yone." 
Psalms106:36 Ba direla medimo ya yone ya disetwa; e e tsileng ya nna seru mo go bone; 
Psalms106:37 ee, ba ntsha bomorwaa bone, le bomorwadia bone ditlhabelo tsa badimo." 
Psalms106:38 Ba tsholola madi a a se nang molato, e bong madi a bomorwaa bone ba ba ba iseditseng medimo ya disetwa ya Kanana ditlhabelo; lefatshe la leswefadiwa ke madi." 
Psalms106:39 Jalo ba tsenngwa leswe ke ditiro tsa bone, ba akafala mo madirong a bone." 
Psalms106:40 Ke gone ka moo tšhakgalo ya ga Jehofa ya tukela batho ba gagwe, a fedisiwa pelo ke boswa jwa gagwe." 
Psalms106:41 Mme a ba tsenya mo seatleng sa merafe; mme ba ba ba ilang ba ba busa. 
Psalms106:42 Baba ba bone ba ba patika le gone; ba fenngwa, ba nna mo thateng ya seatla sa bone." 
Psalms106:43 A ba golola gantsintsi; le fa go ntse jalo ba nna borukhutlhi fela mo kgakololanong ya bone, ba ba ba isiwa kwa tlase mo boikepong jwa bone." 
Psalms106:44 Le fa go ntse jalo a tlhokomela pitlagano ya bone, mogang o utlwang selelo sa bone." 
Psalms106:45 A gakologelwa kgolagano ya gagwe, a ikwatlhaya ka fa bontsing jwa mautlwelobotlhoko a gagwe." 
Psalms106:46 A ba a dira gore ba tlhomogelwe pelo ke botlhe ba ba ba tshwereng ba ba golegile. 
Psalms106:47 Re boloke, Jehofa, Modimo wa rona, o bo o re phuthe go re ntsha mo merafeng, go tla re ntshetsa leina la gago le le boitshepo malebogo, le go ja koma mo pakong ya gago." 
Psalms106:48 A go bakwe Jehofa, Modimo wa Iseraele, go tswa bosasimologeng go ya fela bosaengkae. Mme batho botlhe ba re: “A go nne jalo.” Bakang Jehofa." 
Psalms107:1 A ko lo ntshetseng Jehofa malebogo; gonne o molemo; gonne boutlwelobotlhoko jwa gagwe bo eme ka bosakhutleng. 
Psalms107:2 A barekolodwi ba go Jehofa ba bue jalo, ba o ba rekolotseng mo seatleng sa moganetsi;" 
Psalms107:3 a ba phutha a ba ntsha mo mafatsheng, go tswa kwa botlhabatsatsi, le kwa bophirimatsatsi, kwa botsheka le kwa borwa." 
Psalms107:4 Ba ne ba pholetha mo nageng mo tseleng ya sekaka; ga ba a ka ba bona motse ope o o nnwang. 
Psalms107:5 Ba le tlala le lenyora, mowa wa bone wa idibala mo go bone." 
Psalms107:6 Foo ba goela kwa go Jehofa mo tlalelong ya bone, mme a ba golola a ba ntsha mo dipitlaganong tsa bone." 
Psalms107:7 Le gone a ba goga ka tsela e e lolameng, gore ba ye go fitlha kwa motseng o o ka nnwang." 
Psalms107:8 A bo batho ba ka ka ba baka Jehofa ka ntlha ya molemo wa gagwe, le ka ntlha ya ditiro tsa gagwe tse di gakgamatsang mo baneng ba batho!" 
Psalms107:9 Gonne o kgorisa mowa o o eletsang, le mowa o o bolailweng ke tlala o o kgorise ka molemo." 
Psalms107:10 Ba ba neng ba dutse mo lefifing le mo moriting wa loso, ba bofetswe mo patikong le mo tshiping;" 
Psalms107:11 e le ka gonne ba rukhutlhetse mafoko a Modimo, ba tswitla kgakololo ya Mogodimodimo;" 
Psalms107:12 ke gone ka ntlha ya mo, a pagolola pelo ya bone ka muhuhutso; ba wa, mme go se na ope yo o thusang." 
Psalms107:13 Foo ba ikuela Jehofa mo tlalelong ya bone, mme a ba boloka, a ba ntsha mo dipitlaganong tsa bone." 
Psalms107:14 A ba ntsha mo lefifing le mo moriting wa loso, a komoganya dipofo tsa bone." 
Psalms107:15 A bo batho ba ka ka ba baka Jehofa ka ntlha ya molemo wa gagwe, le ka ntlha ya ditiro tsa gagwe tse di gakgamatsang mo baneng ba batho!" 
Psalms107:16 Gonne o thubile ditswalo tsa kgotlho, a remaganya mephakalego ya tshipi." 
Psalms107:17 Ba ba dieleele ba tle ba bogisiwe ka ntlha ya ditlolo tsa bone, le ka ntlha ya maikepo a bone." 
Psalms107:18 Mowa wa bone o feretlhwe ke dilo tsotlhe fela, mme ba atamele kwa dikgorong tsa loso." 
Psalms107:19 Foo ba ikuele Jehofa mo tlalelong ya bone, mme a ba golole a ba ntshe mo dipitlaganong tsa bone." 
Psalms107:20 A ise lefoko la gagwe, a ba fodise, a ba swatole mo ditshenyegong tsa bone." 
Psalms107:21 A bo batho ba ka ka ba baka Jehofa ka ntlha ya molemo wa gagwe, le ka ntlha ya ditiro tsa gagwe tse di gakgamatsang mo baneng ba batho!" 
Psalms107:22 A ba ise ditlhabelo tsa tebogo, a ba kakanye ditiro tsa gagwe ka go opela." 
Psalms107:23 Ba ba fologelang kwa lewatleng ka dikepe, ba tiro ya bone e leng mo metsing a magolo;" 
Psalms107:24 bao, ba bona ditiro tsa ga Jehofa, le dikgakgamatso tsa gagwe mo bodibeng jo bo botengteng." 
Psalms107:25 Gonne o a laola, mme a tsose phefo e e matsubutsubu e e kokomosang makhubu a yone." 
Psalms107:26 Ba tlhatlogela kwa legodimong, ba fologela gape kwa matennyeng; mowa wa bone o nyere o fele ka ntlha ya tlalelo." 
Psalms107:27 Ba theekele, ba kgokgweetsege jaaka motho yo o tagilweng, mme ba felelwe ke maano otlhe a bone." 
Psalms107:28 Foo ba goele kwa go Jehofa mo tlalelong ya bone, mme a ba swatole mo dipitlaganong tsa bone." 
Psalms107:29 A ritibatse matsubutsubu, makhubu a one a ba a tla a tle a eme fela." 
Psalms107:30 Foo ba ipele ka gobo ba iketlile; jalo a ba gorosetse mo bogorogelong jo ba ratang ba bo ba le mo go jone. 
Psalms107:31 A bo batho ba ka ka ba baka Jehofa ka ntlha ya molemo wa gagwe, le ka ntlha ya ditiro tsa gagwe tse di gakgamatsang mo baneng ba batho!" 
Psalms107:32 A ba ke ba mo goletse le mo phuthegong ya sešaba, ba mmake mo sennong sa bagolwane." 
Psalms107:33 O fetola dinoka naga fela, le metswedi ya metsi mmu o o nyorilweng;" 
Psalms107:34 le lefatshe le le matshebe a le fetole sekaka se se letswai ka ntlha ya boleo jwa ba ba agileng mo go lone. 
Psalms107:35 A fetole naga fela mogobe o o metsi, le lefatshe le le omeletseng metswedi ya metsi." 
Psalms107:36 A agise ba ba bolailweng ke tlala gone, gore ba tle ba baakanye motse o o ka nnwang;" 
Psalms107:37 ba jale masimo, ba tlhome masimo a mafine, mme ba iponele maungo a totafalo." 
Psalms107:38 Le gone a ba segofatse, ba tle ba nne ba ntsifale thata; mme a sa leseletse dikgomo tsa bone go ngobela." 
Psalms107:39 Gape ba ngotlege, ba kokobediwe ka patiko, le tlalelo le bohutsana." 
Psalms107:40 O gorometsa lonyatso mo dikgosaneng, a di pholethise mo dipoeng fela, kwa go se nang tsela gone." 
Psalms107:41 Le fa go ntse jalo, motlhoki o tle a mmeye kwa godimo kwa ntle ga pogiso, a mo dire ditshika jaaka letsomane." 
Psalms107:42 Bathokgami ba tlaa go bona, ba itumela; mme boikepo jotlhe bo tlaa ithiba molomo wa jone." 
Psalms107:43 Le fa e le bomang ba ba botlhale, ba tlaa ela dilo tse tlhoko, mme ba tlaa akanya mautlwelobotlhoko a ga Jehofa." 
Psalms108:1 Modimo, pelo ya me e nitame; ke tlaa opela, ee, ke tlaa opela dipako, le ka e e leng kgalalelo ya me." 
Psalms108:2 Tsogang, saletare le harepe; nna ka nosi ke tlaa tsoga ka maphakela a magolo." 
Psalms108:3 Ke tlaa go ntshetsa malebogo mo gare ga ditšhaba, Jehofa; ke tlaa go opelela dipako mo gare ga merafe." 
Psalms108:4 Gonne boutlwelobothoko jwa gago bo le bogolo godimo ga magodimo, le boammaaruri jwa gago bo fitlha kwa maaping." 
Psalms108:5 O nne o golediwe, Modimo, godimo ga magodimo; le kgalalelo ya gago godimo ga lefatshe lotlhe." 
Psalms108:6 Boloka ka letsogo la gago le legolo, mme o re arabe, gore baratwi ba gago ba gololwe." 
Psalms108:7 Modimo o buile mo boitshepong jwa one; wa re: “Ke tlaa kgana ka boitumelo; ke tlaa kgaoganya Shekeme, ke ba ke lekalekanya mokgatšha wa Sukothe." 
Psalms108:8 Gileate ke ga me; Manase ke ga me; Eferaime le ene ke phemelo ya tlhogo ya me; Juta ke thobane ya me ya bogosi. 
Psalms108:9 Moabe ke mogopo wa me o o tlhapelang; setlhako sa me ke tlaa se latlhela mo Etome; ke tlaa kgana ka Filisitia.” 
Psalms108:10 Ya bo e le mang yo o tlaa nkisang mo motseng o o thekeleditsweng? Ya bo e le mang yo o nkgogetseng mo Etome? 
Psalms108:11 A ga o a re latlha Modimo? Mme o sa bolole le dintwa tsa rona, Modimo." 
Psalms108:12 Re tlhabantshe le moganetsi, ka gobo thuso ya motho ke lefela fela." 
Psalms108:13 Re tlaa dira ka bonatla ka Modimo, gonne ke one o tlaa gatakang baganetsi ba rona." 
Psalms109:1 O se ka wa didimala Modimo wa pako ya me; 
Psalms109:2 gonne molomo wa baikepi, le molomo wa tsietso, ba o nkatlhamiseditse, ba buile le nna ka loleme lwa maaka." 
Psalms109:3 Ba ne ba ntikanyeletsa ka mafoko a kilo, ba tlhabana le nna ka bomo." 
Psalms109:4 Nna ke lorato mo go bone, mme bone ke baganetsi ba me; mme ke ineela mo thapelong." 
Psalms109:5 Ba ntueletse molemo ka bosula, le lorato lwa me ka letlhoo." 
Psalms109:6 Mo tlhomele motho yo o moikepi go mo laola; a moganetsi a mo eme ka fa letsogong la gagwe le legolo. 
Psalms109:7 A e re a atlholwa, a tswe a le molato; mme a morapelo wa gagwe o fetoge boleo." 
Psalms109:8 A malatsi a gagwe a nne mabotlana; mme a motho o sele a tseye tirelo ya gagwe. 
Psalms109:9 A bana ba gagwe ba nne masiela fela, le mosadi wa gagwe a nne moswagadi fela." 
Psalms109:10 A bana ba gagwe ba nne bakaidikaidi, mme ba kope; mme a ba senke sejo sa bone kwa kgakala le matlotla a bone." 
Psalms109:11 Mme a moikgagapeledi a phamole gotlhe mo o nang nago; a baeng ba ntshe mofufutso wa gagwe thopo. 
Psalms109:12 A go se nne ope yo o tlaa mo direlang boutlwelobotlhoko; le gone a go se nne ope yo o tlhomogelang masiela a gagwe pelo. 
Psalms109:13 A losika lwa gagwe lwa kwa morago lo kgaolwe; e tlaa re mo losikeng lo lo rulaganang nalo a leina la bone le phimolelwe ruri. 
Psalms109:14 A boikepo jwa borraabo bo gakologelwe ke Jehofa; a boleo jwa ga mmaabo bo se phimolelwe ruri. 
Psalms109:15 A bo nne bo nne fa pele ga Jehofa ka gale, gore a tle a kgaole kgakologelo ya bone mo lefatsheng." 
Psalms109:16 Gonne a se ka a gakologelwa go itshupa kutlwelobotlhoko, mme a bogisa motho wa mohumanegi, le wa motlhoki, le wa pelo e e phatlogileng, gore a ba bolaye." 
Psalms109:17 Ee, a rata khutsakanyo, mme e tsile mo go ene; ga a ka a kgatlhwa ke go segofatsa, ga bo go le kgakala le ene." 
Psalms109:18 Le gone a ikapesa ka khutsakanyo jaaka seaparo sa gagwe, mme ya tla ya tsena mo ditennyeng tsa gagwe jaaka metsi, le jaaka lookwane mo marapong a gagwe." 
Psalms109:19 A e nne mo go ene jaaka seaparo se o ipipang ka sone, le jaaka moitlesi o o itlamang ka one ka gale." 
Psalms109:20 Eo ke yone tuelo ya baganetsi ba me, e e tswang mo go Jehofa, le ya ba ba buang bosula ka ga mowa wa me." 
Psalms109:21 Mme nna, o ntirele, wena Modimo, Morena, ka ntlha ya leina la gago, e re ka boutlwelobothloko jwa gago bo le molemo, o nkgolole." 
Psalms109:22 Gonne ke lehuma le botlhokwa, le pelo ya me e tlhabilwe mo teng ga me." 
Psalms109:23 Ke ile, jaaka moriti o o felang; ke akgwaakgwa jaaka tsie." 
Psalms109:24 Mangole a me a kgwetlhisiwa ke go tlhoka go ja; le nama ya me e tlhorega monono. 
Psalms109:25 Ke bile ke dule sekgobo mo go bone; e a re ba mpona ba thukhuthetse tlhogo tsa bone. 
Psalms109:26 A ko o nthuse Jehofa Modimo wa me; a ko o mpoloke ka fa boutlwelongbotlhoko jwa gago; 
Psalms109:27 gore ba tle ba itse fa se e le seatla sa gago; fa wena Jehofa o se dirile. 
Psalms109:28 A ba hutsakanye, mme wena o segofatse; ba tlaa re ba ema ba tlhajwe ke ditlhong, motlhanka wa gago ene o tlaa itumela." 
Psalms109:29 A baganetsi ba me ba apesiwe tlotlologo, mme a ba ipipe ka ditlhong tsa bone jaaka ka kobo." 
Psalms109:30 Ke tlaa ntshetsa Jehofa malebogo a magolo ka molomo wa me; ee, ke tlaa mmaka fa gare ga bontsi jwa batho." 
Psalms109:31 Gonne o tlaa ema motlhoki ka fa letsogong le legolo, gore a mo golole mo go bone ba ba sekisang mowa wa gagwe." 
Psalms110:1 Jehofa o raya morena wa me a re: “Dula ka fa letsogong la me le legolo go tsamaye ke dire baba ba gago sebeo sa gago sa dinao.” 
Psalms110:2 Jehofa o tlaa otlolola lore lwa thata ya gago go tswa Sione; wena o buse mo gare ga baba ba gago. 
Psalms110:3 Batho ba gago ba italetsa ka pelo e e thamileng mo letsatsing la thata ya gago; o re o le mo mekgabong ya boitshepo, o a bo o na le monyo, wa bokau jwa gago o tswa sebopelong sa moso." 
Psalms110:4 Jehofa o ikanne, mme ga a ketla a ikwatlhaya, a re: “O moperesiti ka bosakhutleng ka fa mokgweng wa ga Melekiseteke.”" 
Psalms110:5 Morena, a le ka fa letsogong la gago le legolo, o tlaa phololetsa dikgosi mo letsatsing la kgalefo ya gagwe." 
Psalms110:6 O tlaa atlhola mo merafeng, o tlaa tlatsa mafelo ka ditoto tsa baswi; o tlaa phololetsa yo e leng tlhogo mo mafatsheng a le mantsi." 
Psalms110:7 O tlaa nwa mo nokaneng e e mo tseleng; mme ka mo a itse go tsholetsa tlhogo. 
Psalms111:1 Bakang Jehofa. Ke tlaa ntshetsa Jehofa malebogo ka pelo yotlhe ya me mo lekgotleng la bathokgami, le mo phuthegong." 
Psalms111:2 Ditiro tsa ga Jehofa di kgolo, di tlhotlhomisiwa ke botlhe ba ba kgatlhegang mo go tsone." 
Psalms111:3 Tiro ya gagwe ke tlotlo le borena, mme tshiamo ya gagwe e eme ka bosakhutleng." 
Psalms111:4 O dirile gore ditiro tsa gagwe tse di gakgamatsang di gakologelwe; Jehofa o pelotshweu, o tletse pelotlhomogi." 
Psalms111:5 Ba ba mmoifang o ba neile dijo; o tlaa nna a gakologelwa kgolagano ya gagwe ka gale. 
Psalms111:6 O supeditse batho ba gagwe thata ya ditiro tsa gagwe, ka go ba naya boswa jwa merafe." 
Psalms111:7 Ditiro tsa diatla tsa gagwe ke boammaaruri le tshiamiso; dikaelo tsotlhe tsa gagwe di tlhomame. 
Psalms111:8 Di tlhomamisitswe ka bosakhutleng le ka bosaengkae, di dirilwe mo boammaaruring le mo thokgamong." 
Psalms111:9 O iseditse batho ba gagwe kgololo; kgolagano ya gagwe o e laoletse ruri; leina la gagwe le boitshepo, le a sisimogwa." 
Psalms111:10 Go boifa Jehofa ke tshimologo ya botlhale botlhe ba ba dirang ka ga gone ba na le tlhaloganyo e e molemo; pako ya gagwe e eme ka bosakhutleng. 
Psalms112:1 Bakang Jehofa. Go sego monna yo o boifang Jehofa, yo o kgatlhegang thata mo ditaolong tsa gagwe." 
Psalms112:2 Losika lwa gagwe lo tlaa natlafala thata mo lefatsheng; bana ba mothokgami ba tlaa segofala. 
Psalms112:3 Khumo e mo ntlong ya gagwe, le letlotlo; le tshiamo ya gagwe e eme ka bosakhutleng." 
Psalms112:4 Mothokgami o tlhagelwa ke lesedi mo lefifing; o pelotshweu, o tletse pelotlhomogi, o siame." 
Psalms112:5 Go tle go atlegele motho yo o direlang batho ka bopelotshweu a ntshe a adime fela; o tlaa emela mafoko a gagwe sentle fa go le tsheko. 
Psalms112:6 Gonne ga a ketla a tshikinngwa gope; mosiami o tlaa nna a gopolwa ka bosenabokhutlo. 
Psalms112:7 Ga a ketla a tshosiwa ke mafoko a a bosula; pelo ya gagwe e nitame, e ikantse Jehofa." 
Psalms112:8 Pelo ya gagwe e tlhomame, ga a ketla a boifa, go tle go tsamaye a bone keletso ya gagwe mo babeng ba gagwe." 
Psalms112:9 O gasitse, o file batlhoki; tshiamo ya gagwe e eme ka bosakhutleng: lonaka lwa gagwe lo tlaa golediwa ka tlotlo." 
Psalms112:10 Moikepi o tlaa go bona, mme a hutsafale o tlaa huranya meno, mme a tlhapologele koo; keletso ya moikepi e tlaa nyelela." 
Psalms113:1 Bakang Jehofa. Bakang lona batlhanka ba ga Jehofa, bakang leina la gagwe." 
Psalms113:2 A go bakwe leina la ga Jehofa, go tloga fano gompieno go ya bosakhutleng." 
Psalms113:3 Go tswa botlhabatsatsi, go ya bophirimong jwa lone, leina la ga Jehofa le na le go bakwa fela." 
Psalms113:4 Jehofa o godimodimo, godimo ga merafe yotlhe, kgalalelo ya gagwe godimo ga magodimo." 
Psalms113:5 E mang yo o tshwanang le Jehofa Modimo wa rona, yo setulo sa gagwe se kwa godimong?" 
Psalms113:6 Yo o ikokobetsang gore a bone dilo tse di kwa legodimong le mo lefatsheng. 
Psalms113:7 O kakatlolola mohumanegi mo loroleng, a tsholetse motlhoki a mo tlose mo thotobolong;" 
Psalms113:8 gore a tle a mmeye mo dikgosaneng, e bong mo dikgosaneng tsa batho ba gagwe." 
Psalms113:9 O dira gore mosadi yo o moopa a nne le motse, le go nna mma bana yo o itumelang. Bakang Jehofa." 
Psalms114:1 E rile Iseraele a tswa mo Egepeto, le ntlo ya ga Jakobe mo bathong ba puo e sele," 
Psalms114:2 Juta a tla a nna felo ga gagwe ga boitshepo, le Iseraele bogosi jwa gagwe." 
Psalms114:3 Lewatle la go bona, la tshaba; Joretane a kgarametsegela kwa morago." 
Psalms114:4 Dithaba tsa ja mokaragana jaaka diphelefu, dithotana jaaka dikwanyana." 
Psalms114:5 O a bo o reng, wena lewatle fa e bo ne ne o tshaba jaana? Wena Joretane fa e bo ne ne o boela kwa morago jaana?" 
Psalms114:6 Lona dithaba, lwa reng, ka e le fa lo ja mokaragana jaaka diphelefu? Lona dithotana jaaka dikwanyana?" 
Psalms114:7 Roroma, wena lefatshe, fa pele ga Morena, fa pele ga Modimo wa ga Jakobe;" 
Psalms114:8 yo o fetotseng lefika la nna mogobe wa metsi, le legakwa la nna motswedi wa metsi." 
Psalms115:1 E seng rona Jehofa, e seng rona, mme naya leina la gago kgalalelo ka ntlha ya kutlwelobotlhoko ya gago, le ka ntlha ya boammaaruri jwa gago." 
Psalms115:2 Ana merafe e tlaa bo e buelang, e re: “Ana jaana Modimo wa bone o a bo o le kae?”" 
Psalms115:3 Modimo wa rona o kwa magodimong; o dirile ka fa o ratileng ka gone. 
Psalms115:4 Medimo ya bone ya disetwa ke selefera le gouta, ke tiro ya diatla tsa batho fela." 
Psalms115:5 E na le melomo, mme ga e bue; e na le matlho, mme ga e bone;" 
Psalms115:6 e na le ditsebe, mme ga e utlwe; e na le dinko, mme ga e dupe;" 
Psalms115:7 e na le diatla, mme ga e tshware; e na le dinao, mme ga e tsamaye; le gone ga e bue ka memetso ya yone." 
Psalms115:8 Ba ba e dirang ba tlaa tshwana nayo fela, ee, le mongwe le mongwe yo o ikanyang mo go yone." 
Psalms115:9 Wena Iseraele, o ikanye Jehofa; ke ene thuso ya bone, le thebe ya bone." 
Psalms115:10 Lona ba ntlo ya ga Arone, ikanyeng Jehofa; ke ene thuso ya bone, le thebe ya bone." 
Psalms115:11 Lona ba lo boifang Jehofa, ikanyeng Jehofa; ke ene thuso ya bone, le thebe ya bone." 
Psalms115:12 Jehofa o ntse a re gopotse; o tlaa re segofatsa; o tlaa segofatsa ntlo ya Iseraele; o tlaa segofatsa ntlo ya ga Arone. 
Psalms115:13 O tlaa segofatsa ba ba boifang Jehofa, bannye le bagolo." 
Psalms115:14 A Jehofa a lo atise segolo bogolo, lona le bana ba lona." 
Psalms115:15 Lo segofadiwe ke Jehofa yo o dirileng legodimo le lefatshe. 
Psalms115:16 Magodimo ke magodimo a ga Jehofa; mme lefatshe o le neile bana ba batho. 
Psalms115:17 Baswi ga ba bake Jehofa, le fa e le ope yo o fologelang mo tuulalong." 
Psalms115:18 Mme rona re tlaa baka Jehofa, go tloga fano gompieno go ya bosakhutleng. Bakang Jehofa." 
Psalms116:1 Ke rata Jehofa, gonne o utlwile lentswe la me, le mekokotlelo ya me." 
Psalms116:2 Ka a ntshekegetse tsebe ya gagwe, ke gone ke tlaa nnang ke mmitsa ka ke sa ntse ke tshedile." 
Psalms116:3 Dikgole tsa loso di ne di ntsentse gare, matlhoko a Bobipo a ntshwere; ka bona tlalelo le bohutsana." 
Psalms116:4 Foo ka bitsa leina la ga Jehofa; ka re: “Jehofa, ke a go rapela, golola mowa wa me.”" 
Psalms116:5 Jehofa o pelotshweu, o tshiamo; ee, Modimo wa rona o kutlwelobotlhoko." 
Psalms116:6 Jehofa o boloka ba ba sa tlhalefang; ke ne ke ngotlilwe, mme a mpoloka." 
Psalms116:7 Boela mo boikhutsong jwa gago, wena mowa wa me, gonne Jehofa o go diretse sentle ka mo go feteletseng." 
Psalms116:8 Gonne o golotse mowa wa me mo losong, le matlho a me mo dikeleding, le dinao tsa me gore ke se we." 
Psalms116:9 Ke tlaa sepela fa pele ga Jehofa mo lefatsheng la batshedi. 
Psalms116:10 Ke a dumela, gonne ke tlaa bua: “Ke ne ke patikegile thata;”" 
Psalms116:11 ka bua mo go potlakeng ga me, ka re: “Batho botlhe ke maaka fela.”" 
Psalms116:12 Ke tlaa ntshetsa Jehofa eng ka ntlha ya masego otlhe a gagwe a o a ntiretseng? 
Psalms116:13 Ke tlaa tsaya senwelo sa poloko, mme ke tlaa bitsa leina la ga Jehofa." 
Psalms116:14 Ke tlaa lefela Jehofa maikano a me, ee, fa pele ga batho botlhe ba gagwe." 
Psalms116:15 Loso lwa baitshepi ba gagwe lo tlotlega thata mo matlhong a ga Jehofa. 
Psalms116:16 Jehofa, ruri ke motlhanka wa gago; ke motlhanka wa gago, ke ngwana wa lelata la gago; o hunolotse dikgolego tsa me." 
Psalms116:17 Ke tlaa go isetsa setlhabelo sa tebogo, mme ke tlaa bitsa leina la ga Jehofa." 
Psalms116:18 Ke tlaa lefela Jehofa maikano a me, ee, fa pele ga batho botlhe ba gagwe;" 
Psalms116:19 mo malwapeng a ntlo ya ga Jehofa, mo gare ga gago, wena Jerusalema. Bakang Jehofa." 
Psalms117:1 A ko lo bakeng Jehofa, lona merafe yotlhe; lo mmakeng, lona ditšhaba tsotlhe." 
Psalms117:2 Gonne kutlwelobotlhoko ya gagwe ntlheng ya rona e kgolo thata; le boammaaruri jwa ga Jehofa bo eme ka bosakhutleng. Bakang Jehofa. 
Psalms118:1 A ko lo ntshetseng Jehofa malebogo; gonne o molemo, gonne boutlwelobotlhoko jwa gagwe bo eme ka bosakhutleng." 
Psalms118:2 A jaanong Iseraele a bue, a re: “Boutlwelobotlhoko jwa gagwe bo eme ka bosakhutleng.”" 
Psalms118:3 A jaanong ntlo ya ga Arone e bue e re: “Boutlwelobotlhoko jwa gagwe bo eme ka bosakhutleng.” 
Psalms118:4 A jaanong ba ba boifang Jehofa ba bue ba re: “Boutlwelobotlhoko jwa gagwe bo eme ka bosakhutleng.” 
Psalms118:5 Ke ne ka bitsa leina la ga Jehofa mo pitlaganong ya me; Jehofa a nkaraba, mme a mpaya mo felong fa go atlhameng." 
Psalms118:6 Jehofa o ntlheng ya me; ga nketla ke boifa; kana motho o ka ntirang? 
Psalms118:7 Jehofa o ntlheng ya me mo go ba ba nthusang; ke gone ka mo ke tlaa bonang keletso ya me mo go ba ba nkilang. 
Psalms118:8 Go molemo go ikanya Jehofa bogolo go go ikanya motho. 
Psalms118:9 Go molemo go ikanya Jehofa bogolo go go ikanya dikgosana. 
Psalms118:10 Merafe yotlhe e kile ya ntikanyeletsa; mo ineng la ga Jehofa ke tlaa e pomaganya. 
Psalms118:11 E ne ya ntikanyeletsa; ee, ya ntikanyeletsa; mo ineng la ga Jehofa ke tlaa e pomaganya." 
Psalms118:12 Ya ntikanyeletsa jaaka dintshi tsa dinotshe; e timilwe jaaka molelo wa mitlwa; mo ineng la ga Jehofa ke tlaa e pomaganya. 
Psalms118:13 O ne wa nkhutla thata gore ke we; mme Jehofa a nthusa. 
Psalms118:14 Jehofa ke thata ya me le kopelo; mme o diregile poloka ya me. 
Psalms118:15 Lentswe la tuduetso le la poloko le mo megopeng ya basiami: “Seatla se segolo sa ga Jehofa se dira ka bonatla. 
Psalms118:16 Seatla se segolo sa ga Jehofa se goletsegile; seatla se segolo sa ga Jehofa se dira ka bonatla.” 
Psalms118:17 Ga nketla ke swa, ke tlaa tshela, ke ba ke bolela ditiro tsa ga Jehofa." 
Psalms118:18 Jehofa o nkwatlhaile mo go botlhoko; mme ga a a nneela losong. 
Psalms118:19 Mpulela dikgoro tsa tshiamo; ke tlaa tsena ka tsone, ke tlaa ntshetsa Jehofa malebogo." 
Psalms118:20 Kgoro e, ke ya ga Jehofa; basiami ba tlaa tsena ka yone." 
Psalms118:21 Ke tlaa go ntshetsa malebogo, ka gobo o nkarabile, o bile o diregile poloka ya me." 
Psalms118:22 Lentswe le baagi ba le ganneng, le diregile tlhogo ya kgokgotšho." 
Psalms118:23 Mo, ke mo go dirilweng ke Jehofa; go a gakgamatsa mo matlhong a rona." 
Psalms118:24 Le, ke letsatsi le Jehofa o le dirileng; re tlaa itumela, re ipela mo go lone." 
Psalms118:25 Boloka jaanong Jehofa, re a go rapela; Jehofa, re a go rapela, tlisa letlhogonolo jaanong." 
Psalms118:26 Go sego yo o tlang mo ineng la ga Jehofa; re lo segofaditse re le mo ntlong ya ga Jehofa. 
Psalms118:27 Jehofa ke Modimo, mme o re neile lesedi; bofang setlhabelo ka dikgole, lo se bofelele le mo go tse e leng dinaka tsa sebeso." 
Psalms118:28 Wena o Modimo wa me, ke tlaa go ntshetsa malebogo; o Modimo wa me ke tlaa go goletsa." 
Psalms118:29 A ko lo ntshetse Jehofa malebogo, gonne o molemo; boutlwelobotlhoko jwa gagwe bo eme ka bosakhutleng." 
Psalms119:1 Go sego bone ba ba itekanetseng mo tseleng, ba sepela mo molaong wa ga Jehofa." 
Psalms119:2 Go sego ba ba bolokang ditshupo tsa gagwe, ba mmatla ka pelo yotlhe." 
Psalms119:3 Ee, ba bo ba sa dire tshiamololo epe, ba sepela fela mo ditseleng tsa gagwe." 
Psalms119:4 O re laeletse dikaelo tsa gago, gore re di tlhokomele ka tlhoafalo." 
Psalms119:5 Ao, a bo ditsela tsa me di ka bo ne ne di tlhomametse go tlhokomela ditao tsa gago!" 
Psalms119:6 Foo ke ne ke se ketla ke tlhajwa ke ditlhong mogang ke tsayang ditaolo tsotlhe tsa gago tsia. 
Psalms119:7 Ke tlaa go ntshetsa malebogo ka thokgamo ya pelo, mogang ke ithutang dikatlholo tsa gago tse di siameng." 
Psalms119:8 Ke tlaa ela ditao tsa gago tlhoko; a ko o se ka wa ntlogelela ruri. Beth 
Psalms119:9 Ana motho wa lekau o tlaa ntlafatsa tsela ya gagwe ka eng? Ka go e tlhokomela ka fa lefokong la gago. 
Psalms119:10 Ke go batlile ka pelo ya me yotlhe fela; a ko o se ka wa ntesa ka timelwa ke ditaolo tsa gago. 
Psalms119:11 Ke beile lefoko la gago mo pelong ya me gore ke se ka ka go leofela. 
Psalms119:12 A go bakwe Jehofa; nthuta ditao tsa gago. 
Psalms119:13 Ka dipounama tsa me ke kakantse dikatlholo tsotlhe tsa molomo wa gago. 
Psalms119:14 Ke ntse ke itumetse mo tseleng ya ditshupo tsa gago mo go kanang ka fa ke itumelela dikhumo tsotlhe. 
Psalms119:15 Ke tlaa tlhatlhanya dikaelo tsa gago, ke tlaa tsaya ditsela tsa gago tsia." 
Psalms119:16 Ke tlaa ijesa monate mo ditaong tsa gago; ga nketla ke lebala lefoko la gago. Gimel 
Psalms119:17 Direla motlhanka wa gago sentle ka pelo e e feteletseng, gore ke tle ke tshele; jalo ke tlaa tsaya lefoko la gago tsia." 
Psalms119:18 Budulola matlho a me, gore ke bone dilo tse di gakgamatsang tsa molao wa gago." 
Psalms119:19 Ke mojaki fela mo lefatsheng, se ntshubele ditaolo tsa gago." 
Psalms119:20 Mowa wa me o phatlolwa ke go tlhologelelwa dikatlholo tsa gago ka metlha yotlhe. 
Psalms119:21 O kgalemetse bapelompe, ba ba hutsegileng, ba ba timelelwang ke ditaolo tsa gago." 
Psalms119:22 Tlosa kgobo le lonyatso mo go nna; gonne ke bolokile ditshupo tsa gago. 
Psalms119:23 Dikgosana le tsone tsa dula, tsa nna tsa ntsheba; mme motlhanka wa gago a nna a tlhatlhanya ditao tsa gago fela." 
Psalms119:24 Ditshupo tsa gago le tsone di njesa monate; ke digakolodi tsa me. Daleth 
Psalms119:25 Mowa wa me o ngaparetse lorole; ntsitsibosa ka fa lefokong la gago. 
Psalms119:26 Ke ne ka kakanya ditsela tsa me, mme wa nkaraba; nthuta ditao tsa gago." 
Psalms119:27 Ntlhaloganyetsa tsela ya dikaelo tsa gago; jalo ke tlaa tlhatlhanya ditiro tsa gago tse di gakgamatsang. 
Psalms119:28 Ke nyera mowa ka go imelesega; nthatafatsa ka fa lefokong la gago. 
Psalms119:29 Tlosa tsela ya maaka mo go nna; o nneye molao wa gago ka pelotshweu. 
Psalms119:30 Ke itshenketse tsela ya boikanngo; dikatlholo tsa gago ke di tlhomile fa pele ga me. 
Psalms119:31 Ke ngaparetse ditshupo tsa gago; Jehofa, o se ka wa ntlhabisa ditlhong." 
Psalms119:32 Ke tlaa taboga mo tseleng ya ditaolo tsa gago, mogang o katolosang pelo ya me. He" 
Psalms119:33 Nthuta tsela ya ditao tsa gago," 
Psalms119:34 Nnaya tlhaloganyo, mme ke tlaa boloka molao wa gago; ee, ke tlaa o tlhokomela ka pelo ya me yotlhe fela." 
Psalms119:35 Ntseisa tsela ya ditaolo tsa gago; gonne ke ja monate mo go tsone. 
Psalms119:36 Sokololela pelo ya me mo ditshupong tsa gago, e seng mo bopelotshetlheng." 
Psalms119:37 Faposa matlho a me mo go lebeng boithamako, o ntsitsibose mo ditseleng tsa gago." 
Psalms119:38 Tlhomamisetsa motlhanka wa gago lefoko la gago, yo ke leng wa poifo ya gago." 
Psalms119:39 Thibosa kgobo ya me, e ke e tshabang; gonne dikatlholo tsa gago di molemo." 
Psalms119:40 Bona, ke ntse ke tlhologeletswe dikaelo tsa gago; ntsitsibosa mo tshiamong ya gago. Vau" 
Psalms119:41 A mautlwelobotlhoko a gago a tle mo go nna, Morena, e bong poloka ya gago, ka fa lefokong la gago." 
Psalms119:42 Jalo ke tlaa bo ke na le go fetola yo o nkgobang; gonne ke ikanya lefoko la gago. 
Psalms119:43 Lefoko la gago o se ka wa le tlosetsa ruri mo molomong wa me; gonne ke ntse ke solofetse mo dikatlholong tsa gago. 
Psalms119:44 Jalo ke tlaa tlhokomela molao wa gago ka gale, ka bosakhutleng le ka bosaengkae." 
Psalms119:45 Ke tlaa tsamaya ke gololosegile; gonne ke senkile dikaelo tsa gago. 
Psalms119:46 Le gone ke tlaa bua ka ga ditshupo tsa gago, le fa pele ga dikgosi ga nketla ke tlhajwa ke ditlhong." 
Psalms119:47 Ke tlaa ijesa monate mo ditaolong tsa gago, tse ke di ratileng." 
Psalms119:48 Le tsone diatla tsa me, ke tlaa di tsholeletsa kwa ditaolong tsa gago, tse ke di ratileng; mme ke tlaa tlhatlhanya ditao tsa gago. Zain" 
Psalms119:49 Gakologelwa lefoko le o le buileng le motlhanka wa gago, gonne o ntsholofeditse." 
Psalms119:50 Ke lone kgomotso ya me mo pitlaganong; gonne lefoko la gago le ntsitsibositse. 
Psalms119:51 Ba ba pelompe ba nngongotse segolo thata; le fa go ntse jalo ga ke a ngosela mo molaong wa gago. 
Psalms119:52 Ke ntse ke gakologetswe dikatlholo tsa gago tsa bogologolo Jehofa, mme ke ikgomoditse." 
Psalms119:53 Ke tshwerwe ke kgakatsego e e molelo ka ntlha ya baikepi ba ba tlogelang molao wa gago. 
Psalms119:54 Ditao tsa gago e ntse ke tsone dikopelo tsa me mo ntlong ya loeto lwa me. 
Psalms119:55 Ke ntse ke gakologetswe leina la gago, Jehofa, bosigo, mme ke tlhokometse molao wa gago." 
Psalms119:56 Moo ke ntse ke na nago, gonne ke bolokile dikaelo tsa gago. Keth" 
Psalms119:57 Jehofa ke kabelo ya me; ke rile, ke tlaa tlhokomela mafoko a gago." 
Psalms119:58 Ke ne ka rapelela lesego la gago thata, ka pelo ya me yotlhe; o nne kutlwelobotlhoko mo go nna, ka fa lefokong la gago." 
Psalms119:59 Ka akanya mekgwa ya me, ka busetsa dinao tsa me mo ditshupong tsa gago." 
Psalms119:60 Ka itlhaganela, ka se ka ka nyafala go tlhokomela ditaolo tsa gago." 
Psalms119:61 Megala ya boikepi e ntharile, mme ga ke a lebala molao wa gago." 
Psalms119:62 Bosigo gare ke tlaa tsoga ke go leboga, ka ntlha ya dikatlholo tsa gago tse di siameng." 
Psalms119:63 Ke monkana wa botlhe ba ba go boifang, le wa ba ba tlhokomelang dikaelo tsa gago." 
Psalms119:64 Jehofa, lefatshe le tletse kutlwelobotlhoko ya gago; nthuta ditao tsa gago. Teth" 
Psalms119:65 O diretse motlhanka wa gago sentle, Jehofa, fela ka fa lefokong la gago." 
Psalms119:66 Nthuta temogo e e molemo, le kitso; gonne ke dumetse ditaolo tsa gago." 
Psalms119:67 E rile ke ise ke patikwe ka timela; mme jaanong ke tlhokomela lefoko la gago. 
Psalms119:68 O molemo, mme o dira molemo; nthuta ditao tsa gago." 
Psalms119:69 Ba ba pelompe ba ntogetse kako; ke tlaa boloka dikaelo tsa gago ka pelo yotlhe ya me. 
Psalms119:70 Pelo ya bone e nonne jaaka mafura, mme nna ke natefelwa mo molaong wa gago." 
Psalms119:71 Go ntiretse molemo fa ke ntse ke patikwa; gore ke tle ke ithute ditao tsa gago. 
Psalms119:72 Molao wa molomo wa gago o molemo mo go nna bogolo go makgolokgolo a gouta le selefera. Yod 
Psalms119:73 Diatla tsa gago di ntirile tsa ba tsa mpopa; nnaya tlhaloganyo, gore ke ithute ditaolo tsa gago." 
Psalms119:74 Ba ba go boifang ba tlaa mpona, ba itumela; gonne ke solofetse mo lefokong la gago." 
Psalms119:75 Ke a itse Jehofa, fa dikatlholo tsa gago di le tshiamo, le gore o nkutlwisitse botlhoko e le ka go ntshiamisa." 
Psalms119:76 Ke a go rapela, a ko o mme mapelonomi a gago a lorato a nne kgomotso ya me, ka fa lefokong la gago mo motlhankeng wa gago." 
Psalms119:77 A mautlwelobotlhoko a manana a gago a tle mo go nna, gore ke tshele; gonne molao wa gago ke mo go njesang monate." 
Psalms119:78 A ba ba pelompe ba tlhajwe ke ditlhong, gonne ba ntigile ka mo go sa siamang; mme nna, ke tlaa tlhatlhanya dikaelo tsa gago." 
Psalms119:79 A ba ba go boifang ba sokologele mo go nna, mme ba tlaa itse ditshupo tsa gago."
