Psalms119:80 A pelo ya me e itekanele mo ditaong tsa gago; gore ke se ka ka tlhajwa ke ditlhong. Kaf 
Psalms119:81 Mowa wa me o idibalela poloka ya gago, mme ke solofetse mo lefokong la gago." 
Psalms119:82 Matlho a me a lapela lefoko la gago, ka ke ntse ke re: “O tlaa nkgomotsa leng?”" 
Psalms119:83 Gonne ke ntse jaaka sekoo mo mosing fela; le fa go ntse jalo ga ke lebale ditao tsa gago. 
Psalms119:84 Ana malatsi a motlhanka wa gago ke a le kaye? O tlaa dirafatsa katlholo leng mo go ba ba mpogisang? 
Psalms119:85 Ba ba pelompe ba nkepetse mamena, e bong bone ba ba sa nnang ka fa molaong wa gago." 
Psalms119:86 Ditaolo tsa gago tsotlhe di boikanngo; ba mpogisa ka mo go sa siamang; wena, a ko o nthuse." 
Psalms119:87 Ba batlile go nja ba ntshwetsa mo lefatsheng; mme ga ke a ka ka tlogela dikaelo tsa gago. 
Psalms119:88 Ntsitsibosa ka fa mapelonoming a gago; jalo ke tlaa tlhokomela tshupo ya molomo wa gago. Lamed 
Psalms119:89 Jehofa, lefoko la gago le nnetse ruri ka bosakhutleng mo legodimong." 
Psalms119:90 Boikanngo jwa gago bo fitlha mo tshikatshikeng; o tlhomamisitse lefatshe, mme le ntse." 
Psalms119:91 Di ntse le gompieno ka fa ditaolelong tsa gago; gonne dilo tsotlhe ke batlhanka ba gago. 
Psalms119:92 Fa molao wa gago o ka bo o se ka wa nna boitumelo jwa me, nka bo ke nyeletse mo pitlaganong ya me." 
Psalms119:93 Ga nketla ke lebala dikaelo tsa gago gope; gonne o ntsitsibositse ka tsone. 
Psalms119:94 Ke wa gago, o mpoloke; gonne ke batlile dikaelo tsa gago." 
Psalms119:95 Baikepi ba ntaletse gore ba tle ba ntshenye, mme ke tlaa tlhatlhanya ditshupo tsa gago." 
Psalms119:96 Ke bonye bokhutlo jwa boitekanelo jotlhe; mme taolo ya gago e atlhame thata. Mem 
Psalms119:97 Ana ke rata molao wa gago jang! Ke one go tlhatlhanya ga me ka letsatsi lotlhe. 
Psalms119:98 Ditaolo tsa gago di ntlhalefisa go gaisa baba ba me; gonne di nna le nna ka gale. 
Psalms119:99 Ke na le tlhaloganyo go gaisa baruti botlhe ba me; gonne ditshupo tsa gago ke tsone tlhatlhanyo ya me. 
Psalms119:100 Ke tlhaloganya bogolo go batsofe, gonne ke bolokile dikaelo tsa gago." 
Psalms119:101 Ke thibile dinao tsa me mo ditseleng tsotlhe tse di bosula, gore ke tle ke tlhokomele lefoko la gago." 
Psalms119:102 Ga ke a fapoga dikatlholo tsa gago; gonne o nthutile. 
Psalms119:103 Ana mafoko a gago a botshe jang mo magalapeng a me; ee, a gaisa dinotshe mo molomong wa me." 
Psalms119:104 Ke bona tlhaloganyo ka dikaelo tsa gago; ke gone ka moo ke ilang mokgwa mongwe le mongwe wa phoro. Nun 
Psalms119:105 Lefoko la gago ke lobone lwa dinao tsa me, le lesedi la tsela ya me." 
Psalms119:106 Ke ikanne, mme ke go tlhomamisitse, gore ke tlaa tlhokomela dikatlholo tsa gago tse di siameng." 
Psalms119:107 Ke utlwisitswe botlhoko thata; ntsitsibosa Jehofa, ka fa lefokong la gago." 
Psalms119:108 Ke a go rapela, Jehofa, a ko o amogele ditshupelo tsa molomo wa me, tse di leng tsa peleego, mme o nthute dikatlholo tsa gago." 
Psalms119:109 Mowa wa me o ntse o le mo seatleng sa me fela ka gale; le fa go ntse jalo ga ke lebale molao wa gago. 
Psalms119:110 Baikepi ba nthaetse ka seru; le fa go ntse jalo ga ke a ka ka timelwa ke dikaelo tsa gago. 
Psalms119:111 Ditshupo tsa gago ke di tseile go nna boswa ka bosakhutleng; gonne tsone, ke boipelo jwa pelo ya me." 
Psalms119:112 Ke sokololetse pelo ya me kwa go direng ditao tsa gago ka bosakhutleng, e leng go ya kwa bokhutlong. Samek" 
Psalms119:113 Ke ila ba ba maitlhomo mabedi, mme molao wa gago one ke a o rata." 
Psalms119:114 O boitshubelo jwa me, le thebe ya me; ke solofetse mo lefokong la gago." 
Psalms119:115 Ntlogelang, lona badira bosula, gore ke boloke ditaolo tsa Modimo wa me." 
Psalms119:116 Nkokotletsa ka fa lefokong la gago, gore ke tshele; a ke se ka ka tlhabisiwa ditlhong ke tsholofelo ya me." 
Psalms119:117 Ntshegetsa, mme ke tlaa bolokesega; le ditao tsa gago ke tlaa di tsaya tsia ka gale." 
Psalms119:118 O nyaditse botlhe ba ba timelwang ke ditao tsa gago; gonne tsietso ya bone ke maaka fela. 
Psalms119:119 O a tle o latlhe baikepi botlhe ba lefatshe jaaka manyelo; ke gone ka mo ke ratang ditshupo tsa gago. 
Psalms119:120 Nama ya me e roromisiwa ke go go boifa; ke bile ke tshaba dikatlholo tsa gago. Ayin 
Psalms119:121 Ke dirile katlholo le tshiamiso; se ntlogele mo bapatiking ba me. 
Psalms119:122 O nne moemedi wa molemo mo boemong jwa motlhanka wa gago; a ba ba bopelompe ba se mpatike. 
Psalms119:123 Matlho a me a lapela poloka ya gago, le lefoko la gago la tshiamo." 
Psalms119:124 Direla motlhanka wa gago ka fa boutlwelongbotlhoko jwa gago, o nthute ditao tsa gago." 
Psalms119:125 Ke motlhanka wa gago, nnaya tlhaloganyo, gore ke tle ke itse ditshupo tsa gago." 
Psalms119:126 Ke lobaka lwa ga Jehofa go dira; gonne ba thatholotse molao wa gago. 
Psalms119:127 Ke gone ka moo ke ratang ditaolo tsa gago bogolo go gouta, ee, bogolo go gouta e e itshekileng." 
Psalms119:128 Ke gone ka moo ke kayang dikaelo tsa gago tsotlhe ka ga dilo tsotlhe, gore di tshiamo; mme ke ila mokgwa mongwe le mongwe wa phoro. Pe" 
Psalms119:129 Ditshupo tsa gago di a gakgamatsa; ke gone ka moo mowa wa me o di bolokang. 
Psalms119:130 Go bolelesega ga mafoko a gago go a senola; go tle go neye ba ba sa tlhalefang tlhaloganyo. 
Psalms119:131 Ka momolola molomo wa me, mme ka fegelwa; gonne ke ne ke tlhologeletswe ditaolo tsa gago." 
Psalms119:132 Sokologela mo go nna, o nkutlwele botlhoko, jaaka o ne o ntse o tle o direle ba ba ratang leina la gago." 
Psalms119:133 Rulaganya dikgato tsa me mo lefokong la gago; a go se nne boikepo bope jo bo tlaa nnang le taolo mo go nna. 
Psalms119:134 Nthekolola mo patikong ya motho; jalo ke tlaa tlhokomela dikaelo tsa gago. 
Psalms119:135 Phatsimisetsa motlhanka wa gago sefatlhogo sa gago; o bo o nthute ditao tsa gago. 
Psalms119:136 Dinoka tsa metsi di ela mo matlhong a me, ka gobo ba sa tlhokomele molao wa gago. Tsade" 
Psalms119:137 O tshiamo, wena, Jehofa; le dikatlholo tsa gago di thokgame." 
Psalms119:138 Ditshupo tsa gago o di laotse mo tshiamong le boikanngo tota. 
Psalms119:139 Tlhoafalo ya me e njele ya mphetsa, gonne baganetsi ba me ba lebetse mafoko a gago." 
Psalms119:140 Lefoko la gago le itshekile thata; ke gone ka moo motlhanka wa gago o le ratang. 
Psalms119:141 Ke monnye, ke bile ke a nyatsega; le fa go ntse jalo ga ke lebale ditao tsa gago." 
Psalms119:142 Tshiamo ya gago ke tshiamo e e sa khutleng, le molao wa gago ke boammaaruri." 
Psalms119:143 phuduego e ntshwere, le tlalelo e e mahehe; le fa go ntse jalo ditaolo tsa gago ke natefelo ya me." 
Psalms119:144 Ditshupo tsa gago di tshiamo ka bosakhutleng; nnaya tlhaloganyo, mme ke tlaa tshela. Kof" 
Psalms119:145 Ke biditse ka pelo ya me yotlhe; nkaraba Jehofa; ke tlaa boloka ditao tsa gago. 
Psalms119:146 Ke bileditse koo go wena; mpoloka, mme ke tlaa tlhokomela ditshupo tsa gago." 
Psalms119:147 Ka raka mahube a moso, ka goa; ka solofela mo mafokong a gago." 
Psalms119:148 Matlho a me a ne a raka ditebeledi tsa bosigo, gore ke tle ke tlhatlhanye lefoko la gago." 
Psalms119:149 Utlwa lentswe la me ka fa bopelonoming jwa gago jwa lorato; o ntsitsibose Jehofa, ka fa dikatlholong tsa gago." 
Psalms119:150 Ba ba latelang boikepo ba a atamela; ba kgakala le molao wa gago. 
Psalms119:151 Wena o gaufi Jehofa; ditaolo tsotlhe tsa gago di boammaaruri. 
Psalms119:152 Ke sa le ke itse bogologolo ka ditshupo tsa gago, fa o di tlhometse bosakhutleng. Resh" 
Psalms119:153 Gopola patikego ya me, mme o nkgolole; gonne ga ke lebale molao wa gago." 
Psalms119:154 Mpuelela mo kgannyeng ya me, o bo o nthekolole; ntsitsibosa ka fa lefokong la gago." 
Psalms119:155 Poloko e kgakala le baikepi; gonne ga ba batle ditao tsa gago. 
Psalms119:156 Mautlwelobotlhoko a manana a gago a magolo, Jehofa; ntsitsibosa ka fa dikatlholong tsa gago." 
Psalms119:157 Ba bantsi babogisi ba me, le baganetsi ba me; le fa go ntse jalo ga ke a ngosela mo ditshupong tsa gago." 
Psalms119:158 Ke ne ka leba ba ba dirang ka koko, mme ka utlwa botlhoko ka ba sa tlhokomele lefoko la gago." 
Psalms119:159 A ko o gopole ka fa ke ratang dikaelo tsa gago ka gone; ntsitsibosa Jehofa, ka fa bopelonoming jwa gago jwa lorato." 
Psalms119:160 Tshobokano ya lefoko la gago ke boammaaruri; nngwe le nngwe ya dikatlholo tsa gago tse di siameng, e eme ka bosakhutleng. Shin" 
Psalms119:161 Dikgosana di mpogisitse ka bomo; mme pelo ya me e eme mo go sisimogeng lefoko la gago. 
Psalms119:162 Ke itumela ka lefoko la gago, jaaka motho yo o bonang thopo e kgolo." 
Psalms119:163 Ke ila maaka, a mphedisa pelo ruri; molao wa gago ke a o rata." 
Psalms119:164 Ke tle ke go bake gasupa ka letsatsi, ka ntlha ya dikatlholo tsa gago tse di siameng." 
Psalms119:165 Ba ba ratang molao wa gago ba na le kagiso e kgolo; ga ba na go kgopiwa gope. 
Psalms119:166 Jehofa, ke ntse ke solofetse poloka ya gago, mme ke dirile ditaolo tsa gago." 
Psalms119:167 Mowa wa me o tlhokometse ditshupo tsa gago; ke di rata segolo thata. 
Psalms119:168 Ke tlhokometse dikaelo tsa gago, le ditshupo tsa gago; gonne mekgwa yotlhe ya me e fa pele ga gago. Tau" 
Psalms119:169 A go goa ga me go atamele fa pele ga gago Jehofa; nnaya tlhaloganyo ka fa lefokong la gago. 
Psalms119:170 A mekokotlelo ya me e fitlhe fa pele ga gago; nkgolola ka fa lefokong la gago. 
Psalms119:171 A dipounama tsa me di bue pako; gonne o nthuta ditao tsa gago. 
Psalms119:172 A loleme lwa me lo opele lefoko la gago; gonne ditaolo tsotlhe tsa gago di tshiamo. 
Psalms119:173 A seatla sa gago se iketleeletse go nthusa; gonne ke itshenketse dikaelo tsa gago. 
Psalms119:174 Ke tlhologeletswe poloka ya gago, Jehofa; molao wa gago ke o o njesang monate." 
Psalms119:175 A mowa wa me o tshele, mme o tlaa go baka; le dikatlholo tsa gago di ntshuse." 
Psalms119:176 Ke timetse jaaka nku e e ileng le naga; batla motlhanka wa gago; gonne ga ke lebale ditaolo tsa gago. 
Psalms120:1 E rile ke le mo pitlaganong ka tlhaeleletsa kwa go Jehofa, mme a nkaraba." 
Psalms120:2 Jehofa, golola mowa wa me mo dipounameng tse di akang, le mo lolemeng lo lo boferefere." 
Psalms120:3 Wena loleme lo lo boferefere, o tlaa newa eng? Kgotsa o tlaa dirwa eng gape?" 
Psalms120:4 Metswi e e bogale ya ba ba dinatla, e na le magala a mokala." 
Psalms120:5 A bo go latlhega nna, ka ke jakile mo Mešeke, ka ke agile mo megopeng ya Ketare." 
Psalms120:6 Mowa wa me ga o bolo go aga le ene yo o ilang kagiso. 
Psalms120:7 Nna ke rata kagiso; mme fa ke bua, bone ba rata ntwa fela." 
Psalms121:1 Ke tlaa tsholeletsa matlho a me kwa dithabeng; thuso ya me e tlaa tswa kae? 
Psalms121:2 Thuso ya me e tswa kwa go Jehofa, yo o dirileng legodimo le lefatshe." 
Psalms121:3 Ga a ketla a leseletsa lonao lwa gago go tshikinyega; yo o go dibelang ga a ketla a otsela. 
Psalms121:4 Bona, yo o dibelang Iseraele ga a ketla a otsela, le fa e le go robala." 
Psalms121:5 Jehofa ke modibedi wa gago; Jehofa ke moriti wa gago ka fa ntlheng ya letsogo la gago le le siameng. 
Psalms121:6 Letsatsi ga le ketla le go tlhapela motshegare, le fa e le ngwedi bosigo." 
Psalms121:7 Jehofa o tlaa go dibela mo bosuleng; o tlaa dibela mowa wa gago. 
Psalms121:8 Jehofa o tlaa dibela go tswa ga gago le go tsena ga gago, go tloga fano gompieno le go ya bosakhutleng." 
Psalms122:1 E rile ba nthaya ba re: “A re yeng kwa ntlong ya ga Jehofa,” ka itumela." 
Psalms122:2 Dinao tsa rona di eme mo teng ga dikgoro tsa gago, wena Jerusalema;" 
Psalms122:3 Jerusalema, o agilwe jaaka motse o o kitlanyeng;" 
Psalms122:4 kwa ditso di tlhatlogelang gone, e bong ditso tsa ga Jehofa, go nna tshupo mo go Iseraele, go ntshetsa leina la ga Jehofa malebogo." 
Psalms122:5 Gonne ditulo tsa bogosi tsa katlholelo di beilwe gone, e bong ditulo tsa bogosi tsa ntlo ya ga Dafite." 
Psalms122:6 Rapelelang kagiso ya Jerusalema: “Ba ba go ratang ba tlaa tlhogonolofala. 
Psalms122:7 A go nne kagiso mo teng ga dithako tsa gago, le go tlhogonolofala mo teng ga matlo a gago a dikgosi.”" 
Psalms122:8 Ka ntlha ya bana ba ga rre le bankana ba me, ke tlaa bua jaana ke re: “Kagiso e nne mo teng ga gago.”" 
Psalms122:9 Ka ntlha ya ntlo ya ga Jehofa, Modimo wa rona, ke tlaa go batlela se se molemo." 
Psalms123:1 Ke tsholeletsa matlho a me kwa go wena, wena yo o dutseng mo magodimong." 
Psalms123:2 Bonang, jaaka matlho a batlhanka a tle a lebe seatla sa mong wa bone; jaaka matlho a lelata a tle a lebe seatla sa mohumagadi wa lone; jalo matlho a rona a leba Jehofa Modimo wa rona, a ba a tle a re utlwele botlhoko." 
Psalms123:3 Re utlwele botlhoko, Jehofa, re utlwele botlhoko; gonne re tladitswe lonyatso mo go feteletseng." 
Psalms123:4 Mowa wa rona o tladitswe mo go feteletseng ka lesotlo la ba ba iketlileng fela, le ka lonyatso lwa ba ba pelompe fela." 
Psalms124:1 Fa e ka bo e se Jehofa yo o neng a le ntlheng ya rona, a Iseraele a bue jaana a re:" 
Psalms124:2 “Fa e ka bo e se Jehofa, yo e rileng batho ba re tsogologela a bo a le ntlheng ya rona;" 
Psalms124:3 ba ka bo ba re komeditse re sa ntse re utlwa, jale ka kgakalo ya bone e re tuketse." 
Psalms124:4 Foo metsi a ka bo a re phikametse, noka e ka bo e hupeditse mowa wa rona." 
Psalms124:5 Foo metsi a a kokomogileng a ka bo a hupeditse mowa wa rona.” 
Psalms124:6 A go bakwe Jehofa yo o se kang a re tsenya jaaka thopo mo menong a bone. 
Psalms124:7 Mowa wa rona o falotse jaaka nonyane mo mutlwaneng wa bathai; mutlwane o kgaogile, mme re falotse." 
Psalms124:8 Thuso ya rona e mo ineng la ga Jehofa, yo o dirileng legodimo le lefatshe." 
Psalms125:1 Bone ba ba ikantseng Jehofa, ba ntse jaaka thaba ya Sione e e sa ka keng ya tshikinngwa, mme e nnetse ruri ka bosakhutleng." 
Psalms125:2 Jaaka dithaba di dikanyeditse Jerusalema, Jehofa o dikanyeditse batho ba gagwe jalo go tloga fano gompieno go ya bosakhutleng." 
Psalms125:3 Gonne thobane ya bogosi ya boikepo ga e ketla e nna mo kabelong ya basiami; gore basiami ba se ka ba otlololela diatla tsa bone kwa boikepong. 
Psalms125:4 Jehofa, ba ba molemo, a o ko o ba direle molemo, le ba ba dipelo di thokgameng." 
Psalms125:5 Ka ga ba ba fapogelang kwa mekgweng ya bone e e kgopameng, Jehofa o tlaa ba gogela koo le badiri ba boikepo. Kagiso a e nne le Iseraele." 
Psalms126:1 E rile Jehofa a ba a busa botshwaro jwa Sione, ra nna jaaka ba ba lorang." 
Psalms126:2 Foo molomo wa rona wa tlala setshego, le loleme lwa rona lwa tlala go opela; foo ba bua mo merafeng, ba re: “Jehofa o ba diretse dilo tse dikgolo.”" 
Psalms126:3 Jehofa o re diretse dilo tse dikgolo, tse re di itumelelang." 
Psalms126:4 Ba o buse botshwaro jwa rona, Jehofa, jaaka dinokana tsa kwa Borwa." 
Psalms126:5 Ba ba jalang ka dikeledi ba tlaa roba ka boitumelo. 
Psalms126:6 Le fa motho a ka tswa a tsamaya a ntse a lela, mme a tshotse peo, o tlaa ba a tla gape, dingata tsa gagwe a na natso." 
Psalms127:1 Fa Jehofa a sa age ntlo, ba ba e agang ba direla lefela; fa Jehofa a sa dise motse, molebedi o tsogela lefela fela." 
Psalms127:2 Ke lefela fela mo go lona fa lo tsoga ka maphakela, lo ba lo ya go robala go le bosigo thata, lo ba lo ja dijo tsa letsapa; gonne o naya baratwana ba gagwe boroko jalo." 
Psalms127:3 Bona, bana ke boswa jwa Jehofa; le loungo lwa sebopelo ke tuelo ya gagwe." 
Psalms127:4 Jaaka metswi mo seatleng sa monna yo o senatla, banna ba bokau ba ntse jalo." 
Psalms127:5 Go sego monna yo mokotlopo wa gagwe o ba tletseng; ba tlaa re ba bua le baba fa kgorong, ba se ke ba tlhajwe ke ditlhong." 
Psalms128:1 Go sego mongwe le mongwe yo o boifang Jehofa, yo o tsamayang mo ditseleng tsa gagwe." 
Psalms128:2 Gonne o tlaa ja tiro ya diatla tsa gago; o tlaa segofala, mme go tlaa nna sentle nao." 
Psalms128:3 Mosadi wa gago o tlaa nna jaaka mofine o o ungwang thata mo tengteng ga ntlo ya gago; bana ba gago ba tlaa nna jaaka matswela a motlhware, ba dikanyetsa lomati lwa bojelo lwa gago." 
Psalms128:4 O bo o bone gore monna yo o boifang Jehofa o tlaa segofadiwa jalo. 
Psalms128:5 Jehofa o tlaa go segofatsa a le mo Sione; mme o tlaa bona molemo wa Jerusalema ka malatsi otlhe a botshelo jwa gago. 
Psalms128:6 Ee, o tlaa bona bana ba bana ba gago. A kagiso e nne mo go Iseraele." 
Psalms129:1 A Iseraele a bue jaana, a re: “Ba sa le ba ntlhokofatsa gantsintsi, le mo bokaung jwa me go tla nakong eno;" 
Psalms129:2 ba sa le ba ntlhokofatsa gantsintsi mo bokaung jwa me go tla nakong eno; le fa go ntse jalo ga ba ise ba mphenye. 
Psalms129:3 Balemi ba lemile mokotla wa me; ba lelefatsa meralo ya bone.” 
Psalms129:4 Jehofa o tshiamo, o kgaotse dikgole tsa baikepi." 
Psalms129:5 Botlhe ba ba ilang Sione a ba tlhajwe ke ditlhong, mme ba busediwe kwa morago." 
Psalms129:6 A ba nne jaaka bojang jo bo mo godimo ga matlo, jo bo omelelang bo ise bo gole;" 
Psalms129:7 jo mokgetli o sa tlatseng seatla sa gagwe ka jone, le yo o bofang dingata o sa tlatseng sehuba ka jone;" 
Psalms129:8 le ba ba fetang ga ba ke ba bua ba re: “Tshegofatso ya ga Jehofa e nne mo go lona; re lo segofatsa mo ineng la Jehofa.” 
Psalms130:1 Ke rile ke le mo matennyeng ka goela koo go wena Jehofa. 
Psalms130:2 Morena, utlwa lentswe la me; a ditsebe tsa gago di akele lentswe la mekokotlelo ya me." 
Psalms130:3 Jehofa, fa o ka bo o ne wa lotolotsa maikepo, go ka bo go ema mang, Morena?" 
Psalms130:4 Go na le boitshwarelo mo go wena, gore o tle o boifiwe." 
Psalms130:5 Ke lebeletse Jehofa, mowa wa me o lebeletse fela, mme ke solofetse mo lefokong la gagwe." 
Psalms130:6 Mowa wa me o lebeletse Morena bogolo go fa balebedi ba lebelela mahube a moso; ee, bogolo go balebedi ba mahube a moso." 
Psalms130:7 Iseraele, solofela mo go Jehofa; gonne mo go Jehofa go na le boutlwelobotlhoko; e bile mo go ene go na le thekololo e e letlotlo fela." 
Psalms130:8 O tlaa rekolola Iseraele mo maikepong otlhe a gagwe. 
Psalms131:1 Jehofa, pelo ya me ga e a ipega, le matlho a me ga a kalega; le gone ga nke ke tsena mo mafokong a matona, le fa e le mo dilong tse di ntshitang." 
Psalms131:2 Ruri ke ikgaoditse ke ritibaditse mowa wa me; jaaka ngwanyana yo o kgwisiwang a na le mmaagwe, mowa wa me o ntse le nna jaaka ngwanyana yo o kgwisiwang." 
Psalms131:3 Iseraele, o tle o solofele mo go Jehofa, go tloga fano gompieno go ya bosakhutleng." 
Psalms132:1 Jehofa, o gopolele Dafite patiko yotlhe ya gagwe;" 
Psalms132:2 jaaka a ne a ikanela Jehofa, a ikanela Mothata wa ga Jakobe, a re:" 
Psalms132:3 “Ruri ga nketla ke tsena mo mogopeng wa ntlo ya me, le fa e le go ya mo bolaong jwa me;" 
Psalms132:4 ga nketla ke naya matlho a me boroko, le fa e le dintshi tsa me go bokalala;" 
Psalms132:5 go bo go tsamaye ke bonele Jehofa bonno, ke bonele Mothata wa ga Jakobe motlaagana.”" 
Psalms132:6 Bonang, re go utlwaletse kwa Eferatha; ra go fitlhela kwa nageng ya Jaare." 
Psalms132:7 “Re tlaa tsena mo metlaaganeng ya gagwe; re tlaa obama fa sebeong sa dinao tsa gagwe. 
Psalms132:8 Jehofa, a ko o tsogele mo bonnong jwa boikhutso jwa gago; wena le letlole la thata ya gago." 
Psalms132:9 A baperesiti ba gago ba apesiwe tshiamo; a baitshepi ba gago ba duduetse ka boitumelo.” 
Psalms132:10 Ka ntlha ya ga Dafite motlhanka wa gago, o se ka wa hulatsha sefatlhogo sa motlodiwa wa gago." 
Psalms132:11 Jehofa o ikanetse Dafite ka boammaaruri; ga a ketla a bo tlhanogela a re: “Ke tlaa nnisa loungo lwa mmele wa gago mo setulong sa gago sa bogosi. 
Psalms132:12 E tlaa re fa bana ba gago ba boloka kgolagano ya me, le tshupo ya me e ke tlaa e ba rutang, bana ba bone le bone, ba tlaa nna mo setulong sa gago sa bogosi ka bosakhutleng.”" 
Psalms132:13 Gonne Jehofa o ikgethetse Sione; o go eleleditse go nna boago jwa gagwe. A re: 
Psalms132:14 “Fa, ke jone bonno jwa boikhutso jwa me ka bosakhutleng; fa, ke gone fa ke tlaa nnang gone, gonne ke go eleditse." 
Psalms132:15 Ke tlaa segofatsa dijo tsa gagwe tsa dibolokelo thatathata; ke tlaa kgorisa bahumanegi ba gagwe ka dijo. 
Psalms132:16 Baperesiti ba gagwe le bone, ke tlaa ba apesa poloko; baitshepi ba gagwe ba tlaa duduetsa thata ka boitumelo." 
Psalms132:17 Ke tlaa kukuntsha lonaka lwa ga Dafite gone; ke baakanyeditse motlodiwa wa me lobone. 
Psalms132:18 Baba ba gagwe ke tlaa ba apesa ditlhong; mo go ene ka esi, serwalo sa gagwe sa bogosi se tlaa galalela.”" 
Psalms133:1 Bonang, go molemo jang, go monate jang, fa bana ba monna ba aga mmogo ka pelo nngwe fela." 
Psalms133:2 Go tshwana jaaka lookwane lo lo tlhokegang lo le mo tlhogong, lwa repelelela le kwa ditedung, e bong ditedu tsa ga Arone; lwa ba lwa fologela le kwa dipeeleding tsa diaparo tsa gagwe;" 
Psalms133:3 go tshwana jaaka monyo wa Heremone, o o fologelang mo dithabeng tsa Sione; gonne Jehofa o laoletse tshegofatso gone, e bong botshelo ka bosakhutleng." 
Psalms134:1 Bonang, lo bakeng Jehofa, lona lotlhe batlhanka ba ga Jehofa, ba e a reng bosigo lo bo lo eme mo ntlong ya Jehofa." 
Psalms134:2 Tsholeletsang diatla tsa lona kwa felong ga boitshepo, mme lo bake Jehofa." 
Psalms134:3 A Jehofa a go segofatse a le mo Sione; e bong ene yo o dirileng legodimo le lefatshe. 
Psalms135:1 Bakang Jehofa; lo bakeng leina la ga Jehofa; lo mmakeng lona batlhanka ba ga Jehofa; 
Psalms135:2 lona ba lo emang mo ntlong ya Jehofa, mo malwapeng a ntlo ya Modimo wa rona." 
Psalms135:3 Lo bakeng Jehofa; gonne Jehofa o molemo; opelelang leina la gagwe dipako; gonne go monate. 
Psalms135:4 Gonne Jehofa o ikgethetse Jakobe go nna wa gagwe ka sebele, le Iseraele go nna khumo ya gagwe e e tlhophegileng." 
Psalms135:5 Gonne ke a itse fa Jehofa a le mogolo, le go re Jehofa wa rona o godimo ga medimo yotlhe." 
Psalms135:6 Sengwe le sengwe se Jehofa o se ratileng o dirile sone fela, kwa legodimong le mo lefatsheng, mo mawatleng le mo mafelong a a boteng otlhe fela." 
Psalms135:7 O tle a tlhatlose mouwane kwa dikhutlong tsa lefatshe; a direle pula dikgadima; a ntshe phefo mo dibolokelong tsa gagwe. 
Psalms135:8 Ke yo o na a itaya matsalwapele a Egepeto, a motho le a kgomo." 
Psalms135:9 O ne a baya ditshupo le dikgakgamatso mo gare ga gago Egepeto, mo go Faro, le mo batlhankeng ba gagwe botlhe fela." 
Psalms135:10 Yo o ne a itaya merafe e le mentsi, a bolaya dikgosi tse di thata:" 
Psalms135:11 Sihone kgosi ya Baamore, le Oge kgosi ya Bašane, le magosi otlhe a Kanana;" 
Psalms135:12 a aba lefatshe la bone go nna boswa, boswa jwa ga Iseraele, tšhaba ya gagwe." 
Psalms135:13 Leina la gago, Jehofa, le eme ka bosakhutleng; segopodiso sa gago, Jehofa, se ntse mo tshikatshikeng tsotlhe fela." 
Psalms135:14 Gonne Jehofa o tlaa atlhola batho ba gagwe, mme o tlaa ikwatlhaya ka ga batlhanka ba gagwe." 
Psalms135:15 Medimo ya disetwa ya merafe ke selefera le gouta, tiro ya diatla tsa batho." 
Psalms135:16 E na le melomo, mme ga e bue; e na le matlho, mme ga e bone;" 
Psalms135:17 e na le ditsebe, mme ga e utlwe; mme le gone ga go na mowa mo melomong ya yone." 
Psalms135:18 Ba ba e dirang ba tlaa tshwana nayo fela; ee, mongwe le mongwe yo o e ikanyang." 
Psalms135:19 Lona ba ntlo ya ga Iseraele, bakang Jehofa; lona ba ntlo ya ga Arone, bakang Jehofa;" 
Psalms135:20 lona ba ntlo ya ga Lefi, bakang Jehofa; lona ba lo boifang Jehofa, lo bakeng Jehofa." 
Psalms135:21 A go bakwe Jehofa mo Sione, yo o agileng kwa Jerusalema. Bakang Jehofa." 
Psalms136:1 A ko lo ntshetseng Jehofa malebogo; gonne o molemo; gonne boutlwelobotlhoko jwa gagwe bo eme ka bosakhutleng. 
Psalms136:2 A ko lo ntshetseng Modimo wa medimo malebogo; gonne boutlwelobotlhoko jwa gagwe bo eme ka bosakhutleng. 
Psalms136:3 A ko lo ntshetseng Morena wa barena malebogo; gonne boutlwelobotlhoko jwa gagwe bo eme ka bosakhutleng. 
Psalms136:4 Ene yo o dirang dikgakgamatso a le esi; gonne boutlwelobotlhoko jwa gagwe bo eme ka bosakhutleng. 
Psalms136:5 Ene yo o dirileng magodimo ka tlhaloganyo; gonne boutlwelobotlhoko jwa gagwe bo eme ka bosakhutleng. 
Psalms136:6 Ene yo o phutholotseng lefatshe mo godimo ga metsi; gonne boutlwelobotlhoko jwa gagwe bo eme ka bosakhutleng. 
Psalms136:7 Ene yo o dirileng masedi a magolo; gonne boutlwelobotlhoko jwa gagwe bo eme ka bosakhutleng. 
Psalms136:8 Letsatsi, gore le laole motshegare; gonne boutlwelobotlhoko jwa gagwe bo eme ka bosakhutleng." 
Psalms136:9 Kgwedi le dinaledi gore di laole bosigo; gonne boutlwelobotlhoko jwa gagwe bo eme ka bosakhutleng. 
Psalms136:10 Ene yo o iteileng Egepeto ka lotsalwapele lwa bone; gonne boutlwelobotlhoko jwa gagwe bo eme ka bosakhutleng. 
Psalms136:11 A ntsha Iseraele mo gare ga bone; gonne boutlwelobotlhoko jwa gagwe bo eme ka bosakhutleng. 
Psalms136:12 ka seatla se se thata, le ka letsogo le le otlologileng; gonne boutlwelobotlhoko jwa gagwe bo eme ka bosakhutleng." 
Psalms136:13 Ene yo o neng a kgaoganya Lewatle le Lehibidu fa gare; gonne boutlwelobotlhoko jwa gagwe bo eme ka bosakhutleng. 
Psalms136:14 A tlolagantsha Iseraele fa gare ga lone; gonne boutlwelobotlhoko jwa gagwe bo eme ka bosakhutleng. 
Psalms136:15 A ribegetsa Faro le ntwa ya gagwe mo Lewatleng le Lehibidu; gonne boutlwelobotlhoko jwa gagwe bo ema ka bosakhutleng. 
Psalms136:16 Ene yo o neng a goga batho ba gagwe a ba ralatsa naga fela; gonne boutlwelobotlhoko jwa gagwe bo eme ka bosakhutleng. 
Psalms136:17 Ene yo o neng a itaya dikgosi tse dikgolo; gonne boutlwelobotlhoko jwa gagwe bo eme ka bosakhutleng. 
Psalms136:18 A bolaya dikgosi tse di tumileng; gonne boutlwelobotlhoko jwa gagwe bo eme ka bosakhutleng. 
Psalms136:19 Sihone, kgosi ya Baamora; gonne boutlwelobotlhoko jwa gagwe bo eme ka bosakhutleng." 
Psalms136:20 Le Oge, kgosi ya Bašane; gonne boutlwelobotlhoko jwa gagwe bo eme ka bosakhutleng." 
Psalms136:21 A aba lefatshe la bone go nna boswa; gonne boutlwelobotlhoko jwa gagwe bo eme ka bosakhutleng. 
Psalms136:22 E bong boswa jwa ga Iseraele, motlhanka wa gagwe; gonne boutlwelobotlhoko jwa gagwe bo eme ka bosakhutleng." 
Psalms136:23 Ene yo o re gopotseng re phophoregetswe; gonne boutlwelobotlhoko jwa gagwe bo eme ka bosakhutleng. 
Psalms136:24 O bile o re golotse mo baganetsing ba rona; gonne boutwelobotlhoko jwa gagwe bo eme ka bosakhutleng. 
Psalms136:25 O fa dilo tsotlhe dijo; gonne boutlwelobotlhoko jwa gagwe bo eme ka bosakhutleng. 
Psalms136:26 A ko lo ntshetseng Modimo wa legodimo malebogo; gonne boutlwelobotlhoko jwa one bo eme ka bosakhutleng. 
Psalms137:1 E rile re le fa dinokeng tsa Babilone, ra dula gone, ee, ra lela, ka re gakologelwa Sione." 
Psalms137:2 Ra pega diharepe tsa rona mo madubunokeng a a fa gare ga tsone. 
Psalms137:3 Gonne ba ba re isitseng gone re le ditshwarwa ba re: Re opele; le ba ba re swafaditseng ba re raya ba re: Re dire mokete; ba re: “Re opelele sengwe sa difela tsa Sione.” 
Psalms137:4 Kana, re ka opela jang sefela sa ga Jehofa mo lefatsheng la seeng?" 
Psalms137:5 A e re fa nka go lebala, wena Jerusalema, a seatla sa me se segolo se lebale maatlametlo a sone." 
Psalms137:6 A loleme lwa me lo ngaparele magalapa a me, fa ke sa go gopole, fa ke sa godise Jerusalema godimo ga boitumelo jwa me jo bogolo." 
Psalms137:7 Jehofa, a ko o gopole motlha wa Jerusalema, o sekise bana ba Etome ka ga one, ba ba rileng: “O rutleng, o rutleleng go fitlha kwa motheong wa one.”" 
Psalms137:8 Ao! Wena morwadia Babilone, o na le go senngwa fela; go tlaa nna sego ene yo o tlaa go duelang fela jaaka o diretse rona." 
Psalms137:9 Go tlaa nna sego ene yo o tlaa tsayang dirathana tsa gago a di phatlakanya mo lefikeng. 
Psalms138:1 Ke tlaa go ntshetsa malebogo ka pelo yotlhe ya me; fa pele ga medimo ke tlaa go opelela dipako. 
Psalms138:2 Ke tlaa obama ke lebile tempele ya gago e e boitshepo, ke tlaa ntshetsa leina la gago malebogo ka ntlha ya mapelonomi a gago a lorato, le ka ntlha ya boammaaruri jwa gago; gonne o godiseditse lefoko la gago godimo ga leina la gago lotlhe fela." 
Psalms138:3 E rile mo letsatsing le ke biditseng ka lone, wa nkaraba, wa nnonofisa ka thata mo moeng wa me." 
Psalms138:4 Dikgosi tsotlhe tsa lefatshe di tlaa go ntshetsa malebogo, Jehofa, gonne di utlwile mafoko a molomo wa gago." 
Psalms138:5 Ee, di tlaa opela ka ga ditsela tsa ga Jehofa; gonne kgalelelo ya ga Jehofa e kgolo." 
Psalms138:6 Gonne le fa Jehofa a le godimo, le fa go ntse jalo, o tsaya tsia bangotlegi; mme baipegi o ba itsetse kgakala fela." 
Psalms138:7 Le fa ke tsamaya mo gare ga tlalelo, o tlaa nthudisa; kgakalo ya baba ba me o tlaa e otlololela letsogo la gago, le seatla sa gago se segolo se tlaa mpoloka." 
Psalms138:8 Jehofa o tlaa ntshweletsa se se leng ka ga me; boutlwelobotlhoko jwa gago, Jehofa, bo eme ka bosakhutleng; se tlhoboge ditiro tse e leng tsa diatla tsa gago tota." 
Psalms139:1 Jehofa, o mphukuditse, mme o nkitsile." 
Psalms139:2 O itse go dula ga me la go nanoga ga me, o tlhaloganyetsa mogopolo wa me kwa kgakala." 
Psalms139:3 O hukutsa tselana ya me le go rapama ga me, mme o tlwaetse mekgwa ya me yotlhe fela." 
Psalms139:4 Gonne ga go na lefoko lepe mo lolemeng lwa me, fa e se gore, Jehofa o le itse lotlhe fela." 
Psalms139:5 O mpotile kwa morago le kwa pele, o beile seatla sa gago mo go nna." 
Psalms139:6 Kitso e e ntseng jalo e nkgakgamatsa bobe; e kwa godimo, ga ke ka ke ka fitlha kwa go yone." 
Psalms139:7 Kana ke ka bo ke ka ya kae ke tlogela mowa wa gago? Kgotsa sebonalo sa gago nka se tshabela kwa kae? 
Psalms139:8 Fa ke tlhatlogela kwa legodimong, o bo o le gone; fa ke ala phate ya me mo Bobipong, bona, o bo o le gone fela." 
Psalms139:9 Fa ke tsaya diphuka tsa moso, ke ba ke aga kwa tengteng ga dikhutlo tsa lewatle." 
Psalms139:10 Le gone seatla sa gago se tlaa bo se nkgoga, le seatla sa gago se segolo se tlaa ntshwara." 
Psalms139:11 Fa ke re: “Ruri lefifi le tlaa mpipa, le lesedi le le ntikologileng le tlaa nna bosigo.”" 
Psalms139:12 Le e leng lefifi ga le go bipele sepe; mme bosigo bo phatsima jaaka motshegare; lefifi le lesedi ke mo go tshwanang fela mo go wena. 
Psalms139:13 Gonne o bopile diphilo tsa me; wa mpipa ke le mo sebopelong sa ga mme. 
Psalms139:14 Ke tlaa go ntshetsa malebogo; gonne ke dirilwe ka mo go boitshegang le ka mo go gakgamatsang; di a gakgamatsa, ditiro tsa gago; mme goo mo, mowa wa me o a go itse sentle." 
Psalms139:15 Popego ya me ga e a ka ya go fitlhegela jale ka ke dirwa mo bosaitsiweng, ka ke bopiwa ka maatlametlo kwa tlasetlase ga lefatshe." 
Psalms139:16 Matlho a gago a ne a bona go nna ga me ke ise ke bopege, mme mo lokwalong lwa gago go ne go kwadilwe ditokololo tsotlhe tsa me, tse di neng di ntse di bopiwa ka letsatsi le letsatsi, le mororo go ise go nne epe ya tsone." 
Psalms139:17 Le gone, Modimo, megopolo ya gago e ratega jang mo go nna! Fa e sopaanye, e a bo e le kgolo jang!" 
Psalms139:18 Fa nka bo ke e bala, e a bo e le mentsi thata, go feta palo ya mošawa; e a re ke kubuga ke be ke ntse ke na nao fela." 
Psalms139:19 Ruri, o tlaa bolaya baikepi, Modimo; ke gone ntlogelang, lona batho ba lo nyorelwang madi a batho." 
Psalms139:20 Gonne ba bua maswe ka ga gago, le baba ba gago ba umakela leina la gago lefela." 
Psalms139:21 Jehofa, a ga ke ile bone ba ba go ilang? A ga ke a tlhokofadiwa ke ba ba go tsogologelang?" 
Psalms139:22 Ke a ba ila ka kilo e tona thata; ke ba kaya e le baba ba me. 
Psalms139:23 Modimo, a ko o mphukutse, o bo o itse pelo ya me; nteka, mme o itse megopolo ya me;" 
Psalms139:24 o bone fa go na le mokgwa mongwe wa boikepo mo go nna; mme o nkgoge mo tseleng e e sa khutleng. 
Psalms140:1 Jehofa, a ko o nkgolole mo mothong yo o bosula; ntibela mo mothong yo o thubakang." 
Psalms140:2 Ba ba tlhatlhanyang bosenyi mo pelong tsa bone; ba tlhola ba ntse ba phuthegela ntwa ka gale. 
Psalms140:3 Ba looditse loleme lwa bone jaaka noga; botlhoko jwa šaušawane bo ka fa tlase ga dipounama tsa bone. Sela. 
Psalms140:4 Jehofa, mpoloka mo diatleng tsa baikepi; ntibela mo mothong yo o thubakang; ba ba ikaeletseng gore ba tlaa faposa dikgato tsa me." 
Psalms140:5 Bapelompe ba ntshubetse mutlwane le megala; ba adile lotloa ka fa tseleng; ba nthaetse ka diru. Sela. 
Psalms140:6 Ka raya Jehofa ka re: “O Modimo wa me;” sekegela lentswe la mekokotlelo ya me tsebe, Jehofa." 
Psalms140:7 Modimo Morena, thata ya poloko ya me, o khurumeditse tlhogo ya me mo letsatsing la tlhabano." 
Psalms140:8 Jehofa o se ka wa naya moikepi dikeletso tsa gagwe; o se ka wa tsweleletsa pele maano a gagwe a bosula; ba ka tla ba ikgodisa. Sela. 
Psalms140:9 Ka ga tlhogo ya ba ba ntikanyetsang, a bosenyi jwa dipounama tsa bone bo ba bipe." 
Psalms140:10 A magala a a tukang a wele mo go bone; a ba latlhelwe mo molelong; mo mekoleng e e boteng, gore ba se ka ba tlhola ba tsoga." 
Psalms140:11 Motho yo o buang bosula ga a ketla a tlhomamisiwa mo lefatsheng; bosula bo tlaa tsoma yo o thubakang go mo ribegetsa. 
Psalms140:12 Ke a itse fa Jehofa a tlaa emela kgang ya yo o patikwang, le tshiamo ya motlhoki." 
Psalms140:13 Ruri mosiami o tlaa ntshetsa leina la gago malebogo; mothokgami o tlaa aga fa pele ga gago. 
Psalms141:1 Jehofa, ke goetse koo go wena; a ko o nkakofele; sekegela lentswe la me tsebe mogang ke go bitsang." 
Psalms141:2 A morapelo wa me o rangwe fa pele ga gago jaaka maswalo; go tsholediwa ga diatla tsa me e nne jaaka setlhabelo sa maitsebowa. 
Psalms141:3 Jehofa a ko o beye tebelo fa pele ga molomo wa me; disa setswalo sa dipounama tsa me. 
Psalms141:4 O se ka wa sokololela pelo ya me kwa go sepe se se bosula go tla e dira ditiro tsa tshiamololo le banna ba ba dirang boikepo; mme a nke ke se ka ka akola nabo ka tse di metsegang tsa bone. 
Psalms141:5 A mosiami a ntiteye, e tlaa bo e le pelonomi fela; a nkomanye, e tlaa bo e le jaaka fa lookwane lo thelwa mo tlhogong ya me; a tlhogo ya me e se lo gane; gonne le mo boikepong jwa bone, morapelo wa me o tlaa tswelelela pele fela." 
Psalms141:6 Fa baatlhodi ba bone ba digelwa ka fa mapaweng, ba tlaa utlwa mafoko a me fa a le monate." 
Psalms141:7 Jaaka fa motho a lema a fatola mmu, marapo a rona a gasame fa mojakong wa phupu." 
Psalms141:8 Gonne matlho a me a koo go wena Modimo, Morena; ke ikanya mo go wena; se tlogele mowa wa me o iphotlhere fela." 
Psalms141:9 Ntibela mo mutlwaneng o ba o mpeetseng, le mo dirung tsa ba ba dirang boikepo." 
Psalms141:10 A baikepi ba wele mo ditloeng tsa bone ka bosi, ka nna ke falola fela ba le foo." 
Psalms142:1 Ke tlhaeleletsa kwa go Jehofa ka lentswe la me; ke isa mokokotlelo kwa go Jehofa ka lentswe la me. 
Psalms142:2 Ke gorometsa boitoko jwa me fa pele ga gagwe; ke supa tlalelo ya me fa pele ga gagwe. 
Psalms142:3 E rile mowa wa me o phikame mo teng ga me, wa bo o itse tsela ya me fela. Mo tseleng e ke tsamayang mo go yone ba ntshubetse mutlwane." 
Psalms142:4 Leba ka fa ntlheng ya letsogo la me le legolo, mme o bone; gone ga go na ope yo o nkitseng; ke tlhaetswe ke botshabelo; ga go motho ope yo o dirang sepe ka mowa wa me." 
Psalms142:5 Ke ne ka tlhaeleletsa koo go wena, Jehofa, ka re: “O botshabelo jwa me, le kabelo ya me, mo lefatsheng la batshedi.”" 
Psalms142:6 Ela go goa ga me tlhoko, gonne ke ngotlilwe thata; nkgolola mo babogising ba me; gonne ba thata bogolo go nna." 
Psalms142:7 Ntsha mowa wa me mo ntlong ya kgolegelo, gore ke ntshetse leina la gago malebogo; basiami ba tlaa ntikanyeletsa; gonne o tlaa ntirela sentle ka pelo mo go feteletseng." 
Psalms143:1 Utlwa morapelo wa me Jehofa; sekegela mekokotlelo ya me tsebe; o nkarabe mo boikanngong jwa gago, le mo tshiamong ya gago." 
Psalms143:2 O se ka wa seka le motlhanka wa gago; gonne mo ponong ya gago ga go na motshedi ope yo o ka nnang tshiamo. 
Psalms143:3 Gonne mmaba o bogisitse mowa wa me; o thubanyeditse botshelo jwa me fa fatshe; o mpatiketse go aga mo mafelong a lefifi jaaka ba ba sa bolong go swa. 
Psalms143:4 Ke gone ka moo mowa wa me o phikameng mo teng ga me; pelo ya me e swafetse mo teng ga me. 
Psalms143:5 Ke gakologelwa metlha ya bogologolo; ke akanya go dira ga gago; ke tlhatlhanya ditiro tsa diatla tsa gago. 
Psalms143:6 Ke otlololela diatla tsa me kwa go wena; mowa wa me o go nyorelwa jaaka lefatshe le le kgalegileng. 
Psalms143:7 Jehofa, akofa o nkarabe; mowa wa me o a fela; se mphitlhele sefatlhogo sa gago; nka tla ka nna jaaka ba ba fologelang mo moleteng." 
Psalms143:8 Nkutlwisa bopelonomi jwa gago jwa lorato mo mosong; gonne ke ikanya mo go wena; nkitsise tsela e ke tshwanetseng go tsamaya mo go yone; gonne ke tsholeletsa mowa wa me koo go wena. 
Psalms143:9 Jehofa, nkgolola mo babeng ba me; ke tshabela koo go wena gore o mphitlhe." 
Psalms143:10 O nthute go dira go rata ga gago; gonne o Modimo wa me; mowa wa gago o molemo; o nkgoge mo lefatsheng la thokgamo. 
Psalms143:11 Ntsitsibosa, Jehofa, ka ntlha ya leina la gago; mo tshiamong ya gago o ntshe mowa wa me mo tlalelong." 
Psalms143:12 Mo bopelonoming jwa gago jwa lorato o bo o kgaole botlhe ba ba patikang mowa wa me; gonne ke motlhanka wa gago. 
Psalms144:1 A go bakwe Jehofa, lefika la me, yo o rutang diatla tsa me go dira ntwa, le menwana ya me go tlhabana." 
Psalms144:2 Bopelonomi jwa me jwa lorato, le kago ya me ya phemelo; kago e e godileng thata ya me ya phemelo le mogolodi wa me; thebe ya me e bile ke ene yo ke mo ikanyang; yo o fenyetsang batho ba me kwa tlase ga me." 
Psalms144:3 Jehofa, kana motho e be e le eng fa e bo ne ne o mo tlhokometse jaana? Le morwa motho fa e bo ne ne o mo kaya e le sengwe jaana?" 
Psalms144:4 Motho o ntse jaaka lefela fela; malatsi a gagwe a ntse jaaka moriti o o fetelang koo. 
Psalms144:5 Jehofa, oba magodimo a gago, mme o fologe, ama dithaba, mme di tlaa kua mosi." 
Psalms144:6 Gadimisa dikgadima, o ba phatlalatse; ntsha metswi ya gago, o ba alole." 
Psalms144:7 Otlolola seatla sa gago o le koo godimo; mphamola, o ntshwatole mo metsing a magolo, mo seatleng sa baeng;" 
Psalms144:8 ba melomo ya bone e buang boithamako; le seatla sa bone se se siameng ke seatla se se siameng sa maaka. 
Psalms144:9 Modimo, ke tlaa go opelela sefela se seša; ke tlaa go opelela dipako ka seletso se se megala e le some." 
Psalms144:10 Ke one o o nayang dikgosi poloko; o o falodisang Dafite, motlhanka wa one mo tšhakeng e e utlwisang botlhoko." 
Psalms144:11 Mphalodisa, o nkgolole mo seatleng sa baeng ba molomo wa bone o buang boithamako, ba seatla sa bone se se siameng e leng seatla se se siameng sa maaka." 
Psalms144:12 E tlaa re bomorwaa rona ba nna jaaka ditlhatshana tse di godileng mo bokaung jwa bone; le bomorwadia rona ba nna jaaka maje a kgokgotsho, a a betlilweng ka fa mokgweng wa ntlo ya segosi;" 
Psalms144:13 e tlaa re matlo a rona a polokelo a tletse, go fitlhelwa dithoto di le methalethale mo go one; le manku a rona a tsala makgolokgolo mo mebileng ya rona;" 
Psalms144:14 e tlaa re dipelesa tsa rona di belesitse thata; e tlaa re go tlhagela mo teng le go thobela kwa ntle go seyo, mme go se na legalo mo mebileng ya rona;" 
Psalms144:15 go bo go le sego tšhaba e e mo boemong jo bo ntseng jalo; ee, go sego tšhaba e Modimo wa yone e leng Jehofa." 
Psalms145:1 Modimo wa me, ke tlaa go godisa, Kgosi; ke tlaa baka leina la gago ka bosakhutleng le ka bosaengkae." 
Psalms145:2 Ke tlaa go baka ka malatsi otlhe; ke tlaa baka leina la gago ka bosakhutleng le ka bosaengkae. 
Psalms145:3 Jehofa o mogolo, mme o na le go bakwa thata; bogolo jwa gagwe ga bo na phukutso." 
Psalms145:4 Losika longwe lo tlaa baka ditiro tsa gago go ya losikeng lo longwe, mme lo tlaa kakanya ditiro tsa gago tsa bonatla." 
Psalms145:5 Ke tlaa akanya borena jo bo galalelang jwa tlotlego ya gago, le ditiro tsa gago tse di gakgamatsang." 
Psalms145:6 Batho ba tlaa bua ka ga bonatla jwa ditiro tsa gago tse di boitshegang; mme ke tlaa bolela bogolo jwa gago. 
Psalms145:7 Ba tlaa bolela kgakologelo ya molemo o mogolo wa gago, ba tlaa opela ka ga tshiamo ya gago." 
Psalms145:8 Jehofa o pelotshweu, o tletse pelotlhomogi; o bonya go galefa, mme o na le boutlwelobotlhoko jo bogolo." 
Psalms145:9 Jehofa o molemo mo go tsotlhe; mautlwelobotlhoko a manana a gagwe a okame ditiro tsotlhe tsa gagwe. 
Psalms145:10 Ditiro tsotlhe tsa gago di tlaa go ntshetsa malebogo, Jehofa; le baitshepi ba gago ba tlaa go baka." 
Psalms145:11 Ba tlaa bua ka ga kgalalelo ya bogosi jwa gago, ba bua ka ga thata ya gago;" 
Psalms145:12 go itsise bana ba batho ditiro tsa gagwe tsa bonatla, le kgalalelo ya borena jwa bogosi jwa gagwe." 
Psalms145:13 Bogosi jwa gago ke bogosi jo bo se nang bokhutlo, le puso ya gago e eme go ya ditshikatshikeng tsotlhe." 
Psalms145:14 Jehofa o tshegetsa botlhe ba ba wang, o topalatsa botlhe ba ba obameng." 
Psalms145:15 Matlho a dilo tsotlhe a lebeletse wena; mme o tle o di fe dijo tsa tsone mo metlheng e e lebanyeng. 
Psalms145:16 O huporolola seatla sa gago, o kgorise keletso ya ditshedi tsotlhe fela." 
Psalms145:17 Jehofa o tshiamo mo ditseleng tsotlhe tsa gagwe, o pelotshweu mo ditirong tsotlhe tsa gagwe." 
Psalms145:18 Jehofa o gaufi le botlhe ba ba mmitsang, e bong botlhe ba ba mmitsang ka boammaaruri." 
Psalms145:19 O tlaa dirafatsa keletso ya ba ba mmoifang; le gone o tlaa utlwa pitso ya bone, a ba boloke." 
Psalms145:20 Jehofa o boloka botlhe ba ba mo ratang; mme baikepi botlhe o tlaa ba senya. 
Psalms145:21 Molomo wa me o tlaa bua pako ya ga Jehofa; a nama yotlhe e bake leina la gagwe le le boitshepo, ka bosakhutleng le ka bosaengkae." 
Psalms146:1 Bakang Jehofa, baka Jehofa, wena mowa wa me." 
Psalms146:2 Ke tlaa nna ke baka Jehofa ke sa ntse ke tshedile; ke tlaa opelela Modimo wa me dipako ka ke sa ntse ke leyo. 
Psalms146:3 Lo se ka lwa ikanya dikgosana, le fa e le ngwana wa motho yo go se nang thuso epe mo go ene." 
Psalms146:4 Mowa wa gagwe o a tswa, mme a boele mo mmung wa gagwe; ka letsatsi leo fela maikaelelo a gagwe a nyelele." 
Psalms146:5 Go sego ene yo Modimo wa ga Jakobe e leng thuso ya gagwe, yo tsholofelo ya gagwe e leng mo go Jehofa Modimo wa gagwe;" 
Psalms146:6 o o dirileng legodimo le lefatshe, lewatle, le tsotlhe tse di mo go tsone; o o tshegetsang boammaaruri ka bosakhutleng;" 
Psalms146:7 O o diraletsang bapatikwi tshiamiso; o o fang ba ba bolawang ke tlala dijo; Jehofa o golola bagolegwi. 
Psalms146:8 Jehofa o budulola matlho a difofu; Jehofa o topalatsa ba ba obameng; Jehofa o rata basiami. 
Psalms146:9 Jehofa o boloka baeng; o tshegetsa khutsana le mosadi wa motlholagadi; mme tsela ya moikepi a e ribege. 
Psalms146:10 Jehofa o tlaa busa ka bosakhutleng, e bong Modimo wa gago Sione, go ya tshikatshikeng tsotlhe fela. Bakang Jehofa." 
Psalms147:1 Bakang Jehofa; gonne go molemo go opelela Modimo wa rona dipako, gonne go monate, mme pako e tshwanetse." 
Psalms147:2 Jehofa o agelela Jerusalema; o phutha balatlhiwa ba Iseraele. 
Psalms147:3 O fodisa ba ba pelo di phatlogileng, o fapa matsanko a bone." 
Psalms147:4 O bolela palo ya dinaledi, o di raya maina tsotlhe fela." 
Psalms147:5 Morena wa rona o mogolo, o senatla mo nonofong; tlhaloganyo ya gagwe ke mo go se nang kankabetso." 
Psalms147:6 Jehofa o tshegetsa bapelonomi; mme o folosetsa baikepi fa fatshe. 
Psalms147:7 Opelelang Jehofa ka tebogo; opelelang Modimo wa rona dipako ka harepe. 
Psalms147:8 O o khurumetsang legodimo ka maru, o o baakanyetsang lefatshe pula, o o tlhogisang bojang mo dithabeng." 
Psalms147:9 O fa dikgomo dijo tsa tsone, le mamphorwana a mahukubu a a lelang." 
Psalms147:10 Ga o natefelwe ke thata ya pitse; ga o na kgatlhego mo maotong a motho. 
Psalms147:11 Jehofa o kgatlhega mo go ba ba mmoifang, mo go ba ba solofelang mo boutlwelongbotlhoko jwa gagwe." 
Psalms147:12 Baka Jehofa, wena Jerusalema; baka Modimo wa gago wena Sione." 
Psalms147:13 Gonne o thatafaditse mephakalego ya ditswalo tsa gago; o segofaditse bana ba gago mo teng ga gago. 
Psalms147:14 O dira kagiso mo melelwaneng ya gago; o go kgorisa setou sa mabele se se boleta bogolo. 
Psalms147:15 O ntshetsa taolo ya one kwa lefatsheng; lefoko la one le siane ka thata e kgolo. 
Psalms147:16 O aba kapoko e nne jaaka bobowa; a gase kgogotshwane, e nne jaaka melora." 
Psalms147:17 O latlhela sefako sa one, se nne jaaka dikgapetlana; e mang yo o ka itshokelang letsididi la one?" 
Psalms147:18 O ntsha lefoko la one, o di tlhapolose; o fokise phefo ya one, mme metsi a elele." 
Psalms147:19 O supetsa Jakobe lefoko la one, ditao tsa one le ditshiamiso tsa one mo go Iseraele." 
Psalms147:20 Ga o ise o ko o direle morafe ope jalo; mme ka ga dikatlholo tsa one, ga ba ise ba ke ba di itse. Bakang Jehofa." 
Psalms148:1 Bakang Jehofa, lo bakeng Jehofa lo le kwa magodimong; mmakeng mo mafelong a a godimo." 
Psalms148:2 Mmakeng lona lotlhe baengele ba gagwe; mmakeng lona lotlhe masomosomo a gagwe. 
Psalms148:3 Lo mmakeng letsatsi le kgwedi; lo mmakeng lona lotlhe dinaledi tsa lesedi. 
Psalms148:4 Mmakeng lona magodimo a magodimo, le lona metsi a lo leng kwa godimo ga magodimo" 
Psalms148:5 A tsotlhe di bake leina la ga Jehofa; gonne o ne a laola, mme tsa tlholega." 
Psalms148:6 Le gone o di tlhomamiseditse bosakhutleng le bosaengkae; o tlhomile molao o o se ketlang o feta. 
Psalms148:7 Bakang Jehofa lo le mo lefatsheng, lona maruarua, le lona lotlhe madiba a a boteng;" 
Psalms148:8 molelo le sefako; kapoko le mouwane, phefo e e matsubutsubu e e dirafatsang lefoko la gagwe;" 
Psalms148:9 dithaba le dithabana tsotlhe; ditlhare tse di ungwang, le masetara otlhe;" 
Psalms148:10 diphologolo le dikgomo tsotlhe; dilo tse di gagabang le dinonyane tse di fofang; 
Psalms148:11 dikgosi tsa lefatshe le ditšhaba tsotlhe; dikgosana le baatlhodi botlhe ba lefatshe; 
Psalms148:12 makau a na le basetsana; banna bagolo le banyana; 
Psalms148:13 a ba bake leina la ga Jehofa; gonne leina la gagwe ke lone losi le le goletsegileng; kgalalelo ya gagwe e godimo ga lefatshe le legodimo. 
Psalms148:14 O goleditse lonaka lwa batho ba gagwe, pako ya baitshepi ba gagwe botlhe; e bong bana ba Iseraele, e le tšhaba e e gaufi le ene. Bakang Jehofa." 
Psalms149:1 Bakang Jehofa. Opelelang Jehofa sefela se seša, le pako ya gagwe mo phuthegong ya baitshepi." 
Psalms149:2 A Iseraele a itumele mo go ene yo o mo dirileng; bana ba Sione ba ipele mo kgosing ya bone. 
Psalms149:3 A ba bake leina la gagwe ka go bina; a ba mo opelele dipako ka moropana le harepe. 
Psalms149:4 Gonne Jehofa o na le kgatlhego mo bathong ba gagwe; o tlaa kgabisa ba ba pelonomi ka poloko. 
Psalms149:5 A baitshepi ba kgane ka boitumelo mo kgalalelong; a ba opele ka boitumelo ba le mo malaong a bone. 
Psalms149:6 A dipako tse dikgolo tsa Modimo di nne mo molomong wa bone le tšhaka e e magale mabedi e nne mo diatleng tsa bone: 
Psalms149:7 Go dirafatsa pusoloso mo merafeng, le dipetso mo ditšhabeng;" 
Psalms149:8 go golega dikgosi tsa tsone ka diketane, le barena ba tsone ka dikgolego tsa tshipi;" 
Psalms149:9 go dirafatsa mo go bone katlholo e e kwadilweng; tlotlo e, baitshepi botlhe ba gagwe ba na nayo. Bakang Jehofa." 
Psalms150:1 Bakang Jehofa. Lo bakeng Modimo mo felong ga one ga boitshepo, o bakeng mo phuthologong ya thata ya one." 
Psalms150:2 O bakeleng ditiro tsa one tsa bonatla; o bakeng ka fa bogolong jwa one jo bo gaisang. 
Psalms150:3 O bakeng ka tumo ya lonaka; o bakeng ka saletare le harepe. 
Psalms150:4 O bakeng ka moropana le ka go bina; o bakeng ka diletso tse di megala le ka ditlhaka. 
Psalms150:5 O bakeng ka disemebala tse di tumo kgolo; o bakeng ka disemebala tse di dumang ka lentswe le le kwa godimo. 
Psalms150:6 A dilo tsotlhe fela tse di nang le mowa di bake Jehofa. Bakang Jehofa. 
Proverbs1:1 Diane tsa ga Solomone morwa Dafite, kgosi ya Iseraele:" 
Proverbs1:2 Go itse botlhale le thuto; go lemoga mafoko a tlhaloganyo; 
Proverbs1:3 go tshola thuto ya go dira ka botlhale, ka tshiamo, le ka katlholo, le ka tekatekanyo;" 
Proverbs1:4 go naya yo o sa tlhalefang matseba, le motho wa lekau kitso le pharologanyo;" 
Proverbs1:5 gore motho yo o botlhale a utlwe, a totafale mo go ithuteng; le gore motho wa tlhaloganyo a ye go tshwara dikgakololo tse di itekanetseng;" 
Proverbs1:6 go tlhaloganya seane, le setshwantsho; mafoko a ba ba botlhale, le dinyoba tsa bone." 
Proverbs1:7 Go boifa Jehofa ke tshimologo ya kitso, mme masilo a nyatsa botlhale le thuto." 
Proverbs1:8 Morwaaka, utlwa thuto ya ga rraago, mme o se ka wa tlogela molao wa ga mmaago," 
Proverbs1:9 gonne e tlaa nna kgopana e ntle mo tlhogong ya gago, le tlhanyaku mo thamong ya gago." 
Proverbs1:10 Morwaaka, fa baleofi ba go fepa, o se ka wa dumela." 
Proverbs1:11 Fa ba re: “A re tsamaye mmogo re ye go lalela go tsholola madi, a re bobele ba ba se nang molato ka bomo;" 
Proverbs1:12 a re ba kometse jaaka Bobipo ba sa ntse ba utlwa, ba le boleka jaaka ba ba fologelang mo moleteng;" 
Proverbs1:13 re tlaa fitlhela thoto yotlhe e e tlhokegang, re tlaa tlatsa matlo a rona ka thopo;" 
Proverbs1:14 o tlaa tlhakanela kgetsi le rona; re tlaa dira le kgetsana ya madi e le nngwe fela.” 
Proverbs1:15 Morwaaka, o se ka wa tsamaya nabo mo tseleng; thiba lonao lwa gago, gore lo se ka lwa tsena mo tselaneng ya bone," 
Proverbs1:16 gonne dinao tsa bone di sianela bosula, ba itlhaganelela go tsholola madi." 
Proverbs1:17 Gonne, aitse lotloa lo menololelwa lefela mo ponong ya nonyane le fa e ka nna efe;" 
Proverbs1:18 bao ba italelela a e leng madi a bone tota, ba ipobelela a e leng matshelo a bone tota." 
Proverbs1:19 Ditsela tsa mongwe le mongwe yo o sefatlha ka ga papadi di ntse jalo, e tle e bolaye beng ba yone." 
Proverbs1:20 Botlhale o kuela godimo mo mmileng; o ntsha lentswe la gagwe mo dipatlelong; 
Proverbs1:21 o kua mo bonnong jo bogolo jwa borakanelo; fa botsenong jwa dikgoro, o bolela mafoko a gagwe mo motseng, a re:" 
Proverbs1:22 “Lona ba lo sa tlhalefang, lo tlaa rata botlhoka botlhale ka lobaka lo lo kaye, le basotli go ijesa monate mo go sotleng, le dieleele go ila kitso?" 
Proverbs1:23 Sokologang ka kgalemo ya me; bonang, ke tlaa thela mowa wa me mo go lona, ke tlaa lo itsise mafoko a me." 
Proverbs1:24 E re ka ke biditse, mme lwa gana; ke otlolotse letsogo la me, mme ga se ka ga tlhokomela ope;" 
Proverbs1:25 lo ntshitse kgakololo ya me yotlhe lefela, lwa ba lwa gana kgalemo ya me." 
Proverbs1:26 Le nna ke tlaa tshega mo motlheng wa tatlhego ya lona; ke tlaa sotla motlhang poifo ya lona e tlang; 
Proverbs1:27 motlhang poifo ya lona e tlang jaaka matsubutsubu a phefo, le tatlhego ya lona e tlaa jaaka setsuatsue; motlhang pitlagano e tlang mo go lona le tlalelo e e mahehe." 
Proverbs1:28 Foo ba tlaa mpitsa, mme ga nketla ke araba; ba tlaa mpatla ka tlhoafalo, mme ga ba ketla ba mpona." 
Proverbs1:29 E re ka ba idile kitso, ba se ka ba itshenkela go boifa Jehofa," 
Proverbs1:30 kgakololo ya me ba e ganela ruri; ba nyatsa kgalemo yotlhe ya me. 
Proverbs1:31 Ke gone ka moo ba tlaa jang loungo lwa tsela ya bone, ba tlaa kgora maano a ba a logileng ka bosi." 
Proverbs1:32 Gonne go tenega ga ba ba sa tlhalefang go tlaa ba bolaya, le boiketlo jwa dieleele bo tlaa di senya." 
Proverbs1:33 Yo o ntheetsang o tlaa aga ka polokego, o tlaa nna fela a sa boife bosula.”" 
Proverbs2:1 Morwaaka, fa o ka tshola mafoko a me, wa ba wa ipeela ditaolo tsa me fa go wena," 
Proverbs2:2 wa sekegela botlhale tsebe, mme wa lebisa pelo ya gago kwa tlhaloganyong;" 
Proverbs2:3 ee, fa o tlhaeletsa tlhalemaleje, mme wa tsholeletsa tlhaloganyo lentswe la gago;" 
Proverbs2:4 fa o mmatla jaaka e ka bo e le selefera, fa o mo hukuletsa jaaka e kabo e le dikhumo tse di subegileng;" 
Proverbs2:5 foo o tlaa tlhaloganya go boifa Jehofa, mme o tlaa bona kitso ya Modimo." 
Proverbs2:6 Gonne Jehofa o aba botlhale; kitso e tswa mo molomong wa gagwe, le tlhaloganyo." 
Proverbs2:7 O beela bathokgami botlhale jo bo itekanetseng, ke ene thebe kwa go ba ba tsamayang ka boitekanelo," 
Proverbs2:8 gore a femele ditselana tsa katlholo, a dibele tsela ya baitshepi ba gagwe." 
Proverbs2:9 Foo o tlaa tlhaloganya tshiamo le katlholo, le tekatekanyo, ee, tselana nngwe le nngwe e e molemo." 
Proverbs2:10 Gonne botlhale bo tlaa go tsena mo pelong, le kitso e tlaa nna monate mo moweng wa gago;" 
Proverbs2:11 tlhalemaleje e tlaa go tlhodumela, tlhaloganyo e tlaa go boloka," 
Proverbs2:12 go go golola mo tseleng ya bosula, mo banneng ba ba buang dilo tsa lesoko," 
Proverbs2:13 ba ba tlogelang ditsela tsa thokgamo, gore ba tsamaye mo ditseleng tsa lefifi;" 
Proverbs2:14 ba ba itumelang go dira bosula, ba ipela mo lesokong la bosula." 
Proverbs2:15 Ba ba kgopo mo ditseleng tsa bone, ba logwadi mo ditselaneng tsa bone." 
Proverbs2:16 Go go golola mo mosading yo o leng o sele, e bong mo mosading yo o leng o sele yo o rethefatsang mafoko a gagwe;" 
Proverbs2:17 yo o latlhang tsala ya bokau jwa gagwe, a lebale kgolagano ya Modimo wa gagwe;" 
Proverbs2:18 gonne ntlo ya gagwe e ganelela kwa losong, le ditselana tsa gagwe kwa baswing." 
Proverbs2:19 Mo go ba ba yang kwa go ene, ga go ope yo o bowang, le gone ga ba ke ba ye go wela ditselana tsa botshelo." 
Proverbs2:20 Gore o tle o tsamaye mo tseleng ya batho ba ba molemo, o tatamale fela le ditselana tsa basiami," 
Proverbs2:21 gonne bathokgami ba tlaa aga mo lefatsheng, le baitekanedi ba tlaa sala ba ntse ruri mo go lone." 
Proverbs2:22 Baikepi ba tlaa kgaolwa ba tlosiwa mo lefatsheng, le ba ba dirang ka bonongwana ba tlaa khumolwa mo go lone." 
Proverbs3:1 Morwaaka, o se ka wa lebala molao wa me; mme a pelo ya gago e tshegetse ditaolo tsa me," 
Proverbs3:2 gonne di tlaa go okeletsa boleele jwa malatsi, le dinyaga tsa botshelo, le kagiso." 
Proverbs3:3 A boutlwelobotlhoko bo se go tlogele le boammaaruri; o di bofelele mo thamong ya gago; o di kwale mo sekwalelong sa pelo ya gago; 
Proverbs3:4 jalo o tlaa bona botsalano le tlotlego mo ponong ya Modimo le ya motho. 
Proverbs3:5 O ikanye Jehofa ka pelo yotlhe ya gago, o se ka wa ikaega tlhaloganyo ya gago fela." 
Proverbs3:6 Mo ditseleng tsotlhe tsa gago o ipolele ene, mme o tlaa siamisa ditselana tsa gago." 
Proverbs3:7 O se ka wa nna botlhale mo matlhong a gago; boifa Jehofa, o bo o kgaogane le bosula." 
Proverbs3:8 E tlaa nna phodiso mo khubung ya gago, le moko mo marapong a gago." 
Proverbs3:9 Tlotla Jehofa ka thoto ya gago, le ka tsa ntlha tsa totafalelo yotlhe ya gago." 
Proverbs3:10 Jalo mabolokelo a gago a tlaa tlala letlotlo, le dithatholelo tsa gago di tlaa penologa bojalwa jo boša." 
Proverbs3:11 Morwaaka, o se ka wa nyatsa kwatlhao ya ga Jehofa; le gone o se ka wa lapisiwa ke kgalemo ya gagwe;" 
Proverbs3:12 gonne yo Jehofa o mo ratang o tle a mo kgalemele; fela jaaka rra motho a tle a kgalemele morwawe yo o mo natefelang. 
Proverbs3:13 Go tlhogonolo motho yo o bonang botlhale, le motho yo o bapalang tlhaloganyo." 
Proverbs3:14 Gonne tlhwatlhwa ya yone e gaisa tlhwatlhwa ya selefera, le papadi ya lone e gaisa papadi ya gouta e e itshekileng." 
Proverbs3:15 O tlhokega bogolo go diperela; mme mo dilong tsotlhe tse o ka di eletsang ga go na sepe se se ka tshwantshiwang nae. 
Proverbs3:16 Boleele jwa malatsi bo mo seatleng sa gagwe se se siameng; mo seatleng sa gagwe sa molema go dikhumo le tlotlo. 
Proverbs3:17 Ditsela tsa gagwe ke ditsela tsa monate, le ditselana tsa gagwe tsotlhe ke kagiso." 
Proverbs3:18 O setlhare sa botshelo mo go ba ba mo tshwarang; go tlhogonolo mongwe le mongwe yo o mo itshadisetsang. 
Proverbs3:19 Jehofa o thaile lefatshe ka botlhale; a tlhomamisa magodimo ka tlhaloganyo. 
Proverbs3:20 Mateng a ne a phunyakwa ka kitso ya gagwe, mme loapi lo rotha monyo." 
Proverbs3:21 Morwaaka, a di se tloge mo matlhong a gago; o tshware botlhale jo bo itekanetseng le pharologanyo." 
Proverbs3:22 Jalo di tlaa nna botshelo mo moweng wa gago, le bontle mo thamong ya gago." 
Proverbs3:23 Foo o tlaa tsamaya mo tseleng ya gago ka thagamo, le lonao lwa gago ga lo ketla lo kgotswa." 
Proverbs3:24 E tlaa re o rapama ga o ketla o boifa; ee, o tlaa rapama fela, mme boroko jwa gago bo tlaa nna monate." 
Proverbs3:25 O se ka wa boifa poifo e e tshoganetsang, le fa e le go swafadiwa ga baikepi motlhang go tlang;" 
Proverbs3:26 gonne Jehofa o tlaa nna boikanngo jwa gago, o tlaa boloka lonao lwa gago, gore lo se ka lwa tshwarwa." 
Proverbs3:27 Ba ba tshwanetsweng ke go direlwa molemo, o se ka wa gana ka one, fa go le mo thateng ya seatla sa gago go o dira." 
Proverbs3:28 O se ka wa raya wa gaeno wa re: “Tsamaya, o bo o tle gape, ka moso ke tlaa go naya;” le mororo selo o na naso." 
Proverbs3:29 O se ka wa logela wa gaeno maano a a bosula, e tswa a agile fa go wena ka thagamo." 
Proverbs3:30 O se ka wa lwela le motho lefela, fa a sa go direla molato ope." 
Proverbs3:31 O se ka wa rata wa bo o ka nna jaaka motho wa sesenyi, o bo o se ka wa itshenkela ditsela dipe tsa gagwe." 
Proverbs3:32 Gonne yo o logwadi ke mofedisa pelo mo go Jehofa; leoma la gagwe le na le yo o thokgameng. 
Proverbs3:33 Phutso ya ga Jehofa e mo ntlong ya moikepi; mme o segofatsa boago jwa mosiami. 
Proverbs3:34 Ruri o sotla basotli, mme o naya bakgobaladi bontlafalo." 
Proverbs3:35 Ba ba botlhale ba tlaa rua kgalalelo; mme dieleele di tlaa godisediwa ditlhonnyeng. 
Proverbs4:1 Bomorwaaka, utlwang thuto ya rra batho, lo tlhokomeleng go itse tlhaloganyo;" 
Proverbs4:2 gonne ke lo naya thuto e e siameng; lo se ka lwa tlogela molao wa me. 
Proverbs4:3 Gonne ke ne ke le morwarre, ke le tlekeetso, ke ratega ke le nosi mo matlhong a ga mme." 
Proverbs4:4 Rre a nthuta a nthaya a re: “A pelo ya gago e tshegetse mafoko a me; o boloke ditaolo tsa me, mme o tshele:" 
Proverbs4:5 Bapala botlhale, bapala tlhaloganyo; o se ka wa go lebala, le gone o se ka wa tenega mo mafokong a molomo wa me;" 
Proverbs4:6 o se ka wa kgaogana nae, mme o tlaa go tlamela; o mo rate mme o tlaa go direla." 
Proverbs4:7 Botlhale ke selo se segolo bogolo go dilo tsotlhe; ke gone bapala botlhale: Ee, mo go tsotlhe tse o di bonyeng, o bo o bapetse tlhaloganyo." 
Proverbs4:8 O mo goletse, mme o tlaa go godisa; o tlaa go isa mo tlotlong, motlhang o mo tlamparelang." 
Proverbs4:9 O tlaa naya tlhogo ya gago kgopana ya bontlafalo: o tlaa go neela serwalo sa tlhogo sa bontle.” 
Proverbs4:10 Utlwa, morwaaka, o amogele dipolelo tsa me; mme dinyaga tsa botshelo jwa gago di tlaa nna dintsi." 
Proverbs4:11 Ke go rutile mo tseleng ya botlhale; ke go gogile mo ditselaneng tsa thokgamo. 
Proverbs4:12 E tlaa re o tsamaya, dikgato tsa gago ga di ketla di pitlaganngwa, fa o siana, ga o ketla o kgotswa." 
Proverbs4:13 Tshwara thuto thatathata; o se ka wa e lesa; o e tshegetse; gonne ke botshelo jwa gago. 
Proverbs4:14 O se ka wa tsena mo tseleng ya baikepi, o se ka wa tsamaya mo mekgweng ya batho ba ba bosula." 
Proverbs4:15 E thibogele, o se ka wa feta ka yone; o e fapoge, mme o fetele koo." 
Proverbs4:16 Gonne ga ba robale ba e se ba dire bosenyi pele; boroko mo go bone ga boyo, fa ba sa diga bangwe." 
Proverbs4:17 Gonne ba ja senkgwe sa boikepo, ba nwa bojalwa jwa mofine jwa thubakanyo." 
Proverbs4:18 Tselana ya mosiami e ntse jaaka lesedi le le phatsimang, le le phatsimelang pele fela go ya motshegareng o mogolo." 
Proverbs4:19 Mme tselana ya baikepi e ntse jaaka lefifi: ga ba itse se se ba kgopang. 
Proverbs4:20 Morwaaka, tlhokomela mafoko a me; sekegela dipolelo tsa me tsebe." 
Proverbs4:21 A di se tloge mo matlhong a gago; o di bolokele mo sekwalelong sa pelo ya gago. 
Proverbs4:22 Gonne di botshelo mo go ba ba di bonang, di bile di le phodiso fela mo nameng yotlhe ya bone." 
Proverbs4:23 Dibela pelo ya gago ka tlhoafalo yotlhe: gonne matso a botshelo a tswa mo go yone. 
Proverbs4:24 Molomo o o lesoko o o tlose fa go wena, le dipounama tse di kgopo o di beye kgakala nao." 
Proverbs4:25 A matlho a gago a lebele kwa pele, dintshi tsa matlho a gago di lolamele go lebela kwa pele ga gago fela." 
Proverbs4:26 Lekalekanya tsela ya dinao tsa gago, mme ditselana tsotlhe tsa gago di tlhomamisiwe." 
Proverbs4:27 O se ka wa fapogela ka fa ntlheng ya le legolo, kgotsa ya la molema: tlosa lonao lwa gago lo tswe mo bosuleng." 
Proverbs5:1 Morwaaka, tlhokomela botlhale jwa me; sekegela tlhaloganyo ya me tsebe," 
Proverbs5:2 gore o tle o boloke pharologanyo, le gore dipounama tsa gago di tshegetse kitso." 
Proverbs5:3 Gonne dipounama tsa mosadi o sele di rotha sedinotshe, magalapa a gagwe a boleta bogolo go lookwane." 
Proverbs5:4 Mme bokhutlo jwa gagwe bo botlhoko jaaka longana, bo bogale jaaka tšhaka e e magale mabedi." 
Proverbs5:5 Dinao tsa gagwe di fologela mo losong; dikgato tsa gagwe di ya go tshwara Bobipo. 
Proverbs5:6 Jalo wa bo a sa wele tselana e e papannweng ya botshelo; ditsela tsa gagwe di raraanye, mme a ba a sa go itse." 
Proverbs5:7 Mme jaana bomorwaaka, ka re, Ntheetsang, mme lo se ka lwa tlogela mafoko a molomo wa me." 
Proverbs5:8 Katosetsa tsela ya gago kgakala nae, o se ka wa atamela mojako wa ntlo ya gagwe," 
Proverbs5:9 o ka tla wa naya ba sele tlotlo ya gago, le dinyaga tsa gago wa di abela tse di bolalome." 
Proverbs5:10 Ba sele ba ka tla ba kgora nonofo ya gago; le matsapa a gago a nna mo ntlong ya motho wa seeng; 
Proverbs5:11 mme wa lela mo bokhutlong jwa gago, motlhang nama ya gago e tlhoregang, le mmele wa gago," 
Proverbs5:12 wa re: “A bo nkile ka ila thuto, pelo ya me ya nyatsa jang kgalemelo;" 
Proverbs5:13 le gone ga ke a utlwa lentswe la baruti ba me, le fa e le go sekegela ba ba nthutileng tsebe!" 
Proverbs5:14 Ka batla go nna mo bosuleng jotlhe, mo gare ga phuthego le kokoano ya batho.”" 
Proverbs5:15 Nwa metsi mo sedibeletsong se e leng sa gago, le metsi a a elang mo motsweding o e leng wa gago." 
Proverbs5:16 A metswedi ya gago e tshwanetse go tšheamela koo kwa ntle, le dinoka tsa metsi go ya le mebila fela?" 
Proverbs5:17 A e nne tsa gago o le wesi, mme e seng tsa ba sele nao." 
Proverbs5:18 A motswedi wa gago o nne sego; mme o itumele mo mosading wa bokau jwa gago. 
Proverbs5:19 Jaaka tshephe e namagadi e e lorato, le jaaka lefele le le namagadi le le natefang, a mabele a gagwe a go thethebatse ka metlha yotlhe, o nne o tlhapelwe ke lorato lwa gagwe ka metlha yotlhe." 
Proverbs5:20 Kana morwaaka, o ka bo o ratelang go tlhapelwa ke mosadi yo o leng o sele, wa tlamparela sehuba sa mosadi wa seeng?" 
Proverbs5:21 Gonne ditsela tsa motho di fa pele ga matlho a ga Jehofa, mme o lekalekanya ditselana tsotlhe tsa gagwe." 
Proverbs5:22 Moikepi o tlaa tshwarwa ke maikepo a gagwe tota, mme o tlaa tshegediwa ke megala ya boleo jwa gagwe." 
Proverbs5:23 O tlaa swa ka go tlhoka thuto; mme mo bogolong jwa bosilo jwa gagwe o tlaa timela. 
Proverbs6:1 Morwaaka, fa o ineetse go nna moemedi wa motho wa gaeno, fa o opantse diatla tsa gago le moeng," 
Proverbs6:2 o a bo o raetswe ke mafoko a molomo wa gago, o tshwerwe ke mafoko a molomo wa gago." 
Proverbs6:3 Dira jaana, morwaaka, mme o ikgolole, ka e le fa o tsenye mo seatleng sa wa gaeno jaana; ya, o ikokobetse, o kokotlele wa gaeno." 
Proverbs6:4 O se ka wa lesa matlho a gago a robala, le fa e le dintshi tsa matlho a gago go bokalala." 
Proverbs6:5 O bo o ikgolole jaaka tshephe mo seatleng sa motsomi, le jaaka nonyane mo seatleng sa motshwara nonyane." 
Proverbs6:6 Ya kwa tshoswaneng wena mmodufadi; o akanye mekgwa ya yone, mme o tlhalefe;" 
Proverbs6:7 e e reng e se na kgosi, le fa e le molebedi, kgotsa molaodi," 
Proverbs6:8 e be e etleetse dijo tsa yone go le selemo, e kokotletse dijo tsa yone mo lobakeng lwa thobo." 
Proverbs6:9 O tlaa rapama ka lobaka lo lo kaye, wena mmodufadi, o tlaa tsoga leng mo go robaleng?" 
Proverbs6:10 Nama o sa robetse go le gonnye, o otsele go le gonnye, o lesololele boroko diatla," 
Proverbs6:11 jalo khumanego ya gago e tlaa tla jaaka senokwane, le lehuma la gago jaaka monna yo o tlhometseng dibolao." 
Proverbs6:12 Motho yo o seruti, motho wa boikepo, o tsamayatsamaya ka molomo o o lesoko." 
Proverbs6:13 O gwetlha ka matlho, a bue ka dinao, a gonetse ka menwana;" 
Proverbs6:14 lesoko le mo pelong ya gagwe, o ntse a loga bosula ka metlha yotlhe; o jala kgotlhang mo bathong." 
Proverbs6:15 Ke gone ka moo tatlhego ya gagwe e tlaa tlang ka tshoganetso; o tlaa tshoga ka a thubilwe fela, mme e tlaa bo e le mo go se nang kalafo." 
Proverbs6:16 Go na le dilo di le thataro tse Jehofa o di ilang; ee, di supa tse di mo fedisang pelo, ke tse:" 
Proverbs6:17 Matlho a a kadileng, loleme lo lo akang, le diatla tse di tshololang madi a motho a a se nang molato;" 
Proverbs6:18 pelo e e logang ditlhatlhanyo tsa boikepo, dinao tse di bofefo go sianela kwa bosenying;" 
Proverbs6:19 mosupi wa kako yo o bilolang maaka, le yo o jalang kgotlhang mo baneng ba monna." 
Proverbs6:20 Morwaaka, tshegetsa taolo ya ga rraago, mme o se ka wa latlha molao wa ga mmaago." 
Proverbs6:21 Di bofelele mo pelong ya gago ka metlha yotlhe, o di gokelele mo thamong ya gago." 
Proverbs6:22 Motlhang o tsamayang di tlaa go goga; motlhang o robalang di tlaa go tlhodumela, mme motlhang o kubugang di tlaa bua nao." 
Proverbs6:23 Gonne taolo ke lobone; le molao ke lesedi, dikgalemo tsa thuto ke tsela ya botshelo," 
Proverbs6:24 go go dibela mo mosading yo o bosula, le mo go hakeng ga loleme lwa mosadi o sele." 
Proverbs6:25 O se ka wa eletsa bontle jwa gagwe mo pelong ya gago; le gone a se ka a go gapa ka dintshi tsa matlho a gagwe. 
Proverbs6:26 Gonne motho o tle a humanegisiwe ke mosadi wa sepepe, bojotlhe jwa gagwe e ba e nna semathanyana sa bogobe fela; e bile mosadi yo o seaka o tle a tsome botshelo jo bo tlhokegang." 
Proverbs6:27 A motho o ka tsaya molelo mo sehubeng sa gagwe, mme diaparo tsa gagwe di sa še?" 
Proverbs6:28 Kgotsa a mongwe o ka tsamaya mo godimo ga magala a a molelo, mme dinao tsa gagwe di sa še?" 
Proverbs6:29 Yo o tsenang kwa mosading wa monna wa ga gabo o ntse jalo; le fa e le mang yo o mo amang ga a ketla a lesiwa fela a sa bediwe. 
Proverbs6:30 Batho ga ba nyatse legodu, fa le utswa gore mowa wa lone o kgore, motlhang le bolawang ke tlala." 
Proverbs6:31 Mme fa le tshwerwe, le tlaa lefa gasupa; le tlaa ntsha thoto yotlhe ya ntlo ya lone." 
Proverbs6:32 Yo o dirang boaka le mosadi, ga a na tlhaloganyo: yo o bo dirang o rata go senya mowa wa gagwe tota." 
Proverbs6:33 O tlaa tswa dintho le tlotlologo; mme go kgojwa ga gagwe ga go ketla go phimolwa. 
Proverbs6:34 Gonne lefufa ke bolau jwa monna; mme ga a ketla a rekegela mo motlheng wa pusoloso. 
Proverbs6:35 Ga a ketla a tlhokomela thekololo epe; le gone ga a ketla a diga pelo, le fa o ntsha dineo di le dintsi." 
Proverbs7:1 Morwaaka, tshegetsa mafoko a me, o beye ditaolo tsa me fa go wena." 
Proverbs7:2 Tshegetsa ditaolo tsa me o tshele; le molao wa me jaaka thaka ya leitlho la gago. 
Proverbs7:3 O di bofelele mo menwaneng ya gago; o di kwale mo sekwalelong sa pelo ya gago. 
Proverbs7:4 Raya botlhale o re: “O kgaitsadiake;” o reye tlhaloganyo o re: “O wa bana ba ga mme;” 
Proverbs7:5 gore ba go dibele mo mosading wa seeng, mo moennyeng yo o fakang ka mafoko a gagwe." 
Proverbs7:6 Gonne e kile ya re ka fa seiponing sa ntlo ya me ka okomela ka marofana," 
Proverbs7:7 mme ka bona mo go ba ba sa tlhalefang, ka lemoga mo makaung, motho mongwe wa lekau yo o se nang tlhaloganyo," 
Proverbs7:8 a feta le mmila gaufi le kgokgotsho ya mosadi yoo, mme a otobela kwa tseleng e e yang kwa ntlong ya gagwe;" 
Proverbs7:9 ka lotlatlana, ka maabanyane, mo bontshong jwa bosigo, le jwa lefifi." 
Proverbs7:10 Mme bonang, a kgatlhantshiwa ke mosadi a apere diaparo tsa seaka, mme a le pelo e e boitobo." 
Proverbs7:11 O a tle a phokelele, a itaole, dinao tsa gagwe ga di ke di nna mo ntlong ya gagwe:" 
Proverbs7:12 Jaana o mo mebileng, kgantele o mo dipatlelong, mme a lalele fa marakanelong a otlhe." 
Proverbs7:13 Jalo a mo tshwara a mo atla, a iphimola sefatlhogo, a mo raya a re:" 
Proverbs7:14 “Ditlhabelo tsa ditshupelo tsa kagiso di kwa go nna; ke lefetse maikano a me ka tsatsi leno. 
Proverbs7:15 Ke gone ke moo ke duleng go go kgatlhantsha, go batla sefatlhogo sa gago ka tlhoafalo, jaanong ke go fitlhetse." 
Proverbs7:16 Ke adile bolao jwa me ka diphate tse di matsabatsaba, le ka matsela a a mebalabala a tlhale ya Egepeto." 
Proverbs7:17 Ke natefesitse bolao jwa me ka malao a mera, le aloe, le kinamone." 
Proverbs7:18 Ntlo, re ineele mo thatong ka botlalo go ya mosong; a re ikgomotse ka marato." 
Proverbs7:19 Gonne monna ga a yo mo gae, o ile loetong lo loleele." 
Proverbs7:20 O tshotse kgetsi ya madi; o tlaa boela gae kgwedi e le tshweu.” 
Proverbs7:21 A mo kgona ka go bua sentle ga gagwe mo gogolo, a mo kgola ka go haka ga dipounama tsa gagwe." 
Proverbs7:22 A mo sala morago ka bonako, jaaka kgomo e ya go tlhajwa, kgotsa jaaka seiaie fa se ya dikgolegong tsa kwatlhao;" 
Proverbs7:23 go tsamaya motswi o mo phololetsa sebete; jaaka nonyane e tle e itlhaganelele seru, e sa itse fa e le tatlhego ya botshelo." 
Proverbs7:24 Ke gone jaana bomorwaaka, ntheetsang, lo tlhokomele mafoko a molomo wa me." 
Proverbs7:25 A pelo ya gago e se ka ya fapogela kwa tseleng ya gagwe, o se ka wa timelela mo ditselaneng tsa gagwe." 
Proverbs7:26 Gonne o digile batho ba le bantsi ba ntshitswe dintho; ee, ba ba bolailweng ke ene ke bontsi jo bogolo." 
Proverbs7:27 Ntlo ya gagwe ke tsela e e yang Bobipong, e fologela mo matsatseng a loso." 
Proverbs8:1 A Botlhale ga a kue, tlhaloganyo a ga a tsholetse lentswe la gagwe?" 
Proverbs8:2 Kwa godimo ga mafelo a a godimo fa tseleng, fa ditselana di kopanelang gone, o eme gone;" 
Proverbs8:3 fa dikgorong, fa botsenong jwa motse, fa go tsenwang ka mejako gone, o kuela godimo; a re:" 
Proverbs8:4 “Ke kua lona banna; lentswe la me le buisa bana ba batho. 
Proverbs8:5 Lona ba lo sa tlhalefang, tlhaloganyang matseba, le lona dieleele lo nne pelo e e tlhaloganyang." 
Proverbs8:6 Utlwang, gonne ke tlaa bua dilo tse di gaisang mo go feteletseng; go tumologa ga dipounama tsa me e tlaa nna ga dilo tse di siameng." 
Proverbs8:7 Gonne molomo wa me o tlaa bolela boammaaruri; boikepo ke makgapha mo dipounameng tsa me. 
Proverbs8:8 Mafoko otlhe a molomo wa me a mo tshiamong; ga go na sepe se se sokameng, le fa e le se se kgopo mo go one." 
Proverbs8:9 A bonala sentle fela otlhe mo go ene yo o tlhaloganyang, a siame mo go ba ba bonang kitso." 
Proverbs8:10 Tsholang thuto ya me, e seng selefera; le kitso bogolo go gouta e e tlhophegileng." 
Proverbs8:11 Gonne botlhale bo molemo bogolo go diperela, mme dilo tsotlhe tse motho o ka di eletsang ga di na go tshwantshiwa le jone." 
Proverbs8:12 Nna, botlhale, ke dirile matseba boago jwa me, ke tsoma kitso le pharologanyo." 
Proverbs8:13 Go boifa Jehofa ke go ila bosula; boikgodiso, le bogoma, le mokgwa o o bosula le molomo o o lesoko, ke dilo tse ke di ilang." 
Proverbs8:14 Kgakololo ke ya me, le kitso e e itekanetseng; ke nna tlhaloganyo; ke na le thata." 
Proverbs8:15 Dikgosi di busa ka nna, le dikgosana di tlhoma molao wa tshiamo ke nna." 
Proverbs8:16 Dikgosana di laola ka nna le bagolwane, e bong baatlhodi botlhe ba lefatshe." 
Proverbs8:17 Ke rata bone ba ba nthatang; ba ba mpatlang ka tlhoafalo ba tlaa mpona. 
Proverbs8:18 Dikhumo ke na natso le tlotlo, ee, dikhumo tse di tlhomameng, le tshiamo." 
Proverbs8:19 Loungo lwa me lo molemo bogolo go gouta, ee, bogolo go gouta e e itshekileng; le totafalelo ya me bogolo go selefera se se tlhophegileng." 
Proverbs8:20 Ke sepela mo tseleng ya tshiamo, mo gare ga ditselane tsa tshiamiso." 
Proverbs8:21 Gore ba ba nthatang ke ba jese boswa jwa dilo, le gore ke tlatse matlo a bone a a bayang mahumo." 
Proverbs8:22 Jehofa o ne a na le nna mo tshimologong ya tsela ya gagwe, pele ga ditiro tsa gagwe tsa bogologolo." 
Proverbs8:23 Ke sa le ke emisiwa kwa bosasimologeng kwa tlholegong, lefatshe le ise le be le nne." 
Proverbs8:24 E rile go se na ditsiba tse di botengteng, ka tsalwa; jale go se na metswedi e e tletseng metsi." 
Proverbs8:25 Pele dithaba di ise di itshetlele, le pele ga dithabana, ka tsalwa." 
Proverbs8:26 E rile a ise a dire lefatshe, le fa e le dinaga, le fa e le tshimologo ya lorole lwa lobopo," 
Proverbs8:27 jale ka a etleetsa magodimo, ka bo ke le gone. Jale ka a baya tikwatikwe mo bophadiphading jwa setsiba se se boteng;" 
Proverbs8:28 e rile a tiisa loapi kwa godimo, jale ka metswedi ya boteng e pumpunyega;" 
Proverbs8:29 e rile a beela lewatle molelwane wa lone, gore metsi a tle a se ka a tlola taolo ya gagwe; ya re a rala metheo ya lefatshe," 
Proverbs8:30 foo ke ne ke le fa go ene, jaaka motho yo e leng tlhogo ya tiro; ke le natefelo ya gagwe ka malatsi otlhe, ke ntse ke itumela ka metlha yotlhe fa pele ga gagwe." 
Proverbs8:31 Ka itumelela lefatshe la gagwe le le nnwang; natefelo ya me le yone e le mo baneng ba batho. 
Proverbs8:32 Ke gone jaana, bomorwaaka, ka re: Ntheetsang, gonne go sego ba ba tshegetsang ditsela tsa me." 
Proverbs8:33 Utlwang thuto, lo tlhalefe, mme lo se ka lwa e gana." 
Proverbs8:34 Go sego motho yo o nkutlwang, a ntse a lebeletse fa dikgorong tsa me, a ntse a letile fa mephakwaneng ya mejako ya me." 
Proverbs8:35 Gonne yo o mponang o bona botshelo, mme o tlaa bona botsalano mo go Jehofa." 
Proverbs8:36 Mme yo o nteofelang o siamololela mowa wa gagwe tota; botlhe ba ba nkilang ba rata loso.” 
Proverbs9:1 Botlhale o agile ntlo ya gagwe, o betlile maotwana a gagwe a supa." 
Proverbs9:2 O tlhabile dikgomo tsa gagwe; o tlhakantse bojalwa jwa gagwe jwa mofine; o bile o baakantse lomati lwa gagwe lwa bojelo. 
Proverbs9:3 O romile barweetsana ba gagwe, o kua a tlhatlogile mafelo a a godimodimo mo motseng, a re:" 
Proverbs9:4 “Le fa e le mang yo o sa tlhalefang, a a tsene kwano!” Ka ga gagwe yo o se nang tlhaloganyo, o mo raya a re:" 
Proverbs9:5 “Ntlong lo je senkgwe sa me, lo nwe bojalwa jwa mofine jo ke bo tlhakantseng." 
Proverbs9:6 Bakelang go dira boeleele, lona ba lo sa tlhalefang, lo tshele; lo sepele mo tseleng ya tlhaloganyo.”" 
Proverbs9:7 Yo o otlhayang mosotli o inaya ditlhong fela; le yo o kgalemelang moikepi o ipaya setshubaba fela. 
Proverbs9:8 O se ka wa kgalemela mosotli, o ka tla a go ila; kgalemela motho yo o botlhale, mme o tlaa go rata." 
Proverbs9:9 Naya motho yo o botlhale thuto, mme o tlaa tlhalefa bogolo; ruta motho yo o siameng, mme o tlaa totafala mo thutong." 
Proverbs9:10 Go boifa Jehofa ke tshimologo ya botlhale; go itse Moitshepi ke yone tlhaloganyo. 
Proverbs9:11 Gonne malatsi a gago a tlaa ntsifadiwa ke nna, le dinyaga tsa botshelo jwa gago di tlaa okediwa." 
Proverbs9:12 Fa o le botlhale, o a bo o itlhalefetse; fa o sotla, ke wena wesi o tlaa go belegang." 
Proverbs9:13 Mosadi wa seeleele o tle a phokelele fela; ga a a tlhalefa, ga a itse sepe." 
Proverbs9:14 O tle a dule fa mojakong ga ntlo ya gagwe, mo setulong se se mo mafelong a godimo mo motseng," 
Proverbs9:15 gore a tle a tlhaeletse ba ba fetang, ba ba tlhamaletseng le ditsela tsa bone, a re:" 
Proverbs9:16 “Le fa e le mang yo o sa tlhalefang, a a tsene kwano;” mme ka ga gagwe yo o se nang tlhaloganyo, a mo reye a re:" 
Proverbs9:17 “Metsi a a utswiwang a monate, le senkgwe se se jelwang mo sephiring se a natefa.”" 
Proverbs9:18 Mme monna yo a sa itse fa baswi ba gone; le go re ba o ba laleditseng ba mo matennyeng a Bobipo. 
Proverbs10:1 Diane tsa ga Solomone. Mosimane yo o botlhale o itumedisa rraagwe, mme mosimane yo o seeleele ke khutsafatso ya ga mmaagwe." 
Proverbs10:2 Dikhumo tsa boikepo ga di thuse sepe, mme tshiamo e golola mo losong." 
Proverbs10:3 Jehofa ga a ketla a leseletsa mowa wa mosiami go nna mo logabeng, mme o kgoromeletsa keletso ya moikepi koo." 
Proverbs10:4 Motho yo o dirang ka seatla se se bolea o tle a humanege, mme seatla sa yo o tlhoafetseng se a humisa." 
Proverbs10:5 Yo o kokoanyang go le selemo ke ngwana wa mosimane yo o botlhale, mme yo o robalang mo motlheng wa thobo ke ngwana wa mosimane yo o tlhabisang ditlhong." 
Proverbs10:6 Masego a mo tlhogong ya mosiami, mme thubako e bipa moikepi molomo." 
Proverbs10:7 E sego kgakologelo ya mosiami, mme leina la moikepi le tlaa bola." 
Proverbs10:8 Yo o pelo e e botlhale o tle a tshole ditaolo, mme lesilo le le balabalang le tlaa wa." 
Proverbs10:9 Yo o tsamayang ka thokgamo o tsamaya ka tlhomamo, mme yo o sokamisang tsela ya gagwe o tlaa itsiwe." 
Proverbs10:10 Yo o gwetlhang ka leitlho o tsosa bohutsana, mme seeleele se se balabalang se tlaa wa." 
Proverbs10:11 Molomo wa mosiami ke motswedi wa botshelo, mme bothubako bo bipa moikepi molomo." 
Proverbs10:12 Kilo e tsosa dikgang, mme lorato lo bipa ditlolo tsotlhe." 
Proverbs10:13 Mo dipounameng tsa yo o nang le tlhalemalejo go fitlhelwa botlhale, mme thupa e lebanye mokotla wa yo o se nang tlhaloganyo." 
Proverbs10:14 Batho ba ba botlhale ba boloka kitso, mme molomo wa seeleele ke tshenyego e e fa gaufi fela." 
Proverbs10:15 Khumo ya mohumi ke yone motse wa gagwe o o thata, se se senyang bahumanegi ke lehuma la bone." 
Proverbs10:16 Letsapa la mosiami le isa kwa botshelong; totafalelo ya moikepi e isa boleong. 
Proverbs10:17 Yo o elang kwatlhao tlhoko o mo tseleng ya botshelo, mme yo o latlhang kgalemelo o a timela." 
Proverbs10:18 Yo o lobang kilo o dipounama tse di akang, mme yo o utlwatsang tshebo o seeleele." 
Proverbs10:19 Mo bontsing jwa mafoko ga go ko go tlhokafala tlolo, mme yo o thibang dipounama tsa gagwe o botlhale." 
Proverbs10:20 Loleme lwa mosiami lo ntse jaaka selefera se se tlhophegileng, mme pelo ya moikepi e molemo o monnye fela." 
Proverbs10:21 Dipounama tsa mosiami di otla batho ba bantsi, mme masilo a swa ka go tlhoka tlhaloganyo." 
Proverbs10:22 Tshegofatso ya ga Jehofa e a humisa, ga a ke a e oketsa ka bohutsana." 
Proverbs10:23 Go ntse jaaka tshameko fela mo mothong wa seeleele go dira boikepo, mme botlhale bo ntse jalo mo mothong wa tlhaloganyo." 
Proverbs10:24 Poifo ya moikepi e tlaa tla mo go ene, mme keletso yo mosiami o tlaa e newa." 
Proverbs10:25 E re fa setsuatsue se feta, moikepi a ba a sa tlhole a leyo, mme mosiami ke motheo wa bosaenkae." 
Proverbs10:26 Jaaka bojalwa jo bo bodila mo menong, le jaaka mosi mo matlhong, motho yo o bobodu o ntse jalo mo go ba ba mo romang." 
Proverbs10:27 Go boifa Jehofa go oketsa malatsi, mme dinyaga tsa moikepi di tlaa khutsafadiwa." 
Proverbs10:28 Tsholofelo ya mosiami e tlaa nna boitumelo, mme tebelelo ya moikepi e tlaa nyelela." 
Proverbs10:29 Tsela ya ga Jehofa ke kago e e thata ya phemelo mo mosiaming, mme ke tshenyo mo go ba ba dirang boikepo." 
Proverbs10:30 Mosiami ga a ketla a sutisiwa gope, mme moikepi ga a ketla a aga mo lefatsheng." 
Proverbs10:31 Molomo wa mosiami o ntsha botlhale, mme loleme lo lo lesoko lo tlaa kgaolwa." 
Proverbs10:32 Dipounama tsa mosiami di itse se se lebosegang, mme molomo wa moikepi o bua tse di lesoko fela." 
Proverbs11:1 Selekanyo sa pego se se tsietsang ke se se makgapha mo go Jehofa, mme sebokete se se lekanyeng se a mo natefela." 
Proverbs11:2 E re fa boikgodiso bo tla, foo go tle ditlhong, mme botlhale bo nna le yo o ikgobalatsang." 
Proverbs11:3 Botlhoka molato jwa bathokgami bo tlaa ba goga, mme lesoko la ba ba bongowane le tlaa ba senya." 
Proverbs11:4 Dikhumo ga di thuse sepe mo tsatsing la bogale, mme tshiamo e golola mo losong." 
Proverbs11:5 Tshiamo ya moitekanedi e tlaa mo kaela tsela ya gagwe, mme moikepi o tlaa wa ka boikepo jwa gagwe." 
Proverbs11:6 Tshiamo ya bathokgami e tlaa ba golola, mme ba ba dirang ka bonongwane ba tlaa tshwarelwa mo bosenying jwa bone fela." 
Proverbs11:7 Motlhang motho wa boikepo o swang, tebelelo ya gagwe e nyelele, le tsholofelo ya boikepo e fele." 
Proverbs11:8 Mosiami o gololwa mo tlalelong, mme moikepi a tsene mo boemong jwa gagwe." 
Proverbs11:9 Motho yo o sa reng Modimo sepe o senya wa ga gabo ka molomo wa gagwe, mme mosiami o tlaa gololwa ka kitso." 
Proverbs11:10 E a re go nna molemo mo mosiaming motse o itumele, mme mogang moikepi o nyelelang, go nne tuduetso." 
Proverbs11:11 Motse o golediwa ke tshegofatso ya mothokgami, mme o ribegediwe ke molomo wa moikepi." 
Proverbs11:12 Yo o nyatsang wa ga gabo ga a na botlhale, mme motho wa tlhaloganyo o ithiba mo puong." 
Proverbs11:13 Yo o tsamayatsamayang e le mosebi o senola maoma, mme yo o mowa wa boikanngo o a a loba." 
Proverbs11:14 Kwa go se nang kgogo ya botlhale gone, batho ba a wa, mme mo bontsing jwa bagakolodi go nne le polokego." 
Proverbs11:15 Yo o leng moemedi wa moeng o tlaa babalesega ka gone, mme yo o ilang kemelo o tlhomame." 
Proverbs11:16 Mosadi yo o pelotshweu o nnela ruri le tlotlo; mme batho ba ba thubakang ba nnela ruri le khumo. 
Proverbs11:17 Motho yo o boutlwelobotlhoko o itirela mowa wa gagwe molemo, mme yo o selalome o itshwenya nama ya gagwe." 
Proverbs11:18 Moikepi o ipapalela tuelo ya tsietso, mme yo o jalang tshiamo o na le tuelo e e tlhomameng." 
Proverbs11:19 Yo o nitameng mo tshiamong o tlaa fitlha kwa botshelong. Mme yo o latelelang bosula o dira jalo go tla a inaya loso. 
Proverbs11:20 Ba ba lesoko mo pelong ke difedisa pelo mo go Jehofa, mme ba ba itekanetseng mo tseleng ya bone, ke natefelo ya gagwe." 
Proverbs11:21 Le fa seatla se tshwaragana le seatla, motho yo o bosula ga a ketla a tlhoka petso, mme losika lwa mosiami lo tlaa gololwa." 
Proverbs11:22 Jaaka lenyena la gouta mo nkong ya kolobe, mosadi yo montle, yo o se nang pharologanyo, o ntse fela jalo."
