Isaiah10:15 A selepe se a bo se tlaa belafalela ene yo o remang ka sone? A šage o tlaa ikgodisetsa ene yo o setlhang ka ene? Jaaka fa thupa e ka thukhuthetsa ene yo o e tsholetsang, gongwe jaaka fa thobane e ka tsholetsa ene yo o seng logong." 
Isaiah10:16 Ke gone ka moo Morena, Jehofa wa masomosomo, o tlaa tsenyang tlhorego mo go ba ba nonneng ba gagwe; mme ka kwa tlase ga kgalalelo ya gagwe go tlaa gotsiwa phiso jaaka phiso ya molelo." 
Isaiah10:17 Lesedi la Iseraele e tlaa nna lone molelo, le Moitshepi wa gagwe o tlaa nna one kgabo; o tlaa fisa o laila lokhi lwa gagwe le lorwana lwa gagwe ka letsatsi le le lengwe fela." 
Isaiah10:18 O tlaa laila kgalalelo ya sekgwa sa gagwe, le ya leota la gagwe le le ungwang, mowa le mmele; mme go tlaa nna jaaka fa motsholamokgele a idibala." 
Isaiah10:19 Mme masalela a ditlhare tsa sekgwa sa gagwe a tlaa nna mannye, le ngwanyana o ka ba a di kwala fela." 
Isaiah10:20 Go tlaa dirala mo letsatsing leo, go re, maselela a Iseraele, le bafalodi ba ntlo ya ga Jakobe, ga ba ketla ba tlhola ba ikaega mo go ene yo o kileng a ba itaya, mme ba tlaa ikaega mo go Jehofa, Moitshepi wa Iseraele, mo boammaaruring." 
Isaiah10:21 Masalela a tlaa bowa, e bong masiela a ga Jakobe, a boela mo Modimong, Mothata." 
Isaiah10:22 Gonne le fa batho ba me ba ntse jaaka mošawa wa lewatle, ke masiela fela a bone a a tlaa boang; go laotswe nyeletso e e penologang ka tshiamo." 
Isaiah10:23 Gonne nyeletso, e bong nyeletso e e laotsweng, Morena, Jehofa wa masomosomo o tlaa e dira mo gare ga lefatshe lotlhe." 
Isaiah10:24 Ke gone go buang Morena, Jehofa wa masomosomo a re: “Hee, batho ba me ba lo agileng mo Sione, se boifeng Moasiria; le fa a go itaya ka thupa, a lo ekela thobane ya gagwe ka fa mokgweng wa Egepeto." 
Isaiah10:25 Gonne go sa le lobakanyana lo lo khutshwane, mme kgakatsego e tlaa bo e sweditswe, le bogale jwa me, mo tshenyegong ya bone." 
Isaiah10:26 Jehofa wa masomosomo o tlaa mo tsosetsa sebetso, jaaka mo kgailong ya Midiane kwa lefikeng la Orebe; mme thobane ya gagwe e tlaa okama lewatle, o tlaa e tsholetsa ka fa mokgweng wa Egepeto." 
Isaiah10:27 Mme go tlaa dirala mo letsatsing leo, go re, morwalo wa gagwe o tlaa tloga mo leruding la gago, le jokwe ya gagwe mo thamong ya gago, mme jokwe e tlaa nyelediwa ka ntlha ya tlotso.”" 
Isaiah10:28 O fitlhile mo Aiathe, o raletse Migerone; o baya makokoma a gagwe kwa Mikemaše;" 
Isaiah10:29 ba fetile ka phata; ba thibeletse ba lala kwa Geba; Rama o a roroma; Gibea wa ga Saulo o tshabile. 
Isaiah10:30 Gala thata ka lentswe la gago wena, morwadia Galime! Reetsa, wena Laiše! A motho wa mogolo, wena Anathothe!" 
Isaiah10:31 Matemena ke mofaladi; banni ba Gebime ba phuthegela go tshaba. 
Isaiah10:32 Ka tsatsi leno fela o tlaa thibelela kwa Nobe; o thokgoseletsa thaba ya morwadia Sione seatla, e bong thota ya Jerusalema." 
Isaiah10:33 Bonang, Morena, Jehofa wa masomosomo o tlaa kgaola dikala ka therego: tse di kwa godimo tse di godileng di tlaa rengwa, le tse di kwa godimodimo di tlaa folosediwa kwa tlase." 
Isaiah10:34 O tlaa rema ditswatswa tsa sekgwa ka tshipi, mme Lebanone o tlaa wa ka yo o nonofileng." 
Isaiah11:1 Go tlaa tswa letlhogela mo thitong ya ga Jese, mme letswela le le tswang mo metsweng ya gagwe le tlaa ungwa." 
Isaiah11:2 Mowa wa ga Jehofa o tlaa nna mo go ene, mowa wa botlhale le wa tlhaloganyo, mowa wa kgakololo le wa nonofo, mowa wa kitso le wa go boifa Jehofa." 
Isaiah11:3 Go thama ga gagwe go tlaa nna mo go boifeng Jehofa; ga a ketla a atlhola ka fa ponong ya matlho a gagwe, le fa e le go kgalema ka fa kutlong ya ditsebe tsa gagwe." 
Isaiah11:4 O tlaa atlholela bahumanegi ka tshiamo, a kgalemelele bakgobaladi ba lefatshe ka tekatekanyo; mme o tlaa itaya lefatshe ka thupa ya molomo wa gagwe, a bolaya baikepi ka mowa wa dipounama tsa gagwe." 
Isaiah11:5 Tshiamo e tlaa nna moitlamo wa lotheka lwa gagwe, le boikanngo bo nne moitlamo wa dirope tsa gagwe." 
Isaiah11:6 Phiri e tlaa aga le kwanyana, nkwe e tlaa botha le potsane; le namane le tawana di tlaa fula mmogo; mme ngwanyana yo monye o tlaa di goga." 
Isaiah11:7 Kgomo e namagadi e tlaa fula e na le bera; bana ba tsone ba tlaa botha mmogo; mme tau e tlaa ja motlhaka jaaka kgomo. 
Isaiah11:8 Ngwanyana yo o anyang o tlaa tshameka fa mosimeng wa kake, ngwanyana yo o kgwisitsweng o tlaa baya seatla sa gagwe fa kutleng ya šaušawane." 
Isaiah11:9 Ga di ketla di utlwisa botlhoko le fa e le go senya mo thabeng yotlhe ya me e e boitshepo; gonne lefatshe le tlaa bo le tletse kitso ya go itse Jehofa, jaaka metsi a khurumeditse lewatle." 
Isaiah11:10 Go tlaa dirala mo letsatsing leo, go re motswe wa ga Jese, yo o emeng a le mokgele wa ditšhaba, merafe e tlaa leba kwa go ene; mme felo fa o nnang gone go tlaa nna kgalalelo." 
Isaiah11:11 Go tlaa dirala mo letsatsing leo go re Morena o tlaa ntsha letsogo la gagwe gape go ba a tsaya masalela a batho ba gagwe, a a tlaa bong a setse, a tswa Asiria le kwa Egepeto, le kwa Patherose, le kwa Kuše, le kwa Elame, le kwa Shinare, le kwa Hamathe, le kwa ditlhakeng tsa lewatle." 
Isaiah11:12 O tlaa tlhomela merafe mokgele mme o tlaa kokoanya balelekwi ba Iseraele; o tlaa phuthela mmogo bafaladi ba Juta ba tswa dikgokgotshong tsoo nne tsa lefatshe. 
Isaiah11:13 Lefufa la ga Eferaime le lone le tlaa tloga, le ba ba tshwenyang Juta ba tlaa kgaolwa; Eferaime ga a ketla a nna lefufa le Juta, le Juta ga a ketla a tshwenya Eferaime." 
Isaiah11:14 Ba tlaa phomegela mo leruding la Bafilisitia ka fa ntlheng ya bophirimatsatsi; mmogo ba tlaa thopa bana ba botlhabatsatsi; ba tlaa ntshetsa letsogo la bone kwa Etome le Moabe; mme bana ba Amone ba tlaa ba ineela. 
Isaiah11:15 Jehofa o tlaa senyetsa ruri senwane sa lewatle la Egepeto; mme o tlaa thokgosetsa letsogo la gagwe godimo ga Noka ka phefo ya gagwe e e tshubang, o tlaa e betsa e nna dinokana di supa, o tlaa di kgabagantsha batho ka dinao di ikomeleletse fela." 
Isaiah11:16 Go tlaa nna tsela e tona ya mheru ya masalela a batho ba gagwe, ba ba tlaa bong ba setse ba tswa Asiria; jaaka e kile ya ne e le ya ga Iseraele mo motlheng o ba duleng mo lefatsheng la Egepeto ka one." 
Isaiah12:1 E tlaa re mo letsatsing leo o tlaa re: “Ke tlaa go ntshetsa malebogo Morena; gonne le fa o kile wa nna bogale le nna, bogale jwa gago bo boile, mme o ntse wa nkgomotsa." 
Isaiah12:2 “Bonang, Modimo ke poloka ya me, ke tlaa ikanya fela, ga nketla ke boifa; gonne Jehofa Modimo ke thata ya me, le sefela sa me, mme o diregile poloka ya me.”" 
Isaiah12:3 Ke gone ka moo lo tlaa gang metsi ka boitumelo mo didibeng tsa poloka. 
Isaiah12:4 Mme lo tlaa bua mo letsatsing leo, lo re: “Ntshetsang Jehofa malebogo, bitsang leina la gagwe, kakanyang ditirotiro tsa gagwe mo ditšhabeng, umakang, go re, leina la gagwe le goletsegile." 
Isaiah12:5 Opelelang Jehofa; gonne o dirile dilo tse di gaisang; mo, a go itsiwe mo lefatsheng lotlhe." 
Isaiah12:6 Kuela godimo, o goe, wena monni wa Sione; gonne go mogolo moitshepi wa Iseraele mo gare ga gago.”" 
Isaiah13:1 Ponelopele ka ga Babilone, e Isaia morwa Amose o ne a e bona." 
Isaiah13:1 Ponelopele ka ga Babilone, e Isaia morwa Amose o ne a e bona." 
Isaiah13:2 Tlhomang mokgele mo thabeng e e loforotlho, ba tsholeletseng lentswe, akgang seatla, gore ba ye go tsena mo dikgorong tsa batho ba bagolo." 
Isaiah13:3 Ke laotse batshwaedi ba me, ee, ke biditse bagale ba me, ke ba bileditse bogale jwa me, e bong ba ba kganang ka boitumelo ka ntlha ya borena jwa me." 
Isaiah13:4 A modumo wa bontsi jwa batho mo dithabeng, jaaka e kete ya tšhaba e tona! A modumo wa kudumedi ya magosi a merafe e phuthegile mmogo! Jehofa wa masomosomo o epela tlhabano ntwa." 
Isaiah13:5 Ba tswa kwa lefatsheng le le kgakala, kwa bokhutlong jwa legodimo, e bong Jehofa, a na le dibolao tsa kgakalo ya gagwe, go senya lefatshe lotlhe fela." 
Isaiah13:6 Bokolelang; gonne letsatsi la ga Jehofa le gaufi; le tlaa tla jaaka tshenyego e e tswang mo go Mothataotlhe. 
Isaiah13:7 Ke gone ka moo diatla tsotlhe di tlaa repang, le pelo nngwe le nngwe e tlaa nyema." 
Isaiah13:8 Ba tlaa rerega; metlotsedi e tlaa ba tshwara le mahutsana; ba tlaa nna mo botlhokong jaaka mosadi yo o belegang; ba tlaa gakgamalelana fela; difatlhogo tsa bone di tlaa nna difatlhogo tsa kgabo ya molelo. 
Isaiah13:9 Bonang letsatsi la ga Jehofa le etla, la bolalome, ka tšhakgalo le bogale jo bo tukang, go dira lefatshe tshwafalo, le go senyetsa ruri baleofi ba ba mo go lone." 
Isaiah13:10 Gonne dinaledi tsa legodimo le dinaletsana tsa lone ga di ketla di ntsha lesedi la tsone; letsatsi le tlaa tlhatloga le fifetse, le kgwedi ga e ketla e phatsimisa lesedi la yone." 
Isaiah13:11 Lefatshe ke tlaa le beletsa bosula jwa bone, le baikepi boikepo jwa bone; ke tlaa khutlisa boikgantsho jwa ba ba bopelompe, ke tlaa isa tlase boipego jwa ba ba boitshegang." 
Isaiah13:12 Ke tlaa dira gore monna a tlhokafale bogolo go gouta e ntlentle, e bong motho bogolo go gouta e e itshekileng ya Ofire." 
Isaiah13:13 Ke gone ka moo ke tlaa roromisang magodimo, lefatshe le tlaa kutumisiwa le tswa mo felong ga lone, ka tšhakgalo ya ga Jehofa wa masomosomo, le mo letsatsing la bogale jwa gagwe jo bo tukang." 
Isaiah13:14 Mme go tlaa dirala, go re, jaaka tshephe e e khukhelwang, le jaaka dinku tse di se nang ope yo o di phuthang, mongwe le mongwe wa bone o tlaa sokologela kwa go ba ga gabo, motho mongwe le mongwe o tla tshabela kwa lefatsheng la ga gabo." 
Isaiah13:15 Mongwe le mongwe yo o fitlhelwang o tlaa sogotlhwa; mongwe le mongwe yo o tshwarwang o tlaa wa ka tšhaka. 
Isaiah13:16 Ditshea tsa bona di tlaa phatlakanngwa fa pele ga matlho a bone; matlo a bone a tlaa thopiwa, le basadi ba bone ba tlaa betelelwa." 
Isaiah13:17 Bonang, ke tlaa ba tsosetsa Bamete ba ba sa tlhokomeleng selefera, le ka ga gouta ga ba ketla ba itumela mo go yone." 
Isaiah13:18 Mara a bone a tlaa phatlakanya makau a bone; loungo lwa sebopelo ga ba ketla ba lo tlhomogela pelo; leitlho la bone ga le ketla le rekegela banyana. 
Isaiah13:19 Mme Babilone, kgalalelo ya magosi, bontle jwa pelafalo ya Bakalatea, o tlaa nna jaaka fa Modimo o lo wa ribegetsa Sotoma le Gomora." 
Isaiah13:20 Ga o ketla o tlhola o nnwa ke batho gope, le gone ga go ope yo o tlaa agang mo go one go tswa kokomaneng, go ya kokomaneng; le gone Moarabia ga a ketla a tlhoma mogope wa gagwe gone; le gone badisa ga ba ketla ba bothisa matsomane a bone gone." 
Isaiah13:21 Dibatana tsa naga di tlaa robala gone; matlo a bone a tlaa tlala ditshedi tse di dumadumang; le bontšhe ba tlaa aga gone, le badimo ba sekapodi ba tlaa kalapa gone." 
Isaiah13:22 Diphiri di tlaa lela mo matlong a a thata a bone, le diphokoje mo matlong a magolo a mantle a bone; mme lobaka lwa gagwe lo atametse go tla, le malatsi a gagwe ga a ketla a nyafadiwa." 
Isaiah14:1 Gonne Jehofa o tlaa tlhomogela Jakobe pelo, o tlaa nama a itshenkela Iseraele, a ba baya mo lefatsheng la bone; yo o leng moeng o tlaa ikopanya nabo, mme ba tlaa ngaparela ntlo ya ga Jakobe." 
Isaiah14:2 Ditšhaba di tlaa ba tsaya di ba isa kwa felong ga bone: mme ntlo ya Iseraele e tlaa di ruela mo lefatsheng la ga Jakobe go nna batlhanka le malata; ba tlaa ntsha ditshwarwa, bone ba ba kileng ba ntshiwa ditshwarwa ke bone; mme ba tlaa busa bapatiki ba bone." 
Isaiah14:3 Go tlaa dirala mo letsatsing le Jehofa o tlaa go nayang boikhutso ka lone ka ga bohutsana jwa gago, le ka ga pitlagano ya gago, le ka ga tirelo e e thata e o ne o dirisiwa mo go yone," 
Isaiah14:4 go re o tlaa tlhaba seane se ka ga Babilone, o re: “Ana mopatiki o khutlile jang! Motse o o gouta o khutlile jang!" 
Isaiah14:5 Jehofa o robile serobi sa baikepi, e bong thobane ya bogosi ya babusi; e le" 
Isaiah14:6 ba ba kileng ba nna ba teketa ditšhaba ka teketo e e sa emeng, ba busa merafe ka bogale, ka pogiso e go se nang ope yo o e kganelang." 
Isaiah14:7 Lefatshe lotlhe le ikhutsitse, le iketlile; ba ponyega mo go opeleng;" 
Isaiah14:8 ee, ditlhare tsa mafira di a itumela ka ga gago le masetara a Lebanone tsa re: ‘E sa le ka o namaladiwa fa fatshe ga go ise go ko go tle moremi ope go re rema.’" 
Isaiah14:9 “Bobipo kwa tlase o tsebeetsegela go ya go kgatlhantsha go tla ga gago; o go tsosetsa baswi, e bong ditlhogo tsotlhe tsa lefatshe; o nanotse dikgosi tsotlhe tsa merafe mo ditulong tsa tsone tsa bogosi." 
Isaiah14:10 Botlhe bao ba tlaa bua nao ba re: ‘A e ntse jaana le wena o koafetse jaaka rona? A o semegile go tshwana le rona?’ 
Isaiah14:11 Boitlotlomatso jwa gago bo foloseditswe mo Bobipong, le modumo wa diletso tsa gago; seboko se adilwe tlase ga gago, dibokwana di a go hupetsa." 
Isaiah14:12 “A bo o kile wa wa kwa legodimong, wena naledi ya masa! Morwa phepafalo ya bosa! A bo o kile wa remelwa fa fatshe, wena yo o kileng wa namalatsa merafe fa fatshe!" 
Isaiah14:13 Mme wa bo o ne o itheile mo pelong ya gago, wa re, o tlaa tlhatlogela kwa legodimong, o tlaa goleletsa setulo sa gago sa bogosi godimo ga dinaledi tsa Modimo; o tlaa dula mo thabeng ya bophuthegelo, kwa dikhutlong tsa lefatshe, ntlheng ya botsheka." 
Isaiah14:14 Wa re o tlaa tlhatlogela godimo ga bogodimo jwa maru, o tlaa tshwana le Mogodimodimo." 
Isaiah14:15 Le fa go ntse jalo o tlaa folosediwa mo Bobipong, kwa dikhutlong tsa molete." 
Isaiah14:16 “Ba ba go bonang ba tlaa go sekaseka ka matlho, ba tlaa go akanya, ba re: ‘Monna yo a ke ene yo o ne a roromisa lefatshe, a reketlisa magosi;" 
Isaiah14:17 a dira lefatshe go nna naga fela, a ribegetsa metse ya lone; mme a se ke a gololela ditshwarwa tsa gagwe go ya magabone?’" 
Isaiah14:18 Dikgosi tsotlhe tsa merafe, tsotlhetsotlhe fela, di totometse mo tlotlong, nngwe le nngwe e le mo ntlong ya yone;" 
Isaiah14:19 mme wena o latlhetswe kwa ntle ga phupu ya gago jaaka kala e e makgapha, jaaka diaparo tsa ba ba bolailweng, ba ba sogotlhilweng ka tšhaka, ba ba kgokologelang mo majeng a molete; jaaka setoto se se sobotlwang ka dinao." 
Isaiah14:20 Ga o ketla o kopanngwa le tsone mo phitlhong, ka o sentse lefatshe la gago, o bolaile batho ba gago; losika lwa badirabosula ga lo ketla lo umakwa gope ka bosenabokhutlo." 
Isaiah14:21 Baakanyetsang bana ba gagwe polao ka ntlha ya boikepo jwa borraabo; gore ba tle ba se ka ba tsoga ba rua lefatshe, ba tlatsa sefatlhogo sa lefatshe ka metse.”" 
Isaiah14:22 “Ke tlaa tsoga ke tlhabana nabo,” go bua Jehofa wa masomosomo: “Ke kgaola ke tlosetsa Babilone leina le lesalela, le ngwana wa mosimane, le ngwana wa ngwana wa mosimane,” go bua Jehofa." 
Isaiah14:23 “Le gone ke tlaa go ntsha boswa jwa setlhong, le megobe ya metsi; mme ke tlaa go feela ka lofeelo lwa tshenyo;” go bua Jehofa wa masomosomo." 
Isaiah14:24 Jehofa wa masomosomo o ikanne, a re: “Ruri jaaka ke akantse, go tlaa dirala jalo; le jaaka ke ikaeletse, go tlaa ema fela jalo;" 
Isaiah14:25 go re, ke tlaa robaganya Mosiria mo lefatsheng la me, le mo dithabeng tsa me, ke tlaa mo gataka ka dinao; foo jokwe ya gagwe e tlaa tloga mo go bone, le morwalo wa gagwe o tlaa tloga leruding la bone.”" 
Isaiah14:26 Ke lone boikaelelo jo bo ikaeleletsweng lefatshe lotlhe; mo ke sone seatla se se otlololetsweng merafe yotlhe. 
Isaiah14:27 Gonne Jehofa wa masomosomo, o ikaeletse, mme e mang yo o tlaa kaololang? Letsogo la gagwe le lolame, mme ke mang yo o tlaa le gonang." 
Isaiah14:28 E rile ka ngwaga o Ahase o suleng ka one ga nna ponelopele e. Ga re: 
Isaiah14:29 “O se ka wa itumela wena Filisitia, gotlhe ga gago, ka go re, thupa e e kileng ya go betsa e robegile, gonne mo motsweng wa noga go tlaa tswa šaušawane, mme lotsalo lwa yone e tlaa nna noga e e molelo e e fofang." 
Isaiah14:30 Mme batsalwapele ba bahumanegi ba tlaa ja fela, le batlhoki ba tlaa ithobalela fela mo boiketlong; motswe wa gago ke tlaa o bolaya ka leuba, le masalela a gago a tlaa bolawa." 
Isaiah14:31 “Bokolela, wena kgoro; lela, wena motse; o nyerile, wena Filisitia gotlhe fela ga gago; gonne go kua mosi kwa ntlheng ya botsheka, mme ga go ope yo o ikeolelang kwa thoko mo metlheng ya gagwe e e laotsweng.”" 
Isaiah14:32 Jaana barongwa ba merafe ba tlaa fetolwa go tweng? Go tlaa twe: “Jehofa o theile Sione, mme bapatikwi ba batho ba gagwe ba tlaa fitlhela botshabelo mo go ene.”" 
Isaiah15:1 Ponelopele ka ga Moabe. Gonne Are wa Moabe o sentswe, o kgakgabaditswe mo bosigong bo le bongwe fela; gonne Kire wa Moabe o sentswe, o kgakgabaditswe mo bosigong bo le bongwe fela." 
Isaiah15:2 O tlhatlogetse kwa Bajithe, le kwa Dibone, kwa mafelong a a tlotlometseng a ya go lela: Moabe o bokolelela Nebo le Meteba; mo ditlhogong tsotlhe go logatadima, ditedu tsotlhe di beotswe." 
Isaiah15:3 Ba itlama ka letsela la kgetse mo mebileng ya bone; mongwe le mongwe o bokolela a lela thata, ba le mo godimo ga matlo, le mo dibatleng tse di atlhameng." 
Isaiah15:4 Le Hešebone o a gala, le ene Eleale; go goa ga bone go utlwala le kwa Jahase; ke gone ka moo banna ba ba tlhometseng ba Moabe ba galang thata; mowa wa gagwe o roroma mo teng ga gagwe." 
Isaiah15:5 Pelo ya me e kurueletsa Moabe; batho ba bagolo ba gagwe ba tshabela kwa Soare, kwa Egelathe-šelišiya; gonne ba tlhatloga mokong wa Luhithe ka selelo; gonne mo tseleng ya Horonaime ba tsosa kurueletso ya tshenyego." 
Isaiah15:6 Gonne metsi a Nimerime a tlaa kgala; bojang bo swabile, loreme lwa fela, ga go na sepe se se talana." 
Isaiah15:7 Ke gone ka moo letlotlo le ba le bapetseng, le se ba se bolokileng, ba tlaa di rwala ba isa kwa nokaneng ya madibonoka." 
Isaiah15:8 Gonne kuruetso e potonogile le melelwane ya Moabe; go bokolela ga gone kwa Egelaime, le go bokolela ga gone kwa Beerelime." 
Isaiah15:9 Gonne metsi a Dimone a tletse madi; le fa go ntse jalo ke tlaa nna ke tlisa mo go Dimone fela, ke tlaa tlisa tau mo go ene yo o falolang wa Moabe, le mo masaleleng a lefatshe." 
Isaiah16:1 Isetsang mmusi wa lefatshe lekgetho la dikwanyana go tswa kwa Sela, o o kwa ntlheng ya sefola sa naga, di ye kwa thabeng ya morwadia Sione." 
Isaiah16:2 Gonne go tlaa nna go re, jaaka dinonyane tse di kailakailang, jaaka setlhaga se se phatlaletseng, bomorwadia Moabe ba tlaa nna jalo kwa matsibogong a Arenone." 
Isaiah16:3 “A go tswe kgakololo, dirafatsa katlholo; dira moriti wa gago o nne jaaka bosigo mo gare ga motshegare; fitlha balatlhegi; o se ka wa senola mokgarakgatshegi." 
Isaiah16:4 A balatlhegi ba nne ba age nao; mme ka ga Moabe o nne boiphitlhelo jwa gagwe mo mothoping; gonne moikgagapeledi o fedisitswe, go thopa go a khutla, bapatiki ba nyeleditswe mo lefatsheng." 
Isaiah16:5 Setulo sengwe sa bogosi se tlaa tlhomamisiwa mo kutlwelongbotlhoko, mme mongwe o tlaa dula mo go sone mo boammaaruring, mo mogopeng wa ga Dafite; a atlhola, a senka katlholo, a le bofefo go dira tshiamo.”" 
Isaiah16:6 Re utlwaletse boikgodiso jwa Moabe, fa a le boikgodiso thata; e bong boitelaganyo jwa gagwe, le boikgodiso jwa gagwe, le tšhakgalo ya gagwe; maipelafatso a gagwe e be e se sepe." 
Isaiah16:7 Ke gone ka moo Moabe o tlaa bokolelela Moabe, mongwe le mongwe o tlaa bokolela; lo tlaa lelela ditshwabi tsa mafine tsa Kireharesethe, ka lo tlaa bo lo kgwathetse ruri." 
Isaiah16:8 Gonne maota a Hešebone a a bokalala, le one mofine wa Sibema; barena ba merafe ba robakile ditlhongwa tse di tlhaotsweng tsa one: tsa fitlha kwa Jasere, tsa itsamaelela kwa sefoleng sa naga; menamo ya one e ne ya anama ya tlolaganya lewatle." 
Isaiah16:9 Ke gone ka moo ke tlaa lelang ka selelo sa Jasere, ke lelela mofine wa Sibema; ke tlaa go nosa ka dikeledi tsa me, wena Hešebone, le Eleale; gonne mokgosi wa ntwa o wetse mo dikungweng tsa gago tsa letlhabula, le mo thobong ya gago." 
Isaiah16:10 Boitumelo bo tlositswe, le boipelo mo leoteng le le ungwang; le mo masimong a lofine ga go ketla go nna dipina, le fa e le modumo wa boitumelo; ga go ketla go nna mogati yo o tlaa gatelang bojalwa jwa mofine mo didibeletsong; ke khutlisitse lošalaba lwa phulo ya mafine." 
Isaiah16:11 Ke gone ka moo mala a me a dumelang Moabe jaaka harepe, le diteng tsa me di dumela Kireherese." 
Isaiah16:12 Go tlaa dirala go re e tlaa re Moabe a iponatsa, e tlaa re a itapisa mo felong fa go tlotlometseng, mme a tla mo felong ga boitshepo ga gagwe go rapela, ga a ketla a kgona." 
Isaiah16:13 Lefoko le, ke lone le Jehofa o le buileng mo motlheng o o fetileng ka ga Moabe." 
Isaiah16:14 Gompieno Jehofa o buile a re: “E tlaa re go e se go fete dinyaga di le tharo, jaaka dinyaga tsa yo o thapetsweng tuelo, kgalalelo ya Moabe e tlaa bo e dule nyatsego a na le bontsintsi jo bogolo jwa gagwe; masalela one a tlaa bo a le mannye a sa kaiwe sepe.”" 
Isaiah17:1 Ponelopele ka ga Damaseko. Bonang, Damaseko o khutlisitswe, gore e se nne motse, mme e tlaa nna mokoa wa mo go robakanyeng." 
Isaiah17:2 Metse ya Aroere e tlhobogilwe; e tlaa nna ga matsomane a a tlaa bothang, mme ga go na sepe se se tlaa a tshosang." 
Isaiah17:3 Le yone kago ya phemelo e tlaa khutla mo Eferaime, le bogosi mo go Damaseko, le mo go setseng ga Siria; di tlaa nna jaaka kgalalelo ya bana ba Iseraele, go bua Jehofa wa masomosomo." 
Isaiah17:4 Go tlaa dirala mo letsatsing leo, go re, kgalalelo ya ga Jakobe e tlaa swarega, le monono wa nama ya gagwe o tlaa tlhorega." 
Isaiah17:5 Go tlaa nna jaaka fa morobi a phutha mabele a a emeng, mme letsogo la gagwe le roba diako; ee, go tlaa nna jaaka fa motho a ronopa diako mo mokgatšheng wa Refaime." 
Isaiah17:6 Le fa go ntse jalo go tlaa tlogelwa maronopo mo go one, jaaka mo kudubatsong ya motlhware, dikungwa di le pedi gongwe di le tharo kwa ntlheng ga kala e e kwa godimodimo, di le nne gongwe di le tlhano mo dikaleng tse di lemetseng kwa ntle, tsa setlhare se se sisang, go bua Jehofa Modimo wa Iseraele." 
Isaiah17:7 E tlaa re mo letsatsing leo motho o tlaa leba Modiri wa gagwe, le matlho a gagwe a tlaa tlhokomela Moitshepi wa Iseraele." 
Isaiah17:8 Ga a ketla a leba dibeso tse e leng tiro ya diatla tsa gagwe, le gone ga a ketla a tlhokomela se diatla tsa gagwe di se dirileng, le fa e le Medimako, kgotsa ditshwantsho tsa letsatsi." 
Isaiah17:9 Mo letsatsing leo metse e e thata ya gagwe e tlaa nna jaaka mafelo a a tlhobogilweng mo sekgweng, kgotsa a a kwa tlhoreng ya thaba, a a sa leng a tlhobogwa fa pele ga bana ba Iseraele; e tlaa nna tshwafalo fela." 
Isaiah17:10 Gonne o gakilwe ke Modimo wa poloko ya gago, mme wa se ka wa gakologelwa lefika la thata ya gago; ke gone ka moo wa tlhoma ditlhongwa tse di kgatlhang fela, wa tsenya matlhogela a mafatshe a sele teng." 
Isaiah17:11 E ne ya re mo letsatsing la go tlhoma ga gago wa go beela ka logora, mme e re go le ka moso wa thuntsha peo ya gago; mme e re mo motlheng wa khutsafalo le wa bohutsana jo bobe, thobo e tshabe e ye koo fela." 
Isaiah17:12 A kudumedi ya ditšhaba di le dintsi tse di sumang jaaka go suma ga mawatle; le go tšhabanyetsega ga merafe e e tšhabanyetsegang jaaka go tšhabanya ga metsi a a thata e kgolo! 
Isaiah17:13 Merafe e tlaa tšhabanyetsega jaaka go tšhabanya ga metsi a matona a mantsi; o tlaa e kgalemela, e tlaa tshabela kwa kgakala, mme ba tlaa kgopholwa jaaka mmoko wa dithaba fa pele ga phefo, le jaaka lorole lo lo sokeletsegang fa pele ga sefefo." 
Isaiah17:14 E re go le maitsebowa, bonang therego; mme go ise go nne bosa ba bo ba seyo. E ke yone kabelo ya ba ba re thopang, ke mo go abelwang ba ba re gapang." 
Isaiah18:1 Ija! A lefatshe la go suma ga diphuka, le le leng kwa moseja ga dinoka tsa Ethiopia;" 
Isaiah18:2 le le romang barongwa ka lewatle, e bong ka makawe a koma mo metsing, ba re: “Tsamayang lona barongwa ba difadima, lo ye morafeng o o batho ba baleele ba ba borethe, kwa bathong ba ba sa leng ba simologa ba nna poitshego go tla le mo nakong eno; e le morafe o o lekanyetsang, le o o sobotlang, o lefatshe la one le faraferweng ke dinoka!”" 
Isaiah18:3 Lona lotlhe banni ba lobopo lotlhe, le lona ba lo agileng mo lefatsheng, e re mogang mokgele o tsholediwang mo dithabeng, lo lebe, e re mogang lonaka lo lediwang, lo utlwe." 
Isaiah18:4 Gonne Jehofa o buile le nna jaana, a re: “Ke tlaa didimala fela, mme ke tlaa leba ke le mo boagong jwa me; jaaka mogote wa letsatsi le le tsabakelang, jaaka monyo mo mogoteng wa lobaka lwa thobo.”" 
Isaiah18:5 Gonne e tlaa re pele ga thobo, fa sethunya se tlhotlhoregile, mme kgolokwane e tloga e nna mafine a a butswang, o tlaa kgaola dikalana ka dithipa, a tlose menamo, a reme." 
Isaiah18:6 Ba le mmogo ba tlaa tlogelelwa manong a dithaba, le dibatana tsa lefatshe; mme manong a tlaa ba ja selemo, le dibatana tsotlhe tsa lefatshe di tlaa ba ja mariga." 
Isaiah18:7 Mo motlheng oo, go tlaa tlisediwa Jehofa wa masomosomo neo, e tswa tšhabeng e e batho ba baleele, ba ba borethe, e tswa tšhabeng e e sa leng e simologa e nna poitshego go tla nakong eno; e le morafe o o lekanyetsang, le o o sobotlang, o lefatshe la one le faraferweng ke dinoka, e tlisiwa kwa felong ga leina la ga Jehofa wa masomosomo, kwa thabeng ya Sione." 
Isaiah19:1 Ponelopele ka ga Egepeto. Bonang, Jehofa o palame leru le le sefadima, o tla mo Egepeto; mme medimo ya disetwa ya Egepeto e tlaa tsebeetsega ka e mmona, le pelo ya Egepeto e tlaa nyera fa gare ga gagwe." 
Isaiah19:2 Ke tlaa lotlhanya Baegepeto; ba tlaa tlhabana, mongwe le mongwe le morwa rraagwe, le mongwe le mongwe le mongwe ka ene; motse le motse, le bogosi le bogosi." 
Isaiah19:3 Mowa wa Egepeto o tlaa dirwa lolea fela fa gare ga lone; mme ke tlaa senya kgakololo ya lone; mme ba tlaa botsa mo medimong ya disetwa, le mo baroming, le mo go ba ba buang le badimo, le mo baloing." 
Isaiah19:4 Baegepeto ke tlaa ba tsenya mo seatleng sa morena yo o bolau; kgosi e e logala e tlaa ba busa, go bua Morena, Jehofa wa masomosomo." 
Isaiah19:5 Metsi a tlaa ngomela mo lewatleng, noka e tlaa tšha, e omelela." 
Isaiah19:6 Dinoka di tlaa nkga; dinokana tsa Egepeto di tlaa ngomela di omelediwa; lotlhaka lo tlaa swaba lo tsitla. 
Isaiah19:7 Dipatlelo tsa noka ya Nile, ka fa maereng a Nile, le tsotlhe tse di jetsweng ka fa nokeng ya Nile, di tlaa ša, di kgophoga, di sa tlhole di le teng." 
Isaiah19:8 Le babolai ba ditlhapi ba tlaa hutsafala, le botlhe ba ba konopelang kobe mo nokeng ya Nile ba tlaa lela, le ba ba tsharololang ditloa mo metsing ba tlaa topetega." 
Isaiah19:9 Le gone ba ba dirang ka leloba le le tsharabolotsweng, le ba ba logang letsela le lesweu ba tlaa tlhajwa ke ditlhong." 
Isaiah19:10 Mme maotwana a gagwe a tlaa komoganngwa, botlhe ba ba dirang ba thapetswe tuelo ba tlaa utlwa botlhoko mo pelong." 
Isaiah19:11 Dikgosana tsa Soane di silofetse ruri; kgakololo ya bagakolodi ba ga Faro, e bong ba ba tlhalefileng segolo, e dule ya ditho fela; ana lo raya Faro jang, lo re, lo bomorwa batlhale, lo bomorwa dikgosi tsa bogologolo tala?" 
Isaiah19:12 Fa go ntse jaana, ba fa kae batlhale ba gago? A ba go bolelele gompieno; a ba itse se Jehofa wa masomosomo o se ikaeletseng ka ga Egepeto." 
Isaiah19:13 Dikgosana tsa Soane di diregile masilo, dikgosana tsa Nofa di tsietsegile; di timeditse Egepeto; tsone tse e leng lentswe la kgokgotsho ya ditso tsa gagwe." 
Isaiah19:14 Jehofa o tlhakantse mowa wa logwadi mo gare ga gagwe; ba timeditse Egepeto mo ditirong tsotlhe tsa gagwe, jaaka motho yo o tagilweng a tle a thekeele mo go tlhatseng ga gagwe." 
Isaiah19:15 Le gone ga go ketla go nna tiro epe ya Egepeto, ya tlhogo le fa e le ya mogatla, kala ya mokolane le mokhasi, e di ka e dirang." 
Isaiah19:16 Mo letsatsing leo Egepeto o tlaa nna jaaka basadi; o tlaa roroma a boifa ka ntlha ya thokgosetso ya seatla sa ga Jehofa wa masomosomo, se o se thokgosetsang mo godimo ga gagwe." 
Isaiah19:17 Lefatshe la Juta le tlaa tswa therego ya Egepeto, mongwe le mongwe yo le tlaa umakwang mo go ene o tlaa boifa, ka ntlha ya boikaelelo jwa ga Jehofa wa masomosomo, jo o bo ikaelelang ka ga lone." 
Isaiah19:18 Mo letsatsing leo go tlaa nna metse e le metlhano mo lefatsheng la Egepeto e e tlaa buang puo ya Sekanana, e ikanela Jehofa wa masomosomo; mongwe o tlaa bidiwa, go twe, Motse wa tshenyego." 
Isaiah19:19 Mo letsatsing leo go tlaa nna sebeso, e le sa ga Jehofa, fa gare ga lefatshe la Egepeto, le sefikantswe se se motloutlo, e le sa ga Jehofa, fa molelwaneng wa lone." 
Isaiah19:20 E tlaa nna sekao le sesupo sa ga Jehofa wa masomosomo mo lefatsheng la Egepeto; gonne ba tlaa tlhaeletsa kwa go Jehofa ka ntlha ya bapatiki, mme o tlaa roma mmoloki kwa go bone, le mofemedi, mme o tlaa ba golola." 
Isaiah19:21 Mme Jehofa o tlaa itsiwe ke Egepeto, le Baegepeto ba tla itse Jehofa mo letsatsing leo; ee, ba tlaa obama ka setlhabelo le seromololo, ba tlaa ikanela Jehofa ikano ba e dirafatse." 
Isaiah19:22 Jehofa o tlaa itaya Egepeto, a iteye a ba a fodise; mme ba tlaa boela mo go Jehofa, mme o tlaa rapelesega ka ga bone, a ba fodisa." 
Isaiah19:23 Mo letsatsing leo go tlaa nna tsela e kgolo ya mheru e tswa Egepeto e ya Asiria, mme Moasiria o tlaa tla mo Egepeto, le Moegepeto mo Asiria; Baegepeto ba tlaa obama le Baasiria mmogo." 
Isaiah19:24 Mo letsatsing leo, Iseraele o tlaa nna wa boraro le Egepeto le Asiria, ba le tshegofatso mo gare ga lefatshe;" 
Isaiah19:25 ka gobo Jehofa wa masomosomo o ba segofaditse, a re: “Go sego Egepeto batho ba me, le Asiria tiro ya diatla tsa me, le Iseraele boswa jwa me.”" 
Isaiah20:1 E rile ka ngwaga o Taretane o tsileng mo Ašetote ka one, ka Saregone kgosi ya Asiria a mo roma, mme a tlhabana le Ašetote, a o gapa;" 
Isaiah20:2 mo motlheng oo, Jehofa a bua ka Isaia morwa Amose, a re: “Tsamaya o funolole letsela la kgetse mo lothekeng lwa gago, o bo o role ditlhako mo naong tsa gago.” Mme a dira jalo, a tsamaya fela a sa ikatega, a bile a sa rwala ditlhako." 
Isaiah20:2 mo motlheng oo, Jehofa a bua ka Isaia morwa Amose, a re: “Tsamaya o funolole letsela la kgetse mo lothekeng lwa gago, o bo o role ditlhako mo naong tsa gago.” Mme a dira jalo, a tsamaya fela a sa ikatega, a bile a sa rwala ditlhako." 
Isaiah20:3 Jehofa a re: “Jaaka motlhanka wa me Isaia a tsamaile fela a sa ikatega, a sa rwala ditlhako ka dinyaga di le tharo, e le sesupo le kgakgamatso ka ga Egepeto le ka ga Ethiopia;" 
Isaiah20:4 jalo kgosi ya Asiria e tlaa goga e isa ditshwarwa tsa Egepeto le bafaladi ba Ethiopia, ba bannye le ba batsofe, ba sa ikatega ba sa rwala ditlhako, ba le marago a a tsotsweng, go tlhabisa Egepeto ditlhong." 
Isaiah20:5 Mme ba tlaa tseanngwa ba tlhajwa ke ditlhong ka ntlha ya Ethiopia bolebelelo jwa bone, le ka ntlha ya Egepeto kgalalelo ya bone." 
Isaiah20:6 Banni ba lefatshe le, le le ikamileng lewatle, ba tlaa bua mo letsatsing leo, ba re: ‘Bonang, go dirafetse jaana mo go bone ba re neng re ba ikantse, re tshabetse kwa go bone re senka thuso, gore re gololwe mo kgosing ya Asiria; mme rona, ana re tlaa falola jang?’ ”" 
Isaiah21:1 Ponelopele ka ga naga e e ka fa lewatleng. Jaaka ditsuatsue tsa kwa ntlheng ya Borwa di tsubutla di ralala, le yone ponelopele e tswa kwa nageng; kwa lefatsheng le le boitshegang." 
Isaiah21:2 Ponatshegelo e e botlhoko thata ke e boleletswe; mooki o dira ka mooko, mothopi le ene o a thopa. Bolola, wena Elame; dika wena Media; ke khutlisitse phegelo yotlhe ya teng." 
Isaiah21:3 Ke gone ka moo lotheka lwa me lo tletse botlhoko jo bo mahehe; metlotsedi e ntshwere, jaaka metlotsedi ya mosadi a belega; ke kudupanye, ga ke utlwe; ke tseanye, ga ke bone." 
Isaiah21:4 Pelo ya me e a kaila, themego e kgolo ya marapo e ntshositse; lotlatlana lo ke lo eleditseng lo bile lo fetogile thoromo mo go nna." 
Isaiah21:5 Ba baakanya lomati lwa bojelo, ba tlhoma balebedi, ba a ja, ba a nwa; tsogang lo eme, lona dikgosana, tshasang thebe." 
Isaiah21:6 Gonne Morena o buile le nna jaana, a re: “Ya o tlhome molebedi; a a kakanye se o se bonang." 
Isaiah21:7 Mme o tlaa re a bona setlhopha sa bapalami ba dipitse ba rulaganye ka bobedi le bobedi, setlhopha sa diesela, setlhopha sa dikamela, a a reetse ka tlhoafalo, ka kelotlhoko e kgolo.”" 
Isaiah21:8 Mme a goa jaaka tau, a re: “Morena, ke tlhola ke eme mo seraleng sa go tlhola mo motshegareng, ke lala ke emisitswe mo tebelong ya me masigo a ye go sa." 
Isaiah21:9 “Mme bonang, golo fa go tla setlhopha sa banna, bapalami ba dipitse ka bobedi le bobedi.” Mme a fela a re: “Babilone o ole, o ole; ditshwantsho tsotlhe tse di setilweng tsa medimo ya gagwe di robaganyeditswe fa fatshe.”" 
Isaiah21:10 Ao! Wena photho ya me, le mabele a sebopi sa me; se ke se utlwileng mo go Morena wa masomosomo, Modimo wa Iseraele, ke se lo kakanyeditse." 
Isaiah21:11 Ponelopele ka ga Duma. Mongwe o ntlhaeletsa a le kwa Seire; a re: “Molebedi, ke nako efe ya bosigo? Molebedi, ke nako efe ya bosigo?”" 
Isaiah21:12 Molebedi a re: “Bosa bo e tla, le jone bosigo; fa lo rata go fela lo botsa, botsang; sokologang lo tle.”" 
Isaiah21:13 Ponelopele ka ga Arabia. Lona masomo a a etang a Batetane, lo tlaa lala mo sekgweng se se mo Arabia." 
Isaiah21:14 Ene yo o nyorilweng ba ne ba mo tlisetsa metsi; banni ba lefatshe la Tema ba kgatlhantsha bafaladi ka dijo. 
Isaiah21:15 Gonne ba ne ba tshaba ditšhaka, ba tshaba tšhaka e e somotsweng, le bora jo bo goketsweng, le bothata jwa ntwa." 
Isaiah21:16 Gonne Morena o buile le nna jaana, a re: “E tlaa re ngwaga o ise o fete, ka fa dinyageng tsa yo o thapetsweng tuelo, kgalalelo yotlhe ya Ketare e tlaa fela." 
Isaiah21:17 Mme masalela a bontsi jwa bahudi ka mara, banna ba diganka ba bana ba Ketare, a tlaa nna mabotlana; gonne Jehofa Modimo wa Iseraele o go boletse.”" 
Isaiah22:1 Ponelopele ka ga mokgatšha wa ponatshegelo. O ntse jang jaana, ka e le fa o ile gotlhe fela kwa ditlhoeng tsa matlo?" 
Isaiah22:2 Wena yo o tletseng lošalaba, o le motse wa ditlhapelo, o le motse wa meduduetso; babolaiwa ba gago ga ba a bolawa ka tšhaka, le gone ga ba a swela mo ntweng." 
Isaiah22:3 Balaodi ba gago botlhe ba ne ba tshaba mmogo, mme ba golegwa ke bahudi ka mara; botlhe ba gago ba ba fitlhetsweng ba ne ba golegwa mmogo, ba ne ba tshabela kgakala." 
Isaiah22:4 Ke gone ka moo ke rileng: “Nkhularelang, ke tlaa lela mo go botlhoko; se itapiseng ka go re lo nkgomoletsa go thopiwa ga morwadia tšhaba ya me.”" 
Isaiah22:5 Gonne ke letsatsi la phereetsego, le la katakalano, le la tharaano, mo go tswang mo go Morena Modimo wa masomosomo, mo mokgatšheng wa ponatshegelo; la go thubakanya dithako, le la go lelela kwa dithabeng." 
Isaiah22:6 Mme Elame a phakarisa mokotlopo a na le ditlhopha tsa banna, le bapalami ba dipitse; mme Kire a alolola thebe." 
Isaiah22:7 Mme ga dirala go re, mekgatšha ya gago e mentlentle ya tlala dikara tsa tlhabano, le bapalami ba dipitse ba ikaba fa kgorong." 
Isaiah22:8 A tlosa sesiro sa Juta; mme mo letsatsing leo wa leba kwa dibolaong tse di mo ntlong ya sekgwa. 
Isaiah22:9 Mme lwa bona diphatlha tsa motse wa ga Dafite fa di le dintsi; lwa phuthela mmogo metsi a lekadiba la tlase. 
Isaiah22:10 Lwa baya matlo a Jerusalema dipalo, lwa thuba matlo, gore lo thatafatse lorako ka one." 
Isaiah22:11 Le gone lwa dira lekadiba fa gare ga dithako tsoo pedi, lwa le direla metsi a lekadiba la bogologolo; ga lo a ka lwa leba kwa go ene yo o ne a dirile se, le gone ga lo a ka lwa tlhokomela ene yo o ne a se agile bogologolo." 
Isaiah22:12 E rile mo letsatsing leo Morena, Modimo wa masomosomo, a opa mokgosi, a re: “Go nne selelo le khutsafalo, le logatadima, le go itlama ka letsela la kgetse.”" 
Isaiah22:13 Mme bonang, ga bo go le boitumelo fela, le boipelo, go tlhaba dikgomo le go tlhaba dinku, go ja nama, le go nwa bojalwa jwa mofine; ga twe: “A re jeng, re nweng, gonne re tlaa swa ka moso.”" 
Isaiah22:14 Mme Jehofa wa masomosomo a itshenola mo ditsebeng tsa me, a re: “Ruri boikepo jo, ga bo ketla bo tlhatswega mo go lona go ba lo tlaa loo swa,” go bua Morena Modimo wa masomosomo." 
Isaiah22:15 Morena Modimo wa masomosomo, o bua jaana, a re: “Tsamaya, o ye kwa molebeding yo wa thoto, e bong kwa go Shebena, yo o laolang mo ntlong, o re:" 
Isaiah22:16 ‘O dirang fano? Mme o na le mang fano, fa e bo ne ne e le fano o ikgabetse phuphu fa? Ka a itlhwaela phupu fa godimo, a ikgarubela bonno mo lefikeng?" 
Isaiah22:17 Bona, Jehofa o tlaa go hulaotsa ka thata jaaka monna yo o thata; ee, o tlaa go huparela ka thata." 
Isaiah22:18 Ruri o tlaa retologa, a go konopela jaaka tsamuru kwa lefatsheng le le atlhameng; o tlaa swela teng, le dikara tsa tlhabano tsa kgalalelo ya gago di tlaa nna teng; wena botlhabisaditlhong jwa ntlo ya morena wa gago." 
Isaiah22:19 Ke tlaa go kgorometsa mo tirong ya gago, mme o tlaa go pagolola mo boemong jwa gago.’" 
Isaiah22:20 “Go tlaa dirala mo letsatsing leo, ke tlaa bitsa motlhanka wa me Eliakime morwa Hilekia;" 
Isaiah22:21 mme ke tlaa mo apesa sekhutlana sa gago, ke mo thatafatsa ka moitlamo wa gago, le puso ya gago ke tlaa e tsenya mo seatleng sa gagwe; mme o tlaa nna rra batho mo banning ba Jerusalema le mo ntlong ya Juta." 
Isaiah22:22 Sekopololo sa ntlo ya ga Dafite ke tlaa se baya mo leruding la gagwe; o tlaa bula, mme ga go ketla go tswala ope; o tlaa tswala, mme ga go ketla go bula ope." 
Isaiah22:23 Ke tlaa mo kokothela jaaka lomapo mo felong ga tlhomamo; mo ntlong ya ga rraagwe o tlaa bo a ntse jaaka setulo sa bogosi sa kgalalelo. 
Isaiah22:24 “Ba tlaa pega kgalalelo yotlhe ya ntlo ya ga rraagwe mo go ene, matlhogela le matlhogelana, sejana sengwe le sengwe se sebotlana, go tswa dijaneng tsa dinwelo go ya dijaneng tsa dinkgwana." 
Isaiah22:25 E tlaa re mo letsatsing leo, go bua Jehofa, lomapo lo lo kileng lwa kokothelwa mo felong ga tlhomamo lo tlaa somoga; mme lo tlaa rengwa lo wa, le lekokoma le le mo go lone le tlaa kgaolwa; gonne Jehofa o go boletse.”" 
Isaiah23:1 Ponelopele ka ga Ture. Bokolelang lona dikepe tsa Tarešiše; gonne o kgakgabaditswe, go bile ga go na ntlo epe, ga go na fa go ka tsenwang teng; di go senoletswe di le kwa lefatsheng la Kitime." 
Isaiah23:2 Didimalang, lona banni ba setlhake, wena yo barekisi ba ba tswang Sitone ba kgabaganya lewatle ba go etleetleditseng." 
Isaiah23:3 Mme a le mo metsing a magolo mabele a peo ya Shihore, thobo ya noka ya Nile e ne e le one a o ipapalelang ka one; mme a bo a le borakanelo jwa merafe." 
Isaiah23:4 Tlhajwa ke ditlhong wena Sitone, gonne lewatle, le buile, felo ga bothata ga lewatle, la re: “Ga ke a nna mo pelegong, le gone ga ke a tshola, le fa e le go otla makau, le fa e le go godisa barweetsana.”" 
Isaiah23:5 E tlaa re kutlwalelo e fitlha kwa Egepeto, ba utlwe botlhoko thata ka ga kutlwalelo ya Ture." 
Isaiah23:6 Tlolaganyetsang kwa Tarešiše lo bokolele, lona banni ba setlhake." 
Isaiah23:7 A ke one motse wa lona ne, o o ntseng wa ipela, o o saleng ka o theiwa ka metlha ya bogologolo tala, o dinao tsa one di o isitseng kwa kgakala thata, gore o tlholatlhole teng?" 
Isaiah23:8 E mang yo o ikaeletseng se ka ga Ture, motse wa serwalo, o barekisi ba one e leng dikgosana, o babapadi ba one e leng batlotlegi ba lefatshe?" 
Isaiah23:9 Jehofa wa masomosomo o se ikaeletse, go mara boikgodiso jwa kgalalelo yotlhe, gore a tsenye batlotlegi botlhe ba lefatshe lonyatso." 
Isaiah23:10 Penologela lefatshe la gago jaaka Nile, wena morwadia Tarešiše; ga go tlhole go na le moitlamo tikologong ya gago." 
Isaiah23:11 O otlololetse lewatle letsogo la gagwe, o reketlisitse magosi; Jehofa o laotse ka ga Kanana, gore go senngwe mafelo a lone a a thata." 
Isaiah23:12 Mme o rile: “Ga o ketla o tlhola o itumela wena kgarebana yo o patikwang, morwadia Sitone; tloga o eme o tlolaganyetse kwa Kitime; le gone ga o ketla o bona boitapoloso teng.”" 
Isaiah23:13 Bonang, lefatshe la Bakalatea; tšhaba e, ga e tlhole e le teng; Moasiria o le laoletse gore le nne la dibatana tsa naga; ba ne ba emisa dikago tsa bone tsa phemelo, ba ribegetsa matlo a lone a dikgosi; ba le dira marope fela." 
Isaiah23:14 Bokolelang lona dikepe tsa Tarešiše; gonne felo ga lona fa go thata go kgakgabaditswe. 
Isaiah23:15 Go tlaa dirala mo letsatsing leo, go re, Ture o tlaa lebalwa ka dinyaga di le 70, ka fa malatsing a kgosi e le nngwe; mme morago ga bokhutlo jwa dinyaga di le 70, ka ga Ture go tlaa nna jaaka mo sefeleng sa seaka." 
Isaiah23:16 Tsaya harepe, o tsamayetsamaye le motse, wena seaka, yo o ntseng o lebetswe; o koteketse sentle, o opele dipina di le dintsi, gore o tle o gakologelwe." 
Isaiah23:17 Mme go tlaa dirala morago ga bokhutlo jwa dinyaga di le 70, go re, Jehofa o tlaa lekola Ture, mme mosadi yo o tlaa boela kwa go thapelweng ga gagwe ka tuelo, mme o tlaa dira boaka le magosi otlhe a lefatshe mo lefatsheng lotlhe fela." 
Isaiah23:18 Mme tlhwatlhwa ya one, le go thapelwa ga one ka tuelo, go tlaa nna boitshepelo Jehofa; ga go ketla go putukelelwa le fa e le go bewa le mahumo; gonne tlhwatlhwa ya one e tlaa nna ya ba ba agileng fa pele ga Jehofa, gore ba je ba kgore, le go bona diaparo tse di nnang ka lobaka." 
Isaiah24:1 Bonang, Jehofa o dira lefatshe gore le nne lolea fela, o a le swafatsa, o a le ribegetsa, mme o falatsa banni ba lone." 
Isaiah24:2 E tlaa nna go re jaaka go ntse le batho go nne jalo le moperesiti; jaaka go ntse le motlhanka, go nne jalo le mong wa gagwe; jaaka go ntse le lelata, go nne jalo le mohumagadi wa lone; jaaka go ntse le moreki, go nne jalo le morekisi; jaaka go ntse le moadingwi, go nne jalo le moadimi; jaaka go ntse le motsaya koketso ya madi, go nne jalo le montsha koketso." 
Isaiah24:3 Lefatshe le tlaa leafalela ruri, le tlaa thopelelwa ruri; gonne Jehofa o buile lefoko le." 
Isaiah24:4 Lefatshe le a hutsafala le a ngoselela; lefatshe le a topetega le a ngoselela; batho ba ba ipegileng ba lefatshe ba a topetega. 
Isaiah24:5 Lefatshe le bile le tsenye leswe tlase ga banni ba lone; ka ba tlodile melao, ba fetotse ditao, ba robile kgolagano ya bosakhutleng." 
Isaiah24:6 Ke gone ka moo phutso e supuditseng lefatshe, le ba ba agileng mo go yone ba bonywe molato; ke gone ka moo banni ba lefatshe ba fisitsweng, mme ba setse ba le banye." 
Isaiah24:7 Bojalwa jo boša jwa mofine bo a hutsafala, mofine o a swaba, botlhe ba ba pelo di tamutamu ba a fegelwa." 
Isaiah24:8 Letleputlepu la meropana le a khutla, modumo wa ba ba ipelang o a fela, boitumelo jwa harepe bo a khutla." 
Isaiah24:9 Ga ba ketla ba nwa bojalwa jwa mofine ka kopelo; senoo se se bogale se tlaa nna bokgengwe mo go ba ba se nwang. 
Isaiah24:10 Motse o o mapetepete o thubagantswe; ntlo nngawe le nngwe e paketswe, gore motho ope a se ka a tsena." 
Isaiah24:11 Go selelo mo mebileng ka ntlha ya bojalwa jwa mofine; boitumelo jotlhe bo fifetse, letleputlepu la lefatshe le ile." 
Isaiah24:12 Mo motseng go setse tshwafalo fela; kgoro e itaakilwe ka tshenyo. 
Isaiah24:13 Gonne go tlaa nna jalo mo gare ga lefatshe mo ditšhabeng, jaaka go udubadiwa ga motlhware, jaaka mabudutso a mafine fa phulo e sweditswe." 
Isaiah24:14 Bao ba tlaa tsholetsa lentswe la bone, ba tlaa goa; ba tlaa goa ka thata, ba goela borena jwa ga Jehofa ba le kwa lewatleng." 
Isaiah24:15 Ke gone ka moo, lo galaletseng Jehofa ntlheng ya botlhabatsatsi, e bong leina la ga Jehofa Modimo wa Iseraele, mo ditlhakeng tsa lewatle." 
Isaiah24:16 Re utlwile dikopelo di tswa bokhutlong jwa lefatshe, tsa re: “Kgalalelo e nne go basiami.” Mme nna ke rile: “Ke jega pelo, ke jega pelo, ija nna we! Baoki ba dira ka mooko; ee, baoki ba dirile ka mooko o mogolo.”" 
Isaiah24:17 Poifo e mo go wena, le gopo, le mutlwane, wena monni wa lefatshe." 
Isaiah24:18 Go tlaa dirala go re, yo o tlaa tshabang mosito wa poifo o tlaa wela mo gopong; mme yo o tlhatlogang mo teng ga gopo o tlaa tshwarwa ke mutlwane; gonne dithoba tsa legodimo di bulegile, le metheo ya lefatshe e a reketla." 
Isaiah24:19 Lefatshe le thubagantswe ruri, lefatshe le tlhapologile mo gogolo, lefatshe le tshikinyegile mo go feteletseng." 
Isaiah24:20 Lefatshe le tlaa theekela jaaka motho yo o tagilweng, mme le tlaa ibilega jaaka mogope; tlolo ya lone e tlaa nna boima mo go lone, mme le tlaa wa, le se ke le ba le tsoga." 
Isaiah24:21 Go tlaa dirala mo letsatsing leo go re, Jehofa o tlaa betsa lesomo la ba ba ipegileng kwa godimo, le dikgosi tsa lefatshe mo lefatsheng." 
Isaiah24:22 Ba tlaa phuthelwa mmogo jaaka bagolegwi ba tle ba phuthelwe mo moleteng wa kgolegelo; ba tlaa tswalelwa mo ntlong ya kgolegelo, morago ga malatsi a le mantsi ba tlaa bediwa." 
Isaiah24:23 Foo kgwedi e tlaa sosobaganngwa, le letsatsi le tlaa tlhajwa ke ditlhong; gonne Jehofa wa masomosomo o tlaa busa mo thabeng ya Sione le mo Jerusalema, le fa pele ga bagolwane ba gagwe ka kgalalelo." 
Isaiah25:1 Jehofa, o Modimo wa me; ke tlaa go godisa, ke tlaa baka leina la gago, gonne o dirile dilo tse di gakgamatsang, e bong dikgakololo tsa bogologolo, mo boikanngong le mo boammaaruring." 
Isaiah25:2 Gonne o dirile motse gore o nne mokoa fela; le gore motse o o thekeleditsweng o nne marope fela; ntlo ya kgosi ya baeng, gore e se nne motse wa sepe; ga o ketla o tlhola o agiwa gope." 
Isaiah25:3 Ke gone ka moo tšhaba e e thata e tlaa go galaletsang, motse wa merafe e e boitshegang o tlaa go boifa." 
Isaiah25:4 Gonne o ne o ntse o le felo fa go thata ga bahumanegi, felo fa go thata ga motlhoki mo pitlaganong ya gagwe, botshabelo mo matsubutsubung, moriti mo mogoteng, motlhang leratla la ba ba boitshegang le nnang jaaka fa matsubutsubu a itaaka fa lorakong." 
Isaiah25:5 Jaaka mogote mo felong fa go omeletseng o tlaa kokobetsa modumo wa baeng; pina ya ba ba boitshegang e tlaa ngotlelwa tlase, jaaka mogote fa leru le diga tshuti." 
Isaiah25:6 Mo thabeng e, Jehofa wa masomosomo o tlaa baakanyetsa ditšhaba tsotlhe modiro wa dilo tse di nonneng, modiro wa majalwa a mafine a a itshekileng, wa dilo tse di nonneng tse di tletseng moko, wa majalwa a a itshekileng a a tlhotlhegileng sentlentle." 
Isaiah25:7 Mo thabeng e o tlaa senya bontle jwa sebipo se se latlhetsweng mo godimo ga ditšhaba tsotlhe, le sesiro se se bipileng merafe yotlhe." 
Isaiah25:8 O komeditse loso ka bosakhutleng; Morena Modimo o tlaa phimola dikeledi mo matlhong otlhe; le yone kgobo ya batho ba gagwe o tlaa e tlosa mo lefatsheng lotlhe fela; gonne Jehofa o le boletse. 
Isaiah25:9 Go tlaa buiwa mo letsatsing leo, go twe: “Bonang Modimo wa rona ke one o; re ntse re o lebeletse, o tlaa re boloka; yo, ke ene Jehofa; re ntse re mo lebeletse; re tlaa itumela re ipela mo polokeng ya gagwe.”" 
Isaiah25:10 Gonne seatla sa ga Jehofa se tlaa nna mo thabeng e; mme Moabe o tlaa gatakwa mo felong ga gagwe, fela jaaka motlhaka o gatakelwa mo metsing a kgatampi ya maloko." 
Isaiah25:11 O tlaa otlolola mabogo a gagwe mo gare ga gone, jaaka yo o sapang a tle a otlolole mabogo a gagwe go sapa; o tlaa baya boikgodiso jwa gagwe kwa tlase mmogo le togakanyo ya diatla tsa gagwe." 
Isaiah25:12 Mme kago ya phemelo, kago ya phemelo e e godileng ya dithako tsa gago, o tlaa bo a e folositse, o e kokobeditse, o e beile fa fatshe, fela mo loroleng." 
Isaiah26:1 Mo letsatsing leo sefela se, se tlaa opelwa mo lefatsheng la Juta, go twe: Re na le motse o o thata; Poloko o tlaa e tlhoma gore e nne dithako le diphemelo." 
Isaiah26:2 Bulang dikgoro gore morafe o o siameng, o o tshegetsang boammaaruri o tsene." 
Isaiah26:3 Ene yo pelo ya gagwe e ikaegileng mo go wena, o tlaa mo nnisa mo kagisong e e tlhomameng; ka a ikantse mo go wena." 
Isaiah26:4 Ikanyeng mo go Jehofa ka bosakhutleng; gonne mo go MORENA JEHOFA go na le lefika la bosaengkae. 
Isaiah26:5 Gonne o folositse ba ba agileng kwa godimo, e bong motse o o kwa godimo; o o beile kwa tlase, a o baya mo mmung tota; a o tlisa le mo loroleng fela." 
Isaiah26:6 Lonao lo tlaa o gatakela tlase; le tse e leng dinao tsa bahumanegi, le dikgato tsa batlhoki." 
Isaiah26:7 Tsamao ya mosiami ke thokgamo; wena yo o thokgameng o lolamisa tsela ya basiami. 
Isaiah26:8 Ee, mo tsamaong ya dikatlholo tsa gago Jehofa, re go letile; keletso ya mewa ya rona e mo leineng la gago, le mo seregopodising sa gago." 
Isaiah26:9 Ke go eleditse bosigo ka mowa wa me; ee, ka mowa wa me o o mo teng ga me ke tlaa go senka ka maphakela; gonne e a re fa ditshiamiso tsa gago di le mo lefatsheng, banni ba lefatshe ba tle ba ithute tshiamo." 
Isaiah26:10 Le fa go ka iwa ntlheng ya moikepi, le fa go ntse jalo ga a ke a ithuta tshiamo; mo lefatsheng la thokgamo o tlaa nna a sokamisa fela, a se ke a tlhokomele borena jwa ga Jehofa." 
Isaiah26:11 Jehofa, seatla sa gago se tsholeditswe, le fa go ntse jalo ga ba bone; le fa go ntse jalo ba tlaa tla ba bona tlhoafalo ya gago ka ga batho, mme ba tlaa tlhajwa ke ditlhong; ee, molelo o tlaa laila baganetsi ba gago." 
Isaiah26:12 Jehofa o tlaa re laolela kagiso, gonne o re diretse le tsone ditiro tsotlhe tsa rona." 
Isaiah26:13 Jehofa, Modimo wa rona, barena ba sele kwa ntle ga gago ba ntse ba na le taolo mo go rona; mme ke ka wena wesi yo re tlaa umakang leina la gago." 
Isaiah26:14 Bone ba sule, ga ba ketla ba tshela; ba nyeletse, ga ba ketla ba tsoga; ke gone ka moo o ba kgopholotseng wa ba senya, mme wa dira gore go ba gakologelwa go nyelelele ruri." 
Isaiah26:15 O atisitse morafe Jehofa, o atisitse morafe; o galaleditswe; o katositse melelwane yotlhe ya lefatshe." 
Isaiah26:16 Jehofa, ba go batlile ba le mo tlalelong, e rile kwatlhao ya gago e le mo go bone ba gorometsa morapelo." 
Isaiah26:17 Jaaka mosadi yo o moimanyana a atamela lobaka lwa gagwe lwa go belega, a le mo botlhokong, mme a gwetla ka metlotsedi ya gagwe; le rona re ne re ntse jalo fa pele ga gago, Jehofa." 
Isaiah26:18 Re ne re ntse re le baimanyana, re ntse jaaka e kete re belege phefo fela; ga re a dira kgololo epe mo lefatsheng, le gone ga go a tsalwa banni ba lefatshe." 
Isaiah26:19 Baswi ba gago ba tlaa tshela; ditoto tsa me di tlaa tsoga. Tsogang lo eme, lo opele lona ba lo agileng mo loroleng; gonne monyo wa gago o ntse jaaka monyo wa merogo, mme lefatshe le tlaa tlhatsa baswi ba lone." 
Isaiah26:20 Ntlo, wena tšhaba ya me, o tsene mo matlonyaneng a gago, o itswalele mejako o le kwa teng; o iphitlhe ka lobaka lo lonnyennyane, go tsamaye kgakalo e fete." 
Isaiah26:21 Gonne, bonang, Jehofa o tswa mo felong ga gagwe, a tswela go beletsa banni ba lefatshe boikepo jwa bone; lefatshe le lone le tlaa senola madi a lone, mme ga le ketla le tlhola le bipa babolaiwa ba lone." 
Isaiah27:1 Mo letsatsing leo Jehofa o tlaa betsa seinyoki se segolo sa noga e e sefadima, le seinyoki sa noga se se ikgarang, ka tšhaka ya gagwe e e botlhoko, e tona, e e thata; mme o tlaa bolaya kgogela e e mo nokeng." 
Isaiah27:2 Mo letsatsing leo: A tshimo ya bojalwa jwa mofine! E opeleleng. 
Isaiah27:3 Nna Jehofa ke a e lebela; ke tlaa e nosa ka dipakanyana tsotlhe; ke tlaa e lebela bosigo le motshegare, gore ope a se ka a e senya." 
Isaiah27:4 Go šakgala ga goyo mo go nna. A bo lokhi le lorwana di ka ka tsa tlhabana le nna ka ntwa! Ke ne ke tlaa di tshologela ke di fisa mmogo. 
Isaiah27:5 Gongwe a a tshware thata ya me, gore a tle a agisanye le nna; ee, a a agisanye le nna." 
Isaiah27:6 Mo malatsing a a tlang Jakobe o tlaa anama motswe; Iseraele o tlaa thunya a kukunya; mme ba tlaa tlatsa lefatshe ka loungo. 
Isaiah27:7 A o mo iteile jaaka a iteile bale ba ba kileng ba mo itaya? Kgotsa a o bolailwe ka fa polaong ya bone ba ba kileng ba bolawa ke ene? 
Isaiah27:8 Ka selekanyo, e a re o mo leleka, wa bo o ganela nae; o mo tlositse ka tsubutlo ya gagwe e e thata, mo motlheng wa phefo ya botlhabatsatsi." 
Isaiah27:9 Ke gone ka moo boikepo jwa ga Jakobe bo tlaa tlhatswegang, mme moo gotlhe ke lone loungo lwa go tlosa boleo jwa gagwe; motlhang o dirang maje otlhe a sebeso go nna jaaka manyaaphiri a a thubagantsweng, gore Medimako le ditshwantsho tsa letsatsi di se ka tsa tlhola di tsoga." 
Isaiah27:10 Gonne motse o o thekeleditsweng o osi fela; ke bonno jo bo tlhadilweng, jo bo tlhobogilweng jaaka naga fela; namane e tlaa fula gone, e ba e botha gone, e tlaa poma e ja dikalana tsa bone." 
Isaiah27:11 E tlaa re fa dikala tsa gone di omeletse di tlaa rojwa; basadi ba tlaa tla ba di tshuba ka molelo; gonne ke tšhaba e e se nang tlhaloganyo, ke gone ka moo yo o ba dirileng ga a ketla a ba tlhomogela pelo, le yo o ba bopileng ga a ketla a ba supetsa botsalano bope." 
Isaiah27:12 Go tlaa dirala mo letsatsing leo, go re, Jehofa o tlaa goba loungo lwa gagwe, go simolola kwa morwaleleng wa Noka e kgolo go ya nokaneng ya Egepeto, mme lona lo tlaa olwa ka monokela, lona bana ba Iseraele." 
Isaiah27:13 Go tlaa dirala mo letsatsing leo, go re, go tlaa lediwa lonaka lo logolo; mme go tlaa tla ba ba kileng ba batla go nyelela mo lefatsheng la Asiria, le ba e kileng ya ne e le balelekwi mo lefatsheng la Egepeto; ba tlaa obamela Jehofa mo thabeng e e boitshepo kwa Jerusalema." 
Isaiah28:1 Ija! A bo go latlhega serwalo sa tlhogo sa boikgodiso jwa matagwa a Eferaime, le sethunya se se swabang sa bontle jo bo galalelang se se fa tlhogong ya mokgatšha o o nonneng, wa ba ba topetilweng ke bojalwa jwa mofine." 
Isaiah28:2 Bonang, Morena o na le mongwe yo o thata, yo o nonofileng; jaaka ledimo la sefako, jaaka sešetlana se se senyang, jaaka makobekobe a metsi a a thata a a penologang, o tlaa digela fa fatshe ka seatla." 
Isaiah28:3 Serwalo sa tlhogo sa boikgodiso sa matagwa a Eferaime se tlaa gatakwa ka dinao; 
Isaiah28:4 le sethunya se se swabang sa bontle jwa gagwe jo bo galalelang, se se fa tlhogong ya mokgatšha o o nonneng, se tlaa nna jaaka feiye e e buduleng pele, letlhabula le ise le tle, e e a reng motho a e leba a e bona, mme e sa ntse e le mo seatleng sa gagwe a e kometse fela." 
Isaiah28:5 Mo letsatsing leo Jehofa wa masomosomo o tlaa nna serwalo sa tlhogo sa kgalalelo, le tlhoro e ntle mo masaleleng a batho ba gagwe." 
Isaiah28:6 Le mowa wa tshiamiso mo go ene yo o nnetseng go atlhola, le thata mo go ba ba tatang ntwa fa kgorong." 
Isaiah28:7 Ba le bone ba theeketse ka bojalwa jwa mofine, ba timetse ka senoo se se loileng; moperesiti le ene moperofeti, ba theekela ka senoo se se loileng ba kodumeditswe ke bojalwa jwa mofine; ba timetse ka senoo se se loileng, ba marara mo go boneng, ba kwakwaetsa mo katlholong." 
Isaiah28:8 Gonne dimati tsa bojelo tsotlhe di tletse matlhatsa le matladika, ga go na gope fa go ntle." 
Isaiah28:9 Wa bo o tlaa ruta mang kitso? A tlhaloganyetsa mang polelo? A ke ba ba kgwisitsweng maši, ba tlosediwa mabele?" 
Isaiah28:10 Gonne ke kaelo mo kaelong, kaelo mo kaelong; sekao mo sekaong, sekao mo sekaong; bonnye fano, bonnye fale." 
Isaiah28:11 Nnyaa, mme ka batho ba ba melomo e sele, le ka loleme lo sele o tlaa bua le tšhaba e;" 
Isaiah28:12 e o e reileng, a re: “Boikhutso ke jo, lapolosang ene yo o lapileng; le gone thudiso ke e;” le fa go ntse jalo ba gana go utlwa." 
Isaiah28:13 Ke gone ka moo lefoko la ga Jehofa le tlaa nnang kaelo mo kaelong mo go bone, kaelo mo kaelong; sekao mo sekaong, sekao mo sekaong; bonnye fano, bonnye fale; gore ba tle ba tsamaye ba wele kwa morago, ba robege, ba thaiwe ka mutlwane ba tshwarwe." 
Isaiah28:14 Ke gone, utlwang lefoko la ga Jehofa, lona basotli ba batho, ba lo busang tšhaba e, e e mo Jerusalema:" 
Isaiah28:15 E re ka lo rile: “Re golaganye le loso, mme re dumalanye le Bobipo;” lwa re: “E tlaa re sebetso se se penologang se ralala, ga se ketla se fitlha kwa go rona; gonne re itiretse maaka botshabelo jwa rona, re iphitlhile ka fa tlase ga tsietso.”" 
Isaiah28:16 Ke gone Morena Modimo o buang jaana, a re: “Bonang, ke thaya motheo mo Sione ka lentswe, ke lentswe le le lekilweng, ke lentswe la kgokgotsho le le tlhokegang, le le motheo o o tlhomameng; ‘yo o dumelang ga a ketla a potlaka.’" 
Isaiah28:17 Ke dira tshiamo go nna thapo e e lekanyang, le tshiamiso go nna selekanyo se se thokgameng; mme sefako se tlaa gogoba botshabelo jwa maaka, metsi a tlaa penologela felo ga boiphitlho.”" 
Isaiah28:18 Kgolagano ya lona le loso e tlaa golaganololwa, le tumalano ya lone le Bobipo ga e ketla e ema; e tlaa re sebetso se se penologang se ralala, lo tlaa gatakwa ke sone." 
Isaiah28:19 Se tlaa re se ntse se ralala se lo tseye fela; gonne se tlaa ralala ka moso le ka moso, motshegare le bosigo; mme go tlhaloganya polelo e tlaa bo e se sepe fa e se therego fela." 
Isaiah28:20 Gonne bolao bo bokhutshwane, bo tlhaela motho go ikotlolola mo go jone, kobo e tshesane e tlhaela motho go ipipa ka yone." 
Isaiah28:21 Gonne Jehofa o tlaa tsoga a ema jaaka mo thabeng ya Perasime, o tlaa galefa jaaka mo molapong wa Gibeone; gore a tle a dire tiro ya gagwe, e le tiro ya gagwe e sele, a be a diratse go dira ga gagwe, e le go dira ka go sele." 
Isaiah28:22 Ke gone jaana, se nneng basotli, e ka tla ya re gongwe dikgole tsa lona tsa thatafadiwa; gonne boswetso, e bile e le jo bo laoletsweng lefatshe lotlhe, ke bo utlwile mo go Jehofa Modimo wa masomosomo." 
Isaiah28:23 Sekegang tsebe, lo utlwe lentswe la me; reetsang, lo utlwe puo ya me:" 
Isaiah28:24 A molemi o a ba a ka tlhola a ntse a lema fela gore a jale? A o ka nna a pitikolola mmu a thuba makote a tshimo ya gagwe ka gale ka gale? 
Isaiah28:25 A ga e a re a sena go papana fa godimo ga yone, a ga a latlhele dipeo tsa kumina yo montsho, a gase kumina, a ba a jala mabele a makhutshwane ka ditsela, le barele fa o go laoletsweng, le lebelebele mo tlhofing ya lone?" 
Isaiah28:26 Gonne Modimo wa gagwe o mo kaela sentle, o a mo ruta." 
Isaiah28:27 Gonne kumina yo montsho ga a phothwe ka mootlwana, o o bokete, le gone lekoto la koloi ga le ke le dikolosiwa mo kumineng; mme kumina yo montsho o phothwa ka mootlwana, le kumina ka thobanyane." 
Isaiah28:28 Mabele a a makhutshwane a tle a dikolosediwe; gonne ga a ke a tlhola a ntse a a fola ka gale; mme le fa lekoto la koloi ya gagwe le a gasa, le dipitse tsa gagwe ga di a thuge." 
Isaiah28:29 Mo le gone go tswa mo go Jehofa wa masomosomo, yo e leng ene kgakgamatso mo kgakololong, e le Mogaisi mo botlhaleng." 
Isaiah29:1 Heela! Ariele, Ariele, motse o Dafite o ne a thibelela mo go one! Tlhomaganyang dinyaga; a mediro e nne e dikologe e tle." 
Isaiah29:2 Foo ke tlaa pitlaganya Ariele, mme go tlaa nna selelo le khutsafalo; le fa go ntse jalo mo go nna o tlaa nna jaaka Ariele fela." 
Isaiah29:3 Ke tlaa go thibelela ka ntwa, ke tlaa go dikelela ka kago ya tlhabano, mme ke tlaa go tsosetsa dikadisi tsa tikeletso." 
Isaiah29:4 O tlaa folosediwa kwa tlase, o tlaa bua o le mo mmung, le puo ya gago e tlaa nna tlase e tswa mo loroleng; lentswe la gago le tlaa nna jaaka la motho yo o buang le badimo, mme puo ya gago e tlaa tswerenya e tswa mo loroleng." 
Isaiah29:5 Bontsi jwa baba ba gago ba tlaa nna jaaka lorole lo losesane, le bontsi jwa ba ba boitshegang bo nna jaaka mmoko o o fetang; ee, go tlaa nna jalo ka bonako ka tshoganetso." 
Isaiah29:6 O tlaa sekisiwa ke Jehofa wa masomosomo ka tumo ya maru, ka thoromo ya lefatshe, le modumo o mogolo, ka setsuatsue, le ledimo la phefo, le ka kgabo ya molelo o o lailang." 
Isaiah29:7 Bontsi jo bo tswang merafeng yotlhe e e tlhabanang le Ariele, e bong botlhe ba ba tlhabanang nae le felo ga gagwe fa go thata, mme ba mo pitlaganya, ba tlaa nna jaaka toro fela, le ponatshego bosigo." 
Isaiah29:8 Go tlaa etsa jaaka fa motho yo o bolailweng ke tlala a lora, bonang o a ja; a thanye, mme mowa wa gagwe wa bo o le lolea fela; kgotsa jaaka motho yo o nyorilweng a lora, bonang o a nwa; mme a thanye, mme bonang o a idibala, mowa wa gagwe o eletse fela; bontsi jo bo tswang mo merafeng yotlhe, jo bo tlhabanang le thaba ya Sione, bo tlaa nna fela jalo." 
Isaiah29:9 Emaemang lo gakgamale; lo nne lo ineele kgatlhego lo budulale; ba tagilwe, mme e seng ka bojalwa jwa mofine; baa theekela, mme e seng ka senoo se se loileng." 
Isaiah29:10 Gonne Jehofa o goromeleditse mo go lona mowa wa boroko jwa thulamelo, o rarile matlho a lona, e bong baperofeti; le ditlhogo tsa lona, e bong balebeledi, o di bipile." 
Isaiah29:11 Ponatshego yotlhe e ntse mo go lona jaaka mafoko a lokwalo lo lo konetsweng ka sekano, lo batho ba lo neelang mongwe yo o rutegileng, ba re: “A ko o bale mo, ke a go rapela.” mme ene, a re: “Ke a palelwa gonne lo konetswe ka sekano;”" 
Isaiah29:12 mme lokwalo lo tloge lo neelwe yo o sa rutegang, go twe: “A ko o bale mo, ke a go rapela.” Mme ene a re: “Ga ke a rutega.”" 
Isaiah29:13 Mme Morena a re: “E re ka batho ba, ba nkatamela, ba ba ba ntlotla ka molomo wa bone le ka dipounama tsa bone, mme ba tloseditse pelo ya bone kgakala le nna; le go mpoifa ga bone e be e le taolo ya batho fela e ba e rutilweng;" 
Isaiah29:14 ke gone ka moo, ke tlaa tloga ke dira tiro e e gakgamatsang mo bathong ba, e bong tiro ya kgakgamatso le ya tseanyo; botlhale jwa batlhale ba bone bo tlaa nyelela, le tlhaloganyo ya ba bonokopela bo tlaa fitlhwa.”" 
Isaiah29:15 Ija! A bo go latlhega ba ba senkelang kwa teng, gore ba subele Jehofa kgakololo ya bone, le ba ditiro tsa bone di a bong di le mo lefifing, mme ba re: “E mang yo o re bonang? E mang yo o re itseng?”" 
Isaiah29:16 Lo a tle lo pitikolole dilo! A mmopi o tlaa kaiwa, go re, ke ene letsopa; fa e tlaa bo ne ne selo se se dirilweng se ka raya ene yo o se dirileng, se re: “Ga a a ntira;” kgotsa selo se se bopilweng se ka raya ene yo o se bopileng sa re: “Ga a na tlhaloganyo?”" 
Isaiah29:17 A ga e sa ntse e le lobakanyana fela, mme Lebanone o tlaa fetolwa leota le le sisisang; mme leota le le sisisang le tlaa kaiwa go re ke sekgwa fela?" 
Isaiah29:18 Mme mo letsatsing leo ba bosusu ba tlaa utlwa mafoko a lokwalo, le matlho a difofu a tlaa bona a le mo lootong le mo lefifing." 
Isaiah29:19 Bapelonolo le bone ba tlaa itotisetsa boitumelo jwa bone mo go Jehofa, le bahumanegi ba ba mo bathong ba tlaa itumela mo go ene Moitshepi wa Iseraele." 
Isaiah29:20 Gonne yo o boitshegang o dirilwe lefela fela, le moswinyi o a khutla, le botlhe ba ba lebelelang boikepo ba kgaotswe;" 
Isaiah29:21 e bong ba ba leofisang motho ka mafoko, ba beele yo o kgalemelang molato mo kgorong serai, ba fapose mosiami ka selo se e leng lefela fela." 
Isaiah29:22 Ke gone ka moo go buang Jehofa, yo o rekolotseng Aberahame, kaga ntlo ya ga Jakobe, a re: “Jakobe ga a ketla a tlhajwa ke ditlhong jaanong, le gone sefatlhogo sa gagwe ga se ketla se khwata jaanong." 
Isaiah29:23 O tlaa re a bona bana ba gagwe, tiro ya diatla tsa me, mo gare ga gagwe, ba tlaa itshepisa leina la me; ee, ba tlaa itshepisa Moitshepi wa ga Jakobe, mme ba tlaa ema mo go boifeng Modimo wa Iseraele." 
Isaiah29:24 Le ba ba timelang mo moweng ba tlaa tla mo tlhaloganyong, le ba ba ngongoregang ba tlaa ithuta thuto.”" 
Isaiah30:1 “Ija! A bo go latlhega bana ba ba dirukhutlhi,” go bua Jehofa, “ba ba lopang kgakololo, mme e seng mo go nna; ba bipa ka sebipo, mme e seng ga mowa wa me, gore ba oketse boleo ka boleo." 
Isaiah30:2 Ba ba dirang mosepele ba re ba ya Egepeto, mme ba se ke ba botsa molomo wa me; ba ya go ithatafatsa mo thateng ya ga Faro, le go ikanya mo moriting wa Egepeto." 
Isaiah30:3 Ke gone ka moo thata ya ga Faro e tlaa nnang ditlhong tsa lona, le go ikanya ga lone mo tshuting ya Egepeto go tlaa lo tlhakanya tlhogo." 
Isaiah30:4 Gonne dikgosana tsa gagwe di kwa Soane, le barongwa ba gagwe ba fitlhile kwa Hanese." 
Isaiah30:5 Botlhe ba tlaa tlhabisiwa ditlhong ke batho ba ba sa kakeng ba ba direla molemo, ba ba se nang thuso, le fa e le molemo, fa e se ditlhong fela le yone kgobo.”" 
Isaiah30:6 Ponelopele kaga dibatana tsa kwa ntlheng ya Borwa. Ba tla ba raletse lefatshe la tlalelo, le botlhoko jo bo molelo, kwa tau e namagadi le tau e tona di tswang gone, le šaušawane, le kgwanyape e e fofong, ba tla ba tshotse dikhumo tsa bone ba di belesitse mo magetleng a dieselana, le mahumo a bone mo diroteng tsa dikamela, ba di isa kwa tšhabeng e e se ketlang e dirana le molemo mo go bone ka sepe." 
Isaiah30:7 Gonne Egepeto o thusetsa lefela, le ka mo go se nang tiro; ke gone ka moo ke mmiditseng Rahabe yo o ntseng fela." 
Isaiah30:8 Jaana ya o se kwale fa pele ga bone mo sekwalelong, o se kwale ka go se nyenyeka mo lokwalong, gore e tle e nne selo sa motlha o o tlang, ka bosakhutleng le ka bosaengkae." 
Isaiah30:9 Gonne ke tšhaba e e tsuololang, bana ba ba akang, bana ba ba ganang go utlwa molao wa ga Jehofa;" 
Isaiah30:10 ba ba rayang baboni, ba re: “Se boneng!” Le baperofeti, ba re: “Se re boleleleng dilo tse di siameng, buang le rona ka dilo tse di borethe, lo re bolelele ditsietso!” Ba re:" 
Isaiah30:11 “Tlogang mo tseleng lo fapoge, khutlisang Moitshepi wa Iseraele fa pele ga rona.”" 
Isaiah30:12 Ke gone ka moo go buang Moitshepi wa Iseraele jaana, a re: “E re ka lo nyatsa lefoko le, lo ikanya patiko le tshokamo, lo itlhabetsa ka tsone," 
Isaiah30:13 ke gone boikepo jo bo tlaa nnang mo go lona jaaka thubego e e gaufi le go wa, e e fapogang mo lorakong lo lo godileng, lo thubagano ya lone e tlang ka tshoganetso le ka ponyo." 
Isaiah30:14 O tlaa lo rabanya jaaka nkgwana ya mmopi e rabaganngwa, a e rebanye a sa rekegele; go ba go tlhokafala mo dikabetlaneng tsa yone le fa e le lobeanyana lo lo ka ogolelang molelo mo isong, le fa e le go ga metsinyana ka lone mo ledibeleng.”" 
Isaiah30:15 Gonne go bua jaana Morena Modimo, Moitshepi wa Iseraele, a re: “Lo ne lo tlaa bolokwa ke go bowa le go ithokgamisa; mo tuulalong le mo go ikanyeng e tlaa nna thata ya lona; mme lo ganne.”" 
Isaiah30:16 Lo ne lwa re: “Nnyaa! Re tlaa tshaba re pagame dipitse.” Ke gone lo tlaa tshabang; gape, “Re tlaa pagama tse di difadima.” Ke gone ka moo bakhukhedi ba lona ba tlaa nnang bafadima." 
Isaiah30:17 Batho ba le 1 000 ba tlaa tshaba ka kgalemo ya motho a le mongwe fela; lo tlaa tshaba ka kgalemo ya ba le batlhano; lo ba lo tlogelwa jaaka sesa kwa setlhoeng sa thaba, le jaaka mokgele mo thoteng." 
Isaiah30:18 Ke gone ka moo Jehofa o tlaa letang, gore a tle a lo tlhomogele pelo, ke gone ka moo o tlaa nanogang gore a tle a nne pelotshweu go lona; gonne Jehofa ke Modimo wa katlholo; go sego botlhe ba ba mo letang." 
Isaiah30:19 Gonne batho ba tlaa aga mo Sione kwa Jerusalema; ga o ketla o tlhola o lela; ruri o tlaa nna pelotshweu go wena, a utlwa lentswe la pitso ya gago; o tlaa re a utlwa a go arabe." 
Isaiah30:20 Le fa Morena a go naya dijo tsa pabaletso, le metsi a patikego, le fa go ntse jalo baruti ba gago ga ba ketla ba tlhola ba subega gope, matlho a gago a tlaa bona baruti ba gago." 
Isaiah30:21 Le ditsebe tsa gago di tlaa utlwa lefoko sefularong sa gago, le re: “Tsela ke e, tsamayang mo go yone:” Ke go re, mogang lo fapogelang ka fa letsogong le le siameng, le fa lo fapogela ka fa go la molema." 
Isaiah30:22 Mme lo tlaa atlafatsa sethathelelo sa selefera, sa ditshwantsho tsa disetwa tsa gago, le dipapetlana tsa gouta tse di apesitseng ditshwantsho tse di tshetsweng, o tlaa di latlha jaaka sekatana se se maswe; o tlaa se raya, o re: “Tloga fano.”" 
Isaiah30:23 O tlaa nesetsa peo ya gago e o tlaa e jalang mo mmung pula; a go naya dijo tsa loato lwa mmu, mme e tlaa bo e le mo go nonneng, mo go letlotlo. Mo letsatsing leo dikgomo tsa gago di tlaa fula mo mafulong a a atlhameng." 
Isaiah30:24 Le dikgomo jalo le dieselana tse di lemang mmu, di tlaa ja dijo tse di lenko, tse di olositsweng ka seoloso le ka loselo." 
Isaiah30:25 Mo godimo ga thaba nngwe le nngwe e e godileng le mo lekhubung lengwe le lengwe le le godileng, go tlaa nna dinoka le dinokana tsa metsi, mo letsatsing la kgailo e kgolo, mogang dikago tsa phemelo di wang." 
Isaiah30:26 Gape lesedi la ngwedi le tlaa nna jaaka lesedi la letsatsi, mme lesedi la letsatsi le tlaa sedifala gasupa, jaaka lesedi la malatsi a supa; mo letsatsing le Jehofa o tlaa fapang botlhoko jwa batho ba gagwe ka lone, a fodisa titeo ya ntho ya bone." 
Isaiah30:27 Bonang, leina la ga Jehofa, le etla le tswa kgakala, le tuka ka bogale jwa gagwe, le ka mosi o o kalabanyeng o a kuuloga; dipounama tsa gagwe di tletse kgakalo; loleme lwa gagwe ke molelo o o lailang;" 
Isaiah30:28 mowa wa gagwe o ntse jaaka nokana e e penologang, e e fitlhang le fa thamong, go tshetshetha merafe ka loselo lwa boithamako; mogala wa pitse o o timetsang o tlaa nna mo ditlhaeng tsa ditšhaba." 
Isaiah30:29 Lona lo tlaa nna le kopelo jaaka mo bosigong jwa fa go jewa moletlo o o boitshepo; le boitumelo jwa pelo jaaka fa mongwe a gwanta ka molodi wa lotlhaka, a ya kwa thabeng ya ga Jehofa, kwa Lefikeng la Iseraele." 
Isaiah30:30 Jehofa o tlaa utlwatsa lentswe la gagwe le lentlentle, a bonaletsa go bata ga letsogo la gagwe, le na le kgakalo ya bogale jwa gagwe, le kgabo ya molelo o o lailang, le leratla, le ledimo, le difako." 
Isaiah30:31 Gonne Moasiria o tlaa thubaganngwa ka lentswe la ga Jehofa, ene Moasiria yo o kileng a itaya ka thobane." 
Isaiah30:32 Titeo nngwe le nngwe ya thobane e e laotsweng, e Jehofa o tlaa e bayang mo go ene, e tlaa ba e nna ka meropana le ka diharepe; mme o tlaa tlhabana nabo ka ditlhabano tsa dingatetso." 
Isaiah30:33 Gonne felo ga phisetso go sa le go baakanngwa bogologolo; ee, go baakanyeditswe kgosi; o go epile boteng le botona; mokoa wa gone ke molelo le dikgong tse ditona; mowa wa Morena, jaaka nokana ya sulefura, o a o tshuba." 
Isaiah31:1 Ija! A bo go latlhega bone ba ba tshologelang thuso kwa Egepeto, ba ikaega dipitse; ba ikanya dikara tsa tlhabano ka go bo di le dintsi, le bapalami ka go bo ba nonofile thata; mme ga ba lebe Moitshepi wa Iseraele, le gone ba sa batle Jehofa!" 
Isaiah31:2 Le fa go ntse jalo, le ene o botlhale, o tlaa lere bosula, ga a ketla a khutlisa mafoko a gagwe; o tlaa tsogologela ntlo ya badira bosula, a ba a tsogologela thuso e e tswang mo go ba ba dirang boikepo." 
Isaiah31:3 Aitse, Baegepeto ke batho, ga se Modimo; le dipitse tsa bone ke nama, ga se mowa; mme e tlaa re Jehofa a ba otlololela letsogo la gagwe, go le yo o thusang o tlaa kgotswa, le yo o thusiwang o tlaa wa, mme ba tlhaele botlhe mmogo." 
Isaiah31:4 Gonne Jehofa o nthaya jaana, a re: “Fela jaaka fa tau e kurutla, le jaaka tawana, godimo ga se di se bolaileng, fa bontsi jwa badisa ba bidiwa, gore ba e tshologele, ga e ketla e rerega ka lentswe la bone, le fa e le go ikokobetsa ka modumo wa bone; jalo fela Jehofa wa masomosomo o tlaa fologa a tla go tlhabana mo thabeng ya Sione, le mo thoteng ya teng." 
Isaiah31:5 Jaaka dinonyane fa di phaphasela, jalo Jehofa wa masomosomo o tlaa femela Jerusalema; o tlaa femela a o golola, o tlaa o tlolaganya a o boloka.”" 
Isaiah31:6 Boelang kwa go ene yo lo mo tsuolololetseng mo gogolo, lona bana ba Iseraele!" 
Isaiah31:7 Gonne mo letsatsing leo motho mongwe le mongwe o tlaa latlha medimo ya gagwe ya disetwa ya selefera, le medimo ya gagwe ya disetwa ya gouta, e diatla tsa lona tota di e lo diretseng go nna boleo." 
Isaiah31:8 “Foo Moasiria o tlaa wa ka tšhaka, mme e seng ya motho; tšhaka e e seng ya motho e tlaa mo gaila; mme o tlaa tshaba tšhaka, mme makau a gagwe a tlaa kgetha." 
Isaiah31:9 Lefika la gagwe le tlaa fetela koo ka ntlha ya therego, le dikgosana tsa gagwe di tlaa rerega ka mokgele,” go bua Jehofa, yo molelo wa gagwe o leng mo Sione, le pesetso ya gagwe e leng mo Jerusalema." 
Isaiah32:1 Bonang, kgosi e tlaa busa ka tshiamo, le dikgosana di tlaa laola ka tshiamo." 
Isaiah32:2 Monna o tlaa nna jaaka boipoteletso mo phefong, le boitekeletso mo ledimong; jaaka dinoka tsa metsi mo sekakeng, jaaka moriti wa lefika le legolo mo nageng e e lapisang." 
Isaiah32:3 Matlho a ba ba bonang ga a ketla a fifala, ditsebe tsa ba ba utlwang di tlaa reetsa." 
Isaiah32:4 Le dipelo tsa baphomesegedi di tlaa tlhaloganya kitso, le diteme tsa bakwakweetsi di tlaa bo di etleetsegile go bua sentle." 
Isaiah32:5 Sefephe ga se ketla se tlhola se rewa go twe se pelontle, le fa e le senoge go rewa, go twe se pelo." 
Isaiah32:6 Gonne sefephe se tlaa bua bofephe fela, le pelo ya sone e tlaa dira boikepo, se tlhapatsa, go bua timetso ka ga Jehofa, go dira mowa wa yo o bolailweng ke tlala go nna lolea fela, le go tlhaetsa go nwa ga yo o bolailweng ke lenyora." 
Isaiah32:7 Le dilo tse senoge se dirang ka tsone di bosula; se loga maano a borumolang go tlaa se senya bahumanegi ka mafoko a maaka, ee, le e leng fa motlhoki a bua tshiamo." 
Isaiah32:8 Yo o pelontle o loga maano a dilo tsa bopelontle; mme o tlaa nna a tswelela mo dilong tsa bopelontle. 
Isaiah32:9 Nanogang, lona basadi ba lo iketlileng, lo utlwe lentswe la me; lona bomorwadiaka, ba lo tlhokomologileng dilo, beelang puo ya me tsebe." 
Isaiah32:10 Gonne lo tlaa fuduiwa ka malatsi a a fetang a ngwaga, lona basadi ba lo tlhokomologileng dilo; gonne phulo ya lofine e tlaa tlhaela; le go rorela kwa gae ga go ketla go tla." 
Isaiah32:11 Roromang, lona basadi ba lo iketlileng; fuduegang, lona ba lo tlhokomologileng dilo; apolang, lo ipeye motomotsa, lo itlame ditheka ka letsela la kgetse." 
Isaiah32:12 Ba tlaa ititaya dihuba, ba ititeela maota a a eletsegang, le mofine o o sisang." 
Isaiah32:13 Mo matlhagareng a batho ba me go tlaa tlhoga lorwana le lokhi; ee, mo godimo ga matlo otlhe a tuduetso, mo motseng wa tuduetso." 
Isaiah32:14 Gonne ntlo ya bogosi e tlaa tlhobogwa, le motse wa bontsintsi jwa batho o tlaa tlogelwa; thotana le serala sa tebelelo di tlaa nna dikgagakgaga ka bosenabokhutlo, di nne boitumelelo jwa diesela tsa nageng, le bofulo jwa matsomane;" 
Isaiah32:15 go tle go tsamaye mowa re o goromelediwe o tswa kwa godimo, le e e leng naga fela e nne leota le le ungwang, le leota le le ungwang le kaiwe jaaka sekgwa." 
Isaiah32:16 E dira gone tshiamiso e tlaa agang mo e leng naga fela, le tshiamo e nna mo leoteng le le ungwang." 
Isaiah32:17 Tiro ya tshiamo e tlaa nna kagiso; le se se tlaa tswang mo tshiamong e tlaa nna lodule le boikanyo ka bosakhutleng. 
Isaiah32:18 Batho ba me ba tlaa nna mo boagong jwa thagamo, le mo dikagong tse di tlhomameng, le mo mafelong a tapologo le a lodule." 
Isaiah32:19 Mo go koameng ga sekgwa sefako se tlaa nna, motse o tlaa lalediwa ruri fa fatshe." 
Isaiah32:20 Go sego lona ba lo jalang ka fa matloding a metsi otlhe fela, ba lo bolotsang kgomo le esela di iketlile ka dinao fela." 
Isaiah33:1 Ija! A bo go latlhega wena yo o thopang, mme o se ka wa thopiwa; wa dira ka mooko, mme wena ba se ka ba go direla ka mooko! O tlaa re o sena go bakela go thopa, wena o tlaa thopiwa; mme o tlaa re o sena go khutla go dira ka mooko, wena ba tlaa go direla ka mooko." 
Isaiah33:2 Jehofa, a ko o nne pelotshweu go rona! Re ntse re go lebeletse; a ko o nne letsogo la bone ka meso yotlhe, le poloka ya rona mo metlheng ya tlalelo." 
Isaiah33:3 Ditšhaba di tshabile ka modumo wa tumo; merafe e gasagasegile ka go itlotloanya ga gago. 
Isaiah33:4 Thopo ya lona e tlaa kokoanngwa jaaka molome o tle o kokoane; ba tlaa e tlolela jaaka tsie e tle e tlolatlole. 
Isaiah33:5 Jehofa o goletsegile; gonne o agile kwa godimong; o tladitse Sione ka tshiamiso le tshiamo. 
Isaiah33:6 Go tlaa nna nitamo mo metlheng ya gago, e bong letlotlo la poloka, le botlhale le kitso; go boifa Jehofa ke khumo ya gagwe." 
Isaiah33:7 Bonang, bapelotona ba bone ba goa ba le kwa ntle, ba ba romilweng kagiso ba lela mo go botlhoko." 
Isaiah33:8 Ditsela tsa meheru di swafetse, motsamai wa tsela o a khutla; o sentse kgolagano, o nyaditse metse, ga a tlhokomele motho." 
Isaiah33:9 Lefatshe le a lela, le a topetega; Lebanone o tlhabilwe ke ditlhong, o swabela ruri; Sharone o ntse jaaka sekaka; Bašane le Karemele, ba tlhotlhorega makakaba." 
Isaiah33:10 Jaanong ke tlaa tsoga, ke ema, go bua Jehofa; jaanong ke tlaa itlotloanya; jaanong ke tlaa goletsega." 
Isaiah33:11 Lo tlaa ithwala mmoko, lo tlaa belega serite; mowa wa lona ke molelo o o tlaa lo lailang." 
Isaiah33:12 Ditšhaba di tlaa nna jaaka go besiwa ga maje a manyaphiri; jaaka mitlwa e e remilweng, e e fisiwang mo molelong." 
Isaiah33:13 Utlwang, lona ba lo kgakala, se ke se dirileng; le lona ba lo fa gaufi, ipoleleng nonofo ya me." 
Isaiah33:14 Baleofi ba ba mo Sione ba a boifa; go tlakasela go tshoganyeditse ba ba tlhokomologileng Modimo. E mang mo go rona yo o tlaa agang le molelo o o lailang? E mang mo go rona yo o tlaa agang le diphiso tse di sa khutleng? 
Isaiah33:15 Yo o tsamayang ka tshiamo, mme a bua ka thokgamo; yo o nyatsang dipapadi tsa patiko, a itlhotlhora diatla mo go tseyeng dituelelo tsa phaposo, yo o ikabang ditsebe, gore a se utlwe ka ga madi a motho, a budulatse matlho a gagwe, gore a se bone bosula:" 
Isaiah33:16 Yo, ke ene yo o tlaa agang kwa godimo; bonno jwa gagwe jwa phemelo e tlaa nna maiphemelo a mafika; dijo tsa gagwe o tlaa di fiwa; metsi a gagwe o tlaa a bona ruri." 
Isaiah33:17 Matlho a gago a tlaa bona kgosi e le mo bontlentleng jwa yone; a tlaa leba lefatshe le le namaletseng kwa kgakala. 
Isaiah33:18 Pelo ya gago e tlaa akanya therego e rumaruma; ana yo o ne a bala o kae? Yo o ne a lekanya lekgetho o kae? O kae ene yo o ne a bala dikago tsa phemelo? 
Isaiah33:19 Ga o ketla o bona yone tšhaba e e logala, tšhaba ya puo e e kwa teng, e o sa kakeng wa e lemoga; tšhaba e e loleme lo sele lo o sa kakeng wa lo tlhaloganya." 
Isaiah33:20 Leba Sione, motse wa mediro ya rona e e masisi; Matlho a gago a tlaa bona Jerusalema e le boago jwa lodule, e le mogope o o se ketlang o tlosiwa, o dimapo tsa one di se ketlang di khumolwa gope, le fa e le dithapo tsa one go kgaoga gope." 
Isaiah33:21 Gone foo Jehofa o tlaa nna le rona ka borena, felong ga dinoka le dinokana tse di atlhameng; kwa go se ketlang go tsamaya mokoro ope ka dikankase gone, le fa e le sekepe se se fatlhang ka bontle go feta ka gone." 
Isaiah33:22 Gonne Jehofa ke Moatlhodi wa rona, Jehofa ke Motlhoma molao wa rona, Jehofa ke Kgosi ya rona; ene o tlaa re boloka." 
Isaiah33:23 Megala ya gago e repile; e ne e sa kake ya thatafatsa thito ya pinagare ya sekepe sa bone, e ne e sa kake ya tsharolola letsela; foo thopo ya kgapo e kgolo ya kgaoganngwa; ditlhotsa tsone tsa tsaya thopo." 
Isaiah33:24 Monni wa gona ga a ketla a re: “Ke a bobola,” batho ba ba agang gona ba tlaa itshwarelwa boikepo jwa bone." 
Isaiah34:1 Atamelang lona merafe lo tle go utlwa; lo reetseng lona ditšhaba; a lefatshe le utlwe le botlalo jwa lone; lobopo le dilo tsotlhe tse di tswang mo go lone. 
Isaiah34:2 Gonne Jehofa o gakaletse merafe yotlhe, o šakgaletse ntwa yotlhe ya yone; o e senyeditse ruri, o e neetse go gailwa fela." 
Isaiah34:3 Babolaiwa ba bona ba tlaa latlhelwa kwa ntle, mme sefoka sa ditoto tsa bone se tlaa phunyega, le dithaba di tlaa nyera ka madi a bone." 
Isaiah34:4 Lesomosomo lotlhe la legodimo le tlaa nyera, magodimo a tlaa tshophiwa jaaka lokwalo lo lo tshophiwang; lesomosomo lotlhe la one le tlaa tlhotlhorega jaaka lekakaba le tle le tlhotlhorege mo mofineng, le jaaka lekakaba le tlhotlhorega mo feiyeng." 
Isaiah34:5 Gonne tšhaka ya me e nole e kgotshe mo legodimong; bonang, e tlaa wela Etome godimo, le mo bathong ba neelo ya me, go ba sekisa." 
Isaiah34:6 Tšhaka ya ga Jehofa e tlhamuketse madi, e nontshitswe ka monono, ka madi a dikwanyana le a dipodi, le ka mafura a diphilo tsa diphelefu; gonne Jehofa o na le setlhabelo mo Bosera, le kgailo e kgolo mo lefatsheng la Etome." 
Isaiah34:7 Dinare di tla fologa natso, le dipholo di na le dipoo, lefatshe la bone le tlaa tagwa ke madi, le lorole lwa bone lo tlaa nongwa ka monono." 
Isaiah34:8 Gonne ke letsatsi la pusoloso ya ga Jehofa, ke ngwaga wa tefetso mo kgangnyeng ya Sione." 
Isaiah34:9 Dinokana tsa teng di tlaa fetoga boka, le lorole lwa teng sulefura, lefatshe la teng le tlaa nna boka jo bo tukang molelo." 
Isaiah34:10 Ga go ketla go tingwa bosigo le motshegare; mosi wa teng o tlaa kuelela ka bosakhutleng; go tlaa namalala go kgakgabetse go ya ditshikatshikeng; ope ga a ketla a go ralala ka bosakhutleng le ka bosaengkae. 
Isaiah34:11 Khukara e tlaa go rua le noko; le morubisi o tlaa aga teng le mohukubu, mme o tlaa go namalaletsa mogala wa mafaratlhatlha, le selekanyo se se thokgameng sa tobekano." 
Isaiah34:12 Ba tlaa biletsa bagolwane ba teng kwa bogosing, mme ga go ketla go dira le ope teng; le dikgosana tsotlhe tsa gagwe di tlaa bo di se sepe." 
Isaiah34:13 Lorwana lo tlaa tlhoga mo matlong a teng a dikgosi, mmabi le mokaikai mo dikagong tsa gone tsa phemelo; e tlaa nna bonno jwa diphokoje le lolwapa lwa bontšhe." 
Isaiah34:14 Dibatana tsa sekaka di tlaa kopana le diphiri, le badimo sekapodi ba tlaa bitsakanya le dilekane tsa bone. Ee, Mma-meno a-mahibidu o tlaa tla a nna teng, mongwe le mongwe a na le selekane sa gagwe." 
Isaiah34:15 Morubisi o tlaa dira setlhaga sa one teng, o baya mae, o thothotsa, o phuthela mo go ikgareng ga one; bomankgwedi ba tlaa kokoanela teng, mongwe le mongwe a na le selekane sa gagwe." 
Isaiah34:16 Tlhotlhomisang mo lokwalong lwa ga Jehofa, lo bale: ga go na epe ya tsone tse, e e tlaa tlhokafalang, epe ga e ketla e tlhoka mogatsa a yone, gonne molomo wa me o go laotse, mowa wa gagwe o di phuthile." 
Isaiah34:17 O di laoletse ka bola; seatla sa gagwe se le di kgaoganyeditse ka mogala; di tlaa le rua ka bosakhutleng, di tlaa aga teng mo ditshikatshikeng." 
Isaiah35:1 E e leng naga fela e tlaa ipela le lefatshe la lokgere; le sekaka se tlaa itumela se nyakalala jaaka sešeše. 
Isaiah35:2 Se tlaa nyakalala segolo thata, se ipela, ee, le ka boitumelo le tuduetso; kgalalelo ya Lebanone e tlaa se newa, le boitlotlomatso jwa Karemele le Sharone; ba tlaa bona kgalalelo ya ga Jehofa, le boitlotlomatso jwa Modimo wa rona."
