Isaiah56:12 Ba re: “Ntlong, ke tlaa ya go lere bojalwa jwa mofine, mme re tlaa ikgorisa ka seno se se loileng; mme ka moso go tlaa nna jaaka gompieno, letsatsi le legolo go fetelela.”" 
Isaiah57:1 Mosiami o a nyelela, mme ga go motho ope yo o go bayang mo pelong; batho ba ba pelotlhomogi ba a tlosiwa, mme ope a sa tlhokomele go re mosiami o tlosediwa bosula jo bo tlang." 
Isaiah57:2 O tsena mo kagisong: ba lapologa mo malaong a bone, e bong mongwe le mongwe yo o tsamayang mo thokgamong ya gagwe." 
Isaiah57:3 “Atamelang kwano lona bomorwa mosadi yo o moloi, lona losika lwa mosadi wa seotswa le wa seaka." 
Isaiah57:4 Lo a bo lo tshameka ka mang? Lo atlhamolosetsa mang molomo, lo laila ka loleme? A ga lo bana ba tlolo, losika lwa maaka." 
Isaiah57:5 Ba lo ikgotetsang ka medimo ya disetwa, fa disetwa fa tlase ga setlhare sengwe le sengwe se setala; lo bolaya banyana mo megorogorong, fa tlase ga mariba a mafika?" 
Isaiah57:6 Ga eno ke mo gare ga maje a a borethe a mogorogoro; one ke one ga eno; ke one a o a theletseng tshupelo ya seno, o a iseditse seromololo. A nka rapelesega ka dilo tse?" 
Isaiah57:7 O beile bolao jwa gago mo thabeng e e godileng, e e godimo thata; wa tlhatlogela koo wa ya go isa setlhabelo." 
Isaiah57:8 O tlhomile segopodiso sa gago ka fa morago ga ditswalo le mephekwana; o ikapoletse o sele e seng nna, mme o tlhatlogile; o katolositse bolao jwa gago, o golaganye nabo; wa rata bolao jwa bone fela kwa o bo bonang teng." 
Isaiah57:9 Wa ya kwa kgosing o tshotse setlolo, wa oketsa tse di nkgang monate tsa gago, wa roma barongwa ba gago kwa kgakala, wa itswapolela le go ya Bobipong." 
Isaiah57:10 Wa lapisiwa ke boleele jwa loeto lwa gago; le fa go ntse jalo ga o a ka wa re: ‘Ga go na tsholofelo;’ wa fitlhela go na le thudiso ya thata ya gago; ke gone ka moo o ne o se ka wa idibala. 
Isaiah57:11 “O ntse o tshaba mang wa nna mo poifong, fa e bo ne ne o aka jaana, o sa nkgakologelwe, le fa e le go go baya mo pelong ya gago? A ga ke a nna ka itidimalela e sa le bogologolo, mme o sa mpoife?" 
Isaiah57:12 Tshiamo ya gago ke tlaa e kakanya; mme ka ga ditiro tsa gago ga di ketla di go direla molemo. 
Isaiah57:13 Mogang o galang, a ba o ba phuthileng ba go golole; mme phefo e tlaa ba tsaya, go hema ga molomo go tlaa ba tlosa botlhe; mme yo o ikanyang mo go nna o tlaa rua lefatshe, o tlaa ja thaba ya me e e boitshepo boswa.”" 
Isaiah57:14 O tlaa re: “Tlhatlosang, tlhatlosang, lo baakanye tsela, tlosang sekgopi mo tseleng ya batho ba me.”" 
Isaiah57:15 Gonne go bua jaana Ene yo o godimo, yo o godileng thata, yo o ntseng mo Bosakhutleng, yo leina la gagwe e leng Boitshepo, a re: “Ke agile mo felong ga godimo le ga boitshepo, le gone ke nna le ene yo o mowa o o ngomogileng, o o ikokobeditseng, go rudisa mowa wa ba ba ikokobeditseng, le go rudisa pelo tsa ba ba pelo e e ngomogileng." 
Isaiah57:16 Gonne ga nketla ke ganela ka bosenabokhutlo, le gone ga nketla ke nna ke šakgala ka gale; gonne botshelo bo ne bo ka fela fa pele ga me, le mewa e ke e dirileng." 
Isaiah57:17 Ke ne ke šakgetse ka ba ka mo itaya ka ntlha ya boikepo jwa bopelotshetlha jwa gagwe; ka fitlha sefatlhogo sa me, ka šakgala; mme a tswelela pele ka lešoko fela mo mokgweng wa gagwe." 
Isaiah57:18 “Ke bonye mekgwa ya gagwe, mme ke tlaa mo fodisa; le gone ke tlaa mo goga, ke ba ke busetsa dikgomotso kwa go ene, le kwa go ba ba mo lelelang." 
Isaiah57:19 Nna ke tlhola loungo lwa dipounama: Kagiso, kagiso e nne go ene yo o kgakala le go ene yo o gaufi, go bua Jehofa; mme ke tlaa mo fodisa." 
Isaiah57:20 Baikepi ba ntse jaaka lewatle le le kgaphaselang, gonne ga le kake la iketla, metsi a lone a bilola seretse le matlakala fela." 
Isaiah57:21 Ga go na kagiso epe e e leng ya baikepi,” go bua Modimo wa me." 
Isaiah58:1 “Goa thata, se rekegele, tsholetsa lentswe la gago jaaka lonaka, o kakanyetse batho ba me tlolo ya bone, le ba ntlo ya ga Jakobe maleo a bone." 
Isaiah58:2 Le fa go ntse jalo ba tlhola ba ntse ba mpatla ka malatsi otlhe, ba natefelwa ke go itse mekgwa ya me; jaaka e kete ke morafe o o dirang tshiamo, o sa latlha katlholo ya Modimo wa bone, ba ntopa melao e e siameng, ba kgatlhwa ke go atamela kwa Modimong." 
Isaiah58:3 “Ba re: ‘Re a bo re ikiditse go ja ka ntlha yang, fa e bo ne ne o sa bone? Re ipatikile mowa ka ntlha yang fa e bo ne ne o sa tlhokomele?’ Bonang, e re mo letsatsing la go ikitsa go ja ga lona, ke go dira go kgatlhega ga lona fela, mme lo a bo lo patika badiredi ba lona botlhe." 
Isaiah58:4 Bonang, lo ikitsa go ja go dira kgang fela le komang le go kitla ka letswele la boikepo; ga lo ikitse go ja gompieno gore lo tle lo utlwatse lentswe la lona kwa godimo." 
Isaiah58:5 A ke gone go ikitsa go ja mo ke go lopileng? A ke letsatsi la motho go ipatika mowa wa gagwe? A ke go ikoba tlhogo fela jaaka mophutlo, le go ikalela letsela la kgetse le molora tlase ga gagwe? A golo mo, o tlaa go raya o re: Ke go ikitsa go ja, o ba o re: Ke letsatsi le le lebosegang mo go Jehofa?" 
Isaiah58:6 “A go ikitsa go ja mo ke go lopileng a ga se gone mo? E bong go golola dikgolego tsa boikepo, le go hunolola dikgole tsa jokwe, le go leseletsa bapatikwi go tsamaya fela, le gore lo robe dijokwe tsotlhe?" 
Isaiah58:7 A ga se go abela ba ba bolailweng ke tlala dijo tsa gago, le go lere mo ntlong ya gago bahumanegi ba ba latlhegileng? O re o bona yo o sa aparang a ga se gore o mo apese? Le gore o se iphitlhele bone ba e leng nama ya gago?" 
Isaiah58:8 “Foo lesedi la gago le tlaa betlama jaaka phepafalo ya moso, le go fola ga gago go tlaa runya ka bonako; le tshiamo ya gago e tlaa go etelela pele; le kgalalelo ya ga Jehofa e tlaa nna tshimega ya gago." 
Isaiah58:9 Foo o tlaa bitsa, mme Jehofa o tlaa go araba; o tlaa goa, mme o tlaa re: ‘Ke fano.’ “Fa o tlosa jokwe mo gare ga gago, le go supa ka monwana, le go bua ka boikepo;" 
Isaiah58:10 le gone fa o ntshetsa yo o bolailweng ke tlala pelo ya gago, le yo o bogisiwang fa o mmusetsa pelo; foo lesedi la gago le tlaa tlhaba mo lefifing, le bosabonaleng jwa gago bo tlaa nna jaaka motshegare;" 
Isaiah58:11 Jehofa o tlaa nna mogogi wa gago ka gale le ka gale, a go busetsa pelo mo leubeng, a thatafatsa marapo a gago; mme o tlaa nna jaaka tshimo e e nosiwang, le jaaka motswedi wa metsi, o metsi a one a sa feleng." 
Isaiah58:12 Bone ba e tlaa bong e le ba gago ba tlaa aga marope a bogologolo; o tlaa tsosolosa metheo ya ditshika di le dintsi; mme o tlaa bidiwa Momamatleledi wa phatlha, Motsosolosi wa ditsela gore go nnwe mo go tsone." 
Isaiah58:13 “Fa o faposa lonao lwa gago mo go gateng Sabata, o sa dire kgatlhego ya gago ka letsatsi la me le le itshepileng; mme o raya Sabata o re: O monate, le se se itshepileng sa ga Jehofa o re; se a tlotlega; mme fa o mo tlotla o sa ye le mekgwa e e leng ya gago, o sa bone kgatlhego e e leng ya gago, o sa bue mafoko a e leng a gago;" 
Isaiah58:14 foo, o tlaa ijesa monate mo go Jehofa; mme ke tlaa go palamisa mafelo a godimo a lefatshe; ke tlaa go otla ka boswa jwa ga Jakobe rraago, gonne molomo wa ga Jehofa o buile.”" 
Isaiah59:1 Bonang, letsogo la ga Jehofa ga le a khutshwafala, go re ga le kake la boloka; le tsebe ya gagwe ga e a kabala, go re ga e kake ya utlwa." 
Isaiah59:2 Maikepo a lona a lomologantse fa gare ga lona le Modimo wa lona; le maleo a lona a lo subetse sefatlhogo sa one gore a gane go utlwa. 
Isaiah59:3 Gonne diatla tsa lona di leswe ka madi, le menwana ya lona ka boikepo; dipounama tsa lona di buile maaka; diteme tsa lona di pepedumapepeduma boikepo." 
Isaiah59:4 Ga go na ope yo o isang tshekong ka tshiamo, ga go na ope yo o buelelang kgang mo boammaaruring; ba ikanya boithamako, ba bua maaka; ba ima bosenyi, ba belega boikepo." 
Isaiah59:5 Ba tototsha mae a šaušawane, ba loga bobi jwa segokgo; yo o jang mae a bone a swe, le le le phatlakantsweng le tswe legwere." 
Isaiah59:6 Mabi a bone ga a ketla a tswa diaparo, le gone ga ba ketla ba ikapesa ka ditiro tsa bone; ditiro tsa bone ke ditiro tsa boikepo; tiro ya thubakanyo e mo diatleng tsa bone." 
Isaiah59:7 Dinao tsa bone di sianela kwa bosuleng, ba itlhaganelela go tsholola madi a a se nang molato; megopolo ya bone ke megopolo ya boikepo; tshwafalo le tshenyego di mo motlhaleng wa bone." 
Isaiah59:8 Tsela ya kagiso ga ba e itse; ga go na tshiamo mo metlhaleng ya bone; ba itshokamiseditse ditselana; le fa e le mang yo o tsamayang mo go tsone ga a ke a itse kagiso. 
Isaiah59:9 Ke gone ka moo katlholo e ntseng kgakala le rona, le tshiamo ga e re fitlhele; re batla lesedi, mme re bona lefifi fela; re batla phatsimo mme, re tsamaya mo go sa bonaleng fela." 
Isaiah59:10 Re apaapa lomota jaaka difofu; ee, re apaapa jaaka ba ba se nang matlho; re tlauma motshegare jaaka fa go le lotlatlana; mo go ba ba dingware re ntse jaaka batho ba ba suleng fela." 
Isaiah59:11 Re kgorotla rotlhe jaaka dibera, re lela mo go botlhoko jaaka maeba; re batla katlholo, mme ga go na epe; re batla poloko, mme e ntse kgakala le rona." 
Isaiah59:12 Gonne ditlolo tsa rona di ntsifetse fa pele ga gago, le maleo a rona a supa ka ga rona; gonne ditlolo tsa rona di na le rona, mme ka ga maikepo a rona re a a itse;" 
Isaiah59:13 ka go tlola, le ka go itatola Jehofa, le ka go fapoga go latela Modimo wa rona, ka go bua patiko le tsuololo, ka go ithwala le go ntsha mafoko a maaka a a tswang mo pelong." 
Isaiah59:14 Katlholo e tenegetse kwa morago, le tshiamo e emetse kwa kgakala; gonne boammaaruri bo ole mo mmileng, le thokgamo ga e kake ya tsena." 
Isaiah59:15 Ee, boammaaruri bo a tlhokafala; mme yo o kgaoganang le bosula o itshemela go thopiwa; Jehofa o na a go bona, mme ga mo itumolola fa go se na katlholo." 
Isaiah59:16 Mme a bona fa go se na monna ope, mme a gakgamala fa go se na morapeledi; ke gone ka moo letsogo la gagwe ka esi la mo leretse poloko; tshiamo ya gagwe yone ya mo tshegetsa." 
Isaiah59:17 A apara tshiamo jaaka phemo ya sehuba, le tlhoro ya phemo mo tlhogong ya gagwe; a apara diaparo tsa tefetso, le tlhoafalo a e apara jaaka kobo." 
Isaiah59:18 Fela ka fa ditiro tsa bone di ntseng ka teng, o tlaa duela fela jalo; baganetsi ba gagwe ka tšarologo, baba ba gagwe ka tuelo; mme ditlhare o tlaa di duela ka tekanyetso." 
Isaiah59:19 Jalo ba tlaa boifa leina la ga Jehofa ba le kwa bophirimatsatsi, le kgalalelo ya gagwe ba le kwa botlhabatsatsi; gonne o tlaa tla jaaka noka e e phašametsegang, e go hema ga Jehofa go e phašametsang." 
Isaiah59:20 “Morekolodi o tlaa tla mo Sione, le mo go bone ba ga Jakobe ba ba boang mo tlolong,” go bua Jehofa." 
Isaiah59:21 “Ka ga me, ke yone kgolagano ya me nabo,” go bua Jehofa; “mowa wa me o o mo go wena, le mafoko a me a ke a tsentseng mo molomong wa gago, ga di ketla di tloga di tswa mo molomong wa gago, le fa e le mo molomong wa bana ba gago, le fa e le mo molomong wa bana ba bana ba gago, go tloga fano gompiyeno, go ya bosakhutleng,” go bua Jehofa." 
Isaiah60:1 Tsoga o phatsime; gonne lesedi la gago le fitlhile, le kgalalelo ya ga Jehofa e go tlhabetse." 
Isaiah60:2 Gonne bona, lefifi le tlaa bipa lefatshe, le lefifi le lentshontsho le tlaa bipa ditšhaba; mme wena Jehofa o tlaa go tlhabela, le kgalalelo ya gagwe e tlaa bonala mo go wena." 
Isaiah60:3 Merafe e tlaa tla leseding la gago, le dikgosi di tlaa tla phatsimong ya go tlhaba ga gago." 
Isaiah60:4 Tsholetsa matlho a gago o lebe, o kobakobe; ba phuthega botlhe mmogo ba tla kwa go wena; bomorwao ba tla, ba tswa kgakala, le bomorwadio ba tlaa tsholwa ka mabogo." 
Isaiah60:5 Foo o tlaa ba bona ka boipelo, mme pelo ya gago e tlaa tlala boitumelo; gonne letlotlo la lewatle le tlaa busediwa kwa go wena, mahumo a merafe a tlaa tla kwa go wena." 
Isaiah60:6 Dikamela di tlaa go khurumetsa ka bontsi, dikamelana tsa Midiane le Efa; Bašeba ba tlaa tla botlhe; ba tlaa lere gouta le maswalo, ba tlaa bolela dipako tsa ga Jehofa." 
Isaiah60:7 Matsomane otlhe a Ketare a tlaa phuthegela kwa go wena, diphelefu tsa Nebaiothe di tlaa go direla; di tlaa tla mo sebesong sa me ka tebosego, mme ke tlaa galaletsa ntlo ya kgalalelo ya me." 
Isaiah60:8 Ke bomang ba, ba ba fofang jaaka leru, le jaaka maeba a ya marobeng a one?" 
Isaiah60:9 Ruri ditlhake di tlaa nteta, le dikepe tsa Tarešiše pele, go lere bomorwao ba tswa kgakala, le selefera sa bone le gouta ya bone nabo, ka ntlha ya leina la ga Jehofa Modimo wa gago, le ka ntlha ya Moitshepi wa Iseraele, ka gobo a go galaleditse." 
Isaiah60:10 Baeng ba tlaa tsosa ba aga dithako tsa gago, le dikgosi tsa bone di tlaa go direla; gonne ke ne ka go betsa mo tšhakgalong ya me, mme mo botsalanong jwa me ke go utlwetse botlhoko." 
Isaiah60:11 Dikgoro tsa gago le tsone di tlaa nna di bulegile ka gale le ka gale; ga di ketla di tswalwa motshegare le bosigo; gore batho ba tlise mo go wena mahumo a merafe, le dikgosi tsa bone di tlaa gogwa nabo." 
Isaiah60:12 Gonne morafe o o tlaa ganang go go direla, le bogosi, ba tlaa nyelela; ee, merafe eo, e tlaa senyediwa ruri." 
Isaiah60:13 Kgalalelo ya Lebanone e tlaa tla mo go wena, setlhare sa mophane le sa mogonono di le mmogo le monato; go ntlefatsa felo ga me ga boitshepo, mme ke tlaa galaletsa felo ga dinao tsa me." 
Isaiah60:14 Bomorwaa bone ba ba kileng ba ne ba go patika ba tlaa tla ba go ikobetse; botlhe ba ba kileng ba ne ba go nyatsa, ba tlaa khutšhama fa dipatong tsa dinao tsa gago; mme ba tlaa go raya leina ba re: Motse wa ga Jehofa, Sione wa Moitshepi wa Iseraele." 
Isaiah60:15 E re ka o ntse o tlhadilwe o ilwa, ga tsamaya ope a se ka a go ralala, ke tlaa go dira go nna boitlotlomatso jo bo sa khutleng, boitumelo jwa ditshika di le dintsi." 
Isaiah60:16 Le gone o tlaa anya maši a merafe, o tlaa anya a dikgosi; mme o tlaa itse fa Nna Jehofa ke le Mmoloki wa gago, le Morekolodi wa gago, Mothata wa ga Jakobe." 
Isaiah60:17 Mo boemong jwa kgotlho ke tlaa lere gouta, le kgotlho boemong jwa logong, ke lere selefera boemong jwa tshipi, le tshipi boemong jwa maje; ke tlaa dira maotlana a gago kagiso, le badirisi ba gago tshiamo." 
Isaiah60:18 Go thubaka ga go ketla go tlhola go utlwala mo lefatsheng la gago, le fa e le tshwafatso kgotsa tshenyo mo teng ga melelwane ya gago; o tlaa raya dithako tsa gago leina o re: Poloka, le dikgoro tsa gago o re: Pako." 
Isaiah60:19 Letsatsi ga le ketla le tlhola e le lesedi la gago motshegare, le kgwedi ka go phatsima ga e ketla e go naya lesedi; mme Jehofa o tlaa nna lesedi la gago le le sa khutleng; le Modimo wa gago o tlaa nna kgalalelo ya gago." 
Isaiah60:20 Letsatsi la gago ga le ketla le tlhola le phirima, le kgwedi ya gago ga e ketla e tlhola e kotlomela; gonne Jehofa o tlaa nna lesedi la gago le le sa khutleng, mme malatsi a khutsafalo a gago a tlaa bo a khutlile." 
Isaiah60:21 Batho ba gago le bone ba tlaa nna tshiamo botlhe, ba tlaa rua lefatshe ka bosenabokhutlo; e le kala ya go tlhongwa ga me, e le tiro ya diatla tsa me, gore ke tle ke galalediwe." 
Isaiah60:22 Yo monnye o tlaa tla a nna sekete, le yo mmotlana a nna morafe o o thata; nna Jehofa ke tlaa go akofisa mo motlheng wa gone." 
Isaiah61:1 Mowa wa Morena Modimo o mo go nna; gonne Jehofa o ntloleditse go rerela ba ba pelonolo mafoko a a molemo; o nthomile gore ke fape ba ba pelo di phatlogileng, go bolelela batshwarwa kgololo, le ba ba golegilweng, go re ntlo ya kgolegelo e budilwe." 
Isaiah61:2 Go bolela ngwaga o o lebosegang wa ga Jehofa, le letsatsi la pusoloso ya Modimo wa rona; go gomotsa botlhe ba ba hutsafetseng;" 
Isaiah61:3 go laolela ba ba hutsafetseng mo Sione, go ba naya mokgabo wa ditšheše boemong jwa melora, lookwane lwa boitumelo boemong jwa khutsafalo, seaparo sa pako mo boemong jwa mowa wa ngodiego; gore ba bidiwe ditlhare tsa tshiamo, tse di tlhomilweng ke Jehofa, gore a galalediwe." 
Isaiah61:4 Ba tlaa aga marope a magologolo, ba tlaa tsosolosa fa go swafetseng ga pele, ba tlaa mamatlelela metse e e kgakgabetseng marope a ditshika di le dintsi." 
Isaiah61:5 Baeng ba tlaa ema ba fudisa matsomane a lona, ba ditšhaba ba tlaa nna balemedi ba lona le babaakanyetsi ba lona ba mafine." 
Isaiah61:6 Lona lo tlaa bidiwa baperesiti ba ga Jehofa; batho ba tlaa lo bitsa badiredi ba Modimo wa rona; lo tlaa ja mafumo a merafe, lo tlaa itlotla ka kgalalelo ya yone." 
Isaiah61:7 Mo boemong jwa ditlhong tsa lona lo tlaa amogela sebedi; mme mo boemong jwa tsielo ba tlaa itumela mo kabelong ya bone; ke gone ka mo ba tlaa ruang sebedi mo lefatsheng la bone; boitumelo jo bo sa khutleng bo tlaa nna mo go bone. 
Isaiah61:8 Gonne nna Jehofa ke rata tshiamiso, ke ila bogodu bo na le boikepo; ke tlaa ba naya maduo a bone mo boammaaruring, ke dira kgolagano e e sa khutleng nabo." 
Isaiah61:9 Losika lwa bone lo tlaa itsiwe mo merafeng le matlhogela a bone mo ditšhabeng; botlhe ba ba ba bonang ba tlaa ba dumela fa e le bone losika lo Jehofa o lo segofaditseng. 
Isaiah61:10 Ke tlaa itumela thata mo go Jehofa, mowa wa me o tlaa ipela mo Modimong wa me, ka o nkapesitse diaparo tsa poloko, o mpipile ka kobo ya tshiamo, jaaka monyadi o tle a ikgabise ka mokgabo wa ditsheše, le jaaka monyadwi a tle a ikgabise ka mekgabo ya gagwe e e tsabakelang." 
Isaiah61:11 Gonne jaaka lefatshe le tle le ntshe go kukunya ga lone, le jaaka tshimo e tle e tlhabise dijalo tsa yone; jalo Morena Modimo o tlaa tlhogisa tshiamo le pako fa pele ga merafe yotlhe." 
Isaiah62:1 Ka ntlha ya Sione ga nketla ke didimala, le ka ntlha ya Jerusalema ga nketla ke itapolosa, go tsamaya tshiamo ya gagwe e tswela kwa ntle jaaka phatsimo, le poloko ya gagwe jaaka lobone lo lo tukang." 
Isaiah62:2 Merafe e tlaa bona tshiamo ya gago, le dikgosi tsotlhe kgalalelo ya gago, mme o tlaa retwa ka leina le leša le molomo wa ga Jehofa o tlaa le go rayang." 
Isaiah62:3 Le gone o tlaa nna serwalo sa bogosi se sentle mo seatleng sa ga Jehofa, le mofapatlhogo wa segosi mo seatleng sa Modimo wa gago." 
Isaiah62:4 Ga o ketla o tlhola o bidiwa Molatlhiwa; le gone lefatshe la gago ga le ketla le tlhola le bidiwa Marope; mme wena o tlaa bidiwa Hefesiba, le lefatshe la gago le tlaa bidiwa Beula, gonne Jehofa o kgatlhega thata mo go wena, le lefatshe la gago le tlaa nyalwa." 
Isaiah62:5 Gonne jaaka lekau le tle le nyale kgarebane, jalo bomorwao ba tlaa go nyala; le jaaka monyadi a tle a itumelele monyadwi, Modimo wa gago o tlaa itumelela wena fela jalo." 
Isaiah62:6 Ke tlhomile balebedi mo dithakong tsa gago wena Jerusalema, ga ba ketla ba didimala gope motshegare le bosigo, lona ba lo leng bagakolodi ba ga Jehofa." 
Isaiah62:7 Go se ka ga itapolosa lona, le ene lo se ka lwa mo lesa a itapolosa, go tsamaya a tlhomamisa, le go tsamaya a dira Jerusalema pako mo lefatsheng pele." 
Isaiah62:8 Jehofa o ikanne ka seatla sa gagwe se segolo le ka letsogo la thata ya gagwe, a re: “Ruri ga nketla ke tlhola ke ntsha mabele a gago go nna dijo tsa baba ba gago; le gone baeng ga ba ketla ba nwa bojalwa jwa mofine jwa gago, jo o ineileng letsapa ka ga jone." 
Isaiah62:9 Mme bone ba ba a roretseng mo disoeng ba tlaa a ja, ba baka Jehofa; le ba ba hodileng ba tlaa bo nwela mo malwapeng a felo ga me ga boitshepo.”" 
Isaiah62:10 Tsenang, tsenang ka dikgoro; baakanyang tsela ya batho; tlhatlosang, tlhatlosang tsela ya mheru; olang maje; tsholeletsang ditšhaba mokgele." 
Isaiah62:11 Bonang, Jehofa o boletse le kwa sekhutlong sa lefatshe, a re: Rayang morwadia Sione lo re: “Bona, Poloka ya gago o etla, bona, tuelo ya gagwe o na nayo, le maduo a gagwe a fa pele ga gagwe.”" 
Isaiah62:12 Mme ba tlaa ba raya ba re: Batho ba ba boitshepo, Barekolodiwi ba ga Jehofa; mme wena o tlaa bidiwa Mmatlilwi, Motse o o sa tlogelwang." 
Isaiah63:1 E mang yo, yo o tswang kwa Etome, a le diaparo tse di bohibidu jo bo mokgona, a tswa kwa Bosera? Yo o galalelang ka diaparo tsa gagwe, a sepela mo bogolong jwa thata ya gagwe? “Ke nna yo ke buang mo tshiamong, ke le mothata mo go bolokeng.”" 
Isaiah63:2 Ke ka ntlha yang fa e bo ne ne o le diaparo tse di bohibidu, o le diaparo tse di ntseng jaaka tsa yo o gatang sedibeletso sa bojalwa jwa mofine?" 
Isaiah63:3 “Ke gatile sedibeletso sa bojalwa jwa mofine ke le nosi fela; mme go ne go se na ope wa ditšhaba le nna; ee, ke ba gatile mo boraleng jwa me, ke ba sobotlile mo tšarologong ya me; madi a bone a mahibidu a gasegetse diaparo tsa me, ke bile ke hubiditse diaparo tsa me tsotlhe fela." 
Isaiah63:4 Gonne letsatsi la pusoloso le ne le le mo pelong ya me, le ngwaga wa barekolodwi ba me o fitlhile." 
Isaiah63:5 Mme ka leba, mme go ne go se na ope yo o thusang; mme ka gakgamala ka go se na ope yo o tshegetsang; ke gone ka mo letsogo la me ka nosi la nteretse poloko, le tšarologo ya me ya ntshegetsa." 
Isaiah63:6 Ka gataka ditšhaba ka bogale jwa me, ka ba taga mo tšarologong ya me; mme madi a mahibidu a bone ka a tshololela fa fatshe.”" 
Isaiah63:7 Ke tlaa umaka mapelonomi a lorato a ga Jehofa, le dipako tsa ga Jehofa ka fa dilong tsotlhe tse Jehofa o di re neileng; le molemo o mogolo wa gagwe ka ga ntlo ya Iseraele, o o o ba neileng ka fa mautlwelong botlhoko a gagwe, le ka fa bontsing jwa mapelonomi a gagwe a lorato." 
Isaiah63:8 Gonne a re: “Ruri, ke batho ba me, ke bana ba ba se ketlang ba dira ka boferefere;” jalo a nna mmoloki wa bone." 
Isaiah63:9 Mo dipogisong tsotlhe tsa bone le ene a bogisiwa, moengele wa gagwe yo o emelang ene, a ba boloka; a ba rekolola ka lorato lwa gagwe, le ka pelotlhomogi ya gagwe; a ba belega, a ba sikara ka malatsi otlhe a bogologolo." 
Isaiah63:10 Mme ba ne ba tsuolola ba utlwisa mowa wa gagwe o o boitshepo botlhoko; ke gone o ne a fetoga a nna mmaba wa bone, ene ka esi a tlhabana nabo." 
Isaiah63:11 Foo a gakologelwa malatsi a bogologolo, Moše, le batho ba gagwe, a re: O kae yo o kileng a ba tlhatlosa mo lewatleng a na le badisa ba letsomane la gagwe? O kae ene yo o ne a tsenya mowa wa gagwe o o boitshepo fa gare ga bone?" 
Isaiah63:12 A tsamaisa letsogo la gagwe le le galalelang ka fa ntlheng ya letsogo le legolo la ga Moše? A tsetsereganya metsi fa pele ga bone, go itirela leina le le sa khutleng?" 
Isaiah63:13 A ba goga, a ba ralatsa madiba a a boteng jaaka pitse mo nageng fela, ba tla ba se ka ba kgopiwa?" 
Isaiah63:14 Jaaka matlhape a a fologelang mo mokgatšheng, mowa wa ga Jehofa wa ba ikhutsisa; o ne wa goga batho ba gago jalo go itirela leina le le galalelang." 
Isaiah63:15 Okomela o le mo legodimong, mme o bone o le mo bonnong jwa gago jo bo boitshepo, le jwa kgalalelo ya gago; tlhoafalo ya gago e kae, le ditiro tsa gago tsa nonofo? Go tlhologelelwa ga mala a gago go ikgogonne, le one mapelotlhomogi a gago ka ga me." 
Isaiah63:16 Gonne o rraetsho, le fa Aberahame a sa re itse, le Iseraele a sa re dumele; wena Jehofa o rraetsho: Morekolodi go tswa bosenangtshimologo ke leina la gago." 
Isaiah63:17 Ana Jehofa o a bo o re faposetsang ditsela tsa gago, dipelo tsa rona o di thatafaletsang poifo ya gago? Bowa ka ntlha ya batlhanka ba gago, ditso tsa boswa jwa gago." 
Isaiah63:18 Batho ba gago ba ba boitshepo ba ne ba bo rua ka lobakanyana fela; baganetsi ba rona ba gatakile felo ga gago ga boitshepo. 
Isaiah63:19 Re fetogile re ntse jaaka batho ba o e seng o ke o ba laole gope; jaaka ba ba neng ba sa bidiwa ka leina la gago. 
Isaiah64:1 A bo o ka ka wa fatoganya magodimo, wa fologa, gore dithaba di nyere ka sebonalo sa gago;" 
Isaiah64:2 jaaka fa molelo o tshuba ditlharapana, le jaaka molelo o bedisa metsi; gore o itsise baganetsi ba gago leina la gago, gore merafe e tle e rorome fa pele ga gago." 
Isaiah64:3 E rile o dira dilo tse di boitshegang thata, tse re se kang ra di lebelela gope, o ne wa fologa, mme dithaba tsa nyera ka sebonalo sa gago." 
Isaiah64:4 Gonne e sa le bogologolo batho ga ba ise ba ke ba utlwe, le fa e le go tlhwaisa ka tsebe, le leitlho ga le ise le ke le bone Modimo o o direlang ene yo o o lebelelang, fa e se wena fela." 
Isaiah64:5 O a tle o kgatlhane le ene yo o itumelang a ba a dira tshiamo, ba ba go gakologelwang mo mekgweng ya gago; bona, o ne o galefile, mme ra leofa; re sa le re nna mo go tsone ka lobaka lo loleele, mme a rona re tlaa bolokwa?" 
Isaiah64:6 Gonne rotlhe re ntse jaaka motho yo o leswe, le ditshiamo tsotlhe tsa rona di ntse jaaka seaparo se se tsenyeng maswe; mme rotlhe re swaba fela jaaka lekakaba; le maikepo a rona, jaaka phefo, a re tsubulela koo fela." 
Isaiah64:7 Mme ga go na ope yo o bitsang leina la gago, yo o itlotloanyang gore a go tshware; gonne o re subetse sefatlhogo sa gago, o re nyeleditse ka maikepo a rona." 
Isaiah64:8 Jaana Jehofa, o rraetsho; rona re letsopa, mme wena o mmopi wa rona; rona rotlhe re tiro ya seatla sa gago." 
Isaiah64:9 O se ka wa šakgala thatathata, Jehofa, le gone o se ka wa gakologelwa boikepo ka bosakhutleng; bona, o lebe, re a go rapela, re batho ba gago rotlhe." 
Isaiah64:10 Metse ya gago e e boitshepo e fetogile, e ntse naga fela; Sione o fetogile o ntse naga fela, Jerusalema ke marope fela." 
Isaiah64:11 Ntlo ya rona e e boitshepo e ntle, e borraetsho ba ne ba go baka mo go yone, e fisitswe ka molelo, le dilo tsotlhe tsa rona tse di eletsegang di kgakgabetse fela." 
Isaiah64:12 A o tlaa ikgogona ka ntlha ya tsone dilo tse, Jehofa? A o tlaa didimala fela, o ba o re bogisa mo go botlhoko thata?" 
Isaiah65:1 “Go bodiwa ka ga me ke bone ba ba se kang ba ntshenka gale; ke bonwa ke ba ba se kang ba mpatla; ke reile morafe o o no o sa bidiwa ka leina la me, ka re: ‘Ke fano, ke fano!’" 
Isaiah65:2 Ke tlhotse letsatsi lotlhe ke otlololetse batsuolodi mabogo a me, e le ba ba tsamayang ka tsela e e seng molemo, ka fa megopolong e e leng ya bone fela." 
Isaiah65:3 E le batho ba ba nthumolang ka gale ba le fa pele ga matlho a me, ba isa ditlhabelo mo masimong, ba fisetsa maswalo mo makoteng;" 
Isaiah65:4 e le ba ba dulang mo diphupung, ba lala mo mafelong a boiphitlho; e le ba ba jang nama ya kolobe, mme le moro wa dilo tse di makgapha o mo dijaneng tsa bone:" 
Isaiah65:5 E le ba ba reng: ‘Emelang koo, se nkatamele, gonne ke boitshepo bogolo go wena;’ bao ke mosi mo dinkong tsa me, ke molelo o o tukang letsatsi lotlhe fela." 
Isaiah65:6 “Bona, go kwadilwe fa pele ga me: Ga nketla ke didimala, mme ke tlaa ntsha maduo, ee, ke tlaa ntsha maduo, ke a ba tsenya mo sehubeng, e bong," 
Isaiah65:7 maikepo a lona ka losi, le maikepo a borra ba lona mmogo, go bua Jehofa, ba ba fisitseng maswalo mo dithabeng ba ntlhapaditse mo makhubung; ke gone ka moo ke tlaa lekanyetsang tiro ya bone pele mo sehubeng sa bone.”" 
Isaiah65:8 Go bua jaana Jehofa, a re: “Jaaka bojalwa jwa mofine jo boša bo tle bo fitlhelwe mo leroseng, mme mongwe a tle a re: ‘Se le senye, gonne lesego le mo go lone.’ Le nna ke tlaa dira jalo ka ntlha ya batlhanka ba me, gore ke se ka ka ba senya botlhe." 
Isaiah65:9 Mme ke tlaa ntsha losika lo tswa mo go Jakobe, le mo go Juta ke tlaa ntsha morui wa dithaba tsa me; mme baitshenkedwi ba me ba tlaa di rua, le batlhanka ba me ba tlaa aga teng." 
Isaiah65:10 Sharone o tlaa nna lesaka la matsomane, le mokgatšha wa Akore e tlaa nna mabothelo a matlhape a batho ba me ba ba mpatlileng." 
Isaiah65:11 “Mme lona ba lo tlogelang Jehofa, ba lo lebalang thaba ya me e e boitshepo, ba lo baakanyetsang modimo wa Maswalo lomati lwa bojelo, le ba lo thelelang modimo wa Ditaolela bojalwa jwa mofine jo bo tswaisitsweng;" 
Isaiah65:12 ke tlaa lo neelela tšhaka, mme lo tlaa ikobela kgailo; ka go bo e rile ke bitsa lwa se ka lwa araba; e rile ke bua lwa se ka lwa utlwa; mme lwa dira se se bosula mo matlhong a me, lwa itshenkela sone se ke sa se itumelelang.”" 
Isaiah65:13 Ke gone go bua Morena Modimo jaana, a re: “Bonang, batlhanka ba me ba tlaa ja, mme lona lo tlaa bolawa ke tlala; bonang, batlhanka ba me ba tlaa nwa, mme lona lo tlaa nyorwa; bonang, batlhanka ba me ba tlaa itumela, mme lona lo tlaa tlhajwa ke ditlhong." 
Isaiah65:14 Bonang, batlhanka ba me ba tlaa opela ka go thama ga pelo, mme lona lo tlaa lela ka go jewa ke moetlo mo moeng, le ka bohutsana jwa pelo lo tlaa bokolela." 
Isaiah65:15 Lo tlaa tlogelela baitshenkedwi ba me leina la lona e le phutso, mme Morena Modimo o tlaa go bolaya; mme batlhanka ba gagwe o tlaa ba raya leina le sele;" 
Isaiah65:16 go bo go tle go re, yo o itshegofatsang mo lefatsheng o tlaa itshegofatsa ka Modimo wa boammaaruri; le yo o ikanang mo lefatsheng o tlaa ikana ka Modimo wa boammaaruri; gonne ditshwenyego tsa pele di lebetswe, le ka go bo di subetswe matlho a me." 
Isaiah65:17 “Gonne, bonang, ke tlhola magodimo a maša, le lefatshe le leša; mme dilo tsa pele ga di ketla di gakologelwa, le fa e le go tla mo mogopolong." 
Isaiah65:18 Lona lo ipele, lo itumele ka bosakhutleng mo go se ke se tlholang; gonne ke tlhola Jerusalema go nna boipelo, le batho ba gagwe go nna boitumelo." 
Isaiah65:19 Ke tlaa ipela ka Jerusalema, ke ja monate mo bathong ba me; mme lentswe la selelo ga le ketla le tlhola le utlwiwa mo go ene, le fa e le lentswe la go gala." 
Isaiah65:20 Ga go ketla go tlhola go nna gone losea lwa malatsi a mannye, le fa e le monna mogolo yo o iseng a bone botlalo jwa malatsi a gagwe; gonne ngwanyana o tlaa swa a le dinyaga di le lekgolo, mme moleofi yo o tlaa bong a le dinyaga di le lekgolo o tlaa bo a hutsegile." 
Isaiah65:21 Ba tlaa aga matlo, ba nna mo go one; ba tlaa tlhoma masimo a mafine, ba ja maungo a one." 
Isaiah65:22 Ga ba ketla ba aga, mme go nne o sele; ga ba ketla ba tlhoma, mme go je o sele; gonne jaaka malatsi a setlhare a ntse, malatsi a batho ba me a tlaa nna jalo, mme baitshenkedwi ba me ba tlaa ja tiro ya diatla tsa bone ka monate, ka lobaka lo loleele." 
Isaiah65:23 Ga ba ketla ba kgokgolela lefela, le fa e le go tsholela thekisego bana; gonne bone ke losika lwa basegofadiwi ba ga Jehofa, le matlhogela a bone nabo." 
Isaiah65:24 Go tlaa dirafala go re, pele ba e se ba bitse, ke tlaa araba; mme ba tlaa re ba sa ntse ba bua ke utlwe." 
Isaiah65:25 Phiri e tlaa ja mmogo fela le kwanyana, le tau e tlaa ja lotlhaka jaaka kgomo; mme lorole e tlaa nna dijo tsa noga. Ga di ketla di utlwisa botlhoko, le fa e le go senya mo thabeng e e itshepileng ya me yotlhe fela,” go bua Jehofa." 
Isaiah66:1 Go bua jaana Jehofa, a re: “Legodimo ke setulo sa me sa bogosi, mme lefatshe ke sebeo sa me sa dinao; lo tlaa nkagela ntlo e e ntseng jang? Le felo ga boikhutso jwa me e tlaa nna gofe?" 
Isaiah66:2 Gonne dilo tse tsotlhe seatla sa me se di dirile, jalo dilo tse tsotlhe tsa tla tsa nna, go bua Jehofa; mme motho ke yo, yo ke tlaa lebang kwa go ene, e bong ene yo o humanegileng, a le mowa o o ngomogileng, mme a roroma ka lefoko la me." 
Isaiah66:3 “Yo o bolayang kgomo o ntse jaaka yo o bolayang motho; yo o isang kwanyana setlhabelo, o ntse jaaka yo o komolang ntša thamo; yo o supelang seromololo, jaaka yo o supelang madi a kolobe; yo o fisang maswalo jaaka yo o segofatsang modimo wa sesetwa, ee: ba itebalebetse mekgwa e e leng ya bone, le mowa wa bone o kgatlhega thata mo dilong tsa bone tse di makgapha." 
Isaiah66:4 Le nna ke tlaa itebalebela diphoro tsa bone, ke tlaa tlisa dipoifo tsa bone mo go bone; gonne e rile ke bitsa, ope a se ka a araba, e rile ke bua, ba se ka ba utlwa; mme ba ne ba dira se se bosula mo matlhong a me fela, ba itshenkela se ke sa natefelwang ke sone.”" 
Isaiah66:5 Utlwang lefoko la ga Jehofa, lona ba lo roromang ka lefoko la gagwe: “Bomorwa rraeno ba ba lo tlhoileng, ba lo latlhetse kwa ntle ka ntlha ya leina la me, ba rile: ‘A Jehofa a galalediwe, gore re tle re bone boitumelo jwa lona;’ mme ba tlaa tlhajwa ke ditlhong." 
Isaiah66:6 “Go tumo ya pheretlho e e tswang mo motseng, tumo e e tswang mo tempeleng, tumo ya ga Jehofa yo o ntshetsang baba ba gagwe maduo a a ba lekanyeng." 
Isaiah66:7 “E rile a ise a ikutlwe ditlhabi a khubama; e rile motlotsedi wa gagwe o ise o tle, a belega ngwana wa mosimane." 
Isaiah66:8 Mang yo o kileng a utlwa selo se se ntseng jalo? Mang yo o bonyeng tse di ntseng jalo? A lefatshe le ka tsalwa ka letsatsi le le lengwe fela? A morafe o ka belegelwa gongwe fela? Gonne e rile Sione a sa ntse a ikutlwa ditlhabi a ba a belega bana ba gagwe. 
Isaiah66:9 A ke tlaa kukuntsha, mme ke se ka ka belegisa?” Go bua Jehofa: “Nna yo ke belegisang, a ke tlaa tswala sebopelo?” Go bua Modimo wa gago." 
Isaiah66:10 “Itumeleng le Jerusalema, lo bo lo ipele ka ntlha ya gagwe, lona lotlhe ba lo mo ratang; itumeleng nae ka moduduetso, lona lotlhe ba lo mo lelelang;" 
Isaiah66:11 gore lo tle lo anye lo kgore mabele a gagwe a a nametsang pelo; gore lo tle lo game lo napole, mme lo thethebale thata ka letlotlo la kgalalelo ya gagwe.”" 
Isaiah66:12 Gonne go bua jaana Jehofa, a re: “Bona, ke tlaa anamisetsa kagiso kwa go ene jaaka noka, le kgalalelo ya merafe jaaka nokana e e penologelang kwa ntle, gore lo tomane lo nwe teng; lo tlaa tsholwa ka noka, lo tlaa akgolwa mo mangoleng." 
Isaiah66:13 Fela jaaka mongwe yo mmaagwe o mo gomotsang, nna ke tlaa lo gomotsa jalo; mme lo tlaa gomotsega mo Jerusalema.”" 
Isaiah66:14 Mme lo tlaa go bona, le pelo tsa lona di tlaa itumela, marapo a lona a tlaa kgaba jaaka bojang jo botalana; mme seatla sa ga Jehofa se tlaa itsiwe ntlheng ya batho ba gagwe, mme o tlaa gakalela baba ba gagwe." 
Isaiah66:15 Gonne bonang, Jehofa o tlaa tla ka molelo, le dikara tsa gagwe di tlaa nna jaaka sefefo; a tla go ntsha bogale jwa gagwe ka tšarologo, le kgalemo ya gagwe ka dikgabo tsa molelo." 
Isaiah66:16 Gonne Jehofa o tlaa emela kgang ka molelo le ka tšhaka ya gagwe, o tlaa bua le nama yotlhe; mme bagaidiwi ba ga Jehofa ba tlaa nna bantsi." 
Isaiah66:17 “Ba ba iitshepisang ba intlafaletsa go ya mo masimong ba bopeletse, ba ja nama ya kolobe, le se se makgapha, le peba; bone ba tlaa khutla mmogo, go bua Jehofa." 
Isaiah66:18 “Gonne ke a di itse ditiro tsa bone, le megopolo ya bone; lobaka lo etla lo ke tlaa phuthang merafe yotlhe le diteme ka lone, mme ba tlaa tla, ba tla bona kgalalelo ya me." 
Isaiah66:19 Ke tlaa tlhoma sesupo mo go bone; mme ba ba falolang mo go bone ke tlaa ba roma kwa merafeng, kwa Tarešiše, le kwa Pule le Lute, e le ba ba itseng go laela bora, kwa Tubale, le Jafane, kwa ditlhakeng tse di kgakala, kwa ba iseng ba ke ba utlwe tumedi ya me, le gone ba ise ba bone kgalalelo ya me; mme ba tlaa kakanya kgalalelo ya me mo merafeng." 
Isaiah66:20 Ba tlaa lere bomorwa rraeno botlhe, ba ba ntsha mo merafeng yotlhe, go nna tshupelo kwa go Jehofa, ba tla ka dipitse le mo dikareng, le ka difata, le ka dimmoulo, le ka dikamelana tse di fefogang, ba tla mo Jerusalema, mo thabeng ya me e e boitshepo, go bua Jehofa, jaaka bana ba Iseraele ba tle ba tlise tshupelo ka sejana se sentle mo ntlong ya ga Jehofa." 
Isaiah66:21 Mme ke tlaa tsaya ba bone go nna baperesiti le Balefi,” go bua Jehofa." 
Isaiah66:22 “Gonne jaaka magodimo a maša a ke tlaa a dirang a tlaa sala a ntse fa pele ga me, le lefatshe le leša, losika lwa lone lo tlaa sala lo ntse jalo, le leina la lone jalo,” go bua Jehofa." 
Isaiah66:23 “Go tlaa dirala, go re, go tloga mo kgweding e ntšha nngwe go ya kwa go e nngwe, le mo Sabateng mongwe go ya kwa go o mongwe, nama yotlhe e tlaa tla go obama fa pele ga me,” go bua Jehofa." 
Isaiah66:24 “Ba tlaa tsamaela kwa ntle ba ya go bona ditoto tsa batho ba ba dirileng ditlolo fa pele ga me; gonne seboko sa bone ga se ketla se swa. Le gone molelo wa bone ga o ketla o tingwa; mme ba tlaa nna se se tsitlisang marapo mo bathong botlhe fela.” 
Jeremiah1:1 Mafoko a ga Jeremia morwa Hilekia, wa baperesiti ba ba neng ba le kwa Anathothe mo lefatsheng la Benjamine," 
Jeremiah1:2 yo lefoko la ga Jehofa le kileng la tla kwa go ene mo metlheng ya ga Josia morwa Amone, kgosi ya Juta, ka ngwaga wa 13 wa puso ya gagwe." 
Jeremiah1:3 Le gone la tla mo metlheng ya ga Jehoiakime morwa Josia, kgosi ya Juta; go ya bofelong jwa ngwaga wa 11 wa ga Setekia morwa Josia, kgosi ya Juta; go ya kwa go tlosiweng ga ba Jerusalema ba le ditshwarwa ka kgwedi ya botlhano." 
Jeremiah1:4 Jaana lefoko la ga Jehofa la tla mo go nna, la re:" 
Jeremiah1:5 “E rile ke ise ke go bopele mo sebopelong ka bo ke go itse, le o ise o tswe mo sebopelong ka bo ke go itshepisitse; ke go laoletse go nna moperofeti mo merafeng.”" 
Jeremiah1:6 Foo ka re: “Ao, Jehofa Modimo! Bona, ga ke itse go bua, gonne ke ngwanyana fela.”" 
Jeremiah1:7 Mme Jehofa a nthaya a re: “Se re: ‘Ke ngwanyana fela’; gonne le fa e le bomang ba ke tlaa go romang kwa go bone o na le go ya fela, mme le fa e le eng se ke se go laolelang o na le go se bua fela." 
Jeremiah1:8 O se ka wa boifa ka ntlha ya bone, gonne ke na nao go go golola;” go bua Jehofa." 
Jeremiah1:9 Foo Jehofa a ntsha seatla, mme a nkama molomo; mme Jehofa a nthaya a re: “Bona ke tsentse mafoko a me mo molomong wa gago." 
Jeremiah1:10 Bona, ke go neile thata mo merafeng le mo magosing gompieno, go kumola le go phalolela fa fatshe, go senya le go ribegetsa; go aga le go tlhoma.”" 
Jeremiah1:11 Gape lefoko la ga Jehofa la tla mo go nna, la re: “Jeremia, o bonang?” Ka re: “Ke bona thupa ya setlhare sa mothamane.”" 
Jeremiah1:12 Foo Jehofa a nthaya a re: “O bonye sentle, gonne ke dibetse lefoko la me ka tlhodumelo go tla ke le dirafatsa.”" 
Jeremiah1:13 Mme lefoko la ga Jehofa la tla mo go nna lwa bobedi, la re: “O bonang?” Ka re: “Ke bona pitsa e tona e e belang ka thata; mme marago a yone a sekametse kwa ntlheng ya botsheka.”" 
Jeremiah1:14 Foo Jehofa a nthaya a re: “Bosula bo tlaa phunyegela banni botlhe ba lefatshe, bo tswa ntlheng ya botsheka." 
Jeremiah1:15 Gonne bona, ke tlaa bitsa ba makgotla otlhe a magosi a a kwa ntlheng ya botsheka;” go bua Jehofa; mme ba tlaa tla, mme mongwe le mongwe o tlaa tlhoma setulo sa gagwe sa bogosi fa matsenong a dikgoro tsa Jerusalema, le fa tlase ga dithako tsa one mo tikologong, le fa tlase ga metse yotlhe ya Juta." 
Jeremiah1:16 “Ke tlaa bolela ditshekiso tsa me ka ga boikepo jotlhe jwa bone; ka ba ntatlhile, ba fiseditse medimo e sele maswalo, ba obametse tse e leng ditiro tsa diatla tsa bone fela." 
Jeremiah1:17 “Ke gone wena o ikokwaele lotheka, o nanoge, o bue nabo tsotlhe tse ke di go laolelang, o se ka wa tseanngwa ke bone, ka nka tla ka go tseanya fa pele ga bone." 
Jeremiah1:18 Gonne, bona, ka tsatsi leno ke go dirile motse o o thekeleditsweng, le tshipe lore, le dithako tsa kgotlho, kemalano le lefatshe lotlhe, kemalano le dikgosi tsa Juta, kemalano le dikgosana tsa teng, kemalano le baperesiti ba teng, le kemalano le batho botlhe ba lefatshe." 
Jeremiah1:19 Ba tlaa tlhabana nao; mme ga ba ketla ba go fenya; gonne ke na nao, go bua Jehofa, go go golola.”" 
Jeremiah2:1 Lefoko la ga Jehofa la tla mo go nna la re: 
Jeremiah2:2 “Ya o kue mo ditsebeng tsa Jerusalema o re: Go bua jaana Jehofa, a re: “Ke gakologetswe ka ga gago, bopelonomi jwa boroba jwa gago, lorato lwa peelelo ya gago; jaaka o ne wa ntshala morago mo nageng mo lefatsheng le le neng le sa lengwa." 
Jeremiah2:3 Iseraele o ne a le boitshepelo Jehofa, mabutswapele a totafalelo ya gagwe; botlhe ba ba mo jang ba mo fetsa, ba tlaa kaiwa molato; bosula bo tlaa ba wela, go bua Jehofa.”" 
Jeremiah2:4 Utlwang lefoko la ga Jehofa lona ba ntlo ya ga Jakobe, le ba makgotla otlhe a Iseraele:" 
Jeremiah2:5 Go bua jaana Jehofa, a re: “Borraeno ba bonye tshiamololo efe mo go nna, fa e bo ne ne ba ile kgakala le nna, mme ba latetse boithamako, ba thamakafetse jaana?" 
Jeremiah2:6 Le gone ga baa ka ba re: ‘O kae Jehofa yo o re ntshitseng mo lefatsheng la Egepeto; yo o re gogileng a re ralatsa naga, a re goga mo lefatsheng la dikaka le la melete, mo lefatsheng la lokgere le moriti wa loso, mo lefatsheng le ope o sa le ralaleng, le kwa go sa agang ope teng?’" 
Jeremiah2:7 Ka lo lere mo lefatsheng la letlotlo, lwa tla go ja loungo lwa lone, le molemo wa lone; mme e rile lo tsena, lwa leswefatsa lefatshe la me, lwa kgaphafatsa boswa jwa me." 
Jeremiah2:8 Baperesiti ga ba a ka ba re: ‘Jehofa o kae?’ le ba ba tshwarang molao ba ne ba sa nkitse; le badisa ba ne ba ntlolela, le baperofeti ba perofesa ka Baale, ba sala dilo tse di se nang thuso morago.”" 
Jeremiah2:9 “Ke gone ke tlaa fela ke sa ntse ke ganetsanya le lona,” go bua Jehofa, “le bana ba bana ba lona ke tlaa ganetsanya nabo." 
Jeremiah2:10 Gonne kgabaganyetsang kwa ditlhakeng tsa Kupero, mme lo bone; lo romele kwa Ketare, lo akanye thata; lo bone, bo go kile ga ne go le tiro nngwe e e ntseng jalo." 
Jeremiah2:11 A morafe mongwe o kile wa ananya medimo ya one, le mororo e se medimo ya sepe? Mme batho ba me ba anantse se se senang thuso ka kgalalelo ya bone." 
Jeremiah2:12 Lona magodimo lo gakgamalele selo se, mme lo boife mo go remang marapo, lo swafale thata,” go bua Jehofa." 
Jeremiah2:13 “Gonne batho ba me ba dirile masula a le mabedi; ba latlhile nna yo ke leng motswedi wa metsi a a tshedileng, mme ba ikgabetse madu, madu a a phunyegileng, a a sa kakeng a tshegetsa metsi ape.”" 
Jeremiah2:14 “Iseraele a o motlhanka? A o motlhanka yo o tsaletsweng mo gae? Ana go ntse jang ka a bile a ntse thopo fela? 
Jeremiah2:15 Ditau di ntse di mo dumela, di ntshitse dikodu tsa tsone: mme di kgakgabaditse lefatshe la gagwe; metse ya gagwe e fisitswe ka molelo, ga e na banni." 
Jeremiah2:16 Le bana ba Nofe le Tapanehese ba kutile phogo ya tlhogo ya gago. 
Jeremiah2:17 Golo mo a ga o a go iteretse, ka o latlhile Jehofa Modimo wa gago jale ka a go goga mo tseleng?" 
Jeremiah2:18 Mme jaanong o na le eng se o se dirang mo tseleng e e yang Egepeto, go nwa metsi a Shihore? Kgotsa o na le eng se o se dirang mo tseleng e e yang Asiria, go nwa metsi a Noka?" 
Jeremiah2:19 Boikepo jwa gago tota bo tlaa go otlhaya, le ditenego tsa gago di tlaa go kgalemela; ke gone itse o bo o bone fa e le selo se se bosula, le se se galakang, jaaka e le fa o latlhile Jehofa Modimo wa gago, e bile go mpoifa go seyo mo go wena, go bua Jehofa Modimo wa masomosomo.”" 
Jeremiah2:20 “Gonne ke sa le ke roba jokwe ya gago bogologolo, ka komoganya dikgolego tsa gago; mme o rile: ‘Ga nketla ke mo direla’; gonne mo thoteng nngwe le nngwe e e godileng, le fa tlase ga setlhare sengwe le sengwe se setala, o ne wa ikoba, wa akafala." 
Jeremiah2:21 Le fa go ntse jalo ka bo ke ne ke go tlhomile o le mofine o montlentle, o le peo e e siameng ruri; ana o senyegile jang wa nna setlhatshana fela sa mofine o sele mo go nna?" 
Jeremiah2:22 Gonne le fa o itlhapisa ka logolo, mme go itseela molora o le motona, le fa go ntse jalo boikepo jwa gago bo ntse setshubaba fela fa pele ga me”, go bua Jehofa Modimo." 
Jeremiah2:23 “O ka bua jang, wa re: ‘Ga ke a leswefala, ga ke a latela boBaale?’ Bona mokgwa wa gago mo molapong, itse se o se dirileng; o kamelana e e lobelo e e itsayatsayang motlhala." 
Jeremiah2:24 O esela ya nageng e e tlwaetseng bogareganaga, e e dupelelang mowa mo keletsong ya yone; mo palogong ya yone e mang yo o ka e sokololang? Tsotlhe tse di e tlhokang ga di ketla di ipolaisa letsapa; e tlaa re mo kgweding ya yone ba tlaa e bona fela." 
Jeremiah2:25 “O ithibe, gore o se ka wa nna lonao lo lo sa rwalang, le gore o se nne mometso o o lenyora; mme o rile: ‘Ga go na tsholofelo; nnyaa, ka gonne ke ratile baeng, mme ke bone ba ke tlaa ba latelang.’" 
Jeremiah2:26 “Jaaka legodu le tle le tlhajwe ke ditlhong fa le tshwerwe, ba ntlo ya Iseraele ba tlhajwa ke ditlhong jalo; bone le dikgosi tsa bone, le dikgosana tsa bone, le baperesiti ba bone, le baperofeti ba bone;" 
Jeremiah2:27 ba ba rayang logong ba re: ‘O rre’; le lentswe ba re: ‘O ntsetse,’ gonne ba nneile dikotla e seng difatlhogo; mme mo motlheng wa tlalelo ya bone ba tlaa re: ‘Nanoga, o re boloke.’" 
Jeremiah2:28 “E kae medimo ya gago e o e itiretseng? A go nanoge yone, fa e na le go go boloka mo motlheng wa tlalelo ya gago; gonne medimo ya gago e kana ka palo ya metse ya gago, wena Juta." 
Jeremiah2:29 Ana lo ganeletsanyang le nna?” Lo ntloletse lotlhe. Go bua Jehofa. 
Jeremiah2:30 “Bana ba lona ke ba diteetse lefela; ga baa ka ba amogela thuto epe; tšhaka ya lona tota e biladitse baperofeti ba lona, jaaka tau e e senyang." 
Jeremiah2:31 Ao losika ke lona, lo bo lo bone lefoko la ga Jehofa. A ke ntse ke ntse jaaka naga fela mo go Iseraele? Kgotsa lefatshe la lefifi le lentsho? Ana batho ba me ba buelang ba re: ‘Re thobile; ga re ketla re tlhola re ya koo go wena’?" 
Jeremiah2:32 A morweetsana o ka lebala mekgabo ya gagwe? Kgotsa monyadwi diaparo tsa gagwe? Le fa go ntse jalo batho ba me ba ntebetse ka malatsi a a se nang palo. 
Jeremiah2:33 Ana o baakanya jang tsela ya gago o ya go batla lorato! Ke gone ka moo le ba e leng basadi ba ba bosula o ba rutile mekgwa ya gago. 
Jeremiah2:34 Le mo dikojeng tsa diaparo tsa gago go fitlhelwa madi a bahumanegi ba ba se nang molato; ga o a ba tshwara mo felong fa go phuntsweng ntlo teng, fa e se mo mafelong a otlhe fela." 
Jeremiah2:35 Le fa go ntse jalo, o rile: ‘Ga ke na molato; ruri bogale jwa gagwe boa bo bo boile mo go nna.’ Bona, ke tlaa seka nao, ka o re: ‘Ga ke a leofa.’" 
Jeremiah2:36 Ana o kgabatlolegelang mo go kanakana, o re o fetola mokgwa wa gago? O tlaa tlhajwa ke ditlhong le ka Egepeto, jaaka o ne wa tlhajwa ke ditlhong ka Asiria." 
Jeremiah2:37 Le kwa go ene o tlaa tswa o ithwele megono fela, gonne Jehofa o ganne ba o ba ikantseng, mme ga o ketla o tlhogonolofala mo go bone." 
Jeremiah3:1 “Go tle go twe: “ ‘Fa monna a tlhala mosadi wa gagwe, mme mosadi a tswa mo go ene, a ya a nna mosadi wa monna o sele, a monna o ka ba a boela mo go ene?’ Lefatshe leo a ga le ketla le leswefala thata? Mme wena o dirile boaka le dinyatsi di le dintsi; le fa go ntse jalo, a wa re o boela mo go nna?” go bua Jehofa." 
Jeremiah3:2 “Tsholeletsa matlho kwa dithoteng tse di loforotlho, mme o bone; kwa go se kang ga lalwa nao gone ke kae? O ba duletse fa ditseleng, jaaka Moarabia mo gareng ga naga; mme o leswefaditse lefatshe ka maakafalo a gago, le ka boikepo jwa gago." 
Jeremiah3:3 Ke gone ka moo dipula tsa medupe di kganetsweng, go bile go ise go ko go ne pula ya kgogolamoko; le fa go ntse jalo o ne o na le phatla ya seaka, wa gana go tlhajwa ke ditlhong." 
Jeremiah3:4 “Go tloga mo lobakeng lono a ga o ketla o biletsa kwa go nna, o re: ‘Rara, ke wena mogogi wa bokau jwa me?" 
Jeremiah3:5 A o tlaa nna bogale ka bosakhutleng?’ A o tlaa bo tshegeletsa go ya kwa bokhutlong? Bona o buile, mme o dirile dilo tse di bosula, o bile o dirile go rata ga gago.”" 
Jeremiah3:6 Gape Jehofa o ne a nthaya mo metlheng ya kgosi Josia, a re: “A o bonye se Iseraele mosadi wa motenegi o se dirileng? O palametse kwa thabeng nngwe le nngwe e e godileng, o ile fa tlase ka setlhare sengwe le sengwe se setala, mme o akafaletse teng." 
Jeremiah3:7 E rile a sena go dira dilo tsotlhe tse, ka re: ‘O tlaa boela mo go nna,’ mme ga a ka a bowa; mme mogolowe mosadi wa molotsana, e bong Juta o ne a go bona." 
Jeremiah3:8 Ka bona jaaka e rile ke sena go tlhala Iseraele wa motenegi, le go mo naya lokwalo lwa tlhalo, fela ka ntlha ya go bo a dirile boaka, le fa go ntse jalo mogolowe wa molotsana, e bong Juta ga a ka a boifa; mme le ene a ya a akafala." 
Jeremiah3:9 Mme ga dirala ya re ka ntlha ya go bo boaka jwa gagwe a bo kaya e seng sepe, lefatshe la leswefadiwa, mme a akafala le maje le dikgong." 
Jeremiah3:10 Le fa dilo tse tsotlhe di ntse jalo, mogolowe wa molotsana, e bong Juta, ga a a boela mo go nna ka pelo yotlhe ya gagwe, fa e se ka boitimokanyo fela.” Go bua Jehofa." 
Jeremiah3:11 Mme Jehofa a nthaya a re: “Iseraele wa motenegi o itshupile fa a le tshiamo bogolo go Juta molotsana. 
Jeremiah3:12 Ya o bolele mafoko a kwa ntlheng ya botsheka, o re: ‘Boa wena Iseraele wa motenegi,’ go bua Jehofa. ‘Ga nketla ke lo leba ka bogale, gonne ke kutlwelobotlhoko,’ go bua Jehofa, ‘ga nketla ke tshegetsa bogale ka bosakhutleng.’" 
Jeremiah3:13 Mme go le gosi o ipolele boikepo jwa gago ka go re, o tloletse Jehofa Modimo wa gago, o gaseditse baeng mekgwa ya gago fa tlase ga setlhare sengwe le sengwe se setala, mme lwa se ka lwa akela lentswe la me”; go bua Jehofa." 
Jeremiah3:14 “Bowang, lona bana ba lo tenegang,” go bua Jehofa, “gonne ke monna wa lona; mme ke tlaa lo tsaya a le mongwe fela wa motse mongwe, ba le babedi ba losika longwe, mme ke tlaa lo tlisa mo Sione." 
Jeremiah3:15 Ke tlaa lo naya badisa ka fa pelong ya me, ba ba tlaa lo jesang ka kitso le tlhaloganyo." 
Jeremiah3:16 Go tlaa dirala go re, e tlaa re mo metlheng eo lo sena go ntsifala, lo atile mo lefatsheng,” go bua Jehofa, “ga ba ketla ba tlhola ba re: ‘Letlole la kgolagano ya ga Jehofa’; le gone ga le ketla le tla; mme ga ba ketla ba le gakologelwa; le gone ga ba ketla ba le ngongoregela; le gone ga le ketla le tlhola le dirwa gope." 
Jeremiah3:17 E tlaa re mo motlheng oo ba tlaa bitsa Jerusalema Setulo sa ga Jehofa sa bogosi; mme merafe yotlhe e tlaa phuthegela kwa go sone, kwa leineng la ga Jehofa kwa Jerusalema; mme ga ba ketla ba tlhola ba tsamaya ka fa logwading lwa pelo ya bone e e bosula." 
Jeremiah3:18 E tlaa re mo metlheng eo ba ntlo ya Juta ba tlaa sepela le ba ntlo ya Iseraele, ba tlaa tswa mmogo kwa lefatsheng la botsheka ba tla mo lefatsheng le ke le neileng borraeno boswa.”" 
Jeremiah3:19 “Mme ka re: ‘Ke tlaa go baya jang mo baneng ba me, ke go naya lefatshe le le eletsegang, boswa jo bo molemo jwa bontsi jwa merafe?’ Mme ka re: Lo tlaa mpitsa lo re: ‘Rraetsho’; ga lo ketla lo kgaogana le go ntshala morago." 
Jeremiah3:20 Ruri jaaka mosadi a tle a kgaogane le monna wa gagwe ka bolotsana, le lona lo ntiretse ka bolotsana, lona ba ntlo ya Iseraele,” go bua Jehofa." 
Jeremiah3:21 Lentswe lengwe le utlwala mo dithoteng tse di loforotlho, selelo le mekokotlelo ya bana ba Iseraele; gonne ba sokamisitse tsela ya bone, ba lebetse Jehofa Modimo wa bone." 
Jeremiah3:22 “Bowang, lona bana ba lo tenegang, ke tlaa fodisa ditenego tsa lona.” “Bona, re tsile mo go wena; gonne o Jehofa Modimo wa rona." 
Jeremiah3:23 Ruri thuso e e lebeletsweng go tswa mo makhubung ke lefela, le tlhapeo e e mo dithabeng; ruri poloko ya Iseraele e mo go Jehofa Modimo wa rona." 
Jeremiah3:24 “Mme selo se se tlhabisang ditlhong se sa le se ja letsapa la borraetsho mo bokaung jwa rona; matsomane a bone le matlhape a bone, bana ba bone ba basimane le ba basetsana." 
Jeremiah3:25 A re itelegeng mo ditlhongnyeng tsa rona! A tshosobagano ya rona e re khurumetse; gonne re leofetse Jehofa Modimo wa rona, rona le borraetsho, go tswa mo bokaung jwa rona le go tla mo motlheng wa gompieno, ga re ise re akele lentswe la ga Jehofa Modimo wa rona.”" 
Jeremiah4:1 “Fa o tlaa boa, wena Iseraele,” go bua Jehofa, “o tlaa boela mo go nna; mme fa o ka tlosa makgapha a gago fa pele ga me, foo ga o ketla o tlosiwa;" 
Jeremiah4:2 o tlaa ikana, o re: ‘Jaaka Jehofa a tshedile,’ mo boammaaruring, mo tshiamisong le mo tshiamong; mme merafe e tlaa itshegofatsa, mo go ene, e tlaa ikgantsha ka ene.”" 
Jeremiah4:3 Gonne Jehofa o bua jaana le banna ba Juta le Jerusalema, a re: “Lemang lefatshe la lona thobu, mme lo se ka lwa jala mo mitlweng." 
Jeremiah4:4 Ithupisetseng Jehofa, lo tlose bokgola ja pelo tsa lona, lona banna ba Juta le banni ba Jerusalema; tšarafalo ya me e ka tla ya tswa jaaka molelo, ya tuka mo go sa kakeng ga tingwa ke ope, ka ntlha ya bosula jwa ditiro tsa lona.”" 
Jeremiah4:5 Bolelang mo Juta, lo itsise mo Jerusalema; lo re: “Letsang lonaka mo lefatsheng; opang mokgosi thata, lo re: ‘Phuthegang, a re tseneng mo metseng e e thekeleditsweng.’" 
Jeremiah4:6 Tlhomang mokgele o lebe kwa Sione; tshabang, se diegeng, gonne ke tlaa lere bosula bo tswa ntlheng ya botsheka, le tshenyo e kgolo.”" 
Jeremiah4:7 Tau e tlhatlogile mo setswatsweng sa yone, le mosenyi wa merafe; o mo tseleng, o dule mo felong ga gagwe, go tla go swafatsa lefatshe la gago gore metse ya gago e tle e gokgolelwe e se na monni." 
Jeremiah4:8 Ka ntlha ya moo lo itlamelele ka letsela la kgetse, lo hutsafale, lo bokolele; gonne bogale jo bo fisang jwa ga Jehofa ga bo a boa mo go rona." 
Jeremiah4:9 “Mme go tlaa dirala mo motlheng oo,” go bua Jehofa, “go re pelo ya kgosi e tlaa rema, le pelo ya dikgosana; le baperesiti ba tlaa ja kgakge, le baperofeti ba tlaa gakgamala.”" 
Jeremiah4:10 Foo ka re: “Ao, Jehofa Modimo! Ruri o a bo o tsieditse tšhaba e thata, le Jerusalema, wa re: ‘Lo tlaa bona kagiso’; etswa tšhaka e tsenetse mo moweng.”" 
Jeremiah4:11 E tlaa re mo motlheng oo go tlaa rewa tšhaba e, le ba Jerusalema, go twe: “Phefo e e molelo e e tswang kwa dithoteng tse di loforotlho kwa bogareng ga naga e tlaa e lebile morwadia batho ba me, e seng go olosa le fa e le go ntlafatsa;" 
Jeremiah4:12 phefo e e thata e e tswang kwa go tseo e tlaa tla ka ga me; jaanong le gone ke tlaa bua ditshekiso ka ga bone.” 
Jeremiah4:13 Bonang o tlaa nyeloga jaaka maru, dikara tsa gagwe di tlaa nna jaaka setsuatsue; dipitse tsa gagwe di fefoga bogolo go bontswi, Ija! A bo re latlhegile, gonne re thopilwe!" 
Jeremiah4:14 Jerusalema, tlhapisa pelo ya gago boikepo, gore o tle o bolokwe. Ana megopolo ya gago e e bosula e tla tlhola nao ka lobaka lo lo kaye?" 
Jeremiah4:15 Gonne lentswe lengwe le bolela kwa ntlheng ya Dane, le kakanya bosula ntlheng ya makhujana a Eferaime." 
Jeremiah4:16 Lomang merafe tsebe; bonang, kakanyang ka ga Jerusalema, lo re: “Ditlhola di tswa lefatsheng le le kgakala, di opela metse ya Juta mokgosi." 
Jeremiah4:17 Jaaka baleti ba tshimo ba o dikile; ka a ne a ntse a ntsuololela;” go bua Jehofa. 
Jeremiah4:18 “Mokgwa wa gago le ditiro tsa gago di go lereditse dilo tse; jo ke jone boikepo jwa gago; gonne bo bogalaka, ka go bo bo tsenela mo pelong ya gago.”" 
Jeremiah4:19 Mala a me we, mala a me we! Ke botlhoko le mo pelong ya me tota; pelo ya me e tlhobaela mo teng ga me; ke retelelwa ke go didimala; gonne wena mowa wa me, o utlwile modumo wa lonaka, le tshoso mokgosi wa dira." 
Jeremiah4:20 Go kuiwa tshenyego mo tshenyegong; gonne lefatshe lotlhe le thopilwe; megope ya me e thopilwe ka tshoganetso, matsela a dilepelelo a me ka ponyo ya leitlho." 
Jeremiah4:21 Ke tlaa bona mokgele ka lobaka lo lo kaye, ke ba ke utlwa modumo wa lonaka?" 
Jeremiah4:22 “Gonne batho ba me ba boeleele, ga ba nkitse; ke bana ba sekamatagwa, ga ba na tlhaloganyo epe; ba botlhale go dira bosula, mme ga ba na kitso ya go dira molemo.”" 
Jeremiah4:23 Ka leba lefatshe, mme bonang, la bo le tobekanye fela le sa itsege sepe; le magodimo, mme a ne a se na lesedi." 
Jeremiah4:24 Ka leba dithaba, mme bonang, tsa bo di roroma, le makhubu otlhe a golorela kwa le kwa." 
Jeremiah4:25 Ka leba, mme bonang, ga bo go se na motho, le dinonyane tsotlhe tsa loapi di ne di tshabile." 
Jeremiah4:26 Ka leba, mme bonang, leota le le emang loungo le ne le le naga fela, mme metse yotlhe ya teng e ne e rutlologile ka sebonalo sa ga Jehofa, le fa pele ga bogale jwa gagwe jo bo tukang." 
Jeremiah4:27 Gonne go bua jaana Jehofa, a re: “Lefatshe lotlhe le tlaa nna tshwafalo; le fa go ntse jalo ga nketla ke nyeleletsa ruri." 
Jeremiah4:28 Lefatshe le tlaa hutsafalela moo, le magodimo kwa godimo a tlaa nna mantsho; ka go bo ke se buile, ke se ikaeletse, mme ga ke a ikwatlhaya, le gone ga nketla ke boa mo go sone.”" 
Jeremiah4:29 Motse otlhe o tshaba ka modumo wa bapalama dipitse, le wa bahudi ka bora; ba tsena mo ditswatsweng, ba palamela mo mafikeng; motse mongwe le mongwe o tlogetswe fela, mme ga go na motho yo o nnang mo go one." 
Jeremiah4:30 Wena o tlaa re o thopilwe, o tlaa dirang? Le fa o ka ikapesa ka bohibidu jo bo letlhololo, le fa o ka ikgabisa ka mekgabo ya gouta, le fa o ka itshasa matlho go a dira makalaba, wa bo o itirela bontle lefela fela; dinyatsi tsa gago di a go nyatsa, di senka botshelo jwa gago." 
Jeremiah4:31 Gonne ke utlwile lentswe jaaka e kete la mosadi a le mo pelegong, tlalelo e e mahehe e kete ya mongwe yo e leng gone o bonang ngwana wa ntlha, lentswe la morwadia Sione, a hupetse mowa, mme a ntsha diatla, a re: “Jo we! Gonne mowa wa me o idibala fa pele ga babolai.”" 
Jeremiah5:1 “Lo siane sianeleng le mebila ya Jerusalema, mme lo bone jaana lo itse, lo batle mo dipatlelong tsa teng, fa lo ka bona monna, fa go na le mongwe yo o dirang ka tekatekanyo, le yo o batlang boammaaruri, mme ke tlaa itshwarela motse." 
Jeremiah5:2 Le fa ba re: ‘Jaaka Jehofa a tshedile’; ba bo ba ikana ka maaka fela.” 
Jeremiah5:3 Jehofa, matlho a gago a ga a a leba boammaaruri? O ba iteile, mme ga baa ka ba utlwa botlhoko; o ba nyeleditse, mme ba ganne go gapiwa; ba ithatafaditse difatlhogo go gaisa lefika; ba ganne go sokologa." 
Jeremiah5:4 Foo ka re: “Ruri bao ba bo ba le badidi; ba boeleele; gonne ga ba itse tsela ya ga Jehofa, le fa e le katlholo ya Modimo wa bone." 
Jeremiah5:5 Ke tlaa ikela kwa bathong ba batona, ke tlaa bua nabo; gonne bone ba itse tsela ya ga Jehofa, le katlholo ya Modimo wa bone.” Mme bone ka bongwe fela jwa pelo, ba robile jokwe, ba komagantse dikgolego." 
Jeremiah5:6 Ke gone tau e e tswang mo sekgweng e tlaa ba bolaya, letlonkana la maabanyane le tlaa ba thopa, nkwe o tlaa lalela metse ya bone, mme mongwe le mongwe yo o tswang mo go yone o tlaa gagoganngwa, gonne ditlolo tsa bone di dintsi, le ditenego tsa bone di totafetse." 
Jeremiah5:7 “Ke ka go itshwarela jang? Bana ba gago ba ntatlhile, ba ikanne ka yone e e seng medimo epe; e rile ke sena go ba fa dijo ka botlalo, ba ya ba dira boaka, ba phuthega ka masomo mo matlong a diaka." 
Jeremiah5:8 Ba ne ba ntse jaaka dipitse tse di otlwang tse di kgarakgatshegang, mongwe le mongwe a kgwankgwanyegela mosadi wa mongwe ka ene." 
Jeremiah5:9 A ga nketla ke kgopololela dilo tse?” go bua Jehofa; “A mowa wa me ga o ketla o itefetsa mo morafeng o o ntseng jaana? 
Jeremiah5:10 “Palamelang mo dithakong tsa teng lo senye; mme lo se ka lwa nyeleletsa ruri; lo tlose dikala tsa teng, gonne ga se tsa ga Jehofa." 
Jeremiah5:11 Gonne ba ntlo ya Iseraele, le ba ntlo ya Juta ba dirile ka bolotsana jo bogolo fa pele ga me,” go bua Jehofa." 
Jeremiah5:12 Ba itatotse Jehofa, ba rile: “Ga se ene; le gone bosula ga bo ketla bo tla mo go rona; le gone ga re ketla re bona tšhaka, le fa e le popamo." 
Jeremiah5:13 Baperofeti ba tlaa fetoga phefo, e bile lefoko ga leyo mo go bone; ba tlaa direlwa jalo.”" 
Jeremiah5:14 Ke gone ka moo, go bua jaana Jehofa, Modimo wa masomosomo, a re: “Ereka lo bua lefoko le, bonang, ke tlaa dira mafoko a me gore a nne molelo mo molomong wa gago, le batho ba, ba tlaa nna dikgong, mme molelo o tlaa ba laila." 
Jeremiah5:15 “Bonang, ke tlaa lere mo go lona morafe o o tswang kgakala, lona ba ntlo ya Iseraele,” go bua Jehofa. “Ke morafe o o thata, ke morafe wa bogologolo, morafe o puo ya one o sa e itseng, o bile o sa tlhaloganye se ba se buang." 
Jeremiah5:16 Mokotlopo wa bone ke letswe le le atlhameng, ke batho ba ba nonofileng botlhe fela." 
Jeremiah5:17 Ba tlaa lakaila thobo ya gago, le dijo tsa gago, tse bana ba gago ba basimane le ba basetsana ba tshwanetseng go di ja; ba tlaa fetsa matsomane a gago le matlhape a gago; ba tlaa jela ruri mofine wa gago le mofeige wa gago; ka tšhaka ba tlaa humanegisa metse ya gago e e thekeleditsweng, e o ikantseng mo go yone." 
Jeremiah5:18 “Le mo metlheng eo ga nketla ke go nyeleletsa ruri,” go bua Jehofa." 
Jeremiah5:19 Go tlaa dirala, go re, mogang lo buang, lo re: “Ke ka ntlha yang Jehofa Modimo wa rona a re diretse dilo tsotlhe tse?” Foo o tlaa ba raya o re: “Fela jaaka lo ntatlhile, mme lwa direla medimo e sele fela mo lefatsheng la lona, jalo fela lo tlaa direla baeng mo lefatsheng le e seng la lona.”" 
Jeremiah5:20 “Bolelang selo se mo ntlong ya ga Jakobe, lo se kakanye mo Juta, lo re:" 
Jeremiah5:21 A ko lo utlwe selo se, batho ba ba dieleele ke lona, le ba lo se nang tlhaloganyo; ba lo nang le matlho, mme lo sa bone; ba lo nang le ditsebe, mme lo sa utlwe:" 
Jeremiah5:22 A ga lo mpoife?” Go bua Jehofa: “A ga lo ketla lo roroma ka sebonalo sa me, nna yo ke beileng mošawa gore o nne mmotwana wa lewatle ka molao o o sa khutleng, gore le se ka la o feta? Mme le fa makhubu a lone a itlodisa, le fa go ntse jalo ga a fenye, le fa a suma ka mosumo o mogolo, le fa go ntse jalo ga a na nonofo ya go o tlola." 
Jeremiah5:23 Mme tšhaba e e na le pelo e e rukutlhang e e tsuololang; barukutlhi ba ile. 
Jeremiah5:24 Le gone ga ba ke ba bua mo pelong ya bone ba re: ‘A re ke re boifeng Jehofa Modimo wa rona, yo o nesang pula ya sephai, le ya kgogolammoko, mo metlheng ya yone; yo o re bolokelang dibeke tse di laotsweng tsa thobo.’" 
Jeremiah5:25 Maikepo a lona a fapositse dilo tse, le maleo a lona a kganetse molemo gore o se tle mo go lona." 
Jeremiah5:26 “Gonne mo bathong ba me go fitlhelwa baikepi; ba lebelele jaaka bathaa dinonyane ba tle ba lalele; ba beye seru, ba tshware batho." 
Jeremiah5:27 Jaaka serobi se tletse dinonyane, jalo fela matlo a bone a tletse tsietso; ke gone ka moo ba leng bagolo, mme ba humile." 
Jeremiah5:28 Ba nonne, ba retefetse. Ee, ba feteletse mo ditirong tsa boikepo; ga ba sekele, ga ba sekele mafoko a masiela, gore ba tle ba tlhogonolofale; mme tshiamelo ya motlhoki ga ba e atlhole." 
Jeremiah5:29 “A ga nketla ke ba kgopololela dilo tse?” Go bua Jehofa; “A mowa wa me ga o ketla o itefetsa mo morafeng o o ntseng jaana? 
Jeremiah5:30 Selo se se gakgamatsang le se se tsitlisang marapo se dirafetse mo lefatsheng; 
Jeremiah5:31 baperofeti ba perofesa ka maaka, baperesiti ba laola ka thata ya bone; batho ba me ba rata gore go nne jalo; mme lo tlaa dirang mo bokhutlong jwa gone?" 
Jeremiah6:1 “Tshabelang polokegong, lona bana ba Benjamine, lo tswe mo gare ga Jerusalema, letsang lonaka mo Tekoa, lo tlhome sekao mo Bethe-hakereme; gonne bosula bo kokomoga ntlheng ya botsheka, le thubakanyo e kgolo." 
Jeremiah6:2 Yo montle le yo o tlekeetso, e bong morwadia Sione, ke tlaa mo kgaola." 
Jeremiah6:3 Badisa ba tlaa tla kwa go ene ba na le matsomane a bone; ba tlaa tlhoma megope ya bone tikologong ya gagwe; mongwe le mongwe o tlaa fudisa felong ga gagwe.” 
Jeremiah6:4 “Mmaakanyetseng dira; nanogang, re bololeng motshegare. Ija! A bo go latlhega rona! Gonne letsatsi le fefile, gonne meriti ya maitsebowa e lelafetse!" 
Jeremiah6:5 Nanogang, re bololeng bosigo, re senyeng matlo a dikgosi a teng.”" 
Jeremiah6:6 Gonne go bua jaana Jehofa wa masomosomo, a re: “Remang ditlhare, lo koele Jerusalema lomota; ke one motse wa go sekisiwa; go patiko fela mo go one." 
Jeremiah6:7 Jaaka sediba se tle se bilole metsi a sone, le one motse o bilola boikepo jwa one jalo; thubakanyo le thopo di utlwala mo go one; go bolwetse le dintho fa pele ga me ka gale le ka gale." 
Jeremiah6:8 A ko o rutege wena Jerusalema, ka mowa wa me o ka tla wa go tenegelela ruri; nka tla ka go dira tshwafalo, le lefatshe le le sa nnweng.”" 
Jeremiah6:9 O bua jaana Jehofa wa masomosomo, a re: “Ba tlaa buduletsa ruri masalela a Iseraele jaaka mofine; ba o busetse seatla sa gago mo dikalaneng jaaka mohudi wa mafine.”" 
Jeremiah6:10 Ke tlaa bua le mang ke supa, gore ba tle ba utlwe? Bonang, ditsebe tsa bone ga di a rupisiwa, mme ga ba kake ba reetsa; bonang, lefoko la ga Jehofa mo go bone le fetogile kgobo; ga ba na kgatlhego epe mo go lone." 
Jeremiah6:11 Ke gone ke tletseng tšarologo ya ga Jehofa; ke lapisitswe ke go ithiba: “E goromeletse gongwe mo banyaneng mo mmileng, le mo kokoanong ya makau, gonne le e leng monna le mosadi wa gagwe ba tlaa tshwarwa, le motsofe a na le yo o malatsi a a tletseng." 
Jeremiah6:12 Matlo a bone a tlaa faposiwa a nna a ba sele, maota a bone le basadi ba bone mmogo; gonne ke tlaa otlololela banni ba lefatshe letsogo la me,” go bua Jehofa." 
Jeremiah6:13 “Gonne go simolola ka yo mmotlana go ya kwa go yo mogolo mo go bone, mongwe le mongwe o ineetse mo bopelotshetlheng; mme go simolola ka moperofeti go ya moperesiting, mongwe le mongwe o dira ka go ferekana fela." 
Jeremiah6:14 Ba bile ba fodisitse thobego ya batho ba me go le gonnye fela, ba re: ‘Kagiso, kagiso;’ le mororo go se na kagiso." 
Jeremiah6:15 A e rile ba sena go dira makgapha, a ba kile ba tlhajwa ke ditlhong? Nnyaa, ba ne ba sa tlhajwe ke ditlhong gope, le gone ba ne ba sa kake ba thunya. Ke gone ka moo ba tlaa wa mmogo le ba ba wang; mogang ke ba sekisang ba tlaa digelwa fa fatshe,” go bua Jehofa." 
Jeremiah6:16 Go bua jaana Jehofa, a re: “Emang mo ditseleng, mme lo bone, lo botse ka ga ditselana tsa bogologolo, kwa tsela e e molemo e teng, mme lo sepele mo go yone, mme lo tlaa bonela mewa ya lona boikhutso; mme ba re: ‘Re gana go sepela mo go yone.’" 
Jeremiah6:17 Ka lo beela balebedi; ka re: ‘Reetsang modumo wa lonaka;’ mme ba re: ‘Re gana go reetsa.’ 
Jeremiah6:18 “Ke gone utlwang, lona merafe, mme lo itse, lona phuthego, se se mo go lona." 
Jeremiah6:19 Utlwa, wena lefatshe; bona, ke tlaa lere bosula mo bathong ba, e bong loungo lwa megopolo ya bone, ka ba se ka ba reetsa mafoko a me; le one molao wa me ba o ganne." 
Jeremiah6:20 Ana ke tlelwa ke maswalo a lebano a a tswang kwa Sheba ka ntlha yang, le nyoba e e tswang lefatsheng le le kgakala? Ditshupelo tsa lona tse di fisiwang ga di lebosege, le ditlhabelo tsa lona ga di nkgatlhe.”" 
Jeremiah6:21 Ke gone ka moo Jehofa o bua jaana, a re: “Bonang ke tlaa baya dikgopi fa pele ga tšhaba e; mme borra bana le bomorwaa bone ba tlaa kgotswa mmogo ke tsone; oo rra motho le tsala ya gagwe ba tlaa nyelela.”" 
Jeremiah6:22 Jehofa o bua jaana, a re: “Bonang, go tla tšhaba nngwe e tswa lefatsheng la botsheka; le morafe mongwe o mogolo o tlaa tlhotlhelediwa o tswa dikhutlong tsa bofelofelo tsa lefatshe." 
Jeremiah6:23 Ke ba ba tsholang bora le lerumo; ke ba ba bolalome, ga ba itse go utlwela botlhoko; kodu ya bone e suma jaaka lewatle, mme ba palame dipitse; mongwe le mongwe o go tlhomeletse, wena morwadia Sione, jaaka monna yo o tlhomeletseng tlhabano.”" 
Jeremiah6:24 Re utlwile tumedi ya gone; diatla tsa rona di a koafala; tlalelo e e mahehe e re tshwere, le metlotsedi e e ntseng jaaka ya mosadi fa a le mo pelegong." 
Jeremiah6:25 Se tsweleng kwa masimong, se tsamayeng mo tseleng; gonne tšhaka ya mmaba e teng, le theregiso ka ntlha tsotlhe." 
Jeremiah6:26 Wena morwadia tšhaba ya me, itlame ka letsela la kgetse, o ipidikamise mo meloreng; o itirele khutsafalo, jaaka e ka bo e le morwao yo o esi, e bong go gogotlega mo go botlhoko thata; gonne mothopi o tlaa re wela ka tshoganetso." 
Jeremiah6:27 “Ke go dirile kago e e godileng le kago e e thata ya phemelo mo bathong ba me; gore o tle o itse o ba o leka tsela ya bone. 
Jeremiah6:28 Botlhe fela ke dirukutlhi tse di utlwisang botlhoko, ba kgarakgatshega ka ditlabeletso; ba ntse kgotlho le tshipi; botlhe fela ba dira mo go bodileng." 
Jeremiah6:29 Mouba o tle o ubele ka thata; lotwe o jelwe ke molelo; ba tswelelela pele lefela go itshekisa; gonne baikepi ga ba khumolelwe koo. 
Jeremiah6:30 Batho ba tlaa ba bitsa manyelo a selefera, ka Jehofa a ba ganne.”" 
Jeremiah7:1 Lefoko le le tsileng mo go Jeremia le tswa kwa go Jehofa, la re:" 
Jeremiah7:2 “Ema mo kgorong ya ntlo ya ga Jehofa, mme o kue teng lefoko le, o re: ‘Utlwang lefoko la ga Jehofa lona lotlhe ba Juta, ba lo tsenang ka dikgoro tse lo ya go obamela Jehofa." 
Jeremiah7:3 Jehofa wa masomosomo, Modimo wa Iseraele, o bua jaana, a re: Siamisang ditsela tsa lona le ditiro tsa lona, mme ke tlaa lo agisa mo felong fa." 
Jeremiah7:4 Lo se ka lwa ikanya mafoko a maaka, lwa re: Tempele ya ga Jehofa, tempele ya ga Jehofa, tempele ya ga Jehofa ke dikago tse.’" 
Jeremiah7:5 “Gonne fa lo siamisetsa ruri ditsela tsa lona, le ditiro tsa lona; fa lo dirafaletsa ruri tshiamiso gare ga motho le wa ga gabo;" 
Jeremiah7:6 fa lo sa patike moeng, le lesiela, le mosadi wa motlholagadi, fa lo sa tsholole madi a a se nang molato mo felong fa, le gone lo sa sale medimo e sele morago, go tlaa lo ikutlwisa botlhoko;" 
Jeremiah7:7 foo ke tlaa lo agisa mo felong fa, mo lefatsheng le ke le neileng borraeno, go tswa bogologolong go ya fela kwa bosakhutleng." 
Jeremiah7:8 “Bonang, lo ikanya mafoko a maaka, a a sa kakeng a thusa sepe." 
Jeremiah7:9 A lo tlaa utswa, lo bolaya batho, lo dira boaka, lo ikana ka maaka, lo fisetsa Baale maswalo, lo sala medimo e sele morago e lo sa e itseng," 
Jeremiah7:10 lo ba lo ema fa pele ga me mo ntlong, e, e e bidiwang ka leina la me, mme lo re: ‘Re golotswe!’ Gore lo tle lo dire makgapha a lona otlhe fela?" 
Jeremiah7:11 Ntlo e, e e bidiwang ka leina la me, a e ntse jaana e fetogile mongobo wa magodu mo matlhong a lona? Bonang, nna, e bong nna, ke go bonye, go bua Jehofa." 
Jeremiah7:12 Tlogang jaana lo ye kwa felong ga me fa go neng go le kwa Shilo, kwa ke agisitseng leina la me teng pele, mme lo bone se ke se go diretseng, ka ntlha ya boikepo jwa tšhaba ya me ya Baiseraele." 
Jeremiah7:13 Jaana, e re ka lo dirile ditiro tsotlhe tse, go bua Jehofa, mme ka bua le lona, ke phakela ke bua, mme lo se ka lwa utlwa; ka lo bitsa, mme lo se ka lwa araba;" 
Jeremiah7:14 ke gone ka moo ntlo e, e e bidiwang ka leina la me, e lo e ikantseng, le felo fa ke go neileng lona le borraeno, ke tlaa e direla jaaka ke diretse Shilo." 
Jeremiah7:15 Ke tlaa lo latlha lo tswa mo ponong ya me, jaaka ke latlhile bana botlhe ba ga rraeno, e bong losika lotlhe lwa ga Eferaime." 
Jeremiah7:16 “Ke gone o se ka wa rapelela tšhaba e, le gone o se ka wa e tsholeletsa selelo le fa e le thapelo, o se ka wa dira thapelelo mo go nna, gonne ga nketla ke go utlwa." 
Jeremiah7:17 A ga o bone se ba se dirang mo metseng ya Juta, le mo mebileng ya Jerusalema?" 
Jeremiah7:18 Bana ba tle ba rwalele, borraabo ba gotse molelo, basadi ba dube boupe go tla ba direla mohumagadi kgosi ya legodimo dinkgwenyana, le go thelela medimo e sele ditshupelo tse di nowang, gore ba tle ba ntlhotlheletsa bogaleng." 
Jeremiah7:19 A ba bo ba ntlhotlheleletsa bogaleng? Go bua Jehofa; a ga go itlhotlheletse bone ka bosi, ba itshosobaganya difatlhogo tsa bone?" 
Jeremiah7:20 Ke gone ka moo Jehofa Modimo o buang jaana, a re: ‘Bonang, go tlaa goromelediwa bogale jwa me le tšarologo ya me mo felong fa, mo mothong le mo kgomong, le mo ditlhareng tsa naga, le mo loungong lwa mmu; mme go tlaa tuka molelo, ga go ketla go tingwa.’ ”" 
Jeremiah7:21 O bua jaana Jehofa wa masomosomo, Modimo wa Iseraele, a re: “Tlhakanyang ditshupelo tsa lona tse di fisiwang le ditlhabelo tsa lona, mme lo je nama." 
Jeremiah7:22 Gonne ga ke a ka ka bua le borraeno, le fa e le go ba laola mo motlheng o ke ba ntshitseng mo lefatsheng la Egepeto ka one, ka ga ditshupelo tse di fisiwang, le fa e le ditlhabelo." 
Jeremiah7:23 Mme ka ba laolela selo se, ka re: ‘Reetsang lentswe la me, mme ke tlaa nna Modimo wa lona, lo tlaa nna batho ba me; mme lo sepele mo tseleng yotlhe e ke e lo laolelang, gore go tle go nne molemo mo go lona.’" 
Jeremiah7:24 Mme ga ba a ka ba reetsa, le fa e le go sekega tsebe, mme ba sepela ka fa kgakololong ya bone, le ka fa logwading lwa pelo tsa bone tse di bosula, mme ba boela kwa morago e seng kwa pele." 
Jeremiah7:25 E sa le ka lobaka lo borraeno ba duleng ka lone kwa Egepeto go tla mo lobakeng lwa gompieno, ke ntse ke roma batlhanka ba me, e bong baperofeti kwa go lona, ke phakela ka meso le meso ke ba roma." 
Jeremiah7:26 Le fa go ntse jalo ga ba a ka ba ntheetsa le fa e le go sekega tsebe, ba ikwatlalatsa thamo, ba dira bosula bogolo go borraabo." 
Jeremiah7:27 “O tlaa bua nabo mafoko otlhe a; mme ga ba ketla ba go reetsa; le gone o tlaa ba bitsa; mme ga ba ketla ba go araba. 
Jeremiah7:28 O tlaa ba raya o re: ‘O ke one morafe o o sa reetseng lentswe la ga Jehofa Modimo wa bone, le fa e le go amogela thuto; boammaaruri bo nyeletse, bo kgaotswe mo melomong ya bone." 
Jeremiah7:29 Ikgaole moriri wena Jerusalema, o o latlhe, mme o tlhabeletse khutsafalo mo dithoteng tse di loforotlho; gonne Jehofa o ganne, o latlhile losika lwa bogale jwa gagwe.’" 
Jeremiah7:30 “Gonne bana ba Juta ba dirile se se bosula mo ponong ya me,” go bua Jehofa; “ba beile makgapha a bone mo ntlong e e bidiwang ka leina la me, go e itshekolola." 
Jeremiah7:31 Ba bile ba agile mafelo a a tlotlometseng a Tofethe, yo o mo mogogorong wa morwa Hinome, go tla ba fisa bana ba bone ba basimane le ba basetsana mo molelong; e le mo ke sa go laolang, le gone go se ka ga tla ga tsoga mo pelong ya me." 
Jeremiah7:32 Ke gone bonang, metlha e e tla, go bua Jehofa, ga go ketla go tlhola go bidiwa Tofethe, le fa e le mogogoro wa morwa Hinome, fa e se Mogogoro wa Polaelo; gonne ba tlaa fitlha baswi mo Tofethe, go tle go tsamaye go tlhokafale fa go ka fitlhwang teng." 
Jeremiah7:33 Ditoto tsa batho ba, e tlaa nna dijo tsa dinonyane tsa loapi, le tsa dibatana tsa lefatshe; ga go ketla go dirana le ope yo o di kuulolang." 
Jeremiah7:34 Foo ke tlaa khutlisa modumo wa go dira mokete le wa boitumelo, le lentswe la monyadi le lentswe la monyadi mo metseng ya Juta, le mo mebileng ya Jerusalema; gonne lefatshe le tlaa nna kgakgabalo fela." 
Jeremiah8:1 “E tlaa re ka motlha oo, go bua Jehofa, ba tlaa ntsha marapo a dikgosi tsa Juta, le marapo a dikgosana tsa teng, le marapo a baperesiti le marapo a baperofeti, le marapo a banni ba Jerusalema; ba tlaa a epolola mo diphupung tsa bone." 
Jeremiah8:2 Ba tlaa a anega fa pele ga letsatsi, le kgwedi, le bontsi jotlhe jwa legodimo, e le dilo tse ba di ratileng, tse ba di diretseng, tse ba di latetseng, tse ba di batlileng, tse ba di obametseng; ga a ketla a phuthwa le fa e le go fitlhwa; a tlaa nna letshotelo fa godimo ga mmu." 
Jeremiah8:3 Mme masalela otlhe a a tlaa salang a losika lo lo bosula lo, a a tlaa bong a setse mo mafelong otlhe kwa ke a leleketseng teng, a tlaa ipatlela loso bogolo go botshelo,” go bua Jehofa wa masomosomo." 
Jeremiah8:4 “Gape o ba reye o re: ‘Go bua jaana Jehofa. A re: A batho ba tlaa wa, mme ba se ke ba tsoge gape? A motho mongwe o tlaa fapoga, mme a se ke a boe?’" 
Jeremiah8:5 Ke ka ntlha yang tšhaba e ya Jerusalema e releletse kwa morago ka tenego ya ka gale le ka gale? Ba tshegeditse tsietso thata, ba gana go boa.”" 
Jeremiah8:6 Ka reetsa mme ka utlwa, mme ga ba a ka ba bua ka tshiamo; ga go motho ope yo o ikwatlhaelang boikepo jwa gagwe ka go re: “Ke dirile eng?” Mongwe le mongwe o fapogela tseleng ya gagwe, jaaka pitse e e sotlhomelang mo tlhabanong." 
Jeremiah8:7 Ee, mogolodi mo loaping o itse metlha ya one e e laotsweng; le lephoi, le peolwane, le kokolohutwe, di tle di tlhokomele metlha ya go tla ga tsone; mme batho ba me ga ba itse molao wa ga Jehofa." 
Jeremiah8:8 “Lo bua jang, lo re: ‘Re botlhale, le molao wa ga Jehofa re na nao?’ Bonang, sekwala se se tsietsang sa bakwadi se dirile ka tsietso." 
Jeremiah8:9 Ba ba botlhale ba tlhabilwe ke ditlhong, ba tseanye, ba tshwaregile; bonang, ba ganne lefoko la ga Jehofa; mme botlhale go na le jo bo ntseng jang mo go bone?" 
Jeremiah8:10 Ke gone ka moo basadi ba bone ke tlaa ba naya ba sele, le masimo a bone ke tlaa a naya ba ba tlaa a ruang fela; gonne mongwe le mongwe, go simologa ka yo mmotlana go ya kwa go yo mogolo, o ineetse mo bopelotshetlheng, go simolola ka moperofeti le go ya moperesiting, mongwe le mongwe o dira ka tsietso." 
Jeremiah8:11 Ba fodisitse thobego ya morwadia batho ba me ka kgometho, ba re: ‘Kagiso, kagiso;’ le mororo go se na kagiso." 
Jeremiah8:12 A ba kile ba tlhajwa ke ditlhong ba sena go dira se se makgapha? Nnyaa, ba ne ba sa tlhajwe ke ditlhong gope, le fa e le go thunya; ke gone ka moo ba tlaa wang le ba ba wang. Mo motlheng wa go sekisiwa ga bone ba tlaa digelwa fa fatshe,” go bua Jehofa." 
Jeremiah8:13 “Ke tlaa ba nyeleletsa ruri, go bua Jehofa, ga go ketla go dirana le difine mo mofineng, le fa e le difeige mo mofeigeng; le lekakaba le tlaa swaba; le dilo tse ke di ba neileng di tlaa tloga di feta mo go bone.”" 
Jeremiah8:14 Ana re duletseng fela? Phuthegang, re tseneng mo metseng e e thekeleditsweng, re tuulaleng teng; gonne Jehofa Modimo wa rona o re didimaditse, o re nositse metsi a santlhokwe, gonne re leofetse Jehofa." 
Jeremiah8:15 Ra lebelela kagiso, mme ga se ka ga tla molemo ope; ra lebelela motlha wa go fola, mme bonang ga nna tseano fela!" 
Jeremiah8:16 Pudulo ya dipitse tsa gagwe e utlwala di le kwa Dane; lefatshe lotlhe le roroma ka kgwankgwanyego ya dinatla tsa gagwe; gonne ba tsile, mme ba lakaitse lefatshe le tsotlhe tse di mo go lone; motse le ba ba agileng mo go one." 
Jeremiah8:17 “Gonne, bonang, ke tlaa roma dinoga, dišaušawane mo go lona, tse di tlaa ganang go tshereganngwa; mme di tlaa lo loma,” go bua Jehofa." 
Jeremiah8:18 A bo ke ka bo ke nonofile go ikgomoletsa bohutsana! Pelo ya me ya idibala mo teng ga me. 
Jeremiah8:19 Bonang, lentswe la go gowa ga morwadia batho ba me, le le tswang lefatsheng le le kgakala thata: “A Jehofa ga a yo mo Sione? A kgosi ya gagwe ga e yo mo go ene?” “Ana ba nkgakaleditseng ka ditshwantsho tsa bone tse di setilweng, le ka maithamako a seeng?”" 
Jeremiah8:20 “Thobo e fetile, letlhabula le khutlile, mme rona ga re a bolokwa.”" 
Jeremiah8:21 Ke utlwisiwa botlhoko ke thobego ya morwadia batho ba me; ke montsho; kgakgamalo e ntshwere. 
Jeremiah8:22 A ga go na boroku jo bo alafang mo Gileate? A ga go na ngaka teng? Ke ka ntlha yang se se fodisang se sa bewa mo go morwadia batho ba me? 
Jeremiah9:1 A bo tlhogo ya me e ka bo e le metsi, le matlho a me a ka bo a le motswedi wa dikeledi, gore ke tle ke lelele ba ba bolailweng ba morwadia batho ba me, motshegare le bosigo!" 
Jeremiah9:2 A bo ke ka bo ke na le felo ga bolalo ga batsamai le tsela mo nageng; gore nka bo ke tlogela batho ba me ka tswa mo go bone! gonne ke bagokafadi botlhe, phuthego ya malotsana." 
Jeremiah9:3 “Ba obe loleme lwa bone, jaaka e ka bo e le bora jwa bone go tla ba bua maaka; mme ba nonofetse mo lefatsheng, mme e seng ntlheng ya boammaaruri: gonne ba tle ba tswe mo bosuleng bongwe, ba ye mo bosuleng jo bongwe, mme ga ba nkitse,” go bua Jehofa." 
Jeremiah9:4 “A mongwe le mongwe a itise mo go wa ga gabo, ope a se ka a ikanya ngwana a rraagwe; gonne ngwanaa rramotho mongwe le mongwe o tle a tlhalefeletse yo mongwe ruri, mme mongwe le mongwe wa ga gabo motho o tle a nne a tsamaye ka ditlabeletso." 
Jeremiah9:5 Mongwe le mongwe o tlaa tsietsa wa ga gabo, ga ba ketla ba bua boammaaruri; ba rutile diteme tsa bone go bua maaka; ba inaya letsapa la go dira boikepo." 
Jeremiah9:6 Bonno jwa gago bo mo gare ga tsietso; ka ntlha ya tsietso ba gana go nkitse,” go bua Jehofa." 
Jeremiah9:7 Ke gone ka moo Jehofa wa masomosomo o buang jaana, a re: “Bonang, ke tlaa ba tlhapolosa, ke ba leka; gonne ke ka bo ke dira jang ka go sele, ka ntlha ya morwadia batho ba me?" 
Jeremiah9:8 Loleme lwa bone ke motswi o o tlisang loso; lo bua tsietso; motho o a tle a bue kagiso le wa ga gabo ka molomo, mme mo pelong a mo laletse." 
Jeremiah9:9 A ga nketla ke ba kgopololela dilo tse?” go bua Jehofa; “a mowa wa me ga o ketla o itefetsa mo morafeng o o ntseng jaana?” 
Jeremiah9:10 Ke tlaa tlhabeleletsa dithaba selelo le kuruetso, le mafulo a naga khutsafalelo, gonne a fisitswe, go bile ga go tle ope ka gona; le gone batho ga ba kake ba utlwa kodu ya dikgomo; go le dinonyane tsa loapi, le diphologolo di tshabile, di ile." 
Jeremiah9:11 “Ke tlaa dira Jerusalema mekoakoa, boago jwa diphokoje; ke tlaa dira metse ya Juta tshwafalo go se na monni.”" 
Jeremiah9:12 Monna yo o botlhale ke mang, yo o ka tlhaloganyang se? Yo molomo wa ga Jehofa o buileng nae ke mang, gore a se bolele? Ke ka ntlha yang lefatshe le sule, le šele jaaka naga, go bile go sa tle ope ka teng?" 
Jeremiah9:13 Jehofa a re: “E re ka ba latlhile molao wa me o ke o beileng fa pele ga bone, mme ba se ka ba utlwa lentswe la me, le fa e le go sepela mo go lone;" 
Jeremiah9:14 mme ba sepetse ka fa logwading lwa pelo tsa bone, ba ile le boBaale, mo ba go rutilweng ke borraabo.”" 
Jeremiah9:15 Ke gone ka moo, go bua jaana Jehofa wa masomosomo, Modimo wa Iseraele, a re: “Bonang, ke tlaa ba jesa, e bong batho ba, ke ba jese longana, ke tlaa ba nosa santlhokwe." 
Jeremiah9:16 Le gone ke tlaa ba falaletsa le merafe e ba iseng ba ke ba e itse le fa e le borraabo; mme ke tlaa ba latedisa tšhaka, go tsamaye ke ba nyeletse.”" 
Jeremiah9:17 Go bua jaana Jehofa wa masomosomo, a re: “Lo gopole, mme lo bitse basadi ba khutsafalelo gore ba tle; lo romele basadi ba ba matsetseleko gore ba tle:" 
Jeremiah9:18 A ba itlhaganele, mme ba re tlhabeleletse selelo, gore matlho a rona a tshologe dikeledi, le dintshi tsa matlho a rona di gorometse metsi." 
Jeremiah9:19 Gonne modumo wa khutsafalelo o a utlwala o tswa Sione, o re: ‘Ana re thopilwe jang! Re sosobagantswe, ka re latlhile lefatshe, ka ba digile manno a rona.’ ”" 
Jeremiah9:20 Le fa go ntse jalo utlwang tlheng lefoko la ga Jehofa, lona basadi, mme a ditsebe tsa lona di amogele lefoko la molomo wa gagwe, lo rute bomorwadia lona kuruetso, le mongwe le mongwe a rute wa ga gabo khutsafalo." 
Jeremiah9:21 Gonne loso lo tlhatlogile lo tsenye ka diipone tsa rona, lo tsenye mo matlong a dikgosi tsa rona; go tla lo kgaola banyana kwa ntle, le makau mo mebileng." 
Jeremiah9:22 Bua o re: Jehofa o bua jaana, a re: “Ditoto tsa batho di tlaa wela mo nageng e e lobala fela jaaka boloko, le jaaka mabelenyana a tle a we mo seatleng sa mosegi, mme go se na ope yo o tlaa a selang.”"
