Jeremiah28:4 Ke tlaa ba ke busetsa mo felong fa Jekonia morwa Jehoiakime, kgosi ya Juta, a na le batshwarwa botlhe ba Juta, ba ba ileng Babilone, go bua Jehofa; gonne ke tlaa roba jokwe ya kgosi ya Babilone.”" 
Jeremiah28:5 Foo moperofeti Jeremia a raya moperofeti Hanania mo ponong ya baperesiti, le mo ponong ya batho botlhe ba ba emeng mo ntlong ya ga Jehofa," 
Jeremiah28:6 e bong moperofeti Jeremia, a re: “A go nne jalo! A Jehofa a dire jalo! A Jehofa a dirafatse mafoko a gago a o a perofesitseng, a go ba a lere dijana tsa ntlo ya ga Jehofa, le botlhe ba botshwaro, ba tswe Babilone ba tle felong fa." 
Jeremiah28:7 Le fa go ntse jalo a ko o utlwe lefoko le ke le buelang mo tsebeng tsa gago, le mo tsebeng tsa batho botlhe:" 
Jeremiah28:8 Baperofeti ba ba kileng ba ne ba le pele ga me le pele ga gago bogologolo, ba ne ba perofesa dira, le bosula, le kgogodi ka ga mafatshe a le mantsi, le ka ga magosi a magolo." 
Jeremiah28:9 Moperofeti yo o perofesang ka ga kagiso, mogang lefoko la moperofeti yoo le dirafalang, foo moperofeti yoo o tlaa itsiwe, go re Jehofa o mo romile ka mmaanete.”" 
Jeremiah28:10 Foo moperofeti Hanania a tlosa jokwe mo thamong ya moperofeti Jeremia, a lo roba." 
Jeremiah28:11 Mme Hanania a bua mo ponong ya batho botlhe, a re: “Jehofa o bua jaana, a re: Fela jalo ke tlaa roba jokwe ya ga Nebukatenesare kgosi ya Babilone, ke e tlosa mo thamong ya merafe yotlhe, dinyaga di le pedi tse di tletseng di e se di fete.” Mme moperofeti Jeremia a tloga a tsamaya." 
Jeremiah28:12 Foo lefoko la ga Jehofa la tla mo go Jeremia, morago ga Hanania moperofeti a sena go roba jokwe, a e tlosa mo thamong ya moperofeti Jeremia, la re:" 
Jeremiah28:13 “Ya o reye Hanania o re: ‘Jehofa o bua jaana, a re: O robile dijokwe tsa dikgong; mme o tlaa dira dijokwe tsa tshipi mo boemong jwa tsone." 
Jeremiah28:14 Gonne Jehofa wa masomosomo, Modimo wa Iseraele, o bua jaana; a re: Ke beile jokwe ya tshipi mo thamong ya merafe yotlhe e, gore e direle Nebukatenesare kgosi ya Babilone; mme e tlaa mo direla. Ke bile ke mo neile diphologolo le dibatana tsa naga.’ ”" 
Jeremiah28:15 Foo moperofeti Jeremia a raya moperofeti Hanania, a re: “Utlwa jaana wena Hanania; Jehofa ga a a go roma; mme o dira gore batho ba, ba ikanye maaka." 
Jeremiah28:16 Ke gone ka moo Jehofa o buang jaana, a re: ‘Bona, ke tlaa go tlosa mo lefatsheng; o tlaa swa ka ngwaga ono, gonne o buile go tsuololela Jehofa.’ ”" 
Jeremiah28:17 Jalo Hanania moperofeti a swa ka ngwaga oo, ka kgwedi ya bosupa." 
Jeremiah29:1 Jaana, a ke mafoko a lokwalo lo moperofeti Jeremia, a le mo Jerusalema, a lo kwalela masalela a bagolwane ba botshwaro le baperesiti, le baperofeti, le batho botlhe ba Nebukatenesare o ne a ba tlositse mo Jerusalema, a ba isitse kwa Babilone ba le ditshwarwa." 
Jeremiah29:2 (Morago ga kgosi Jekonia, le mma kgosi, le baopafadiwi, le, dikgosana tsa Juta le Jerusalema, le badiri ba ba maatlametlo, le bathudi, ba sena go tsamaya ba tswa mo Jerusalema.)" 
Jeremiah29:3 Lwa isiwa ke Elasa morwa Shafane, le Gemaria, morwa Hilekia, (yo Setekia kgosi ya Juta o ne a mo romile kwa Babilone, kwa go Nebukatenesare kgosi ya Babilone), a re:" 
Jeremiah29:4 Jehofa wa masomosomo, Modimo wa Iseraele o bua jaana, a re: Ke raya batshwarwa botlhe ba ke laotseng gore ba tsewe mo Jerusalema ba isiwe e le ditshwarwa kwa Babilone:" 
Jeremiah29:5 Ka re: “Agang matlo, lo nne mo go one; tlhomang masimo, lo je loungo lwa one;" 
Jeremiah29:6 tsayang basadi, lo bone bana ba basimane le ba basetsana; lo bo lo tseise bomorwaa lona basadi, le bomorwadia lona lo ba tseise banna, gore ba tle ba bone bana ba basimane le ba basetsana; lo ate teng lo se ka lwa ngotlega." 
Jeremiah29:7 Lo batlele motse o ke laotseng gore lo isiwe botshwarong kwa go one kagiso, lo o rapelele mo go Jehofa; gonne mo kagisong ya one le lona lo tlaa bona kagiso.”" 
Jeremiah29:8 Gonne Jehofa wa masomosomo, Modimo wa Iseraele o bua jaana, a re: “A baperofeti ba lona ba ba mo gare ga lona, le baitseanape ba lona ba se lo tsietse, gape lo se ka lwa reetsa ditoro tsa lona tse lo di lorang." 
Jeremiah29:9 Gonne ba perofesa ka tsietso mo ineng la me; ga ke a ba roma;” go bua Jehofa. 
Jeremiah29:10 Gonne Jehofa o bua jaana, a re: “E tlaa re dinyaga di le 70 di sena go diralela Babilone, ke tlaa lo lekola, ke tlaa dirafatsa lefoko la me le le molemo ka ga lona, ke lo busetsa felong fano," 
Jeremiah29:11 gonne ke a e itse megopolo e ke e gopolang ka ga lona,” go bua Jehofa, “megopolo ya kagiso, e seng ya bosula, go lo naya tsholofelo mo motlheng wa lona wa bofelo." 
Jeremiah29:12 Lo tlaa mpitsa, lo tlaa ya lo nthapela, mme ke tlaa lo reetsa." 
Jeremiah29:13 Lo tlaa mpatla, mme lo tlaa mpona, mogang lo mpatlang ka pelo yotlhe ya lona." 
Jeremiah29:14 Ke tlaa bonwa ke lona, go bua Jehofa, botshwaro jwa lona ke tlaa bo sokolola; ke tlaa lo phutha kwa merafeng yotlhe, le kwa mafelong otlhe kwa ke lo leleketseng teng, go bua Jehofa; ke tlaa ba ke lo lere felong fa ke laoletseng gore lo tsewe teng lo isiwe botshwarong.”" 
Jeremiah29:15 “Gonne lo rile: ‘Jehofa o re tsoseditse baperofeti mo Babilone.’ 
Jeremiah29:16 Gonne Jehofa o bua jaana ka ga kgosi e e dutseng mo setulong sa ga Dafite sa bogosi, le ka ga batho botlhe ba ba agileng mo motseng o, bana ba rraeno ba ba se kang ba ya le lona botshwarong; go bua jaana Jehofa wa masomosomo, a re:" 
Jeremiah29:17 ‘Bonang, ke tlaa ba tsosetsa tšhaka, le popamo, le kgogodi, ke tlaa ba dira jaaka difeige tse di bosula, tse di sa kakeng tsa jewa, ka di le bosula thata." 
Jeremiah29:18 Ke tlaa ba konatelela ka tšhaka, le ka popamo, le ka kgogodi, ke tlaa ba neela go akgaakgelwa mo magosing otlhe a lefatshe, gore ba nne thogako, le kgakgamatso, le kotso, le kgobo mo merafeng yotlhe kwa ke ba leleketseng teng." 
Jeremiah29:19 Ka go bo ba se ka ba reetsa mafoko a me,’ go bua Jehofa, ‘a ke romileng batlhanka ba me, e bong baperofeti, kwa go bone ka one, ke phakela ke ba roma; mme lwa gana go utlwa,’ go bua Jehofa." 
Jeremiah29:20 Ke gone utlwang lefoko la ga Jehofa, lona lotlhe ba botshwaro, ba ke lo tlositseng mo Jerusalema ka lo isa kwa Babilone." 
Jeremiah29:21 Jehofa wa masomosomo, Modimo wa Iseraele, o bua jaana ka ga Ahabe morwa Kolaia, le ka ga Setekia morwa Maaseia, ba ba lo perofesetsang maaka ka leina la me, a re: ‘Bonang, ke tlaa ba tsenya mo seatleng sa ga Nebukateresare kgosi ya Babilone; mme o tlaa ba bolaela fa pele ga matlho a lona;" 
Jeremiah29:22 mme go tlaa tsewa phutso ka bone ke batshwarwa botlhe ba Juta ba ba mo Babilone, ba re: “A Jehofa a go dire jaaka Setekia, le jaaka Ahabe, ba kgosi ya Babilone e ba besitseng mo molelong.”" 
Jeremiah29:23 Gonne ba dirile bosilo mo Iseraele, ba dirile boaka le basadi ba bangwe ka bone, ba buile ka leina la me ka tsietso, ba bua mafoko a ke se kang ka a ba laolela; e bile ke nna ke itseng, ke bile ke mosupi,’ ” go bua Jehofa." 
Jeremiah29:24 Ka ga Shemaia wa Monehelame bua o re: 
Jeremiah29:25 “Jehofa wa masomosomo, Modimo wa Iseraele, o bua jaana, a re: Ereka o isitse dikwalo ka leina la gago kwa bathong botlhe ba ba mo Jerusalema, le kwa go Sefania morwa Maaseia moperesiti, le kwa baperesiting botlhe, wa re:" 
Jeremiah29:26 ‘Jehofa o go dirile moperesiti mo boemong jwa ga Joiata moperesiti, gore lo nne balaodi mo ntlong ya ga Jehofa, go tshwara mongwe le mongwe yo o tsenwang, le yo o itirang moperofeti, gore o mo golegele mo disaneng le mo dikgolegong tsa thamo." 
Jeremiah29:27 Jaana ka re, go ntse jang ka o se ka wa kgalemela Jeremia wa Anathothe, yo o lo itirelang moperofeti," 
Jeremiah29:28 ka a romile kwano go rona mo Babilone, a re: Botshwaro bo bolele; agang matlo lo nne mo go one; tlhomang masimo lo je loungo lwa one’ ”?" 
Jeremiah29:29 Sefania moperesiti a bala lokwalo lo, mo tsebeng tsa ga Jeremia moperofeti." 
Jeremiah29:30 Foo ga tla lefoko la ga Jehofa mo go Jeremia la re: 
Jeremiah29:31 “Roma kwa go botlhe ba botshwaro o re: ‘Jehofa o bua jaana kaga Shemaia wa Monehelame, a re: E re ka Shemaia a lo porefeseditse mme ke se ka ka mo roma, mme o lo ikantshitse maaka;" 
Jeremiah29:32 ke gone ka moo, go buang Jehofa, a re: Bonang, ke tlaa betsa Shemaia wa Monehelame, le losika lwa gagwe; ga a ketla a dira le monna yo o tlaa agang mo bathong ba ga gabo, le gone ga a ketla a bona molemo o ke tlaa o direlang batho ba me, go bua Jehofa; ka a buile go tsuololela Jehofa.’ ”" 
Jeremiah30:1 Lefoko le le tsileng mo go Jeremia le tswa kwa go Jehofa, la re:" 
Jeremiah30:2 “Go bua jaana Jehofa, Modimo wa Iseraele, a re: Kwala mafoko otlhe a ke a buileng nao mo lokwalong." 
Jeremiah30:3 Gonne bona, metlha e etla, go bua Jehofa, e ke tlaa sokololang botshwaro jwa batho ba me ba Iseraele, le ba Juta ka yone, go bua Jehofa; ke tlaa ba busetsa kwa lefatsheng le ke le neileng borraabo, mme ba tlaa le rua.”" 
Jeremiah30:4 A ke one mafoko a Jehofa o a buileng ka ga Iseraele le ka ga Juta. 
Jeremiah30:5 “Gonne Jehofa o bua jaana, a re: Re utlwile magweregwere a lentswe la thoromo, la poifo, e seng la kagiso." 
Jeremiah30:6 Botsang jaana, lo bone, bo monna o tle a nne mo pelegong; go ntse jang ka ke bona monna mongwe le mongwe a itshwere dinoka, jaaka mosadi fa a le mo pelegong, le difatlhogo tsotlhe di khwatetse?" 
Jeremiah30:7 Ija we! Gonne letsatsi leo le logolo, go bile go se na lepe le le tshwanang nalo; ke motlha wa khuduego ya ga Jakobe fela; mme o tlaa gololwa mo go lone." 
Jeremiah30:8 “Go tlaa dirala mo tsatsing leo, go bua Jehofa wa masomosomo, a re: Ke tlaa roba jokwe ya gagwe ke e tlosa mo thamong ya gago, ke tlaa komoganya dikgolego tsa gago, mme baeng ga ba ketla ba tlhola ba itirela ka ene." 
Jeremiah30:9 Ba tlaa direla Jehofa Modimo wa bone, le Dafite kgosi ya bone, yo ke tlaa mo ba tsosetsang." 
Jeremiah30:10 “Ke gone, o se ka wa boifa, wena Jakobe motlhanka wa me, go bua Jehofa; o se ka wa rerega wena Iseraele; gonne bona, ke tlaa go golola o le kgakala, le losika lwa gago lo le kwa lefatsheng la botshwaro jwa bone; mme Jakobe o tlaa boa, o tlaa nna mo thagamong le mo boiketlong, ga go na ope yo o tlaa mmoifisang." 
Jeremiah30:11 Gonne ke na nao, go bua Jehofa, go go golola; gonne ke tlaa nyeleletsa ruri merafe yotlhe e ke go falaleditseng kwa go yone, mme wena ga nketla ke go nyeletsa ruri; ke tlaa go siamisa ka tekanyo, ga nketla ke go lesa gope o sa bediwa.”" 
Jeremiah30:12 Gonne Jehofa o bua jaana, a re: “Thobego ya gago ke e e sa foleng, ntho ya gago e botlhoko thata." 
Jeremiah30:13 Ga go na ope yo o ka go rapelelang, gore o tle o fapiwe; ga o na melemo epe e e fodisang." 
Jeremiah30:14 Dinyatsi tsotlhe tsa gago di go lebetse, ga di go batle; gonne ke go bolaile ka ntho ya mmaba, ka kwatlhao ya motho yo o bolalome; ka ntlha ya bogolo jwa boikepo jwa gago, gonne dibe tsa gago di ne di ntsifetse." 
Jeremiah30:15 O goelang thobego ya gago? Bolwetse jwa gago ke jo bo sa foleng; ke go diretse dilo tse ka ntlha ya bogolo jwa boikepo jwa gago, le ka gonne dibe tsa gago di ne di ntsifetse." 
Jeremiah30:16 Ke gone ka moo botlhe ba ba go jang ba go fetsa ba tlaa jewa ba fediwa; le baba botlhe ba gago, mongwe le mongwe wa bone ba tlaa ya botshwarong; ba ba go thopang ba tlaa nna thopo, le botlhe ba ba go bolayang ke tlaa ba neela polaong." 
Jeremiah30:17 Gonne ke tlaa busetsa go fola mo go wena, ke tlaa go fodisa dintho, go bua Jehofa; gonne ba go biditse molatlhwa ba re: ‘Ke Sione yo o sa batlweng ke ope.’ ”" 
Jeremiah30:18 Jehofa o bua jaana, a re: “Bonang, ke tlaa ba ke sokolola botshwaro jwa megope ya ga Jakobe, ke tlaa tlhomogela maago a gagwe pelo; mme motse o tlaa agiwa godimo ga ditsha tsa one, le ntlo ya kgosi e tlaa nnwa ka fa mokgweng wa yone." 
Jeremiah30:19 Go tlaa tswa malebogo mo go one, le modumo wa ba ba dirang mokete ke tlaa ba ntsifatsa, ga ba ketla ba nna babotlana; le gone ke tlaa ba galaletsa, ga ba ketla ba nna bannye." 
Jeremiah30:20 Le bana ba bone ba tlaa nna jaaka ga ntlha, le phuthego ya bone e tlaa tlhomama fa pele ga me, mme ke tlaa betsa botlhe ba ba ba patikang." 
Jeremiah30:21 Kgosana ya bone e tlaa nna yo e leng wa ga bone fela, le mmusi wa bone e tlaa nna yo o tswang mo gare ga bone; ke tlaa mo atametsa, mme o tlaa atamela mo go nna; gonne ke mang yo o kileng a nna le pelokgale ya go nkatamela? Go bua Jehofa." 
Jeremiah30:22 Lo tlaa nna batho ba me, le nna ke tlaa nna Modimo wa lona.”" 
Jeremiah30:23 Bonang, ledimo la ga Jehofa, e bong tšararego ya gagwe, le dule e le ledimo le le gogobang; le tlaa thubegela mo tlhogong tsa baikepi." 
Jeremiah30:24 Bogale jo bo tukang jwa ga Jehofa ga bo ketla bo bowa, go tsamaya a dirafatsa, le go tsamaya a dira maikaelelo a pelo ya gagwe; lo tlaa go tlhaloganya mo metlheng ya bofelo." 
Jeremiah31:1 “E tlaa re mo motlheng oo,” go bua Jehofa, “ke tlaa nna Modimo wa ditshika tsotlhe tsa Iseraele, mme ba tlaa nna batho ba me.”" 
Jeremiah31:2 Jehofa o bua jaana, a re: “Batho ba ba tlogetsweng ke tšhaka ba bonye tlhogonolofatso mo nageng, e bong Iseraele, jale ka ke ne ke ile go mo ikhutsisa.”" 
Jeremiah31:3 Jehofa bogologolo o kile a mponalela, a re: “Ee, ke go ratile ka lorato lo lo sa khutleng; ke gone ka moo ke go gogileng ka bopelonomi jwa lorato." 
Jeremiah31:4 Ke tlaa ba ke go aga, mme o tlaa agiwa, wena kgarebana ya Iseraele; o tlaa ba o kgabisiwa ka meropana ya gago, mme o tlaa tswela mo dipineng tsa ba ba dirang mokete." 
Jeremiah31:5 O tlaa ba o tlhoma masimo a mafine mo dithabeng tsa Samaria; batlhomi ba tlaa tlhoma, mme ba tlaa ja loungo lwa gone monate." 
Jeremiah31:6 Gonne go tlaa nna letsatsi le balebedi ba ba mo makgabaneng a Eferaime ba tlaa opang mokgosi ka lone ba re: ‘Nanogang, a re tlhatlogeleng kwa Sione, kwa go Jehofa Modimo wa rona.’ ”" 
Jeremiah31:7 Gonne Jehofa o bua jaana, a re: “Opelang ka boitumelo ka ga Jakobe, lo theleng lošalaba ka ga yo mogolo wa merafe; lo boleleng, lo bake, lo re: ‘Jehofa, boloka batho ba gago, masalela a Iseraele.’" 
Jeremiah31:8 Bonang, ke tlaa ya go ba tlisa kwa lefatsheng la botsheka, ke tlaa ba phutha kwa dikhutlong tsa lefatshe, ba na le difofu, le batlhotsi, mosadi yo o ithweleng, le yo o mo pelegong ba le mmogo, ba tlaa boela kwano ba le lesomo le legolo." 
Jeremiah31:9 Ba tlaa tla ka selelo, ke tlaa ba goga ka mekokotlelo; ke tlaa ba tsamaisa fa dinokeng tsa metsi, mo tseleng e e siameng e ba se ketlang ba kgokgweetsega mo go yone; gonne ke rraabo Baiseraele, mme Eferaime ke ngwana wa me wa ntlha." 
Jeremiah31:10 “Utlwang lefoko la ga Jehofa, lona merafe, lo le kakanye mo ditlhakeng tse di kwa kgakala; lo re: ‘Ene yo o faladitseng Iseraele o tlaa mo phutha, a mo dibela, jaaka modisa a tle a dibele letsomane la gagwe.’" 
Jeremiah31:11 Gonne Jehofa o rekolotse Jakobe, a mo rekolola mo seatleng sa yo o ne a le thata bogolo go ene." 
Jeremiah31:12 Ba tlaa tla ba opela mo thoteng ya Sione, ba tlaa sailela mmogo kwa molemong wa ga Jehofa, kwa mabeleng, le kwa bojalweng jwa mofine, le kwa lookwaneng, le kwa loonyaneng lwa letsomane le lwa matlhape; mowa wa bone o tlaa nna jaaka tshimo e e nosiwang; mme ga ba ketla ba tlhola ba hutsafala gope." 
Jeremiah31:13 Foo kgarebane e tlaa itumela mo pineng, le makau le banna bagolo mmogo; gonne khutsafalo ya bone ke tlaa e fetola boitumelo, ke tlaa ba gomotsa, ke ba itumedisa, ba tswa mo bohutsaneng jwa bone." 
Jeremiah31:14 Ke tlaa thethebatsa mowa wa baperesiti ka mafura, le batho ba me ba tlaa kgora molemo wa me,” go bua Jehofa." 
Jeremiah31:15 Jehofa o bua jaana, a re: “Go utlwala lentswe mo Rama, khutsafalo, le selelo se sebe, Ragele o lelela bana ba gagwe; o gana go gomodiwa ka ga bana ba gagwe, ka ba seyo.”" 
Jeremiah31:16 Jehofa o bua jaana, a re: “Thiba lentswe la gago mo selelong, le matlho a gago mo dikeleding, gonne tiro ya gago e tlaa duelwa,” go bua Jehofa; “mme ba tlaa ba ba boa kwa lefatsheng la mmaba." 
Jeremiah31:17 Go na le tsholofelo ka ga bokhutlo jwa gago,” go bua Jehofa; “mme bana ba gago ba tlaa ba ba boela molelwaneng o e leng wa bone." 
Jeremiah31:18 Ruri ke a bo ke utlwile Eferaime a itelela, a re: ‘O mpeditse, mme ka bediwa, jaaka namane e e sa tlwaelang jokwe; a ko o ntshokolole, mme ke tlaa sokologa; gonne o Jehofa Modimo wa me." 
Jeremiah31:19 Ruri ya bo e rile ke sena go sokololwa, ka ikwatlhaya; ke sena go rutwa, ka ipata serope; ka tlhajwa ke ditlhong, ee, ka sosobagana, ka gonne ke ne ke rwele kgobo ya bokau jwa me.’" 
Jeremiah31:20 A Eferaime ke morwaake yo o rategang? A ke ngwana yo o kgatlhang? Gonne jaaka ke ntse ke mo nyatsa ke be ke ntse ke mo gakologetswe ka thata; ke gone ka moo mala a me a ba a ntse a mo huduegela; ruri ke tlaa mo utlwela botlhoko,” go bua Jehofa." 
Jeremiah31:21 “Itlhomele dikai tsa tsela, o itirele ditlhaloganyetso tsa ditsela; lebisa pelo ya gago kwa tseleng ya mheru, e bong tsela e o kileng wa tsamaya ka yone; ba o boe, wena kgarebana ya Iseraele, ba o boele mo metseng e ya gago." 
Jeremiah31:22 O tlaa nna o ya kwa le kwa ka lobaka lo lo kaye wena mosetsana wa tenego? Gonne Jehofa o tlhodile sengwe se seša mo lefatsheng, ke go re mosadi o tlaa dikanyeletsa monna.”" 
Jeremiah31:23 Jehofa wa masomosomo, Modimo wa Iseraele, o bua jaana, a re: “Ba tlaa ba ba bua puo e mo lefatsheng la Juta le mo metseng ya teng, mogang ke sokololang botshwaro jwa bone, ba re: ‘A Jehofa a go segofatse, wena bonno jwa tshiamiso, wena thaba e e boitshepo.’" 
Jeremiah31:24 Ba Juta le metse yotlhe ya teng ba tlaa nna mmogo mo go lone; balemi ba lefatshe, le ba ba tsamayang le matsomane." 
Jeremiah31:25 Gonne ke thethebaditse mowa o o lapileng, le mongwe le mongwe yo o hutsafalang ke mo etleeleditse.”" 
Jeremiah31:26 Foo ka kubuga, ka leba; mme boroko jwa me bo ne bo le monate mo go nna." 
Jeremiah31:27 “Bonang, metlha e etla,” go bua Jehofa, “e ke tlaa jalang ka yone peo ya motho, le peo ya kgomo, mo ntlong ya Iseraele, le mo ntlong ya Juta." 
Jeremiah31:28 Mo go tlaa dirala, go re jaaka ke ntse ka nna ka ba lebela go kumola le go thuba, le go pitikolola le go senya, le go utlwisa botlhoko, ke tlaa ba lebela jalo go ba aga le go ba tlhoma,” go bua Jehofa." 
Jeremiah31:29 E tlaa re mo metlheng eo ga ba ketla ba tlhola ba bua, ba re: “Borra bana ba jele difine tse di botlha, mme meno a bana a dilafetse.”" 
Jeremiah31:30 Mongwe le mongwe o tlaa swela boikepo jwa gagwe tota; motho mongwe le mongwe yo o jang difine tse di botlha ke ene meno a gagwe a tlaa dilafalang. 
Jeremiah31:31 “Bonang, metlha e e tla,” go bua Jehofa, “e ke tlaa dirang kgolagano e ntšha ka yone le ba ntlo ya Iseraele, le ba ntlo ya Juta." 
Jeremiah31:32 E seng ka fa kgolaganong e nkileng ka e dira le borraabo jale mo motlheng o ke ba tshwereng ka letsogo ka one, ka ba ntsha mo lefatsheng la Egepeto; mme kgolagano eo ya me ba ne ba e senya, le fa ke ne ke le monna wa bone,” go bua Jehofa." 
Jeremiah31:33 “Kgolagano e ke tlaa e dirang le ba ntlo ya Iseraele morago ga metlha eo ke e,” go bua Jehofa. “Ke tlaa tsenya molao wa me mo teng ga bone, ke o kwala mo pelong tsa bone. Ke tlaa nna Modimo wa bone, le bone ba tlaa nna batho ba me." 
Jeremiah31:34 Ga ba ketla ba tlhola ba ruta mongwe le mongwe wa ga gabo, le mongwe le mongwe ngwana a rraagwe, ba re: ‘Itse Jehofa;’ gonne ba tlaa nkitse botlhe fela, go simolola ka yo mmotlana go ya go yo mogolo mo go bone,” go bua Jehofa; “gonne ke tlaa ba itshwarela boikepo jwa bone, le boleo jwa bone ga nketla ke tlhola ke bo gakologelwa gope.”" 
Jeremiah31:35 Go bua jaana Jehofa, yo o beileng letsatsi gore le nne lesedi motshegare, le melao ya kgwedi le ya dinaledi gore di nne lesedi mo bosigong; yo o huduang lewatle, mme dinteelo tsa lone di faologe; Jehofa wa masomosomo ke leina la gagwe." 
Jeremiah31:36 “Fa ditao tse, di tloga fa pele ga me,” go bua Jehofa, “foo le losika lwa Iseraele lo tlaa khutla go tlhola e le morafe fa pele ga me ka bosakhutleng.”" 
Jeremiah31:37 Go bua jaana Jehofa, a re: “Fa legodimo kwa godimo le ka lekanngwa le metheo ya lefatshe kwa tlase, fa e ka hukudiwa, foo le nna ke tlaa latlha losika lotlhe lwa Iseraele ka ntlha ya tsotlhe tse ba di dirileng,” go bua Jehofa." 
Jeremiah31:38 “Bonang, metlha e etla,” go bua Jehofa, “motse o, o tlaa agelwa Jehofa, go tswa kagong e e godileng ya ga Hananele go ya kgorong ya kgokgotsho." 
Jeremiah31:39 Le thapo e e lekanyang e tlaa nama e tlhamalalela kwa lekhubung la Garebe, mme e tlaa menogela kwa Goa." 
Jeremiah31:40 Mogogoro otlhe o o ditotototo le o o melora, le matlhagare otlhe go ya kwa molatswaneng wa Kiterone, go ya kwa kgokgotshong ya kgoro ya dipitse ntlheng ya botlhabatsatsi, go tlaa itshepela Jehofa; ga go ketla go tlhola go kumolwa, le fa e le go digwa gope ka bosakhutleng.”" 
Jeremiah32:1 Lefoko le le tsileng mo go Jeremia le tswa kwa go Jehofa, ka ngwaga wa letsome wa ga Setekia kgosi ya Juta, o e neng e le ngwaga wa 18 wa ga Nebukatenesare." 
Jeremiah32:2 Jaana e rile ka motlha oo, ntwa ya kgosi ya Babilone ya tlhasela Jerusalema; mme moperofeti Jeremia a bo a tswaletswe mo lwapeng lwa tebelo, lo lo mo ntlong ya kgosi ya Juta." 
Jeremiah32:3 Gonne Setekia kgosi ya Juta o ne a mo tswaletse a re: “Ana o perofesetsang o re: ‘Jehofa o bua jaana, a re: Bonang, motse o ke tlaa o tsenya mo seatleng sa kgosi ya Babilone, mme e tlaa o gapa." 
Jeremiah32:4 Setekia kgosi ya Juta ga a ketla a falola mo seatleng sa Bakalatea, ruri o tlaa tsenngwa mo seatleng sa kgosi ya Babilone, mme o tlaa buisanya nae ka molomo, le matlho a gagwe a tlaa lebana le matlho a yone," 
Jeremiah32:5 e tlaa gogela Setekia kwa Babilone, mme o tlaa nna teng go tsamaya ke mo lekola, go bua Jehofa, le fa lo tlhabana le Bakalatea, ga lo ketla lo segofala?’ ”" 
Jeremiah32:6 Jeremia a re: “Lefoko la ga Jehofa la tla mo go nna, la re:" 
Jeremiah32:7 Bona, Hanamele morwa Shalume malomaago o tlaa tla kwa go wena, a re: ‘O ithekele lotlhagare lwa me lo lo mo Anathothe, gonne tshiamelo ya thekololo ke ya gago go lo reka.’" 
Jeremiah32:8 “Jalo Hanamele morwa malome a tla kwa go nna mo lwapeng lwa balebedi, ka fa lefokong la ga Jehofa, mme a nthaya a re: ‘Ke a go rapela reka lotlhagare lwa me, lo lo mo Anathothe mo lefatsheng la Benjamine, gonne tshiamelo ya boswa ke ya gago, le thekololo ke ya gago; o lo ithekele.’ Foo ka itse fa leo e le lefoko la ga Jehofa." 
Jeremiah32:9 “Mme ka reka lotlhagare lo lo mo Anathothe mo go Hanamele morwa malome, mme ka mo lekanyetsa madi, e bong dišekela di le 17 tsa selefera." 
Jeremiah32:10 Ka kwala dikwalo tsa tlhomamiso, ka kana longwe, mme ka bitsa basupi, ka mo lekanyetsa madi ka selekanyo sa pego." 
Jeremiah32:11 Jalo ka tsaya dikwalo tsa theko, lone lo lo kannweng, ka fa molaong le ka fa temalong, le lone lo lo sa kanwang." 
Jeremiah32:12 Lokwalo lwa theko ka lo neela Baruke morwa Neria, morwa Maseia, mo ponong ya ga Hanamele morwa malome, le mo ponong ya basupi ba ba ikwadileng mo lokwalong lwa theko, fa pele ga Bajuta botlhe ba ba dutseng mo lwapeng lwa balebedi." 
Jeremiah32:13 Ka laya Baruke fa pele ga bone, ka re:" 
Jeremiah32:14 ‘Jehofa wa masomosomo, Modimo wa Iseraele o bua jaana, a re: Tsaya dikwalo tse, e bong lokwalo lo lwa theko, lone lo lo kannweng, le lo lo sa kanwang, o di tsenye mo sejaneng sa letsopa; gore di tle di bolokege ka lobaka lo loleele." 
Jeremiah32:15 Gonne Jehofa wa masomosomo, Modimo wa Iseraele, o bua jaana, a re: Mantlo le matlhagare le masimo a mafine a tlaa ba a rekwa gape mo lefatsheng le.’ ”" 
Jeremiah32:16 Jaana e rile ke sena go neela Baruke morwa Neria lokwalo lwa theko, ka rapela Jehofa, ka re:" 
Jeremiah32:17 “Ao Jehofa Modimo! bona, o dirile legodimo le lefatshe ka thata e kgolo ya gago, le ka letsogo la gago le le otlologileng; ga go na sepe se se ka go retelelang." 
Jeremiah32:18 Yo o supetsang ba ba makgolokgolo kutlwelobotlhoko, mme boikepo jwa borrabana a bo lefetse mo sehubeng sa bana ba bone morago ga bone. Modimo o mogolo, o o thata, Jehofa wa masomosomo ke leina la gagwe;" 
Jeremiah32:19 o mogolo mo kgakololong, o nonofile mo tirong; yo matlho a gago a budulogetseng ditsela tsotlhe tsa bana ba batho; go naya mongwe le mongwe ka fa ditseleng tsa gagwe, le ka fa loungong lwa ditiro tsa gagwe." 
Jeremiah32:20 Yo o kileng wa baya ditshupo le dikgakgamatso mo lefatsheng la Egepeto, le gompieno mo go Baiseraele, le mo gare ga batho ba bangwe; mme wa itirela leina jaaka go ntse gompieno;" 
Jeremiah32:21 wa ntsha batho ba gago Baiseraele mo lefatsheng la Egepeto ka ditshupo, le ka dikgakgamatso, ka letsogo le le otlologileng, le ka theregiso e kgolo;" 
Jeremiah32:22 wa ba naya lefatshe le o le ikanetseng borraabo wa re, o tlaa le ba naya, e le lefatshe le le elang maši le dinotshe." 
Jeremiah32:23 Ba tsena ba le rua; mme ga ba a ka ba utlwa lentswe la gago le fa e le go sepela mo molaong wa gago; ga ba ise ba dire sepe sa dilo tsotlhe tse o di ba laoletseng go di dira; ke gone ka moo o lerileng bosula jotlhe jo mo go bone. 
Jeremiah32:24 “Le ba dimota tsa ntwa, ba tsile motseng go o gapa; motse o tsentswe mo seatleng sa Bakalatea ba ba tlhabanang nao ka ntlha ya tšhaka, le popamo, le ka kgogodi; se o se buileng se diretse; mme bona, o se lebile." 
Jeremiah32:25 O ntheile Jehofa Modimo wa me, wa re, ke ithekele lotlhagare ka madi, mme ke bitse basupi, le mororo motse o tsentswe mo seatleng sa Bakalatea.”" 
Jeremiah32:26 Foo ga tla lefoko la ga Jehofa mo go Jeremia, la re:" 
Jeremiah32:27 “Bona, ke nna Jehofa Modimo wa batho botlhe; a go na le sengwe se se ka nthetelelang?" 
Jeremiah32:28 Ke gone ka moo Jehofa o bua jaana, a re: Bona, ke tlaa tsenya motse o mo seatleng sa Bakalatea, le mo seatleng sa ga Nebukatenesare kgosi ya Babilone, mme o tlaa o gapa." 
Jeremiah32:29 Bakalatea, ba ba tlhabanang le motse o, ba tlaa tla ba tshuba motse o, ba o fisa, le matlo a ba iseditseng Baale maswalo mo godimo ga ditlhomeso tsa one, ba thelela medimo e sele ditshupelo tse di nowang, go tla ba ntlhotlheleletsa bogaleng." 
Jeremiah32:30 Gonne bana ba Iseraele, le bana ba Juta, ba sa le ba dira fela se se bosula mo matlhong a me, le mo bokaung jwa bone; gonne bana ba Iseraele ba sa le ba ntlhotlheleletsa bogaleng fela ka tiro ya diatla tsa bone, go bua Jehofa." 
Jeremiah32:31 Gonne motse o e ne e ntse e le tlhotlheletso ya bogale jwa me, le ya tšararego ya me, go simolola ka motlha o ba o agileng ka one go tla mo lobakeng lwa gompieno; go ba ke tla ke o tlosa fa pele ga me;" 
Jeremiah32:32 ka ntlha ya bosula jotlhe jwa bana ba Iseraele le jwa bana ba Juta, jo ba bo dirileng go tla ba ntlhotlheleletsa bogaleng, bone, le dikgosi tsa bone, le dikgosana tsa bone, le baperesiti ba bone, le baperofeti ba bone, le banna ba Juta, le banni ba Jerusalema." 
Jeremiah32:33 Ba nneile dikotla, e seng difatlhogo; mme le fa ke ba rutile, ke phakela ke ba ruta, le fa go ntse jalo ga ba a ka ba reetsa go tla ba amogela thuto." 
Jeremiah32:34 Ba baya tse di makgapha tsa bone mo ntlong e e bidiwang ka leina la me, go tla ba e itshekolola." 
Jeremiah32:35 Ba agile mafelo a a tlotlometseng a ga Baale, a a mo mogogorong wa morwa Hinome, go tla ba ralaletsa Moleke bana ba bone mo molelong, ba basimane le ba basetsana; e le mo ke sa go ba laolelang, le gone go se ka ga tsena mo mogopolong wa me, go re ba ka dira se se makgapha se; go tla ba leofisa Bajuta.”" 
Jeremiah32:36 Jaana ka ntlha ya gone moo, Jehofa, Modimo wa Iseraele, o bua jaana ka ga motse o, o lo buang ka ga one lo re: “O tsentswe mo seatleng sa kgosi ya Babilone ka tshaka, le ka popamo le ka kgogodi.”" 
Jeremiah32:37 “Bona, ke tlaa ba phutha kwa mafatsheng a otlhe kwa ke ba leleketseng teng mo bogaleng jwa me, le mo tšararegong ya me, le mo kgakalong e kgolo ya me; ke tlaa ba ke ba lere felong fa; ke ba agisa mo polokegong;" 
Jeremiah32:38 ba tlaa nna batho ba me, le nna ke tlaa nna Modimo wa bone." 
Jeremiah32:39 Ke tlaa ba naya pelo e le nngwe fela, le tsela e le nngwe fela, gore ba mpoife ka bosakhutleng; e le gore go nne molemo mo go bone, le mo baneng ba bone morago ga bone." 
Jeremiah32:40 Ke tlaa dira kgolagano e e sa khutleng nabo, ya go re, ga nketla ke ba hularela, go tla ke ba direla molemo; ke tlaa tsenya go mpoifa mo pelong tsa bone, gore ba se ka ba tloga mo go nna." 
Jeremiah32:41 Ee, ke tlaa ba itumelela go tla ke ba direla molemo, ke tlaa ba tlhoma mo lefatsheng le ruri ka pelo yotlhe ya me, le ka mowa otlhe wa me.”" 
Jeremiah32:42 Gonne Jehofa o bua jaana, a re: “Fela jaaka ke lerile bosula jotlhe jo mo bathong ba, fela jalo ke tlaa lere mo go bone molemo otlhe o ke o ba solofeditseng." 
Jeremiah32:43 Matlhagare a tlaa rekwa mo lefatsheng, le, le lo buang ka ga lone, lo re: Le swafetse, ga le na motho le fa e le kgomo; le tsentswe mo seatleng sa Bakalatea." 
Jeremiah32:44 Batho ba tlaa reka matlhagare ka madi, ba tlaa kwala dikwalo tsa tlhomamiso, ba di baya sekano, ba bitsa basupi, mo lefatsheng la Benjamine, le mo mafelong a a mo tikologong ya Jerusalema, le mo metseng ya Juta, le mo metseng ya lefatshe la makgabana, le mo metseng ya kwa sekhuting, le mo metseng ya Borwa; gonne ke tlaa dira gore botshwaro jwa bone bo bowe,” go bua Jehofa." 
Jeremiah33:1 Gape lefoko la Jehofa la tla mo go Jeremia lwa bobedi, a sa ntse a tswaletswe mo lwapeng lwa balebedi, la re:" 
Jeremiah33:2 “Go bua jaana Jehofa yo o dirang se, Jehofa yo o se bopang go tla a se tlhomamisa, Jehofa ke leina la gagwe." 
Jeremiah33:3 Mpitsa, mme ke tlaa go araba, ke go supetsa dilo tse dikgolo, le tse di thata tse o sa di itseng." 
Jeremiah33:4 Gonne Jehofa, Modimo wa Iseraele, o bua jaana, a re: Ka ga matlo a motse o, le ka ga matlo a dikgosi tsa Juta, a a rutlilweng go tla ba dira ka one dikago tsa go tilela ba dimota tsa ntwa le ba tšhaka." 
Jeremiah33:5 Ba tla go tlhabana le Bakalatea, e be e le go di tlatsa ditoto tsa batho, ba ke ba bolaileng mo bogaleng jwa me, le mo tšararegong ya me, le ba ke subetseng motse o sefatlhogo sa me, ka ntlha ya boikepo jotlhe jwa bone." 
Jeremiah33:6 “Bona, ke tlaa o leretse go fola le phodiso, le bone ke tlaa ba fodisa; mme ke tlaa ba senolela letlotlo la kagiso le boammaruri." 
Jeremiah33:7 Ke tlaa busa botshwaro jwa Juta le botshwaro jwa Iseraele, mme ke tlaa ba aga, jaaka ga ntlha." 
Jeremiah33:8 Ke tlaa ba ntlafatsa mo boikepong jotlhe jwa bone, jo ba nteofetseng ka jone; ke tlaa ba itshwarela maikepo otlhe a bone, a ba nteofetseng ka one, le a ba ntloletseng ka one." 
Jeremiah33:9 Motse o, o tlaa nna mo go nna leina la boitumelo, le pako le kgalalelo, fa pele ga merafe yotlhe ya lefatshe, e e tlaa utlwelang molemo otlhe o ke o ba direlang, e e tlaa boifang e ba e roromela molemo otlhe le kagiso yotlhe e ke e ba direlang.”" 
Jeremiah33:10 Jehofa o bua jaana, a re: “Gape mo felong fa lo buang ka ga gone lo re: ‘Go kgakgabetse, go se na motho, go se na kgomo,’ e bong mo metseng ya Juta le mo mebileng ya Jerusalema, e e swafetseng, e se na motho, e se na monni, e se na kgomo;" 
Jeremiah33:11 go tlaa ba go utlwala teng modumo wa boitumelo le modumo wa boipelo, lentswe la monyadi le lentswe la monyadwi, le lentswe la ba ba reng: “ ‘Bakang Jehofa wa masomosomo, gonne Jehofa wa molemo, gonne boutlwelobotlhoko jwa gagwe bo eme ka bosakhutleng’; “le modumo wa ba ba lereng ditlhabelo tsa tebogo mo ntlong ya ga Jehofa. Gonne ke tlaa busa botshwaro jwa lefatshe jaaka ga ntlha, go bua Jehofa." 
Jeremiah33:12 “Jehofa wa masomosomo o bua jaana, a re: Gape go tlaa ba go nna mo felong fa go kgakgabetseng, go se na motho go se na kgomo, le mo metseng yotlhe ya teng, go tlaa nama go nna boago jwa badisa ba ba bothisang matsomane a bone teng." 
Jeremiah33:13 Mo metseng ya lefatshe la makgabana, le mo metseng ya kwa sekhuting, le mo metseng ya Borwa, le mo lefatsheng la Benjamine, le mo mafelong a a mo tikologong ya Jerusalema, le mo metseng ya Juta, matsomane a tlaa ba a feta ka fa tlase ga diatla tsa yo o a balang, go bua Jehofa." 
Jeremiah33:14 “Bonang metlha e etla,” go bua Jehofa, “e ke tlaa dirafatsang ka yone lefoko le le molemo leo, le ke le buileng ka ga ntlo ya Iseraele le ka ga ntlo ya Juta." 
Jeremiah33:15 “Mo metlheng eo, le ka lobaka loo, ke tlaa tlhogisetsa Dafite Letlhogele la tshiamo; mme o tlaa dirafatsa katlholo le tshiamo mo lefatsheng." 
Jeremiah33:16 Mo metlheng eo Juta o tlaa bolokwa, le Jerusalema o tlaa nna mo polokegong; le ke lone leina le o tlaa bidiwang ka lone, go twe, ‘Jehofa ke tshiamo ya rona.’" 
Jeremiah33:17 “Gonne Jehofa o bua jaana, a re: Dafite ga a ketla a tlhoka monna gope yo o dulang mo setulong sa bogosi sa ntlo ya Iseraele;" 
Jeremiah33:18 le gone baperesiti ba Balefi ga ba ketla ba tlhoka monna fa pele ga me yo o isang ditshupelo tse di fisiwang, le yo o fisang diromololo, le yo o dirang setlhabelo ka gale le ka gale.”" 
Jeremiah33:19 Lefoko la ga Jehofa la tla mo go Jeremia, la re:" 
Jeremiah33:20 “Jehofa o bua jaana, a re: Fa lo ka senya kgolagano ya me ya motshegare, le kgolagano ya me ya bosigo, gore go se ka ga nna motshegare le bosigo mo metlheng ya tsone;" 
Jeremiah33:21 foo le yone kgolagano ya me le Dafite motlhanka wa me, e ka senyega, a ba a tla a tlhoka ngwana wa mosimane yo o tlaa busang mo setulong sa gagwe sa bogosi; le yone kgolagano ya me le Balefi ba baperesiti, badiredi ba me." 
Jeremiah33:22 Jaaka bontsintsi jwa legodimo bo sa kake jwa balwa, le fa e le mošawa wa lewatle go lekanngwa; ke tlaa ntsifatsa losika lwa ga Dafite motlhanka wa me jalo, le Balefi ba ba ntirelang.”" 
Jeremiah33:23 Lefoko la ga Jehofa la tla mo go Jeremia, la re:" 
Jeremiah33:24 “A ga o akanye se batho ba, ba se buileng, ba re: ‘Ditshika tse pedi tse Jehofa o kileng a di itshenkela, o di latlhile?’ Boo ba nyatsa batho ba me jalo, gore ba se ka ba tlhola ba nna morafe fa pele ga bone." 
Jeremiah33:25 Jehofa o bua jaana, a re: Fa kgolagano ya me ya motshegare le ya bosigo e sa eme, fa ke sa tlhoma melao ya legodimo le lefatshe;" 
Jeremiah33:26 foo le gone ke tlaa latlha losika lwa ga Jakobe, le lwa ga Dafite motlhanka wa me, ke ba ke tla ke gana go tsaya ba losika lwa gagwe go nna babusi ba losika lwa ga Aberahame, le Isake, le Jakobe; gonne ke tlaa dira gore botshwaro jwa bone bo busiwe, mme ke tlaa ba utlwela botlhoko.”" 
Jeremiah34:1 Lefoko le le tsileng mo go Jeremia le tswa kwa go Jehofa, jale ka Nebukatenesare kgosi ya Babilone, le ntwa yotlhe ya gagwe, le magosi otlhe a lefatshe a a mo taolong ya gagwe, le ditšhaba tsotlhe di tla go tlhasela Jerusalema, le metse yotlhe ya gone, la re:" 
Jeremiah34:2 “Jehofa Modimo wa Iseraele o bua jaana, a re: Ya o bue le Setekia kgosi ya Juta, mme o mo reye o re: ‘Jehofa o bua jaana, a re: Bona, ke tlaa tsenya motse o mo seatleng sa kgosi ya Babilone, mme e tlaa o fisa ka molelo." 
Jeremiah34:3 Ga o ketla o falola mo seatleng sa yone, o tlaa tshwarwa ruri o tsenngwa mo seatleng sa yone; matlho a gago a tlaa leba matlho a kgosi ya Babilone, lo tlaa buisanya ka melomo, mme o tlaa ya kwa Babilone.’" 
Jeremiah34:4 Le fa go ntse jalo utlwa lefoko la ga Jehofa, wena Setekia kgosi ya Juta: Jehofa o bua jaana ka ga gago, a re: Ga o ketla o swa ka tšhaka;" 
Jeremiah34:5 o tlaa swela mo kagisong; le ka diphisetso tsa borraago, e bong dikgosi tsa pele tse di ne di le pele ga gago, batho ba tlaa go direla diphisetso jalo; ba tlaa go hutsafalela, ba re: ‘Ija we, morena!’ Gonne ke buile lefoko, go bua Jehofa.”" 
Jeremiah34:6 Foo moperofeti Jeremia a bua mafoko a otlhe le Setekia kgosi ya Juta mo Jerusalema. 
Jeremiah34:7 Jale ka ntwa ya kgosi ya Babilone e tlhasela Jerusalema, le metse yotlhe ya Juta e e neng e setse, e bong Lakiše le Aseka; gonne go ne go setse yone e le yosi fela ya metse ya Juta e e thekeleditsweng." 
Jeremiah34:8 Lefoko le le tsileng mo go Jeremia le tswa kwa go Jehofa, morago ga kgosi Setekia a sena go dira kgolagano le batho botlhe ba ba mo Jerusalema, ya go ba kuela kgololesego;" 
Jeremiah34:9 gore motho mongwe le mongwe a golole motlhanka wa gagwe, le lelata la gagwe, e le wa Mohebere wa monna, kgotsa Mohebere wa mosadi; gore ope a se ka a itirela ka bone, e bong ka Mojuta wa ngwana a rraagwe." 
Jeremiah34:10 Mme dikgosana tsotlhe le batho botlhe ba utlwa, e bong ba ba tsenyeng mo kgolaganong eo, gore mongwe le mongwe a golole motlhanka wa gagwe, le mongwe le mongwe a golole lelata la gagwe, gore ope a se ka a tlhola a itirela ka bone; ba utlwa mme ba ba lesa ba tsamaya." 
Jeremiah34:11 Morago ga mo ba menoga, ba busa batlhanka bao, le malata ao, ba ba neng ba ba lesitse ba gololesegile, ba ba patikela go nna batlhanka le malata gape." 
Jeremiah34:12 Ke gone ka moo lefoko la ga Jehofa la tla mo go Jeremia le tswa kwa go Jehofa, la re:" 
Jeremiah34:13 “Jehofa, Modimo wa Iseraele o bua jaana, a re: Nkile ka dira kgolagano le borraeno mo motlheng o ke ba ntshitseng ka one kwa lefatsheng la Egepeto, mo ntlong ya botlhanka, ka re:" 
Jeremiah34:14 ‘E tle e re go fetile dinyaga di supa, a mongwe le mongwe wa lona a golole ngwana a rraagwe yo e leng Mohebere, yo o rekisitsweng mo go ene, mme a mo diretse ka dinyaga di le thataro, a a mo lese a tswe mo go ene’; mme borraeno ga ba a ka ba ntheetsa, le fa e le go sekega tsebe." 
Jeremiah34:15 Mme gompieno lo ne lo sokologile, lo ne lo dirile se se siameng mo matlhong a me, ka go re mongwe le mongwe o ne a kuile kgololesego ya wa ga gabo; lo ne lo dirile kgolagano fa pele ga me, mo ntlong e e bidiwang ka leina la me." 
Jeremiah34:16 Lo bile lo menogile, lo tlhapaditse leina la me, mongwe le mongwe o busitse motlhanka wa gagwe le lelata la gagwe, ba lo neng lo ba lesitse ba gololesegile ka fa ba ratileng ka gone; lo ba patiketse go nna batlhanka le malata gape mo go lona.”" 
Jeremiah34:17 Ke gone ka moo Jehofa o bua jaana, a re: “Ga lo a ka lwa ntheetsa, go kuela mongwe le mongwe ngwana a rraagwe kgololesego, le mongwe le mongwe wa ga gabo kgololesego; bonang, go bua Jehofa, ke lo kuela kgololesego ya tšhaka, le kgogodi le popamo; ke tlaa lo akgaakgela mo magosing otlhe a lefatshe." 
Jeremiah34:18 Banna ba ba tlodileng kgolagano ya me, ba ba se kang ba dirafatsa mafoko a kgolagano e ba e dirileng fa pele ga me, jale ka ba fatola namane, mme ba ralala gare ga mefama ya yone;" 
Jeremiah34:19 dikgosana tsa Juta le dikgosana tsa Jerusalema, baopafadiwa le baperesiti, le batho botlhe ba lefatshe ba ba raletseng gare ga mefama ya namane;" 
Jeremiah34:20 batho bao, ke tlaa ba tsenya mo seatleng sa baba ba bone, le mo seatleng sa ba ba senkang botshelo jwa bone. Ditoto tsa bone di tlaa nna dijo tsa dinonyane tsa legodimo, le tsa dibatana tsa lefatshe." 
Jeremiah34:21 Setekia kgosi ya Juta le dikgosana tsa ga gabo ke tlaa ba tsenya mo seatleng sa baba ba bone, le mo seatleng sa ba ba senkang botshelo jwa bone, le mo seatleng sa ntwa ya kgosi ya Babilone, ba ba tlogileng mo go lona." 
Jeremiah34:22 Bonang, go bua Jehofa, ke tlaa laola, mme ke tlaa ba busetsa kwano motseng o; ba tlaa tlhabana nao, ba o gapa, ba o fisa ka molelo; mme ke tlaa swafatsa metse ya Juta, e nne fela e se na monni.”" 
Jeremiah35:1 Lefoko le le tsileng mo go Jeremia le tswa kwa go Jehofa, mo metlheng ya ga Jehoiakime morwa Josia, kgosi ya Juta, la re:" 
Jeremiah35:2 “Ya kwa ntlong ya Barekabe, o bue nabo, mme o ba ise mo ntlong ya ga Jehofa, mo go nngwe ya matlwana, mme o ba nose bojalwa jwa mofine.”" 
Jeremiah35:3 Foo ka tsaya Jaasania morwa Jeremia, morwa Habasinia, le bomorwa rraagwe le bomorwawe botlhe, le botlhe ba kgotla ya Barekabe;" 
Jeremiah35:4 ka ba isa mo ntlong ya ga Jehofa, mo ntlwaneng ya bomorwa Hanane morwa Igetalia, monna wa Modimo, e e bapileng le ntlwana ya dikgosana, fa godimo ga ntlwana ya ga Maaseia morwa Shalume, molebedi wa mojako." 
Jeremiah35:5 Ka baya dinkgwana tsa bojalwa jwa mofine le dinwelo fa pele ga bomorwa ntlo ya Barekabe, ka ba raya ka re: “Nwang bojalwa jwa mofine.”" 
Jeremiah35:6 Ba re: “Ga re nwe bojalwa jwa mofine epe; gonne Jonatabe morwa Rekabe rraetsho o ne a re laola a re: ‘Lo se ka lwa na bojalwa jwa mofine epe, lona, le fa e le bomorwaa lona ka bosakhutleng." 
Jeremiah35:7 Le gone lo se ka lwa aga ntlo le fa e le go jala peo, le fa e le go tlhoma tshimo ya mafine, le fa e le go dira le yone; mme lo age mo megopeng ka metlha yotlhe ya lona; gore lo tshele metlha e le mentsi mo lefatsheng le lo jakileng mo go lone.’" 
Jeremiah35:8 Re aketse lentswe la ga Jonatabe morwa Rekabe rraetsho, mo go tsotlhe tse o di re laetseng, ka go tlhoka le go nwa bojalwa jwa mofine bope ka metlha yotlhe ya rona, le basadi ba rona, le bana ba rona ba basimane le ba basetsana;" 
Jeremiah35:9 le fa e le go ikagela matlo a go aga mo go one; le gone ga re na tshimo ya mafine, le fa e le lotlhagare, le fa e le peo." 
Jeremiah35:10 Re ntse re agile mo megopeng fela, re ntse re utlwa, re bile re dirile ka fa go tsotlhe tse Jonatabe rraetsho o di re laoletseng." 
Jeremiah35:11 Mme ga dirala, e rile Nebukatenesare kgosi ya Babilone a tla mo lefatsheng, ra bua, ra re: ‘Ntlong, re yeng Jerusalema ka go boifa ntwa ya Bakalatea, le ka go boifa ntwa ya Basiria’; mme re ntse mo Jerusalema jalo.”" 
Jeremiah35:12 Foo lefoko la ga Jehofa la tla mo go Jeremia, la re:" 
Jeremiah35:13 “Jehofa wa masomosomo, Modimo wa Iseraele o bua jaana, a re: Ya o reye batho ba Juta le banni ba Jerusalema, o re: A ga lo ketla lo amogela thuto lo reetsa mafoko a me? Go bua Jehofa." 
Jeremiah35:14 Mafoko a ga Jonatabe morwa Rekabe, a o a laoletseng bomorwawe, a re, ba se nwe bojalwa jwa mofine, a diraditswe, mme le gompieno ga ba nwe bope, gonne ba ntse ba tshwere taolo ya ga rraabo; mme nna ke buile le lona, ke phakela ke bua; mme ga lo a ka lwa ntheetsa." 
Jeremiah35:15 Ke bile ke romile batlhanka botlhe ba me, e bong baperofeti kwa go lona, ke phakela ke ba roma, ke re: ‘A mongwe le mongwe wa lona a ke a boe mo tseleng ya gagwe e e bosula, lo bo lo siamise ditiro tsa lona, lo se ye le medimo e sele go e direla, mme lo tlaa aga mo lefatsheng le ke le neileng lona le borraeno.’ Mme ga lo a ka lwa sekega tsebe, le fa e le go ntheetsa." 
Jeremiah35:16 E re ka bomorwa Jonatabe morwa Rekabe, ba dirafaditse taolo ya ga rraabo e o e ba laoletseng, mme batho ba, ba se ka ba ntheetsa," 
Jeremiah35:17 ke gone ka moo Jehofa, Modimo wa Masomosomo, Modimo wa Iseraele o bua jaana, a re: ‘Bonang, ke tlaa tlisetsa Bajuta le banni botlhe ba Jerusalema, bosula jotlhe jo ke bo buileng ka ga bone; ka gonne ke buile nabo mme ba se ka ba utlwa; ke ba biditse, mme ba se ka ba araba.’ ”" 
Jeremiah35:18 Jeremia a raya ba ntlo ya Barekabe a re: “Jehofa wa masomosomo, Modimo wa Iseraele o bua jaana, a re: ‘E re ka lo utlwile taolo ya ga Jonatabe rraeno, lo bile lo tshegeditse dikaelo tsotlhe tsa gagwe, lo dirile ka fa go tsotlhe tse o di lo laoletseng;" 
Jeremiah35:19 ke gone ka moo Jehofa wa masomosomo, Modimo wa Iseraele o bua jaana, a re: Jonatabe morwa Rekabe ga a ketla a tlhoka monna yo o tlaa emang fa pele ga me ka bosakhutleng.’ ”" 
Jeremiah36:1 Ga dirala, ya re ka ngwaga wa bone wa ga Jehoiakime morwa Josia, kgosi ya Juta, lefoko le, la tla mo go Jeremia le tswa kwa go Jehofa, la re:" 
Jeremiah36:2 “Tsaya momeno mongwe wa lokwalo, mme o kwale mo go one mafoko otlhe a ke a buileng nao ke nyatsa Iseraele, le Juta, le merafe yotlhe, go simolola ka letsatsi le ke buileng nao ka lone, go simolola ka metlha ya ga Josia, go tla mo lobakeng lwa gompieno." 
Jeremiah36:3 E ka tla ya re gongwe ba ntlo ya Juta ba utlwele bosula jotlhe jo ke ikaeletseng go bo ba direla; gore ba bowe, mongwe le mongwe mo tseleng ya gagwe e e bosula; gore ke ba itshwarele boikepo jwa bone le boleo jwa bone.”" 
Jeremiah36:4 Foo Jeremia a bitsa Baruke morwa Neria; mme Baruke a tsaya mo molomong wa ga Jeremia mafoko otlhe a Jehofa, a o a buileng nae, a a kwala mo momenong wa lokwalo." 
Jeremiah36:5 Jeremia a laola Baruke, a re: “Ke tswaletswe; ke retelelwa ke go ya kwa ntlong ya ga Jehofa." 
Jeremiah36:6 Ke gone a go ye wena, mme o bale mafoko a ga Jehofa a a mo momenong o o o kwadileng, o a tsaya mo molomong wa me, o a bale mo ditsebeng tsa batho mo ntlong ya Jehofa, ka letsatsi la go ikitsa go ja; le gone o a bale mo ditsebeng tsa Bajuta botlhe ba ba tswang mo metseng ya bone." 
Jeremiah36:7 E ka tla ya re gongwe ba isa mekokotlelo ya bone fa pele ga Jehofa, mme ba boe mongwe le mongwe mo tseleng ya gagwe e e bosula; gonne bogale jwa ga Jehofa bo bogolo, le tšararego ya gagwe e o e buileng ka ga batho ba.”" 
Jeremiah36:8 Baruke morwa Neria a dira ka fa go tsotlhe tse Jeremia moperofeti o di mo laoletseng, a bala mo lokwalong mafoko a ga Jehofa, mo ntlong ya ga Jehofa." 
Jeremiah36:9 Jaana ga dirala, ya re ka ngwaga wa botlhano wa ga Jehoiakime morwa Josia, kgosi ya Juta, ka kgwedi e e ferang o le mongwe fela, batho botlhe ba ba mo Jerusalema, le botlhe ba ba tlang mo Jerusalema ba tswa mo metseng ya Juta, ba kua go ikitsa go ja fa pele ga Jehofa." 
Jeremiah36:10 Foo Baruke a bala mo lokwalong mafoko a ga Jeremia, a a bala mo ntlong ya ga Jehofa, mo ntlwaneng ya ga Gemaria morwa Shafane mokwadi, mo lwapeng lwa godimo, fa botsenong jwa kgoro e ntšha ya ntlo ya ga Jehofa, a a bala mo ditsebeng tsa batho botlhe." 
Jeremiah36:11 E rile Mikaia morwa Gemaria, morwa Shafane a sena go utlwa mafoko otlhe a ga Jehofa a a mo lokwalong," 
Jeremiah36:12 a fologela kwa ntlong ya kgosi, a ya mo ntlwaneng ya mokwadi, mme bonang, dikgosana tsotlhe tsa bo di dutse gone, e bong Elišama mokwadi, le Delaia morwa Shemaia, le Elenathane morwa Akebore, le Gemaria morwa Shafane, le Setekia morwa Hanania, le dikgosana tsotlhe." 
Jeremiah36:13 Foo Mikaia a ba kakanyetsa mafoko otlhe a o a utlwileng ka Baruke jaaka a bala lokwalo mo ditsebeng tsa batho. 
Jeremiah36:14 Ke gone ka moo dikgosana tsotlhe tsa roma Jehudi morwa Nethania, morwa Shelemia, morwa Kuši, kwa go Baruke, ba re: “Tsaya momeno o o badileng mo go one mo ditsebeng tsa batho, mme o tle nao.” Jalo Baruke morwa Neria a tsaya momeno, a ya nao kwa go bone." 
Jeremiah36:15 Ba mo raya, ba re: “Dula, mme o o bale mo ditsebeng tsa rona.” Jalo Baruke a o bala mo ditsebeng tsa bone." 
Jeremiah36:16 Jaana ga dirala, e rile ba sena go utlwa mafoko ao otlhe, ba retologanela ka poifo, ba raya Baruke, ba re: “Ruri mafoko otlhe a re tlaa a bolelela kgosi.”" 
Jeremiah36:17 Mme ba botsa Baruke, ba re: “A ko o re bolelele, o kwadile jang mafoko otlhe a ka molomo wa gagwe?”" 
Jeremiah36:18 Foo Baruke a ba fetola, a re: “O ne a mpolelela mafoko otlhe a ka molomo, mme ka a kwala ka enke mo Lokwalong.”" 
Jeremiah36:19 Foo dikgosana tsa raya Baruke tsa re: “Ya o iphitlhe, wena le Jeremia; go se ka ga itse ope kwa lo leng teng.”" 
Jeremiah36:20 Ba ya ba tsena kwa kgosing kwa lwapeng; ba bo ba beile momeno mo ntlwaneng ya ga Elišama mokwadi, mme ba bolela mafoko otlhe mo ditsebeng tsa kgosi." 
Jeremiah36:21 Jalo kgosi ya roma Jehudi a ya go lere momeno; a o tsaya mo ntlwaneng ya ga Elišama mokwadi, mme Jehudi a o bala mo ditsebeng tsa kgosi, le mo ditsebeng tsa dikgosana tsotlhe tse di emeng fa kgosing." 
Jeremiah36:22 Jaana kgosi ya bo e ne e dutse mo ntlong ya mariga go le kgwedi e e ferang o le mongwe fela; go ne go tuka molelo mo leiswaneng fa pele ga yone. 
Jeremiah36:23 Ga dirala, ya re Jehudi a sena go bala ditsebe di le tharo kgotsa di le nne, kgosi ya o sega ka thipana, ya o latlhela mo molelong o o mo iswaneng, ga tsamaya momeno otlhe wa jewa ke molelo o o mo iswaneng." 
Jeremiah36:24 Mme ba bo ba sa boife, le fa e le go ikgagola diaparo, le fa e le kgosi, le fa e le ope wa batlhanka ba yone ba ba utlwileng mafoko otlhe ao." 
Jeremiah36:25 Gape Elenathane le Delaia le Gemaria, ba ne ba rapetse kgosi gore e se ka ya fisa momeno; mme ya gana go ba utlwa." 
Jeremiah36:26 Kgosi ya laola Jerameele morwa kgosi, le Seraia morwa Aseriele, le Shelemia morwa Abeteele, gore ba ye go tshwara Baruke mokwadi le Jeremia moperofeti; mme Jehofa a ba fitlha." 
Jeremiah36:27 Foo lefoko la ga Jehofa la tla mo go Jeremia, kgosi e sena go fisa momeno, le mafoko a Baruke o a kwadileng ka molomo wa ga Jeremia, la re:" 
Jeremiah36:28 “Ba o tseye momeno o mongwe, o kwale mo go one mafoko otlhe a pele, a a ne a le mo momenong wa ntlha, o Jehoiakime kgosi ya Juta o o fisitseng." 
Jeremiah36:29 Ka ga Jehoiakime kgosi ya Juta, o bue, o re: ‘Jehofa o bua jaana, a re: O fisitse momeno oo, wa re: Ana o kwaletseng mo go one, wa re: Kgosi ya Babilone e tlaa tla ruri e senya lefatshe le, e ba e fedisa motho le kgomo teng?" 
Jeremiah36:30 Ke gone ka moo Jehofa o bua jaana a re, ka ga Jehoiakime kgosi ya Juta: Ga a ketla a dirana le ope yo o tlaa dulang mo setulong sa ga Dafite sa bogosi; mme setoto sa gagwe se tlaa latlhelwa kwa ntle motshegare, se nne mo mogoteng le bosigo mo serameng." 
Jeremiah36:31 Ene le losika lwa gagwe le batlhanka ba gagwe ke tlaa ba beletsa boikepo jwa bone; mo go bone, le mo banning ba Jerusalema, le mo banneng ba Juta, ke tlaa tlisa bosula jo ke bo buileng ka ga bone, mme ba se ka ba utlwa.’ ”" 
Jeremiah36:32 Foo Jeremia a tsaya momeno o mongwe, a o neela Baruke mokwadi morwa Neria; mme ene a kwala mo go one ka molomo wa ga Jeremia mafoko otlhe a lokwalo lo Jehoiakime kgosi ya Juta o lo fisitseng ka molelo; mme a okediwa ka mafoko a mangwe a le mantsi a a tshwanang nao." 
Jeremiah37:1 Setekia morwa Josia a busa e le kgosi mo boemong jwa ga Konia morwa Jehoiakime, yo Nebukateresare kgosi ya Babilone o mmeileng kgosi mo lefatsheng la Juta." 
Jeremiah37:2 Go ne go le ene, le batlhanka ba gagwe, le batho ba lefatshe; ga ba a ka ba reetsa mafoko a ga Jehofa, a o a buileng ka moperofeti Jeremia." 
Jeremiah37:3 Kgosi Setekia a roma Jehukale morwa Shelemia, le Sefania morwa Maaseia moperesiti, kwa go Jeremia moperofeti, a re: “A ko o re rapelele mo go Jehofa Modimo wa rona.”" 
Jeremiah37:4 Jaana Jeremia a bo a ntse a tsamayatsamaya mo bathong, gonne ba ne ba ise ba mo tsenye mo ntlong ya kgolegelo." 
Jeremiah37:5 Ntwa ya ga Faro e ne e bolotse kwa Egepeto; mme e rile Bakalatea ba ba tlhaselang Jerusalema ba e utlwela, ba bothologa kwa Jerusalema." 
Jeremiah37:6 Foo lefoko la ga Jehofa la tla mo go moperofeti Jeremia, la re:" 
Jeremiah37:7 “Jehofa, Modimo wa Iseraele o bua jaana, a re: Bua jaana le kgosi ya Juta, yo o lo romileng kwa go nna go tla go mpotsa; ‘Bona, ntwa ya ga Faro, e e tsileng go lo thusa, e tlaa boela kwa Egepeto, lefatshe la ga yone." 
Jeremiah37:8 Bakalatea ba tlaa tla gape, ba tlhabana le motse o; mme ba tlaa o gapa, ba o fisa ka molelo.’" 
Jeremiah37:9 Jehofa a bua jaana, a re: Lo se ka lwa itsietsa lwa re: ‘Bakalatea ba tlaa re tlogela ka mmaanete;’ gonne ga ba ketla ba tloga." 
Jeremiah37:10 Gonne le fa lo ka bo lo ne lo kgemethile ntwa yotlhe ya Bakalatea ba ba tlhabanang le lona, mme ga sala fela ba ba tlhabilweng mo go bone, le fa go ntse jalo ba ne ba tlaa nanoga, mongwe le mongwe mo mogopeng wa gagwe, ba fisa motse o ka molelo.”" 
Jeremiah37:11 Ga dirala, e rile ntwa ya Bakalatea e bothologa kwa Jerusalema ka go boifa ntwa ya ga Faro," 
Jeremiah37:12 foo Jeremia a tswa mo Jerusalema, a re o ya lefatsheng la Benjamine, a ya go amogela kabelo ya gagwe a le teng mo gare ga batho." 
Jeremiah37:13 Ya re a le fa kgorong ya Benjamine, go ne go le mogolwane wa tebelo teng, yo leina la gagwe go tweng Irija, morwa Shelemia, morwa Hanania; a tshwara Jeremia moperofeti, a re: “O ntse jaana o ngwegela kwa Bakalateeng.”" 
Jeremiah37:14 Foo Jeremia a re: “Ke maaka; ga ke ngwegele kwa Bakalateeng;” mme a se ka a mo reetsa; jalo Irija a tshwara Jeremia, a mo isa kwa dikgosaneng." 
Jeremiah37:15 Dikgosana tsa galefela Jeremia, tsa ba tsa mo itaya tsa mo tsenya mo ntlong ya kgolegelo, mo ntlong ya ga Jonathane mokwadi; gonne ba ne ba ntshitse yone ntlo ya kgolegelo." 
Jeremiah37:16 E rile Jeremia a sena go fitlha mo ntlong ya molete, le mo dingaleng tsa kgolegelo, mme Jeremia a sa bolo go nna teng malatsi a le mantsi;" 
Jeremiah37:17 foo Setekia kgosi a roma a ya go mo lere; kgosi ya mmotsa mo sephiring mo ntlong ya yone, ya re: “A go na le lefoko lengwe le le tswang kwa go Jehofa?” Jeremia a re: “Le gone.” Gape a ba a re: “O tlaa tsenngwa mo seatleng sa kgosi ya Babilone.”" 
Jeremiah37:18 Gape Jeremia a raya kgosi Setekia, a re: “Ke go leofetse mo go eng, le fa e le batlhanka ba gago, le fa e le batho ba, fa e bo ne ne lo ntsentse mo ntlong ya kgolegelo jaana?" 
Jeremiah37:19 Ba kae jaanong baperofeti ba lona ba ba lo perofeseditseng, ba re: ‘Kgosi ya Babilone, ga e ketla e tla go tlhabana le lona, le fa e le lefatshe le’?" 
Jeremiah37:20 Jaana ke a go rapela kgosi, morena wa me, o nkutlwe; ke a go rapela, a mokokotlelo wa me o amogelwe fa pele ga gago; o se ka wa ba wa mpusetsa kwa ntlong ya ga Jonathane mokwadi, nka tla ka swela teng.”" 
Jeremiah37:21 Foo Setekia kgosi a laola, mme ba tsenya Jeremia mo lwapeng lwa balebedi, ba mo naya ka malatsi otlhe senkgwe se le sengwe fela se se tswang mo mmileng wa babesi ba senkgwe, ga tsamaya senkgwe sotlhe sa fela mo motseng. Jeremia a nna jalo mo lwapeng lwa balebedi." 
Jeremiah38:1 Shefatia morwa Matane, le Getalia morwa Pašure, le Jokale morwa Shelemia, le Pašure morwa Malakia, ba utlwa mafoko a Jeremia o a buileng le batho botlhe, a re:" 
Jeremiah38:2 “Jehofa o bua jaana, a re: Yo o nnang mo motseng o, o tlaa swa ka tšhaka, ka popamo le ka kgogodi; mme yo o tswelang kwa Bakalateeng o tlaa tshela; botshelo jwa gagwe bo tlaa nna mo go ene kgapo ya gagwe, mme o tlaa tshela." 
Jeremiah38:3 Jehofa o bua jaana, a re: ‘Ruri motse o, o tlaa tsenngwa mo seatleng sa ntwa ya kgosi ya Babilone, mme o tlaa o gapa.’ ”" 
Jeremiah38:4 Foo dikgosana tsa raya kgosi tsa re: “Re a go rapela, a monna yo a bolawe; ka a repisa mabogo a batlhabani ba ba setseng mo motseng o, le mabogo a batho botlhe, ka a bua mafoko a a ntseng jaana nabo; ka go bo monna yo, ga a batle tlhogonolofalo ya batho ba, fa e se kutlwisobotlhoko fela.”" 
Jeremiah38:5 Setekia kgosi, a re: “Bonang, o mo seatleng sa lona; gonne kgosi ga se ene yo o ka dirang sengwe se lo sa se rateng.”" 
Jeremiah38:6 Foo ba tsaya Jeremia, ba mo latlhela mo moleteng wa ga Malakia morwa kgosi, e le molete o o mo lwapeng lwa balebedi; ba folosa Jeremia ka megala. Mo moleteng go ne go se na metsi fa e se loraga fela; Jeremia a roromela mo lorageng." 
Jeremiah38:7 Jaana e rile Ebete-meleke wa Moethiopia, e le moopafadiwa yo o ne a le mo ntlong ya kgosi, a utlwa fa ba tsentse Jeremia mo moleteng; kgosi yone e dutse fa kgorong ya Benjamine;" 
Jeremiah38:8 Ebete-meleke a tswa mo ntlong ya kgosi a ya a bua le kgosi, a re:" 
Jeremiah38:9 “Kgosi, morena wa me, banna bao ba dirile bosula mo go tsotlhe tse ba di diretseng Jeremia moperofeti; yo ba mo latlhetseng mo moleteng; o ka tla a swela mo felong kwa o gone ka ntlha ya tlala; gonne ga go tlhole go na le dijo mo motseng.”" 
Jeremiah38:10 Foo kgosi ya laola Ebete-meleke wa Moethiopia, ya re: “Tsaya fano banna ba le 30, o ye o ntshe Jeremia moperofeti mo moleteng a ise a swe.”" 
Jeremiah38:11 Jalo Ebete-meleke a tsaya banna bao, a ya a tsena mo ntlong ya kgosi fa tlase ga ntlo ya dikhumo, a tsaya teng dikatana tse di latlhilweng, le diaparo tse di dibodu, a di folosetsa kwa go Jeremia mo moleteng ka megala." 
Jeremiah38:12 Jalo Ebete-meleke wa Moethiopia a raya Jeremia a re: “A ko o ithathelele dikatana tse, le diaparo tse di dibodu mo magwafeng a gago fa tlase ga megala.” Jeremia a dira jalo." 
Jeremiah38:13 Jalo ba goga Jeremia ka megala, ba mo ntsha mo moleteng; Jeremia a sala a le mo lwapeng lwa balebedi." 
Jeremiah38:14 Foo Setekia kgosi a roma a ya go tlisa Jeremia moperofeti kwa go ene, kwa botsenong jwa boraro jo bo mo ntlong ya ga Jehofa; kgosi ya raya Jeremia ya re: “Ke tlaa go botsa sengwe; o se ka wa ntobela sepe.”" 
Jeremiah38:15 Foo Jeremia a raya Setekia a re: “Fa ke se go bolelela, a jaana ga o tlaa mpolaela ruri? Le gone fa ke go gakolola, ga o ketla o ntheetsa.”" 
Jeremiah38:16 Jalo Setekia kgosi a ikanela Jeremia mo sephiring, a re: “Jaaka Jehofa a tshedile, yo o re dirileng mowa o, ga nketla ke go bolaya, le gone ga nketla ke go tsenya mo seatleng sa banna ba, ba ba senkang botshelo jwa gago.”" 
Jeremiah38:17 Foo Jeremia a raya Setekia a re: “Jehofa, Modimo wa masomosomo, Modimo wa Iseraele o bua jaana, a re: ‘Fa o tswela kwa dikgosaneng tsa kgosi ya Babilone, foo mowa wa gago o tlaa tshela, mme motse o, ga o ketla o fisiwa ka molelo; o tlaa tshela le ba ntlo ya gago." 
Jeremiah38:18 Mme fa o gana go tswela kwa dikgosaneng tsa kgosi ya Babilone, foo motse o, o tlaa tsenngwa mo seatleng sa Bakalatea; ba tlaa o fisa ka molelo, mme ga o ketla o falola mo seatleng sa bone.’ ”" 
Jeremiah38:19 Setekia kgosi a raya Jeremia, a re: “Ke boifa Bajuta ba ba ngwegetseng kwa Bakalateeng, ba ka tla ba ntsenya mo seatleng sa bone, mme ba ntshotla.”" 
Jeremiah38:20 Jeremia, a re: “Ga ba ketla ba go tsenya. Ke a go rapela, a ko o utlwe fela lentswe la ga Jehofa, mo go se ke se buang nao; jalo go tlaa nna molemo mo go wena, le mowa wa gago o tlaa tshela." 
Jeremiah38:21 Fa o gana go tswa, le ke lone lefoko le Jehofa o le ntshupeditseng:" 
Jeremiah38:22 Bona, basadi botlhe ba ba setseng mo ntlong ya kgosi ya Juta, ba tlaa ntshediwa kwa dikgosaneng tsa kgosi ya Babilone, mme basadi bao ba tlaa bua ba re: “ ‘Ditsala tsa gago tse dikgolo di go forile, di go fentse; jaanong ka dinao tsa gago di rorometse mo lorageng, ditsala di go fularetse.’" 
Jeremiah38:23 “Ba tlaa ntshetsa Bakalatea basadi botlhe ba gago, le bana ba gago; ga o ketla o falola mo seatleng sa bone, mme o tlaa tshwarwa ka letsogo ke kgosi ya Babilone; mme o tlaa bo o ba fisisa motse o ka molelo.”" 
Jeremiah38:24 Foo Setekia a raya Jeremia, a re: “A go se itse ope ka ga mafoko a, mme ga o ketla oo swa." 
Jeremiah38:25 Fa dikgosana di utlwa fa ke buile nao, di tlaa tla mo go wena di go raya di re: ‘A ko o re bolelele se o se buileng le kgosi; o se ka wa se re lobela, ga re ketla re go bolaya; le se kgosi e se buileng nao o se re bolelele.’" 
Jeremiah38:26 Foo o di reye, o re: ‘Ke isitse mokokotlelo wa me fa pele ga kgosi, gore e se ka ya mpusetsa kwa ntlong ya ga Jonathane ka ya go swela teng.’ ”" 
Jeremiah38:27 Foo dikgosana tsotlhe tsa tla mo go Jeremia tsa mmotsa; mme a di bolelela ka fa mafokong otlhe a kgosi e a laotseng. Mme tsa khutla go bua nae, gonne selo seo se ne se sa lemogwa." 
Jeremiah38:28 Jalo Jeremia a nna mo lwapeng lwa balebedi go ya go fitlha mo tsatsing le Jerusalema o gapilweng ka lone. 
Jeremiah39:1 Ga dirala, e rile Jerusalema o gapiwa (ka ngwaga o o ferang o le monge fela wa ga Setekia kgosi ya Juta, ka kgwedi ya lesome, Nebukatenesare kgosi ya Babilone a tla, a na le ntwa yotlhe ya gagwe, a tla go tlhabana le Jerusalema, mme a fitlha a o tlhasela;" 
Jeremiah39:2 ka ngwaga wa 11 wa ga Setekia, ka kgwedi ya bone, ka letsatsi le le ferang o le mongwe fela la kgwedi, ga phunngwa phatlha mo motseng;)" 
Jeremiah39:3 dikgosana tsotlhe tsa kgosi ya Babilone tsa tsena, tsa dula mo kgorong ya fa gare, e bong Neregale-šaresere, le Samegare-nebo, le Saresekime, le Rabe-sarise, le Neregale-šaresere, le Rabe-mage, ba na le dikgosana tsotlhe tse dingwe tsa kgosi ya Babilone." 
Jeremiah39:4 Ga dirala e rile Setekia kgosi ya Juta le batlhabani botlhe ba ba bona, foo ba tshaba, ba tswa mo motseng bosigo, ka tsela ya tshimo ya kgosi, ka kgoro e e fa gare ga dithako tse pedi; mme a tswa ka tsela ya Araba." 
Jeremiah39:5 Ntwa ya Bakalatea ya ba konatelela, ya tshwara Setekia mo dipaleng tsa Jeriko; ya re ba sena go mo tshwara, ba mo isa kwa go Nebukatenesare kgosi ya Babilone, kwa Ribela mo lefatsheng la Hamathe, mme a atlhola ka ga gagwe." 
Jeremiah39:6 Foo kgosi ya Babilone ya bolaya bomorwa Setekia mo Ribela fa pele ga matlho a gagwe; gape kgosi ya Babilone ya bolaya bagolwane botlhe ba Juta. 
Jeremiah39:7 Gape a gonya Setekia matlho, a mo golega ka mehiri go tla a mo isa kwa Babilone." 
Jeremiah39:8 Bakalatea ba fisa ntlo ya kgosi ka molelo, le matlo a batho, ba ba ba thuba dithako tsa Jerusalema." 
Jeremiah39:9 Foo Nebusaratane, molaodi wa balebedi, a isa kgolegong kwa Babilone masalela a batho ba ba setseng mo motseng, le bangwegi ba ba ngwegetseng kwa go ene, le masalela a batho ba ba setseng." 
Jeremiah39:10 Nebusaratane, molaodi wa balebedi, a tlogela bahumanegi ba batho, ba ba se nang sepe mo lefatsheng la Juta, a ba naya masimo a mafine, le matlhagare ka lone lobaka loo." 
Jeremiah39:11 Jaana Nebukatenesare, kgosi ya Babilone, a laela Nebusaratane mogolwane wa balebedi ka ga Jeremia, a re:" 
Jeremiah39:12 “Mo tseye o mo dise sentle, o se ka wa mo utlwisa botlhoko; o mo direle fela ka fa o tlaa go rayang ka gone.”" 
Jeremiah39:13 Jalo Nebusaratane, molaodi wa balebedi a roma, le Nebušasebane, le Rabesarise, le Neregale-šaresere, le Rabemage, le balaodisiwa botlhe ba bagolwane ba kgosi ya Babilone;" 
Jeremiah39:14 ba roma, ba ntsha Jeremia mo lwapeng lwa balebedi, mme ba mo neela Getalia morwa Ahikame, morwa Shafane, gore a mo ise kwa gae; jalo a aga mo bathong." 
Jeremiah39:15 Jaana lefoko la Jehofa la tla mo go Jeremia jale, ka a sa ntse a tswaletswe mo lwapeng lwa balebedi, la re:" 
Jeremiah39:16 “Ya o bue le Ebete-meleke wa Moethiopia o re: ‘Jehofa wa masomosomo, Modimo wa Iseraele o bua jaana, a re: Bona ke tlaa dirafatsa mafoko a me mo motseng o ka bosula, e seng ka molemo; mme a tlaa dirafadiwa fa pele ga gago ka tsatsi leo." 
Jeremiah39:17 Wena ke tlaa go golola ka tsatsi leo, go bua Jehofa; ga o ketla o tsenngwa mo seatleng sa banna ba o ba boifang." 
Jeremiah39:18 Gonne ruri ke tlaa go boloka, ga o ketla o wa ka tšhaka, botshelo jwa gago bo tlaa nna mo go wena kgapo ya gago; ka o ikantse mo go nna,’ ” go bua Jehofa." 
Jeremiah40:1 Lefoko le le tsileng mo go Jeremia le tswa kwa go Jehofa, Nebusaratane molaodi wa balebedi a sena go mo golola kwa Rama, jale ka a ne a mo tshotse a golegilwe ka diketana, a na le batshwarwa botlhe ba Jerusalema le ba Juta, ba ba isiwang botshwarong kwa Babilone." 
Jeremiah40:2 Molaodi wa balebedi a tsaya Jeremia a mo raya a re: “Jehofa Modimo wa gago o boletse bosula jo ka ga felo fano. 
Jeremiah40:3 Jehofa o bo lerile; o dirile jaaka a buile; ka gonne lo leofetse Jehofa, mme lwa se ka lwa reetsa lentswe la gagwe, ke gone ka moo selo se se tsileng mo go lona." 
Jeremiah40:4 Jaana bona, ke go golola gompieno mo diketaneng tse di mo letsogong la gago. Fa go le molemo mo matlhong a gago go ya le nna kwa Babilone, a re tsamaye, ke tlaa go disa sentle; mme fa go le bosula mo matlhong a gago go ya le nna kwa Babilone, gana fela; bona lefatshe lotlhe le fa pele ga gago; kwa go leng molemo le tshiamo mo matlhong a gago go ya gone, ya teng fela.”" 
Jeremiah40:5 Jaana e rile a ise a boe, molaodi wa balebedi a mo raya a re: “Ee, boela kwa go Getalia morwa Ahikame, morwa Shafane, yo kgosi ya Babilone e mmeileng molaodisiwa wa metse ya Juta, mme o nne nae mo gare ga batho; kgotsa o ka ya fela kwa go leng tshiamo mo matlhong a gago go ya teng.” Jalo molaodi wa balebedi a mo naya mefago le dineo, mme a mo lesa a tsamaya." 
Jeremiah40:6 Foo Jeremia a ya kwa go Getalia morwa Ahikame kwa Misepa, mme a aga nae mo gare ga batho ba ba tlogetsweng mo lefatsheng." 
Jeremiah40:7 Jaana e rile balaodi botlhe ba mephato e e mo nageng, e bong bone le batho ba bone, ba utlwa fa kgosi ya Babilone e beile Getalia morwa Ahikame molaodi mo lefatsheng, mme a mo neetse banna, le basadi, le banyana, le ba ba humanegileng bogolo ba lefatshe, e bong bone ba ba sa isiwang e le ditshwarwa kwa Babilone;" 
Jeremiah40:8 foo ba tla mo go Getalia kwa Misepa, e bong Išemaele morwa Nethania, le Johanane le Jonathane bomorwa Karea, le Seraia morwa Tanehumethe, le bomorwa Efai wa Monetofathe, le Jesania morwa motho wa Momaakathe, bone ba na le banna ba bone." 
Jeremiah40:9 Mme Getalia morwa Ahikame morwa Shafane a ba ikanela le banna ba bone, a re: “Lo se ka lwa boifa go direla Bakalatea; agang mo lefatsheng, mme lo direle kgosi ya Babilone, mme go tlaa nna molemo mo go lona." 
Jeremiah40:10 Ka ga me, bonang, ke agile mo Misepa, go ema fa pele ga Bakalatea ba ba tlaa tlang mo go rona: mme lona, phuthang bojalwa jwa mofine, le maungo a letlhabula, le lookwane, lo di tsenye mo dilwaneng tsa lona, mme lo age mo metseng e lo e gapileng.”" 
Jeremiah40:11 Gape le BaJuta botlhe ba ba kwa Moabe, le kwa baneng ba Moabe, le kwa Etome, le ba ba mo mafatsheng otlhe, e rile ba utlwa fa kgosi ya Babilone e tlogetse masalela mangwe a Juta, e bile e ba tsentse mo taolong ya ga Getalia morwa Ahikame, morwa Shafane;" 
Jeremiah40:12 foo Bajuta botlhe ba boa kwa mafelong otlhe kwa ba leleketsweng teng, ba tla mo go Getalia mo lefatsheng la Juta, kwa Misepa, mme ba phutha bojalwa jwa mofine le maungo a letlhabula go le gotona thata." 
Jeremiah40:13 Gape Johanane morwa Karea, le balaodi botlhe ba mephato e e mo nageng, ba tlaa mo go Getalia kwa Misepa, ba mo raya ba re:" 
Jeremiah40:14 “A o a itse fa Baalise kgosi ya bana ba Amone a romile Išemaele morwa Nethania go tla go go bolaya?” Getalia morwa Ahikame a se ka a ba dumela. 
Jeremiah40:15 Foo Johanane morwa Karea a bua le Getalia mo sephiring a re: “Ke a go rapela, mma ke tsamaye, mme ke tlaa ya ke bolaya Išemaele morwa Nethania, mme ga go ketla go itse motho ope; ana o ka bo a go bolaelang, mme Bajuta botlhe ba ba phuthegetseng mo go wena ba faladiwa, le masalela a Juta a nyelela?”" 
Jeremiah40:16 Getalia morwa Ahikame a raya Johanane morwa Karea a re: “O se ka wa dira selo se; gonne o pateletsa Išemaele.” 
Jeremiah41:1 Ga dirala e rile ka kgwedi ya bosupa, Išemaele morwa Nethania, morwa Elišame wa losika lwa segosi, e bile e le mongwe wa balaodisiwa ba bagolo ba kgosi, a na le banna ba le some, a tla mo go Getalia morwa Ahikame kwa Misepa, mme ba ja mmogo teng mo Misepa." 
Jeremiah41:2 Foo ga nanoga Išemaele morwa Nethania, le banna ba ba some ba ba nang nae, mme ba itaya Getalia morwa Ahikame morwa Shafane ka tšhaka, ba mmolaya, ene yo kgosi ya Babilone e mmeileng molaodisiwa mo lefatsheng." 
Jeremiah41:3 Le gone Išemaele a bolaya Bajuta botlhe ba ba nang nae, ke go re ba ba nang le Getalia mo Misepa, le Bakalatea ba ba fitlhelwang teng, e bong batlhabani." 
Jeremiah41:4 Ga dirala ya re ka letsatsi la bobedi a sena go bolaya Getalia, mme ope a sa go itse," 
Jeremiah41:5 ga tla bangwe ba ba tswang kwa Shekeme, le kwa Shilo, le kwa Samaria, e bong batho ba ba 80 ba ipeotse ditedu ba ikgagotse diaparo, ba itshegakile, ba tla ba tshotse diromololo le maswalo a lebano, ba tla go di isa kwa ntlong ya ga Jehofa." 
Jeremiah41:6 Išemaele morwa Nethania a tswa mo Misepa a ya go ba kgatlhantsha, a tla a lela; mme ga dirala ya re a kgatlhana nabo a ba raya a re: “Tlang kwa go Getalia morwa Ahikame.”" 
Jeremiah41:7 Ga dirala e rile ba fitlha mo gare ga motse, Išemaele morwa Nethania a ba bolaya ka tšhaka, a ba latlhela mo teng ga molete, ene le banna ba o nang nabo." 
Jeremiah41:8 Mme ga fitlhelwa mo go bone banna ba le some, mme ba raya Išemaele ba re: “O se ka wa re bolaya, gonne re na le dithoto tse di fitlhilweng mo nageng, tsa mabele, tsa barele, tsa lookwane le tsa dinotshe.” Mme a ithiba, a se ka a ba bolaela mo go ba ga gabo." 
Jeremiah41:9 Jaana molete o Išemaele o latlhetseng mo go one ditoto tsa batho ba o ba bolaetseng fa go Getalia, (ke one o Asa kgosi o kileng a o dira ka go boifa Baaša kgosi ya Iseraele), Išemaele morwa Nethania a o katela ka bone ba ba bolailweng." 
Jeremiah41:10 Foo Išemaele a tlosa masalela otlhe a batho ba ba mo Misepa e le ditshwarwa, e bong bomorwadia kgosi, le batho botlhe ba ba setseng mo Misepa, ba Nebusaratane molaodi wa balebedi o ne a ba neetse Getalia morwa Ahikame; Išemaele morwa Nethania a ba tlosa e le ditshwarwa, mme a tloga a re o kgabaganyetsa kwa baneng ba Amone." 
Jeremiah41:11 E rile Johanane morwa Karea, le balaodi botlhe ba mephato e o ne a na nayo ba utlwa ka ga bosula jotlhe jo Išemaele morwa Nethania o bo dirileng," 
Jeremiah41:12 foo ba tsaya banna botlhe, ba ya go tlhabana le Išemaele morwa Nethania, mme ba mo fitlhela fa metsing a magolo a a kwa Gibeone." 
Jeremiah41:13 Jaana ga dirala ya re batho botlhe ba ba nang le Išemaele ba bona Johanane morwa Karea, le balaodi botlhe ba mophato ba o nang nabo, foo ba itumela." 
Jeremiah41:14 Jalo batho botlhe ba Išemaele o ne a ba tlositse kwa Misepa e le ditshwarwa ba retologa, ba boa, ba ya kwa go Johanane morwa Karea." 
Jeremiah41:15 Mme Išemaele morwa Nethania a falola mo go Johanane a na le banna ba ba ferang mebedi, mme ba ya kwa baneng ba Amone." 
Jeremiah41:16 Foo Johanane morwa Karea, le balaodi botlhe ba mephato ba o nang nabo, ba tsaya masalela otlhe a batho ba o ba golotseng mo go Išemaele morwa Nethania, ba ba tswang kwa Misepa, morago ga a sena go bolaya Getalia morwa Ahikame, e bong batlhabani le basadi, le bana le baopafadiwa, ba o ne a ba busitse kwa Gibeone." 
Jeremiah41:17 Mme ba tloga ba ya ba aga mo Geruthe Kimehame, o o fa Betheleheme, ba re ba ya go tsena kwa Egepeto," 
Jeremiah41:18 ka ntlha ya Bakalatea; gonne ba ne ba ba boifa, ka Išemaele morwa Nethania a bolaile Getalia morwa Ahikame, yo kgosi ya Babilone e ne e mmeile molaodisiwa mo lefatsheng." 
Jeremiah42:1 Foo balaodi botlhe ba mephato, le Johanane morwa Karea, le Asaria morwa Hošaia, le batho botlhe, go simolola ka ba babotlana le go ya kwa go ba bagolo, ba atamela." 
Jeremiah42:2 Ba raya Jeremia moperofeti, ba re: “Re a go rapela, a mokokotlelo wa rona o amogelwe fa pele ga gago, mme o re rapelele Jehofa Modimo wa gago, e bong masalela a otlhe; gonne re tlogetswe ke bontsi, re setse re le bannye jaaka matlho a gago a re bona," 
Jeremiah42:3 gore Jehofa Modimo wa gago o tle o re kaele tsela e re tshwanetseng go tsamaya ka yone, le selo se re tshwanetseng go se dira.”" 
Jeremiah42:4 Foo Jeremia moperofeti a ba raya a re: “Ke lo utlwile; bonang, ke tlaa rapela Jehofa Modimo wa lona ka fa mafokong a lona; mme go tlaa dirala go re, le fa e ka ne e le eng se Jehofa o tlaa lo fetolang ka sone, ke tlaa se lo bolelela; ga nketla ke lo lobela sepe.”" 
Jeremiah42:5 Foo ba raya Jeremia ba re: “A Jehofa a nne mosupi yo o boammaaruri le boikanngo gare ga rona, fa re sa dire fela ka fa lefokong lotlhe le Jehofa Modimo wa gago o tlaa go romang kwa go rona ka lone." 
Jeremiah42:6 Le fa e ka bo e le molemo, le fa e ka bo e le bosula, re tlaa ineela fela mo lentsweng la ga Jehofa Modimo wa rona, yo re go romelang kwa go ene; gore go tle go nne molemo mo go rona, mogang re akelang lentswe la ga Jehofa Modimo wa rona.”" 
Jeremiah42:7 Ga dirala ya re malatsi a le some a sena go feta, lefoko la ga Jehofa la tla mo go Jeremia." 
Jeremiah42:8 Foo a bitsa Johanane morwa Karea, le balaodi botlhe ba mephato ba o nang nabo le batho botlhe, go simolola ka ba babotlana, go ya kwa go ba bagolo, a ba raya a re:" 
Jeremiah42:9 “Jehofa Modimo wa Iseraele, yo lo nthomileng kwa go ene go ya go baya mokokotlelo wa lona fa pele ga gagwe o bua jaana, a re:" 
Jeremiah42:10 ‘Fa lo rata lo fela lo ntse mo lefatsheng le, foo ke tlaa lo aga, mme ke se ketla ke lo rutlolola, ke tlaa lo tlhoma ke se ketla ke lo kumola; gonne ke a ikwatlhaya ka ga bosula jo ke bo lo diretseng." 
Jeremiah42:11 Lo se ka lwa boifa kgosi ya Babilone e lo e tshabang; lo se ka lwa e boifa,’ go bua Jehofa; ‘gonne ke na le lona go lo boloka, le go lo golola mo seatleng sa yone." 
Jeremiah42:12 Ke tlaa lo neela boutlwelo botlhoko, gore e tle e lo utlwele botlhoko, e dire gore lo boele mo lefatsheng la ga lona.’" 
Jeremiah42:13 “Fa lo re: ‘Ga re ketla re aga mo lefatsheng le,’ jalo lo gana go akela lentswe la ga Jehofa Modimo wa lona;" 
Jeremiah42:14 fa lo re: ‘Nnyaa; re tlaa ya kwa lefatsheng la Egepeto, kwa re se ketlang re bona ntwa epe teng, le fa e le go utlwa modumo wa lonaka teng, le fa e le go bolawa ke tlala teng; re tlaa aga teng;’" 
Jeremiah42:15 ke gone jaana utlwang lefoko la ga Jehofa, lona masalela a Juta: Jehofa wa masomosomo, Modimo wa Iseraele o bua jaana, a re: ‘Fa lo tlhometse ruri mogopolo go ya go tsena kwa Egepeto, le go ya go jaka teng," 
Jeremiah42:16 foo go tlaa dirala go re tšhaka e lo e boifang, e tlaa lo tshwara teng mo lefatsheng la Egepeto, le popamo e lo e boifang, e tlaa lo konatelela ka thata teng mo Egepeto; mme lo tlaa swela teng." 
Jeremiah42:17 Go tlaa nna jalo le banna botlhe ba ba tlhomileng mogopolo go ya kwa Egepeto, go ya go jaka teng; ba tlaa swa ka tšhaka, ka popamo le ka kgogodi; ga go na ope yo o tlaa salang le fa e le go falola mo bosuleng jo ke tlaa bo tlisang mo go bone.’" 
Jeremiah42:18 “Gonne Jehofa wa masomosomo, Modimo wa Iseraele o bua jaana, a re: ‘Jaaka bogale jwa me le tšarologo ya me di goromeleditswe mo banning ba Jerusalema, tšarologo ya me e tlaa goromelediwa mo go lona jalo, mogang lo tsenang mo Egepeto; lo tlaa nna seferosa sebete, le kgakgamatso, le phutso, le kgobo; mme felo fa ga lo ketla lo tlhola lo go bona gope.’" 
Jeremiah42:19 “Jehofa o buile ka ga lona, lona masalela a Juta, a re: ‘Lo se ka lwa ya kwa Egepeto.’ Itsetseng ruri fa ke lo supeditse gompieno." 
Jeremiah42:20 Gonne lo diretse mewa ya lona ka tsietso; gonne lo ne lwa nthoma kwa go Jehofa Modimo wa lona, lwa re: ‘O re rapelele mo go Jehofa Modimo wa rona; mme ka fa go tsotlhe tse Jehofa Modimo wa rona o tlaa di buang, o re bolelele jalo, mme re tlaa go dira.’" 
Jeremiah42:21 Ke se lo boleletse gompieno; mme ga lo a akela lentswe la ga Jehofa Modimo wa lona mo go sepe se o se nthometseng kwa go lona. 
Jeremiah42:22 Ke gone jaana, itsetseng ruri fa lo tlaa swa ka tšhaka, ka popamo, le ka kgogodi mo felong kwa lo eletsang go yo go jaka teng.”" 
Jeremiah43:1 Ga dirala e rile Jeremia a sena go wetsa go bua le batho botlhe mafoko otlhe a ga Jehofa, Modimo wa bone, a Jehofa Modimo wa bone o ne a mo romile kwa go bone ka one, e bong mafoko otlhe a," 
Jeremiah43:2 foo ga bua Asaria morwa Hošaia, le Johanane morwa Karea, le batho botlhe ba ba ikgodisang, ba raya Jeremia, ba re: “O bua maaka; Jehofa Modimo wa rona ga a a go roma go tla go bua go re: ‘Lo se ka lwa ya Egepeto go jaka teng.’" 
Jeremiah43:3 Baruke morwa Neria wa go re tlhotlheleletsa, go re tsenya mo seatleng sa Bakalatea, gore ba re bolae, le gore ba re ise kwa Babilone re le ditshwarwa fela.”" 
Jeremiah43:4 Jalo Johanane morwa Karea le balaodi botlhe ba mephato, le batho botlhe, ba se ka ba ineela mo lentsweng la ga Jehofa go aga mo lefatsheng la Juta." 
Jeremiah43:5 Mme Johanane morwa Karea, le balaodi botlhe ba mephato, ba tsaya masalela otlhe a Juta a a ne a boile kwa merafeng yotlhe kwa a ne a leleketswe teng, a tsile go jaka mo lefatsheng la Juta;" 
Jeremiah43:6 banna, basadi, banyana, le bomorwadia kgosi, le motho mongwe le mongwe yo Nebusaratane molaodi wa balebedi o ne a ba tlogetse le Getalia morwa Ahikame, morwa Shafane, le Jeremia moperofeti, le Baruke morwa Neria." 
Jeremiah43:7 Ba fitlha mo lefatsheng la Egepeto, gonne ga ba a ka ba akela lentswe la Jehofa; mme ba ya ba fitlha le kwa Tapanehese." 
Jeremiah43:8 Foo ga tla lefoko la ga Jehofa mo go Jeremia kwa Tapanehese, la re:" 
Jeremiah43:9 “Tsaya maje a matona ka seatla, o a beye mo seretseng fa go alwang makote teng, fa botsenong jwa ntlo ya ga Faro mo Tapanehese, mo ponong ya banna ba Juta;" 
Jeremiah43:10 mme o ba reye o re: ‘Jehofa wa masomosomo, Modimo wa Iseraele o bua jaana; a re: Bonang, ke tlaa roma ke ya go tsaya Nebukatenesare kgosi ya Babilone, motlhanka wa me, mme ke tlaa tlhoma setulo sa gagwe sa bogosi mo majeng a ke a beileng; mme o tlaa tsharolola mogope wa gagwe wa segosi mo godimo ga one." 
Jeremiah43:11 O tlaa tla a kgemetha lefatshe la Egepeto; ba ba laoletsweng go swa ba tlaa neelwa loso, ba ba laoletsweng botshwaro ba tlaa neelwa botshwaro, le ba ba laoletsweng tšhaka ba tlaa neelwa tšhaka." 
Jeremiah43:12 Ke tlaa gotsa molelo mo matlong a medimo ya Egepeto; mme o tlaa a fisa, ene o tlaa ba tlosa e le ditshwarwa; o tlaa ikapesa ka lefatshe la Egepeto, jaaka modisa a tle a apare kobo ya gagwe; mme o tlaa tswa teng ka kagiso." 
Jeremiah43:13 Gape o tlaa thuba ditshwantsho tse di setilweng tse di metloutlo tsa Ntlo ya letsatsi e e mo lefatsheng la Egepeto; le matlo a medimo ya Egepeto o tlaa a tshuba ka molelo.’ ” 
Jeremiah44:1 Lefoko le le tsileng mo go Jeremia ka ga Bajuta botlhe ba ba agileng mo lefatsheng la Egepeto, ba agile mo Migetole, le mo Tapanehese, le mo Nofe, le mo lefatsheng la Patherose, la re:" 
Jeremiah44:2 “Jehofa wa masomosomo, Modimo wa Iseraele o bua jaana, a re: Lo bonye bosula jotlhe jo ke bo lerileng mo Jerusalema, le mo metseng yotlhe ya Juta; bonang, gompieno ke tshwafalo fela, mme ga go a aga motho ope teng;" 
Jeremiah44:3 ka ntlha ya boikepo jwa bone, jo ba bo dirileng go ntlhotlheleletsa bogaleng, ka ba ya go fisa maswalo, le go direla medimo e sele, e bone ba sa e itseng, bone, le fa e le lona, le fa e le borraeno." 
Jeremiah44:4 Le fa go ntse jalo ka roma batlhanka botlhe ba me kwa go lona, e bong baperofeti, ke phakela ke ba roma ke re: ‘Ao! ke a lo rapela, se direng selo se se makgapha se ke se ilang.’" 
Jeremiah44:5 Mme ga ba a ka ba reetsa, le fa e le go sekega tsebe, go tla ba bowa mo boikepong jwa bone, go bakela go fisetsa medimo e sele maswalo." 
Jeremiah44:6 Ke gone ka moo tšararego ya me, le bogale jwa me jwa gorometsega, mme jwa tuka mo metseng ya Juta le mo mebileng ya Jerusalema; mme e kgakgabetse, e swafetse, jaaka go sa ntse go ntse le gompieno." 
Jeremiah44:7 “Ke gone ka moo Jehofa Modimo wa masomosomo, Modimo wa Iseraele o buang jaana, a re: Ke ka ntlha yang lo direla mewa ya lona bosula jo bogolo jo, go tlosa monna le mosadi, ngwanyana le yo o anyang, mo gare ga Juta, go tlhoka le go itshadisetsa ope;" 
Jeremiah44:8 ka lo ntlhotlheleletsa bogaleng ka ditiro tsa diatla tsa lona, lo fisetsa medimo e sele maswalo mo lefatsheng la Egepeto, kwa lo ileng go jaka teng; gore lo tlosiwe, le gore lo tle lo nne phutso le kgobo mo merafeng yotlhe ya lefatshe?" 
Jeremiah44:9 A lo lebetse boikepo jwa borraeno, le boikepo jwa dikgosi tsa Juta, le boikepo jwa lona tota, le boikepo jwa basadi ba lona, jo ba ne ba bo dirile mo lefatsheng la Juta, le mo mebileng ya Jerusalema?" 
Jeremiah44:10 Ga ba a kokobediwa le gompieno, le gone ga ba a boifa, le fa e le go sepela mo molaong wa me, le fa e le mo ditaong tsa me, tse ke di beileng fa pele ga lona le fa pele ga borraeno." 
Jeremiah44:11 “Ke gone ka moo Jehofa wa masomosomo, Modimo wa Iseraele o buang jaana, a re: Bonang, ke tlaa lo lebisa sefatlhogo sa me bosula, e bong go kgaola Bajuta botlhe." 
Jeremiah44:12 Ke tlaa tsaya masalela a Juta, ba ba tlhomileng mogopolo go ya kwa lefatsheng la Egepeto go jaka teng, mme ba tlaa nyelediwa botlhe; ba tlaa wa mo lefatsheng la Egepeto, ba tlaa nyelediwa ka tšhaka le ka popamo; ba tlaa swa, go simolola ka ba babotlana le go ya kwa go ba bagolo, ka tšhaka le ka popamo, mme ba tlaa nna seferosa sebete, le kgakgamatso, le phutso, le kgobo." 
Jeremiah44:13 Gonne ke tlaa betsa ba ba agileng mo lefatsheng la Egepeto, jaaka ke beditse Jerusalema, ka tšhaka, ka popamo le ka kgogodi." 
Jeremiah44:14 Jalo mo masaleleng a Juta a a ileng lefatsheng la Egepeto go jaka teng, ga go ketla go falola ope le fa e le go sala go tla ba boela lefatsheng la Juta, le ba nang le keletso ya go boela teng go aga teng mo go lone, gonne ga go ketla go bowa bape fa e se ba ba tlaa falolang fela.”" 
Jeremiah44:15 Foo banna botlhe ba ba itseng fa basadi ba bone ba tle ba fisetse medimo e sele maswalo, le basadi botlhe ba ba emeng teng, e le phuthego e kgolo, e bong batho botlhe ba ba agileng mo lefatsheng la Egepeto, mo Patherose, ba fetola Jeremia, ba re:" 
Jeremiah44:16 “Ka ga lefoko le o le buileng le rona ka leina la ga Jehofa, ga re ketla re go reetsa." 
Jeremiah44:17 Lefoko lengwe le lengwe le le duleng mo molomong wa rona re tlaa le dira ruri, la go fisetsa kgosi ya sesadi ya legodimo maswalo, le go e thelela ditshupelo tse di nowang, jaaka re dirile, rona le borraetsho, le dikgosi tsa rona, le dikgosana tsa rona, mo metseng ya Juta, le mo mebileng ya Jerusalema: gonne ka baka loo re ne re na le dijo tse di tletseng, mme ra tshela sentle, re sa bone bosula bope." 
Jeremiah44:18 Re sa le re bakela go fisetsa kgosi ya sesadi ya legodimo maswalo, le go e thelela ditshupelo tse di nowang, re ntse re tlhoka dilo tsotlhe, mme re ntse re nyelediwa ke tšhaka le ke popamo.”" 
Jeremiah44:19 “A e ne ya re re ntse re fisetsa kgosi ya sesadi ya legodimo maswalo re e thelela ditshupelo tse di nowang, a re kile ra e direla dinkgwenyana tse di papetla go e tshwantsha, le fa e le go e thelela ditshupelo tse di nowang re sena banna ba rona?”" 
Jeremiah44:20 Foo Jeremia a raya batho botlhe, banna le basadi, e bong batho botlhe ba ba mo fetotseng jalo, a re:" 
Jeremiah44:21 “Maswalo a lo a fisitseng mo metseng ya Juta, le mo mebileng ya Jerusalema, lona le borraeno, le dikgosi tsa lona, le dikgosana tsa lona, le batho ba lefatshe, a Jehofa ga a a di gakologelwa, mme a ga di a tsena mo pelong ya gagwe?"
