Jeremiah44:22 Ga ba ga retelela Jehofa go tlhola a itshokile, ka ntlha ya bosula jwa ditiro tsa lona, le ka ntlha ya dilo tse di makgapha tse lo di dirileng; ke gone ka moo lefatshe la lona le ntseng tshwafalo, le kgakgamatso le phutso go sena monni, jaaka go ntse gompieno." 
Jeremiah44:23 Ereka lo fisitse maswalo, le gone ka lo leofetse Jehofa, mme lo se ka lwa akela lentswe la ga Jehofa, le fa e le go sepela mo molaong wa gagwe, le fa e le mo ditaong tsa gagwe, le fa e le mo ditshupong tsa gagwe; ke gone ka moo bosula jo bo lo dirafaletseng, jaaka go ntse gompieno.”" 
Jeremiah44:24 Gape Jeremia a raya batho botlhe, le basadi botlhe, a re: “Utlwang lefoko la ga Jehofa, lona lotlhe Bajuta ba lo mo lefatsheng la Egepeto." 
Jeremiah44:25 Jehofa wa masomosomo, Modimo wa Iseraele o bua jaana, a re: Lona le basadi ba lona lo buile ka melomo lo bile lo se diraditse ka diatla tsa lona, lo re: ‘Ruri re tlaa tlhomamisa maikano a re ikanneng ka one a go fisetsa kgosi ya sesadi ya legodimo maswalo, le go e thelela ditshupelo tse di nowang.’ Ke gone, tshegetsang maikano a lona, lo bo lo tlhomamise maikano a lona." 
Jeremiah44:26 Ke gone, utlwang lefoko la ga Jehofa, lona lotlhe Bajuta ba lo agileng mo lefatsheng la Egepeto: ‘Bonang ke ikanne ka leina la me le legolo,’ go bua Jehofa, ‘go re, leina la me ga le ketla le tlhola le umakwa mo molomong wa motho ope wa Juta mo lefatsheng lotlhe la Egepeto, go re: Jaaka Jehofa a tshedile." 
Jeremiah44:27 Bonang ke ba lebela go ba direla bosula, e seng molemo; mme batho botlhe ba Juta ba ba mo lefatsheng la Egepeto ba tlaa nyelediwa ka tšhaka le ka popamo, go tsamaya ba fela." 
Jeremiah44:28 Ba ba falolang mo tšhakeng, ba tlaa bowa mo lefatsheng la Egepeto, ba boela lefatsheng la Juta ba le babotlana fela mo palong; mme masalela otlhe a Juta a a ileng lefatsheng la Egepeto go ya go jaka teng, a tlaa itse, go re, go tlaa ema lefoko la ga mang, la me, kgotsa la bone." 
Jeremiah44:29 “ ‘Mme se e tlaa nna sesupo go lona, go bua Jehofa, fa ke tlaa lo kgopholola mo felong fa, gore lo itse ruri fa mafoko a me a tlaa emalana le lona go lo direla bosula.’" 
Jeremiah44:30 Jehofa o bua jaana, a re: ‘Bonang, Faro Hofera kgosi ya Egepeto, ke tlaa mo tsenya mo seatleng sa baba ba gagwe, le mo seatleng sa ba ba batlang botshelo jwa gagwe; jaaka ke tsentse Setekia kgosi ya Juta mo seatleng sa ga Nebukatenesare kgosi ya Babilone, mmaba wa gagwe, yo o ne a batla botshelo jwa gagwe.’ ”" 
Jeremiah45:1 Lefoko le Jeremia moperofeti o le buileng le Baruke morwa Neria, jale ka a kwala mafoko a mo lokwalong, ka molomo wa ga Jeremia, ka ngwaga wa bone wa ga Jehoiakime morwa Josia kgosi ya Juta, la re:" 
Jeremiah45:2 “Jehofa Modimo wa Iseraele o bua jaana, a go raya, wena Baruke, a re:" 
Jeremiah45:3 O rile: ‘A motho wa mogolo nna! Gonne Jehofa o okeditse botlhoko jwa me ka bohutsana; ke lapile ka go fegelwa ga me, ga ke bone boikhutso bope.’" 
Jeremiah45:4 “O mo reye jaana, o re: Jehofa o bua jaana, a re: ‘Bona, se ke se agileng, ke tlaa se rutlolola, le se ke se tlhomileng ke tlaa se kumola; mme mo e tlaa bo e le ka lefatshe lotlhe fela." 
Jeremiah45:5 A o ipatlela dilo tse dikgolo? O se ka wa di batla, gonne ke tlaa tlisa bosula mo bathong botlhe, go bua Jehofa; mme botshelo jwa gago ke tlaa bo go naya gore bo nne kgapo ya gago mo mafelong otlhe kwa o yang teng.’ ”" 
Jeremiah46:1 Lefoko la ga Jehofa le le tsileng mo go Jeremia moperofeti ka ga merafe. 
Jeremiah46:2 Ka ga Egepeto; ka ga ntwa ya ga Faro Neko kgosi ya Egepeto, e e neng e le fa nokeng ya Euferatese, mo Karekemiše, e Nebukatenesare kgosi ya Babilone o e kgemethileng ka ngwaga wa bone wa ga Jehoiakime morwa Josia, kgosi ya Juta." 
Jeremiah46:3 “Baakanyang thejana le thebe, mme lo atamele go tlhabana." 
Jeremiah46:4 Golegang dipitse, palamang, lona bapalami, ikemiseng ka ditlhoro tsa phemelo tsa lona; gotlhang marumo, Aparang meitshomelo ya phemelo." 
Jeremiah46:5 Ana ke go bonye ka ntlha yang? Ba a tseanngwa, ba buseditswe kwa morago; diganka tsa bone di batantswe, mme di tshabile ka thata di sa šebe kwa morago; theregiso e mo ntlheng tsotlhe, go bua Jehofa." 
Jeremiah46:6 Yo o bofefo a a se tshabe, a seganka se se falole; ntlheng ya botsheka fa nokeng ya Euferatese ba kgopilwe ba ole." 
Jeremiah46:7 “Emang yo, yo o hohomogang jaaka Nile, e metsi a yone a itlolakisang jaaka dinoka?" 
Jeremiah46:8 Egepeto o hohomoga jaaka Nile, mme metsi a gagwe a itlolakisa jaaka dinoka; mme a re: ‘Ke tlaa nanoga, ke khurumetsa lefatshe; ke tlaa senya motse le banni ba one.’" 
Jeremiah46:9 Tlhatlogang, lona dipitse; šakgalang, lona dikara; mme a diganka tsa ntwa di tswele pele; ba Kuše le ba Pute, ba ba itseng go tshwara thebe; le Balute ba ba itseng go tshwara le go oba bora." 
Jeremiah46:10 Gonne letsatsi leo ke letsatsi lengwe la ga Jehofa, Jehofa wa masomosomo, letsatsi la tefetso, gore a tle a itefetse mo babeng ba gagwe; mme tšhaka e tlaa suputsa, e kgora, e tlaa nwa madi a bone ya kgora; gonne Jehofa, Modimo wa masomosomo o na le tlhabelo mo lefatsheng la botsheka fa nokeng ya Euferatese." 
Jeremiah46:11 “Tlhatlogela kwa Gileate, mme o tseye gone boroku jo bo alafang, wena morwadia Egepeto wa kgarebana; o nwela melemo e le mentsi lefela; ga o na go fola." 
Jeremiah46:12 Merafe e utlwetse ditlhong tsa gago, le lefatshe le tletse go goa ga gago; gonne seganka se thulakanye le seganka, di ole tsoo pedi mmogo.”" 
Jeremiah46:13 Lefoko le Jehofa o le buileng le Jeremia moperofeti, la ka fa Nebukatenesare kgosi ya Babilone o tlaa tlang ka gone a kgemetha lefatshe la Egepeto." 
Jeremiah46:14 “Bolelang mo Egepeto, lo utlwatse mo Migetole, lo bo lo utlwatse mo Nofe le mo Tapanahese, lo re: ‘Ikemise, o ipaakanye; gonne tšhaka e supuditse mo tikologong ya gago.’" 
Jeremiah46:15 Ana ba ba thata ba gago ba kgopholetswe koo ka ntlha yang? Ga ba a ka ba ema, ka gonne Jehofa o ba kgophotse." 
Jeremiah46:16 O ne a kgopisa ba le bantsi, ee, ba ne ba welana; mme ba re: ‘Nanogang, a re boeleng kwa bathong ba ga rona, le kwa lefatsheng la ga rona, re tswe mo tšhakeng e e patikang.’" 
Jeremiah46:17 Ba ne ba kua gone, ba re: ‘Faro, kgosi ya Egepeto ke modumo fela, o lesitse lobaka lo lo laotsweng lwa feta.’" 
Jeremiah46:18 “Jaaka ke tshedile, go bua Kgosi e leina la yone e leng Jehofa wa masomosomo, a re: Ruri jaaka Tabore a ntse mo gare ga dithaba, le jaaka Karemele a ntse fa lewatleng, ene o tlaa tla jalo." 
Jeremiah46:19 Wena ngwana wa mosetsana yo o agileng mo Egepeto, ipaakanye go tla o ya botshwarong; gonne Nofe o tlaa nna tshwafalo fela, o tlaa fisiwa, a tlhoka monni." 
Jeremiah46:20 “Egepeto ke kgomo ya moroba e ntle thata; mme tshenyego e e tswang ntlheng ya botsheka e tsile, e tsile." 
Jeremiah46:21 Banna ba gagwe ba ba thapilweng ka tuelo ba ntse jaaka dinamane tse di otlilweng mo gare ga gagwe; gonne le bone ba buseditswe kwa morago, ba tshabile mmogo, ga ba a ka ba ema; gonne letsatsi la tatlhego ya bone le tsile mo go bone, motlha wa tshekiso ya bone." 
Jeremiah46:22 “Mokgwasa wa one o tlaa tsamaya jaaka wa noga; gonne ba tlaa tsamaela gongwe ka ntwa, ba tlaa mo tlhasela ka dilepe, jaaka baremi ba ditlhare." 
Jeremiah46:23 Ba tlaa rema sekgwa sa gagwe, go bua Jehofa, le fa se sa kake sa hukudiwa; ka gonne ba feta tsie, ba sena palo." 
Jeremiah46:24 Morwadia Egepeto o tlaa tlhabisiwa ditlhong; o tlaa tsenngwa mo seatleng sa batho ba botsheka.” 
Jeremiah46:25 Jehofa wa masomosomo, Modimo wa Iseraele, a re: “Bonang, ke tlaa kgopholola Amone wa No, le Faro, le Egepeto, a na le medimo ya gagwe, le dikgosi tsa gagwe; e bong Faro le ba ba ikanyang mo go ene." 
Jeremiah46:26 Ke tlaa ba tsenya mo seatleng sa ba ba batlang botshelo jwa bone, le mo seatleng sa ga Nebukatenesare kgosi ya Babilone, le mo seatleng sa batlhanka ba gagwe; mme morago ga moo o tlaa nnwa jaaka mo metlheng ya bogologolo,” go bua Jehofa." 
Jeremiah46:27 “Wena Jakobe motlhanka wa me, o se ka wa boifa, se rerege, wena Iseraele; gonne bona, ke tlaa go boloka o le kwa kgakala, le ba losika lwa gago ba le kwa lefatsheng la botshwaro jwa bone. mme Jakobe o tlaa boa, mme o tlaa nna mo thagamong le mo boiketlong, mme ga go na ope yo o tlaa mmoifisang." 
Jeremiah46:28 Jakobe motlhanka wa me, o se ka wa boifa, go bua Jehofa; gonne ke na nao; gonne ke tlaa khutlisetsa ruri merafe e ke go leleketseng kwa go yone, mme wena ga nketla ke go khutlisetsa ruri; mme ke tlaa go siamisa ka tekanyo, ga nketla ke go lesa gope o sa kgopololwa.”" 
Jeremiah47:1 Lefoko la ga Jehofa le le tsileng mo go Jeremia moperofeti ka ga Bafilisitia, Faro a ise a kgemethe Gasa." 
Jeremiah47:2 Jehofa o bua jaana, a re: “Bonang, metsi a hohomoga kwa botsheka, mme a tlaa nna noka e e penologang, e tlaa penologela lefatshe le tsotlhe tse di mo go lone, motse le ba ba agileng mo go one; mme batho ba tlaa goa, le banni botlhe ba lefatshe ba tlaa bokolela." 
Jeremiah47:3 Ka ntlha ya modumo wa mesito ya ditlhako tsa dinatla tsa gagwe, le ka ntlha ya mokgwaso wa go taboga ga dikara tsa gagwe, le ka ntlha ya modumo wa maoto a gagwe a dikologa, borra bana ga ba šebele kwa baneng ba bone ka ntlha ya go repa ga mabogo;" 
Jeremiah47:4 le ka ntlha ya letsatsi le le tlang, la go thopa Bafilisitia botlhe, le go kgaola mo Ture le Sitone mothusi mongwe le mongwe yo o setseng, gonne Jehofa o tlaa thopa Bafilisitia, masalela a setlhake sa Kafetore." 
Jeremiah47:5 Logatadima lo wetse ba Gasa; Ašekelone o dirilwe bosengsepe, makhunantshana a molapo wa bone; o tlaa nna o itshegaka ka lobaka lo lo kaye?" 
Jeremiah47:6 Tshaka ya ga Jehofa we, o tlaa nna lobaka lo lo kaye o ise o tuulale? Itsenye mo kgatleng ya gago; ikhutse, mme o tuulale fela." 
Jeremiah47:7 Ana o ka tuulala jang? ka e le fa Jehofa a go neile tiro; ka fa Ašekelone, le ka fa losing lwa lewatle, o e laoletse gone.”" 
Jeremiah48:1 Ka ga Moabe. Jehofa wa masomosomo, Modimo wa Iseraele o bua jaana, a re: “A bo go latlhega Nebo! Gonne o kgakgabaditswe; Kiriathaime o tlhabisitswe ditlhong, o gapilwe; kago ya phemela e tlhabisitswe ditlhong, mme e rutlologile." 
Jeremiah48:2 Pako ya Moabe ga e tlhole e le gone; ba mo logetse maano a a bosula mo Hešebone, ba re: ‘Ntlong, re mo khutliseng mo go tlholeng a le morafe.’ Le wena, Matemene, o tlaa tuuladiwa, tšhaka e tlaa go konatelela." 
Jeremiah48:3 A modumo wa go goa mo go tswang Horonaime: ‘Go thopa le go senya mo go golo!’ 
Jeremiah48:4 Moabe o sentswe; banyana ba gagwe ba utlwaditse go goa. 
Jeremiah48:5 Gonne ba tlaa tlhatloga ka fa botlhatlogong jwa Luhithe ka selelo se se sa khutleng; gonne mo bofologong jwa Horonaime ba utlwile tlalelo ya go goa ga tshenyego. 
Jeremiah48:6 Tshabang, ipolokeng, mme lo nne jaaka logolo mo nageng." 
Jeremiah48:7 Gonne, e re ka o ikantse mo ditirong tsa gago le mo mahumong a gago, le wena o tlaa thopiwa; le Kemoše o tlaa tswa a ya botshwarong, baperesiti ba gagwe le dikgosana tsa gagwe mmogo." 
Jeremiah48:8 Mothopi o tlaa tla mo motseng mongwe le mongwe, mme ga go motse ope o o tlaa falolang; le molapo o tlaa šwa, le lobala lo tlaa senngwa; jaaka Jehofa a buile." 
Jeremiah48:9 Nayang Moabe diphuka, gore a fofe a ye koo; mme metse ya gagwe e tlaa nna tshwafalo, e sena ope yo o nnang gone." 
Jeremiah48:10 “A go hutsege ene yo o dirang tiro ya ga Jehofa a itshemeleditse, mme a go hutsege ene yo o kganelelang madi tšhaka ya gagwe.”" 
Jeremiah48:11 “Moabe o sa le a iketla ka bokau jwa gagwe, o sa le a itsheka mo dintshing tsa gagwe, ga a ka a tlhotlhwa a tswa nkgwaneng a ya nkgwaneng; ga a ka a ya botshwarong; ke gone ka moo moutlwalo wa gagwe o setse mo go ene, le monko wa gagwe ga o a fetoga." 
Jeremiah48:12 “Ke gone bonang metlha e etla,” go bua Jehofa, “e ke tlaa romang kwa go ene bone ba ba tlhotlhang, mme ba tlaa mo tlhotlha; ba tlaa tsholola se se mo dijaneng tsa gagwe, mme ba tlaa thuba dinkgwana tsa gagwe." 
Jeremiah48:13 Moabe o tlaa tlhabisiwa ditlhong ke Kemoše, jaaka ba ntlo ya Iseraele ba ne ba tlhabisiwa ditlhong ke Bethele boikanyo jwa bone." 
Jeremiah48:14 “Lo bua jang, lo re: ‘Re banna ba ba thata, re diganka tsa go dira ntwa’?" 
Jeremiah48:15 Moabe o kgakgabaditswe, ba tlhatlogetse mo metseng ya gagwe, mme makau a gagwe a a tlhophegileng a fologetse polaong,” go bua Kgosi, e leina la yone e leng Jehofa wa masomosomo." 
Jeremiah48:16 “Tatlhego ya ga Moabe e atametse, le pitlagano ya gagwe e itlhaganela ka thata." 
Jeremiah48:17 Lona lotlhe ba lo mo tikologong ya gagwe, lo mo thukhuthele tlhogo, le lona lotlhe ba lo mo itseng leina, lo re: ‘Ana lore lwa bogosi lo lo thata lo robegile jang, tsamma e ntle.’" 
Jeremiah48:18 “Wena ngwana wa mosetsana yo o agileng mo Dibone, fologa mo kgalalelong ya gago, mme o dulele mo lenyoreng; gonne mothopi wa Moabe o go bololetse, o sentse dikago tsa gago tse di thata tsa phemelo." 
Jeremiah48:19 Wena monni wa Aroere, ema fa tseleng o tlhodumele; botsa monna yo o tshabang, le mosadi yo o falolang; o re: ‘Go dirafetseng?’" 
Jeremiah48:20 Moabe o tlhabisitswe ditlhong; gonne o rutlolotswe; bokolelang lo goe; lo go bolele mo Arenone, lo re: Moabe o kgakgabaditswe." 
Jeremiah48:21 “Tshekiso e tsile mo lefatsheng la lobala; mo Holone, le mo Jahesa le mo Mefaathe;" 
Jeremiah48:22 le mo Dibone, le mo Nebo, le mo Bethe-dibalathaime;" 
Jeremiah48:23 le mo Kiriathaime, le mo Bethe-gamule, le mo Bethemeone;" 
Jeremiah48:24 le mo Keriothe, le mo Bosera, le mo metseng yotlhe ya lefatshe la Moabe, e e kwa kgakala le e e fa gaufi." 
Jeremiah48:25 Lonaka lwa ga Moabe lo kgaotswe, le letsogo la gagwe le robilwe,” go bua Jehofa." 
Jeremiah48:26 “Mo tagiseng; gonne o na a ikgodisetsa Jehofa; Moabe o tlaa bidikama mo matlhatseng a gagwe, mme le ene o tlaa bolaisa ditshego." 
Jeremiah48:27 Ka gonne a Iseraele o ne a sa go bolaise ditshego? A o ne a fitlhelwa mo magodung? Gonne ya tle e re o bua ka ga gagwe, wa bo o tle o nne o tshikinye tlhogo." 
Jeremiah48:28 “Lona banni ba Moabe, tlogelang metse, lo ye go nna mo lefikeng; lo nne jaaka letseba le le agang setlhaga sa lone mo ditlhakoreng tsa molomo wa logaga." 
Jeremiah48:29 Re utlwile ka ga boikgodiso jwa ga Moabe, go re, o boikgodiso thata; boitlotlomatso jwa gagwe, le bodipa jwa gagwe, le bopelompe jwa gagwe." 
Jeremiah48:30 Ke a e itse tšhakgalo ya gagwe, go bua Jehofa, go re, ga se sepe; go ipelafatsa ga gagwe ga go ise go dire sepe." 
Jeremiah48:31 Ke gone ka moo ke tlaa bokolelelang Moabe; ee, ke tlaa goa ka ga ba Moabe botlhe; ba tlaa hutsafalela banna ba Kireherese." 
Jeremiah48:32 Ke tlaa go lelela ka selelo se se fetang sa ga Jasere, wena mofine wa Sibema; menamo ya gago e ne ya kgabaganya lewatle, ya fitlha fela kwa lewatleng la Jasere; mothopi o wetse maungo a gago a letlhabula, le mo difineng tsa gago." 
Jeremiah48:33 Boipelo bo tlositswe le boitumelo mo masimong a a ungwang le mo lefatsheng la Moabe; mme ke khutlisitse bojalwa jwa mofine mo dikgatisetsong; ga go na ope yo o tlaa gatang ka tuduetso; tuduetso e tlaa bo e se tuduetso ya sepe. 
Jeremiah48:34 “Go tswa kgoong ya Hešebone go ya fela kwa Eleale, le go ya fela kwa Jahase, ba tumisitse kodu ya bone, go tswa Soare go ya fela kwa Horonaime, kwa Egelathe-šelešiya; gonne le metsi a Nimerime le one a tlaa swafala fela." 
Jeremiah48:35 Gape ke tlaa khutlisa mo Moabe ene yo o isang tshupelo mo felong fa go tlotlometseng, le ene yo o fisetsang medimo ya gagwe maswalo, go bua Jehofa." 
Jeremiah48:36 “Ke gone ka moo pelo ya me e dumang ka ga Moabe jaaka ditlhaka, pelo ya me e duma jaaka ditlhaka ka ga batho ba Kireherese; ke gone ka moo letlotlo le o le bonyeng le nyeletse." 
Jeremiah48:37 Gonne tlhogo nngwe le nngwe e logatadima, le ditedu tsotlhe di kgaotswe; mo diatleng tsotlhe go na le ditshegako, le mo dithekeng go letsela la kgetse." 
Jeremiah48:38 Mo godimo ga mantlo otlhe a Moabe le mo mebileng ya gone go na le modumo wa khutsafalo ka ntlha tsotlhe fela; gonne ke thubile Moabe jaaka sejana se go senang kgatlhego epe mo go sone,” go bua Jehofa." 
Jeremiah48:39 “Ana o rutlologile jang? Ba bokolela jang! Moabe o hularetse batho jang ka ditlhong! Jalo Moabe o tlaa nna setshego le seboifiso mo go botlhe ba ba mo tikologong ya gagwe.” 
Jeremiah48:40 Gonne Jehofa o bua jaana, a re: “Bonang, o tlaa fofa jaaka ntswi yo motona, o tlaa tsharololela Moabe diphuka ka bosula." 
Jeremiah48:41 Keriothe o gapilwe, mme dikago tse di thata tsa phemelo di tshoganetswe, le pelo ya diganka tsa Moabe ka motlha oo e tlaa nna jaaka pelo ya mosadi mo metlotseding ya gagwe." 
Jeremiah48:42 Moabe o tlaa senngwa gore e se tlhole e le sešaba, ka a ikgodiseditse Jehofa." 
Jeremiah48:43 Poifo, le molete, le seru, di mo go wena, wena monni wa Moabe,” go bua Jehofa." 
Jeremiah48:44 “Yo o tshabang ka poifo o tlaa wela mo moleteng; mme yo o tsogang a tswa mo moleteng o tlaa tshwarwa mo serung; gonne ke tlaa lere mo go ene, e bong mo go Moabe, ngwaga wa tshekiso ya bone,” go bua Jehofa." 
Jeremiah48:45 “Ba ba tshabileng ba eme ba sena thata mo moriting wa Hešebone; gonne go dule molelo mo Hešebone, le kgabo mo gare ga Sihone, mme di laitse ntlha ya Moabe, le diphugo tsa ba ba feretlhang." 
Jeremiah48:46 A bo go latlhega wena Moabe! Batho ba Kemoše ba latlhegile, gonne bana ba gago ba basimane ba tlositswe ba golegilwe, le bana ba gago ba basetsana ba ile botshwarong." 
Jeremiah48:47 “Le fa go ntse jalo ke tlaa ba ke busa botshwaro jwa ga Moabe mo metlheng ya bofelo,” go bua Jehofa. Tshekiso ya Moabe e kalo." 
Jeremiah49:1 Ka ga bana ba Amone. Jehofa o bua jaana, a re: “A Iseraele ga a na bana ba basimane? A ga a na moja boswa? Ke ka ntlha yang Milekome a ruile Gate, le batho ba gagwe ba agile mo metseng ya teng?" 
Jeremiah49:2 Ke gone bona, metlha e etla,” go bua Jehofa, “e ke tlaa utlwatsang mokgosi wa ntwa e e tlhaselang Raba wa bana ba Amone ka yone; mme o tlaa tswa mokoa o o swafetseng, le bana ba gagwe ba basetsana ba tlaa fisiwa ka molelo; foo Iseraele o tlaa rua bone ba ba kileng ba mo rua,” go bua Jehofa." 
Jeremiah49:3 “Bokolela, wena Hešebone, gonne Ai o thopilwe; galang, lona bomorwadia Raba, lo ikokwaele ka letsela la kgetse; lo hutsafale, mme lo sianesiane mo gare ga dikgora; gonne Milekome o tlaa ya botshwarong, baperesiti ba gagwe le dikgosana tsa gagwe mmogo." 
Jeremiah49:4 Ana o ipelafaletseng melapo, molapo wa gago o o elelang, wena, mosetsana wa motenegi? Yo o ne a ikanya mahumo a gagwe, a re: ‘E mang yo o tlaa tlang mo go nna?’" 
Jeremiah49:5 Bona, ke tlaa lere poifo mo go wena,” go bua Jehofa, Jehofa wa masomosomo, “ya go tshaba botlhe ba ba mo tikologong ya gago; mme lo tlaa lelekwa mongwe le mongwe a tlhamalaletse ruri, mme ga go ketla go dira le ope yo o tlaa selang yo o timelang." 
Jeremiah49:6 Morago ga moo ke tlaa ba ke busa botshwaro jwa bana ba Amone,” go bua Jehofa." 
Jeremiah49:7 Ka ga Etome, Jehofa wa masomosomo o bua jaana, a re: “A botlhale ga bo tlhole bo le teng mo Temane? A kgakololo e sule mo go ba ba tlhaloganyang? A botlhale jwa bone bo nyeletse?" 
Jeremiah49:8 Tshabang, boelang kwa morago, agang kwa teng, lona banni ba Detane; gonne ke tlaa lere mo go ene tatlhego ya ga Esau mogang ke mo sekisang." 
Jeremiah49:9 Fa bahudi ba difine ba ne ba ka tla kwa go wena, a ba ne ba se ketla ba tlogela difine dingwe tse di ka ronopiwang? Fa e ka bo e le magodu a bosigo, a ga a ne a se ketla a senya go tsamaya a bona mo go lekanyeng fela?" 
Jeremiah49:10 Nna ke apotse Esau, ke bipolotse mafelo a gagwe a a sa itsegeng, mme ga a ketla a nonofa go iphitlha; losika lwa gagwe lo thopilwe, le bana ba ga rraagwe, le ba ga gabo, le ene ga a yo." 
Jeremiah49:11 Tlogela masiela a gago, ke tlaa a tshedisa; mme a basadi ba ba batlholagadi ba gago ba ikanye mo go nna.”" 
Jeremiah49:12 Gonne Jehofa o bua jaana, a re: “Bonang, ba ba neng ba sa tshwanela go nwa senwelo, ruri ba tlaa nwa; mme a ke wena yo o tlaa falolang fela, o sa bediwe? Ga o ketla o nna fela o sa bediwa, mme ruri o tlaa nwa." 
Jeremiah49:13 Gonne ke ikanne ka nna ka nosi,” go bua Jehofa, go re: “Bosera o tlaa nna segakgamatso, le kgobo, le kgakgabalo, le phutso; mme metse yotlhe ya teng e tlaa nna dikgakgabalo ka bosakhutleng.”" 
Jeremiah49:14 Ke utlwile mafoko mo go Jehofa, mme go romilwe morongwi mo merafeng, ga twe: “Phuthegang, lo mmololele, lo nanogele go tlhabana.”" 
Jeremiah49:15 “Gonne bona, ke go ngotlile mo merafeng, ke go dirile nyatsego mo gare ga batho." 
Jeremiah49:16 Ka ga poitshego ya gago, boikgodiso jwa pelo ya gago bo go tsieditse, wena yo o agileng mo dipharong tsa lefika, yo o tshegeditseng tlhora ya thota; le fa o ka bo o aga setlhaga sa gago kwa godimo jaaka ntswi yo motona, ke tlaa go folosa teng,” go bua Jehofa." 
Jeremiah49:17 “Etome o tlaa nna segakgamatso; mongwe le mongwe yo o fetang ka ene o tlaa gakgamala, mme o tlaa otsetsa dipetso tsotlhe tsa gagwe." 
Jeremiah49:18 Jaaka mo go ribegediweng ga Sotoma le Gomora le metse e e neng e bapile nayo,” go bua Jehofa, “ga go ketla go nna motho ope teng, ga go ketla go tlhola tlhola ope morwa motho teng." 
Jeremiah49:19 “Bonang, o tlaa tlhatloga jaaka tau e e ntshiwang ke kgogomogo ya Joretane, mme e tlaa go tlhasela mo mahulong a a tlhomameng; mme ke tlaa mo e tshabisa ka tshoganetso; mme ene yo o itshenketsweng ke tlaa mmaya molaodi wa yone; gonne e mang yo o tshwanang le nna? Mme e mang yo o tlaa ntlhomelang lobaka? Mme modisa e mang yo o tlaa emang fa pele ga me?" 
Jeremiah49:20 Ke gone utlwang kgakololo ya ga Jehofa, e o e gakologetsweng ka ga Etome; le maikaelelo a gagwe a o a ikaeletseng ka ga banni ba Temane; ruri ba tlaa ba gogela koo, e bong bana ba letsomane; ruri o tlaa swafatsa bonno jwa bone ka ntlha ya bone." 
Jeremiah49:21 Lefatshe le a roroma ka modumo wa go wa ga bone; go na le kgoo, modumo wa yone o utlwala kwa Lewatleng le Lehibidu." 
Jeremiah49:22 Bonang o tlaa tlhatloga, a fofa jaaka ntswi yo motona, o tlaa tsharololela Bosera diphuka tsa gagwe ka bosula; mme pelo ya diganka tsa Etome mo motlheng oo e tlaa nna jaaka pelo ya mosadi a le mo metlotseding ya gagwe.”" 
Jeremiah49:23 Ka ga Damaseko. “Hamathe o tlhabilwe ke ditlhong, le Arepate; gonne ba utlwile mafoko a a bosula, ba nyerile; go na le kotlomano mo lewatleng; le retela go sisibala." 
Jeremiah49:24 Damaseko o koafetse, o ithetolola go tla a tshaba, mme thoromo e mo tshwere; tlalelo e e mahehe e mo tshwere, le mahutsana, jaaka mosadi yo o mo pelegong." 
Jeremiah49:25 Ana go ntse jang motse wa pako o sa latlhwe, motse wa boitumelo jwa me?" 
Jeremiah49:26 Ke gone makau a one a tlaa wela mo mebileng ya one, le batlhabani botlhe ba tlaa tuuladiwa mo motlheng oo, go bua Jehofa wa masomosomo." 
Jeremiah49:27 Ke tlaa tshuba molelo mo lorakong lwa Damaseko, mme o tlaa laila mantlo a bogosi a ga Benehatate.”" 
Jeremiah49:28 Ka ga Ketare, le ka ga magosi a Hasore, a Nebukatenesare kgosi ya Babilone o a kgemethileng. Jehofa o bua jaana, a re: “Nanogang, yang kwa Ketare, lo thope bana ba botlhabatsatsi." 
Jeremiah49:29 Ba tlaa gapa megope ya bone le matsomane a bone; ba tla ikgapela dilepelelo tsa bone, le dijana tsa bone, le dikamela tsa bone; mme ba tlaa ba goelela, ba re: ‘Gaa! Ka ntlha tsotlhe.’" 
Jeremiah49:30 “Tshabang, lo timelele kwa kgakala, agang kwa teng, lona banni ba Hasore,” go bua Morena; “gonne Nebukatenesare kgosi ya Babilone o ikgakolotse ka ga lona, o bonye boikaelelo ka ga lona." 
Jeremiah49:31 Nanogang, lo bololele morafe mongwe o o iketlileng, o o agileng fela o sa re sepe,” go bua Jehofa; “o o senang ditswalo le mephakalego, o o agileng ba le bosi fela." 
Jeremiah49:32 “Dikamela tsa one di tlaa nna kgapo, le bontsi jwa dikgomo tsa one di tlaa nna thopo; mme ba ba itshekotseng ke tlaa ba falaletsa kwa diphefong tsotlhe; mme ke tlaa ba tlisetsa tatlhego mo ntlheng tsotlhe tsa bone,” go bua Jehofa." 
Jeremiah49:33 “Hasore o tlaa nna bonno jwa diphokoje, le tshwafalo ka bosakhutleng, ga go ketla go aga motho ope gone, mme ga go ketla go tlhola tlhola ope morwa motho teng.”" 
Jeremiah49:34 Lefoko la ga Jehofa le le tsileng mo go Jeremia moperofeti ka ga Elame, mo tshimologong ya puso ya ga Setekia kgosi ya Juta, la re:" 
Jeremiah49:35 Jehofa wa masomosomo o bua jaana, a re: “Bonang, ke tlaa roba bora jwa ba Elame, tlhogo ya nonofo ya bone." 
Jeremiah49:36 Ke tlaa tlisa mo go Elame diphefo tsoo nne kwa dintlheng tsoo nne tsa legodimo, mme ke tlaa ba falaletsa kwa diphefong tseo; mme ga go ketla go dira le morafe ope o balelekiwa ba Elame ba se ketlang ba wela kwa go one." 
Jeremiah49:37 Ke tlaa tseanya ba Elame fa pele ga baba ba bone, le fa pele ga ba ba batlang botshelo jwa bone, mme ke tlaa lere bosula mo go bone, e bong bogale jwa me jo bo tukang,” go bua Jehofa; “mme ke tlaa ba lateletsa tšhaka, go tsamaya ke ba nyeletsa." 
Jeremiah49:38 Ke tlaa tlhoma setulo sa me sa bogosi mo Elame, ke senya ke tlosa kgosi le dikgosana teng,” go bua Jehofa." 
Jeremiah49:39 “Mme go tlaa dirala mo metlheng ya morago, go re, ke tlaa ba ke busa botshwaro jwa Elame,” go bua Jehofa." 
Jeremiah50:1 Lefoko le Jehofa o le buileng ka ga Babilone, ka ga lefatshe la Bakalatea, ka Jeremia moperofeti." 
Jeremiah50:2 “Bolelang mo merafeng lo kakanye, mme lo tlhome mokgele; kakanyang, lo se ka lwa loba; lo re: ‘Babilone o gapilwe, Bele o tlhabisitswe ditlhong, Merotake o thubagantswe; ditshwantsho tsa gagwe di tlhabisitswe ditlhong, medimo ya gagwe ya disetwa e thubagantswe.’" 
Jeremiah50:3 “Gonne go tla morafe o o tswang ntlheng ya botsheka, o tla go mo tlhasela, o o tlaa swafatsang lefatshe la gagwe, mme ga go ketla go aga ope mo go lone; ba tshabile, ba ile, motho le kgomo." 
Jeremiah50:4 “E tlaa re mo metlheng eo, le ka lobaka loo,” go bua Jehofa, “bana ba Iseraele ba tlaa tla, bone le bana ba Juta mmogo; ba tlaa etla ba lela, mme ba tlaa batla Jehofa Modimo wa bone." 
Jeremiah50:5 Ba tlaa botsa ka ga Sione ba lebile teng, ba re: ‘Tlang, lo ikopanye le Jehofa ka kgolagano e e sa khutleng, e e se ketlang e lebalwa.’" 
Jeremiah50:6 “Batho ba me e ntse e le dinku tse di timetseng; badisa ba bone ba ba timeditse, ba ba faposeditse mo dithabeng; ba tlhomagantse thaba le thotana, ba lebetse sebothelo sa bone." 
Jeremiah50:7 Botlhe ba ba ba fitlhetseng ba ba supuditse; mme baba ba bone ba rile: ‘Ga re na molato, ka ba leofetse Jehofa, tsholofelo ya borraabo.’" 
Jeremiah50:8 “Kudubitlegang lo tswe mo gare ga Babilone, lo tswe mo lefatsheng la Bakalatea, mme lo nne jaaka diphoko fa pele ga matsomane." 
Jeremiah50:9 Gonne, bonang, ke tlaa tsosetsa ke ba ke tlhatlosetsa kwa Babilone kokwano ya merafe e megolo e tswa lefatsheng la botsheka; mme ba tlaa mo ikabela; mme a le foo o tlaa gapiwa; metswi ya bone e tlaa nna jaaka ya seganka se se setswerere; ga go ketla go boa ope ka lefela." 
Jeremiah50:10 Lefatshe la Kalatea le tlaa nna thopo; botlhe ba ba le thopang ba tlaa kgora.” Go bua Jehofa. 
Jeremiah50:11 “E re ka lo ipela, ka lo itumela, lona ba lo thopang boswa jwa me, ka lo lealeega jaaka kgomo ya moroba e e gatang mabele, mme lo kgwankgwanyega jaaka dipitse tse di nonofileng;" 
Jeremiah50:12 mmaeno o tlaa tlhajwa ke ditlhong thata; yo o lo belegeng o tlaa sosobagana; bona, o tlaa nna wa moragorago wa merafe, o tlaa nna naga fela, le lefatshe la lokgere, le sekaka." 
Jeremiah50:13 Ka ntlha ya botšarara jwa ga Jehofa ga o ketla o nnwa, mme o tlaa swafala gotlhe fela; mongwe le mongwe yo o tlaa fetang ka Babilone o tlaa gakgamala, mme o tlaa otsetsa dipetso tsotlhe tsa gagwe." 
Jeremiah50:14 “Ikabeleng Babilone mo tikologong, lona lotlhe ba lo laelang bora; mo huleng, se rekegeleng metswi; gonne o leofetse Jehofa." 
Jeremiah50:15 O goeleleng mo tikologong; o inetse; dikago tsa one tsa phemelo di ole, dithako tsa one di digilwe; gonne ke pusoloso ya ga Jehofa; ipusolosetse mo go ene; jaaka a dirile, mo direleng jalo." 
Jeremiah50:16 Kgaolang mojadi mo Babilone, le ene yo o tshwarang thipa ya mabele mo lobakeng lwa go roba; mongwe le mongwe o tlaa retologela kwa bathong ba ga gabo ka ntlha ya poifo ya tšhaka e e patikang, mongwe le mongwe o tlaa tshabela kwa lefatsheng la ga gabo." 
Jeremiah50:17 “Iseraele ke nku e e phalogileng; ditau di mo lelekile; ga ntlha kgosi ya Babilone e mo supuditse; ga bofelo Nebukatenesare kgosi ya Babilone o robile marapo a gagwe.” 
Jeremiah50:18 Ke gone ka moo Jehofa wa masomosomo, Modimo wa Iseraele o bua jaana, a re: “Bonang ke tlaa betsa kgosi ya Babilone le lefatshe la yone, jaaka ke beditse kgosi ya Asiria." 
Jeremiah50:19 Ke tlaa ba ke busetsa Iseraele kwa mafulong a gagwe, mme o tlaa fula mo Karemele, le mo Bašane; mowa wa gagwe o tlaa kgora mo makgabaneng a Eferaime le mo Gileate." 
Jeremiah50:20 Mo metlheng eo, le ka lobaka loo,” go bua Jehofa, “boikepo jwa Iseraele bo tlaa batlwa, mme go tlaa bo go sena bope; le maleo a Juta, mme ga a ketla a fitlhelwa, gonne ke tlaa itshwarela bone ba ke ba sadisang e le masalela." 
Jeremiah50:21 “Bololelang lefatshe la Merathaime, ke go re, go le tlhasela, le go tlhasela banni ba Pekote; bolayang, lo senyetse ruri morago ga bone,” go bua Jehofa, “mme lo dire ka fa go tsotlhe tse ke di go laoletseng." 
Jeremiah50:22 Go na le modumo wa tlhabano mo lefatsheng, le wa tshenyo e kgolo." 
Jeremiah50:23 Ana noto ya lefatshe lotlhe e phatlogile jang ka bogare, e thubegile jang! Ana Babilone o swafetse mo merafeng jang!" 
Jeremiah50:24 Ke go beetse seru, o bile o tshwerwe, wena Babilone, mme o ne o sa itse; o bonywe, o bile o tshwerwe, ka o ganetse le Jehofa." 
Jeremiah50:25 Jehofa o budile ntlo ya gagwe ya dibolao, tsa tšhakgalo ya gagwe; gonne Jehofa, Modimo wa masomosomo o na le tiro e o e dirang mo lefatsheng la Bakalatea." 
Jeremiah50:26 Tswang kwa bokhutlong jwa lefatshe lo mmololele, lo bule matlo a gagwe a a bolokelang; lo mo ribegetse a nne mekoakoa, fela lo mo senyetse ruri; go se ka ga sala sepe sa gagwe." 
Jeremiah50:27 Bolayang dipholo tsa gagwe tsotlhe, a di ye tlhabong; a bo baa latlhega! Gonne motlha wa bone o tsile, motlha wa tshekiso ya bone." 
Jeremiah50:28 “A lentswe la ba ba tshabang ba falola ba tswa lefatsheng la Babilone, ba ya go bolela mo Sione pusoloso ya ga Jehofa Modimo wa rona, pusoloso ya tempele ya gagwe." 
Jeremiah50:29 “Phuthang bahudi ka bora ba tle go tlhasela Babilone, botlhe ba ba itseng go laela bora; mo tlhaoleleleng lo mo dike tikologong; a go se falole ope wa gone; mo dueleng ka fa tirong ya gagwe; ka fa go tsotlhe tse o di dirileng, mo direleng jalo, gonne o na a ntse a le boikgodiso fa pele ga Jehofa, fa pele ga Moitshepi wa Iseraele." 
Jeremiah50:30 Ke gone ka moo makau a gagwe a tlaa welang mo mebileng ya gagwe, le batlhabani ba gagwe botlhe ba tla tuuladiwa ka tsatsi leo,” go bua Jehofa." 
Jeremiah50:31 “Bona, ke emalanye nao, wena mokaka,” go bua Jehofa, Morena wa masomosomo; “gonne motlha wa gago o tsile, motlha o ke tlaa go sekisang ka one." 
Jeremiah50:32 Mokaka o tlaa kgopiwa a wa, mme ga go na ope yo o tlaa mo kakatlololang; ke tlaa tshuba molelo mo metseng ya gagwe, mme o tlaa laila botlhe ba ba mo tikologong ya gagwe.”" 
Jeremiah50:33 Jehofa wa masomosomo o bua jaana, a re: “Bana ba Iseraele le bana ba Juta ba bogisiwa mmogo; mme botlhe ba ba ba isitseng botshwarong ba ba tshwere thata, ba gana go ba rebola." 
Jeremiah50:34 Morekolodi wa bone o thata; Jehofa wa masomosomo ke leina la gagwe; o tlaa ba emelela ruri mo tshekong, gore a tle a neye lefatshe boikhutso, mme a iketlolole banni ba Babilone." 
Jeremiah50:35 “Go tšhaka mo go Bakalatea,” go bua Jehofa, “le mo banning ba Babilone, le mo dikgosaneng tsa gagwe, le mo matlhaleng a gagwe." 
Jeremiah50:36 Go tšhaka mo babelafading, mme ba tlaa fela tlhaloganyo; go tšhaka mo dikgankeng tsa gagwe, mme ba tlaa tseana." 
Jeremiah50:37 Go tšhaka mo dipitseng tsa bone, le mo dikareng tsa bone, le mo bathong botlhe ba ba tlhakanyeng ba ba mo gare ga gagwe, mme ba tlaa nna jaaka basadi; go tšhaka mo mahumong a gagwe, mme a tlaa utswiwa." 
Jeremiah50:38 Go leuba mo dinokeng tsa gagwe, mme di tlaa tšha; gonne ke lefatshe la ditshwantsho tse di setilweng, mme ba a tsenwa ka ga medimo ya disetwa." 
Jeremiah50:39 “Ke gone ka moo dibatana tsa naga di na le diphiri di tlaa nna teng, le bontšhe ba tlaa nna teng; mme ga a ketla a tlhola a nnwa ka bosakhutleng; mme ga go ketla go aga motho teng go ya tshikatshikeng." 
Jeremiah50:40 Jaaka Modimo o ne o kile wa ribegetsa Sotoma le Gomora, le metse e e neng e bapile nayo, go bua Jehofa; jalo fela ga go ketla go nna motho ope teng, mme ga go ketla go tlholatlhola ope morwa motho teng." 
Jeremiah50:41 “Bonang, go tswa tšhaba kwa ntlheng ya botsheka; le morafe o mogolo, le dikgosi di le dintsi di tlaa tsosiwa kwa dikhutlong tsa lefatshe." 
Jeremiah50:42 Ba tshwara bora le lerumo; ba bolalome, ga ba itse go tlhomoga pelo; kodu ya bone e faologa jaaka lewatle, mme ba palame dipitse; mongwe le mongwe o go abetswe go tlhabana nao, jaaka monna mo tlhabanong, wena morwadia Babilone." 
Jeremiah50:43 Kgosi ya Babilone e utlwile tumedi ya bone, mme diatla tsa yone di a koafala; tlalelo e e mahehe e e tshwere, le metlotsedi e e etsang ya mosadi a le mo pelegong." 
Jeremiah50:44 “Bonang, o tlaa tlhatloga jaaka tau e e ntshiwang ke kgogomogo ya Joretane e tla go tlhasela mo mafulong a a tlhomameng; mme ke tlaa mo e tshabisa ka tshoganetso; mme yo o itshenketsweng, ke tlaa mo neela go e laola; gonne e mang yo o tshwanang le nna? E mang yo o tlaa nkaelang motlha? Mme modisa e mang yo o tlaa emang fa pele ga me?" 
Jeremiah50:45 Ke gone utlwang kgakololo ya ga Jehofa, e o e gakologetsweng ka ga Babilone; le maikaelelo a gagwe, a o a ikaeletseng ka ga lefatshe la Bakalatea; ruri ba tlaa ba gogela koo, e bong banyana ba letsomane; ruri o tlaa swafatsa bonno jwa bone ka ntlha ya bone." 
Jeremiah50:46 Lefatshe le a roroma ka modumo wa go gapiwa ga Babilone, le go goa go utlwala mo merafeng.”" 
Jeremiah51:1 Jehofa o bua jaana, a re: “Bonang, ke tlaa tsosa phefo e e senyang, ke e tsosetsa Babilone le ba ba agileng mo Lebe-kamai." 
Jeremiah51:2 “Ke tlaa roma baolosi kwa Babilone, ba ba tlaa mo olosang; ba tlaa leafatsa lefatshe la gagwe, gonne mo motlheng wa pitlagano ba tlaa mo tlhasela mo tikologong." 
Jeremiah51:3 A mohudi ka bora a laele bora jwa gagwe, a a hule yo o hulang ka bora, a a be a hule yo o itsosang a le mo meitshomelong ya gagwe ya phemelo, mme lo se ka lwa rekegela makau a gagwe; lo senyetse ruri ntwa yotlhe ya gagwe." 
Jeremiah51:4 Ba tlaa wa ba bolailwe mo fatsheng la Bakalatea, ba phololeditswe mo mebileng ya gagwe." 
Jeremiah51:5 Gonne Iseraele, ga a a latlhwa, le fa e le Juta, ke Modimo wa gagwe, Jehofa wa masomosomo; le fa lefatshe la bone le tletse molato wa go leofela Moitshepi wa Iseraele." 
Jeremiah51:6 Kudubitlegang lo tswe mo gare ga Babilone, mme a mongwe le mongwe a phedise botshelo jwa gagwe; se kgaolelweng mo boikepong jwa gagwe; gonne ke motlha wa pusoloso ya ga Jehofa; o tlaa mo naya tuelo." 
Jeremiah51:7 Babilone e ne e ntse e le senwelo sa gouta mo seatleng sa ga Jehofa, se se tagisitseng lefatshe lotlhe: merafe e nole bojalwa jwa mofine jwa gagwe; ke gone ka moo merafe e tsenwang." 
Jeremiah51:8 Babilone o ole ka tshoganetso, o senyegile; mmokoleleleng, lo tseeleng botlhoko jwa gagwe boroku jo bo alafang, e tle e re kgotsa a fole." 
Jeremiah51:9 Re ne re rata re ka bo re fodisitse Babilone, mme ga a a fola; mo tlhobogeng, mme a re yeng mongwe le mongwe fatsheng la ga gabo, gonne tshekiso ya gagwe e fitlha le kwa legodimong, e tsholetsegile go ya fela kwa loaping." 
Jeremiah51:10 “Jehofa o ntsheditse tshiamo ya rona kwa ntle; ntlong a re boleleng mo Sione tiro ya ga Jehofa Modimo wa rona. 
Jeremiah51:11 “Gotlhang metswi; tshwarang dithebe thata; Jehofa o tsositse mowa wa dikgosi tsa Bamete; ka gonne o logetse Babilone maano go mo senya, gonne ke pusoloso ya ga Jehofa, pusoloso ya tempele ya gagwe." 
Jeremiah51:12 Tlhomelang dithako tsa Babilone mokgele wa tlhabano, lo thatafatse tebelo, tlhomang balebedi, baakanyang ditalelo, gonne Jehofa o logile maano, o bile o dirile se o se buileng ka ga banni ba Babilone." 
Jeremiah51:13 Ao, wena yo o agileng mo dinokeng di le dintsi, yo o tletseng mahumo, bokhutlo jwa gago bo tsile, selekanyo sa bopelotshetlha jwa gago." 
Jeremiah51:14 Jehofa wa masomosomo o ikanne ka ene ka esi, a re: Ruri ke tlaa go tlatsa ka batho, jaaka e ka bo e le tsie; mme ba tlaa go goelelela.”" 
Jeremiah51:15 “O dirile lefatshe ka nonofo ya gagwe, o tlhomamisitse lobopo ka botlhale jwa gagwe, o tsharolotse magodimo ka tlhaloganyo ya gagwe." 
Jeremiah51:16 Ya re a ntsha lentswe la gagwe go nne kgwaso ya metsi mo magodimong, a tlhatlose meuwane kwa dikhutlong tsa lefatshe; a direle pula dikgadima, mme a ntshe phefo mo mabolokelong a gagwe." 
Jeremiah51:17 “Motho mongwe le mongwe o fetogile sefolofolo mo o bileng a sena kitso; mothudi mongwe le mongwe wa gouta o tlhabisiwa ditlhong ke setshwantsho sa gagwe se se setilweng; gonne setshwantsho sa gagwe se se thetsweng ke maaka, go bile go sena mowa mo go tsone." 
Jeremiah51:18 Di boithamako, ke tiro ya phoro; mo motlheng wa tshekiso ya tsone di tlaa nyelela." 
Jeremiah51:19 Kabelo ya ga Jakobe ga a nna jaaka tseo; gonne ene ke mmopi wa dilo tsotlhe; mme Iseraele ke lotso lwa boswa jwa gagwe; Jehofa wa masomosomo ke leina la gagwe.” 
Jeremiah51:20 “Ke wena molamu wa me, le dibolao tsa me tsa ntwa; mme ke tlaa thubaganya merafe ka wena; ke tlaa senya magosi ka wena;" 
Jeremiah51:21 ke tlaa thubaganya pitse le mopalami wa yone ka wena; ke tlaa thubaganya kara le ene yo o palameng mo go yone ka wena; 
Jeremiah51:22 ke tlaa thubaganya monna le mosadi ka wena; ke tlaa thubaganya monnamogolo le lekau ka wena; ke tlaa thubaganya lekolwane le morweetsana ka wena; 
Jeremiah51:23 ke tlaa thubaganya modisa le letsomane la gagwe ka wena; ke tlaa thubaganya molemi le dikgomo tsa jokwe ya gagwe ka wena; ke tlaa thubaganya balaodi le balaodisiwa ka wena. 
Jeremiah51:24 “Babilone le banni botlhe ba Kalatea ke tlaa lefetsa mo go bone bosula jotlhe jwa bone jo ba bo dirileng mo Sione mo ponong ya lona,” go bua Jehofa." 
Jeremiah51:25 “Bona, ke tlhabana nao, wena thaba e e senyang, go bua Jehofa, wena yo o senyang lefatshe lotlhe; ke tlaa go otlololela seatla sa me, mme ke tlaa go kgokolosa ke go ntsha kwa mafikeng, ke go ntsha thaba e e šeleng fela." 
Jeremiah51:26 Mme ga ba ketla ba tsaya mo go wena lentswe la kgokgotšho, le fa e le lentswe la motheo; mme o tlaa swafala fela ka bosakhutleng, go bua Jehofa." 
Jeremiah51:27 “Tlhomang mokgele mo lefatsheng, letsang lonaka mo merafeng, lo mmaakanyetseng merafe, lo mmiletseng magosi a Ararate, le Minni, le Ašekenase; mo laoleleng kgosana ya tlhabano; tlhatlosang dipitse di nne jaaka tsie molomi." 
Jeremiah51:28 Mmaakanyetseng merafe go tlhabana nae, dikgosi tsa Bamete, le balaodi ba teng, le balaodisiwa botlhe ba teng, le lefatshe lotlhe la mmuso wa gagwe." 
Jeremiah51:29 Lefatshe le a roroma, le mo botlhokong; gonne maikaelelo a Morena ka ga Babilone a eme, a go dira lefatshe la Babilone tshwafalo, le sena monni." 
Jeremiah51:30 Diganka tsa Babilone di ithibile go tlhabana, di setse fela mo dikagong tsa tsone tse di thata tsa phemelo; thata ya bone e ngobetse; di ntse jaaka basadi fela; maago a gagwe a tshubilwe ka molelo; mephakalego ya gagwe e robegile." 
Jeremiah51:31 Moisa dikwalo o tlaa siana a ya go kgatlhantsha moisa dikwalo yo mongwe, le morongwi yo mongwe o tlaa kgatlhantsha yo mongwe, ba ya go supetsa kgosi ya Babilone fa motse wa yone o gapilwe mo ntlheng tsotlhe;" 
Jeremiah51:32 le go re, matsibogo a gapilwe, le go re, lotlhaka ba lo fisitse ka molelo, le go re, batlhabani ba tshogile.”" 
Jeremiah51:33 Gonne Jehofa wa masomosomo, Modimo wa Iseraele o bua jaana, a re: “Morwadia Babilone o ntse jaaka sebopi sa pholelo mo motlheng o se gatwang ka one; e sa le lobakanyana, mme motlha wa thobo o tlaa mo tlela.”" 
Jeremiah51:34 “Nebukatenesare kgosi ya Babilone o ntshupuditse, o mpitlile, o ntirile sejana se se logapa fela, o nkomeditse jaaka kgogela, o itladitse mpa ka dimonate tsa me; o ntelekile.”" 
Jeremiah51:35 “Monni wa Sione o tla bua, a re: Thubakanyo e o e ntiretseng le nama ya me, a e nne mo go Babilone”; gape go tlaa bua Jerusalema, a re: “A madi a me a nne mo banning ba Kalatea.”" 
Jeremiah51:36 Ke gone ka moo Jehofa o bua jaana, a re: “Ke tlaa emela mafoko a gago mo tshekong, ke tlaa go lefeletsa; mme ke tlaa tšhisa lewatle la gagwe, ke tlaa kgadisa motswedi wa gagwe." 
Jeremiah51:37 Babilone o tlaa nna mekoakoa fela, a nna bonno jwa bophokoje, le kgakgamatso, le kotso, a sena monni." 
Jeremiah51:38 Ba tlaa duma mmogo jaaka ditau; ba tlaa karetla jaaka bana ba ditau. 
Jeremiah51:39 Ba tlaa re ba gotetse, ke ba direle modiro, ke tlaa ba tagisa, gore ba tle ba tlhapelwe, mme ba robale boroko jo bo sa khutleng, ba se ke ba tlhola ba kubuga,” go bua Jehofa." 
Jeremiah51:40 “Ke tlaa ba isa tlhabong jaaka dikwanyana, jaaka diphelefu di na le diphoko." 
Jeremiah51:41 “Ana Shešake o gapilwe jang! Pako ya lefatshe lotlhe e tshoganeditswe jang! Babilone o fetogile jang tshwafalo mo merafeng! 
Jeremiah51:42 Lewatle le tlhatlogetse mo Babilone; o khurumeditswe ke bontsi jwa makhubu a lone. 
Jeremiah51:43 Metse ya gagwe e swafetse, ke lefatshe la lokgere, le sekaka, lefatshe le go sa ageng motho ope mo go lone, le le go sa feteng ngwana ope wa motho ka lone." 
Jeremiah51:44 Ke tlaa sekisa Bele mo Babilone, ke tlaa ntsha mo ganong la gagwe se o se komeditseng; mme merafe ga e ketla e tlhola e sailela mmogo kwa go ene. Ee, lorako lwa Babilone lo tlaa wa." 
Jeremiah51:45 Batho ba me, tswang mo gare ga gagwe, mme a mongwe le mongwe e iphedise botshelo jwa gagwe mo bogaleng jo bo tukang jwa ga Jehofa." 
Jeremiah51:46 A pelo tsa lona di se idibale, se boifeng ka ntlha ya tumedi e e tlaa utlwalang mo lefatsheng; gonne go tlaa tla tumedi ka ngwaga o mongwe, mme morago ga moo ka ngwaga o mongwe go tlaa tla tumedi, le thubakanyo mo lefatsheng, molaodi a tlhabana le molaodi." 
Jeremiah51:47 “Ke gone, bonang, metlha e e tla, e ke tlaa sekiseng ditshwantsho tse di setilweng tsa Babilone ka yone, mme lefatshe lotlhe la gagwe le tlaa tlhajwa ke ditlhong; le babolaiwi ba gagwe botlhe ba tlaa wela mo gare ga gagwe." 
Jeremiah51:48 Foo legodimo le lefatshe, le tsotlhe tse di mo go lone, di tlaa opela Babilone ka boitumelo; gonne bathopi ba tlaa tla mo go ene ba tswa ntlheng ya botsheka,” go bua Jehofa." 
Jeremiah51:49 “Jaaka Babilone a ositse babolaiwi ba Iseraele, jalo fela babolaiwi ba lefatshe lotlhe ba tlaa wa kwa Babilone.”" 
Jeremiah51:50 “Lona ba lo falotseng mo tšhakeng, tsamayang, lo se ka lwa ema; gakologelwang Jehofa lo le kwa kgakala, mme a Jerusalema a tsene mo mogopolong wa lona." 
Jeremiah51:51 ‘Re tlhabilwe ke ditlhong, ka re utlwile kgobo; tshosobagano e re bipile difatlhogo, gonne baeng ba tsile mo mafelong a a boitshepo a ntlo ya ga Jehofa.’" 
Jeremiah51:52 Ke gone, bonang, metlha e etla,” go bua Jehofa, “e ke tlaa sekisang ditshwantsho tsa gagwe tse di setilweng ka yone; mme ba ba ntshitsweng dintho mo lefatsheng la gagwe lotlhe ba tlaa sonela." 
Jeremiah51:53 Le fa Babilone a ka palamela kwa legodimong, le fa a ka thatafatsa bogodimo jwa thata ya gagwe, le fa go ntse jalo bathopi ba tlaa tla mo go ene ba tswa kwa go nna.” Go bua Jehofa." 
Jeremiah51:54 “A modumo wa go goa o o tswang Babilone, le wa thubaganyo e kgolo o o tswang lefatsheng la Bakalatea!" 
Jeremiah51:55 Gonne Jehofa o thopa Babilone, o senya mo go ene kodu e kgolo, gore e tswe mo go ene; mme dintelo tsa bone di faologa jaaka metsi a le mantsi, modumo wa kodu ya bone o a tswa." 
Jeremiah51:56 Gonne mothopi o tsile mo go ene, e bong mo go Babilone, mme diganka tsa gagwe di tshwerwe, mara a bone a robagantswe; gonne Jehofa ke Modimo wa ditefetso, ruri o tlaa lefetsa." 
Jeremiah51:57 Mme ke tlaa tagisa dikgosana tsa gagwe, le matlhale a gagwe, le balaodi ba gagwe, le balaodisiwa ba gagwe, le diganka tsa gagwe; mme ba tlaa robala boroko jo bo sa khutleng, ba sa kubuge, go bua Kgosi, e leina la yone e leng Jehofa wa masomosomo.”" 
Jeremiah51:58 “Jehofa wa masomosomo o bua jaana; a re: ‘Dithako tse di atlhameng tsa Babilone di tlaa ribegelediwa ruri, le ditswalo tsa teng tse di godileng di tlaa fisiwa ka molelo; mme ditšhaba di tlaa ingodisetsa lefela, le merafe e itapisetsa molelo, mme ba tlaa lapa.’ ”" 
Jeremiah51:59 Lefoko le Jeremia moperofeti o le laoletseng Seraia morwa Neria morwa Maheseia, jale ka a ya Babilone le Setekia kgosi ya Juta, ka ngwaga wa bone wa puso ya gagwe. Jaana Seraia ya bo e le molebedi yo mogolo wa mantlwana." 
Jeremiah51:60 Jeremia a kwala mo lokwalong bosula jotlhe jo bo tlaa tlang mo Babilone, e bong mafoko otlhe a a kwadilweng ka ga Babilone." 
Jeremiah51:61 Mme Jeremia a raya Seraia, a re: “Mogang o fitlhang mo Babilone, foo o bone gore o bale mafoko otlhe a," 
Jeremiah51:62 o re: ‘Jehofa, aitse o buile ka ga felo fa, go go kgaola, gore go se age ope teng, le fa e le motho le fa e le kgomo, fa e se gore go swafale fela ka bosakhutleng.’" 
Jeremiah51:63 Go tlaa dirala go re, fa o sena go wetsa go bala lokwalo lo, o bofele lentswe mo go lone, mme o lo latlhele mo gare ga Euferatese," 
Jeremiah51:64 o re: ‘Babilone o tlaa nwela fela jalo, mme ga a ketla a tlhola a biloga ka ntlha ya bosula jo ke tlaa bo ba lapile.’ ” Mafoko a ga Jeremia a khutla fa." 
Jeremiah52:1 E rile Setekia a simolola go busa, a bo a le dinyaga di le 21 mme a busa ka dinyaga di le 11 mo Jerusalema, mme leina la ga mmaagwe e ne e le Hamutale morwadia Jeremia wa Libena." 
Jeremiah52:2 Mme a dira se se bosula mo matlhong a ga Jehofa, ka fa go tsotlhe tse Jehoiakime o ne a di dirile." 
Jeremiah52:3 Gonne ya re ka ntlha ya bogale jwa ga Jehofa, ga dirala mo Jerusalema le mo Juta, ga tsamaya a ba leleka fa pele ga gagwe; mme Setekia a tsuololela kgosi ya Babilone." 
Jeremiah52:4 Ga dirala e rile ka ngwaga o o ferang mongwe fela wa puso ya gagwe, ka kgwedi ya lesome, ka letsatsi la lesome la kgwedi, Nebukatenesare kgosi ya Babilone a tla, ene le ntwa yotlhe ya gagwe, a tla go tlhasela Jerusalema, mme a o tlhaolelela a o dika; mme a aga dikago tsa tlhabanelo mo tikologong ya one." 
Jeremiah52:5 Jalo motse wa nna wa tlhaselwa go ya ngwageng wa 11 wa kgosi Setekia. 
Jeremiah52:6 Ya re ka kgwedi ya bone, ka letsatsi le le ferang mongwe fela, tlala ya bo e le botlhoko bobe mo motseng, batho ba lefatshe ba bo ba bile ba tlhoka dijo." 
Jeremiah52:7 Foo ga ntshiwa phatlha mo motseng, mme batlhabani ba tshaba, ba tswa mo motseng bosigo, ka tsela ya kgoro e e fa gare ga dithako tse pedi, e e fa tshimong ya kgosi; (mme Bakalatea ba bo ba dikile motse); mme batshabi ba ya le tsela ya Araba." 
Jeremiah52:8 Ntwa ya Bakalatea ya konatelela kgosi, mme ya tshwara Setekia mo dipaleng tsa Jeriko; mme ntwa ya gagwe yotlhe ya bo e mo phatlalaletse." 
Jeremiah52:9 Foo a tsaya kgosi, ba e isa kwa kgosing ya Babilone kwa Ribela mo lefatsheng la Hamathe; mme ya atlhola ka ga gagwe." 
Jeremiah52:10 Kgosi ya Babilone ya bolaya bomorwa Setekia fa pele ga matlho a gagwe; a ba a bolaela dikgosana tsotlhe tsa Juta mo Ribela. 
Jeremiah52:11 A gonya Setekia matlho; mme kgosi ya Babilone ya mo golega ka mehiri, ya mo isa Babilone, mme ya mo tsenya mo ntlong ya kgolegelo go ya go fitlha kwa letsatsing la loso lwa gagwe." 
Jeremiah52:12 Jaana e rile ka kgwedi ya botlhano, ka letsatsi la lesome la kgwedi, e le ngwaga wa 19 wa ga Nebukatenesare kgosi ya Babilone, Nebusaratane molaodi wa balebedi, yo o ne a tle a eme fa pele ga kgosi ya Babilone, a tla Jerusalema." 
Jeremiah52:13 A fisa ntlo ya ga Jehofa, le ntlo ya kgosi; le matlo otlhe a Jerusalema, e bong ntlo nngwe le nngwe e kgolo a e fisa ka molelo." 
Jeremiah52:14 Ntwa yotlhe ya Bakalatea, e e nang le molaodi wa balebedi, ya thuba dithako tsa Jerusalema mo tikologong." 
Jeremiah52:15 Foo Nebusaratane molaodi wa balebedi a tlosa bahumanegi ba batho e le ditshwarwa, le masalela a batho a a tlogetsweng mo motseng, le ba ba ngwegileng, ba ngwegetse kwa kgosing ya Babilone, le masalela a bontsi jwa batho." 
Jeremiah52:16 Nebusaratane molaodi wa balebedi a tlogela ba bahumanegi ba lefatshe, gore ba nne babaakanyi ba mafine le balemi." 
Jeremiah52:17 Maotwana a kgotlho a a ne a le mo ntlong ya ga Jehofa, le ditlhomo, le lewatle la kgotlho, tse di ne di le mo ntlong ya ga Jehofa, Bakalatea ba di thubaganya, mme kgotlho yotlhe ya tsone ba e isa Babilone." 
Jeremiah52:18 Le dipitsa, le diolela melora, le dipoma tsa dipone, le megotšana le dintshwana, le dijana tsotlhe tsa kgotlho tse ba ne ba direla ka tsone, ba tsamaya ka tsone." 
Jeremiah52:19 Le dinwelo, le diolela molelo, le megotšana, le dipitsa, le ditlhomo tsa dipone, le dintshwana, le megopo; se e neng e le sa gouta, e le gouta, le se e neng e le sa selefera, e le selefera, molaodi wa balebedi a tsamaya ka tsone." 
Jeremiah52:20 Maotwana a mabedi, lewatle le lengwe fela, le dipoo tse di 12 tsa kgotlho, tse di ne di tshegeditse ditlhomo, tse kgosi Solomone o kileng a di direla ntlo ya ga Jehofa; kgotlho ya dilwana tsotlhe tse e ne e sena selekanyo." 
Jeremiah52:21 Ka ga maotwana, bogodimo jwa lekotwana lengwe e ne e le jwa dimetara di le 8; mme ya bo e dikolositswe thathelelo e e dimetara di le tlhano; mme bokweno jwa yone e ne e le dimilimeta ra di le 75; mme e ne e le logapa fela." 
Jeremiah52:22 Go ne go le tlhogwana ya kgotlho mo godimo; mme bogodimo jwa tlhogwana e le nngwe fela bo ne bo le dimetara di ka nna pedi, le tiro ya selotloa, le digaranata mo tlhogwaneng tikologong, gotlhe fela e le kgotlho; lekotwana la bobedi le ne le na le dilo tse di ntseng jalo, le digaranata." 
Jeremiah52:23 Go ne go na le digaranata di le 96 ka fa ditlhakoreng; digaranata tsotlhe di ne di le lekgolo mo tikologong ya tiro ya selotloa. 
Jeremiah52:24 Mme molaodi wa balebedi a tsaya Seraia moperesiti yo mogolo, le Sefania moperesiti wa bobedi, le balebedi ba kgoro boo bararo." 
Jeremiah52:25 Mo motseng a tsaya molaodisiwa mongwe yo o ne a laodisitswe batlhabani; le banna ba supa mo go ba ba neng ba tle ba bone sefatlhogo sa kgosi, ba ba fitlhetsweng mo motseng; le mokwaledi wa molaodi wa ntwa, yo o ne a tle a phuthe batho ba lefatshe; le banna ba 60 ba lefatshe, ba ba fitlhetsweng mo gare ga motse." 
Jeremiah52:26 Nebusaratane molaodi wa balebedi a ba tsaya, a ba isa kwa kgosing ya Babilone kwa Ribela." 
Jeremiah52:27 Kgosi ya Babilone ya ba kgemetha, ya ba bolaela mo Ribela mo lefatsheng la Hamathe. Jalo ba Juta ba tlosiwa mo lefatsheng la ga bone e le ditshwarwa fela." 
Jeremiah52:28 Tšhaba e ke yone e Nebukatenesare o ne a e tlosa e le ditshwarwa; ka ngwaga wa bosupa Bajuta ba tlosiwa ba le 3 023. 
Jeremiah52:29 Ka ngwaga wa 18 wa ga Nebukatenesare a isa batho ba le 832, ba tlosiwa mo Jerusalema." 
Jeremiah52:30 Ka ngwaga wa 23 wa ga Nebukatenesare, Nebusaratane molaodi wa balebedi a isa botshwarong Bajuta ba le 745; ba le mmogo batho bao e ne e le 4 600." 
Jeremiah52:31 Ga dirala ya re ka ngwaga wa 37 wa botshwaro jwa ga Jehoiakine kgosi ya Juta, ka kgwedi ya 12, ka tsatsi la 25, Efile-merotake kgosi ya Babilone, ka ngwaga wa ntlha wa puso ya gagwe a tsholetsa tlhogo ya ga Jehoiakine kgosi ya Juta, mme a mo ntsha mo ntlong ya kgolegelo." 
Jeremiah52:32 A bua sentle nae, a baya setulo sa gagwe sa bogosi godimo ga ditulo tsa dikgosi tse di nang nae mo Babilone." 
Jeremiah52:33 A mo apola diaparo tsa ntlo ya kgolegelo a mo apesa di sele, a ja dijo fa pele ga gagwe ka metlha yotlhe ya botshelo jwa gagwe." 
Jeremiah52:34 Ka ga mojo wa gagwe, o ne a newa mojo ka metlha yotlhe ke kgosi ya Babilone, mojo ka tsatsi lengwe le lengwe go ya go fitlha mo letsatsing la loso lwa gagwe, ka metlha yotlhe ya botshelo jwa gagwe." 
Lamentations1:1 Ana motse o dutse o ntse matlotla jang, o o neng o ntse o tletse batho! O fetogile mosadi wa motlholagadi jang! Ene yo o ne a le mogolo mo merafeng, e le morwadia kgosi mo dikgaolong tsa lefatshe, o tsile a nna montsha lekgetho jang!" 
Lamentations1:2 O lela mo go botlhoko bosigo, dikeledi tsa gagwe di mo marameng a gagwe; mo baratweng botlhe ba gagwe, ga a na ope yo o mo gomotsang; ditsala tsotlhe tsa gagwe di mo diretse ka bolotsana, di fetogile baba ba gagwe." 
Lamentations1:3 Juta o ile botshwarong ka ntlha ya patiko, le ka ntlha ya botlhanka jo bogolo; o agile mo merafeng, ga a bone boikhutso. Babogisi botlhe ba gagwe ba mo tshwaretse mo teng ga mogala wa gopo." 
Lamentations1:4 Ditsela tsa Sione di a hutsafala, ka go bo go sa tle ope phuthegong e e laotsweng; dikgoro tsotlhe tsa gagwe di swafetse; baperesiti ba gagwe ba a fegelwa; makgarebane a gagwe a a patikwa, le ene ka esi o mo bogalakeng." 
Lamentations1:5 Baganetsi ba gagwe ba fetogile ba nna tlhogo, baba ba gagwe ba a segofala; gonne Jehofa o mo patikile ka ntlha ya bontsi jwa ditlolo tsa gagwe. Banyana ba bannye ba gagwe ba ile botshwarong fa pele ga moganetsi." 
Lamentations1:6 Mo go morwadia Sione bontle jotlhe jwa gagwe bo tlogile; dikgosana tsa gagwe di fetogile di ntse jaaka dikwalata tse di sa boneng bofulo, mme di tsamaile, di koafetse fa pele ga mokonatedi." 
Lamentations1:7 Mo metlheng ya patikego ya gagwe, le mo manyobonyobong a gagwe, Jerusalema o gakologelwa dilo tsotlhe tsa gagwe tse di eletsegang tsa metlha ya bogologolo; e rile batho ba gagwe ba wela mo seatleng sa mmaba, mme go se na ope yo o mo thusang, baganetsi ba mmona, ba sotla ka ditshwafalo tsa gagwe." 
Lamentations1:8 Jerusalema o leofile thata; ke gone o fetogile o ntse jaaka selo se se maswe; botlhe ba ba kileng ba mo tlotla ba a mo nyatsa, ka ba bonye bosaikategang jwa gagwe. Ee, o a fegelwa, mme o retologile kwa morago." 
Lamentations1:9 Bomaswe jwa gagwe bo ne bo le mo ditswalong tsa gagwe tse di kgokgothang; ga a ka a gakologelwa bokhutlo jwa gagwe; ke gone o ileng kwa tlase mo go gakgamatsang; ga a na mogomotsi. “Jehofa, bona patikego ya me; gonne mmaba o ikgodisitse.”" 
Lamentations1:10 Moganetsi o atlareleditse mo dilong tsotlhe tsa gagwe tse di eletsegang diatla. Gonne o bonye fa merafe e tsenye mo felong ga gagwe ga boitshepo, ba o laotseng ka ga bone, wa re: Ba se ka ba tsena mo phuthegong ya gago." 
Lamentations1:11 Batho botlhe ba gagwe ba a fegelwa, ba batla dijo; ba ntshitse dilo tsa bone tse di eletsegang ba anantse ka tsone dijo tsa go ikidibolola ka tsone. “Jehofa, a ko o lebe, o bone; gonne ke befile thata.”" 
Lamentations1:12 “A e a bo e se sepe mo go lona lotlhe ba lo fetang ka tsela? Lebang, lo bone bo go na le bohutsana bongwe jo bo tshwanang le bohutsana jwa me, jo ke bo dirwang, jo Jehofa o mpatikileng ka jone mo motlheng wa bogale jwa gagwe jo bo tukang." 
Lamentations1:13 O tsentse molelo o o tswang godimong mo marapong a me, mme wa a fenya. O aletse dinao tsa me lotloa, o mpuseditse kwa morago; o ntshwafaditse, o nkidibaditse motshegare otlhe." 
Lamentations1:14 “Jokwe ya ditlolo tsa me e golegilwe ke seatla sa gagwe; di logantswe, di palame mo thamong ya me; o tlhaedisitse thata ya me, Morena o ntsentse mo diatleng tsa batho ba ke se nang thata ya go emalana nabo." 
Lamentations1:15 Morena o nyaditse banna ba ba diganka botlhe ba me mo gare ga me; o mpileditse phuthego e e masisi go tla go pitla makau a me. Morena o gatakile kgarebana morwadia Juta jaaka e ka bo e le mo kgatisetsong ya bojalwa jwa mofine. 
Lamentations1:16 “Ke lelela dilo tse; leitlho la me, leitlho la me le tshologa metsi; ka go bo mogomotsi yo o ne a tshwanetse go rudisa mowa wa me o kgakala le nna. Bana ba me ba ntse lore fela, gonne mmaba o fentse.”" 
Lamentations1:17 Sione o atlaretse diatla tsa gagwe; ga go na ope yo o mo gomotsang; Jehofa o laotse ka ga Jakobe, gore ba ba mo tikologong ya gagwe e nne baganetsi ba gagwe. Jerusalema o ntse mo go bone jaaka selo se se maswe." 
Lamentations1:18 “Jehofa o tshiamo; gonne ke tsuololetse taolo ya gagwe. Ke a lo rapela, utlwang lona ditšhaba tsotlhe, lo bone bohutsana jwa me. Makgarebane a me, le makau a me a ile botshwarong." 
Lamentations1:19 Ka bitsa baratiwa ba me, mme ba ntsieditse; baperesiti ba me le bagolwane ba me ba gonogela mo motseng, ba sa ntse ba batla dijo tsa go ikidibolola ka tsone." 
Lamentations1:20 “Jehofa a ko o lebe, gonne ke mo pitlaganong, boteng jwa me bo huduegile; pelo ya me e pitikologile mo teng ga me; gonne ke tsuolotse thata; kwa ntle tšhaka e thukhutha batho bana, le mo gae go ntse jaaka loso fela." 
Lamentations1:21 Ba utlwile fa ke fegelwa; ga go na ope yo o ka nkgomotsang; baba botlhe ba me ba utlwetse pitlagano ya me; ba itumela ka o go dirile. O tlaa fitlhisa letsatsi le o le boletseng, mme ba tlaa tshwana le nna." 
Lamentations1:22 “A boikepo jotlhe jwa bone bo tle fa pele ga gago; o ba direle jaaka o ntireletse ditlolo tsotlhe tsa me. Gonne diphegelo tsa me di dintsi, le pelo ya me e idibetse.”" 
Lamentations2:1 Ana Morena o khurumeditse jang morwadia Sione ka leru mo bogaleng jwa gagwe! O ntshitse bontle jwa Iseraele mo legodimong a bo latlhela fa fatshe, ga a a gakologelwa sebeo sa gagwe sa dinao mo letsatsing la bogale jwa gagwe." 
Lamentations2:2 Morena o komeditse manno otlhe a ga Jakobe, a se ka a tlhomoga pelo; o digile dikago tse di thata tsa phemelo tsa morwadia Juta mo bogaleng jwa gagwe; o di foloseditse fela fa fatshe, o tlhapaditse bogosi le dikgosana tsa jone." 
Lamentations2:3 O kgaotse dinaka tsotlhe tsa Iseraele mo bogaleng jo bo tukang; o gonne letsogo la gagwe le legolo fa pele ga mmaba; mme o laitse Jakobe jaaka molelo o o tutumang, o o lailang ntlheng tsotlhe." 
Lamentations2:4 O laetse bora jwa gagwe jaaka mmaba, o eme, letsogo la gagwe le legolo le ntse jaaka moganetsi, o bile o bolaile gotlhe mo go neng go eletsega mo matlhong; o goromeditse tšararego ya gagwe jaaka molelo mo mogopeng wa morwadia Sione." 
Lamentations2:5 Morena o fetogile o ntse jaaka mmaba, o komeditse Iseraele; o komeditse matlo otlhe a gagwe a dikgosi, o sentse dikago tsa gagwe tse di thata tsa phemelo, mo go morwadia Juta o ntsifaditse selelo le khutsafalo." 
Lamentations2:6 O tlositse loobo lwa gagwe ka thata, jaaka e ka bo e le lwa tshimo; o sentse felo ga gagwe ga bophuthegelo; Jehofa o dirile gore phuthego e e masisi le sabata di lebalwe mo Sione, mo kgakalong ya bogale jwa gagwe o nyaditse kgosi le moperesiti." 
Lamentations2:7 Morena o itatotse sebeso sa gagwe, o tlhoile felo ga gagwe ga boitshepo, dithako tsa matlo a gagwe a dikgosi o di tsentse mo seatleng sa mmaba; ba tsositse modumo mo ntlong ya ga Jehofa jaaka mo tsatsing la phuthego e e masisi." 
Lamentations2:8 Jehofa o ikaeletse go senya lorako lwa morwadia Sione; o namaladitse thapo, ga a ise a gone seatla sa gagwe mo go senyeng; o dirile gore kago ya phemelo le lorako di hutsafale; di topetege mmogo." 
Lamentations2:9 Ditswalo tsa gagwe di rorometse mo mmung; o sentse o robakile mephakalego ya gagwe. Kgosi ya gagwe le dikgosana tsa gagwe di mo merafeng kwa molao o seyong gone ee, baperofeti ba gagwe ga ba bone ponatshegelo epe e e tswang kwa go Jehofa." 
Lamentations2:10 Bagolwane ba morwadia Sione ba dutse fa fatshe ba didimetse; ba kubuetsa lorole mo tlhogong tsa bone; ba ikokwaetse ka letsela la kgetse. Makgarebane a Jerusalema a ikobela ditlhogo fa fatshe. 
Lamentations2:11 Matlho a me a kalega ka dikeledi, boteng jwa me bo fuduegile, sebete sa me se gorometsegetse fa fatshe, ka ntlha ya tshenyego ya morwadia batho ba me; gonne banyana le ba ba anyang ba ngategela mo mebileng ya motse." 
Lamentations2:12 Ba raya bommaabo, ba re: “Mabele a kae le bojalwa jwa mofine?” Mogang ba ngategang jaaka ba ba tlhabilweng mo mebileng ya motse, mogang mowa wa bone o goromelediwang mo sefubeng sa bommaabo." 
Lamentations2:13 Ke tlaa go supetsa eng? Ke tlaa go tshwantsha le eng, wena morwadia Jerusalema? Ke tlaa go lekanya le eng gore ke tle ke go gomotse, wena morwadia Sione wa kgarebana? Gonne thubego ya gago e kgolo jaaka lewatle; e mang yo o ka go fodisang?" 
Lamentations2:14 Baperofeti ba gago ba go bonetse diponatshegelo tsa boithamako le bonyana; mme ga ba ise ba lemoge boikepo jwa gago gore ba tle ba buse botshwaro jwa gago. Ba go bonetse ditao tsa boithamako, le dilo tse di tlaa go lelekang mo lefatsheng." 
Lamentations2:15 Botlhe ba ba fetang ka tsela ba go opanyetsa diatla; ba a otsa, ba thukhuthela morwadia Jerusalema tlhogo ba re: “A ke one motse o batho ba ne ba o bitsa ba re: ‘Bontle jo bo tletseng,’ ba re: ‘Boitumelo jwa lefatshe lotlhe’ ”" 
Lamentations2:16 Baba botlhe ba gago ba go atlhamoloseditse molomo; ba a otsa, ba huranya meno ba re: “Re mo komeditse; ruri ke one motlha o re ntseng re o lebeletse; re o fitlhetse, re o bonye.”" 
Lamentations2:17 Jehofa o dirile se o se ikaeletseng; o dirafaditse lefoko la gagwe le o le laotseng mo metlheng ya bogologolo; o digile, a sa tlhomoge pelo. O dirile gore mmaba a go jele koma, o goleditse lonaka lwa baba ba gago." 
Lamentations2:18 Pelo ya bone ya goela kwa go Morena; wena lorako lwa morwadia Sione, a dikeledi di elele jaaka noka motshegare le bosigo; o se ka wa inaya lobaka; a nyetse ya leitlho la gago e se khutle." 
Lamentations2:19 Nanoga, o kue mo bosigong, mo tshimologong ya ditebelo; thela pelo ya gago jaaka metsi fa pele ga sefatlhogo sa Morena; mo tsholeletse diatla tsa gago ka ga botshelo jwa banyana ba gago ba bannye, ba ba idibalang ka tlala fa dibaeng tsa mebila yotlhe fela." 
Lamentations2:20 Leba Jehofa, o bone ba o ba diretseng jaana! A basadi ba tlaa ja loumo lwa bone, e bong banyana ba ba akgolwang ka mabogo? A moperesiti le moperofeti ba tlaa bolaelwa mo felong ga boitshepo ga Morena?" 
Lamentations2:21 Tshimane le nnakgolo di namaletse fa fatshe mo mebileng; makgarebane a me le makau a me a ole ka tšhaka; o a bolaile mo motlheng wa bogale jwa gago; o bolaile o sa tlhomoge pelo. 
Lamentations2:22 O biditse ditheregiso tsa me mo ntlheng tsotlhe jaaka mo tsatsing la phuthego e e masisi, mme go ne go sa falola le fa e le go sala ope mo motlheng wa bogale jwa ga Jehofa. Ba ke ba akgotseng ka ba otla, mmaba wa me o ba jele o ba supuditse." 
Lamentations3:1 Ke nna monna yo ke bonyeng pogiso ka thupa ya go šakgala ga gagwe. 
Lamentations3:2 O nkgogile, o ntsamaisitse mo lefifing e seng mo leseding." 
Lamentations3:3 Ruri o tlhola a busetsa letsogo la gagwe go tlhabana le nna gangwe le gape motshegare otlhe. 
Lamentations3:4 O onaditse nama ya me le letlalo la me; o robile marapo a me. 
Lamentations3:5 O agile dikago tsa go tlhabana le nna, mme o ntikanyeditse ka mo go galakang le ka tapisego." 
Lamentations3:6 O mpatikile go aga mo mafelong a a lefifi, jaaka ba ba sa bolong go swa." 
Lamentations3:7 O ntsentse gare ka logora, ga ke na go tswela kwa ntle; ketane ya me o e ketefaditse." 
Lamentations3:8 Ee, ya re fa ke goa ke kuela thuso, a tswalele morapelo wa me kwa ntle." 
Lamentations3:9 O kganetse ditsela tsa me ka dithako tsa maje a a betlilweng, o sokamisitse ditsela tsa me." 
Lamentations3:10 Mo go nna o ntse jaaka bera e e laletseng, jaaka tau mo mafelong a boiphitlhelo." 
Lamentations3:11 O fapositse ditsela tsa me, o nkgagogantse; o ntshwafaditse." 
Lamentations3:12 O laetse bora jwa gagwe, o ntlhomile sekonopiwa sa go fulwa ka motswi." 
Lamentations3:13 O tsenyeditse metswi ya mokotlopo wa gagwe mo diphilong tsa me. 
Lamentations3:14 Ke dule setshego mo bathong botlhe ba me, le sefela sa bone motshegare otlhe." 
Lamentations3:15 O ntladitse bogalaka, o ntlopetse ka longana." 
Lamentations3:16 O bile o nthobile meno ka lošagarana, o nkhurumeditse ka melora." 
Lamentations3:17 O tloseditse mowa wa me kgakala le kagiso; ka lebala tlhogonolofalo. 
Lamentations3:18 Ka re: “Thata ya me e nyeletse, le tebelelo ya me mo go Jehofa.”" 
Lamentations3:19 Gopola pogisego ya me le manyobonyobo a me, longana le santlhokwe." 
Lamentations3:20 Mowa wa me o sa ntse o di gopotse, mme o obegile mo teng ga me." 
Lamentations3:21 Ke a ikgakolola go mo, mme ke gone ke nang le tsholofelo." 
Lamentations3:22 Fa e bo ne ne re sa nyelediwe jaana ke ka ntlha ya mapelonomi a ga Jehofa, le ka go bo matlhomoga pelo a gagwe a sa tlhaele." 
Lamentations3:23 A ntse maša ka meso le meso; boikanngo jwa gago bo bogolo. 
Lamentations3:24 “Jehofa ke kabelo ya me,” go bua mowa wa me: “ke gone ke tlaa solofelang mo go ene.”" 
Lamentations3:25 Jehofa o molemo mo go ba ba mo lebelelang, le mo moweng o o mmatlang." 
Lamentations3:26 Go molemo gore motho a solofele a be a lebelele poloka ya ga Jehofa a iketlile fela. 
Lamentations3:27 Go molemo mo monneng go rwala jokwe mo bokaung jwa gagwe. 
Lamentations3:28 A a dule a le esi, a didimale ka a e beile mo go ene." 
Lamentations3:29 A a beye molomo wa gagwe mo loroleng; e tle e re kgotsa go bo go na le tsholofelo. 
Lamentations3:30 A a neele yo o mo tlhanyang lesama la gagwe; a a tladiwe kgobo, e tlale." 
Lamentations3:31 Gonne Morena ga a ketla a latlhela ruri. 
Lamentations3:32 Gonne le fa a hutsafatsa, o tlaa tlhomoga pelo ka fa bontsing jwa mautlwelobotlhoko a gagwe." 
Lamentations3:33 Gonne ga a bogise ka go rata, le fa e le go hutsafatsa bana ba batho." 
Lamentations3:34 Go gatakela bagolegwi botlhe ba lefatshe," 
Lamentations3:35 go faposa tshiamelo ya monna fa pele ga sefatlhogo sa Mogodimodimo," 
Lamentations3:36 go phetsolela motho mafoko a gagwe, a a sekwang, dilo tse, Morena ga a di rate." 
Lamentations3:37 E mang yo o buang, mme go dirafale, fa Morena a sa laola jalo?" 
Lamentations3:38 Mo molomong wa Mogodimodimo a ga go tle go tswe bosula le molemo? 
Lamentations3:39 Ana motho yo o tshedileng o ngongoregelang, e le motho, ka ntlha ya go belediwa dibe tsa gagwe?" 
Lamentations3:40 A re kheleiseng re lekeng ditsela tsa rona, re be re sokologele mo go Jehofa." 
Lamentations3:41 A re tsholeletseng Modimo mo magodimong dipelo di na le diatla tsa rona. 
Lamentations3:42 “Re tlodile, re tsuoletse; ga o a re itshwarela." 
Lamentations3:43 “O re khurumeditse ka bogale, wa re konatelela; o bolaile, ga o a tlhomoga pelo." 
Lamentations3:44 O ikhurumeditse ka leru, gore morapelo wa rona o se le phololele." 
Lamentations3:45 O re dirile ra nna jaaka mokgona le se se latlhwang mo gare ga ditšhaba. 
Lamentations3:46 Baba botlhe ba rona ba re atlhamoloseditse melomo. 
Lamentations3:47 Poifo le molete di re tletse, le pheretlho le tshenyo." 
Lamentations3:48 Leitlho la me le elela dinoka tsa metsi, ka ntlha ya tshenyego ya morwadia batho ba me." 
Lamentations3:49 “Leitlho la me le a tsholola, ga le khutle, ga go kgaoge gope." 
Lamentations3:50 Go tsamaye Jehofa a okomele, a lebe a le kwa legodimong." 
Lamentations3:51 Leitlho la me le tlhokofatsa mowa wa me, ka ntlha ya bomorwadia motse wa gaetsho otlhe fela." 
Lamentations3:52 Ba e leng baba ba me fela e seng ka sepe, ba ntelekile mo go botlhoko jaaka nonyane." 
Lamentations3:53 Ba nkgaoletse botshelo mo moleteng, ba latlhetse letlapa godimo ga me." 
Lamentations3:54 Metsi a ne a elela godimo ga tlhogo ya me; ka re: ‘Ke kgaotswe.’ 
Lamentations3:55 “Ka bitsa leina la gago Jehofa, ke le mo moleteng o o kwa tengteng." 
Lamentations3:56 O ne wa utlwa lentswe la me; o se ka wa subela phegelo ya me le go goa ga me tsebe. 
Lamentations3:57 O ne wa atamela mo motlheng o ke go biditseng ka one wa re: ‘Se boife.’ 
Lamentations3:58 “Morena, o mpueletse mafoko a mowa wa me a tsheko; o rekolotse botshelo jwa me." 
Lamentations3:59 Jehofa, o bonye patikego ya me; a ko o atlhole mafoko a me." 
Lamentations3:60 O bonye pusoloso yotlhe ya bone, le maano otlhe a ba a ntogetseng." 
Lamentations3:61 O utlwile kgobo ya bone, Jehofa, le maano otlhe a ba a ntogetseng;" 
Lamentations3:62 le dipounama tsa ba ba ntsogologetseng, le go akanya ga bone ka ga me motshegare otlhe." 
Lamentations3:63 Leba go dula ga bone, le go nanoga ga bone; ke ntse sefela sa bone fela." 
Lamentations3:64 “Jehofa, o tlaa ba naya tuelo ka fa tirong ya diatla tsa bone." 
Lamentations3:65 O tlaa ba naya kgwalalo ya pelo, phutso ya gago e tlaa nna mo go bone." 
Lamentations3:66 O tlaa ba konatelela mo bogaleng, o tlaa ba senyetsa ruri ba tloge fa tlase ga magodimo a ga Jehofa.”" 
Lamentations4:1 Ana gouta e kgonne jang! Gouta e e itshekileng thata e fetogile jang? Maje a felo ga boitshepo a thelegetse fa dibaeng tsa mebila yotlhe fela. 
Lamentations4:2 Bomorwa Sione ba ba tlhekeeditsweng, ba ba tshwantshiwang le gouta e e itshekileng, ba kaiwa jang jaaka dinkgwana tsa letsopa, tiro ya diatla tsa mmopi wa dipitsa!" 
Lamentations4:3 Le e leng bophokoje ba tle ba ntshe letsele ba amuse bana ba bone, morwadia batho ba me o fetogile bolalome, o ntse jaaka bontšhe mo nageng." 
Lamentations4:4 Loleme lwa ngwanyana yo o anyang lo ngaparela magalapa a gagwe ka lenyora, banyana ba lopa senkgwe, mme ga go na motho ope yo o se ba ngathelang." 
Lamentations4:5 Ba ba kileng ba ja mo letlepung ba bile ba swafetse mo mebileng, ba ba otlilweng ba apere bohibidu jo bo letlhololo ba bile ba ngaparetse dithotobolo." 
Lamentations4:6 Gonne boikepo jwa morwadia batho ba me bo feta boleo jwa Sotoma, o o ribegeditsweng ka ponyo ya leitlho, go sa bewa diatla dipe mo go ene." 
Lamentations4:7 Batho ba gagwe ba batona ba kile ba ne ba itshekile bogolo go kapoko, ba le basweu bogolo go maši; mo mmeleng ba ne ba le bohibidu bogolo go korala, go redimoga ga bone go ne go ntse jaaka ga safire." 
Lamentations4:8 Ponalo ya bone e ntsho bogolo go magala; ga ba itsiwe mo mebileng, letlalo la bone le ngaparetse marapo a bone; le sosobaganye, le ntse jaaka logong fela." 
Lamentations4:9 Ba ba bolawang ka tšhaka ba gaisa ba ba bolawang ke go bopama; gonne bao ba tlhorega fela, ba topetswe ke go tlhoka maungo a masimo." 
Lamentations4:10 Diatla tsa basadi ba ba pelonamagadi di apeile bana ba bone tota; e ne e le dijo tsa bone mo tshenyegong ya morwadia batho ba me. 
Lamentations4:11 Jehofa o dirafaditse tšararego ya gagwe, o goromeditse bogale jwa gagwe jo bo tukang; o tshubile molelo mo Sione o o laitseng metheo ya teng." 
Lamentations4:12 Dikgosi tsa lefatshe ga di a ka tsa dumela, le fa e le banni botlhe ba lefatshe, fa moganetsi le mmaba ba ka tsena mo dikgorong tsa Jerusalema." 
Lamentations4:13 Ke ka ntlha ya maleo a baperofeti ba gagwe, le maikepo a baperesiti ba gagwe, ba ba tsholotseng madi a basiami mo gare ga gagwe." 
Lamentations4:14 Ba kaila fela jaaka difofu mo mebileng, ba leswefetse ka madi, batho ba bile ba retelelwa ke go ama diaparo tsa bone." 
Lamentations4:15 Ba ne ba ba goelela, ba re: “Tlogang, lo maswe! Tlogang, tlogang, se ameng.” E rile ba tshaba ba timela, batho ba bua mo merafeng ba re: “Ga ba ketla ba tlhola ba jaka mono.”" 
Lamentations4:16 Bogale jwa ga Jehofa bo ba kgaogantse; ga a ketla a tlhola a ba tlhokomela. Ga ba a ka ba tlotla sebele sa baperesiti, ga ba a ka ba ya ntlheng ya bagolwane." 
Lamentations4:17 Matlho a rona a sa ntse a bokalala ka go senka thuso ya rona ya lefela; mo go lebeleng ga rona re lebeletse morafe o o ne o sa kake wa boloka. 
Lamentations4:18 Ba tsoma dikgato tsa rona, re bile re retelelwa ke go tsamaya mo mebileng ya rona. Bokhutlo jwa rona bo gaufi, malatsi a rona a fetile; gonne bokhutlo jwa rona bo fitlhile." 
Lamentations4:19 Bakonatedi ba rona ba ne ba le bofefo bogolo go bontswi ba batona ba loapi; ba re lelekile mo dithabeng ba re laletse mo gare ga naga. 
Lamentations4:20 Mowa wa dinko tsa rona, e bong motlodiwa wa ga Jehofa o ne a tshwarwa ka mamena a bone; ene yo re buileng ka ga gagwe, ra re: “Re tlaa aga mo merafeng re le fa tlase ga moriti wa gagwe.”" 
Lamentations4:21 Wena morwadia Etome, yo o agileng mo lefatsheng la Use, itumele o ipele; senwelo se tlaa ralalela le kwa go wena; o tlaa tagwa, mme o tlaa itsola." 
Lamentations4:22 Kgophololelo ya boikepo jwa gago e dirafetse, wena morwadia Sione; ga a ketla a tlhola a go isa botshwarong; o tlaa sekisa boikepo jwa gago, wena morwadia Etome; o tlaa senola maleo a gago." 
Lamentations5:1 Jehofa, gakologelwa se se re tletseng; leba, mme o bone kgobo ya rona." 
Lamentations5:2 Boswa jwa rona bo pitikololetswe baeng, matlo a rona a neilwe ba tšhaba di sele." 
Lamentations5:3 Re masiela, re bile re se na borraetsho, bommaarona ba ntse jaaka batlholagadi fela." 
Lamentations5:4 Metsi a rona re a nole ka go a reka ka madi; dikgong tsa rona di rekisiwa mo go rona. 
Lamentations5:5 Bakonatedi ba rona ba mo dithamong tsa rona; re lapile, ga re na boikhutso." 
Lamentations5:6 Re naanye diatla le Baegepeto, le Baasiria, gore re tle re kgore dijo." 
Lamentations5:7 Borraetsho ba leofile, mme ga ba yo; rona re belege maikepo a bone." 
Lamentations5:8 Batlhanka ba a re laola: ga go na ope yo o ka re gololang mo seatleng sa bone. 
Lamentations5:9 Re bona dijo tsa rona re le mo kotlomanong ya polao, ka ntlha ya tšhaka ya naga." 
Lamentations5:10 Letlalo la rona le lentsho jaaka pesetso ka ntlha ya mogote o o fisang wa go bopama. 
Lamentations5:11 Ba beteletse basadi mo Sione, le barweetsana mo metseng ya Juta." 
Lamentations5:12 Dikgosana di ne di pegwa di lepelediwa di akgega ka mabogo a tsone, difatlhogo tsa bagolwane di ne di sa tlotlwe." 
Lamentations5:13 Makau a ne a rwala lolwala, le banyana ba kgokgoetsega ba rwele dikgong." 
Lamentations5:14 Bagolwane ba khutlile mo kgotleng, makau a khutlile mo go opeleng ga one." 
Lamentations5:15 Boitumelo jwa pelo tsa rona bo khutlile; pina ya rona e fetogile bohutsana. 
Lamentations5:16 Serwalo se ole mo tlhogong ya rona. A batho ba bagolo, rona! Gonne re leofile." 
Lamentations5:17 Dipelo tsa rona di idibetse ka ntlha ya mo; matlho a rona a otofala ka ntlha ya dilo tse. 
Lamentations5:18 Ka ntlha ya thaba ya Sione, e e swafetseng; bophokoje ba tsamaya mo go yone fela." 
Lamentations5:19 Wena Jehofa, o ntse ka bosakhutleng; setulo sa gago sa bogosi se ntse mo tshikatshikeng tsotlhe." 
Lamentations5:20 O re lebala ka bosakhutleng ka ntlha yang, o re latlhelang ka lobaka lo lo kanakana?" 
Lamentations5:21 Re sokololele kwa go wena, Morena, mme re tlaa bo re sokologile; šafatsa metlha ya rona jaaka bogologolo." 
Lamentations5:22 Mme o ganetse ruri, o re tšararagetse thata." 
Ezekiel1:1 Jaana ga dirala e rile ka ngwaga wa 30, ka kgwedi ya bone, ka letsatsi la botlhano la kgwedi, ke le mo batshwarwing fa nokeng ya Kebare, magodimo a atlhamologa; mme ka bona diponatshegelo tsa Modimo." 
Ezekiel1:2 Ya re ka letsatsi la botlhano la kgwedi, e le ka ngwaga wa botlhano wa botshwaro jwa ga Joiakine," 
Ezekiel1:3 lefoko la ga Jehofa la tla le siametse kwa go Esekiele, moperesiti, morwa Busi, mo lefatsheng la Bakalatea fa nokeng ya Kebare; mme seatla sa ga Jehofa sa nna gone mo go ene." 
Ezekiel1:4 Ka leba, mme bonang, sefefo sa tswa ntlheng ya botsheka, leru le legolo, le molelo o o imenaganyang, le na le phatsimo tikologong ya lone, mme mo gare ga lone ga tswa e kete mmala wa motsodutsokwane mo gare ga molelo." 
Ezekiel1:5 Mo gare ga lone ga tswa setshwano sa ditshedi di le nne. Mme e ke yone ponalo ya tsone; di ne di na le setshwano sa motho. 
Ezekiel1:6 Sengwe le sengwe sa tsone sa bo se na le difatlhogo di le nne, e bile sengwe le sengwe sa tsone sa bo se na le diphuka di le nne." 
Ezekiel1:7 Maoto a tsone e ne e le maoto a a tlhamaletseng fela; mme pato ya dinao tsa tsone e ne e ntse jaaka pato ya tlhako ya namane; mme di tsabakela jaaka mmala wa kgotlho e e gotlhilweng. 
Ezekiel1:8 Tsa bo di na le diatla tsa motho fa tlase ga diphuka tsa tsone mo ditlhakoreng tsa tsone tsoo nne; mme difatlhogo le diphuka tsa tsone tsoo nne di ne di ntse jaana, ke go re:" 
Ezekiel1:9 Diphuka tsa tsone di ne di tshwaraganye; fa di tsamaya di ne di sa retologe; sengwe le sengwe se ne se tle se tlhamalalele kwa pele fela. 
Ezekiel1:10 Ka ga setshwano sa difatlhogo tsa tsone, di ne di na le sefatlhogo sa motho; mme mo ntlheng ya ka fa tsogong le legolo di ne di na le sefatlhogo sa tau tsoo nne; mme ka fa ntlheng ya la molema di ne di na le sefatlhogo sa kgomo tsoo nne; di bile di na le sefatlhogo sa ntswi yo motona tsoo nne." 
Ezekiel1:11 Kwa godimo difatlhogo tsa tsone le diphuka tsa tsone di ne di kgaoganye; diphuka di le pedi tsa sengwe le sengwe di tshwaraganye, mme di le pedi tsa bo di apesitse mebele ya tsone." 
Ezekiel1:12 Sengwe le sengwe sa siamela kwa pele fela; kwa mowa o ne o na le go ya gone, tsa ya gone; ga di a ka tsa re di tsamaya tsa menoga." 
Ezekiel1:13 Mo gare ga ditshedi tseo ga bo go na le ponalo nngwe e e tshwanang jaaka magala a molelo a a tukang, jaaka ponalo ya ditime; mme ya tsamaya tsamaya mo gare ga ditshedi, mme molelo o ne o phatsima, mme ga tswa dikgadima mo molelong." 
Ezekiel1:14 Mme ditshedi tsa siana di ba di bowa jaaka go bebenya ga logadima. 
Ezekiel1:15 Jaana ya re ke sa lebile ditshedi, bonang, lekoto le le dikologang le le lengwe fela fa fatshe fa ditsheding, la sengwe le sengwe sa difatlhogo tsa tsone tsoo nne." 
Ezekiel1:16 Ponalo ya maoto a a dikologang le ya tiro ya yone e ne e ntse jaaka mmala wa lentswe la berile; mme ao mane a le tshwano e le nngwe fela: ponalo ya one le tiro ya one go ne go ntse jaaka e kete ke lekotwana le le dikologang mo teng ga lekoto le lengwe. 
Ezekiel1:17 Fa di tsamaya, di bo di tsamaya ka dintlha tsa tsone tsoo nne; fa di tsamaya di be di sa dikologe." 
Ezekiel1:18 Ka ga digogoropo tsa maoto di ne di godile di bile di boitshega; mme digogoropo tsa one ao mane di ne di tletse matlho mo tikologong. 
Ezekiel1:19 E ne e tle e re ditshedi di tsamaya, maoto a a dikologang a tsamaye fa go tsone; mme fa ditshedi di tsholediwa fa fatshe, maoto a tsholediwe." 
Ezekiel1:20 Kwa mowa o ne o na le go ya gone, tsa ya gone; mowa o ne o na le go ya gone fela; mme maoto a a dikologang a tsholediwa fa go tsone; gonne mowa wa setshedi o ne o le mo maotong a a dikologang." 
Ezekiel1:21 E ne e tle e re tseo di tsamaya, le one a tsamaye; mme fa tseo di ema, le one a eme; fa tseo di tsholediwa fa fatshe, maoto a tsholediwa fa go tsone; gonne mowa wa setshedi o no o le mo maotwaneng a a dikologang." 
Ezekiel1:22 Godimo ga tlhogo ya setshedi go ne go okame setshwano sa phuthologo ya loapi, se tshwana jaaka mmala wa legakwa le le boitshegang, se tsharologetse tlhogo tsa tsone fa godimo." 
Ezekiel1:23 Ka fa tlase ga phuthologo ya loapi diphuka tsa tsone di ne di tlhamaletse, longwe lo lebaganye le lo longwe: sengwe le sengwe se ne se na le di le pedi tse di apesang mebele ya tsone ka fa ntlheng e, le sengwe le sengwe se ne se na le di le pedi tse di apesang mebele ya tsone ka fa ntlheng e nngwe." 
Ezekiel1:24 E ne e re di tsamaya, ka utlwa mosumo wa diphuka tsa tsone o ntse jaaka mosumo wa metsi a magolo, jaaka lentswe la Mothatayotlhe, e le mosumo wa pheretlho o ntse jaaka mosumo wa ntwa; e ne e re di ema, di losolole diphuka." 
Ezekiel1:25 Ga bo go le lentswe fa godimo ga phuthologo ya loapi e e okameng ditlhogo tsa tsone; e ne e re di ema, di losolole diphuka." 
Ezekiel1:26 Kwa godimo ga phuthologo ya loapi e e okameng ditlhogo tsa tsone go ne go le setshwano sa setulo sa bogosi, se ntse jaaka ponalo ya lentswe la safire: mme mo godimo ga setshwano sa setulo sa bogosi go ne go le setshwano se se ntseng jaaka ponalo ya motho mo go sone fa godimo." 
Ezekiel1:27 Ka bona ekete mmala wa motsodutsokwane, ekete ponalo ya molelo mo teng ga sone ka ntlha tsotlhe, go simolola ka ponalo ya lotheka lwa gagwe go ya kwa godimo; mme go simolola ka lotheka lwa gagwe go ya kwa tlase ka bona ekete ponalo ya molelo, mme go le phatsimo ntlheng tsotlhe tsa gagwe." 
Ezekiel1:28 Jaaka ponalo ya mola wa godimo o o mo lerung mo motlheng wa pula, ponalo ya phatsimo e ne e ntse jalo mo tikologong. Eo e ne e le ponalo ya kgalalelo ya ga Jehofa. Mme ya re ke e bona, ka wela ka sefatlhogo fa fatshe, mme ka utlwa lentswe la mongwe yo o buang." 
Ezekiel2:1 A nthaya a re: “Morwa motho, ema ka dinao, mme ke tlaa bua nao.”" 
Ezekiel2:2 Ya re a bua le nna mowa wa tsena mo go nna, wa nkemisa ka dinao; mme ka utlwa yo o buang le nna." 
Ezekiel2:3 Mme a nthaya a re: “Morwa motho, ke go roma kwa baneng ba Iseraele, kwa merafeng e e borukhutlhi, e e ntsuololetseng; bone le borraabo ba ntloletse molao, le go tla go fitlha mo tsatsing leno la gompieno." 
Ezekiel2:4 Bana ba ke go romang kwa go bone ba makgakga, ba pelo ya lesoko; mme o tlaa ba raya o re: ‘Morena Modimo o bua jaana, a re.’" 
Ezekiel2:5 Bone, le fa ba utlwa, kgotsa ba gana go utlwa, (gonne ke lekgotla le le borukhutlhi), ba tlaa bo ba itse fa go kile ga ne go le moperofeti mo go bone." 
Ezekiel2:6 “Mme wena, morwa motho, o se ka wa ba boifa le gone o se ka wa boifa mafoko a bone, le fa go na le mengana le mitlwa nao, mme o agile fa gare ga diphepheng; o se ka wa boifa mafoko a bone, o bo o se ka wa rerega ka ponalo ya bone, le fa ba le lekgotla le le borukhutlhi." 
Ezekiel2:7 Wena, o bue mafoko a me nabo, le fa ba utlwa, le fa ba gana go utlwa; gonne ba borukhutlhi mo gogolo thata."
