Ezekiel20:34 Ke tlaa lo ntsha mo ditšhabeng, ke tlaa lo phutha kwa mafatsheng kwa lo gasamesegetseng teng, ka seatla se se thata, le ka letsogo le le otlologileng, le ka tšararego e e goromeditsweng." 
Ezekiel20:35 Ke tlaa lo ntshetsa kwa nageng ya ditšhaba, ke ganetsanya le lona teng re lebanye mo matlhong." 
Ezekiel20:36 Fela jaaka nkile ka ganetsanya le borraeno mo nageng ya lefatshe la Egepeto, ke tlaa ganetsanya le lona jalo, go bua Morena Modimo." 
Ezekiel20:37 “Ke tlaa lo huhumetsa lore, ke tlaa lo lere mo boikgolegong jwa kgolagano;" 
Ezekiel20:38 ke tlaa ntshetsa ruri batsuolodi mo go lona, le ba ba ntlolelang; ke tlaa ba ntsha mo lefatsheng le ba jakileng mo go lone, ga ba ketla ba tsena mo lefatsheng la Iseraele; mme lo tlaa itse fa ke le Jehofa." 
Ezekiel20:39 “Ka ga lona, lona ba ntlo ya Iseraele, Morena Modimo o bua jaana a re: Tsamayang, mongwe le mongwe a ye a direle medimo ya gagwe ya disetwa, le gone mo lobakeng lo lo tlang, fa lo gana go ntheetsa; mme leina la me le le itshepileng ga lo ketla lo tlhola lo le tlhapatsa ka dineo tsa lona, le ka medimo ya lona ya disetwa." 
Ezekiel20:40 Gonne mo thabeng ya me e e boitshepo, mo thabeng e e tlhorameng ya Iseraele, go bua Morena Modimo, botlhe ba ntlo ya Iseraele, botlhe fela, ba tlaa ntirela teng mo lefatsheng; ke tlaa ba amogela teng, ke tlaa lopa teng ditshupelo tsa lona, le mabutswapele a diromololo tsa lona, di na le dilo tsotlhe tsa lona tse di itshepileng." 
Ezekiel20:41 Ke tlaa lo amogela jaaka lonko lo lo monate, mogang ke lo ntshang mo ditšhabeng, ke lo phutha kwa mafatsheng kwa lo gasametseng teng; mme ke tlaa itshepisiwa mo go lona mo ponong ya merafe." 
Ezekiel20:42 Lo tlaa itse fa ke le Jehofa, mogang ke lo fitlhisang mo lefatsheng la Iseraele, mo lefatsheng le ke le tsholeleditseng seatla ka re ke tlaa le naya borraeno." 
Ezekiel20:43 Lo tlaa gakologelwa ditsela tsa lona teng, le ditiro tsotlhe tsa lona, tse lo iitshekolotseng ka tsone; mme lo tlaa ikila mo ponong ya lona ka ntlha ya masula otlhe a lo a dirileng." 
Ezekiel20:44 Lo tlaa itse fa ke le Jehofa, ke sena go dira le lona ke direlela leina la me e seng ka fa ditseleng tsa lona tse di bosula, le fa e le ka fa ditirong tsa lona tse di bodileng, lona ba ntlo ya Iseraele, go bua Morena Modimo.”" 
Ezekiel20:45 Lefoko la ga Jehofa la tla mo go nna, la re," 
Ezekiel20:46 “Morwa motho, lebisa sefatlhogo sa gago ntlheng ya borwa, mme o lotlegele lefoko kwa Borwa, o perofese o nyatse sekgwa sa naga ya Borwa." 
Ezekiel20:47 O reye sekgwa sa Borwa o re: Utlwa lefoko la ga Jehofa. Morena Modimo o bua jaana a re: Bona, ke tlaa tshuba molelo mo go wena, mme o tlaa laila setlhare sengwe le sengwe se setala mo go wena, le setlhare sengwe le sengwe se se omeletseng; molelo o o tutumang ga o ketla o tingwa, mme difatlhogo tsotlhe go tswa borwa go ya botsheka di tlaa fisiwa ka one." 
Ezekiel20:48 Nama yotlhe e tlaa bona fa e le nna Jehofa ke o tshubileng; ga o ketla o tingwa.” 
Ezekiel20:49 Foo ka re: “Ija we, Morena Modimo! Batho ba bua ka ga me, ba re: A ga se mmui wa ditshwantsho?”" 
Ezekiel21:1 Lefoko la ga Jehofa la tla mo go nna, la re:" 
Ezekiel21:2 “Morwa motho, lebisa sefatlhogo sa gago kwa Jerusalema, mme o lotlege lefoko ka ga mafelo a a boitshepo, o perofese o nyatse lefatshe la Iseraele." 
Ezekiel21:3 O reye lefatshe la Iseraele o re: Jehofa o bua jaana, a re: Bona, ke tlhabana nao, ke tlaa somola tšhaka ya me mo kgatleng ya yone, mme ke tlaa kgaola mosiami le moikepi mo go wena." 
Ezekiel21:4 E re ka ke tlaa kgaola mosiami le moikepi mo go wena, ke gone tšhaka ya me e tlaa tswang mo kgatleng ya yone, e tswela nama yotlhe, go simolola kwa borwa go ya kwa botsheka." 
Ezekiel21:5 Nama yotlhe e tlaa itse fa nna Jehofa ke somotse tšhaka ya me mo kgatleng ya yone; ga e ketla e tlhola e boa. 
Ezekiel21:6 “Ke gone fegelwa, wena morwa motho; o fegelwe fa pele ga matlho a bone ka go kgaoga ga lotheka lwa gago, le ka bogalaka." 
Ezekiel21:7 Go tlaa dirala go re mogang ba go rayang ba re: ‘O fegelelwang’? O re: ‘Ke ka ntlha ya mafoko, gonne a etla; mme dipelo tsotlhe di tlaa tlhapologa, diatla tsotlhe di tlaa repa, mewa yotlhe e tlaa idibala, mangole otlhe a tlaa nna borere jaaka metsi; bona, go etla, mme go tlaa dirala,’ ” go bua Morena Modimo." 
Ezekiel21:8 Lefoko la ga Jehofa la tla mo go nna, la re:" 
Ezekiel21:9 “Morwa motho, perofesa o re: Jehofa o bua jaana, a re: O re: “Tšhaka, tšhaka, e looditswe, e bile e gotlhilwe!" 
Ezekiel21:10 E looditswe gore e tle e gaile; e gotlhilwe gore e tle e nne jaaka tladi, mme fa e le foo, a ke go re re ka dira mokete? Letlhogela la ga morwaake ke leswedi mo ditlhareng tsotlhe." 
Ezekiel21:11 E neetswe go gotlhiwa, gore e tle e kgatikanngwe; tšhaka e looditswe, ee, e gotlhilwe, go tla e tsenngwa mo seatleng sa mmolai." 
Ezekiel21:12 Goa, o bokolele, wena morwa motho; gonne e mo bathong ba me, e mo dikgosaneng tsa Iseraele; ba neeletswe tšhaka le batho ba me, mme ke gone ipate serope." 
Ezekiel21:13 Gonne go na le teko; mme go ka tweng fa e tlaa re kgotsa letlhogela le le leswedi le be le sa tlhole le le teng?” Go bua Morena Modimo. 
Ezekiel21:14 “Ke gone, wena morwa motho, o perofese, o opanye diatla; mme a tšhaka e nne seraro, tšhaka ya ba ba tlhabilweng lwa go swa; ke tšhaka ya yo mogolo yo o tlhabilweng lwa go swa, e e tsenelang mo matlwaneng a bone." 
Ezekiel21:15 Ke lebisitse ntlha ya tšhaka kwa dikgorong tsotlhe tsa bone, gore pelo tsa bone di tlhapologe, le go kgopega ga bone go ntsifale. Ija we! E editswe tladi, e ntshitswe ntlha ya go gaila." 
Ezekiel21:16 Itlotlwanye, o ikgatimokanyetse ntlheng ya le legolo; ithulaganye, o ikgatimokanyetse ntlheng ya la molema; fela kwa o lebisiwang teng." 
Ezekiel21:17 Le nna ke tlaa opanya diatla, mme ke tlaa kgorisa tšararego ya me; nna Jehofa ke buile.”" 
Ezekiel21:18 Lefoko la ga Jehofa la tla mo go nna gape, la re:" 
Ezekiel21:19 “Le gone wena morwa motho, kaya ditsela di le pedi, gore tšhaka ya kgosi ya Babilone e tle; a di tswe lefatsheng le le lengwe fela tsoo pedi; direla felo gongwe moralelo, o go rale fa tshimologong ya tsela e e yang motseng." 
Ezekiel21:20 Kaya tsela e tšhaka e tlaa tlang ka yone mo Raba wa bana ba Amone, le mo Juta, mo Jerusalema o o thekeleditsweng." 
Ezekiel21:21 Gonne kgosi ya Babilone e ne ya ema fa tsela e nnang maphata teng, fa tshimologong ya ditsela tse pedi, a botsa ka bola; a kgotlokgotsa metswi, a botsa mereo, a lebaleba mo sebeting." 
Ezekiel21:22 Mo seatleng sa gagwe se segolo go ne go le taola ka ga Jerusalema, go tlhoma dithubaganyi tse di thubang lorako, go atlhamolosetsa polao, go tsholetsa lentswe ka lošalaba, go tlhomela dikgoro dithubaganyi tse di thubang dithako, go tsosa dimota, go aga dikago tsa tlhabanelo." 
Ezekiel21:23 Mo go bone e tlaa nna jaaka taola ya lefela mo ponong ya bone, ba ba ba ikanetseng ka maikano; mme o ba gopodisa boikepo, gore ba tle ba tshwarwe." 
Ezekiel21:24 Ke gone Morena Modimo o bua jaana, a re: E re ka lo dirile gore boikepo jwa lona bo gakologelwe, ka ditlolo tsa lona di senotswe, maleo a lona a bile a bonala mo ditirong tsotlhe tsa lona; e re ka lo gakologetswe, lo tlaa tshwarwa ka letsogo." 
Ezekiel21:25 “Le wena moikepi yo o tlhabilweng lwa go swa, kgosana ya Iseraele, yo lobaka lwa gago lo tsileng, mo motlheng wa boikepo jwa bokhutlo;" 
Ezekiel21:26 Morena Modimo o bua jaana, a re: Tlosang tlhoro, lo role serwalo; ga go ketla go tlhola go nna jalo; goletsang se se kwa tlase, kokobetsang se se godileng." 
Ezekiel21:27 Ke tlaa ribegetsa, ke ribegetsa, ke go ribegetsa; le gone go mo ga go ketla go tlhola go nna, go tsamaya go tla ene yo tshiamelo ya gone e leng ya gagwe; mme ke tlaa go mo naya." 
Ezekiel21:28 “Wena, morwa motho, perofesa o re: Morena Modimo o bua jaana ka ga bana ba Amone, le ka ga kgobo ya bone; mme o bue, o re: “ ‘Tšhaka, tšhaka e somotswe, e gotlhetswe kgailo, go e laidisa; gore e nne jaaka tladi;’" 
Ezekiel21:29 “ka ba go bonela boithamako, ka ba go perofesetsa maaka, go tla ba go baya mo dithamong tsa baikepi ba ba tlhabilweng lwa go swa, ba lobaka lwa bone lo fitlhileng, mo motlheng wa boikepo jwa bokhutlo." 
Ezekiel21:30 “E busetse mo kgatleng ya yone. Mo felong kwa o tlhodilweng teng, mo lefatsheng la botsalelo jwa gago, ke tlaa go sekisa teng." 
Ezekiel21:31 Ke tlaa goromeletsa tšararego ya me mo go wena; ke tlaa go budulela ka molelo wa tšhakgalo ya me; ke tlaa go tsenya mo seatleng sa batho ba ba sefolofolo, ba ba ditswerere mo go senyeng." 
Ezekiel21:32 O tlaa nna fela dikgong tsa molelo; madi a gago a tlaa nna mo gare ga lefatshe; ga o ketla o tlhola o gakologelwa, gonne nna Jehofa ke buile.”" 
Ezekiel22:1 Gape lefoko la ga Jehofa la tla mo go nna, la re:" 
Ezekiel22:2 “Wena morwa motho, a o tlaa atlhola, a o tlaa atlhola motse o o madi? Fa e le jalo o o itsise tse di makgapha tsotlhe tsa one." 
Ezekiel22:3 O re: Morena Modimo o bua jaana, a re: A motse o o tshololang madi mo gare ga one, gore motlha wa one o tle, o o itirelang medimo ya disetwa ya go iitshekolola!" 
Ezekiel22:4 O molato mo mading a gago a o a tsholotseng, o itshekologile ka medimo ya disetwa e o e dirileng; mme o atameditse metlha ya gago, o fitlhile fela le mo dinyageng tsa gago; ke gone ka moo ke go dirileng kgobo mo merafeng, le tshotlo mo mafatsheng otlhe." 
Ezekiel22:5 Ba ba gaufi, le ba ba kgakala nao ba tlaa go sotla, wena yo o leina le le maswe, yo o tletseng pheretlho." 
Ezekiel22:6 “Bona, dikgosana tsa Iseraele di ntse di le mo go wena di tsholola madi, nngwe le nngwe ka fa nonofong ya yone." 
Ezekiel22:7 Di ntse di sa re sepe ka borra le bomma mo go wena; ba diretse moeng ka patiko mo gare ga gago; ba siamololetse masiela le mosadi wa motlholagadi mo go wena. 
Ezekiel22:8 O nyaditse dilo tsa me tse di boitshepo, o tlhapaditse bosabata ba me." 
Ezekiel22:9 Bapateletsi ba ntse ba nnetse mo go wena go tsholola madi; ba jetse mo dithabeng ba le mo go wena; ba dirile dilo tsa botlhodi ba le mo gare ga gago. 
Ezekiel22:10 Ba senotse bosaikategang jwa borraabo ba le mo go wena; ba katisitse mosadi yo o itshekologileng ka medibela, ba le mo go wena." 
Ezekiel22:11 Mongwe o dirile boatla le mosadi wa mongwe ka ene; yo mongwe o dirile botlhodi ka go senya ngwetsi wa gagwe; yo mongwe a le mo go wena o katisitse kgaitsadie, morwadia rraagwe, a le mo go wena." 
Ezekiel22:12 Ba amogetse dineo tsa go tsholola madi ba le mo go wena; wena o amogetse koketso le ntsifatso, o bapetse mo go bagaeno ka boiphetlho, o ba patika, mme nna o ntebetse, go bua Morena Modimo." 
Ezekiel22:13 “Ke gone, bona, ke opantse diatla ka ga papadi ya gago ya pherekano e o e bapetseng, le ka ga madi a gago a a ntseng a le mo gare ga gago." 
Ezekiel22:14 A pelo ya gago e ka itshoka, kgotsa a diatla tsa gago di ka nna thata mo metlheng e ke tlaa dirang nao ka yone? Nna Jehofa ke buile, mme ke tlaa go dira." 
Ezekiel22:15 Ke tlaa go gasamisetsa mo merafeng, ke go falaletsa mo mafatsheng, mme ke tlaa nyeletsa leswe la gago le tloga mo go wena." 
Ezekiel22:16 O tlaa tlhapatsega mo go wena ka wesi, mo ponong ya merafe; mme o tlaa itse fa ke le Jehofa.”" 
Ezekiel22:17 Lefoko la ga Jehofa la tla mo go nna, la re:" 
Ezekiel22:18 “Morwa motho, ntlo ya Iseraele e fetogile manyelo mo go nna: botlhe fela ke kgotlho, le boleke, le tshipi, le lotwe, mo leisong la leubelo; ke manyelo a selefera fela." 
Ezekiel22:19 Ke gone ka moo, go bua Morena Modimo, a re: E re ka lo fetogile manyelo lotlhe, ke gone bonang, ke tlaa lo kokoanyetsa mo gare ga Jerusalema." 
Ezekiel22:20 Jaaka go tle go kokoanyediwe selefera, le kgotlho, le tshipi, le lotwe, le boleke mo leisong la leubelo, go tla go ubelelwa molelo mo go tsone, gore di tlhapolosiwe; ke tlaa lo kokoanya jalo mo bogaleng jwa me, le mo tšararegong ya me, ke tlaa lo baya teng, ke lo tlhapolosa." 
Ezekiel22:21 Ee, ke tlaa lo kokoanya, ke lo ubela ka molelo wa bogale jwa me, mme lo tlaa tlhapolosiwa mo gare ga teng." 
Ezekiel22:22 Jaaka selefera se tle se tlhapolosiwe mo leisong la leubelo, le lona lo tlaa tlhapolosiwa jalo mo gare ga teng, mme lo tlaa itse fa nna Jehofa, ke lo goromeleditse tšararego ya me.”" 
Ezekiel22:23 Lefoko la ga Jehofa la tla mo go nna, la re:" 
Ezekiel22:24 “Morwa motho, le reye o re: O lefatshe le le sa tlhapisiwang, le fa e le go nelwa ke pula mo motlheng wa tšhakgalo." 
Ezekiel22:25 Go kgolaganyetso ya baperofeti ba lona mo gare ga lona, jaaka tau e e dumang fa e garola phologolo; ba supuditse mewa ya batho; ba tsaya khumo, le dilo tse di tlhokegang; ba ntsifaditse basadi ba batlholagadi ba yona mo gare ga yona." 
Ezekiel22:26 Baperesiti ba yona ba sentse molao wa me, ba tlhapaditse dilo tsa me tse di boitshepo; ga ba a farologanya dilo tse di boitshepo le tse e leng dilo fela, le gone ga ba a farologanyetsa batho dilo tse di sa itshekang le tse di itshekileng, ba bile ba subetse bosabata ba me matlho, mme ke tlhapatsegile mo go bone." 
Ezekiel22:27 Dikgosana tsa yona mo gare ga yona di ntse jaaka diphiri tse di garolang phologolo; ba tsholola madi, ba senya mewa ya batho, e le gore ba bone papadi ya pherekano." 
Ezekiel22:28 Le baperofeti ba lona ba ba bategile ka sebatego se se sa swelang, ba bona boithamako, ba ba perofesetsa maaka, ba re: ‘Morena Modimo o bua jaana;’ le mororo Jehofa a sa bua." 
Ezekiel22:29 Batho ba lefatshe ba patikile, ba dirile bogodu. Ee, ba tshwentse bahumanegi le batlhoki, ba ba ba patika moeng ka mo go sa siamang." 
Ezekiel22:30 Ka senka monna mo go bone, yo o tlaa baakanya lorako, le yo o tlaa emang fa pele ga me mo phatlheng go rapelela lefatshe, gore ke se ka ka le senya; mme ga ke a ka ka fitlhela ope." 
Ezekiel22:31 Ke gone ka moo ke ba goromeleditseng tšhakgalo ya me; ke ba laitse ka molelo wa kgalefo ya me; ke lerile tsela ya bone mo ditlhogong tsa bone, go bua Morena Modimo.”" 
Ezekiel23:1 Lefoko la ga Jehofa la ba la tla mo go nna, la re:" 
Ezekiel23:2 “Morwa motho, go kile ga ne go le basadi ba le babedi, bana ba mosadi a le mongwe fela." 
Ezekiel23:3 Ba dira boaka kwa Egepeto; ba dira boaka mo borweetsaneng jwa bone. Mabele a bone a ne a papielwa gone, mme ba apaapa ditlhoko tsa bokgarebana jwa bone gone." 
Ezekiel23:4 Leina la yo mogolwane e ne e le Ohola, monnawe e le Oholiba; mme ba tla ba nna ba me, ba belega bana ba basimane le ba basetsana. Mme ka ga maina a bone, Samaria ke Ohola, Jerusalema ke Oholiba." 
Ezekiel23:5 “Ohola a akafala a sa ntse a le wa me; mme a rata dinyatsi tsa gagwe thata, e bong Baasiria ba o ne a bapile nabo." 
Ezekiel23:6 Ba ba apereng bobududu, balaodi le balaodisiwa, botlhe e le makolwane a a eletsegang, bapalami ba ba palamang dipitse." 
Ezekiel23:7 A ineela mo go bone ka maakafalo a gagwe, banna e le ba ba tlhaotsweng ba Asiria botlhe fela; bangwe le bangwe ba o ba ratang thata o ne a itshekolola ka medimo ya disetwa ya bone yotlhe fela." 
Ezekiel23:8 Mme e sa le ka metlha ya Egepeto ga a ise a ke a kgaogane le boaka jwa gagwe; gonne e rile mo borweetsaneng jwa gagwe ba robala nae, ba apaapa ditlhoko tsa bokgarebana jwa gagwe, ba goromeletsa boaka jwa bone mo go ene." 
Ezekiel23:9 Ke gone ka moo ka mo tsenya mo seatleng sa dinyatsi tsa gagwe, e bong mo seatleng sa Baasiria, ba o ba ratileng thata." 
Ezekiel23:10 Bao ba senola bosaikategang jwa gagwe; ba gapa bana ba gagwe ba basimane le ba basetsana, mme ene ba mmolaya ka tšhaka, mme a nna setlhajwa difela mo basading, gonne ba ne ba dirafatsa ditshekiso mo go ene." 
Ezekiel23:11 “Oholiba monnawe a bona mo, mme le fa go ntse jalo a nna sebodu bogolo go ene mo dithatong tsa gagwe, le mo maakafalong a gagwe a a bileng a feta a ga mogoloe." 
Ezekiel23:12 A rata Baasiria thata, balaodi le balaodisiwa, ba ba bapileng nae, ba ba kgabileng ka matsabatsaba a magolo, e le bapalami ba ba palamang dipitse botlhe fela a le makolwane a a eletsegang." 
Ezekiel23:13 Ka bona fa a senyegile; ba tsaya tsela e le nngwe fela ka bobedi jwa bone. 
Ezekiel23:14 “Ene a totisa maakafalo a gagwe; gonne a bona ditshwano tsa banna ba tshwantshitswe mo lomoteng, ditshwantsho tsa Bakalatea di dirilwe ka bohibidu jo bo kganyang;" 
Ezekiel23:15 ba tlamilwe ka meitlamo mo lothekeng, ba rwele ditlhoro tse di mebalabala mo ditlhogong, e le dikgosana botlhe fela fa motho a ba leba, ka fa tshwanong ya Babilone mo Kalatea, lefatshe la bone la botsalelo." 
Ezekiel23:16 Ya re a itlhoma a di bona fela a ba rata thata fela, mme a roma barongwi kwa go bone kwa Kalatea." 
Ezekiel23:17 Bababilone ba tla kwa go ene mo bolaong jwa dithato, ba mo senya ka boaka jwa bone, mme a leswefala ka bone, mowa wa gagwe wa ba wa tenwa ke bone." 
Ezekiel23:18 Jalo a senola maakafalo a gagwe, a itshenola bosaikategang jwa gagwe. Foo mowa wa me wa tenwa ke ene jaaka mowa wa me o ne o tennwe ke mogolowe." 
Ezekiel23:19 Le fa go ntse jalo a ntsifatsa maakafalo a gagwe fela, a ntse a gakologetswe metlha ya borweetsana jwa gagwe, jale jaaka a akafala mo lefatsheng la Egepeto." 
Ezekiel23:20 A rata dinyatsi tsa bone thata, ba nama ya bone e ntseng jaaka ya diesela, ba motlhapo wa bone o ntseng jaaka motlhapo wa dipitse." 
Ezekiel23:21 Jalo o ne wa ikgopodisa botlhodi jwa borweetsana jwa gago, ka Baegepeto ba apaapa ditlhoko tsa gago, ka mabele a gago e sa ntse e le a borweetsana jwa gago.”" 
Ezekiel23:22 “Ke gone, wena Oholiba, Morena Modimo o bua jaana, a re: Bona, ke tlaa go tsosetsa dinyatsi tsa gago, tse di tenneng mowa wa gago; ke tlaa di lere mo go wena ka ntlha tsotlhe." 
Ezekiel23:23 Bababilone, le Bakalatea botlhe, Bapekodi, le Bašoa, le Bakoa le Baasiria botlhe nabo; makolwane a a eletsegang, balaodi le balaodisiwa botlhe fela, dikgosana le batho ba ba tumileng, botlhe ba palame dipitse." 
Ezekiel23:24 Ba tlaa go bololela ba na le dibolao, le dikara, le makoloi, le masomo a ditšhaba; ba tlaa go ipaakanyetsa ka thejana, le thebe le tlhoro ya phemelo ka ntlha tsotlhe; ke tlaa ba neela tsheko, mme ba tlaa go atlhola ka fa dikatlholong tsa bone." 
Ezekiel23:25 Ke tlaa go beela lefufa la me, mme ba tlaa go direla ka tšararego; ba tlaa go kgaola nko le ditsebe, mme masalela a gago a tlaa wa ka tšhaka; ba tlaa go thukhutha bana ba gago ba basimane le ba basetsana; masalela a gago a tlaa lailwa ke molelo." 
Ezekiel23:26 Gape ba tlaa go apola diaparo, mme ba tlaa go tseela mekgabo ya gago e mentle." 
Ezekiel23:27 Ke tlaa khutlisa botlhodi jwa gago mo go wena, le boakafalo jwa gago jo bo tswang lefatsheng la Egepeto; mme ga o ketla o ba tsholeletsa matlho, le fa e le go tlhola o gakologelwa Egepeto gope.”" 
Ezekiel23:28 Gonne Morena Modimo o bua jaana, a re: “Bona, ke tlaa go tsenya mo seatleng sa ba o ba tlhoileng, mo seatleng sa ba ba tenneng mowa wa gago." 
Ezekiel23:29 Ba tlaa go direla ka kilo, ba tlaa tlosa gotlhe mo o go dirileng, ba tlaa go tlogela o sa ikatega o le loforotlho fela; mme bosaikategang jwa maakafalo a gago bo tlaa senolwa, e bong botlhodi jwa gago le maakafalo a gago." 
Ezekiel23:30 Dilo tse o tlaa di direlwa, ka o ne o akafalela ba ditšhaba, le ka gonne o leswefaditswe ke medimo ya bone ya disetwa." 
Ezekiel23:31 O tsamaile mo tseleng ya ga mogoloo; ke gone ke tlaa tsenyang senwelo sa gagwe mo seatleng sa gago.” 
Ezekiel23:32 Morena Modimo o bua jaana, a re: “O tlaa nwa senwelo sa ga mogoloo, se se boteng, se segolo; o tlaa tshegwa ka tshotlo, o nna lonyatso; senwelo se, se tshola botona thata." 
Ezekiel23:33 O tlaa kgorisiwa botagwa le bohutsana ka senwelo sa kgakgamalo le tshwafalo, ka senwelo sa ga mogoloo Samaria." 
Ezekiel23:34 “O tlaa se gopisa o ba o se minolosa, mme o tlaa phura dipeana tsa sone, o tlaa ikgagola mabele; gonne ke buile.” Go bua Morena Modimo." 
Ezekiel23:35 Ke gone Morena Modimo o bua jaana a re: “E re ka o ntebetse, o ntatlhetse ka kwa motlhaneng ga gago, ka re, le wena belega botlhodi jwa gago le maakafalo a gago.”" 
Ezekiel23:36 Gape Jehofa a nthaya a re: “Morwa motho, a o tlaa atlhola Ohola le Oholiba? Fa e le jalo o ba kakanyetse tse di makgapha tsa bone." 
Ezekiel23:37 Gonne ba dirile boaka, go bile go na le madi mo diatleng tsa bone, gape ba dirile boaka le medimo ya bone ya disetwa; mme le bana ba bone, ba ba ba bonyeng le nna, ba ba ralaleditse molelo gore ba bolawe." 
Ezekiel23:38 Gape ba ntiretse selo se; ba itshekolotse felo ga me ga boitshepo, ka tsatsi le le lengwe fela, ba bile ba tlhapaditse bosabata ba me." 
Ezekiel23:39 Gonne e rile ba sena go bolaela medimo ya bone ya disetwa bana ba bone, foo ba tla ka tsatsi leo fela mo felong ga me ga boitshepo, ba tla go go tlhapatsa; mme bonang, ba dirile jalo mo gare ga ntlo ya me." 
Ezekiel23:40 “Gape lo romile lwa ya go bitsa banna ba ba tswang kgakala, ba go romilweng morongwa kwa go bone, mme bonang ba tsile; ba o ne wa ba itlhapisetsa wa itshasa mo matlhong, wa itsabaketsa ka mekgabo;" 
Ezekiel23:41 wa dula mo bolaong jwa serena, lomati lwa bojelo lo lo baakantsweng lo le fa pele ga jone, lo o ne wa baya maswalo a me mo go lone, le lookwane lwa me." 
Ezekiel23:42 Mme go dumaduma ga bontsi jwa batho ba ba iketlileng ga bo go ntse nae; mme ga leriwe batagwi ba tswa kwa nageng, ba na le ba e leng batho fela; mme ba rwesa basadi bao boo babedi mefitshana mo mabogong, le dirwalo tse dintle mo ditlhogong." 
Ezekiel23:43 “Foo ga bua nna ka ga gagwe yo o leng mogologolo mo maakafalong, ka re: Jaanong ba tlaa dira boaka nae, le ene nabo." 
Ezekiel23:44 Ba tsena mo go ene, jaaka go tle go tsenwe kwa mosading wa seaka; ba tsena jalo kwa go Ohola le kwa go Oholiba, basadi ba ditlhodi." 
Ezekiel23:45 Banna ba ba siameng, ba tlaa ba sekisa ka tshekiso ya diaka, le ka tshekiso ya basadi ba ba tshololang madi, gonne ke diaka, e bile madi a batho a mo diatleng tsa bone.”" 
Ezekiel23:46 Gonne Morena Modimo o bua jaana, a re: “Ke tlaa lere lesomo le tla go tlhabana nabo, mme ke tlaa ba neela go akgaakgelwa kwa le kwa le go thukhuthwa." 
Ezekiel23:47 Lesomo le tlaa ba kgobotletsa ka maje, ba tlaa ba fofotsa ka ditšhaka tsa bone; ba tlaa bolaya bana ba bone ba basimane le ba basetsana, ba tlaa fisa matlo a bone ka molelo." 
Ezekiel23:48 Ke tlaa khutlisa botlhodi jwa bone jalo mo lefatsheng, gore basadi botlhe ba ithute, gore ba se ka ba dira ka fa botlhoding jwa lona." 
Ezekiel23:49 Ba tlaa lefetsa botlhodi jwa lona mo go lona; lo tlaa belega maleo a medimo ya lona ya disetwa, ditshwantsho tsa lona; mme lo tlaa itse fa ke le Morena Modimo.”" 
Ezekiel24:1 Gape ya re ka ngwaga o o ferang mongwe fela, ka kgwedi ya lesome, ka letsatsi la lesome la kgwedi, lefoko la ga Jehofa la tla mo go nna, la re:" 
Ezekiel24:2 “Morwa motho, kwala leina la letsatsi, e bong la letsatsi leno fela. Kgosi ya Babilone e ne ya atamela Jerusalema thata ka lone letsatsi leno fela." 
Ezekiel24:3 Ntlo e e borukhutlhi o e bolelele setshwantsho, o ba reye o re: “Morena Modimo o bua jaana, a re: Tlhatlayang pitsa e tona, lo e tlhatleye, lo bo lo thele metsi mo go yone." 
Ezekiel24:4 Lo olele mo go yone dirwe tsa yone, e bong serwe sengwe le sengwe se se molemo, serope le letsogo; lo tsenye marapo a a tlhaotsweng mo go yone, e tlale." 
Ezekiel24:5 Tsayang tse di tlhophilweng tsa letsomane, lo tlhatlaganye dikgong fa tlase ga yone; a e bele thata. Ee, a marapo a yone a apewe mo gare ga yone.”" 
Ezekiel24:6 Ke gone Morena Modimo o bua jaana, a re: “A bo go latlhega motse o o madi, le pitsa e tona e lesulo la yone le leng mo go yone, e lesulo la yone le iseng le tswe mo go yone! Di inoleng ka monokela; ga e a thelelwa bola." 
Ezekiel24:7 Gonne madi a one a mo gare ga one; wa a baya mo lefikeng le le borethe fela; ga o a ka wa a tshololela fa fatshe go tla a o bipa ka lorole. 
Ezekiel24:8 Ke beile madi a one mo lefikeng le le borethe fela, gore a se ka a bipiwa, e le gore a tsose tšararego go tla e busolosa.”" 
Ezekiel24:9 Ke gone ka moo Morena Modimo o bua jaana, a re: “A bo go latlhega motse o o madi! Le gone ke tlaa koela mokoa o nna mogolo." 
Ezekiel24:10 Koang dikgong, tukisang molelo, nama a e butswe thata, loisang moro thata, mme marapo a fisiwe." 
Ezekiel24:11 Foo lo e tlhatleye e se na sepe mo magaleng a yone, gore e nne molelo, le gore kgotlho ya yone e še, le gore leswe la yone le tlhapologe mo go yone, le gore lesulo la yone le nyelediwe." 
Ezekiel24:12 O itapisitse ka tiro; le fa go ntse jalo lesulo la one le legolo ga le tswe mo go one; lesulo la one ga le tswe ka molelo. 
Ezekiel24:13 Botlhodi bo mo lesweng la gago; ereka ke go tlhapisitse, mme wa se ka wa tlhapisega, ga o ketla o tlhola o tlhapisiwa gope mo lesweng la gago, go tsamaye ke kgorise tšararego ya me mo go wena." 
Ezekiel24:14 Nna Jehofa ke buile; go tlaa dirala, ke tlaa go dira; ga nketla ke bowa ka morago, le gone ga nketla ke rekegela, le gone ga nketla ke ikwatlhaya; ba tlaa go sekisa ka fa ditseleng tsa gago, le ka fa ditirong tsa gago;” go bua Morena Modimo." 
Ezekiel24:15 Gape lefoko la ga Jehofa la tla go nna, la re:" 
Ezekiel24:16 “Morwa motho, bona, ke go tlosetsa seeletso sa matlho a gago ka kanyo e le nngwe fela; le fa go ntse jalo o se ka wa hutsafala le fa e le go lela, le gone dikeledi tsa gago a di se tshologe." 
Ezekiel24:17 Fegelwa, mme e seng kwa godimo; o se ka wa direla baswi khutsafalelo; rwala tlhoro o e hunele, rwala ditlhako, mme o se ka wa bipa molomo, le gone o se ka wa ja dijo tsa banna.”" 
Ezekiel24:18 Jalo ka bua le batho go le ka moso; e rile maitseboa mosadi wa me a swa; mme ya re ka moso ka dira jaaka ke laotswe. 
Ezekiel24:19 Batho ba nthaya ba re: “Fa e bo ne ne o dira jaana, a ga o nka o re bolelela go re dilo tse di kayang mo go rona?”" 
Ezekiel24:20 Foo ka ba raya ka re: “Lefoko la ga Jehofa la tla mo go nna, la re:" 
Ezekiel24:21 Bua le ba ntlo ya Iseraele, o re: Morena Modimo o bua jaana; a re: Bonang, ke tlaa tlhapatsa felo ga me ga boitshepo, boikgantsho jwa thata ya lona, seeletso sa matlho a lona, le sone se mowa wa lona o se ngomogelang pelo, mme bana ba lona ba basimane le ba basetsana ba lo ba tlogetseng ba tlaa wa ka tšhaka." 
Ezekiel24:22 Lo tlaa dira jaaka ke dirile; ga lo ketla lo ipipa melomo, le fa e le go ja dijo tsa banna." 
Ezekiel24:23 Ditlhoro tsa lona di tlaa nna mo ditlhogong tsa lona, le ditlhako mo dinaong tsa lona; ga lo ketla lo hutsafala le fa e le go lela; lo tlaa tlhorega fela mo maikepong a lona, lo tlaa ba lo sonelana." 
Ezekiel24:24 Jalo Esekiele o tlaa nna sesupo mo go lona; lo tlaa dira ka fa go tsotlhe tse o di dirileng; mogang selo se se tlang, foo lo tlaa itse fa ke le Morena Modimo." 
Ezekiel24:25 “Wena morwa motho, a ga go ketla go dirafala mo motlheng o ke ba tseelang thata ya bone ka one, boitumelo jwa kgalalelo ya bone, seeletso sa matlho a bone, le se ba tlhomileng pelo ya bone mo go sone, e bong bana ba bone ba basimane le ba basetsana," 
Ezekiel24:26 gore e tle e re yo o falolang mo motlheng oo a tle a tle mo go wena, go se go utlwisa mo ditsebeng tsa gago?" 
Ezekiel24:27 Mo motlheng oo o tlaa tswela mofalodi molomo, o tlaa bua, ga o ketla o tlhola o nna semumu; jalo o tlaa bo o le sesupo mo go bone; mme ba tlaa itse fa ke le Jehofa.”" 
Ezekiel25:1 Lefoko la ga Jehofa la tla mo go nna, la re:" 
Ezekiel25:2 “Morwa motho, lebisa sefatlhogo sa gago kwa baneng ba Amone, mme o ba perofesetse o ba nyatse." 
Ezekiel25:3 O reye bana ba Amone o re: Utlwang, lefoko la Morena Modimo; Morena Modimo o bua jaana, a re: E re ka o nyaditse felo ga me ga boitshepo, jale ka go tlhapadiwa, wa re: ‘Ahe;’ le ka ga lefatshe la Iseraele jale ka le swafadiwa; le ka ga ba ntlo ya Juta jale ka ba isiwa botshwarong." 
Ezekiel25:4 Ke gone bona, ke tlaa go neela bana ba botlhabatsatsi gore ba go rue, mme ba tlaa tlhoma mathibelelo a bone mo go wena, ba tlaa dira maago a bone mo go wena; ba tlaa ja maungo a gago, ba tlaa nwa maši a gago." 
Ezekiel25:5 Ke tlaa dira Raba gore go nne ntlo ya dikamela, le bana ba Amone gore o nne mabothelo a matsomane; mme lo tlaa itse fa ke le Jehofa.”" 
Ezekiel25:6 Gonne Morena Modimo o bua jaana, a re: “E re ka o opantse diatla, wa tiba ka dinao, wa itumela ka kilo yotlhe ya mowa wa gago ka ga lefatshe la Iseraele;" 
Ezekiel25:7 ka re: Bona, ke go otlololetse seatla, ke tlaa go neela merafe gore o thopiwe; ke tlaa go kgaola mo ditšhabeng, ke dira gore o nyelele mo mafatsheng, ke tlaa go senya; mme o tlaa itse fa ke le Jehofa.”" 
Ezekiel25:8 Morena Modimo o bua jaana, a re: “Ereka boMoabe le Seira ba re: Bonang, ba ntlo ya Juta ba tshwana le merafe yotlhe;" 
Ezekiel25:9 ke gone bonang, ke tlaa phunya lotlhakore lwa Moabe ka fa ntlheng ya metse, go tswa metseng ya gagwe e e mo melelwaneng ya gagwe, kgalalelo ya lefatshe, e bong Bethe-jesimothe, le Baale-meone, le Kiriathaime," 
Ezekiel25:10 ke lo phunyetsa bana ba botlhabatsatsi, ba ya go tlhabana le bana ba Amone, mme ke tlaa ba ntshetsa go ruiwa, gore bana ba Amone ba se tlhole ba gakologelwa mo merafeng." 
Ezekiel25:11 Ke tlaa dirafatsa ditshekiso mo Moabe; mme ba tlaa itse fa ke le Jehofa.” 
Ezekiel25:12 Morena Modimo o bua jaana, a re: “E re ka Etome a tlhabanye le ba ntlo ya Juta ka go ipusolosa a kgopile thata, mme a ipusoloseditse mo go bone;" 
Ezekiel25:13 ke gone ka moo Morena Modimo o bua jaana, a re: Ke tlaa otlololela Etome seatla, ke tlaa kgaola ke tlosa gone motho le kgomo, ke tlaa go swafatsa go simolola kwa Temane; go ya fela kwa Detane ba tlaa wa ka tšhaka." 
Ezekiel25:14 Ke tlaa baya pusoloso ya me mo Etome ka seatla sa batho ba me ba Iseraele; ba tlaa dira mo Etome ka fa bogaleng jwa me, le ka fa tšararegong ya me; mme ba tlaa itse pusoloso ya me,” go bua Morena Modimo." 
Ezekiel25:15 Morena Modimo o bua jaana, a re: “E re ka Bafilisitia ba dirile ka pusoloso, mme ba ipusolositse ka kilo ya mowa go le senya ka bobaba jo bo sa khutleng;" 
Ezekiel25:16 ke gone ka moo Morena Modimo o bua jaana, a re: Bonang, ke tlaa otlololela Bafilisitia seatla, mme ke tlaa kgaola Bakerethe, ke ba ke senya masalela a ka fa dintshing tsa lewatle." 
Ezekiel25:17 Ke tlaa ba ipusolosetsa thata ka dikgalemo tse di šakgetseng; mme ba tlaa itse fa ke le Jehofa, mogang ke ipusolosang mo go bone.”" 
Ezekiel26:1 Ga dirala ya re ka ngwaga wa 11, ka letsatsi la ntlha la kgwedi, lefoko la ga Jehofa la tla mo go nna, la re:" 
Ezekiel26:2 “Morwa motho, e re ka Ture o buile ka ga Jerusalema wa re: ‘Ahe, one o e neng e le kgoro ya ditšhaba o thubegile; o menogetse mo go nna; jaanong nna ke tlaa tlalelediwa, ka one o kgakgabaditswe;’" 
Ezekiel26:3 ke gone ka moo go bua Morena Modimo, a re: Bona, ke tlhabana nao, wena Ture, ke tlaa go tsosetsa merafe e le mentsi e tle go go tlhasela jaaka lewatle le tle le tsose makhubu a lone." 
Ezekiel26:4 E tlaa senya dithako tsa Ture, e tlaa rutla dikago tse di godileng tsa tlhabanelo tsa gone; ke bile ke tlaa gopa lorole mo go ene, ke mo ntsha lefika le le borethe fela." 
Ezekiel26:5 O tlaa nna felo ga go anega ditloa mo gare ga lewatle; gonne ke buile, go bua Morena Modimo; o tlaa tswa thopo ya merafe." 
Ezekiel26:6 Bomorwadie ba ba mo nageng ba tlaa bolawa ka tšhaka, mme ba tlaa itse fa ke le Jehofa.”" 
Ezekiel26:7 Gonne Morena Modimo o bua jaana, a re: “Bonang ke tlaa lere mo Ture Nebukatenesare kgosi ya Babilone, kgosi ya dikgosi e tswa ntlheng ya botsheka e na le dipitse le dikara, le bapalama dipitse, le lesomo la batho ba le bantsi." 
Ezekiel26:8 O tlaa bolaya bomorwadio ka tšhaka mo nageng, mme o tlaa go agela dikago tsa tlhabanelo, a go tsosetsa dimota, a ba a go tsholeletsa thejana." 
Ezekiel26:9 O tlaa tlhomela dithako tsa gago dikgaraga tsa gagwe tse di thubaganyang, mme o tlaa rutla dikago tse di godileng tsa gago tsa tlhabanelo ka dilepe tsa gagwe." 
Ezekiel26:10 O tlaa khurumediwa ka lorole ka ntlha ya bontsi jwa dipitse tsa gagwe; dithako tsa gago di tlaa reketla ka modumo wa bapalama dipitse ba gagwe, le wa makoloi, le wa dikara, mogang o tsenang mo dikgorong tsa gago, jaaka batho ba tle ba tsene mo motseng o go ntshitsweng phatlha mo go one." 
Ezekiel26:11 O tlaa gatakela mebila yotlhe ya gago ka ditlhako tsa dipitse tsa gagwe; o tlaa bolaya batho ba gago ka tšhaka, dikago tsa gago tse di emeng metloutlo tsa thata ya gago di tlaa wela fa fatshe." 
Ezekiel26:12 Dikhumo tsa gago ba tlaa di ntsha thopo, ba tlaa gapa tlhwatlhwa ya gago; ba tlaa thuba dithako tsa gago, ba senya matlo a gago a a eletsegang; mme maje a gago, le dikgong tsa gago, le lorole lwa gago, ba tlaa baya gotlhe fela mo gare ga metse." 
Ezekiel26:13 Mme ke tlaa khutlisa tumo ya dipina tsa gago; modumo wa diharepe tsa gago ga o ketla o tlhola o utlwala. 
Ezekiel26:14 Ke tlaa go ntsha lefika le le borethe fela; o tlaa nna felo ga go anega ditloa; ga o ketla o tlhola o agiwa; gonne nna Morena ke buile.” Go bua Morena Modimo. 
Ezekiel26:15 Morena Modimo o bua jaana le Ture, a re: “A ditlhake ga di ketla di reketla ka phašogo ya go wa ga gago, motlhang o ba ba tlhabilweng ba sonelang, motlhang o polao e gailang mo gare ga gago?" 
Ezekiel26:16 Foo dikgosana tsotlhe tsa lewatle di tlaa fologa mo ditulong tsa tsone tsa bogosi, di tlaa apola dikobo tsa tsone di ba di apola diaparo tsa tsone tse di mororodi; di tlaa ikapesa dithoromo; di tlaa dula fa fatshe di ntse di roroma fela, di go gakgamaletse." 
Ezekiel26:17 Ba tlaa go tlhabeletsa khutsafalelo, ba go raya ba re: “ ‘Ana o sentswe jang, wena yo o ne o nnwa ke batsamai ba lewatle, wena motse o o tumileng, o o ne o le thata mo lewatleng, wena le banni ba gago, ba lo ne lo tle lo tsenye therego ya lona mo go botlhe ba ba o serang!’" 
Ezekiel26:18 Jaanong ditlhake di tlaa roroma mo motlheng wa go wa ga gago; ee, ditlhake tse di mo lewatleng di tlaa tseanngwa ke go tloga ga gago.”" 
Ezekiel26:19 Gonne Morena Modimo o bua jaana a re: “Mogang ke go dirang motse, o o swafetseng, o o tshwanang le metse e e sa nnweng; mogang ke tlhatlosetsang, boteng mo go wena, le metsi a magolo, a go khurumetsa;" 
Ezekiel26:20 foo ke tlaa go folosa le ba ba fologelang kwa moleteng, ba ya bathong ba metlha ya bogologolo; ke tlaa go agisa mo mafelong a a kwa tlasetlase a lefatshe mo mafelong a a sa leng a swafala bogologolo, o na le ba ba fologelang mo moleteng, gore o tle o se nnwe; le fa e le go tlhoma kgalalelo ya gago mo lefatsheng la batshedi." 
Ezekiel26:21 Ke tlaa go dira theregiso, mme o bo o sa tlhole o leyo; le fa o ka batlwa, o tlaa bo o sa tlhole o ka bonwa gope,” go bua Morena Modimo." 
Ezekiel27:1 Gape lefoko la ga Jehofa la tla mo go nna, la re:" 
Ezekiel27:2 “Le wena, morwa motho, o tlhabeleletse Ture khutsafalelo;" 
Ezekiel27:3 o reye Ture o re: “Ao, wena yo o agileng fa botsenong jwa lewatle, yo o leng mmapadisi wa tlhwatlhwa ya ditšhaba go e isa ditlhakeng di le dintsi, Morena Modimo o bua jaana, a re: Wena Ture, o rile o itekanetse mo bontleng." 
Ezekiel27:4 Melelwane ya gago e mo pelong ya mawatle, baagi ba gago ba itekaneditse bontle jwa gago." 
Ezekiel27:5 Ba dirile dimati tsotlhe tsa gago ka ditlhare tsa mafira tse di tswang kwa Senire; ba tshotse masetara kwa Lebanone go go direla dipinagare tsa mekoro. 
Ezekiel27:6 Ba dirile dikankase tsa gago ka dikgong tsa maoka a Bašane, ba dirile bogato jwa gago ka mokuperese o o tswang ditlhakeng tsa Kitime, bo gomilwe ka dinaka tsa tlou." 
Ezekiel27:7 Letsela la gago la phefo e ne e le la leloba le le boleta le le dirilweng marorodi, le tswa kwa Egepeto, gore le nne mokgele mo go wena; tse di bobududu le bohibidu jo bo mokgona tse di tswang ditlhakeng tsa Eliša e le letsela la gago la tsharologo ya moriti." 
Ezekiel27:8 Banni ba Sitone le Arefate e ne e le bahudui ba mekoro ya gago; matlhale a gago, wena Ture a ne a le mo go wena, e le bone basimaganyetsi ba dikepe tsa gago." 
Ezekiel27:9 Bagolwane ba Gebale le matlhale a teng ba ne ba le mo go wena bakani ba dikepe: dikepe tsotlhe tsa lefatshe di na le batsamaisi ba tsone di ne di le mo go wena, di tsile go ananya tlhwatlhwa ya gago." 
Ezekiel27:10 “Ba Peresia le ba Lute le ba Pute ba ne ba le mo mephatong ya gago e le banna ba gago ba ntwa; ba ne ba pega thebe le tlhoro ya phemelo mo go wena; ba bonatsa borena jwa gago. 
Ezekiel27:11 Banna ba Arefate ba na le mephato ya gago ba ne ba le mo dithakong tsa gago mo ntlheng tsotlhe, le ba Gamadime ba le mo dikagong tse di godileng tsa gago tsa tlhabanelo, ba pega dithebe tsa bone mo dithakong tsa gago mo ntlheng tsotlhe; ba itekaneditse bontle jwa gago." 
Ezekiel27:12 “Ba Tarešiše e ne e le babapaletsi ba gago ba tlhwatlhwa ka ntlha ya bontsi jwa dikhumo dingwe le dingwe; ba bapala dilo tsa gago ka selefera, le tshipi, le boleke le lotwe." 
Ezekiel27:13 Ba Jafane, le ba Tubale, le ba Mešeke, e ne e le batho ba ba rekalanang nao; ba bapatsa batho, le dilwana tsa kgotlho, ba reka tlhwatlhwa ya gago." 
Ezekiel27:14 Bone ba ntlo ya Togarema ba ne ba reka dilo tsa gago ka dipitse, le dipitse tsa ntwa, le dimmoulo." 
Ezekiel27:15 Banna ba Detane e ne e le batho ba ba rekalanang nao; ditlhake di le dintsi e ne e le marekelo a seatla sa gago. Ba ne ba go leretse dinaka tsa ditlou le ditlhare tse di logong lo lontsho go ananya ka tsone. 
Ezekiel27:16 Ba Siria e ne e le bareki ba dilo tsa gago ka ntlha ya bontsi jwa ditiro tsa seatla sa gago; ba reka dilo tsa gago ka diemerelete le ka bohibidu jo bo mokgona, le ka tiro ya marorodi, le ka leloba le le boleta, le ka korala, le ka majana a mahibitswana." 
Ezekiel27:17 Ba Juta, le ba lefatshe la Iseraele, e ne e le batho ba ba rekalanang nao; ba ne ba reka tlhwatlhwa ya gago ka mabele a makhutshwane a Minithe, ka panaga, ka dinotshe, ka lookwane le ka bolao jwa baleme." 
Ezekiel27:18 Ba Damaseko e ne e le bareki ba gago ba tlhwatlhwa ya gago ka bontsi jwa ditiro tsa seatla sa gago, ka ntlha ya bontsi jwa dikhumo tsa mehuta yotlhe; le ka bojalwa jwa mofine jwa Helebone, le ka bobowa jo bosweu." 
Ezekiel27:19 Ba Fetane le ba Jafane ba ne ba reka dilo tsa gago ka lodi lwa dikhai; tshipi e e phatsimang, le ditswaiso tsa kasia, le kalamusa, e ne e le dilo tse di mo tlhwatlhweng ya gago." 
Ezekiel27:20 Ba Detane e ne e le batho ba ba rekalanang nao ka matsela a a dipeeletso tse di tlhokegang tsa bapalami. 
Ezekiel27:21 Ba Arabia, le dikgosana tsotlhe tsa Ketare e ne e le bareki ba tlhwatlhwa ya seatla sa gago; ka dikwanyana, ka diphelefu le ka diphoko, e ne e le bareki ba tlhwatlhwa ya gago ka dilo tseo." 
Ezekiel27:22 Bareki ba Sheba le ba Raama e ne e le batho ba ba rekalanang nao; ba reka dilo tsa gago ka ditswaiso tse di tlhophegileng, ka majana a a tlhokegang otlhe le ka gouta." 
Ezekiel27:23 Ba Harane, le ba Kane, le ba Etene bareki ba Sheba, le ba Ašure, le ba Kilemate, e ne e le batho ba ba rekalanang nao." 
Ezekiel27:24 Bao e ne e le ba ba rekalanang nao ka dilo tse di tlhaolesegileng mo tlhwatlhweng ya gago, e bong dingata tse di sobokantsweng tsa bobududu, dilo tse di dirilweng marorodi, le matlole a diaparo tse di tlhokegang a bofilwe ka thodi, mme a dirilwe ka mosetare." 
Ezekiel27:25 Dikepe tsa Tarešiše e ne e le ditlhopha tsa ditsamaisi tsa dilo tsa gago tsa tlhwatlhwa: “Mme wa tlalelediwa, wa dirwa kgalalelo e kgolo mo pelong ya mawatle." 
Ezekiel27:26 Bahudui ba dikepe tsa gago ba go fitlhisitse mo metsing a magolo; phefo ya botlhabatsatsi e go thubaketse mo pelong ya mawatle. 
Ezekiel27:27 Dikhumo tsa gago le dithoto tsa gago, le tlhwatlhwa ya gago, le batsamaisi ba dikepe tsa gago, le basimaganyetsi ba dikepe tsa gago, le bakani ba dikepe tsa gago, le baananyi ba tlhwatlhwa ya gago, le banna botlhe ba ntwa ba gago, ba ba mo go wena, ba na le lesomo lotlhe la gago le le mo gare ga gago, ba tlaa wela mo pelong ya mawatle mo motlheng wa go ropefadiwa ga gago." 
Ezekiel27:28 Dintlhana tsa motse di tlaa reketla ka go goa ga basimaganyetsi ba dikepe tsa gago. 
Ezekiel27:29 Le botlhe ba ba itseng go tshwara dikankasi, le batsamaisi ba dikepe, le basimaganyetsi ba dikepe mo lewatleng, ba tlaa fologa mo dikepeng tsa bone, ba ema fa fatshe." 
Ezekiel27:30 Ba tlaa utlwatsa lešalaba la bone, mo godimo ga gago, ba tlaa gala mo go botlhoko, ba tlaa ikubuela lorole mo tlhogong tsa bone, ba bidikama mo moloreng." 
Ezekiel27:31 Ba tlaa go itšhemolela ditlhogo, ba ikokwaela ka letsela la kgetse, ba tlaa go lelela ka bogalaka jwa mowa ka selelo se se galakang." 
Ezekiel27:32 Mo go goeng ga bone ba tlaa go tlhabeleletsa khutsafalo, ba tlaa go hutsafalela, ba re: ‘E mang yo o tshwanang le Ture, yo o tshwanang le ene yo o didimaditsweng mo pelong ya lewatle.’" 
Ezekiel27:33 E rile dithoto tsa gago di sa tswa mo mawatleng, wa bo o ne o tlaleletsa ditšhaba di le dintsi; wa humisa dikgosi tsa lefatshe ka bontsi jwa dikhumo tsa gago, le jwa tlhwatlhwa ya gago." 
Ezekiel27:34 E rile mo motlheng o o thubilweng ka one ke mawatle mo matengnyeng a metsi, tlhwatlhwa ya gago, le lesomo lotlhe la gago lwa wa mo gare ga gago." 
Ezekiel27:35 “Banni botlhe ba ditlhake ba go gakgamaletse le dikgosi tsa bone di a boifa mo go tsitlisang marapo di tlhontse difatlhogo tsa tsone. 
Ezekiel27:36 Babapatsi ba ba mo ditšhabeng ba go otsa; o dule theregiso, mme ga o ketla o tlhola o leyo gope.”" 
Ezekiel28:1 Gape lefoko la ga Jehofa la tla mo go nna, la re:" 
Ezekiel28:2 “Morwa motho, raya kgosana ya Ture, o re: Morena Modimo o bua jaana, a re: E re ka pelo ya gago e itsholeditse, mme o rile, o modimo, o dutse mo setulong sa Modimo, mo gare ga mawatle; le fa go ntse jalo o motho, e seng Modimo le fa o ne o beile pelo ya gago jaaka pelo ya Modimo." 
Ezekiel28:3 Bona, o botlhale bogolo go Daniele; ga go na maoma ape a ba ka a go subelang." 
Ezekiel28:3 Bona, o botlhale bogolo go Daniele; ga go na maoma ape a ba ka a go subelang." 
Ezekiel28:4 O iponetse dikhumo ka botlhale jwa gago le ka tlhaloganyo ya gago, mme o tsentse gouta le selefera mo mahumong a gago." 
Ezekiel28:5 O ntsifaditse dikhumo tsa gago ka botlhale jwa gago jo bogolo, le ka go bapala ga gago, mme pelo ya gago e itsholeditse ka ntlha ya dikhumo tsa gago.”" 
Ezekiel28:6 Ke gone ka moo Morena Modimo o bua jaana, a re: “E re ka o beile pelo ya gago jaaka pelo ya Modimo;" 
Ezekiel28:7 ke gone bona, ke tlaa lere baeng mo go wena, ba ba boitshegang ba merafe; mme ba tlaa somolela bontle jwa botlhale jwa gago ditšhaka, ba tlaa leswefatsa phatsimo ya gago." 
Ezekiel28:8 Ba tlaa go folosetsa mo moleteng; mme o tlaa swa dintsho tsa ba ba bolailweng, o le mo pelong ya mawatle." 
Ezekiel28:9 A o sa ntse o tlaa bua fa pele ga yo o go bolayang o re, o modimo le mororo o le motho, e seng Modimo, o le mo seatleng sa yo o go ntshang ntho?" 
Ezekiel28:10 O tlaa swa dintsho tsa ba ba sa rupang, ka seatla sa baeng, gonne ke buile. Go bua Morena Modimo.”" 
Ezekiel28:11 Gape lefoko la ga Jehofa la tla mo go nna, la re:" 
Ezekiel28:12 “Morwa motho, tlhabeleletsa kgosi ya Ture khutsafalelo, mme o e reye o re: Morena Modimo o bua jaana, a re: O konela tshobokanyo, o tletse botlhale, o itekanetse mo bontleng." 
Ezekiel28:13 O ne o le mo Etene tshimo ya Modimo; lentswana lengwe le lengwe le le tlhokegang e ne e le seipipo sa gago, e bong la saredio, le la topase, le la teemane, le la berile, le la onekesa le la jasepere, le la safire, le la emerelete, le la karebunekele, le gouta; go dira meropana ya gago, le ditlhaka tsa gago tse di lediwang, go ne go le mo go wena; di baakantswe mo motlheng o o tlhodilweng ka one." 
Ezekiel28:14 E ne e le wena tšheruba e e tloditsweng e e khurumetsang; mme ka go baya, wa ba wa tla wa nna mo thabeng e e itshepileng ya Modimo; o tsamaetse kwa le kwa mo gare ga maje a a molelo." 
Ezekiel28:15 E sa le ka letsatsi le o tlhodilweng ka lone o ntse o itekanetse fela, ga tsamaya tshiamololo ya fitlhelwa mo go wena." 
Ezekiel28:16 Ba tladitse bogare jwa gago ka thubakano ka bontsi jwa dithekelano tsa gago, mme o leofile. Ke gone ka moo ke go fegoletseng koo mo thabeng ya Modimo jaaka selo se se matladika; mme ke go sentse, wena tšheruba e e khurumetsang, ka go ntsha mo majeng a molelo." 
Ezekiel28:17 Pelo ya gago e ne e itsholeditse ka ntlha ya bontle jwa gago, o bodisitse botlhale jwa gago ka ntlha ya phatsimo ya gago; ke go digetse fa fatshe, ke go beile fa pele ga dikgosi, gore di go bone." 
Ezekiel28:18 Ka bontsi jwa maikepo a gago, mo tshiamololong ya go bapala ga gago, o tlhapaditse mafelo a gago a a boitshepo; ke gone ka moo ke tukisitseng molelo mo gare ga gago, o go laitse, mme ke go fetotse melora fa fatshe mo ponong ya botlhe ba ba go lebileng." 
Ezekiel28:19 Botlhe ba ba go itseng mo ditšhabeng ba tlaa go gakgamalela; o fetogile theregiso, mme ga o ketla o tlhola o leyo gope.”" 
Ezekiel28:20 Lefoko la ga Jehofa la tla mo go nna, la re:" 
Ezekiel28:21 “Morwa motho, lebisa sefatlhogo sa gago kwa Sitone, mme o perofese o o nyatse, o re: Morena Modimo o bua jaana, a re:" 
Ezekiel28:22 Bona, ke tlhabana nao, wena Sitone; mme ke tlaa galalediwa mo gare ga gago; mme ba tlaa itse fa ke le Jehofa, ke sena go dirafatsa ditshekiso mo go ene, le ke sena go itshepisiwa mo go ene." 
Ezekiel28:23 Gonne ke tlaa roma mo go ene kgogodi le madi mo mebileng ya gone; mme ba ba tlhabilweng ba tlaa wa mo gare ga teng, e leng ka tšhaka mo ntlheng tsotlhe tsa teng; mme ba tlaa itse fa ke le Jehofa." 
Ezekiel28:24 “Ga go ketla go tlhola go le mitlwana e e tlhabang ntlo ya Iseraele, le fa e le mitlwa e e tlhokofatsang ya bape ba ba mo tikologong ya bone, ba ba kileng ba ba direla ka kgokgontsho; mme ba tlaa itse fa ke le Morena Modimo.”" 
Ezekiel28:25 Morena Modimo o bua jaana a, re: “E tlaa re ke sena go phutha ba ntlo ya Iseraele kwa ditšhabeng kwa ba gasegetseng teng, le ke sena go itshepisiwa mo go bone mo ponong ya merafe, foo ba tlaa aga mo lefatsheng la ga bone, le ke le neileng motlhanka wa me Jakobe." 
Ezekiel28:26 Ba tlaa aga mo go lone ka thagamo; ee, ba tlaa aga matlo, ba tlhoma masimo a mafine, mme ba tlaa aga ka thagamo; ke sena go dirafatsa ditshekiso mo go bone botlhe ba ba ba direlang ka kgokgontsho mo tikologong ya bone; mme ba tlaa itse fa ke le Morena Modimo wa bone.”" 
Ezekiel29:1 E rile ka ngwaga wa lesome, ka kgwedi ya lesome, ka letsatsi la 12 la kgwedi, lefoko la ga Jehofa la tla mo go nna, la re:" 
Ezekiel29:2 “Morwa motho, lebisa sefatlhogo sa gago kwa go Faro kgosi ya Egepeto, mme o perofese o mo nyatse, ene, le lefatshe lotlhe la Egepeto." 
Ezekiel29:3 Bua, o re: Morena Modimo o bua jaana, a re: Bona, ke tlhabana nao, wena Faro kgosi ya Egepeto, kwena e tona e e namaletseng mo gare ga dinoka tsa gagwe, yo o reng: ‘Noka ya me ke ya me fela, ke bile ke e itiretse.’" 
Ezekiel29:4 Ke tlaa tsenya dikobe mo ditlhaeng tsa gago, mme ditlhapi tsa dinoka tsa gago ke tlaa di ngaparetsa mo makapeng a gago; ke tlaa go tlhatlosa mo gare ga dinoka tsa gago, le ditlhapi tsotlhe tsa dinoka tsa gago di ngaparetse mo makapeng a gago." 
Ezekiel29:5 Ke tlaa go tlogela o latlhetswe mo nageng, wena le ditlhapi tsotlhe tsa dinoka tsa gago; o tlaa wela mo nageng e e lobala fela; ga o ketla o kokoanngwa le fa e le go phuthwa; ke go abetse dibatana tsa lefatshe le dinonyane tsa loapi go nna dijo tsa tsone." 
Ezekiel29:6 “Banni botlhe ba Egepeto ba tlaa itse fa ke le Jehofa, ka gobo ba ne ba ntse ba le seikokotlelo sa lotlhaka fela mo go ba ntlo ya Iseraele." 
Ezekiel29:7 E rile ba go tshwara ka letsogo wa phitsega, wa gagola marudi otlhe a bone; e rile ba ikaega mo go wena wa robega, wa roromisa ditheka tsotlhe tsa bone." 
Ezekiel29:8 Ke gone ka moo, go bua Morena Modimo, a re: Bona, ke tlaa lere tšhaka mo go wena, ke kgaola mo go wena motho le kgomo." 
Ezekiel29:9 Lefatshe la Egepeto le tlaa nna tshwafalo le kgakgabalo; mme ba tlaa itse fa ke le Jehofa; gonne o itheile a re: ‘Noka ke ya me, ke nna yo ke e dirileng.’" 
Ezekiel29:10 Ke gone bona, ke tlhabana nao le dinoka tsa gago, ke tlaa ira lefatshe la Egepeto gore le nne tshenyego le kgakgabalelo le tshwafalelo ruri, go tswa kagong e e godileng ya phemelo ya Sefene go ya fela kwa molelwaneng wa Ethiopia." 
Ezekiel29:11 Ga go ketla go ralala lonao lope lwa motho mo go lone, le tlhako ya kgomo ga e ketla e le ralala, le gone ga le ketla le nnwa ka dinyaga di le 40." 
Ezekiel29:12 Ke tlaa swafatsa lefatshe la Egepeto mo gare ga mafatshe a a swafetseng, le metse ya lone mo gare ga metse e e ropefetseng, e tlaa nna tshwafalo ka dinyaga di le 40. Ke tlaa gasamisetsa Baegepeto mo merafeng, ke ba phatlalaletsa mo mafatsheng.”" 
Ezekiel29:13 Gonne Morena Modimo o bua jaana, a re: “E tlaa re dinyaga di le 40 di sena go feta ke tlaa phutha Baegepeto kwa ditšhabeng kwa ba gasamesegetseng teng." 
Ezekiel29:14 Ke tlaa ba ke busa botshwaro jwa Baegepeto, ke tlaa ba busetsa mo lefatsheng la Patherose, mo lefatsheng la botsalelo jwa bone; mme ba tlaa nna teng e le bogosi jo bo nyatsegang." 
Ezekiel29:15 Bo tlaa nyatsega bogolo go magosi otlhe; ga bo ketla bo tlhola bo itsholeletsa godimo ga merafe; ke tlaa ba ngotla gore ba se tlhole ba laola merafe. 
Ezekiel29:16 Ga bo ketla bo tlhola bo nna boikanngo jwa ba ntlo ya Iseraele, go gopodisa ka ga boikepo fa ba šeba kwa go bone; mme ba tlaa itse fa ke le Morena Modimo.”" 
Ezekiel29:17 Ga dirala ya re ka ngwaga wa 27, ka kgwedi ya ntlha, ka letsatsi la ntlha la kgwedi, lefoko la ga Jehofa la tla mo go nna, la re:" 
Ezekiel29:18 “Morwa motho, Nebukatenesare kgosi ya Babilone o na a dirisa ntwa ya gagwe tiro e kgolo ya go tlhabana le Ture; ditlhogo tsotlhe tsa tšhemoga, marudi otlhe a kgoboga; le fa go ntse jalo o ne a sena maduo, le fa e le ntwa ya gagwe mo Ture, ka ga tiro e o e dirileng a tlhabana nao." 
Ezekiel29:19 Ke gone ka moo Morena Modimo o bua jaana, a re: Bona, ke tlaa naya Nebukatenesare kgosi ya Babilone lefatshe la Egepeto; mme o tlaa tlosetsa bontsi jwa lone koo, o tlaa thopa a gapa dilo tsa lone; mme e tlaa nna maduo a ntwa ya gagwe." 
Ezekiel29:20 Ke mo neile lefatshe la Egepeto e le tuelo ya gagwe e o e diretseng, ka ba ne ba ntirela, go bua Morena Modimo." 
Ezekiel29:21 “Ke tlaa re mo motlheng oo ke kukuntshetse ba ntlo ya Iseraele lonaka, le wena ke tlaa go naya go tswa molomo mo gare ga bone; mme ba tlaa itse fa ke le Jehofa.”" 
Ezekiel30:1 Gape lefoko la ga Jehofa la tla mo go nna, la re:" 
Ezekiel30:2 “Morwa motho, perofesa, o re: Morena Modimo o bua jaana, a re:" 
Ezekiel30:3 “Bokolelang lo re: A letsatsi le legolo! Gonne letsatsi le atametse, e bong letsatsi la ga Jehofa le atametse, letsatsi la maru; e tlaa nna motlha wa baditšhaba." 
Ezekiel30:4 Tšhaka e tlaa tla mo Egepeto, mme go tlaa nna tlalelo e e mahehe mo Ethiopia, mogang babolaiwi ba wang mo Egepeto; ba tlaa tlosetsa bontsi jwa gagwe koo, le metheo ya gagwe e tlaa rutlwa." 
Ezekiel30:5 “Ba Ethiopia, le ba Pute, le ba Lute, le batho ba ba tlhakanyeng botlhe, le ba Kuba, le bana ba lefatshe le le mo kgolaganong, ba tlaa tswa nabo ka tšhaka.”" 
Ezekiel30:6 Jehofa o bua jaana, a re: “Le ba ba tshegeditseng Egepeto ba tlaa wa, le pelafalo ya thata ya gagwe e tlaa fologa; go simologa ka kago e e godileng ya Sefene ba tlaa wa mo go ene ka tšhaka, go bua Morena Modimo." 
Ezekiel30:7 Ba tlaa swafala mo gare ga mafatshe a a swafetseng, metse ya gagwe e tlaa nna mo gare ga metse e e ropefetseng." 
Ezekiel30:8 Ba tlaa itse fa ke le Jehofa, ke sena go tsenya molelo mo Egepeto, le bathusi ba gagwe botlhe ba senyegile." 
Ezekiel30:9 “E tlaa re mo motlheng oo barongwa ba tlaa tswa fa pele ga me ka dikepe ba ya go boifisa Baethiopia ba ba ntseng fela ba sa re sepe. Go tlaa nna tlalelo e e mahehe mo go bone, jaaka mo motlheng wa Egepeto; gonne bonang, o etla.”" 
Ezekiel30:10 Morena Modimo o bua jaana, a re: “Ke bile ke tlaa khutlisa bontsi jwa Egepeto, ka seatla sa ga Nebukatenesare kgosi ya Babilone." 
Ezekiel30:11 Ene le batho ba gagwe nae, ba ba boitshegang ba merafe, ba tlaa leriwe go senya lefatshe; ba tlaa somolela Egepeto ditšhaka tsa bone, ba tlaa tlatsa lefatshe ka babolaiwi." 
Ezekiel30:12 Mme ke tlaa kgadisa dinoka, ke tlaa rekisetsa lefatshe mo seatleng sa batho ba ba bosula; ke tlaa swafatsa lefatshe le tsotlhe tse di mo go lone, ka seatla sa baeng. Nna Jehofa ke buile.”" 
Ezekiel30:13 Morena Modimo o bua jaana, a re: “Ke bile ke tlaa senya medimo ya disetwa, ke tlaa khutlisa tse e leng ditshwantsho, di nyelela mo Nofa; ga go ketla go tlhola go nna kgosana ya lefatshe la Egepeto; ke tlaa tsenya poifo mo lefatsheng la Egepeto." 
Ezekiel30:14 Ke tlaa swafatsa Patherose, ke tlaa tsenya molelo mo Soane, ke tlaa dirafatsa ditshekiso mo No." 
Ezekiel30:15 Ke tlaa goromeletsa tšararego ya me mo Sine o e leng kago e e thata ya phemelo ya Egepeto, ke kgaola bontsi jwa No." 
Ezekiel30:16 Ke tlaa tsenya molelo mo Egepeto; Sine o tlaa nna mo tlalelong e kgolo e e mahehe; le No o tlaa thubaganngwa; le Nofe o tlaa nna le baganetsi go le motshegare. 
Ezekiel30:17 Makau a Afene le a Pibesethe a tlaa wa ka tšhaka; mme metse eo e tlaa ya botshwarong. 
Ezekiel30:18 Le gone kwa Tagepenese motshegare o tlaa ngongwaela, mogang ke robelang teng dijokwe tsa Egepeto, pelafalo ya thata ya gagwe e tlaa khutla mo go ene; mme ka ga gagwe leru le tlaa mo khurumetsa, le bomorwadie ba tlaa ya botshwarong." 
Ezekiel30:19 Ke tlaa dirafatsa ditshekiso mo Egepeto jalo; mme ba tlaa itse fa ke le Jehofa.” 
Ezekiel30:20 Ga dirala ya re ka ngwaga wa 11, ka kgwedi ya ntlha, ka letsatsi la bosupa la kgwedi, lefoko la ga Jehofa la tla mo go nna, la re:" 
Ezekiel30:21 “Morwa motho, ke robile letsogo la ga Faro kgosi ya Egepeto; mme bona, ga le a fapiwa go tla le bewa melemo e e fodisang, go tla le bofiwa ka sebofo, gore le nonofele go tshwara tšhaka." 
Ezekiel30:22 Ke gone ka moo Morena Modimo o bua jaana, a re: Bona, ke tlhabana le Faro kgosi ya Egepeto, ke tlaa roba mabogo a gagwe, le le thata, le le le robegileng gale; mme ke tlaa usa tšhaka mo seatleng sa gagwe." 
Ezekiel30:23 Ke tlaa gasamisetsa Baegepeto mo merafeng, ke ba phatlalaletsa le mafatshe." 
Ezekiel30:24 Ke tlaa thatafatsa mabogo a kgosi ya Babilone, ke tsenya tšhaka ya me mo seatleng sa yone; ke tlaa roba mabogo a ga Faro, mme o tlaa sonela fa pele ga yone ka ditshonelo tsa motho yo o tlhabilweng lwa go swa." 
Ezekiel30:25 Ke tlaa tsholetsa mabogo a kgosi ya Babilone, mabogo a ga Faro a tlaa lesologa; mme ba tlaa itse fa ke le Jehofa, mogang ke tsenyang tšhaka ya me mo seatleng sa kgosi ya Babilone, mme e tlaa e otlololela lefatshe la Egepeto." 
Ezekiel30:26 Ke tlaa gasamisetsa Baegepeto mo merafeng, ke tlaa ba phatlalaletsa le mafatshe; mme ba tlaa itse fa ke le Jehofa.”" 
Ezekiel31:1 Ga dirala ya re ka ngwaga wa 11, ka kgwedi ya boraro, ka letsatsi la ntlha la kgwedi, lefoko la ga Jehofa la tla mo go nna, la re:" 
Ezekiel31:2 “Morwa motho, raya Faro kgosi ya Egepeto, le bontsi jwa gagwe, o re: “Ana o tshwana le mang mo bogolong jwa gago?" 
Ezekiel31:3 Bona, Moasiria e ne e le mosetara mo Lebanone, o o nang le dikala tse dintle, o o nang le togakano e e tshutifatsang, mme o ne o godile thata, setlhoa sa gagwe se le mo dikaleng tse dikima." 
Ezekiel31:4 Metsi a ne a mo otla, boteng jwa mo godisa; dinoka tsa gagwe tsa elela tikologong ya fa o tlhomilweng teng; mme a isa meedi ya gagwe kwa ditlhareng tsotlhe tsa naga." 
Ezekiel31:5 Ke gone ka moo go gola ga gagwe ga feta ditlhare tsotlhe tsa naga; le dikala tsa gagwe tsa ntsifadiwa, mme ya re a tlhogisa dikala tsa gagwe tsa nna ditelele ka ntlha ya metsi a mantsi." 
Ezekiel31:6 Dinonyane tsotlhe tsa loapi tsa aga ditlhaga tsa tsone mo dikaleng tsa gagwe, ditshedi tsotlhe tsa naga tsa tsalela ka fa tlase ga dikala tsa gagwe, le merafe yotlhe e megolo ya aga mo moriting wa gagwe." 
Ezekiel31:7 Jalo o ne a le montle mo bogolong jwa gagwe, mo boleeleng jwa dikala tsa gagwe; gonne motswe wa gagwe o ne o le ka fa metsing a mantsi." 
Ezekiel31:8 Masetara a a mo tshimong ya Modimo a ne a sa nonofa go mo suba; ditlhare tsa mafire di sa tshwane le dikala tsa gagwe, le ditlhare tsa mapelane di sa nna jaaka dikala tsa gagwe; go ne go se na setlhare sepe mo tshimong ya Modimo se se tshwanang nae mo bontleng jwa gagwe." 
Ezekiel31:9 Ke mo dirile montle ka bontsi jwa dikala tsa gagwe; ditlhare tsotlhe tsa Etene, tse di mo tshimong ya Modimo, a di bolaisa pelo.”" 
Ezekiel31:10 Ke gone ka moo Morena Modimo o bua jaana, a re: “E re ka o godile, mme o beile setlhoa mo dikaleng tse dikima, le pelo ya gagwe e itsholeditse mo bogodimong jwa gagwe," 
Ezekiel31:11 ke tlaa mo tsenya mo seatleng sa mononofi wa merafe; ene ruri o tlaa dira nae; ke mo leleketse koo ka ntlha ya boikepo jwa gagwe. 
Ezekiel31:12 Baeng ba ba boitshegang ba merafe, ba mo kgaotse, ba mo tlogetse dikala tsa gagwe di wetse mo dithabeng le mo megogorong yotlhe, dikala tsa gagwe di robegetse fa meeding yotlhe ya metse ya lefatshe; mme ditšhaba tsotlhe tsa lefatshe di tlogile mo moriting wa gagwe, di mo tlogetse." 
Ezekiel31:13 Dinonyane tsotlhe tsa loapi di tlaa aga mo go koameng ga gagwe, le ditshedi tsotlhe tsa naga di tlaa aga mo dikaleng tsa gagwe," 
Ezekiel31:14 e le gore go se nne ditlhare dipe tse di fa metsing tse di ka ikgodisang mo go goleng ga tsone, le fa e le go ipaya setlhoa mo dikaleng tse dikima, le fa e le bathata ba merafe go ema mo bogodimong jwa bone, e bong botlhe ba ba nwang metsi; gonne ba neetswe loso botlhe fela, go ya mafelong a a kwa tlasetlase a lefatshe, mo gare ga bana ba batho, ba na le ba ba fologelang mo moleteng.”" 
Ezekiel31:15 Morena Modimo o bua jaana, a re: “E rile ka tsatsi le o fologetseng ka lone mo Bobipong, ka tsosa bohutsana; ka mo khurumeletsa boteng, ka kganela dinoka tsa lone, mme metsi a magolo a emisiwa; ka mo hutsafaletsa Lebanone, le ditlhare tsotlhe tsa naga tsa mo idibalela." 
Ezekiel31:16 E rile ke mo digela mo Bobipong a na le ba ba fologelang mo moleteng, ka reketlisa merafe ka kgosomelo ya go wa ga gagwe; ditlhare tsotlhe tsa Etene, tse di tlhaotsweng le tse di molemo tsa Lebanone, tsotlhe tse di nwang metsi, tsa gomodiwa mo mafelong a a kwa tlasetlase a lefatshe." 
Ezekiel31:17 Tsa ba tsa fologela nae mo Bobipong kwa go ba ba bolailweng ka tšhaka; ee, bone ba e ne e le letsogo la gagwe, mme ba aga mo moriting wa gagwe mo gare ga merafe." 
Ezekiel31:18 “Ana jalo mo ditlhareng tsa Etene o tshwana le mang mo kgalalelong le mo go goleng? Le fa go ntse jalo o tlaa folosediwa le ditlhare tsa Etene kwa mafelong a a kwa tlasetlase a lefatshe. O tlaa nna mo gare ga ba ba sa rupang, le ba ba bolailweng ka tšhaka. Yo ke ene Faro, le bontsi jwa gagwe.” Go bua Morena Modimo." 
Ezekiel32:1 Ga dirala ya re ka ngwaga wa 12, ka kgwedi ya 12, ka tsatsi la ntlha la kgwedi, lefoko la ga Jehofa la tla mo go nna, la re:" 
Ezekiel32:2 “Morwa motho, tlhabeleletsa Faro kgosi ya Egepeto khutsafalelo, o mo reye o re: “O kile wa tshwantshiwa le ledumedi la merafe; le fa go ntse jalo o ntse jaaka kgogela mo mawatleng, mme wa photsega mo dinokeng tsa gago, wa kgobera metsi ka maroo, wa leswefatsa dinoka tsa bone." 
Ezekiel32:3 Morena Modimo o bua jaana, a re: Ke tlaa go tsharololela lotloa lwa me ka lesomo le ditšhaba di le dintsi, ba tlaa go ntshetsa kwa ntle ka lotloa lwa me." 
Ezekiel32:4 Ke tlaa go tlogela mo lefatsheng, ke go latlhela mo nageng e e lobala fela, ke tlaa rereanyetsa dinonyane tsotlhe tsa loapi mo go wena, ke tlaa kgorisa dibatana tsa lefatshe lotlhe ka wena." 
Ezekiel32:5 Ke tlaa baya nama ya gago mo dithabeng, ke tlaa tlatsa megogoro ka bogodimo jwa gago." 
Ezekiel32:6 Le lefatshe le o sapang mo go lone ke tlaa le nosa madi a gago, go ya fela kwa dithabeng; mme o tlaa tlala ka meedi ya metsi." 
Ezekiel32:7 E tlaa re ke go tima, ke tlaa khurumetsa legodimo, ke tlaa fifatsa dinaledi tsa lona; ke tlaa khurumetsa letsatsi ka leru, le kgwedi ga e ketla e ntsha lesedi la yone." 
Ezekiel32:8 Masedi otlhe a legodimo a a betlameng ke tlaa a fifatsa mo godimo ga gago, mme ke tlaa baya lefifi mo fatsheng la gaeno, go bua Morena Modimo." 
Ezekiel32:9 “Ke bile ke tlaa gakatsa dipelo tsa ditšhaba di le dintsi, mogang ke tlisang tshenyego ya gago mo merafeng, mo mafatsheng a o se kang wa a itse." 
Ezekiel32:10 Ee, ke tlaa gakgamatsa ditšhaba di le dintsi ka wena, dikgosi tsa tsone di tlaa boifa ka mo go tsitlisang marapo ka ga gago, mogang ke kgatikanyang tšhaka ya me fa pele ga tsone; di tlaa nna di roroma tsotlhe ka thata, nngwe le nngwe e roromela botshelo jwa yone tota, mo motlheng wa go wa ga gago.”" 
Ezekiel32:11 Gonne Morena Modimo o bua jaana, a re: “Tšhaka ya kgosi ya Babilone e tlaa tla mo go wena." 
Ezekiel32:12 Ke tlaa usa bontsi jwa gago ka ditšhaka tsa bathata; botlhe ke ba ba boitshegang ba merafe; ba tlaa thopa pelafalo ya Egepeto, mme bontsi jotlhe jwa bone bo tlaa senngwa." 
Ezekiel32:13 Ke bile ke tlaa senya le dikgomo tsotlhe tsa teng di nyelele fa metsing a magolo; mme lonao lwa motho ga lo ketla lo tlhola lo a kgobera, le ditlhako tsa dikgomo ga di ketla di a kgobera." 
Ezekiel32:14 Foo ke tlaa ikgatisa metsi a bone, ke tlaa eledisa dinoka tsa bone jaaka lookwane, go bua Morena Modimo." 
Ezekiel32:15 E tlaa re mogang ke swafatsang ke kgakgabatsa lefatshe la Egepeto, e nne lefatshe le le tlhokang sone se se neng se tletse mo go lone, mogang o ke itayang botlhe ba ba agileng teng, foo ba tlaa itse fa ke le Jehofa." 
Ezekiel32:16 E ke khutsafalo e ba tlaa hutsafalang ka yone; bomorwadia merafe ba tlaa hutsafala ka yone; ba tlaa hutsafalela Egepeto le bontsi yotlhe jwa gagwe ka yone.” Go bua Morena Modimo. 
Ezekiel32:17 Le gone ga dirala ya re ka ngwaga wa 12, ka letsatsi la 15 la kgwedi, lefoko la ga Jehofa la tla mo go nna, la re:" 
Ezekiel32:18 “Morwa motho, tlhabeleletsa bontsi jwa Egepeto kuruetso, o ba digele mo mafelong a a tlasetlase a lefatshe, e bong ene Egepeto le bomorwadia merafe e e tumileng, ba ye le ba ba fologelang mo moleteng." 
Ezekiel32:19 “ ‘Ana o gaisa mang ka bontle? Fologa, o ye go namaladiwa le ba ba sa rupang.’" 
Ezekiel32:20 “Ba tlaa wela mo gare ga ba ba bolailweng ka tšhaka; o neeletswe tšhaka; mo tlosetseng koo le bontsintsi jotlhe jwa gagwe. 
Ezekiel32:21 Yo o thata mo banonofing o tlaa bua nae a le mo gare ga Bobipo a na le ba ba mo thusang; ba fologile, ba namaletse fela, e bong ba ba sa rupang, ba bolailwe ka tšhaka." 
Ezekiel32:22 “Ašure o teng le lesomo lotlhe la gagwe; diphupu tsa gagwe di mo tikologong ya gagwe; botlhe e le ba ba bolailweng, ba ole ka tšhaka:" 
Ezekiel32:23 Ba diphupu tsa bone di beilweng kwa meseong e e kwa tengteng ga molete, mme lesomo la gagwe le mo tikologong ya phupu ya gagwe; botlhe e le ba ba bolailweng, ba ole ka tšhaka, e le ba ba kileng ba ne ba tsosa theregiso mo fatsheng la batshedi." 
Ezekiel32:24 “Elame o teng le bontsi jotlhe jwa gagwe tikologong ya phupu ya gagwe; botlhe ke ba ba bolailweng, ba ole ka tšhaka, ba ba fologetseng kwa mafelong a a kwa tlasetlase a lefatshe ba sa rupa, ba ba kileng ba tsosa theregiso ya bone mo lefatsheng la batshedi, mme ba belege botlhabisa ditlhong jwa bone le ba ba fologelang mo moleteng." 
Ezekiel32:25 Ba mo aletse bolao mo gare ga babolaiwi, a na le bontsi jwa gagwe; diphupu tsa gagwe di mo tikologong ya gagwe; botlhe e le ba ba sa rupang, ba bolailwe ka tšhaka; gonne theregiso ya bone e kile ya tsosiwa mo lefatsheng la batshedi; mme ba belege botlhabisa ditlhong jwa bone le ba ba fologelang mo moleteng." 
Ezekiel32:26 “Mešeke o teng le Tubale, le bontsi jotlhe jwa gagwe; diphupu tsa gagwe di mo tikologong ya gagwe: botlhe e le ba ba sa rupang, ba bolailwe ka tšhaka; gonne ba ne ba tsosa theregiso ya bone mo lefatsheng la batshedi." 
Ezekiel32:27 Ga ba ketla ba robala le bathata ba ba oleng ba sa rupa, ba ba fologetseng mo Bobipong, ba na le dibolao tsa bone tsa ntwa, ba samile ditšhaka tsa bone, le maikepo a bone a mo marapong a bone; gonne ba ne ba le theregiso ya bathata mo lefatsheng la batshedi." 
Ezekiel32:28 “Wena o tlaa thubelwa mo gare ga ba ba sa rupang, o tlaa namalala le ba ba bolailweng ka tšhaka." 
Ezekiel32:29 “Etome o teng, dikgosi tsa gagwe le dikgosana tsotlhe tsa gagwe, ba namaladitswe e le diganka le ba ba bolailweng ka tshaka; ba tlaa namalala le ba ba sa rupang, ba na le ba ba fologelang mo moleteng." 
Ezekiel32:30 “Dikgosana tsa kwa botsheka di teng, tsotlhe fela, le Basitone botlhe, ba ba fologileng le babolaiwi; ba tlhabisiwa ditlhong ke theregiso e ba kileng ba e tsosa ka nonofo ya bone; ba namaletse ba sa rupa, ba na le ba ba bolailweng ka tšhaka, ba belege botlhabisa ditlhong jwa bone le ba ba fologelang mo moleteng." 
Ezekiel32:31 “Faro o tlaa ba bona, mme o tlaa gomotsega ka ga bontsi jotlhe jwa gagwe, e bong Faro le mephato yotlhe ya gagwe, ba ba bolailweng ka tšhaka, go bua Morena Modimo." 
Ezekiel32:32 “Gonne ke tsentse theregiso ya gagwe mo lefatsheng la batshedi; o tlaa namaladiwa mo gare ga ba ba sa rupang, le ba ba bolailweng ka tšhaka, e bong Faro le bontsi jotlhe jwa gagwe.” Go bua Morena Modimo." 
Ezekiel33:1 Lefoko la ga Jehofa la tla mo go nna, la re:" 
Ezekiel33:2 “Morwa motho, bua le bana ba batho ba gaeno, o ba reye o re: Mogang ke lereng tšhaka mo lefatsheng lengwe, fa batho ba lefatshe leo ba tsaya motho mo go bone, ba mmaya molebedi wa bone;" 
Ezekiel33:3 fa e tlaa re a bona tšhaka e tla mo lefatsheng, mme a letsa lonaka, a tlhagisa batho;" 
Ezekiel33:4 foo le fa e le mang yo o utlwang tumo ya lonaka, mme a se ka a tlhagisega, fa tšhaka e tlaa e mo tlosa, madi a gagwe a tlaa nna mo tlhogong ya gagwe." 
Ezekiel33:5 O utlwile tumo ya lonaka, mme a se ka a tlhagisega, madi a gagwe a tlaa nna mo go ene: le mororo fa a ka bo a ne a tlhagisega o ka bo a golotse mowa wa gagwe." 
Ezekiel33:6 Mme fa molebedi a bona tšhaka e tla, mme a sa letse lonaka, mme batho ba sa tlhagisiwe, mme tšhaka e tla, e tlosa motho mongwe mo go bone; o tlosiwa mo boikepong jwa gagwe, mme madi a gagwe ke tlaa a batla mo seatleng sa molebedi." 
Ezekiel33:7 “Jalo fela, wena morwa motho, ke go beile molebedi wa ba ntlo ya Iseraele; mme ke gone utlwa lefoko mo molomong wa me, mme o ba neye tlhagiso e e tswang mo go nna." 
Ezekiel33:8 Ya re fa ke raya moikepi, ke re: ‘Wena moikepi, ruri o tlaa swa!’ Mme o sa bue go tlhagisa moikepi gore a tswe tseleng ya gagwe; moikepi yoo o tlaa swela mo boikepong jwa gagwe, mme madi a gagwe ke tlaa a lopa mo seatleng sa gago." 
Ezekiel33:9 Le fa go ntse jalo fa o tlhagisa moikepi ka ga tsela ya gagwe go mo sokolola mo go yone, mme a sa sokologe mo tseleng ya gagwe; o tlaa swela mo boikepong jwa gagwe, mme wena o bo o golotse mowa wa gago." 
Ezekiel33:10 “Le wena, morwa motho, raya ba ntlo ya Iseraele, o re: Lo tle lo bue jaana, lo re: ‘Ditlolo tsa rona le maleo a rona a mo go rona, re tlhorega fela mo go tsone; mme re bo re ka tshela jang?’" 
Ezekiel33:11 Ba reye o re: Jaaka ke tshedile, go bua Morena Modimo, ga ke na kgatlhego epe mo losong lwa moikepi; fa e se go re moikepi a sokologe mo tseleng ya gagwe, mme a tshele. Sokologang, sokologang mo ditseleng tsa lona tse di bosula; gonne lo ratelang go swa, lona ba ntlo ya Iseraele?" 
Ezekiel33:12 “Le wena, morwa motho, raya bana ba batho ba gaeno, o re: ‘Tshiamo ya mosiami ga e ketla e mo golola mo motlheng wa tlolo ya gagwe; mme ka ga boikepo jwa moikepi ga a ketla a wa ka jone mo motlheng o o sokologang ka one mo boikepong jwa gagwe. Le ene yo o siameng ga a ketla a nonofa go tshela ka gone, mo motlheng o o leofang ka one.’" 
Ezekiel33:13 Ya re fa ke raya mosiami ke re: ‘Ruri o tlaa tshela;’ fa a ikanya tshiamo ya gagwe, mme a dira boikepo, ga go ketla go gakologelwa ditiro dipe tsa gagwe tsa tshiamo; mme mo boikepong jo o bo dirileng o tlaa swela mo go jone." 
Ezekiel33:14 Gape, ya re fa ke raya moikepi ke re: ‘Ruri o tlaa swa;’ fa a sokologa mo boleong jwa gagwe, mme a dira se se laotsweng le se se siameng;" 
Ezekiel33:15 fa moikepi a rebola peelo, a busa se o ne a se tsere ka bogodu, a sepela mo ditaong tsa botshelo, a sa dire boikepo bope; ruri o tlaa tshela, ga a ketla a swa." 
Ezekiel33:16 Ga go ketla go gakologelwa maleo ape a gagwe a o a dirileng go mo sekisa; o dirile se se laotsweng le se se siameng; ruri o tlaa tshela. 
Ezekiel33:17 “Le fa go ntse jalo bana ba batho ba gaeno ba tle ba re: ‘Tsela ya ga Jehofa ga e lekalekane;’ mme ka ga bone, tsela ya bone ga e a lekalekana." 
Ezekiel33:18 Mogang mosiami o sokologang mo tshiamong ya gagwe, mme a dira boikepo, o tlaa swela fela mo go jone." 
Ezekiel33:19 Mogang moikepi o sokologang mo boikepong jwa gagwe, mme a dira se se laotsweng le se se siameng, o tlaa tshela ka gone." 
Ezekiel33:20 Le fa go ntse jalo lo a tle lo re: ‘Tsela ya ga Jehofa ga e lekalekane.’ Lona ba ntlo ya Iseraele, ke tlaa atlhola mongwe le mongwe wa lona ka fa mekgweng ya gagwe.”" 
Ezekiel33:21 Ga dirala ya re ka ngwaga wa 12 wa botshwaro jwa rona, ka kgwedi ya lesome, ka letsatsi la botlhano la kgwedi, mongwe yo o falotseng kwa Jerusalema a tla kwa go nna, a re: “Motse o kgemethilwe.”" 
Ezekiel33:22 Jaana seatla sa ga Jehofa sa bo se letse se le mo go nna go le maitsebowa, yo o falotseng a ise a goroge; mme o ne a ntumolotse molomo, ga tsamaya a tla mo mosong; mme molomo wa me o ne o tumolotswe, mme ka bo ke sa tlhole ke le semumu." 
Ezekiel33:23 Lefoko la ga Jehofa la tla mo go nna, la re:" 
Ezekiel33:24 “Morwa motho, ba ba ntseng mo mafelong ale a a kgakgabetseng mo lefatsheng la Iseraele, ba a bua, ba re: ‘Aberahame o ne a le mongwe fela, mme a rua lefatshe; mme rona re bantsi; lefatshe le neilwe rona go nna boswa.’" 
Ezekiel33:25 “Ke gone o ba reye o re: Morena Modimo o bua jaana, a re: Lo ja selo le madi a sone, lo tsholeletsa medimo ya disetwa ya lona matlho, lo tsholola madi a batho; a lo ka rua lefatshe?" 
Ezekiel33:26 Lo ema mo tšhakeng ya lona, lo dira tse di makgapha, monwe le mongwe o senya mosadi wa mongwe ka ene; mme a lona lo ka rua lefatshe?" 
Ezekiel33:27 “O tlaa ba raya jaana, o re: Morena Modimo o bua jaana, a re: Jaaka ke tshedile, ruri ba ba kwa mafelong a a kgakgabetseng ba tlaa wa ka tšhaka, le ene yo o mo nageng e e lobala fela ke tlaa mo neela dibatana di mo ja, le ba ba mo dikagong tse di thata tsa phemelo le mo dikgageng, ba tlaa swa ka kgogodi." 
Ezekiel33:28 Ke tlaa dira lefatshe tshwafalo le kgakgamatso, pelafalo ya thata ya lone e tlaa khutla; dithaba tsa Iseraele di tlaa swafala, go ba go se ketla go feta ope ka teng." 
Ezekiel33:29 Foo ba tlaa itse fa ke le Jehofa, ke sena go dira lefatshe tshwafalo le kgakgamatso, ka ntlha ya tse di makgapha tsotlhe tsa bone tse ba di dirileng." 
Ezekiel33:30 “Ka ga gago, morwa motho, bana ba ba gaeno ba bua ka ga gago fa dithakong le mo mejakong ya mantlo, mme ba raane, mongwe le mongwe a reye wa ga gabo, a re: Ntlong, ke a lo rapela, lo utlwe, go re lefoko la ga Jehofa la reng." 
Ezekiel33:31 Ba tle mo go wena, jaaka batho ba tle ba tle, ba dule fa pele ga gago jaaka e ka bo e le batho ba me, ba utlwe mafoko a gago, mme ba se ke ba a dirafatse; gonne ka molomo ba bua lorato lo logolo, mme pelo ya bone e ye le papadi ya bone fela." 
Ezekiel33:32 Bona, o ntse mo go bone jaaka pina e e monate ya mongwe yo o nang le lentswe le le kgatlhang, mme a itse go letsa seletso sentle, gonne ba utlwa mafoko a gago, mme ga ba a dire." 
Ezekiel33:33 Mogang golo mo go dirafalang, bona, go etla, foo ba tlaa itse fa moperofeti mongwe a kile a ne a le mo go bone.”" 
Ezekiel34:1 Lefoko la ga Jehofa la tla mo go nna, la re:" 
Ezekiel34:2 “Morwa motho, perofesa o nyatse badisa ba Iseraele, perofesa, o ba reye, e bong badisa, o re: Morena Modimo o bua jaana, a re: A bo go latlhega badisa ba Iseraele ba ba ijesang fela! Badisa a ga ba a tshwanela go fudisa dinku?" 
Ezekiel34:3 Lo ja mafura, lo ikapesa ka bobowa, lo tlhaba tse di nonneng; mme ga lo fudise dinku." 
Ezekiel34:4 Tse di bobolang ga lo a di thatafatsa, ga lo a fodisa tse di lwalang, ga lo a fapa tse di robegileng, le gone ga lo a busa tse di lelekilweng, ga lo a batla tse di timetseng; mme lo di laotse ka kgolo le patiko." 
Ezekiel34:5 Di ne di faletse ka go bo modisa a seyo. Tsa nna dijo tsa dibatana tsotlhe tsa naga, mme di ne di faletse." 
Ezekiel34:6 Dinku tsa me tsa timelela mo dithabeng tsotlhe, le mo lekhubung lengwe le lengwe. Ee, dinku tsa me di ne di gasametse mo lefatsheng lotlhe; mme go se na ope yo o di senkang le fa e le go di latela." 
Ezekiel34:7 “Ke gone, lona badisa utlwang lefoko la ga Jehofa, a re:" 
Ezekiel34:8 Jaaka ke tshedile, go bua Morena Modimo: Ruri, e re ka dinku tsa me e ne e le dilo tsa go bolawa fela, dinku tsa me tsa nna dijo tsa dibatana tsotlhe tsa naga, ka go bo modisa a na a seyo, le gone badisa ba me ba se ka ba batla dinku tsa me, mme badisa ba ijesa fela, ba se ka ba fudisa dinku tsa me;" 
Ezekiel34:9 ke gona, lona badisa utlwang lefoko la ga Jehofa;" 
Ezekiel34:10 Morena Modimo o bua jaana, a re: Bonang, ke tlhabana le badisa; ke tlaa lopa dinku tsa me mo seatleng sa bone, mme ke tlaa ba khutlisa mo go tlholeng ba fudisa dinku; le gone badisa ga ba ketla ba tlhola ba ijesa fela; ke tlaa golola dinku tsa me mo ganong la bone, gore di se nne dijo tsa bone." 
Ezekiel34:11 “Gonne Morena Modimo o bua jaana, a re: Bonang, nna ka nosi, e bong nna, ke tlaa senka dinku tsa me, ke tlaa di latela." 
Ezekiel34:12 Jaaka modisa a tle a senke letsomane la gagwe mo motlheng o dinku di a bong di faletse ka one, le nna ke tlaa senka dinku tsa me jalo; ke tlaa di golola mo mafelong otlhe kwa di falaletseng teng mo motlheng wa maru le lefifi." 
Ezekiel34:13 Ke tlaa di ntsha mo ditšhabeng, ke tlaa di phutha kwa mafatsheng, ke tlaa di lere mo lefatsheng le e leng la tsone; ke tlaa di fudisa mo dithabeng tsa Iseraele, fa meeding ya metsi, le mo mafelong otlhe a lefatshe a a ntsweng." 
Ezekiel34:14 Ke tlaa di fudisa bofulo jo bo monate, mme lesaka la tsone le tlaa nna mo dithabeng tsa bogodimo jwa Iseraele. Di tlaa robala mo sakeng le le molemo, di tlaa fula mo bofulong jo bo loreme mo dithabeng tsa Iseraele." 
Ezekiel34:15 Nna ka nosi ke tlaa fudisa dinku tsa me, ke di bothisa, go bua Morena Modimo." 
Ezekiel34:16 “Ke tlaa batla tse di timetseng, ke tlaa ba ke lere tse di lelekilweng, ke tlaa fapa tse di robegileng, ke thatafatsa tse di botlhoko; mme ke tlaa senya tse di nonneng le tse di thata; ke tlaa di fudisa mo tshiamisong." 
Ezekiel34:17 “Ka ga lona, letsomane la me, Morena Modimo o bua jaana, a re: Bonang, ke sekaseka gare ga dihuthsane le dihutshane, mo diphelefung jaaka mo diphokong." 
Ezekiel34:18 A ke sengwe se sennyennyane mo go lona, go re, lo fudile mo mafulong a a molemo, fa e bo ne ne fano mo go setseng ga mafulo a lona lo go gataka ka dinao? Le go re lo nole metsi a a itshekileng, fa e bo ne ne fano a a setseng lo a kgobera ka dinao?" 
Ezekiel34:19 Ka ga dinku tsa me, di fula mo lo go gatakileng ka dinao, di nwa metsi a lo a kgoberileng ka dinao." 
Ezekiel34:20 “Ke gone ka moo Morena Modimo o buang nabo jaana, a re: Bonang, nna e bong nna, ke tlaa sekaseka gare ga dihutshane tse di nonneng le dihutshane tse di mokodue." 
Ezekiel34:21 Ereka lo kgorometsa ka lotlhakore le ka lerudi, lo šegola tse di lwalang tsotlhe ka dinaka tsa lona, go tsamaya lo di falaletsa kwa ntle;" 
Ezekiel34:22 ke gone ka moo ke tlaa bolokang letsomane la me, mme ga le ketla le tlhola le nna kgapo; ke tlaa sekaseka gare ga dihutshane le dihutshane." 
Ezekiel34:23 Ke tlaa di tlhomela modisa a le mongwe fela, mme o tlaa di fudisa, e bong motlhanka wa me Dafite; o tlaa di fudisa, mme o tlaa nna modisa wa tsone." 
Ezekiel34:24 Nna Jehofa ke tlaa nna Modimo wa bone, motlhanka wa me Dafite o tlaa nna kgosana mo go bone; nna Jehofa ke buile." 
Ezekiel34:25 Ke tlaa dira kgolagano ya kagiso nabo, ke tlaa khutlisa dibatana tse di bosula mo lefatsheng; ba tlaa nna ka thagamo mo nageng, ba robala fela mo dikgweng." 
Ezekiel34:26 “Ke tlaa ba dira tshegofatso, bone le mafelo a a mo tikologong ya lekhubu la me; ke tlaa nesa pula mo motlheng wa yone; go tlaa nna meokodi ya tshegofatso." 
Ezekiel34:27 Le setlhare sa naga se tlaa ungwa; le lefatshe le tlaa ntsha totafalo ya lone, mme ba tlaa nna ka thagamo mo lefatsheng la bone. Ba tlaa itse fa ke le Jehofa, ke sena go roba mephakalego ya dijokwe tsa bone, mme ke ba golotse mo seatleng sa ba ba itirelang ka bone." 
Ezekiel34:28 Ga ba ketla ba tlhola ba le kgapo ya baditšhaba, le sebatana sa lefatshe ga se ketla se ba ja; mme ba tlaa aga ka thagamo, ope ga a ketla a ba boifisa." 
Ezekiel34:29 Ke tlaa ba tsosetsa sekgwana se se tlaa tumang, ga ba ketla ba tlhola ba nyelediwa ke leuba mo lefatsheng, le fa e le go tlhola ba belega botlhabisa ditlhong jwa baditšhaba gope." 
Ezekiel34:30 Ba tlaa itse fa nna Morena Modimo wa bone ke na le bone, le go re bone ba ntlo ya Iseraele ke batho ba me, go bua Morena Modimo." 
Ezekiel34:31 “Lona dinku tsa me, dinku tsa bofulo jwa me, lo batho, le nna ke Modimo wa lona.” Go bua Morena Modimo." 
Ezekiel35:1 Gape lefoko la ga Jehofa la tla mo go nna, la re:" 
Ezekiel35:2 “Morwa motho, lebisa sefatlhogo sa gago kwa thabeng ya Seire, mme o perofese o e nyatse." 
Ezekiel35:3 “O e reye o re: Morena Modimo o bua jaana, a re: “Bona, ke tlhabana nao, Wena thaba ya Seire, ke tlaa go otlololela seatla sa me, ke tlaa go dira tshwafalo le kgakgamatso." 
Ezekiel35:4 Ke tlaa ropefatsa metse ya gago, mme o tlaa swafala; mme o tlaa itse fa ke le Jehofa." 
Ezekiel35:5 “E re ka o ne o ntse o na le bobaba jo bo emeng fela, mme o tsentse bana ba Iseraele mo thateng ya tšhaka mo motlheng wa tatlhego ya bone, mo motlheng wa boikepo jwa bokhutlo;" 
Ezekiel35:6 ke gone, jaaka ke tshedile,” go bua Morena Modimo, “ke tlaa go baakanyetsa go ya mading, madi a tlaa go konatelela; e re ka o se ka wa ila madi, ke gone madi a tlaa go konatelela." 
Ezekiel35:7 Jalo ke tlaa dira thaba ya Seire go nna kgakgamatso le tshwafalo; ke tlaa kgaola mo go yone ene yo o fetang ka teng, le ene yo o boang." 
Ezekiel35:8 Ke tlaa tlatsa dithaba tsa gagwe ka babolaiwi; mo makhubung a gago, le mo megogorong ya gago, le mo meeding yotlhe ya gago, ba ba bolailweng ka tšhaka ba tlaa wela teng." 
Ezekiel35:9 Ke tlaa go dira ditshwafalo tse di sa khutleng, le metse ya gago ga e ketla e nnwa; mme lo tlaa itse fa ke le Jehofa." 
Ezekiel35:10 “E re ka o rile: ‘Merafe e mebedi e, le mafatshe a mabedi a, a tlaa nna a me, mme re tlaa a rua;’ le mororo Jehofa a le teng;" 
Ezekiel35:11 ke gone, jaaka ke tshedile,” go bua Morena Modimo, “ke tlaa dira ka fa bogaleng jwa gago, le ka fa bopelotshetlheng jwa gago jo o bo bonaditseng ka ntlha ya go ba ila ga gago; ke tlaa ikitsise mo go bone, mogang o ke go sekisang." 
Ezekiel35:12 O tlaa itse fa nna Jehofa ke utlwile ditlhapatso tsotlhe tsa gago tse o tlhapaditseng dithaba tsa Iseraele ka tsone, wa re: ‘Di swafaditswe, re di neetswe go di ja.’" 
Ezekiel35:13 Lo inkgodiseditse ka molomo, lo intsifaleditse mafoko a lona, ke go utlwile.”" 
Ezekiel35:14 Morena Modimo o bua jaana, a re: “E tlaa re mogang lefatshe lotlhe le itumelang, wena ke go swafatse." 
Ezekiel35:15 Jaaka o kile wa jela boswa jwa ntlo ya Iseraele koma, ka bo ne bo swafetse, le nna ke tlaa go direla jalo; o tlaa swafala; wena thaba ya Seire, le lefatshe lotlhe la Etome e bong lotlhe fela; mme ba tlaa itse fa ke le Jehofa." 
Ezekiel36:1 “Wena morwa motho, perofesetsa dithaba tsa Iseraele, o re: Lona dithaba tsa Iseraele, utlwang lefoko la ga Jehofa." 
Ezekiel36:2 Morena Modimo o bua jaana, a re: E re ka baba ba buile ka ga lona ba re: ‘Ahe!’ ba ba ba re: ‘Mafelo a a tlotlometseng a bogologolo ke a rona go a rua.’" 
Ezekiel36:3 “Ke gone perofesa, o re: Morena Modimo o bua jaana, a re: e re ka, ee, e re ka ba lo swafaditse, ba lo komeditse ka ntlha tsotlhe, gore lo nne seruiwa sa masalela a merafe, mme lo bolelwa ke melomo ya babuabui, lo le tumedi e e bosula mo bathong;" 
Ezekiel36:4 ke gone, lona dithaba tsa Iseraele, utlwang lefoko la Morena Modimo; Morena Modimo o bua jaana le dithaba le makhubu, le meedi, le melapo le dikgakgabalo tse di swafetseng, le metse e e tlogetsweng, e e duleng thopo le setshego mo masaleleng a merafe e e mo tikologong." 
Ezekiel36:5 “Ke gone ka moo Morena Modimo o bua jaana, a re: Ruri ke buile ka molelo wa lefufa la me ka ga masalela a merafe, le ka ga Etome otlhe fela, ba ba ineileng lefatshe la me go le rua ka boitumelo jwa pelo yotlhe ya bone, ka kilo ya mowa, go le latlhela kwa ntle e le thopo." 
Ezekiel36:6 “Ke gone perofesa ka ga lefatshe la Iseraele, o reye dithaba, le makhubu, le meedi, le melapo, o re: Morena Modimo o bua jaana, a re: Bonang, ke buile mo lefufeng la me, le mo tšararegong ya me, gonne lo belege botlhabisa ditlhong jwa baditšhaba." 
Ezekiel36:7 Ke gone ka mo Morena Modimo o bua jaana, a re: Ke tsholeditse letsogo la me ka re: Ruri baditšhaba ba ba mo tikologong ya lona, ba tlaa belega botlhabisa ditlhong jwa bone." 
Ezekiel36:8 “Lona dithaba tsa Iseraele, lo tlaa tlhogisa dikala, lo tlaa ungwela batho ba me Iseraele; gonne ba gaufi go tla." 
Ezekiel36:9 Gonne bonang, ke ntlheng ya lona, ke tlaa retologela kwa go lona, mme lo tlaa lengwa lo jalwa." 
Ezekiel36:10 Ke tlaa ntsifatsa batho mo go lona, ba ntlo ya Iseraele botlhe, e bong botlhe fela; mme metse e tlaa nnwa, le mafelo a a ropefetseng a tlaa agiwa."
