Ezekiel36:11 Ke tlaa ntsifatsa mo go lona motho le kgomo; mme batho ba tlaa ntsifala ba ata le dikgomo. Ke tlaa dira gore lo nnwe ka fa popegong ya lona ya pele, ke tlaa lo direla sentle bogolo go mo ditshimologong tsa lona; mme lo tlaa itse fa ke le Jehofa." 
Ezekiel36:12 Ee, ke tlaa tsamaisa batho mo go lona, e bong batho ba me ba Iseraele; mme ba tlaa go rua, o tlaa nna boswa jwa bone, mme ga o ketla o tlhola o ba thukhutha bana gope." 
Ezekiel36:13 “Morena Modimo o bua jaana, a re: E re ka ba lo raya ba re: ‘Wena lefatshe o mosuputsi wa batho, o ntse o le mothukhuthi wa morafe wa gaeno;’" 
Ezekiel36:14 ke gone ga o ketla o tlhola o suputsa batho gope, le fa e le go thukhutha morafe wa ga eno, go bua Morena Modimo." 
Ezekiel36:15 Le gone ga nketla ke tlhola ke go leseletsa o utlwa botlhabisa ditlhong jwa merafe, ga o ketla o tlhola o belega kgobo ya baditšhaba, ga o ketla o tlhola o kgopisa morafe wa ga eno; go bua Morena Modimo.”" 
Ezekiel36:16 Gape lefoko la ga Jehofa la tla mo go nna, la re:" 
Ezekiel36:17 “Morwa motho, e rile ba ntlo ya Iseraele ba sa ntse ba agile mo lefatsheng la ga bone, ba le itshekolola ka mokgwa wa bone le ka ditiro tsa bone; mokgwa wa bone fa pele ga me o ne o ntse jaaka leswe la mosadi a le medibela." 
Ezekiel36:18 Ke gone ka moo ka ba goromeletsa tšararego ya me ka ntlha ya madi a ba a tsholotseng mo lefatsheng, le ka go bo ba le itshekolotse ka medimo ya bone ya disetwa." 
Ezekiel36:19 Ka ba gasamisetsa mo merafeng, ba phatlalalediwa le mafatshe; ke ba sekisitse ka fa mokgweng wa bone le ka fa ditirong tsa bone." 
Ezekiel36:20 Mme e rile ba fitlha kwa merafeng, kwa ba ileng teng, ba fitlhile ba tlhapatsa leina la me le le boitshepo; ka batho ba buile ka ga bone, ba re: Bao ke batho ba ga Jehofa, mme ba dule mo lefatsheng la gagwe." 
Ezekiel36:21 Mme ka tlhomogela leina la me le le boitshepo pelo, le ba ntlo ya Iseraele, ba ne ba le tlhapaditse mo merafeng, kwa ba ne ba ile teng." 
Ezekiel36:22 “Ke gone, raya ba ntlo ya Iseraele o re: Morena Modimo o bua jaana a re: Ga ke dire se ka ntlha ya lona, lona ba ntlo ya Iseraele, fa e se ka ntlha ya leina la me le le boitshepo, le lo le tlhapaditseng mo merafeng kwa lo ne lo ile teng." 
Ezekiel36:23 Ke tlaa itshepisa leina la me le legolo, le le tlhapaditsweng mo merafeng, le lo le tlhapaditseng mo gare ga yona; mme merafe e tlaa itse fa ke le Jehofa, go bua Morena Modimo, mogang ke itshepisiwang mo go lona fa pele ga matlho a yona." 
Ezekiel36:24 Gonne ke tlaa lo tsaya mo merafeng ke lo phutha kwa mafatsheng otlhe, mme ke tlaa lo lere mo lefatsheng la ga lona." 
Ezekiel36:25 Foo ke tlaa lo kgatsha ka metsi a a itshekileng, mme lo tlaa itsheka; ke tlaa lo tlhapisa leswe lotlhe la lona, le medimo yotlhe ya lona ya disetwa." 
Ezekiel36:26 Le gone ke tlaa lo naya pelo e ntšha, ke tlaa tsenya mowa o moša mo teng ga lona; ke tlaa tlosa pelo ya sekalentswe mo nameng ya lona, mme ke tlaa lo naya pelo ya senama." 
Ezekiel36:27 Ke tlaa tsenya mowa wa me mo teng ga lona, ke tlaa lo tsamaisa mo ditaong tsa me, lo tlaa tshegetsa dikatlholo tsa me, lo di dira." 
Ezekiel36:28 Lo tlaa aga mo lefatsheng le ke le neileng borraeno; lo tlaa nna batho ba me, le nna ke tlaa nna Modimo wa lona." 
Ezekiel36:29 Ke tlaa lo dibela mo masweng otlhe a lona; ke tlaa bitsa mabele, ke a ntsifatsa, ke sa beye popamo epe mo go lona." 
Ezekiel36:30 Ke tlaa ntsifatsa loungo lwa setlhare, le totafalo ya masimo, mme ga lo ketla lo tlhola lo kgojwa ka tlala mo merafeng." 
Ezekiel36:31 Foo lo tlaa gakologelwa mekgwa ya lona e e bosula, le ditiro tsa lona tse di seng molemo; lo tlaa itshulafalela mo ponong ya lona ka ntlha ya maikepo a lona, le ka ntlha ya tse di makgapha tsa lona." 
Ezekiel36:32 A go itsiwe ke lona go re mo ga ke go dire ka ntlha ya lona, go bua Morena Modimo; tlhajwang ke ditlhong, lo sosobagane ka ntlha ya mekgwa ya lona, lona ba ntlo ya Iseraele.”" 
Ezekiel36:33 “Morena Modimo o bua jaana, a re: E tlaa re mo motlheng o ke lo tlhapisang ka one maikepo otlhe a lona, ke tlaa dira gore metse e nnwe, mme mafelo a a ropefetseng a tlaa agiwa." 
Ezekiel36:34 Le lefatshe le le kileng la ne le swafetse le tlaa lengwa, le mororo le ne le le tshwafalo fela mo ponong ya botlhe ba ba fetang ka teng." 
Ezekiel36:35 Ba tlaa bua ba re: ‘Lefatshe le, le le kileng la ne le swafetse, le bile le fetogile le ntse jaaka tshimo ya Etene; le metse e e neng e kgakgabetse, e swafetse, e le marope fela, e bile e thekeleditswe, e ntswe ke batho.’" 
Ezekiel36:36 Foo merafe e e setseng mo tikologong ya lona e tlaa itse fa nna Jehofa ke agile mafelo a a ne a rutlologile, ke tlhomile mo go neng go swafetse; nna Jehofa ke buile, mme ke tlaa go dira.”" 
Ezekiel36:37 Morena Modimo o bua jaana, a re: “Le ka ga sone se, ke tlaa bodiwa ke ba ntlo ya Iseraele go se ba direla; ke tlaa ba atisetsa batho jaaka letsomane." 
Ezekiel36:38 Jaaka letsomane la setlhabelo, jaaka letsomane la Jerusalema mo medirong ya one e e laotsweng; jalo fela metse e e ropefetseng e tlaa tlala matsomane a batho; mme ba tlaa itse fa ke le Jehofa.”" 
Ezekiel37:1 Seatla sa ga Jehofa se ne se le mo go nna, mme a nkisa kwa ntle ke le mo moweng wa ga Jehofa, a mpaya mo gare ga mogogoro; mme wa bo o tletse marapo." 
Ezekiel37:2 Mme a a mpotonosa, mme bonang, a bo a le mantsi thata mo mogogorong mo lobaleng fela; mme bonang, a bo a omeletse thata." 
Ezekiel37:3 Mme a nthaya a re: “Morwa motho, a marapo a, a ka tshela?” Mme ka mo fetola ka re: “Go itse wena, Morena Modimo.”" 
Ezekiel37:4 Gape a nthaya, a re: “Perofesetsa mo godimo ga marapo a, mme o a reye o re: Lona marapo a a omeletseng utlwang lefoko la ga Jehofa." 
Ezekiel37:5 Morena Modimo o raya marapo jaana, a re: Bonang, ke tlaa tsenya mowa mo go lona, mme lo tlaa tshela." 
Ezekiel37:6 Ke tlaa baya mesifa mo go lona, ke tlaa medisa nama mo go lona, ke lo khurumetsa ka letlalo, ke tsenya mowa mo go lona, mme lo tlaa tshela; mme lo tlaa itse fa ke le Jehofa.”" 
Ezekiel37:7 Jalo ka perofesa jaaka ke laotswe, mme ya re ke perofesa, ga tsoga modumo, mme bonang, ga nna thoromo ya lefatshe, mme marapo a kopana, lesapo mo lesapong le o rraa lone." 
Ezekiel37:8 Ka leba, mme bonang, ga bo go le mesifa mo go one, le nama ya mela, letlalo la a khurumetsa godimo; mme ga bo go se na mowa mo go one." 
Ezekiel37:9 Foo a nthaya, a re: “Perofesetsa phefo, perofesa, wena morwa motho, o reye phefo o re: Morena Modimo o bua jaana, a re: Tswa mo diphefong tsoo nne, wena mowa, o budulele babolaiwi ba, gore ba tshele.”" 
Ezekiel37:10 Jalo ka perofesa jaaka a ntaotse, mme mowa wa tsena mo go bone, mme ba tshela, ba ema ka dinao, e le ntwa e kgolo thata." 
Ezekiel37:11 Foo a nthaya a re: “Morwa motho, marapo a ke ba ntlo ya Iseraele botlhe fela; ba tle ba re: ‘Bonang, marapo a rona a omeletse, tsholofelo ya rona e ile; re kgaoletswe ruri.’" 
Ezekiel37:12 Ke gone perofesa, o ba reye o re: Morena Modimo o bua jaana, a re: Bonang, ke tlaa katolola diphupu tsa lona, ke tlaa lo ntsha mo diphupung tsa lona, lona batho ba me; mme ke tlaa lo isa kwa lefatsheng la Iseraele." 
Ezekiel37:13 Mme lo tlaa itse fa ke le Jehofa ke sena go katolola diphupu tsa lona, le ke sena go lo ntsha mo diphupung tsa lona, lona batho ba me." 
Ezekiel37:14 Ke tlaa tsenya mowa wa me mo go lona, mme lo tlaa tshela; ke tlaa lo baya mo lefatsheng la ga lona; mme lo tlaa itse fa nna Jehofa ke buile, ka ba ka go dira, go bua Jehofa.”" 
Ezekiel37:15 Gape lefoko la ga Jehofa la tla mo go nna, la re:" 
Ezekiel37:16 “Wena, morwa motho, tsaya thobane nngwe, mme o kwale mo go yone, o re: Ya ga Juta, le ya bana ba Iseraele, bankana ba gagwe; foo o tseye thobane e nngwe o kwale mo go yone, o re: Ya ga Josefe, thobane ya ga Eferaime, le ya ba ntlo ya Iseraele botlhe bankana ba gagwe;" 
Ezekiel37:17 o di pataganye e nne thobane e le nngwe fela, gore di nne nngwe fela mo seatleng sa gago." 
Ezekiel37:18 Mme mogang bana ba batho ba gaeno ba buang le wena, ba re: ‘A ga o nka o re bolelela se o se kayang ka dilo tse?’" 
Ezekiel37:19 O ba reye o re: Morena Modimo o bua jaana, a re: Bonang, ke tlaa tsaya thobane ya ga Josefe e e mo seatleng sa ga Eferaime, le ditso tsa Iseraele bankana ba gagwe; mme ke tlaa di baya mmogo nao, e bong le thobane ya ga Juta; mme ke tlaa di dira thobane e le nngwe fela, mme di tlaa nna nngwe fela mo seatleng sa me." 
Ezekiel37:20 “Dithobane tse o kwalang mo go tsone di tlaa nna mo atleng sa gago fa pele ga matlho a bone. 
Ezekiel37:21 O ba reye o re Morena Modimo o bua jaana, a re: Bonang, ke tlaa tlosa bana ba Iseraele kwa merafeng, kwa ba ileng teng, ke tlaa ba phutha mo ntlheng tsotlhe, ke ba isa mo lefatsheng la ga bone." 
Ezekiel37:22 Ke tlaa ba dira morafe o le mongwe fela mo lefatsheng, mo dithabeng tsa Iseraele; mme kgosi e le nngwe fela e tlaa nna kgosi e e ba busang botlhe fela; ga ba ketla ba tlhola ba nna merafe e le mebedi, le gone ga ba ketla ba tlhola ba kgaoganngwa ba nna magosi a le mabedi gope." 
Ezekiel37:23 Le gone ga ba ketla ba tlhola ba itshekolola ka medimo ya bone ya disetwa, le fa e le ka dilo tsa bone tse di tlhoesegang, le fa e le ka ditlolo dipe tsa bone; ke tlaa ba golola mo ditenegong tsotlhe tsa bone tse ba leofileng ka tsone, ke tlaa ba tlhapisa; jalo ba tlaa nna batho ba me, le nna ke tlaa nna Modimo wa bone." 
Ezekiel37:24 “Motlhanka wa me Dafite o tlaa nna kgosi e e ba busang; ba tlaa nna le modisa a le mongwe fela; le gone ba tlaa sepela mo dikatlholong tsa me, ba tlaa tlhokomela ditao tsa me, ba di dira." 
Ezekiel37:25 Ba tlaa aga mo lefatsheng le ke le neileng Jakobe motlhanka wa me, le borra ba lona ba kileng ba aga mo go lone; ba tlaa aga teng, bone le bana ba bone, le bana ba bana ba bone, ka bosakhutleng. Dafite motlhanka wa me o tlaa nna kgosana ya bone ka bosakhutleng." 
Ezekiel37:26 Gape ke tlaa dira kgolagano ya kagiso nabo; e tlaa nna kgolagano e e sa khutleng nabo. Ke tlaa ba baya, ke ba ntsifatsa, ke ba ke baya felo ga me ga boitshepo mo gare ga bone ka bosakhutleng." 
Ezekiel37:27 Le motlaagana wa me o tlaa nna le bone; ke tlaa nna Modimo wa bone, le bone ba tlaa nna batho ba me." 
Ezekiel37:28 Merafe e tlaa itse fa e le nna Jehofa yo ke itshepisang Iseraele, mogang felo ga me ga boitshepo go nnang mo go bone ka bosakhutleng.”" 
Ezekiel38:1 Lefoko la ga Jehofa la tla mo go nna la re: 
Ezekiel38:2 “Morwa motho, lebisa sefatlhogo sa gago kwa Goge, wa lefatshe la Magoge, kgosana ya Rosa, le Mešeke, le Tubale, mme o perofese o mo nyatse." 
Ezekiel38:3 O re: Morena Modimo o bua jaana, a re: Bona, ke tlhabana nao wena Goge, kgosana ya Rosa, le Mešeke le Tubale." 
Ezekiel38:4 Ke tlaa go retolola, ke tsenya dikobe mo ditlhaeng tsa gago, ke tlaa go ntshetsa kwa ntle, le ntwa yotlhe ya gago, dipitse le bapalama dipitse botlhe ba apere meitshomelo ya phemelo, lesomo le legolo le na le thebe, botlhe e le ba ba itseng go kgatikanya tšhaka." 
Ezekiel38:5 Ba Peresia, le ba Kuše le ba Pute ba na nabo; botlhe ba na le thebe le tlhoro ya phemelo." 
Ezekiel38:6 Gomere, masomosomo otlhe a gagwe a sekamerwalo ya tsie; ba ntlo ya ga Togarema kwa dikhutlong tsa lefatshe tsa kwa botsheka, le masomosomo a gagwe otlhe a sekamerwalo ya tsie; e bong ditšhaba di le dintsi di na nao." 
Ezekiel38:7 “O etleetsege, ee, o ipaakanye, wena le masomo otlhe a gago a a phuthegetseng kwa go wena, mme o nne molaodi mo go one." 
Ezekiel38:8 E tlaa re malatsi a le mantsi a fetile o tlaa lekolwa; e tlaa re mo dinyageng tse di kwa pele o tlaa fitlha mo lefatsheng le le busitsweng mo tšhakeng, le le phuthilweng mo ditšhabeng di le dintsi, mo dithabeng tsa Iseraele, tse di ntseng di kgakgabetse ka gale le ka gale; mme le ntshitswe kwa ditshabeng, mme ba tlaa aga ka thagamo, botlhe fela." 
Ezekiel38:9 O tlaa tlhatloga o tlaa tla jaaka ledimo, o tlaa nna jaaka leru go khurumetsa lefatshe, wena le masomosomo otlhe a gago a sekamerwalo ya tsie, o na le ditšhaba di le dintsi." 
Ezekiel38:10 “Morena Modimo o bua jaana, a re: Go tlaa dirala mo motlheng oo, go re dilo di tlaa tsoga mo pelong ya gago, mme o tlaa loga maano a a bosula." 
Ezekiel38:11 O tlaa re: Ke tlaa bololela kwa lefatsheng la metsana e e sa agelwang dithako; ke tlaa ya kwa go ba ba iketlileng, ba agile ka thagamo, botlhe ba agile fela ba se na dithako, ba se na mephakalego le fa e le ditswalo." 
Ezekiel38:12 Go tsaya thopo, go tsaya kgapo; go ya go busetsa seatla sa gago mo mafelong a a kgakgabetseng, a gompieno a ntsweng, le go tlhabana le batho ba ba tswang go phuthwa kwa merafeng, ba bapetse dikgomo le dithoto, ba agile mo gare ga lefatshe." 
Ezekiel38:13 Ba Sheba le ba Detane, le barekisi ba Tarešiše ba na le madumedi otlhe a teng, ba tlaa go raya ba re: ‘A o tsile go tsaya thopo? A o phuthile lesomo la gago go tla go tsaya kgapo? Go tla lo isa koo selefera le gouta, go ya le dikgomo le dilwana, go tsaya thopo e kgolo?’" 
Ezekiel38:14 “Ke gone ka moo, morwa motho, perofesa, o reye Goge o re: Morena Modimo o bua jaana, a re: E tlaa re mo motlheng oo, mogang batho ba me ba Iseraele ba agileng ka thagamo, a ga o ketla o go itse?" 
Ezekiel38:15 O tlaa tswa kwa felong ga gago, kwa dikhutlong tsa ntlha ya botsheka, wena le ditšhaba di le dintsi di na nao, botlhe ba palame dipitse, e le lesomo le legolo, le ntwa e e thata e kgolo." 
Ezekiel38:16 O tlaa bololela batho ba me ba Iseraele, o khurumetsa lefatshe jaaka leru; go tlaa dirala mo metlheng ya bofelo go re, ke tlaa go bololetsa lefatshe la ga etsho, gore merafe e nkitse, mogang ke itshepisiwang mo go wena, wena Goge fa pele ga matlho a bone.”" 
Ezekiel38:17 Morena Modimo o bua jaana, a re: “A ke wena yo ke buileng ka ga gago mo metlheng ya bogologolo, ka batlhanka ba me, baperofeti ba Iseraele, ba ba perofesitseng mo lobakeng loo ka dinyaga di le dintsi, ka re: Ke tlaa ba go bololetsa?" 
Ezekiel38:18 “Go tlaa dirala mo motlheng oo, go re mogang Goge o bololelang lefatshe la Baiseraele,” go bua Morena, “tšararego ya me e tlaa gola mo dinkong tsa me." 
Ezekiel38:19 Gonne ke buile mo lefufeng la me, le mo molelong wa bogale jwa me, ka re: Ruri mo motlheng oo go tlaa nna thoromo e kgolo mo lefatsheng la Iseraele;" 
Ezekiel38:20 go ba go tla ditlhapi tsa lewatle, le dinonyane tsa loapi, le ditshedi tsa naga, le dilo tsotlhe tse di gagabang, tse di gagbang fa fatshe, le batho botlhe ba ba mo lefatsheng, ba tlaa roroma fa pele ga gago, le dithaba di tlaa digwa, le mapawa a tlaa wa, le dithako tsotlhe di tlaa wela fa fatshe." 
Ezekiel38:21 Ke tlaa mo kuela tšhaka mo dithabeng tsa me tsotlhe fela,” go bua Morena Modimo; “tšhaka ya motho mongwe le mongwe e tlaa tsholediwa kgatlhanong le ngwana a rraagwe." 
Ezekiel38:22 Ke tlaa ganetsana nae ka kgogodi le madi; go le ene le masomosomo a gagwe a sekamerwalo ya tsie, le ditšhaba tse dintsi tse o nang natso, ke tlaa ba nesetsa lesogodi le le penologang, le sefako se segolo, le molelo, le sulefura." 
Ezekiel38:23 Ke tlaa itlotlomatsa, ke tlaa iitshepisa, ke tlaa itira gore ke itsiwe mo matlhong a merafe e le mentsi; mme ba tlaa itse fa ke le Jehofa.”" 
Ezekiel39:1 “Wena, morwa motho, perofesa o nyatse Goge, o re: Morena Modimo o bua jaana, a re: Bona, ke tlhabana nao wena Goge, kgosana ya Rosa, le Mešeke, le Tubale." 
Ezekiel39:2 Ke tlaa go retolola, ke tlaa go gogela kwa pele, ke go tlhatlosa kwa dikhutlong tsa ntlha ya botsheka; ke tlaa go lere mo dithabeng tsa Iseraele." 
Ezekiel39:3 Ke tlaa phaila bora jwa gago mo seatleng sa gago sa molema, ke tlaa usa metswi ya gago mo seatleng sa gago se segolo." 
Ezekiel39:4 O tlaa wela mo dithabeng tsa Iseraele, wena le masomosomo a gago otlhe a sekamerwalo ya tsie, le ditšhaba tsotlhe tse o nang natso; ke tlaa go neela dinonyane tse di gagolang tsa mehuta yotlhe, le dibatana tsa naga go go suputsa." 
Ezekiel39:5 O tlaa wela mo nageng e e lobala fela; gonne ke buile, go bua Morena Modimo." 
Ezekiel39:6 Ke tlaa tsenya molelo mo Magoge, le mo go ba ba agileng ka thagamo mo ditlhakeng; mme ba tlaa itse fa ke le Jehofa." 
Ezekiel39:7 “Leina la me le le boitshepo ke tlaa le itsise mo gare ga batho ba me ba Iseraele; ga nketla ke tlhola ke leseletsa leina la me le le boitshepo go tlhapadiwa; mme merafe e tlaa itse fa ke le Jehofa Moitshepi mo Iseraele. 
Ezekiel39:8 “Bonang, go etla, mme go tlaa dirwa,” go bua Morena Modimo; “ke lone letsatsi le ke buileng ka ga lone." 
Ezekiel39:9 Ba ba agileng mo metseng ya Iseraele ba tlaa bolola, ba tlaa ora dibolao, ba tlaa di fisa, dithebe le dithejane, mara le metswi, le melamu, le marumo, ba tlaa di ora ka dinyaga di supa." 
Ezekiel39:10 Jalo ga ba ketla ba ya go rwalela dikgong kwa nageng, le fa e le go di rema mo dikgweng; gonne ba tlaa ora dibolao; mme ba tlaa thopa bone ba ba kileng ba ba thopa, ba thukhutha bone ba ba kileng ba ba thukhutha.” Go bua Morena Modimo." 
Ezekiel39:11 “Go tlaa dirala mo motlheng oo, go re: Ke tlaa naya Goge felo ga phitlhelo mo Iseraele, mogogoro wa ba ba kgabaganyang ka fa ntlheng ya botlhabatsatsi ga lewatle; mme go tlaa kganela bone ba ba kgabaganyang; ba tlaa fitlha Goge teng, le bontsi jotlhe jwa gagwe; ba tlaa o raya leina ba re: Mogogoro wa Hamone-goge." 
Ezekiel39:12 Ba ntlo ya Iseraele ba tlaa nna ba ba fitlha ka dikgwedi di supa, gore ba tle ba tlhapise lefatshe." 
Ezekiel39:13 Ee, batho botlhe ba lefatshe ba tlaa ba fitlha; mme e tlaa nna tumedi mo go bone mo motlheng o ke tlaa galalediwang ka one, go bua Morena Modimo." 
Ezekiel39:14 Ba tlaa tlhaola banna ba ba tlaa nnang mo tirong e ka metlha yotlhe, ba tlaa farafara lefatshe ba fitlha ba ba raletseng, ba ba setseng fela fa godimo ga mmu wa lefatshe, gore ba le tlhapise; e tlaa re go fetile dikgwedi di supa ba tlaa fokotsa." 
Ezekiel39:15 Ba ba farafarang lefatshe ba tlaa ralala; mme e tlaa re fa mongwe fela a bona lesapo la motho, foo o tlaa tlhoma sesupo fa go lone, go tsamaye bafitlhi ba le fitlhe mo mogogorong wa Hamone-goge." 
Ezekiel39:16 E bile Hamone e tlaa nna leina la motse mongwe. Ba tlaa tlhapisa lefatshe jalo. 
Ezekiel39:17 “Wena, morwa motho,” Morena Modimo o bua jaana, a re: “Bua le dinonyane tsa mehuta yotlhe, le tse di tshedileng tsotlhe tsa naga, o re: Phuthegang, lo tle; lo ikokoanyetseng mo ntlheng tsotlhe lo phuthegele setlhabelo sa me, se ke se lo isetsang, e bong setlhabelo se segolo mo dithabeng tsa Iseraele, gore lo je nama lo nwe madi." 
Ezekiel39:18 Lo tlaa ja nama ya bathata, loo nwa madi a dikgosana tsa lefatshe, a diphelefu, le a dikwanyana, le a dipodi, le a dipholo, tsotlhe e le tse di nonneng tsa Bašane." 
Ezekiel39:19 Lo tlaa jela mahura lo kgora, lo nwela madi go tagwa, e le a setlhabelo sa me se ke se lo isetsang." 
Ezekiel39:20 Fa lomating lwa me lwa bojelo lo tlaa kgora dipitse, le dikara, le bathata, le batho botlhe ba ntwa, go bua Morena Modimo." 
Ezekiel39:21 “Ke tlaa tlhoma kgalalelo ya me mo merafeng, merafe yotlhe e tlaa bona tshekiso ya me, e ke e dirafaditseng, le seatla sa me se ke se beileng mo go yone." 
Ezekiel39:22 Jalo ba ntlo ya Iseraele ba tlaa itse fa ke le Morena Modimo wa bone, go simolola ka tsatsi leo le go ya kwa pele." 
Ezekiel39:23 Merafe e tlaa itse fa ba ntlo ya Iseraele ba ne ba ile botshwarong ka ntlha ya boikepo jwa bone; ka ba ne ba ntlolela, mme ka ba itshubela sefatlhogo sa me; ka ba tsenya mo seatleng sa baba ba bone, mme ba wa botlhe ka tšhaka." 
Ezekiel39:24 Ka ba direla ka fa boitshekologong jwa bone, le ka fa ditlolong tsa bone; ka ba ka ba itshubela sefatlhogo sa me." 
Ezekiel39:25 “Ke gone ka moo Morena Modimo o bua jaana, a re: Jaanong ke tlaa busa botshwaro jwa ga Jakobe, ke tlaa utlwela ntlo yotlhe ya Iseraele botlhoko; mme ke tlaa fufagela leina la me le le boitshepo." 
Ezekiel39:26 Mme ba tlaa bo ba belege botlhabisa ditlhong jwa bone, le ditlolo tsotlhe tsa bone tse ba ntloletseng ka tsone, mogang ba agang ka thagamo mo lefatsheng la gabone, go se na ope yo o ba boifisang;" 
Ezekiel39:27 mogang ke ba busitseng gape kwa ditšhabeng, ke ba phuthile kwa mafatsheng a baba ba bone, mme ke itshepisiwa mo go bone mo ponong ya merafe e le mentsi." 
Ezekiel39:28 Ba tlaa itse fa ke le Morena Modimo wa bone, ka go bo ke ne ka laola gore ba isiwe botshwarong mo merafeng, ke bile ke ba phuthetse mo lefatsheng la ga bone; ke bile ke se ketla ke tlhola ke tlogela ope wa bone teng;" 
Ezekiel39:29 le gone ga nketla ke tlhola ke ba itshubela sefatlhogo sa me, gonne ke goromeditse mowa wa me mo go ba ntlo ya Iseraele, go bua Morena Modimo.”" 
Ezekiel40:1 E rile ka ngwaga wa 25 wa botshwaro jwa rona, mo tshimologong ya ngwaga, ka letsatsi la lesome la kgwedi, ka ngwaga wa lesome le bone, morago ga motse o sena go kgemethwa, ka letsatsi leo fela seatla sa ga Jehofa sa bo se le mo go nna, mme a nkisa teng." 
Ezekiel40:2 A nkisa lefatsheng la Iseraele mo diponatshegelong tsa Modimo, mme a mpaya mo thabeng nngwe e e godileng thata, e go neng go le mo go yone ka fa ntlheng ya borwa e ke te sebopego sa motse mongwe." 
Ezekiel40:3 A nkisa teng, mme bonang, ga bo go le monna teng, yo ponalo ya gagwe e ntseng jaaka ponalo ya kgotlho, a tshotse thodi ya leloba, le lotlhaka lo lo lekanyang; mme a bo a eme mo kgorong." 
Ezekiel40:4 Monna yoo a nthaya, a re: “Morwa motho, o bone ka matlho, o bo o utlwe ka ditsebe, mme o tlhokomele ka pelo, tsotlhe tse ke di go supetsang; gonne fa o lerilwe kwano e be e le gore ke di go supetse; tsotlhe tse o di bonang o di kakanyetse ba ntlo ya Iseraele.”" 
Ezekiel40:5 Bonang, ga bo go le lorako ka fa ntle ga ntlo mo tikologong ya yone, mme monna yoo o ne a tshotse lotlhaka lo lo lekanyang lo le boleele jwa mabogo a le marataro, letsogo lengwe le lengwe e le letsogo le paralatso ya seatla; mme a lekanya boatlhamo jwa kago, bo le lotlhaka lo le longwe fela; le bogodimo bo le lotlhaka lo le longwe fela." 
Ezekiel40:6 Foo a fitlha fa kgorong e e lebileng kwa botlhabatsatsi, mme a palama direpudi tsa yone; a lekanya serepudi sa kgoro, se le boatlhamo lotlhaka lo le longwe fela; le serepudi se sengwe se le boatlhamo lotlhaka lo le longwe fela." 
Ezekiel40:7 Ntlwana nngwe le nngwe ya tebelo e ne e le boleele jwa lotlhaka lo le longwe fela, le boatlhamo lotlhaka lo le longwe fela; mme sebaka se se fa gare ga matlwana a tebelo e ne e le mabogo a le matlhano; mme serepudi sa kgoro fa maribeleng a kgoro e e lebileng kwa ntlong, e ne e le lotlhaka lo le longwe fela." 
Ezekiel40:8 A ba a lekanya le one maribela a kgoro e e lebileng kwa ntlong e le lotlhaka lo le longwe fela. 
Ezekiel40:9 Foo a lekanya maribela a kgoro, mabogo a a 8; le maotwana a one e le mabogo a le mabedi; maribela a kgoro a ne a lebile kwa ntlong." 
Ezekiel40:10 Matlwana a tebelo a kgoro ntlheng ya botlhabatsatsi a ne a le mararo ka fa ntlheng nngwe, le mararo ntlheng e nngwe; oo mararo a ne a le selekanyo se le sengwe fela; le maotwana a le selekanyo se le sengwe fela ka fa ntlheng nngwe le nngwe." 
Ezekiel40:11 A lekanya boatlhamo jwa botseno jwa kgoro, mabogo a le some; le boleele jwa kgoro, mabogo a le 13;" 
Ezekiel40:12 le sebaka sa fa pele ga matlwana a tebelo, letsogo le le lengwe fela ntlheng nngwe, le sebaka se le letsogo lengwe fela ntlheng e nngwe; le matlwana a tebelo a le mabogo a le marataro ntlheng nngwe, le mabogo a le marataro ntlheng a nngwe." 
Ezekiel40:13 A lekanya kgoro go tswa ditlhomesong tsa ntlwana nngwe ya tebelo go ya ditlhomesong tsa e nngwe e le boatlhamo jwa mabogo a le 25; mojako o lebaganye le mojako. 
Ezekiel40:14 A ba a dira maotwana, mabogo a le 60; mme lolwapa lwa fitlha kwa lekotwaneng tikologong yotlhe ya kgoro." 
Ezekiel40:15 Go tswa fa pele ga kgoro fa botsenong, go ya fa pele ga ntlwana ya kgoro e e ka fa teng e ne e le mabogo a le 50." 
Ezekiel40:16 Go ne go le dipone tse ditshesane tsa matlwana a tebelo, le tsa maotwana a tsone mo tikologong ya kgoro, le tsa mekatako; go le dipone mo tikologong, tse di lebileng kwa teng, mme mo lekotwaneng lengwe le lengwe go ne go le ditlhare tsa makolane." 
Ezekiel40:17 Foo a nkisa mo lolwapeng lwa fa ntle, mme bonang, ga bo go le matlwana le bophaphatho jwa matlapa, go diretswe lolwapa mo tikologong; go ne go le matlwana a le 30 fa bophaphathong jwa matlapa." 
Ezekiel40:18 Bophaphatho jwa matlapa bo ne bo le fa dikgorong, bo ntse jaaka boleele jwa dikgoro, e bong bophaphatho jwa tlase." 
Ezekiel40:19 Foo a lekanya boatlhamo go tswa fa pele ga kgoro ya tlase go ya fa pele ga lolwapa lwa kwa teng ka fa ntle, e le mabogo a le lekgolo, ntlheng ya botlhabatsatsi le ntlheng ya botsheka." 
Ezekiel40:20 Le kgoro ya lolwapa lwa ka fa ntle e e lebileng ntlheng ya botsheka, a lekanya boleele jwa yone le boatlhamo jwa yone." 
Ezekiel40:21 Le matlwana a yone a tebelo a na a le mararo ka fa ntlheng nngwe le a le mararo ntlheng e nngwe; le maotwana a yone le mekatako ya yone, di ntse ka fa selekanyong sa kgoro ya ntlha; boleele jwa yone bo ne bo le jwa mabogo a le 50, le boatlhamo jwa yone mabogo a le 25." 
Ezekiel40:22 Le dipone tsa yone, le mekatako ya yone, le makolane a yone, di ne di le ka fa selekanyong sa kgoro e e lebileng botlhabatsatsi; mme ba palamela kwa go yone ka direpudi di supa; le mekatako ya yone e ne e le fa pele ga tsone." 
Ezekiel40:23 Go ne go le kgoro ya lolwapa lwa ka fa teng bolebana le kgoro e nngwe ntlheng ya botsheka, le gone ntlheng ya botlhabatsatsi; mme a lekanya go tswa kgorong nngwe go ya kgorong e nngwe go le mabogo a le lekgolo." 
Ezekiel40:24 A nkgogela ntlheng ya borwa, mme bonang, kgoro nngwe e e lebileng ntlheng ya borwa, mme a lekanya maotwana a yone, le mekatako ya yone ka fa dilekanyong tse." 
Ezekiel40:25 Ga bo go le dipone mo go yone, le mo mekatakong ya yone tikologong yotlhe, tse di tshwanang le dipone tsele; boleele e le mabogo a le 50, le boatlhamo mabogo a le 25." 
Ezekiel40:26 Go ne go le direpudi di supa tsa go palamela kwa go yone, mme mekatako ya yone e le fa pele ga tsone; mme e ne e na le ditlhare tsa makolane, sengwe ka fa ntlheng nngwe, le se sengwe ka fa ntlheng e nngwe, mo maotwaneng a yone." 
Ezekiel40:27 Go ne go na le kgoro ya lolwapa lwa ka fa teng e e lebileng ntlheng ya borwa; a lekanya go tswa kgorong nngwe go ya kgorong e nngwe ntlheng ya borwa go le mabogo a le lekgolo. 
Ezekiel40:28 Foo a nkisa kwa lolwapeng lwa ka fa teng ka kgoro ya borwa. A lekanya kgoro ya borwa ka fa dilekanyong tse; 
Ezekiel40:29 le matlwana a yone a tebelo le maotwana a yone, le mekatako ya yone, ka fa dilekanyong tse; go ne go le dipone mo go yone le mo mekatakong ya yone mo tikologong; e le boleele mabogo a le 50 le boatlhamo bo le 25." 
Ezekiel40:30 Go ne go le mekatako mo tikologong yotlhe, e le boleele jwa mabogo a le 25, le boatlhamo bo le mabogo a le matlhano." 
Ezekiel40:31 Mekatako ya yone e ne e lebile kwa lolwapeng lwa ka fa ntle; mme go ne go le makolane mo maotwaneng a yone; mme botlhatlogo jwa yone bo ne bo na le direpudi tse di 8. 
Ezekiel40:32 A nkisa kwa lolwapeng lwa ka fa teng lo lo lebileng ntlheng ya botlhabatsatsi; mme a lekanya kgoro ka fa dilekanyong tse; 
Ezekiel40:33 le mantlwana a yone a tebelo, le maotwana a yone, le mekatako ya yone, ka fa dilekanyong tse; go le dipone mo go yone le mo mekatakong ya yone mo tikologong yotlhe; e le boleele jwa mabogo a le 50 le boatlhamo jwa mabogo a le 25." 
Ezekiel40:34 Mekatako ya yone e ne e lebile lolwapa lwa ka fa ntle; mme go ne go le makolane mo maotwaneng a yone, mo ntlheng nngwe le nngwe; botlhatlogo jwa yone bo na le direpudi tse di 8." 
Ezekiel40:35 A nkisa kwa kgorong ya botsheka, mme a e lekanya ka fa dilekanyong tse:" 
Ezekiel40:36 Matlwana a yone a tebelo, le maotwana a yone, le mekatako ya yone; mme go ne go le dipone mo go yone mo tikologong yotlhe; boleele bo le jwa mabogo a le 50, le boatlhamo bo le mabogo a le 25." 
Ezekiel40:37 Maotwana a yone a na a lebile kwa lolwapeng lwa ka fa ntle; mme go ne go le makolane mo maotwaneng a yone, mo ntlheng nngwe le nngwe; botlhatlogo jwa yone bo na le direpudi tse di 8." 
Ezekiel40:38 Ntlwana e ne e na le setswalo sa yone, e ne e le fa maotwaneng a dikgoro; e le gone fa ba ne ba tle ba tlhatswetse gone tshupelo e e fisiwang." 
Ezekiel40:39 Mo maribeleng a kgoro go ne go le dimati di le pedi tsa bojelo ka fa ntlheng nngwe, le dimati di le pedi tsa bojelo ka fa ntlheng e nngwe, tse go tlhabelwang mo go tsone tshupelo e e fisiwang, le tshupelelo ya boleo, le tshupelelo ya molato." 
Ezekiel40:40 Ka fa ntlheng nngwe fa ntle, fa motho a tlhatlogela kwa botsenong jwa kgoro ka fa ntlheng ya botsheka, go ne go le dimati tsa bojelo di le pedi; ka fa ntlheng nngwe fa go leng ga maribela a kgoro, go ne go le dimati tsa bojelo di le pedi." 
Ezekiel40:41 Go ne go le dimati tsa bojelo di le nne ka fa ntlheng nngwe, le dimati tsa bojelo di le nne ka fa ntlheng e nngwe fa kgorong; dimati tsa bojelo di 8, tse ba ne ba tle ba tlhabelele ditlhabelo mo go tsone." 
Ezekiel40:42 Ga bo go le dimati tsa bojelo di le nne tsa tshupelo e e fisiwang, tsa maje a a betlilweng, di le boleele jwa letsogo le le lengwe fela le ntlha nngwe, le boatlhamo bo le jwa letsogo le ntlha nngwe, le bogodimo bo le letsogo le le lengwe fela, tse ba bayang mo go tsone dilo tse ba tlhabang ka tsone tshupelo e e fisiwang le setlhabelo." 
Ezekiel40:43 Go no go le mapego a le boatlhamo bo le kana ka paralatso ya seatla, a sometswe mo tikologong yotlhe; mo dimating tsa bojelo go le nama ya seromololo." 
Ezekiel40:44 Ka fa ntle ga kgoro ya ka fa teng go le mantlwana a baopedi, mo lolwapeng lwa ka fa teng, lo lo ne lo le fa kgorong ya botsheka; a lebile ntlheng ya borwa; e le nngwe fela fa kgorong ya botlhabatsatsi e e lebileng ntlheng ya botsheka." 
Ezekiel40:45 Mme a nthaya a re: “Ntlwana e, e e lebileng ntlheng ya borwa, ke ya baperesiti, batshegetsi ba tebelo ya ntlo." 
Ezekiel40:46 Ntlwana e e lebileng ntlheng ya botsheka ke ya baperesiti, batshegetsi ba tebelo ya sebeso; ba ke bomorwa Satoke, ba ba tleng ba atamele Jehofa go mo direla, e le ba ba tlhaotsweng mo go bomorwa Lefi.”" 
Ezekiel40:47 A lekanya lolwapa boleele bo le jwa mabogo a le lekgolo, le boatlhamo bo le mabogo a le lekgolo, le lekalekanye fela dintlha tsoo nne; mme sebeso se le fa pele ga ntlo." 
Ezekiel40:48 Foo a nkisa kwa maribeleng a kgoro ya ntlo, mme a lekanya lekotwana lengwe le lengwe la maribela a kgoro, mabogo a le matlhano ntlheng nngwe, le mabogo a le matlhano ntlheng e nngwe; boatlhamo jwa kgoro e le jwa mabogo a le mararo mo ntlheng nngwe, le mabogo a le mararo mo ntlheng e nngwe." 
Ezekiel40:49 Boleele jwa maribela a kgoro bo no bo le mabogo a le 20, le boatlhamo bo le mabogo a le 11, e bong ka direpudi tse ba ne ba palamela kwa go tsone ka tsone; mme go no go le maoto fa maotwaneng, le lengwe fela ka fa ntlheng nngwe, le le lengwe fela ka fa ntlheng e nngwe." 
Ezekiel41:1 A nkisa kwa Tempeleng, a lekanya maotwana, boatlhamo bo le jwa mabogo a le marataro ntlheng nngwe, le mabogo a le marataro ntlheng e nngwe, e le jone boatlhamo jwa motlaagana." 
Ezekiel41:2 Boatlhamo jwa botseno bo ne bo le mabogo a le some; ditlhakore tsa botseno di ne di le mabogo a le matlhano mo ntlheng nngwe le mabogo a le matlhano ntlheng e nngwe; mme a lekanya boleele jwa yone, mabogo a le 40, le boatlhamo mabogo a le 20." 
Ezekiel41:3 Foo a tsenela kwa teng, a lekanya lekotwana lengwe le lengwe la botseno, mabogo a le mabedi; le botseno, mabogo a le marataro; le boatlhamo jwa botseno mabogo a supa." 
Ezekiel41:4 A lekanya boleele jwa yone, mabogo a le 20, le boatlhamo mabogo a le 20, fa pele ga Tempele; mme a nthaya a re: “Fa ke felo ga boitshepo jo bo itshepileng.”" 
Ezekiel41:5 Foo a lekanya lomota lwa ntlo, mabogo a le marataro; le boatlhamo jwa ntlwana nngwe le nngwe ya ka fa ditlhakoreng, mabogo a le mane mo tikologong yotlhe ya ntlo." 
Ezekiel41:6 Mantlwana a ka fa ditlhakoreng a ne a tlhatlaganye seraro, nngwe e tlhatlaganye le e nngwe, mme a na a tshwaraganye a le 30; a lomaganye le lomota lwa ntlo lo lo diretsweng matlwana a ka fa ditlhakoreng mo tikologong, gore di tle di lomagane le lona, mme di sa lomagane le lomota lo e leng lwa ntlo tota." 
Ezekiel41:7 Matlwana a ka fa ditlhakoreng a ne a re a dikologa ntlo a nne a atlhame bogolo fa go iwa nao kwa godimo; gonne go dikologa ntlo ga nna ga tlhatlogela kwa godimo mo tikologong ya ntlo; ke gone ka moo boatlhamo jwa ntlo jwa nna jwa golela pele go ya kwa godimo; mme go palangwe go ntse jalo, go duwa mo ntlwaneng e e kwa tlase go iwe kwa go e e kwa godimo ka ntlwana e e fa gare." 
Ezekiel41:8 Ka ba ka bona fa ntlo e na le serepodi se se tsholetsegileng mo tikologong; metheo ya matlwana a lotlhakore e ne e le selekanyo sa lotlhaka lo lo tletseng lwa mabogo a magolo a le marataro. 
Ezekiel41:9 Bokima jwa lomota lo lo diretsweng matlwana a ka fa ditlhakoreng, ka fa ntle, e ne e le mabogo a le matlhano; mo go setseng e ne e le felo ga matlwana a ka fa ditlhakoreng a e leng a ntlo." 
Ezekiel41:10 Fa gare ga mantlwana go ne go le sebaka se le katlhamo ya mabogo a le 20 mo tikologong yotlhe fela ya ntlo. 
Ezekiel41:11 Mejako ya matlwana a ka fa ditlhakoreng e ne e lebile kwa felong fa go neng go setse, mojako o le mongwe fela o lebile kwa botsheka, o mongwe o lebile kwa borwa; boatlhamo jwa sebaka sa fa go neng go setse e le mabogo a le matlhano mo tikologong." 
Ezekiel41:12 Kago e e neng e le fa pele ga felo fa go lomologileng ka fa lotlhakoreng lo lo lebileng kwa bophirimatsatsi e ne e le boatlhamo bo le mabogo a 70; mme lomota lwa kago lo no lo le bokima jwa mabogo a le matlhano mo tikologong, le boleele jwa lone bo ne bo le mabogo a 90." 
Ezekiel41:13 Jalo a lekanya ntlo, boleele bo le mabogo a le lekgolo; le felo fa go lomologileng, le kago, e na le dimota tsa yone, boleele bo le mabogo a le lekgolo;" 
Ezekiel41:14 le gone boatlhamo jwa fa pele ga ntlo, le jwa felo fa go lomologileng mme go lebileng kwa botlhabatsatsi, bo ne bo le mabogo a le lekgolo." 
Ezekiel41:15 A lekanya boleele jwa kago fa pele ga felo fa go lomologileng mo go leng kwa morago ga yone, le masepelo a yone a a lebileng kwa godimo mo ntlheng nngwe le mo go e nngwe, mabogo a le lekgolo; le Tempele ya kwa teng, le maribela a lolwapa;" 
Ezekiel41:16 direpudi, le dipone tse ditshesane, le masepelo a a godimo, mo tikologong mo go tlhatlaganyeng seraro ga one, bolebana le serepudi, tsa bo di khurumeditswe ka dimati kwa godimo, le go tswa fa fatshe go fitlha fa diponeng; mme jaana dipone di ne di khurumeditswe;" 
Ezekiel41:17 go fitlha mo sebakeng se se okameng mojako, e bong go fitlha kwa ntlong ya kwa teng le ka fa ntle, le fa lomoteng lotlhe mo tikologong ka fa teng le ka fa ntle ka selekanyo." 
Ezekiel41:18 Go ne go kwalakwaditswe ditšheruba le makolane; mme go le mokolane fa gare ga tšheruba le tšheruba, mme tšheruba nngwe le nngwe e na le difatlhogo di le pedi;" 
Ezekiel41:19 ke go re, go ne go le sefatlhogo sa motho se lebile kwa mokolaneng ntlheng nngwe; le sefatlhogo sa ledumedi se lebile kwa mokolaneng ntlheng e nngwe; go ne go dirwa jalo ka ntlo yotlhe fela." 
Ezekiel41:20 Go tswa fa fatshe go ya fa godimo ga mojako go ne go kwalakwaditswe ditšheruba le makolane; lomota lwa Tempele lo ne lo ntse jalo. 
Ezekiel41:21 Ka ga tempele, mephakwana ya mojako e ne e dirilwe dintlha di le nne tse di lekalekanyeng fela; mme ka ga felo ga boitshepo ka fa pele, ponalo ya teng e ne e tshwana le ponalo ya Tempele." 
Ezekiel41:22 Sebeso e ne e le sa logong, se le bogodimo jwa mabogo a le mararo, le boleele jwa sone bo le mabogo a le mabedi; le dinaka tsa sone, le boleele jwa sone, le ditlhakore tsa sone, e ne e le logong; mme a nthaya, a re: Ke lone lomati lwa bojelo lo lo fa pele ga Jehofa." 
Ezekiel41:23 Tempele le felo ga boitshepo di ne di na le mejako e le mabedi. 
Ezekiel41:24 Ditswalo di ne di na le mefama e e menaganang, mefama e le mebedi; mefama e le mebedi ya setswalo sengwe, le mefama e le mebedi ya setswalo se sengwe." 
Ezekiel41:25 Ga bo go kwalakwaditswe mo go tsone, e bong mo ditswalong tsa Tempele ditšheruba le makolane, ga tshwana le mo go kwalakwaditsweng mo dimoteng; mme go le mesepuri e mekima ya logong fa pele ga maribela a kgoro ka fa ntle." 
Ezekiel41:26 Go le dipone tse ditshesane le makolane mo ntlheng nngwe le e nngwe mo ditlhakoreng tsa maribela a kgoro; matlwana a ka fa ditlhakoreng a ne a ntse jalo, le mesepuri e mekima." 
Ezekiel42:1 Foo a nkisa kwa ntle kwa lolwapeng lwa ka fa ntle, ntlheng ya botsheka; mme a nkisa mo ntlwaneng e e lebaganyeng le felo fa go lomologileng, le e e lebaganyeng le kago ntlheng ya botsheka." 
Ezekiel42:2 Fa pele ga boleele jwa mabogo a le lekgolo go no go le mojako wa botsheka, mme boatlhamo bo le mabogo a 50." 
Ezekiel42:3 Bolebagana le sebaka sa mabogo a 20 se e leng sa lolwapa lwa ka fa teng, le bolebagana le bophaphatho jwa matlapa jo e leng jwa lolwapa lwa ka fa ntle, go ne go le manno bosepelo kwa godimo bo lebaganye le bosepelo kwa godimo mo tlhatlaganong ya boraro." 
Ezekiel42:4 Fa pele ga matlwana go ne go le tsela e e boatlhamo bo le mabogo a le some ka fa teng, e le boleele jwa mabogo a lekgolo; mme mejako ya yone e ne e lebile ntlheng ya botsheka." 
Ezekiel42:5 Jaana matlwana a a kwa godimo a bo a le makhutshwane; gonne bosepelo jo bo kwa godimo bo bo ne bo kgoseditse one ao, bogolo go a a ka fa tlase le a a fa gare mo kagong." 
Ezekiel42:6 Gonne a ne a tlhatlaganye seraro, mme a se na maotwana a a etsang maotwana a malwapa; ke gone ka moo a a kwa godimodimo a ne a pitlaganye bogolo go a a kwa tlase le a a fa gare, go simolola fa fatshe." 
Ezekiel42:7 Lorako lo lo kwa ntle ka fa matlwaneng, bolebana le lolwapa lwa ka fa ntle fa pele ga matlwana, boleele jwa lone e ne e le mabogo a le 50." 
Ezekiel42:8 Gonne boleele jwa matlwana a a mo lolwapeng lwa ka fa ntle e ne e le mabogo a le 50; mme bonang, fa pele ga tempele ya bo e le mabogo a le lekgolo." 
Ezekiel42:9 Ka fa ntlheng ya botlhabatsatsi botseno bo ne bo huhumela matlwana a, jaaka fa motho a tsena a tswa lolwapeng lwa ka fa ntle." 
Ezekiel42:10 Mo bokimeng jwa kago ya lorako lwa lolwapa ntlheng ya botlhabatsatsi fa pele ga felo fa go lomologileng, le fa pele ga kago, go ne go le matlwana." 
Ezekiel42:11 Tsela e e fa pele ga yone e ne e tshwana le ponalo ya tsela ya matlwana a a ntlheng ya botsheka; ka fa boleeleng jwa tsone, le ka fa boatlhamong jwa tsone di ne di tshwana fela; mme matso otlhe a yone a ne a le ka fa meagong ya tsone, le ka fa mejakong ya yone." 
Ezekiel42:12 Le ka fa mejakong ya matlwana a a ntlheng ya borwa, go ne go le mojako mongwe fa tshimologong ya tsela, e bong tsela e e fa pele ga lorako fela ntlheng ya botlhabatsasi, fa motho a tsena mo go yone." 
Ezekiel42:13 Foo a nthaya a re: “Matlwana a a ka fa botsheka, le matlwana a a ka fa borwa, a a fa pele ga felo fa go lomologileng, ke one matlwana a a boitshepo, kwa baperesiti ba ba gaufi le Jehofa ba tlaa jelang teng dilo tse di boitshepo jo bo itshepileng; ba tlaa baya teng dilo tse di boitshepo jo bo itshepileng, le tshupelo ya boupe, le tshupelelo ya boleo, le tshupelelo ya molato; gonne felo foo go boitshepo." 
Ezekiel42:14 Ya re fa baperesiti ba tsena, foo ga ba ketla ba tswa mo felong ga boitshepo ba tswela kwa lolwapeng lwa ka fa ntle, mme ba tlaa baya diaparo tsa bone teng tse ba direlang ka tsone; gonne di boitshepo; mme ba tlaa apara diaparo di sele ba itse go atamela kwa go se e leng sa batho fela.”" 
Ezekiel42:15 Jaana e rile a sena go wetsa go lekanya ntlo ya ka fa teng, a nkisa kwa ntle ka tsela ya kgoro e e lebileng kwa botlhabatsatsi, a e lekanya mo ntlheng tsotlhe." 
Ezekiel42:16 Ka fa ntlheng ya botlhabatsatsi a lekanya ka lotlhaka lwa selekanyo, ditlhaka di le 500, ka lotlhaka lwa selekanyo mo ntlheng tsotlhe." 
Ezekiel42:17 Ntlheng ya botsheka a lekanya ditlhaka di le 500, ka a lekanya ka lotlhaka lwa selekanyo mo ntlheng tsotlhe." 
Ezekiel42:18 Ntlheng ya borwa a lekanya ditlhaka di le 500, ka lotlhaka lwa selekanyo." 
Ezekiel42:19 A retologela ntlheng ya bophirimatsatsi, mme a lekanya ditlhaka di le 500 ka lotlhaka lwa selekanyo." 
Ezekiel42:20 A e lekanya mo ntlheng tsoo nne; e ne e na le lorako mo tikologong, boleele bo le 500, le boatlhamo bo le 500, go dira tomologano gare ga tse di boitshepo le tse e leng dilo fela." 
Ezekiel43:1 Morago ga moo a nkisa kwa kgorong, e bong kgoro e e lebileng ntlheng ya botlhabatsatsi." 
Ezekiel43:2 Bonang, kgalalelo ya Modimo wa Iseraele ya tla le tsela ya botlhabatsatsi; mme lentswe la one le ne le ntse jaaka mosumo wa metsi a le mantsi, mme lefatshe la galalela ka kgalalelo ya one." 
Ezekiel43:3 Mme go ne go ntse jaaka ponalo ya ponatshegelo e nkileng ka e bona, e bong ka fa ponatshegelong e ke e bonyeng jale ka ke tsile go senya motse; mme diponatshegelo di ne di ntse jaaka ponatshegelo e ke e bonyeng kwa nokeng ya Kebare; mme ka wela ka sefatlhogo sa me fa fatshe." 
Ezekiel43:4 Kgalalelo ya ga Jehofa ya tla mo tlong ka tsela ya kgoro e e lebileng ntlheng ya botlhabatsatsi. 
Ezekiel43:5 Mowa wa ntsholetsa, wa nkisa mo lolwapeng lwa ka fa teng; mme bonang, kgalalelo ya ga Jehofa ya tlala ka ntlo." 
Ezekiel43:6 Mme ka utlwa mongwe a bua le nna a le mo ntlong; mme monna mongwe a ema fa go nna. 
Ezekiel43:7 A nthaya a re: “Morwa motho, fano ke felo ga setulo sa me sa bogosi, le felo ga dipato tsa dinao tsa me, fa ke tlaa agang teng ka bosakhutleng mo baneng ba Iseraele; mme ba ntlo ya Iseraele ga ba ketla ba tlhola ba itshekolola leina la me le le boitshepo, le fa e le bone, le fa e le dikgosi tsa bone, ka go akafala ga bone, le fa e le ka ditoto tsa dikgosi tsa bone mo mafelong a bone a a tlotlometseng." 
Ezekiel43:8 Le fa e le ka go baya serepudi sa bone fa serepuding sa me, le mephakwana ya bone ya mojako fa mephakwaneng ya me ya mojako, mme ga bo go le lomota fela gare ga me le bone; mme ba itshekolotse leina la me le le boitshepo ka tse di makgapha tsa bone tse ba di dirileng; ke gone ka moo ke ba nyeleditseng mo bogaleng jwa me." 
Ezekiel43:9 Jaana a ba tlose go akafala ga bone, le ditoto tsa dikgosi tsa bone, go nne kgakala le nna, mme ke tlaa aga mo gare ga bone ka bosakhutleng." 
Ezekiel43:10 “Wena morwa motho, supetsa ba ntlo ya Iseraele ntlo, gore ba tlhabisiwe ditlhong ke maikepo a bone; mme a ba lekanye sekao seo." 
Ezekiel43:11 Mme, fa ba tlhabisiwa ditlhong ke tsotlhe tse ba di dirileng, o ba itsise popego ya ntlo, le modiro wa yone, le matso a yone, le matseno a yone, le dipopego tsotlhe tsa yone, le ditao tsotlhe tsa yone le dipopego tsotlhe tsa yone, le melao yotlhe ya yone; o di kwale mo ponong ya bone; gore ba tshegetse popego yotlhe ya yone, le ditao tsotlhe tsa yone, mme ba di dire." 
Ezekiel43:12 O ke one molao wa ntlo; mo godimo ga thaba, sebaka sotlhe se e emeng mo go sone se tlaa nna boitshepo. Bona, ke one molao wa ntlo.”" 
Ezekiel43:13 “Tse ke dilekanyo tsa sebeso ka fa dikubiteng, ke go re, letsogo; (kubite ke letsogo le le nang le paralatso ya seatla); kwa tlase e nne letsogo lengwe fela, le boatlhamo bo nne letsogo lengwe fela, le morapalego wa yone fa losing lwa yone tikologong e nne selekanyo sa paralatso ya seatla; mme mo e nne motheo wa sebeso." 
Ezekiel43:14 Go tswa fa tlase ga sone fa fatshe go ya serepuding sa tlase se nne mabogo a le mabedi, le boatlhamo e nne letsogo lengwe fela; mme go tswa fa serepuding se sebotlana go ya mo serepuding se segolo se nne mabogo a le mane, le boatlhamo letsogo le le lengwe fela." 
Ezekiel43:15 Sebeso sa godimo se nne mabogo a le mane; mme go tswa fa leisong la sebeso go ya kwa godimo se nne mabogo a le mane. 
Ezekiel43:16 Leiso la sebeso le nne boleele jwa mabogo a le 12, le boatlhamo mabogo a le 12, dintlha tsa sone tsoo nne di lekalekane fela." 
Ezekiel43:17 Serepudi sa lomota se nne boleele jwa mabogo a le 14, le boatlhamo mabogo a le 14 dintlheng tsoo nne; kgarelo kwa tlase tikologong ya sone e nne ntlha nngwe ya letsogo le le lengwe fela mo tikologong; mme direpudi tsa sone di lebe ntlheng ya botlhabatsatsi.”" 
Ezekiel43:18 Mme a nthaya a re: “Morwa motho, Morena Modimo o bua jaana, a re: Tse ke tsone ditao tsa dibeso tsa motlha o ba tlaa se dirang ka one, go tlaa ba isa ditshupelo tse di fisiwang mo go sone, le go kgatsha madi mo go sone." 
Ezekiel43:19 Naya baperesiti kgongwana ya tshupelelo ya boleo, e bong Balefi ba losika lwa ga Satoke, ba ba gaufi le nna go ntirela, go bua Morena Modimo." 
Ezekiel43:20 O tseye ga madi a yone, o a beye mo dinakeng tsa sebeso tsoo nne, le mo dikgokgotšhong; tse nne tsa serepudi sa lomota, le mo morapalegong mo tikologong; o tlaa se tlhapisa jalo, o se direla tetlanyo." 
Ezekiel43:21 Le gone o tseye kgomo ya tshupelelo ya boleo, o e fisetse mo felong fa go laotsweng ga ntlo, ka fa ntle ga felo ga boitshepo." 
Ezekiel43:22 E re ka letsatsi la bobedi o ise podi e e se nang bogole e le ya tshupelelo ya boleo; mme ba tlaa tlhapisa sebeso, jaaka ba se tlhapisitse ka kgomo." 
Ezekiel43:23 O tlaa re o sena go wetsa go se tlhapisa, o ise kgongwana e e se nang bogole tshupelo, le phelefu ya letsomane e e se nang bogole." 
Ezekiel43:24 O di atametse fa pele ga Jehofa, mme baperesiti ba tlaa nonela letswai mo go tsone, mme ba di isetsa Jehofa tshupelo e e fisiwang." 
Ezekiel43:25 Ka malatsi a supa o tlaa baakanya podi ka tsatsi lengwe le lengwe go nna tshupelelo ya boleo; le bone ba baakanye kgongwana le phelefu ya letsomane, e le tse di se nang bogole." 
Ezekiel43:26 Ba tlaa direla sebeso tetlanyo ka malatsi a supa ba se tlhapisa; jalo ba tlaa se ntshwaela. 
Ezekiel43:27 E tlaa re ba sena go wetsa malatsi a, go tlaa dirala go re ka letsatsi la 8, go ya kwa pele, baperesiti ba tlaa isa ditshupelo tsa lona tse di fisiwang mo sebesong, le ditshupelo tsa lona tsa kagiso; mme ke tlaa lo amogela, go bua Morena Modimo.”" 
Ezekiel44:1 Foo a mpusa ka tsela ya kgoro ya ka fa ntle ya felo ga boitshepo e e lebileng ntlheng ya botlhabatsatsi; mme ga bo go tswadilwe. 
Ezekiel44:2 Mme Jehofa a nthaya a re: “Kgoro e, e tlaa nna fela e tswetswe, ga e ketla e bulwa gope, le gone ga go ketla go tsena motho ope ka yone, gonne Jehofa Modimo wa Iseraele, o tsenye ka yone; ke gone e tlaa nnang fela e tswetswe." 
Ezekiel44:3 Ka ga kgosana, e tlaa dula teng e le kgosana go ja senkgwe fa pele ga Jehofa; e tlaa tsena ka tsela ya maribela a kgoro, e tlaa fela e tswa ka yone.”" 
Ezekiel44:4 Foo a nkisa ka tsela ya kgoro ya botsheka fa pele ga ntlo; mme ka leba, mme bonang, kgalalelo ya ga Jehofa ya tlala ka ntlo ya ga Jehofa; mme ka wela ka sefatlhogo sa me fa fatshe." 
Ezekiel44:5 Jehofa a nthaya a re: “Morwa motho, tlhokomela thata, o lebe ka matlho, o utlwe ka ditsebe tsotlhe tse ke di go bolelelang ka ga ditao tsotlhe tsa ntlo ya ga Jehofa, le melao yotlhe ya yone; o tlhokomele thata botseno jwa ntlo, le matso otlhe a felo ga boitshepo." 
Ezekiel44:6 “O tlaa bua jaana le ba ba dirukhutlhi, e bong ba ntlo yotlhe ya Iseraele, o re: Morena Modimo o bua jaana, a re: Lona, ba ntlo ya Iseraele a go lo lekane, mo go tse di makgapha tsa lona tsotlhe fela." 
Ezekiel44:7 Ka e le fa lo lerile baeng mo teng, ba sa rupa mo pelong, ba sa rupa mo nameng, gore ba nne mo felong ga me ga boitshepo, go go tlhapatsa, e bong ntlo ya me, mogang lo isang senkgwe sa me, mahura le madi, mme ba sentse kgolagano ya me, go oketsa tse di makgapha tsotlhe tsa lona." 
Ezekiel44:8 Lona ga lo a tshegetsa tebelo ya dilo tsa me tse di boitshepo; lo ipeetse batshegetsi ba tebelo ya me mo felong ga me ga boitshepo. 
Ezekiel44:9 “Morena Modimo o bua jaana a re: Ga go na motho ope wa seeng a sa rupa mo pelong a sa rupa mo nameng, yo o ka tsenang mo felong ga me ga boitshepo, wa bape ba seeng ba ba mo baneng ba Iseraele.”" 
Ezekiel44:10 Balefi ba ba ileng kgakala le nna jale ka Iseraele a timela, ba ba timetseng ba tswa mo go nna, ba latela medimo ya bone ya disetwa; ba tlaa belega boikepo jwa bone." 
Ezekiel44:11 Le fa go ntse jalo ba tlaa nna badiredi mo felong ga me ga boitshepo, ka go nna le tebelo fa dikgorong tsa ntlo, le ka go direla mo ntlong; ba tlaa tlhaba tshupelo e e fisiwang, le setlhabelelo sa batho, ba tlaa ema fa pele ga bone go direla bone." 
Ezekiel44:12 E re ka ba ba diretse fa pele ga medimo ya bone ya disetwa, mme ba nna sekgopiso sa boikepo mo go ba ntlo ya Iseraele; ke gone ka moo ke ba tsholeleditseng seatla sa me go tlhabana nabo, go bua Morena Modimo, mme ba tlaa belega boikepo jwa bone." 
Ezekiel44:13 Ga ba ketla ba atamela kwa go nna, go tla ba ntirela tiro ya boperesiti, le fa e le go atamela dilo dipe tsa me tse di boitshepo, e bong dilo tse di boitshepo jo bo itshepileng; mme ba tlaa belega botlhabisa ditlhong jwa bone, le tse di makgapha tsa bone tse ba di dirileng." 
Ezekiel44:14 Le fa go ntse jalo ke tlaa ba baya batshegetsi ba tebelo ya ntlo ya me mo tirelong yotlhe ya yone, le mo go tsotlhe tse di tlaa dirwang teng." 
Ezekiel44:15 “Baperesiti ba Balefi, bomorwa Satoke ba ba tshegeditseng tebelo ya felo ga me ga boitshepo, jale ka bana ba Iseraele ba timela ba ntlogela, bao ba tlaa atamela ba tla go ntirela; ba tlaa ema fa pele ga me go nkisetsa tshupelo ya mafura le madi.” Go bua Morena Modimo." 
Ezekiel44:16 “Ba tlaa tsena mo felong ga me ga boitshepo, ba tlaa atamela fa lomating lwa me lwa bojelo go ntirela, mme ba tlaa tshegetsa tebelo ya me." 
Ezekiel44:17 Go tlaa dirala go re fa ba tsena ka dikgoro tsa lolwapa lwa ka fa teng, ba apare diaparo tsa leloba; mme a go se tle bobowa jwa nku mo go bone, fa ba sa ntse ba direla mo teng ga dikgoro mo lolwapeng lwa ka fa teng, le mo ntlong." 
Ezekiel44:18 A ba rwale ditlhoro tsa leloba mo ditlhogong, ba tswale diputlela tsa leloba mo lothekeng; mme ba se ka ba itlama ka sepe se se tlaa ba huhutsang." 
Ezekiel44:19 Fa ba tswela kwa lolwapeng lwa ka fa ntle, e bong kwa lolwapeng lwa ka fa ntle kwa bathong, a ba apole diaparo tse ba direlang ka tsone, mme ba di beye mo matlwaneng a a boitshepo, mme ba apare diaparo di sele, gore ba se ka ba itshepisa batho ka diaparo tsa bone." 
Ezekiel44:20 “Le gone a ba se ipeole ditlhogo, le fa e le go leseletsa moriri go nna moleele; a ba ikute fela mo ditlhogong." 
Ezekiel44:21 Moperesiti ope a se ka a nwa bojalwa jwa mofine, mogang ba tsenang mo lolwapeng lwa ka fa teng." 
Ezekiel44:22 Le gone a ba se nyale mosadi wa motlholagadi, le fa e le mosadi yo o tlhadilweng; mme ba nyale makgarebane a losika lwa ntlo ya Iseraele, kgotsa mosadi wa motlholagadi yo e leng motlholagadi wa moperesiti mongwe." 
Ezekiel44:23 “Ba tlaa ruta batho ba me go farologanya dilo tse di itshepileng le tse e leng dilo fela, ba ba ba lemotsha se se itshekologileng le se se itshekileng." 
Ezekiel44:24 E tle e re go le kgang, ba eme go atlhola; ba e atlhole ka fa dikatlholong tsa me; ba tshegetse melao ya me le ditao tsa me mo medirong yotlhe ya me e e laotsweng; mme ba itshepise bosabata ba me." 
Ezekiel44:25 “A ba se atamele motho yo o suleng go itshekolola; mme fa e le ka ga rraabo kgotsa mmaabo, kgotsa ngwana wa bone wa mosimane le fa e le wa mosetsana, kgotsa ngwanaa rraabo, wa mosimane le fa e le wa mosetsana yo o se nang monna ba ka iitshekolola." 
Ezekiel44:26 E tlaa re a sena go itshekisiwa, a ipalele malatsi a supa." 
Ezekiel44:27 E tlaa re ka tsatsi le o tsenang ka lone mo felong ga boitshepo, mo lolwapeng lwa ka fa teng, a ya go direla mo felong ga boitshepo, a ise tshupelelo ya gagwe ya boleo, go bua Morena Modimo." 
Ezekiel44:28 “Ba tlaa nna le boswa; ke nna boswa jwa bone, mme lo se ka lwa ba naya thuo epe mo Iseraele; ke nna thuo ya bone." 
Ezekiel44:29 Ba tlaa ja tshupelo ya boupe, le tshupelelo ya boleo le tshupelelo ya molato; sengwe le sengwe se se tshwailweng mo Iseraele e tlaa nna sa bone." 
Ezekiel44:30 Tsa ntlha tsa mabutswapele otlhe, le tshupelo nngwe le nngwe ya tsholetso ya sengwe le sengwe ya ditshupelo tsotlhe tsa lona tsa tsholetso, a e nne tsa baperesiti; lo tlaa ba lo naya moperesiti sa ntlha sa bodubo jwa lona, go medisa tshegofatso mo ntlong ya gago." 
Ezekiel44:31 Baperesiti a ba se je sepe se se suleng fela, kgotsa se se gagotsweng, le fa e ka ne e le nonyane, le fa e le kgomo." 
Ezekiel45:1 “Gape, e tlaa re lo kgaoganya lefatshe ka taolo ya bola, gore le nne boswa, lo isetse Jehofa seromololo, e bong kabelo nngwe e e boitshepo ya lefatshe; boleele e nne jwa boleele jwa ditlhaka di le 25 000, le boatlhamo e nne ditlhaka di le 10 000; kabelo eo e tlaa nna boitshepo go ya le molelwane otlhe wa lone mo tikologong." 
Ezekiel45:2 Mo go lone a go nne sebaka sa felo ga boitshepo, boleele bo nne 500, le boatlhamo bo le 500, se lekalekanye fela ka ntlha yotlhe; le mabogo a le 50 a dintlhana tsa yone ntlheng tsotlhe." 
Ezekiel45:3 Mo selekanyong seo o lekanye boleele bo le 25 000, le boatlhamo bo le 10 000; mme e tlaa nna gone felo ga boitshepo, mo go boitshepo jo bo itshepileng." 
Ezekiel45:4 Ke kabelo ya lefatshe e e itshepileng; e tlaa nna ga baperesiti, badiredi ba felo ga boitshepo, ba ba atamelang go direla Jehofa; e tlaa nna felo ga mantlo a bone, le felo mo go itshepileng ga felo ga boitshepo." 
Ezekiel45:5 Boleele jwa 25 000, le boatlhamo jwa 10 000 e tlaa nna ga Balefi, badiredi ba ntlo, go nna boswa jwa bone, jwa matlwana a le 20." 
Ezekiel45:6 “Lo tlaa laolela boswa jwa motse boatlhamo bo le 5 000, le boleele bo le 25 000 go bapile le seromololo sa kabelo e e itshepileng; e nne ga ba ntlo yotlhe ya Iseraele." 
Ezekiel45:7 “Se e ka nnang sa kgosana e nne ka fa ntlheng nngwe le e nngwe, se bapile le seromololo se se itshepileng le boswa jwa motse, fa pele ga seromololo se se itshepileng, le fa pele ga boswa jwa motse, ka fa ntlheng ya bophirimatsatsi go leba bophirimatsatsi, le ka fa ntlheng ya botlhabatsatsi go leba botlhabatsatsi; le mo boleeleng go lekalekanye le kabelo nngwe, go tswa molelwaneng wa bophirimatsatsi go ya molelwaneng wa botlhabatsatsi." 
Ezekiel45:8 Mo lefatsheng e tlaa nna boswa jwa yone mo Iseraele; mme dikgosana tsa me ga di ketla di tlhola di patika batho ba me; di tlaa naya ba ntlo ya Iseraele lefatshe ka fa ditsong tsa bone.” 
Ezekiel45:9 Morena Modimo o bua jaana, a re: “A go lo lekane lona dikgosana tsa Iseraele; tlosang thubakano le thopo, mme lo dirafatse katholo le tshiamiso; tlosang dipatiko tsa lona mo bathong ba me, go bua Morena Modimo." 
Ezekiel45:10 “Lo nne le dilekanyo tsa pego tse di siameng, selekanyo sa emere se se siameng le selekanyo sa batha se se siameng." 
Ezekiel45:11 “Efa le batha di nne selekanyo se le sengwe fela gore e tle e re homere e kgaoganngwa sesome, batha e be e le kana ka kgaogano e le nngwe fela ya yone, le efa e le kana ka kgaogano e le nngwe fela ya tse di some tsa homere; selekanyo sa tsone se tlaa nna ka fa selekanyong sa homere." 
Ezekiel45:12 “Shekele e nne digera di le 20; dišekele di le 20, dišekele di le 25, dišekele di le 15 e nne selekanyo sa lona sa mane." 
Ezekiel45:13 “Se ke sone seromololo se lo tlaa se isang; fa e le homere ya mabele go isiwe kgaogano e le nngwe fela ya dikgaogano di le thataro tsa efa, le fa go le homere ya barele, e tlaa nna kgaogano e le nngwe fela ya dikgaogano di thataro tsa efa." 
Ezekiel45:14 Kabelo e e laotsweng ya lookwane, e e tswang mo batheng ya lookwane a e nne kgaogano e le nngwe fela ya dikgaogano di le some tsa batha mo selekanyong sa kore (kore ke homere), e e leng dibatha di le some, e bong homere; gonne dibatha di le some ke homere." 
Ezekiel45:15 Le kwanyana e le nngwe fela ya letsomane, ya makgolo a le mabedi, e e tswang kwa mahulong a monono a Iseraele; go nna tshupelo ya dijo, le tshupelo e e fisiwang, le ditshupelo tsa kagiso, go ba direla tetlanyo, go bua Morena Modimo." 
Ezekiel45:16 “Batho botlhe ba lefatshe a ba ntshe seromololo se, e le sa kgosana mo Iseraele." 
Ezekiel45:17 E tlaa nna tshwanelo ya kgosana go ntsha ditshupelo tse di fisiwang, le ditshupelo tsa boupe, le ditshupelo tse di nowang, mo medirong, le mo metlheng ya go rogwa ga dikgwedi, le mo bosabateng, mo medirong yotlhe e e laotsweng ya ntlo ya Iseraele; o tlaa baakanya tshupelelo ya boleo le tshupelo ya boupe le tshupelo e e fisiwang, le ditshupelo tsa kagiso, go direla ntlo ya Iseraele tetlanyo.”" 
Ezekiel45:18 “Morena Modimo o bua jaana, a re: E re ka kgwedi ya ntlha, ka letsatsi la ntlha la kgwedi, o tseye kgongwana e e se nang bogole; mme o tlhapise felo ga boitshepo." 
Ezekiel45:19 Moperesiti a tseye madi a tshupelelo ya boleo, a a beye mo mephakwaneng ya mojako wa ntlo, le mo dikgokgotšhong tse nne tsa serepodi sa lomota lwa sebeso, le mo mephakwaneng ya kgoro ya lolwapa lwa ka fa teng." 
Ezekiel45:20 O tlaa dira jalo ka tsatsi la bosupa la kgwedi, o direla mongwe le mongwe yo o timelang le yo o motho senyana. Jalo lo tlaa bo lo direla ntlo tetlanyo." 
Ezekiel45:21 “Ka kgwedi ya ntlha, ka letsatsi la 14 la kgwedi, lo dire modiro wa tlolaganyo, e le modiro wa malatsi a supa; go tlaa jewa senkgwe se se sa bedisiwang." 
Ezekiel45:22 Ka tsatsi leo, a kgosana e ipaakanyetse le batho botlhe ba lefatshe kgomo, e le tshupelelo ya boleo." 
Ezekiel45:23 Mo malatsing a a supang a modiro a e baakanyetse Jehofa tshupelo e e fisiwang, dikgomo disupa, le diphelefu disupa tse di se nang bogole, ka tsatsi lengwe le lengwe la malatsi a a supang, le phoko ka letsatsi lengwe le lengwe e le tshupelelo ya boleo." 
Ezekiel45:24 A a baakanye tshupelo ya dijo, e le emere ya kgomo nngwe le nngwe, le emere ya kgomo nngwe le nngwe, le emere ya phelefu nngwe le nngwe, le sego sa lookwane sa emere nngwe le nngwe." 
Ezekiel45:25 “Ka kgwedi ya bosupa, ka tsatsi la 15 la kgwedi, mo modirong, a dire jalo ga malatsi a a supang; ka fa tshupelelong ya boleo, ka fa tshupelong e e fisiwang, le ka fa tshupelong ya boupe, le ka fa lookwaneng.”" 
Ezekiel46:1 “Morena Modimo o bua jaana a, re: Kgoro ya lolwapa lwa ka fa teng, e e lebileng ntlheng ya botlhabatsatsi, a e tswalwe ka malatsi a marataro a tiro; mme e re ka letsatsi la sabata e bulwe, le ka letsatsi la go rogwa ga kgwedi a e bulwe." 
Ezekiel46:2 A kgosana e tsene ka tsela ya maribela a kgoro ya ka fa ntle; mme e eme fa mophakwaneng wa kgoro, mme baperesiti ba baakanye tshupelelo ya yone ya boleo, le ditshupelo tsa yone tsa kagiso, mme a e obame fa serepuding sa kgoro; foo e tlaa tswela kwa ntle, mme go se tswalwe kgoro go tsamaya go nna maitsebowa." 
Ezekiel46:3 A batho ba lefatshe ba obamele fa mojakong wa kgoro eo fa pele ga Jehofa ka bosabata le ka metlha ya go rogwa ga dikgwedi. 
Ezekiel46:4 “Tshupelo e e fisiwang, e kgosana e tlaa e isetsang Jehofa ka letsatsi la sabata, e nne dikwanyana di le thataro tse di se nang bogole le phelefu e e se nang bogole." 
Ezekiel46:5 Le tshupelo ya boupe e nne emere ya phelefu, mme tshupelo ya boupe ya dikwanyana e nne ka fa motho o nonofileng go ntsha ka teng, le sego sa lookwane sa emere nngwe le nngwe." 
Ezekiel46:6 Ka letsatsi la go rogwa ga kgwedi tshupelo e nne kgongwana e e se nang bogole; le dikwanyana di le thataro, le phelefu; e nne tse di se nang bogole." 
Ezekiel46:7 A e baakanye tshupelo ya boupe, kgomo emere, le phelefu emere, le dikwanyana ka fa motho o nonofileng ka teng, le selekanyo sa emere se ntshediwe sego sa lookwane." 
Ezekiel46:8 E re kgosana e tsena, a e tsene ka tsela ya maribela a kgoro, e be e tswe ka yone." 
Ezekiel46:9 “E tlaa re fa batho ba lefatshe ba tla fa pele ga Jehofa mo medirong e e laotsweng, yo o tsenang ka kgoro ya botsheka a ya go obama, a tswe ka kgoro ya borwa; mme yo o tsenang ka kgoro ya borwa a a tswe ka kgoro ya botsheka; a se ka a boa ka kgoro e o tsenyeng ka yone, mme o tlaa tswa fela a siametse pele fela." 
Ezekiel46:10 E tlaa re ba tsena, kgosana e tsene, e le mo gare ga bone; le fa ba tswa ba tswe ba le mmogo." 
Ezekiel46:11 Mo medirong, le mo medirong e e masisi, tshupelo ya boupe e le kgomo e ntshediwe emere, le phelefu emere, le ga dikwanyana ka fa motho o nonofileng go ntsha ka teng, le emere e ntshediwe sego sa lookwane." 
Ezekiel46:12 “E tlaa re fa kgosana e baakanya tshupelo ya pelo fela, e le tshupelo e e fisiwang, kgotsa ditshupelo tsa kagiso e le tshupelo ya pelo fela e e direlwang Jehofa, mongwe a e bulele kgoro e e lebileng kwa botlhabatsatsi, mme e baakanye tshupelo ya yone e e fisiwang, le ditshupelo tsa yone tsa kagiso, jaaka e tle e dire ka letsatsi la sabata; foo a e tswe; mme e tlaa re e sena go tswa a mongwe a tswale kgoro." 
Ezekiel46:13 “O baakanyetse Jehofa kwanyana ya ngwaga wa ntlha e e se nang bogole, e le tshupelo e e fisiwang ya malatsi otlhe; o e baakanye ka moso le moso." 
Ezekiel46:14 O baakanye tshupelo ya boupe nayo ka moso le moso, e bong kgaogano ya serataro ya emere, le kgaogano ya seraro ya sego ya lookwane, go kolobetsa setou; e le tshupelo ya boupe ya ga Jehofa ya metlha yotlhe ka tao e e sa khutleng." 
Ezekiel46:15 A ba baakanye kwanyana jaana, le tshupelo ya boupe, le lookwane, ka moso le moso, e le tshupelo e e fisiwang ya metlha yotlhe.”" 
Ezekiel46:16 Morena Modimo o bua jaana, a re: “Fa kgosana e naya bomorwa yone bangwe neo, ke boswa jwa gagwe, a e nne jwa bomorwawe; ke boswa jwa bone go bo rua." 
Ezekiel46:17 Fa e naya mongwe wa batlhanka ba yone neo, sengwe sa boswa jwa yone, e tlaa nna ya gagwe go ya go fitlha mo ngwageng wa kgololego; foo a e boele mo kgosaneng; mme ka ga boswa jwa yone, e tlaa nna jwa bomorwa yone fela." 
Ezekiel46:18 Gape kgosana e se ka ya tsaya ga thuo ya batho, go ba kgarametsa mo bosweng jwa bone; a e neye bomorwaa yone go rua jo e leng boswa jwa yone, gore batho ba me ba se ka ba falalediwa mongwe le mongwe boswa jwa gagwe.”" 
Ezekiel46:19 Foo a nkisa ka botseno jo bo ka fa lotlhakoreng ga kgoro, mo matlwaneng a a boitshepo a baperesiti, a a lebileng ntlheng ya botsheka; mme bonang, go ne go le felo gongwe ka kwa morago ntlheng ya bophirimatsatsi." 
Ezekiel46:20 Mme a nthaya a re: “Felo fa ke gone fa baperesiti ba tlaa apeelang teng tshupelelo ya molato, le tshupelelo ya boleo, fa ba tlaa besang teng tshupelo ya boupe; gore ba se ka ba di ntshetsa kwa lolwapeng lwa ka fa ntle, ba ya go itshepisa batho teng.”" 
Ezekiel46:21 Foo a nkisa kwa lolwapeng lwa ka fa ntle, a ntsamaisa ka fa dikgokgotšhong tsoo nne tsa lolwapa, mme bonang, mo kgokgotšhong nngwe le nngwe ya lolwapa go ne go le lolwapana." 
Ezekiel46:22 Mo dikgokgotšhong tsoo nne tsa lolwapa go ne go le malwapana a a ageletsweng, a le boleele jwa mabogo a le 40, le boatlhamo bo le mabogo a le 30; tse nne tseo mo dikgokgotšhong di ne di le selekanyo se le sengwe fela." 
Ezekiel46:23 Go no go le dikago tse di tlhomaganyeng mo tikologong mo go yone, mo tikologong ya one oo mane, go dirilwe go na le mafelo a a apeelang fa tlase ga matshwaragano mo tikologong." 
Ezekiel46:24 Foo a nthaya a re: “A, ke one matlo a a apeelang, kwa badiredi ba ntlo ba tlaa apeelang setlhabelo sa batho teng.”" 
Ezekiel47:1 Mme a mpusetsa kwa mojakong wa ntlo; mme bonang metsi a bo a tswa fa tlase ga serepodi sa ntlo, a tswela ntlheng ya botlhabatsatsi, gonne kgoro ya ntlo e ne e lebile botlhabatsatsi; mme metsi a fologa a tswa fa tlase, a tswa ka fa lotlhakoreng lwa ntlo lwa ka fa tsogong le legolo, go pota sebeso ka fa borwa." 
Ezekiel47:2 Foo a nkgogela kwa ntle ka tsela ya kgoro ntlheng ya botsheka, a mpotolosa ka tsela ya ka fa ntle go ya kwa kgorong ya ka fa ntle, ka tsela ya kgoro e e lebileng ntlheng ya botlhabatsatsi; mme bonang, ga bo go tsitla metsi ka fa ntlheng ya letsogo le legolo." 
Ezekiel47:3 E rile monna yoo a tswela ntlheng ya botlhabatsatsi a tshotse thodi, a lekanya mabogo a le 1 000, mme a nthalatsa metsi, e le metsi a a fitlhang fa magwejaneng." 
Ezekiel47:4 Gape a lekanya a le 1 000, mme a nthalatsa metsi, e le metsi a a fitlhang mo mangoleng. Gape a lekanya a le 1 000, mme a nthalatsa metsi, e le metsi a a tshwarang dinoka." 
Ezekiel47:5 Morago ga moo a lekanya a le 1 000; mme ya bo e le noka e ke sa kakeng ka e tshela; gonne metsi a ne a gogomogile, e le metsi a go ka sapiwang mo go one, e le noka e e sa kakeng ya tshelwa." 
Ezekiel47:6 Mme a nthaya a re: “Morwa motho, a o bonye selo se?” Foo a nkgoga, a mpusetsa kwa losing lwa noka." 
Ezekiel47:7 Jaana e rile ke sena go boa, bonang, fa losing lwa noka ga bo go le ditlhare di le dintsi thata ka fa ntlheng nngwe le nngwe." 
Ezekiel47:8 Foo a nthaya a re: “Metsi ao a tswela kwa ntlheng ya lefatshe la botlhabatsatsi, mme a tlaa fologela kwa Araba; mme a tlaa tswelela kwa lewatleng; metsi a a tswedisitsweng a tlaa tsena mo lewatleng; mme metsi a tlaa fodisiwa." 
Ezekiel47:9 Go tlaa dirala go re ditshedi tsotlhe tse di nyeulang, gongwe le gongwe kwa dinoka di fitlhang teng, di tlaa tshela; mme go tlaa nna bontsintsi jo bogolo jwa ditlhapi; gonne metsi ao a fitlhile teng, mme metsi a lewatle a tlaa fodisiwa, dilo tsotlhe di tlaa tshela gongwe le gongwe kwa noka e fitlhang teng." 
Ezekiel47:10 Go tlaa dirala go re batshwara ditlhapi ba tlaa ema fa go yone; go tswa mo Enegedi go ya fela kwa Enegelaime e tlaa nna felo ga go anega ditloa; ditlhapi tsa tsone di tlaa nna ka fa mehuteng ya tsone, jaaka ditlhapi tsa lewatle le legolo di le dintsi thata." 
Ezekiel47:11 Mafelo a lone a a maraga, le dinwedi tsa lone, ga di ketla di fodisiwa; di tlaa neelwa go nna letswai fela." 
Ezekiel47:12 Fa nokeng, ka fa losing lwa yone, ka fa ntlheng nngwe le nngwe, go tlaa gola ditlhare dingwe le dingwe tse di jewang, tse lekakaba la tsone le se ketlang le swaba, le tse maungo a tsone a sa tlhaeleng; se tlaa ungwa maungo a maša ka kgwedi nngwe le nngwe, ka metsi a lone a tswa mo felong ga boitshepo; maungo a tsone a tlaa nna dijo, le lekakaba la tsone e tlaa nna la kalafo.”" 
Ezekiel47:13 Morena Modimo o bua jaana, a re: “O, e tlaa nna molelwane o lo tlaa kgaoganyang ka one lefatshe go nna boswa ka fa ditsong tse di some le metso mebedi tsa Iseraele; Josefe o tlaa bona dikabelo di le pedi." 
Ezekiel47:14 Lo tlaa rua lefatshe, mongwe jaaka yo mongwe; le ke le tsholeleditseng seatla ka re: Ke tlaa le naya borraeno, mme lefatshe leo le tlaa newa lona go nna boswa." 
Ezekiel47:15 “O, e tlaa nna molelwane wa lefatshe, ntlheng ya botsheka, go tswa lewatleng le legolo, ka tsela ya Hethelone, go ya go fitlha kwa botsenong jwa Setate;" 
Ezekiel47:16 Hamathe, Berotha, le Siberaime, o o fa gare ga molelwane wa Damaseko le molelwane wa Hamathe; Hasere-hatikone, o o fa molelwaneng wa Haurane." 
Ezekiel47:17 Molelwane go tswa kwa lewatleng e tlaa nna Hasere-enone fa molelwaneng wa Damaseko, mme ka fa ntlheng ya botsheka go ya kwa botsheka go molelwane wa Hamathe. Eo ke ntlha ya botsheka." 
Ezekiel47:18 “Ntlha ya botlhabatsatsi, fa gare ga Haurane le Damaseko le Gileate le lefatshe la Iseraele, e tlaa nna Joretane; go tswa molelwaneng wa botsheka go ya lewatleng la botlhabatsatsi lo tlaa lekanya. E ke ntlha ya botlhabatsatsi." 
Ezekiel47:19 “Ntlha ya borwa go ya kwa borwa go tlaa tswa mo Tamare go ya go fitlha kwa metsing a Meribathekateše, go ya go fitlha kwa molatswaneng wa Egepeto, go ya go fitlha kwa lewatleng le legolo. E ke yone ntlha ya borwa go ya kwa borwa." 
Ezekiel47:20 “Ntlha ya bophirimatsatsi e tlaa nna lewatle le legolo, go tswa molelwaneng wa borwa go ya go fitlha bolebana le botseno jwa Hamathe. E ke yone ntlha ya bophirimatsatsi." 
Ezekiel47:21 “Lo tlaa ikgaoganyetsa lefatshe leo jalo ka fa ditsong tsa Iseraele. 
Ezekiel47:22 Go tlaa dirala go re lo tlaa le kgaoganya ka bola go nna boswa jwa lona le jwa baeng ba ba jakileng mo go lona, ba ba tlaa tsalang bana mo go lona; mme ba tlaa nna mo go lona jaaka ba ba tsaletsweng mo gae mo baneng ba Iseraele; ba tlaa nna le boswa le lona mo ditsong tsa Iseraele." 
Ezekiel47:23 Go tlaa dirala go re lotso lo moeng o jakileng mo go lone, lo tlaa mo naya boswa jwa gagwe teng.” Go bua Morena Modimo." 
Ezekiel48:1 “Jaana maina a ditso ke a: Go tswa bokhutlong ntlheng ya botsheka go bapa le Hethelone go ya kwa botsenong jwa Hamathe, Hasare-enone fa molelwaneng wa Damaseko go ya kwa botsheka go bapa le Hamathe, ditlhakore tsa tsone di tlaa leba botlhabatsatsi le bophirimatsatsi. Dane kabelo e le nngwe fela." 
Ezekiel48:2 “Fa molelwaneng wa ga Dane, go tswa ntlheng ya botlhabatsatsi go ya ntlheng ya bophirimatsatsi, Ašere; kabelo e le nngwe fela." 
Ezekiel48:3 Fa molelwaneng wa ga Ašere, go tswa ntlheng ya botlhabatsatsi go ya fela ntlheng ya bophirimatsatsi; Nafetali, kabelo e le nngwe fela." 
Ezekiel48:4 Fa molelwaneng wa ga Nafetali, go tswa ntlheng ya botlhabatsatsi go ya ntlheng ya bophirimatsatsi; Manase, kabelo e le nngwe fela." 
Ezekiel48:5 Fa molelwaneng wa ga Manase, go tswa ntlheng ya botlhabatsatsi go ya ntlheng ya bophirimatsatsi; Eferaime, kabelo e le nngwe fela." 
Ezekiel48:6 Fa molelwaneng wa ga Eferaime, go tswa ntlheng ya botlhabatsatsi go ya fela ntlheng ya bophirimatsatsi; Rubene, kabelo e le nngwe fela." 
Ezekiel48:7 Fa molelwaneng wa ga Rubene, go tswa ntlheng ya botlhabatsatsi go ya ntlheng ya bophirimatsatsi; Juta, kabelo e le nngwe fela." 
Ezekiel48:8 “Fa molelwaneng wa Juta, go tswa ntlheng ya botlhabatsatsi go ya ntlheng ya bophirimatsatsi, a e nne seromololo se lo tlaa se isang, boatlhamo bo le ditlhaka di le 25 000, le boleele bo le kana ka kabelo nngwe, go tswa ntlheng ya botlhabatsatsi go ya ntlheng ya bophirimatsatsi; mme felo ga boitshepo go nne mo gare ga sone." 
Ezekiel48:9 “Seromololo se lo tlaa se isetsang Jehofa a e nne boleele jwa ditlhaka di le 25 000, le boatlhamo bo le 10 000." 
Ezekiel48:10 Seromololo se se itshepileng se, e tlaa nna sa bone bao, e bong sa baperesiti; go ya ntlheng ya botsheka boleele bo le 25 000, le go ya ntlheng ya bophirimatsatsi boatlhamo bo le 10 000, le go ya ntlheng ya botlhabatsatsi boatlhamo bo le 10 000, le go ya ntlheng ya borwa boleele bo le 25 000; mme felo ga boitshepo ga Jehofa a go nne mo gare ga sone." 
Ezekiel48:11 Go tlaa nna ga baperesiti ba ba itshepisitsweng ba bomorwa Satoke, ba ba ntseng ba tshegeditse tebelo ya me; ba ba se kang ba timela jale ka bana ba Iseraele ba timela, jaaka Balefi ba ne ba timela." 
Ezekiel48:12 E tlaa nna seromololo sa bone mo seromololong sa lefatshe, e le sengwe se se boitshepo jo bo itshepileng, fa molelwaneng wa Balefi." 
Ezekiel48:13 Go tshwaragana le molelwane wa baperesiti, a Balefi ba bone boleele bo le 25 000 le boatlhamo bo le 10 000 boleele bo le mmogo a bo nne 25 000, le boatlhamo 10 000." 
Ezekiel48:14 Mme ga ba ketla ba go rekisa, le fa e le go go ananya, le mabutswapele a lefatshe ga a ketla a newa batho ba sele; gonne go boitshepo Moreneng." 
Ezekiel48:15 “Mme 5 000 tse di setseng mo boatlhamong, fa pele ga 25 000 e tlaa nna ga tiro nngwe le nngwe fela, ga motse fela, ga go nnwa, le ga dintlhana tsa motse; mme motse o tlaa nna mo gare ga gone." 
Ezekiel48:16 Dilekanyo tsa teng e tlaa nna tse: Ntlheng ya botsheka 4 500, le ntlheng ya borwa 4 500, le ntlheng ya botlhabatsatsi 4 500, le ntlheng ya bophirimatsatsi 4 500." 
Ezekiel48:17 A motse o dire le dintlhana: Ntlheng ya botsheka 250, ntlheng ya borwa 250, ntlheng ya botlhabatsatsi 250, le ntlheng ya bophirimatsatsi 250." 
Ezekiel48:18 Mo go setseng ga boleele, mo go bapileng le seromololo se se itshepileng, a e nne 10 000 ntlheng ya botlhabatsatsi, le 10 000 ntlheng ya bophirimatsatsi; mme a go bape le seromololo se se itshepileng; mme totafalo ya teng e tlaa nna dijo tsa ba ba dirang mo motseng." 
Ezekiel48:19 Ba ba dirang mo motseng e le ba ba tswang mo ditsong tsotlhe tsa Iseraele ba tlaa go lema. 
Ezekiel48:20 “Seromololo sotlhe fela e tlaa nna 25 000 ka 25 000; seromololo se se itshepileng lo se ise se le dintlha di le nne tse di lekalekanyeng, se na le boswa jwa motse." 
Ezekiel48:21 “Mo go setseng e tlaa nna ga kgosana ka fa ntlheng nngwe le nngwe ya seromololo se se itshepileng, le ga boswa jwa motse, fa pele ga 25 000 ba seromololo, ntlheng ya molelwane ka fa botlhabatsatsi, le ntlheng ya bophirimatsatsi fa pele ga 25 000 ka fa ntlheng ya bophirimatsatsi, e le mo go bapileng le dikabelo, e tlaa nna ga kgosana; mme seromololo se se itshepileng le felo ga boitshepo ga ntlo go tlaa nna mo gare ga gone." 
Ezekiel48:22 Gape, go tswa mo bosweng jwa Balefi, le go tswa mo bosweng jwa motse, ka go le mo teng ga se e leng sa kgosana, fa gare ga molelwane wa Juta le molelwane wa Benjamine, e tlaa nna ga kgosana." 
Ezekiel48:23 “Ka ga ditso tse dingwe; go tswa ntlheng ya botlhabatsatsi go ya ntlheng ya bophirimatsatsi; Benjamine, kabelo e le nngwe fela." 
Ezekiel48:24 Fa molelwaneng wa Benjamine go tswa ntlheng ya botlhabatsatsi go ya ntlheng ya bophirimatsatsi; Simeone, kabelo e le nngwe fela." 
Ezekiel48:25 Fa molelwaneng wa Simeone, go tswa ntlheng ya botlhabatsatsi go ya ntlheng ya bophirimatsatsi; Isakare, kabelo e le nngwe fela." 
Ezekiel48:26 Fa molelwaneng wa Isakare, go tswa ntlheng ya botlhabatsatsi go ya ntlheng ya bophirimatsatsi; Sebulone, kabelo e le nngwe fela." 
Ezekiel48:27 Fa molelwaneng wa Sebulone go tswa ntlheng ya botlhabatsatsi go ya ntlheng ya bophirimatsatsi; Gate, kabelo e le nngwe fela." 
Ezekiel48:28 “Fa molelwaneng wa Gate ka fa ntlheng ya borwa go ya kwa borwa, molelwane o tlaa tswa fela mo Tamare go ya kwa metsing a Meribathekateše kwa molatswaneng wa Egepeto, kwa lewatleng le legolo." 
Ezekiel48:29 “Leo ke lone lefatshe le lo tlaa le kgaoganyetsang ditso tsa Iseraele ka bola go nna boswa, mme tse ke tsone dikabelo tsa bangwe le bangwe, go bua Morena Modimo." 
Ezekiel48:30 “A ke one matso a motse; mo ntlheng ya botsheka ditlhaka di le 4 500 ka selekanyo: 
Ezekiel48:31 Dikgoro tsa motse a di rewe maina a ditso tsa Iseraele; ntlheng ya botsheka dikgoro di le tharo; kgoro ya ga Rubene, nngwe fela; kgoro ya ga Juta, nngwe fela; kgoro ya ga Lefi, nngwe fela." 
Ezekiel48:32 Mo ntlheng ya botlhabatsatsi ditlhaka di le 4 500; le dikgoro di le tharo: e bong kgoro ya ga Josefe, nngwe fela; kgoro ya ga Benjamine, nngwe fela; kgoro ya ga Dane, nngwe fela." 
Ezekiel48:33 Mo ntlheng ya borwa ditlhaka di le 4 500 ka selekanyo; le dikgoro di le tharo; kgoro ya ga Simeone, nngwe fela; kgoro ya ga Isakare, nngwe fela; kgoro ya ga Sebulone, nngwe fela." 
Ezekiel48:34 Mo ntlheng ya bophirimatsatsi, ditlhaka di le 4 500, ka selekanyo, le dikgoro tsa tsone tse tharo; kgoro ya ga Gate, nngwe fela; kgoro ya ga Asere, nngwe fela; kgoro ya ga Nafetali, nngwe fela." 
Ezekiel48:35 Mme o tlaa nna ditlhaka di le 18 000; mme go tswa mo tsatsing leo leina la motse le tlaa rewa go twe, Jehofa o gone.”" 
Daniel1:1 E rile ka ngwaga wa boraro wa puso ya ga Jehoiakime kgosi ya Juta, Nebukatenesare kgosi ya Babilone a tla mo Jerusalema, mme a o tlhasela." 
Daniel1:2 Mme Morena a tsenya Jehoiakime kgosi ya Juta mo seatleng sa gagwe, le bontlhanngwe jwa dilwana tsa ntlo ya Modimo; mme a di isa kwa lefatsheng la Shinare kwa ntlong ya modimo wa gagwe; mme a isa dilwana mo ntlong ya dikhumo, ya modimo wa gagwe." 
Daniel1:3 Kgosi ya bua le Asepenase mong wa baopafadiwi ba gagwe, gore a lere bangwe ba bana ba Iseraele, e bong ba losika lwa segosi le lwa bagolwane;" 
Daniel1:4 e le makau a a se nang bokoa, e le ba ba bopegileng sentle, ba le ditswerere mo botlhaleng jotlhe, e le ba ba seleng tlhogo, ba fasitse, ba tlhaloganya kitso yotlhe, ba ba nang le nonofo ya go ema mo ntlong ya kgosi; gore a ba rute thuto le puo ya Sekalatea." 
Daniel1:5 Kgosi ya ba laolela kabelo ya malatsi otlhe ya dijo tsa kgosi, le ya bojalwa jwa mofine jo e bo nwang, le gore ba otlwe ka dinyaga di le tharo; gore e tle e re di sena go feta boo ba itse go ema fa pele ga kgosi." 
Daniel1:6 Jaana mo go bao ga bo go le Daniele, le Hanania, le Mišaele, le Asaria, e le ba bana ba Juta." 
Daniel1:7 Kgosana ya baopafadiwi ya ba raya maina: Daniele a rewa leina la Beletešasare; Hanania la Shaterake; Mišaele, la Mešake; le Asaria la Abetenego." 
Daniel1:8 Daniele ene a ikaelela mo pelong ya gagwe fa a se ketla a iitshekolola ka dijo tsa kgosi, le fa e le ka bojalwa jwa mofine jo e bo nwang; ka moo a lopa kgosana ya baopafadiwi gore a mme a se ka a iitshekolola." 
Daniel1:9 Jaana Modimo wa naya Daniele botsalano le go tlhomogelwa pelo mo matlhong a kgosana ya baopafadiwi. 
Daniel1:10 Kgosana ya baopafadiwi ya raya Daniele ya re: “Ke boifa kgosi morena wa me, yo o lo laoletseng dijo tsa lona le noo ya lona; gonne o tlaa bo a bonelang difatlhogo tsa lona di tlhontse bogolo go tsa makau ba e leng bankana ba lona? Jalo lo tlaa bo lo mpiletsa loso mo kgosing.”" 
Daniel1:11 Foo Daniele a raya molebedi, yo kgosana ya baopafadiwi e beileng Daniele, le Hanania, le Mišaele, le Asaria, mo taolong ya gagwe," 
Daniel1:12 a re: “Ke a go rapela, o tle o leke batlhanka beno ka malatsi a le some; mme ba re jese merogo, ba re nose metsi." 
Daniel1:13 Foo a difatlhogo tsa rona di sekasekwe fa pele ga gago le difatlhogo tsa makau a a jang dijo tsa kgosi; mme o tle o itse go direla batlhanka beno ka fa o bonang ka teng.” 
Daniel1:14 Jalo a ba reetsa mo selong se, a ba leka ka malatsi a le some." 
Daniel1:15 Ya re malatsi a le some a sena go feta difatlhogo tsa bone tsa bonala di le dintle bogolo, mme ba bo ba nonne bogolo go makau otlhe a a jang dijo tsa kgosi." 
Daniel1:16 Jalo molebedi a tlosa dijo tsa bone, le bojalwa jwa mofine jo ba tshwanetseng go bo nwa, mme a ba naya merogo." 
Daniel1:17 Ka ga makau a mane ao, Modimo wa ba naya kitso le maano mo thutong yotlhe le botlhale; mme Daniele o na a na le tlhaloganyo mo diponatshegelong tsotlhe le mo ditorong." 
Daniel1:18 E rile malatsi a sena go feta, a kgosi e ne e laotse gore ba leriwe ka one, kgosana ya baopafadiwi ya ba isa mo teng fa pele ga Nebukatenesare." 
Daniel1:19 Kgosi ya bua nabo; mme mo go bone botlhe go se ka ga fitlhelwa bape ba ba tshwanang le Daniele, le Hanania, le Mišaele, le Asaria; ke gone ka moo ba ne ba ema fa pele ga kgosi." 
Daniel1:20 Mo dilong tsotlhe tsa botlhale le tlhaloganyo, tse kgosi e ba botsang ka ga tsone, ya ba fitlhela ba gaisa ga some baitseanape botlhe le dingaka tsotlhe tsa lefatshe lotlhe la yone." 
Daniel1:21 Mme Daniele a nna a tshela fela a ya go fitlha mo ngwageng wa ntlha wa kgosi Kurose. 
Daniel2:1 E rile ka ngwaga wa bobedi wa puso ya ga Nebukatenesare, Nebukatenesare a lora ditoro; mme mowa wa gagwe wa khidiega, le boroko jwa tloga mo go ene." 
Daniel2:2 Foo kgosi ya laola gore go bidiwe baitseanape, le dingaka, le baloi, le Bakalatea, gore ba tle go bolelela kgosi ditoro tsa yone. Jalo ba tsena ba ema fa pele ga kgosi." 
Daniel2:3 Mme kgosi ya ba raya ya re: “Ke lorile toro, mme mowa wa me o khidiegela go itse toro eo.”" 
Daniel2:4 Foo Bakalatea ba bua le kgosi ka puo ya Sesiria ba re: “A kgosi e tshele ka bosakhutleng; bolelela batlhanka beno toro, mme re tlaa supa phuthololo.”" 
Daniel2:5 Kgosi ya fetola Bakalatea ya ba raya ya re: “Selo seo se tlogile mo go nna; fa lo sa nkitsise toro le phuthololo ya yone, lo tlaa remaganngwa, le matlo a lona a tlaa ntshiwa thotobolo fela." 
Daniel2:6 Mme fa lo supa toro le phuthololo ya yone, lo tlaa amogela mo go nna dineo, le dituelo, le tlotlo e kgolo; ke gone, ntshupetsang toro le phuthololo ya yone.”" 
Daniel2:7 Ba fetola lwa bobedi, ba re: “A kgosi e bolelele batlhanka ba yone toro, mme re tlaa supa phuthololo ya yone.”" 
Daniel2:8 Kgosi ya ba fetola ya re: “Ke a itse sentle fa lo a bo lo rata go inaya lobaka, ka lo bona selo seo se tlogile mo go nna." 
Daniel2:9 Fa lo sa nkitsise toro, go na le taolo e le nngwe fela ka ga lona; gonne lo baakantse mafoko a maaka le a a bodileng go a bua fa pele ga me, go tle go tsamaye motlha o fetoge; ke gone mpolelelang toro, mme ke tlaa itse fa lo ka ntshupetsa phuthololo ya yone.”" 
Daniel2:10 Bakalatea ba fetola fa pele ga kgosi ba re: “Ga go na motho ope mo lefatsheng yo o ka supang selo se sa kgosi; ka go bo ga go na kgosi epe, le fa e le morena, le fa e le molaodi, yo o kileng a lopa sepe se se ntseng jalo mo go moitseanape, le fa e le mo ngakeng le fa e le mo Mokalateeng." 
Daniel2:11 Se kgosi e se lopang ke selo se sele fela, mme ga go na ope o sele yo o ka se supang fa pele ga kgosi, fa e se medimo fela, e bonno jwa yone bo seyong mo bathong.”" 
Daniel2:12 Ka ntlha ya moo kgosi ya nna bogale, ya šakgala thata, ya laola gore go senngwe batlhale botlhe ba Babilone." 
Daniel2:13 Jalo taolo ya tswa, mme batlhale ba ne ba na le go bolawa fela; mme ba senka Daniele le bankana ba gagwe gore ba bolawe." 
Daniel2:14 Foo Daniele a busetsa karabo ka boikgakololo le botlhale kwa go Arioke mogolwane wa balebedi ba kgosi, yo o tsamaetseng batlhale ba Babilone go ba bolaya." 
Daniel2:15 A fetola Arioke, mogolwane wa balebedi ba kgosi, a re: “Ana ke ka ntlha yang taolo e tswa mo kgosing ka potlako jaana?” Foo Arioke a itsise Daniele selo seo." 
Daniel2:16 Mme Daniele a tsena, a ya go lopa kgosi gore a mo neye lobaka, mme o tlaa supetsa kgosi phuthololo." 
Daniel2:17 Foo Daniele a ya kwa ntlong ya gagwe, mme selo seo a se itsise bankana ba gagwe, Hanania, le Mišaele, le Asaria;" 
Daniel2:18 gore ba lope mautlwelo botlhoko mo Modimong wa legodimo ka ga bosaitsiweng jo; gore Daniele le bankana ba gagwe ba se ka ba nyelela le batlhale ba bangwe ba Babilone.
