Hosea7:14 Le gone ga ba a ntelela ka pelo tsa bone, mme ba gogotlega mo malaong a bone; ba phuthegela mabele le bojalwa jwa mofine ba a ntsuololela." 
Hosea7:15 Le fa ke ba rutile ka ba ka thatafatsa mabogo a bone, le fa go ntse jalo ba ntlhatlhanyetsa bosula fela." 
Hosea7:16 Ba a boa, mme ga ba boele go ene yo o kwa godimong; ba ntse jaaka bora jo bo laologileng; dikgosana tsa bone di tlaa wa ka tšhaka ka ntlha ya tšararego ya loleme lwa bone; se e tlaa nna tshotlo ya bone mo lefatsheng la Egepeto." 
Hosea8:1 “Baya lonaka mo molomong wa gago. O tla jaaka ntswi yo motona, a tla go tlhasela ntlo ya ga Jehofa, gonne ba sentse kgolagano ya me, ba tlodile molao wa me." 
Hosea8:2 Ba tlaa biletsa kwa go nna, ba re: ‘Modimo wa me, rona Baiseraele re a go itse.’" 
Hosea8:3 Iseraele o latlhile sone se se molemo, mmaba o tlaa mo konatelela." 
Hosea8:4 “Ba tlhomile dikgosi, mme e seng ka nna; ba dirile dikgosana ke sa go itse; ba itiretse medimo ya disetwa ka selefera sa bone le gouta ya bone, gore ba tle ba kgaolwe." 
Hosea8:5 O latlhile namane ya gago, wena Samaria; bogale jwa me bo ba tuketse; e tlaa nna lobaka lo lokae ba ise ba fitlhe kwa go tlhokeng molato?" 
Hosea8:6 Gonne le e leng sone se, se tswa mo go Iseraele; modiri o ne a se dira, mme ga se modimo wa sepe; ee, namane ya Samaria e tlaa thubaganngwa." 
Hosea8:7 Gonne ba jala phefo, mme ba tlaa roba setsuatsue. Ga a na mabele a a emeng; mogwang ga o ketla o ntsha boupe; le fa e ka reng gongwe o ka bo ntsha, baeng ba tlaa bo kometsa." 
Hosea8:8 Iseraele o komeditswe, jaana ba ntse mo merafeng jaaka sejana se go se nang kgatlhego mo go sone." 
Hosea8:9 Gonne ba ile Asiria jaaka esela ya naga fela e e leng yosi fela. Eferaime o thapile dinyatsi ka tuelo. 
Hosea8:10 Ee, le fa ba thapa ka tuelo mo merafeng jaanong ke tlaa ba phutha; mme ba simolola go ngotlwa ka ntlha ya lekgetho la kgosi ya dikgosana." 
Hosea8:11 “E re ka Eferaime a ntsifaleditse boleo dibeso, dibeso e ne e ntse e le tsa go leofa mo go ene." 
Hosea8:12 Le fa ke mo kwalela molao wa me ka dikaelo di le makgolo a le lekgolo, di kaiwa gore ke selo se sele fela." 
Hosea8:13 Ka ga ditlhabelo tsa ditshupelo tsa me, ba isa nama setlhabelo, mme ba e je; Jehofa ga a ba amogele; jaanong o tlaa gakologelwa boikepo jwa bone, a sekisa dibe tsa bone; ba tlaa boela Egepeto." 
Hosea8:14 Gonne Iseraele o lebetse Modiri wa gagwe, o agile matlo a dikgosi; Juta o ntsifaditse metse e e thekeleditsweng; mme ke tlaa tsenya molelo mo metseng ya gagwe; mme o tlaa laila dikago tse di thata tsa yone.”" 
Hosea9:1 Wena Iseraele, o se ka wa itumela ka boitumelo, jaaka ba ditšhaba, gonne o dule mo Modimong wa gago wa ya boakeng, o ratile go thapiwa ka tuelo mo seboping sengwe le sengwe sa mabele." 
Hosea9:2 Sebopi sa pholelo le kgatisetso ya bojalwa jwa mofine ga di ketla di ba otla, le bojalwa jo boša bo tlaa mo tlhaela." 
Hosea9:3 Ga ba ketla ba aga mo lefatsheng la ga Jehofa; Eferaime o tlaa boela Egepeto, ba tlaa ja dijo tse di seng dintle kwa Asiria." 
Hosea9:4 Ga ba ketla ba thelela Jehofa ditshupelo tsa bojalwa jwa mofine, le gone ga di ketla di mo natefela; ditlhabelo tsa bone di tlaa nna mo go bone jaaka senkgwe sa bahutsafadi; botlhe ba ba se jang ba tlaa itshekologa; gonne senkgwe sa bone, e tlaa nna sa bone sa go jelwa mo mpeng; ga se ketla se tsena mo ntlong ya ga Jehofa." 
Hosea9:5 Lo tlaa dirang mo motlheng wa modiro o o masisi, le mo motlheng wa modiro wa ga Jehofa?" 
Hosea9:6 Gonne, bonang, ba tsamaile ba dule tshenyegong, le fa go ntse jalo Egepeto o tlaa ba kokoanya, Memefise o tlaa ba fitlha; dilo tsa bone tse dintle tsa selefera, sebabetsane se tlaa di rua; go tlaa nna mitlwa mo megopeng ya bone." 
Hosea9:7 Metlha ya kgophololo e fitlhile, metlha ya tefetso e fitlhile; Iseraele o tlaa go itse; moperofeti ke lesilo, motho yo o nang le mowa o a tsenwa, ka ntlha ya bontsi jwa maikepo a gago, le ka ntlha ya go bo bobaba bo le bogolo." 
Hosea9:8 Eferaime e ne e le molebedi, a na le Modimo wa me; ka ga moperofeti, seru sa mothaya nonyane se mo ditseleng tsotlhe tsa gagwe, le bobaba mo ntlong ya Modimo wa gagwe." 
Hosea9:9 Ba ipodiseditse kwa teng, jaaka mo metlheng ya Gibea; o tlaa gakologelwa boikepo jwa bone, a kgopholola maleo a bone." 
Hosea9:10 “Ke fitlhetse Iseraele a ntse jaaka difine mo nageng; ka bona borraeno jaaka mabutswapele mo mofeigeng mo motlheng wa one wa ntlha; mme ba tla mo go Baale-peore, ba itshwaela selo se se ditlhong, ba tswa se se ferosang sebete fela jaaka selo seo se ba se ratileng." 
Hosea9:11 Ka ga Baeferaime, kgalalelo ya bone e tlaa fofela koo jaaka nonyane; ga go ketla go nna botsalo, le fa e le ope yo o moimana, le fa e le yo o ithweleng." 
Hosea9:12 Le fa ba godisa bana ba bone, le fa go ntse jalo ke tlaa ba thukhutha, go ba go tlhoka le go sala ope. Ee, gape go a bo go latlhega bone mogang ke tlogang mo go bone.”" 
Hosea9:13 Eferaime o tlhomilwe mo felong fa gontle, jaaka nkile ka bona Ture; mme Eferaime o tlaa ntshetsa babolai bana ba gagwe." 
Hosea9:14 Jehofa a ko o ba abele; o tlaa ba naya eng? Ba neye sebopelo se se senyegelwang, le mabele a a husitseng." 
Hosea9:15 “Boikepo jotlhe jwa bone bo mo Gilegale; gonne ka ba ila gone, ka ntlha ya boikepo jwa ditiro tsa bone, ke tlaa ba leleka mo ntlong ya me. Ga nketla ke tlhola ke ba rata; dikgosana tsotlhe tsa bone ke dirukhutlhi fela." 
Hosea9:16 Eferaime o iteegile, modi wa bone o omeletse, ga ba ketla ba ungwa; ee, le fa ba ka belega, le fa go ntse jalo ke tlaa senya loumo lo lo rategang lwa sebopelo sa bone.”" 
Hosea9:17 Modimo wa me o tlaa ba latlha, ka ba se ka ba o reetsa; ba tlaa nna bakaidi fela mo merafeng." 
Hosea10:1 Iseraele ke mofine o o enneng thata, o o ungwang; o ntsifaditse dibeso tsa gagwe ka fa bontsing jwa loungo lwa gagwe; ba dirile ditshwantsho tse di setilweng tse dintle ka fa molemong wa lefatshe la bone." 
Hosea10:2 Dipelo tsa bone di kgaoganye; jaana ba tlaa fitlhelwa ba le molato; o tlaa itaya dibeso tsa bone, o tlaa thopa ditshwantsho tsa bone tse di emeng motloutlo." 
Hosea10:3 Ruri jaanong ba tlaa bo ba bua ba re: “Ga re na kgosi, gonne ga re boife Jehofa; mme kgosi yone e ka re direla eng?”" 
Hosea10:4 Ba bua mafoko a boithamako fela, ba ikana ka maaka fa ba dira dikgolagano; ke gone ka moo tshekiso e tlaa tlhogang jaaka mogau mo ditemaneng tsa bolemo." 
Hosea10:5 Banni ba Samaria ba tlaa nna mo theregong ka ntlha ya dinamane tsa Bethafene; gonne batho ba teng ba tlaa go hutsafalela, le baperesiti ba teng ba ba kileng ba go itumelela, ka ntlha ya kgalalelo ya teng, ka e tlositswe." 
Hosea10:6 Le gone go tlaa isiwa kwa Asiria e le neo e e newang kgosi Jarebe. Eferaime o tlaa amogela ditlhong, le Iseraele o tlaa tlhabisiwa ditlhong ke kgakololo e e leng ya gagwe." 
Hosea10:7 Ka ga Samaria, kgosi ya gagwe e okoletswe koo, jaaka lofulo mo metsing." 
Hosea10:8 Le mafelo a a tlotlometseng a Afene, boleo jwa Iseraele, a tlaa senngwa; mitlwa le mofero di tlaa mela mo dibesong tsa bone; mme ba tlaa raya dithaba, ba re: “Re bipe,” le makhujana, ba re: “Re weleng godimo.”" 
Hosea10:9 “Iseraele we, e sa le ka metlha ya Gibea o ntse o leofa fela, ba ne ba ntse ba eme gone; gore tlhabano e e tlhaselang bana ba boikepo e se ka ya ba tshwara mo Gibea." 
Hosea10:10 E tlaa re ke eletsa jalo ke tlaa ba otlhaya; mme ditšhaba di tlaa phuthegela go tlhabana nabo, mogang ba gokaganyeng le ditlolo tse pedi tsa bone." 
Hosea10:11 “Eferaime ke kgomo ya moroba e e rutilweng, e e ratang go photha mabele; mme ke beile jokwe mo thamong ya gagwe e ntle, ke tlaa baya mopalami mo go Eferaime; Juta o tlaa lema, Jakobe o tlaa thuba makote." 
Hosea10:12 Ijaleleng mo tshiamong, lo robe ka fa boutlwelongbotlhoko; lo kgathe lefatshe la lona le le sa lengwang, gonne ke lobaka lwa go batla Jehofa, go tle go tsamaye a tle go lo nesetsa pula ya tshiamo." 
Hosea10:13 Lo lemile tshiamololo, lo robile boikepo; lo jele loungo lwa maaka. Gonne o ne wa ikanya tsela ya gago, le bontsi jwa diganka tsa gago," 
Hosea10:14 ke gone ka moo pheretlhego e tlaa tsogang mo bathong ba gago, dikago tsotlhe tsa gago tse di thata tsa tlhabanelo di tlaa gapiwa jaaka Shalemane a ne a thopa Betharebele mo motlheng wa tlhabano; mma bana o na a phatlakanngwa le bana ba gagwe." 
Hosea10:15 Bethele o tlaa lo direla jalo ka ntlha ya boikepo jo bogolo jwa lona; kgosi ya Iseraele e tlaa kgaolelwa ruri go le busabusa. 
Hosea11:1 “E rile Iseraele a sa le ngwanyana ka bo ke mo rata, mme ka bitsa morwaake a tswe kwa Egepeto." 
Hosea11:2 Fela jaaka ba ne ba ba bitsa, ba bo ba tloga ba tswa mo go bone jalo; ba ya ba isetsa Bobaale ditlhabelo, ba fisetsa ditshwantsho tse di setilweng maswalo." 
Hosea11:3 Le fa go ntse jalo ka lekisa Eferaime go tsamaya ka dinao; ka ba tshola mo mabogong a me; mme ba bo ba sa itse fa ke ba fodisa. 
Hosea11:4 Ka ba goga ka megala ya motho, ka dikgole tsa lorato; ka ba ka nna mo go bone ke ntse jaaka ba ba tlosang jokwe mo ditlhaeng tsa bone, mme ka baya dijo fa pele ga bone." 
Hosea11:5 “Ga a ketla a boela kwa lefatsheng la Egepeto; mme Moasiria o tlaa nna kgosi ya gagwe, ka ba ganne go bowa." 
Hosea11:6 Tšhaka e tlaa wela metse ya gagwe, e tlaa nyeletsa mephakalego ya gagwe, mme e tlaa e suputsa, ka ntlha ya dikgakololo tse e leng tsa bone." 
Hosea11:7 Batho ba me ba lemaletse kwa go ntenegeleng; le fa ba biletsa kwa go se se kwa godimo, ga go na ope yo o tlaa mo tsholetsang ka gope." 
Hosea11:8 Ana ke tlaa go tlhoboga jang, Eferaime? “Ke tlaa go neela batho jang Iseraele? ke tlaa go dira jang wa nna jaaka Atema? Ke tlaa go baya jang jaaka Seboime? Pelo ya me e a gana mo teng ga me, mapelotlhomogi a me a tuka mmogo." 
Hosea11:9 Ga nketla ke dirafatsa tšhakgalo ya bogale jwa me, ga nketla ke boa ke ya go senya Eferaime; gonne ke Modimo e seng motho; ke Moitshepi mo gare ga gago; mme ga nketla ke tsena ka bogale." 
Hosea11:10 “Ba tlaa sala Jehofa morago, yo o tlaa dumang jaaka tau; gonne o tlaa duma, mme bana ba tlaa tswa bophirimatsatsi ba roroma." 
Hosea11:11 Ba tlaa tswa kwa Egepeto ba roroma jaaka nonyane, le jaaka lephoi kwa lefatsheng la Asiria; mme ke tlaa ba agisa mo matlong a bone, go bua Jehofa." 
Hosea11:12 “Eferaime o ntsentse gare ka maaka, le ba ntlo ya Juta ka tsietso; mme Juta o sa ntse a busa le Modimo, le Moitshepi yo o leng boikanngo." 
Hosea12:1 “Eferaime o ja phefo, o latela phefo ya botlhabatsatsi; o tlhola a ntsifatsa maaka le tshwafalo; mme ba dira kgolagano le Asiria, le gone lookwane lo isiwa kwa Egepeto.”" 
Hosea12:2 Jehofa o bile a na le kgang le Juta, o tlaa kgopholola Jakobe ka fa mekgweng ya gagwe; o tlaa mo duela ka fa ditirong tsa gagwe." 
Hosea12:3 E rile a sa le mo mpeng a tshwara mogolowe ka serethe; le gone mo bonneng jwa gagwe o ne a na le thata le Modimo. 
Hosea12:4 Ee, o ne a na le thata mo moengeleng, mme a fenya, a lela, a mo kokotlela. A mo fitlhela kwa Bethele, mme a bua le rona gone." 
Hosea12:5 E bong Jehofa, Modimo wa masomosomo, Jehofa ke segopodiso sa gagwe." 
Hosea12:6 Ke gone boela Modimong wa gago, tshegetsa boutlwelobotlhoko le katlholo, mme o lebelele Modimo wa gago ka metlha yotlhe." 
Hosea12:7 “Ke ene Mokanana, dilekanyo tsa tsietso di mo seatleng sa gagwe, o rata go patika." 
Hosea12:8 Eferaime a re: ‘Ke a bo ke humile, ke iponetse khumo; mo ditirong tsotlhe tsa me ga ba ketla ba fitlhela boikepo bope jo bo ka nnang boleo.’" 
Hosea12:9 Ke ntse ke le Jehofa Modimo wa gago o sa le o tswa kwa Egepeto; ke tlaa nama ke ba ke go agisa mo megopeng, jaaka jale mo metlheng ya modiro o o masisi." 
Hosea12:10 Ke bile ke buile le baperofeti, ke ntsifaditse diponatshegelo; ke buile ka ditshwantsho ka tirelo ya baperofeti." 
Hosea12:11 A Gileate ke boikepo? Botlhe ke boithamako fela. Mo Gilegale ba isa dikgomo ditlhabelo. Ee dibeso tsa bone di ntse jaaka mekoa mo ditemaneng tsa leota.” 
Hosea12:12 Jakobe o kile a tshabela kwa nageng ya Arame, Iseraele a direlela mosadi, a disa dinku gore a tle a bone mosadi." 
Hosea12:13 Jehofa a ntsha Iseraele kwa Egepeto ka moperofeti, a ba a bolokwa ke moperofeti." 
Hosea12:14 Eferaime o tlhotlheleditse bogaleng fela mo go botlhoko; ke gone ka moo madi a gagwe a tlaa tlogelwang mo go ene, kgobo ya gagwe Morena o tlaa e busetsa mo go ene." 
Hosea13:1 E rile Eferaime a bua, ga bo go le thoromo, a ikgodisa mo Iseraele; mme ya re a leofa ka Baale, a swa." 
Hosea13:2 Jaana ba leofa bogolo bogolo, ba bile ba itiretse ditshwantsho tse di tshetsweng ka selefera sa bone, e bong ditshwantsho tsa medimo ka fa tlhaloganyong ya bone, tsotlhe fela e le tiro ya banna ba ba ditswerere. Ba bua ka ga tsone ba re: A batho ba ba isang ditlhabelo ba atle dinamane." 
Hosea13:3 Ke gone ba tlaa nnang jaaka leru la ka moso, le jaaka monyo o o tlogang go sa le ka moso, jaaka mmoko o o kgopholwang ke setsuatsue mo seboping, le jaaka mosi o tswa ka letshoba la one." 
Hosea13:4 “Le fa go ntse jalo ke ntse ke le Modimo wa gago o sa le o tswa lefatsheng la Egepeto; ga o ketla o itse modimo ope fa e se nna, kwa ntle ga me ga go na mmoloki ope." 
Hosea13:5 Ke ne ke go itse o le mo nageng, mo lefatsheng la lokgere lo logolo." 
Hosea13:6 Ba ne ba kgora ka fa bofulong jwa bone; ba kgora, dipelo tsa bone tsa goletsega; ke gone ka moo ba ntebetseng." 
Hosea13:7 “Ke gone ke ntseng mo go bone jaaka tau, jaaka nkwe ke tlaa lalela fa tseleng." 
Hosea13:8 Ke tlaa ba kgatlhantsha jaaka bera e e thukhuthilweng bana, ke tlaa gagola lotswalo lwa pelo tsa bone; ke tlaa ba suputsa gone jaaka tau; sebatana se tlaa ba gagola." 
Hosea13:9 “Ke tshenyego ya gago Iseraele, fa e bo ne ne o tlhabana le nna jaana, o tlhabana le mothusi wa gago." 
Hosea13:10 Kgosi ya gago e kae jaana, gore e tle e go boloke mo metseng yotlhe ya gago; le baatlhodi ba gago, ba o buileng ka ga bone, wa re: ‘Nnayang kgosi le dikgosana’?" 
Hosea13:11 Ka go naya kgosi mo bogaleng jwa me, mme ke e tlositse mo kgakalong ya me." 
Hosea13:12 “Boikepo jwa ga Eferaime bo bofeletswe; boleo jwa gagwe bo beilwe mo polokelong. 
Hosea13:13 Mahutsana a mosadi yo o belegang a tlaa tla mo go ene; ke ngwana wa mosimane yo o seng botlhale; gonne ke lobaka lwa gore, ga a tshwanela go tlhola a diegile mo felong ga go kukunya ga bana." 
Hosea13:14 Ke tlaa ba golola mo thateng ya phupu; ke tlaa ba rekolola mo losong. Loso, dipetso tsa gago di kae? Phupu, tshenyo ya gago e kae? Boikwatlhao bo tlaa subegela matlho a me." 
Hosea13:15 Le fa a ka nna yo o ungwang bogolo mo baneng ba ga rraagwe, go tlaa tla phefo ya botlhabatsatsi, e bong mowa wa go hema ga Jehofa o o tlhatlogang kwa nageng, mme motswedi wa gagwe o tlaa tšha, sediba sa gagwe se tlaa kgala; o tlaa thopa dikhumo tsa dijana tsotlhe tse di kgatlhang." 
Hosea13:16 Samaria o tlaa belega molato wa gagwe; gonne o tsuololetse Modimo wa gagwe; ba tlaa wa ka tšhaka, banyana ba bone ba tlaa phatlakanngwa, le basadi ba bone ba baimana ba tlaa roposiwa.”" 
Hosea14:1 Iseraele we, boela mo go Jehofa Modimo wa gago; gonne o ole ka boikepo jwa gago." 
Hosea14:2 Yang le mafoko, lo boele mo go Jehofa; lo mo reye lo re: “Tlosa boikepo jotlhe, mme o amogele se se molemo; jalo re tlaa isa tshupelo ya melomo ya rona jaaka e ka bo e le dikgomo." 
Hosea14:3 Ašure ga a ketla a re boloka; re tlaa gana go palama dipitse; le gone ga re ketla re tlhola re raya tiro ya diatla tsa rona re re: ‘Lo medimo ya rona;’ gonne lesiela le bona kutlwelobotlhoko mo go wena.” 
Hosea14:4 “Ke tlaa fodisa tenego ya bone, ke tlaa ba rata ka go thama ga pelo fela; gonne bogale jwa me bo mo fapogile." 
Hosea14:5 Ke tlaa nna jaaka monyo mo go Iseraele; o tlaa thunya jaaka thunyo ya lesoma, mme o tlaa nama metswe jaaka Lebanone." 
Hosea14:6 Dikala tsa gagwe di tlaa nna maphatladika, le bontle jwa gagwe bo tlaa nna jaaka jwa motlhware le lonko lwa gagwe jaaka lwa Lebanone." 
Hosea14:7 Ba ba agileng fa tlase ga moriti wa gagwe ba tlaa boa; ba tlaa rulwa jaaka mabele, ba thunya jaaka mofine. Lonko lwa gagwe lo tlaa nna jaaka lwa bojalwa jwa mofine jwa Lebanone." 
Hosea14:8 Eferaime o tlaa re: ‘Ke sa tlhola ke dirang ka ditshwantsho tse di setilweng?’ Ke mo arabile, mme ke tlaa mo tlhokomela; ke ntse jaaka setlhare sa mofira o motala; loungo lwa gago lo bonwa mo go nna.”" 
Hosea14:9 Yo o botlhale ke mang, mme o tlaa tlhaloganya dilo tse? Le yo o bonokopela, mme o tlaa di itse? Gonne ditsela tsa ga Jehofa di siame, mme ba ba tshiamo ba tlaa sepela mo go tsone; batlhodi bone, ba tlaa wa mo go tsone." 
Joel1:1 Lefoko la ga Jehofa le le tsileng kwa go Joele morwa Pethuele: 
Joel1:2 Utlwang se, lona bannabagolo, lo sekegeng tsebe, lona banni botlhe ba lefatshe! A selo se, se kile sa nna mo metlheng ya lona, kgotsa mo metlheng ya borraeno?" 
Joel1:3 Bolelelang bana ba lona ka ga sone, a bana ba lona ba bolelele bana ba bone, mme bana ba bone ba bolelele kokomana e nngwe." 
Joel1:4 Se mogokong o se tlogetseng, tsie e se jele; se tsie e se tlogetseng, boijane bo se jele; se boijane bo se tlogetseng, seboko se se jele." 
Joel1:5 Kubugang, matagwa ke lona, lo lele; bokolelang lona lotlhe banwi ba bojalwa jwa mofine, ka ntlha ya bojalwa jo bo monate; gonne bo kgaotswe mo ganong la lona." 
Joel1:6 Gonne morafe mongwe o o thata, o o se nang palo, o tsile mo lefatsheng la me; meno a one ke meno a tau, o na le meno a lotlhaa a tau e tona." 
Joel1:7 O kgakgabaditse mofine wa me, o kgobotse feige ya me makwati, o e kgoboletse ruri, o e latlhile, dikala tsa yone di ditshweu." 
Joel1:8 Hutsafala jaaka lekgarebana le le itlamileng ka letsela la kgetse, le hutsafalela monna wa borweetsana jwa lone." 
Joel1:9 Tshupelo ya boupe e na le tshupelo e e nowang e kgaotswe mo ntlong ya ga Jehofa; baperesiti, badiredi ba ga Jehofa, ba a hutsafala." 
Joel1:10 Lotlhagare lo kgakgabaditswe, lefatshe le a hutsafala; gonne mabele a sentswe, bojalwa jwa mofine jo boša bo tšhele, lookwane lo a tshoboega." 
Joel1:11 Lo tlhajwe ke ditlhong, lona balemi, bokolelang, lona babaakanyi ba mafine, ka ntlha ya mabele; le ka ntlha ya barele; gonne thobo ya masimo e sule." 
Joel1:12 Mofine o swabile, mofeige o a tshoboega; mogaranata, le one mokolane le moapole, e bong ditlhare tsotlhe tsa masimo di swabile; gonne boitumelo bo swabile, bo tlogile mo baneng ba batho." 
Joel1:13 Itlameng ka letsela la kgetse, lo hutsafale lona baperesiti; bokolelang lona badiredi ba sebeso; ntlong, lo lale bosigo jotlhe ka letsela la kgetse, lona badiredi ba Modimo wa me; gonne tshupelo ya boupe e na le tshupelo e e nowang e kganeletswe ntlo ya Modimo wa lona." 
Joel1:14 Itshepiseng go ikitsa go ja, kuang modiro o o masisi, phuthang banna bagolo, le banni botlhe ba lefatshe, lo ba phuthele mo ntlong ya ga Jehofa Modimo wa lona, mme lo biletse kwa go Jehofa." 
Joel1:15 Ija we! A letsatsi le legolo! Gonne letsatsi la ga Jehofa le atametse, le tlaa tla jaaka tshenyo e e tswang kwa go Mothatayotlhe." 
Joel1:16 A dijo ga di a kgaolwa fa pele ga matlho a lona? Ee, boitumelo le boipelo mo ntlong ya Modimo wa rona?" 
Joel1:17 Dipeo di bola fa tlase ga makote a tsone; mabolokelo a mabele a swafaditswe, matlo a mabele a rutlilwe; gonne mabele a swabile." 
Joel1:18 Ana dikgomo di fegelwa jang! Matlhape a akabetse, ka a se na bohulo; ee, matsomane a dinku a swafaditswe." 
Joel1:19 Jehofa, ke goela koo go wena, gonne molelo o laitse mafulo a kwa nageng, dikgabo di fisitse ditlhare tsotlhe tsa naga." 
Joel1:20 Ee, diphologolo tsa naga di a go fegelelwa, gonne melatswana ya metsi e kgadile, molelo o laitse mafulo a kwa nageng." 
Joel2:1 Letsang lonaka mo Sione, lo openg mokgosi wa tshoso mo thabeng ya me e e boitshepo; a banni botlhe ba lefatshe ba rorome; gonne motlha wa ga Jehofa o etla, gonne o fa gaufi." 
Joel2:2 Motlha wa lefifi le letobo, motlha wa maru le lefifi le le kwenneng, jaaka bosa fa bo sela le dithaba; batho ba ba tšhaba e kgolo e e thata, ga go ise go ke go nne e e tshwanang nabo, le gone ga go ketla go tlhola go nna epe morago ga bone, go ya fela dinyageng tsa dikokomana di le dintsi." 
Joel2:3 Molelo o laila fa pele ga bone; fa morago ga bone kgabo e a tuka; lefatshe le ntse jaaka tshimo ya Etene fa pele ga bone, mme morago ga bone ke naga e e swafetseng fela. Ee, ga go na sepe se se falotseng mo go bone." 
Joel2:4 Ponalo ya bone e ntse jaaka ponalo ya dipitse; ba bile ba taboga jaaka bapalami ba dipitse. 
Joel2:5 Go tlola ga bone go ntse jaaka modumo wa dikara, mo godimo ga dithaba go ntse jaaka modumo wa kgabo ya molelo fa e ja dirite, jaaka batho ba ba thata fa ba abetswe go tlhabana." 
Joel2:6 Ditšhaba di mo tlalelong e e mahehe ka ntlha ya bone; difatlhogo tsotlhe di khwatile. 
Joel2:7 Ba taboga jaaka batho ba ba nonofileng; ba palama lorako jaaka batlhabani; ba tsamaela gongwe botlhe mo ditseleng tsa bone, ga ba fapaane mo thulaganong ya bone." 
Joel2:8 Le gone mongwe ga a kgorometse yo mongwe; ba tsamaela gongwe, mongwe le mongwe mo tseleng ya gagwe, ba sotlhomele mo dibolaong fela ka thata, ga ba kgaogane mo go sepeleng ga bone." 
Joel2:9 Ba tlolele mo motseng; ba taboge mo godimo ga lorako; ba palamele mo matlong; ba tsene ka fa diponeng jaaka legodu. 
Joel2:10 Lefatshe le reketle fa pele ga bone; magodimo a rorome, letsatsi le fifale le kgwedi, le dinaledi di gonyetse phatsimo ya tsone." 
Joel2:11 Jehofa o ntsha lentswe la gagwe fa pele ga ntwa ya gagwe; gonne ntwa ya gagwe e e tlhaolelang e kgolo thata; gonne go thata yo o dirafatsang lefoko la gagwe. Gonne motlha wa ga Jehofa o mogolo, o boitshega thata; mme e mang yo o ka o itshokelang?" 
Joel2:12 “Le gompieno,” go bua Jehofa, “retologelang mo go nna ka pelo yotlhe, le ka go ikitsa go ja, le ka go lela, le ka go hutsafala.”" 
Joel2:13 Lo ikgagole dipelo, e seng diaparo, lo retologele mo go Jehofa Modimo wa lona, gonne o pelontle, o tletse bopelotlhomogi, o bonya go galefa, o letlotlo la boutlwelobotlhoko, mme o tle a ikwatlhaele bosula." 
Joel2:14 Go itse mang bo ga a ketla a retologa a ikwatlhaya, mme a tlogela tshegofatso, e bong tshupelo ya boupe, le tshupelo e e nowang ya ga Jehofa Modimo wa lona?" 
Joel2:15 Letsang lonaka mo Sione lo itshepise go ikitsa go ja, kuang phuthego e e masisi;" 
Joel2:16 phuthang batho, itshepiseng phuthego, phuthang banna bagolo, phuthang banyana, le ba ba anyang mabele. A monyadi a tswe mo ntlwaneng ya gagwe, le monyadwi mo borobalong jwa gagwe." 
Joel2:17 A baperesiti, badiredi ba ga Jehofa, ba lele fa gare ga maribela le sebeso, mme a ba re: “Jehofa, rekegela batho ba gago, o se ka wa neela boswa jwa gago kgobong, gore merafe e ba laole; ana ba tlaa bo ba buelang mo ditšhabeng ba re: ‘Modimo wa bone o kae?’ ”" 
Joel2:18 Foo Jehofa a hufanela lefatshe la gagwe, a tlhomogela batho ba gagwe pelo." 
Joel2:19 Jehofa a fetola, a raya batho ba gagwe, a re: “Bonang, ke tlaa lo leretse mabele, le bojalwa jwa mofine, le lookwane, mme lo tlaa di kgora; ga nketla ke tlhola ke lo dira kgobo mo merafeng;" 
Joel2:20 ke tlaa tlosetsa ntwa ya botsheka kgakala le lona, ke tlaa e lelekela kwa lefatsheng le le sekaka le le le swafetseng, tlhogo ya yone e le mo lewatleng la botlhabatsatsi, le mogatla wa yone o le mo lewatleng la bophirimatsatsi; mme go nkga ga yone go tlaa tlhatloga, le moutlwalo wa yone o o bosula o tlaa tlhatloga, ka ba dirile dilo tse dikgolo.”" 
Joel2:21 O se ka wa boifa, wena lefatshe, ipele o itumele; gonne Jehofa o dirile dilo tse dikgolo." 
Joel2:22 Lo se ka lwa boifa lona diphologolo tsa naga; gonne mafulo a naga a a tlhoga, gonne setlhare se a ungwa, ditlhare tsa mofeige le tsa mafine di ntsha thata ya tsone." 
Joel2:23 Ke gone, ipeleng lona bana ba Sione, lo itumele mo go Jehofa Modimo wa lona; gonne o lo naya pula ya sephai ka selekanyo se se siameng, o lo nesetsa pula, pula ya sephai le pula ya kgogolammoko ka kgwedi ya ntlha." 
Joel2:24 Dibopi di tlaa tlala mabele, le didibeletso di tlaa penologa bojalwa jwa mofine le lookwane." 
Joel2:25 “Ke tlaa lo rebolela tsa dinyaga tse tsie e di jeleng, le boijane, le seboko, le mogokong, ntwa ya me e kgolo e nkileng ka e roma mo go lona." 
Joel2:26 Lo tlaa jela mo letlotlong lo kgora, lo tlaa baka leina la ga Jehofa Modimo wa lona, yo o lo diretseng ka kgakgamatso; mme batho ba me ga ba ketla ba tlhajwa ke ditlhong gope." 
Joel2:27 Lo tlaa itse fa ke le mo gare ga Iseraele, le go re ke Jehofa Modimo wa lona, mme go bo go se na ope o sele. Mme batho ba me ga ba ketla ba tlhajwa ke ditlhong gope.”" 
Joel2:28 “Go tlaa dirala morago ga mo, go re ke thele mowa wa me mo bathong botlhe; bana ba lona ba basimane le ba basetsana ba tlaa perofesa, banna bagolo ba lona ba tlaa lora ditoro, makau a lona a tlaa bona diponatshegelo." 
Joel2:29 Le mo batlhankeng le mo malateng ke tlaa thela mowa wa me mo metlheng eo. 
Joel2:30 Ke tlaa bonatsa dikgakgamatso mo magodimong le mo lefatsheng, madi le molelo, le dithogomosi tsa mosi." 
Joel2:31 Letsatsi le tlaa fetolwa lefifi le kgwedi madi, pele motlha o mogolo le o o boitshegang wa ga Jehofa o ise o tle." 
Joel2:32 Go tlaa dirala go re, le fa e le mang yo o tlaa bitsang leina la ga Jehofa o tlaa gololwa; gonne mo thabeng ya Sione le mo Jerusalema go tlaa nna ba ba falolang, jaaka Jehofa a buile, le mo masaleleng go tlaa nna bone ba Jehofa o ba bitsang." 
Joel3:1 “Gonne, bonang, e tlaa re mo metlheng eo, le mo lobakeng loo, mogang ke busang botshwaro jwa Juta le Jerusalema," 
Joel3:2 ke tlaa phutha merafe yotlhe, ke tlaa e folosetsa mo molapong wa ga Jehošafate; ke tlaa ganetsanya nabo gone ka ga batho ba me, le ka ga boswa jwa me Baiseraele, ba ba ba faladitseng mo merafeng, mme ba kgaogana lefatshe la me." 
Joel3:3 Ba bile ba theletse batho ba me bola; ba ananya seaka ka mosimane, ba reka bojalwa jwa mofine ka ngwana wa mosetsana, gore ba nwe." 
Joel3:4 “Ee, lo a bo lo le eng mo go nna, lona Ture le Sitone, le mafatshe otlhe a Filisitia? A lo tlaa nnaya tuelo? Fa lo mme ntuela ke tlaa busetsa tuelo ya lona ka bofefo le ka bonako mo tlhogong ya lona." 
Joel3:5 E re ka lo tshotse selefera sa me le gouta ya me, mme lo isitse dilo tsa me tse dintle, tse di eletsegang, mo ditempeleng tsa lona;" 
Joel3:6 le bana ba Juta, le ba Jerusalema lo ba rekisitse mo go bomorwa Bagerika, gore lo ba tlosetse kgakala le molelwane wa bone;" 
Joel3:7 bonang, ke tlaa ba tsosa ba le kwa lo ba rekiseditseng gone, ke tlaa busetsa tuelo ya lona mo ditlhogong tsa lona:" 
Joel3:8 Ke tlaa rekisa bana ba lona ba basimane le ba basetsana mo seatleng sa bana ba Juta, mme ba tla ba rekisa mo bathong ba Sheba, mo morafeng o o kwa kgakala; gonne Jehofa o buile.”" 
Joel3:9 Bolelang selo se mo merafeng; lo baakanyeng ntwa, tsosang diganka, a batlhabani botlhe ba atamele, ba tlhatloge." 
Joel3:10 Thulang megoma ya lona ditšhaka, le dithipa tsa lona tsa mabele marumo; a yo o bokoa, a re: “Ke thata.”" 
Joel3:11 Itlhaganeleng, tlang lona merafe yotlhe mo tikologong, phuthegang; Jehofa, folosetsa diganka tsa gago teng." 
Joel3:12 A merafe e itsose, e tle kwa molapong wa ga Jehošafate; gonne ke tlaa dula teng ke atlhola merafe yotlhe mo tikologong." 
Joel3:13 Tsenyang thipa ya mabele, gonne mabele a budule. Tlang, lo gate; gonne kgatisetso ya bojalwa jwa mofine e tletse; didibeletso di a penologa; gonne boikepo jwa bone bo bogolo." 
Joel3:14 A bontsintsi, bontsintsi jwa batho mo molapong wa katlholelo! Gonne motlha wa ga Jehofa o atametse mo molapong wa katlholelo." 
Joel3:15 Letsatsi le fifetse, le kgwedi, le dinaledi di gonyetse go phatsima ga tsone." 
Joel3:16 Mme Jehofa o tlaa kgaratla a le mo Sione, o tlaa ntsha lentswe a le mo Jerusalema, magodimo a tlaa tlakasela le lefatshe. Mme Jehofa o tlaa nna botshabelo jwa batho ba gagwe, le kago e e thata ya phemelo mo baneng ba Iseraele." 
Joel3:17 “Jalo lo tlaa itse fa ke le Jehofa Modimo wa lona; ke agile mo Sione, thaba ya me e e boitshepo. Foo Jerusalema o tlaa nna boitshepo, mme ga o ketla o tlhola o ralalwa ke baeng." 
Joel3:18 “Go tlaa dirala mo motlheng oo, go re dithaba di tlaa rotha bojalwa jwa mofine jo bo monate, makhubu a tlaa elela maši, melatswana yotlhe ya Juta e tlaa elela metsi; le motswedi o tlaa tswa mo ntlong ya ga Jehofa, o nosa mokgatšha wa Shitime." 
Joel3:19 Egepeto o tlaa nna tshwafalo, le Etome o tlaa nna naga fela e e swafetseng, ka ntlha ya tshenyo e e diretsweng bana ba Juta, ka ba tsholotse madi a a se nang molato mo lefatsheng la bone." 
Joel3:20 Juta o tlaa nna ka bosakhutleng, le Jerusalema go ya mo tshikatshikeng." 
Joel3:21 Mme ke tlaa tlhapisa madi a bone a ke iseng ke a tlhapise;” gonne Jehofa o agile mo Sione. 
Amos1:1 Mafoko a ga Amose, yo o ne a le mo badiseng ba Tekoa, a o ne a a bua ka ga Iseraele, go le mo metlheng ya ga Usia kgosi ya Juta, le mo metlheng ya ga Jeroboame morwa Joase kgosi ya Iseraele, dinyaga di le pedi pele ga thoromo ya lefatshe." 
Amos1:2 A re: “Jehofa o tlaa duma a le mo Sione, o tlaa ntsha lentswe a le mo Jerusalema; mme mafulo a badisa a tlaa hutsafala, le tlhora ya Karemele e tlaa swaba.”" 
Amos1:3 Jehofa o bua jaana, a re: “Ka ditlolo di le tharo tsa Damaseko, ee, ka di le nne, ga nketla ke faposa petso ya teng; ka ba phothile Gileate ka diphotho tsa tshipi." 
Amos1:4 Ke tlaa tsenya molelo mo ntlong ya ga Hasaele, mme o tlaa laila matlo a dikgosi a ga Benehatate." 
Amos1:5 Ke tlaa roba mophakalego wa Damaseko, ke kgaola monni mo molapong wa Afene, le yo o tshotseng thobane ya bogosi mo ntlong ya ga Etene, mme batho ba Siria ba tlaa ya botshwarong kwa Kire.” Go bua Jehofa." 
Amos1:6 Jehofa o bua jaana, a re: “Ka ditlolo di le tharo tsa Gasa, ee, ka di le nne, ga nketla ke faposa petso ya teng; ka ba tlositse batho ba le mmogo e le ditshwarwa, go ya go ba neela Etome." 
Amos1:7 Ke tlaa tsenya molelo mo lorakong lwa Gasa, mme o tlaa laila matlo a teng a dikgosi." 
Amos1:8 Ke tlaa kgaola monni mo Ašetote, le yo o tshotseng thobane ya bogosi mo Ašekelone; ke tlaa busetsa seatla sa me kwa go Ekerone, mme masalela a Bafilisitia a tlaa nyelela.” Go bua Morena Modimo." 
Amos1:9 Jehofa o bua jaana, a re: “Ka ditlolo di le tharo tsa Ture, ee, ka di le nne, ga nketla ke faposa petso ya teng; ka ba neetse Etome tšhaba yotlhe e le mmogo, mme ba se ka ba gakologelwa kgolagano ya bokaulengwe." 
Amos1:10 Ke tlaa tsenya molelo mo lorakong lwa Ture, mme o tlaa laila matlo a teng a dikgosi.”" 
Amos1:11 Jehofa o bua jaana, a re: “Ka ditlolo di le tharo tsa Etome, ee, ka di le nne, ga nketla ke faposa petso ya teng; ka a ne a konatelela morwa rraagwe ka tšhaka, a latlha bopelotlhomogi jotlhe, mme bogale jwa gagwe jwa nna jwa garola ka metlha yotlhe, mme a tshegetsa tšhakgalo ya gagwe ka bosakhutleng." 
Amos1:12 Ke tlaa tsenya molelo mo Temane, o tlaa laila matlo a dikgosi a Bosera.”" 
Amos1:13 Jehofa o bua jaana, a re: “Ka ditlolo di le tharo tsa bana ba Amone, ee, ka di le nne, ga nketla ke faposa petso ya teng; ka ba ropositse basadi ba ba baimana ba Gileate, gore ba tle ba katose molelwane wa bone." 
Amos1:14 Ke tlaa tshuba molelo mo lorakong lwa Raba, mme o tlaa laila matlo a teng a dikgosi ka lošalaba mo motlheng wa tlhabano, ka ledimo la phefo mo motlheng wa sefefo." 
Amos1:15 Mme kgosi ya bone e tlaa ya botshwarong, yone le dikgosana tsa yone mmogo.” Go bua Jehofa." 
Amos2:1 Jehofa a bua jaana, a re: “Ka ditlolo di le tharo tsa Moabe, ee, ka di le nne, ga nketla ke faposa petso ya teng; ka a fisitse marapo a kgosi ya Etome a nna taka e tshweu." 
Amos2:2 Ke tlaa tsenya molelo mo Moabe, mme o tlaa laila mantlo a dikgosi a Keriothe; Moabe o tlaa swa ka pheretlho, le ka lošalaba, le ka tumo ya lonaka." 
Amos2:3 Ke tlaa kgaola moatlhodi mo gare ga gone, ke tlaa bolaya dikgosana tsotlhe tsa teng nae.” Go bua Jehofa." 
Amos2:4 Jehofa o bua jaana, a re: “Ka ditlolo di le tharo tsa Juta, ee, ka di le nne, ga nketla ke faposa petso ya teng; ka ba ganne molao wa ga Jehofa, ba se ka ba tshegetsa ditao tsa gagwe, maaka a bone a ba timeditse, a borraabo ba ne ba a sala morago." 
Amos2:5 Mme ke tlaa tsenya molelo mo Juta, mme o tlaa laila matlo a dikgosi a Jerusalema.”" 
Amos2:6 Jehofa, o bua jaana, a re: “Ka ditlolo di le tharo tsa Iseraele, ee, ka di le nne, ga nketla ke faposa petso ya teng, ka ba rekisitse basiami ka selefera, le batlhoki ka ditlhako tse pedi." 
Amos2:7 E le ba ba fegelelwang lorole lwa lefatshe lo lo mo tlhogong ya bahumanegi, ba faposa tsela ya bakgobaladi. Motho le rraagwe ba ye morweetsaneng a le mongwe fela, ba tlhapatsa leina la me le le boitshepo." 
Amos2:8 Ba itelege fa sebesong sengwe le sengwe ba adile diaparo tse di tshotsweng peelo, mo ntlong ya Modimo wa bone ba nwe bojalwa jwa mofine jwa ba ba lefisitsweng." 
Amos2:9 “Le fa go ntse jalo ka senya Moamora fa pele ga bone, yo bogodimo jwa gagwe bo ne bo ntse jaaka bogodimo jwa masetara, o ne a le thata jaaka maoka; mme ka senya loungo lwa gagwe kwa godimo, le medi ya gagwe kwa tlase." 
Amos2:10 Gape ka lo ntsha mo lefatsheng la Egepeto, ka lo goga ka dinyaga di le 40 mo nageng, lo ya go rua lefatshe la Moamora." 
Amos2:11 Ka tsosa bangwe ba bomorwaa lona ba nna baperofeti, le Banasirite bangwe mo makaung a lona. A ga go a nna fela jalo, lona bana ba Iseraele?” Go bua Jehofa." 
Amos2:12 “Lwa nosa Banasirite bojalwa jwa mofine; lwa laola baperofeti, lwa re: ‘Se perofeseng.’" 
Amos2:13 Bonang, ke tlaa lo gata mo felong ga lona, jaaka kara e e oletseng dingata tsa mabele e tle e gate." 
Amos2:14 Go tshaba go tlaa tlhokafalela ba ba lobelo, mothata ga a ketla a itlotloanyetsa nonofo ya gagwe, le seganka ga se ketla se iphedisa;" 
Amos2:15 le ene yo o itseng go tshwara bora ga a ketla a ema; le yo o dinao tse di bofefo ga a ketla a iphedisa; le ene yo o palameng pitse ga a ketla a iphalodisa; 
Amos2:16 le yo o pelokgale mo digankeng o tlaa tshaba a sa ikatega mo motlheng oo.” Go bua Jehofa. 
Amos3:1 Utlwang lefoko le Jehofa o lo nyaditseng ka lone, lona bana ba Iseraele; ke nyatsa losika lotlhe lo ke lo ntshitseng mo lefatsheng la Egepeto, ka re:" 
Amos3:2 “Ke itsile lona fela lo le losi mo ditshikeng tsotlhe tsa lefatshe; ke gone ka moo ke tlaa lo kgopololela maikepo otlhe a lona.” 
Amos3:3 A batho ba le babedi ba ka tsamaya mmogo, fa ba se ka ba dumalana?" 
Amos3:4 A tau e tle e dume mo sekgweng fa e se na sepe se e se bolayang? A ledumedi le tle le dumadume le le mo mongobong wa lone fa le sa bolaya sepe? 
Amos3:5 A nonyane e ka wela fa fatshe mo serung, fa seru se sa raelwang gone? A mutlwane o ka tsipoga fela mo mmung, o sa tshwara sepesepe?" 
Amos3:6 A lonaka lo ka lediwa mo motseng, batho ba se ke ba boife? A bosula bo tlaa wela motse, Jehofa a sa bo dira?" 
Amos3:7 Ruri Morena Modimo o tlaa bo a sa dire sepe, fa e se ka go senolela batlhanka ba gagwe baperofeti leoma la gagwe." 
Amos3:8 Tau e dumile, e be e le mang yo o se ketlang a boifa? Morena Modimo o buile, e be e le mang yo o ka nnang fela a sa perofese?" 
Amos3:9 Utlwatsang mo matlong a dikgosi kwa Ašetota, le mo matlong a dikgosi mo lefatsheng la Egepeto; lo re: “Phuthegelang mo dithabeng tsa Samaria, lo bone dipheretlho tse dikgolo tsa teng, le dipatiko tse di mo gare ga teng.”" 
Amos3:10 “Gonne ga ba itse go dira tshiamo,” go bua Jehofa: “e bong ba ba bolokang tsa thubakanyo le bogodu mo matlong a bone a dikgosi.”" 
Amos3:11 Ke gone ka moo Morena Modimo o bua jaana, a re: “Go tlaa nna moganetsi, e bong mo tikologong ya lefatshe; mme o tlaa folosa thata ya gago mo go wena, matlo a gago a dikgosi a tlaa thopiwa.”" 
Amos3:12 Jehofa o bua jaana, a re: “Jaaka modisa a tla a swabole dirope di le pedi kgotsa ntlhanngwe ya tsebe mo ganong la tau; bana ba Iseraele ba tlaa swabolwa jalo; e bong ba ba dutseng mo Samaria mo boikaegelong jwa sekanamelo, le mo mesamong ya sei ya bolao." 
Amos3:13 Utlwang, mme lo supe lo nyatse ba ntlo ya ga Jakobe;” go bua Morena Modimo, Modimo wa masomosomo." 
Amos3:14 “Gonne e tlaa re mo motlheng o ke kgophololelang Iseraele ditlolo tsa gagwe ka one, le gone ke tlaa kgopholola dibeso tsa Bethele, mme dinaka tsa sebeso di tlaa kgaolwa, di wela fa fatshe." 
Amos3:15 Ke tlaa itaya ntlo ya mariga le ntlo ya selemo mmogo; le matlo a dinaka tsa ditlou a tlaa nyelela, le matlo a magolo a tlaa nna le bokhutlo.” Go bua Jehofa." 
Amos4:1 “Utlwang lefoko le, lona dikgomo tse di namagadi tsa Bašane, tse di mo dithabeng tsa Samaria, tse di patikang bahumagadi, tse di pitlang batlhoki, tse di rayang barena ba tsone di re: ‘Lereng, re nweng.’" 
Amos4:2 Morena Modimo o ikanne ka boitshepo jwa gagwe, a re: ‘Bonang, metlha e tlaa tla mo go lona, e ba tlaa lo tlosang mo go yone ka megolasetso, le masalela a lona ka dikobe tsa ditlhapi." 
Amos4:3 Lo tlaa tswa ka diphatlha, mongwe le mongwe a tlhamalaletse fela kwa pele ga gagwe; mme lo tlaa itatlhela mo Haremone.’ Go bua Jehofa." 
Amos4:4 “Tlang mo Bethele lo tlole; le mo Gilegale lo ntsifatse ditlolo; lo lere ditshupelo tsa lona ka meso le meso, le tsa bosome tsa lona ka tsatsi lengwe le lengwe la boraro;" 
Amos4:5 mme lo ise setlhabelo sa tebogo ya se se bedisitsweng, lo bolele ditshupelo tse e leng tsa peleego fela, lo di utlwatse; gonne moo ke mo go lo tshwanetseng, lona Baiseraele.” Go bua Morena Modimo." 
Amos4:6 “Ke lo neile bophepa jwa meno mo metseng ya lona, le go tlhoka dijo mo mannong a otlhe a lona; le fa go ntse jalo ga lo a boela mo go nna.” Go bua Jehofa." 
Amos4:7 “Ke bile ke lo tshwaretse pula, go sa ntse go le dikgwedi di le tharo go ya thobong; ka nesetsa motse o mongwe pula, ka khutlisetsa motse o mongwe pula; mo gongwe ga nelwa ke pula, mme kwa go se kang ga nelwa ke pula gone ga swaba." 
Amos4:8 Jalo ba metse e le mebedi kgotsa e le meraro ba kailela kwa motseng o le mongwe fela, ba ya go nwa metsi teng, mme ba se ka ba kgora; mme ga lo a boela mo go nna.” Go bua Jehofa." 
Amos4:9 “Ke lo iteile ka tshubego ya mabele le phori; bontsi jwa masimo a lona le masimo a mafine, le ditlhare tsa lona tsa mofeige, le ditlhare tsa lona tsa motlhware, tse e di jele; le fa go ntse jalo ga lo a boela mo go nna.” Go bua Jehofa." 
Amos4:10 “Ke lo tliseditse kgogodi e e tshwanang le ya Egepeto; makau a lona ke a bolaile ka tšhaka, ke tlositse dipitse tsa lona; go nkga sebodu ga bothibelelo jwa lona ke go tlhatloseditse mo dinkong tsa lona; le fa go ntse jalo ga lo a boela mo go nna.” Go bua Jehofa." 
Amos4:11 “Ke ribegeditse bangwe mo go lona, jaaka jale ka Modimo o ribegetsa Sotoma le Gomora, mme lwa nna jaaka motswaiso o o swatotsweng mo molelong; le fa go ntse jalo ga lo a boela mo go nna.” Go bua Jehofa." 
Amos4:12 “Ke gone ka moo ke tlaa go direlang jaana, wena Iseraele, mme ereka ke tlaa go direla selo se, o ipaakanyetse go kgatlhana le Modimo wa gago, wena Iseraele.”" 
Amos4:13 Gonne, bonang: Ene yo o bopang dithaba, a tlhola phefo, mme a bolelela motho o e leng mogopolo wa gagwe, yo o dirang moso gore o nne lefifi, a gata mafelo a a tlotlometseng a lefatshe; Jehofa, Modimo wa masomosomo, ke leina la gagwe." 
Amos5:1 Utlwang lefoko le ke le lo tlhabeleletsang khutsafalo, lona ba ntlo ya Iseraele:" 
Amos5:2 “Kgarebane ya Iseraele e ole, ga e ketla e tlhola e ema; e digetswe mo lefatsheng la ga yone; ga go na ope yo o e kakatlololang.”" 
Amos5:3 Gonne Morena Modimo o bua jaana, a re: “Motse o e rileng o bolola wa bo o le makgolo a le some o tlaa salelwa ntlo ya Iseraele ke lekgolo le le lengwe fela; le o e rileng o bolola wa bo o le lekgolo o tlaa salelwa ke lesome fela.”" 
Amos5:4 Gonne Jehofa o bua jaana, a raya ba ntlo ya Iseraele, a re: “Mpatlang mme lo tlaa tshela!" 
Amos5:5 Lo se ka lwa batla Bethele le fa e le go tsena mo Gilegale, lo bo lo se ka lwa fetela kwa Beerešeba; gonne ruri Gilegale o tlaa ya botshwarong, le Bethele o tlaa nyelela.”" 
Amos5:6 Batlang Jehofa mme lo tlaa tshela; o ka tla a thunya jaaka molelo mo ntlong ya ga Josefe, wa laila, mme go se ke go nne le ope yo o ka o timang mo Bethele;" 
Amos5:7 lona ba lo fetolang katlholo longana, lo digela tshiamo fa fatshe." 
Amos5:8 Batlang ene yo o dirang Selemela le Kgogamisigo, yo o fetolang lefifi le lentsho gore le nne bosa, o dire motshegare gore o nne lefifi la bosigo; o bitsa metsi a lewatle o a thele fa godimo ga lefatshe; Jehofa ke leina la gagwe;" 
Amos5:9 yo o tlisang tshenyego ya tshoganetso mo bathating, tshenyego e be e tle mo kagong ya tlhabanelo." 
Amos5:10 Ba ila ene yo o kgalemang mo kgotleng, ba fedisiwe pelo ke yo o buang ka thokgamo." 
Amos5:11 Ke gone e re ka lo gatakela mohumanegi, lo tsaya mo go ene lekgetho la mabele, lo agile matlo ka maje a a betlilweng, mme ga lo ketla lo nna mo go one; lo tlhomile masimo a mafine, mme ga lo ketla lo nwa bojalwa jwa mofine jwa one." 
Amos5:12 Gonne ke a itse jaaka ditlolo tsa lona di le dintsintsi, le jaaka dibe tsa lona di le thata bobe; lona ba lo patikang basiami, ba lo amogelang neo e e faposang tshiamo, lo faposa batlhoki mo kgotleng mo tshiamelong ya bone." 
Amos5:13 Ke gone ka moo yo o itseng go itisa o tlaa didimala fela mo lobakeng lo lo ntseng jalo; gonne ke lobaka lo lo bosula. 
Amos5:14 Batlang molemo, e seng bosula, gore lo tshele; mme jalo Jehofa Modimo wa masomosomo o tlaa nna le lona, jaaka lo bua." 
Amos5:15 Ilang se se bosula, lo rate se se molemo, lo tlhomamise katlholo mo kgotleng; e tlaa re kgotsa Jehofa Modimo wa masomosomo a nne pelontle mo masaleleng a ga Josefe." 
Amos5:16 Ke gone ka moo, go bua jaana Jehofa Modimo wa masomosomo, Morena, a re: “Dikuruetso di tlaa nna mo dipatlelong tsotlhe; mme ba tlaa bua mo mebileng yotlhe, ba re: ‘Ija! Ija we!’ mme ba tlaa raya molemi ba re a tle khutsafalong, le ba ba rutegileng mo selelong gore ba tle go kuruetsa." 
Amos5:17 Le mo masimong otlhe a mafine go tlaa nna kuruetso, gonne ke tlaa ralala mo gare ga gago.” Go bua Jehofa." 
Amos5:18 A bo go latlhega lona ba lo eletsang letsatsi la ga Jehofa! Ana lo ratelang lwa bo lo ka bona letsatsi la ga Jehofa? Ke lefifi, e seng lesedi." 
Amos5:19 Ke jaaka fa motho a tshaba tau, mme bera e kgatlhana nae; kgotsa a tsena mo ntlong a ikaega fa lomoteng ka seatla, mme noga e mo loma." 
Amos5:20 A letsatsi la ga Jehofa ga le ketla le nna lefifi e seng lesedi, e bong lefifi le lentsho, go bile go se na phatsimo epe mo go lone?" 
Amos5:21 “Ke a e ila, ke nyatsa mediro ya lona, ga nketla ke kgatlhega gope ka diphuthego tsa lona tse di masisi." 
Amos5:22 Ee, le fa lo nkisetsa ditshupelo tsa lona tse di fisiwang, le ditshupelo tsa lona tsa boupe, ga nketla ke di amogela, le gone ga nketla ke tlhokomela ditshupelo tsa lona tsa kagiso tsa dikgomo tsa lona tse di nonneng." 
Amos5:23 Tlosa fa go nna modumo wa dipina tsa gago; gonne ga ke rate go utlwa go koteketsa ga diletso tsa gago. 
Amos5:24 A katlholo e phothosele jaaka metsi, le tshiamo jaaka noka e kgolo." 
Amos5:25 “A lo ne lo tle lo nteretse ditlhabelo le ditshupelo mo nageng ka dinyaga tse di masome mane, lona ba ntlo ya Iseraele?" 
Amos5:26 Ee, lo ntse lo belege Sikuthe kgosi ya lona le Kiune, ditshwantsho tsa lona, naledi ya modimo wa lona, e le dilo tse lo di itiretseng." 
Amos5:27 Ke gone ka moo ke tlaa lo isa kwa botshwarong, go pota Damaseko ka kwa pele.” Go bua Jehofa, yo leina la gagwe e leng Modimo wa masomosomo." 
Amos6:1 A bo go latlhega bone ba ba iketlileng mo Sione, le ba ba thagameng mo thabeng ya Samaria, batho ba ba itsegeng, ba e leng ditlhogo tsa merafe, ba ba ntlo ya Iseraele ba tleng ba ye kwa go bone!" 
Amos6:2 Kgabaganyetsang kwa Kalene lo bone; lo tswe teng lo ye kwa Hamathe o mogolo, foo lo fologele kwa Gathe wa Bafilisitia. A ba gaisa magosi ano? Kgotsa a molelwane wa bone o mogolo go molelwane wa lona?" 
Amos6:3 Lona ba lo bayang motlha wa bosula kgakala, mme lo atametse senno sa thubakanyo." 
Amos6:4 Ba lo itelegang mo malaong a dinaka tsa ditlou, lo rapama mo dikanamelong tsa lona, lo ja dikwanyana tsa letsomane, le dinamane di tswa mo lesakeng;" 
Amos6:5 ba lo opelelang modumo wa diletso dipina tsa boeleele; ba lo itirelang dilo tsa kopelo tse di etsang tsa ga Dafite; 
Amos6:6 ba lo nwang bojalwa jwa mofine ka megotšana, lo itlotsa ditlolo tse di tlhaolesegileng; mme lo sa hutsafalele pitlagano ya ga Josefe." 
Amos6:7 Ke gone ka moo ba tlaa yang botshwarong jaana le ba ntlha ba ba yang botshwarong, mme tlhapelo ya ba ba neng ba rapame e tlaa fetela koo." 
Amos6:8 Morena Modimo o ikanne ka ene ka esi, go bua Jehofa Modimo wa masomosomo: “Ke ila pelafalo ya ga Jakobe; ke tlhoile matlo a gagwe a dikgosi; ke gone ka moo ke tlaa neelang baba motse le tsotlhe tse di mo go one.”" 
Amos6:9 Go tlaa dirala go re, e tlaa re fa go sala banna ba le some mo ntlong e le nngwe fela, ba tlaa swa." 
Amos6:10 E tlaa re fa tsela ya motho, e bong ene yo o mo fisetsang, a mo tsaya a re, o ntsha marapo a gagwe mo ntlong, mme a raya yo o kwa tengteng ga ntlo a re: “A mongwe o sa le teng?” ene yoo a mo reye a re: “Nyaa”; foo o tlaa re: “Didimala; gonne ga re kake ra umaka leina la ga Jehofa.”" 
Amos6:11 Gonne bona, Jehofa o tle a laole, mme ntlo e kgolo e itewe ka mathubego, le ntlo e potlana ka dikgagogo." 
Amos6:12 A dipitse di ka taboga mo lefikeng? A mongwe o ka lema teng ka dikgomo? Fa e bo ne ne lo fetotse katlholo santlhokwe, le loungo lwa tshiamo lo lo fetotse longana." 
Amos6:13 Lona ba lo itumelelang selo sa bosengsepe, ba lo reng: “A ga re a inaya dinaka ka thata ya rona?”" 
Amos6:14 “Gonne bonang, ke tlaa lo tsosetsa morafe mongwe, lona ba ntlo ya Iseraele,” go bua Jehofa Modimo wa masomosomo, “mme ba tlaa lo pitlaganya go simolola ka kgoro ya Hamathe go ya kwa molatswaneng wa Araba.”" 
Amos7:1 Morena Modimo o ne a ntshupetsa jaana; mme bonang, a bopa tsie mo tshimologong ya go tlhoga ga bojang jwa morago; bonang, ya bo e le bojang jo bo tlhogileng morago kgosi e sena go sega." 
Amos7:2 Mme ga dirala ya re e sena go wetsa go ja bojang jwa lefatshe, foo ka re: “Morena Modimo ke a go rapela, o itshwarele. Jakobe o ka ema jang gonne o mmotlana?”" 
Amos7:3 Jehofa a ikwatlhaela seo a re: “Ga go ketla go dirala.” 
Amos7:4 Morena Modimo o ne a ntshupetsa jaana; bonang, Morena Modimo a bitsa gore go ganelwe ka molelo; mme wa laila bodiba jo bo boteng jo bogolo, mme o ne o rata o ka bo o laila lefatshe." 
Amos7:5 Foo ka re: “Morena Modimo, ke a go rapela khutla. Jakobe o ka ema jang gonne o mmotlana?”" 
Amos7:6 Jehofa a ikwatlhaela seo: “Le sone se, ga se ketla se dirala.” Go bua Morena Modimo." 
Amos7:7 A ntshupetsa jaana: Morena a bo a eme fa lomoteng longwe lo lo dirilweng ka selekanyo sa thokgamiso, a tshotse selekanyo sa thokgamiso mo seatleng." 
Amos7:8 Jehofa a nthaya a re: “Amose, o bonang?” Mme ka re: “Ke bona selekanyo se se thokgamisang.” Foo Morena a re: “Bona, ke tlaa baya selekanyo se se thokgamisang mo gare ga batho ba me Baiseraele; ga nketla ke tlhola ke ba feta fela gope." 
Amos7:9 Mafelo a a tlotlometseng a ga Isake a tlaa swafala, le mafelo a a boitshepo a ga Iseraele a tlaa kgakgabadiwa; mme ke tlaa tsogologela ba ntlo ya ga Jeroboame ka tšhaka.”" 
Amos7:10 Foo Amasia moperesiti wa Bethele a roma kwa go Jeroboame kgosi ya Iseraele, a re: “Amose o go rerile mo gare ga ntlo ya Iseraele, lefatshe ga le a nonofa go belega mafoko otlhe a gagwe." 
Amos7:11 Gonne Amose o bua jaana, a re: ‘Jeroboame o tlaa swa ka tšhaka, ruri Iseraele o tlaa tswa lefatsheng la ga gabo a isiwa botshwarong.’ ”" 
Amos7:12 Le ene Amasia a raya Amose a re: “Wena mmoni, tsamaya o tshabele kwa lefatsheng la Juta, mme o je dijo teng, o perofese gone;" 
Amos7:13 o se ka wa tlhola o perofesa kwa Bethele, gonne ke felo ga boitshepo ga kgosi, e bile ke ntlo ya segosi.”" 
Amos7:14 Foo Amose a fetola Amasia a mo raya, a re: “Ke ne ke se moperofeti wa sepe, le gone ke ne ke se ngwana wa moperofeti; mme ke ne ke le modisa fela, le maakanyi wa ditlhare tsa masekamore." 
Amos7:15 Jehofa a ntlosa mo go saleng letsomane morago, mme a nthaya a re: ‘Ya, o perofesetse batho ba me Baiseraele.’" 
Amos7:16 Ke gone jaana utlwa lefoko la ga Jehofa. Wa re, ke se ka ka perofesetsa ka nyatsa ntlo ya ga Iseraele, le gone ke se ka ka lotlega lefoko ka nyatsa ba ntlo ya ga Isake." 
Amos7:17 Ke gone Jehofa o bua jaana, a re: ‘Mosadi wa gago o tlaa nna seaka mo motseng, le bomorwao le bomorwadio ba tlaa wa ka tšhaka, le lefatshe la gago le tlaa kgaoganngwa ka mogala; wena ka wesi o tlaa swela mo lefatsheng lengwe le le itshekologileng, mme ruri Iseraele o tlaa ntshiwa mo lefatsheng la gagwe a isiwa botshwarong.’ ”" 
Amos8:1 Morena Modimo a ntshupetsa se: Ka bona seroto sa loungo lwa letlhabula. 
Amos8:2 Mme a re: “Amose, o bonang?” Ka re: “Ke bona seroto sa loungo lwa letlhabula.” Foo Jehofa a nthaya a re: “Bokhutlo bo tsile mo bathong ba me Baiseraele; ga nketla ke tlhola ke ba feta gope." 
Amos8:3 Dipina tsa tempela e tlaa na dipokolelo mo motlheng oo,” go bua Morena Modimo: “Ditoto di tlaa nna dintsi; gongwe le gongwe ba tlaa di latlhela kwa ntle ba tuuletse fela.”" 
Amos8:4 Utlwang se, lona ba lo ratang go kometsa batlhoki, le go tlhokafisa bahumanegi ba lefatshe, ba lo reng:" 
Amos8:5 “Go rogwa ga kgwedi go tlaa feta leng, gore re tle re rekise mabele? Le sabata, gore re tle re beye mabele mo paananeng? Ka go dira seelo sa emere se nne sennye, le šekela se nne segolo, ka go ferekana ka tsietso ka dilekanyo tsa pego tsa tsietso;" 
Amos8:6 gore re tle re reke bahumanegi ka selefera, le motlhoki ka ditlhako tse pedi, re be re rekise mapapa a mabele.”" 
Amos8:7 Jehofa o ikanne ka tlotlomalo ya ga Jakobe, a re: “Ruri ga nketla ke lebala gope ditiro dipe tsa bone." 
Amos8:8 A lefatshe ga le ketla le roromela mo, le mongwe le mongwe yo o agileng teng a sula pelo? Ee, le tlaa gogomoga lotlhe jaaka noka; le gone le tlaa rwalelesega le ba le kokobela gape, jaaka noka ya Egepeto." 
Amos8:9 Go tlaa dirala mo motlheng oo,” go bua Morena Modimo, a re: “Ke tlaa phirimisa letsatsi go le motshegare o mogolo, ke tlaa fifatsa lefatshe go le motshegare o o phepa." 
Amos8:10 Ke tlaa fetola mediro ya lona telo, le dipina tsotlhe tsa lona khutsafalo; ke tlaa baya letsela la kgetse mo dithekeng tsotlhe, le logatadima mo ditlhogong tsotlhe; ke tlaa go dira gore go nne jaaka fa go lelelwa ngwana wa mosimane yo o esi, le bokhutlo jwa gone gore e nne motlha o o galakang." 
Amos8:11 “Bonang metlha e etla,” go bua Morena Modimo: “Ke tlaa tsosa leuba mo lefatsheng, e seng leuba la dijo le fa e le lenyora la metsi, fa e se leuba la go utlwa lefoko la ga Jehofa." 
Amos8:12 Ba tlaa kailakaila ba tswe lewatleng ba ye lewatleng, ba tswe botsheka ba ye fela kwa botlhabatsatsi; ba tlaa nna ba tabogela kwa le kwa ba senka lefoko la ga Jehofa, mme ga ba ketla ba le bona." 
Amos8:13 “E tlaa re mo motlheng oo makgarebane a mantle le makau a tlaa idibadiwa ke lenyora. 
Amos8:14 Bone ba ba ikanang ka seleo sa Samaria ba re: ‘Jaaka Modimo wa gago, Dane, o tshedile’; le go re: ‘Jaaka tsela ya Beerešeba e tshedile’; le e leng bone ba tlaa wa, mme ga ba ketla ba tlhola ba tsoga.”" 
Amos9:1 Ka bona Morena a eme fa sebesong, a re: “Itaya ditlhogwana tsa dikgoro, gore direpudi di reketle, o di thubaganyetse mo ditlhogong tsa bone botlhe; mme ke tlaa bolaya ba ba setseng ka tšhaka; ga go ketla go phela ope wa bone; ga go ketla go falola ope wa bone." 
Amos9:2 Le fa ba ikepela mo Bobipong, seatla sa me se tlaa ba swatola teng; le fa ba palamela kwa legodimong, ke tlaa ba folosa teng." 
Amos9:3 Le fa ba iphitlha mo tlhoreng ya Karemele, ke tlaa putla ke ba ke ba ntsha teng, le fa ba subegetse pono ya me, ba le mo teng ga lewatle, ke tlaa laola noga teng, mme e tlaa ba loma." 
Amos9:4 Le fa ba ya botshwarong fa pele ga baba ba bone, ke tlaa laola tšhaka teng, mme e tlaa ba bolaya; ke tlaa ba tsepega matlho ka bosula, e seng ka molemo.”" 
Amos9:5 Gonne Morena, Modimo wa masomosomo ke ene yo o amang lefatshe, mme le tlhapologe, mme botlhe ba ba agileng mo go lone ba tlaa hutsafala; le tlaa gogomoga gotlhe fela jaaka noka; le tlaa ba le kokobela, jaaka noka ya Egepeto." 
Amos9:6 Ke ene yo o agang matlwana a gagwe mo legodimong, o thaetse loobo lwa gagwe lwa loapi fa fatshe; ke yo o bitsang metsi a lewatle, mme a a thele mo godimo ga lefatshe; Jehofa ke leina la gagwe." 
Amos9:7 “Mo go nna a ga lo a nna jaaka bone Baethiopia, lona bana ba Iseraele?” Go bua Jehofa. “A ga ke a ntsha Baiseraele mo lefatsheng la Egepeto, le Bafilisitia mo Kafatore, le Basiria mo Kire?" 
Amos9:8 Bonang, matlho a Morena Modimo a mo bogosing jwa boleo, mme ke tlaa bo senya ke bo tlosa mo lefatsheng; fa e se go re, ga nketla ke senyetsa ruri ba ntlo ya ga Jakobe.” Go bua Jehofa." 
Amos9:9 “Gonne bonang, ke tlaa laola, mme ke tlaa feferela ba ntlo ya Iseraele mo merafeng yotlhe, jaaka mabele a tle a feferwe, mo loselong, le fa go ntse jalo go bo go se ketla go wela fa fatshe le fa e le tlhaka e nnyennyane." 
Amos9:10 Baleofi botlhe ba batho ba me ba tlaa swa ka tšhaka, e bong ba ba reng: ‘Bosula joo ga bo ketla bo re tshwara le fa e le go re kganela.’" 
Amos9:11 “Ke tlaa re mo motlheng oo ke emise motlaagana o o oleng wa ga Dafite, ke thibe diphatlha tsa one; ke tlaa tsosolosa marope a gagwe, ke o aga jaaka mo metlheng ya bogologolo;" 
Amos9:12 gore ba rue masalela a Etome, le merafe yotlhe e e bidiwang ka leina la me.” Go bua Jehofa yo o dirang selo se:" 
Amos9:13 “Bonang, metlha e etla,” go bua Morena, “e molemi o tlaa fitlhelanang le morobi ka yone, le mogatisi wa difine go fitlhelana le yo o jalang; le dithaba di tlaa rotha bojalwa jwa mofine jo bo botshe, le makhubu otlhe a tlaa tlhapologa." 
Amos9:14 Mme ke tlaa ba ke busa botshwaro jwa batho ba me ba Iseraele, ba tlaa aga metse e e ropefetseng, ba nna mo go yone; ba tlaa tlhoma masimo a mafine, mme ba nwa bojalwa jwa mofine jwa one; le gone ba tlaa dira masimo, mme ba ja loungo lwa one." 
Amos9:15 Ke tlaa ba tlhoma mo lefatsheng la bone, mme ga ba ketla ba tlhola ba khumolwa mo lefatsheng la ga bone, le ke le ba neileng.” Go bua Morena Modimo wa gago." 
Obadiah1:1 Ponatshegelo ya ga Obadia. Go bua jaana Morena Modimo ka ga Etome; a re: “Re utlwile mafoko a a tswang mo go Jehofa, mme morongwa mongwe o romilwe mo merafeng a re: ‘Nanogang, a re nanogeng re yeng go tlhabana nae.’" 
Obadiah1:2 Bona, ke go dirile mmotlana mo merafeng, o nyatsegile thata." 
Obadiah1:3 Mabela a pelo ya gago a go tsieditse, wena yo o agileng mo dipharong tsa lefika, yo bonno jwa gago bo leng kwa godimo, yo o buang mo pelong, o re: ‘E mang yo o tlaa mpholosetsang fa fatshe?’" 
Obadiah1:4 Le fa o palamela kwa godimodimo jaaka ntswi yo motona, le fa setlhaga sa gago se ka bo se tlhomilwe mo dinaleding, ke tlaa go folosa teng,” go bua Jehofa." 
Obadiah1:5 Fa magodu a ka tla mo go wena, le fa e le dinokwane bosigo (ana o ka bo o kgaotswe jang!) a ba ne ba se ketla ba utswa go tsamaya ba kgora? Fa bahudi ba difine ba ka tla mo go wena, a ba ne ba se ketla ba sia maronopo mangwe a difine." 
Obadiah1:6 Ana dilo tsa ga Esau di hukuditswe jang! Dikhumo tsa gagwe tse di fitlhilweng di batlilwe jang! 
Obadiah1:7 Banna botlhe ba kgolagano nao ba go buledisitse, ba ya nao fela kwa molelwaneng; banna ba ba neng ba le kagiso nao ba go tsieditse, mme ba go fentse; ba ba jang dijo tsa gago ba go beela seru; ga go na tlhaloganyo epe mo go ene." 
Obadiah1:8 “A ga nketla ke senya matlhale a tloga mo Etome mo motlheng oo, le tlhaloganyo ya tswa mo thabeng ya ga Esau,” go bua Jehofa?" 
Obadiah1:9 “Le diganka tsa gago, wena Temane, di tlaa rerega, e le ka boikaelelo jwa go re, mongwe le mongwe a kgaolwe mo thabeng ya ga Esau ka polao.”" 
Obadiah1:10 “Ditlhong di tlaa go khurumetsa ka ntlha ya thubako e e diretsweng monnao Jakobe, mme o tlaa kgaolwa ka bosakhutleng." 
Obadiah1:11 E rile mo motlheng o o ne wa ema ka one kwa thoko, ka letsatsi le baeng ba ne ba gapa thoto ya gagwe ka lone, le batho ba ditšhaba ba tsena mo dikgorong tsa gagwe, mme ba thelela Jerusalema bola, le e leng wena o ne o ntse jaaka mongwe wa bone." 
Obadiah1:12 O se ka wa leba letsatsi la ga monnao mo motlheng wa tatlhego ya gagwe, o bo o se ka wa itumelela bana ba Juta mo tsatsing la tshenyego ya bone; o se ka wa bua ka pelafalo mo motlheng wa pitlagano." 
Obadiah1:13 O se ka wa tsena mo kgorong ya batho ba me mo motlheng wa tshenyegelo ya bone; ee, o se ka wa leba patikego ya bone, mo motlheng wa tshenyegelo ya bone, le gone lo se ka lwa baya diatla mo dilong tsa bone mo motlheng wa tshenyegelo ya bone." 
Obadiah1:14 Le gone o se ka wa ema fa tsela e tlolaganyang e nngwe teng, go kgaola ba gagwe ba ba falolang; o se ka wa neela baba, bone ba ba setseng, mo go ba gagwe, mo motlheng wa pitlagano." 
Obadiah1:15 “Gonne letsatsi la ga Jehofa le gaufi mo merafeng yotlhe. Jaaka o dirile, go tlaa direlwa wena jalo; tiro ya gago e tlaa boela mo tlhogong ya gago." 
Obadiah1:16 Gonne jaaka lo nole mo thabeng ya me e e boitshepo, merafe yotlhe e tlaa nwa jalo ka metlha yotlhe ee, e tlaa nwa e ba e kodumetsa, mme e tlaa nna jaaka e kete, ga e ise e be e nne gope.”" 
Obadiah1:17 “Mme mo thabeng ya Sione go tlaa nna ba ba falolang, mme e tlaa nna boitshepo; ba ntlo ya ga Jakobe ba tlaa rua dithuo tsa bone." 
Obadiah1:18 Ba ntlo ya ga Jakobe ba tlaa nna molelo, le ba ntlo ya ga Josefe ba tlaa nna kgabo, ba ntlo ya ga Esau ba tlaa nna dirite, ba tlaa fisa mo gare ga bone, ba tlaa ba laila; mme ga go ketla go nna le ope yo o tlaa salelang ntlo ya ga Esau.” Gonne Jehofa o go buile." 
Obadiah1:19 Bone ba Borwa ba tlaa rua thaba ya ga Esau; ba lefatshe la melapo ba tlaa rua Bafilisitia, ba tlaa rua naga ya Eferaime, le naga ya Samaria; le Benjamine o tlaa rua Gileate." 
Obadiah1:20 Ba botshwaro jwa lesomosomo le la bana ba Iseraele, ba ba mo gare ga Bakanana, ba tlaa rua go ya fela kwa Sarefate; mme ba botshwaro jwa Jerusalema jo bo mo Sefarate, ba tlaa rua metse ya Borwa." 
Obadiah1:21 Bagolodi ba tlaa tlhatloga mo thabeng ya Sione ba tla go sekisa thaba ya ga Esau; mme bogosi e tlaa nna jwa ga Jehofa. 
Jonah1:1 Jaana lefoko la ga Jehofa la tla kwa go Jona morwa Amitai, la re:" 
Jonah1:2 “Nanoga, o ye kwa Ninefe, motse o mogolo oo, mme o kue, o o nyatse; gonne boikepo jwa bone bo tsile fa pele ga me.”" 
Jonah1:3 Mme Jona a nanoga, a re o tshabela kwa Tarešiše a tswa mo ponong ya ga Jehofa; mme a fologela kwa Jopa, a fitlhela sekepe teng se se yang kwa Tarešiše, mme a se ntshetsa madi a tsamao, a fologela mo go sone, a re o ya nabo kwa Tarešiše, a tswa mo ponong ya ga Jehofa." 
Jonah1:4 Mme Jehofa a digela phefo e kgolo mo lewatleng, mme ga nna ledimo le legolo la phefo mo lewatleng, ga tshwana jaaka e kete sekepe se tlaa thubega." 
Jonah1:5 Foo banna ba ba tsamaisang sekepe ba boifa, mongwe le mongwe a goela kwa go modimo wa gagwe; thoto e e mo sekepeng ba e latlhela mo lewatleng, gore se tle se ba fefofalele. Mme Jona o ne a tsenye kwa tengteng ga sekepe; mme a bo a rapame, a thulametse thata." 
Jonah1:6 Jalo mong wa sekepe a ya kwa go ene, a mo raya a re: “O a reng morobadi ke wena? Tsoga o bitse Modimo wa gago, e tle e re kgotsa Modimo wa re gopola, gore re se ka ra swa.”" 
Jonah1:7 Mongwe le mongwe a raya monkana wa gagwe, a re: “Ntlo re theleng bola, gore re tle re itse gore, bosula jo, bo mo go rona ka ntlha ya ga mang.” Jalo ba thela bola, mme bola jwa kaya Jona." 
Jonah1:8 Foo ba mo raya ba re: “Re a go rapela, re bolelele tlhe, gore, bosula jo bo mo go rona ka ntlha ya ga mang; tiro ya go ke eng? O tswa kae? Lefatshe la gaeno ke kae? Le batho ba gaeno ke bomang?”" 
Jonah1:9 Mme a ba raya a re: “Ke Mohebere; mme ke boifa Jehofa, Modimo wa legodimo, yo o dirileng lewatle le lefatshe la komelelo.”" 
Jonah1:10 Foo banna bao ba boifa thata, mme ba mo raya ba re: “Ke eng se o se dirileng?” Gonne banna bao ba ne ba itse fa a tshabile a tswa mo ponong ya ga Jehofa, gonne o ne a ba boleletse." 
Jonah1:11 Foo ba mo raya ba re: “Re tlaa go dirang, gore lewatle le re sisibalele?” Gonne lewatle le ne le ya kwa pele ka go rwalelesega mo gogolo." 
Jonah1:12 Mme a ba raya a re: “Ntsayang lo ntatlhele mo lewatleng; jalo lewatle le tlaa lo sisibalela; gonne ke a itse fa ledimo le legolo le le mo go lona ka ntlha ya me.” 
Jonah1:13 Le fa go ntse jalo banna bao ba hudua sekepe ka thata, ba re ba boela kwa lefatsheng, mme ba retelelwa, gonne lewatle la ya fela kwa pele ka go rwalelesega le tlhabaganye nabo." 
Jonah1:14 Ke gone ka moo ba goelang kwa go Jehofa ba re: “Re a go rapela, Jehofa, re a go rapela, a re se swe ka ntlha ya botshelo jwa monna yo, mme o se ka wa baya mo go rona madi a a se nang molato; gonne wena Jehofa o dirile ka fa o ratileng ka teng.”" 
Jonah1:15 Mme ba tsaya Jona, ba mo latlhela mo lewatleng; mme lewatle la khutla mo go šakgaleng ga lone." 
Jonah1:16 Foo banna bao ba boifa Jehofa thata, ba isetsa Jehofa setlhabelo, mme ba dira maikano." 
Jonah1:17 Mme Jehofa a baakanya leruarua le legolo gore le tle go metsa Jona; mme Jona o ne a le mo mpeng ya leruarua ka malatsi a le mararo le masigo a le mararo. 
Jonah2:1 Foo Jona a rapela Jehofa Modimo wa gagwe, a le mo mpeng ya leruarua." 
Jonah2:2 A re: “Ka ntlha ya pitlagano ya me ka biletsa kwa go Jehofa, mme a nkaraba, ka goa ke le mo mpeng ya Bobipo, mme wa utlwa lentswe la me." 
Jonah2:3 Gonne o ne wa ntatlhela mo botenyeng, mo pelong ya mawatle, mme morwalela o ne o ntsentse gare; dintelo tsotlhe tsa gago, le makhubu a gago a metsi a ne a ntlolela godimo." 
Jonah2:4 Mme ka re: ‘Ke latlhegetse koo kwa ntle fa pele ga matlho a gago; le fa go ntse jalo ke tlaa ba ke leba kwa tempeleng ya gago e e boitshepo.’ 
Jonah2:5 Metsi a ne a mpharafere, go ya go fitlha le kwa moweng; boteng bo ne bo le tikologong ya me; malele a ne a ntharile tlhogo." 
Jonah2:6 Ka fologela kwa metheong ya dithaba; lefatshe ka mephakalego ya lone la ntswalegela ka bosakhutleng; le fa go ntse jalo o ntshitse botshelo jwa me mo moleteng, wena Jehofa Modimo wa me." 
Jonah2:7 E rile mowa wa me o idibala mo teng ga me, ka gakologelwa Jehofa; morapelo wa me wa ya go tsena kwa go wena, mo tempeleng ya gago e e boitshepo." 
Jonah2:8 Ba ba tlhokomelang maithamako a maaka ba tlogela boutlwelobotlhoko jwa bone ka bosi. 
Jonah2:9 Mme nna ke tlaa go isetsa setlhabelo ka lentswe la tebogo; ke tlaa lefa se ke se ikanneng. Poloka ke ya ga Jehofa.” 
Jonah2:10 Mme Jehofa a bua le leruarua, mme la tlhatsetsa Jona mo lefatsheng la komelelo." 
Jonah3:1 Lefoko la ga Jehofa la tla kwa go Jona lwa bobedi, la re:" 
Jonah3:2 “Nanoga, o ye kwa Ninefe motse oo o mogolo, mme o o rerele thero e ke tlaa e go laolelang.”" 
Jonah3:3 Jalo Jona a nanoga, a ya kwa Ninefe, ka fa lefokong la ga Jehofa. Ninefe ya bo e le motse o mogolo thata, o o ka ralalwang ka loeto lwa malatsi a le mararo." 
Jonah3:4 Mme Jona a simolola go tsena motse loeto lwa letsatsi le le lengwe fela, mme a kua, a re: “Go sa le malatsi a le 40, Ninefe o tlaa ribegediwa.”" 
Jonah3:5 Mme batho ba Ninefe ba dumela Modimo; mme ba laola gore go ikidiwe dijo; ba apara letsela la kgetse go simolola ka yo mogolo mo go bone, go ya fela kwa go yo mmotlana mo go bone." 
Jonah3:6 Mafoko ao a ya a fitlha kwa kgosing ya Ninefe, mme ya nanoga mo setulong sa yone sa bogosi, ya apola kobo ya yone e tona, ya apara letsela la kgetse, ya dula mo moloreng." 
Jonah3:7 Ya opa mokgosi, ya kua mo motseng otlhe wa Ninefe ka taolo ya kgosi le ya bagolwane ba yone, go twe: “A go se nne motho ope yo o isang sepe mo ganong, le fa e le setshedi sa matlhape, le fa e le sa letsomane; a di se hule le fa e le go nwa metsi." 
Jonah3:8 A go ikhurumediwe ka letsela la kgetse, motho le setshedi, mme go goelediwe Modimo ka thata, ee, a mongwe le mongwe a sokologe mo tseleng ya gagwe e e bosula, le mo thubakong e e mo diatleng tsa bone." 
Jonah3:9 E mang yo o itseng gore, a Modimo ga o ketla o sokologa o ikwatlhaya, o boa mo bogaleng jwa one jo bo gaketseng, gore re se ka ra swa?”" 
Jonah3:10 Mme Modimo wa bona ditiro tsa bone, gore ba sokologile mo tseleng ya bone e e bosula; mme Modimo wa ikwatlhaela bosula jo o rileng o tlaa bo ba direla; wa se ka wa bo dira." 
Jonah4:1 Mme ga itumolola Jona thata, a nna bogale thata." 
Jonah4:2 A rapela Jehofa a re: “Ke a go rapela Jehofa, a e ne e se lone lefoko la me, ke sa ntse ke le kwa lefatsheng la gaetsho? Ke gone ka moo ke akofileng ka tshabela kwa Tarešiše; gonne ke ne ke itse fa o le Modimo o o pelonomi, o o tletseng bopelotlhomogi, o le bonya go galefa, o tletse boutlwelobotlhoko, o tle o ikwatlhaele bosula." 
Jonah4:3 Ke gone Jehofa, ke a go rapela, ka re, o tle o mpolaye, gonne mo go nna go molemo go swa bogolo go go tshela.”" 
Jonah4:4 Mme Jehofa a re: “A o dira sentle fa o nna bogale?” 
Jonah4:5 Foo Jona a tswela kwa ntle ga motse, a dula a potile motse ntlheng ya botlhabatsatsi, mme a itirela motlaagana teng, a dula fa tlase ga one mo moriting, go tla a bona se se tlaa dirafalelang motse." 
Jonah4:6 Jehofa Modimo a baakanya menamo ya segwana, a e tlhogisetsa go okama Jona, gore e nne moriti tlhogong ya gagwe, go mo fomodisa mo pitlaganong ya gagwe e e bosula. Jalo Jona a itumela thata ka ga menamo ya segwana." 
Jonah4:7 Mme ya re bosigo boo sa ka moso, Jehofa a baakanya seboko, sa fetlha menamo ya segwana, mme ya swaba." 
Jonah4:8 Ga dirala ya re letsasi le tlhatloga, Modimo wa baakanya phefo ya botlhabatsatsi e e molelo; letsatsi la thothomela mo tlhogong ya ga Jona, a ba a idibala, mme a itopela gore a swe, a re: “Go molemo mo go nna go swa bogolo go go tshela.”" 
Jonah4:9 Modimo wa raya Jona wa re: “A o dira sentle go nna bogale ka ga menamo ya segwana?” Mme a re: “Ke dira sentle go nna bogale go ya fela mo losong.” 
Jonah4:10 Jehofa a re: “O tlhomogetse menamo ya segwana pelo, o o se kang wa fufula ka ga one, le o o se kang wa o tlhogisa; o o tlhogileng mo bosigong bo le bongwe fela, wa ba wa swa mo bosigong bo le bongwe fela." 
Jonah4:11 A le nna ga ke a tshwanela go utlwela Ninefe botlhoko, motse o mogolo oo, o o nang le batho ba ba fetang 120 000, ba ba sa farologanyeng seatla se segolo le sa molema; le bontsi jwa dikgomo?”" 
Micah1:1 Lefoko la ga Jehofa le le tsileng mo go Mika wa Morašete, mo metlheng ya ga Jothame, Ahase, le Hesekia, dikgosi tsa Juta, e le lefoko le o le bonyeng ka ga Samaria le Jerusalema." 
Micah1:2 Utlwang lona ditšhaba lotlhe fela; a o ke o reetse, wena lefatshe, tsotlhe tse di mo go lone; mme lo mme Morena Modimo a nne mosupi ka ga lona, Morena a le mo tempeleng ya gagwe e e boitshepo." 
Micah1:3 Gonne bonang, Jehofa o tswa mo felong ga gagwe, mme o tlaa fologa, o tlaa gata mafelo a a godimo a lefatshe." 
Micah1:4 Dithaba di tlaa tlhapolosiwa fa tlase ga gagwe, le melapo e tlaa tsetseregana, jaaka makgafa fa pele ga molelo, jaaka metsi a a thelegang ka fa maphothophothong." 
Micah1:5 Tsotlhe tse ke ka ntlha ya tlolo ya ga Jakobe, le ka ntlha ya maleo a ba ntlo ya Iseraele. Tlolo ya ga Jakobe ke eng? A ga se Samaria? Mafelo a a tlotlometseng a ga Juta ke afe? A ga se Jerusalema?" 
Micah1:6 Ke gone ka moo ke tlaa dirang Samaria go nna jaaka mokoa mo nageng, le jaaka matlhomelo a tshimo ya mafine, maje a one ke tlaa a goromeletsa mo molapong, ke senola metheo ya one." 
Micah1:7 Le ditshwantsho tsotlhe tsa gagwe tse di setilweng di tlaa thubaganngwa, le dituelo tsotlhe tsa gagwe di tlaa fisiwa ka molelo, le medimo ya gagwe ya disetwa, ke tlaa di swafatsa tsotlhe fela; gonne o di phuthile ka tuelo ya seaka, mme di tlaa boela mo tuelong ya seaka." 
Micah1:8 Ke tlaa thomeletsa ke bokolela ka ntlha ya moo, ke tlaa tsamaya fela ke itšhaile ke le loforotlho fela; ke tlaa thomeletsa ka selelo jaaka bophokoje, ke khutsa jaaka bontšhe." 
Micah1:9 Gonne dintho tsa gagwe ke tse di sa kakeng tsa fodisiwa, gonne go fitlhile le mo Juta; go fitlhile kwa kgorong ya batho ba me, e bong kwa Jerusalema." 
Micah1:10 Lo se ka lwa go bolela mo Gathe, lo se ka lwa lela gope; kwa Bethe-leafera ke ipidikamisitse mo loroleng." 
Micah1:11 Fetang lo yeng koo, wena monni wa Shafire, ka loforotlho le ka ditlhong; monni wa Saanane ga a a tswa; thomeletso ya Betheesele e tlaa lo tlosetsa boemo jwa gone." 
Micah1:12 Gonne monni wa Marothe o lebeletse molemo ka khidiego; gonne bosula bo fologile kwa go Jehofa bo tsile kgorong ya Jerusalema. 
Micah1:13 Wena monni wa Lakiše, a ko o golegele kara mo pitseng e e fadimang; e ne e le ene tshimologo ya boleo mo go morwadia Sione; gonne ditlolo tsa Baiseraele di fitlhetswe mo go wena." 
Micah1:14 Ke gone ka moo o tlaa naya Morešethe-gathe neo ya kgaogano ya lotlhokwa; matlo a ga Akesibe a tlaa nna selo se se tsietsang mo dikgosing tsa Iseraele. 
Micah1:15 Wena monni wa Marešo, ke tlaa nama ke lere mo go wena ene yo o tlaa go ruang; kgalalelo ya Iseraele e tlaa fitlha fela le kwa Adulame." 
Micah1:16 Itsue tlhogo, mme o itšhemole ka ga bana ba natefelo ya gago; atlhamolosa tsuego ya gago jaaka ya lenong; gonne ba dule mo go wena ba ile botshwarong." 
Micah2:1 A bo go latlhega ba ba akanyetsang boikepo, le ba ba dirang bosula ba le mo malaong a bone! E tle e re bosa bo sele ba bo dire, ka go le mo thateng ya seatla sa bone." 
Micah2:2 Ba eletsa matlhagare, ba a tseye fela; le matlo, mme ba a tlose; ba patike monna le ba ntlo ya gagwe, e bong monna le boswa jwa gagwe." 
Micah2:3 Ke gone ka moo, go bua jaana Jehofa a re: “Bonang, ke akanyetsa losika lo bosula bongwe, jo lo se ketlang lo itshomola dithamo tsa lona mo go jone, le gone ga lo ketla lo sepela lo gwanta; ka e tlaa bo e le motlha o o bosula.”" 
Micah2:4 E tlaa re ka tsatsi leo ba tlaa lo tlhabeleletsa setshwantsho, ba hutsafala ka selelo se se khutsang, ba re: “Re gapeletswe ruri; o fetola kabelo ya batho ba me; o e tlosa jang mo go nna! O abela batsuolodi matlhagare a rona.”" 
Micah2:5 Ke gone ka mo o se ketlang o dira le ope yo o namalatsang lodi go lekanya matlhagare mo phuthegong ya ga Jehofa. 
Micah2:6 “Lo se ka lwa perofesa,” go tlhola go bua bone. “Ga ba ketla ba perofesetsa tsone tse; dikgobo ga di ketla di tloga.”" 
Micah2:7 Wena ntlo ya ga Jakobe, a go tlaa buiwa, go twe: “A mowa wa Morena o pitlaganye? Ditiro tse a ke tsa gagwe? Mafoko a me a ga a dire molemo mo go yo o sepelang ka thokgamo?”" 
Micah2:8 “Mo metlheng eno ya morago batho ba me ba tsogile jaaka mmaba, lo rutla kobo mo seaparong mo go bone ba ba fetang ba iketlile jaaka batho ba ba ganang ntwa." 
Micah2:9 Basadi ba batho ba me lo ba leleka mo matlong a mantle a bone; lo tlosetsa ruri kgalalelo ya me mo banyaneng ba bone. 
Micah2:10 Nanogang, lo tsamaye; gonne fa ga se felo ga boikhutso jwa lona; ka ntlha ya bomaswe jo bo senyang, e bong ka tshenyo e e botlhoko." 
Micah2:11 “Fa monna yo o sepelang ka mowa wa tsietso a aka, a re: ‘Ke tlaa go perofesetsa ka ga bojalwa jwa mofine le ka ga bojalwa jo bo loileng;’ e bo e le ene yo o tlaa nnang moperofeti wa batho ba." 
Micah2:12 “Wena Jakobe, ruri ke tlaa go phutha gotlhe fela; ruri ke tlaa phutha masalela a Iseraele, ke tlaa ba baya mmogo jaaka dinku tsa Bosera, jaaka letsomane mo gare ga bohulo jwa lone, ba tlaa tsosa modumo o mogolo ka ntlha ya bontsi jwa batho.”" 
Micah2:13 Mothobi o ba eteletse pele; ba thobile, ba fetetse kwa kgorong, ba dule ka yone; mme kgosi e ba eteletse pele, le Jehofa o kwa tlhogong ya bone." 
Micah3:1 Ke rile: Ke a lo rapela, utlwang lona ditlhogo tsa ba Jakobe, le balaodi ba ntlo ya Iseraele. A ga se tiro ya lona go itse katlholo?" 
Micah3:2 Ba lo ilang molemo, lo rata bosula; ba lo ba khumolotseng letlalo le nama mo marapong a bone;" 
Micah3:3 ba ba bileng ba ja nama ya batho ba me, mme ba ba tswatolotsa letlalo, ba ba roba marapo; ee, ba ba remaganya, jaaka e kete go tsenngwa mo pitseng, le jaaka nama e e mo teng ga pitsa e tona." 
Micah3:4 Foo ba tlaa goela kwa go Jehofa, mme ga a ketla a ba araba; ee, o tlaa ba subela sefatlhogo sa gagwe mo motlheng oo, ka fa ba dirileng bosula ka teng mo ditirong tsa bone." 
Micah3:5 Jehofa o bua jaana ka ga baperofeti ba ba timetsang batho ba me; ba ba lomang ka meno mme ba kue, ba re: “Kagiso,” mme yo o sa tsenyeng sepe mo ganong la bone, ba mmaakanyetse ntwa fela;" 
Micah3:6 ke gone ka moo go tlaa nnang bosigo mo go lona, gore lo se ka lwa nna le ponatshegelo; go tlaa nna lefifi go lona, gore lo se ka lwa dira boitseanape; letsatsi le tlaa phirimela baperofeti, le motshegare o tlaa nna montsho fela mo godimo ga bone." 
Micah3:7 Baboni ba tlaa tlhajwa ke ditlhong, le baitseanape ba tlaa silofala. Ee, ba tlaa ipipa melomo botlhe, gonne go se na karabo epe ya Modimo." 
Micah3:8 Mme nna, ruri, ke tletse nonofo ka mowa wa ga Jehofa, le katlholo, le bonatla, go kakanyetsa Jakobe tlolo ya gagwe, le Iseraele boleo jwa gagwe." 
Micah3:9 Ke a lo rapela, lo utlwe se, lona ditlhogo tsa ba ntlo ya ga Jakobe, le lona balaodi ba ntlo ya Iseraele, ba lo tlhoang katlholo, lo sokamisa tekatekanyo." 
Micah3:10 Ba aga Sione ka madi a batho, le Jerusalema ka tshiamololo." 
Micah3:11 Ditlhogo tsa bone di atlhola ka tuelo, baperesiti ba bone ba ruta ka go thapiwa ka tuelo, le baperofeti ba bone ba bua boitseanape ka madi, le fa go ntse jalo ba tle ba ikaege Jehofa ba re: “A Jehofa ga a mo gare ga rona? Ga go bosula bope jo bo tlaa tlang mo go rona.”" 
Micah3:12 Ke gone Sione o tlaa lengwang jaaka lotlhagare ka ntlha ya lona, Jerusalema o tlaa nna mekoakoa fela, le thaba ya ntlo e tlaa nna jaaka mafelo a a goletseng godimo a sekgwa." 
Micah4:1 Mo metlheng ya morago go tlaa dirala go re, thaba ya ntlo ya ga Jehofa e tlaa tlhomamisiwa mo tlhoreng tsa dithaba, e tlaa golediwa mo godimo ga makhubu; mme ditšhaba di tlaa sailela kwa go yone." 
Micah4:2 Merafe e le mentsi e tlaa fitlha, e re: “Ntlong, a re tlhatlogeleng kwa thabeng ya ga Jehofa le kwa ntlong ya Modimo wa ga Jakobe; o tlaa re ruta ditsela tsa one, mme re tlaa sepela mo ditselaneng tsa one; gonne molao o tlaa tswa mo Sione, le lefoko la ga Jehofa mo Jerusalema.”" 
Micah4:3 O tlaa atlhola fa gare ga ditšhaba di le dintsi, o tlaa kgalemela merafe e e thata e e kwa kgakala; mme ba tlaa thula ditšhaka tsa bone megoma, le marumo a bone dithipa tse di segang mabele; morafe ga o ketla o ekela morafe o mongwe tšhaka, le gone ga ba ketla ba tlhola ba ithuta ntwa gope." 
Micah4:4 Mongwe le mongwe wa bone o tlaa dula fa tlase ga mofine wa gagwe, le fa tlase ga mofeige wa gagwe; ope ga a ketla a ba boifisa; gonne molomo wa ga Jehofa wa masomosomo o se buile." 
Micah4:5 Gonne batho ba ditšhaba tsotlhe ba tlaa sepela, mongwe le mongwe ka leina la modimo wa gagwe, mme rona re tlaa sepela ka leina la ga Jehofa Modimo wa rona, ka bosakhutleng le ka bosaengkae." 
Micah4:6 “E tlaa re mo motlheng oo,” go bua Jehofa: “Ke tlaa kokoanya ene yo o tlhotsang, ke phutha ene yo o lelekilweng, le ene yo ke mo patikileng." 
Micah4:7 Ene yo o ne a tlhotsa ke tlaa mo dira masalela, le ene yo o ne a latlhetswe kwa kgakala ke tlaa mo dira morafe o o thata; Jehofa o tlaa ba busa mo thabeng ya Sione go tloga fano le go ya bosakhutleng." 
Micah4:8 Wena kago e e goletseng godimo ya letsomane, lekhubu la morwadia Sione, go tlaa tla mo go wena; ee, mmuso wa pele o tlaa tla, bogosi jwa morwadia Jerusalema.”" 
Micah4:9 Ana o kuelelang godimo? A ga go na kgosi mo go wena, ee, a mogakolodi wa gago o sule, fa e bo ne ne metlotsedi e go tshwere jaana jaaka ekete ya mosadi yo o mo pelegong?" 
Micah4:10 O nne botlhoko, mme o leke go belega, wena morwadia Sione, jaaka mosadi yo o mo pelegong; gonne jaanong o tlaa tswa mo motseng o aga mo nageng, o tlaa fitlha le kwa Babilone; o tlaa falodisiwa teng koo; Jehofa o tlaa go rekolola teng mo seatleng sa baba ba gago." 
Micah4:11 Jaana merafe e le mentsi e go phuthegetse, e e reng: “A a leswefadiwe, mme a leitlho la rona le bone keletso ya lone mo Sione.”" 
Micah4:12 Mme ga ba itse megopolo ya ga Jehofa, le gone ga ba tlhaloganye kgakololo ya gagwe; gonne o ba kokoanyeditse mo seboping jaaka dingata tsa mabele." 
Micah4:13 “Nanoga, o phothe, wena morwadia Sione, gonne ke tlaa dira lonaka lwa gago tshipi, le ditlhako tsa gago kgotlho, mme o tlaa thubaganya ditšhaba di le dintsi;” mme tlhwatlhwa ya bone o tlaa e naya Jehofa, le thoto ya bone o tlaa e naya Jehofa wa lefatshe lotlhe." 
Micah5:1 Jaanong o tlaa iphutha, o nna ditlhopha, wena morwadia ditlhopha; o re tlhasetse, ba tlaa kanya kgosi ya Iseraele mo lesameng ka thupa." 
Micah5:2 “Wena Bethelehema Eferatha, yo o leng mmotlana mo go makgolokgolo a Juta, mo go wena go tlaa ntswela mongwe yo o tlaa nnang molaodi mo Iseraele; yo matso a gagwe a sa leng a nna a bogologolo, e bong ka go se nang tshimologo.”" 
Micah5:3 Ke gone ka moo o tlaa ba tlhobogang, ene yo o mo metlotseding a ba a tla a belega; foo makunantshane a bana ba ga rraagwe a tlaa boela kwa baneng ba Iseraele." 
Micah5:4 O tlaa ema, mme o tlaa fudisa letsomane la gagwe ka thata ya ga Jehofa, ka tlotlomalo ya leina la ga Jehofa Modimo wa gagwe; mme ba tlaa nna; gonne jaanong o tlaa nna mogolo le go ya dikhutlong tsa lefatshe." 
Micah5:5 Mme monna yoo e tlaa nna ene kagiso ya rona. Mogang Moasiria o tlang mo lefatsheng la rona, le mogang o gatang mo matlong a rona a dikgosi, foo re tlaa mo tsosetsa badisa basupa, le banna ba bagolwane ba ba ferang e le mabedi." 
Micah5:6 Mme ba tlaa lakaila lefatshe la Asiria ka tšhaka, le lefatshe la Nimerote mo dikgorong tsa lone; mme o tlaa re golola mo Moasirieng, mogang o tlang mo lefatsheng la rona, le mogang o gatang mo teng ga molelwane wa rona." 
Micah5:7 Le masalela a ga Jakobe a tlaa nna mo gare ga ditšhaba di le dintsi, jaaka monyo o o tswang kwa go Jehofa, jaaka medupe mo bojannyeng; e e sa diegeleng motho, le fa e le go leta bana ba batho." 
Micah5:8 Maselela a ga Jakobe a tlaa nna mo merafeng, mo gare ga ditšhaba di le dintsi, jaaka tau mo gare ga diphologolo tsa sekgwa, jaaka tawana mo matsomaneng a dinku, e e a reng e ralala e be e gatake, e gagole, mme go bo go se na ope yo o gololang." 
Micah5:9 A seatla sa gago se tsholelediwe godimo ga baba ba gago, mme a baba botlhe ba gago ba kgaolwe." 
Micah5:10 “Go tlaa dirala mo motlheng oo,” go bua Jehofa, “go re ke tlaa kgaola dipitse tsa gago di tswa mo gare ga gago, ke ba ke senya dikara tsa gago." 
Micah5:11 Ke tlaa kgaola metse ya lefatshe la gago, ke tlaa rutla dikago tsotlhe tsa gago tsa phemelo tse di thata." 
Micah5:12 Ke tlaa kgaola ke tlosa boloi mo seatleng sa gago; mme ga o ketla o tlhola o dira le baswabi ba ditiro. 
Micah5:13 Ke tlaa kgaola ke tlosa ditshwantsho tsa gago tse di setilweng, le maje a a emeng motloutlo a gago mo gare ga gago; mme ga o ketla o tlhola o obamela tiro ya diatla tsa gago." 
Micah5:14 Ke tlaa khumola ke tlosa Medimako ya gago mo gare ga gago, ke tlaa senya metse ya gago." 
Micah5:15 Ke tlaa dirafatsa pusoloso ka bogale le mo merafeng e e se kang ya reetsa.” 
Micah6:1 Utlwang jaana se Jehofa o se buang; “Nanoga, o ganele fa pele ga dithaba, mme a makhubu a utlwe lentswe la gago." 
Micah6:2 Utlwang, lona dithaba kgang ya ga Jehofa, le lona metheo ya lefatshe e e sa onaleng; gonne Jehofa o na le kgang le batho ba gagwe, mme o rata go ganetsanya le Iseraele." 
Micah6:3 Ao, lona batho ba me, ke lo dirileng? ke lo lapisitse ka eng? Supang ka ga me." 
Micah6:4 Gonne ke lo ntshitse kwa lefatsheng la Egepeto, ka lo rekolola mo ntlong ya botlhanka; ka roma Moše fa pele ga lona, le Arone, le Miriame." 
Micah6:5 Ao, lona batho ba me, a ko lo gakologelwe jaana se Balake kgosi ya Moabe o ne a se gopotse, le ka fa Balaame morwa Beore o ne a mo fetola ka teng; lo gakologelwe go tswa Shitime go ya Gilegale, gore lo itse ditiro tse di siameng tsa ga Jehofa.”" 
Micah6:6 Ke tlaa ya fa pele ga Jehofa ka eng, ke ikoba fa pele ga Modimo wa Bogodimo? A ke tlaa ya fa pele ga one ka ditshupelo tse di fisiwang, ka dinamane tse di ngwaga o le mongwe fela?" 
Micah6:7 A Jehofa o tlaa itumelela dikete tsa diphelefu, kgotsa dinoka tsa lookwane di le dikete di le some? A ke tlaa ntshetsa tlolo ya me ngwana wa me yo mogolo, loungo lwa mmele wa me ka ga boleo jwa mowa wa me?" 
Micah6:8 O go supeditse se se molemo motho ke wena; gape Jehofa o lopang mo go wena, fa e se gore o dire ka tshiamo, le go rata boutlwelobotlhoko, le go sepela ka boikokobetso le Modimo wa gago?" 
Micah6:9 Lentswe la ga Jehofa le biletsa kwa motseng, mme motho yo o botlhale o tlaa boifa leina la gago. “Reetsang thupa le ene yo o e laotseng." 
Micah6:10 A go sa ntse go na le dikhumo tsa tshiamololo mo ntlong ya basiamolodi, le selekanyo se se tlhaelang, se se tlhoesegileng?" 
Micah6:11 A ke tlaa bo ke itshekile ke na le selekanyo sa pego sa tshiamololo, le kgetse ya makete a dilekanyo tsa bokete tsa tsietso?" 
Micah6:12 Gonne bahumi ba teng ba tletse thubakanyo, le banni ba teng ba buile maaka, le loleme lwa bone lo tsietso fela mo molomong wa bone." 
Micah6:13 Ke gone ka moo le nna ke go iteileng ka ntho e e botlhoko; ke go swafaditse ka ntlha ya maleo a gago. 
Micah6:14 O tlaa ja, mme ga o ketla o kgora; mme lolea lwa gago lo tlaa nna mo gare ga gago; mme o tlaa huduga, mme ga o ketla o rora sentle, le se o se rorang ke tlaa se neela tšhaka." 
Micah6:15 O tlaa jala mme ga o ketla o roba; o tlaa gata ditlhware, mme ga o ketla o tlola lookwane; o tlaa gata difine, mme ga o ketla o nwa bojalwa."
