Micah6:16 Gonne ditao tsa ga Omeri di a tshegediwa, le ditiro tsotlhe tsa ntlo ya ga Ahabe; lo bile lo sepela mo dikgakololong tsa bone, gore ke tle ke go dire tshwafalo, le banni ba gone kotso; mme lo tlaa belega kgobo ya batho ba me.”" 
Micah7:1 A motlho wa mogolo nna! Gonne ke ntse jaaka fa ba sena go phutha maungo a selemo, jaaka maronopo a difine; ga go na lerose le le ka jewang, mowa wa me o eletsa feige ya lebutswapele." 
Micah7:2 Motho yo o moetsa Modimo o fedile o dule mo lefatsheng, ga go na ope yo o thokgameng mo bathong; botlhe fela ba lalela madi go a tsholola; mongwe le mongwe o tsoma ngwana a rraagwe ka lotloa." 
Micah7:3 Diatla tsa bone di mo go sone se se bosula go se dira ka tlhoafalo; kgosana e tle e lope, le moatlhodi o ba a iketleeditse go atlhola ka tuelo; le motho yo mogolo o bua bosenyi jo bo mo moeng wa gagwe, ba bo loga jalo mmogo." 
Micah7:4 Le yo o molemo bogolo mo go bone o ntse jaaka mongana; yo o thokgameng bogolo o gaisa logora lwa mitlwa ka bosula; motlha wa balebedi ba gago, e bong wa kgophololo ya gago, o tsile; jaanong ke gone go tlaa nnang kakabalo ya bone." 
Micah7:5 Lo se ka lwa ikanya tsala, lo se ka lwa ikanya mogogi; o dibele mejako ya molomo wa gago mo go ene mosadi yo o robalang mo sefubeng sa gago." 
Micah7:6 Gonne ngwana wa mosimane o tlotlolola rraagwe, ngwana wa mosetsana o tsogologela mmaagwe, le ngwetsi o tsogologela matsalaagwe, mme baba ba monna e be e le batho ba ntlo ya gagwe." 
Micah7:7 Mme ka ga, me, ke tlaa leba kwa go Jehofa; ke tla lebelela. Modimo wa poloko ya me; Modimo wa me o tlaa nkutlwa." 
Micah7:8 O se ka wa itumela ka ga me, wena mmaba wa me; mogang ke wang, ke tlaa tsoga; mogang ke dulang mo lefifing, Jehofa o tlaa nna lesedi mo go nna." 
Micah7:9 Ke tlaa belega kgakalo ya ga Jehofa ka ke mo leofetse, go tsamaya a ganelela mafoko a me, mme a ntirela tshiamiso. O tlaa nntshetsa mo leseding mme ke tlaa bona tshiamo ya gagwe." 
Micah7:10 Foo mmaba wa me o tlaa go bona, mme ditlhong di tlaa mo khurumetsa yo o ntheileng a re: “Jehofa Modimo wa gago o kae?” Matlho a me a tlaa mmona; jaanong o tlaa gatakwa jaaka seretse sa mebila." 
Micah7:11 A motlha wa go aga dithako tsa gago! Mo motlheng oo molelwane o tlaa katosediwa kgakala. 
Micah7:12 Mo motlheng oo ba tlaa tla mo go wena, ba tswa Asiria le kwa metseng ya Egepeto, go tswa Egepeto go ya fela kwa Nokeng, le go tswa lewatleng, go ya lewatleng le lengwe, le go tswa thabeng go ya thabeng e nngwe." 
Micah7:13 Le fa go ntse jalo lefatshe le tlaa nna tshwafalo ka ntlha ya ba ba agileng mo go lone, ka ntlha ya loungo lwa ditiro tsa bone." 
Micah7:14 Fudisa batho ba gago ka kgoge ya gago, letsomane la boswa jwa gago ba ba agileng ba le bosi, mo sekgweng mo gare ga Karemele: a ba hule mo Bašane le Gileate, jaaka mo metlheng ya bogologolo." 
Micah7:15 “Jaaka mo metlheng ya go tswa ga gago kwa lefatsheng la Egepeto, ke tlaa mo supetsa dilo tse di gakgamatsang.”" 
Micah7:16 Merafe e tlaa bona e ba e tlhajwa ke ditlhong ka thata yotlhe ya bone; ba tlaa ipaya seatla mo molomong, ditsebe tsa bone di tlaa kabala." 
Micah7:17 Ba tlaa latswa lorole jaaka noga, jaaka dilo tse di gagabang tsa lefatshe, ba tlaa tswa ba roroma mo mafelong a bone a dikutla; ba tlaa tla mo go Jehofa Modimo wa rona ka poifo, mme ba tlaa boifa ka ntlha ya gago." 
Micah7:18 Ana Modimo o o tshwanang nao ke ofe, o o itshwarelang boikepo, o iphapaanye le tlolo ya masalela a boswa ja one? Ga o tshegetse bogale jwa one ka bosakhutleng, ka o rata boutlwelobotlhoko." 
Micah7:19 O tlaa ba o retologa, o tlaa re tlhomogela pelo; o tlaa gata maikepo a rona ka dinao. O tlaa latlhela maleo otlhe a bone mo botennyeng jwa lewatle." 
Micah7:20 O tlaa tlhomamisetsa Jakobe boammaaruri, le Aberahame boutlwelobotlhoko, jo o bo ikanetseng borraetsho mo metlheng ya bogologolo." 
Nahum1:1 Molaetso ka ga Ninefe. Lokwalo lwa ponatshegelo ya ga Nahume wa Moelekoše. 
Nahum1:2 Jehofa ke Modimo o o lefufa, mme o a busolosa; Jehofa o a busolosa, mme o tletse bogale; Jehofa o ipusolosetsa baganetsi ba gagwe, o bolokela baba ba gagwe bogale." 
Nahum1:3 Jehofa o bonya go galefa, o mogolo mo nonofong, mme ga a ketla a atlholela yo o molato gope; Jehofa o na le tsela ya gagwe mo setsuatsueng le mo ledimong, mme maru ke lorole lwa dinao tsa gagwe." 
Nahum1:4 O tle a kgalemele lewatle, a le tšhese, mme a kgadise dinoka tsotlhe; Bašana a topetege le Karemela, le sethunya sa Lebanone se topetege." 
Nahum1:5 Dithaba di a mo tlakaselela, le makhubu a tlhapologe, lefatshe le gogomoge fa pele ga gagwe, ee, lobopo le tsotlhe tse di agileng mo go lone." 
Nahum1:6 E mang yo o ka emang fa pele ga kgakalo ya gagwe? E mang yo o ka nnang mo tšhakgalong ya bogale jwa gagwe? Tšhakgalo ya gagwe e goromediwa jaaka molelo, le mafika a phatlakanngwe ke ene." 
Nahum1:7 Jehofa o molemo, ke kago e e thata ya phemelo mo motlheng wa tlalelo; mme o itse ba ba mo ikanyang." 
Nahum1:8 O tlaa fedisetsa ruri felo ga one motse ka morwalela o o penologang, baba ba gagwe o tlaa ba konatelela mo lefifing." 
Nahum1:9 Ana lo tlhatlhanya eng ka ga Jehofa? O tlaa fedisetsa ruri; patikego ga e ketla e tsoga lwa bobedi. 
Nahum1:10 Gonne le fa ba ntse jaaka mitlwa e e nganaganyeng, le fa ekete ba itlopetse ka go nwa ga bone, ba tlaa lailelwa ruri jaaka dirite tse di omeletseng." 
Nahum1:11 Go dule mongwe mo go wena yo o tlhatlhanyang bosula ka ga Jehofa, yo o gakololang boikepo." 
Nahum1:12 Go bua jaana Jehofa, a re: “Le fa ba tletse nonofo, ba bile ba le bantsi, ba tlaa rengwa fela jalo, mme o tlaa fetela koo. Le fa ke go patikile ga nketla ke tlhola ke go patika." 
Nahum1:13 Jaana ke tlaa roba jokwe ya gagwe ke e tlosa mo go wena, ke tlaa komoganya dikgolego tse di go golegileng.”" 
Nahum1:14 Jehofa o ntshitse taolo ka ga gago, gore go se tlhole go jalwa ga leina la gago: “Ke tlaa kgaola ke tlosa mo ntlong ya medimo ya gago setshwantsho se se setilweng, le setshwantsho se se thetsweng; ke tlaa go direla phupu, gonne o maswe thata.”" 
Nahum1:15 Bonang, mo dithabeng go tla dinao tsa yo o tlang le mafoko a a molemo, yo o bolelang kagiso! Tshegetsa mediro ya gago wena Juta, o tlhomamise maikano a gago, gonne motho wa boikepo ga a ketla a tlhola a go ralala; o kgaoletswe ruri." 
Nahum2:1 Yo o phatlakanyang o tsile fa pele ga sefatlhogo sa gago; disa kago ya gago ya phemelo, lebela tsela, o ithatafatse lotheka, o thatafatse nonofo ya gago segolo." 
Nahum2:2 Gonne Jehofa o bile o busetsa Jakobe tlotlomalo jaaka tlotlomalo ya ga Iseraele; gonne batsholodi ba ba tsholotse, ba sentse dikala tsa bone tsa mafine." 
Nahum2:3 Thebe ya diganka tsa gagwe e hubiditswe, banna ba ba dinatla ba gagwe ba apere bohibidu jo bo letlhololo; dikara di šadiega ka tshipi ya setale mo motlheng wa ipaakanyo ya gagwe, le marumo a otwa mo go boitshegang." 
Nahum2:4 Dikara di taboga ka mokgwaso mo mebileng, di thulana mo ditseleng tsa meheru; ponalo ya tsone e ntse jaaka ditime, di taboga jaaka dikgadima." 
Nahum2:5 O gakologelwa ba gagwe ba ba itsegeng; ba kgokgoetsega mo go tsamaeleng gongwe ga bone; ba itlhaganelela lorako lwa one, mme sesiro sa phemelo se baakantswe." 
Nahum2:6 Dikgoro tsa noka di budilwe, ntlo ya kgosi e rutlologile." 
Nahum2:7 Husabe o bipolotswe, wa tlosiwa, malata a gagwe a kuruetsa e kete ka kodu ya matseba, ba ititaya dihuba." 
Nahum2:8 Ninefe o sa le a nna jaaka lekadiba la metsi bogologolo; le fa go ntse jalo ba a tshaba; ba kua, ba re: “Emang! Emang! Mme go bo go se ope yo o šebang kwa morago." 
Nahum2:9 Tsayang thopo ya selefera, tsayang thopo ya gouta! Gonne ga go na bokhutlo jwa thopo e e beilweng, le ya kgalalelo ya dilwana tsotlhe tse di eletsegang tsa ntlo." 
Nahum2:10 O lolea fela, o loforotlho, o kgakgabetse, le pelo ya tlhapologa, le mangole a itaana, le tlalelo e e mahehe e mo dithekeng tsotlhe, le difatlhogo tsa lona di khwatile." 
Nahum2:11 O kae mongobo wa ditau, le bojelo jwa ditawana, kwa tau e tona le tau e namagadi di ntseng di tsamaya teng, le tawana ya tau, mme go ne go se na ope yo o di boifisang?" 
Nahum2:12 Tau e ne ya gagola mo go lekanyeng bana ba yone, ya betelela ditau tsa ga yone tse dinamagadi, ya olela thopo mo dikgageng tsa yone, le tse di gagotsweng mo mengobong ya yone, ga ba ga tlala." 
Nahum2:13 “Bona, ke tlhabana nao,” go bua Jehofa wa masomosomo, “ke tlaa fisa dikara tsa gagwe mo mosing, le tšhaka e tlaa ja ditawana tsa gago; ke tlaa kgaola dibolaiwi tsa gago mo lefatsheng, le lentswe la barongwa ba gago ga le ketla le tlhola le utlwala.”" 
Nahum3:1 A bo go latlhega motse o o madimadi! O tletse maaka le thubakanyo; go thopa ga go tloge. 
Nahum3:2 Go thwanya ga seme le kgwaso ya leratla la maoto a dikara; le mesito ya dipitse, le dikara tse di tlolakang;" 
Nahum3:3 go sotlhomela ga ba ba palameng dipitse, le tšhaka e e bebenyang, le lerumo le le phatsimang; le bontsi jo bo bolailweng, le mokoa o mogolo wa ditoto; mme ga go na bokhutlo jwa direpa; ba kgopiwa ke direpa tsa bone;" 
Nahum3:4 ka ntlha ya bontsi jwa maakafalo a seaka se se otlilweng sentle, mong wa ditoo, yo o rekisang merafe ka maakafalo a gagwe, le ditshika ka ditoo tsa gagwe." 
Nahum3:5 “Bona, ke tlhabana nao,” go bua Jehofa wa masomosomo, “Ke tlaa go tsodisa mesese fa pele ga sefatlhogo sa gago; ke tlaa supetsa merafe bosaikategang jwa gago, le magosi ditlhong tsa gago." 
Nahum3:6 Ke tlaa marela mo go wena leswe le le makgapha, ke tlaa go dira makgamatha, ke tlaa go baya selebo fela sa batho." 
Nahum3:7 Mme go tlaa dirala, go re, botlhe ba ba go lebang ba tlaa tshaba ba tswa fa go wena ba re: ‘Ninefe o kgakgabaditswe; e mang yo o tlaa mo lelelang?’ Ke tlaa go batlela kae bagomotsi?”" 
Nahum3:8 A o gaisa Noamone ka molemo; yo o ne a le mo gare ga dinoka, yo o ne a tsentswe gare ke metse; o phemelo ya one e neng e le lewatle, le lorako lwa one e le metsi a lewatle?" 
Nahum3:9 Ethiopia le Egepeto e le thata ya one, e ne e se na bokankabetso; Pute le Lubime e le bathusi ba gago." 
Nahum3:10 Le fa go ntse jalo a tlosiwa, a ya botshwarong; le banyana ba gagwe ba ne ba phatlakanngwa kwa dibaeng tsotlhe tsa mebila; ba thelela banna ba gagwe ba ba tlotlegang bola, banna botlhe ba gagwe ba batona ba ne ba golegwa ka diketane." 
Nahum3:11 Le wena o tlaa tagwa, o tlaa sujwa; le wena o tlaa batla kago ya phemelo e e thata ka ntlha ya mmaba." 
Nahum3:12 Dikago tsa gago tsa phemelo tsotlhe di tlaa nna jaaka ditlhare tsa difeige fa di udubadiwa di wela mo ganong la moji. 
Nahum3:13 Bona, batho ba gago ba ba mo gare ga gago ke basadi fela; dikgoro tsa lefatshe la gago di atlhametse baba ba gago fela; molelo o jele mephakalego ya gago." 
Nahum3:14 Ikgele tlhaselo metsi, o thatafatse dikago tsa gago tsa tlhabano; tsena mo seretseng, o gate seretse, o thatafatse pesetso ya makote." 
Nahum3:15 Molelo o tlaa go laila teng; tšhaka e tlaa go kgaola, e tlaa go ja jaaka boijane; o itire bontsi jaaka boijane, o itire bontsi jaaka tsie." 
Nahum3:16 O ntsifaditse babapaledi ba gago go feta dinaledi tsa legodimo; boijane bo a senya, bo tloge bo fofele koo." 
Nahum3:17 Ba gago ba ba rwesitsweng ba ntse jaaka tsie, le bakwadi ba gago ba ntse jaaka masogodi a tsiakgope, a a thibelelang mo dikgoreng fa go le tsididi, mme mogang letsatsi le tlhabang a fofele koo, mme felo ga one kwa a nnang teng ga go itsiwe." 
Nahum3:18 Badisa ba gago ba a otsela, wena kgosi ya Asiria; ba ba itsegeng ba gago ba a ikhutsa; batho ba gago ba falaletse mo dithabeng, mme ga go na ope yo o tlaa ba phuthang." 
Nahum3:19 Ga go na go tsidifatsa ntho ya gago; ntho ya gago e botlhoko thata; botlhe ba ba utlwang tumedi ya gago, ba go opela diatla; gonne go na le mang yo boikepo jwa gago bo sa tleng mo go ene ka metlha yotlhe?" 
Habakkuk1:1 Molaetso o Habakuke moperofeti o ne a o bona. 
Habakkuk1:2 Jehofa, ke tlaa goa ka lobaka lo lo kae mme o ntse o gana go utlwa? Ke goele koo go wena ka ga bothubako, mme o gana go boloka." 
Habakkuk1:3 Ana o ntshupetsa boikepo ka ntlha yang, mme o lebelang logwadi? Gonne thopo le thubako di fa pele ga me; e bile go kgang, komano le yone e a tsoga." 
Habakkuk1:4 Ke gone ka moo molao o repisitsweng, le katlholo ga e tlhole e tswelela gope; gonne baikepi ba dikanyeditse basiami; ke gone ka fa katlholo e tswelelang pele e sokamisitswe ka gone." 
Habakkuk1:5 “Lebang mo gare ga merafe, mme lo tlhokomele lo bo lo gakgamale segolo; gonne ke dira tiro mo metlheng ya lona, e lo se ketlang lo e dumela le fa lo e boleletswe." 
Habakkuk1:6 Gonne bonang, ke tsosa Bakalatea, morafe oo o o bogalaka, o o phomelang; ba ba tsamaelang gongwe ba ralala boatlhamo jwa lefatshe, ba ya go rua manno a e seng a bone." 
Habakkuk1:7 Ba a boitshega, ba theregiso; go itshekatshekela ga bone le tlotlomalo ya bone di tswa mo go bone ka bosi." 
Habakkuk1:8 “Le dipitse tsa bone di lobelo bogolo go bonkwe, ba bogale bogolo go matlonkana a lotlatlana; bapalama dipitse ba bone ba a iphalatsa; ee, bapalama dipitse ba bone ba tswa kgakala; ba fofa jaaka lenong le le akofelang go ja." 
Habakkuk1:9 “Botlhe fela ba tlela go thubaka; difatlhogo tsa bone di gagametse, di gaketse jaaka phefo ya botlhabatsatsi; ba phutha ditshwarwa jaaka mošawa." 
Habakkuk1:10 Ee, o sotla ka dikgosi, le dikgosana, ke setshego mo go ene; a tshege dikago tsotlhe tse di thata tsa phemelo; gonne o koela lorole kwa go tsone, mme a di gape." 
Habakkuk1:11 Foo o tlaa heheutla a feta jaaka phefo, a kgabaganya, mme a nne molato; e bong ene yo thata ya gagwe e leng modimo wa gagwe.”" 
Habakkuk1:12 A ga o sale o nna ka bosenang tshimologo, Jehofa Modimo wa me, Moitshepi wa me? Ga re ketla re e swa. Jehofa, o mo laoletse tshekiso; mme wena Lefika, o mo tlhomamiseditse kwatlhao." 
Habakkuk1:13 Wena yo o leng matlho a a itshekileng, a a sa kakeng a leba bosula, le a a sa kakeng a leba logwadi, ana o lebelang fela bone ba ba bonongwana? O didimalelang mogang moikepi o kometsang motho yo o siameng bogolo go ene," 
Habakkuk1:14 a ba a kae batho jaaka ditlhapi tsa lewatle, jaaka dilo tse di gagabang, tse di se nang yo o di laolang." 
Habakkuk1:15 O ba tshwara botlhe ka kobe, a ba tshware ka lotloa lwa gagwe, a ba phuthele mo lotloeng lwa gagwe lo lo gogwang; ke gone ka moo o itumelang a ipela." 
Habakkuk1:16 Ke gone ka moo o isetsang lotloa lwa gagwe tlhabelo, le lotloa lwa gagwe lo lo gogwang a lo fisetsa maswalo; gonne kabelo ya gagwe e mafura ka ntlha ya tsone ditloa, le dijo tsa gagwe di letlotlo." 
Habakkuk1:17 Ke gone a o tlaa ololola lotloa lwa gagwe, a se ke a rekegela go bolaya merafe ka metlha yotlhe?" 
Habakkuk2:1 Ke tlaa ema mo tebelong ya me, ke ipaya mo kagong e e godileng, mme ke tlaa lebela koo ntle, gore ke bone se o tlaa se buang le nna, le se ke tlaa se mo fetolang ka ga ngongorego ya me." 
Habakkuk2:2 Mme Jehofa a mphetola a re: “Kwala ponatshegelo e, o e dire gore e bonale sentle mo dimating tsa kwalelo, gore motho a tle a e bale a ntse a taboga." 
Habakkuk2:3 Gonne ponatshegelo e sa ntse e na le lobaka lo lo laotsweng, mme e be e itlhaganelela bokhutlo, ga e ketla e aka; le fa e ko e diega, lo e lete; gonne ruri e tlaa tla, ga e ketla e diega." 
Habakkuk2:4 Bonang, mowa wa gagwe o gogomogile, ga o a thokgama mo go ene; mme mosiami o tlaa tshela ka boikanyego jwa gagwe.”" 
Habakkuk2:5 Ee, gape bojalwa jwa mofine ke bonongwane, ke monna yo o ikgodisang, yo o sa nneng mo gae; yo o atlhamolosang keletso ya gagwe jaaka Bobipo, o ntse jaaka loso, ga a kake a kgorisiwa, mme o iphuthela merafe yotlhe, o ikokoanyetsa ditšhaba tsotlhe fela." 
Habakkuk2:6 A botlhe ba ga ba ketla ba mo tlhabeleletsa setshwantsho le seane sa mokgobo, ba re: “A bo go latlhega ene yo o totisang se se seng sa gagwe! Ka lobaka lo lo kaye? Le yo o ikimetsang ka dipeelo!”" 
Habakkuk2:7 A ga go ketla go nanoga ka tshoganetso ba ba tlaa go lomang, le go kubuga ba ba tlaa go tshwenyang, mme o tlaa nna thopo mo go bone?" 
Habakkuk2:8 Ka o thopile merafe e le mentsi, masalela otlhe a ditšhaba a tlaa go thopa; ka ntlha ya madi a batho, le ka ntlha ya thubako e e diretsweng lefatshe, e bong motse le botlhe ba ba agileng mo go one." 
Habakkuk2:9 A bo go latlhega ene yo o bonelang ntlo ya gagwe papadi e e bosula, gore a tle a tlhome setlhaga sa gagwe kwa godimo, gore a tle a gololwe mo seatleng sa bosula!" 
Habakkuk2:10 O gakololetse ntlo ya gago ditlhong, ka go kgaola ditšhaba di le dintsi, o bile o leofetse mowa wa gago." 
Habakkuk2:11 Gonne lentswe le tlaa kua le le mo lorakong, le mosipuri o le mo dikgonnyeng o tlaa le araba." 
Habakkuk2:12 A bo go latlhega ene yo o agang motse ka madi a batho, a tlhoma motse ka boikepo!" 
Habakkuk2:13 Bonang, a ga go tswe mo go Jehofa wa masomosomo fa e bo ne ne ditšhaba di bapalela molelo, le merafe e itapisetsa lefela?" 
Habakkuk2:14 Gonne lefatshe le tlaa tlala kitso ya kgalalelo ya ga Jehofa, jaaka metsi a khurumeditse lewatle." 
Habakkuk2:15 A bo go latlhega ene yo o nosang wa ga gabo, yo o oketsang ka sekgatlholo sa gago, le gone a mo tagisa gore o tle o lebe bosaikategang jwa bone!" 
Habakkuk2:16 O tletse ditlhong mo boemong jwa kgalalelo. Le wena nwa, o bo o nne jaaka mongwe yo o sa rupang; senwelo sa seatla sa ga Jehofa se segolo se tlaa menolelwa mo go wena, ditlhong tse di maswe di tlaa nna mo kgalalelong ya gago." 
Habakkuk2:17 Gonne thubako e e diretsweng Lebanone e tlaa go khurumetsa, le go senngwa ga dibatana mo go di boifisitseng; ka ntlha ya madi a batho; le ka ntlha ya thubako e e diretsweng lefatshe, le motse le botlhe ba ba agileng mo go one." 
Habakkuk2:18 Setshwantsho se se setilweng se thusang, fa e bo ne ne modiri wa sone a se setile; le setshwantsho se se thetsweng, le moruti wa maaka, fa e bo ne ne modiri wa tiro ya gagwe a ikanya mo go sone, a dira medimo ya disetwa e e sa bueng?" 
Habakkuk2:19 A bo go latlhega ene yo o rayang logong, a re: “Kubuga!” le lentswe le le semumu a, re: “Nanoga!” A leo le tlaa ruta? Bonang, le manegilwe gouta le selefera, mme ga go na mowa ope mo teng ga lone." 
Habakkuk2:20 Mme Jehofa ene, o mo tempeleng ya gagwe e e boitshepo; a lefatshe lotlhe le tuulale fa pele ga gagwe." 
Habakkuk3:1 Morapelo wa ga Habakuke moperofeti, o o rulaganyeditsweng Shigionothe." 
Habakkuk3:2 Jehofa, ke utlwile tumedi ya gago, mme ka boifa; Jehofa rudisa tiro ya gago mo gare ga dinyaga, mo gare ga dinyaga o dire gore e itsiwe; o re o le bogale o gakologelwe boutlwelobotlhoko." 
Habakkuk3:3 Modimo o ne wa tswa kwa Temane, le Moitshepi kwa thabeng ya Parane. Sela. Kgalalelo ya gagwe ya apesa magodimo, le lefatshe la tlala pako ya gagwe." 
Habakkuk3:4 Le phatsimo ya gagwe e ne e ntse jaaka lesedi; go ne go tswa marang mo seatleng sa gagwe; le go sujwa ga nonofo ya gagwe go ne go le teng. 
Habakkuk3:5 Kgogodi ya mo etelela pele, le melelo ya tladi ya tlapana ya tswa fa dinaong tsa gagwe." 
Habakkuk3:6 A ema, a lekanya lefatshe; a leba, mme a phatlalatsa merafe; le dithaba tsa bosakhutleng tsa faladiwa, le makhubu a a sa yeng kae a ikoba; ditsamao tsa gagwe di ne di ntse jaaka bogologolo." 
Habakkuk3:7 Ka bona megope ya Kušane e le mo pitlaganong; dilepelelo tsa lefatshe la Midiane tsa tetesela. 
Habakkuk3:8 A Jehofa o ne a itumologela dinoka? A o ne o le bogale le dinoka, kgotsa a o ne o gakaletse lewatle, fa e bo ne ne o ne o palame dipitse tsa gago, o palame dikara tsa gago tsa poloka?" 
Habakkuk3:9 Bora jwa gago bo ne bo senoletswe ruri, maikanelo a ditso e le lefoko la tlhomamo. Sela. O ne wa tsetsereganya lefatshe ka dinoka." 
Habakkuk3:10 Dithaba tsa go bona, mme tsa boifa; morwalela o o makhubukhubu wa feta; boteng jwa ntsha kodu, jwa tsholeletsa mabogo godimo." 
Habakkuk3:11 Letsatsi la ema mo bonnong jwa lone, le yone kgwedi; ka lesedi la metswi ya gago ka e hulega, ka phatsimo ya lerumo la gago le le galalelang." 
Habakkuk3:12 O ne wa ralala lefatshe ka kgakalo, wa photha merafe, o le bogale." 
Habakkuk3:13 Wa tswela poloko ya batho ba gago, poloko ya ba gago ba ba tloditsweng, wa ntsha tlhogo ya ntlo ya baikepi ntho, wa senola motheo go ya fela kwa thamong. Sela." 
Habakkuk3:14 O ne wa phunya yo o leng tlhogo ya batlhabani ba gagwe ka marumo a gagwe fela; ba ne ba tsile jaaka setsuatsue go mphalatsa; go duduetsa ga bone go ne go ntse jaaka e kete ga go jela ruri bahumanegi ka bosaitsiweng. 
Habakkuk3:15 O ne wa gata lewatle ka dipitse tsa gago, e bong mokoa wa metsi a a thata." 
Habakkuk3:16 Ka utlwa, mme mpa ya me ya roroma, dipounama tsa me tsa tlakaselela lentswe; go nyera ga ntsena mo marapong, ka roroma mo felong ga me; ka go lebelela motlha wa tlalelo, mogang o bololelang batho, e bong ene yo o mo tlhaselang a le ditlhophatlhopha." 
Habakkuk3:17 Gonne le fa mofeige o se ketla o thunya, le fa go tlaa bo go se na loungo mo mafineng; tiro ya motlhware e ka tla ya tlhaela, le matlhagare a se ka a ntsha dijo; letsomane le ka tla la kgaolwa mo lesakaneng, mme go se ka ga dirana le matlhape mo marakeng." 
Habakkuk3:18 Le fa go ntse jalo ke tlaa itumela mo go Jehofa, ke tlaa ipela mo Modimong wa poloko ya me." 
Habakkuk3:19 Jehofa, Morena, ke thata ya me, o dira dinao tsa me di nna jaaka maoto a tshephe, o tlaa ntsamaisa mo mafelong a me a a godimo. Go diretswe moopedi yo mogolo mo diletsong tsa me tse di ditlhale." 
Zephaniah1:1 Lefoko la ga Jehofa le le tsileng mo go Sefania morwa Kuši, morwa Getalia, morwa Amaria, morwa Hesekia, mo metlheng ya ga Josia morwa Amone, kgosi ya Juta." 
Zephaniah1:2 “Ke tlaa nyeleletsa ruri dilo tsotlhe, di tloga mo lefatsheng,” go bua Jehofa." 
Zephaniah1:3 “Ke tlaa nyeletsa motho le setshedi; ke tlaa nyeletsa dinonyane tsa legodimo, le ditlhapi tsa lewatle, le dikgopiso le baikepi natso; mme ke tlaa kgaola motho a tloga mo mmung,” go bua Jehofa." 
Zephaniah1:4 “Ke tlaa otlololela Juta letsogo la me, le banni botlhe ba Jerusalema, ke tlaa kgaola masalela a ga Baale a tloga mo felong fa, le leina la Kemarime le baperesiti nalo!" 
Zephaniah1:5 Le ba ba obamelang bontsi jwa legodimo ba le mo godimo ga matlo; le ba ba obamang, ba ikanelang Jehofa ba ba ba ikana ka Milekame;" 
Zephaniah1:6 le ba ba menogileng mo go saleng Jehofa morago; le ba ba se kang ba batla Jehofa, le fa e le go botsa ka ga gagwe.”" 
Zephaniah1:7 O tle o didimale fa pele ga Jehofa Modimo; gonne letsatsi la ga Jehofa le gaufi; gonne Jehofa o baakantse setlhabelo, o itshepisitse balalediwa ba gagwe." 
Zephaniah1:8 “Mme go tlaa dirala mo tsatsing leo la setlhabelo sa ga Jehofa, ke tlaa betsa dikgosana le bomorwa kgosi, le botlhe ba ba apereng diaparo tsa mafatshe a sele." 
Zephaniah1:9 Mo lefatsheng leo ke tlaa betsa botlhe ba ba tlolang serepudi, ba ba tlatsang ntlo ya mong wa bone ka thubako le tsietso." 
Zephaniah1:10 “Mo tsatsing leo,” go bua Jehofa, “go tlaa nna modumo wa go goa, o o tswang kgorong ya ditlhapi, le pokolelo e e tswang kgaoganong ya bobedi, le loratla lo logolo lo lo tswang kwa makhubung." 
Zephaniah1:11 Bokolelang, lona banni ba Makateše, gonne batho botlhe ba Kanana ba dirologile; botlhe ba ba neng ba belege selefera ba kgaotswe." 
Zephaniah1:12 “Go tlaa dirala mo tsatsing leo, go re, ke tlaa kheleisa Jerusalema ka dipone; ke tlaa betsa banna ba ba itshekileng mo dintshing tsa bone, ba ba buang mo pelong, ba re: ‘Jehofa ga a ketla a dira molemo, le gone ga a ketla a dira bosula.’" 
Zephaniah1:13 Khumo ya bone e tlaa tswa thopo, le matlo a bone tshwafalo; ee, ba tlaa aga matlo, mme ga ba ketla ba nna mo go one; ba tlaa tlhoma masimo a mafine, mme ga ba ketla ba nwa bojalwa jwa mofine jwa one.”" 
Zephaniah1:14 Letsatsi le legolo la ga Jehofa le gaufi, le gaufi le akofa thata, e bong kodu ya letsatsi la ga Jehofa; motho wa seganka o gala mo go botlhoko gone." 
Zephaniah1:15 Letsatsi leo ke letsatsi la go goa, letsatsi la tlalelo le pitlagano, letsatsi la kgakgabalo le tshwafalo, letsatsi la lefifi le letobo, letsatsi la maru le lefifi le le kwenneng." 
Zephaniah1:16 Letsatsi la lonaka go lela, le mokgosi wa tshoso, go lelela metse e e thekeleditsweng, dikago tse di mo godimo ga dithako." 
Zephaniah1:17 “Ke tlaa lere pitlagano mo bathong, go tla ba sepela jaaka difofu, gonne ke leofetse Jehofa; le madi a bone a tlaa tshololwa jaaka lorole, le nama ya bone jaaka letshotelo.”" 
Zephaniah1:18 Go le selefera sa bone le gouta ya bone, ga di kake tsa ba golola mo motlheng wa bogale jwa ga Jehofa; mme lefatshe lotlhe le tlaa lailwa ke molelo wa lefufa la gagwe; gonne o tlaa dira bokhutlo, ee, bokhutlo jo bo boitshegang jwa botlhe ba ba agileng mo lefatsheng." 
Zephaniah2:1 Phuthegang, ee, phuthegang, wena morafe o o se nang ditlhong;" 
Zephaniah2:2 taolo e ise e tsale, le letsatsi le ise le fete jaaka mmoko, le bogale jo bo fisang bo ise bo tle mo go lona, le letsatsi la bogale jwa ga Jehofa le ise le tle mo go lona." 
Zephaniah2:3 Batlang Jehofa, lona bakgobaladi botlhe ba lefatshe; ba lo dirileng katlholo ya gagwe; batlang tshiamo, batlang kgobalalo; e ka tla ya re gongwe lwa sujwa mo letsatsing la bogale jwa ga Jehofa." 
Zephaniah2:4 Gonne Gasa o tlaa tlogelwa, Ašekelone o tlaa nna tshwafalo; ba tlaa leleka Ašetote go le motshegare, le Ekerone o tlaa khumolwa." 
Zephaniah2:5 A bo go latlhega banni ba lefatshe le le ntlheng ya lewatle, morafe wa Bakerethe! Lefoko la ga Jehofa le tlhabana le lona, wena Kanana, lefatshe la Bafilisitia. “Ke tlaa go senya, mme ga go ketla go nna le monni.”" 
Zephaniah2:6 Lefatshe le le ntlheng ya lewatle le tlaa nna mafulo le na le megopenyana ya badisa, le maraka a matsomane." 
Zephaniah2:7 Losi lwa lewatle lo tlaa nna lwa masalela a ba ntlo ya Juta; ba tlaa fudisa matsomane a bone mo go lone; ba tlaa itatsa ka maabanyane mo mantlong a Ašekelone; gonne Jehofa Modimo wa bone o tlaa ba lekola, mme o tlaa ba busa mo botshwarong jwa bone." 
Zephaniah2:8 “Ke utlwile kgobo ya Moabe le dikgalo tsa bana ba amone, tse ba kgobileng batho ba me ka tsone, mme ba ikgodisetsa molelwane wa bone." 
Zephaniah2:9 Ke gone ka moo, jaaka ke tshedile,” go bua Jehofa wa masomosomo, Modimo wa Iseraele; “ruri Moabe o tlaa nna jaaka Sotoma, le bana ba Amore jaaka Gomora, e nna felo ga dikhi, le mahuti a lobu, le tshwafalo e e sa khutleng; masalela a batho ba me a tlaa ba thopa, le masalela a morafe wa me a tlaa ba ja boswa.”" 
Zephaniah2:10 Se ke sone se ba tlaa se bonang ka ga boikgodiso jwa bone, ka ba kgobile, ba ikgodiseditse batho ba ga Jehofa wa masomosomo." 
Zephaniah2:11 Jehofa o tlaa nna poitshego mo go bone; gonne o tlaa tlhora medimo yotlhe ya lefatshe; mme batho ba tlaa obamela one, mongwe le mongwe a le felong ga gagwe, e bong ditlhake tsotlhe tsa merafe." 
Zephaniah2:12 “Le lona Baethiopia, lo tlaa bolawa ka tšhaka ya me.”" 
Zephaniah2:13 O tlaa otlololela lefatshe la botsheka letsogo la gagwe, o tlaa senya Asiria, o tlaa swafatsa Ninefe le nna lokgere jaaka bobidibidi jwa naga." 
Zephaniah2:14 Matlhape a tlaa botha mo gare ga one, e bong ditshedi tsotlhe tsa merafe; khukara le noku di tlaa robala mo ditlhoeng tsa one, kodu ya tsone e tlaa lela mo diponeng; tshwafalo e tlaa nna fa mejakong, gonne o senotse tiro ya dikgong tsa masetara." 
Zephaniah2:15 O ke one motse wa boitumelo, o o kileng wa nna fela o sa re sepe, o o ne o bua mo pelong o re: “Ke nna yono, ga go na ope kwa ntle ga me.” O fetogile jang a nna tshwafalo e le felo ga dilo go botha teng; mongwe le mongwe o o fetang ka one, o tlaa otsa, a ba a ota seatla." 
Zephaniah3:1 A bo go latlhega ene yo o serukhutlhi yo o itshekologileng, e bong motse o o patikang!" 
Zephaniah3:2 Ga o a ka wa utlwa lentswe; ga o a ka wa amogela thuto; ga o a ka wa ikanya mo go Jehofa; ga o a ka wa atamela Modimo wa one. 
Zephaniah3:3 Dikgosana tsa one mo gare ga one ke ditau tse di dumang; baatlhodi ba one ke matlonkana a lotlatlana; ga a sadisetse moso sepe. 
Zephaniah3:4 Baperofeti ba one ke batho ba ba bofafalele ba bonongwana, baperesiti ba one ba tlhapaditse felo ga boitshepo, ba sokile molao." 
Zephaniah3:5 Jehofa o tshiamo mo gare ga one; ga a ketla a dira boikepo; o tle a ntshetse katlholo ya gagwe mo leseding ka meso le meso, ga a tlhaele; mme basiamolodi ga ba itse ditlhong." 
Zephaniah3:6 “Ke kgaotse merafe, dikago tsa yone tsa tlhabanelo tse di godileng di swafetse; ke kgakgabaditse mebila ya bone, go bo go se na ope yo o fetang; metse ya bone a sentswe, go bo go se na motho, go se na monni." 
Zephaniah3:7 Ke rile: O tlaa bo o mpoifa o tlaa amogela thuto; jalo bonno jwa one bo ne bo se ketla bo kgaolwa, ka fa go tsotlhe tse ke di o laoletseng; ba ne ba phakela ba senya ditiro tsotlhe tsa bone." 
Zephaniah3:8 “Ke gone, ntetang,” go bua Jehofa, “go tsamaya letsatsi le fitlha le ke tlaa nanogelang thopo ka lone; gonne boikaelelo jwa me ke go phutha merafe, gore ke kokoanye magosi, go tla ke gorometsa tšhakgalo ya me mo go one, e bong bogale jwa me jotlhe jo bo fisang; gonne lefatshe lotlhe le tlaa lailwa ke molelo wa lefufa la me." 
Zephaniah3:9 “Gonne foo ke tlaa fetolela ditšhaba puo e e itshekileng, gore ba bitse leina la ga Jehofa, go tla ba mo direla ka tumalano e le ngwe fela." 
Zephaniah3:10 Barapedi ba me, e bong morwadia bafaladi ba me, ba tlaa lere tshupelo ya me, ba tswa kwa moseja ga dinoka tsa Ethiopia." 
Zephaniah3:11 “E tlaa re mo motlheng oo ga o ketla o tlhajwa ke ditlhong ka ditiro tsotlhe tsa gago, tse o tlodileng fa pele ga me ka tsone; gonne foo ke tlaa tlosa mo gare ga gago babelafadi ba gago ba ba gwantang, mme ga o ketla o tlhola o nna boikgodiso mo thabeng ya me e e boitshepo." 
Zephaniah3:12 Ke tlaa tlogela mo gare ga gago batho bangwe ba ba patikegileng, le ba ba humanegileng, mme ba tlaa ikanya leina la ga Jehofa." 
Zephaniah3:13 Masalela a Iseraele ga a ketla a dira boikepo, le fa e le go bua maaka, loleme lo lo tsietsang ga lo ketla lo fitlhelwa mo melomong ya bone; gonne ba tlaa ja ba robala, mme ga go na ope yo o tlaa ba boifisang.”" 
Zephaniah3:14 Opela, wena morwadia Sione; thela lošalaba, wena Iseraele; o ipele o itumele ka pelo yotlhe wena morwadia Jerusalema." 
Zephaniah3:15 Jehofa o tlositse ditshekiso tsa gago; o lelekile mmaba wa gago; kgosi ya Iseraele, e bong Jehofa o mo gare ga gago; ga o ketla o tlhola o boifa bosula." 
Zephaniah3:16 Mo motlheng oo go tlaa rewa Jerusalema go twe: “O se ka wa boifa, wena Sione, a diatla tsa gago di se repe." 
Zephaniah3:17 Jehofa Modimo wa gago o mo gare ga gago, e le mothata yo o tlaa bolokang; o tlaa go itumelela ka boitumelo, o tlaa ritibala mo loratong lwa gagwe, o tlaa go dudueletsa ka kopelo.”" 
Zephaniah3:18 “Ke tla phutha ba ba hutsafalelang phuthego e e masisi, ba e neng e le ba gago; ba mokgweleo o o mo go ene e neng e le kgobo mo go bone." 
Zephaniah3:19 Bonang, e tlaa re ka motlha oo ke tlaa tsena mo mafokong a botlhe ba ba go patikang; mme ke tlaa phutha ene yo o ne a lelekilwe; ke tlaa ba dira pako le leina, e bong bone ba ditlhong tsa bone di ntseng di le mo lefatsheng lotlhe." 
Zephaniah3:20 Mo motlheng oo ke tlaa lo lere mo teng, mo motlheng oo ke tlaa lo phutha; gonne ke tlaa lo dira leina la pako mo ditšhabeng tsotlhe tsa lefatshe, mogang ke lo busang mo botshwarong fa pele ga matlho a lona,” go bua Jehofa." 
Haggai1:1 E rile ka ngwaga wa bobedi wa ga Dario kgosi, ka kgwedi ya borataro, ka letsatsi la ntlha la kgwedi, lefoko la ga Jehofa la tla ka Hagai moperofeti kwa go Serubabele morwa Shealetiele, molaodi wa Juta, le kwa go Jošua morwa Jehosatake moperesiti yo mogolo, la re:" 
Haggai1:2 Jehofa wa masomosomo o bua jaana, a re: “Tšhaba e, ya re: ‘Ga se lobaka lwa rona go tla, ga se lobaka lwa ntlo ya ga Jehofa go agiwa.’ ”" 
Haggai1:3 Foo ga tla lefoko la ga Jehofa, la tla ka Hagai moperofeti, la re:" 
Haggai1:4 “A ke lobaka mo go lona ka losi lwa go aga mo mantlong a a khurumeditsweng kwa godimo ka dimati, mme ntlo e yone, e kgakgabetse fela?" 
Haggai1:5 Ke gone jaana,” go bua Jehofa wa masomosomo jaana, a re: “Gopolang mekgwa ya lona." 
Haggai1:6 Lo jadile segolo; mme lo rora bobotlana; lo a ja, mme ga lo kgore; lo a nwa, mme ga lo kgore go nwa; lo a ikapesa, mme ga go na ope yo o thuthafetseng; le yo o bapalang tuelo o e bapalela go tla a e tsenya mo kgetseng e e maroba fela.”" 
Haggai1:7 Go bua jaana Jehofa wa masomosomo, a re: “Gopolang mekgwa ya lona." 
Haggai1:8 Palamelang kwa thabeng, lo lere dikgong, lo age ntlo; mme ke tlaa ja monate ka ga yone, ke tlaa galalediwa, go bua Jehofa." 
Haggai1:9 “Lo ne lo lebeletse go le go tona, mme bonang, ga fela go le go botlana; e rile lo go lere gae, ka go budulela. Ka ntlha yang?” Go bua Jehofa wa masomosomo. “Ka ntlha ya ntlo ya me e e kgakgabetseng, ka mongwe le mongwe wa lona a tabogela kwa ntlong ya gagwe fela." 
Haggai1:10 Ke gone ka ntlha ya lona, legodimo le kganetswe, mo go useng monyo, le lefatshe le kganetswe mo go ungweng ga lone." 
Haggai1:11 Ka bitsa leuba la tla mo lefatsheng mo dithabeng, mo mabeleng, mo bojalweng jwa mofine, mo lookwaneng, mo go se lefatshe le se ungwang, mo bathong, mo dikgomong le mo tirong yotlhe ya diatla.”" 
Haggai1:12 Foo Serubabele morwa Sealetiele, le Jošua morwa Jehosatake moperesiti yo mogolo, ba na le masalela otlhe a batho, ba utlwa lentswe la ga Jehofa Modimo wa bone, le mafoko a ga Hagai moperofeti, jaaka Jehofa Modimo wa bone a ne a mo romile; mme batho ba boifa fa pele ga Jehofa." 
Haggai1:13 Foo ga bua Hagai morongwi wa ga Jehofa ka molaetso wa ga Jehofa mo bathong, a re: “Ke na le lona,” go bua Jehofa." 
Haggai1:14 Mme Jehofa a tlhotlheletsa mowa wa ga Serubabele morwa Shealetiele, molaodi wa Juta, le mowa wa ga Jošua morwa Jehosatake moperesiti yo mogolo, le mowa wa masalela otlhe a batho; mme ba tla ba dira mo ntlong ya ga Jehofa wa masomosomo, Modimo wa bone," 
Haggai1:15 ka letsatsi la 24, ka kgwedi ya borataro, ka ngwaga wa bobedi wa ga Dario kgosi." 
Haggai2:1 E rile ka kgwedi ya bosupa, ka letsatsi la 21 la kgwedi, lefoko la ga Jehofa la tla ka Hagai moperofeti, la re:" 
Haggai2:2 “A ko o bue le Serubabele morwa Shealatiele molaodi wa Juta, le Jošua morwa Jehosatake moperesiti yo mogolo, le masalela a batho, o re:" 
Haggai2:3 ‘Go setse mang mo go lona yo o kileng a bona ntlo e mo kgalalelong ya yone ya pele? Lo e bona jang jaanong? Mo matlhong a lona a ga e a nna jaaka e se sepe? 
Haggai2:4 Le fa go ntse jalo jaanong o nne thata, wena Serubabele,’ go bua Jehofa. ‘O nne thata, le wena Jošua, morwa Jehosatake, moperesiti yo mogolo; le lona lo nne thata, lona lotlhe batho ba lefatshe,’ go bua Jehofa, ‘lo dire, gonne ke na le lona,’ go bua Jehofa wa masomosomo." 
Haggai2:5 ‘Ka fa lefokong le ke le golaganetseng le lona jale ka lo tswa Egepeto, le mowa wa me o agile mo go lona; lo se ka lwa boifa.’" 
Haggai2:6 “Gonne Jehofa wa masomosomo o bua jaana, a re: ‘E tlaa nama e nna gangwe fela, ke lobakanyana fela, mme ke tlaa reketlisa magodimo, le lefatshe le lewatle le lefatshe la komelelo." 
Haggai2:7 Ke tlaa reketlisa merafe yotlhe, mme dilo tse di eletsegang tsa merafe yotlhe di tlaa tla, mme ke tlaa tlatsa ntlo e ka kgalalelo,’ go bua Jehofa wa masomosomo." 
Haggai2:8 ‘Selefera ke ya me, le gouta ke ya me,’ go bua Jehofa wa masomosomo." 
Haggai2:9 ‘Kgalalelo ya morago ya ntlo e, e tlaa nna kgolo bogolo go ya pele,’ go bua Jehofa wa masomosomo; ‘ke tlaa aba kagiso mo felong fa,’ go bua Jehofa wa masomosomo.”" 
Haggai2:10 E rile ka tsatsi la 24, la kgwedi ya bofera o le mongwe, ka ngwaga wa bobedi wa ga Dario, ga tla lefoko la ga Jehofa ka Hagai moperofeti, la re:" 
Haggai2:11 “Jehofa wa masomosomo o bua jaana, a re: ‘Botsang baperesiti jaana ka ga molao, lo re:" 
Haggai2:12 Fa mongwe a tshotse nama e e itshepileng mo lokojeng lwa seaparo sa gagwe, mme a ama senkgwe ka lokoja lwa gagwe, kgotsa dikgobe, kgotsa bojalwa jwa mofine, kgotsa lookwane, kgotsa dijo dingwe fela, a di tlaa fetoga di nna boitshepo?’ ” Baperesiti ba araba, ba re: “Nnyaa.”" 
Haggai2:13 Foo Hagai a re: “Fa mongwe yo o itshekologileng ka setoto, a ama sengwe sa dilo tseo, a se tlaa nna itshekologo?” Mme baperesiti ba mo fetola ba re: “Se tlaa nna itshekologo.”" 
Haggai2:14 Foo Hagai a ba fetola, a re: “Batho ba, ba ntse jalo, le morafe o, o ntse jalo fa pele ga me,” go bua Jehofa; “le tiro nngwe le nngwe ya diatla tsa bone e ntse jalo; le se ba se isang tshupelo gone se itshekologile.”" 
Haggai2:15 “Jaana ke a lo rapela, lo gopolele go tswa mo bakeng lwa gompieno go ya kwa morago, go tswa mo bakeng lwa pele lentswe le ise le tlhatlaganngwe le lentswe mo tempeleng ya ga Jehofa." 
Haggai2:16 Ka lobaka loo lotlhe fela e ne e tle e re fa motho a ithaya a re: O tla mo mokoeng o o diele di le 20 a fitlhele di le some fela; fa motho a tla sedibeletsong sa bojalwa a re, o tla go gelela dijana di le 50, a fitlhele go lekanye di le 20 fela." 
Haggai2:17 Ka lo betsa ka tshubego le ka phori, le ka sefako mo tirong yotlhe ya diatla tsa lona; le fa go ntse jalo ga lo a ka lwa boela mo go nna.” Go bua Jehofa." 
Haggai2:18 “Ke a lo rapela, lo gopolele go tswa mo bakeng lwa gompieno, le go ya kwa morago, go tswa mo letsatsing la 24 la kgwedi ya 9, go tswa mo tsatsing le motheo wa tempele ya ga Jehofa o theilweng ka lone, lo go gopole." 
Haggai2:19 A peo e sa ntse e le gone mo ntlong ya mabele? Ee, mofine, le mofeige le garanata, le motlhware, di ntse di sa ungwe; go tloga fano tsatsing leno ke tlaa lo segofatsa.”" 
Haggai2:20 Lefoko la ga Jehofa la tla lwa bobedi kwa go Hagai ka letsatsi la 24 la kgwedi, la re:" 
Haggai2:21 “Bua le Serubabele, molaodi wa Juta, o re: Ke tlaa reketlisa magodimo le lefatshe." 
Haggai2:22 Ke tlaa ribegetsa setulo sa magosi, ke tlaa senya thata ya magosi a merafe; ke tlaa ribegetsa dikara le ba ba palameng mo go tsone; mme dipitse di tlaa fologa le bapalami ba tsone, mongwe le mongwe ka tšhaka ya morwarraagwe." 
Haggai2:23 Mo tsatsing leo go bua Jehofa wa masomosomo, ke tlaa go tsaya, wena Serubabele, motlhanka wa me, morwa Sealatiele, go bua Jehofa; ke tlaa go dira o nna jaaka sekanela, gonne ke go itshenketse, go bua Jehofa wa masomosomo.”" 
Zechariah1:1 E rile ka kgwedi ya bofera mebedi, ka ngwaga wa bobedi wa ga Dario, lefoko la ga Jehofa la tla kwa go Sekaria morwa Berekia, morwa Ido moperofeti, la re:" 
Zechariah1:2 “Jehofa o ntse a itumologetse borraeno thata. 
Zechariah1:3 Ke gone jaana o ba reye o re: ‘Jehofa wa masomosomo o bua jaana, a re: Boelang mo go nna, go bua Jehofa wa masomosomo, mme ke tlaa boela mo go lona,’ go bua Jehofa wa masomosomo." 
Zechariah1:4 Lo se ka lwa nna jaaka borraeno, ba baperofeti ba pele ba ne ba kua mo go bone, ba re: ‘Jehofa wa masomosomo o bua jaana, a re: Boang jaana mo ditseleng tsa lona tse di bosula, le mo ditirong tsa lona tse di bosula;’ mme ga ba a ka ba utlwa, le fa e le go ntheetsa, go bua Jehofa." 
Zechariah1:5 Borraeno ba kae? Le baperofeti a ba tshela ka bosakhutleng? 
Zechariah1:6 Mafoko a me le ditao tsa me tse ke di laoletseng baperofeti, batlhanka ba me, a ga di a ka tsa latela borraeno tsa ba tshwara? Mme ba boa, ba re: ‘Fela jaaka Jehofa wa masomosomo a ne a gopotse go re direla, ka fa mekgweng ya rona le ka fa ditirong tsa rona, o re diretse fela jalo.’ ”" 
Zechariah1:7 E rile ka letsatsi la 24 la kgwedi ya 11, e e leng kgwedi ya Sebate, ka ngwaga wa bobedi wa ga Dario, lefoko la ga Jehofa, la tla kwa go Sekaria morwa Berekia, morwa Ito moperofeti la re:" 
Zechariah1:8 Ka leba bosigo, mme bonang, motho a palame pitse e le khunou, mme a bo a eme mo gare ga ditlhare tsa maretela tse di kwa tlase; morago ga gagwe go ne go le dipitse tse di khunou, le tse dikwebu, le tse di tshweu." 
Zechariah1:9 Foo ka re: “Morena wa me, ke eng tse?” Mme moengele yo o buang le nna a nthaya, a re: “Ke tlaa go supetsa gore dilo tse ke eng.”" 
Zechariah1:10 Mme monna yo o ne a eme mo gare ga ditlhare tsa maretela a mphetola, a re: “Ba ke bone ba Jehofa o ba romileng, ba tlaa go ya kwa le kwa ba ralale lefatshe.”" 
Zechariah1:11 Mme ba fetola moengele wa ga Jehofa yo o emeng mo ditlhareng tsa maretela ba re: “Re sepeletse kwa le kwa re raletse lefatshe, mme bonang, lefatshe lotlhe le dutse fela, le mo boiketlong.”" 
Zechariah1:12 Foo moengele wa ga Jehofa a fetola, a re: “Jehofa wa masomosomo, e tlaa nna lobaka lo lokae o ntse o sa utlwele Jerusalema botlhoko le metse ya Juta, e o ntseng o le bogale nayo ka dinyaga tse di 70 tse?”" 
Zechariah1:13 Mme Jehofa a fetola moengele yo o buang le nna ka mafoko a a molemo, e bong mafoko a a gomotsang." 
Zechariah1:14 Jalo moengele yo o buang le nna a nthaya a re: “Kua, o re: Jehofa wa masomosomo o bua jaana, a re: ‘Ke lefufa le legolo ka ga Jerusalema le Sione." 
Zechariah1:15 Ke itumologetse thata merafe e e ntseng ka boiketlo fela; gonne ke ne ke itumologile go le gonnye, mme ya tlhotlheletsa patiko.’" 
Zechariah1:16 “Ke gone ka moo, go bua Jehofa, a re: ‘Ke boetse mo Jerusalema ka mautlwelobotlhoko; ntlo ya me e tlaa agiwa mo go one.’ Go bua Jehofa wa masomosomo; mme mogala o tlaa namalalediwa Jerusalema." 
Zechariah1:17 “Kua gape, o re: Jehofa wa masomosomo o bua jaana, a re: ‘Metse ya me e tlaa nama e anama ka ntlha ya go tlhogonolofala; Jehofa o tlaa nama a gomotsa Sione, o tlaa nama a itshenkela Jerusalema.’ ”" 
Zechariah1:18 Mme ka tsholetsa matlho a me, ka leba, mme bonang, ga bo go le dinaka di le nne." 
Zechariah1:19 Ka raya moengele yo o buang le nna, ka re: “Ke eng tse?” Mme a mphetola, a re: “Tse ke dinaka tse di phatlaladitseng Juta, le Iseraele le, Jerusalema.”" 
Zechariah1:20 Jehofa a ntshupetsa bathudi ba le bane. 
Zechariah1:21 Foo ka re: “Bao ba tla go dirang?” Mme a bua a re: “Tseo ke dinaka tse di phatlaladitseng Juta, ga tsamaya ga se ka ga sala motho ope yo o tsholetsang tlhogo; mme bao ba tsile go di kgobola go latlhela fa fatshe dinaka tsa merafe e e kileng ya tsholeletsa lefatshe la Juta lonaka go le phatlalatsa.”" 
Zechariah2:1 Ka tsholetsa matlho a me, ka leba, mme bonang monna yo o tshotseng mogala o o lekanyang." 
Zechariah2:2 Foo ka re: “O ya kae?” A nthaya a re: “Ke ya go lekanya Jerusalema, gore ke bone boatlhamo jwa one le boleele jwa one.”" 
Zechariah2:3 Bonang, moengele yo o buang le nna a tswela kwa ntle, mme moengele yo mongwe a tswa a ya go kgatlhana nae." 
Zechariah2:4 A mo raya a re: “Taboga o bue le lekau leo o re: ‘Jerusalema o tlaa nnwa jaaka metsana e e se nang dithako, ka ntlha ya bontsi jwa batho le jwa dikgomo jo bo tlaa nnang mo go one." 
Zechariah2:5 Gonne nna, go bua Jehofa, ke tlaa nna lorako lwa molelo lwa one mo tikologong, mme ke tlaa nna kgalalelo mo gare ga one.’ ”" 
Zechariah2:6 “Hee! hee! tshabang, lo tswe lefatsheng la botsheka,” go bua Jehofa; gonne ke lo anamisitse le lefatshe jaaka diphefo tsoo nne tsa legodimo, go bua Jehofa." 
Zechariah2:7 “Hee Sione, wena yo o agileng le morwadia Babilone iphalodise.”" 
Zechariah2:8 Gonne Jehofa wa masomosomo o bua jaana, a re: O nthomile kwa merafeng e e lo thopileng go senka kgalalelo; gonne yo o lo amang o ama thaka ya leitlho la gagwe." 
Zechariah2:9 “Gonne bonang ke tlaa ota seatla sa me godimo ga bone, mme ba tlaa nna thopo ya bone ba ba kileng ba ba direla.” Mme lo tlaa itse fa Jehofa wa masomosomo a nthomile." 
Zechariah2:10 “Opela o itumele, wena morwadia Sione; gonne bona ke etla, ke tlaa aga mo gare ga gago,” go bua Jehofa." 
Zechariah2:11 “Merafe e le mentsi e tlaa ikopanya le Jehofa mo motlheng oo, mme e tlaa nna batho ba me; ke tlaa nna mo gare ga gago, mme o tlaa itse fa Jehofa wa masomosomo a nthomile kwa go wena." 
Zechariah2:12 Jehofa o tlaa rua Juta, e le mo e leng ga gagwe mo lefatsheng le le boitshepo, o tlaa nama a itshenkela Jerusalema." 
Zechariah2:13 “Didimalang batho botlhe fa pele ga Jehofa, gonne o tsogile a le mo bonnong jwa gagwe jo bo boitshepo.”" 
Zechariah3:1 A ntshupetsa Jošua moperesiti yo mogolo a eme fa pele ga moengele wa ga Jehofa, le Satane a eme ka fa ntlheng ya letsogo le legolo la gagwe, gore a nne moganetsi wa gagwe." 
Zechariah3:2 Jehofa a raya Satane a re: “A Jehofa a go kgalemele wena Satane; ee, Jehofa yo o itshenketseng Jerusalema, a a go kgalemele; yo a ga se motswaiso o o swatotsweng mo molelong?”" 
Zechariah3:3 Jaana Jošua o ne a apere diaparo tse di maswe, a eme fa pele ga moengele." 
Zechariah3:4 Mme a raya ba ba emeng fa pele ga gagwe, a re: “Tlosang diaparo tse di matladika mo go ene.” Mme a mo raya a re: “Bona, ke fetisitse ka tlosa tshiamololo ya gago mo go wena, mme ke tlaa go apesa diaparo tse dintle.”" 
Zechariah3:5 Ka re: “A ba mo rwese tlhoro e ntle mo tlhogong.” Mme ba mo rwesa tlhoro e ntle mo tlhogong, ba mo apesa diaparo; mme moengele wa ga Jehofa a bo a eme teng." 
Zechariah3:6 Moengele wa ga Jehofa a tlhomamiseletsa Jošua, a re:" 
Zechariah3:7 “Jehofa wa masomosomo o bua jaana, a re: Fa o sepela mo tseleng tsa me, fa o tshegetsa tebelo ya me, foo le gone o tlaa atlhola ntlo ya me, le gone o tlaa lebela malwapa a me, mme ke tlaa go naya boemo jwa katamelo mo go ba ba emeng teng." 
Zechariah3:8 “ ‘Utlwa jaana, wena Jošua moperesiti yo mogolo, wena le bankana ba gago ba ba dutseng fa pele ga gago; gonne ke banna ba ba leng segakgamatso; gonne, bona, ke tlaa ntshetsa kwa ntle motlhanka wa me yo go tweng Letlhogela." 
Zechariah3:9 Gonne bona, lentswe le ke le beileng fa pele ga Jošua; mo lentsweng le le lengwe fela go matlho a supa; bona, ke tlaa seta ditseto tsa lone,’ go bua Jehofa wa masomosomo, ‘mme ke tlaa tlosa boikepo jwa lefatshe leo ka tsatsi le le lengwe fela." 
Zechariah3:10 E tlaa re mo tsatsing leo,’ go bua Jehofa wa masomosomo, ‘lo tlaa bitsakanya mongwe le mongwe le wa ga gabo, ba le fa tlase ga mofine le fa tlase ga mofeige.’ ”" 
Zechariah4:1 Moengele yo o buang le nna a tla gape, a ntsosa jaaka monna yo o tsosiwang a robetse." 
Zechariah4:2 Mme a nthaya a re: “O bonang?” Mme ka re: “Ke lebile, mme bonang, setlhomo sa lobone e le sa gouta sotlhe fela, se na le nkgwana ya sone mo godimo ga sone; le dilampa tsa sone di supa di le mo go sone; lampa nngwe le nngwe e na le ditlhaka tse di logapa di supa, tse di kwa godimo ga sone;" 
Zechariah4:3 le ditlhare di le pedi tsa matlhware fa go sone, sengwe ka fa tsogong le legolo ga nkgwana, se sengwe ka fa ntlheng ya la molema ga yone.”" 
Zechariah4:4 Mme ka fetola moengele yo o buang le nna, ka re: “Dilo tse ke eng, morena wa me?”" 
Zechariah4:5 Foo moengele yo o buang le nna a mphetola, a re: “A ga o itse go re dilo tse ke eng?” Mme ka re: “Nnyaa morena wa me.”" 
Zechariah4:6 Foo a mphetola a re: “Le ke lone lefoko la ga Jehofa kwa go Serubabele, a re: ‘Ga se ka thata, le fa e le ka nonofo, fa e se ka mowa wa me,’ go bua Jehofa wa masomosomo." 
Zechariah4:7 O mang, wena thaba e kgolo? O tlaa fetoga o nna lobala fa pele ga Serubabele; mme o tlaa ntsha lentswe la tlhogo ka go thela lošalaba lwa go re: ‘Matlhogonolo, matlhogonolo a nne mo go wena.’ ”" 
Zechariah4:8 Gape lefoko la ga Jehofa la tla mo go nna, la re:" 
Zechariah4:9 “Diatla tsa ga Serubabele di theile motheo wa ntlo e; diatla tsa gagwe di tlaa ba di e wetsa; mme o tlaa itse fa Jehofa wa masomosomo a nthomile kwa go bone. 
Zechariah4:10 Gonne e mang yo o nyaditseng motlha wa dilo tse dipotlana? Gonne ba tlaa itumela, ba tlaa bona selekanyo se se thokgamisang mo seatleng sa ga Serubabele, e bong tse di supa tse, tse e leng matlho a ga Jehofa; a ya kwa le kwa mo lefatsheng lotlhe.”" 
Zechariah4:11 Foo ka mo fetola ka re: “Ditlhare tse pedi tse tsa matlhware ke eng, tse di ka fa ntlheng ya letsogo le legolo ga setlhomo sa lobone, le ka fa ntlheng ya la molema ga sone?”" 
Zechariah4:12 Ka mo fetola lwa bobedi, ka re: “Ke eng dikala tse, tse pedi tsa motlhware tse di bapileng le ditlhaka tse di logapa tsa gouta, tse di ntshang lookwane lo lo gouta mo teng ga tsone ka tsosi?”" 
Zechariah4:13 Mme a mphetola a re: “A ga o itse gore dilo tse ke eng?” Mme ka re: “Nnyaa morena wa me.” 
Zechariah4:14 Foo a re: “Tse ke bomorwa lookwane ba babedi, ba ba emeng fa go Morena wa lefatshe lotlhe.”" 
Zechariah5:1 Foo ka tsholetsa matlho a me gape, ka leba, mme bonang, lokwalo lo lo mennweng lo fofa." 
Zechariah5:2 Mme a nthaya a re: “O bonang?” Ka mo fetola ka re: “Ke bona lokwalo lo lo menaganyeng lo fofa; boleele jwa lone ke dimetara di le 9, le boatlhamo jwa lone ke dimetara di le 4,5.”" 
Zechariah5:3 Foo a nthaya a re: “E ke yone phutso e e tswelang mo lefatsheng lotlhe; gonne mongwe le mongwe yo o utswang o tlaa kgaolelwa ruri mo go lone ka fa ntlheng e nngwe, ka fa taolong ya lone; mongwe le mongwe yo o ikanang o tlaa kgaolelwa ruri mo go lone, ka fa ntlheng e nngwe ka fa taolong ya lone." 
Zechariah5:4 Ke tlaa dira gore lo tswelele,” go bua Jehofa wa masomosomo, “mme lo tlaa tsena mo ntlong ya legodu, le mo ntlong ya yo o ikanang ka tsietso, ka leina la me; lo tlaa nna mo gare ga ntlo ya gagwe, lo tlaa e nyeletsa ka dikgong tsa yone le ka maje a yone.”" 
Zechariah5:5 Foo moengele yo o buang le nna a tswela kwa ntle, mme a nthaya a re: “A ke o tsholetse matlho, o bone seelo se, se se tswelelang, gore ke eng.”" 
Zechariah5:6 Ka re: “Ke eng?” Mme a re: “Se ke sone seelo se se tswelelang.” Gape a re: “E ke yone tshwano ya bone mo lefatsheng lotlhe.” 
Zechariah5:7 Mme bonang ga tsholediwa moritshana wa lotwe: Mme yo ke mosadi yo o dutseng mo gare ga seelo. 
Zechariah5:8 A re: “Yo ke Boikepo;” mme a mo latlhela mo gare ga seelo; a latlhela moritshana wa lotwe mo molomong wa sone. 
Zechariah5:9 Foo ka tsholetsa matlho, ka leba, mme bonang, ga tswa basadi ba le babedi, mme phefo ya bo e le mo diphukeng tsa bone; jaana ba bo ba na le diphuka tse di etsang tsa mogolori; mme ba tsholetsa seelo fa gare ga lefatshe le legodimo." 
Zechariah5:10 Foo ka raya moengele yo o buang le nna ka re: “Ana batho ba, ba isa kae seelo?”" 
Zechariah5:11 Mme a nthaya a re: “Ba ya go agela mosadi ntlo mo lefatsheng la Šinare; mme e tlaa re e sena go baakanngwa, o tlaa bewa gone mo felong ga gagwe.”" 
Zechariah6:1 Gape ka tsholetsa matlho a me, ka leba, mme bonang, ga tswa dikara di le nne mo gare ga dithaba di le pedi; dithaba tseo e ne e le tsa kgotlho." 
Zechariah6:2 Mo kareng ya ntlha go ne go le dipitse tse dikhunou; mo kareng ya bobedi dipitse tse dintsho. 
Zechariah6:3 Mo kareng ya boraro dipitse tse ditshweu; mme mo kareng ya bone dipitse tse di bowebu jo bohibidu. 
Zechariah6:4 Foo ka bua, ka raya moengele yo o buang le nna ka re: “Dilo tse ke eng, morena wa me?”" 
Zechariah6:5 Moengele a mphetola a re: “Tse ke diphefo tse nne tsa legodimo, tse di tswang kwa go emeng fa pele ga Jehofa wa lefatshe lotlhe." 
Zechariah6:6 Kara ya dipitse tse dintsho e tswela kwa lefatsheng la botsheka; mme tse ditshweu tsa di latela; mme tse dikwebu tsa tswela kwa lefatsheng la borwa.” 
Zechariah6:7 Tse dikhunou tsa tswa tsa leka go tsamaya gore di ye kwa le kwa go ralala lefatshe; mme a re: “Tlogang fa, lo sepelele kwa le kwa lo ralale lefatshe.” Jalo tsa ya kwa le kwa tsa ralala lefatshe." 
Zechariah6:8 Foo a nkua a bua le nna, a re: “Bona tse di tswelang kwa lefatsheng la botsheka di thethebaditse mowa wa me mo lefatsheng la botsheka.”" 
Zechariah6:9 Mme Lefoko la ga Jehofa la tla mo go nna la re: 
Zechariah6:10 “Amogela mo go ba botshwaro, e bong mo go Heletai, le mo go Tobia, le mo go Jetaia; mme o tle ka tsatsi leno fela, o tsene mo ntlong ya ga Josia morwa Sefania, kwa ba gorogetseng teng ba tswa Babilone." 
Zechariah6:11 Ee, o tseye mo go bone selefera le gouta, mme o dire dirwalo, o di beye mo tlhogong ya ga Jošua morwa Jehosatake, moperesiti yo mogolo." 
Zechariah6:12 O bue nae, o re: ‘Go bua jaana Jehofa wa masomosomo, a re: Bonang, monna yo leina la gagwe go tweng, Letlhogela; o tlaa tlhoga mo felong ga gagwe, mme o tlaa aga tempele ya ga Jehofa." 
Zechariah6:13 E leng ene o tlaa aga tempele ya ga Jehofa; mme o tlaa rwala kgalalelo, o tlaa dula a ba a busa mo setulong sa gagwe sa bogosi; o tlaa nna moperesiti mo setulong sa gagwe; mme kgakololo ya kagiso e tlaa nna mo gare ga tsone tsoo pedi.’" 
Zechariah6:14 Dirwalo e nne tsa boHeleme, le Tobia, le Jetaia, le Hene morwa Sefania, go nna segopodiso mo tempeleng ya ga Jehofa." 
Zechariah6:15 “Le ba ba kwa kgakala ba tlaa tla ba aga tempele ya ga Jehofa, mme lo tlaa itse fa Jehofa wa masomosomo a nthomile kwa go lona. Mme seo, se tlaa dirala fa lo ineela go utlwa lentswe la ga Jehofa Modimo wa lona ka tlhoafalo.”" 
Zechariah7:1 Ga dirala e rile ka ngwaga wa bone wa kgosi Dario, lefoko la ga Jehofa la tla kwa go Sekaria ka letsatsi la bone la kgwedi ya bofera o le mongwe, e bong ka Kiselefe." 
Zechariah7:2 Jaana bone ba Bethele ba ne ba romile Sharesere le Regememeleke, le banna ba bone, ba ya go lopa tlhogonolofatso mo go Jehofa." 
Zechariah7:3 Le go bua le baperesiti ba ntlo ya ga Jehofa wa masomosomo, le baperofeti, ba re: “A ke ke lele ka kgwedi ya botlhano, ka itomolola jaaka ke ntse ke dira ka dinyaga tse dintsi tse?”" 
Zechariah7:4 Foo ga tla lefoko la ga Jehofa wa masomosomo mo go nna, la re:" 
Zechariah7:5 “Bua le batho botlhe ba lefatshe le baperesiti, o re: E rile lo ikitsa go ja lo hutsafala ka kgwedi ya botlhano le ka kgwedi ya bosupa, e bong ka dinyaga tse di 70 tse, a lo kile lwa ikitsa go ja ka ntlha ya me, nna, e bong nna?" 
Zechariah7:6 Mogang lo jang le mogang lo nwang, a ga lo ijele fela, a ga lo inwele fela?" 
Zechariah7:7 A ga loa tshwanela go utlwa mafoko a Jehofa o a kuileng ka baperofeti ba pele, jale Jerusalema o sa ntswe ke batho o le mo tlhogonolofalong, le metse ya one mo tikologong, le Borwa le lefatshe la Sekhuti go sa ntse go ntswe gotlhe fela.”" 
Zechariah7:8 Lefoko la ga Jehofa la tla mo go Sekaria la re: 
Zechariah7:9 “Jehofa wa masomosomo o buile jaana, a re: ‘Atlholang ka katlholo ya mmaanete, lo nne boutlwelobotlhoko le pelotlhomogi, mongwe le mongwe mo go ngwana a rraagwe." 
Zechariah7:10 Lo se ka lwa patika mosadi wa motlholagadi, le fa e le masiela, le fa e le moeng, le fa e le mohumanegi; a go se nne ope wa lona yo o gopolelang ngwana a rraagwe bosula mo pelong.’" 
Zechariah7:11 “Mme ba ganne go reetsa, ba kgotha lerudi, ba kaba ditsebe, gore ba se utlwe." 
Zechariah7:12 Ee, ba dirile pelo tsa bone tsa nna jaaka lentswe tshipi, ba re ba ka tla ba utlwa molao, le mafoko a ga Jehofa wa masomosomo o ne a isitse ka mowa wa gagwe ka seatla sa baperofeti ba pele; ke gone ka fa go tsileng bogale jo bogolo ka gone bo tswa kwa go Jehofa wa masomosomo." 
Zechariah7:13 “Ga dirala ya re fela jaaka a ne a kua, mme ba gana go utlwa; le bone ba tlaa kua jalo, mme ke tlaa gana go utlwa,” go bua Jehofa wa masomosomo." 
Zechariah7:14 “Ke tlaa ba hulaoletsa ka setsuatsue mo gare ga merafe e ba iseng ba e itse. Jalo lefatshe la nna tshwafalo morago ga bone, ga ba ga se ka ga ralala motho ope, le fa e le go boa; gonne ba ne ba swafatsa lefatshe le le eletsegang.”" 
Zechariah8:1 Lefoko la ga Jehofa wa masomosomo la tla kwa go nna, la re:" 
Zechariah8:2 “Jehofa wa masomosomo o bua jaana, a re: Ke lefufa ka ga Sione ka lefufa le legolo, ke lefufa ka ga one ka tšararego e kgolo." 
Zechariah8:3 Jehofa o bua jaana a re: Ke boetse mo Sione, ke tlaa aga mo gare ga Jerusalema; mme Jerusalema o tlaa bidiwa Motse wa boammaaruri; le thaba ya ga Jehofa wa masomosomo, Thaba e e boitshepo.”" 
Zechariah8:4 Jehofa wa masomosomo o bua jaana, a re: “Go tlaa nama go nna banna bagolo le basadi bagolo mo mebileng ya Jerusalema, mongwe le mongwe a tshotse seikokotlelo ka ntlha ya botsofe jo bogolo fela." 
Zechariah8:5 Mebila ya motse e tlaa tlala tshimane le tshetsana, ba tshameka mo mebileng ya one.”" 
Zechariah8:6 Jehofa wa masomosomo o bua jaana, a re: “Fa e tlaa bo ne ne e le kgakgamatso mo matlhong a masalela a batho mo metlheng eo, a go ka nna kgakgamatso le mo matlhong a me? Go bua Jehofa wa masomosomo." 
Zechariah8:7 Jehofa wa masomosomo o bua jaana, a re: Bonang, ke tlaa golola batho ba me kwa lefatsheng la botlhabatsatsi le kwa lefatsheng la bophirimatsatsi;" 
Zechariah8:8 ke tlaa ba lere, mme ba tlaa aga mo gare ga Jerusalema; ba tlaa nna batho ba me, le nna ke tlaa nna Modimo wa bone mo boammaaruring le mo tshiamong.”" 
Zechariah8:9 Jehofa wa masomosomo o bua jaana, a re: “A diatla tsa lona di nne thata, lona ba e a reng mo metlheng eno lo utlwa mafoko a mo melomong ya baperofeti, ba e rileng mo motlheng wa fa motheo wa ntlo ya ga Jehofa wa masomosomo o thaiwa, e bong tempele, gore e agiwe, ba bo ba le teng." 
Zechariah8:10 Gonne e rile pele ga metlha eo go ne go se na go thapiwa ga motho ka tuelo, le fa e le go thapiwa ga kgomo; le gone go ne go se na kagiso kwa go ene yo o bololang, le fa e le go yo o gorogang ka ntlha ya moganetsi; gonne ka lotlhanya batho botlhe, mongwe le mongwe le wa ga gabo." 
Zechariah8:11 Mme jaanong ga nketla ke nna mo masaleleng a batho ba jaaka mo metlheng ya pele,” go bua Jehofa wa masomosomo." 
Zechariah8:12 “Gonne go tlaa nna peo ya kagiso; mofine o tlaa ungwa; lefatshe le tlaa ntsha totafalo ya lone, le magodimo a tlaa usa monyo; mme masalela a tšhaba e ke tlaa a ruisa dilo tsotlhe tse." 
Zechariah8:13 Mme go tlaa dirala, go re, jaaka lo ne lo le phutso mo gare ga merafe, lona ba ntlo ya Juta, le ba ntlo ya Iseraele, ke tlaa lo boloka jalo, mme lo tlaa nna tshegofatso; se boifeng, mme a diatla tsa lona di nne thata.”" 
Zechariah8:14 Gonne Jehofa wa masomosomo o bua jaana, a re: “Jaaka ke ne ke gopotse go lo direla bosula, jale ka borraeno ba ntlhotlheletsa bogaleng,” go bua Jehofa wa masomosomo, “mme ke se ka ka ikwatlhaya;" 
Zechariah8:15 jalo fela ke bile ke gopotse mo metlheng eno go direla Jerusalema le ba ntlo ya Juta molemo; lo se ka lwa boifa. 
Zechariah8:16 Dilo tse a e nne tsone tse lo di dirang. A mongwe le mongwe a bue boammaaruri le wa ga gabo; atlholang katlholo ya boammaaruri le kagiso mo dikgotleng tsa lona; 
Zechariah8:17 go se nne ope wa lona yo o gopolang bosula mo pelong ya gagwe ka ga wa ga gabo; lo se ka lwa rata ikano epe ya tsietso; gonne dilo tsotlhe tse ke dilo tse ke di ilang.” Go bua Jehofa. 
Zechariah8:18 Lefoko la ga Jehofa wa masomosomo la tla mo go nna, la re:" 
Zechariah8:19 “Jehofa wa masomosomo o bua jaana, a re: Go ikitsa go ja ka kgwedi ya bone, le go ikitsa go ja ka ya botlhano, le go ikitsa go ja ka ya bosupa, le go ikitsa go ja ka ya lesome, e tlaa nna boitumelo le ipelo mo go ba ntlo ya Juta, le mediro ya tuduetso; ke gone lo rateng boammaaruri le kagiso.”" 
Zechariah8:20 Jehofa wa masomosomo o bua jaana, a re: “Go tlaa nama go dirala go re go tlaa tla ditšhaba, le banni ba metse e le mentsi." 
Zechariah8:21 Banni ba motse mongwe ba tlaa ya kwa go ba o mongwe, ba re: ‘A re itlhaganeleng re yeng go lopa tlhogonolofatso mo go Jehofa, le go batla Jehofa wa masomosomo; le nna ke tlaa ya.’" 
Zechariah8:22 Ee, ditšhaba di le dintsi le merafe e e thata e tlaa tla go batla Jehofa wa masomosomo mo Jerusalema, le go batla tlhogonolofatso ya ga Jehofa.”" 
Zechariah8:23 Jehofa wa masomosomo o bua jaana, a re: “Mo metlheng eo go tlaa dirala go re batho ba le some ba dipuo tsotlhe tsa merafe ba tlaa tshwara, ee, ba tlaa tshwara lokoje lwa yo o leng Mojuta, ba re: ‘Re tlaa ya le lona, gonne re utlwile fa Modimo o ntse le lona.’ ”" 
Zechariah9:1 Molaetso wa lefoko la ga Jehofa ka ga lefatshe la ga Haterake. Damaseko e tlaa nna felo ga boikhutso ga one; gonne leitlho la botho, le la ditso tsotlhe tsa Iseraele le lebile Jehofa;" 
Zechariah9:2 le Hamathe o o bapileng le one; Ture le Sitone ka a le botlhale thata. 
Zechariah9:3 Ture o ne a ikagela kago e e thata ya tlhabanelo, a kokoanya selefera sa nna jaaka lorole, le gouta e e itshekileng ya nna jaaka seretse sa mebila." 
Zechariah9:4 Bonang, Jehofa o tlaa mo ruolola, o tlaa itaya thata ya gagwe mo lewatleng; mme o tlaa lailwa ke molelo." 
Zechariah9:5 Ašekelone o tlaa go bona, a boifa; le ene Gasa, o tlaa nna botlhoko thata; le Ekerone, gonne tebelelo ya gagwe e tlaa tlhajwa ke ditlhong; kgosi e tlaa swa mo Gasa, Ašekelone ga a ketla a nnwa." 
Zechariah9:6 Motho yo o tlhakanyeng losika o tlaa aga mo Ašetote, mme ke tlaa kgaola pelafalo ya Bafilisitia." 
Zechariah9:7 Ke tlaa tlosa madi a gagwe mo ganong la gagwe, le dilo tse di makgapha tsa gagwe mo gare ga meno a gagwe; le ene o tlaa nna lesalela la Modimo wa rona; o tlaa nna jaaka kgosana mo Juta, le Ekerone jaaka Mojebuse." 
Zechariah9:8 Mme ke tlaa nnela ntlo ya me seduledi mo tikologong, go tlhabana le ntwa, gore go se nne ope yo o fetang le fa e le yo o bowang; ga ba ketla ba ralalwa ke mopatiki ope gope; gonne jaanong ke bonye ka matlho a me." 
Zechariah9:9 Itumele thata, wena morwadia Sione; thela lošalaba wena morwadia Jerusalema; bona, kgosi ya gago e etla kwa go wena; o tshiamo, o na le poloka, o boikokobetso, o palame esela, e bong eselana ngwana wa esela." 
Zechariah9:10 Ke tlaa kgaola kara ya tlhabano mo Eferaime, le pitse mo Jerusalema, le bora jwa tlhabano bo tlaa kgaolwa; o tlaa bua kagiso le merafe, mme puso ya gagwe, e tlaa tswa lewatleng lengwe e ya lewatleng le lengwe, e tlaa tswa Nokeng e ye go fitlha kwa dikhutlong tsa lefatshe." 
Zechariah9:11 Ka ga gago le wena, ka ntlha ya madi a kgolagano, ke ntshitse bagolegwi ba gago mo mokoleng o go se nang metsi mo go one." 
Zechariah9:12 Retologelang kwa kagong e e thata ya tlhabanelo lona bagolegwi ba tsholofelo; le gompieno ke a itlhomamisa go re ke tlaa go duela sebedi. 
Zechariah9:13 Gonne ke itaeleditse Juta, ke tladitse bora ka Eferaime; mme ke tlaa tlhotlheletsa bomorwao, wena, Sione, ke tlaa ba tlhotlheletsa bomorwao, wena Gerika, ke tlaa go dira jaaka tšhaka ya seganka." 
Zechariah9:14 Jehofa o tlaa bonwa godimo ga bone, le motswi wa gagwe o tlaa hulega jaaka logadima; Jehofa Modimo o tlaa letsa lonaka, o tlaa tsamaya ka ditsuatsue tsa borwa." 
Zechariah9:15 Jehofa wa masomosomo o tlaa ba femela; mme ba tlaa jela ruri, ba tlaa gataka maje a motsekedi, mme ba tlaa nwa, ba tlaa tsosa modumo jaaka e ka bo e le ka bojalwa; ba tlaa tlala jaaka megopo, jaaka dikgokgotsho tsa sebeso." 
Zechariah9:16 Jehofa Modimo wa bone o tlaa ba boloka mo motlheng oo jaaka letsomane la batho ba gagwe; gonne ba tlaa nna jaaka majana a serwalo sa bogosi se se tsholeditsweng godimo ga tlhogo ya gagwe. 
Zechariah9:17 Gonne molemo wa gagwe o mogolo jang! Bontle jwa gagwe bo bogolo jang! Mabele a tlaa itumedisa makau, le bojalwa jo boša barweetsana." 
Zechariah10:1 Lopang Jehofa pula mo motlheng wa pula ya morago; e bong Jehofa yo o dirang dikgadima; mme o tlaa ba nesetsa dipula tsa medupe, a neye mongwe le mongwe bojang mo nageng." 
Zechariah10:2 Gonne mereo e buile boithamako, le baitseanape ba bonye maaka; ba boletse ditoro tsa tsietso, ba gomotsa ka lefela; ke gone ka moo ba tsayang tsela ya bone jaaka dinku, ba patikegile, ka gobo go se na modisa." 
Zechariah10:3 “Bogale jwa me bo tuketse badisa, mme ke tlaa kgopholola diphoko”; gonne Jehofa wa masomosomo o lekotse letsomane la gagwe la ba ntlo ya Juta, mme o tlaa ba dira jaaka pitse ya gagwe e ntle mo tlhabanong." 
Zechariah10:4 Lentswe la kgokgotsho le tlaa tswa mo go ene, le lomapo mo go ene, le bora jwa tlhabano mo go ene, le molaodi mongwe le mongwe o tlaa tswa mo go ene." 
Zechariah10:5 Ba tlaa nna jaaka diganka, ba gatakela baba ba bone mo seretseng sa mebila mo tlhabanong; ba tlaa tlhabana ka go bo Jehofa a na nabo; bapalami ba dipitse ba tlaa sosobaganngwa." 
Zechariah10:6 “Ke tlaa thatafatsa ba ntlo ya ga Juta, ke tlaa boloka ba ntlo ya ga Josefe, ke tlaa ba lere gape, gonne ke ba utlwela botlhoko; mme ba tlaa nna jaaka e kete ga ke a ba latlha; gonne ke Jehofa Modimo wa bone, ke tlaa ba utlwa." 
Zechariah10:7 Le bone ba Eferaime ba tlaa nna jaaka seganka, pelo ya bone e tlaa itumela jaaka e ka bo e le ka bojalwa. Ee, bana ba bone ba tlaa go bona ba itumela, pelo ya bone e tlaa ipela mo go Jehofa." 
Zechariah10:8 Ke tlaa ba bitsa ka kotso, ke ba phutha; gonne ke ba rekolotse; ba tlaa ntsifala jaaka ba ntse ba ntsifetse." 
Zechariah10:9 Ke tlaa ba jalela kwa ditšhabeng; mme ba tlaa nkgakologelwa kwa mafatsheng a a kwa kgakala; ba tlaa tshela le bana ba bone, mme ba tlaa boa." 
Zechariah10:10 Ke tlaa ba ke ba busa le kwa lefatsheng la Egepeto, ke ba phutha kwa Asiria; ke tlaa ba lere mo lefatsheng la Gileate le Lebanone; mme ga ba ketla ba bonelwa bonno." 
Zechariah10:11 O tlaa ralala lewatle la patikego, o tlaa itaya makhubu a metsi mo lewatleng, mme mateng otlhe a noka ya Nile a tlaa tšha; le boikgodiso jwa Asiria bo tlaa kokobediwa, le thobane ya bogosi ya Egepeto e tlaa tsamaya." 
Zechariah10:12 Ke tlaa ba thatafatsa mo go Jehofa; mme ba tlaa sepelela kwa le kwa ka leina la gagwe,” go bua Jehofa." 
Zechariah11:1 Bula dikgoro tsa gago, wena Lebanone, gore molelo o tle o laile masetara a gago." 
Zechariah11:2 Bokolela, wena setlhare sa mofira, gonne mosetara o ole, gonne tse dintle di sentswe; bokolelang lona maoka a Bašane, gonne sekgwa se se thata se fologile." 
Zechariah11:3 A kodu ya pokolelo ya badisa! Gonne kgalalelo ya bone e sentswe; a kodu ya go duma ga ditau! Gonne boikgodiso jwa Joretane bo sentswe. 
Zechariah11:4 Jehofa Modimo wa me o bua jaana, a re: “Fudisang letsomane la tlhabo;" 
Zechariah11:5 le barui ba lone ba le tlhabang, mme ba ikaya ba se molato; le ba ba di rekisang, ba re: ‘A go bakweng Jehofa, gonne ke humile’; badisa ba tsone tota ga ba di tlhomogele pelo." 
Zechariah11:6 “Gonne ga nketla ke tlhola ke tlhomogela banni ba lefatshe pelo,” go bua Jehofa; “mme bonang, ke tlaa tsenya mongwe le mongwe mo seatleng sa wa ga gabo, le mo seatleng sa kgosi ya gagwe; mme ba tlaa itaya lefatshe, mme ga nketla ke ba golola mo seatleng sa bone.”" 
Zechariah11:7 Jalo ka fudisa letsomane la tlhabo, ee, ruri tse di malolo tsa letsomane. Ka itseela dithobane di le pedi; nngwe ka e raya leina ka re: “Bontle,” e nngwe ka e raya leina ka re: “Diphapo”; mme ka fudisa letsomane." 
Zechariah11:8 Ka kgaola badisa boo bararo ka kgwedi e le nngwe fela; gonne mowa wa me o ne o lapile ka bone, le mowa wa bone o ne wa nkila." 
Zechariah11:9 Foo ka re: “Ga nketla ke lo fudisa; se se swang, a se swe; se se laoletsweng go kgaolwa a se kgaolwe; mme mo go tse di setseng a nngwe le nngwe e je nama ya e nngwe fela.”" 
Zechariah11:10 Mme ka tsaya thobane ya me, e bong Bontle, ka e pomaganya ka bogare, gore ke tle ke senye kgolagano ya me e ke e dirileng le ditšhaba tsotlhe." 
Zechariah11:11 Mme ya rojwa ka tsatsi leo; jalo tse di malolo tsa letsomane tse di ntlhokometseng tsa itse fa e ne e le lefoko la ga Jehofa. 
Zechariah11:12 Ka ba raya ka re: “Fa go le molemo mo go lona, lo nneye tuelo ya me; mme fa go sa nna jalo, lo ka lesa. Mme ba lekanya dipapetlana tsa selefera di le 30, e le tuelo ya me.”" 
Zechariah11:13 Mme Jehofa a nthaya, a re: “E latlhele mmopi wa dipitsa, e bong tlhwatlhwa e e molemo e ke e sekaseketsweng tlhwatlhwa ke bone.” Ka tsaya dipapetlana tsa selefera tse di 30, ka di latlhela mmopi wa dipitsa, mo ntlong ya ga Jehofa." 
Zechariah11:14 Foo ka pomaganya thobane ya me e nngwe ka bogare, e bong Diphapo, gore ke tle ke senye bokaulengwe gare ga Juta le Iseraele." 
Zechariah11:15 Mme Jehofa a nthaya, a re: “Itseele gape dilo tsa modisa yo o seeleele." 
Zechariah11:16 Gonne bona, ke tlaa tsosa modisa mo lefatsheng yo o se ketlang a lekola tsone tse di kgaotsweng, le fa e le go batla tsone tse di faletseng, le fa e le go alafa tse di robegileng; le gone ga a ketla a fudisa tsone tse di itekanetseng, mme o tlaa ja nama ya tse di nonneng, a gagoganye ditlhako tsa tsone." 
Zechariah11:17 A bo go latlhega modisa yo o se nang molemo, yo o tlogelang letsomane! Tšhaka e tlaa nna mo letsogong la gagwe le mo leitlhong la gagwe le legolo; letsogo la gagwe le tlaa omelelela ruri, leitlho la gagwe le legolo le tlaa fifalela ruri.”" 
Zechariah12:1 Molaetso wa lefoko la Jehofa ka ga Iseraele. Go bua jaana Jehofa, yo o phuthololang magodimo, yo o thayang motheo wa lefatshe, le yo o bopang mowa wa motho mo teng ga gagwe, a re:" 
Zechariah12:2 “Bonang, ke tlaa dira Jerusalema gore o nne senwelo sa theeketso mo ditšhabeng tsotlhe tikologong, le mo go ene Juta se tlaa nna mo tlhaselong ya Jerusalema." 
Zechariah12:3 Go tlaa dirala ka letsatsi leo, go re, ke tlaa dira Jerusalema lentswe le le imelang mo ditšhabeng tsotlhe; botlhe ba ba itapisang ka lone ba tlaa ntshiwa dintho tse di botlhoko; merafe yotlhe ya lefatshe e tlaa o phuthegela go o tlhasela." 
Zechariah12:4 Mo motlheng oo, go bua Jehofa, ke tlaa itaya pitse nngwe le nngwe ka kgakgamalo, le mopalami wa yone ka botsenwa; ke tlaa budulogela ntlo ya Juta matlho, ke tlaa itaya dipitse tsotlhe tsa ditšhaba ka bofofu." 
Zechariah12:5 Bagolwane ba Juta ba tlaa bua mo pelong, ba re: ‘Banni ba Jerusalema ke thata ya me mo go Jehofa wa masomosomo, Modimo wa bone.’" 
Zechariah12:6 “Mo motlheng oo ke tlaa dira bagolwane ba Juta ba nna jaaka leiso la molelo mo gare ga dikgong, le jaaka setime sa molelo mo gare ga dingata tsa mabele; mme ba tlaa laila ditšhaba tsotlhe mo tikologong, ka fa ntlheng ya letsogo le legolo, le ka fa ntlheng ya la molema; mme Jerusalema o tlaa ba a aga gape mo felong ga gagwe, e leng mo Jerusalema." 
Zechariah12:7 “Jehofa le ene o tlaa boloka megope ya Juta pele, gore kgalalelo ya ba ntlo ya ga Dafite le kgalalelo ya banni ba Jerusalema e se ka ya golediwa godimo ga Juta." 
Zechariah12:8 Mo motlheng oo Jehofa o tlaa femela banni ba Jerusalema; mme yo o dibobo mo go bone mo motlheng oo, o tlaa nna jaaka Dafite; le ntlo ya ga Dafite e tlaa nna jaaka Modimo, jaaka moengele wa ga Jehofa fa pele ga bone." 
Zechariah12:9 Go tlaa dirala mo motlheng oo, go re, ke tlaa batla go senya merafe yotlhe e e tlaa tlang go tlhasela Jerusalema." 
Zechariah12:10 “Mo go ba ntlo ya ga Dafite, le mo banning ba Jerusalema, ke tlaa gorometsa mowa wa tshegofatso le wa thapelo; ba tlaa leba nna yo ba ntlhabileng, mme ba tlaa mo lelela jaaka motho a tle a lelele morwawe yo o esi, ba tlaa nna pelo e e galakegang ka ga gagwe, jaaka motho a tle a galakegele ngwana wa gagwe wa motsalwapele pelo." 
Zechariah12:11 Mo motlheng oo go tlaa nna selelo se segolo mo Jerusalema, jaaka selelo sa Hatatarimone mo molapong wa Megitone." 
Zechariah12:12 Lefatshe le tlaa lela, losika longwe le longwe lo le losi; losika lwa ba ntlo ya ga Dafite lo le losi, le basadi ba bone ba le bosi; losika lwa ba ntlo ya ga Nathane lo le losi, le basadi ba bone ba le bosi;" 
Zechariah12:13 losika lwa ba ntlo ya ga Lefi lo le losi, le basadi ba bone ba le bosi; losika lwa Basimea ba le bosi, le basadi ba bone ba le bosi;" 
Zechariah12:14 ditshika tsotlhe tse di setseng, losika longwe le longwe lo le losi, le basadi ba bone ba le bosi." 
Zechariah13:1 “Mo motlheng oo motswedi o tlaa phunyediwa ba ntlo ya ga Dafite le banni ba Jerusalema, o o tlosang boleo le o o tlosang boitshekologo." 
Zechariah13:2 “Go tlaa dirala mo motlheng oo,” go bua Jehofa wa masomosomo, “go re, ke tlaa kgaola maina a medimo ya disetwa a tswa mo lefatsheng, ga a ketla a tlhola a gakologelwa; gape, ke tlaa dira gore baperofeti le ba mowa o o maswe ba tswe mo lefatsheng." 
Zechariah13:3 Go tlaa dirala go re e tlaa re fa mongwe a sa ntse a tlaa perofesa, foo rraagwe le mmaagwe ba ba mo tsetseng ba tlaa mo raya, ba re: ‘Ga o ketla o tshela; gonne o bua maaka ka leina la ga Jehofa;’ mme rraagwe le mmaagwe ba ba mo tsetseng, ba tlaa mo phololetsa mogang o perofesang." 
Zechariah13:4 “Go tlaa dirala mo motlheng oo, go re, baperofeti, mongwe le mongwe wa bone, o tlaa tlhajwa ke ditlhong ka ga ponatshegelo ya gagwe, mogang o perofesang, le gone ga ba ketla ba apara kobo e e bobowa go tsietsa." 
Zechariah13:5 Mme o tlaa re: ‘Ga ke moperofeti wa sepe, ke molemi fela wa mmu, gonne e sa le ke le lekau, ka dirwa motlhanka.’" 
Zechariah13:6 Mongwe o tlaa mo raya a re: ‘Dintho tse ke dife tse di mo mabogong a gago?’ Foo o tlaa fetola a re: ‘Ke tse ke di ntshitsweng mo ntlong ya ditsala tsa me.’ 
Zechariah13:7 “Kubuga wena tšhaka, o kubugele modisa wa me, le motho yo e leng monkana wa me,” go bua Jehofa wa masomosomo; “Itaya modisa, mme dinku di tlaa faladiwa; seatla sa me ke tlaa se retololela mo go tse dipotlana." 
Zechariah13:8 Go tlaa dirala go re, mo lefatsheng lotlhe, go bua Jehofa, dintlha di le pedi di tlaa kgaolwa di swa; mme ya boraro e tlaa tlogelwa mo go lone." 
Zechariah13:9 Kgaogano ya boraro ke tlaa e ralatsa molelo, ke tlaa ba itshekisa jaaka selefera se tle se itshekisiwe, ke tlaa ba leka jaaka gouta e tle e lekwe, ba tlaa bitsa leina la me, mme ke tlaa ba utlwa; ke tlaa re: ‘Ke batho ba me;’ le bone ba tlaa re: ‘Jehofa ke Modimo wa me.’ ”" 
Zechariah14:1 Go tla motlha mongwe wa ga Jehofa, mogang thopo ya gago e tlaa kgaoganngwang mo gare ga gago." 
Zechariah14:2 “Gonne ke tlaa phuthela merafe yotlhe kwa Jerusalema, e tla go tlhabana nao; motse o tlaa gapiwa le matlo a tlaa hukudiwa, basadi ba tlaa betelelwa ka thata; bontlhanngwe jwa motse bo tlaa ya botshwarong, mme masalela a batho ga a ketla a kgaolwa mo motseng.”" 
Zechariah14:3 Foo Jehofa o tlaa bolola a ya go tlhabana le merafe eo, jaaka jale a kile a tlhabana mo motlheng wa tlhabano." 
Zechariah14:4 Mo motlheng oo dinao tsa gagwe di tlaa ema mo thabeng ya Matlhware e e lebaganyeng le Jerusalema, ka fa ntlheng ya botlhabatsatsi, mme Thaba ya Matlhware e tlaa fatogana ka bogare bolebana le botlhabatsatsi le bophirimatsatsi, mme go tlaa nna mogogoro o mogolo; bontlhanngwe jwa thaba bo tlaa sutela ntlheng ya botsheka, le bontlhanngwe ntlheng ya borwa." 
Zechariah14:5 Lo tlaa tshaba le mogogoro wa dithaba tsa me; gonne mogogoro wa dithaba o tlaa ditlha kwa Asale; ee, lo tlaa tshaba jaaka lo kile lwa tshaba fa pele ga thoromo ya lefatshe mo metlheng ya ga Usia kgosi ya Juta; mme Jehofa Modimo wa me o tlaa tla, le baitshepi botlhe nao." 
Zechariah14:6 Go tlaa dirala mo motlheng oo, go re, lesedi ga le ketla le nna ka phatsimo le ka lotobo;" 
Zechariah14:7 mme e tlaa nna letsatsi le le lengwe fela le le itsiweng ke Jehofa; e seng motshegare, le e seng bosigo; mme go tlaa dirala, go re, e re ka lotlatlana lwa maitsebowa go tlaa bo go le lesedi." 
Zechariah14:8 Go tlaa dirala mo motlheng oo, go re, metsi a a tshedileng a tlaa tswa mo Jerusalema; bontlhanngwe jwa one bo tlaa leba lewatle la botlhabatsatsi, le bontlhanngwe jwa one bo lebe lewatle la bophirimatsatsi; go tlaa nna jalo selemo le mariga." 
Zechariah14:9 Jehofa o tlaa nna kgosi ya lefatshe lotlhe; mo motlheng oo, o tlaa nna mongwe fela, le leina la gagwe lengwe fela." 
Zechariah14:10 Lefatshe le tlaa fetolwa le nna jaaka Araba, go tswa Geba go ya Rimona, go pota Jerusalema ntlheng ya borwa; mme o tlaa tsholediwa, o tlaa aga mo felong ga gagwe, go tswa kgorong ya ga Benjamine, go ya felong ga kgoro ya ntlha, go ya kgorong ya kgokgotsho, le go tswa kagong e e godileng ya ga Hananele go ya dikgatisetsong tsa kgosi." 
Zechariah14:11 Batho ba tlaa aga mo go one, mme ga go ketla go nna phutso epe; mme Jerusalema o tlaa nna mo polokegong." 
Zechariah14:12 E ke yone petso e Jehofa o tlaa betsang ka yone ditšhaba tsotlhe tse di tlhabanyeng le Jerusalema; nama ya bone e tlaa jega ba sa ntse ba eme ka dinao, matlho a bone a tlaa jega mo kgapeng tsa one, le loleme lwa bone lo tlaa jega mo melomong ya bone." 
Zechariah14:13 Go tlaa dirala mo motlheng oo, go re, go tlaa nna pheretlho e kgolo, mo go bone, e e tswang kwa go Jehofa; mongwe le mongwe o tlaa tshwara wa ga gabo ka letsogo, mme letsogo la gagwe le tlaa tsogela letsogo la wa ga gabo." 
Zechariah14:14 Le Juta o tlaa tlhabana kwa Jerusalema; mme khumo ya merafe yotlhe mo tikologong e tlaa phuthwa: gouta, selefera, le diaparo ka letlotlo le legolo." 
Zechariah14:15 Mme petso ya pitse e tlaa nna jalo, ya mmoulo, ya kamela, ya esela, le ya ditshedi tsotlhe tse di tlaa bong di le mo mathibelelong ao, e tlaa nna jaaka petso e." 
Zechariah14:16 Go tlaa dirala go re, mongwe le mongwe yo o setseng wa merafe yotlhe e e neng e tsile go tlhasela Jerusalema, o tlaa ya ka ngwaga le ngwaga go obamela Kgosi, Jehofa wa masomosomo, le go dira modiro wa diobo." 
Zechariah14:17 Go tlaa dirala, go re, le fa e le mang wa ditshika tsa lefatshe yo o sa tlhatlogelang kwa Jerusalema a ya go obamela Kgosi, Jehofa wa masomosomo, ga go ketla go nna pula mo ga bone." 
Zechariah14:18 Fa losika lwa Egepeto lo sa tlhatloge, mme ba sa tle, le mo go bone ga e ketla e na; go tlaa nna sebetso se Jehofa o tlaa betsang ka sone merafe e e sa yeng go dira modiro wa diobo." 
Zechariah14:19 E tlaa nna yone petso ya Egepeto, le petso ya merafe yotlhe e e sa yeng go dira modiro wa diobo." 
Zechariah14:20 Mo motlheng oo go tlaa kwalwa mo dikolokwaneng tsa dipitse go twe: BOITSHEPELO JEHOFA; le dipitsa mo ntlong ya ga Jehofa di tlaa tshwana le megopo e e fa pele ga sebeso. 
Zechariah14:21 Ee, dipitsa tsotlhe tse di mo Jerusalema, le tse di mo Juta, di tlaa nna boitshepelo Jehofa wa masomosomo; mme botlhe ba ba isang setlhabelo ba tlaa tla ba tsaya ga tsone, ba apaya ka tsone; mme mo motlheng oo ga go ketla go tlhola go nna le Mokanana mo ntlong ya ga Jehofa wa masomosomo." 
Malachi1:1 Molaetso wa lefoko la ga Jehofa mo go Iseraele ka Malaki. 
Malachi1:2 “Ke lo ratile,” go bua Jehofa. Le fa go ntse jalo, lo a tle lo re: “O re ratile mo go eng?” “A Esau e ne e se ngwana wa ga rraagwe Jakobe?” Go bua Jehofa. “Le fa go ntse jalo ka rata Jakobe." 
Malachi1:3 Esau ene ka mo ila, ka dira dithaba tsa gagwe tshwafalo, ka naya bophokoje ba naga boswa jwa gagwe.”" 
Malachi1:4 E re ka boo ra Etome ba re: “Re humanegisitswe, mme re tlaa bowa, re tlaa aga mafelo a a senyegileng;” Jehofa wa masomosomo o bua jaana, a re: “Ba tlaa aga, mme nna ke tlaa rutla;” a re: “Batho ba tlaa ba raya leina ba re: Molelwane wa boikepo, le gone, tšhaba e Jehofa o leng bogale nayo ka bosakhutleng.”" 
Malachi1:5 Matlho a lona a tlaa bona, mme lo tlaa re: “A Jehofa a godisiwe kwa moseja ga molelwane wa Iseraele!”" 
Malachi1:6 “Ngwana wa mosimane o tle a tlotle rraagwe, le motlhanka mong wa gagwe; mme fa ke le rra batho, tlotlo ya me e kae? Fa ke le mong wa batho, go mpoifa go kae? Go bua Jehofa wa masomosomo, a raya lona baperesiti ba lo nyatsang leina la me. Mme lo a tle lo re: ‘Ana re nyaditse leina la gago mo go eng?’" 
Malachi1:7 Lo isa senkgwe se se itshekolotsweng mo sebesong sa me. Lo re: ‘Re go itshekolotse mo go eng?’ Ke ka lo tle lo re: Lomati lwa ga Jehofa lwa bojelo lo nyatsegile. 
Malachi1:8 Mogang lo isang setlhabelo ka se se foufetseng, lo tle lo re: Ga se bosula bope! Fa lo isa setlhabelo ka se se tlhotsang le se se lwalang, lo tle lo re: Ga se bosula bope! A lo ko lo ye go se naya molaodi; a o tlaa go itumelela, kgotsa a o tlaa amogela sebele sa gago?” Go bua Jehofa wa masomosomo." 
Malachi1:9 “Jaana ke a lo rapela, lo lope tlhogonolofatso ya Modimo, gore o tle o nne pelotshweu mo go rona: Se, ke se se diretseng ka lona, a o tlaa amogela bangwe ba lona?” Go bua Jehofa wa masomosomo." 
Malachi1:10 “Ke rata jang go bo go na le mongwe mo go lona yo o ka tswalang mejako, gore lo se gotse molelo mo sebesong sa me ka lefela! Ga ke na kgatlhego mo go lona.” Go bua Jehofa wa masomosomo. “Mme ga nketla ke amogela tshupelo mo seatleng sa lona." 
Malachi1:11 Gonne go tswa botlhabatsatsi go ya fela phirimong ya lone, leina la me le legolo mo Merafeng; mme mo felong gongwe le gongwe maswalo a isediwa leina la me, le tshupelo e e itshekileng; gonne leina la me le legolo mo merafeng.” Go bua Jehofa wa masomosomo." 
Malachi1:12 “Mme lona lo le tlhapaditse, ka lo re: ‘Lojelo lwa ga Jehofa lo itshekologile,’ le loungo lwa lone, e bong dijo tsa gagwe: ‘Di nyatsegile.’" 
Malachi1:13 Gape lo a tle lo re: ‘Bonang, ke letsapa le legolo jang!’ Mme lo le dupeletse fela,” go bua Jehofa wa masomosomo. “Lo lerile se se gapilweng ka thata, le se se tlhotsang, le se se lwalang; lo lere tshupelo jalo. A ke tshwanetse go amogela se mo seatleng sa lona?” Go bua Jehofa." 
Malachi1:14 “A go hutsege motsietsi yo o nang le e tona mo letsomaneng la gagwe, mme a ikane, a isetse Jehofa setlhabelo ka sengwe se se nang le bogole. Gonne ke Kgosi e Kgolo, go bua Jehofa wa masomosomo, mme leina la me le a boitshega mo merafeng.”" 
Malachi2:1 “Jaana lona baperesiti, taolo e, ke e e laoletsweng lona." 
Malachi2:2 Fa lo gana go utlwa, mme lo gana go e tsaya ka pelo, go tla lo galaletsa leina la me,” go bua Jehofa wa masomosomo, “foo ke tlaa lo tsosetsa phutso, mme ke tlaa hutsa matshego a lona. Ee, ke setse ke a hutsitse le gompieno, ka lo sa tseye ka pelo." 
Malachi2:3 “Ke tlaa kgalemela peo ka ntlha ya lona, ke tlaa matha moswang mo difatlhogong tsa lona; e bong moswang wa ditlhabelo tsa lona; mme lo tlaa tlosiwa nao." 
Malachi2:4 Lo tlaa itse fa ke romile taolo e mo go lona, gore kgolagano ya me e tle e nne le Lefi.” Go bua Jehofa wa masomosomo." 
Malachi2:5 “Kgolagano ya me nae e ne e le ya botshelo le kagiso; mme ka di mo naya gore a tle a boife; mme a mpoifa, a sisimoga leina la me."
